Genesis1:1 Dongh cor Tin-Hungh zeix lungh zeix ndau.
Genesis1:2 Baamh gen maiv maaih haaix nyungc mou zeiv
Genesis1:3 Tin-Hungh gorngv
Genesis1:4 Tin-Hungh buatc njang se longx nyei
Genesis1:5 Njang ninh heuc “lungh hnoi zanc.” Hmuangx aeqv
Genesis1:6 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:7 Tin-Hungh ziouc zeix cuotv wuov nyungc ga'naaiv daaih bun nqoi wuom. Maaih deix yiem wuov nyungc ga'naaiv gu'nguaaic. Maaih deix yiem ga'ndiev. Ziouc za'gengh hnangv naaic.
Genesis1:8 Wuov nyungc ga'naaiv Tin-Hungh heuc “lungh.” Maaih lungh hmuangx yaac maaih lungh ndorm. Naaiv se da'nyeic hnoi.
Genesis1:9 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:10 Maiv maaih wuom nyei dorngx
Genesis1:11 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:12 Ndau cuotv miev
Genesis1:13 Maaih lungh hmuangx yaac maaih lungh ndorm. Naaiv se da'faam hnoi.
Genesis1:14 Tin-Hungh gorngv
Genesis1:15 Naaiv deix njang oix zuqc yiem gu'nguaaic lungh ziux lungh ndiev njang.” Ziouc za'gengh maaih aqv.
Genesis1:16 Tin-Hungh zeix cuotv i norm domh njang daaih. Hlo wuov norm ninh bun gunv lungh hnoi zanc. Faix wuov norm gunv lungh muonz zanc. Ninh aengx zeix hleix cuotv daaih.
Genesis1:17 Ninh bun naaiv deix njang yiem wuov lungh ziux njang ga'ndiev ndau
Genesis1:18 gunv lungh hnoi gunv lungh muonz
Genesis1:19 Maaih lungh hmuangx yaac maaih lungh ndorm. Naaiv se da'feix hnoi.
Genesis1:20 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:21 Tin-Hungh ziouc zeix cuotv yiem koiv hlo haic nyei domh mbiauz caux nyungc-nyungc yiem wuom maaih maengc nyei
Genesis1:22 Tin-Hungh buang waac bun naaiv deix yietc zungv ga'naaiv. Ninh gorngv
Genesis1:23 Maaih lungh hmuangx yaac maaih lungh ndorm. Naaiv se da'hmz hnoi.
Genesis1:24 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:25 Tin-Hungh zeix cuotv hieh zoih caux saeng-kuv
Genesis1:26 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:27 Tin-Hungh ziouc ziux ninh ganh nyei fangx zeiv zeix cuotv baamh mienh
Genesis1:28 Tin-Hungh buang waac bun ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv
Genesis1:29 Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis1:30 Yiem ndau-beih nyei saeng-kuv hieh zoih
Genesis1:31 Tin-Hungh mangc ninh zeix daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv
Genesis2:1 Lungh ndau caux maanc muotc hnangv naaiv nor zeix ziangx nzengc aqv.
Genesis2:2 Taux da'cietv hnoi Tin-Hungh zoux ziangx ninh zoux nyei gong. Da'cietv hnoi ninh ziouc dingh gong hitv kuonx.
Genesis2:3 Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv da'cietv hnoi
Genesis2:4 Zeix lungh zeix ndau nyei jauv-louc se hnangv naaiv. Ziouv Tin-Hungh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc
Genesis2:5 ndau maiv gaengh maaih haaix nyungc miev ndiangx. Maiv gaengh maaih haaix nyungc ga'naaiv-nyim guqc nyaah cuotv
Genesis2:6 Kungx maaih wuom yiem ndau-ndiev saamx cuotv daaih bun ndau ndorn gormx nzengc hnangv.
Genesis2:7 Ziouv Tin-Hungh aengx zorqv deix nie-mbung nanv cuotv dauh mienh daaih yaac biomv maaih maengc nyei qiex bieqc ninh nyei mba'zorng. Ninh ziouc benx maaih maengc nyei mienh aqv.
Genesis2:8 Ziouv Tin-Hungh ziouc yiem dong bung
Genesis2:9 Ziouv Tin-Hungh yaac bun nyungc-nyungc ndiangx yiem ndau cuotv daaih nzueic nyei
Genesis2:10 E^nden Deic-Bung maaih diuh ndaaih liouc bieqc mingh yungz wuov norm huingx. Cuotv ziqc E^nden wuov diuh ndaaih ziouc bun zoux biei caax mi'aqv.
Genesis2:11 Da'yietv caax heuc Bison Ndaaih
Genesis2:12 (Wuov norm deic-bung nyei jiem zien haic. Aengx maaih nyungc ndiangx-zung ndaang haic caux nyungc jaaix haic nyei la'bieiv-siqv nzueic nyei.)
Genesis2:13 Da'nyeic caax heuc Gi^hon Ndaaih
Genesis2:14 Da'faam caax heuc Taigitc Ndaaih
Genesis2:15 Ziouv Tin-Hungh ziouc bun ninh zeix daaih wuov laanh mienh yiem E^nden Huingx
Genesis2:16 Ziouv hatc ninh
Genesis2:17 Mv baac bun mienh hiuv duqv longx hiuv duqv ciouv wuov zungh
Genesis2:18 Ziouv Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis2:19 Ziouv Tin-Hungh ziouc zorqv deix nie daaih nanv nyungc-nyungc yiem ndau nyei saeng-kuv hieh zoih caux nyungc-nyungc yiem ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc
Genesis2:20 Naaiv laanh mienh tengx cuotv nzoih nyungc-nyungc saeng-kuv nyei mbuox caux yiem ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc caux yietc zungv yiem lomc nyei hieh zoih nyei mbuox
Genesis2:21 Ziouv Tin-Hungh ziouc bun wuov dauh mienh bueix m'njormh ndo nyei. M'njormh mingh wuov zanc
Genesis2:22 Ziouv Tin-Hungh longc yiem m'jangc dorn zorqv cuotv wuov diuh la'saengx mbungv zoux benx dauh m'sieqv dorn
Genesis2:23 Wuov dauh m'jangc dorn ziouc gorngv
Genesis2:24 Weic naaiv m'jangc dorn dorng jaa
Genesis2:25 Naaiv dauh m'jangc dorn caux ninh nyei auv laengh gaengv nyei yiem mv baac laanh maiv nyaiv laanh.
Genesis3:1 Ziouv Tin-Hungh zeix daaih nyei yietc zungv lomc zaangc ga'naaiv se naang gauh guaix jiex. Naang naaic gaax wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Genesis3:2 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn dau naang
Genesis3:3 Mv baac Tin-Hungh gorngv
Genesis3:4 Naang gorngv mbuox m'sieqv dorn
Genesis3:5 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyanc liuz
Genesis3:6 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn mangc buatc wuov zungh biouv nzueic nyei
Genesis3:7 Ninh mbuo nyanc liuz
Genesis3:8 Wuov hnoi
Genesis3:9 Mv baac Ziouv Tin-Hungh heuc wuov dauh m'jangc dorn
Genesis3:10 Wuov dauh m'jangc dorn dau
Genesis3:11 Tin-Hungh naaic gaax
Genesis3:12 Wuov dauh m'jangc dorn dau
Genesis3:13 Ziouv Tin-Hungh naaic gaax wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Genesis3:14 Ziouv Tin-Hungh mbuox wuov diuh naang
Genesis3:15 Yie oix bun meih caux naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn daav win
Genesis3:16 Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Genesis3:17 Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv mbuox Aa^ndam
Genesis3:18 Ndau oix weic meih cuotv miev cuotv njimv. Meih yaac oix zuqc nyanc yiem ndau cuotv nyei lai-miev.
Genesis3:19 Meih oix zuqc zoux gong kouv cuotv ziex sin hanc wuov deix ndau cingx daaih haih cuotv deix ga'naaiv. Zoux taux meih aengx nzuonx benx nie
Genesis3:20 Aa^ndam tengx ninh nyei auv cuotv mbuox heuc Haawaa
Genesis3:21 Ziouv Tin-Hungh longc saeng-kuv nyei ndopv zoux lui-houx bun Aa^ndam caux ninh nyei auv
Genesis3:22 Ziouv Tin-Hungh aengx gorngv
Genesis3:23 Ziouv Tin-Hungh ziouc zunc ninh cuotv E^nden Huingx yaac bun ninh zoux liangx-ndeic yiem Tin-Hungh longc nanv ninh daaih wuov deix nie.
Genesis3:24 Ziouv zunc ninh cuotv liuz
Genesis4:1 Aa^ndam caux ninh nyei auv
Genesis4:2 Nqa'haav ninh aengx yungz Kaa^in nyei youz
Genesis4:3 Jiex daaih
Genesis4:4 Aa^mbaen dorh deix yiem ninh nyei ba'gi yungh guanh gu'nyuoz nyei daauh toi dorn caux ba'gi yungh nyei hmei daaih fongc horc. Ziouv buangv hnyouv Aa^mbaen caux ninh fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv.
Genesis4:5 Mv baac Kaa^in caux ninh fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv Tin-Hungh maiv buangv hnyouv aqv. Kaa^in ziouc qiex jiez haic. Hmien mapv maengh mapv hmuangx nyei.
Genesis4:6 Ziouv ziouc gorngv mbuox Kaa^in
Genesis4:7 Meih zoux duqv horpc nor
Genesis4:8 Kaa^in gorngv mbuox ninh nyei youz
Genesis4:9 Ziouv naaic gaax Kaa^in
Genesis4:10 Ziouv aengx gorngv
Genesis4:11 Ih zanc yie houv jienv meih. Yangh naaiv jiex meih maiv duqv zoux ndeic
Genesis4:12 Yiem naaiv mingh
Genesis4:13 Kaa^in aengx gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Genesis4:14 Mangc gaax! Ih hnoi meih zunc yie biaux
Genesis4:15 Mv baac Ziouv dau
Genesis4:16 Kaa^in ziouc leih nqoi Ziouv mi'aqv
Genesis4:17 Kaa^in caux ninh nyei auv nitv liuz doic
Genesis4:18 Enokv duqv dauh dorn heuc I^laatv. I^laatv zoux Me^hux^yaa^en nyei die. Me^hux^yaa^en zoux Me^tu^saa^en nyei die. Me^tu^saa^en zoux Laamekv nyei die.
Genesis4:19 Laamekv longc i dauh auv. Maaih dauh heuc Aa^ndaa
Genesis4:20 Aa^ndaa yungz duqv Yaa^mbaan. Yaa^mbaan zoux yiem ndopv-liuh yungz saeng-kuv wuov deix mienh nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv.
Genesis4:21 Ninh nyei youz heuc Yu^mbaan. Yu^mbaan zoux patv daanh baah
Genesis4:22 Sinx^laa yungz duqv Tu^mban Kaa^in. Tu^mban Kaa^in zoux zaangc mienh
Genesis4:23 Laamekv mbuox ninh nyei auv
Genesis4:24 Se gorngv haaix dauh daix Kaa^in
Genesis4:25 Aa^ndam caux ninh nyei auv nitv liuz doic
Genesis4:26 Setc yaac duqv dauh dorn
Genesis5:1 Naaiv se Aa^ndam nyei zeiv-fun nyei douh zong daan. Tin-Hungh zeix mienh daaih wuov zanc
Genesis5:2 Ninh zeix benx m'jangc m'sieqv yaac ceix fuqv bun ninh mbuo
Genesis5:3 Aa^ndam duqv yietc baeqv faah ziepc hnyangx
Genesis5:4 Yiem duqv liuz Setc
Genesis5:5 Aa^ndam nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov baeqv faah ziepc hnyangx ziouc guei seix mi'aqv.
Genesis5:6 Setc duqv yietc baeqv lengh biaa hnyangx
Genesis5:7 Yiem duqv liuz Enotv
Genesis5:8 Setc nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov baeqv ziepc nyeic hnyangx
Genesis5:9 Enotv duqv juov ziepc hnyangx
Genesis5:10 Yiem duqv liuz Kenan
Genesis5:11 Enotv nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov baeqv lengh biaa hnyangx
Genesis5:12 Kenan duqv cietv ziepc hnyangx
Genesis5:13 Duqv liuz Maa^haa^laa^len
Genesis5:14 Kenan nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov baeqv lengh ziepc hnyangx ziouc guei seix mi'aqv.
Genesis5:15 Maa^haa^laa^len duqv luoqc ziepc hmz hnyangx
Genesis5:16 Duqv liuz Yaaletv
Genesis5:17 Maa^haa^laa^len nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv betv baeqv juov ziepc hmz hnyangx ziouc guei seix mi'aqv.
Genesis5:18 Yaaletv duqv yietc baeqv luoqc ziepc nyeic hnyangx
Genesis5:19 Yiem duqv liuz Enokv
Genesis5:20 Yaaletv nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov baeqv luoqc ziepc nyeic hnyangx ziouc guei seix mi'aqv.
Genesis5:21 Enokv duqv luoqc ziepc hmz hnyangx
Genesis5:22 Duqv liuz naaiv dauh dorn
Genesis5:23 Enokv nyei siouc nyuonh ziangh duqv faam-baeqv luoqc ziepc hmz hnyangx.
Genesis5:24 Enokv zanc-zanc caux Tin-Hungh jiu tong
Genesis5:25 Me^tu^se^laa duqv yietc baeqv betv ziepc cietv hnyangx
Genesis5:26 Yiem duqv liuz Laamekv
Genesis5:27 Me^tu^se^laa nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov baeqv luoqc ziepc juov hnyangx ziouc guei seix mi'aqv.
Genesis5:28 Laamekv duqv yietc baeqv betv ziepc nyeic hnyangx
Genesis5:29 tengx ninh cuotv mbuox heuc Noyaa. Ninh gorngv
Genesis5:30 Laamekv duqv liuz Noyaa
Genesis5:31 Laamekv nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv cietv baeqv cietv ziepc cietv hnyangx ziouc guei seix mi'aqv.
Genesis5:32 Noyaa ziangh duqv hmz baeqv hnyangx cingx duqv buo dauh dorn
Genesis6:1 Yiem lungh ndiev mienh maanh jiez gorn hiaangx jienv faaux
Genesis6:2 maaih deix doz-mienh dorn buatc baamh mienh nyei sieqv nzueic. Ninh mbuo yaac ginv deix longc zoux auv.
Genesis6:3 Ziouv ziouc gorngv
Genesis6:4 Wuov zanc maaih Nefin Mienh yiem lungh ndiev
Genesis6:5 Ziouv buatc yiem lungh ndiev mienh zoux waaic sic camv. Hnyouv haaix zanc kungx hnamv cuotv waaic nyei jauv hnangv.
Genesis6:6 Ziouv haiz hnyouv mun haic
Genesis6:7 Ziouv gorngv
Genesis6:8 Mv baac Noyaa zoux duqv horpc Ziouv nyei hnyouv.
Genesis6:9 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv Noyaa nyei jauv-louc. Noyaa zoux kuv mienh. Wuov jaax lungh ndiev kungx ninh ganh maiv maaih dorngx daanh hnangv. Ninh haaix zanc yaac gan longx Tin-Hungh.
Genesis6:10 Noyaa maaih buo dauh dorn mbuox heuc Sem
Genesis6:11 Tin-Hungh buatc lungh ndiev mienh waaic jienv njiec. Mienh kungx zoux doqc zoux orqv nyei sic hnangv.
Genesis6:12 Tin-Hungh mangc lungh ndiev
Genesis6:13 Tin-Hungh ziouc gorngv mbuox Noyaa
Genesis6:14 Meih oix zuqc longc jiem haic nyei ndiangx gapv poux nzangv. Nzangv gu'nyuoz oix zuqc nqenx jienv yietc qongx yietc qongx nyei. Yaac oix zuqc longc ndau-ndiev nyouh haic nyei zung naic jienv gu'nyuoz ga'nyiec.
Genesis6:15 Naaiv poux nzangv oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Genesis6:16 Oix zuqc gomv jienv nzangv-liuh. Nzangv-liuh oix zuqc leih nzangv-sin yietc ndorqc hlang. Gaengh oix zuqc zoux yiem yietc bung nzangv-hlen hnangv. Naaiv poux nzangv oix zuqc nqenx zoux buo nzangh
Genesis6:17 Mangc maah! Yie oix bun mbiungc-suiv-imx yiemx ndau-beih
Genesis6:18 Mv baac yie oix caux meih laengz jiez ngaengc waac. Meih oix zuqc dorh meih nyei auv-jueiv dorn-mbuangz caux meih bieqc nzangv.
Genesis6:19 Meih oix zuqc dorh nyungc-nyungc maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Genesis6:20 Nyungc-nyungc norqc
Genesis6:21 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zorqv nyungc-nyungc nyanc hopv bienh bieqc nzangv
Genesis6:22 Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor paaiv Noyaa
Genesis7:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Noyaa
Genesis7:2 Da'faanh maiv maaih uix nyei saeng-kuv
Genesis7:3 Yiem ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc yietc nyungc oix zuqc dorh siec doix
Genesis7:4 Yiem naaiv mingh siec hnoi hnangv
Genesis7:5 Noyaa ziouc ei jienv Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux ziangx nzengc.
Genesis7:6 Mbiungc-suiv-imx yiemx lungh ndiev wuov zanc
Genesis7:7 Ninh caux ninh nyei auv-jueiv dorn-mbuangz bieqc nzangv mingh biaux ndutv mbiungc-suiv-imx yiemx.
Genesis7:8 Maaih uix fai maiv maaih uix nyei saeng-kuv caux norqc caux nyorng ndau-beih nyei ga'naaiv
Genesis7:9 yietc doix yietc doix nyei
Genesis7:10 Jiex liuz siec hnoi
Genesis7:11 Noyaa buangv luoqc baeqv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Genesis7:12 duih domh mbiungc njiec feix ziepc hnoi feix ziepc muonz.
Genesis7:13 Dongh wuov hnoi
Genesis7:14 Ninh mbuo dorh nyungc-nyungc hieh zoih
Genesis7:15 Yietc zungv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Genesis7:16 Daaih bieqc nzangv nyei nyungc-nyungc saeng-kuv
Genesis7:17 Mbiungc-suiv-imx yiemx jienv ndau faaux feix ziepc hnoi. Wuom buangv jienv faaux
Genesis7:18 Wuom buangv jienv faaux
Genesis7:19 Wuom buangv jienv faaux taux yiemx nzengc lungh ndiev hlang jiex nyei mbong-ningv.
Genesis7:20 Corc aengx yiemx faaux ziqc mbong-ningv ziepc hmz ndorqc.
Genesis7:21 Nyungc-nyungc yiem ndau-beih maaih maengc
Genesis7:22 Da'faanh yiem ndau-beih maaih maengc
Genesis7:23 Yiem ndau-beih maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv yietc zungv zuqc guaatv zuqc mietc nzengc. Liemh mienh maanh
Genesis7:24 Wuom yiemx jienv lungh ndiev yietc baeqv hmz ziepc hnoi.
Genesis8:1 Tin-Hungh zungv maiv la'kuqv Noyaa yaac caux ninh yiem nzangv wuov deix yietc zungv saeng-kuv hieh zoih. Tin-Hungh bun nziaaux buonc ndau-beih
Genesis8:2 Ndau-ndiev nyei wuom-zingv nyei kuotv yietc zungv ndipc mi'aqv. Gu'nguaaic lungh nyei gaengh yaac guon nzengc. Lungh yaac hlorngx mi'aqv.
Genesis8:3 Wuom manc-manc haapv jienv njiec. Jiex liuz yietc baeqv hmz ziepc hnoi wuom corc haapv jienv njiec.
Genesis8:4 Taux cietv hlaax ziepc cietv wuov hnoi
Genesis8:5 Wuom aengx haapv jienv njiec taux ziepc hlaax saeng-yietv wuov hnoi
Genesis8:6 Jiex liuz feix ziepc hnoi
Genesis8:7 ziouc bungx norm norqc aa cuotv. Norqc aa kungx ndaix mingh ndaix daaih taux ga'ndiev ndau nyei wuom haapv nqaai nzengc.
Genesis8:8 Noyaa aengx bungx norm norqc nqo cuotv mingh weic zuqc ninh oix hiuv duqv ndau-beih nyei wuom haapv fai maiv gaengh haapv.
Genesis8:9 Mv baac wuom corc yiemx jienv lungh ndiev. Norqc nqo lorz maiv duqv dorngx nzopc ziouc nzuonx daaih taux nzangv-hlen. Noyaa aengx sung buoz zipv bieqc nzangv.
Genesis8:10 Ninh zuov siec hnoi liuz aengx bungx norqc nqo yiem nzangv cuotv mingh.
Genesis8:11 Lungh maanz-hmuangx norqc nqo nzuonx taux Noyaa wuov
Genesis8:12 Ninh aengx zuov siec hnoi liuz ziouc bungx norqc nqo cuotv nzunc. Naaiv nzunc norqc nqo maiv nzuonx aqv.
Genesis8:13 Noyaa duqv luoqc baeqv lengh yietc hnyangx
Genesis8:14 Taux nyeic hlaax nyic ziepc cietv wuov hnoi
Genesis8:15 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox Noyaa
Genesis8:16 “Meih caux meih nyei auv-jueiv dorn-mbuangz cuotv nzangv aqv.
Genesis8:17 Caux meih yiem naaiv deix nyungc-nyungc maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Genesis8:18 Noyaa caux ninh nyei auv-jueiv dorn-mbuangz ziouc cuotv nzengc daaih aqv.
Genesis8:19 Yietc zungv saeng-kuv caux nyorng ndau nyei ga'naaiv caux norqc
Genesis8:20 Noyaa ceix norm ziec-dorngh daaih weic Ziouv. Ninh aengx zorqv nyungc-nyungc maiv maaih uix nyei saeng-kuv caux nyungc-nyungc maiv maaih uix nyei norqc
Genesis8:21 Ziouv haiz naaiv deix qiex ndaang
Genesis8:22 “Da'faanh baamh gen corc yiem jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Genesis9:1 Tin-Hungh buang waac Noyaa caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo. Ninh gorngv
Genesis9:2 Da'faanh yiem ndau-beih nyei saeng-kuv caux yiem ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc
Genesis9:3 Yietc zungv maaih maengc haih dongz nyei ga'naaiv benx meih mbuo nyei nyanc hopv. Ih zanc yie zorqv nyungc-nyungc jiu bun meih mbuo hnangv zinh ndaangc yie zorqv lai-maeng lai-miev jiu bun meih mbuo wuov nor.
Genesis9:4 “Mv baac maiv dungx nyanc maaih nziaamv yiem jienv nyei orv weic zuqc maengc yiem nziaamv.
Genesis9:5 Haaix dauh hoic meih mbuo nyei maengc
Genesis9:6 “Haaix dauh daix mienh
Genesis9:7 Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc maaih fu'jueiv camv
Genesis9:8 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox Noyaa caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Genesis9:9 “Ih zanc yie ganh caux meih mbuo yaac caux meih mbuo nyei zeiv-fun liepc jiez ngaengc waac
Genesis9:10 aengx caux meih yiem yietc zungv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Genesis9:11 Yie oix caux meih mbuo liepc ngaengc waac
Genesis9:12 Tin-Hungh gorngv
Genesis9:13 Yie bun diuh jung hinc wuov mbuonx. Naaiv se yie caux baamh gen liepc ngaengc waac nyei jangx-hoc.
Genesis9:14 Yie haaix zanc bun mbuonx om jienv ndau-beih gu'nguaaic yaac maaih jung hinc wuov mbuonx
Genesis9:15 yie ziouc jangx zuqc yie caux meih mbuo caux nyungc-nyungc maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv liepc nyei ngaengc waac. Mbiungc-suiv-imx yietc liuz maiv aengx yiemx
Genesis9:16 Jung hinc yiem wuov mbuonx cuotv daaih
Genesis9:17 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox Noyaa
Genesis9:18 Yiem nzangv cuotv daaih maaih Noyaa nyei dorn
Genesis9:19 Naaiv se Noyaa nyei buo dauh dorn. Dongh naaiv deix dorn bun njiec nyei zeiv-fun nzaanx mingh yiem buangv lungh ndiev.
Genesis9:20 Noyaa benx zoux ndeic nyei daauh dauh mienh yaac zoux huingx zuangx a'ngunc biouv.
Genesis9:21 Maaih nzunc ninh hopv huingx nyei a'ngunc diuv nquin mingh
Genesis9:22 Haam
Genesis9:23 Sem caux Yaafetv ziouc zorqv deix lui kuangx jienv ninh mbuo nyei mba'dauh
Genesis9:24 Nqa'haav Noyaa nzang daaih
Genesis9:25 Ninh ziouc gorngv
Genesis9:26 Ninh yaac gorngv

Genesis18:4 Yie ziouc dorh deix wuom daaih bun meih mbuo nzaaux zaux

Genesis18:6 Apc^laa^ham gaanv jienv bieqc ndopv-liuh mbuox Saalaa
Genesis18:7 Gorngv liuz

Genesis18:12 Saalaa yiem hnyouv yietc binc jatv yietc binc hnamv
Genesis18:13 Ziouv naaic Apc^laa^ham
Genesis18:14 Maiv maaih haaix nyungc ndongc haaix aqc Ziouv maiv haih zoux. Da'nyeic hnyangx taux naaiv norm ziangh hoc yie aengx nzuonx daaih. Taux wuov zanc Saalaa ziouc duqv dauh dorn daaih aqv.”
Genesis18:15 Saalaa gamh nziex nyei
Genesis18:16 Wuov deix mienh yiem naaic cuotv jauv mingh taux norm dorngx mangc duqv buatc So^ndom Zingh. Apc^laa^ham yaac fungx jienv ninh mbuo mingh.
Genesis18:17 Ziouv yiem hnyouv hnamv. “Yie oix zoux nyei sic yie oix zuqc bingx
Genesis18:18 Weic zuqc Apc^laa^ham oix benx hlo nyei
Genesis18:19 Yie ginv ninh daaih weic bun ninh njaaux ninh nyei fu'jueiv caux ninh nyei hoz doic zeiv-fun
Genesis18:20 Ziouv ziouc gorngv mbuox Apc^laa^ham
Genesis18:21 Yie oix zuqc njiec mingh mangc gaax ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic ndongc yie haiz gox yie wuov deix waac fai? Se gorngv maiv zeiz nor
Genesis18:22 Wuov deix i dauh mienh leih nqoi wuov norm dorngx hungx jienv So^ndom Zingh mingh mi'aqv. Mv baac Apc^laa^ham corc yiem wuov souv jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien.
Genesis18:23 Apc^laa^ham ziouc mingh fatv nyei naaic Ziouv
Genesis18:24 Se gorngv wuov norm zingh maaih hmz ziepc dauh kuv mienh ni? Meih corc oix mietc
Genesis18:25 Ziouv za'gengh maiv haih zorqv kuv mienh caux orqv mienh yietc njiec daix guangc saah? Meih gengh maiv haih zoux bun kuv mienh caux orqv mienh fih hnangv nyei. Siemv lungh ndiev nyei Jien oix zoux baengh fim nyei maiv zeiz?”
Genesis18:26 Ziouv gorngv
Genesis18:27 Apc^laa^ham aengx gorngv
Genesis18:28 Se gorngv maiv gaux hmz ziepc dauh kuv mienh
Genesis18:29 Apc^laa^ham aengx gorngv nzunc
Genesis18:30 Apc^laa^ham gorngv
Genesis18:31 Apc^laa^ham gorngv
Genesis18:32 Apc^laa^ham gorngv
Genesis18:33 Ziouv caux Apc^laa^ham gorngv liuz waac
Genesis19:1 Wuov deix i dauh fin-mienh mingh taux So^ndom Zingh wuov zanc
Genesis19:2 gorngv
Genesis19:3 Mv baac Lotv qaqv! tov
Genesis19:4 Naaiv deix i dauh mienh maiv gaengh bueix
Genesis19:5 Ninh mbuo heuc Lotv
Genesis19:6 Lotv cuotv gaengh ka'ndau
Genesis19:7 mbuox wuov deix mienh
Genesis19:8 Mangc gaax! Yie maaih i dauh sieqv maiv gaengh bueix jiex dorn. Yie dorh ninh mbuo cuotv daaih bun meih mbuo sueih eix zoux. Mv baac maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc bun naaiv deix m'jangc dorn. Ninh mbuo daaih yiem yie nyei biauv
Genesis19:9 Zuangx mienh gorngv
Genesis19:10 Mv baac wuov deix i dauh kaeqv mienh hnyaa buoz cuotv daaih zorqv Lotv tor bieqc biauv mingh
Genesis19:11 Ninh mbuo aengx zoux bun yiem ga'nyiec ziqc gaengh nyei yietc zungv mienh gox-gox lunx-lunx nyei m'zing mbuov nzengc ziouc huaax naaiv huaax wuov yaac lorz maiv buatc gaengh.
Genesis19:12 Wuov deix i dauh mienh mbuox Lotv
Genesis19:13 Yie mbuo oix mietc So^ndom Zingh weic zuqc Ziouv haiz gox naaiv norm zingh nyei waac camv haic aqv. Ninh ziouc paaiv yie mbuo daaih mietc.”
Genesis19:14 Lotv ziouc cuotv mingh mbuox gorngv ziangh ninh nyei sieqv wuov deix sieqv-laangh
Genesis19:15 Da'nyeic ndorm lungh njang
Genesis19:16 Lotv corc samh samh soqv-soqv nyei. Wuov deix i dauh mienh ziouc zorqv Lotv mbuo i hmuangv caux ninh mbuo nyei i dauh sieqv nyei buoz ken jienv cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc zingh mingh
Genesis19:17 Biaux cuotv ziqc zingh mingh
Genesis19:18 Mv baac Lotv dau
Genesis19:19 Ziux meih buatc yie
Genesis19:20 Mangc maah! Wuov ndau maaih norm mungv faix nyei
Genesis19:21 Fin-mienh gorngv mbuox Lotv
Genesis19:22 Gaanv tiux jienv mingh wuov aqv. Meih mingh maiv gaengh taux wuov norm dorngx
Genesis19:23 Lotv mingh taux So^aa Zingh wuov zanc
Genesis19:24 Ziouv liemh zeih bun zieqc jienv douz nyei hungh yiem gu'nguaaic lungh njiec So^ndom caux Go^mo^laa Zingh
Genesis19:25 buov mietc nzengc wuov norm horngc zaangc nyei zingh
Genesis19:26 Mv baac Lotv nyei auv yiem nqa'haav huin nzuonx mangc ziouc benx norm nzauv-dongc mi'aqv.
Genesis19:27 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
Genesis19:28 mangc njiec. Ninh buatc So^ndom caux Go^mo^laa caux wuov norm horngc cuotv douz-sioux-don cutv-cutv nyei faaux hnangv buov domh douz-nzauc nor.
Genesis19:29 Hnangv naaic
Genesis19:30 Weic zuqc Lotv gamh nziex
Genesis19:31 Sieqv-hlo mbuox sieqv-faix
Genesis19:32 Mbuo oix zuqc bun aa die hopv diuv nquin mingh
Genesis19:33 Wuov muonz ninh mbuo i muoz-sieqv bun ninh mbuo nyei die hopv a'ngunc diuv
Genesis19:34 Da'nyeic hnoi sieqv-hlo gorngv mbuox sieqv-faix
Genesis19:35 Wuov muonz ninh mbuo ziouc bun ninh mbuo nyei die aengx hopv a'ngunc diuv. Sieqv-faix ziouc bieqc mingh caux ninh nyei die bueix. Ninh nyei die fih hnangv nyei maiv hiuv duqv ninh nyei sieqv ziangh haaix bueix ziangh haaix jiez sin.
Genesis19:36 Hnangv naaiv nor Lotv nyei i dauh sieqv maaih jienv ninh mbuo ganh nyei die nyei gu'nguaaz.
Genesis19:37 Sieqv-hlo yungz duqv dauh dorn
Genesis19:38 Sieqv-faix yaac yungz duqv dauh dorn

Genesis25:2 Ke^tu^laa yungz duqv camv-dauh dorn bun ninh. Maaih Simx^laan
Genesis25:3 Yokv^saan nyei dorn nyei mbuox heuc Qe^mbaa caux Nde^ndaan. Nde^ndaan nyei dorn bun njiec benx Atc^su^lim
Genesis25:4 Mi^ndien nyei dorn heuc E^faa
Genesis25:5 Apc^laa^ham jiu ninh nyei jaa-dingh yietc zungv ga'naaiv bun ninh nyei dorn
Genesis25:6 Mv baac Apc^laa^ham maiv gaengh guei seix wuov zanc ninh bun zingh nyeic ninh nyei auv-dorn nyei dorn mbuo. Nqa'haav ziouc heuc ninh mbuo leih nqoi I^sakc mingh yiem dong bung maengx nyei deic-bung
Genesis25:7 Apc^laa^ham nyei hnyangx-jeiv ziangh duqv yietc baeqv cietv ziepc hmz hnyangx.
Genesis25:8 Ninh ziangh duqv siouc nyuonh ndaauv
Genesis25:9 Ninh nyei dorn
Genesis25:10 Se Apc^laa^ham tengx Hitv^tai Mienh maaiz nyei ndeic. Apc^laa^ham caux ninh nyei auv
Genesis25:11 Apc^laa^ham guei seix liuz
Genesis25:12 Ih zanc gorngv Apc^laa^ham nyei dorn
Genesis25:13 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv I^saa^maa^en nyei dorn nyei mbuox zueih hlo taux faix. Dorn-hlo heuc Ne^mbaa^yotv. Aengx maaih Ke^ndaa
Genesis25:14 Mitv^maa
Genesis25:15 Haa^ndatc
Genesis25:16 Naaiv se I^saa^maa^en nyei dorn nyei mbuox. Ninh bun njiec zoux ziepc nyeic fingx nyei bieiv zeiv. Ninh mbuo liepc nyei laangz caux corng ndopv-liuh nyei dorngx gan ninh mbuo ganh nyei mbuox heuc.
Genesis25:17 I^saa^maa^en nyei hnyangx-jeiv ziangh duqv yietc baeqv faah ziepc cietv hnyangx
Genesis25:18 I^saa^maa^en nyei zeiv-fun mbuo yiem Haa^wi^laa caux Suwaa mbu'ndongx
Genesis25:19 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv Apc^laa^ham nyei dorn
Genesis25:20 I^sakc longc Le^mbe^kaa zoux auv wuov zanc ninh duqv feix ziepc hnyangx. Le^mbe^kaa zoux Mbe^tu^en nyei sieqv. Mbe^tu^en se Aalam Mienh
Genesis25:21 Le^mbe^kaa maiv maaih fu'jueiv
Genesis25:22 Maaih sung-gu'nguaaz. Gu'nguaaz yiem maa nyei ga'sie borngz jaax. Le^mbe^kaa gorngv
Genesis25:23 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Genesis25:24 Taux yungz nyei ziangh hoc ninh ziouc yungz duqv sung-gu'nguaaz-dorn.
Genesis25:25 Yungz cuotv ndaangc wuov dauh
Genesis25:26 Nqa'haav yungz wuov dauh nanv jienv ninh nyei gorx
Genesis25:27 Naaiv deix i dauh dorn hlo daaih. Esaau zoux dauh buonv orv henv haic nyei mienh. Haaix zanc yaac oix mingh gemh buonv orv. Yaakopv aeqv
Genesis25:28 I^sakc gauh hnamv Esaau
Genesis25:29 Maaih hnoi nor

Genesis25:31 Yaakopv gorngv
Genesis25:32 Esaau dau
Genesis25:33 Yaakopv gorngv

Genesis26:1 Yiem Apc^laa^ham nyei seix zeiv
Genesis26:2 Ziouv hinc cuotv gorngv mbuox I^sakc
Genesis26:3 Oix zuqc yiem naaiv norm deic-bung
Genesis26:4 Yie oix bun meih nyei zeiv-fun hiaangx daaih ndongc gu'nguaaic lungh nyei hleix camv
Genesis26:5 weic zuqc Apc^laa^ham muangx yie nyei waac yaac ei jienv yie paaiv nyei jauv
Genesis26:6 I^sakc ziouc yiem jienv Ge^laa^aa Zingh.
Genesis26:7 Wuov norm dorngx nyei mienh naaic taux ninh nyei auv. I^sakc gorngv Le^mbe^kaa zoux ninh nyei muoc
Genesis26:8 I^sakc yiem wuov lauh aqv. Maaih hnoi nor
Genesis26:9 Aa^mbi^me^lekv heuc I^sakc daaih ziouc gorngv
Genesis26:10 Aa^mbi^me^lekv gorngv
Genesis26:11 Aa^mbi^me^lekv ziouc hatc ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Genesis26:12 I^sakc yiem wuov norm deic-bung zuangx ga'naaiv. Wuov hnyangx ninh zuangx yietc gouv siou duqv yietc baeqv gouv weic zuqc Ziouv ceix fuqv bun ninh.

Genesis26:16 Aa^mbi^me^lekv gorngv mbuox I^sakc
Genesis26:17 I^sakc ziouc suiv mingh corng ndopv-liuh yiem Ge^laa^aa Horngz.
Genesis26:18 Ninh aengx wetv nzunc dongh yiem ninh nyei die
Genesis26:19 I^sakc nyei bou aengx wetv norm wuom-kuotv yiem wuov horngz. Wetv cuotv zingv wuom daaih aqv.
Genesis26:20 Ge^laa^aa Zingh nyei yungz saeng-kuv nyei bou daaih caux I^sakc nyei yungz saeng-kuv nyei bou nzaeng. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Genesis26:21 I^sakc nyei bou aengx wetv duqv norm wuom-kuotv. Mienh aengx daaih nzaeng. I^sakc ziouc cuotv mbuox heuc Sitc^naa.
Genesis26:22 I^sakc ziouc leih nqoi wuov norm dorngx aengx ganh wetv norm wuom-kuotv. Naaiv nzunc maiv maaih haaix dauh nzaeng aqv. Ninh ziouc cuotv wuov norm wuom-kuotv nyei mbuox heuc Le^hox^mbotc. Ninh gorngv
Genesis26:23 I^sakc aengx suiv mingh yiem Mbe^e^qe^mbaa Zingh.
Genesis26:24 Wuov muonz Ziouv hinc cuotv mbuox ninh

Genesis31:14 Laasen caux Le^aa dau Yaakopv
Genesis31:15 Ninh zoux bun yie mbuo hnangv benx ganh fingx mienh nor. Ninh yaac maaic yie mbuo nyei m'nqorngv daaih yaac naqv nzengc mi'aqv.
Genesis31:16 Tin-Hungh bun meih duqv yie mbuo nyei die nyei ga'naaiv se benx yie mbuo nyei yaac benx yie mbuo nyei fu'jueiv nyei. Ih zanc Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor mbuox meih
Genesis31:17 Yaakopv ziouc mbenc ziangx ga'naaiv. Ninh bun ninh nyei auv-jueiv geh jienv lorh torh
Genesis31:18 yaac zunc jienv saeng-kuv mingh ndaangc. Aengx dorh jienv ninh yiem Batc^ndaan Aalam zornc duqv daaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv cuotv jauv nzuonx Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung
Genesis31:19 Wuov zanc Laa^mbaan cuotv mingh japv ninh nyei ba'gi yungh biei. Laasen bangc wuov norm ziangh hoc nimc ninh nyei die yiem biauv zaangc nyei miuc-fangx.
Genesis31:20 Yaakopv yaac nduov ninh nyei ong-daa
Genesis31:21 Ninh dorh jienv ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv biaux jiex ziqc Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih
Genesis31:22 Yaakopv biaux mingh duqv buo hnoi
Genesis31:23 Ninh ziouc dorh jienv ninh nyei gorx-youz mingh zunc. Zunc siec hnoi ziouc zunc zaaic yiem Gi^le^aatc nyei mbong-aiv dorngx.
Genesis31:24 Wuov muonz Laa^mbaan mbeix buatc Tin-Hungh daaih gorngv mbuox ninh
Genesis31:25 Laa^mbaan zunc zaaic Yaakopv wuov zanc
Genesis31:26 Laa^mbaan gorngv mbuox Yaakopv
Genesis31:27 Meih fungc hnangv naaiv nor nduov yie
Genesis31:28 Meih liemh maiv bun yie duqv zom yie nyei fun caux yie nyei sieqv. Naaiv meih zoux nyei jauv za'gengh hngongx haic.
Genesis31:29 Ih zanc meih yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. Yie oix zoux haaix nyungc hoic meih se zoux duqv nyei. Mv baac a'hmuangx meih nyei die nyei Tin-Hungh box mbeix mbuox yie
Genesis31:30 Yie hiuv duqv meih nyei hnyouv oix nzuonx meih nyei die nyei biauv cingx daaih biaux. Mv baac meih weic haaix diuc nimc yie yiem biauv zaangc nyei miuc-fangx?”
Genesis31:31 Yaakopv dau Laa^mbaan
Genesis31:32 Mv baac meih nyei miuc-fangx aeqv
Genesis31:33 Laa^mbaan ziouc bieqc Yaakopv nyei ndopv-liuh caux Le^aa nyei ndopv-liuh caux wuov deix i dauh nouh beiz nyei ndopv-liuh sou mv baac sou maiv cuotv ninh nyei miuc-fangx. Ninh yiem Le^aa nyei ndopv-liuh cuotv daaih aengx bieqc Laasen nyei ndopv-liuh.
Genesis31:34 Laasen zorqv wuov deix yiem biauv zaangc nyei miuc-fangx dapv jienv lorh torh nyei dorx. Ninh ganh aeqv
Genesis31:35 Laasen gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die
Genesis31:36 Yaakopv qiex jiez haic ziouc gorngv Laa^mbaan
Genesis31:37 Meih sou nzengc yie nyei ga'naaiv meih buatc haaix nyungc zeiz meih nyei ga'naaiv? Zorqv cuotv daaih an jienv naaiv maah! Bun meih nyei mienh caux yie nyei mienh lomh nzoih mangc. Ninh mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie caux meih
Genesis31:38 “Yie caux meih yiem duqv nyic ziepc hnyangx aqv. Meih nyei ba'gi yungh caux yungh maiv mbaang jiex dorn. Yietc dauh meih nyei ba'gi yungh gouv fai yungh gouv yie maiv nyanc jiex.
Genesis31:39 Se gorngv hieh ga'naaiv ngaatc
Genesis31:40 Lungh hnoi zanc yie diev nyutc pui
Genesis31:41 Yie hnangv naaiv nor caux meih yiem buangv nyic ziepc hnyangx. Yie zoux gong ziepc feix hnyangx bietv meih nyei i dauh sieqv longc. Aengx zoux juqv hnyangx bietv meih nyei saeng-kuv. Meih corc tiuv yie nyei gong-zinh duqv ziepc nzunc mi'aqv.
Genesis31:42 Se gorngv maiv zeiz yie nyei die nyei Tin-Hungh
Genesis31:43 Laa^mbaan dau Yaakopv
Genesis31:44 Daaih maah! Meih caux yie oix zuqc liepc jiez ngaengc waac weic tengx mbuo i dauh zoux zorng-zengx.”
Genesis31:45 Yaakopv ziouc zorqv norm la'bieiv liepc jiez daaih don jienv zoux jangx-hoc
Genesis31:46 aengx mbuox ninh nyei mienh
Genesis31:47 Laa^mbaan cuotv wuov norm dorngx nyei mbuox heuc Yegaa Saax^haax^ndu^taa
Genesis31:48 Laa^mbaan gorngv
Genesis31:49 Aengx duqv mbuox heuc Mitv^baa
Genesis31:50 Se gorngv meih zoux doqc yie nyei sieqv
Genesis31:51 Laa^mbaan aengx gorngv mbuox Yaakopv
Genesis31:52 Naaiv ndui la'bieiv caux naaiv norm la'bieiv-dongc zoux zorng-zengx tengx mbuo jangx zuqc
Genesis31:53 Tov Apc^laa^ham nyei Tin-Hungh caux Naa^ho nyei Tin-Hungh
Genesis31:54 Ninh yaac yiem wuov norm mbong-aiv longc saeng-kuv ziec bun Tin-Hungh yaac heuc ninh nyei gorx-youz daaih lomh nzoih nyanc hnaangx. Nyanc liuz
Genesis31:55 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei

Genesis33:1 Yaakopv mingh gau
Genesis33:2 Ninh bun ninh nyei i dauh nouh beiz caux ninh mbuo nyei fu'jueiv mingh ndaangc. Jiex daaih maaih Le^aa caux ninh nyei fu'jueiv. Laasen caux Yosepv nqa'haav laai jiex.

Genesis34:1 Yaakopv caux Le^aa maaih dauh sieqv
Genesis34:2 Gunv wuov norm dorngx nyei Hiwai Mienh

Genesis34:4 Sekem mbuox ninh nyei die
Genesis34:5 Yaakopv hiuv duqv Sekem zoux bun ninh nyei sieqv nyei mengh dauh waaic mv baac Yaakopv maiv gaengh gorngv haaix nyungc weic zuqc ninh nyei dorn mbuo yiem wuov naah bungx saeng-kuv. Ninh zuov jienv ninh nyei dorn mbuo nzuonx.
Genesis34:6 Sekem nyei die
Genesis34:7 Yaakopv nyei dorn mbuo yiem wuov naah yietv haiz naaiv deix sic ninh mbuo ziouc nzuonx daaih. Ninh mbuo haiz hnyouv waaic nzengc
Genesis34:8 Haamo gorngv mbuox Yaakopv mbuo dorn-diex doic

Genesis34:13 Laaix Sekem zoux waaic ninh mbuo nyei muoc
Genesis34:14 Ninh mbuo gorngv

Genesis34:23 Ninh mbuo nyei saeng-kuv

Genesis34:25 Jiex liuz gaatv nyei leiz da'faam hnoi wuov hnoi
Genesis34:26 Liemh Haamo caux Sekem i dorn-diex

Genesis37:1 Yaakopv corc yiem jienv zinh ndaangc ninh nyei die yiem wuov norm deic-bung
Genesis37:2 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv Yaakopv nyei dorn-jueiv nyei jauv-louc. Yosepv benx mienh lunx mienh
Genesis37:3 I^saa^laa^en hnamv Yosepv gauh camv jiex ninh nyei yietc zungv dorn
Genesis37:4 Yosepv nyei gorx mbuo buatc ninh mbuo nyei die hnamv Yosepv gauh camv hnamv ninh mbuo
Genesis37:5 Maaih nzunc Yosepv mbeix buatc
Genesis37:6 Yosepv gorngv
Genesis37:7 Yie mbeix buatc mbuo yiem ndeic sai mbiauh zeiv. Yie nyei mbiauh zeiv ganh jiez sin daaih don jienv. Gorx mbuo nyei mbiauh zeiv yaac jiez daaih weih gormx yie nyei mbiauh zeiv baaix.”
Genesis37:8 Ninh nyei gorx mbuo naaic gaax ninh
Genesis37:9 Nqa'haav Yosepv aengx mbeix buatc nzunc yaac gorngv bun ninh nyei gorx mbuo muangx. Ninh gorngv
Genesis37:10 Ninh aengx gorngv naaiv norm mbeix bun ninh nyei die
Genesis37:11 Yosepv nyei gorx mbuo gengh mueic jieqv ninh
Genesis37:12 Yosepv nyei gorx mbuo dorh ninh mbuo nyei die nyei ba'gi yungh caux yungh guanh mingh Sekem bungx.
Genesis37:13 I^saa^laa^en ziouc gorngv mbuox Yosepv
Genesis37:14 Ninh nyei die mbuox ninh

Genesis37:16 Yosepv dau
Genesis37:17 Wuov dauh mienh gorngv
Genesis37:18 Ninh nyei gorx mbuo buatc Yosepv corc yiem go nyei. Daaih maiv gaengh taux
Genesis37:19 Laanh mbuox laanh
Genesis37:20 Mbuo lomh nzoih mingh zorqv ninh daix guangc aqv. Daix dapv jienv wuom-kuotv-nqaai. Mbuo ziouc gorngv ga'naaiv ngaatc mi'aqv. Mbuo mangc gaax ninh nyei mbeix ndongc haaix lingh?”
Genesis37:21 Lu^mben haiz ninh youz mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Genesis37:22 Lu^mben aengx mbuox ninh mbuo
Genesis37:23 Yosepv daaih taux
Genesis37:24 aengx zorqv ninh fongv ndortv wuom-kuotv. Wuov norm kuotv maiv maaih wuom.
Genesis37:25 Yosepv nyei gorx mbuo zueiz jienv nyanc hnaangx wuov zanc
Genesis37:26 Yu^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh nyei muoz-doic
Genesis37:27 Mbuo oix zuqc maaic bun naaiv deix I^saa^maa^en Mienh gauh longx daix guangc. Ninh zoux mbuo nyei youz
Genesis37:28 Wuov deix zoux saeng-eix nyei Mi^ndien Mienh jiex jauv taux wuov. Yosepv nyei gorx mbuo ziouc cie Yosepv cuotv kuotv daaih maaic bun naaiv deix I^saa^maa^en Mienh
Genesis37:29 Lu^mben daaih taux wuov norm kuotv
Genesis37:30 Ninh nzuonx ninh nyei youz mbuo wuov gorngv
Genesis37:31 Ninh mbuo ziouc daix dauh yungh gouv aengx zorqv Yosepv nyei lui-ndaauv
Genesis37:32 aengx dorh nzuonx bun ninh nyei die mangc. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Genesis37:33 Yaakopv zieqv duqv nyei. Ninh gorngv
Genesis37:34 Yaakopv nzauh haic
Genesis37:35 Ninh nyei dorn ninh nyei sieqv mbuo yietc zungv kuinx ninh
Genesis37:36 Dongh wuov zanc yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov deix zoux saeng-eix nyei Mi^ndien Mienh aengx maaic Yosepv bun hungh diex nyei yietc dauh jien
Genesis38:1 Dongh wuov zanc
Genesis38:2 Yiem wuov Yu^ndaa buangh dauh Kaa^naa^an Mienh
Genesis38:3 ninh nyei auv ziouc maaih jienv sin aqv
Genesis38:4 Ninh nyei auv aengx maaih da'nyeic nzunc sin
Genesis38:5 Nqa'haav aengx yungz dauh dorn
Genesis38:6 Yu^ndaa tengx ninh nyei dorn-hlo
Genesis38:7 Mv baac ziux Ziouv mangc
Genesis38:8 Yu^ndaa aengx gorngv mbuox Onan
Genesis38:9 Onan hiuv duqv yungz duqv fu'jueiv mv baac maiv funx ninh nyei buonc. Hnangv naaic
Genesis38:10 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Genesis38:11 Yu^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh nyei mbuangz
Genesis38:12 Jiex daaih
Genesis38:13 Maaih mienh mbuox Taamaa
Genesis38:14 Taamaa ziouc yienc nqoi ninh nyei auv-guaav lui-houx
Genesis38:15 Yu^ndaa buatc Taamaa
Genesis38:16 Yu^ndaa mingh wuov jauv-hlen caux ninh gorngv waac. Ninh gorngv
Genesis38:17 Yu^ndaa dau
Genesis38:18 Yu^ndaa naaic gaax
Genesis38:19 Taamaa nzuonx mingh zorqv nqoi mbiorngz hmien nyei ndie aengx zuqv jienv ninh nyei auv-guaav nyei lui-houx hnangv loz wuov nor.
Genesis38:20 Yu^ndaa mbuox ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic
Genesis38:21 Ninh ziouc naaic gaax wuov norm dorngx nyei mienh
Genesis38:22 Hilaa ziouc nzuonx mingh mbuox Yu^ndaa
Genesis38:23 Yu^ndaa gorngv
Genesis38:24 Nqa'haav aav lamh deix buo hlaax nyieqc nyei dorngx
Genesis38:25 Dorh Taamaa cuotv daaih wuov zanc
Genesis38:26 Yu^ndaa zieqv duqv naaiv deix ga'naaiv se ninh nyei. Ninh gorngv
Genesis38:27 Taux yungz nyei ziangh hoc buatc Taamaa maaih sung-gu'nguaaz.
Genesis38:28 Mun jienv wuov zanc
Genesis38:29 Mv baac gu'nguaaz aengx hluotv ninh nyei buoz bieqc
Genesis38:30 Ndoh jienv fei-siqv wuov dauh dorn nqa'haav yungz yaac cuotv mbuox heuc Zelaa.
Genesis39:1 I^saa^maa^en Mienh dorh Yosepv mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung maaic bun dauh I^yipv Mienh
Genesis39:2 Ninh yiem ninh nyei I^yipv Mienh biauv-ziouv nyei biauv. Ziouv caux Yosepv yiem
Genesis39:3 Wuov dauh biauv-ziouv buatc Ziouv caux Yosepv yiem. Ziouv yaac bun Yosepv yiem ninh zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc duqv longx.
Genesis39:4 Yosepv zoux duqv horpc Bo^ti^faa nyei hnyouv yaac duqv zoux ninh nyei lengc jeiv bou. Bo^ti^faa ziouc bun ninh goux biauv zong caux jaa-dingh yietc zungv ga'naaiv.
Genesis39:5 Yiem Bo^ti^faa paaiv Yosepv goux jienv ninh nyei biauv zong yietc zungv jaa-dingh
Genesis39:6 Bo^ti^faa nyei yietc norm jaa-dingh nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv ninh jiu bun Yosepv goux nzengc. Cuotv liuz ninh ganh nyei nyanc hopv
Genesis39:7 Yiem gau
Genesis39:8 Mv baac Yosepv maiv muangx. Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei ziouv nyei auv
Genesis39:9 Yiem naaiv biauv yie maaih hatc maaz ndongc ninh hlo. Yie nyei ziouv maiv nzaeng haaix nyungc cuotv liuz meih weic zuqc meih zoux ninh nyei auv. Yie fungc haih zoux waaic sic ndongc naaic hlo
Genesis39:10 Maiv gunv wuov dauh auv hnoi-hnoi yuoqc Yosepv
Genesis39:11 Maaih hnoi nor
Genesis39:12 Bo^ti^faa nyei auv nyau jienv Yosepv nyei lui gorngv
Genesis39:13 Wuov dauh auv buatc Yosepv guangc jienv ninh nyei lui biaux cuotv ga'nyiec
Genesis39:14 ninh ziouc nauc-nauc nyei heuc yiem ninh nyei biauv wuov deix m'jangc bou daaih. Ninh gorngv
Genesis39:15 Ninh haiz yie heuc
Genesis39:16 Wuov dauh auv zorqv Yosepv nyei lui an jienv ninh nyei ga'hlen zuov Yosepv nyei ziouv nzuonx daaih.
Genesis39:17 Ninh ziouc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Genesis39:18 Yie qaqv heuc
Genesis39:19 Yosepv nyei ziouv haiz ninh nyei auv gorngv
Genesis39:20 zorqv Yosepv wuonx jienv loh
Genesis39:21 mv baac Tin-Hungh caux ninh yiem
Genesis39:22 Goux loh jien ziouc bun Yosepv goux yietc zungv yiem loh nyei zuiz-mienh. Da'faanh yiem loh gu'nyuoz nyei sic
Genesis39:23 Yosepv goux jienv nyei yietc zungv sic
Genesis40:1 Jiex liuz yietc caamx
Genesis40:2 Hungh diex qiex jiez haic naaiv deix i dauh jien
Genesis40:3 ziouc zorqv ninh mbuo wuonx jienv goux hungh dinc wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv nyei biauv nyei loh
Genesis40:4 Goux hungh dinc wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv paaiv Yosepv goux ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo i dauh yaac zuqc wuonx jienv loh lauh nyei.
Genesis40:5 Maaih muonz nor
Genesis40:6 Da'nyeic ndorm Yosepv bieqc mingh mangc
Genesis40:7 Ninh naaic gaax Faalo nyei domh jien
Genesis40:8 Ninh mbuo dau
Genesis40:9 Bouh a'ngunc diuv wuov dauh domh jien ziouc gorngv ninh nyei mbeix bun Yosepv muangx. Ninh gorngv
Genesis40:10 Wuov diuh hmei yaac maaih buo caax nquaah. Yietv cuotv cunx daaih yaac nqoi biangh
Genesis40:11 Wuov zanc Faalo Hungh nyei zaanv yiem yie nyei buoz. Yie ziouc gaeqv wuov deix a'ngunc biouv nanv biouv-wuom dapv jienv zaanv bouh bun Faalo.”
Genesis40:12 Yosepv gorngv
Genesis40:13 Aengx buo hnoi Faalo Hungh oix bungx meih cuotv
Genesis40:14 Meih duqv longx nyei ziangh hoc tov jangx deix yie
Genesis40:15 Yie yiem Hipv^lu Mienh nyei deic-bung zuqc dorh taux naaiv daaih. Yiem naaiv I^yipv Deic-Bung yie yaac maiv dorngc haaix nyungc zic duqv bun yie zuqc wuonx jienv naaiv loh hmuangx.”
Genesis40:16 Zoux njuov nyei domh jien buatc Yosepv porv mbeix nyei eix leiz longx
Genesis40:17 Gu'nguaaic wuov norm jei maaih nyungc-nyungc ziqv daaih nyei njuov bun Faalo Hungh nyanc. Mv baac norqc daaih nyanc wuov deix njuov.”
Genesis40:18 Yosepv gorngv
Genesis40:19 Aengx buo hnoi Faalo Hungh oix bun mienh hngaqv ndutv meih nyei m'nqorngv aengx zorqv meih nyei sei ndiux jienv ndiangx. Norqc yaac oix daaih nyanc meih nyei orv.”
Genesis40:20 Aengx jiex buo hnoi taux Faalo Hungh nyei sih nyietv-hnoi
Genesis40:21 Bouh a'ngunc diuv wuov dauh aengx duqv zoux gong hnangv loz wuov nor
Genesis40:22 Mv baac zoux njuov wuov dauh aeqv
Genesis40:23 Mv baac bouh a'ngunc diuv wuov dauh jien la'kuqv Yosepv mi'aqv. Maiv jangx zuqc ninh aqv.
Genesis41:1 Jiex daaih buangv i hnyangx
Genesis41:2 Maaih siec dauh yangh ngongh nyeiz nzueic nyei
Genesis41:3 Aengx maaih siec dauh yangh ngongh nyeiz korng jaic nyei
Genesis41:4 Ngongh jaic ziouc nyanc nzengc wuov deix siec dauh ngongh junc. Mbeix liuz
Genesis41:5 Hungh diex aengx m'njormh mingh
Genesis41:6 Nqa'haav aengx cuotv siec dorv mbiauh maux
Genesis41:7 Mbiauh maux naqv nzengc wuov deix siec dorv jauh nyei
Genesis41:8 Da'nyeic ndorm ninh haiz hnyouv maiv henh ziouc heuc I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei mangc sou porv mbeix nyei fin-saeng caux guai-gorqv fin-saeng yietc zungv daaih. Faalo ziouc gorngv ninh nyei mbeix bun ninh mbuo muangx. Mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh haih porv duqv mbeix cuotv.
Genesis41:9 Wuov zanc tengx Faalo Hungh bouh diuv wuov dauh domh jien gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Genesis41:10 Maaih nzunc hungh diex qiex jiez ninh nyei bou
Genesis41:11 Maaih muonz nor
Genesis41:12 Maaih dauh Hipv^lu mienh lunx mienh yaac caux yie mbuo zuqc wuonx jienv loh. Ninh zoux goux hungh dinc nyei domh baeng-bieiv nyei nouh. Yie mbuo gorngv yie mbuo nyei mbeix bun ninh muangx
Genesis41:13 Nqa'haav za'gengh doix-diuc nzengc ninh porv nyei eix leiz. Yie duqv zoux gong hnangv zinh ndaangc nor
Genesis41:14 Faalo Hungh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh heuc Yosepv daaih. Ninh mbuo ziouc siepv-siepv nyei mingh dorh ninh cuotv. Yosepv teix siaam
Genesis41:15 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox ninh
Genesis41:16 Yosepv dau Faalo Hungh
Genesis41:17 Faalo Hungh ziouc gorngv mbuox Yosepv
Genesis41:18 Maaih siec dauh yangh ngongh nyeiz nzueic nyei
Genesis41:19 Nqa'haav aengx maaih siec dauh yangh ngongh nyeiz korng jaic nyei
Genesis41:20 Wuov deix ngongh jaic nyanc nzengc cuotv ndaangc wuov deix siec dauh ngongh junc.
Genesis41:21 Nyanc liuz mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh zieqv duqv ninh mbuo nyanc wuov deix ngongh junc. Ninh mbuo corc hnangv zinh ndaangc nor
Genesis41:22 “Yie aengx mbeix buatc maaih zungh mbiauh cuotv siec dorv jauh nyei
Genesis41:23 Nqa'haav aengx cuotv siec dorv mbiauh maux
Genesis41:24 Wuov deix mbiauh maux naqv nzengc wuov deix siec dorv mbiauh jauh mi'aqv. Yie gorngv yie nyei mbeix bun mangc sou porv mbeix nyei fin-saeng muangx yaac maiv maaih yietc dauh haih porv duqv cuotv.”
Genesis41:25 Yosepv ziouc gorngv mbuox Faalo Hungh
Genesis41:26 Wuov deix siec dauh yangh ngongh junc beiv siec hnyangx. Wuov deix siec dorv mbiauh jauh yaac beiv siec hnyangx. I norm mbeix nyei eix leiz se fih hnangv nyei.
Genesis41:27 Nqa'haav cuotv wuov deix siec dauh yangh ngongh jaic nyei
Genesis41:28 “Naaiv za'gengh hnangv yie mbuox liuz hungh diex wuov nor. Tin-Hungh oix bun meih hiuv duqv ninh oix hnangv haaix nor zoux.
Genesis41:29 Yiem naaiv mingh siec hnyangx gu'nyuoz
Genesis41:30 Nqa'haav aengx maaih siec hnyangx domh huaang domh ngorc. Laaix ngorc hnaangx
Genesis41:31 Taux ngorc nyei ziangh hoc ba'laqc ngorc duqv kouv haic
Genesis41:32 Hungh diex mbeix naaiv deix i norm mbeix biux mengh Tin-Hungh dingc ziangx hnangv naaiv nor zoux yaac oix siepv-siepv nyei zoux.
Genesis41:33 “Hnangv naaiv
Genesis41:34 Aengx orn deix jien gunv gormx deic-bung. Naaiv deix bungx-zuoqc longx nyei siec hnyangx gu'nyuoz oix zuqc siou yietc zungv gaeng-zuangx biaa gouv nyei yietc gouv.
Genesis41:35 Naaiv deix hnyangx-zingh longx nyei ziangh hoc naaiv deix jien oix zuqc zorqv laangh ziqc gapv nzoih guei Faalo Hungh nyei buoz-ndiev siou jienv yiem norm-norm zingh zoux nyanc hopv.
Genesis41:36 Naaiv deix laangh ziqc liouh jienv mbungh I^yipv Deic-Bung ngorc siec hnyangx nyei ziangh hoc ziouc maaih nyanc maaih hopv weic maiv bun deic-bung laaix ngorc hnaangx zuqc mietc nzengc.”
Genesis41:37 Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei yietc zungv jien haiz Yosepv nyei za'eix longx nyei.
Genesis41:38 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox ninh nyei zuangx jien
Genesis41:39 Ninh gorngv mbuox Yosepv
Genesis41:40 Yie oix bun meih goux yie nyei dinc. Yie nyei zuangx baeqc fingx yaac oix zuqc mbuoqc meih
Genesis41:41 Faalo Hungh aengx gorngv mbuox Yosepv
Genesis41:42 Faalo Hungh ziouc hlutv maaih yienx nyei buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng tengx Yosepv dangh jienv. Bun ninh zuqv jienv la'maah ndie-muonc nyei lui-ndaauv
Genesis41:43 Faalo yaac bun Yosepv zueiz ninh nyei da'nyeic norm maaz-cie. Aengx maaih mienh mingh ndaangc heuc jienv gorngv
Genesis41:44 Faalo aengx gorngv mbuox Yosepv
Genesis41:45 Hungh diex tengx Yosepv cuotv norm I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei mbuox heuc Saax^fe^naatv Baa^ne^aa yaac zorqv On Zingh nyei sai mienh
Genesis41:46 Yosepv jiez gorn weic I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei Faalo Hungh zoux gong wuov zanc
Genesis41:47 Yiem wuov deix bungx-zuoqc longx nyei siec hnyangx gu'nyuoz
Genesis41:48 Yosepv ziouc siou naaiv deix siec hnyangx gu'nyuoz nyei laangh ziqc gapv zunv yiem norm-norm zingh. Yiem haaix norm zingh nyei horngc zaangc zuangx nyei laangh ziqc yaac siou daaih gapv zunv an jienv wuov norm zingh.
Genesis41:49 Yosepv siou duqv laangh ziqc ndongc koiv-hlen nyei saa-ziou camv. Camv gau
Genesis41:50 Domh ngorc nyei hnyangx-zingh maiv gaengh taux
Genesis41:51 Yosepv ziouc tengx ninh nyei dorn-hlo cuotv mbuox heuc Maa^natv^se. Ninh gorngv
Genesis41:52 Da'nyeic dauh dorn ninh cuotv mbuox heuc E^faa^im yaac gorngv
Genesis41:53 I^yipv Deic-Bung bungx-zuoqc longx nyei siec hnyangx jiex liuz
Genesis41:54 aengx bieqc siec hnyangx nyei domh ngorc doix nzengc Yosepv gorngv nyei waac. Norm-norm guoqv ngorc nzengc aqv. Mv baac I^yipv Deic-Bung norm-norm dorngx maaih nyanc nyei.
Genesis41:55 Taux I^yipv Mienh ngorc daaih
Genesis41:56 Domh ngorc gunv zoux gunv kouv buangv nzengc I^yipv Deic-Bung mi'aqv. Yosepv ziouc koi nqoi ninh nyei norm-norm dorngx nyei domh lamz maaic mbiauh cuotv bun I^yipv Mienh.
Genesis41:57 Aengx maaih lungh ndiev mienh yietc zungv mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung tengx Yosepv maaiz mbiauh
Genesis42:1 Yaakopv haiz gorngv I^yipv Deic-Bung maaih mbiauh nyei. Ninh ziouc mbuox ninh nyei dorn
Genesis42:2 Yie haiz gorngv I^yipv Deic-Bung maaih mbiauh nyei. Meih mbuo mingh maaiz deix daaih nyanc maah! Tengx mbuo maiv zuqc ngorc hnaangx daic.”
Genesis42:3 Yosepv nyei ziepc dauh gorx ziouc mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung maaiz mbiauh aqv.
Genesis42:4 Mv baac Yosepv nyei youz
Genesis42:5 Yaakopv nyei dorn mbuo caux jienv mienh camv mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung maaiz mbiauh weic zuqc Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung yaac buangh domh ngorc.
Genesis42:6 Yosepv zoux I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei zungx
Genesis42:7 Yosepv zieqv duqv ninh nyei gorx mbuo mv baac ninh zoux hnangv maiv hiuv nor. Ninh caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac beqv nyei naaic gaax
Genesis42:8 Yosepv zieqv duqv ninh gorx mbuo nyei
Genesis42:9 Yosepv jangx zuqc ninh zinh ndaangc mbeix nyei mbeix. Ninh aengx gorngv
Genesis42:10 Ninh mbuo dau
Genesis42:11 Yie mbuo yietc zungv benx yietc dauh die nyei dorn. Yie mbuo yietc zungv
Genesis42:12 Yosepv aengx gorngv
Genesis42:13 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Genesis42:14 Yosepv aengx dau
Genesis42:15 Yie hnangv naaiv nor seix meih mbuo. Yie ziangv jienv Faalo Hungh nyei maengc houv waac. Cuotv liuz meih mbuo nyei youz-laai daaih taux naaiv
Genesis42:16 Bun dauh nzuonx mingh dorh meih mbuo nyei youz-laai daaih. Zengc njiec naaiv deix
Genesis42:17 Gorngv liuz
Genesis42:18 Taux da'faam hnoi
Genesis42:19 Meih mbuo za'gengh hnyouv zaqc nyei mienh nor
Genesis42:20 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc dorh meih mbuo nyei youz-laai daaih yie naaiv. Hnangv naaiv ziouc bun cing meih mbuo nyei waac se zien. Meih mbuo yaac maiv zuqc daic.” Ninh mbuo ziouc laengz ei jienv zoux.
Genesis42:21 Laanh gorngv mbuox laanh
Genesis42:22 Lu^mben gorngv
Genesis42:23 Ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv Yosepv mengh baeqc ninh mbuo gorngv nyei waac weic zuqc ninh haaix zanc caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac maaih mienh tengx faan.
Genesis42:24 Yosepv haiz naaiv deix waac
Genesis42:25 Yosepv heuc mienh zorqv mbiauh dapv buangv ninh gorx mbuo nyei mbuoqc
Genesis42:26 Yosepv nyei gorx mbuo mbenc ziangx bun lorh tor jienv mbiauh ziouc cuotv jauv nzuonx.
Genesis42:27 Wuov muonz taux ninh mbuo hitv nyei dorngx
Genesis42:28 Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei muoz-doic
Genesis42:29 Nzuonx taux Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung
Genesis42:30 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Genesis42:31 Yie mbuo dau
Genesis42:32 Yietc zungv maaih ziepc nyeic muoz-dorn juangc dauh die. Maaih dauh youz maiv yiem aqv. Youz-laai corc caux ninh nyei die yiem Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung.’
Genesis42:33 “Wuov norm deic-bung nyei ziouv gorngv
Genesis42:34 Oix zuqc dorh meih mbuo nyei youz-laai daaih bun yie mangc. Yie ziouc hiuv duqv meih mbuo hnyouv zaqc nyei mienh
Genesis42:35 Ninh mbuo dox mbiauh cuotv wuov zanc
Genesis42:36 Ninh mbuo nyei die
Genesis42:37 Lu^mben gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die
Genesis42:38 Mv baac Yaakopv gorngv
Genesis43:1 Yiem Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung maaih domh huaang domh ngorc kouv haic.
Genesis43:2 Yaakopv nyei hmuangv doic nyanc nzengc mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung maaiz daaih nyei mbiauh mi'aqv. Yaakopv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh nyei dorn
Genesis43:3 Yu^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die
Genesis43:4 Se gorngv die bun youz-laai caux yie mbuo mingh
Genesis43:5 Mv baac se gorngv maiv bun youz-laai caux yie mbuo mingh
Genesis43:6 I^saa^laa^en gorngv
Genesis43:7 Ninh nyei dorn mbuo dau
Genesis43:8 Yu^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die
Genesis43:9 Yie longc yie ganh nyei maengc zoux ndaam-daauh. Die heuc yie ganh beu naaiv dauh dorn duqv nyei. Se gorngv yie maiv dorh ninh nzuonx taux meih naaiv
Genesis43:10 Se gorngv maiv hnangv naaiv zuov lauh
Genesis43:11 I^saa^laa^en gorngv mbuox ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Genesis43:12 Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc dorh nyaanh gauh camv mingh ndaangc wuov nzunc i gouv. Oix zuqc dorh dongh yiem mbuoqc wuov deix nyaanh tuix nzuonx
Genesis43:13 Gunv dorh jienv meih mbuo nyei youz mingh lorz wuov laanh mienh.
Genesis43:14 Tov Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo yiem wuov laanh mienh nyei nza'hmien duqv ninh korv-lienh meih mbuo
Genesis43:15 Ninh mbuo muoz-doic ziouc cuotv jauv mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung
Genesis43:16 Yosepv buatc Mben^yaa^min caux jienv daaih ziouc mbuox goux ninh nyei biauv nyei domh bou
Genesis43:17 Wuov dauh bou ei jienv Yosepv nyei waac zoux
Genesis43:18 Bou dorh jienv ninh mbuo bieqc Yosepv nyei biauv wuov zanc

Genesis43:20 “Domh Gorx aac
Genesis43:21 Nzuonx maengx

Genesis43:23 Wuov dauh bou dau
Genesis43:24 Wuov dauh bou dorh wuov deix muoz-doic bieqc biauv lorz wuom bun ninh mbuo nzaaux zaux yaac lorz miev bun ninh mbuo nyei lorh nyanc.
Genesis43:25 Wuov deix muoz-doic mbenc ziangx ninh mbuo nyei zingh nyeic zuov jienv Yosepv nzuonx
Genesis43:26 Yosepv taux biauv
Genesis43:27 Yosepv naaic ninh mbuo
Genesis43:28 Ninh mbuo dau

Genesis43:30 Gorngv liuz
Genesis43:31 Nzaaux liuz hmien
Genesis43:32 Bou weic Yosepv ganh mbenc norm dieh
Genesis43:33 Yosepv bun zuangx muoz-doic zueiz jienv hmien huin mingh Yosepv nyei dieh wuov bung
Genesis43:34 Ninh mbuo nyanc nyei ga'naaiv
Genesis44:1 Yosepv paaiv goux ninh nyei biauv nyei domh bou
Genesis44:2 Zorqv yie nyei zaanv
Genesis44:3 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
Genesis44:4 Cuotv ziqc zingh mingh maiv gaengh nangc go
Genesis44:5 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc nimc yie nyei ziouv nyei nyaanh zaanv mingh? Naaiv norm zaanv ninh longc hopv yaac longc naaic zinh hoz nyei jauv. Meih mbuo za'gengh zoux dorngc ndo haic aqv.’+”
Genesis44:6 Wuov dauh bou zunc zaaic
Genesis44:7 Mv baac wuov deix muoz-doic gorngv
Genesis44:8 Mangc gaax

Genesis44:21 “Meih heuc yie mbuo

Genesis44:25 “Yie mbuo nyei die mbuox yie mbuo
Genesis44:26 Yie mbuo dau
Genesis44:27 “Meih nyei bou

Genesis44:29 Se gorngv meih mbuo dorh naaiv dauh mingh

Genesis44:33 “Hnangv naaic
Genesis44:34 Se gorngv naaiv dauh dorn maiv caux yie nzuonx
Genesis45:1 Yosepv haiz nyienz maiv jienv
Genesis45:2 Yosepv qaqv nyiemv mbui nyei
Genesis45:3 Yosepv mbuox ninh nyei muoz-doic
Genesis45:4 Yosepv ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo
Genesis45:5 Meih mbuo maiv dungx hnyouv mun
Genesis45:6 Deic-bung ngorc duqv i hnyangx aqv. Corc aengx maaih biaa hnyangx maiv haih zuangx
Genesis45:7 Tin-Hungh paaiv yie daaih ndaangc meih mbuo
Genesis45:8 “Hnangv naaiv se maiv zeiz gorx mbuo bun yie daaih naaiv. Se Tin-Hungh ganh paaiv yie daaih. Ninh bun yie hnangv Faalo Hungh nyei die
Genesis45:9 Ih zanc gaanv nzuonx mingh mbuox yie nyei die
Genesis45:10 Die haih yiem naaiv
Genesis45:11 Hnangv naaiv yie haih goux die
Genesis45:12 Yosepv aengx gorngv
Genesis45:13 Gorngv mbuox die
Genesis45:14 Yosepv qam jienv ninh nyei youz
Genesis45:15 Yosepv aengx zom ninh nyei dauh dauh gorx aengx nyiemv. Nqa'haav ninh nyei muoz-doic caux ninh gorngv waac.
Genesis45:16 Yosepv nyei muoz-doic daaih nyei fienx sing taux hungh dinc. Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei zuangx jien a'hneiv haic aqv.
Genesis45:17 Faalo Hungh gorngv mbuox Yosepv
Genesis45:18 Bienh meih mbuo nyei die caux meih mbuo nyei hmuangv doic daaih yie naaiv. Yie oix bun I^yipv Deic-Bung gauh longx jiex nyei ga'naaiv ninh mbuo. Naaiv norm deic-bung maaih haaix nyungc longx jiex ninh mbuo duqv nyanc aqv.’
Genesis45:19 “Meih yaac oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo
Genesis45:20 Meih mbuo maiv dungx korv-fiqv meih mbuo nyei ga'naaiv weic zuqc I^yipv Deic-Bung maaih gauh longx jiex nyei ga'naaiv se benx meih mbuo nyei.’+”
Genesis45:21 I^saa^laa^en nyei dorn mbuo ziouc ei jienv zoux. Yosepv yaac ei jienv Faalo Hungh paaiv nyei waac bun ngongh cie ninh mbuo
Genesis45:22 Ninh nyei gorx mbuo

Genesis45:24 Yosepv ziouc fungx ninh nyei muoz-doic cuotv jauv nzuonx. Oix mingh wuov zanc ninh gorngv

Genesis45:28 I^saa^laa^en gorngv
Genesis46:1 I^saa^laa^en dorh jienv ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv cuotv jauv mingh taux Mbe^e^qe^mbaa Deic yiem wuov ziec ninh nyei die
Genesis46:2 Lungh muonz zanc Tin-Hungh hinc cuotv daaih heuc ninh
Genesis46:3 Tin-Hungh gorngv
Genesis46:4 Yie caux meih mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung
Genesis46:5 Yaakopv yiem Mbe^e^qe^mbaa Deic cuotv jauv. Ninh nyei dorn mbuo bun ninh mbuo nyei die caux ninh mbuo nyei fu'jueiv-faix caux ninh mbuo yietc zungv nyei auv faaux Faalo Hungh bun daaih zipv Yaakopv mbuo wuov deix ngongh cie mingh.
Genesis46:6 Ninh mbuo yaac dorh jienv yiem Kaa^naa^an duqv daaih nyei saeng-kuv caux nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung. Yaakopv caux ninh nyei fun-faqv yietc zungv mingh.
Genesis46:7 Ninh dorh jienv ninh nyei dorn
Genesis46:8 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv mingh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mbuox. Se Yaakopv caux ninh nyei fun-faqv. Maaih Yaakopv nyei dorn-hlo
Genesis46:9 Lu^mben nyei dorn se Haanokv
Genesis46:10 Si^me^on nyei dorn se Ye^mu^en
Genesis46:11 Lewi nyei dorn se Geson
Genesis46:12 Yu^ndaa nyei dorn se E^aa
Genesis46:13 Itc^saax^kaa nyei dorn se Tolaa
Genesis46:14 Se^mbu^lun nyei dorn se Seletv

Genesis46:16 Gaatc nyei dorn se Si^fi^yon
Genesis46:17 Aa^se nyei dorn se Imnaa
Genesis46:18 Naaiv deix se Laa^mbaan bun ninh nyei sieqv

Genesis46:21 Mben^yaa^min nyei dorn se Mbelaa
Genesis46:22 Naaiv deix se Laasen yungz bun Yaakopv nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv. Yietc zungv maaih ziepc feix dauh.
Genesis46:23 Ndaan nyei dorn se Husim.
Genesis46:24 Napv^taa^li nyei dorn se Yaa^si^en

Genesis47:15 I^yipv Mienh caux Kaa^naa^an Mienh nyei nyaanh longc njang nzengc mi'aqv. I^yipv Mienh ziouc mingh lorz Yosepv gorngv
Genesis47:16 Yosepv gorngv
Genesis47:17 Baeqc fingx ziouc dorh ninh mbuo nyei saeng-kuv mingh Yosepv wuov. Yosepv longc mbiauh yienc ninh mbuo nyei yungh

Tov meih longc laangh ziqc yienc yie mbuo caux yie mbuo nyei ndau. Yie mbuo ziouc benx Faalo Hungh nyei nouh. Yie mbuo nyei ndau yaac benx ninh nyei mi'aqv. Tov bun mbiauh nyim yie mbuo weic bun yie mbuo haih duqv maengc ziangh
Genesis47:20 Hnangv naaic Yosepv maaiz nzengc I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei ndau bun Faalo Hungh. I^yipv Mienh dauh dauh maaic nzengc ninh mbuo nyei ndau
Genesis47:21 Yosepv yaac bun zuangx baeqc fingx yiem naaiv bung I^yipv mingh taux wuov bung I^yipv benx nzengc Faalo Hungh nyei nouh.

Genesis49:1 Yaakopv heuc ninh nyei dorn mbuo daaih nzoih. Ninh gorngv
Genesis49:2 “Yaakopv nyei dorn aac
Genesis49:3 “Lu^mben aac
Genesis49:4 Meih beiv hnangv wuom-seix nor
Genesis49:5 “Si^me^on caux Lewi zoux i muoz. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuqc ndaauv se zoux doqc nyei wuoqc ginc.
Genesis49:6 Ninh mbuo daav za'eix
Genesis49:7 Laaix ninh mbuo qiex jiez
Genesis49:8 “Yu^ndaa aac
Genesis49:9 Yu^ndaa aac
Genesis49:10 Yu^ndaa oix yietc liuz nanv jienv hungh diex nyei biaav. Ninh gunv mienh nyei biaav-mbiaac zungv maiv leih ninh nyei i jieqv zaux mbu'ndongx
Genesis49:11 Ninh nyei lorh gouv ninh ndoh jienv a'ngunc hmei
Genesis49:12 Weic hopv a'ngunc diuv
Genesis49:13 “Se^mbu^lun duqv yiem wuov koiv-hlen
Genesis49:14 “Itc^saax^kaa hnangv lorh nor henv
Genesis49:15 Ninh buatc ninh hitv nyei dorngx longx
Genesis49:16 “Ndaan oix baengh fim nyei siemv ninh nyei baeqc fingx. Ninh nyei fingx se yietc fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Genesis49:17 Ndaan oix benx diuh naang yiem wuov jauv
Genesis49:18 “ Ziouv aac
Genesis49:19 “Gaatc oix zuqc guanh janx-zaqc caangv
Genesis49:20 “Aa^se nyei deic-bung bungx-zuoqc

Genesis49:22 “Yosepv se ziangh biouv camv nyei ndiangx-nquaah
Genesis49:23 Buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh daaih caux ninh mborqv jaax zoux doqc
Genesis49:24 Mv baac ninh zaangv dingc ninh nyei juang-zinx. Ninh nyei buoz yaac maaih qaqv henv weic Yaakopv nyei Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh
Genesis49:25 Weic meih nyei die nyei Tin-Hungh
Genesis49:26 Meih nyei die bun meih duqv nyei fuqv se gauh hlo jiex yietc liuz yiem nyei mbong duqv daaih nyei fuqv. Se gauh hlo jiex yie nyei ong-taaix bun daaih nyei fuqv. Tov naaiv deix fuqv yiem Yosepv nyei m'nqorngv
Genesis49:27 “Mben^yaa^min hnangv dauh hieh juv cei orv
Genesis49:28 Naaiv se I^saa^laa^en nyei ziepc nyeic fingx. Yaac ziux ninh mbuo nyei die buang nyei waac puix duqv ninh mbuo dauh dauh.
Genesis49:29 Yaakopv paaiv waac bun ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Genesis49:30 Makv^be^laa
Genesis49:31 Apc^laa^ham caux ninh nyei auv
Genesis49:32 Wuov nzong ndau caux mbaengx-kuotv tengx Hitv^tai Mienh maaiz daaih.”
Genesis49:33 Yaakopv paaiv waac mbuox liuz ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Genesis50:1 Yosepv buatc ninh nyei die dangx qiex
Genesis50:2 Ninh paaiv tengx ninh zoux gong wuov deix ndie-sai longc ndie-wuom ziemx jienv ninh nyei die
Genesis50:3 Ndie-sai ziouc longc feix ziepc hnoi zoux
Genesis50:4 Naaiv deix nzauh nyiemv nyei ziangh hoc jiex liuz
Genesis50:5 Mbuox ninh
Genesis50:6 Faalo Hungh dau
Genesis50:7 Yosepv ziouc dorh ninh nyei die mingh zangx aqv. Faalo Hungh nyei yietc zungv jien yaac caux jienv mingh. Se yiem hungh dinc zoux gauh hlo wuov deix jien
Genesis50:8 Yosepv nyei hmuangv doic caux ninh nyei muoz-doic aengx caux ninh nyei die nyei biauv zong mienh yietc zungv gan jienv mingh. Kungx zengc fu'jueiv-faix caux ba'gi yungh
Genesis50:9 Maaih maaz-cie
Genesis50:10 Mingh taux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei dong bung maengx
Genesis50:11 Yiem wuov norm dorngx nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh buatc mienh yiem Aataatv mborqv mbiauh nyei ciangv nzauh nyiemv
Genesis50:12 Yaakopv nyei dorn mbuo ziouc ei jienv ninh mbuo nyei die paaiv nyei waac zoux.
Genesis50:13 Ninh mbuo dorh sei mingh Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung
Genesis50:14 Zangx liuz ninh nyei die
Genesis50:15 Ninh mbuo nyei die guei seix mi'aqv
Genesis50:16 Ninh mbuo ziouc bun mienh mingh mbuox Yosepv
Genesis50:17 ‘Oix zuqc mbuox Yosepv
Genesis50:18 Ninh nyei gorx mbuo ziouc mingh taux Yosepv nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec ndau baaix aengx gorngv
Genesis50:19 Mv baac Yosepv gorngv mbuox ninh nyei gorx mbuo
Genesis50:20 Meih mbuo daav za'eix hoic yie
Genesis50:21 Hnangv naaic
Genesis50:22 Yosepv caux ninh nyei die nyei hmuangv doic yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung
Genesis50:23 yaac duqv buatc E^faa^im nyei fu'jueiv taux da'faam doic. Aengx duqv zipv Maa^natv^se nyei dorn
Genesis50:24 Yosepv gorngv mbuox ninh nyei muoz-doic
Genesis50:25 Yosepv aengx heuc I^saa^laa^en nyei dorn laengz ngaengc waac. Ninh gorngv
Genesis50:26 Yosepv ziangh yietc baeqv ziepc hnyangx yiem wuov I^yipv Deic-Bung guei seix mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo zorqv sei ziemx jienv ndie-wuom bun maiv haih huv
Exodus1:1 Naaiv se Yaakopv nyei dorn nyei mbuox
Exodus1:2 Ninh nyei dorn nyei mbuox heuc Lu^mben
Exodus1:3 Itc^saax^kaa
Exodus1:4 Ndaan
Exodus1:5 Yaakopv nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv yietc zungv maaih cietv ziepc dauh. Maaih Yosepv wuov dauh zungv yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung mi'aqv.
Exodus1:6 Hoz daaih
Exodus1:7 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih fun-faqv camv
Exodus1:8 Nqa'haav ganh maaih dauh siang-hungh gunv I^yipv Deic-Bung. Ninh maiv hiuv yietc deix taux Yosepv.
Exodus1:9 Wuov dauh hungh diex gorngv mbuox ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Exodus1:10 Daaih maah! Mbuo oix zuqc longc guv guaix nyei za'eix bun ninh mbuo maiv haih hiaangx. Maiv zeiz nor
Exodus1:11 I^yipv Mienh ziouc paaiv gong-bou-bieiv gunv jienv I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Exodus1:12 I^yipv Mienh yietc zei zoux hoic
Exodus1:13 qaqv hoic ninh mbuo zoux gong kouv.
Exodus1:14 I^yipv Mienh hoic I^saa^laa^en Mienh zoux gong kouv
Exodus1:15 I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei hungh gorngv mbuox tengx Hipv^lu Mienh yungz gu'nguaaz wuov deix m'sieqv dorn
Exodus1:16 “Meih mbuo tengx Hipv^lu Mienh yungz gu'nguaaz
Exodus1:17 Mv baac tengx yungz gu'nguaaz nyei m'sieqv dorn gamh nziex Tin-Hungh
Exodus1:18 I^yipv Hungh ziouc heuc tengx yungz gu'nguaaz wuov deix m'sieqv dorn daaih
Exodus1:19 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn dau
Exodus1:20 Tin-Hungh ziouc zoux longx bun tengx yungz gu'nguaaz wuov deix m'sieqv dorn. I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx jaa hiaangx jienv faaux yaac henv jienv faaux.
Exodus1:21 Weic zuqc tengx yungz gu'nguaaz wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gamh nziex Tin-Hungh
Exodus1:22 Zoux gau
Exodus2:1 Zoux gau
Exodus2:2 Ninh nyei auv ziouc maaih sin
Exodus2:3 Bingx gau
Exodus2:4 Gu'nguaaz nyei dorc yiem go deix nyei
Exodus2:5 Faalo Hungh nyei sieqv mingh wuov Nai^aa Ndaaih nzaaux sin. Mbienz ninh wuov deix m'sieqv bou yiem wuov ndaaih hlen saau a'nziaauc. Hungh sieqv buatc wuov norm ndaan yiem wuov luoqc diqc lomc ziouc heuc ninh nyei nouh beiz mingh zorqv daaih.
Exodus2:6 Hungh sieqv koi mangc buatc dauh gu'nguaaz-dorn. Gu'nguaaz yaac nyiemv aqv. Hungh sieqv korv-lienh haic
Exodus2:7 Gu'nguaaz nyei dorc ziouc daaih naaic gaax hungh sieqv
Exodus2:8 Hungh sieqv dau
Exodus2:9 Faalo Hungh nyei sieqv gorngv mbuox gu'nguaaz nyei maa
Exodus2:10 Gu'nguaaz nyei maa ziouc hlorpv gu'nguaaz mingh dorh. Gu'nguaaz hlo deix
Exodus2:11 Mose hlo daaih aqv. Maaih hnoi nor
Exodus2:12 Mose ziouc mangc naaiv mangc wuov

Exodus2:14 Wuov dauh dau
Exodus2:15 Faalo Hungh haiz naaiv deix sic ninh oix daix Mose
Exodus2:16 Mi^ndien Deic-Bung maaih dauh sai mienh maaih siec dauh sieqv. Wuov deix siec muoz-sieqv daaih cie wuom dox buangv zoh bun ninh mbuo nyei die nyei ba'gi yungh guanh caux yungh guanh hopv.
Exodus2:17 Aengx maaih guanh mangc yungh nyei mienh daaih zunc naaiv deix siec muoz-sieqv biaux. Mose ziouc jiez sin tengx naaiv deix sieqv yaac tengx ninh mbuo cie wuom bun ninh mbuo nyei yungh hopv.

Exodus4:31 Baeqc fingx ziouc sienx. Ninh mbuo haiz gorngv Ziouv daaih lorz ninh mbuo I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac buatc ninh mbuo zuqc mienh hoic nyei kouv naanc

Exodus5:7 “Yiem naaiv mingh maiv dungx bun mbiauh nqaauv naaiv deix mienh zoux nie-zun. Heuc ninh mbuo ganh mingh lorz.
Exodus5:8 Mv baac oix zuqc aapv ninh mbuo zoux taux mbuoqc da'hnangv hnoi nyei soux mouc. Maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo zoqc yietc norm. Ninh mbuo lueic haic cingx daaih ceuv
Exodus5:9 Oix zuqc hoic ninh mbuo zoux gong gauh kouv zinh ndaangc wuov. Bun ninh mbuo maiv dingh maiv hitv nyei zoux jienv gong mingh
Exodus5:10 Wuov deix gunv nouh mienh caux gong-bou-bieiv ziouc cuotv mingh mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Exodus5:11 Mingh haaix lorz

Exodus5:15 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei gong-bou-bieiv ziouc mingh lorz Faalo Hungh. Ninh mbuo gorngv

Exodus7:2 da'faanh yie paaiv meih nyei yietc zungv waac
Exodus7:3 Mv baac yie oix bun Faalo nyei hnyouv ngaengc. Maiv gunv yie yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung zoux mbu'ziex nzunc mbuoqc horngh haic nyei sic caux jangx-hoc
Exodus7:4 ninh yaac maiv muangx meih mbuo. Yie ziouc sung yie nyei buoz jiez daaih hniev-hniev nyei dingc I^yipv Mienh nyei zuiz
Exodus7:5 Yie sung buoz dingc I^yipv Mienh nyei zuiz yaac dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih wuov zanc
Exodus7:6 Mose caux Aalon ei jienv Ziouv paaiv ninh mbuo nyei waac zoux.
Exodus7:7 Ninh mbuo i dauh mingh caux hungh diex gorngv wuov zanc
Exodus7:8 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Exodus7:9 “Faalo haaix zanc gorngv
Exodus7:10 Mose caux Aalon ziouc mingh Faalo Hungh wuov
Exodus7:11 Faalo ziouc heuc ninh nyei guai-gorqv fin-saeng caux zoux huaax-nyinz nyei mienh daaih. Naaiv deix zoux faatv nyei I^yipv Mienh yaac longc ninh mbuo nyei faatv fih hnangv nyei zoux.
Exodus7:12 Gorqv-mienh zorqv gorqv-mienh nyei biaav-mbiaac guaengx njiec ndau
Exodus7:13 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic
Exodus7:14 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus7:15 Njang ndorm Faalo mingh Nai^aa Ndaaih wuov zanc

Exodus7:17 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Exodus7:18 Yiem ndaaih nyei mbiauz zuqc daic. Ndaaih yaac zueix nzengc. I^yipv Mienh zungv hopv maiv duqv ndaaih nyei wuom.”+’+”
Exodus7:19 Ziouv mbuox Mose
Exodus7:20 Mose caux Aalon ziouc ei jienv Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux nzengc. Dorng jienv Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei jien nyei nza'hmien
Exodus7:21 Yiem ndaaih nyei mbiauz daic. Wuom yaac zueix haic
Exodus7:22 Mv baac I^yipv nyei huaax-nyinz mienh longc ninh mbuo nyei faatv fih hnangv nyei zoux. Faalo Hungh nyei hnyouv ziouc fih hnangv nyei ngaengc. Ninh maiv kangv muangx Mose caux Aalon nyei waac hnangv Ziouv gorngv nor.
Exodus7:23 Faalo Hungh maiv guen maiv sic nyei nzuonx mingh bieqc ninh nyei hungh dinc mi'aqv.
Exodus7:24 I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei zuangx mienh wetv wuov Nai^aa Ndaaih hlen lorz wuom hopv
Exodus7:25 Ziouv mborqv liuz Nai^aa Ndaaih
Exodus8:1 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus8:2 Meih maiv kangv bungx ninh mbuo mingh nor
Exodus8:3 Gaengv yaac oix buangv nzengc Nai^aa Ndaaih. Gaengv yaac oix faaux mingh bieqc meih nyei hungh dinc
Exodus8:4 Gaengv yaac oix faaux meih nyei sin
Exodus8:5 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus8:6 Aalon sung buoz jiex I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei wuom gu'nguaaic. Gaengv ziouc cuotv daaih buangv I^yipv Deic-Bung mi'aqv.
Exodus8:7 Mv baac zoux huaax-nyinz nyei mienh longc ninh mbuo nyei faatv fih hnangv nyei zoux
Exodus8:8 Faalo Hungh heuc Mose caux Aalon daaih
Exodus8:9 Mose gorngv mbuox Faalo Hungh
Exodus8:10 Faalo gorngv
Exodus8:11 Gaengv oix biaux meih caux meih nyei jien caux meih nyei baeqc fingx
Exodus8:12 Mose caux Aalon yiem Faalo wuov cuotv mingh mi'aqv. Mose weic cuotv daaih hoic Faalo naaiv deix gaengv qaqv daux gaux tov Ziouv tengx.
Exodus8:13 Ziouv ziouc ziux Mose tov nyei waac zoux. Yiem biauv
Exodus8:14 I^yipv Mienh nzauz gaengv-daic daaih ndui-ndui nyei. Yietc norm deic-bung zueix nzengc.
Exodus8:15 Mv baac Faalo Hungh buatc gaengv daic nzengc
Exodus8:16 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus8:17 Ninh mbuo i dauh ei jienv zoux. Aalon yaamh jiez biaav-mbiaac mborqv nie-mbung. Nie-mbung ziouc benx gaeng-mbung daaih buangv mienh nyei sin caux saeng-kuv nyei sin. I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei nie-mbung benx gaeng-mbung nzengc.
Exodus8:18 Zoux huaax-nyinz nyei mienh oix longc ninh mbuo nyei faatv zoux gaeng-mbung yaac zoux maiv cuotv. Gaeng-mbung daaih fiaau mienh nyei sin caux saeng-kuv nyei sin.
Exodus8:19 Zoux huaax-nyinz nyei mienh gorngv mbuox Faalo
Exodus8:20 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus8:21 Se gorngv meih maiv bungx yie nyei baeqc fingx mingh nor
Exodus8:22 “+‘+“Dongh wuov hnoi yie oix nqenx cuotv Gosen Deic-Bung
Exodus8:23 Yie ziouc nqenx jienv yie nyei baeqc fingx caux meih nyei baeqc fingx. Naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc njang hnoi cuotv aqv.”+’+”
Exodus8:24 Ziouv ziouc hnangv naaiv zoux. Mungz faanv ngomh ngomh nyei bieqc Faalo nyei hungh dinc caux ninh nyei jien nyei biauv. Deic-bung haaix ndau maaih mungz buangv nzengc. Laaix naaiv deix mungz faanv
Exodus8:25 Faalo ziouc heuc Mose caux Aalon daaih. Ninh gorngv
Exodus8:26 Mose gorngv
Exodus8:27 Yie mbuo oix zuqc mingh buo hnoi nyei jauv-dingh
Exodus8:28 Faalo gorngv
Exodus8:29 Mose dau
Exodus8:30 Mose ziouc mingh aqv
Exodus8:31 Ziouv yaac ei Mose tov nyei waac zoux. Mungz biaux nzengc Faalo caux ninh nyei jien caux ninh nyei baeqc fingx. Maiv zengc yietc norm aqv.
Exodus8:32 Mv baac naaiv nzunc Faalo aengx ngaengc jienv hnyouv
Exodus9:1 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus9:2 Se gorngv meih maiv bungx ninh mbuo mingh
Exodus9:3 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo nyei saeng-kuv ciangv nyei yietc zungv lorh maaz
Exodus9:4 Mv baac Ziouv oix bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei saeng-kuv caux I^yipv Mienh nyei saeng-kuv maiv fih hnangv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei saeng-kuv maiv zuqc daic yietc dauh.’+”
Exodus9:5 Ziouv dingc ziangx ziangh hoc yaac gorngv
Exodus9:6 Da'nyeic hnoi Ziouv za'gengh ei jienv ninh nyei waac zoux. I^yipv Mienh nyei saeng-kuv daic nzengc mi'aqv. Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei maiv daic yietc dauh.
Exodus9:7 Faalo paaiv mienh mingh mangc ziouc hiuv duqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei saeng-kuv maiv daic yietc dauh. Mv baac Faalo nyei hnyouv corc ngaengc nyei
Exodus9:8 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Exodus9:9 Saaiv ziouc hnangv nie-mbung-muonc mbung mingh buangv I^yipv Deic-Bung. Liemh mienh liemh saeng-kuv ziouc ziangh zueih gunx nongc yaac faanv gormx deic-bung.”
Exodus9:10 Mose mbuo ziouc nyau jienv douz-nzauc nyei saaiv mingh taux Faalo nyei nza'hmien
Exodus9:11 Zoux huaax-nyinz nyei mienh liemh maiv haih mingh souv jienv Mose nyei nza'hmien
Exodus9:12 Mv baac Ziouv bun Faalo nyei hnyouv ngaengc
Exodus9:13 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus9:14 Maiv zei aeqv
Exodus9:15 Se gorngv yie oix zoux nor
Exodus9:16 Mv baac yie liouh meih mbuo weic bun meih mbuo buatc yie nyei domh qaqv yaac haih maaih mienh zunh yie nyei mengh buangv lungh ndiev.
Exodus9:17 Meih corc ngaengc jienv yie nyei baeqc fingx
Exodus9:18 Muangx jienv oc. Njang hnoi taux naaiv norm ziangh hoc oix duih domh borqc. Yiem liepc jiez I^yipv Deic-Bung taux ih zanc
Exodus9:19 Ih zanc oix zuqc paaiv mienh mingh dorh yiem lingh deic nyei saeng-kuv caux maaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv nzuonx daaih bingx jienv. Maiv gunv mienh fai saeng-kuv
Exodus9:20 Faalo nyei jien
Exodus9:21 Mv baac maiv muangx Ziouv nyei waac wuov deix
Exodus9:22 Ziouv mbuox Mose
Exodus9:23 Mose ziouc longc biaav-mbiaac ziangv jienv lungh

Exodus9:25 I^yipv Deic-Bung norm-norm dorngx

Exodus9:28 Tengx daux gaux tov Ziouv
Exodus9:29 Mose dau

Exodus10:1 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus10:2 weic bun meih mbuo gorngv mbuox meih mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv muangx yie hnangv haaix nor zoux bun I^yipv Mienh
Exodus10:3 Mose caux Aalon ziouc mingh gorngv mbuox Faalo
Exodus10:4 Meih maiv kangv bungx yie nyei baeqc fingx mingh nor
Exodus10:5 Jopv-nyeic oix njiec daaih yiem buangv ndau-beih
Exodus10:6 Jopv-nyeic oix bieqc buangv meih nyei dinc caux meih nyei jien caux meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei biauv. Meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Exodus10:7 Faalo Hungh nyei jien gorngv mbuox Faalo

Exodus10:12 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus10:13 Mose ziouc sung biaav-mbiaac jiex I^yipv Deic-Bung gu'nguaaic. Ziouv bun dong bung maengx nyei nziaaux buonc yietc hnoi yietc muonz. Da'nyeic ndorm nziaaux ziouc buonc jienv jopv-nyeic njunh njunh nyei bieqc deic-bung aqv.
Exodus10:14 Jopv-nyeic faatv-faatv nyei njiec I^yipv Deic-Bung. Haaix norm dorngx yaac jopv-nyeic buangv nzengc. Zinh ndaangc maiv gaengh maaih jiex jopv-nyeic ndongc naaiv camv. Nqa'haav hingv yietc liuz yaac maiv maaih.
Exodus10:15 Jopv-nyeic ndui ndipc ndau-beih hmuangx nzengc. Borqc mborqv liuz zengc njiec nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv jopv-nyeic nyanc nzengc. Yiem ndeic nyei gaeng-zuangx ga'naaiv caux yiem ndiangx nyei biouv nyanc nzengc. I^yipv Deic-Bung maiv maaih yietc kuaaiv ndiangx-normh maeng fai yietc diuh miev-maeng aqv.
Exodus10:16 Faalo siepv-siepv nyei heuc Mose caux Aalon daaih. Ninh gorngv
Exodus10:17 Ih zanc tov aengx guangc nzunc yie nyei zuiz
Exodus10:18 Mose ziouc yiem Faalo wuov cuotv. Ninh mingh daux gaux tov Ziouv tengx.
Exodus10:19 Ziouv ziouc tiuv dong bung nziaaux benx fai bung nyei domh nziaaux buonc daaih hlorv jopv-nyeic mingh guangc wuov Koiv-Siqv. I^yipv Deic-Bung maiv zengc yietc norm jopv-nyeic aqv.
Exodus10:20 Mv baac Ziouv bun Faalo nyei hnyouv ngaengc
Exodus10:21 Ziouv aengx mbuox Mose

Exodus10:23 Buo hnoi gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo laanh mangc maiv buatc laanh yaac maiv haih cuotv biauv mingh haaix ndau. Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem nyei dorngx njang nyei.

Exodus11:6 Yietc norm I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei mienh oix mbiouh mbiouh nyei nyiemv nzengc. Zinh ndaangc maiv maaih jiex hnangv naaic. Nqa'haav hingv yaac maiv maaih aqv.

Exodus12:1 Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Exodus12:2 “Naaiv norm hlaax oix zuqc benx meih mbuo nyei zih hlaax
Exodus12:3 Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Exodus12:4 Haaix buonc mienh hmuangv zoqc
Exodus12:5 Longc ba'gi yungh dorn yaac duqv
Exodus12:6 Ginv cuotv daaih uix jienv taux naaiv norm hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi. Lungh maanz-hmuangx
Exodus12:7 Yiem haaix norm biauv nyanc
Exodus12:8 Dongh wuov muonz ninh mbuo oix zuqc nyanc ziqv daaih nyei yungh orv caux maiv an bingv nyei njuov caux jienv lai-im.
Exodus12:9 Wuov deix orv maiv dungx nyanc nyiemz yaac maiv dungx zouv. Oix zuqc ziangh dauh ziqv
Exodus12:10 Maiv dungx liouh yietc deix taux lungh ndorm. Se gorngv maaih zengc taux lungh ndorm oix zuqc buov guangc.
Exodus12:11 Nyanc nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor nyanc. Oix zuqc sai jienv houx-hlaang
Exodus12:12 “Dongh naaiv muonz yie oix mingh gormx I^yipv Deic-Bung daix nzengc dauh dauh dorn-la'gauv caux saeng-kuv njiec nyei daauh toi dorn. Yie yaac oix siemv dingc I^yipv Deic-Bung yietc zungv zienh nyei zuiz. Yie se Ziouv.
Exodus12:13 Nzaatv gaengh zouc
Exodus12:14 “Naaiv norm hnoi meih mbuo oix zuqc jangx jienv. Yietc doic jiex yietc doic oix zuqc longc naaiv norm hnoi jiex zipv houc Ziouv
Exodus12:15 “Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz oix zuqc nyanc maiv an bingv nyei njuov. Daauh hnoi oix zuqc zorqv yiem biauv nyei bingv cuotv nzengc weic zuqc yiem daauh hnoi taux da'cietv hnoi gu'nyuoz
Exodus12:16 Da'yietv hnoi oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix. Da'cietv hnoi fih hnangv nyei. Naaiv deix hnoi gu'nyuoz
Exodus12:17 “Oix zuqc jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv weic zuqc dongh naaiv norm hnoi yie dorh meih mbuo guanh guanh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv. Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc jiex naaiv norm zipv
Exodus12:18 Zih hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx
Exodus12:19 Naaiv deix siec hnoi maiv dungx bun haaix dauh nyei biauv maaih bingv. Haaix dauh nyanc da'faanh an bingv nyei ga'naaiv
Exodus12:20 Maiv dungx nyanc haaix nyungc an bingv nyei ga'naaiv. Maiv gunv yiem haaix
Exodus12:21 Mose heuc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gox daaih nzoih
Exodus12:22 Oix zuqc zorqv yietc zeiv husopc miev ziemx bunh gu'nyuoz nyei nziaamv
Exodus12:23 Ziouv oix mingh gormx I^yipv Deic-Bung daix I^yipv Mienh. Ninh buatc gaengh gu'nguaaic caux i bung gaengh zouc nyei nziaamv nor
Exodus12:24 “Meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc yietc liuz gan naaiv diuh leiz.
Exodus12:25 Meih mbuo mingh taux Ziouv laengz bun meih mbuo wuov norm deic-bung
Exodus12:26 Meih mbuo nyei naamh nyouz naaic gaax meih mbuo
Exodus12:27 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo
Exodus12:28 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ei jienv Ziouv mbuox Mose caux Aalon nyei waac zoux.
Exodus12:29 Taux ndaamv muonz
Exodus12:30 Wuov muonz Faalo caux ninh nyei jien caux zuangx baeqc fingx jiez sin daaih. I^yipv Mienh yietc zungv mbiouh mbiouh nyei nyiemv
Exodus12:31 Dongh wuov muonz Faalo heuc Mose caux Aalon daaih. Ninh gorngv
Exodus12:32 Dorh jienv meih mbuo nyei ngongh guanh

Exodus12:34 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc zorqv caix ziangx maiv gaengh an bingv nyei njuov dapv jienv ninh mbuo caix njuov nyei bunh
Exodus12:35 Ninh mbuo ei jienv Mose paaiv nyei waac zoux
Exodus12:36 Ziouv bun I^yipv Mienh nqoi fim nqoi eix ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo tov haaix nyungc
Exodus12:37 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Laa^maa^setc cuotv jauv mingh taux Sukc^kotv. M'jangc dorn maaih leih maiv go juqv sinx dauh
Exodus12:38 Aengx maaih ganh fingx mienh camv nyei caux jienv ngongh guanh
Exodus12:39 Ninh mbuo ziqv yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung dorh daaih nyei njuov-nyiemz. Ninh mbuo maiv duqv an bingv weic zuqc ninh mbuo zuqc zunc
Exodus12:40 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung feix baeqv faah ziepc hnyangx.
Exodus12:41 Buangv feix baeqv faah ziepc hnyangx wuov hnoi
Exodus12:42 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov muonz
Exodus12:43 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Exodus12:44 Mv baac longc nyaanh maaiz daaih nyei nouh gauv oix zuqc jiex gaatv nyei leiz ndaangc cingx bun ninh nyanc duqv.
Exodus12:45 “Caux yiem meih mbuo nyei biauv caamx baav nyei kaeqv mienh fai cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh nyanc maiv duqv.
Exodus12:46 “Nyanc nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc yiem biauv gu'nyuoz nyanc. Maiv dungx dorh cuotv gaengh ka'ndau. Nyanc wuov dauh yungh dorn maiv dungx bun mbungv nauv yietc diuh.
Exodus12:47 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh oix zuqc jiex naaiv norm zipv.
Exodus12:48 “Se gorngv maaih ganh fingx mienh daaih yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx
Exodus12:49 Buonv-deic I^saa^laa^en Mienh fai yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei ganh fingx mienh oix zuqc juangc naaiv diuh leiz longc.”

Exodus14:4 Yie oix bun Faalo nyei hnyouv ngaengc

Exodus14:6 Hungh diex ziouc heuc mienh liuc leiz ninh mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie yaac dorh jienv ninh nyei baeng-guanh mingh aqv.
Exodus14:7 Ninh dorh gauh longx jiex wuov deix luoqc baeqv norm mborqv jaax cie caux yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie
