Exodus14:12 Yiem I^yipv wuov zanc yie mbuo m'daaih mbuox meih
Exodus14:13 Mose gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
Exodus14:14 Ziouv ganh oix weic meih mbuo mborqv jaax. Meih mbuo liemh maiv zuqc zoux haaix nyungc.”
Exodus14:15 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus14:16 Sung meih nyei biaav-mbiaac jiex koiv gu'nguaaic
Exodus14:17 Yie oix bun I^yipv Mienh hnyouv ngaengc
Exodus14:18 Yie hingh Faalo caux ninh mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux geh maaz baeng duqv mienh taaih yie wuov zanc
Exodus14:19 Tin-Hungh nyei fin-mienh
Exodus14:20 dangv jienv yiem I^yipv baeng caux I^saa^laa^en baeng mbu'ndongx. Mbuonx-ndiouh bun yietc bung hmuangx
Exodus14:21 Mose sung buoz jiex koiv gu'nguaaic. Ziouv bun dong bung maengx nyei domh nziaaux buonc yietc muonz
Exodus14:22 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc duqv yangh jauv-nqaai jiex koiv. Yiem ninh mbuo nyei zaaix maengx
Exodus14:23 I^yipv Mienh zunc jienv I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh. Faalo nyei yietc zungv maaz
Exodus14:24 Lungh aav lamh deix njang
Exodus14:25 Ninh zoux bun maaz-cie nyei yienh zietc
Exodus14:26 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus14:27 Mose ziouc sung buoz jiex koiv gu'nguaaic. Lungh njang
Exodus14:28 Wuom gapv jienv yiemx nzengc maaz-cie caux geh maaz nyei baeng caux yietc zungv gan I^saa^laa^en Mienh njiec koiv nyei baeng. Maiv maaih yietc dauh duqv maengc cuotv.
Exodus14:29 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh yangh jauv-nqaai jiex koiv. Yiem mbiaauc maengx zaaix maengx
Exodus14:30 Dongh wuov hnoi Ziouv njoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh biaux ndutv I^yipv Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac buatc I^yipv Mienh daic wuov koiv-hlen.
Exodus14:31 I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc Ziouv longc domh qaqv zoux bun I^yipv Mienh nyei sic
Exodus15:1 Wuov zanc Mose caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh baaux naaiv diuh nzung ceng Ziouv. “Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh mborqv domh jaax hingh mi'aqv. Ninh zorqv maaz caux geh maaz nyei mienh fengx njiec koiv gu'nyuoz.
Exodus15:2 Ziouv zoux yie nyei qaqv caux yie nyei nzung
Exodus15:3 Ziouv zoux mborqv jaax nyei baeng
Exodus15:4 Ninh zorqv Faalo Hungh mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux baeng-guanh zoi njiec koiv. Faalo Hungh gauh longx jiex nyei baeng-bieiv zuqc Koiv-Siqv yiemx daic nzengc.
Exodus15:5 Ndo haic nyei wuom yiemx ninh mbuo
Exodus15:6 “O Ziouv aac
Exodus15:7 Meih longc meih hlo haic nyei domh qaqv baaic nzengc meih nyei win-wangv. Meih qiex jiez hnangv njopc douz
Exodus15:8 Meih longc mba'zorng nyei qiex biomv koiv
Exodus15:9 “Win-wangv gorngv
Exodus15:10 Meih nyei nziaaux buonc daaih
Exodus15:11 “O Ziouv aac
Exodus15:12 Meih sung cuotv meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz
Exodus15:13 “Meih yietc liuz hnamv mienh
Exodus15:14 Maanc fingx mienh haiz ziouc sin zinx nzengc. Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gengh! gamh nziex haic.
Exodus15:15 Zoux hlo nyei E^ndom Mienh gamh nziex nzengc
Exodus15:16 Ninh mbuo za'gengh! gamh nziex haic
Exodus15:17 Meih dorh ninh mbuo bieqc daaih liepc nguaaz-gorn yiem meih ganh nyei mbong. O Ziouv aac
Exodus15:18 Ziouv yietc liuz duqv zoux hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic.”
Exodus15:19 Faalo Hungh nyei maaz caux mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux geh maaz mienh njiec koiv wuov zanc
Exodus15:20 Aalon nyei dorc
Exodus15:21 Miliem ziouc baaux nzung gorngv
Exodus15:22 Nqa'haav Mose aengx dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Koiv-Siqv hlen cuotv mingh bieqc Suwaa Deic-Bung-Huaang. Yiem deic-bung-huaang yangh buo hnoi yaac lorz maiv duqv wuom hopv.
Exodus15:23 Ninh mbuo mingh taux norm dorngx
Exodus15:24 Baeqc fingx ziouc ngopv Mose aengx naaic ninh
Exodus15:25 Mose qaqv tov Ziouv
Exodus15:26 Ninh gorngv
Exodus15:27 Ninh mbuo aengx jiex mingh taux Elim Deic. Maaih ziepc nyeic zingv wuom caux cietv ziepc zungh daau. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem wuov wuom-hlen liepc ciangv.
Exodus16:1 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yiem Elim cuotv jauv mingh taux Sinx Deic-Bung-Huaang
Exodus16:2 Yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang zuangx mienh ngopv Mose caux Aalon.
Exodus16:3 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Exodus16:4 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus16:5 Taux da'luoqc hnoi wuov hnoi
Exodus16:6 Mose caux Aalon gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Exodus16:7 Njang ndorm meih mbuo duqv buatc Ziouv nyei njang-laangc
Exodus16:8 Mose aengx gorngv
Exodus16:9 Mose gorngv mbuox Aalon
Exodus16:10 Aalon caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh corc gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc
Exodus16:11 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus16:12 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh ngopv nyei waac yie haiz mi'aqv. Mbuox ninh mbuo
Exodus16:13 Taux lungh maanz-hmuangx nyei ziangh hoc
Exodus16:14 Mbiungc-suiv nqaai mingh maaih nyungc ga'naaiv bieqc nyei
Exodus16:15 I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc
Exodus16:16 Ziouv hatc meih mbuo
Exodus16:17 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ei jienv Mose nyei waac siou. Maaih deix siou camv
Exodus16:18 Siou daaih hlaau mangc
Exodus16:19 Mose gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Exodus16:20 Mv baac maaih deix maiv muangx Mose nyei waac
Exodus16:21 Ndorm-ndorm gorqv-mienh siou gaux gorqv-mienh nyanc. Nyutc cuotv daaih jorm
Exodus16:22 Taux da'luoqc hnoi ninh mbuo siou camv yietc buonc
Exodus16:23 Mose mbuox ninh mbuo
Exodus16:24 Ei Mose hatc nyei waac
Exodus16:25 Mose gorngv
Exodus16:26 Juqv hnoi oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi siou naaiv deix nyanc nyei ga'naaiv. Mv baac siec hnoi wuov hnoi
Exodus16:27 Siec hnoi wuov hnoi
Exodus16:28 Ziouv naaic Mose
Exodus16:29 Jangx jienv oc. Yie
Exodus16:30 Hnangv naaic
Exodus16:31 Wuov nyungc nyanc nyei ga'naaiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh heuc maa^naa. Maa^naa se hnangv yienh si nyim nor
Exodus16:32 Mose gorngv
Exodus16:33 Mose mbuox Aalon
Exodus16:34 Aalon ziouc ei Ziouv mbuox Mose nyei waac zorqv wuov ongx maa^naa an jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien maengx
Exodus16:35 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyanc feix ziepc hnyangx maa^naa taux ninh mbuo duqv bieqc Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung nyei gapv-jaaix
Exodus16:36 (Loz-hnoi longc hlaau ga'naaiv nyei ndaan se leih maiv go nyic ziepc nyeic morqv. Yaac maaih ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv funx daaih leih maiv go i morqv lengh diqv dien.)
Exodus17:1 Zuangx I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv Sinx Deic-Bung-Huaang
Exodus17:2 Ninh mbuo ziouc ngopv Mose. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Exodus17:3 Mv baac zuangx mienh jaang nqaatv duqv kouv haic
Exodus17:4 Mose qaqv daux gaux tov Ziouv
Exodus17:5 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus17:6 Yiem Sinaai Mbong yie oix yiem meih mbuo nyei nza'hmien souv jienv la'bieiv-zorng gu'nguaaic. Meih mborqv la'bieiv
Exodus17:7 Wuov norm dorngx Mose cuotv mbuox heuc Matv^saax caux Me^li^mbaa weic zuqc dongh wuov norm dorngx I^saa^laa^en Mienh ngopv yaac oix seix Ziouv. Ninh mbuo seix mangc gaax
Exodus17:8 Aa^maa^lekv Mienh daaih caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax yiem Le^fi^ndim Deic.
Exodus17:9 Mose mbuox Yo^su^waa
Exodus17:10 Yo^su^waa ziouc ei jienv Mose nyei waac zoux
Exodus17:11 Da'faanh Mose sung jienv buoz
Exodus17:12 Mose sung gau buoz
Exodus17:13 Yo^su^waa ziouc longc nzuqc ndaauv mborqv hingh Aa^maa^lekv Mienh.

Exodus18:1 Mose nyei ong-daa
Exodus18:2 Zinh ndaangc Mose fungx ninh nyei auv
Exodus18:3 caux i dauh dorn mingh Mose wuov. Maaih dauh dorn
Exodus18:4 Maaih dauh heuc E^li^ye^se
Exodus18:5 Mose nyei ong-daa
Exodus18:6 Yeto bun waac mingh mbuox Mose
Exodus18:7 Mose ziouc cuotv mingh zipv ninh nyei ong-daa
Exodus18:8 Mose gorngv Ziouv weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh zoux bun Faalo caux I^yipv Mienh nyei yietc zungv sic bun ninh nyei ong-daa muangx. Ninh yaac gorngv ninh mbuo yiem ndaamv-jauv buangh zuqc nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc
Exodus18:9 Yeto haiz liuz Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh duqv longx
Exodus18:10 Ninh gorngv
Exodus18:11 Ih zanc yie hiuv duqv Ziouv gauh hlo jiex maanc zienh weic zuqc ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun zoux maux hoic I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov deix.”
Exodus18:12 Mose nyei ong-daa
Exodus18:13 Da'nyeic hnoi Mose zueiz jienv wuov tengx ninh nyei baeqc fingx dunx sic. Baeqc fingx souv weih gormx Mose lungh ndorm taux lungh hmuangx.
Exodus18:14 Mose nyei ong-daa buatc Mose oix zuqc tengx ninh nyei baeqc fingx zoux naaiv deix yietc zungv sic
Exodus18:15 Mose dau ninh nyei ong-daa
Exodus18:16 Haaix dauh maaih sic ninh mbuo daaih lorz yie
Exodus18:17 Mose nyei ong-daa gorngv
Exodus18:18 Meih caux daaih lorz meih naaiv deix mienh gunv zoux gunv kouv jienv njiec. Gong ndongc naaiv hniev se jiex ndaangc meih nyei qaqv. Meih ganh hnangv zoux maiv hingh lorqc.
Exodus18:19 Meih muangx yie maah! Yie oix tengx meih daav za'eix. Tov Tin-Hungh caux meih yiem. Meih oix zuqc div baeqc fingx yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien
Exodus18:20 Oix zuqc njaaux baeqc fingx hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc caux leiz. Yaac oix zuqc porv mengh bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv yiem naaiv seix zaangc hnangv haaix nor yiem
Exodus18:21 Mv baac meih oix zuqc yiem baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx ginv maaih banh zeic nyei mienh
Exodus18:22 Oix zuqc bun ninh mbuo zanc-zanc tengx baeqc fingx mbenc sic. Maaih domh sic bun ninh mbuo daaih lorz meih. Faix-fiuv sic ninh mbuo ganh mbenc. Hnangv naaic meih nyei gong ziouc heng deix weic zuqc ninh mbuo tengx jienv ndaam.
Exodus18:23 Se gorngv meih hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Exodus18:24 Mose muangx ninh nyei ong-daa gorngv nyei waac yaac ziux ninh gorngv nyei nyungc-nyungc ei jienv zoux.
Exodus18:25 Mose ziouc yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx ginv cuotv maaih banh zeic nyei mienh yaac orn ninh mbuo zoux bieiv zeiv. Maaih deix gunv yietc cin dauh
Exodus18:26 Naaiv deix mienh zanc-zanc tengx mbenc sic. Aqc duqv dunx nyei sic ninh mbuo dorh mingh bun Mose mbenc. Faix-fiuv sic ninh mbuo ganh mbenc.
Exodus18:27 Mose ziouc fungx ninh nyei ong-daa cuotv jauv nzuonx. Ninh nyei ong-daa ziouc nzuonx ninh ganh nyei deic-bung.
Exodus19:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
Exodus19:2 Ninh mbuo cuotv Le^fi^ndim Deic suiv mingh taux Sinaai Deic-Bung-Huaang
Exodus19:3 Mose ziouc faaux taux Tin-Hungh wuov. Ziouv yaac yiem wuov mbong heuc Mose. Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv mbuox Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun
Exodus19:4 ‘Meih mbuo ganh buatc yie hnangv haaix nor zoux bun I^yipv Mienh. Yaac hiuv duqv yie hnangv haaix nor dorh meih mbuo daaih taux yie naaiv
Exodus19:5 Se gorngv meih mbuo muangx yie nyei waac yaac ei jienv yie nyei ngaengc waac zoux
Exodus19:6 Meih mbuo oix zoux yietc fingx sai mienh fu-sux yie
Exodus19:7 Mose ziouc nzuonx mingh heuc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx mienh gox daaih zunv
Exodus19:8 Zuangx mienh lomh nzoih dau
Exodus19:9 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus19:10 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus19:11 Taux da'faam hnoi wuov hnoi
Exodus19:12 Oix zuqc dingc ziangx mbong-nqenx huing gormx mbong aengx mbuox mienh
Exodus19:13 Yaac maiv dungx longc buoz muoqv ninh. Oix zuqc zorqv la'bieiv zong daic fai longc juang-zinx buonv daic. Maiv gunv mienh fai saeng-kuv
Exodus19:14 Mose yiem mbong njiec daaih mbuox baeqc fingx bun ganh cing-nzengc
Exodus19:15 Ninh aengx mbuox ninh mbuo
Exodus19:16 Da'faam hnoi wuov ndorm borngz mba'lingc
Exodus19:17 Mose dorh baeqc fingx cuotv ndopv-liuh ciangv mingh buangh Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh souv jienv mbong-juoqv.
Exodus19:18 Douz-sioux om jienv Sinaai Mbong weic zuqc Ziouv yiem douz gu'nyuoz njiec mbong. Douz-sioux cutv-cutv nyei faaux hnangv buov domh douz-nzauc nor. Ziangh norm mbong yaac dongz duqv seix haic.
Exodus19:19 Nzatc nyei qiex yaac gunv zoux gunv mbui. Mose caux Tin-Hungh gorngv waac
Exodus19:20 Ziouv njiec taux Sinaai Mbong-ningv aengx heuc Mose faaux wuov mbong-ningv. Mose ziouc faaux aqv.
Exodus19:21 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Exodus19:22 Liemh daaih fatv yie
Exodus19:23 Mose gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Exodus19:24 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus19:25 Mose ziouc njiec mingh ziang naaiv deix waac mbuox baeqc fingx.
Exodus20:1 Tin-Hungh gorngv naaiv deix yietc zungv waac.
Exodus20:2 “Yie se Ziouv
Exodus20:3 “Cuotv liuz yie
Exodus20:4 “Maiv dungx weic ganh zoux haaix nyungc miuc-fangx. Maiv gunv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
Exodus20:5 Maiv dungx gueic njiec baaix naaiv deix miuc-fangx yaac maiv dungx zaangc
Exodus20:6 Mv baac haaix dauh hnamv yie
Exodus20:7 “Maiv dungx la'guaih longc Ziouv
Exodus20:8 “Oix zuqc jangx jienv longc Dingh Gong Hnoi benx norm cing-nzengc hnoi.
Exodus20:9 Maaih juqv hnoi zoux meih mbuo nyei yietc zungv gong.
Exodus20:10 Mv baac da'cietv hnoi wuov hnoi se Dingh Gong Hnoi weic fungx bun Ziouv. Wuov hnoi maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc gong. Meih mbuo ganh caux meih mbuo nyei naamh nyouz
Exodus20:11 Weic zuqc Ziouv longc juqv hnoi zeix lungh zeix ndau zeix koiv caux yiem naaiv deix gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv. Mv baac siec hnoi wuov hnoi Tin-Hungh dingh gong aqv. Weic naaiv Ziouv ceix fuqv wuov norm hnoi benx ninh nyei cing-nzengc hnoi.
Exodus20:12 “Oix zuqc tongx nimc meih mbuo nyei diex maac
Exodus20:13 “Maiv dungx daix mienh.
Exodus20:14 “Maiv dungx hienx auv hienx nqox.
Exodus20:15 “Maiv dungx zoux zaqc.
Exodus20:16 “Maiv dungx zoux jaav zorng-zengx hoic mienh.
Exodus20:17 “Maiv dungx mauv mienh nyei biauv. Maiv dungx mueic jieqv mienh nyei auv
Exodus20:18 Zuangx baeqc fingx haiz mba'ong mbui
Exodus20:19 aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus20:20 Mose gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh
Exodus20:21 Baeqc fingx souv jienv wuov go nyei. Kungx Mose mingh fatv Tin-Hungh yiem wuov norm mapv maengh mapv hmuangx nyei dorngx hnangv.
Exodus20:22 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus20:23 Meih mbuo maiv dungx longc jiem fai nyaanh zoux haaix nyungc zienh nyei fangx daaih caux jienv yie zaangc.
Exodus20:24 “+‘Oix zuqc longc nie weic yie ceix ziec-dorngh
Exodus20:25 Se gorngv longc la'bieiv weic yie ceix ziec-dorngh
Exodus20:26 Yaac maiv dungx jaax tei faaux yie nyei ziec-dorngh. Nziex bingx-ciouv haih cuotv.’
Exodus21:1 “Meih oix zuqc gorngv naaiv deix leiz mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Exodus21:2 “Se gorngv meih maaiz dauh Hipv^lu Mienh zoux nouh
Exodus21:3 Se gorngv ninh daaih nyei ziangh hoc daan-sin mienh
Exodus21:4 Gorngv hnangv ninh nyei ziouv lorz auv bun ninh longc
Exodus21:5 “Mv baac se gorngv wuov dauh nouh gorngv
Exodus21:6 ninh nyei ziouv oix zuqc dorh ninh mingh dorng jienv mbenc sic mienh zorqv nouh nyei m'normh bangc gaengh fai gaengh zouc
Exodus21:7 “Se gorngv mienh maaic ganh nyei sieqv tengx mienh zoux nouh beiz
Exodus21:8 Se gorngv maaiz ninh daaih wuov dauh ziouv oix longc zoux ganh nyei auv
Exodus21:9 Se gorngv wuov dauh ziouv ginv wuov dauh sieqv bun ganh nyei dorn longc zoux auv
Exodus21:10 Se gorngv ninh aengx longc auv-dorn
Exodus21:11 Se gorngv ninh ei maiv duqv naaiv deix buo nyungc nor
Exodus21:12 “Haaix dauh mborqv mienh yaac mborqv daic
Exodus21:13 Haaix dauh maiv zeiz baac-baac daix mienh
Exodus21:14 Mv baac haaix dauh jiez hnyouv baac-baac daix mienh daic
Exodus21:15 “Haaix dauh mborqv ninh nyei die fai maa nor
Exodus21:16 “Haaix dauh nimc mienh daaih maaic fai nimc daaih corc yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev maaih mienh buatc
Exodus21:17 “Haaix dauh zioux ninh nyei die fai maa
Exodus21:18 “Se gorngv maaih mienh nzaeng jaax
Exodus21:19 se gorngv nqa'haav ninh jiez sin mbiaac jienv biaav cuotv ga'nyiec maengx
Exodus21:20 “Se gorngv mienh longc biaav mborqv ninh nyei nouh gauv fai nouh beiz
Exodus21:21 Mv baac mborqv liuz i buo hnoi cingx daaih daic
Exodus21:22 “Se gorngv maaih i dauh mienh mborqv jaax
Exodus21:23 Se gorngv wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn zuqc haaix ndau mun
Exodus21:24 m'zing jaauv m'zing
Exodus21:25 douz buov aengx zorqv douz buov jaauv
Exodus21:26 “Haaix dauh mborqv ninh nyei nouh gauv fai nouh beiz nyei yietc bung m'zing maengh nor
Exodus21:27 Haaix dauh mborqv ninh nyei nouh gauv fai nouh beiz nyei nyaah ndutv yietc norm
Exodus21:28 “Se gorngv maaih dauh ngongh gouv ceux dauh m'jangc dorn fai m'sieqv dorn daic nor
Exodus21:29 Mv baac se gorngv wuov dauh ngongh ceux jiex mienh
Exodus21:30 Se gorngv mienh heuc cuotv zuoqc maengc nyaanh mbu'ziex
Exodus21:31 Se gorngv ngongh ceux sieqv fai dorn
Exodus21:32 Se gorngv ngongh ceux mienh nyei nouh gauv fai nouh beiz daic nor
Exodus21:33 “Haaix dauh koi nqoi kuotv fai wetv kuotv daaih yaac maiv gomv
Exodus21:34 kuotv nyei ziouv oix zuqc tipv saeng-kuv nyei jaax-zinh. Daic wuov dauh saeng-kuv yaac benx kuotv-ziouv nyei mi'aqv.
Exodus21:35 “Se gorngv maaih dauh mienh nyei ngongh ceux ganh dauh mienh nyei ngongh daic
Exodus21:36 Se gorngv hiuv duqv naaiv dauh ngongh ceux jiex mienh fai ngongh
Exodus22:1 “Se gorngv maaih mienh zoux zaqc nimc ngongh fai ba'gi yungh dorh mingh daix fai maaic
Exodus22:2 “Se gorngv mienh buatc janx-zaqc wetv kuotv bieqc biauv ziouc mborqv janx-zaqc daic nor
Exodus22:3 Mv baac se gorngv mba'hnoi cuotv daaih ninh mborqv daic nor
Exodus22:4 “Se gorngv ninh nimc daaih nyei saeng-kuv
Exodus22:5 “Haaix dauh bungx saeng-kuv yiem ninh ganh nyei ndeic fai a'ngunc huingx nyanc miev
Exodus22:6 “Haaix dauh yiem ndeic buov douz
Exodus22:7 “Se gorngv maaih mienh dorh nyaanh fai jaaix nyei ga'naaiv bun dauh juangc laangz nyei gorx-youz tengx siou
Exodus22:8 Zorqv maiv duqv janx-zaqc nor
Exodus22:9 Haaix zanc maaih gox nyei sic
Exodus22:10 “Haaix dauh dorh lorh fai ngongh fai ba'gi yungh fai haaix nyungc saeng-kuv yaac duqv
Exodus22:11 tengx mangc nyei mienh oix zuqc dorng jienv Ziouv houv waac gorngv
Exodus22:12 Mv baac se gorngv tengx goux nyei mienh goux jienv nyei ziangh hoc zuqc janx-zaqc nimc wuov dauh saeng-kuv nor
Exodus22:13 Se gorngv hieh ga'naaiv daaih ngaatc saeng-kuv daic
Exodus22:14 “Gorngv hnangv maaih mienh gaav laangz zaangc gorx-youz nyei saeng-kuv mingh longc
Exodus22:15 Se gorngv saeng-kuv nyei ziouv caux jienv yiem nor
Exodus22:16 “Se gorngv maaih dauh sieqv maiv nziaauc jiex dorn yaac maiv gaengh maaih haaix dauh gorngv ziangh ninh mv baac maaih dauh m'jangc dorn nduov ninh caux bueix nor
Exodus22:17 Gorngv hnangv sieqv nyei die maiv kangv bun wuov dauh m'jangc dorn longc
Exodus22:18 “Zoux faatv nyei m'sieqv dorn
Exodus22:19 “Haaix dauh mienh hienx saeng-kuv
Exodus22:20 “Haaix dauh dorh ga'naaiv ziec bun ganh dauh zienh
Exodus22:21 “Maiv dungx zoux doqc hoic caux meih mbuo yiem nyei ganh fingx mienh
Exodus22:22 “Maiv dungx zoux doqc auv-guaav caux guh hanh fu'jueiv.
Exodus22:23 Se gorngv zoux hoic ninh mbuo
Exodus22:24 Yie ziouc qiex jiez! haic
Exodus22:25 “Se gorngv yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maaih dauh yie nyei baeqc fingx jomc haic
Exodus22:26 Se gorngv meih longc haaix dauh nyei domh lui zoux dorngx-daauh nor
Exodus22:27 weic zuqc ninh kungx maaih naaiv nduqc deix domh lui-ndaauv buix sin hnangv. Ninh maiv maaih nor
Exodus22:28 “Maiv dungx ki Tin-Hungh. Yaac maiv dungx zioux goux baeqc fingx nyei jien.
Exodus22:29 “Maiv dungx ngaih
Exodus22:30 Meih mbuo nyei ngongh
Exodus22:31 “Meih mbuo zoux yie nyei cing-nzengc mienh. Weic naaiv maiv dungx nyanc hieh ga'naaiv ngaatc nyei saeng-kuv orv. Oix zuqc guangc bun juv nyanc.
Exodus23:1 “Maiv dungx dorh jaav waac mingh zunh mbuox mienh. Maiv dungx caux mienh waaic mienh dongh hnyouv zoux zorng-zengx hoic mienh.
Exodus23:2 “Maiv dungx gan mienh camv zoux waaic sic. Gorngv sic nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx gan mienh camv zoux jaav zorng-zengx bun baengh fim nyei leiz pien.
Exodus23:3 “Mienh jomc mienh dorngc sic yaac maiv dungx bouc ninh nyei leiz.
Exodus23:4 “Se gorngv buatc meih nyei win-jaa nyei ngongh fai lorh ndutv biaux mingh
Exodus23:5 Se gorngv buatc nzorng meih wuov dauh mienh nyei lorh ndorpc mingh
Exodus23:6 “Meih mbuo nyei mienh jomc mienh maaih sic nor
Exodus23:7 Maiv dungx gox jaav sic yaac maiv dungx daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh fai hnyouv zingx nyei mienh
Exodus23:8 “Maiv dungx nyanc nyaanh hmuangx. Nyaanh hmuangx haih bun m'zing njang nyei mienh nyei m'zing maengh
Exodus23:9 “Maiv dungx zoux doqc hoic ganh fingx mienh. Meih mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo haiz hnangv haaix nor weic zuqc zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung yaac zoux jiex ganh fingx mienh.
Exodus23:10 “Juqv hnyangx gu'nyuoz
Exodus23:11 Mv baac taux siec hnyangx wuov hnyangx oix zuqc bun ndau henh
Exodus23:12 “Longc juqv hnoi zoux meih mbuo nyei gong. Siec hnoi wuov hnoi oix zuqc dingh gong weic bun meih mbuo nyei ngongh
Exodus23:13 “Yie
Exodus23:14 “Yietc hnyangx oix zuqc weic yie jiex buo norm zipv.
Exodus23:15 “Oix zuqc jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv. Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz oix zuqc nyanc maiv an bingv nyei njuov hnangv yie hatc meih mbuo nor. Oix zuqc ziux dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc yiem Aa^mbipc hlaax jiex zipv
Exodus23:16 “Oix zuqc jiex Siou Siang-Mbiauh nyei Zipv
Exodus23:17 “Meih mbuo nyei yietc zungv m'jangc dorn oix zuqc daaih yiem yie
Exodus23:18 “Meih mbuo dorh saeng-kuv ziec bun yie
Exodus23:19 “Yiem meih mbuo nyei lingh deic cuotv gauh longx jiex nyei daauh torngx cun-gaeng oix zuqc dorh mingh Ziouv
Exodus23:20 “Mangc maah! Yie paaiv dauh fin-mienh mingh ndaangc weic yiem jauv zaangc beu jienv yaac dorh meih mbuo mingh taux yie liuc leiz ziangx nyei dorngx.
Exodus23:21 Oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx
Exodus23:22 Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh muangx ninh nyei waac yaac ei jienv yie gorngv nyei yietc zungv
Exodus23:23 Yie nyei fin-mienh oix mingh ndaangc
Exodus23:24 Maiv dungx gueic njiec baaix ninh mbuo nyei zienh yaac maiv dungx zaangc. Maiv dungx zuotc ninh mbuo nyei nyungc zeiv zoux. Oix zuqc mietc nzengc ninh mbuo nyei miuc-fangx
Exodus23:25 Oix zuqc fu-sux yie
Exodus23:26 Yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung ziouc maiv maaih haaix dauh waaic gu'nguaaz
Exodus23:27 “Da'faanh meih mbuo mingh taux haaix
Exodus23:28 Yie yaac oix bun guanh mueiz-njeiv mingh ndaangc meih mbuo
Exodus23:29 Mv baac yie maiv zeiz yietc hnyangx gu'nyuoz zunc ninh mbuo cuotv nzengc. Nziex deic-bung haih benx deic-bung-huaang
Exodus23:30 Yie manc-manc zunc ninh mbuo cuotv meih mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx
Exodus23:31 “Yie oix dingc meih mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Koiv-Siqv mingh taux Me^ndi^de^le^nien Koiv
Exodus23:32 Maiv dungx caux ninh mbuo fai caux ninh mbuo nyei zienh liepc haaix nyungc ngaengc waac.
Exodus23:33 Maiv dungx bun wuov deix mienh yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung. Nziex ninh mbuo haih nduov meih mbuo baamz zuiz dorngc yie. Se gorngv meih mbuo zaangc ninh mbuo nyei zienh
Exodus24:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus24:2 Kungx Mose ganh nduqc dauh haih daaih nitv fatv yie
Exodus24:3 Mose dorh Ziouv nyei waac caux yietc zungv leiz mingh mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx. Zuangx mienh dongh joux waac dau
Exodus24:4 Mose ziouc fiev jienv Ziouv gorngv nyei yietc zungv waac. Da'nyeic ndorm Mose jiez sin daaih nziouv nyei
Exodus24:5 Ninh yaac paaiv deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mienh lunx mienh mingh fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv
Exodus24:6 Mose siou yietc buonc saeng-kuv nyei nziaamv zaangh jienv bunh liouh jienv
Exodus24:7 Ninh ziouc zorqv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Sou doqc bun zuangx baeqc fingx muangx. Zuangx mienh gorngv
Exodus24:8 Mose ziouc zorqv zaangh jienv bunh nyei nziaamv fuqv zuangx mienh. Ninh gorngv
Exodus24:9 Mose
Exodus24:10 yaac duqv buatc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh nyei zaux-caaiv hnangv jaaix haic nyei la'bieiv
Exodus24:11 Tin-Hungh yaac maiv hoic naaiv deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv. Ninh mbuo duqv buatc Tin-Hungh yaac duqv nyanc duqv hopv.
Exodus24:12 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus24:13 Mose caux ninh nyei borng-buoz mienh
Exodus24:14 Ninh gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh gox
Exodus24:15 Mose faaux mbong mingh
Exodus24:16 Ziouv nyei njang-laangc njiec daaih yiem Sinaai Mbong. Mbuonx om jienv mbong juqv hnoi. Siec hnoi wuov hnoi ninh yiem wuov mbuonx heuc Mose.
Exodus24:17 (I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc Ziouv nyei njang-laangc hnangv douz zieqc jienv wuov mbong-ningv nor.)
Exodus24:18 Mose ziouc faaux mbong bieqc mbuonx gu'nyuoz yaac yiem wuov mbong feix ziepc hnoi feix ziepc muonz.
Exodus25:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus25:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh ga'naaiv daaih fongc horc bun yie. Haaix dauh nqoi fim nqoi eix fongc horc
Exodus25:3 Meih oix zuqc zipv ninh mbuo fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv se jiem
Exodus25:4 ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus25:5 nyomc daaih siqv nyei yungh gouv ndopv caux fuoqv daaih longx nyei saeng-kuv ndopv
Exodus25:6 caux buov dang nyei ga'lanv youh
Exodus25:7 caux yietc nyungc jaaix haic nyei la'bieiv-siqv nzueic nyei
Exodus25:8 “Zuangx mienh oix zuqc weic yie zoux norm singx dinc
Exodus25:9 Naaiv norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh caux ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz nyei jaa-dorngx oix zuqc hnangv yie mbuox meih wuov nor zoux.
Exodus25:10 “Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux norm faang
Exodus25:11 Longc jiem buang jienv ga'nyiec caux gu'nyuoz. Aengx longc jiem zoux bin hormh gormx.
Exodus25:12 Oix zuqc dox biei norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv biei jieqv faang-zaux nyei gu'nguaaic
Exodus25:13 Longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux i diuh gaeng faang nyei ndiangx yaac buang jienv jiem.
Exodus25:14 Zorqv daaih cunx jienv faang ga'hlen nyei kuing weic gaeng faang.
Exodus25:15 Naaiv deix gaeng faang nyei ndiangx oix zuqc zanc-zanc cunx jienv
Exodus25:16 Aengx zorqv yie oix jiu bun meih wuov deix i kuaaiv Laengz Ngaengc Waac nyei la'bieiv-benv dapv jienv faang gu'nyuoz.
Exodus25:17 “Oix zuqc longc jiem zoux ceix en nyei weic wuov norm faang-nqaaix
Exodus25:18 Longc jiem daav i dauh ke^lu^mbim daaih an i bung faang-daauh.
Exodus25:19 Yietc bung maaih dauh. Bun i bung faang-daauh nyei ke^lu^mbim ziangh jienv caux faang-nqaaix benx yietc kuaaiv mi'aqv.
Exodus25:20 Naaiv deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim oix zuqc hmien doix hmien
Exodus25:21 Zorqv yie oix jiu bun meih wuov deix i kuaaiv Laengz Ngaengc Waac nyei la'bieiv-benv dapv jienv faang gu'nyuoz aengx zorqv nqaaix gomv jienv.
Exodus25:22 Yie oix yiem Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
Exodus25:23 “Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux norm dieh
Exodus25:24 Aengx longc jiem buang jienv dieh
Exodus25:25 Yaac longc jiem hormh dieh hlen faaux yietc waengh zaangv hlang
Exodus25:26 Dox biei norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv biei bung dieh gorqv zaengx dieh zaux wuov norm dorngx.
Exodus25:27 Naaiv deix kuing oix zuqc dingx nitv jienv dieh bin weic cunx gaeng dieh nyei ndiangx.
Exodus25:28 Gaeng dieh nyei ndiangx oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux daaih yaac buang jienv jiem.
Exodus25:29 Oix zuqc longc jiem zoux dieh nyei jaa-dorngx
Exodus25:30 Oix zuqc zorqv gengx Tin-Hungh nyei njuov an jienv dieh gu'nguaaic
Exodus25:31 “Oix zuqc longc jiem zoux norm dang. Dang-jaax dang-sin oix zuqc daav daaih. Dang nyei zaanv caux biangh nyueiz biangh ei yaac oix zuqc juangc naaiv ndunh jiem daav cuotv daaih.
Exodus25:32 Dang-sin oix zuqc bun zoux juqv caax nquaah
Exodus25:33 Naaiv deix nquaah
Exodus25:34 Dang-sin maaih biei norm zaanv hnangv an^man biangh
Exodus25:35 Juqv caax nquaah
Exodus25:36 Biangh nyueiz caux caax-caax nquaah
Exodus25:37 “Oix zuqc zoux siec norm dang-zaanv don jienv siec caax nquaah dueiv-mueiz bun dang ziux njang dang-jaax nyei nza'hmien maengx.
Exodus25:38 Longc jiem daav njiuv japv dang-cov caux an njiuv nyei bienh.
Exodus25:39 Dang caux dang nyei jaa-sic oix zuqc longc nyic ziepc yietv joih jiem daav daaih.
Exodus25:40 Zoux naaiv deix ga'naaiv oix zuqc faix fim
Exodus26:1 “Oix zuqc longc ziepc kuaaiv ndie zoux norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh. Naaiv deix ndie longc la'maah suix-muonc zorpc jienv ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus26:2 Kuaaiv-kuaaiv oix zuqc fih njietv fih ndaau
Exodus26:3 Zorqv biaa kuaaiv gapv jienv lunh benx yietc kuaaiv. Aengx maaih wuov deix biaa kuaaiv fih hnangv nyei lunh benx yietc kuaaiv.
Exodus26:4 Oix zuqc longc ndie-mbuov zoux nekv dingx jienv naaiv deix i kuaaiv domh ndie nyei ndie-hlen.
Exodus26:5 Yietc kuaaiv dingx hmz ziepc norm nekv. Naaiv kuaaiv nyei nekv caux wuov kuaaiv nyei nekv oix zuqc doix ziangx.
Exodus26:6 Aengx longc jiem zoux hmz ziepc norm ga'naaiv-kaux zorqv naaiv kuaaiv nyei nekv bangc wuov kuaaiv nyei nekv kaux jienv benx yietc norm ndopv-liuh mi'aqv.
Exodus26:7 “Aengx longc yungh biei ndatv ziepc yietv kuaaiv ndie daaih gomv ndopv-liuh ga'nyiec wuov yiemc.
Exodus26:8 Zoux kuaaiv-kuaaiv fih njietv fih ndaau
Exodus26:9 Zorqv biaa kuaaiv gapv jienv lunh benx yietc kuaaiv. Aengx zorqv juqv kuaaiv fih hnangv nyei lunh benx yietc kuaaiv. Naaiv kuaaiv nyei ga'hlen oix zuqc nzipv nzuonx zoux i yiemc yiem ndopv-liuh nyei nza'hmien maengx.
Exodus26:10 Yiem naaiv deix i kuaaiv domh ndie nyei ndie-hlen
Exodus26:11 Aengx longc dongh siqv zoux hmz ziepc norm ga'naaiv-kaux
Exodus26:12 Zengc njiec wuov deix i ndorqc ndie oix zuqc bungx suoh njiec ndopv-liuh nqa'haav maengx.
Exodus26:13 Gomv ndopv-liuh nyei ndie i bung ga'hlen
Exodus26:14 Aengx longc yungh ndopv nyomc daaih siqv nyei gomv yiemc
Exodus26:15 “Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux ndopv-liuh nyei qorng liepc zaqc.
Exodus26:16 Norm-norm qorng oix zuqc zoux hlang ziepc ndorqc
Exodus26:17 Norm-norm qorng i bung qorng-zaux pai ga'nyiec maengx bun ninh citv deix. Yietc norm qorng nyei zaux ziouc caux da'nyeic norm qorng nyei zaux gapv jienv. Ndopv-liuh nyei yietc zungv qorng oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux.
Exodus26:18 Ndopv-liuh nyei naamh bung oix zuqc zoux nyic ziepc norm qorng.
Exodus26:19 Aengx longc nyaanh zoux feix ziepc norm taapv topv qorng nyei zaux. Yietc norm qorng longc i norm taapv.
Exodus26:20 Weic ndopv-liuh nyei baqv bung yaac oix zuqc zoux nyic ziepc norm qorng.
Exodus26:21 Aengx zoux feix ziepc norm nyaanh taapv weic topv qorng nyei zaux. Yietc norm qorng longc i norm taapv.
Exodus26:22 Ndopv-liuh nqaang
Exodus26:23 Aengx ganh zoux i norm qorng weic ndopv-liuh nqa'haav maengx nyei gorqv.
Exodus26:24 Gorqv nyei i norm qorng oix zuqc yiem ga'ndiev horpc taux gu'nguaaic yaac juangc norm kou kou jienv. I bung gorqv oix zuqc zoux fih hnangv nyei.
Exodus26:25 Hnangv naaiv yietc zungv maaih hietc norm qorng yaac maaih ziepc luoqc norm nyaanh taapv. Yietc norm qorng topv i norm taapv.
Exodus26:26 “Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux gungh gangc ndiangx. Yietc bung ndopv-liuh nyei qorng oix zuqc maaih biaa diuh.
Exodus26:27 Wuov bung yaac oix zuqc maaih biaa diuh. Nqa'haav maengx
Exodus26:28 Mbu'ndongx wuov wuonc oix zuqc zoux benx yietc diuh ndiangx yiem naaiv bung cunx dorng wuov bung.
Exodus26:29 Naaiv deix qorng yietc zungv oix zuqc buang jienv jiem aengx longc jiem zoux kuing dingx jienv cunx gungh gangc wuov deix njongc-laan. Gungh gangc njongc-laan yietc zungv yaac oix zuqc buang jienv jiem.
Exodus26:30 “Oix zuqc ziux yiem mbong mbuox meih nyei nyungc zeiv corng naaiv norm ndopv-liuh.
Exodus26:31 “Oix zuqc longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus26:32 Naaiv kuaaiv ndie oix zuqc longc jiem-ngau kuangx jienv biei norm dongc. Dongc oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux yaac buang jienv jiem aengx topv jienv biei norm nyaanh taapv.
Exodus26:33 Oix zuqc zorqv mbaeqc gaengh ndie kuangx jienv ngau
Exodus26:34 Oix zuqc zorqv ceix en nyei weic gomv jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang gu'nguaaic
Exodus26:35 Zorqv dieh don jienv wuov kuaaiv ndie ga'nyiec maengx
Exodus26:36 “Mbaeqc ndopv-liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc wuov kuaaiv ndie oix zuqc longc la'maah suix-muonc zorpc jienv ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus26:37 Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux biaa norm dongc
Exodus27:1 “Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux norm ziec-dorngh
Exodus27:2 Ziec-dorngh nyei biei norm gorqv oix zuqc zoux jienv jorng
Exodus27:3 Oix zuqc zoux siou saaiv nyei jei
Exodus27:4 Longc dongh siqv weic ziec-dorngh zoux kuaaiv piaeng. Piaeng nyei biei norm gorqv
Exodus27:5 Piaeng oix zuqc naetv jienv ziec-dorngh nyei bienh ga'ndiev maengx
Exodus27:6 Gaeng ziec-dorngh nyei ndiangx oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux
Exodus27:7 Naaiv deix gaeng nyei ndiangx oix zuqc cunx jienv ziec-dorngh i bung ga'hlen nyei kuing weic gaeng ziec-dorngh.
Exodus27:8 Oix zuqc longc ndiangx-benv zoux ziec-dorngh
Exodus27:9 “Meih oix zuqc zoux ndopv-liuh nyei laatc. Laatc nyei naamh bung oix zuqc ndaauv yietc baeqv ndorqc
Exodus27:10 Oix zuqc maaih nyic ziepc norm dongh siqv dongc topv jienv nyic ziepc norm dongh siqv taapv. Wuov deix dongc oix zuqc maaih nyaanh ngau nyaanh biaav.
Exodus27:11 Baqv bung maengx nyei laatc yaac maaih ndie mbaeqc jienv fih hnangv nyei
Exodus27:12 “Fai bung maengx nyei laatc ndaauv hmz ziepc ndorqc
Exodus27:13 Dong bung maengx nyei laatc jangv hmz ziepc ndorqc.
Exodus27:14 Mbaeqc yietc bung gaengh hlen ndie oix zuqc ndaauv ziepc hmz ndorqc
Exodus27:15 Wuov bung gaengh hlen yaac maaih ndie ndaauv ziepc hmz ndorqc mbaeqc jienv
Exodus27:16 Mbaeqc laatc gaengh nyei ndie
Exodus27:17 Weih ndopv-liuh nyei laatc oix zuqc maaih nyaanh biaav corng jienv dongc weic bun ninh wuonv. Dongc aengx dingx jienv nyaanh ngau. Topv dongc nyei taapv yaac longc dongh siqv zoux.
Exodus27:18 Ndopv-liuh nyei laatc oix zuqc ndaauv yietc baeqv ndorqc
Exodus27:19 Ndopv-liuh nyei jaa-dorngx yietc zungv longc dongh siqv zoux daaih. Mborng ndau corng ndopv-liuh nyei dongc caux mborng ndau corng laatc nyei dongc yietc zungv yaac longc dongh siqv zoux.
Exodus27:20 “Mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh zaax daaih gauh longx jiex nyei ga'lanv youh daaih dinh dang weic bun dang zanc-zanc zieqc jienv.
Exodus27:21 Yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv Liuh gu'nyuoz
Exodus28:1 “Oix zuqc heuc meih nyei gorx
Exodus28:2 Oix zuqc weic meih nyei gorx
Exodus28:3 Oix zuqc mbuox maaih buoz-dauh longx nyei mienh
Exodus28:4 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc zoux nyei zorng-zuqv se buang la'kuotv nyei ga'naaiv
Exodus28:5 Zaangc mienh oix zuqc longc jiem caux ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus28:6 “Bun buoz-dauh longx nyei zaangc mienh longc jiem caux ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus28:7 Oix zuqc zoux i diuh gorng bangc efotv nyei i bung gorqv dingx jienv paanx mba'dauh.
Exodus28:8 Sai efotv wuov diuh sai jaaiv ndie zoux nyei za'eix caux longc nyei ga'naaiv yaac oix zuqc fih hnangv nyei. Oix zuqc longc jiem
Exodus28:9 “Oix zuqc longc i kuaaiv la'bieiv-jaaix siqv nyei
Exodus28:10 yiem dorn-hlo mingh taux dorn-faix. Yietc norm la'bieiv diu jienv juqv dauh nyei mbuox.
Exodus28:11 Bun diu la'bieiv-jaaix nyei zaangc mienh diu jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei dorn nyei mbuox yiem naaiv deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv-jaaix. Aengx longc jiem-finx ciqv lorqc lorqc jienv.
Exodus28:12 Yaac oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv dingx jienv efotv nyei i bung mba'dauh zoux jangx-hoc. Hnangv naaic
Exodus28:13 Longc jiem-finx ciqv lorqc lorqc jienv la'bieiv
Exodus28:14 yaac longc jiem gitv i diuh mbinz niouv benx hlaang-sietv daaih kaux jienv wuov deix i norm la'bieiv-lorqc.
Exodus28:15 “Bun buoz-dauh longx nyei zaangc mienh zoux kuaaiv buang la'kuotv nyei ga'naaiv bun sai mienh weic dunx sic. Oix zuqc caux efotv fih hnangv nyei zoux. Longc jiem
Exodus28:16 Nzipv jienv benx i yiemc
Exodus28:17 Dingx jienv biei liouz la'bieiv-jaaix. Da'yietv liouz maaih norm siqv nyei
Exodus28:18 Da'nyeic liouz maaih norm ndiemh maeng
Exodus28:19 Da'faam liouz maaih norm mbuov-maeng
Exodus28:20 Da'feix liouz maaih norm yangh baeqc
Exodus28:21 Yietc zungv maaih ziepc nyeic norm la'bieiv. Yietc norm la'bieiv diu jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc dauh dorn nyei mbuox hnangv yienx nor
Exodus28:22 “Oix zuqc weic buang la'kuotv nyei ga'naaiv longc jiem gitv mbinz daaih zoux limc hnangv hlaang nor.
Exodus28:23 Zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv gu'nguaaic i bung gorqv.
Exodus28:24 Zorqv wuov deix i diuh jiem-limc kaux jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv nyei kuing.
Exodus28:25 Limc dueiv-mueiz bangc mba'dauh wuov deix i norm la'bieiv-lorqc nyatv jienv. Hnangv naaiv nor buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv naetv jienv efotv nyei gorng nza'hmien maengx.
Exodus28:26 Aengx zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv ga'ndiev wuov deix i norm gorqv
Exodus28:27 Aengx zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv efotv paanx mba'dauh wuov diuh gorng ga'ndiev
Exodus28:28 Aengx zorqv hlaang-mbuov cunx jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv ga'ndiev nyei kuing bangc dingx efotv nyei kuing nyatv jienv bun buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv yiem dingc.
Exodus28:29 “Aalon haaix zanc bieqc Cing-Nzengc nyei Dorngx
Exodus28:30 Zorqv Ulim caux Tummim
Exodus28:31 “Aengx longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov ndatv lui-ndaauv zuqv efotv gu'nyuoz maengx.
Exodus28:32 Liouh norm kuotv yiem ndie mbu'ndongx zoux lui-jaang. Lui-jaang oix zuqc longc ndatv daaih nyei ndie hornc jienv bun lui-jaang maiv haih mbaaix.
Exodus28:33 Longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus28:34 Dingx norm jiem-lingh aengx dingx norm ziqc liouh biouv nqenx yietc nyungc yietc norm huing gormx lui-juoqv.
Exodus28:35 Aalon fu-sux Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc zuqv naaiv deix lui. Haaix zanc bieqc Cing-Nzengc nyei Dorngx yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien fai cuotv daaih nyei ziangh hoc haiz lingh mbui nor
Exodus28:36 “Longc jiem daav kuaaiv jiem-baaih daaih ndingh jienv nzaangc hnangv yienx nor
Exodus28:37 Aengx longc hlaang-mbuov nyatv jienv naaiv kuaaiv ga'naaiv
Exodus28:38 Naaiv kuaaiv ga'naaiv oix zuqc yiem Aalon nyei biorngh. I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh ga'naaiv daaih fongc horc Ziouv
Exodus28:39 “Aengx longc la'maah suix-muonc ndatv gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc lui-ndaauv bun Aalon zuqv. Yaac longc la'maah ndie-muonc zoux m'nqorngv-beu. Aengx longc buoz-dauh longx nyei zaangc mienh congx diuh sai jaaiv ndie.
Exodus28:40 Yaac oix zuqc weic Aalon nyei dorn mbuo zoux lui
Exodus28:41 Oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix zoux sai nyei lui-houx bun meih nyei gorx
Exodus28:42 “Oix zuqc longc la'maah ndie zoux houx torngv jienv sin yiem jaaiv njiec taux camh zuih.
Exodus28:43 Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo haaix zanc bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh fai mingh taux ziec-dorngh aengx bieqc Cing-Nzengc nyei Dorngx fu-sux
Exodus29:1 “Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic saax Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo cing-nzengc daaih zoux sai mienh fu-sux yie. Oix zuqc zorqv dauh ngongh gouv caan caux i dauh ba'gi yungh gouv
Exodus29:2 Oix zuqc zoux maiv an bingv nyei njuov
Exodus29:3 Zorqv naaiv deix njuov dapv jienv ndaan. Dorh ngongh gouv caux i dauh ba'gi yungh gouv daaih fongc horc bun yie wuov zanc
Exodus29:4 Dorh Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo daaih taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc longc wuom nzaaux ninh mbuo nyei sin.
Exodus29:5 Zorqv Aalon nyei zoux sai lui bun ninh zuqv jienv. Zorqv gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc lui-ndaauv caux efotv nyei lui bun ninh zuqv jienv
Exodus29:6 Zorqv m'nqorngv-beu beu jienv ninh nyei m'nqorngv. Aengx zorqv cing-nzengc wuov kuaaiv jiem-baaih nyatv jienv m'nqorngv-beu.
Exodus29:7 Zorqv orn mienh nyei youh dox jienv ninh nyei m'nqorngv.
Exodus29:8 Dorh Aalon nyei dorn mbuo daaih yaac tengx ninh mbuo zuqv jienv lui-ndaauv.
Exodus29:9 Zorqv ndie mbiorngz jienv ninh mbuo nyei m'nqorngv. Bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn sai jienv sai jaaiv ndie. Ninh mbuo ziouc maaih leiz yietc liuz zoux sai mienh. Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor orn Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo zoux sai mienh.
Exodus29:10 “Dorh ngongh gouv daaih Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh nza'hmien maengx. Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv ngongh nyei m'nqorngv.
Exodus29:11 Oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Exodus29:12 Longc meih nyei buoz-ndoqv coqv ngongh nyei nziaamv zaix jienv ziec-dorngh nyei jorng. Zengc wuov deix nziaamv dox jienv ziec-dorngh nyei gorn.
Exodus29:13 Zorqv gu'nyuoz hnyouv nyei yietc zungv hmei
Exodus29:14 Mv baac ngongh nyei ndopv
Exodus29:15 “Aengx dorh dauh wuov deix ba'gi yungh gouv daaih bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo maan jienv ba'gi yungh nyei m'nqorngv.
Exodus29:16 Oix zuqc daix naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh gouv daaih
Exodus29:17 Oix zuqc hngaqv ba'gi yungh benx yietc nqanx yietc nqanx. Nzaaux nzengc gu'nyuoz hnyouv nyei ga'naaiv caux zuih ziouc dorh daaih caux m'nqorngv caux orv an jienv.
Exodus29:18 Ziangh dauh ba'gi yungh oix zuqc an jienv ziec-dorngh buov. Naaiv se buov ziec bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Exodus29:19 “Aengx zorqv da'nyeic dauh ba'gi yungh gouv daaih bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo maan jienv ba'gi yungh nyei m'nqorngv.
Exodus29:20 Daix naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh daaih
Exodus29:21 Aengx zorqv deix yiem ziec-dorngh nyei nziaamv caux deix orn mienh nyei youh fuqv Aalon caux Aalon nyei lui-houx. Aengx fuqv Aalon nyei dorn mbuo caux ninh mbuo nyei lui-houx. Hnangv naaiv zoux
Exodus29:22 “Meih oix zuqc zorqv naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh gouv nyei hmei caux junc nyei dueiv
Exodus29:23 Aengx zorqv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien maiv an bingv wuov ndaan njuov. Zorqv norm maiv zorpc ga'lanv youh nyei njuov
Exodus29:24 Zorqv naaiv deix yietc zungv bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging fongc horc.
Exodus29:25 Oix zuqc zipv yiem ninh mbuo nyei buoz naaiv deix ga'naaiv daaih an jienv ziec-dorngh caux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv yietc njiec buov
Exodus29:26 Aengx zorqv orn Aalon zoux sai naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh gouv nyei lorqc hiuang orv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging fongc horc
Exodus29:27 “Orn mienh zoux sai mienh wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv nyei lorqc hiuang orv caux zuih cunv ging fongc horc liuz ziouc benx Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo nyei mi'aqv.
Exodus29:28 Naaiv se I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix zuqc bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo yietc liuz duqv nyei buonc. Se I^saa^laa^en Mienh fongc horc ziec weic jiu tong fungx bun Ziouv duqv nyei buonc.
Exodus29:29 “Aalon zoux sai mienh nyei zorng-zuqv oix zuqc bun ninh nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv nzipc jienv yietc doic jiex yietc doic. Haaix zanc dox youh orn ninh mbuo zoux sai mienh
Exodus29:30 Nzipc jienv Aalon zoux sai mienh wuov dauh dorn bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Exodus29:31 “Orn mienh zoux sai mienh wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv nyei orv oix zuqc yiem norm cing-nzengc nyei dorngx zouv.
Exodus29:32 Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc nyanc naaiv dauh yungh nyei orv caux ndaan gu'nyuoz nyei njuov.
Exodus29:33 Dorh daaih fiqv zuiz nyei ga'naaiv caux orn zoux sai mienh fungx bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv kungx sai mienh nyanc duqv hnangv. Ga'nyiec nyei mienh nyanc maiv duqv weic zuqc naaiv deix ga'naaiv se cing-nzengc nyei.
Exodus29:34 Orn mienh zoux sai wuov deix orv caux njuov
Exodus29:35 “Meih oix zuqc ziux yie paaiv meih nyei yietc zungv waac orn Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn zoux sai mienh. Oix zuqc longc siec hnoi orn ninh mbuo.
Exodus29:36 Hnoi-hnoi oix zuqc longc dauh ngongh gouv fongc horc ziec weic fiqv zuiz
Exodus29:37 Oix zuqc linh jienv siec hnoi
Exodus29:38 “Naaiv se meih hnoi-hnoi oix zuqc dorh daaih fongc horc an ziec-dorngh ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Se i dauh doix hnyangx nyei ba'gi yungh dorn
Exodus29:39 Lungh ndorm ziec dauh
Exodus29:40 Lungh ndorm ziec wuov dauh oix zuqc longc i morqv mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv yietc gorngc ga'lanv youh. Aengx fongc horc yietc gorngc a'ngunc diuv weic ciev ziec.
Exodus29:41 Nziemx-yaangh ziec wuov dauh ba'gi yungh dorn yaac fih hnangv nyei. Zorqv fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv yietc njiec buov. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Exodus29:42 “Doic jiex doic oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Exodus29:43 Yie yaac oix yiem wuov norm dorngx buangh I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Yie nyei njang-laangc ziouc bun naaiv norm dorngx cing-nzengc.
Exodus29:44 “Yie oix saax Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh caux ziec-dorngh cing-nzengc
Exodus29:45 Yie oix yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx zoux ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh.
Exodus29:46 Ninh mbuo zungv oix hiuv duqv yie se Ziouv
Exodus30:1 “Oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux norm buov hung dieh.

Exodus30:4 Aengx zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv i bung dieh ga'hlen
Exodus30:5 Gaeng dieh ndiangx yaac oix zuqc longc da'suqv ndiangx buang jienv jiem.

Exodus30:7 “Aalon ndorm-ndorm daaih liuc leiz dang nyei ziangh hoc

Exodus30:31 Meih oix zuqc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Exodus30:32 Naaiv nyungc youh maiv dungx la'guaih dox maiv zeiz zoux sai mienh nyei mienh. Yaac maiv dungx longc naaiv nyungc za'eix peux daaih weic ganh nyungc jauv longc. Naaiv deix youh se cing-nzengc. Oix zuqc jangx jienv za'gengh cing-nzengc.
Exodus30:33 Haaix dauh peux naaiv nyungc youh daaih longc fai la'guaih dox maiv zeiz zoux sai nyei mienh

Exodus30:36 Zorqv deix hung morc benx mbuonv dorh mingh Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz an jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien maengx

Exodus32:1 Baeqc fingx buatc Mose yiem wuov mbong lauh haic
Exodus32:2 Aalon mbuox ninh mbuo

Exodus32:4 Aalon zorqv naaiv deix m'normh hiun dox dauh jiem-ngongh dorn aengx longc jaa-sic ndingh ziangx. Zuangx mienh ziouc gorngv

Exodus32:16 Naaiv deix la'bieiv Tin-Hungh ganh nyei buoz-dauh zoux. Nzaangc yaac Tin-Hungh ganh ndingh daaih nyei nzaangc.
Exodus32:17 Yo^su^waa haiz baeqc fingx heuc mbui nyei. Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus32:18 Mose dau

Exodus32:23 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox yie

Exodus32:27 Mose mbuox ninh mbuo
Exodus32:28 Lewi Mienh ziouc ei jienv zoux. Wuov hnoi zuqc daix daic nyei mienh maaih leih maiv go buo cin dauh.
Exodus32:29 Mose gorngv mbuox Lewi Mienh
Exodus32:30 Da'nyeic hnoi Mose gorngv mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx
Exodus32:31 Mose ziouc aengx nzuonx mingh lorz Ziouv. Ninh gorngv
Exodus32:32 Mv baac ih zanc tov guangc nqoi ninh mbuo nyei zuiz. Se gorngv meih maiv guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz nor
Exodus32:33 Ziouv dau Mose
Exodus32:34 Meih ih zanc mingh aqv. Dorh naaiv deix mienh mingh taux yie mbuox jiex meih wuov norm dorngx. Yie nyei fin-mienh oix yiem meih mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx yienz jauv. Mv baac taux ziangh hoc dingc zuiz yie ziouc dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz aqv.”
Exodus32:35 Ziouv ziouc bun wuov deix mienh butv domh wuon-baengc laaix ninh mbuo aapv Aalon zoux wuov dauh ngongh dorn.
Exodus33:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus33:2 Yie oix paaiv dauh fin-mienh mingh ndaangc meih mbuo. Yie yaac oix zunc cuotv Kaa^naa^an Mienh
Exodus33:3 Oix zuqc mingh taux ndau-touv longx nyei deic-bung. Mv baac yie maiv caux meih mbuo mingh
Exodus33:4 Baeqc fingx haiz naaiv deix waac ninh mbuo za'gengh! nzauh haic yaac nyiemv. Maiv maaih haaix dauh zorng siou-setv
Exodus33:5 weic zuqc Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus33:6 Weic naaiv yiem Holepv Mbong

Exodus34:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus34:2 Njang hnoi ndorm mbenc ziangx ziouc faaux Sinaai Mbong
Exodus34:3 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh gan meih daaih. Mbong nyei haaix norm dorngx yaac maiv dungx bun haaix dauh yiem. Liemh maiv dungx bun yungh guanh
Exodus34:4 Mose ziouc zuqc ziangx i kuaaiv la'bieiv hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov deix i kuaaiv nor. Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei ninh ziux Ziouv nyei waac dorh jienv faaux Sinaai Mbong.
Exodus34:5 Ziouv yiem dorv mbuonx njiec daaih caux Mose souv jienv wuov
Exodus34:6 Ziouv jiex Mose nyei nza'hmien aengx gorngv
Exodus34:7 Yie ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh taux cin-cin doic mienh. Yie guangc zoux waaic zoux orqv caux baamz zuiz nyei sic. Mv baac yie maiv bun maaih zuiz nyei mienh maiv zuqc dingc zuiz
Exodus34:8 Mose liemh zeih gueic njiec ndau baaix.
Exodus34:9 Ninh gorngv
Exodus34:10 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose

Exodus34:16 Nziex meih mbuo mingh lorz ninh mbuo nyei sieqv daaih zoux meih mbuo nyei dorn nyei auv
Exodus34:17 “Maiv dungx dox haaix nyungc miuc-fangx daaih weic ganh zaangc.
Exodus34:18 “Oix zuqc jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv. Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz meih mbuo oix zuqc nyanc maiv an bingv nyei njuov
Exodus34:19 “Maiv gunv ngongh guanh

Exodus34:21 “Longc juqv hnoi zoux gong

Exodus34:23 Meih mbuo nyei yietc zungv m'jangc dorn yietc hnyangx oix zuqc daaih zaangc buo nzunc yie

Exodus34:30 Aalon caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh buatc Mose nyei hmien aengv cuotv njang

Exodus34:32 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh daaih fatv deix
Exodus34:33 Mose caux ninh mbuo gorngv liuz waac

Exodus34:35 I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc ninh nyei hmien aengv cuotv njang. Gorngv liuz waac
Exodus35:1 Mose heuc I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc zungv mienh gapv zunv
Exodus35:2 Longc juqv hnoi zoux gong. Siec hnoi wuov hnoi oix zuqc funx benx cing-nzengc hnoi
Exodus35:3 Dingh Gong Hnoi
Exodus35:4 Mose gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Exodus35:5 Oix zuqc yiem meih mbuo ganh maaih nyei ga'naaiv zorqv daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv. Haaix dauh nqoi fim nqoi eix
Exodus35:6 ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus35:7 nyomc daaih siqv nyei yungh gouv ndopv caux fuoqv daaih longx nyei saeng-kuv ndopv
Exodus35:8 buov dang nyei ga'lanv youh
Exodus35:9 yietc nyungc jaaix haic nyei la'bieiv-siqv caux ziex nyungc la'bieiv weic naetv jienv domh sai mienh nyei efotv caux buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv.
Exodus35:10 “Oix zuqc heuc yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx
Exodus35:11 Oix zuqc zoux ndopv-liuh caux ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc caux ga'nyiec wuov yiemc
Exodus35:12 Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang caux gaeng faang nyei ndiangx
Exodus35:13 dieh caux gaeng dieh nyei ndiangx caux dieh nyei nyungc-nyungc jaa-sic
Exodus35:14 dang-jaax weic ziux njang caux dang nyei jaa-sic
Exodus35:15 buov hung dieh caux gaeng dieh ndiangx

Exodus35:19 caux yiem singx dinc gu'nyuoz fu-sux zuqv nyei cing-nzengc lui-houx
Exodus35:20 Mose gorngv liuz

Exodus35:27 Zuangx bieiv zeiv dorh nyungc nzueic nyei

Exodus35:34 Ziouv yaac bun Mbe^saa^len caux Ndaan Fingx

Exodus36:1 Mbe^saa^len
Exodus36:2 Mose heuc Mbe^saa^len
Exodus36:3 Zaangc mienh yietc zungv mingh Mose wuov zipv I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv fim fongc horc zoux singx dinc wuov deix ga'naaiv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh ndorm-ndorm corc dorh ga'naaiv daaih fongc horc bun Mose.
Exodus36:4 Da'faanh maaih buoz-dauh longx zoux singx dinc nyei zaangc mienh
Exodus36:5 mbuox Mose
Exodus36:6 Mose ziouc mbuox mienh zunh gormx ndopv-liuh ciangv
Exodus36:7 Siou daaih nyei ga'naaiv zungv gauh camv qiemx zuqc longc zoux nyungc-nyungc gong.
Exodus36:8 Yiem zuangx gong-mienh mbu'ndongx
Exodus36:9 Kuaaiv-kuaaiv fih njietv fih ndaau. Ndaauv nyic ziepc betv ndorqc
Exodus36:10 Ninh mbuo zorqv biaa kuaaiv gapv jienv lunh benx yietc kuaaiv
Exodus36:11 Ninh mbuo longc ndie-mbuov zoux nekv dingx jienv wuov deix i kuaaiv domh ndie nyei ndie-hlen.
Exodus36:12 Yietc kuaaiv dingx hmz ziepc norm nekv. Naaiv kuaaiv nyei nekv caux wuov kuaaiv nyei nekv doix ziangx.
Exodus36:13 Ninh mbuo aengx longc jiem zoux hmz ziepc norm ga'naaiv-kaux
Exodus36:14 Ninh mbuo aengx longc yungh biei ndatv ziepc yietv kuaaiv daaih gomv ndopv-liuh ga'nyiec wuov yiemc.
Exodus36:15 Naaiv deix kuaaiv-kuaaiv fih njietv fih ndaau
Exodus36:16 Ninh mbuo zorqv biaa kuaaiv gapv jienv lunh benx yietc kuaaiv. Aengx zorqv juqv kuaaiv fih hnangv nyei lunh benx yietc kuaaiv.
Exodus36:17 Yiem naaiv deix i kuaaiv domh ndie nyei ndie-hlen
Exodus36:18 Ninh mbuo longc dongh siqv zoux hmz ziepc norm ga'naaiv-kaux
Exodus36:19 Ninh mbuo aengx longc nyomc daaih siqv nyei yungh gouv ndopv gomv yiemc. Aengx longc fuoqv daaih longx nyei saeng-kuv ndopv gomv yiemc.
Exodus36:20 Ninh mbuo longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux ndopv-liuh nyei qorng
Exodus36:21 Norm-norm qorng hlang ziepc ndorqc
Exodus36:22 Norm-norm qorng
Exodus36:23 Naamh bung maengx ninh mbuo zoux nyic ziepc norm qorng.
Exodus36:24 Aengx longc nyaanh zoux feix ziepc norm taapv topv qorng nyei zaux. Yietc norm qorng maaih i norm taapv.
Exodus36:25 Weic baqv bung maengx ninh mbuo aengx zoux nyic ziepc norm qorng.
Exodus36:26 Aengx zoux feix ziepc norm nyaanh taapv topv qorng nyei zaux. Yietc norm qorng maaih i norm taapv.
Exodus36:27 Weic ndopv-liuh nqaang
Exodus36:28 Aengx ganh zoux i norm qorng weic nqa'haav maengx nyei gorqv.
Exodus36:29 Gorqv nyei i norm qorng yiem ga'ndiev horpc taux gu'nguaaic yaac juangc norm kou kou jienv. I norm gorqv zungv fih hnangv nyei zoux.
Exodus36:30 Hnangv naaic
Exodus36:31 Ninh mbuo longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux gungh gangc nyei ndiangx. Yietc bung ndopv-liuh nyei qorng maaih biaa diuh.
Exodus36:32 Wuov bung qorng yaac maaih biaa diuh. Ndopv-liuh nqa'haav maengx
Exodus36:33 Mbu'ndongx wuov wuonc gungh gangc ndiangx benx yietc diuh ndiangx yiem naaiv bung mingh dorng wuov bung.
Exodus36:34 Naaiv deix qorng yietc zungv buang jienv jiem aengx dingx jienv jiem-kuing cunx gungh gangc ndiangx. Gungh gangc ndiangx yietc zungv yaac buang jienv jiem.
Exodus36:35 Ninh mbuo longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus36:36 Ninh mbuo longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux biei norm dongc yaac buang jienv jiem
Exodus36:37 Mbaeqc ndopv-liuh nyei gaengh wuov kuaaiv mbaeqc gaengh ndie
Exodus36:38 Ninh mbuo yaac zoux biaa norm dongc caux dingx dongc nyei ngau. Dongc dueiv-mueiz buang jienv jiem. Biaav yaac buang jienv jiem. Ninh mbuo yaac zoux biaa norm dongh siqv taapv topv dongc.
Exodus37:1 Mbe^saa^len longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
Exodus37:2 aengx longc jiem buang jienv ga'nyiec caux gu'nyuoz. Ninh aengx longc jiem zoux bin huing gormx.
Exodus37:3 Ninh dox biei norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv biei jieqv faang-zaux nyei gu'nguaaic
Exodus37:4 Ninh longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux i diuh gaeng faang nyei ndiangx yaac buang jienv jiem
Exodus37:5 zorqv daaih cunx jienv faang ga'hlen nyei kuing weic gaeng faang.
Exodus37:6 Ninh longc jiem zoux ceix en nyei weic wuov norm faang-nqaaix
Exodus37:7 Ninh aengx longc jiem daav i dauh ke^lu^mbim an i bung faang-daauh.
Exodus37:8 Yietc bung maaih dauh. Ninh yaac bun i bung faang-daauh nyei ke^lu^mbim ziangh jienv caux faang-nqaaix benx yietc kuaaiv mi'aqv.
Exodus37:9 Naaiv deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim hmien doix hmien
Exodus37:10 Ninh aengx longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux norm dieh
Exodus37:11 aengx longc jiem buang jienv dieh
Exodus37:12 Ninh longc jiem hormh dieh hlen faaux yietc waengh zaangv hlang
Exodus37:13 Ninh aengx dox biei norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv biei norm dieh gorqv ga'hlen
Exodus37:14 Naaiv deix kuing dingx nitv jienv hormh dieh wuov deix dorngx weic cunx gaeng dieh nyei ndiangx.
Exodus37:15 Gaeng dieh nyei ndiangx ninh longc da'suqv ndiangx buang jienv jiem.
Exodus37:16 Ninh longc jiem zoux dieh nyei jaa-dorngx. Maaih bienh
Exodus37:17 Ninh yaac longc jiem zoux norm dang. Dang-jaax caux dang-sin ninh daav daaih. Dang nyei zaanv caux biangh nyueiz biangh ei yaac juangc naaiv ndunh jiem daav cuotv daaih.
Exodus37:18 Dang-sin bun zoux juqv caax nquaah
Exodus37:19 Naaiv deix nquaah
Exodus37:20 Dang-sin maaih biei norm zaanv hnangv an^man biangh nor
Exodus37:21 Juqv caax nquaah
Exodus37:22 Biangh nyueiz caux caax-caax nquaah
Exodus37:23 Ninh mbuo aengx longc jiem zoux siec norm dang-zaanv caux japv dang-cov nyei njiuv caux an njiuv nyei bienh.
Exodus37:24 Dang caux dang nyei jaa-sic longc nyic ziepc yietv joih jiem daav daaih.
Exodus37:25 Ninh aengx longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux norm buov hung dieh
Exodus37:26 Gu'nguaaic maengx dieh
Exodus37:27 Ninh longc jiem aengx zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv i bung ga'hlen
Exodus37:28 Ninh aengx longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux gaeng dieh ndiangx yaac buang jienv jiem.
Exodus37:29 Ninh bun dauh zoux wuom-ndaang nyei zaangc mienh peux orn mienh nyei cing-nzengc youh caux cing-nzengc hung.
Exodus38:1 Ninh aengx longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh
Exodus38:2 Ziec-dorngh nyei biei norm gorqv zoux jienv jorng caux ziec-dorngh nyei ndiangx ziangh jienv. Aengx longc dongh siqv buang jienv ziec-dorngh.
Exodus38:3 Ninh zoux ziec-dorngh nyei jaa-dorngx. Maaih caeng
Exodus38:4 Ninh aengx longc dongh siqv weic ziec-dorngh zoux piaeng naetv jienv ziec-dorngh nyei bienh ga'ndiev maengx
Exodus38:5 Ninh aengx longc dongh siqv dox biei norm kuing dingx jienv piaeng nyei biei norm gorqv
Exodus38:6 Ninh longc da'suqv ndiangx zoux gaeng ziec-dorngh nyei ndiangx
Exodus38:7 Ninh zorqv gaeng nyei ndiangx cunx jienv ziec-dorngh i bung ga'hlen nyei kuing weic gaeng ziec-dorngh. Ziec-dorngh longc ndiangx-benv gapv daaih
Exodus38:8 Ninh longc dongh siqv zoux bunh caux bunh nyei taapv. Se longc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc fu-sux Ziouv wuov deix m'sieqv dorn nyei dongh siqv gingx zoux.
Exodus38:9 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo zoux laatc weih jienv ndopv-liuh. Laatc nyei naamh bung ninh mbuo zoux ndaauv yietc baeqv ndorqc
Exodus38:10 Maaih nyic ziepc norm dongh siqv dongc topv nyic ziepc norm dongh siqv taapv. Dongc yaac maaih nyaanh ngau nyaanh biaav dingx jienv.
Exodus38:11 Baqv bung laatc yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux ndaauv yietc baeqv ndorqc
Exodus38:12 Fai bung maengx nyei laatc ndaauv hmz ziepc ndorqc
Exodus38:13 Dong bung maengx yaac fih hnangv nyei
Exodus38:14 Mbaeqc yietc bung gaengh hlen ndie
Exodus38:15 Wuov bung gaengh hlen yaac maaih ndie ndaauv ziepc hmz ndorqc mbaeqc jienv
Exodus38:16 Weih biei bung laatc nyei ndie yietc zungv longc la'maah ndie-muonc zoux.
Exodus38:17 Dongc nyei taapv longc dongh siqv zoux. Dongc nyei ngau caux biaav longc nyaanh zoux. Dongc nyei dueiv-mueiz yaac buang jienv nyaanh. Norm-norm dongc maaih nyaanh biaav borqv jienv mingh.
Exodus38:18 Mbaeqc laatc gaengh nyei ndie ninh mbuo longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus38:19 Maaih biei norm dongc caux topv dongc nyei biei norm dongh siqv taapv. Dongc nyei ngau caux biaav longc nyaanh zoux. Dongc dueiv-mueiz yaac buang jienv nyaanh.
Exodus38:20 Mborng ndau corng ndopv-liuh nyei dongc caux mborng ndau corng weih gormx ndopv-liuh nyei laatc yietc zungv yaac longc dongh siqv zoux.
Exodus38:21 Naaiv se ndopv-liuh longc nyei ga'naaiv nyei soux mouc
Exodus38:22 Yu^ndaa Fingx
Exodus38:23 Aengx maaih Ndaan Fingx
Exodus38:24 Mienh fongc horc weic zoux singx dinc nyei yietc zungv gong maaih jiem luoqc baeqv nyic ziepc feix joih ziux singx dinc dingc daaih nyei hniev-daauh.
Exodus38:25 Faaux mbuox saauv nyei mienh cuotv nyei nyaanh maaih i cin yietc baeqv ziepc luoqc joih ziux singx dinc dingc daaih nyei hniev-daauh.
Exodus38:26 Yietc dauh cuotv yietc zinh faam-buon ziux singx dinc dingc daaih nyei hniev-daauh. Da'faanh faaux mbuox nyei mienh
Exodus38:27 Ninh mbuo longc i cin yietc baeqv joih nyaanh zoux singx dinc nyei yietc baeqv norm taapv caux mbaeqc gaengh ndie nyei dongc nyei taapv. Yietc norm taapv longc nyic ziepc yietv joih nyaanh zoux.
Exodus38:28 Zengc wuov deix ziepc nyeic joih bienx nyaanh longc zoux dongc nyei ngau
Exodus38:29 Mienh fongc horc nyei dongh siqv maaih yietc cin feix baeqv betv ziepc luoqc joih.
Exodus38:30 Naaiv deix dongh siqv ninh mbuo longc zoux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh nyei dongc nyei taapv
Exodus38:31 Aengx longc dongh siqv zoux laatc dongc nyei taapv caux bieqc laatc gaengh ndaangc wuov deix dongc nyei taapv
Exodus39:1 Ninh mbuo longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus39:2 Ninh mbuo longc jiem caux ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus39:3 ninh mbuo daav jiem benx yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv bieqc nyei
Exodus39:4 Ninh mbuo weic efotv zoux i diuh gorng bangc efotv nyei i bung gorqv dingx jienv paanx mba'dauh.
Exodus39:5 Sai efotv wuov diuh sai jaaiv ndie ninh mbuo longc ga'naaiv fih hnangv nyei yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux. Ninh mbuo longc jiem
Exodus39:6 Ninh mbuo aengx zorqv wuov deix i kuaaiv jaaix nyei la'bieiv-siqv
Exodus39:7 Ninh mbuo aengx zorqv naaiv deix la'bieiv dingx jienv efotv nyei mba'dauh wuov norm dorngx
Exodus39:8 Buoz-dauh longx nyei zaangc mienh zoux kuaaiv buang la'kuotv nyei ga'naaiv
Exodus39:9 Ninh nzipv jienv benx i yiemc yietc naamx feix-bung
Exodus39:10 aengx dingx jienv biei liouz la'bieiv-jaaix. Da'yietv liouz maaih norm siqv nyei
Exodus39:11 Da'nyeic liouz maaih norm ndiemh maeng nyei
Exodus39:12 Da'faam liouz maaih norm mbuov-maeng nyei
Exodus39:13 Da'feix liouz maaih norm yangh baeqc
Exodus39:14 Yietc zungv maaih ziepc nyeic norm la'bieiv. Yietc norm la'bieiv diu I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc dauh dorn nyei mbuox hnangv yienx nor
Exodus39:15 Weic buang la'kuotv nyei ga'naaiv ninh mbuo longc jiem gitv mbinz daaih zoux limc hnangv hlaang nor.
Exodus39:16 Aengx zoux i norm jiem-lorqc caux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv gu'nguaaic i bung gorqv.
Exodus39:17 Zorqv wuov deix i diuh jiem-limc cunx bieqc buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv nyei i bung gorqv nyei kuing.
Exodus39:18 Limc dueiv-mueiz bangc mba'dauh wuov deix i norm la'bieiv-lorqc nyatv jienv. Hnangv naaiv nor
Exodus39:19 Ninh mbuo aengx zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv ga'ndiev
Exodus39:20 Yaac zoux i norm jiem-kuing dingx jienv efotv nza'hmien maengx
Exodus39:21 Ninh mbuo aengx longc hlaang-mbuov cunx jienv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv ga'ndiev nyei kuing
Exodus39:22 Ninh mbuo aengx longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov ndatv yiemc lui-ndaauv zuqv efotv gu'nyuoz maengx
Exodus39:23 yaac liouh norm kuotv yiem ndie mbu'ndongx zoux lui-jaang
Exodus39:24 Ninh mbuo longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus39:25 Aengx longc jiem zoux lingh dingx jienv
Exodus39:26 yietc norm jiem-lingh nqenx norm ziqc liouh biouv dingx huing gormx zuqv fu-sux Ziouv nyei lui-juoqv
Exodus39:27 Ninh mbuo yaac longc la'maah ndie-muonc zoux gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc lui-ndaauv bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo.
Exodus39:28 M'nqorngv-beu
Exodus39:29 Ninh mbuo aengx longc la'maah suix-muonc zorpc jienv ba'gi suix setv mbuov
Exodus39:30 Ninh mbuo aengx daav kuaaiv jiem zoux cing-nzengc jangx-hoc
Exodus39:31 Aengx longc hlaang-mbuov dingx jienv naaiv kuaaiv ga'naaiv nyatv jienv m'nqorngv-beu ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose nyei waac zoux.
Exodus39:32 Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei yietc zungv gong zoux ziangx nzengc. Ziouv hnangv haaix nor paaiv Mose
Exodus39:33 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh ndopv-liuh mingh Mose wuov. Se dorh gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc ndopv-liuh caux ndopv-liuh nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic
Exodus39:34 Gomv ndopv-liuh wuov deix ba'gi yungh ndopv nyomc daaih siqv nyei caux fuoqv daaih longx nyei wuov deix saeng-kuv ndopv caux mbaeqc jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang wuov kuaaiv ndie.
Exodus39:35 Ninh mbuo aengx dorh Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang caux gaeng faang nyei ndiangx caux ceix en nyei weic wuov norm faang-nqaaix
Exodus39:36 dieh caux dieh nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic caux gengx Tin-Hungh nyei njuov
Exodus39:37 wuov norm jiem-dang-jaax
Exodus39:38 buov hung nyei jiem-dieh
Exodus39:39 dongh siqv ziec-dorngh caux dongh siqv piaeng
Exodus39:40 weih laatc nyei ndie
Exodus39:41 caux yiem singx dinc zuqv jienv fu-sux nyei njang-laangc lui-houx
Exodus39:42 Naaiv deix yietc zungv gong I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux ziangx nzengc.
Exodus39:43 Mose dimv mangc ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv gong yaac buatc se doix nzengc Ziouv paaiv nyei waac
Exodus40:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Exodus40:2 “Zih hlaax saeng-yietv wuov hnoi
Exodus40:3 Zorqv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang an jienv ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz aengx zorqv ndie-mbaeqc torngv jienv.
Exodus40:4 Dorh dieh bieqc daaih don jienv yaac zorqv dieh nyei jaa-sic an jienv dieh gu'nguaaic. Dorh dang-jaax bieqc daaih aengx zorqv dang-zaanv an jienv ninh mbuo nyei dorngx.
Exodus40:5 Zorqv buov hung nyei jiem-dieh don jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien maengx
Exodus40:6 “Zorqv buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh don jienv doix Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc.
Exodus40:7 Zorqv bunh don jienv ziec-dorngh caux ndopv-liuh mbu'ndongx
Exodus40:8 Corng laatc weih jienv biei bung ndopv-liuh
Exodus40:9 “Zorqv orn mienh nyei youh dox ndopv-liuh caux ndopv-liuh nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic fungx bun Ziouv. Nyungc-nyungc ziouc cing-nzengc mi'aqv.
Exodus40:10 Aengx longc youh dox ziec-dorngh
Exodus40:11 Bunh caux bunh nyei taapv yaac oix zuqc zorqv youh dox jienv saax cing-nzengc fungx bun yie
Exodus40:12 “Dorh Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn taux ndopv-liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Exodus40:13 Tengx Aalon zuqv jienv zoux sai nyei cing-nzengc lui-houx
Exodus40:14 Dorh Aalon nyei dorn mbuo daaih bun ninh mbuo zuqv jienv gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc lui-ndaauv.
Exodus40:15 Zorqv youh dox ninh mbuo hnangv dox ninh mbuo nyei die nor
Exodus40:16 Ziouv hnangv haaix nor paaiv Mose zoux haaix nyungc
Exodus40:17 Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih da'nyeic hnyangx
Exodus40:18 Corng ndopv-liuh wuov zanc
Exodus40:19 Ninh zorqv ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc corng jienv
Exodus40:20 Ninh zorqv fiev ziepc diuh Leiz-Latc wuov deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv dapv jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang gu'nyuoz
Exodus40:21 dorh faang an jienv ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz
Exodus40:22 Mose dorh dieh mingh don jienv Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz
Exodus40:23 aengx zorqv njuov ziux yietc nyeic an wuov dieh gengx Ziouv
Exodus40:24 Ninh zorqv dang-jaax an jienv Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz nyei naamh bung maengx doix ziangx wuov norm dieh
Exodus40:25 aengx diemv dang yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Exodus40:26 Mose zorqv buov hung nyei jiem-dieh an jienv Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz
Exodus40:27 aengx buov jienv hung wuov norm dieh gu'nguaaic
Exodus40:28 Ninh ziouc zorqv mbaeqc ndopv-liuh nyei gaengh wuov kuaaiv ndie mbaeqc jienv.
Exodus40:29 Ninh zorqv buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh an jienv Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Exodus40:30 Ninh zorqv bunh an jienv Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh caux ziec-dorngh mbu'ndongx
Exodus40:31 Mose caux Aalon nyei dorn mbuo ziouc longc naaiv norm bunh nyei wuom nzaaux buoz-zaux.
Exodus40:32 Ninh mbuo haaix zanc bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh fai mingh wuov ziec-dorngh
Exodus40:33 Mose aengx weih gormx ndopv-liuh caux ziec-dorngh
Exodus40:34 Wuov zanc maaih mbuonx om jienv Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Exodus40:35 Mose maiv haih bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh weic zuqc mbuonx om jienv
Exodus40:36 Om ndopv-liuh wuov dorv mbuonx haaix zanc siou faaux
Exodus40:37 Gorngv hnangv mbuonx maiv siou faaux nor
Exodus40:38 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem ninh mbuo nyei jauv-daauh louc mueiz
Leviticus1:1 Ziouv yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh heuc Mose
Leviticus1:2 “Meih oix zuqc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus1:3 “+‘Se gorngv buov ziec fongc horc nyei saeng-kuv yiem ngongh guanh dorh daaih
Leviticus1:4 Dorh nyei mienh oix zuqc longc buoz maan jienv oix buov ziec wuov dauh ngongh gouv nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus1:5 Ninh oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien daix wuov dauh ngongh gouv. Aalon nyei dorn
Leviticus1:6 Dorh saeng-kuv daaih ziec nyei mienh ganh oix zuqc maeqv nqoi ndopv
Leviticus1:7 Aalon sai mienh nyei dorn mbuo ziouc buov zieqc douz yiem ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic
Leviticus1:8 Aalon nyei dorn
Leviticus1:9 Dorh saeng-kuv nyei mienh oix zuqc longc wuom nzaaux nzengc hnyouv gu'nyuoz nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv caux zuih. Sai mienh ziouc zorqv yietc zungv an jienv ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic buov. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus1:10 “+‘Se gorngv buov ziec fongc horc nyei saeng-kuv yiem ba'gi yungh fai yungh guanh dorh daaih
Leviticus1:11 Dorh nyei mienh oix zuqc yiem ziec-dorngh nyei baqv bung
Leviticus1:12 Dorh yungh fai ba'gi yungh nyei mienh oix zuqc gaatv benx yietc ndunh yietc ndunh
Leviticus1:13 Dorh saeng-kuv nyei mienh oix zuqc longc wuom nzaaux nzengc jaangh caux zuih
Leviticus1:14 “+‘Se gorngv fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv se norqc
Leviticus1:15 Sai mienh ziouc dorh norqc taux ziec-dorngh
Leviticus1:16 Oix zuqc zorqv cuotv ba'ingv yaac cun norqc biei guangc yiem ziec-dorngh nyei dong bung
Leviticus1:17 Ninh oix zuqc nanv jienv ndaatv betv norqc nyei sin mbaaix mv baac maiv dungx bun ndaatv ndutv. Sai mienh ziouc an jienv ziec-dorngh nyei zaangh caux douz gu'nguaaic buov. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus2:1 “+‘Haaix dauh dorh laangh ziqc daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv
Leviticus2:2 dorh taux Aalon nyei dorn
Leviticus2:3 Fongc horc liuz
Leviticus2:4 “+‘Se gorngv fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc se yiem ziqv njuov nyei nzox ziqv dorh daaih
Leviticus2:5 Se gorngv fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc se yiem caeng naatv daaih
Leviticus2:6 Oix zuqc zorqv njuov maeqv muonc
Leviticus2:7 Se gorngv ziec nyei laangh ziqc yiem caeng zin daaih
Leviticus2:8 Longc naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv zoux fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc
Leviticus2:9 Sai mienh oix zuqc zorqv deix fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc cuotv zoux jangx nyei buonc
Leviticus2:10 Fongc horc liuz
Leviticus2:11 “+‘Da'faanh fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv nyei laangh ziqc
Leviticus2:12 Dorh naaiv deix i nyungc daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv weic zoux daauh torngx cun-gaeng duqv nyei. Mv baac maiv dungx an ziec-dorngh buov weih ndaang nyei qiex.
Leviticus2:13 Meih mbuo fongc horc ziec nyei yietc zungv laangh ziqc oix zuqc hietv jienv nzauv. Maiv dungx bun nzauv dangx
Leviticus2:14 “+‘Se gorngv dorh daauh torngx laangh ziqc daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv
Leviticus2:15 Yaac oix zuqc hietv ga'lanv youh caux hung. Naaiv se ziec fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc.
Leviticus2:16 Sai mienh oix zuqc zorqv cuotv deix mbiauh mbuonv caux youh caux yietc zungv hung zoux jangx nyei buonc
Leviticus3:1 “+‘Se gorngv mienh fongc horc ga'naaiv ziec weic jiu tong
Leviticus3:2 Oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv ninh ziec wuov dauh saeng-kuv nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus3:3 Yiem naaiv deix ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus3:4 caux i norm nyutc zeiv
Leviticus3:5 Aalon nyei dorn ziouc zorqv naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv an ziec-dorngh
Leviticus3:6 “+‘Se gorngv dorh yiem ba'gi yungh fai yungh guanh nyei saeng-kuv daaih ziec bun Ziouv weic jiu tong
Leviticus3:7 Ninh longc dauh ba'gi yungh dorn ziec nor
Leviticus3:8 Oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv ninh ziec wuov dauh saeng-kuv nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus3:9 Yiem naaiv deix ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc dorh deix longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv. Oix zuqc dorh yietc zungv hmei
Leviticus3:10 i norm nyutc zeiv caux naetv nyutc zeiv nyei banv youh. Buang jienv hlan nyei orv-mbiorngz yaac oix zuqc caux jienv nyutc zeiv zorqv cuotv.
Leviticus3:11 Sai mienh ziouc an ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic longc douz buov ziec zoux nyanc nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun Ziouv.
Leviticus3:12 “+‘Se gorngv mienh ziec nyei ga'naaiv se yungh
Leviticus3:13 Oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv yungh nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus3:14 Yiem ninh fongc horc nyei yungh oix zuqc zorqv deix longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv. Oix zuqc zorqv yietc zungv yiem hnyouv nyei hmei
Leviticus3:15 i norm nyutc zeiv caux naetv nyutc zeiv nyei banv youh. Buang jienv hlan nyei orv-mbiorngz yaac oix zuqc caux jienv nyutc zeiv zorqv cuotv.
Leviticus3:16 Sai mienh ziouc an ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic longc douz buov ziec zoux nyanc nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun Ziouv weih ndaang nyei qiex. Hmei yietc zungv benx Ziouv nyei.
Leviticus3:17 “+‘Maiv gunv meih mbuo yiem haaix
Leviticus4:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus4:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus4:3 “+‘Se gorngv longc youh orn daaih zoux sai mienh wuov dauh ganh baamz zuiz
Leviticus4:4 Ninh oix zuqc dorh ngongh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Leviticus4:5 Longc youh orn zoux sai mienh wuov dauh ziouc zorqv deix ngongh gouv nyei nziaamv dorh bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh.
Leviticus4:6 Sai mienh longc buoz-ndoqv coqv nziaamv tiu mingh Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Leviticus4:7 Sai mienh oix zuqc aengx zorqv deix nziaamv zaix yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Leviticus4:8 Oix zuqc zorqv cuotv nzengc ziec fiqv zuiz naaiv dauh ngongh gouv nyei hmei
Leviticus4:9 i norm nyutc zeiv caux beu nyutc zeiv nitv jaaiv nyei banv youh. Buang jienv hlan nyei orv-mbiorngz yaac oix zuqc caux nyutc zeiv zorqv cuotv.
Leviticus4:10 Se caux ziec weic jiu tong wuov dauh ngongh fih hnangv nyei zorqv cuotv nzengc. Sai mienh ziouc zorqv naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv an buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh buov.
Leviticus4:11 Mv baac ngongh ndopv caux yietc zungv orv
Leviticus4:12 se ziangh dauh ngongh
Leviticus4:13 “+‘Se gorngv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh caqv-bouc baamz zuiz yaac maiv gorqc jaang
Leviticus4:14 Ninh mbuo yietv hiuv duqv ninh mbuo baamz nyei zuiz
Leviticus4:15 Zuangx baeqc fingx nyei mienh gox oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien dorh buoz maan jienv naaiv dauh ngongh gouv nyei m'nqorngv. Yaac oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien daix wuov dauh ngongh gouv.
Leviticus4:16 Longc youh orn zoux sai mienh wuov dauh ziouc dorh deix ngongh gouv nyei nziaamv bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Leviticus4:17 ziouc longc buoz-ndoqv coqv nziaamv tiu mingh Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Leviticus4:18 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv deix nziaamv zaix yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Leviticus4:19 Ninh yaac oix zuqc zorqv ngongh nyei hmei yietc zungv cuotv daaih an ziec-dorngh buov.
Leviticus4:20 Naaiv dauh ngongh ninh oix zuqc caux ziec fiqv zuiz wuov dauh fih hnangv nyei zoux. Hnangv naaiv zoux liuz
Leviticus4:21 Nqa'haav sai mienh oix zuqc dorh naaiv dauh ngongh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv buov hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov dauh ngongh gouv nor. Naaiv se weic tengx zuangx baeqc fingx ziec fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus4:22 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh bieiv zeiv caqv-bouc baamz dongh Ziouv
Leviticus4:23 Ninh yietv hiuv duqv ninh baamz nyei zuiz
Leviticus4:24 Oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv yungh nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus4:25 Sai mienh oix zuqc longc buoz-ndoqv coqv deix ziec fiqv zuiz naaiv dauh yungh nyei nziaamv zaix buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh biei norm gorqv nyei jorng. Zengc njiec nyei nziaamv dox njiec ziec-dorngh nyei gorn.
Leviticus4:26 Sai mienh ziouc buov yietc zungv hmei hnangv buov ziec weic jiu tong wuov dauh saeng-kuv nyei hmei nor. Sai mienh hnangv naaiv zoux weic tengx ninh fiqv zuiz. Ninh nyei zuiz ziouc duqv guangc liuz aqv.
Leviticus4:27 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh baeqc fingx caqv-bouc baamz dongh Ziouv hatc maiv dungx zoux nyei haaix diuh leiz
Leviticus4:28 Ninh yietv hiuv duqv ninh baamz nyei zuiz
Leviticus4:29 Oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv ziec fiqv zuiz naaiv dauh yungh nyeiz nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus4:30 Sai mienh oix zuqc longc buoz-ndoqv coqv deix ziec fiqv zuiz naaiv dauh yungh nyei nziaamv zaix buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh biei norm gorqv nyei jorng. Zengc njiec nyei nziaamv dox njiec ziec-dorngh nyei gorn.
Leviticus4:31 Ninh oix zuqc zorqv cuotv nzengc yungh nyei hmei
Leviticus4:32 “+‘Se gorngv mienh dorh ba'gi yungh dorn daaih ziec fiqv zuiz
Leviticus4:33 Oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv ziec fiqv zuiz naaiv dauh saeng-kuv nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus4:34 Sai mienh oix zuqc longc buoz-ndoqv coqv deix ziec fiqv zuiz naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh dorn nyei nziaamv
Leviticus4:35 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv cuotv nzengc ba'gi yungh dorn nyei hmei
Leviticus5:1 “+‘Se gorngv mienh heuc dauh mienh mingh zoux zorng-zengx ziux ninh buatc nyei hiuv nyei mv baac ninh maiv kangv zoux zorng-zengx
Leviticus5:2 “+‘Fai se gorngv maaih mienh caqv-bouc muoqv zuqc maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv hnangv hieh zoih nyei sei
Leviticus5:3 “+‘Fai se gorngv caqv-bouc muoqv zuqc mienh nyei uix
Leviticus5:4 “+‘Fai se gorngv mienh jangx maiv zaaic ziouc houv oix zoux yietc nyungc
Leviticus5:5 “+‘Dongh gorngv liuz naaiv deix nyungc-nyungc
Leviticus5:6 Laaix ninh zoux dorngc zuqc dingc nyei zuiz
Leviticus5:7 “+‘Se gorngv mienh cuotv maiv jiez yietc dauh ba'gi yungh dorn
Leviticus5:8 Ninh oix zuqc dorh naaiv deix i norm norqc taux sai mienh wuov. Sai mienh ziouc longc norm fiqv zuiz. Ninh oix zuqc niouv norqc nyei jaang nauv mv baac maiv dungx bun m'nqorngv ndutv.
Leviticus5:9 Zorqv deix longc fiqv zuiz naaiv norm norqc nyei nziaamv fuqv ziec-dorngh ga'hlen. Zengc njiec nyei nziaamv oix zuqc liouc njiec ziec-dorngh nyei gorn. Naaiv se ziec fiqv zuiz nyei ga'naaiv.
Leviticus5:10 Sai mienh oix zuqc aengx zorqv da'nyeic norm norqc ziux ziec nyei leiz-nyeic longc zoux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Hnangv naaic
Leviticus5:11 “+‘Mv baac se gorngv mienh cuotv maiv jiez i norm norqc nqo fai i norm baeqc gopv lunx
Leviticus5:12 Oix zuqc dorh naaiv deix mbuonv-muonc daaih jiu bun sai mienh. Sai mienh ziouc zorqv yietc nyau mbuonv-muonc weic bun Ziouv jangx fongc horc nyei mienh. Sai mienh ziouc an jienv ziec-dorngh
Leviticus5:13 Hnangv naaiv zoux liuz
Leviticus5:14 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus5:15 “Se gorngv haaix dauh caqv-bouc baamz zuiz zoux dorngc leiz ziouc dorngc Ziouv nyei haaix nyungc cing-nzengc ga'naaiv
Leviticus5:16 Wuov dauh yaac oix zuqc jaauv sung dongh ninh qiemx jienv
Leviticus5:17 “Se gorngv mienh baamz zuiz
Leviticus5:18 Ninh oix zuqc dorh dauh yiem yungh guanh
Leviticus5:19 Naaiv se fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus6:1 Ziouv Gorngv Mbuox Mose
Leviticus6:2 “Se gorngv maaih mienh baamz zuiz
Leviticus6:3 fai zuotc duqv ga'naaiv yaac maiv nyiemc
Leviticus6:4 wuov dauh ziouc zoux dorngc
Leviticus6:5 fai ninh weic haaix nyungc ga'naaiv ndouv zioux jaav nyei. Dorh ga'naaiv mingh ziec weic zoux dorngc zuiz wuov hnoi
Leviticus6:6 Ninh oix zuqc weic ninh zoux dorngc nyei zuiz dorh dauh maiv waaic fangx nyei ba'gi yungh gouv taux sai mienh wuov bun Ziouv. Meih ganh oix zuqc funx ba'gi yungh nyei jaax-zinh puix horpc weic zoux dorngc zuiz ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Leviticus6:7 Sai mienh ziouc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien tengx ninh fiqv zuiz. Hnangv naaic
Leviticus6:8 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus6:9 “Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor paaiv Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Leviticus6:10 Sai mienh oix zuqc zuqv la'maah ndie nyei lui-ndaauv caux la'maah ndie nyei houx
Leviticus6:11 Nqa'haav oix zuqc yienc nqoi lui-houx aengx zuqv ganh deix
Leviticus6:12 Yiem ziec-dorngh nyei douz oix zuqc zanc-zanc zieqc jienv
Leviticus6:13 Ziec-dorngh nyei douz oix zuqc zanc-zanc zieqc jienv. Cin-maanc maiv dungx bun daic.
Leviticus6:14 “+‘Fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc nyei leiz-nyeic se hnangv naaiv. Aalon nyei dorn mbuo oix zuqc yiem ziec-dorngh nza'hmien zorqv fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc ziec bun Ziouv.
Leviticus6:15 Sai mienh oix zuqc zorqv yietc nyau mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh
Leviticus6:16 Zengc njiec nyei buonc
Leviticus6:17 Maiv dungx an bingv ziqv. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun yie nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus6:18 Aalon nyei zeiv-fun
Leviticus6:19 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus6:20 “Naaiv se longc youh orn Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo zoux sai mienh wuov hnoi oix zuqc fongc horc bun Ziouv. Oix zuqc dorh i morqv mbuonv-muonc weih hnoi-hnoi ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Lungh ndorm fongc horc yietc buonc
Leviticus6:21 Zorqv ga'lanv youh dox jienv mbuonv
Leviticus6:22 Longc youh orn Aalon nyei haaix dauh zeiv-fun nzipc jienv zoux sai mienh
Leviticus6:23 Da'faanh sai mienh fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc
Leviticus6:24 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus6:25 “Oix zuqc mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Leviticus6:26 Bun tengx ziec fiqv zuiz wuov dauh sai mienh nyanc naaiv dauh saeng-kuv. Yaac oix zuqc yiem cing-nzengc nyei dorngx
Leviticus6:27 Da'faanh haaix nyungc muoqv zuqc naaiv deix orv
Leviticus6:28 Zouv naaiv deix orv nyei nie-mor oix zuqc mborqv huv. Mv baac se gorngv longc dongh siqv caeng zouv nor
Leviticus6:29 Da'faanh sai mienh nyei hmuangv doic
Leviticus6:30 Mv baac se gorngv sai mienh dorh haaix dauh ziec fiqv zuiz nyei saeng-kuv nziaamv bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Leviticus7:1 “+‘Fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz nyei leiz-nyeic se hnangv naaiv. Se gauh cing-nzengc jiex nyei ga'naaiv.
Leviticus7:2 Ziec fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz nyei saeng-kuv oix zuqc yiem daix buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv nyei dorngx daix. Zorqv nziaamv pietv huing gormx ziec-dorngh.
Leviticus7:3 Yietc zungv hmei oix zuqc fongc horc
Leviticus7:4 caux i norm nyutc zeiv
Leviticus7:5 Sai mienh ziouc an ziec-dorngh
Leviticus7:6 Da'faanh sai mienh nyei hmuangv doic
Leviticus7:7 “+‘Ziec fiqv zuiz caux ziec fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz se fih hnangv nyei. Maaih nduqc nyungc leiz hnangv. Tengx fiqv zuiz wuov dauh sai mienh duqv naaiv deix ziec nyei ga'naaiv aqv.
Leviticus7:8 Haaix dauh sai mienh tengx haaix dauh buov ziec fongc horc nyei saeng-kuv
Leviticus7:9 Haaix nyungc fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc
Leviticus7:10 Fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc yietc zungv
Leviticus7:11 “+‘Naaiv se mienh dorh ga'naaiv fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv weic jiu tong nyei leiz-nyeic.
Leviticus7:12 “+‘Se gorngv mienh dorh ga'naaiv daaih fongc horc weic laengz zingh Ziouv nor
Leviticus7:13 Dorh fongc horc ziec weic jiu tong laengz zingh Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus7:14 Naaiv deix njuov oix zuqc dorh yietc nyungc yietc norm zoux ziec nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun Ziouv. Naaiv se benx sai mienh nyei buonc
Leviticus7:15 Ziec weic jiu tong laengz zingh nyei orv oix zuqc yiem ziec wuov hnoi nyanc taux nzengc. Maiv dungx liouh taux da'nyeic ndorm.
Leviticus7:16 “+‘Se gorngv fongc horc ziec weic jaauv sung laengz nyei ngaengc waac fai cuotv fim ziec
Leviticus7:17 Taux da'faam hnoi corc maaih zengc nyei nor
Leviticus7:18 Se gorngv da'faam hnoi nyanc naaiv deix ziec nyei orv nor
Leviticus7:19 “+‘Se gorngv naaiv deix orv zuqc haaix nyungc maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus7:20 Mv baac haaix dauh maaih uix aengx nyanc fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv weic jiu tong nyei orv nor
Leviticus7:21 Se gorngv haaix dauh muoqv zuqc maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus7:22 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus7:23 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Leviticus7:24 Saeng-kuv ganh daic fai zuqc hieh ga'naaiv ngaatc daic
Leviticus7:25 Haaix dauh nyanc longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei saeng-kuv hmei
Leviticus7:26 Maiv gunv meih mbuo yiem haaix
Leviticus7:27 Haaix dauh nyanc haaix nyungc nziaamv
Leviticus7:28 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus7:29 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus7:30 Longc douz ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus7:31 Sai mienh ziouc zorqv hmei an ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic buov
Leviticus7:32 Yiem meih mbuo ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus7:33 Aalon nyei dorn
Leviticus7:34 Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus7:35 Naaiv se zorqv Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo fungx zoux sai mienh fu-sux Ziouv wuov hnoi dingc bun ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Se yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv zorqv cuotv nyei buonc.
