Leviticus7:36 Dongh longc youh orn Aalon mbuo zoux sai mienh wuov hnoi
Leviticus7:37 Naaiv deix yietc zungv se fongc horc ziec nyei leiz-nyeic. Maaih buov ziec nyei
Leviticus7:38 Se Ziouv yiem Sinaai Mbong paaiv Mose
Leviticus8:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus8:2 “Dorh Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo daaih souv jienv Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc. Aengx dorh zoux sai nyei lui-houx caux orn mienh nyei youh caux dauh ngongh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz caux i dauh ba'gi yungh gouv
Leviticus8:3 Aengx heuc zuangx baeqc fingx daaih gapv zunv yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc.”
Leviticus8:4 Mose ziux Ziouv mbuox nyei waac zoux nzengc. Zuangx mienh ziouc daaih gapv zunv yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc.
Leviticus8:5 Mose mbuox zuangx mienh
Leviticus8:6 Mose ziouc dorh Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo daaih
Leviticus8:7 Ninh zorqv gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc lui-ndaauv tengx Aalon zuqv jienv
Leviticus8:8 Mose aengx zorqv buang la'kuotv wuov kuaaiv ga'naaiv buang jienv Aalon nyei la'kuotv
Leviticus8:9 zorqv m'nqorngv-beu beu jienv ninh nyei m'nqorngv. Aengx zorqv zoux jangx-hoc biux mengh fungx bun Ziouv wuov kuaaiv jiem-baaih naetv jienv m'nqorngv-beu nza'hmien maengx.
Leviticus8:10 Mose ziouc longc orn mienh nyei youh dox zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh caux yiem ndopv-liuh nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv
Leviticus8:11 Ninh aengx longc wuov deix youh fuqv ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic siec nzunc
Leviticus8:12 Ninh aengx longc orn mienh nyei youh dox Aalon nyei m'nqorngv weic orn ninh yaac saax ninh cing-nzengc.
Leviticus8:13 Mose aengx dorh Aalon nyei dorn mbuo daaih tengx ninh mbuo zuqv lui-ndaauv
Leviticus8:14 Mose zorqv ziec weic fiqv zuiz wuov dauh ngongh gouv daaih. Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo ziouc dorh buoz maan jienv ngongh nyei m'nqorngv.
Leviticus8:15 Mose ziouc daix wuov dauh ngongh
Leviticus8:16 Mose zorqv yietc zungv yiem hnyouv nyei hmei
Leviticus8:17 Mv baac ngongh nyei ndopv caux orv caux jaangh dorh cuotv ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv longc douz buov guangc
Leviticus8:18 Ninh aengx zorqv weic buov ziec nyei ba'gi yungh gouv daaih. Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo dorh buoz maan jienv naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh nyei m'nqorngv.
Leviticus8:19 Mose ziouc daix daaih
Leviticus8:20 Hngaqv ba'gi yungh benx yietc nqanx yietc nqanx liuz
Leviticus8:21 Longc wuom nzaaux liuz gu'nyuoz hnyouv nyei ga'naaiv caux zuih
Leviticus8:22 Mose aengx zorqv da'nyeic dauh ba'gi yungh gouv
Leviticus8:23 Mose ziouc daix daaih aengx zorqv deix ba'gi yungh nyei nziaamv guoqv Aalon nyei mbiaauc bung m'normh biouv caux mbiaauc jieqv buoz-ndoqv-nyeiz caux mbiaauc jieqv zaux-ndoqv-nyeiz.
Leviticus8:24 Zoux liuz
Leviticus8:25 Ninh aengx zorqv hmei caux junc nyei dueiv
Leviticus8:26 Yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien wuov ndaan maiv an bingv nyei njuov Mose zorqv norm maiv an bingv zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh nyei njuov
Leviticus8:27 Naaiv deix ga'naaiv yietc zungv ninh hietv jienv Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo nyei buoz. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging weic zoux cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv.
Leviticus8:28 Mose aengx zorqv yiem ninh mbuo nyei buoz wuov deix ga'naaiv daaih an jienv ziec-dorngh
Leviticus8:29 Mose yaac zorqv lorqc hiuang orv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging weic zoux cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv se Mose nyei buonc longc orn mienh zoux sai mienh nyei yungh gouv orv
Leviticus8:30 Mose aengx zorqv deix orn mienh nyei youh caux yiem ziec-dorngh nyei nziaamv fuqv Aalon caux ninh nyei lui-houx. Yaac fuqv Aalon nyei dorn mbuo caux ninh mbuo nyei lui-houx. Hnangv naaic ninh zorqv Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo caux ninh mbuo zoux sai nyei lui-houx fungx bun Ziouv.
Leviticus8:31 Mose mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Leviticus8:32 Zengc njiec nyei orv caux njuov oix zuqc longc douz buov guangc.
Leviticus8:33 Oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc siec hnoi yaac maiv dungx cuotv mingh haaix ndau. Zuov taux orn zoux sai mienh nyei leiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc buangv
Leviticus8:34 Ih hnoi zoux nyei se ziux Ziouv mbuox nyei waac weic tengx meih mbuo fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus8:35 Oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc buangv siec hnoi siec muonz
Leviticus8:36 Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo ziouc ei jienv Ziouv longc Mose paaiv nyei waac zoux nzengc.
Leviticus9:1 Taux da'betv hnoi
Leviticus9:2 Ninh gorngv mbuox Aalon
Leviticus9:3 Yaac oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus9:4 Oix zuqc aengx dorh dauh ngongh caux dauh ba'gi yungh gouv daaih ziec bun Ziouv
Leviticus9:5 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv Mose mbuox nyei yietc zungv dorh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc. Zuangx mienh gapv zunv daaih fatv nyei
Leviticus9:6 Mose gorngv
Leviticus9:7 Mose mbuox Aalon
Leviticus9:8 Aalon ziouc daaih taux ziec-dorngh daix weic fiqv ganh nyei zuiz wuov dauh ngongh dorn.
Leviticus9:9 Ninh nyei dorn dorh ngongh nyei nziaamv daaih bun ninh
Leviticus9:10 Ninh aengx zorqv ziec fiqv zuiz wuov dauh saeng-kuv nyei hmei
Leviticus9:11 Ninh zorqv ngongh ndopv caux orv dorh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc ciangv buov guangc.
Leviticus9:12 Aalon yaac daix buov ziec wuov dauh saeng-kuv. Ninh nyei dorn dorh saeng-kuv nziaamv bun Aalon
Leviticus9:13 Ninh mbuo aengx zorqv buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv yietc nqanx yietc nqanx
Leviticus9:14 Ninh nzaaux yiem hnyouv nyei ga'naaiv caux zuih an ziec-dorngh caux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv yietc njiec buov.
Leviticus9:15 Aalon aengx zorqv baeqc fingx fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv daaih ziec. Ninh zorqv weic fiqv baeqc fingx nyei zuiz wuov dauh yungh gouv daix daaih ziec fiqv zuiz hnangv daauh nzunc ziec fiqv zuiz wuov nor.
Leviticus9:16 Ninh yaac zorqv buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv daaih ei jienv leiz ziec.
Leviticus9:17 Aengx zorqv yietc nyau fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc an ziec-dorngh buov. Naaiv yaac maiv funx bieqc ndorm-ndorm buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Leviticus9:18 Aalon daix ziec weic tengx baeqc fingx jiu tong wuov dauh ngongh caux ba'gi yungh gouv. Ninh nyei dorn mbuo aengx dorh nziaamv daaih bun ninh
Leviticus9:19 Ngongh nyei hmei caux yungh nyei hmei
Leviticus9:20 ninh mbuo hietv jienv lorqc hiuang orv gu'nguaaic. Aalon ziouc zorqv hmei an ziec-dorngh buov.
Leviticus9:21 Mv baac lorqc hiuang orv caux mbiaauc bung zaux-zuih Aalon yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging weic zoux cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus9:22 Aalon ziouc huin jienv baeqc fingx wuov bung
Leviticus9:23 Mose caux Aalon bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh. Cuotv daaih wuov zanc
Leviticus9:24 Maaih douz yiem Ziouv cuotv daaih buov yiem ziec-dorngh buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux yietc zungv hmei. Zuangx mienh buatc
Leviticus10:1 Aalon nyei dorn
Leviticus10:2 Ziouv ziouc bun douz cuotv daaih buov ninh mbuo
Leviticus10:3 Mose mbuox Aalon
Leviticus10:4 Mose heuc Aalon nyei youz-diex
Leviticus10:5 Ninh mbuo ziouc daaih gaeng sei
Leviticus10:6 Mose yaac mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn
Leviticus10:7 Meih mbuo yaac maiv dungx leih Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc. Maiv zei aeqv
Leviticus10:8 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Aalon
Leviticus10:9 “Meih caux meih nyei dorn mbuo bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Leviticus10:10 Meih mbuo horpc zuqc haih samx duqv cuotv haaix nyungc se cing-nzengc nyei fai pou-tong nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus10:11 Yaac oix zuqc njaaux I^saa^laa^en Mienh hiuv nzengc yie longc Mose jiu bun ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv leiz-latc.”
Leviticus10:12 Mose gorngv mbuox Aalon caux ninh zengc njiec nyei dorn
Leviticus10:13 Oix zuqc yiem cing-nzengc nyei dorngx nyanc weic zuqc benx meih caux meih nyei dorn mbuo horpc zuqc duqv nyei buonc
Leviticus10:14 Mv baac cunv ging nyei lorqc hiuang orv caux fongc horc nyei zuih
Leviticus10:15 Fongc horc nyei zaux-zuih caux cunv ging nyei lorqc hiuang orv
Leviticus10:16 Mose zaah naaic taux ziec fiqv zuiz wuov dauh yungh ziouc hiuv duqv buov nzengc mi'aqv. Ninh qiex jiez Aalon zengc njiec nyei dorn
Leviticus10:17 “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei dorngx nyanc? Se gauh cing-nzengc jiex nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv se jiu bun meih mbuo weic bun meih mbuo ndaam zuangx mienh zoux dorngc nyei sic
Leviticus10:18 Weic zuqc maiv dorh saeng-kuv nziaamv bieqc Cing-Nzengc Jiex wuov Qongx gu'nyuoz
Leviticus10:19 Aalon dau Mose
Leviticus10:20 Mose haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ninh buangv eix aqv.
Leviticus11:1 Ziouv Gorngv Mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Leviticus11:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus11:3 Da'faanh deih mbaaix benx i hlengx yaac faan cov nyei saeng-kuv
Leviticus11:4 “+‘Maaih deix deih mbaaix mv baac maiv faan cov
Leviticus11:5 Yiem la'bieiv nyei domh naauz faan cov nyei mv baac maiv maaih deih mbaaix ziouc weic meih mbuo maaih uix.
Leviticus11:6 Toux faan cov nyei mv baac maiv maaih deih mbaaix
Leviticus11:7 Maiv gunv dungz maaih deih mbaaix zoux i hlengx mv baac maiv faan cov ziouc weic meih mbuo maaih uix.
Leviticus11:8 Naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv nyei orv maiv dungx nyanc. Liemh daic nyei yaac maiv dungx muoqv zuqc. Naaiv se weic meih mbuo maaih uix aqv.
Leviticus11:9 “+‘Yiem wuom maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus11:10 Maiv gunv yiem koiv yiem ndoqv
Leviticus11:11 Meih mbuo oix zuqc gamh nziev naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv
Leviticus11:12 Da'faanh yiem wuom maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv maiv maaih ndaatv
Leviticus11:13 “+‘Naaiv se meih mbuo oix zuqc gamh nziev nyei norqc. Maiv dungx nyanc weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziev nyei. Maaih domh jaangv
Leviticus11:14 domh jaangv-dueiv-ndaauv
Leviticus11:15 nyungc-nyungc norqc aa
Leviticus11:16 norqc lorh torh
Leviticus11:17 norqc m'lomh
Leviticus11:18 norqc guv long baeqc
Leviticus11:19 norqc nyieh
Leviticus11:20 “+‘Da'faanh maaih ndaatv
Leviticus11:21 Mv baac maaih deix maaih ndaatv yaac maaih biei jieqv zaux nyorng
Leviticus11:22 Naaiv buoqv gaeng meih mbuo nyanc duqv nyei. Maaih nyungc-nyungc domh jopv-nyeic
Leviticus11:23 Mv baac ganh nyungc maaih ndaatv
Leviticus11:24 “+‘Naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv haih bun meih mbuo maaih uix. Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc naaiv deix ga'naaiv-daic maaih uix taux hmuangx.
Leviticus11:25 Haaix dauh zorqv norm fai dauh naaiv deix ga'naaiv-daic
Leviticus11:26 “+‘Nyungc-nyungc saeng-kuv deih mbaaix mv baac maiv benx i hlengx yaac maiv faan cov se weic meih mbuo maaih uix. Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc naaiv buoqv saeng-kuv-daic ziouc maaih uix aqv.
Leviticus11:27 Yietc zungv maaih biei jieqv buoz-zaux yangh jauv nyei saeng-kuv
Leviticus11:28 Haaix dauh zorqv naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv-daic oix zuqc nzox ninh nyei lui-houx yaac maaih uix taux hmuangx. Naaiv deix se weic meih mbuo maaih uix aqv.
Leviticus11:29 “+‘Da'faanh nyorng ndau nyei ga'naaiv se dongh naaiv deix weic meih mbuo maaih uix. Maaih fanh mbiaah
Leviticus11:30 naang-da'dingx
Leviticus11:31 Da'faanh nyorng ndau nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus11:32 Maaih dauh naaiv deix ga'naaiv daic mingh
Leviticus11:33 Se gorngv maaih naaiv deix ga'naaiv daic mingh
Leviticus11:34 Maaih haaix nyungc nyanc duqv nyei ga'naaiv mv baac wuov norm nie-mor nyei wuom ndiepv zuqc
Leviticus11:35 Maaih dauh naaiv nyungc ga'naaiv daic mingh
Leviticus11:36 Wuom-zingv fai siou wuom nyei kuotv maaih naaiv nyungc ga'naaiv-daic ndortv bieqc nor
Leviticus11:37 Se gorngv maaih nqanx naaiv deix ga'naaiv-daic ndortv zuqc oix zuangx nyei nyim
Leviticus11:38 Mv baac se gorngv nyim ziemx zuqc wuom yaac maaih dauh naaiv deix ga'naaiv daic mingh ndortv bieqc
Leviticus11:39 “+‘Se gorngv dongh meih mbuo nyanc duqv nyei saeng-kuv mv baac ninh ganh daic mingh
Leviticus11:40 Haaix dauh nyanc naaiv dauh saeng-kuv-daic oix zuqc nzox ninh nyei lui-houx yaac maaih uix taux hmuangx. Haaix dauh zorqv naaiv dauh ga'naaiv-daic oix zuqc nzox ninh nyei lui-houx yaac maaih uix taux hmuangx.
Leviticus11:41 “+‘Da'faanh nyorng gan ndau nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv se gamh nziev nyei. Maiv dungx nyanc.
Leviticus11:42 Longc ga'sie luih ndau nyei
Leviticus11:43 Maiv dungx laaix naaiv deix nyorng ndau nyei ga'naaiv bun meih mbuo ganh benx gamh nziev nyei ga'naaiv. Yaac maiv dungx weic naaiv deix ga'naaiv bun ganh maaih uix.
Leviticus11:44 Yie zoux Ziouv
Leviticus11:45 Yie zoux Ziouv
Leviticus11:46 “+‘Naaiv se saeng-kuv
Leviticus11:47 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zieqv duqv maaih uix nyei caux maiv maaih uix nyei
Leviticus12:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus12:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus12:3 Taux da'betv wuov hnoi
Leviticus12:4 m'sieqv dorn corc oix zuqc aengx zuov faah ziepc faam hnoi cingx daaih haih saax nzengc yungz gu'nguaaz cuotv nziaamv nyei uix. Ninh yaac maiv dungx muoqv zuqc haaix nyungc cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv. Yaac maiv dungx bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Ndopv-Liuh. Zuov taux yungz gu'nguaaz cuotv nziaamv maaih uix nyei hnoi-nyieqc buangv.
Leviticus12:5 Mv baac yungz duqv gu'nguaaz-sieqv nor
Leviticus12:6 “+‘Taux saax uix nyei hnoi-nyieqc buangv
Leviticus12:7 Sai mienh ziouc dorh naaiv deix ga'naaiv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien ziec tengx ninh saax nzengc yungz gu'nguaaz cuotv nziaamv nyei uix. Naaiv se m'sieqv dorn yungz gu'nguaaz nyei leiz maiv gunv yungz dorn fai sieqv.
Leviticus12:8 Se gorngv ninh maiv maaih nyaanh maaiz yietc dauh ba'gi yungh dorn
Leviticus13:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Leviticus13:2 “Se gorngv haaix dauh buatc ndopv omx
Leviticus13:3 Sai mienh ziouc zaah mangc ndopv benx baengc wuov norm dorngx. Buatc wuov norm dorngx nyei biei baeqc mi'aqv
Leviticus13:4 Mv baac buatc wuov norm dorngx baeqc yaac hnangv kungx yiem ndopv benx hnangv
Leviticus13:5 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Leviticus13:6 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Leviticus13:7 Ninh duqv sai mienh dingc ninh cing-nzengc nyei mv baac se gorngv nqa'haav buatc ndopv aengx jaa huv jienv mingh
Leviticus13:8 Sai mienh zaah liuz
Leviticus13:9 “Se gorngv maaih haaix dauh butv gomh huv baengc
Leviticus13:10 Sai mienh ziouc zaah mangc. Buatc ndopv baeqc yaac omx
Leviticus13:11 bun cing maiv haih longx
Leviticus13:12 “Se gorngv ndopv nyei baengc butv gormx sin
Leviticus13:13 sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc. Buatc baengc buangv nzengc ziangh sin
Leviticus13:14 Mv baac se gorngv maaih orv-lunx siqv butv cuotv haaix norm dorngx
Leviticus13:15 Sai mienh zaah mangc
Leviticus13:16 Se gorngv naaiv deix orv-lunx tuix setv baeqc nzengc
Leviticus13:17 Sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc. Buatc wuov deix dorngx tuix setv baeqc
Leviticus13:18 “Se gorngv maaih mienh ziangh zueih longx mingh
Leviticus13:19 nqa'haav yiem ziangh jiex zueih nyei dorngx omx daaih baeqc nyei fai maaih deix dorngx baeqc siqv
Leviticus13:20 Sai mienh zaah mangc buatc butv wuov norm dorngx maiv daan yiem ndopv hnangv
Leviticus13:21 Mv baac se gorngv sai mienh zaah mangc nyei ziangh hoc buatc wuov norm dorngx nyei biei maiv baeqc
Leviticus13:22 Buatc ndopv aengx butv jangv jienv mingh nor
Leviticus13:23 Mv baac se gorngv buatc wuov norm dorngx hnangv loz nor
Leviticus13:24 “Haaix dauh zuqc douz buov
Leviticus13:25 sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc. Buatc wuov norm dorngx nyei biei tuix setv baeqc nzengc
Leviticus13:26 Mv baac se gorngv sai mienh zaah mangc
Leviticus13:27 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Leviticus13:28 Mv baac se gorngv buatc wuov norm dorngx m'daaih hnangv loz wuov nor
Leviticus13:29 “Maiv gunv m'jangc fai m'sieqv
Leviticus13:30 sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc naaiv deix faang. Buatc maiv daan yiem ndopv hnangv
Leviticus13:31 Se gorngv sai mienh zaah mangc buatc butv faang sietv nyei dorngx maiv ndo
Leviticus13:32 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Leviticus13:33 naaiv dauh mienh oix zuqc teix mba'biei fai siaam. Mv baac butv faang nyei dorngx maiv dungx teix. Sai mienh ziouc aengx kuonx jienv siec hnoi.
Leviticus13:34 Da'cietv hnoi sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc butv faang sietv nyei dorngx. Se gorngv buatc ndopv maiv butv jangv jienv mingh nor
Leviticus13:35 Se gorngv ninh saax liuz uix mv baac nqa'haav butv faang sietv nyei dorngx butv jangv jienv mingh
Leviticus13:36 oix zuqc bun sai mienh zaah mangc ninh. Se gorngv buatc butv faang sietv nyei dorngx yiem ndopv butv jangv jienv mingh
Leviticus13:37 Mv baac ziux sai mienh mangc buatc butv faang sietv nyei dorngx maiv jaa butv
Leviticus13:38 “Maiv gunv m'jangc m'sieqv
Leviticus13:39 sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc. Se gorngv buatc wuov norm dorngx kungx baeqc hnangv
Leviticus13:40 “Se gorngv haaix dauh m'jangc dorn nyei mba'biei bioh
Leviticus13:41 Haaix dauh nyei biorngh ceiv caux m'nqorngv nza'hmien maengx nyei mba'biei bioh
Leviticus13:42 Mv baac se gorngv m'nqorngv fai biorngh njang cuotv deix baeqc siqv nyei dorngx
Leviticus13:43 Sai mienh oix zuqc zaah mangc. Se gorngv buatc yiem m'nqorngv fai biorngh omx nyei dorngx baeqc siqv hnangv gomh huv baengc nor
Leviticus13:44 wuov dauh mienh ziouc maaih gomh huv baengc. Ninh maaih uix aqv. Sai mienh ziouc dingc ninh maaih uix
Leviticus13:45 “Mienh butv gomh huv baengc oix zuqc zuqv betv huv nyei lui-houx
Leviticus13:46 Da'faanh butv jienv wuov nyungc baengc
Leviticus13:47 “Se gorngv lui-houx jiex mbuov
Leviticus13:48 se longc la'maah suix fai ba'gi suix ndatv daaih fai ciqv daaih nyei lui-houx
Leviticus13:49 yaac se gorngv naaiv deix lui-houx fai longc ndopv zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv jiex mbuov daaih maeng nyei fai siqv nyei
Leviticus13:50 Sai mienh mangc liuz ziouc ganh ca'lengc hietv jienv yietc norm dorngx siec hnoi.
Leviticus13:51 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Leviticus13:52 Sai mienh oix zuqc buov guangc nzengc naaiv deix longc ba'gi suix fai la'maah ndie ndatv daaih nyei lui-houx fai longc ndopv zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus13:53 “Mv baac sai mienh zaah mangc nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus13:54 sai mienh oix zuqc hatc nzox jiex mbuov nyei ga'naaiv. Nzox liuz
Leviticus13:55 Nzox liuz
Leviticus13:56 Se gorngv nzox liuz
Leviticus13:57 Mv baac se gorngv nqa'haav naaiv deix lui-houx
Leviticus13:58 Mv baac se gorngv nzox liuz naaiv deix lui-houx
Leviticus13:59 Naaiv se ga'naaiv jiex mbuov nyei leiz weic dingc ga'naaiv se cing-nzengc fai maaih uix
Leviticus14:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus14:2 “Naaiv se mienh butv gomh huv baengc longx mingh saax uix wuov hnoi oix zuqc gan nyei leiz. Oix zuqc dorh ninh mingh lorz sai mienh.
Leviticus14:3 Sai mienh oix zuqc cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv
Leviticus14:4 sai mienh ziouc heuc zorqv i norm maiv maaih uix nyei norqc nangh caux si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Leviticus14:5 Sai mienh heuc ninh zorqv norm norqc yiem zaangh jienv wuom-daaih nyei nie-mor gu'nguaaic daix.
Leviticus14:6 Ninh aengx zorqv nangh wuov norm norqc caux si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Leviticus14:7 Sai mienh oix zuqc fuqv butv liuz gomh huv baengc oix saax uix wuov laanh mienh siec nzunc
Leviticus14:8 “Duqv saax uix wuov dauh oix zuqc nzox ninh nyei lui-houx
Leviticus14:9 Taux da'cietv hnoi ninh oix zuqc aengx teix mba'biei
Leviticus14:10 “Taux da'betv hnoi ninh oix zuqc dorh i dauh ba'gi yungh gouv dorn caux yietc dauh doix hnyangx nyei ba'gi yungh zeic
Leviticus14:11 Tengx ninh saax uix wuov dauh sai mienh ziouc dorh saax uix nyei mienh caux ninh fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv taux Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Leviticus14:12 “Sai mienh ziouc zorqv yietc dauh wuov deix ba'gi yungh gouv dorn caux yietc gorngc ziepc gouv nyei buo gouv ga'lanv youh ziec weic zoux dorngc nyei zuiz. Ninh oix zuqc zorqv daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging weic zoux cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv.
Leviticus14:13 Sai mienh oix zuqc yiem daix ziec weic fiqv zuiz caux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv wuov norm cing-nzengc dorngx daix
Leviticus14:14 Sai mienh ziouc zorqv deix ziec weic zoux dorngc zuiz wuov dauh saeng-kuv nziaamv guoqv saax uix naaiv dauh mienh nyei mbiaauc bung m'normh biouv caux mbiaauc jieqv buoz-ndoqv-nyeiz caux mbiaauc jieqv zaux-ndoqv-nyeiz.
Leviticus14:15 Sai mienh yaac oix zuqc zorqv deix wuov gorngc ziepc gouv nyei buo gouv ga'lanv youh dox ganh nyei zaaix jieqv buoz-zaangv
Leviticus14:16 yaac longc mbiaauc jieqv buoz-ndoqv-ziangv coqv yiem zaaix jieqv buoz-zaangv nyei youh
Leviticus14:17 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv deix yiem zaaix jieqv buoz-zaangv zengc njiec nyei youh guoqv jienv oix saax uix wuov dauh mienh nyei mbiaauc bung m'normh biouv
Leviticus14:18 Sai mienh nyei buoz-zaangv zengc njiec nyei youh oix zuqc nzaatv saax uix wuov laanh mienh nyei m'nqorngv ziouc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien tengx ninh fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus14:19 “Sai mienh aengx zorqv fongc horc weic fiqv zuiz nyei ga'naaiv daaih ziec tengx saax uix wuov laanh mienh fiqv zuiz. Nqa'haav daix buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv.
Leviticus14:20 Sai mienh ziouc zorqv daaih caux fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc an wuov ziec-dorngh tengx ninh fiqv zuiz. Ninh ziouc cing-nzengc mi'aqv.
Leviticus14:21 “Mv baac se gorngv mienh jomc haic
Leviticus14:22 caux i norm norqc nqo fai i norm baeqc gopv lunx ziux ninh haih lorz duqv nyei. Longc norm ziec fiqv zuiz
Leviticus14:23 “Taux da'betv hnoi oix saax uix wuov laanh mienh oix zuqc dorh naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv taux Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Leviticus14:24 Sai mienh ziouc zorqv ziec weic fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz nyei ba'gi yungh dorn
Leviticus14:25 Ninh ziouc daix ziec weic fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh dorn
Leviticus14:26 Sai mienh oix zuqc aengx zorqv deix ga'lanv youh dox ganh nyei zaaix jieqv buoz-zaangv
Leviticus14:27 aengx longc mbiaauc jieqv buoz-ndoqv-ziangv coqv yiem zaaix jieqv buoz-zaangv nyei youh
Leviticus14:28 Aengx longc deix yiem ninh nyei buoz-zaangv zengc njiec nyei youh guoqv jienv mbiaauc bung m'normh biouv caux mbiaauc jieqv buoz-ndoqv-nyeiz caux mbiaauc jieqv zaux-ndoqv-nyeiz
Leviticus14:29 Yiem sai mienh nyei buoz-zaangv zengc njiec nyei youh nzaatv saax uix wuov laanh mienh nyei m'nqorngv. Sai mienh ziouc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien tengx ninh fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus14:30 Sai mienh oix zuqc tengx ninh ziec. Ziux wuov laanh mienh lorz duqv nyei
Leviticus14:31 yietc norm ziec weic fiqv zuiz
Leviticus14:32 Naaiv se butv liuz gomh huv baengc oix saax uix mv baac maaiz maiv jiez hnangv yietc gau horpc zuqc maaiz daaih fongc horc ziec nyei leiz.
Leviticus14:33 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Leviticus14:34 “Meih mbuo bieqc Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung
Leviticus14:35 biauv-ziouv oix zuqc mingh mbuox sai mienh
Leviticus14:36 Sai mienh ziouc heuc ninh mbuo bienh yiem biauv gu'nyuoz nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv cuotv nzengc ninh cingx daaih bieqc mingh zaah mangc biauv jiex mbuov nyei dorngx. Nzauh heix oix zuqc dingc naaiv deix ga'naaiv maaih uix. Nqa'haav sai mienh bieqc mingh zaah mangc biauv.
Leviticus14:37 Ninh zaah mangc yiem njongc wuov deix jiex mbuov nyei dorngx
Leviticus14:38 Sai mienh ziouc cuotv ga'nyiec
Leviticus14:39 Taux da'cietv hnoi sai mienh aengx mingh zaah mangc. Buatc jiex mbuov nyei dorngx yiem njongc butv jangv jienv mingh nor
Leviticus14:40 ninh ziouc heuc mienh caeqv cuotv jiex mbuov wuov deix la'bieiv dorh mingh guangc ga'nyiec ziqc zingh maaih uix nyei dorngx.
Leviticus14:41 Yaac oix zuqc heuc mienh guaaih nzengc biauv gu'nyuoz nyei norm-norm dorngx. Guaaih ndutv nyei ga'naaiv-mbuonv oix zuqc dorh mingh guangc ga'nyiec ziqc zingh maaih uix nyei dorngx.
Leviticus14:42 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc aengx zorqv siang-la'bieiv dorh mingh div caeqv cuotv wuov deix. Aengx longc siang-ba'naih nie naic jienv.
Leviticus14:43 “Se gorngv caeqv cuotv wuov deix la'bieiv
Leviticus14:44 sai mienh oix zuqc mingh zaah mangc. Se gorngv buatc jiex mbuov jangv jienv mingh
Leviticus14:45 Yietc norm biauv oix zuqc caeqv nzengc. La'bieiv
Leviticus14:46 “Dongh guon jienv biauv nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus14:47 Haaix dauh yiem wuov norm biauv bueix fai nyanc ga'naaiv
Leviticus14:48 “Mv baac se gorngv naic liuz biauv
Leviticus14:49 Weic saax naaiv norm biauv nyei uix oix zuqc longc i norm norqc caux si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Leviticus14:50 Ninh oix zuqc zorqv norm norqc yiem zaangh jienv wuom-daaih nyei nie-mor gu'nguaaic daix.
Leviticus14:51 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv nangh wuov norm norqc caux si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Leviticus14:52 Ninh ziouc longc norqc nziaamv
Leviticus14:53 Nangh wuov norm norqc ninh zorqv daaih bungx cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc zingh gan mboux mingh. Hnangv naaiv zoux
Leviticus14:54 Naaiv deix leiz se weic butv gomh huv baengc
Leviticus14:55 weic lui-houx fai biauv jiex mbuov nyei leiz
Leviticus14:56 weic ndopv omx
Leviticus14:57 Naaiv se gomh huv baengc caux biauv jiex mbuov nyei baengc oix zuqc gan nyei leiz.
Leviticus15:1 Ziouv Gorngv Mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Leviticus15:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus15:3 Maiv gunv naaiv deix ga'naaiv cuotv fai zaeqv jienv gu'nyuoz
Leviticus15:4 “+‘Haaix dauh m'jangc dorn lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv aengx bueix haaix zung coux
Leviticus15:5 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc ninh nyei coux
Leviticus15:6 Haaix dauh zueiz zuqc ninh zueiz jiex nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus15:7 “+‘Haaix dauh muoqv lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv nyei m'jangc dorn oix zuqc nzox ganh nyei lui-houx
Leviticus15:8 “+‘Haaix dauh lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv nyei mienh tuiv wuom-nzuih naetv zuqc mienh
Leviticus15:9 “+‘Lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv nyei mienh zueiz jiex nyei maaz-orn fai haaix nyungc ga'naaiv
Leviticus15:10 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc naaiv deix geh jiex zueiz jiex nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus15:11 “+‘Haaix dauh mienh lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv yaac maiv longc wuom nzaaux buoz ndaangc
Leviticus15:12 “+‘Haaix dauh mienh lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv aengx muoqv zuqc nie-mor
Leviticus15:13 “+‘Lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv cuotv nyei mienh longx mingh
Leviticus15:14 Taux da'betv hnoi oix zuqc dorh i norm norqc nqo fai i norm baeqc gopv lunx
Leviticus15:15 Sai mienh ziouc tengx ninh ziec. Ninh longc norm ziec fiqv zuiz
Leviticus15:16 “+‘Haaix dauh m'jangc dorn maaih jaix-nongc cuotv
Leviticus15:17 Lui-houx fai haaix nyungc longc ndopv zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv maaih jaix-nongc guoqv zuqc
Leviticus15:18 M'jangc m'sieqv caux liuz doic yaac maaih jaix-nongc cuotv
Leviticus15:19 “+‘M'sieqv dorn hlaax-hlaax maaih sin-yienc nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus15:20 “+‘Ninh maaih sin-yienc nyei ziangh hoc bueix haaix norm dorngx
Leviticus15:21 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc ninh nyei coux
Leviticus15:22 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc ninh zueiz nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus15:23 Maiv gunv ninh zueiz coux fai haaix nyungc ga'naaiv
Leviticus15:24 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh m'jangc dorn caux maaih sin-yienc nyei m'sieqv dorn nitv doic
Leviticus15:25 “+‘Haaix dauh m'sieqv dorn maaih nziaamv cuotv camv-hnoi
Leviticus15:26 Maaih nziaamv cuotv nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus15:27 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc wuov deix ga'naaiv ziouc maaih uix. Oix zuqc nzox ganh nyei lui-houx
Leviticus15:28 “+‘Mv baac se gorngv ninh cuotv nyei nziaamv dingh nzengc
Leviticus15:29 Taux da'betv hnoi ninh oix zuqc dorh i norm norqc nqo fai i norm baeqc gopv lunx taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Leviticus15:30 Sai mienh ziouc longc norm ziec weic fiqv zuiz
Leviticus15:31 “+‘Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naaiv bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh simv nqoi ninh mbuo nyei uix. Nziex ninh mbuo dorh uix daaih guoqv zuqc yie nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Leviticus15:32 Naaiv deix leiz se weic m'jangc dorn lamh mbueiz dorngx maaih ga'naaiv fai jaix-nongc cuotv ziouc bun ninh maaih uix
Leviticus15:33 yaac weic m'sieqv dorn maaih sin-yienc nyei ziangh hoc ziouc maaih uix
Leviticus16:1 Aalon nyei i dauh dorn mingh fatv Ziouv ziouc daic mi'aqv. Nqa'haav Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus16:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox meih nyei gorx
Leviticus16:3 “Aalon oix bieqc Cing-Nzengc Jiex nyei Dorngx
Leviticus16:4 Oix zuqc zuqv jienv la'maah ndie nyei cing-nzengc lui-ndaauv yaac zuqv jienv la'maah ndie nyei houx
Leviticus16:5 Oix zuqc yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gu'nyuoz zorqv cuotv i dauh yungh gouv ziec weic fiqv zuiz yaac zorqv dauh ba'gi yungh gouv weic buov ziec.
Leviticus16:6 “Aalon oix zuqc zorqv fiqv ganh nyei zuiz wuov dauh ngongh gouv ziec weic fiqv ganh nyei zuiz caux ganh nyei biauv zong mienh nyei zuiz.
Leviticus16:7 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv wuov deix i dauh yungh gouv yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc fongc horc bun Ziouv.
Leviticus16:8 Aalon oix zuqc weic naaiv deix i dauh yungh gouv dingc maengc mangc. Yietc dauh ndortv benx Ziouv nyei
Leviticus16:9 Aalon ziouc zorqv ndortv benx Ziouv nyei buonc wuov dauh yungh gouv ziec weic fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus16:10 Mv baac ndortv benx teix zuiz wuov dauh yungh oix zuqc liemh nangh fongc horc bun Ziouv weic fiqv zuiz
Leviticus16:11 “Aalon oix zuqc zorqv fiqv ganh nyei zuiz wuov dauh ngongh gouv daix daaih ziec fiqv ganh nyei zuiz caux biauv zong mienh nyei zuiz.
Leviticus16:12 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv hung-louh dapv buangv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien nyei ziec-dorngh nyei douz-taanx-nangh caux i nyau zong muonc nyei hung
Leviticus16:13 Oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien zorqv hung an jienv douz gu'nguaaic bun hung-sioux faaux om jienv ceix en nyei weic
Leviticus16:14 Ninh oix zuqc aengx zorqv deix ngongh gouv nyei nziaamv longc buoz-ndoqv tiu nziaamv mingh guoqv ceix en nyei weic nza'hmien
Leviticus16:15 “Aalon oix zuqc daix weic tengx zuangx baeqc fingx ziec fiqv zuiz wuov dauh yungh
Leviticus16:16 Hnangv naaic
Leviticus16:17 Yiem Aalon bieqc Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx fiqv zuiz nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus16:18 “Aalon cuotv daaih oix zuqc aengx mingh taux yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien nyei ziec-dorngh wuov
Leviticus16:19 Yaac longc buoz-ndoqv coqv nziaamv tiu mingh ziec-dorngh siec nzunc weic saax ziec-dorngh nyei uix
Leviticus16:20 “Aalon weic Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx caux Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh caux ziec-dorngh fiqv liuz zuiz
Leviticus16:21 Ninh ziouc longc sung-buoz maan jienv nangh wuov dauh yungh nyei m'nqorngv
Leviticus16:22 Wuov dauh yungh ziouc teix ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv zuiz taux norm lengh nyei dorngx
Leviticus16:23 “Nqa'haav Aalon oix zuqc bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz yienc nqoi dongh ninh zuqv jienv bieqc Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx wuov deix la'maah ndie nyei lui-houx
Leviticus16:24 Ninh oix zuqc yiem norm cing-nzengc dorngx longc wuom nzaaux sin aengx zuqv jienv yietc gau zuqv nyei sai mienh lui. Nqa'haav oix zuqc cuotv mingh weic ganh yaac weic baeqc fingx zorqv ga'naaiv buov ziec fiqv ganh nyei zuiz caux baeqc fingx nyei zuiz.
Leviticus16:25 Oix zuqc aengx zorqv ziec weic fiqv zuiz wuov dauh saeng-kuv nyei hmei an wuov ziec-dorngh buov.
Leviticus16:26 “Dorh teix zuiz nyei yungh mingh bungx wuov dauh mienh oix zuqc nzox lui-houx
Leviticus16:27 Zoux ziec fiqv zuiz nyei ngongh gouv caux yungh gouv
Leviticus16:28 Buov naaiv deix ga'naaiv wuov dauh mienh oix zuqc nzox lui-houx
Leviticus16:29 “Naaiv se meih mbuo oix zuqc yietc liuz gan nyei leiz
Leviticus16:30 weic zuqc yiem naaiv norm hnoi oix zuqc weic meih mbuo fiqv zuiz
Leviticus16:31 Naaiv se Dingh Gong Hnoi
Leviticus16:32 Duqv longc youh orn daaih nzipc ninh nyei die zoux sai mienh wuov dauh oix zuqc zuqv cing-nzengc nyei la'maah ndie lui-houx tengx fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus16:33 Ninh oix zuqc weic Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx caux Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh caux ziec-dorngh fiqv zuiz. Yaac oix zuqc weic zuangx sai mienh caux zuangx baeqc fingx fiqv zuiz.
Leviticus16:34 “Naaiv se meih mbuo yietc liuz oix zuqc gan nyei leiz. Oix zuqc weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei yietc zungv zuiz yietc hnyangx fiqv yietc nzunc.” Mose ziouc ziux Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux ziangx.
Leviticus17:1 Ziouv Gorngv Mbuox Mose
Leviticus17:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Leviticus17:3 Haaix dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh daix ngongh
Leviticus17:4 se gorngv maiv dorh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Leviticus17:5 Hnangv naaiv zoux se weic bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh dongh ninh mbuo yiem wuov naah daix nyei saeng-kuv daaih fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv. Oix zuqc dorh daaih bun Ziouv
Leviticus17:6 Sai mienh ziouc zorqv wuov dauh saeng-kuv nyei nziaamv fuqv yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Leviticus17:7 Yiem naaiv mingh I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv dungx daix saeng-kuv ziec bun yungh mienv hnangv maaih hieh hnyouv nyei mienh nor. Naaiv se ninh mbuo doic jiex doic yietc liuz oix zuqc gan nyei leiz.’
Leviticus17:8 “Oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo
Leviticus17:9 yaac maiv dorh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc ziec bun Ziouv
Leviticus17:10 “+‘Da'faanh haaix dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh fai yiem ninh mbuo gu'nyuoz nyei ganh fingx mienh nyanc haaix nyungc nziaamv
Leviticus17:11 Weic zuqc nangh nyei ga'naaiv nyei maengc se yiem nziaamv. Yie bun nziaamv meih mbuo weic yiem ziec-dorngh fiqv meih mbuo nyei zuiz. Weic zuqc maengc yiem nziaamv
Leviticus17:12 Weic naaiv yie gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus17:13 “+‘Haaix dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh fai yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz nyei ganh fingx mienh
Leviticus17:14 weic zuqc nyungc-nyungc nangh nyei ga'naaiv nyei maengc se yiem ninh nyei nziaamv. Weic naaiv yie cingx mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus17:15 “+‘Maiv gunv buonv-fingx mienh fai ganh fingx mienh
Leviticus17:16 Mv baac se gorngv ninh maiv nzox lui-houx
Leviticus18:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus18:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus18:3 Meih mbuo maiv dungx zoux hnangv ninh mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung zoux wuov nor
Leviticus18:4 Meih mbuo oix zuqc gan yie nyei leiz
Leviticus18:5 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx longx yie nyei lingc
Leviticus18:6 “+‘Haaix dauh maiv dungx mingh caux juangc nziaamv-fei nyei cien-ceqv nitv doic. Yie se Ziouv.
Leviticus18:7 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix ganh nyei maa. Ninh zoux meih nyei maa
Leviticus18:8 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix meih nyei die nyei auv. Hnangv naaiv ziouc baaic zuqc die.
Leviticus18:9 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix ganh nyei dorc fai muoc
Leviticus18:10 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix meih nyei fun
Leviticus18:11 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix die nyei auv nyei sieqv
Leviticus18:12 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix meih nyei gou-maac fai muoc-maac. Ninh se caux meih nyei die juangc nziaamv-fei nyei cien-ceqv.
Leviticus18:13 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix meih nyei dorc deih fai nziez-maac. Ninh se caux meih nyei maa juangc nziaamv-fei nyei cien-ceqv.
Leviticus18:14 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix meih baeqv-diex nyei auv fai youz-diex nyei auv weic zuqc ninh mbuo zoux meih nyei juoh caux meih nyei nziez-maac.
Leviticus18:15 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix ganh nyei mbuangz. Ninh zoux meih nyei dorn nyei auv. Maiv dungx bueix ninh.
Leviticus18:16 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix ganh nyei muoz-doic nyei auv. Hnangv naaiv zoux baaic zuqc meih nyei gorx fai youz.
Leviticus18:17 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix haaix dauh m'sieqv dorn aengx liemh ninh nyei sieqv bueix. Yaac maiv dungx bueix ninh nyei dorn nyei sieqv fai sieqv nyei sieqv. Ninh mbuo se caux wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn juangc nziaamv-fei nyei cien-ceqv. Hnangv naaiv zoux se zoux waaic sic.
Leviticus18:18 “+‘Meih nyei auv corc ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus18:19 “+‘M'sieqv dorn sin-yienc
Leviticus18:20 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix mienh nyei auv. Hnangv naaiv ziouc guoqv zuqc ganh maaih uix.
Leviticus18:21 “+‘Maiv dungx zorqv meih mbuo nyei haaix dauh fu'jueiv longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Molekv zienh. Naaiv se mangc piex
Leviticus18:22 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix m'jangc dorn dorngx m'sieqv dorn. Se gamh nziev haic nyei sic.
Leviticus18:23 “+‘Maiv dungx hienx saeng-kuv
Leviticus18:24 “+‘Meih mbuo maiv dungx zoux naaiv deix yietc zungv sic bun ganh maaih uix
Leviticus18:25 Liemh deic-bung yaac maaih uix. Yie ziouc dingc deic-bung nyei zuiz. Deic-bung ziouc lov cuotv yiem jienv nyei baeqc fingx.
Leviticus18:26 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc ei nzengc yie nyei lingc caux yie nyei leiz. Maiv gunv buonv-fingx mienh fai yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz nyei ganh fingx mienh
Leviticus18:27 Yiem wuov norm deic-bung ndaangc meih mbuo wuov deix mienh zoux naaiv deix sic
Leviticus18:28 Se gorngv meih mbuo bun deic-bung maaih uix
Leviticus18:29 “+‘Haaix dauh zoux naaiv deix haaix nyungc gamh nziev nyei sic
Leviticus18:30 Oix zuqc ei jienv yie paaiv nyei waac zoux yaac maiv dungx zuotc yiem ndaangc meih mbuo wuov deix gamh nziev haic nyei leiz. Yaac maiv dungx bun ganh laaix naaiv deix sic maaih uix. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus19:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus19:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Leviticus19:3 “+‘Meih mbuo gorqv-mienh oix zuqc tongx nimc ganh nyei diex maac. Yaac oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus19:4 “+‘Maiv dungx guangc yie aengx zaangc miuc-fangx. Yaac maiv dungx dox miuc-fangx daaih weic ganh baaix. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus19:5 “+‘Meih mbuo fongc horc ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv bun Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus19:6 Ziec nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc yiem ziec wuov hnoi nyanc
Leviticus19:7 Taux da'faam hnoi corc aengx nyanc
Leviticus19:8 Haaix dauh nyanc naaiv deix ziec nyei ga'naaiv zungv oix zuqc ndaam ninh ganh nyei zuiz
Leviticus19:9 “+‘Meih mbuo gaatv mbiauh
Leviticus19:10 Maiv dungx gaeqv nzengc yiem a'ngunc huingx nyei biouv. Yaac maiv dungx nzauz a'ngunc biouv-ndortv. Oix zuqc liouh bun mienh jomc mienh aengx caux meih mbuo yiem nyei ganh fingx mienh. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus19:11 “+‘Maiv dungx zoux zaqc. “+‘Maiv dungx gorngv-baeqc. “+‘Maiv dungx laanh nduov laanh.
Leviticus19:12 “+‘Maiv dungx ziangv jienv yie nyei mbuox laengz waac mv baac jaav nyei
Leviticus19:13 “+‘Maiv dungx kuei mienh fai caangv mienh nyei ga'naaiv. “+‘Maiv dungx liouh cingv daaih zoux gong nyei mienh nyei gong-zinh jiex muonz.
Leviticus19:14 “+‘Maiv dungx zioux m'normh ndung nyei mienh. Yaac maiv dungx zorqv ga'naaiv an jauv bun m'zing maengh nyei mienh ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. Oix zuqc gamh nziex
Leviticus19:15 “+‘Oix zuqc baengh fim nyei siemv zuiz mbenc sic. Yaac maiv dungx kungx bouc mienh jomc mienh fai kungx tengx mienh maaih mienh. Oix zuqc baengh fim nyei siemv mienh.
Leviticus19:16 “+‘Maiv dungx yiem meih nyei mienh mbu'ndongx jiex naaiv jiex wuov gorngv waac-huv. “+‘Yaac maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc hoic mienh nyei maengc. Yie se Ziouv.
Leviticus19:17 “+‘Maiv dungx yiem hnyouv nzorng meih nyei gorx-youz. Zungv oix zuqc mingh kuinx ninh weic bun ganh maiv zuqc caux ninh ndaam zuiz.
Leviticus19:18 “+‘Maiv dungx jaauv siouh fai nipc win ganh nyei gorx-youz
Leviticus19:19 “+‘Meih mbuo oix zuqc ei nzengc yie nyei lingc. “+‘Maiv dungx bun meih nyei yietc nyungc saeng-kuv zorpc da'nyeic nyungc nyei buonv. “+‘Maiv dungx longc i nyungc nyim juangc nzong ndeic zuangx. “+‘Maiv dungx zuqv longc i nyungc suix zorpc jienv zoux daaih nyei lui-houx.
Leviticus19:20 “+‘Se gorngv maaih dauh m'jangc dorn bueix dauh nouh beiz
Leviticus19:21 Mv baac wuov dauh m'jangc dorn oix zuqc dorh dauh ba'gi yungh gouv taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc weic zoux dorngc nyei zuiz ziec bun Ziouv.
Leviticus19:22 Sai mienh ziouc longc wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien ziec tengx ninh fiqv ninh zoux dorngc nyei zuiz. Ninh nyei zuiz ziouc duqv guangc liuz aqv.
Leviticus19:23 “+‘Meih mbuo bieqc Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung zuangx haaix nyungc biouv
Leviticus19:24 Da'feix hnyangx ziangh nyei biouv yietc zungv se cing-nzengc nyei
Leviticus19:25 Mv baac da'hmz hnyangx meih mbuo nyanc naaiv deix ndiangx nyei biouv duqv aqv. Hnangv naaiv zoux
Leviticus19:26 “+‘Maiv dungx nyanc corc maaih nziaamv yiem jienv nyei orv. “+‘Maiv dungx mbouv guaax fai zoux haaix nyungc mienv.
Leviticus19:27 “+‘Maiv dungx japv meih mbuo nyei mba'biei baengh nyei huing gormx m'nqorngv.
Leviticus19:28 Mienh daic yaac maiv dungx weic ninh mbuo gaatv ganh nyei sin fai nziepv biangh. Yie se Ziouv.
Leviticus19:29 “+‘Maiv dungx baaic meih mbuo nyei sieqv
Leviticus19:30 “+‘Oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi. Yaac oix zuqc taaih yie nyei singx dinc. Yie se Ziouv.
Leviticus19:31 “+‘Maiv dungx mingh lorz mienh tengx gaanv hei fai mbouv guaax. Hnangv naaiv zoux meih mbuo ziouc laaix ninh mbuo maaih uix. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus19:32 “+‘Yiem mienh gox mienh nyei nza'hmien oix zuqc souv jiez sin. Oix zuqc taaih hnyangx-jeiv hlang nyei mienh
Leviticus19:33 “+‘Se gorngv maaih ganh fingx mienh caux meih mbuo yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung
Leviticus19:34 Oix zuqc funx yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei ganh fingx mienh caux buonv-deic mienh fih hnangv
Leviticus19:35 “+‘Meih mbuo ndorqc fai nziang fai hlaau haaix nyungc
Leviticus19:36 Nziangx oix zuqc horpc
Leviticus19:37 “+‘Oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei yietc zungv lingc caux diuh diuh leiz. Oix zuqc ei jienv zoux nzengc. Yie se Ziouv. ’+”
Leviticus20:1 Ziouv Gorngv Mbuox Mose
Leviticus20:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus20:3 Yie ganh yaac oix mbienv hmien bun wuov dauh yaac bun ninh yiem ninh nyei mienh mbu'ndongx zuqc pai guangc
Leviticus20:4 Wuov dauh mienh zorqv dauh ninh nyei fu'jueiv fungx bun Molekv zienh wuov zanc
Leviticus20:5 yie ganh oix mbienv hmien bun wuov dauh caux ninh nyei hmuangv doic yaac bun ninh yiem ninh nyei mienh mbu'ndongx zuqc pai guangc
Leviticus20:6 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh mingh lorz mienh tengx gaanv hei fai mbouv guaax
Leviticus20:7 “+‘Oix zuqc saax ganh cing-nzengc daaih
Leviticus20:8 Oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei lingc
Leviticus20:9 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh zioux ninh nyei die fai maa
Leviticus20:10 “+‘Se gorngv mienh hienx ganh dauh mienh nyei auv
Leviticus20:11 “+‘Se gorngv mienh bueix ganh nyei die nyei auv ziouc baaic ninh nyei die. Zungv oix zuqc zorqv ninh mbuo i dauh daix daic. Ninh mbuo ganh oix zuqc ndaam ganh nyei zuiz.
Leviticus20:12 “+‘Se gorngv mienh bueix ganh nyei mbuangz
Leviticus20:13 “+‘Se gorngv m'jangc dorn bueix m'jangc dorn dorngx m'sieqv dorn
Leviticus20:14 “+‘Se gorngv mienh longc i sieqv-maac zoux auv se waaic haic nyei sic. Zungv oix zuqc zorqv ninh mbuo buo dauh longc douz buov daic weic maiv bun waaic sic yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx.
Leviticus20:15 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh m'jangc dorn hienx saeng-kuv
Leviticus20:16 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh m'sieqv dorn dorh ganh bun saeng-kuv saeng
Leviticus20:17 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh longc ganh nyei dorc fai muoc
Leviticus20:18 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh m'jangc dorn bueix m'sieqv dorn doix maaih sin-yienc nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus20:19 “+‘Maiv dungx bueix meih nyei gou-maac fai muoz-maac fai dorc deih fai nziez-maac. Hnangv naaiv zoux se baaic zuqc juangc nziaamv-fei nyei cien-ceqv. Ninh mbuo i dauh zungv oix zuqc ndaam ganh nyei zuiz.
Leviticus20:20 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh m'jangc dorn bueix juoh maac fai nziez-maac fai domh miangh maac fai miangh maac ziouc baaic zuqc ninh nyei baeqv-diex fai youz-diex fai domh nauz-diex fai nauz-diex. Ninh mbuo i dauh oix zuqc ndaam ganh nyei zuiz. Taux daic ninh mbuo yaac maiv haih maaih fu'jueiv.
Leviticus20:21 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh m'jangc dorn longc muoz-doic nyei auv
Leviticus20:22 “+‘Oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei yietc zungv lingc caux diuh diuh leiz
Leviticus20:23 Yaac maiv dungx gan yiem wuov norm deic-bung nyei mienh nyei leiz
Leviticus20:24 Mv baac yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo
Leviticus20:25 “+‘Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc zorqv maaih uix caux maiv maaih uix nyei saeng-kuv bun nqoi
Leviticus20:26 Meih mbuo oix zuqc weic yie cing-nzengc
Leviticus20:27 “+‘Maiv gunv m'jangc m'sieqv
Leviticus21:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus21:2 cuotv liuz weic gauh cien jiex wuov deix. Se weic ganh nyei diex maac
Leviticus21:3 fai maiv cuotv gaengh nyei dorc fai muoc. Dorc fai muoc maiv maaih nqox ziouc weic ninh zuqc maaih uix duqv nyei.
Leviticus21:4 Yaac maiv dungx weic cing-jaa nyiemc cien wuov deix maaih uix.
Leviticus21:5 “+‘Sai mienh maiv dungx teix mba'biei fai japv siaam dueiv-mueiz fai gaatv ganh nyei sin.
Leviticus21:6 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc cing-nzengc weic ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh
Leviticus21:7 “+‘Sai mienh maiv dungx longc maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn
Leviticus21:8 Oix zuqc funx ninh mbuo cing-nzengc weic zuqc ninh mbuo fongc horc meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei nyanc hopv. Oix zuqc funx ninh mbuo cing-nzengc
Leviticus21:9 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh sai mienh nyei sieqv benx maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn bun ganh maaih uix ziouc baaic ninh nyei die
Leviticus21:10 “+‘Yiem ninh nyei gorx-youz mbu'ndongx orn zoux domh sai mienh
Leviticus21:11 Haaix norm dorngx maaih mienh daic
Leviticus21:12 Yaac maiv dungx cuotv ninh nyei Tin-Hungh nyei singx dinc fai bun singx dinc maaih uix
Leviticus21:13 “+‘Domh sai mienh oix zuqc longc maiv bueix jiex dorn nyei sieqv zoux auv.
Leviticus21:14 Maiv dungx longc auv-guaav
Leviticus21:15 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv zoux weic maiv bun ganh nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv yiem ganh nyei baeqc fingx gu'nyuoz maaih uix. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus21:16 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus21:17 “Mbuox Aalon
Leviticus21:18 Da'faanh waaic fangx nyei mienh maiv duqv daaih fatv. Se m'zing maengh nyei
Leviticus21:19 buoz-zaux waaic nyei
Leviticus21:20 jaaiv mbouv nyei
Leviticus21:21 Aalon sai mienh nyei zeiv-fun
Leviticus21:22 Ninh nyanc ninh nyei Tin-Hungh nyei nyanc hopv duqv nyei
Leviticus21:23 Mv baac laaix ninh nyei sin zaangc waaic
Leviticus21:24 Mose ziouc gorngv nzengc naaiv deix jauv-louc mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh.
Leviticus22:1 Ziouv Gorngv Mbuox Mose
Leviticus22:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Leviticus22:3 “Oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo
Leviticus22:4 “+‘Da'faanh Aalon nyei haaix dauh zeiv-fun butv gomh huv baengc fai sin maaih ga'naaiv cuotv nyei
Leviticus22:5 fai muoqv zuqc haaix nyungc nyorng ndau haih bun ninh maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus22:6 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc naaiv deix haaix nyungc ga'naaiv ziouc maaih uix taux hmuangx. Ninh maiv dungx nyanc fongc horc nyei cing-nzengc ga'naaiv. Oix zuqc longc wuom nzaaux sin ndaangc.
Leviticus22:7 Taux mba'hnoi muotv nyei ziangh hoc ninh cing-nzengc mi'aqv. Nqa'haav nyanc naaiv deix ga'naaiv duqv nyei weic zuqc naaiv se ninh nyei nyanc hopv.
Leviticus22:8 Maiv dungx nyanc ninh ganh daic nyei ga'naaiv fai zuqc hieh zoih ngaatc daic nyei ga'naaiv ziouc zuqc maaih uix. Yie se Ziouv.
Leviticus22:9 “+‘Sai mienh oix zuqc ei jienv yie dingc daaih nyei leiz-nyeic zoux. Maiv zei aeqv
Leviticus22:10 “+‘Kungx sai mienh nyei hmuangv doic haih nyanc fongc horc nyei cing-nzengc ga'naaiv. Ganh dauh maiv kuh nyanc. Dingh sai mienh nyei biauv nyei kaeqv mienh fai cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh maiv kuh nyanc.
Leviticus22:11 Mv baac se gorngv sai mienh longc nyaanh maaiz nouh fai yiem ninh nyei biauv cuotv seix nyei mienh
Leviticus22:12 Se gorngv sai mienh nyei sieqv dorng jaa
Leviticus22:13 Mv baac se gorngv sai mienh nyei sieqv guaav mingh fai leih mingh yaac maiv maaih fu'jueiv
Leviticus22:14 “+‘Se gorngv haaix dauh caqv-bouc nyanc fongc horc nyei cing-nzengc ga'naaiv
Leviticus22:15 Sai mienh maiv dungx bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei cing-nzengc ga'naaiv maaih uix.
Leviticus22:16 Laaix nyanc dorngc naaiv deix cing-nzengc ga'naaiv
Leviticus22:17 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus22:18 “Oix zuqc mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Leviticus22:19 oix zuqc dorh dauh maiv waaic fangx nyei ngongh gouv fai ba'gi yungh gouv fai yungh gouv
Leviticus22:20 Maiv dungx dorh haaix nyungc waaic fangx nyei
Leviticus22:21 Haaix dauh dorh yiem ngongh guanh
Leviticus22:22 Maiv dungx dorh m'zing maengh nyei
Leviticus22:23 Se gorngv dorh ziangh daaih waaic deix fangx fai nyanv nyei ngongh fai ba'gi yungh dorn cuotv fim ziec duqv nyei. Mv baac se gorngv ziec weic jaauv sung laengz nyei ngaengc waac
Leviticus22:24 Maiv dungx longc jaix-nduih faaux nziaamv nyei
Leviticus22:25 Yaac maiv dungx longc yiem Janx duqv daaih nyei naaiv buoqv saeng-kuv fongc horc zoux meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei nyanc hopv. Naaiv nyungc saeng-kuv waaic fangx
Leviticus22:26 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus22:27 “Ngongh fai ba'gi yungh fai yungh haaix zanc njiec dorn daaih
Leviticus22:28 Maiv gunv ngongh nyeiz fai ba'gi yungh nyeiz
Leviticus22:29 “Dorh ga'naaiv mingh ziec weic laengz zingh Ziouv
Leviticus22:30 Dongh wuov hnoi oix zuqc nyanc taux nzengc
Leviticus22:31 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc gan longx yie mbuox nyei waac yaac ei jienv zoux. Yie se Ziouv.
Leviticus22:32 Maiv dungx baaic yie nyei cing-nzengc mbuox. Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx oix zuqc taaih yie cing-nzengc. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus22:33 yaac dorh meih mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih weic zoux meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh wuov dauh. Yie se Ziouv. ”
Leviticus23:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus23:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus23:3 “+‘Maaih juqv hnoi zoux gong. Da'cietv hnoi se dingh gong hitv kuonx nyei hnoi. Oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix yaac maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc gong. Maiv gunv meih mbuo yiem haaix
Leviticus23:4 “+‘Naaiv se Ziouv dingc daaih nyei zipv. Oix zuqc ziux naaiv deix zipv nyei hnoi-nyieqc zunh mbuox mienh gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix.
Leviticus23:5 Zih hlaax
Leviticus23:6 Ziepc hmz wuov hnoi
Leviticus23:7 Daauh hnoi oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix
Leviticus23:8 Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi dorh ga'naaiv mingh fongc horc
Leviticus23:9 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus23:10 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus23:11 Sai mienh oix zuqc zorqv naaiv zeiv mbiauh yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging fongc horc
Leviticus23:12 Cunv naaiv zeiv mbiauh nyei hnoi oix zuqc dorh dauh doix hnyangx
Leviticus23:13 Aengx zorqv biei morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh
Leviticus23:14 Maiv dungx nyanc naaiv deix siang-mbiauh
Leviticus23:15 “+‘Yiem Dingh Gong Hnoi nqa'haav wuov hnoi
Leviticus23:16 Saauv buangv hmz ziepc hnoi taux da'cietv norm Dingh Gong Hnoi nqa'haav wuov hnoi
Leviticus23:17 Yiem meih mbuo yiem nyei dorngx oix zuqc zoux i norm njuov. Longc biei morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc an jienv bingv. Oix zuqc ziqv ziangx dorh daaih zoux daauh torngx laangh ziqc cunv ging fongc horc bun Ziouv.
Leviticus23:18 Oix zuqc dorh siec dauh doix hnyangx maiv waaic fangx nyei ba'gi yungh dorn
Leviticus23:19 Oix zuqc longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz
Leviticus23:20 Sai mienh oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix i dauh yungh dorn caux jienv daauh torngx laangh ziqc zoux daaih nyei njuov yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging zoux cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv se fongc horc bun Ziouv weih cing-nzengc ga'naaiv
Leviticus23:21 Dongh wuov hnoi oix zuqc zunh mbuox mienh gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix yaac maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc hnoi-hnoi zoux nyei gong. Maiv gunv meih mbuo yiem haaix
Leviticus23:22 “+‘Meih mbuo gaatv mbiauh
Leviticus23:23 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus23:24 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus23:25 Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc hnoi-hnoi zoux nyei gong. Yaac oix zuqc dorh longc douz buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun Ziouv. ’+”
Leviticus23:26 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus23:27 “Cietv hlaax saeng-ziepc se Fiqv Zuiz Hnoi. Oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix
Leviticus23:28 Wuov hnoi maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc gong weic zuqc benx Fiqv Zuiz Hnoi
Leviticus23:29 Yiem wuov norm hnoi
Leviticus23:30 Haaix dauh yiem wuov norm hnoi zoux haaix nyungc gong
Leviticus23:31 Cin-maanc maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc gong. Maiv gunv meih mbuo yiem haaix
Leviticus23:32 Naaiv weih meih mbuo benx norm dingh gong hitv kuonx nyei hnoi. Meih mbuo oix zuqc zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Cietv hlaax saeng-juov
Leviticus23:33 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus23:34 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus23:35 Daauh hnoi oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix. Yaac maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc hnoi-hnoi zoux nyei gong.
Leviticus23:36 Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi dorh longc douz buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun Ziouv. Da'betv hnoi oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix yaac dorh longc douz ziec nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun Ziouv. Naaiv se setv mueiz nyei wuic. Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc hnoi-hnoi zoux nyei gong.
Leviticus23:37 (“+‘Naaiv deix yietc zungv se Ziouv dingc daaih nyei zipv. Meih mbuo oix zuqc zunh mbuox mienh gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix
Leviticus23:38 Naaiv se maiv funx bieqc Ziouv nyei Dingh Gong Hnoi ziec nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus23:39 “+‘Meih mbuo siou baac cun-gaeng
Leviticus23:40 Daauh hnoi oix zuqc dorh longx jiex nyei ndiangx nyei biouv caux daau-normh
Leviticus23:41 Mouz hnyangx taux cietv hlaax oix zuqc jiex Ziouv nyei zipv siec hnoi. Naaiv se doic jiex doic yietc liuz oix zuqc gan nyei leiz.
Leviticus23:42 Meih mbuo oix zuqc yiem liuh siec hnoi. Yietc zungv buonv-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix zuqc yiem liuh
Leviticus23:43 weic bun meih mbuo nyei zeiv-fun hiuv duqv
Leviticus23:44 Hnangv naaic Mose ziouc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh hiuv duqv Ziouv dingc daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc zipv.
Leviticus24:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus24:2 “Oix zuqc paaiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh zaax daaih gauh longx jiex nyei ga'lanv youh weic buov dang
Leviticus24:3 Aalon oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz
Leviticus24:4 Ninh oix zuqc zanc-zanc liuc leiz yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien wuov norm jiem-dang-jaax nyei dang.
Leviticus24:5 “Oix zuqc longc mbuonv-muonc zoux ziepc nyeic norm njuov
Leviticus24:6 Zorqv daaih an jienv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien wuov norm jiem-dieh gu'nguaaic
Leviticus24:7 Aengx zorqv cing-nzengc hung an jienv naaiv deix i liouz njuov weic bun Ziouv jangx. Naaiv deix hung div njuov longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv.
Leviticus24:8 Mouz norm Dingh Gong Hnoi
Leviticus24:9 Naaiv deix njuov benx Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo yietc liuz duqv nyei buonc. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem cing-nzengc nyei dorngx nyanc weic zuqc se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv gauh cing-nzengc jiex nyei ga'naaiv.”
Leviticus24:10 Maaih dauh mienh
Leviticus24:11 Naaiv dauh I^saa^laa^en m'sieqv dorn nyei dorn longc zioux nyei waac ki Ziouv nyei Mbuox. Mienh ziouc dorh ninh mingh taux Mose wuov. (Naaiv dauh mienh nyei maa nyei mbuox heuc Se^lo^mitv
Leviticus24:12 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv naaiv dauh mienh kuonx jienv taux hiuv duqv Ziouv oix ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor zoux.
Leviticus24:13 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus24:14 “Dorh ki Ziouv nyei Mbuox wuov dauh mienh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv. Muangx haiz ninh ki nyei waac wuov deix mienh oix zuqc dorh buoz maan jienv ninh nyei m'nqorngv. Zuangx mienh ziouc oix zuqc longc la'bieiv zong daic ninh.
Leviticus24:15 Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus24:16 Haaix dauh ki Ziouv nyei Mbuox
Leviticus24:17 “+‘Haaix dauh daix mienh
Leviticus24:18 Haaix dauh mborqv daic mienh nyei saeng-kuv
Leviticus24:19 Haaix dauh zoux bun mienh mun
Leviticus24:20 Mbungv jaauv mbungv
Leviticus24:21 Haaix dauh mborqv daic saeng-kuv
Leviticus24:22 Maiv gunv ganh fingx mienh fai juangc fingx mienh
Leviticus24:23 Mose hnangv naaiv nor mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus25:1 Yiem Sinaai Mbong
Leviticus25:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus25:3 Juqv hnyangx gu'nyuoz oix zuqc zuangx ga'naaiv meih mbuo nyei lingh deic yaac fioux longx a'ngunc huingx aengx siou naaiv deix gaeng-zuangx caux biouv.
Leviticus25:4 Mv baac da'cietv hnyangx se Dingh Gong Hnyangx weic fungx bun Ziouv. Oix zuqc bun ndau hitv kuonx. Maiv dungx zuangx ga'naaiv meih mbuo nyei lingh deic fai fioux meih mbuo nyei a'ngunc huingx.
Leviticus25:5 Maiv dungx mingh gaatv ninh ganh cuotv nyei gaeng-zuangx fai siou meih mbuo maiv fioux nyei a'ngunc huingx biouv. Oix zuqc bun ndau hitv kuonx yietc hnyangx.
Leviticus25:6 Dingh Gong Hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Leviticus25:7 Naaiv deix ga'naaiv se weic meih mbuo nyei saeng-kuv nyanc caux yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung lomc zaangc nyei hieh zoih nyanc. Ndau ganh cuotv nyei haaix nyungc nyanc duqv nyei.
Leviticus25:8 “+‘Meih mbuo oix zuqc saauv siec norm Dingh Gong Hnyangx
Leviticus25:9 Dongh wuov hnyangx
Leviticus25:10 Hnangv naaiv zoux se zorqv naaiv hmz ziepc hnyangx wuov hnyangx benx lengc jeiv nyei hnyangx yaac zunh mbuox yiem wuov norm deic-bung nyei zuangx baeqc fingx
Leviticus25:11 Hmz ziepc wuov hnyangx se weic meih mbuo zoux Houc nyei Hnyangx. Maiv dungx zuangx haaix nyungc. Ndau ganh cuotv nyei maiv dungx mingh gaatv. Maiv fioux nyei a'ngunc huingx nyei biouv maiv dungx mingh siou.
Leviticus25:12 Weic zuqc wuov hnyangx se Houc nyei Hnyangx. Se weic meih mbuo benx cing-nzengc hnyangx. Meih mbuo kungx oix zuqc nyanc ndau ganh cuotv nyei ga'naaiv hnangv.
Leviticus25:13 “+‘Yiem Houc nyei Hnyangx
Leviticus25:14 “+‘Se gorngv meih mbuo maaic ndau bun meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz fai tengx ninh maaiz
Leviticus25:15 Meih mbuo oix zuqc tengx ninh maaiz ziux Houc nyei Hnyangx nqa'haav nyei hnyangx-soux. Ninh oix zuqc ziux aengx maaih zuangx ga'naaiv nyei hnyangx-soux nyei soux mouc maaic.
Leviticus25:16 Hnyangx-soux camv
Leviticus25:17 Meih mbuo maiv dungx laanh kuei laanh
Leviticus25:18 “+‘Meih mbuo oix zuqc gan yie nyei lingc
Leviticus25:19 Ndau yaac oix cuotv gaeng-zuangx
Leviticus25:20 Nziex meih mbuo oix naaic
Leviticus25:21 Da'luoqc hnyangx yie oix ceix fuqv camv nyei
Leviticus25:22 Da'betv hnyangx meih mbuo zuangx nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus25:23 “+‘Meih mbuo maaic ndau maiv dungx maaic dangx
Leviticus25:24 Yiem meih mbuo duqv nzipc nyei yietc zungv ndau
Leviticus25:25 “+‘Se gorngv maaih dauh meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz jomc njiec ziouc maaic deix ninh nyei ndau
Leviticus25:26 Se gorngv wuov dauh mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh zuoqc ndau
Leviticus25:27 oix zuqc funx yiem ninh maaic mingh duqv mbu'ziex hnyangx
Leviticus25:28 Mv baac se gorngv wuov dauh mienh maiv maaih nyaanh gaux zuoqc ninh maaic nyei ndau
Leviticus25:29 “+‘Se gorngv mienh maaic biauv yiem maaih zingh laatc nyei zingh
Leviticus25:30 Se gorngv yietc hnyangx gu'nyuoz maiv duqv zuoqc nzuonx
Leviticus25:31 Mv baac biauv yiem maiv maaih zingh laatc nyei laangz oix zuqc funx hnangv ndeic nor. Zuoqc nzuonx duqv nyei. Taux Houc nyei Hnyangx maaiz nyei mienh zungv oix zuqc tuix nzuonx.
Leviticus25:32 “+‘Yiem Lewi Mienh duqv nzipc nyei zingh
Leviticus25:33 Mv baac se gorngv yiem Lewi Mienh nyei zingh maaih dauh Lewi Mienh maaic biauv yaac maiv zuoqc nzuonx
Leviticus25:34 Mv baac wuov deix zingh nyei miev-ciangv maiv dungx maaic
Leviticus25:35 “+‘Se gorngv maaih dauh meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz jomc njiec
Leviticus25:36 Maiv dungx longc haaix nyungc ndaauv-daauh. Oix zuqc gamh nziex
Leviticus25:37 Bungx zaeqv bun ninh
Leviticus25:38 Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus25:39 “Se gorngv maaih dauh gorx-youz jomc njiec
Leviticus25:40 Ninh oix zuqc caux meih yiem hnangv cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh fai ziouc meih yiem nyei mienh. Ninh oix zuqc tengx meih zoux gong taux Houc nyei Hnyangx.
Leviticus25:41 Taux wuov hnyangx ninh caux ninh nyei fu'jueiv duqv cuotv aengx nzuonx ganh nyei buonv-fingx mienh caux ninh nyei ong-taaix nyei buonv-deic dorngx.
Leviticus25:42 Weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh se yie nyei bou
Leviticus25:43 Yaac maiv dungx gunv ba'laqc jienv
Leviticus25:44 “+‘Meih mbuo duqv nyei nouh gauv nouh beiz oix zuqc yiem weih gormx meih mbuo wuov deix ganh fingx mienh maaiz.
Leviticus25:45 Meih mbuo yaac haih maaiz yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz nyei ganh fingx mienh caux yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung cuotv seix
Leviticus25:46 Meih mbuo haih liouh bun meih mbuo nyei naamh nyouz nzipc yaac bun ninh mbuo ziangh seix zoux nouh. Mv baac meih mbuo gunv I^saa^laa^en gorx-youz
Leviticus25:47 “+‘Se gorngv yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maaih dauh ganh fingx mienh fai daaih ziouc meih mbuo yiem nyei mienh butv zoih jiez daaih
Leviticus25:48 ninh corc oix zuqc maaih leiz zuoqc ganh nzuonx. Maaih dauh ninh nyei cien-ceqv zuoqc ninh nzuonx yaac duqv.
Leviticus25:49 Ninh nyei baeqv fai baeqv-muoz doic fai haaix dauh juangc fingx juangc nziaamv-fei nyei cien-ceqv zuoqc ninh duqv nyei. Fai se gorngv ninh ganh benx daaih
Leviticus25:50 Ninh oix zuqc caux maaiz ninh wuov dauh funx yiem maaiz nyei ziangh hoc taux Houc nyei Hnyangx nyei hnyangx-soux. Zuoqc ninh nyei jaax-zinh oix zuqc ziux cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh zoux gong nyei hnyangx-soux nyei gong-zinh.
Leviticus25:51 Se gorngv corc maaih zengc njiec nyei hnyangx-soux camv ziouc oix zuqc ziux camv nyei hnyangx-soux tuix nzuonx zoux zuoqc nyei jaax-zinh.
Leviticus25:52 Se gorngv taux Houc nyei Hnyangx zengc njiec nyei hnyangx zoqc
Leviticus25:53 Maaiz ninh wuov dauh ziouv oix zuqc funx ninh hnangv hnyangx jiex hnyangx cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh. Yaac maiv dungx bun ninh nyei ziouv gunv ba'laqc jienv
Leviticus25:54 “+‘Se gorngv ninh maiv duqv ziux naaiv deix haaix diuc jauv zuoqc nzuonx
Leviticus25:55 weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh benx yie nyei bou. Ninh mbuo zoux yie nyei bou
Leviticus26:1 “+‘Yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc miuc-fangx fai liepc haaix nyungc nyei fangx zeiv fai la'bieiv-ndiouh fai zuqc daaih nyei la'bieiv weic ganh gueic njiec baaix. Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus26:2 “+‘Oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi
Leviticus26:3 “+‘Se gorngv meih mbuo gan longx yie nyei lingc
Leviticus26:4 yie oix ziux cun-ciou bun lungh duih mbiungc. Ndau ziouc cuotv gaeng-zuangx. Biouv-ndeic nyei ndiangx yaac oix ziangh biouv.
Leviticus26:5 Mborqv mbiauh ziouc duqv mborqv taux gaeqv a'ngunc biouv nyei ziangh hoc. Gaeqv a'ngunc biouv yaac duqv gaeqv taux aengx zuangx ga'naaiv nyei ziangh hoc. Meih mbuo ziouc maaih nyanc maaih hopv beuv. Meih mbuo yaac duqv baengh orn nyei yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung.
Leviticus26:6 “+‘Yie oix bun wuov norm deic-bung taaix-baengh. Meih mbuo oix duqv bueix njiec yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh bun meih mbuo gamh nziex. Yie oix bun wuov norm deic-bung ciouv nyei hieh zoih zutc nzengc. Meih mbuo nyei deic-bung yaac maiv maaih mborqv jaax nyei sic.
Leviticus26:7 Meih mbuo oix zunc meih mbuo nyei win-wangv
Leviticus26:8 Meih mbuo biaa dauh oix zunc yietc baeqv dauh. Yietc baeqv dauh oix zunc yietc waanc dauh. Meih mbuo nyei win-wangv ziouc yiem meih mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix.
Leviticus26:9 “+‘Yie oix jangx meih mbuo
Leviticus26:10 Meih mbuo corc nyanc jienv loz-mbiauh
Leviticus26:11 Yie oix liepc yie yiem nyei dorngx yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx. Yie yaac maiv nzorng meih mbuo.
Leviticus26:12 Yie oix yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx yaac zoux meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Meih mbuo yaac oix zoux yie nyei baeqc fingx.
Leviticus26:13 Yie se Ziouv
Leviticus26:14 “+‘Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo maiv muangx yie
Leviticus26:15 yaac se gorngv meih mbuo ngaengc jienv yie nyei lingc
Leviticus26:16 yie oix hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun meih mbuo. Yie oix bun meih mbuo liemh zeih zuqc domh heiv sic
Leviticus26:17 Yie oix mbienv hmien bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo ziouc suei meih mbuo nyei win-wangv. Nzorng meih mbuo wuov deix oix duqv gunv meih mbuo. Meih mbuo oix biaux maiv gunv maiv maaih haaix dauh zunc nqaang.
Leviticus26:18 “+‘Se gorngv meih mbuo buangh liuz ndongc naaic nyei sic corc maiv muangx yie
Leviticus26:19 Yie oix mietc nzengc meih mbuo hnyouv ngaengc
Leviticus26:20 Meih mbuo ziouc baeqc baeqc ndortv qaqv
Leviticus26:21 “+‘Se gorngv meih mbuo corc ngaengc jienv maiv kangv muangx yie
Leviticus26:22 Yie oix bun hieh zoih bieqc meih mbuo mbu'ndongx. Ninh mbuo oix betv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv
Leviticus26:23 “+‘Se gorngv hnangv naaiv nor mborqv njaaux mv baac meih mbuo corc maiv muangx yie
Leviticus26:24 yie ganh oix ngaengc jienv meih mbuo
Leviticus26:25 Laaix meih mbuo bungx ndortv caux yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac
Leviticus26:26 Yie zoux bun meih mbuo nyei laangh ziqc dangx wuov zanc
Leviticus26:27 “+‘Se gorngv zuqc ndongc naaic meih mbuo corc maiv muangx yie
Leviticus26:28 yie ziouc qiex jiez! haic
Leviticus26:29 Meih mbuo ziouc nyanc meih mbuo nyei dorn nyei orv
Leviticus26:30 Yie yaac oix mietc meih mbuo yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx
Leviticus26:31 Yie oix bun meih mbuo nyei zingh benx zingh huaang
Leviticus26:32 Yie oix bun deic-bung benx deic-bung-huaang
Leviticus26:33 Yie oix zoux bun meih mbuo nzaanx mingh yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx
Leviticus26:34 Hnangv naaic
Leviticus26:35 Deic-bung benx ndau-huaang ndongc haaix lauh ziouc duqv hitv ndongc wuov. Se ndau duqv hitv kuonx hnangv meih mbuo yiem jienv jiex Dingh Gong Hnyangx
Leviticus26:36 “+‘Meih mbuo zengc njiec nyei mienh
Leviticus26:37 Laanh oix ndiqv zuqc laanh ndorpc hnangv biaux nzuqc ndaauv nor
Leviticus26:38 Meih mbuo oix yiem fingx-fingx mienh mbu'ndongx zuqc mietc. Meih mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei deic-bung yaac oix naqv meih mbuo.
Leviticus26:39 Meih mbuo zengc njiec nyei mienh
Leviticus26:40 “+‘Mv baac se gorngv ninh mbuo nyiemc ganh nyei zuiz caux ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyei zuiz
Leviticus26:41 yie cingx ngaengc jienv ninh mbuo
Leviticus26:42 yie ziouc jangx taux yie caux Yaakopv liepc nyei ngaengc waac
Leviticus26:43 Mv baac ninh mbuo oix zuqc guangc ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung. Maiv maaih ninh mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus26:44 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic
Leviticus26:45 Yie oix weic ninh mbuo nyei gorn jangx yie caux ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix liepc nyei ngaengc waac
Leviticus26:46 Naaiv deix lingc caux leiz-latc caux diuh diuh leiz se Ziouv yiem Sinaai Mbong
Leviticus27:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Leviticus27:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Leviticus27:3 Oix zuqc ziux hnyangx-jeiv yiem nyic ziepc hnyangx taux luoqc ziepc hnyangx nyei m'jangc dorn
Leviticus27:4 Se gorngv m'sieqv dorn
Leviticus27:5 Se gorngv biaa hnyangx taux nyic ziepc hnyangx nyei dorn
Leviticus27:6 Se gorngv yietc hlaax taux biaa hnyangx nyei dorn dingc yietc lungz faam-zinh
Leviticus27:7 Luoqc ziepc hnyangx faaux maengx nyei m'jangc dorn oix zuqc dingc feix lungz
Leviticus27:8 Se gorngv haaix dauh laengz jiez ngaengc waac mv baac jomc haic
Leviticus27:9 “+‘Se gorngv houv bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv se saeng-kuv
Leviticus27:10 Yaac maiv dungx tiuv. Maiv dungx zorqv dauh longx nyei div maiv benx nyei
Leviticus27:11 Se gorngv houv nyei se maaih uix nyei saeng-kuv
Leviticus27:12 Sai mienh ziouc mborqv jaax-zinh ziux longx nyei fai waaic nyei. Sai mienh mborqv jaax-zinh hnangv haaix nor ziouc oix zuqc hnangv wuov nor mi'aqv.
Leviticus27:13 Se gorngv saeng-kuv ziouv oix zuoqc saeng-kuv nzuonx
Leviticus27:14 “+‘Se gorngv mienh zorqv ganh nyei biauv fungx bun Ziouv weic zoux cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv
Leviticus27:15 Se gorngv fungx biauv wuov laanh mienh oix zuoqc biauv nzuonx
Leviticus27:16 “+‘Se gorngv mienh zorqv deix ninh ganh nzipc nyei ndau fungx bun Ziouv
Leviticus27:17 Se gorngv Houc nyei Hnyangx wuov hnyangx fungx nor
Leviticus27:18 Se gorngv jiex liuz Houc nyei Hnyangx
Leviticus27:19 Se gorngv fungx nyei mienh ganh oix zuoqc ndau nzuonx
Leviticus27:20 Mv baac se gorngv ninh maiv zuoqc ninh nyei ndau fai zorqv ninh nyei ndau maaic bun ganh dauh
Leviticus27:21 Taux Houc nyei Hnyangx fungx ndau nzuonx nyei ziangh hoc
Leviticus27:22 “+‘Se gorngv maaih dauh mienh maaiz nzong ndau daaih
Leviticus27:23 sai mienh ziouc mborqv jaax-zinh funx taux Houc nyei Hnyangx. Dongh wuov hnoi ninh oix zuqc cuotv mborqv daaih nyei jaax-zinh nyei nyaanh benx cing-nzengc ga'naaiv fungx bun Ziouv.
Leviticus27:24 Taux Houc nyei Hnyangx
Leviticus27:25 Nyungc-nyungc nyei jaax-zinh oix zuqc mborqv ziux singx dinc nyei nyaanh.
Leviticus27:26 “+‘Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih zorqv daauh toi saeng-kuv fungx bun Ziouv weic zuqc zungv benx Ziouv nyei mi'aqv. Maiv gunv ngongh fai yungh
Leviticus27:27 Se gorngv maaih uix nyei saeng-kuv
Leviticus27:28 “+‘Haaix dauh zorqv haaix nyungc ninh ganh nyei ga'naaiv fungx dangx bun Ziouv
Leviticus27:29 “+‘Liemh mienh se gorngv fungx dangx bun Ziouv liuz
Leviticus27:30 “+‘Yiem ndau cuotv nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv
Leviticus27:31 Se gorngv haaix dauh oix zuoqc haaix deix ninh nyei ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv
Leviticus27:32 Da'faanh ngongh guanh
Leviticus27:33 Maiv dungx ginv cuotv benx fai maiv benx yaac maiv dungx tiuv. Se gorngv ninh gengh oix tiuv nor
Leviticus27:34 Naaiv deix hatc nyei waac se Ziouv yiem Sinaai Mbong jiu bun Mose weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Numbers1:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei da'nyeic hnyangx
Numbers1:2 “Oix zuqc tengx I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh faaux mienh houz ziux yietc fingx yietc fingx
Numbers1:3 Meih caux Aalon oix zuqc ziux guanh guanh I^saa^laa^en Mienh faaux mbuox
Numbers1:4 Fingx-fingx oix zuqc maaih dauh zoux ninh mbuo nyei buonv-fingx mienh nyei bieiv zeiv daaih tengx meih mbuo.”
Numbers1:5 Tengx meih wuov deix mienh nyei mbuox maaih hnangv naaiv. Lu^mben Fingx Se^nde^e nyei dorn
Numbers1:6 Si^me^on Fingx Sux^li^satv^ndai nyei dorn
Numbers1:7 Yu^ndaa Fingx Am^mi^naa^ndapc nyei dorn
Numbers1:8 Itc^saax^kaa Fingx Zu^aa nyei dorn
Numbers1:9 Se^mbu^lun Fingx Helon nyei dorn
Numbers1:10 E^faa^im Fingx Am^mi^hutv nyei dorn
Numbers1:11 Mben^yaa^min Fingx Gi^nde^o^ni nyei dorn
Numbers1:12 Ndaan Fingx Am^mi^qatv^ndai nyei dorn
Numbers1:13 Aa^se Fingx Okaan nyei dorn
Numbers1:14 Gaatc Fingx Nde^u^en nyei dorn
Numbers1:15 Napv^taa^li Fingx Enan nyei dorn
Numbers1:16 Naaiv deix mienh se zuangx mienh ginv daaih zoux fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv
Numbers1:17 Mose caux Aalon ziouc dorh jienv dongh maaih mbuox naaiv deix mienh
Numbers1:18 taux nyeic hlaax
Numbers1:19 Ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose zoux
Numbers2:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Numbers2:2 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix zuqc corng ganh nyei ndopv-liuh huing gormx yaac huin mingh Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh wuov bung
Numbers2:3 Yiem dong bung maengx
Numbers2:4 Ninh nyei guanh maaih siec waanc biei cin luoqc baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:5 Itc^saax^kaa Fingx oix zuqc corng ndopv-liuh nitv jienv Yu^ndaa Fingx. Itc^saax^kaa Fingx nyei bieiv zeiv maaih Zu^aa nyei dorn
Numbers2:6 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biaa waanc biei cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:7 Jiex mingh
Numbers2:8 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biaa waanc siec cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:9 Bieqc Yu^ndaa wuov bung nyei guanh guanh yietc zungv maaih yietc sinx hietc waanc juqv cin feix baeqv dauh. Cuotv jauv nyei ziangh hoc naaiv deix oix zuqc mingh ndaangc.
Numbers2:10 Yiem naamh bung maengx
Numbers2:11 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biei waanc juqv cin hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:12 Si^me^on Fingx oix zuqc corng ndopv-liuh nitv jienv Lu^mben Fingx. Si^me^on Fingx nyei bieiv zeiv maaih Sux^li^satv^ndai nyei dorn
Numbers2:13 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biaa waanc nduoh cin faam-baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:14 Jiex mingh
Numbers2:15 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biei waanc biaa cin luoqc baeqv hmz ziepc dauh.
Numbers2:16 Bieqc Lu^mben wuov bung nyei guanh guanh yietc zungv maaih yietc sinx biaa waanc yietc cin feix baeqv hmz ziepc dauh. Cuotv jauv nyei ziangh hoc naaiv deix zoux da'nyeic guanh.
Numbers2:17 Cuotv jauv nyei ziangh hoc
Numbers2:18 Yiem fai bung maengx
Numbers2:19 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biei waanc hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:20 Maa^natv^se Fingx oix zuqc corng ndopv-liuh nitv jienv E^faa^im Fingx. Maa^natv^se Fingx nyei bieiv zeiv maaih Be^ndaa^su nyei dorn
Numbers2:21 Ninh nyei guanh maaih buo waanc i cin nyic baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:22 Jiex mingh
Numbers2:23 Ninh nyei guanh maaih buo waanc biaa cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:24 Bieqc E^faa^im wuov bung nyei guanh guanh yietc zungv maaih yietc sinx hietc cin yietc baeqv dauh. Cuotv jauv nyei ziangh hoc naaiv guanh zoux da'faam guanh.
Numbers2:25 Yiem baqv bung maengx
Numbers2:26 Ninh nyei guanh maaih juqv waanc i cin cietv baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:27 Aa^se Fingx oix zuqc corng ndopv-liuh nitv jienv Ndaan Fingx. Aa^se Fingx nyei bieiv zeiv maaih Okaan nyei dorn
Numbers2:28 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biei waanc yietc cin hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:29 Jiex mingh
Numbers2:30 Ninh nyei guanh maaih biaa waanc buo cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers2:31 Bieqc Ndaan Fingx wuov bung yietc zungv maaih yietc sinx biaa waanc siec cin luoqc baeqv dauh. Cuotv jauv nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo zoux nqa'haav laai wuov guanh yaac yiem ganh nyei geh ga'ndiev.
Numbers2:32 Naaiv se I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei mienh houz saauv. Yiem ndopv-liuh ciangv ziux ninh mbuo nyei guanh saauv daaih yietc zungv maaih juqv sinx buo cin hmz baeqv hmz ziepc dauh mienh.
Numbers2:33 Mv baac Lewi Mienh maiv duqv saauv bieqc wuov deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh hnangv Ziouv paaiv Mose nor.
Numbers2:34 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc zoux nzengc ziux Ziouv paaiv Mose nyei waac. Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor yiem ninh mbuo nyei geh ga'ndiev corng ndopv-liuh. Gorqv-mienh yaac ziux gorqv-mienh nyei fingx hnangv wuov nor cuotv jauv.
Numbers3:1 Naaiv se Aalon caux Mose nyei ziex doic mienh
Numbers3:2 Aalon nyei dorn nyei mbuox maaih hnangv naaiv. Dorn-hlo heuc Naa^ndapc yaac maaih Aa^mbi^hu
Numbers3:3 Naaiv se Aalon nyei dorn nyei mbuox
Numbers3:4 Mv baac yiem Sinaai Deic-Bung-Huaang wuov zanc
Numbers3:5 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers3:6 “Oix zuqc dorh Lewi Fingx daaih jiu bun Aalon sai mienh weic tengx ninh.
Numbers3:7 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh weic Aalon yaac weic zuangx baeqc fingx zoux ndopv-liuh nyei gong.
Numbers3:8 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc goux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic yaac weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh zoux ndopv-liuh nyei gong.
Numbers3:9 Oix zuqc zorqv Lewi Mienh jiu bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo. Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx se dongh naaiv deix oix zuqc jiu nzengc bun Aalon.
Numbers3:10 Oix zuqc orn Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo zoux sai mienh nyei gong. Cuotv liuz naaiv deix
Numbers3:11 Ziouv yaac gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers3:12 “Yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gu'nyuoz yie ginv cuotv Lewi Mienh weic div I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc zungv m'sieqv dorn yungz nyei daauh dauh dorn. Lewi Mienh benx yie nyei
Numbers3:13 weic zuqc dauh dauh dorn-la'gauv benx yie nyei. Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung yie daix mouz dauh dorn-la'gauv wuov zanc
Numbers3:14 Yiem Sinaai Deic-Bung-Huaang
Numbers3:15 “Oix zuqc saauv Lewi Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc
Numbers3:16 Mose ziouc ei jienv Ziouv nyei waac saauv ninh mbuo
Numbers3:17 Naaiv se Lewi nyei dorn nyei mbuox. Maaih Geson
Numbers3:18 Geson nyei dorn ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Lipv^ni caux Si^me^i Mienh.
Numbers3:19 Ko^haatv nyei dorn ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Amlaam
Numbers3:20 Me^laa^li nyei dorn ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc benx Maali caux Musi Mienh. Naaiv se Lewi Fingx ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc.
Numbers3:21 Geson nyei bungh buonc se Lipv^ni caux Si^me^i Mienh. Naaiv se Geson Mienh nyei bungh buonc.
Numbers3:22 Yiem yietc hlaax faaux maengx nyei m'jangc dorn yietc zungv maaih siec cin hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers3:23 Geson Mienh nyei bungh buonc oix zuqc corng ganh nyei ndopv-liuh yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh nqa'haav maengx
Numbers3:24 Laa^en nyei dorn
Numbers3:25 Yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh
Numbers3:26 weih gormx ndopv-liuh caux ziec-dorngh mbaeqc laatc caux mbaeqc laatc gaengh nyei ndie. Liemh hlaang aengx caux naaiv buoqv ga'naaiv yietc zungv se ninh mbuo oix zuqc liuc leiz.
Numbers3:27 Ko^haatv nyei bungh buonc maaih Amlaam
Numbers3:28 Yiem yietc hlaax faaux maengx nyei yietc zungv m'jangc dorn maaih hietc cin luoqc baeqv dauh. Ko^haatv Mienh nyei gong se oix zuqc goux singx dinc.
Numbers3:29 Ko^haatv Mienh nyei bungh buonc oix zuqc corng ganh nyei ndopv-liuh yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei naamh bung maengx.
Numbers3:30 Utc^si^en nyei dorn
Numbers3:31 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc goux Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
Numbers3:32 Maaih Aalon sai mienh nyei dorn
Numbers3:33 Me^laa^li nyei bungh buonc maaih Maali caux Musi Mienh. Naaiv se Me^laa^li Mienh nyei bungh buonc.
Numbers3:34 Yiem yietc hlaax faaux maengx nyei m'jangc dorn yietc zungv maaih juqv cin nyic baeqv dauh.
Numbers3:35 Aa^mbi^haa^in nyei dorn
Numbers3:36 Paaiv bun Me^laa^li Mienh zoux nyei gong se oix zuqc goux ndopv-liuh nyei qorng
Numbers3:37 Liemh laatc dongc
Numbers3:38 Mose caux Aalon caux Aalon nyei dorn mbuo oix zuqc corng ganh nyei ndopv-liuh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh nyei dong bung maengx
Numbers3:39 Mose caux Aalon ei Ziouv paaiv nyei waac saauv Lewi Mienh. Ziux bungh buonc dauh dauh buangv hlaax faaux maengx nyei m'jangc dorn yietc zungv maaih i waanc i cin dauh.
Numbers3:40 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers3:41 Meih mbuo oix zuqc ginv Lewi Mienh bun yie weic div I^saa^laa^en Mienh yungz nyei yietc zungv daauh dauh dorn. Lewi Mienh nyei saeng-kuv yaac oix zuqc longc div I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei yietc zungv saeng-kuv njiec nyei daauh toi dorn. Yie se Ziouv. ”
Numbers3:42 Mose ziouc ziux Ziouv paaiv nyei waac saauv nzengc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yungz nyei daauh dauh dorn.
Numbers3:43 Ziux faaux mbuox nyei soux mouc
Numbers3:44 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers3:45 “Oix zuqc zorqv Lewi Mienh fungx bun yie div I^saa^laa^en Mienh yungz nyei yietc zungv dorn-la'gauv
Numbers3:46 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei dorn-la'gauv gauh camv Lewi Mienh nyei nyic baeqv cietv ziepc faam dauh. Zengc njiec naaiv deix
Numbers3:47 Yietc dauh oix zuqc cuotv yietc lungz faam-zinh nyaanh ziux singx dinc dingc daaih nyei hniev-daauh.
Numbers3:48 Zuoqc zengc njiec naaiv deix mienh nyei nyaanh oix zuqc jiu bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo.”
Numbers3:49 Mose ziouc siou dongh Lewi Mienh div liuz zengc njiec wuov deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuoqc mienh nyaanh.
Numbers3:50 Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei dorn-la'gauv ninh duqv nduoh joih nyic ziepc hmz lungz nyaanh ziux singx dinc dingc daaih nyei hniev-daauh.
Numbers3:51 Mose ziouc ziux Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zorqv naaiv deix zuoqc mienh nyei nyaanh fungx bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo.
Numbers4:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Numbers4:2 “Oix zuqc saauv nzengc Lewi Mienh bun njiec nyei Ko^haatv Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc caux ninh mbuo nyei mienh buonc
Numbers4:3 yiem faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx nyei m'jangc dorn
Numbers4:4 “Naaiv se Ko^haatv Mienh oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh zoux nyei gong. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc goux gauh cing-nzengc jiex nyei ga'naaiv.
Numbers4:5 Oix suiv dorngx nyei ziangh hoc
Numbers4:6 Yaac oix zuqc zorqv fuoqv daaih longx nyei saeng-kuv ndopv gomv gu'nguaaic
Numbers4:7 “Oix zuqc zorqv kuaaiv ndie-mbuov dimc gengx Tin-Hungh nyei njuov wuov norm dieh. Aengx zorqv bienh
Numbers4:8 Oix zuqc longc kuaaiv ndie-siqv gomv nzengc naaiv deix yietc zungv. Aengx longc kuaaiv fuoqv daaih longx nyei saeng-kuv ndopv gomv gu'nguaaic jiex yaac zorqv gaeng dieh nyei ndiangx cunx jienv.
Numbers4:9 “Ninh mbuo oix zuqc zorqv kuaaiv ndie-mbuov gomv jienv ziux njang nyei dang-jaax
Numbers4:10 Zorqv dang-jaax caux dang nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic
Numbers4:11 “Ninh mbuo oix zuqc longc kuaaiv ndie-mbuov gomv jienv buov hung nyei jiem-dieh
Numbers4:12 “Ninh mbuo oix zuqc zorqv yiem singx dinc longc nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic longc ndie-mbuov beu jienv. Aengx longc fuoqv daaih longx nyei saeng-kuv ndopv gomv jienv an gaeng ga'naaiv nyei jaax.
Numbers4:13 “Ninh mbuo oix zuqc guaaih cuotv dongh siqv ziec-dorngh nyei saaiv
Numbers4:14 Zorqv weic ziec-dorngh longc nyei jaa-sic
Numbers4:15 “Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo zorqv singx dinc caux singx dinc nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic gomv liuz
Numbers4:16 “Aalon sai mienh nyei dorn
Numbers4:17 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Numbers4:18 “Maiv dungx bun Ko^haatv nyei bungh buonc mienh yiem Lewi Mienh gu'nyuoz zuqc pai guangc.
Numbers4:19 Weic bun naaiv deix mienh haih mingh nitv fatv naaiv deix cing-nzengc jiex nyei ga'naaiv yaac maiv zuqc daic
Numbers4:20 Mv baac Ko^haatv Mienh cin-maanc maiv dungx bieqc mingh mangc naaiv deix cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers4:21 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers4:22 “Oix zuqc saauv nzengc Geson Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc caux ninh mbuo nyei mienh buonc.
Numbers4:23 Saauv nzengc faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx nyei m'jangc dorn
Numbers4:24 “Naaiv se Geson Mienh nyei bungh buonc oix zuqc zoux gong fu-sux yaac oix zuqc bienh ga'naaiv.
Numbers4:25 Ninh mbuo oix bienh corng zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh nyei ndie
Numbers4:26 weih ndopv-liuh caux ziec-dorngh mbaeqc laatc caux mbaeqc laatc gaengh nyei ndie
Numbers4:27 Ninh mbuo fu-sux zoux nyei yietc zungv gong
Numbers4:28 Naaiv se Geson Mienh nyei bungh buonc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh zoux nyei gong. Ninh mbuo zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc se yiem Aalon sai mienh nyei dorn
Numbers4:29 “Oix zuqc saauv Me^laa^li Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc caux ninh mbuo nyei mienh buonc.
Numbers4:30 Saauv nzengc yiem faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx nyei m'jangc dorn
Numbers4:31 Ninh mbuo yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh oix zuqc fu-sux nyei maaih hnangv naaiv. Oix zuqc bienh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Ndopv-Liuh nyei qorng
Numbers4:32 aengx caux weih gormx Ndopv-Liuh nyei laatc dongc caux topv dongc nyei taapv
Numbers4:33 Naaiv se Me^laa^li Mienh nyei bungh buonc oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh zoux nyei gong
Numbers4:34 Mose
Numbers4:35 Yiem faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx
Numbers4:36 ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih i cin cietv baeqv hmz ziepc dauh.
Numbers4:37 Naaiv se Ko^haatv Mienh nyei bungh buonc
Numbers4:38 Ninh mbuo yaac saauv nzengc Geson Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc caux mienh buonc.
Numbers4:39 Yiem faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx
Numbers4:40 ziux bungh buonc caux mienh buonc maaih i cin luoqc baeqv faah ziepc dauh.
Numbers4:41 Naaiv se Geson Mienh nyei bungh buonc
Numbers4:42 Ninh mbuo yaac saauv nzengc Me^laa^li Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc caux mienh buonc.
Numbers4:43 Yiem faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx
Numbers4:44 ziux ninh mbuo nyei mienh buonc maaih buo cin nyic baeqv dauh.
