Numbers4:45 Naaiv se Me^laa^li Mienh nyei bungh buonc. Mose caux Aalon saauv nzengc ninh mbuo ziux Ziouv longc Mose paaiv nyei waac.
Numbers4:46 Mose
Numbers4:47 Yiem faah ziepc hnyangx taux hmz ziepc hnyangx
Numbers4:48 maaih hietc cin hmz baeqv betv ziepc dauh.
Numbers4:49 Ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose
Numbers5:1 Ziouv mbuox Mose
Numbers5:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh hatc butv gomh huv baengc nyei mienh caux sin zaangc cuotv maiv horpc zuqc cuotv nyei haaix nyungc wuom
Numbers5:3 Maiv gunv m'jangc m'sieqv
Numbers5:4 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Numbers5:5 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers5:6 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers5:7 Ninh oix zuqc nyiemc ninh zoux dorngc nyei zuiz
Numbers5:8 Mv baac se gorngv zuqc mienh zoux dorngc wuov dauh daic yaac maiv maaih cien-ceqv laengz wuov deix buih nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers5:9 I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh daaih fungx bun sai mienh nyei yietc zungv cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv ziouc benx sai mienh nyei.
Numbers5:10 Gorqv-mienh nyei cing-nzengc ga'naaiv se gorqv-mienh ganh nyei
Numbers5:11 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers5:12 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers5:13 ziouc caux ganh dauh m'jangc dorn bueix beic ninh nyei nqox
Numbers5:14 yaac se gorngv nqox nzaeng-buang
Numbers5:15 nqox oix zuqc dorh ninh nyei auv mingh sai mienh wuov. Yaac oix zuqc weic ninh nyei auv dorh jienv i morqv mbaali mbiauh mbuonv. Yaac maiv dungx dox ga'lanv youh
Numbers5:16 “+‘Sai mienh ziouc dorh naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn daaih souv jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Numbers5:17 ziouc zorqv deix cing-nzengc nyei wuom daaih dapv nie-baengh
Numbers5:18 Sai mienh ziouc bun wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn souv jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien yaac jaiv nqoi ninh nyei mba'biei
Numbers5:19 ziouc heuc wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn laengz jiez ngaengc waac. Sai mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
Numbers5:20 Mv baac se gorngv meih yiem nqox nyei buoz-ndiev aengx yangh pien zaux-mbiec ziouc zoux maiv cing-nzengc
Numbers5:21 (taux naaiv norm dorngx
Numbers5:22 Tov bun naaiv deix houv mienh nyei wuom-im bieqc meih nyei ga'sie
Numbers5:23 “+‘Sai mienh ziouc fiev naaiv deix houv nyei waac yiem sou-njunc
Numbers5:24 Ninh ziouc bun wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn hopv naaiv houv nyei wuom-im. Wuom ziouc bieqc ninh nyei sin hoic ninh diev kouv.
Numbers5:25 Sai mienh aengx zorqv yiem m'sieqv dorn nyei buoz weic nzaeng-buang nyei sic fongc horc nyei mbuonv
Numbers5:26 Ninh aengx zorqv yietc nyau weic jangx mienh zoux dorngc nyei sic ziec nyei mbuonv hietv ziec-dorngh buov. Buov liuz
Numbers5:27 Se gorngv ninh zoux maiv cing-nzengc nyei sic
Numbers5:28 Mv baac se gorngv wuov dauh mienh cing-nzengc nyei
Numbers5:29 “+‘Naaiv se nzaeng-buang nyei leiz-latc
Numbers5:30 Fai mienh laaic ninh nyei auv maaih jauv ziouc hanc ninh nyei auv. Sai mienh oix zuqc bun wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien yaac ei jienv naaiv nyungc leiz-latc nyei diuh diuh leiz zoux.
Numbers5:31 Nqox yaac maiv maaih zuiz aqv. Mv baac wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziux ninh zoux nyei
Numbers6:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers6:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers6:3 wuov dauh oix zuqc gec
Numbers6:4 Yiem zoux jienv Naasi Mienh nyei ziangh hoc
Numbers6:5 “+‘Yiem laengz jienv zoux Naasi Mienh nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx teix m'nqorngv. Oix zuqc zuov taux dingc daaih nyei hnoi-nyieqc buangv. Ninh oix zuqc cing-nzengc
Numbers6:6 Yiem ninh fungx ganh bun Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc maiv kuh mingh fatv janx-daic nyei sei.
Numbers6:7 Liemh ganh nyei die fai maa
Numbers6:8 Da'faanh yiem fungx ganh bun Ziouv nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Numbers6:9 “+‘Se gorngv yiem ninh nyei ga'hlen maaih mienh liemh zeih daic
Numbers6:10 Taux da'betv hnoi wuov hnoi
Numbers6:11 Sai mienh ziouc zorqv norm ziec weic fiqv zuiz
Numbers6:12 Oix zuqc weic dingc daaih nyei hnoi-nyieqc aengx zorqv ganh fungx bun Ziouv. Yaac oix zuqc dorh dauh yietc hnyangx nyei ba'gi yungh gouv daaih ziec weic ninh zoux dorngc nyei sic. Zinh ndaangc nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv funx aqv
Numbers6:13 “+‘Naasi Mienh nyei leiz
Numbers6:14 Yiem naaic ninh oix zuqc zorqv ga'naaiv weic fongc horc bun Ziouv. Longc dauh doix hnyangx
Numbers6:15 Yaac maaih ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv yietc njiec ziec. Aengx maaih yietc ndaan maiv an bingv nyei njuov
Numbers6:16 “+‘Sai mienh ziouc zorqv naaiv deix ga'naaiv daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien ziec fiqv zuiz caux buov ziec.
Numbers6:17 Ninh aengx zorqv wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv caux wuov ndaan maiv an bingv nyei njuov fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv weic jiu tong
Numbers6:18 “+‘Naasi Mienh oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc teix nzengc dongh zoux jangx-hoc bun cing ninh zorqv ganh fungx bun Ziouv nyei mba'biei caux siaam. Oix zuqc zorqv wuov deix mba'biei daaih dapv ziec weic jiu tong wuov deix ga'naaiv ga'ndiev maengx nyei douz.
Numbers6:19 “+‘Naasi Mienh teix liuz fungx bun Ziouv nyei mba'biei
Numbers6:20 Naaiv deix ga'naaiv sai mienh ziouc zorqv daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cunv ging weic zoux fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv deix ga'naaiv se cing-nzengc nyei
Numbers6:21 “+‘Naaiv se Naasi Mienh nyei leiz
Numbers6:22 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers6:23 “Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn
Numbers6:24 “+‘+“Tov Ziouv ceix fuqv bun meih
Numbers6:25 Tov Ziouv zoux longx bun meih
Numbers6:26 Tov Ziouv huin hmien mangc meih
Numbers6:27 “Hnangv naaic
Numbers7:1 Mose liepc ziangx zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh wuov hnoi
Numbers7:2 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv
Numbers7:3 Ninh mbuo dorh daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei zingh nyeic maaih juqv jaax ngongh cie gomv jienv liuh nyei
Numbers7:4 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers7:5 “Oix zuqc zipv ninh mbuo fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv longc zoux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gong. Oix zuqc jiu bun Lewi Mienh ziux gorqv-mienh nyei gong qiemx longc.”
Numbers7:6 Mose ziouc zorqv ngongh cie caux ngongh jiu bun Lewi Mienh.
Numbers7:7 Ninh zorqv i jaax cie caux biei dauh ngongh bun Geson Mienh ziux ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong qiemx longc nyei.
Numbers7:8 Aengx zorqv biei jaax cie caux hietc dauh ngongh bun Me^laa^li Mienh ziux ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong qiemx longc nyei. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv yiem Aalon sai mienh nyei dorn
Numbers7:9 Mv baac cie caux ngongh Mose maiv bun Ko^haatv Mienh weic zuqc ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong se oix zuqc longc mba'dauh gaeng cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv.
Numbers7:10 Longc cing-nzengc youh nzaatv ziec-dorngh bun ziec-dorngh cing-nzengc wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc
Numbers7:11 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers8:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers8:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox Aalon
Numbers8:3 Aalon ziouc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Ninh zorqv dang-zaanv an jienv dang-jaax bun ziux nza'hmien maengx
Numbers8:4 Naaiv norm dang hnangv naaiv nor zoux daaih. Ziangh norm dang longc jiem daav daaih yiem ga'ndiev dang-torqv taux gu'nguaaic nyei biangh. Ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose nyei nyungc zeiv zoux ziangx nzengc.
Numbers8:5 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers8:6 “Oix zuqc bun nqoi Lewi Mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv daaih yaac tengx ninh mbuo saax uix.
Numbers8:7 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor tengx saax uix. Oix zuqc longc saax uix nyei wuom fuqv ninh mbuo
Numbers8:8 Oix zuqc bun ninh mbuo dorh dauh ngongh gouv dorn caux ziec nyei laangh ziqc yietc njiec ziec
Numbers8:9 Oix zuqc dorh Lewi Mienh daaih yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei nza'hmien maengx
Numbers8:10 Dorh Lewi Mienh daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien wuov zanc
Numbers8:11 Aalon yaac oix zuqc zorqv Lewi Mienh fungx bun Ziouv weic zoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv. Hnangv naaiv zoux liuz
Numbers8:12 “Lewi Mienh dorh buoz maan jienv naaiv deix i dauh ngongh gouv dorn nyei m'nqorngv liuz
Numbers8:13 Oix zuqc bun Lewi Mienh souv jienv Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn nyei nza'hmien
Numbers8:14 Hnangv naaiv nor zoux liuz
Numbers8:15 “Meih tengx Lewi Mienh saax uix aengx zorqv ninh mbuo cunv ging fongc horc liuz
Numbers8:16 Naaiv deix mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih fungx bun yie
Numbers8:17 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx dorn-la'gauv
Numbers8:18 Yie yaac ginv Lewi Mienh div I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx dorn-la'gauv.
Numbers8:19 Yie yaac zorqv Lewi Mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih fungx bun Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo dorngx I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh zoux gong. Ninh mbuo yaac tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh saax uix weic bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh nitv fatv singx dinc wuov zanc maiv zuqc domh zeqc naanc hoic.”
Numbers8:20 Mose
Numbers8:21 Lewi Mienh ziouc saax ganh cing-nzengc
Numbers8:22 Nqa'haav Lewi Mienh yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh zoux ninh mbuo nyei gong yiem Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn nyei buoz-ndiev. Ziux Ziouv paaiv Mose
Numbers8:23 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers8:24 “Naaiv deix jauv gorngv Lewi Mienh. Yiem nyic ziepc hmz hnyangx faaux maengx nyei m'jangc dorn oix zuqc yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh zoux gong.
Numbers8:25 Hnyangx-jeiv buangv hmz ziepc hnyangx wuov deix
Numbers8:26 Ninh mbuo haih tengx ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh zoux gong mv baac maiv zeiz ninh mbuo ganh zoux nzengc. Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor paaiv Lewi Mienh zoux gong.”
Numbers9:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung liuz

Numbers9:13 Mv baac se gorngv maaih mienh cing-nzengc nyei

Numbers10:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers10:2 “Oix zuqc longc nyaanh daav i norm nzatc. Biomv wuov deix i norm nzatc heuc zuangx mienh gapv zunv
Numbers10:3 Biomv i norm nzatc nyei ziangh hoc

Numbers10:5 Haiz biomv nzatc nyei qiex mbui

Numbers11:1 Zuangx baeqc fingx ngopv ninh mbuo zuqc diev nyei kouv naanc. Ziouv yaac haiz mi'aqv
Numbers11:2 Baeqc fingx qaqv heuc Mose tengx. Mose daux gaux tov Ziouv
Numbers11:3 Wuov norm dorngx ziouc cuotv mbuox heuc Taa^mbe^laa
Numbers11:4 Maaih deix Janx zorpc jienv I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh yaac jiez gorn cei oix nyanc ganh nyungc ga'naaiv. Liemh I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx nyiemv jienv gorngv
Numbers11:5 Jangx zuqc yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc duqv nyanc nyei mbiauz yaac maiv zuqc ndortv nyaanh. Yaac jangx zuqc guaa-wuom
Numbers11:6 Ih zanc haiz sin zaangc mau nzengc
Numbers11:7 Maa^naa se hnangv yienh si nyim
Numbers11:8 Baeqc fingx cuotv mingh jiex naaiv jiex wuov siou daaih morc fai zong
Numbers11:9 Lungh muonz zanc mbiungc-suiv njiec ndopv-liuh ciangv nyei ziangh hoc
Numbers11:10 Mose haiz buonc-buonc mienh
Numbers11:11 Mose gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Numbers11:12 Naaiv deix zuangx mienh yie ganh maaih daaih fai? Se yie ganh yungz daaih fai? Ziouv weic haaix diuc heuc yie hlorpv jienv ninh mbuo hnangv maa hlorpv jienv hopv nyorx nyei gu'nguaaz nor
Numbers11:13 Yie oix zuqc mingh haaix duqv orv gaux bun naaiv deix zuangx mienh nyanc? Ninh mbuo dorng jienv yie nyiemv jienv gorngv
Numbers11:14 Yie ganh nduqc laanh mienh hnangv
Numbers11:15 Se gorngv Ziouv oix hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun yie
Numbers11:16 Ziouv mbuox Mose

Numbers11:18 “Oix zuqc mbuox baeqc fingx

Numbers11:23 Ziouv dau Mose
Numbers11:24 Mose ziouc cuotv mingh ziang Ziouv nyei waac mbuox baeqc fingx. Ninh dorh cietv ziepc dauh ninh mbuo nyei mienh gox daaih gapv zunv bun ninh mbuo souv jienv huing gormx Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh.
Numbers11:25 Ziouv ziouc yiem wuov dorv mbuonx njiec daaih caux Mose gorngv waac yaac zorqv deix yiem Mose wuov dauh Singx Lingh

Numbers11:35 Baeqc fingx yiem Kipc^lotv Hatc^daa^aa^waa cuotv jauv mingh taux Haa^se^lotv ziouc yiem naaic aqv.

Numbers14:27 “Naaiv deix orqv haic nyei zuangx mienh oix ngopv yie taux haaix zanc? Yie haiz naaiv deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh ngopv yie

Numbers14:34 Meih mbuo oix zuqc siouc meih mbuo ganh nyei zuiz buangv feix ziepc hnyangx. Ziux mingh zaah deic-bung wuov deix feix ziepc hnoi
Numbers14:35 Yie
Numbers14:36 Mose paaiv mingh zaah deic-bung nyei mienh nzuonx daaih gorngv doqc deic-bung nyei jauv-louc nduov zuangx mienh guaix ninh

Numbers14:40 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei

Numbers14:43 weic zuqc Aa^maa^lekv Mienh caux Kaa^naa^an Mienh yiem meih mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx. Meih mbuo oix zuqc ninh mbuo nyei nzuqc ndaauv daix. Ziouv maiv caux meih mbuo yiem weic zuqc meih mbuo huin nqaang
Numbers14:44 Mv baac zuangx mienh gaamv faaux mbong hlang deix nyei dorngx mingh maiv gunv Mose caux Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang maiv cuotv ndopv-liuh ciangv.
Numbers14:45 Yiem wuov mbong nyei Aa^maa^lekv Mienh caux Kaa^naa^an Mienh ziouc njiec daaih mborqv hingh
Numbers15:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers15:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers15:3 Haaix zanc dorh ngongh
Numbers15:4 Dorh saeng-kuv daaih nyei mienh
Numbers15:5 Dorh mouz dauh yungh dorn
Numbers15:6 “+‘Dorh yietc dauh ba'gi yungh gouv
Numbers15:7 Yaac longc yietc gorngc lengh a'ngunc diuv caux jienv ciev ziec
Numbers15:8 “+‘Meih mbuo liuc leiz dauh ngongh gouv weic buov ziec fai weic ganh nyungc jauv ziec
Numbers15:9 Oix zuqc longc juqv morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv i gorngc ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux jienv wuov dauh ngongh gouv dorh daaih.
Numbers15:10 Yaac oix zuqc dorh i gorngc a'ngunc diuv zoux ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Oix zuqc longc douz buov ziec fongc horc
Numbers15:11 Ziec ngongh gouv
Numbers15:12 Ziux meih mbuo liuc leiz daaih nyei soux mouc
Numbers15:13 “+‘Mouz dauh buonv-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh ga'naaiv daaih longc douz buov ziec fongc horc nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc hnangv naaiv zoux
Numbers15:14 Doic jiex doic
Numbers15:15 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx oix zuqc weic ganh yaac weic yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei Janx juangc naaiv deix leiz longc. Naaiv deix leiz oix zuqc doic jiex doic yietc liuz nzipc. Yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien meih mbuo caux Janx ziouc fih hnangv.
Numbers15:16 Meih mbuo caux yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei Janx oix zuqc juangc nyungc leiz-latc
Numbers15:17 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers15:18 “Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers15:19 nyanc wuov norm deic-bung nyei laangh ziqc
Numbers15:20 Meih mbuo morc daauh nzunc siang-laangh ziqc
Numbers15:21 Doic jiex doic meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naaiv zorqv morc daaih nyei siang-laangh ziqc fongc horc bun Ziouv.
Numbers15:22 “+‘Se gorngv meih mbuo caqv-bouc zoux dorngc
Numbers15:23 dongh Ziouv longc Mose jiu bun meih mbuo nyei haaix diuh leiz
Numbers15:24 yaac se gorngv zuangx baeqc fingx caqv-bouc zoux dorngc
Numbers15:25 Sai mienh oix zuqc tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx fiqv zuiz
Numbers15:26 Hnangv naaic I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx caux yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei Janx nyei zuiz ziouc duqv guangc mi'aqv
Numbers15:27 “+‘Se gorngv kungx maaih nduqc dauh mienh caqv-bouc zoux dorngc
Numbers15:28 Sai mienh oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien weic caqv-bouc zoux dorngc wuov laanh mienh fiqv zuiz. Fiqv liuz
Numbers15:29 Maiv gunv buonv-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh fai Janx
Numbers15:30 “+‘Mv baac haaix dauh baac-baac baamz zuiz
Numbers15:31 Laaix ninh mangc piex Ziouv nyei waac
Numbers15:32 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem deic-bung-huaang wuov zanc
Numbers15:33 Buatc ninh wuov deix mienh ziouc dorh ninh mingh taux Mose caux Aalon caux zuangx baeqc fingx wuov.
Numbers15:34 Ninh mbuo wuonx jienv weic zuqc mienh maiv gaengh hiuv cing oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux bun ninh.
Numbers15:35 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers15:36 Zuangx baeqc fingx ziouc dorh ninh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv
Numbers15:37 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers15:38 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers15:39 Meih mbuo ziouc maaih naaiv deix nqingh nqou mangc weic bun meih mbuo jangx jienv Ziouv bun meih mbuo nyei diuh diuh leiz-latc ziouc ei jienv zoux. Maiv ei ganh nyei hnyouv oix caux m'zing buatc ziouc dorh meih mbuo mingh dorngc jauv.
Numbers15:40 Hnangv naaic
Numbers15:41 Yie se Ziouv
Numbers16:1 Kolaa
Numbers16:2 Aengx maaih nyic baeqv hmz ziepc dauh
Numbers16:3 Ninh mbuo gapv zunv daaih yiem Mose caux Aalon nyei nza'hmien nzaeng gorngv
Numbers16:4 Mose haiz naaiv deix waac ninh mbaapv njiec ndau
Numbers16:5 yaac gorngv mbuox Kolaa caux gan Kolaa daaih wuov deix
Numbers16:6 Kolaa aah! Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Meih caux gan meih nyei mienh oix zuqc dorh hung-louh daaih.
Numbers16:7 Njang hnoi oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien zorqv douz caux hung an jienv hung-louh. Ziouv ginv haaix dauh
Numbers16:8 Mose aengx gorngv mbuox Kolaa
Numbers16:9 I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh ginv meih mbuo yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih
Numbers16:10 Ninh dorh meih caux meih nyei zuangx gorx-youz
Numbers16:11 Hnangv naaiv
Numbers16:12 Mose paaiv mienh mingh heuc E^li^apc nyei dorn
Numbers16:13 Meih dorh yie mbuo yiem ndau-touv longx nyei deic-bung cuotv daaih yiem deic-bung-huaang daix yie mbuo. Naaiv corc maiv gaengh gaux? Meih zungv oix zoux hlo gunv yie mbuo?
Numbers16:14 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv! Meih zungv maiv dorh yie mbuo bieqc norm ndau-touv longx nyei deic-bung
Numbers16:15 Mose qiex jiez! haic ziouc gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Numbers16:16 Mose mbuox Kolaa
Numbers16:17 Gorqv-mienh oix zuqc dorh gorqv-mienh nyei hung-louh
Numbers16:18 Gorqv-mienh ziouc dorh gorqv-mienh nyei hung-louh
Numbers16:19 Kolaa caux gan ninh nyei mienh ziouc gapv zunv caux Mose caux Aalon souv jienv hmien doix hmien yiem Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc. Ziouv nyei njang-laangc ziouc hinc cuotv bun zuangx baeqc fingx buatc.
Numbers16:20 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Numbers16:21 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc simv nqoi naaiv deix zuangx mienh. Ndongc nziepv dangh m'zing yie ziouc mietc nzengc ninh mbuo.”
Numbers16:22 Mose caux Aalon ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau gorngv
Numbers16:23 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers16:24 “Mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx simv nqoi Kolaa
Numbers16:25 Mose ziouc mingh taux Ndaataan caux Aa^mbi^lam wuov. I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mienh gox yaac gan jienv ninh mingh.
Numbers16:26 Ninh kuinx zuangx mienh
Numbers16:27 Mienh ziouc simv nqoi Kolaa
Numbers16:28 Mose gorngv
Numbers16:29 Se gorngv naaiv deix mienh daic hnangv pou-tong nyei mienh daic
Numbers16:30 Mv baac se gorngv Ziouv zoux siang-sic
Numbers16:31 Mose gorngv setv naaiv deix waac
Numbers16:32 Ndau nqoi hnangv morngx nqoi nzuih
Numbers16:33 Ninh mbuo liemh nangh caux jienv ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv ziouc ndortv njiec yiemh gen. Ndau ziouc gapv jienv ndipc
Numbers16:34 Yiem weih gormx nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc zungv haiz ninh mbuo heuc ziouc gaanv biaux
Numbers16:35 Aengx maaih douz yiem Ziouv cuotv daaih buov qui nzengc dorh hung mingh fongc horc wuov deix nyic baeqv hmz ziepc dauh mienh.
Numbers16:36 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers16:37 “Oix zuqc mbuox Aalon sai mienh nyei dorn
Numbers16:38 Se dongh baamz zuiz ziouc zuqc guangc maengc wuov deix mienh nyei hung-louh. Oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix hung-louh daav daaih benx yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv buang jienv ziec-dorngh
Numbers16:39 E^le^aa^saa sai mienh ziouc zorqv nzengc zuqc douz buov wuov deix mienh dorh daaih fongc horc nyei dongh siqv hung-louh
Numbers16:40 hnangv Ziouv longc Mose mbuox E^le^aa^saa zoux nor. Naaiv se weic tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh jangx zuqc
Numbers16:41 Da'nyeic hnoi zuangx baeqc fingx ngopv Mose caux Aalon. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Numbers16:42 Zuangx mienh gapv zunv doix Mose caux Aalon wuov zanc
Numbers16:43 Mose caux Aalon ziouc mingh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei nza'hmien.
Numbers16:44 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers16:45 “Simv nqoi naaiv deix zuangx mienh aqv. Ndongc nziepv dangh m'zing yie oix mietc nzengc ninh mbuo.” Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau.
Numbers16:46 Mose gorngv mbuox Aalon
Numbers16:47 Aalon ziouc ei Mose nyei waac zoux
Numbers16:48 Ninh souv jienv ziangh nyei caux daic mingh nyei mienh mbu'ndongx
Numbers16:49 Zuqc wuon-baengc daic nyei mienh maaih yietc waanc biei cin cietv baeqv dauh
Numbers16:50 Wuon-baengc dingh nzengc
Numbers17:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers17:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux ong-taaix mbuo liepc daaih nyei fingx
Numbers17:3 Yiem Lewi Fingx nyei biaav-mbiaac oix zuqc fiev Aalon nyei mbuox. Fingx-fingx oix zuqc weic ong-taaix liepc wuov fingx nyei bieiv zeiv maaih yietc diuh biaav-mbiaac.
Numbers17:4 Dorh naaiv deix biaav-mbiaac bieqc Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz
Numbers17:5 Yie ginv daaih wuov laanh mienh nyei biaav- mbiaac ziouc cuotv cunx. Hnangv naaic yie ziouc bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh ngopv meih mbuo nyei waac sekv mi'aqv
Numbers17:6 Mose ziouc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv ziouc zorqv biaav-mbiaac
Numbers17:7 Mose dorh yietc zungv biaav-mbiaac hietv jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Numbers17:8 Da'nyeic hnoi Mose bieqc Laengz Ngaengc Waac nyei Ndopv-Liuh gu'nyuoz
Numbers17:9 Mose dorh yietc zungv biaav-mbiaac yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cuotv bun I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mangc. Ninh mbuo mangc liuz
Numbers17:10 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers17:11 Mose ziouc ziux Ziouv nyei waac zoux nzengc.
Numbers17:12 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers17:13 Haaix dauh liemh mingh nitv fatv Ziouv nyei ndopv-liuh zungv oix zuqc daic aqv. Yie mbuo yietc zungv oix zuqc daic nzengc fai?”
Numbers18:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Aalon
Numbers18:2 Oix zuqc dorh meih nyei gorx-youz mbuo
Numbers18:3 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc ei jienv meih mbuo paaiv nyei waac zoux
Numbers18:4 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc caux meih mbuo gapv jienv liuc leiz Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
Numbers18:5 “Meih caux meih nyei dorn mbuo oix zuqc liuc leiz singx dinc caux ziec-dorngh. Hnangv naaic I^saa^laa^en Mienh cingx maiv zuqc yie aengx nouz aqv.
Numbers18:6 Yie ganh ginv meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Numbers18:7 Mv baac kungx meih caux meih nyei dorn mbuo haih zoux ziec-dorngh caux mbaeqc gaengh ndie gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv gong. Yie zorqv sai mienh nyei gong zoux zingh nyeic fungx bun meih mbuo. Cuotv liuz meih mbuo
Numbers18:8 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Aalon
Numbers18:9 Dorh daaih fongc horc gauh cing-nzengc jiex nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers18:10 Oix zuqc yiem norm cing-nzengc jiex nyei dorngx nyanc. Kungx m'jangc dorn maaih leiz nyanc hnangv. Oix zuqc funx benx cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv.
Numbers18:11 “Naaiv deix yaac benx meih mbuo nyei. I^saa^laa^en Mienh cunv ging fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv benx meih mbuo nyei. Yie jiu bun meih caux meih nyei dorn mbuo
Numbers18:12 “Dorh daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei yietc zungv daauh torngx laangh ziqc
Numbers18:13 Da'faanh wuov norm deic-bung nyei ndau cuotv nyei daauh torngx ga'naaiv
Numbers18:14 “Yiem I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung fungx dangx bun Ziouv nyei buonc yietc zungv benx meih nyei mi'aqv.
Numbers18:15 “Dorh daaih fongc horc bun Ziouv
Numbers18:16 Buangv hlaax oix zuqc zuoqc. Oix zuqc weic yietc dauh cuotv yietc lungz faam-zinh nyaanh ziux singx dinc dingc daaih nyei hniev-daauh.
Numbers18:17 “Mv baac daauh toi ngongh fai ba'gi yungh fai yungh maiv dungx zuoqc weic zuqc benx cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv. Oix zuqc zorqv ninh mbuo nyei nziaamv fuqv ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic
Numbers18:18 Naaiv deix saeng-kuv nyei orv benx meih nyei
Numbers18:19 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh fongc horc bun yie nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv yie jiu bun meih caux meih nyei naamh nyouz zoux yietc liuz duqv nyei buonc. Se hnangv longc nzauv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien liepc jiez yietc liuz longc nyei ngaengc waac weic meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei zeiv-fun.”
Numbers18:20 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Aalon
Numbers18:21 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh fongc horc ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv ga'naaiv yie jiu bun Lewi Mienh zoux ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc
Numbers18:22 Yangh naaiv jiex
Numbers18:23 Yangh naaiv mingh
Numbers18:24 Daaux nzuonx
Numbers18:25 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers18:26 “Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox Lewi Mienh
Numbers18:27 Hnangv naaiv fongc horc se funx hnangv yiem mborqv mbiauh ciangv nyei laangh ziqc
Numbers18:28 Hnangv naaic
Numbers18:29 Yiem jiu bun meih mbuo nyei nyungc-nyungc oix zuqc zorqv cuotv gauh longx jiex
Numbers18:30 “Oix zuqc mbuox Lewi Mienh
Numbers18:31 Zengc njiec wuov deix
Numbers18:32 Meih mbuo zorqv gauh longx jiex nyei buonc fongc horc meih ziouc maiv zuqc weic naaiv deix ga'naaiv ndaam haaix nyungc zuiz. Maiv dungx zoux bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh fongc horc naaiv deix cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv maaih uix
Numbers19:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Numbers19:2 “Ziux Ziouv njiec nyei lingc oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh dauh ngongh nyeiz-siqv daaih bun meih
Numbers19:3 Oix zuqc jiu bun E^le^aa^saa sai mienh. Yaac oix zuqc dorh cuotv ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv bun mienh dorng jienv E^le^aa^saa sai mienh nyei nza'hmien daix.
Numbers19:4 E^le^aa^saa ziouc longc buoz-ndoqv coqv ngongh nyeiz nziaamv aengx hungx mingh Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh nza'hmien maengx tiu siec nzunc.
Numbers19:5 Oix zuqc maaih dauh mienh yiem sai mienh nyei nza'hmien buov naaiv dauh ngongh. Liemh ndopv
Numbers19:6 Sai mienh oix zuqc aengx zorqv deix si^ndaa zongh ndiangx caux husopc miev
Numbers19:7 Nqa'haav sai mienh oix zuqc nzox lui-houx
Numbers19:8 Buov ngongh nyeiz nyei mienh yaac oix zuqc nzox lui-houx
Numbers19:9 “Oix zuqc maaih dauh maiv maaih uix nyei mienh siou naaiv dauh ngongh nyei saaiv
Numbers19:10 Siou ngongh nyeiz nyei saaiv wuov laanh mienh yaac oix zuqc nzox ninh nyei lui-houx. Ninh fih hnangv nyei maaih uix taux lungh hmuangx. Naaiv se weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei ganh fingx mienh yietc liuz oix zuqc gan nyei leiz.
Numbers19:11 “Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc janx-daic nyei sei ziouc maaih uix buangv siec hnoi.
Numbers19:12 Wuov dauh mienh taux da'faam hnoi caux da'cietv hnoi
Numbers19:13 Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc janx-daic nyei sei yaac maiv saax ganh nyei uix nor
Numbers19:14 “Naaiv se mienh yiem ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz daic nyei leiz. Mienh daic yiem ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz
Numbers19:15 Ndopv-liuh nyei haaix nyungc jaa-dorngx maiv maaih nqaaix gomv ndipc yaac maaih uix.
Numbers19:16 “Haaix dauh yiem wuov naah haaix ndau yaac muoqv zuqc janx-daic nyei sei
Numbers19:17 “Weic maaih uix nyei mienh
Numbers19:18 Oix zuqc maaih dauh maiv maaih uix nyei mienh longc husopc miev ziemx wuov norm baengh nyei wuom fuqv ndopv-liuh caux ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz nyei jaa-dorngx caux yiem wuov nyei mienh. Ninh yaac oix zuqc fuqv muoqv zuqc janx-daic nyei mbungv
Numbers19:19 Taux da'faam hnoi caux da'cietv hnoi
Numbers19:20 “Haaix dauh maiv saax ganh nyei uix
Numbers19:21 Naaiv se ninh mbuo oix zuqc yietc liuz gan nyei leiz. “Tengx mienh fuqv saax uix nyei wuom wuov laanh mienh yaac oix zuqc nzox ganh nyei lui-houx. Haaix dauh muoqv zuqc saax uix nyei wuom
Numbers19:22 Maaih uix nyei mienh muoqv zuqc haaix nyungc
Numbers20:1 Yiem zih hlaax
Numbers20:2 Yiem wuov norm dorngx maiv maaih wuom bun zuangx baeqc fingx hopv. Ninh mbuo ziouc gapv zunv daaih guaix Mose caux Aalon.
Numbers20:3 Ninh mbuo caux Mose nzaeng jaax gorngv
Numbers20:4 Meih weic haaix diuc dorh Ziouv nyei zuangx mienh daaih naaiv deic-bung-huaang weic bun yie mbuo caux yie mbuo nyei saeng-kuv daic nzengc?
Numbers20:5 Meih weic haaix diuc dorh yie mbuo cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung taux naaiv norm waaic haic nyei deic-bung? Yiem naaiv maiv maaih mbiauh
Numbers20:6 Mose caux Aalon leih nqoi zuangx mienh mingh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Numbers20:7 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers20:8 “Zorqv biaav-mbiaac daaih. Meih caux meih nyei gorx
Numbers20:9 Mose ziouc mingh zorqv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien wuov diuh biaav-mbiaac daaih hnangv Ziouv mbuox ninh zoux nor.
Numbers20:10 Mose caux Aalon heuc zuangx baeqc fingx daaih zunv yiem wuov norm la'bieiv nyei nza'hmien. Mose ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Numbers20:11 Mose ziouc sung buoz
Numbers20:12 Mv baac Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose caux Aalon
Numbers20:13 Naaiv deix wuom ninh mbuo heuc Me^li^mbaa weic zuqc yiem naaic I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Ziouv nzaeng jaax. Yiem wuov norm dorngx
Numbers20:14 Mose paaiv deix mienh yiem Kaa^ndetc Zingh mingh lorz E^ndom Deic-Bung nyei hungh diex gorngv
Numbers20:15 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung yaac yiem wuov lauh nyei. I^yipv Mienh zoux doqc yie mbuo caux yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix.
Numbers20:16 Mv baac yie mbuo qaqv heuc Ziouv
Numbers20:17 Tov bun yie mbuo jiex meih nyei deic-bung. Yie mbuo maiv yangh ndeic
Numbers20:18 Mv baac E^ndom Hungh dau
Numbers20:19 I^saa^laa^en Mienh dau
Numbers20:20 Hungh diex aengx dau
Numbers20:21 Laaix E^ndom Mienh maiv bun ninh mbuo yangh deic-bung jiex
Numbers20:22 Zuangx I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Kaa^ndetc Zingh cuotv jauv mingh taux Ho^aa Mbong.
Numbers20:23 Yiem nitv E^ndom Deic-Bung
Numbers20:24 “Aalon oix zuqc guei seix. Ninh maiv duqv bieqc yie jiu bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov norm deic-bung
Numbers20:25 Oix zuqc dorh Aalon caux ninh nyei dorn
Numbers20:26 Aengx jaiv Aalon nyei zoux sai lui daaih tengx ninh nyei dorn
Numbers20:27 Mose ei jienv Ziouv nyei waac zoux. Ninh mbuo buo dauh dorng jienv zuangx mienh faaux Ho^aa Mbong.
Numbers20:28 Mose jaiv Aalon nyei zoux sai lui bun Aalon nyei dorn
Numbers20:29 Zuangx mienh hiuv duqv Aalon daic mi'aqv
Numbers21:1 Kaa^naa^an Mienh
Numbers21:2 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc caux Ziouv laengz jiez ngaengc waac. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Numbers21:3 Ziouv haiz I^saa^laa^en Mienh tov nyei waac ziouc zorqv Kaa^naa^an Mienh jiu bun ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo ziouc mietc nzengc Kaa^naa^an Mienh caux wuov norm deic-bung nyei zingh yietc zungv. Wuov norm horngc ninh mbuo yaac cuotv mbuox heuc “Homaa.”
Numbers21:4 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Ho^aa Mbong cuotv jauv yangh mingh Koiv-Siqv wuov diuh jauv weic wingc E^ndom Deic-Bung. Yiem jauv zaangc zuangx mienh haiz maiv noic faanh.
Numbers21:5 Ninh mbuo ziouc ngopv Tin-Hungh caux Mose
Numbers21:6 Ziouv ziouc bun naang-doqc yiem zuangx baeqc fingx nyei mbu'ndongx. Naang nyorqv mienh ziouc maaih I^saa^laa^en Mienh daic camv haic.
Numbers21:7 Baeqc fingx daaih lorz Mose yaac gorngv
Numbers21:8 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers21:9 Mose ziouc longc dongh siqv zoux diuh naang an jienv dongc gu'nguaaic. Haaix dauh zuqc naang-doqc nyorqv yaac mangc naaiv diuh dongh siqv naang
Numbers21:10 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx suiv mingh corng ndopv-liuh ciangv yiem O^mbotc.
Numbers21:11 Yiem O^mbotc ninh mbuo cuotv jauv mingh liepc ndopv-liuh ciangv yiem I^ye Aa^mbaa^lim
Numbers21:12 Yiem naaic ninh mbuo aengx suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Zeletv Horngz.
Numbers21:13 Ninh mbuo aengx cuotv jauv yiem Aannon Ndaaih hlen baqv bung maengx. Aannon Ndaaih yiem deic-bung-huaang caengx bieqc Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei deic
Numbers21:14 Weic naaiv yiem Ziouv nyei Mborqv Jaax Sou gorngv
Numbers21:15 caux caengx faaux taux Aan Zingh wuov deix horngz nyei mbaiv
Numbers21:16 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem naaic aengx mingh douc taux Mbe^e. Yiem Mbe^e maaih norm wuom-kuotv
Numbers21:17 Wuov zanc I^saa^laa^en Mienh baaux naaiv diuh nzung
Numbers21:18 Se bieiv zeiv wetv nyei wuom-kuotv
Numbers21:19 yiem Matv^taa^naa mingh taux Naa^haa^li^en Horngc. Yiem Naa^haa^li^en aengx suiv mingh taux Mbaamotv.
Numbers21:20 Cuotv Mbaamotv ninh mbuo aengx mingh Mo^apc Deic nyei horngz
Numbers21:21 I^saa^laa^en Mienh paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei hungh
Numbers21:22 “Tov bun yie mbuo jiex meih nyei deic-bung oc. Yie mbuo maiv yangh pien bieqc ndeic fai a'ngunc huingx
Numbers21:23 Mv baac Si^honx Hungh maiv kangv bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh jiex ninh nyei deic. Ninh heuc ninh nyei zuangx baeng daaih zunv aengx cuotv mingh deic-bung-huaang mborqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh taux Yaa^haatv ziouc caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax.
Numbers21:24 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh longc nzuqc ndaauv daix ninh
Numbers21:25 I^saa^laa^en Mienh caangv nzengc Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei norm-norm zingh
Numbers21:26 Hetv^mbon zoux Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh nyei domh zingh. Si^honx Hungh caux zinh ndaangc wuov dauh Mo^apc Mienh nyei hungh mborqv jaax caangv nzengc yiem Mo^apc Hungh nyei buoz-ndiev nyei yietc zungv deic-bung taux Aannon Ndaaih.
Numbers21:27 Weic naaiv zoc nzung nyei mienh gorngv
Numbers21:28 Maaih douz yiem Hetv^mbon Zingh cuotv
Numbers21:29 O Mo^apc Mienh aac
Numbers21:30 Mv baac yie mbuo bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun zuqc mietc
Numbers21:31 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc yiem njiec Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei deic-bung.
Numbers21:32 Mose paaiv mienh mingh zaah liuz Yaase Zingh
Numbers21:33 Jiex daaih
Numbers21:34 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers21:35 Hnangv naaic
Numbers22:1 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv jauv mingh taux Mo^apc nyei ndau-baengh
Numbers22:2 Mo^apc Deic-Bung nyei hungh
Numbers22:3 Mo^apc Mienh gengh! gamh nziex haic weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh camv! haic. Mo^apc Mienh gamh nziex gau I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers22:4 Mo^apc Mienh ziouc mbuox Mi^ndien Mienh nyei mienh gox
Numbers22:5 Ninh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Mbe^o nyei dorn
Numbers22:6 Tov meih ih zanc daaih tengx yie zioux ninh mbuo
Numbers22:7 Mo^apc caux Mi^ndien Mienh nyei mienh gox ziouc cuotv jauv aengx dorh jienv cingv zioux nyei nyaanh mingh. Taux Mbaa^laa^am wuov
Numbers22:8 Mbaa^laa^am mbuox ninh mbuo
Numbers22:9 Tin-Hungh daaih taux Mbaa^laa^am wuov naaic gaax ninh
Numbers22:10 Mbaa^laa^am dau Tin-Hungh
Numbers22:11 ‘Maaih fingx mienh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih yiem buangv lungh ndiev nyei ndau-beih. Ih zanc tov meih daaih zioux ninh mbuo. Hnangv naaic nziex yie haih caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax aengx zunc ninh mbuo biaux norh.’+”
Numbers22:12 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers22:13 Da'nyeic ndorm
Numbers22:14 Wuov deix Mo^apc Mienh nyei jien ziouc nzuonx Mbaalaakv wuov gorngv
Numbers22:15 Mbaalaakv aengx paaiv deix zoux hlo nyei mienh mingh
Numbers22:16 Ninh mbuo mingh taux Mbaa^laa^am wuov gorngv
Numbers22:17 Yie oix bun meih duqv domh zingh nyeic. Meih oix yie zoux haaix nyungc yie yaac ei jienv zoux. Tov! daaih tengx yie zioux naaiv deix mienh.’+”
Numbers22:18 Mv baac Mbaa^laa^am dau Mbaalaakv paaiv daaih nyei mienh
Numbers22:19 Ih zanc tov meih mbuo yiem muonz naaiv hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov deix nor
Numbers22:20 Wuov muonz Tin-Hungh daaih gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers22:21 Da'nyeic ndorm
Numbers22:22 Mv baac Tin-Hungh qiex jiez haic weic zuqc Mbaa^laa^am mingh. Ziouv nyei fin-mienh ziouc daaih souv jienv jauv dangv jienv ninh. Wuov zanc Mbaa^laa^am geh jienv lorh
Numbers22:23 Lorh buatc Ziouv nyei fin-mienh souv jienv wuov jauv nanv jienv nzuqc ndaauv. Lorh ziouc simv cuotv jauv-hlen bieqc ndeic mingh. Mbaa^laa^am ziouc mborqv lorh
Numbers22:24 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh aengx mingh souv jienv i norm a'ngunc huingx mbu'ndongx
Numbers22:25 Lorh buatc Ziouv nyei fin-mienh ziouc mbengx jienv laatc jiex
Numbers22:26 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh aengx jiex mingh souv jienv gauh hepc jiex nyei yietc norm dorngx. Zaaix maengx
Numbers22:27 Lorh buatc Ziouv nyei fin-mienh ninh ziouc mbaapv njiec. Mbaa^laa^am corc geh jienv nyei. Mbaa^laa^am qiex jiez! haic
Numbers22:28 Ziouv bun lorh haih gorngv waac mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers22:29 Mbaa^laa^am dau lorh
Numbers22:30 Lorh aengx gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers22:31 Wuov zanc Ziouv bun Mbaa^laa^am nyei m'zing haih mangc duqv buatc Ziouv nyei fin-mienh nanv jienv nzuqc ndaauv souv jienv wuov jauv. Mbaa^laa^am ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau.
Numbers22:32 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh naaic ninh
Numbers22:33 Lorh buatc yie yaac simv pien naaiv deix buo nzunc. Se gorngv ninh maiv simv nor
Numbers22:34 Mbaa^laa^am gorngv mbuox Ziouv nyei fin-mienh
Numbers22:35 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers22:36 Mbaalaakv haiz gorngv Mbaa^laa^am daaih
Numbers22:37 Mbaalaakv gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers22:38 Mbaa^laa^am dau
Numbers22:39 Mbaa^laa^am ziouc caux jienv Mbaalaakv mingh Ki^li^yaatv Husotv Zingh.
Numbers22:40 Mbaalaakv daix ngongh caux ba'gi yungh ziec yaac zorqv deix orv bun Mbaa^laa^am caux gan jienv mingh wuov deix jien.
Numbers22:41 Da'nyeic ndorm
Numbers23:1 Mbaa^laa^am gorngv mbuox Mbaalaakv
Numbers23:2 Mbaalaakv ziouc ei jienv Mbaa^laa^am nyei waac zoux. Ninh mbuo i dauh yiem mouz norm ziec-dorngh
Numbers23:3 Mbaa^laa^am gorngv mbuox Mbaalaakv
Numbers23:4 Tin-Hungh buangh Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers23:5 Ziouv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am hnangv haaix nor gorngv
Numbers23:6 Mbaa^laa^am ziouc nzuonx
Numbers23:7 Mbaa^laa^am ziouc gorngv cuotv ninh douc nyei waac. Ninh gorngv
Numbers23:8 Tin-Hungh maiv zioux wuov deix
Numbers23:9 Yie yiem mbaengx-ningv buatc ninh mbuo. Yie yiem hlang nyei dorngx mangc jienv ninh mbuo
Numbers23:10 Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun ndongc nie-mbung camv
Numbers23:11 Mbaalaakv gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers23:12 Mbaa^laa^am dau
Numbers23:13 Mbaalaakv aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
Numbers23:14 Mbaalaakv ziouc dorh Mbaa^laa^am taux Sofim nyei ndeic
Numbers23:15 Mbaa^laa^am gorngv mbuox Mbaalaakv
Numbers23:16 Ziouv daaih buangh Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers23:17 Mbaa^laa^am nzuonx mingh
Numbers23:18 Mbaa^laa^am aengx gorngv cuotv ninh douc nyei waac
Numbers23:19 Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz mienh
Numbers23:20 Yie zipv lingc buang waac
Numbers23:21 “Maiv buatc Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun oix maaih haaix nyungc nzauh kouv. Maiv buatc I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih haaix nyungc kuonx naanh. Ziouv
Numbers23:22 Tin-Hungh dorh ninh mbuo cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
Numbers23:23 Maiv haih bungx haaix nyungc faatv hoic Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun. Maiv haih bungx ding bungx jiemx hoic I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ih zanc mienh oix gorngv taux Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun
Numbers23:24 Naaiv fingx mienh jiez sin hnangv dauh sienh nyeiz nor
Numbers23:25 Mbaalaakv gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers23:26 Mbaa^laa^am dau
Numbers23:27 Mbaalaakv gorngv mbuox Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers23:28 Mbaalaakv ziouc dorh Mbaa^laa^am taux Be^o Mbong-ningv. Yiem naaic haih mangc njiec buatc deic-bung-huaang.
Numbers23:29 Mbaa^laa^am gorngv mbuox Mbaalaakv
Numbers23:30 Mbaalaakv ziouc ei jienv Mbaa^laa^am nyei waac zoux. Yiem mouz norm ziec-dorngh ziec dauh ngongh gouv caux dauh ba'gi yungh gouv.
Numbers24:1 Mbaa^laa^am hiuv duqv Ziouv a'hneiv ceix fuqv bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers24:2 buatc I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux yietc fingx yietc fingx corng ndopv-liuh yiem ninh mbuo nyei ciangv. Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh njiec daaih yiem jienv ninh
Numbers24:3 ninh ziouc douc naaiv deix waac
Numbers24:4 dongh haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov dauh douc nyei waac. Yie nyei m'zing tong
Numbers24:5 “O Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun aac
Numbers24:6 “Meih mbuo hnangv horngz cuotv mingh jangv nyei nor
Numbers24:7 Wuom oix liouc cuotv ninh mbuo nyei tongv
Numbers24:8 “Tin-Hungh dorh ninh mbuo cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
Numbers24:9 Ninh mbuo mbaapv njiec bueix jienv hnangv sienh gouv
Numbers24:10 Mbaalaakv qiex jiez! haic Mbaa^laa^am
Numbers24:11 Ih zanc meih biaux nzuonx meih nyei dorngx aqv. Yie gorngv oix bun zingh nyeic hlo nyei
Numbers24:12 Mbaa^laa^am dau Mbaalaakv
Numbers24:13 ‘Maiv gunv Mbaalaakv zorqv nzengc buangv hungh dinc nyei jiem nyaanh bun yie
Numbers24:14 Ih zanc yie nzuonx yie nyei buonv-fingx mienh wuov mv baac daaih maah! Yie mbuox meih nqa'haav hingv naaiv fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix hnangv haaix nor zoux bun meih nyei baeqc fingx.”
Numbers24:15 Mbaa^laa^am ziouc douc naaiv deix waac
Numbers24:16 dongh haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov dauh douc nyei waac
Numbers24:17 “Yie buatc ninh mv baac maiv zeiz ih zanc. Yie mangc ninh mv baac maiv zeiz fatv nyei. Oix maaih norm hleix yiem Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun cuotv daaih
Numbers24:18 E^ndom oix zuqc suei benx ganh dauh nyei. Ninh nyei win-wangv
Numbers24:19 Maaih dauh Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun oix cuotv daaih gunv. Ninh oix mietc nzengc yiem zingh mborqv liuz jaax zengc njiec nyei mienh.”
Numbers24:20 Yiem Mbaa^laa^am buatc hinc yaangh nyei sic ninh buatc Aa^maa^lekv Mienh ziouc douc naaiv deix waac
Numbers24:21 Ninh aengx buatc Kenai Mienh ziouc douc waac gorngv
Numbers24:22 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic meih mbuo Kenai Mienh oix zuqc mietc. Atc^su Mienh oix caangv meih mbuo mingh ndongc haaix lauh?”
Numbers24:23 Mbaa^laa^am aengx douc waac gorngv
Numbers24:24 Maaih mienh nzaeng nzangv yiem Kitv^tim Guoqv daaih zoux bun Atc^su caux E^mbe zuqc baaic
Numbers24:25 Gorngv liuz
Numbers25:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Sitv^tim Deic wuov zanc
Numbers25:2 Ziec ninh mbuo nyei zienh nyei ziangh hoc
Numbers25:3 Hnangv naaic
Numbers25:4 Ziouv mbuox Mose
Numbers25:5 Mose ziouc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei siemv zuiz jien
Numbers25:6 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gapv zunv yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc nyiemv wuov zanc
Numbers25:7 Aalon sai mienh nyei fun
Numbers25:8 gan jienv wuov dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh bieqc ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx. Ninh longc cang nzopv ninh mbuo i dauh
Numbers25:9 Mv baac laaix butv naaiv nyungc wuon-baengc daic nyei mienh
Numbers25:10 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers25:11 “Aalon sai mienh nyei fun
Numbers25:12 Oix zuqc mbuox ninh
Numbers25:13 se laengz bun ninh caux ninh nyei zeiv-fun yietc liuz duqv zoux sai mienh weic zuqc ninh tengx ninh nyei Tin-Hungh nzaeng I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh fiqv zuiz.”
Numbers25:14 Caux Mi^ndien sieqv zuqc daix wuov dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mbuox heuc Simx^li
Numbers25:15 Zuqc daix wuov dauh Mi^ndien sieqv heuc Kotv^mbi. Ninh nyei die heuc Sux^aa
Numbers25:16 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers25:17 “Oix zuqc zoux bun Mi^ndien Mienh benx win-wangv aqv
Numbers25:18 weic zuqc ninh mbuo yiem Be^o nduov meih mbuo
Numbers26:1 Domh wuon-baengc jiex liuz
Numbers26:2 “Oix zuqc saauv nzengc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Numbers26:3 Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh ziouc yiem Mo^apc ndau-baengh
Numbers26:4 “Oix zuqc saauv nzengc yiem nyic ziepc hnyangx faaux maengx nyei m'jangc dorn ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose.” Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih hnangv naaiv.
Numbers26:5 I^saa^laa^en nyei dorn-hlo
Numbers26:6 Hetv^lon nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:7 Naaiv se Lu^mben Fingx bun njiec nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih biei waanc buo cin cietv baeqv faah ziepc dauh.
Numbers26:8 Banlu nyei dorn se E^li^apc.
Numbers26:9 E^li^apc nyei dorn
Numbers26:10 Ndau ziouc nqoi hnangv morngx nqoi nzuih
Numbers26:11 Mv baac Kolaa nyei dorn mbuo maiv zuqc daic.
Numbers26:12 Si^me^on nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Ne^mu^en nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:13 Zelaa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:14 Naaiv se Si^me^on nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih i waanc i cin nyic baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:15 Gaatc nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Sefon nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:16 Otc^ni nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:17 Aalotv nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:18 Naaiv se Gaatc nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih biei waanc hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:19 E^aa caux Onan zoux Yu^ndaa nyei dorn mv baac ninh mbuo yiem Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung daic mi'aqv.
Numbers26:20 Yu^ndaa nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Qelaa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:21 Beletv nyei fun-faqv maaih Hetv^lon nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:22 Naaiv se Yu^ndaa nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih siec waanc juqv cin hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:23 Itc^saax^kaa nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Tolaa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:24 Yaasupv nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:25 Naaiv se Itc^saax^kaa nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih juqv waanc biei cin faam-baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:26 Se^mbu^lun nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Seletv nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:27 Naaiv se Se^mbu^lun nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih juqv waanc hmz baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:28 Yosepv nyei fun-faqv
Numbers26:29 Maa^natv^se nyei fun-faqv maaih Maa^ki^le nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:30 Naaiv se Gi^le^aatc nyei fun-faqv. Maaih I^ye^se nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:31 Atc^li^en nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:32 Se^mi^ndaa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:33 (Hefe nyei dorn
Numbers26:34 Naaiv se Maa^natv^se nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih biaa waanc i cin cietv baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:35 E^faa^im nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Su^te^laa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:36 Su^te^laa nyei fun-faqv maaih Elaan nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:37 Naaiv se E^faa^im nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih buo waanc i cin hmz baeqv dauh. Naaiv se Yosepv nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc.
Numbers26:38 Mben^yaa^min nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Mbelaa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:39 Se^fu^faam nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:40 Mbelaa nyei fun-faqv ziux Aatc caux Naa^aa^maan nyei bungh buonc maaih Aatc nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:41 Naaiv se Mben^yaa^min nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih biei waanc biaa cin luoqc baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:42 Ndaan nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Su^ham nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:43 Yietc zungv zoux Su^ham Mienh yaac maaih juqv waanc biei cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:44 Aa^se nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Imnaa nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:45 Mbe^li^yaa nyei fun-faqv maaih He^mbe nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:46 (Aa^se maaih dauh sieqv mbuox heuc Se^laa^aa.)
Numbers26:47 Naaiv se Aa^se nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih biaa waanc buo cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:48 Napv^taa^li nyei fun-faqv ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Yaa^se^en nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:49 Yese nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:50 Naaiv se Napv^taa^li nyei bungh buonc. Yietc zungv maaih biei waanc biaa cin feix baeqv dauh.
Numbers26:51 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei m'jangc dorn yietc zungv maaih juqv sinx yietc cin cietv baeqv faah ziepc dauh.
Numbers26:52 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers26:53 “Oix zuqc ziux mienh nyei soux mouc zorqv ndau paaiv bun nqoi ninh mbuo nzipc.
Numbers26:54 Haaix fingx mienh camv oix zuqc paaiv bun ninh mbuo nzipc jangv. Haaix fingx zoqc bun ninh mbuo nzipc gauh hepc. Fingx-fingx ziux ninh mbuo nyei soux mouc oix zuqc nzipc ninh mbuo nyei buonc.
Numbers26:55 Yaac oix zuqc ziux ong-taaix mbuo nyei fingx nyei mbuox dingc maengc mangc haaix dauh duqv haaix bung ndau.
Numbers26:56 Oix zuqc ziux haaix fingx mienh camv fai zoqc dingc maengc mangc weic paaiv ndau bun nqoi ninh mbuo nzipc.”
Numbers26:57 Lewi Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih Geson nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:58 Aengx maaih naaiv deix Lewi Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc. Maaih Lipv^ni nyei bungh buonc
Numbers26:59 Amlaam nyei auv nyei mbuox heuc Yo^ke^mbetc
Numbers26:60 Aalon zoux Naa^ndapc caux Aa^mbi^hu
Numbers26:61 Mv baac Naa^ndapc caux Aa^mbi^hu dorh maiv maaih leiz longc nyei douz yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien ziec
Numbers26:62 Lewi Mienh nyei soux mouc
Numbers26:63 Naaiv se Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh yiem Mo^apc ndau-baengh
Numbers26:64 Ih zanc saauv nyei mienh
Numbers26:65 Weic zuqc Ziouv mbuox wuov deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh ninh mbuo zungv oix zuqc yiem deic-bung-huaang daic nzengc. Cuotv liuz Ye^fun^ne nyei dorn
Numbers27:1 Se^lo^fe^hatc nyei biaa dauh sieqv nyei mbuox maaih hnangv naaiv
Numbers27:2 Naaiv deix biaa muoz-sieqv mingh taux Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc
Numbers27:3 “Yie mbuo nyei die yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang daic mi'aqv. Ninh yaac maiv maaih dorn. Ninh maiv caux gan Kolaa wuov deix gapv zunv ngaengc Ziouv. Ninh daic se weic ninh ganh nyei zuiz.
Numbers27:4 Laaix yie mbuo nyei die maiv maaih dorn
Numbers27:5 Mose ziouc dorh ninh mbuo nyei jauv-louc mbuox Ziouv.
Numbers27:6 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Numbers27:7 “Se^lo^fe^hatc nyei sieqv gorngv duqv horpc nyei. Meih zungv oix zuqc yiem ninh mbuo nyei die nyei muoz-doic mbu'ndongx paaiv ndau bun ninh mbuo nzipc. Zorqv ninh mbuo nyei die nzipc nyei buonc jiu bun ninh mbuo.
Numbers27:8 “Mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh ‘Se gorngv maaih dauh m'jangc dorn daic mi'aqv
Numbers27:9 Se gorngv ninh maiv maaih sieqv
Numbers27:10 Se gorngv maiv maaih gorx
Numbers27:11 Se gorngv ninh nyei die maiv maaih gorx
Numbers27:12 Ziouv mbuox Mose
Numbers27:13 Mangc liuz
Numbers27:14 Weic zuqc yiem Sin Deic-Bung-Huaang
Numbers27:15 Mose gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Numbers27:16 “ Ziouv
Numbers27:17 bun ninh haih yiem ninh mbuo nyei nza'hmien bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv
Numbers27:18 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers27:19 Yaac bun ninh souv jienv E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien
Numbers27:20 Oix zuqc jiu deix meih nyei hatc maaz bun ninh weic bun I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh muangx ninh nyei waac.
Numbers27:21 Ninh oix zuqc souv jienv E^le^aa^saa sai mienh nyei nza'hmien
Numbers27:22 Mose ei jienv Ziouv mbuox nyei waac zoux. Ninh dorh Yo^su^waa daaih bun ninh souv jienv E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien.
Numbers27:23 Ziux Ziouv mbuox nyei waac
Numbers28:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers28:2 “Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor paaiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Mbuox ninh mbuo
Numbers28:3 Yaac mbuox ninh mbuo
Numbers28:4 Lungh ndorm ziec dauh
Numbers28:5 Mouz dauh oix zuqc longc i morqv mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv yietc gorngc ga'lanv biouv njaapc daaih nyei youh caux jienv buov ziec.
Numbers28:6 Yiem Sinaai Mbong wuov zanc hnangv naaiv liepc daaih
Numbers28:7 Ziec nyei mouz dauh yungh dorn oix zuqc yietc dauh maaih gorngc a'ngunc diuv caux jienv ziec
Numbers28:8 Nziemx-yaangh nyei ziangh hoc liuc leiz da'nyeic dauh yungh dorn caux jienv hnangv lungh ndorm fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers28:9 “+‘Dingh Gong Hnoi oix zuqc longc i dauh maiv waaic fangx
Numbers28:10 Naaiv se norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Corc aengx maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec caux jienv yietc njiec ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Numbers28:11 “+‘Mouz hlaax
Numbers28:12 Yietc dauh ngongh gouv caan oix zuqc maaih juqv morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Weic wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv yaac oix zuqc maaih i morqv mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc.
Numbers28:13 Mouz dauh ba'gi yungh dorn yaac oix zuqc longc yietc morqv mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers28:14 Dauh dauh ngongh gouv caan oix zuqc maaih i gorngc a'ngunc diuv caux jienv ciev ziec. Yietc dauh ba'gi yungh gouv oix zuqc maaih yietc gorngc lengh. Mouz dauh ba'gi yungh dorn oix zuqc maaih yietc gorngc. Naaiv se hnyangx-hnyangx hlaax-hlaax saeng-yietv hnoi oix zuqc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Numbers28:15 Yaac oix zuqc ei hnoi-hnoi ziec nyei ziec. Lengc jeiv aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec bun Ziouv weic fiqv zuiz.
Numbers28:16 “+‘Zih hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi oix zuqc jiex Siex Maengc Zipv.
Numbers28:17 Ziepc hmz wuov hnoi
Numbers28:18 Daauh hnoi oix zuqc gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix yaac maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc hnoi-hnoi zoux nyei gong.
Numbers28:19 “+‘Yaac oix zuqc longc i dauh ngongh gouv caan
Numbers28:20 Yietc dauh ngongh gouv oix zuqc maaih juqv morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Weic wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv yaac oix zuqc maaih i morqv mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc.
Numbers28:21 Mouz dauh ba'gi yungh dorn yaac oix zuqc maaih yietc morqv mbuonv-muonc zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc.
Numbers28:22 Yaac oix zuqc longc dauh yungh gouv ziec weic fiqv meih mbuo nyei zuiz.
Numbers28:23 Oix zuqc liuc leiz naaiv deix tipv jienv ndorm-ndorm buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Numbers28:24 Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi liuc leiz naaiv deix nyanc hopv longc douz buov ziec fongc horc
Numbers28:25 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Numbers28:26 “+‘Fongc horc daauh torngx laangh ziqc wuov hnoi doix jiex Siou Siang-Mbiauh nyei Zipv daauh hnoi
Numbers28:27 Oix zuqc dorh i dauh ngongh gouv caan
Numbers28:28 Yietc dauh ngongh gouv caan oix zuqc maaih juqv morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Weic yietc dauh ba'gi yungh gouv oix zuqc maaih i morqv.
Numbers28:29 Mouz dauh ba'gi yungh gouv dorn
Numbers28:30 Yaac oix zuqc longc yietc dauh yungh gouv ziec weic fiqv zuiz.
Numbers28:31 Cuotv liuz naaiv deix buov nyei caux jienv yietc njiec ciev ziec nyei
Numbers29:1 “+‘Cietv hlaax
Numbers29:2 Oix zuqc dorh ga'naaiv buov ziec fongc horc
Numbers29:3 Ngongh gouv caan oix zuqc maaih juqv morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Ba'gi yungh gouv oix zuqc maaih biei morqv bienx.
Numbers29:4 mouz dauh ba'gi yungh dorn
Numbers29:5 yaac oix zuqc longc dauh yungh gouv ziec weic fiqv meih mbuo nyei zuiz.
Numbers29:6 Corc oix zuqc aengx maaih mouz hlaax bieqc siang-hlaax fongc horc buov ziec nyei caux jienv yietc njiec ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Yaac maaih ziux leiz-nyeic hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv yietc njiec fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers29:7 “+‘Cietv hlaax saeng-ziepc wuov hnoi
Numbers29:8 Oix zuqc dorh ga'naaiv mingh buov ziec bun Ziouv weic zoux ndaang nyei qiex. Oix zuqc dorh dauh ngongh gouv caan
Numbers29:9 Ngongh gouv oix zuqc maaih juqv morqv bienx mbuonv-muonc zorpc jienv ga'lanv youh zoux ziec nyei laangh ziqc. Ba'gi yungh gouv oix zuqc maaih biei morqv bienx.
Numbers29:10 Siec dauh yungh dorn
Numbers29:11 Aengx ganh longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Naaiv se tipv dauh ziec fiqv zuiz nyei yungh gouv. Corc aengx maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv yietc njiec ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:12 “+‘Cietv hlaax
Numbers29:13 Yaac oix zuqc dorh ga'naaiv longc douz buov ziec fongc horc
Numbers29:14 Ziepc faam dauh ngongh gouv
Numbers29:15 Wuov deix ziepc feix dauh ba'gi yungh dorn
Numbers29:16 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec weic fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov nyei caux jienv yietc njiec ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:17 “+‘Zipv nyei da'nyeic hnoi
Numbers29:18 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:19 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:20 “+‘Zipv nyei da'faam hnoi
Numbers29:21 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:22 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:23 “+‘Zipv nyei da'feix hnoi
Numbers29:24 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:25 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:26 “+‘Zipv nyei da'hmz hnoi
Numbers29:27 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:28 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:29 “+‘Zipv nyei da'luoqc hnoi
Numbers29:30 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:31 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:32 “+‘Zipv nyei da'cietv hnoi
Numbers29:33 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:34 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:35 “+‘Zipv nyei da'betv hnoi
Numbers29:36 Oix zuqc fongc horc longc douz buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers29:37 Ngongh gouv
Numbers29:38 Aengx longc dauh yungh gouv ziec fiqv zuiz. Corc maaih hnoi-hnoi buov ziec nyei caux jienv yietc njiec ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei a'ngunc diuv.
Numbers29:39 “+‘Ziux dingc daaih nyei zipv oix zuqc longc naaiv deix ga'naaiv ziec bun Ziouv. Maaih buov ziec nyei
Numbers29:40 Mose ziux Ziouv paaiv ninh nyei yietc zungv waac mbuox nzengc I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Numbers30:1 Mose gorngv mbuox fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv
Numbers30:2 Se gorngv haaix dauh laengz ngaengc waac bun Ziouv fai houv ganh zoux yietc nyungc
Numbers30:3 “Se gorngv haaix dauh sieqv corc yiem jienv ninh nyei die nyei biauv wuov zanc laengz ngaengc waac bun Ziouv fai houv ganh zoux yietc nyungc
Numbers30:4 ninh nyei die yietv haiz taux ninh laengz nyei fai houv nyei waac yaac maiv gorngv haaix nyungc
Numbers30:5 Mv baac se gorngv ninh nyei die yietv haiz wuov zanc laanh jienv
Numbers30:6 “Se gorngv sieqv maiv gaengh dorng jaa nyei ziangh hoc laengz ngaengc waac
Numbers30:7 ninh nyei nqox haiz ninh hnangv naaiv laengz yaac maiv gorngv haaix nyungc nor
Numbers30:8 Mv baac se gorngv ninh nyei nqox haiz nyei ziangh hoc laanh jienv
Numbers30:9 “Haaix dauh auv-guaav fai auv-leih laengz ngaengc waac fai houv ganh zoux yietc nyungc
Numbers30:10 “Se gorngv maaih jaa nyei m'sieqv dorn laengz ngaengc waac fai houv ganh zoux yietc nyungc
Numbers30:11 ninh nyei nqox haiz yaac maiv gorngv haaix nyungc
Numbers30:12 Mv baac se gorngv nqox yietv haiz ninh hnangv wuov nor laengz yaac laanh jienv
Numbers30:13 Maiv gunv auv laengz haaix nyungc fai houv ganh zoux yietc nyungc yaac zeiz
Numbers30:14 Mv baac se gorngv hnoi jiex hnoi nqox maiv gorngv haaix nyungc
Numbers30:15 Se gorngv nqox haiz liuz mv baac nqa'haav cingx daaih laanh jienv
Numbers30:16 Naaiv se Ziouv jiu bun Mose nyei leiz gorngv maiv maaih jaa nyei sieqv corc yiem die nyei biauv fai maaih jaa nyei m'sieqv dorn laengz ngaengc waac nyei jauv.
Numbers31:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers31:2 “Oix zuqc weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh jaauv win bun Mi^ndien Mienh
Numbers31:3 Mose ziouc gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
Numbers31:4 Fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers31:5 Hnangv naaic
Numbers31:6 Mose ziouc paaiv ninh mbuo cuotv mingh mborqv jaax
Numbers31:7 Ninh mbuo ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose nyei waac mborqv Mi^ndien Mienh
Numbers31:8 Yiem ninh mbuo daix nyei naaiv deix mienh
Numbers31:9 I^saa^laa^en Mienh zorqv Mi^ndien m'sieqv dorn caux fu'jueiv yaac guaatv nzengc Mi^ndien Mienh nyei saeng-kuv
Numbers31:10 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac buov nzengc Mi^ndien Mienh nyei zingh caux yietc zungv ndopv-liuh ciangv.
Numbers31:11 Ninh mbuo zorqv nzengc ninh mbuo caangv daaih luv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers31:12 dorh taux Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux I^saa^laa^en zuangx mienh nyei ndopv-liuh ciangv wuov
Numbers31:13 Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux zuangx mienh nyei bieiv zeiv cuotv ndopv-liuh ciangv mingh buangh ninh mbuo.
Numbers31:14 Mose qiex jiez haic naaiv deix mborqv jaax nzuonx daaih nyei baeng-bieiv
Numbers31:15 Mose naaic ninh mbuo
Numbers31:16 Se dongh naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn muangx Mbaa^laa^am nyei waac
Numbers31:17 Weic naaiv oix zuqc daix nzengc naaiv deix yietc zungv dorn caux bueix jiex m'jangc dorn nyei m'sieqv dorn.
Numbers31:18 Mv baac maiv bueix jiex m'jangc dorn wuov deix sieqv se liouh jienv weic meih mbuo ganh.
Numbers31:19 “Da'faanh daix mienh fai muoqv zuqc janx-daic wuov deix
Numbers31:20 Yaac oix zuqc saax deix-deix lui-houx caux yietc zungv longc ndopv
Numbers31:21 E^le^aa^saa sai mienh yaac mbuox mingh mborqv jaax nzuonx daaih nyei baeng
Numbers31:22 Jiem
Numbers31:23 da'faanh haih zuqc duqv douz nyei yietc zungv oix zuqc jiex douz
Numbers31:24 Taux da'cietv hnoi wuov hnoi oix zuqc nzox nzengc lui-houx
Numbers31:25 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers31:26 “Meih caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux baeqc fingx nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv oix zuqc saauv nzengc caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Numbers31:27 Oix zuqc bun nqoi zoux i gouv. Bun yietc gouv mingh mborqv jaax nyei baeng. Bun yietc gouv zuangx mienh.
Numbers31:28 Mingh mborqv jaax nyei baeng duqv nyei buonc
Numbers31:29 Yiem baeng nyei buonc maeqv cuotv naaiv deix
Numbers31:30 Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei buonc
Numbers31:31 Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh ziouc ei jienv Ziouv mbuox Mose nyei waac zoux.
Numbers31:32 Cih cuotv baeng ganh longc nyei
Numbers31:33 ngongh
Numbers31:34 lorh
Numbers31:35 maiv bueix jiex m'jangc dorn nyei sieqv
Numbers31:36 Mingh mborqv jaax nyei baeng duqv nyei buonc se hnangv naaiv. Ba'gi yungh
Numbers31:37 Fungx bun benx Ziouv nyei buonc maaih luoqc baeqv cietv ziepc hmz dauh.
Numbers31:38 Ngongh
Numbers31:39 Lorh
Numbers31:40 Mienh
Numbers31:41 Mose zorqv maeqv daaih fungx bun Ziouv nyei buonc jiu bun E^le^aa^saa sai mienh ziux Ziouv mbuox Mose nyei waac.
Numbers31:42 Mose zorqv mingh mborqv jaax caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv maeqv daaih bun yietc buonc I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Numbers31:43 Zuangx baeqc fingx duqv nyei buonc
Numbers31:44 ngongh
Numbers31:45 lorh
Numbers31:46 mienh
Numbers31:47 Ziux Ziouv nyei waac
Numbers31:48 Gunv baeng-guanh nyei zuangx baeng-bieiv
Numbers31:49 gorngv mbuox ninh
Numbers31:50 Yie mbuo gorqv-mienh ziouc dorh yie mbuo duqv daaih nyei jiem-siou-setv
Numbers31:51 Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh ziouc zipv ninh mbuo jiu bun nyei jiem
Numbers31:52 Gunv yietc cin dauh baeng caux yietc baeqv dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv jiu bun Mose caux E^le^aa^saa weih fongc horc bun Ziouv
Numbers31:53 (Naaiv deix mborqv jaax nyei baeng
Numbers31:54 Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh ziouc zipv gunv yietc cin dauh baeng caux yietc baeqv dauh baeng nyei bieiv jiu bun nyei jiem
Numbers32:1 Lu^mben Fingx caux Gaatc Fingx maaih ngongh
Numbers32:2 ziouc mingh mbuox Mose caux E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux baeqc fingx nyei bieiv zeiv
Numbers32:3 “ Ziouv tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh caangv daaih nyei deic-bung maaih Aa^taa^lotv Zingh
Numbers32:4 
Numbers32:5 Ninh mbuo aengx gorngv
Numbers32:6 Mose dau Gaatc Fingx caux Lu^mben Fingx
Numbers32:7 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc oix bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh hnyouv mau ziouc maiv jiex wuov ngaanc bieqc Ziouv ceix bun meih mbuo wuov norm deic-bung?
Numbers32:8 Zinh ndaangc yiem Kaa^ndetc Mbaanie wuov zanc
Numbers32:9 Mingh taux Etc^ko Horngz
Numbers32:10 Dongh wuov hnoi Ziouv qiex jiez haic ziouc houv jienv gorngv
Numbers32:11 ‘Da'faanh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv nyei mienh
Numbers32:12 Kungx maaih Kenatv Mienh
Numbers32:13 Ziouv ziouc qiex jiez haic I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers32:14 “Ih zanc mangc gaax! Meih mbuo nzipc jienv meih mbuo nyei die benx ganh baan zuiz-mienh
Numbers32:15 Se gorngv meih mbuo huin nqaang
Numbers32:16 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh fatv deix Mose yaac gorngv
Numbers32:17 Yie mbuo ganh aeqv
Numbers32:18 Yie mbuo maiv nzuonx biauv
Numbers32:19 Yie mbuo maiv caux ninh mbuo yiem wuov bung Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nzipc haaix nyungc weic zuqc yie mbuo duqv nzipc nyei buonc se yiem naaiv bung Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx.”
Numbers32:20 Mose ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Numbers32:21 meih mbuo yietc zungv dorh wuoqc ginc nyei mienh yaac yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih zuov Ziouv zunc ninh nyei win-wangv tuix cuotv
Numbers32:22 wuov norm deic-bung yaac guei nzengc Ziouv
Numbers32:23 “Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo maiv ei jienv meih mbuo laengz nyei waac zoux
Numbers32:24 Gunv ceix zingh weic meih mbuo nyei auv-jueiv yaac zoux laatc wuonx jienv meih mbuo nyei yungh caux ba'gi yungh. Mv baac oix zuqc ei jienv meih mbuo laengz liuz nyei waac zoux.”
Numbers32:25 Gaatc Fingx caux Lu^mben Fingx nyei mienh gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers32:26 Yie mbuo nyei auv-jueiv
Numbers32:27 Mv baac yie mbuo
Numbers32:28 Mose weic naaiv deix mienh paaiv waac mbuox E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux Nun nyei dorn
Numbers32:29 Ninh gorngv
Numbers32:30 Mv baac se gorngv ninh mbuo maiv dorh wuoqc ginc caux jienv meih mbuo jiex wuov ngaanc
Numbers32:31 Gaatc caux Lu^mben Mienh dau
Numbers32:32 Yie mbuo oix dorh wuoqc ginc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien bieqc Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung
Numbers32:33 Mose ziouc jiu naaiv deix deic-bung bun Gaatc Fingx caux Lu^mben Fingx aengx caux Yosepv nyei dorn
Numbers32:34 Gaatc Fingx aengx ceix Ndi^mbon Zingh
Numbers32:35 Atc^lotv Sofaan
Numbers32:36 Mbetc Nimlaa caux Mbetc Haalaan
Numbers32:37 Lu^mben Fingx aengx ganh ceix jiez Hetv^mbon Zingh
Numbers32:38 yaac ganh ceix jiez Ne^mbo caux Mbaa^an Me^on
Numbers32:39 Maa^natv^se nyei dorn
Numbers32:40 Mose ziouc zorqv Gi^le^aatc Deic bun Maa^natv^se nyei zeiv-fun
Numbers32:41 Maa^natv^se nyei zeiv-fun
Numbers32:42 No^mbaa caangv Kenaatv caux weih gormx nyei laangz
Numbers33:1 Naaiv se I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei guanh yiem Mose caux Aalon nyei buoz-ndiev cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
Numbers33:2 Ziux Ziouv paaiv nyei waac
Numbers33:3 Zih hlaax
Numbers33:4 Wuov zanc I^yipv Mienh deng jienv biopv ninh mbuo nyei zuangx dorn-la'gauv. Naaiv se Ziouv yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx daix wuov deix
Numbers33:5 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv Laa^maa^setc suiv mingh corng ndopv-liuh ciangv yiem Sukc^kotv.
Numbers33:6 Ninh mbuo cuotv Sukc^kotv aengx suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei ga'hlen
Numbers33:7 Ninh mbuo cuotv Etaam
Numbers33:8 Ninh mbuo cuotv Bi Haa^hi^lotv yangh koiv mbu'ndongx jiex taux deic-bung-huaang
Numbers33:9 Ninh mbuo cuotv Maalaa suiv mingh taux Elim liepc ciangv. Yiem naaic maaih ziepc nyeic norm wuom-zingv caux cietv ziepc zungh daau.
Numbers33:10 Yiem Elim suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Koiv-Siqv hlen.
Numbers33:11 Yiem Koiv-Siqv hlen suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Sinx Deic-Bung-Huaang.
Numbers33:12 Yiem Sinx Deic-Bung-Huaang suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Ndo^faa^kaa.
Numbers33:13 Yiem Ndo^faa^kaa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Aalutv.
Numbers33:14 Yiem Aalutv suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Le^fi^ndim. Yiem wuov maiv maaih wuom bun baeqc fingx hopv.
Numbers33:15 Yiem Le^fi^ndim suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Sinaai Deic-Bung-Huaang.
Numbers33:16 Yiem Sinaai Deic-Bung-Huaang suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Kipc^lotv Hatc^daa^aa^waa.
Numbers33:17 Yiem Kipc^lotv Hatc^daa^aa^waa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Haa^se^lotv.
Numbers33:18 Yiem Haa^se^lotv suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Litv^maa.
Numbers33:19 Yiem Litv^maa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Limmon Beletv.
Numbers33:20 Yiem Limmon Beletv suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Lipv^naa.
Numbers33:21 Yiem Lipv^naa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Litv^saax.
Numbers33:22 Yiem Litv^saax suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Ke^he^laa^taa.
Numbers33:23 Yiem Ke^he^laa^taa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Sefe Mbong.
Numbers33:24 Yiem Sefe Mbong suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Haa^laa^ndaa.
Numbers33:25 Yiem Haa^laa^ndaa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Makv^he^lotv.
Numbers33:26 Yiem Makv^he^lotv suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Taa^hatc.
Numbers33:27 Yiem Taa^hatc suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Telaa.
Numbers33:28 Yiem Telaa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Mitv^kaa.
Numbers33:29 Yiem Mitv^kaa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Hatv^mo^naa.
Numbers33:30 Yiem Hatv^mo^naa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Mo^se^lotv.
Numbers33:31 Yiem Mo^se^lotv suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Mbe^ne Yaa^aa^kan.
Numbers33:32 Yiem Mbe^ne Yaa^aa^kan suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Ho Hakv^gitc^gaatc.
Numbers33:33 Yiem Ho Hakv^gitc^gaatc suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Yotv^mbaa^taa.
Numbers33:34 Yiem Yotv^mbaa^taa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Apc^lo^naa.
Numbers33:35 Yiem Apc^lo^naa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem E^si^on Ge^mbe.
Numbers33:36 Yiem E^si^on Ge^mbe suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Sin Deic-Bung-Huaang
Numbers33:37 Yiem Kaa^ndetc suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Ho^aa Mbong
Numbers33:38 Aalon sai mienh ziux Ziouv nyei waac faaux Ho^aa Mbong
Numbers33:39 Aalon yiem Ho^aa Mbong guei seix wuov zanc
Numbers33:40 Kaa^naa^an Mienh
Numbers33:41 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Ho^aa Mbong suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Sanx^mo^naa.
Numbers33:42 Yiem Sanx^mo^naa suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Bunon.
Numbers33:43 Yiem Bunon suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem O^mbotc.
Numbers33:44 Yiem O^mbotc suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem I^ye Aa^mbaa^lim
Numbers33:45 Yiem I^ye Aa^mbaa^lim suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Ndi^mbon Gaatc.
Numbers33:46 Yiem Ndi^mbon Gaatc suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Anmon Ndipc^laa^taa^im.
Numbers33:47 Yiem Anmon Ndipc^laa^taa^im suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Aa^mbaa^lim Mbong
Numbers33:48 Yiem Aa^mbaa^lim Mbong suiv mingh liepc ciangv yiem Mo^apc ndau-baengh
Numbers33:49 Ninh mbuo corng ndopv-liuh zueih Jor^ndaen Ndaaih hlen yiem Mbetc Ye^si^motv mingh taux Aa^mben Sitv^tim.
Numbers33:50 Yiem Mo^apc ndau-baengh
Numbers33:51 oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers33:52 oix zuqc zunc yiem wuov nyei buonv-deic mienh cuotv nzengc
Numbers33:53 Gunv bieqc mingh longc naaiv norm deic-bung liepc meih mbuo nyei nguaaz-gorn
Numbers33:54 Oix zuqc ziux meih mbuo nyei fingx dingc maengc mangc
Numbers33:55 “Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv zunc buonv-deic mienh cuotv
Numbers33:56 Yie ziouc zoux bun meih mbuo hnangv yie dingc zoux bun ninh mbuo nor.”
Numbers34:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers34:2 “Oix zuqc mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers34:3 “+‘Naamh bung nyei gapv-jaaix se yangh Sin Deic-Bung-Huaang
Numbers34:4 aengx huing mingh naamh bung taux Aakc^lapv^mbim Zorng
Numbers34:5 Yiem Atc^mon ziouc huing mingh taux I^yipv Ndoqv aengx cuotv mingh taux Me^ndi^de^le^nien Koiv.
Numbers34:6 “+‘Fai bung nyei gapv-jaaix se Me^ndi^de^le^nien Koiv. Naaiv se meih mbuo fai bung nyei gapv-jaaix.
Numbers34:7 “+‘Baqv bung nyei gapv-jaaix oix zuqc yiem Me^ndi^de^le^nien Koiv baeng zaqc nyei mingh Ho^aa Mbong.
Numbers34:8 Yiem Ho^aa Mbong mingh taux bieqc Haamatv nyei jauv. Aengx jiex taux Se^ndatc
Numbers34:9 mingh taux Sifon
Numbers34:10 “+‘Dong bung nyei gapv-jaaix oix zuqc yiem Haa^saa^le^nan
Numbers34:11 Yiem Sefaam gapv-jaaix ziouc njiec taux Lipv^laa Zingh
Numbers34:12 Gapv-jaaix ziouc yiem naaic gan Jor^ndaen Ndaaih njiec
Numbers34:13 Mose mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers34:14 weic zuqc Lu^mben Fingx caux Gaatc Fingx caux Maa^natv^se nyei ndaamv-fingx
Numbers34:15 Naaiv deix i fingx caux ndaamv-fingx duqv nzipc nyei buonc yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx
Numbers34:16 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers34:17 “Tengx meih paaiv ndau bun baeqc fingx nzipc wuov deix mienh nyei mbuox maaih hnangv naaiv. Maaih E^le^aa^saa sai mienh
Numbers34:18 Yaac oix zuqc paaiv yietc fingx yietc dauh bieiv zeiv tengx jienv.
Numbers34:19 Naaiv deix bieiv zeiv nyei mbuox maaih hnangv naaiv. Yu^ndaa Fingx Ye^fun^ne nyei dorn
Numbers34:20 Si^me^on Fingx Am^mi^hutv nyei dorn
Numbers34:21 Mben^yaa^min Fingx Qitv^lon nyei dorn
Numbers34:22 Ndaan Fingx Yokv^li nyei dorn
Numbers34:23 Maa^natv^se Fingx Efotv nyei dorn
Numbers34:24 E^faa^im Fingx Sipv^taan nyei dorn
Numbers34:25 Se^mbu^lun Fingx Baanaakv nyei dorn
Numbers34:26 Itc^saax^kaa Fingx Atc^saan nyei dorn
Numbers34:27 Aa^se Fingx Se^lo^mi nyei dorn
Numbers34:28 Napv^taa^li Fingx Am^mi^hutv nyei dorn
Numbers34:29 Naaiv se Ziouv paaiv tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung bun nqoi ninh mbuo nzipc nyei ndau.
Numbers35:1 Yiem Mo^apc ndau-baengh
Numbers35:2 “Oix zuqc paaiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem ninh mbuo duqv nzipc nyei ndau zorqv deix zingh jiu bun Lewi Mienh yiem. Yaac oix zuqc bun deix huing gormx zingh nyei miev-ciangv.
Numbers35:3 Hnangv naaiv Lewi Mienh ziouc maaih zingh yiem yaac maaih miev-ciangv yungz ninh mbuo nyei ngongh
Numbers35:4 “Jiu bun Lewi Mienh wuov deix zingh oix zuqc maaih miev-ciangv yiem bung-bung zingh laatc cuotv mingh yietc cin ndorqc go.
Numbers35:5 Zingh ga'nyiec oix zuqc ndorqc dong bung i cin ndorqc
Numbers35:6 “Meih mbuo bun Lewi Mienh nyei zingh oix zuqc ganh ca'lengc bun juqv norm weic zoux siex maengc zingh
Numbers35:7 Jiu bun Lewi Mienh nyei zingh yietc zungv maaih feix ziepc betv norm
Numbers35:8 Ziux fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nzipc nyei buonc oix zuqc maeqv deix bun Lewi Mienh. Haaix fingx duqv camv oix zuqc bun camv. Haaix fingx duqv zoqc oix zuqc bun zoqc.”
Numbers35:9 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Mose
Numbers35:10 “Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Numbers35:11 oix zuqc ginv deix zingh zoux meih mbuo siex maengc zingh weic bun caqv-bouc daix mienh nyei mienh biaux mingh yiem wuov.
Numbers35:12 Naaiv deix zingh se zoux siex maengc nyei dorngx bun daix mienh nyei mienh biaux jaauv mienh maengc win nyei mienh
Numbers35:13 Meih mbuo bun nyei naaiv deix juqv norm zingh oix zuqc zoux siex maengc zingh.
Numbers35:14 Yiem naaiv Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung oix zuqc zorqv cuotv buo norm. Yiem Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung aengx zorqv cuotv buo norm.
Numbers35:15 Naaiv deix juqv norm zingh ziouc zoux siex maengc nyei dorngx weic bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh fai ganh fingx mienh
Numbers35:16 “+‘Se gorngv maaih haaix dauh longc hlieqv zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv mborqv mienh
Numbers35:17 Fai se gorngv haaix dauh longc haih mborqv mienh daic nyei la'bieiv zong mienh
Numbers35:18 Fai se gorngv haaix dauh longc haih mborqv mienh daic nyei ndiangx-jaa-sic mborqv mienh
Numbers35:19 Jaauv mienh maengc win wuov dauh ganh oix zuqc daix dongh daix mienh wuov dauh. Haaix zanc buatc ziouc daix ninh aqv.
Numbers35:20 Haaix dauh hanc mienh ziouc fongv ninh fai baac-baac longc ga'naaiv zoi ninh
Numbers35:21 fai laaix maaih win longc buoz-juonh mborqv mienh
Numbers35:22 “+‘Haaix dauh maiv hanc mienh mv baac caqv-bouc fongv zuqc fai zoi ga'naaiv zong zuqc mienh
Numbers35:23 fai mangc maiv buatc mienh ziouc bungx haih mborqv duqv mienh daic nyei la'bieiv aengx mborqv zuqc mienh
Numbers35:24 gapv zunv nyei mienh oix zuqc yiem daix mienh daic wuov dauh caux jaauv mienh maengc win wuov dauh mbu'ndongx ziux naaiv deix leiz siemv.
Numbers35:25 Gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh oix zuqc njoux daix mienh wuov dauh biaux ndutv jaauv mienh maengc win wuov dauh nyei buoz-ndiev
Numbers35:26 “+‘Mv baac se gorngv daix mienh wuov dauh
Numbers35:27 jaauv mienh maengc win wuov dauh buatc ninh yiem zingh ga'nyiec ziouc daix
Numbers35:28 Daix mienh nyei mienh oix zuqc yiem ninh nyei siex maengc zingh zuov domh sai mienh guei seix
Numbers35:29 “+‘Maiv gunv yiem haaix
Numbers35:30 “+‘Haaix dauh daix mienh oix zuqc maaih i ziex dauh zoux zorng-zengx cingx daix duqv wuov dauh daix mienh nyei mienh. Kungx maaih nduqc dauh zoux zorng-zengx hnangv
Numbers35:31 “+‘Laaix daix mienh dorngc zuiz zic duqv daic nyei mienh
Numbers35:32 “+‘Yaac maiv dungx zipv biaux mingh yiem siex maengc zingh nyei mienh oix zuoqc maengc nyei nyaanh weic bun ninh duqv nzuonx ganh nyei biauv
Numbers35:33 “+‘Maiv dungx bun meih mbuo yiem nyei deic-bung maaih uix. Laaix daix mienh
Numbers35:34 Maiv dungx bun meih mbuo yiem jienv nyei deic-bung maaih uix. Se yie yiem nyei dorngx

Numbers36:2 Ninh mbuo gorngv

Numbers36:6 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor paaiv Se^lo^fe^hatc nyei zuangx sieqv. Ninh mbuo sueih binc caux haaix dauh dorng jaa yaac duqv
Numbers36:7 Hnangv naaic

Deuteronomy1:1 Mose gorngv naaiv deix waac mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh wuov zanc
Deuteronomy1:2 Yiem Holepv Mbong gan Se^i Mbong mingh Kaa^ndetc Mbaanie se ziepc yietv hnoi nyei jauv-dingh.
Deuteronomy1:3 Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
Deuteronomy1:4 Wuov zanc ninh mborqv hingh yiem Hetv^mbon Zingh
Deuteronomy1:5 Mose yiem Mo^apc Deic
Deuteronomy1:6 Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:7 Oix zuqc caeqv ciangv hungx jienv Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei mbong-aiv dorngx caux huin nzuonx Aa^laa^mbaa Deic wuov deix mienh nyei norm-norm dorngx
Deuteronomy1:8 Mangc maah! Yie zorqv naaiv norm deic-bung jiu bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo gunv bieqc mingh yiem aqv. Se yie
Deuteronomy1:9 Mbuo corc yiem Holepv Mbong wuov zanc yie mbuox meih mbuo
Deuteronomy1:10 Ih zanc Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:11 Tov Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:12 Meih mbuo maaih la'nyauv nyei sic
Deuteronomy1:13 Oix zuqc yiem meih mbuo nyei fingx-fingx ginv cuotv maaih cong-mengh
Deuteronomy1:14 Meih mbuo dau yie
Deuteronomy1:15 Yie ziouc zorqv yiem fingx-fingx zoux hlo nyei mienh
Deuteronomy1:16 Wuov zanc yie aengx kuinx meih mbuo nyei mbenc sic jien
Deuteronomy1:17 Siemv nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien. Oix zuqc zaah zoux hlo zoux faix nyei fih hnangv nzengc. Yaac maiv dungx gamh nziex haaix dauh mienh weic zuqc siemv mienh se guei Tin-Hungh. Haaix deix sic meih mbuo haiz aqc duqv dunx
Deuteronomy1:18 Wuov zanc yie yaac zorqv meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc sic mbuox meih mbuo.
Deuteronomy1:19 Mbuo ziouc ziux Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:20 Yie aengx mbuox meih mbuo
Deuteronomy1:21 Mangc maah! Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:22 Meih mbuo yietc zungv ziouc daaih mbuox yie
Deuteronomy1:23 Hnangv naaiv zoux yie haiz horpc nyei
Deuteronomy1:24 Ninh mbuo ziouc cuotv jauv yangh mbong mingh taux Etc^ko Horngz zaah wuov deix ndau.
Deuteronomy1:25 Ninh mbuo dorh deix wuov norm deic-bung nyei biouv daaih bun mbuo yaac mbuox mbuo
Deuteronomy1:26 Mv baac meih mbuo ngaengc jienv Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:27 Yiem meih mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh meih mbuo ngopv jienv gorngv
Deuteronomy1:28 Mbuo maiv haih mingh haaix. Mbuo nyei gorx-youz zungv bun mbuo nyei mba'nziu yuqc nzengc mi'aqv. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo gorngv
Deuteronomy1:29 Yie ziouc mbuox meih mbuo
Deuteronomy1:30 Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:31 Yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang meih mbuo buatc Ziouv
Deuteronomy1:32 Mv baac maiv gunv yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Deuteronomy1:33 dongh yiem jauv zaangc mingh ndaangc meih mbuo wuov dauh. Lungh muonz zanc ninh yiem douz gu'nyuoz
Deuteronomy1:34 Ziouv muangx haiz meih mbuo ngopv nyei waac ziouc qiex jiez! haic
Deuteronomy1:35 “Naaiv doic waaic haic nyei mienh liemh yietc dauh maiv duqv buatc yie laengz bun meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix wuov norm longx haic nyei deic-bung.
Deuteronomy1:36 Kungx maaih Ye^fun^ne nyei dorn
Deuteronomy1:37 Laaix meih mbuo
Deuteronomy1:38 Mv baac meih nyei borng-buoz mienh
Deuteronomy1:39 Liemh meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv-faix
Deuteronomy1:40 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc daaux sin hungx jienv deic-bung-huaang
Deuteronomy1:41 Wuov zanc meih mbuo dau
Deuteronomy1:42 Mv baac Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie
Deuteronomy1:43 Yie ziouc mbuox meih mbuo mv baac meih mbuo maiv kangv muangx. Meih mbuo ngaengc jienv Ziouv hatc nyei waac
Deuteronomy1:44 Yiem wuov mbong nyei Aa^mo^lai Mienh cuotv daaih mborqv meih mbuo
Deuteronomy1:45 Meih mbuo ziouc nzuonx daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien nyiemv. Ziouv yaac hnangv maiv haiz nor

Deuteronomy2:1 Yiem gau
Deuteronomy2:2 Zoux gau
Deuteronomy2:3 “Meih mbuo youh mingh youh daaih yiem naaiv mbong zaangc nyei dorngx lauh aqv
Deuteronomy2:4 Oix zuqc mbuox baeqc fingx
Deuteronomy2:5 Maiv dungx caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo nyei ndau
Deuteronomy2:6 Meih mbuo oix zuqc longc nyaanh tengx ninh mbuo maaiz ga'naaiv nyanc
Deuteronomy2:7 Ziouv
Deuteronomy2:8 Mbuo ziouc jiex mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Deuteronomy2:9 Ziouv aengx mbuox yie
Deuteronomy2:10 (Zinh ndaangc maaih Emim Mienh yiem wuov norm dorngx
Deuteronomy2:11 Naaiv deix Emim Mienh yaac hnangv Aanaakv Mienh nor. Mienh funx ninh mbuo zoux Le^faa^im Mienh
Deuteronomy2:12 Zinh ndaangc Holi Mienh yiem Se^i Deic mv baac Esaau nyei zeiv-fun zunc ninh mbuo cuotv
Deuteronomy2:13 Ziouv gorngv
Deuteronomy2:14 Yiem mbuo cuotv Kaa^ndetc Mbaanie taux jiex liuz Zeletv Horngz longc ziangh hoc faah ziepc betv hnyangx
Deuteronomy2:15 Se Ziouv ganh zoux bun naaiv deix yiem ciangv nyei mienh taux ninh mbuo zuqc mietc nzengc.
Deuteronomy2:16 Hnangv naaic
Deuteronomy2:17 nqa'haav Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie
Deuteronomy2:18 “Ih hnoi meih mbuo oix zuqc yangh Aan Zingh jiex Mo^apc nyei gapv-jaaix.
Deuteronomy2:19 Meih mbuo jiex taux Ammon Mienh nyei deic maiv dungx cuoqv ninh mbuo yaac maiv dungx caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax weic zuqc yie maiv zorqv yietc deix Ammon Mienh nyei ndau bun meih mbuo. Naaiv norm deic-bung yie jiu bun Lotv nyei zeiv-fun benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc mi'aqv.”
Deuteronomy2:20 (Naaiv norm deic-bung se funx benx Le^faa^im Mienh nyei deic-bung weic zuqc zinh ndaangc ninh mbuo yiem jiex
Deuteronomy2:21 Ninh mbuo zoux yietc fingx camv nyei
Deuteronomy2:22 Ziouv yaac fih hnangv nyei yiem Esaau nyei zeiv-fun nyei wuov ndaangc maengx mietc Holi Mienh. Esaau nyei zeiv-fun ziouc nzaeng duqv wuov norm deic-bung yiem njiec taux ih jaax hnoi.

Deuteronomy17:6 Oix zuqc maaih i buo dauh zorng-zengx mienh zoux zorng-zengx cingx dingc ninh nyei zuiz zuqc daic. Kungx maaih nduqc dauh zoux zorng-zengx hnangv
Deuteronomy17:7 Zoux zorng-zengx nyei mienh oix zuqc njiec buoz zong ninh ndaangc. Nqa'haav zuangx mienh tengx jienv zong. Hnangv naaic ziouc bun yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei orqv sic zutc nzengc.

Deuteronomy18:1 Zoux sai nyei Lewi Mienh caux Lewi Fingx nyei yietc zungv mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh gu'nyuoz maiv maaih ninh mbuo nyei buonc yaac maiv duqv nzipc haaix nyungc. Ninh mbuo nyanc nyei
Deuteronomy18:2 Ninh mbuo maiv duqv caux ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz maaih nzipc nyei buonc. Ziouv benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc hnangv ninh caux ninh mbuo laengz jiex nyei waac nor.

Deuteronomy19:11 Mv baac se gorngv maaih dauh mienh nzorng caux ninh juangc laangz mienh ziouc bingx jienv zuov mborqv daic ninh

Deuteronomy19:13 Meih mbuo maiv dungx korv-lienh ninh. Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx oix zuqc bun maiv maaih daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh nyei sic

Deuteronomy19:18 Siemv zuiz jien ziouc longx-longx nyei zaah muonc ninh mbuo nyei sic. Se gorngv zaah cuotv zorng-zengx mienh gorngv-baeqc
Deuteronomy19:19 oix zuqc zoux bun ninh hnangv ninh jiez hnyouv zoux bun ninh nyei gorx-youz nor. Oix zuqc bun naaiv deix orqv sic yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zutc nzengc.

Deuteronomy21:3 Yiem nitv janx-daic gauh fatv wuov norm zingh nyei mienh gox oix zuqc dorh dauh maiv gaengh zoux jiex gong yaac maiv gaaz jiex ndiangx-gaaz nyei ngongh zeic
Deuteronomy21:4 mingh taux norm horngz. Wuov norm horngz mienh maiv laih jiex ndau fai zuangx jiex ga'naaiv yaac maaih ndoqv

Deuteronomy21:12 gunv dorh ninh mingh meih nyei biauv. Bun ninh teix nzengc mba'biei aengx japv buoz-ndoqv-nquaiz
Deuteronomy21:13 yienc nqoi zuqc caangv daaih wuov zanc zuqv jienv nyei lui-houx
Deuteronomy21:14 Hoz daaih se gorngv maiv buangv hnyouv ninh
Deuteronomy21:15 Se gorngv mienh maaih i dauh auv
