Deuteronomy21:17 Ninh oix zuqc bun sung-gouv ga'naaiv dongh ninh maiv hnamv wuov dauh auv nyei dorn weic nyiemc ninh zoux dorn-la'gauv. Naaiv dauh zoux ninh nyei daauh dauh dorn. Zoux dorn-la'gauv duqv sung-gouv nyei leiz benx ninh nyei.
Deuteronomy21:18 Haaix dauh maaih dorn
Deuteronomy21:19 ninh nyei diex maac oix zuqc zorqv ninh dorh mingh taux ganh nyei buonv-zingh gaengh ndaangc

Deuteronomy21:21 Wuov norm zingh nyei zuangx m'jangc dorn ziouc longc la'bieiv zong daic ninh. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo ziouc bun yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maiv maaih naaiv nyungc orqv sic. I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh haiz naaiv deix sic ziouc gamh nziex haic.

Deuteronomy22:1 Se gorngv buatc meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz nyei ngongh fai ba'gi yungh dorngc jauv wuov naah
Deuteronomy22:2 Se gorngv wuov dauh gorx-youz leih meih mbuo go
Deuteronomy22:3 Gorx-youz nyei lorh fai ninh nyei lui fai ninh nyei haaix nyungc ga'naaiv oix zuqc fih hnangv nyei fungx nzuonx. Maiv dungx zoux hnangv maiv guen maiv sic nyei.
Deuteronomy22:4 Se gorngv buatc gorx-youz nyei lorh fai ngongh ndorpc wuov jauv
Deuteronomy22:5 M'sieqv dorn maiv dungx zuqv m'jangc dorn nyei lui-houx. M'jangc dorn yaac maiv dungx zuqv m'sieqv dorn nyei lui-houx. Ziouv
Deuteronomy22:6 Se gorngv buatc norqc lauz yiem wuov jauv-hlen
Deuteronomy22:7 Zungv oix zuqc bungx norqc maa
Deuteronomy22:8 Meih mbuo haaix zanc zoux siang-biauv oix zuqc weih jienv biauv-ngorh nyei biei bung hlang deix. Se gorngv mienh ndortv daic
Deuteronomy22:9 Maiv dungx zorqv ganh nyungc nyim zuangx meih mbuo nyei a'ngunc huingx. Se gorngv hnangv naaiv zoux
Deuteronomy22:10 Maiv dungx longc ngongh caux lorh juangc ndiangx-gaaz ndaam laih ndau.
Deuteronomy22:11 Maiv dungx zuqv ba'gi yungh biei caux la'maah suix zorpc jienv ndatv daaih nyei lui.
Deuteronomy22:12 Meih mbuo zuqv nyei domh lui-ndaauv
Deuteronomy22:13 Se gorngv maaih dauh mienh longc auv yaac caux ninh bueix
Deuteronomy22:14 ziouc lorz jauv gorngv doqc baaic auv nyei mengh dauh. Ninh gorngv
Deuteronomy22:15 Sieqv nyei diex maac ziouc oix zuqc dorh nyungc jangx-hoc cuotv daaih mingh taux zingh gaengh ndaangc
Deuteronomy22:16 Sieqv nyei die ziouc gorngv mbuox mienh gox
Deuteronomy22:17 Ninh zungv gorngv doqc yie nyei sieqv. Ninh gorngv
Deuteronomy22:18 Wuov norm zingh nyei mienh gox ziouc zorqv wuov dauh nqox daaih longc biaav-bin mborqv
Deuteronomy22:19 aengx baatc ninh nyic ziepc luoqc lungz nyaanh jiu bun sieqv nyei die
Deuteronomy22:20 Mv baac se gorngv ninh gox nyei waac zien nyei
Deuteronomy22:21 ninh mbuo ziouc dorh naaiv dauh sieqv cuotv daaih yiem ninh nyei die nyei biauv nyei gaengh ndaangc. Wuov norm zingh nyei zuangx m'jangc dorn ziouc zorqv la'bieiv zong daic
Deuteronomy22:22 Se gorngv buatc dauh mienh hienx ganh dauh mienh nyei auv
Deuteronomy22:23 Se gorngv maaih dauh maiv nziaauc jiex dorn nyei sieqv
Deuteronomy22:24 meih mbuo oix zuqc dorh ninh mbuo i dauh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc zingh gaengh ndaangc aengx longc la'bieiv zong daic ninh mbuo. Wuov dauh sieqv zuqc daix daic weic zuqc ninh yiem zingh gu'nyuoz yaac maiv heuc mbui tov mienh daaih tengx. Wuov dauh m'jangc dorn daic weic zuqc ninh hienx ganh dauh mienh nyei auv. Hnangv naaiv zoux ziouc bun yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maiv maaih naaiv nyungc orqv sic.
Deuteronomy22:25 Mv baac se gorngv maaih dauh m'jangc dorn buangh zuqc dauh dongh mienh gorngv ziangh nyei sieqv yiem wuov naah ziouc zorqv jienv naaiv dauh sieqv caa
Deuteronomy22:26 Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc bun wuov dauh sieqv weic zuqc ninh maiv zoux haaix nyungc zuiz zic duqv daic. Naaiv nyungc sic se hnangv mienh baac-baac mingh mborqv daic dauh ninh nyei laangz zaangc mienh
Deuteronomy22:27 weic zuqc naaiv dauh m'jangc dorn yiem wuov naah buangh zuqc naaiv dauh dongh mienh gorngv ziangh nyei sieqv ziouc caa ninh. Maiv gunv sieqv qaqv heuc yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh daaih njoux ninh.
Deuteronomy22:28 Se gorngv maaih dauh m'jangc dorn buangh dauh maiv nziaauc jiex dorn yaac maiv maaih mienh gorngv ziangh nyei sieqv ziouc zorqv jienv ninh caa yaac maaih mienh buatc
Deuteronomy22:29 caa sieqv wuov dauh m'jangc dorn oix zuqc bun ziepc hmz lungz nyaanh sieqv nyei die weic zuqc ninh baaic wuov dauh sieqv. Sieqv ziouc benx ninh nyei auv mi'aqv. Ninh yietc liuz maiv haih leih guangc.
Deuteronomy22:30 Mienh maiv dungx longc die nyei auv zoux ganh nyei auv. Hnangv naaiv zoux baaic zuqc ganh nyei die.

Deuteronomy24:4 daauh dauh nqox

Deuteronomy24:11 Oix zuqc yiem ga'nyiec maengx zuov gaav meih mbuo nyei ga'naaiv wuov dauh mienh ganh dorh zoux dorngx-daauh nyei ga'naaiv cuotv daaih bun meih mbuo.
Deuteronomy24:12 Se gorngv wuov dauh mienh jomc haic
Deuteronomy24:13 Mba'hnoi muotv nyei ziangh hoc zungv oix zuqc fungx longc zoux dorngx-daauh nyei domh lui nzuonx weic bun ninh homc jienv bueix yaac buang waac bun meih mbuo. Ziux Ziouv
Deuteronomy24:14 Maiv dungx kuei cingv daaih nyei mienh jomc mienh caux dangx-donx nyei mienh
Deuteronomy24:15 Da'faanh zoux gong nyei hnoi
Deuteronomy24:16 Maiv dungx weic dorn-jueiv zoux nyei zuiz daix diex maac. Yaac maiv dungx weic diex maac zoux nyei zuiz daix dorn-jueiv. Gorqv-mienh oix zuqc weic gorqv-mienh nyei zuiz zuqc daic.
Deuteronomy24:17 Maiv dungx kuei ganh fingx mienh fai guh hanh fu'jueiv bun ninh mbuo maiv duqv baengh fim nyei buonc. Yaac maiv dungx zorqv auv-guaav nyei domh lui zoux dorngx-daauh.
Deuteronomy24:18 Jangx jienv meih mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung zoux jiex nouh
Deuteronomy24:19 Meih mbuo yiem ndeic gaatv mbiauh yaac la'kuqv mbiauh zeiv wuov ndeic
Deuteronomy24:20 Meih mbuo piuqv ga'lanv biouv
Deuteronomy24:21 Yiem a'ngunc huingx gaeqv liuz a'ngunc biouv
Deuteronomy24:22 Oix zuqc jangx jienv zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung zoux jiex nouh. Weic naaiv yie cingx hatc meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux.
Deuteronomy25:1 Se gorngv i dauh mienh maaih sic baeng taux sic dorngh
Deuteronomy25:2 Se gorngv maaih zuiz wuov dauh zic duqv mborqv
Deuteronomy25:3 Mv baac maiv dungx bun ninh zuqc mborqv gauh camv feix ziepc bin. Se gorngv mborqv jiex ndaangc soux mouc
Deuteronomy25:4 Ngongh linc mbiauh nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx dou ngongh nyei nzuih baengx.
Deuteronomy25:5 Se gorngv maaih i muoz-dorn juangc biauv yiem
Deuteronomy25:6 Ninh yungz duqv daauh dauh dorn oix zuqc nzipc daic wuov dauh gorx fai youz nyei mbuox weic maiv bun ninh nyei mbuox yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx zutc nzengc.
Deuteronomy25:7 Se gorngv daic mingh wuov dauh nqox nyei muoz-doic maiv kangv bun nzipc ninh nyei gorx fai youz nyei mbuox
Deuteronomy25:8 Wuov norm zingh nyei mienh gox ziouc heuc wuov dauh mienh daaih naaic ninh. Se gorngv ninh corc ngaengc jienv gorngv
Deuteronomy25:9 wuov dauh nyaam-guaav ziouc dorng jienv mienh gox mingh tutv ninh nyei youz nyei yietc jieqv heh
Deuteronomy25:10 Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx wuov buonc mienh ziouc duqv mbuox heuc “zuqc Tutv Heh nyei Hmuangv Doic.”
Deuteronomy25:11 Se gorngv maaih i dauh mienh mborqv jaax

Deuteronomy28:1 Se gorngv meih mbuo muangx longx Ziouv
Deuteronomy28:2 Se gorngv meih mbuo muangx Ziouv
Deuteronomy28:3 Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz meih mbuo oix duqv fuqv
Deuteronomy28:4 Ziouv oix ceix fuqv bun meih mbuo duqv fu'jueiv camv
Deuteronomy28:5 Ziouv oix ceix fuqv meih mbuo nyei hmeiv-ndaan caux meih mbuo longc zoux nyanc zoux hopv nyei jaa-dorngx.
Deuteronomy28:6 Meih mbuo cuotv yaac duqv fuqv
Deuteronomy28:7 Daaih mborqv meih mbuo wuov deix win-wangv
Deuteronomy28:8 Ziouv oix ceix fuqv meih mbuo zoux nyei yietc zungv sic
Deuteronomy28:9 Se gorngv meih mbuo ei jienv Ziouv

Deuteronomy28:11 Meih mbuo yiem Ziouv houv bun meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix oix bun meih mbuo nyei deic-bung
Deuteronomy28:12 Ziouv oix koi nqoi tin-fouv nyei koux
Deuteronomy28:13 Se gorngv meih mbuo ei jienv Ziouv
Deuteronomy28:14 Maiv dungx ngaengc yie ih hnoi hatc meih mbuo nyei haaix joux waac
Deuteronomy28:15 Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo maiv muangx Ziouv
Deuteronomy28:16 Meih mbuo yiem zingh gu'nyuoz oix zuqc zioux
Deuteronomy28:17 Meih mbuo nyei hmeiv-ndaan caux longc zoux nyanc hopv nyei jaa-dorngx oix zuqc zioux aqv.
Deuteronomy28:18 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zioux
Deuteronomy28:19 Bun meih mbuo cuotv yaac zuqc zioux
Deuteronomy28:20 Se gorngv meih mbuo zoux waaic
Deuteronomy28:21 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo zuqc domh wuon-baengc taux meih mbuo zuqc mietc nzengc
Deuteronomy28:22 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo butv baengc-ngaaiz
Deuteronomy28:23 Meih mbuo nyei m'nqorngv gu'nguaaic nyei lungh oix hnangv dongh yangh. Yiem meih mbuo nyei zaux ga'ndiev nyei ndau yaac hnangv hlieqv nor.
Deuteronomy28:24 Ziouv oix bun duih meih mbuo nyei deic-bung wuov deix mbiungc benx nie-mbung caux saa-ziou mbung yiem wuov lungh njiec daaih hoic meih mbuo taux meih mbuo zuqc mietc nzengc.
Deuteronomy28:25 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo yiem win-wangv nyei nza'hmien zuqc suei. Meih mbuo yangh yietc diuh jauv mingh mborqv ninh mbuo
Deuteronomy28:26 Ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc caux ga'ndiev ndau nyei hieh zoih oix daaih nyanc meih mbuo nyei sei
Deuteronomy28:27 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo ziangh zueih hnangv zinh ndaangc I^yipv Mienh ziangh wuov nor. Ninh yaac oix bun meih mbuo ziangh ga'naaiv
Deuteronomy28:28 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo butv ndin
Deuteronomy28:29 Lungh aanx zanc meih mbuo oix huaax jienv mingh hnangv m'zing maengh mienh yiem hmuangx nor. Meih mbuo zoux nyei diuh diuh jauv yaac maiv haih duqv longx. Meih mbuo zanc-zanc zuqc mienh hoic
Deuteronomy28:30 Meih mbuo gorngv ziangh auv mv baac ganh dauh mienh oix mingh bueix. Meih mbuo gomv siang-biauv mv baac maiv duqv yiem. Meih mbuo zoux huingx zuangx a'ngunc biouv yaac maiv duqv nyanc.
Deuteronomy28:31 Mienh oix zorqv meih mbuo nyei ngongh dorng jienv meih mbuo daix mv baac meih mbuo maiv duqv yietc deix ngongh nyei orv. Meih mbuo ganh nyei m'zing buatc jienv mienh caangv meih mbuo nyei lorh yaac maiv fungx nzuonx. Meih mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh zuqc fungx bun win-wangv yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh tengx meih mbuo.
Deuteronomy28:32 Meih mbuo nyei dorn
Deuteronomy28:33 Dongh meih mbuo maiv hiuv nyei mienh oix daaih nyanc meih mbuo ganh nyei ndau nyei ga'naaiv caux meih mbuo ganh ndortv qaqv zuangx nyei yietc zungv gaeng-zuangx. Meih mbuo zanc-zanc oix zuqc mienh hoic
Deuteronomy28:34 Meih mbuo nyei m'zing buatc nyei nyungc-nyungc sic ziouc zoux bun meih mbuo maiv nzang.
Deuteronomy28:35 Ziouv oix bun meih mbuo nyei cingh mborqc ziangh doqc haic
Deuteronomy28:36 Ziouv oix dorh meih mbuo caux meih mbuo liepc daaih gunv meih mbuo nyei hungh mingh taux dongh meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix maiv hiuv nyei guoqv. Yiem wuov meih mbuo ziouc zaangc ganh dauh zienh
Deuteronomy28:37 Yiem Ziouv dorh meih mbuo mingh yiem wuov deix norm-norm guoqv nyei mienh buatc meih mbuo buangh nyei sic
Deuteronomy28:38 Yiem wuov ndeic meih mbuo zuangx nyim camv
Deuteronomy28:39 Meih mbuo oix zoux huingx zuangx a'ngunc biouv fioux longx
Deuteronomy28:40 Yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung norm-norm dorngx maaih ga'lanv ndiangx mv baac meih mbuo maiv duqv ga'lanv youh longc weic zuqc ga'lanv biouv bioh nzengc mi'aqv.
Deuteronomy28:41 Meih mbuo yungz dorn yungz sieqv
Deuteronomy28:42 Yiem meih mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei ndiangx caux lingh deic nyei gaeng-zuangx zuqc jopv-nyeic nyanc nzengc.
Deuteronomy28:43 Yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei ganh fingx mienh oix gunv zoux gunv faaux hlang. Meih mbuo ganh gunv zoux gunv ndortv njiec aiv.
Deuteronomy28:44 Ninh mbuo ziouc maaih gaav bun meih mbuo longc
Deuteronomy28:45 Meih mbuo ziouc zuqc siouc naaiv deix yietc zungv zioux nyei waac taux meih mbuo zuqc mietc
Deuteronomy28:46 Naaiv deix zioux nyei waac yietc liuz zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic weic meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv
Deuteronomy28:47 weic zuqc meih mbuo bungx-zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo maiv njien-youh a'hneiv fu-sux Ziouv
Deuteronomy28:48 Weic naaiv
Deuteronomy28:49 Ziouv oix bun yiem wuov lungh gorn go nyei yietc fingx mienh daaih hnangv domh jaangv nor ndaix njiec siepv mborqv meih mbuo. Ninh mbuo nyei waac meih mbuo zungv maiv hiuv.
Deuteronomy28:50 Naaiv fingx mienh nyei hmien-mueic ciouv
Deuteronomy28:51 Ninh mbuo oix nyanc meih mbuo nyei saeng-kuv njiec daaih nyei dorn caux meih mbuo nyei ndau nyei gaeng-zuangx taux meih mbuo zuqc mietc. Meih mbuo nyei laangh ziqc
Deuteronomy28:52 Ninh mbuo oix weih gormx mborqv meih mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei norm-norm zingh taux meih mbuo kaux wuov deix wuonv haic
Deuteronomy28:53 Win-wangv weih jienv meih mbuo wuov zanc
Deuteronomy28:54 Yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx
Deuteronomy28:55 weic zuqc win-wangv daaih weih jienv meih mbuo nyei norm-norm zingh hoic meih mbuo zuqc siouc kouv
Deuteronomy28:56 Yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx
Deuteronomy28:57 Ninh zungv nyanc ninh ganh koqv hoqc yungz cuotv nyei gu'nguaaz-siqv caux muih. Laaix win-wangv weih jienv mborqv meih mbuo nyei zingh hoic meih mbuo zuqc siouc kouv
Deuteronomy28:58 Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei ei nzengc fiev jienv naaiv buonv sou nyei yietc zungv lingc

Deuteronomy30:10 Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux se gorngv meih mbuo muangx Ziouv
Deuteronomy30:11 Yie ih hnoi hatc meih mbuo nyei leiz-latc se maiv zeiz weic meih mbuo aqc jiex ndaangc
Deuteronomy30:12 Se maiv zeiz yiem gu'nguaaic lungh meih mbuo ziouc gorngv
Deuteronomy30:13 Naaiv deix leiz-latc yaac maiv zeiz yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv ziouc oix zuqc naaic
Deuteronomy30:14 Wuov deix leiz-latc caux meih mbuo yiem naaiv
Deuteronomy30:15 Mangc maah! Yie ih hnoi bun meih mbuo maaih qangx ginv oix maaih maengc ziangh fai daic
Deuteronomy30:16 Se gorngv meih mbuo ei jienv Ziouv
Deuteronomy30:17 Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo hnyouv ngaengc
Deuteronomy30:18 ih hnoi yie mengh mengh nyei zunh mbuox meih mbuo
Deuteronomy30:19 Yie ih hnoi heuc lungh caux ndau tengx meih mbuo zoux zorng-zengx
Deuteronomy30:20 yaac hnamv Ziouv
Deuteronomy31:1 Mose aengx gorngv naaiv deix yietc zungv waac mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh.
Deuteronomy31:2 Ninh gorngv
Deuteronomy31:3 Ziouv
Deuteronomy31:4 Ziouv oix zoux bun wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh hnangv ninh zoux bun Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei hungh
Deuteronomy31:5 Ziouv oix zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo oix zuqc ziux yie hatc meih mbuo nyei yietc zungv waac zoux bun ninh mbuo.
Deuteronomy31:6 Meih mbuo oix zuqc henv
Deuteronomy31:7 Mose heuc Yo^su^waa daaih dorng jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
Deuteronomy31:8 Ziouv ganh oix yiem meih nyei wuov ndaangc maengx. Ninh yietc liuz maiv bungx ndortv meih yaac maiv guangc meih. Maiv dungx gamh nziex yaac maiv dungx hnyouv huaang.”
Deuteronomy31:9 Mose ziouc fiev naaiv deix leiz-latc jiu bun Lewi sai mienh
Deuteronomy31:10 Mose hatc ninh mbuo

Deuteronomy31:13 Ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun

Deuteronomy31:16 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Mose
Deuteronomy31:17 Taux wuov hnoi yie ziouc qiex jiez haic ninh mbuo yaac guangc ninh mbuo. Yie oix buang jienv yie nyei hmien
Deuteronomy31:18 Taux wuov hnoi yie zungv oix buang jienv yie nyei hmien
Deuteronomy31:19 “Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc fiev naaiv diuh nzung njaaux I^saa^laa^en Mienh hoqc taux zuoqc weic bun yie longc zoux zorng-zengx gox ninh mbuo.
Deuteronomy31:20 Yie oix dorh ninh mbuo bieqc wuov norm ndau-touv longx nyei deic-bung
Deuteronomy31:21 Ninh mbuo zuqc ziex nyungc zeqc naanc caux ciouv nyei sic nyei ziangh hoc
Deuteronomy31:22 Dongh wuov hnoi Mose ziouc fiev naaiv diuh nzung daaih aengx njaaux I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Deuteronomy31:23 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor paaiv Nun nyei dorn
Deuteronomy31:24 Mose zorqv naaiv deix leiz-latc nyei waac yiem gorn taux setv mueiz fiev njiec sou nzengc mi'aqv.
Deuteronomy31:25 Ninh ziouc paaiv gaeng Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nyei Lewi Mienh.
Deuteronomy31:26 Ninh gorngv
Deuteronomy31:27 Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo ndongc haaix hnyouv ngaengc
Deuteronomy31:28 Oix zuqc heuc meih mbuo fingx-fingx nyei zuangx mienh gox caux meih mbuo nyei yietc zungv jien daaih gapv zunv. Yie ziouc gorngv naaiv deix waac bun ninh mbuo muangx yaac heuc lungh caux ndau zoux zorng-zengx gox ninh mbuo.
Deuteronomy31:29 Weic zuqc yie hiuv dingc
Deuteronomy31:30 Mose ziouc doqc dorng naaiv diuh nzung nyei waac bun I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh muangx.
Deuteronomy32:1 O lungh aac

Deuteronomy32:25 Yiem ga'nyiec maaih nzuqc ndaauv daix ninh mbuo. Yiem biauv gu'nyuoz yaac gamh nziex jienv. Dorn-lunx sieqv-lunx oix zuqc mietc
Deuteronomy32:26 Yie gorngv yie oix bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx
Deuteronomy32:27 Mv baac yie gamh nziex win-wangv bungx waac-maux
Deuteronomy32:28 I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv kangv ei jienv caangh laangh liuz nyei waac zoux
Deuteronomy32:29 Feix duqv ninh mbuo maaih cong-mengh
Deuteronomy32:30 Yietc laanh mienh hnangv haaix nor haih zunc duqv yietc cin laanh? I laanh hnangv haaix nor haih zunc yietc waanc laanh biaux? Cuotv liuz beu ninh mbuo wuov dauh Ziouv maaic ninh mbuo
Deuteronomy32:31 Yie mbuo nyei win-wangv hiuv duqv ganh nyei zienh maiv hnangv yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh.
Deuteronomy32:32 Win-wangv se hnangv So^ndom nyei a'ngunc hmei
Deuteronomy32:33 Ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc diuv se naang nyei ndie-doqc
Deuteronomy32:34 “Yie siou jienv win-wangv zoux nyei naaiv deix sic
Deuteronomy32:35 Jaauv win se yiem yie. Yie za'gengh jaauv aqv. Zuov ninh mbuo nyei zaux caaiv piatv ndorpc mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc taux fatv aqv. Zuqc mietc nyei ziangh hoc oix siepv-siepv nyei taux.”
Deuteronomy32:36 Ziouv buatc ninh nyei baeqc fingx nyei qaqv nzengc. Maiv zengc yietc dauh maiv gunv zoux nouh fai maiv zoux nouh nyei. Ninh ziouc njoux ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Deuteronomy32:37 Ninh ziouc gorngv
Deuteronomy32:38 Dongh nyanc ninh mbuo ziec wuov deix orv-junc

Deuteronomy32:40 Yie sung buoz ziangv lungh houv jienv gorngv

Deuteronomy32:51 weic zuqc meih mbuo i muoz yiem Sinx Deic-Bung-Huaang

Deuteronomy33:1 Naaiv se Tin-Hungh nyei mienh

Deuteronomy33:14 Yaac duqv mba'hnoi nyei nyutc tengx ga'naaiv-zuangx longx
Deuteronomy33:15 Duqv loz-hnoi nyei mbong cuotv gauh longx jiex nyei ga'naaiv
Deuteronomy33:16 Duqv baamh gen maaih nyei yietc zungv gauh longx jiex nyei ga'naaiv. Yaac duqv yiem zieqc jienv nyei ndiangx-dorn-fomv wuov dauh a'hneiv ninh mbuo. Tov bun naaiv deix fuqv yietc zungv njiec taux Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun nyei m'nqorngv
Deuteronomy33:17 Yosepv henv hnangv dauh daauh toi ngongh gouv. Ninh nyei jorng hnangv hieh ngongh nyei jorng

Deuteronomy33:25 Meih mbuo nyei laatc gaengh nyei sorn longc hlieqv caux dongh siqv zoux daaih. Meih mbuo nyei qaqv oix puix meih mbuo nyei hnoi-nyieqc.

Deuteronomy34:12 Maiv maaih ganh dauh douc waac mienh hnangv Mose yiem I^saa^laa^en yietc zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien maaih domh qaqv zoux yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh
Joshua1:1 Ziouv nyei bou
Joshua1:2 “Yie nyei bou
Joshua1:3 Da'faanh meih mbuo nyei zaux-benv caaiv nyei norm-norm dorngx
Joshua1:4 Meih mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix ziouc yiem naamh bung nyei deic-bung-huaang mingh taux baqv bung Le^mbaa^norn Geh
Joshua1:5 Yiem meih nyei seix zeiv maiv maaih haaix dauh haih mborqv duqv hingh meih. Yie hnangv haaix nor caux Mose yiem
Joshua1:6 “Meih oix zuqc henv yaac zungx jienv daamv
Joshua1:7 Meih oix zuqc henv yaac zungx jienv domh daamv. Oix zuqc faix fim ei jienv yie nyei bou
Joshua1:8 Maiv dungx la'kuqv zanc-zanc doqc naaiv buonv Leiz-Latc Sou. Ndorm-ndorm muonz-muonz oix zuqc fei-fangv
Joshua1:9 Yie hatc liuz meih maiv zeiz? Meih oix zuqc henv yaac zungx jienv daamv. Maiv dungx gamh nziex yaac maiv dungx hnyouv namx
Joshua1:10 Yo^su^waa ziouc paaiv baeqc fingx nyei yietc zungv bieiv zeiv. Ninh gorngv

Joshua1:12 Yo^su^waa gorngv mbuox Lu^mben Mienh

Joshua1:14 Meih mbuo nyei auv

Joshua2:1 Nun nyei dorn
Joshua2:2 Maaih mienh mbuox Ye^li^ko Zingh nyei hungh diex
Joshua2:3 Ye^li^ko Zingh nyei hungh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Laa^hapc
Joshua2:4 Mv baac Laa^hapc dorh wuov deix i dauh m'jangc dorn mingh bingx mi'aqv. Ninh gorngv
Joshua2:5 Aav lamh deix hmuangx
Joshua2:6 (Mv baac Laa^hapc zungv dorh wuov deix i laanh mienh faaux gu'nguaaic biauv-ngorh bun ninh mbuo bingx jienv ninh pui la'maah guaengv ga'ndiev maengx.)
Joshua2:7 Zunc nyei mienh yietv cuotv zingh mingh
Joshua2:8 Wuov deix i laanh maiv gaengh bueix m'njormh
Joshua2:9 Laa^hapc gorngv mbuox wuov deix mienh
Joshua2:10 weic zuqc yie mbuo haiz gorngv meih mbuo biaux cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc
Joshua2:11 Yie mbuo yietv haiz naaiv deix sic
Joshua2:12 Ih zanc tov meih mbuo ziangv jienv Ziouv laengz jienv weic zuqc yie zoux longx bun meih mbuo
Joshua2:13 weic bun cing meih mbuo oix siex cuotv yie nyei diex maac
Joshua2:14 Wuov deix mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
Joshua2:15 Laa^hapc ziouc longc hlaang bungx ninh mbuo i laanh yangh fong muonh cuotv njiec ga'ndiev
Joshua2:16 Laa^hapc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Joshua2:17 Wuov deix m'jangc dorn gorngv mbuox Laa^hapc
Joshua2:18 Zuov yie mbuo bieqc naaiv norm deic-bung wuov zanc
Joshua2:19 Se gorngv haaix dauh cuotv meih nyei biauv nyei gaengh ka'ndau mingh wuov jauv-hlen
Joshua2:20 Mv baac se gorngv meih dorh yie mbuo zoux nyei sic mingh gorngv mbuox mienh nor
Joshua2:21 Laa^hapc gorngv
Joshua2:22 Ninh mbuo i laanh cuotv mingh ziouc faaux wuov jiex mbong-aiv yiem wuov buo hnoi
Joshua2:23 Wuov deix i laanh mienh ziouc yiem mbong njiec daaih. Ninh mbuo jiex ndaaih mingh taux Nun nyei dorn
Joshua2:24 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa

Joshua3:2 Jiex liuz buo hnoi

Joshua3:10 Yo^su^waa gorngv

Joshua4:1 Zuangx I^saa^laa^en baeqc fingx jiex nzengc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih
Joshua4:2 “Oix zuqc yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx ginv ziepc nyeic laanh mienh
Joshua4:3 Mbuox ninh mbuo mingh Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mbu'ndongx
Joshua4:4 Yo^su^waa ziouc heuc ninh ginv ziangx wuov deix ziepc nyeic laanh I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Joshua4:5 Yo^su^waa ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo
Joshua4:6 weic longc naaiv deix la'bieiv yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux jangx-hoc. Nqa'haav hingv meih mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv oix naaic gaax
Joshua4:7 Meih mbuo oix zuqc dau ninh mbuo
Joshua4:8 Wuov deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc ei Yo^su^waa paaiv nyei waac zoux. Ziux ninh mbuo nyei fingx ninh mbuo yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mbu'ndongx bouh ziepc nyeic norm la'bieiv cuotv daaih hnangv Ziouv mbuox Yo^su^waa wuov nor zoux. Ninh mbuo ndaam jienv naaiv deix la'bieiv mingh taux ninh mbuo hitv nyei dorngx bungx njiec wuov.
Joshua4:9 Yo^su^waa ganh ca'lengc zorqv ziepc nyeic norm la'bieiv ndui jienv Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mbu'ndongx
Joshua4:10 Gaeng Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang wuov deix sai mienh souv jienv Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mbu'ndongx zuov taux Ziouv heuc Yo^su^waa paaiv baeqc fingx zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc zoux ziangx. Naaiv se ziux Mose paaiv Yo^su^waa nyei yietc zungv waac. Baeqc fingx ziouc gaanv jienv jiex ndaaih aqv.
Joshua4:11 Zuangx baeqc fingx yietv jiex nzengc
Joshua4:12 Lu^mben Mienh
Joshua4:13 Leih maiv go biei waanc dauh mienh dorh jienv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien jiex ndaaih aengx mingh taux Ye^li^ko nyei ndau-baengh weic mborqv jaax.
Joshua4:14 Dongh wuov hnoi Ziouv dorng jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh taaih Yo^su^waa zoux hlo. Zuangx mienh ziouc yietc seix taaih Yo^su^waa
Joshua4:15 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua4:16 “Heuc gaeng Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang wuov deix sai mienh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih cuotv daaih.”
Joshua4:17 Yo^su^waa ziouc heuc sai mienh
Joshua4:18 Gaeng Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang wuov deix sai mienh ziouc yiem ndaaih mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih. Sai mienh nyei zaux-benv yietv cau faaux caaiv mbienx
Joshua4:19 Zih hlaax saeng-ziepc wuov hnoi
Joshua4:20 Yo^su^waa zorqv ninh mbuo yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih ndaam daaih wuov deix ziepc nyeic norm la'bieiv ndui jienv wuov Gin^gaan.
Joshua4:21 Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Joshua4:22 Meih mbuo oix zuqc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Joshua4:23 Weic zuqc Ziouv
Joshua4:24 Hnangv naaic lungh ndiev maanc mienh haih hiuv duqv Ziouv nyei buoz maaih domh qaqv
Joshua5:1 Yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih fai bung
Joshua5:2 Wuov zanc Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua5:3 Yo^su^waa ziouc longc douz-lau zoux nzuqc daaih yiem Gi^mbe^atc Haa^laa^lotv tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh jiex gaatv nyei leiz.
Joshua5:4 Se weic naaiv Yo^su^waa cingx daaih tengx ninh mbuo jiex gaatv nyei leiz. Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih nyei zuangx m'jangc dorn
Joshua5:5 Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih nyei zuangx baeqc fingx jiex gaatv nyei leiz liuz
Joshua5:6 I^saa^laa^en Mienh youh mingh youh daaih wuov deic-bung-huaang feix ziepc hnyangx
Joshua5:7 Se naaiv deix mienh nyei dorn
Joshua5:8 Zuangx baeqc fingx jiex liuz gaatv nyei leiz
Joshua5:9 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua5:10 I^saa^laa^en Mienh liepc ciangv yiem Gin^gaan. Dongh naaiv norm hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx
Joshua5:11 Jiex liuz Siex Maengc Zipv da'nyeic hnoi
Joshua5:12 Ninh mbuo nyanc wuov norm deic-bung nyei laangh ziqc wuov hnoi
Joshua5:13 Yo^su^waa yiem nitv Ye^li^ko Zingh nyei ziangh hoc
Joshua5:14 Wuov dauh mienh dau
Joshua5:15 Ziouv nyei domh baeng-bieiv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua6:1 Laaix I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Joshua6:2 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua6:3 Meih mbuo nyei zuangx baeng oix zuqc huing wuov norm zingh
Joshua6:4 Bun siec dauh sai mienh nanv jienv siec norm ba'gi yungh jorng mingh ndaangc Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang taux siec hnoi wuov hnoi
Joshua6:5 Ninh mbuo biomv jorng nyei qiex ndaauv wuov zanc
Joshua6:6 Nun nyei dorn
Joshua6:7 Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
Joshua6:8 Yo^su^waa gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx liuz
Joshua6:9 Dorh jienv wuoqc ginc wuov deix baeng mingh ndaangc biomv jorng nyei sai mienh. Mbungh nqa'haav nqaang nyei baeng yaac gan jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang mingh. Sai mienh yaac maiv dingh liouh nyei biomv jorng.
Joshua6:10 Mv baac Yo^su^waa hatc baeqc fingx
Joshua6:11 Ninh hnangv naaiv bun Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang huing Ye^li^ko Zingh yietc nzuonx. Huing liuz
Joshua6:12 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei Yo^su^waa jiez sin daaih. Sai mienh aengx bouh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang gaeng jienv.
Joshua6:13 Siec dauh sai mienh nanv jienv siec norm ba'gi yungh jorng ziouc mingh ndaangc Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
Joshua6:14 Da'nyeic hnoi ninh mbuo aengx huing zingh yietc nzuonx liuz
Joshua6:15 Da'cietv hnoi nziouv nyei
Joshua6:16 Huing taux da'cietv nzuonx
Joshua6:17 Naaiv norm zingh caux yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv oix zuqc mietc nzengc weic fungx dangx bun Ziouv. Kungx siex cuotv maaic buonv-sin wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Joshua6:18 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc simv jienv
Joshua6:19 Yietc zungv jiem nyaanh caux longc dongh siqv
Joshua6:20 Sai mienh ziouc biomv jorng
Joshua6:21 Ninh mbuo longc nzuqc ndaauv mietc nzengc yietc zungv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Joshua6:22 Yo^su^waa ziouc gorngv mbuox dongh zinh ndaangc mingh caaiv juoqv zaah deic-bung wuov deix i laanh mienh
Joshua6:23 Wuov deix i laanh caaiv juoqv nyei mienh lunx mienh ziouc bieqc mingh dorh Laa^hapc caux ninh nyei diex maac
Joshua6:24 Ninh mbuo longc douz buov nzengc wuov norm zingh caux wuov norm zingh nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv. Kungx jiem nyaanh caux longc dongh siqv
Joshua6:25 Mv baac Yo^su^waa siex cuotv maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn
Joshua6:26 Dongh wuov zanc Yo^su^waa gorngv cuotv houv nyei waac mbuox zuangx mienh. Ninh gorngv
Joshua6:27 Hnangv naaic
Joshua7:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux. Ninh mbuo nzepv cuotv horpc zuqc mietc weic fungx dangx bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Joshua7:2 Yo^su^waa paaiv mienh yiem Ye^li^ko Zingh faaux taux Ai Zingh. Ai Zingh yiem nitv Mbetc Aawen
Joshua7:3 Ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua7:4 Hnangv naaic maaih leih maiv go buo cin dauh faaux mingh. Ninh mbuo yaac yiem Ai Zingh mienh nyei wuov ndaangc biaux.
Joshua7:5 Ai Zingh nyei mienh daix ninh mbuo faah ziepc luoqc dauh nyei dorngx. Ai Zingh nyei mienh yiem zingh gaengh zunc ninh mbuo taux Qe^mbaa^lim
Joshua7:6 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx mienh gox nzauh haic
Joshua7:7 Yo^su^waa naaic Ziouv
Joshua7:8 Ziouv aah! Yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh ih zanc zuqc ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv zunc biaux.
Joshua7:9 Kaa^naa^an Mienh caux naaiv norm deic-bung yietc zungv nyei baeqc fingx duqv haiz naaiv deix fienx
Joshua7:10 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua7:11 I^saa^laa^en Mienh baamz zuiz mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo ngaengc yie caux ninh mbuo laengz jiex nyei ngaengc waac
Joshua7:12 Weic naaiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh cingx daaih maiv haih mborqv maiv hingh ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc daaux nqaang biaux weic ninh mbuo benx zuqc mietc nyei ga'naaiv mi'aqv. Yiem naaiv mingh yie maiv caux meih mbuo yiem aqv
Joshua7:13 “Mingh aqv! Mingh tengx baeqc fingx saax nzengc uix. Oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo
Joshua7:14 “+‘Njang ndorm meih mbuo oix zuqc yietc fingx yietc fingx nyei cuotv daaih. Ziouv ginv haaix fingx mienh
Joshua7:15 Zorqv zuqc haaix dauh maaih naaiv deix oix zuqc zorqv benx fungx dangx bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Joshua7:16 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei Yo^su^waa dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc fingx yietc fingx nyei cuotv daaih
Joshua7:17 Yu^ndaa Fingx nyei bungh bungh mienh cuotv daaih ziouc ndortv zuqc Zelaa Mienh. Zelaa Mienh yietc buonc yietc buonc cuotv daaih ziouc ndortv zuqc Sapc^ndi.
Joshua7:18 Yo^su^waa ziouc bun Sapc^ndi wuov buonc mienh yietc dauh yietc dauh cuotv daaih ziouc ndortv zuqc Aakaan. Aakaan zoux Kaanmi nyei dorn. Kaanmi zoux Sapc^ndi nyei dorn. Sapc^ndi zoux Zelaa nyei dorn
Joshua7:19 Yo^su^waa gorngv mbuox Aakaan
Joshua7:20 Aakaan dau Yo^su^waa
Joshua7:21 Yiem caangv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv yie buatc yietc deix Mbaa^mbi^lon Deic-Bung nyei domh lui nzueic haic caux yietc joih ziepc betv lungz nyaanh
Joshua7:22 Yo^su^waa ziouc paaiv deix mienh mingh. Ninh mbuo ziouc tiux jienv mingh Aakaan nyei ndopv-liuh
Joshua7:23 Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz zorqv cuotv daaih dorh mingh taux Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov
Joshua7:24 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc dorh Zelaa nyei fun
Joshua7:25 Yo^su^waa gorngv
Joshua7:26 Zuangx mienh aengx zorqv la'bieiv ndui jienv Aakaan nyei sei
Joshua8:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua8:2 Meih oix zuqc zoux bun Ai Zingh caux wuov norm zingh nyei hungh hnangv meih zoux bun Ye^li^ko Zingh caux zingh nyei hungh diex nor. Mv baac meih mbuo caangv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv caux saeng-kuv meih mbuo ganh gunv longc aqv. Meih mbuo liuc leiz mborqv jaax oix zuqc bingx jienv zingh nqa'haav maengx zuov.”
Joshua8:3 Yo^su^waa caux yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei baeng ziouc mingh Ai Zingh. Ninh ginv duqv buo waanc dauh mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng
Joshua8:4 Yo^su^waa paaiv ninh mbuo
Joshua8:5 Yie ganh aengx caux yie yiem nyei yietc zungv baeqc fingx ziouc hungx jienv zingh mingh. Wuov zanc zingh nyei mienh ziouc cuotv daaih caux yie mbuo mborqv jaax hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov nzunc nor
Joshua8:6 Ninh mbuo ziouc cuotv daaih zunc yie mbuo taux yie mbuo nduov ninh mbuo leih zingh go
Joshua8:7 Meih mbuo yiem bingx jienv nyei dorngx cuotv daaih caangv wuov norm zingh
Joshua8:8 Meih mbuo caangv duqv zingh daaih wuov zanc
Joshua8:9 Yo^su^waa ziouc heuc ninh mbuo mingh aqv. Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh ninh mbuo oix zuqc bingx jienv zuov nyei dorngx
Joshua8:10 Lungh ndorm nziouv nyei Yo^ su^waa jiez sin daaih ziouc dimv ninh nyei baeng. Ninh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv mingh ndaangc dorh baeng faaux Ai Zingh.
Joshua8:11 Yo^su^waa dorh jienv caux ninh mingh wuov deix baeng hungx jienv Ai Zingh mingh taux fatv deix
Joshua8:12 Yo^su^waa aengx dorh leih maiv go biaa cin dauh baeng
Joshua8:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc bun baeng yiem paaiv ziangx nyei dorngx. Dongh camv jiex wuov deix baeng yiem zingh nyei baqv bung. Aengx maaih bingx jienv zingh nyei fai bung wuov deix baeng. Dongh naaic muonz Yo^su^waa yiem wuov horngz.
Joshua8:14 Ai Zingh nyei hungh diex buatc hnangv naaic
Joshua8:15 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeng ziouc duqv-eix zoux hnangv zuqc suei nor
Joshua8:16 Zingh gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv m'jangc dorn ziouc heuc nzoih cuotv daaih zunc I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh mbuo zunc Yo^su^waa wuov zanc
Joshua8:17 Ai Zingh caux Mbetc^en Zingh maiv zengc yietc dauh m'jangc dorn maiv cuotv mingh zunc I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh mbuo koi nqoi zingh
Joshua8:18 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua8:19 Yo^su^waa yietv sung ninh nyei buoz
Joshua8:20 Ai Zingh nyei mienh huin nzuonx mangc
Joshua8:21 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh buatc bingx jienv wuov deix baeng caangv duqv zingh mi'aqv
Joshua8:22 Dongh bingx jienv caangv zingh wuov deix baeng yaac cuotv zingh daaih caux Ai Zingh nyei mienh mborqv jaax. Ai Zingh nyei mienh ziouc zuqc yiem i bung I^saa^laa^en baeng mbu'ndongx. Naaiv bung yaac maaih
Joshua8:23 Mv baac Ai Zingh nyei hungh ninh mbuo zorqv nangh dorh mingh bun Yo^su^waa.
Joshua8:24 I^saa^laa^en baeng yiem lomc-huaang caux deic-bung-huaang daix nzengc zunc ninh mbuo wuov deix Ai Zingh nyei m'jangc dorn. Maiv zengc yietc dauh maiv zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix. Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx nzuonx Ai Zingh mingh longc nzuqc ndaauv daix nzengc zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh.
Joshua8:25 Dongh wuov hnoi zuqc daix daic nyei mienh
Joshua8:26 Weic zuqc Yo^su^waa nyei buoz nanv jienv cang sung jienv
Joshua8:27 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh zorqv wuov norm zingh nyei saeng-kuv caux caangv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv benx ninh mbuo ganh nyei buonc
Joshua8:28 Hnangv naaic
Joshua8:29 Ninh zorqv Ai Zingh nyei hungh diex ndiux jienv ndiangx taux hmuangx. Mba'hnoi muotv nyei ziangh hoc
Joshua8:30 Yo^su^waa yiem E^mbaan Mbong ceix norm ziec-dorngh weic Ziouv
Joshua8:31 ziux Ziouv nyei bou
Joshua8:32 Yo^su^waa yiem wuov dorng jienv I^saa^laa^en Mienh zorqv Mose fiev nyei leiz-latc fiev jienv la'bieiv.
Joshua8:33 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Joshua8:34 Nqa'haav Yo^su^waa doqc leiz-latc nyei yietc zungv waac
Joshua8:35 Mose hatc nyei yietc zungv waac maiv maaih yietc joux Yo^su^waa maiv dorng jienv doqc bun yietc zunv gapv zunv nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Joshua9:1 Yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih fai bung maengx nyei zuangx hungh diex
Joshua9:2 Ninh mbuo ziouc dongh hnyouv gapv qaqv oix mingh caux Yo^su^waa aengx caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax.
Joshua9:3 Mv baac Gi^mbe^on Mienh haiz gorngv Yo^su^waa hnangv haaix nor zoux bun Ye^li^ko Zingh caux Ai Zingh wuov zanc
Joshua9:4 ninh mbuo ziouc daav guv guaix nyei za'eix. Ninh mbuo bun mienh mingh yaac dorh la'maah mbuoqc huv caux mbiev jienv dapv a'ngunc diuv nyei loz-ndopv-mbuoqc huv bun lorh tor jienv mingh.
Joshua9:5 Ninh mbuo daapc mbiev jienv nyei loz-heh yaac zuqv loz-lui-houx. Dorh mingh nyei bienh fuix youc nqaai youc jiex mbuov.
Joshua9:6 Ninh mbuo mingh taux Gin^gaan nyei ndopv-liuh ciangv lorz Yo^su^waa
Joshua9:7 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv mbuox wuov deix Hiwai Mienh
Joshua9:8 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua9:9 Ninh mbuo dau Yo^su^waa
Joshua9:10 yaac haiz gorngv ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei dong bung maengx wuov deix i dauh Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei hungh. Se zoux bun Hetv^mbon Zingh nyei Si^honx Hungh caux yiem Atc^taa^lotv Zingh gunv Mbaasaan Deic wuov dauh Okc Hungh.
Joshua9:11 Weic naaiv yie mbuo nyei mienh gox caux yie mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei yietc zungv baeqc fingx gorngv mbuox yie mbuo
Joshua9:12 Yie mbuo cuotv jauv daaih lorz meih mbuo wuov hnoi
Joshua9:13 Naaiv deix dapv diuv nyei ndopv-mbuoqc yie mbuo dapv a'ngunc diuv wuov zanc corc siang nyei
Joshua9:14 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc zipv wuov deix mienh nyei nyanc hopv daaih
Joshua9:15 Yo^su^waa ziouc caux ninh mbuo gorngv horpc yaac liepc ngaengc waac liouh ninh mbuo nyei maengc. I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei yietc zungv bieiv zeiv yaac houv jienv oix ei naaiv deix ngaengc waac.
Joshua9:16 I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Gi^mbe^on Mienh liepc liuz ngaengc waac nqa'haav buo hnoi
Joshua9:17 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc cuotv jauv. Buo hnoi wuov hnoi ninh mbuo taux wuov deix mienh nyei zingh. Wuov deix mienh nyei zingh heuc Gi^mbe^on
Joshua9:18 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv daix ninh mbuo
Joshua9:19 Mv baac yietc zungv bieiv zeiv gorngv mbuox gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh
Joshua9:20 Mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun ninh mbuo. Oix zuqc siex cuotv ninh mbuo nyei maengc. Maiv zei aeqv
Joshua9:21 Wuov deix bieiv zeiv aengx gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
Joshua9:22 Yo^su^waa ziouc heuc wuov deix Gi^mbe^on Mienh daaih
Joshua9:23 Ih zanc meih mbuo zuqc zioux aqv. Meih mbuo yietc liuz biaux maiv ndutv zoux nouh. Oix zuqc yietc liuz gaeqv zaangh
Joshua9:24 Ninh mbuo dau Yo^su^waa
Joshua9:25 Ih zanc yie mbuo yiem meih nyei buoz-ndiev. Ziux meih buatc zoux duqv horpc
Joshua9:26 Yo^su^waa ziouc tengx ninh mbuo biaux ndutv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev
Joshua9:27 Dongh wuov hnoi Yo^su^waa paaiv Gi^mbe^on Mienh weic I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yaac weic Ziouv oix ginv ziangx wuov norm dorngx nyei ziec-dorngh gaeqv zaangh
Joshua10:1 Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei hungh
Joshua10:2 Ninh caux ninh nyei baeqc fingx za'gengh gamh nziex haic
Joshua10:3 Hnangv naaic Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei hungh
Joshua10:4 “Tov meih mbuo daaih yie naaiv tengx yie mborqv Gi^mbe^on Zingh
Joshua10:5 Wuov deix biaa dauh Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei hungh maaih Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Joshua10:6 Gi^mbe^on Mienh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh wuov Gin^gaan nyei ndopv-liuh ciangv lorz Yo^su^waa. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Joshua10:7 Yo^su^waa ziouc dorh jienv yietc zungv baeng-maanh
Joshua10:8 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua10:9 Yo^su^waa yiem Gin^gaan ziangh muonz yangh jauv mingh. Taux wuov ziouc liemh zeih caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax.
Joshua10:10 Ziouv zoux bun Aa^mo^lai Mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei nza'hmien maengx lunc nzengc mi'aqv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Gi^mbe^on Zingh daix ninh mbuo camv haic
Joshua10:11 Aa^mo^lai Mienh biaux jienv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Mbetc Holon njiec jiex nyei dorngx wuov zanc
Joshua10:12 Dongh Ziouv jiu Aa^mo^lai Mienh bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov hnoi
Joshua10:13 Mba'hnoi ziouc dingh jienv
Joshua10:14 Zinh ndaangc nyei hnoi caux nqa'haav hingv nyei hnoi maiv maaih jiex yietc norm hnoi hnangv naaiv norm hnoi
Joshua10:15 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh daaux nqaang nzuonx Gin^gaan ciangv mi'aqv.
Joshua10:16 Wuov deix biaa dauh hungh biaux mingh bingx Makv^ke^ndaa mbaengx-kuotv gu'nyuoz.
Joshua10:17 Maaih mienh mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua10:18 Yo^su^waa gorngv
Joshua10:19 Mv baac meih mbuo ganh maiv dungx yiem naaic zuov. Oix zuqc zunc jienv meih mbuo nyei win-wangv mingh
Joshua10:20 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh daix wuov deix mienh daic nzengc. Kungx zengc dauh baav hnangv. Zengc wuov deix biaux bieqc weih wuonv nyei zingh mi'aqv.
Joshua10:21 Zuangx baeng baengh orn nyei nzuonx taux Makv^ke^ndaa nyei ciangv
Joshua10:22 Yo^su^waa aengx gorngv
Joshua10:23 Ninh mbuo ziouc koi nqoi mbaengx-kuotv dorh wuov deix biaa dauh hungh cuotv. Maaih Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei hungh
Joshua10:24 Ninh mbuo dorh wuov deix hungh diex mingh taux Yo^su^waa wuov. Yo^su^waa ziouc heuc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx m'jangc dorn daaih
Joshua10:25 Yo^su^waa gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Joshua10:26 Nqa'haav Yo^su^waa zorqv naaiv deix biaa dauh hungh daix daic
Joshua10:27 Mba'hnoi muotv geh nyei ziangh hoc Yo^su^waa paaiv mienh mingh bungx ninh mbuo nyei sei yiem ndiangx njiec daaih
Joshua10:28 Dongh wuov hnoi Yo^su^waa caangv duqv Makv^ke^ndaa Zingh. Ninh longc nzuqc ndaauv daix daic wuov norm zingh nyei mienh caux hungh diex
Joshua10:29 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yiem Makv^ke^ndaa Zingh mingh taux Lipv^naa Zingh
Joshua10:30 Ziouv yaac zorqv naaiv norm zingh caux naaiv norm zingh nyei hungh jiu bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh mi'aqv. Yo^su^waa longc nzuqc ndaauv daix nzengc wuov norm zingh nyei yietc zungv mienh
Joshua10:31 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh cuotv Lipv^naa Zingh mingh Laakitv Zingh ziouc weih jienv mborqv wuov norm zingh.
Joshua10:32 Ziouv zorqv Laakitv Zingh jiu bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Da'nyeic hnoi Yo^su^waa caangv duqv wuov norm zingh
Joshua10:33 Wuov zanc Gese Mungv nyei hungh
Joshua10:34 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh cuotv Laakitv Zingh mingh Ekc^lon Zingh
Joshua10:35 Wuov hnoi ninh mbuo caangv duqv wuov norm zingh
Joshua10:36 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh cuotv Ekc^lon Zingh aengx faaux taux He^mbo^lon Zingh
Joshua10:37 Ninh mbuo caangv duqv wuov norm zingh
Joshua10:38 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh aengx daaux nqaang daaih mborqv Nde^mbi Zingh.
Joshua10:39 Ninh mbuo caangv duqv wuov norm zingh caux wuov norm zingh nyei hungh
Joshua10:40 Yo^su^waa ziouc mborqv hingh nzengc wuov norm deic-bung
Joshua10:41 Yo^su^waa yiem Kaa^ndetc Mbaanie mborqv hingh nzengc ninh mbuo mingh taux Gaasaa Deic caux gormx Gosen Deic-Bung
Joshua10:42 Wuov nzunc Yo^su^waa cuotv mingh mborqv hingh yietc zungv hungh diex
Joshua10:43 Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc nzuonx taux Gin^gaan nyei ndopv-liuh ciangv mi'aqv.
Joshua11:1 Haaso Zingh nyei hungh
Joshua11:2 caux yiem baqv bung maengx nyei mbong-aiv dorngx nyei hungh
Joshua11:3 Ninh aengx paaiv mienh mingh lorz dong bung caux fai bung nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh
Joshua11:4 Naaiv deix hungh diex caux ninh mbuo nyei zuangx baeng-maanh cuotv daaih ndongc yiem koiv-hlen nyei saa-ziou camv. Yaac maaih maaz caux mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie camv haic.
Joshua11:5 Naaiv deix zuangx hungh daaih gapv zunv doic liepc ciangv yiem Melom Wuom-hlen
Joshua11:6 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua11:7 Yo^su^waa dorh yietc zungv baeng-maanh yiem Melom Wuom-hlen liemh zeih buangh zuqc ziouc mborqv ninh mbuo.
Joshua11:8 Ziouv zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh mi'aqv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc zunc jienv daix jienv ninh mbuo mingh taux Sai^ndorn Domh Zingh caux Mitv^le^fotv Maa^im yaac zunc hungx jienv dong bung maengx mingh taux Mitv^baa Horngz daix nzengc ninh mbuo. Maiv zengc yietc dauh duqv cuotv singx maengc.
Joshua11:9 Yo^su^waa ei jienv Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux. Ninh hngaqv dangx maaz nyei domh luangc jaan
Joshua11:10 Wuov zanc Yo^su^waa daaux nqaang daaih caangv duqv Haaso Domh Zingh
Joshua11:11 Ninh mbuo longc nzuqc ndaauv daix
Joshua11:12 Yo^su^waa caangv duqv wuov deix hungh diex nyei yietc zungv zingh yaac longc nzuqc ndaauv daix nzengc wuov deix hungh diex
Joshua11:13 Mv baac yiem mbong-aiv gu'nguaaic nyei zingh
Joshua11:14 Yiem wuov deix zingh caangv duqv daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv caux saeng-kuv
Joshua11:15 Ziouv hnangv haaix nor paaiv ninh nyei bou
Joshua11:16 Yo^su^waa nzaeng duqv nzengc ziangh norm deic-bung
Joshua11:17 Ninh mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Haalakv Mbong faaux mingh taux Se^i Mbong
Joshua11:18 Yo^su^waa longc ziangh hoc caux naaiv deix zingh nyei hungh mborqv jaax lauh nyei.
Joshua11:19 Maiv maaih yietc norm zingh nyei mienh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv horpc
Joshua11:20 Se Ziouv ganh zoux bun wuov deix mienh nyei hnyouv ngaengc
Joshua11:21 Wuov zanc Yo^su^waa mingh mietc nzengc yiem mbong-aiv dorngx nyei Aanaakv Mienh
Joshua11:22 Maiv zengc yietc dauh Aanaakv Mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei deic-bung. Kungx Gaasaa Zingh
Joshua11:23 Hnangv naaic Yo^su^waa caangv duqv yietc zungv deic-bung ziux Ziouv paaiv Mose nyei waac. Yo^su^waa yaac zorqv naaiv deix ndau ziux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei fingx paaiv bun nqoi benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. Wuov norm deic-bung ziouc taaix-baengh
Joshua12:1 Daaux naaiv mingh gorngv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx mborqv hingh aengx caangv duqv ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung wuov deix hungh
Joshua12:2 Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh yiem Hetv^mbon Zingh. Ninh gunv nyei deic-bung yiem Aannon Horngz-hlen
Joshua12:3 Ninh yaac gunv Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung nyei Aa^laa^mbaa Deic yiem Kin^ne^letv Koiv-Dorn njiec mingh taux Aa^laa^mbaa Koiv
Joshua12:4 Mbaasaan Deic nyei Okc Hungh
Joshua12:5 Ninh gunv Hemon Mbong caux Saax^le^kaa Zingh
Joshua12:6 Ziouv nyei bou
Joshua12:7 Daaux naaiv mingh gorngv taux Yo^su^waa caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih fai bung maengx mborqv hingh nyei hungh diex. Ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung yiem Le^mbaa^norn Horngz
Joshua12:8 se mbong-aiv dorngx

Joshua12:12 Ekc^lon Zingh yietc dauh Gese Zingh yietc dauh

Joshua12:16 Makv^ke^ndaa Zingh yietc dauh Mbetc^en Zingh yietc dauh
Joshua12:17 Tapv^bu^waa Mungv yietc dauh Hefe Mungv yietc dauh
Joshua12:18 Aafekv Zingh yietc dauh Laa^saa^lon Zingh yietc dauh

Joshua13:1 Yo^su^waa nyei hnyangx-jeiv hlang
Joshua13:2 “Corc oix zuqc nzaeng nyei deic-bung maaih Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caux Gesu Mienh nyei yietc zungv deic-bung
Joshua13:3 yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei dong bung maengx
Joshua13:4 se naamh bung maengx Kaa^naa^an Mienh nyei yietc zungv deic-bung
Joshua13:5 Yaac maaih Ge^mbaan Mienh nyei deic-bung
Joshua13:6 “Mbong-aiv dorngx nyei yietc zungv mienh yiem Le^mbaa^norn Geh mingh taux Mitv^le^fotv Maa^im
Joshua13:7 Ih zanc meih oix zuqc paaiv naaiv deix ndau bun nqoi naaiv deix nduoh fingx caux Maa^natv^se ndaamv-fingx benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc.”
Joshua13:8 Zengc wuov deix Maa^natv^se ndaamv-fingx caux Lu^mben Fingx caux Gaatc Fingx nzipc nyei ndau yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx ziux Ziouv nyei bou
Joshua13:9 Maaih yiem Aannon Horngz-hlen nyei Aa^lo^e Zingh
Joshua13:10 Yaac maaih yiem Hetv^mbon Zingh gunv Aa^mo^lai Mienh wuov dauh Si^honx Hungh nyei norm-norm zingh mingh taux Ammon Mienh nyei gapv-jaaix.
Joshua13:11 Yaac maaih Gi^le^aatc Deic caux Gesu Mienh caux Maa^aa^kaa Mienh nyei deic
Joshua13:12 Aengx maaih Mbaasaan Deic nyei Okc Hungh gunv nyei ziangh norm guoqv. Ninh yiem Atc^taa^lotv Zingh caux E^nden^i Zingh gunv. Le^faa^im Mienh kungx zengc ninh ganh nduqc dauh hnangv. Naaiv deix mienh yietc zungv Mose mborqv hingh aengx zunc ninh mbuo cuotv nzengc.
Joshua13:13 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv zunc Gesu Mienh caux Maa^aa^kaa Mienh cuotv. Gesu Mienh
Joshua13:14 Mv baac Mose maiv paaiv ndau bun Lewi Fingx zoux ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. Ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc se longc douz buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv
Joshua13:15 Mose ziux Lu^mben Fingx nyei bungh buonc paaiv ndau benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc.
Joshua13:16 Ninh mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix se yiem Aannon Horngz-hlen nyei Aa^lo^e Zingh caux yiem horngz gu'nyuoz nyei zingh caux weih gormx Me^nde^mbaa Zingh nyei ndau-baengh
Joshua13:17 liemh Hetv^mbon Zingh caux yiem Hetv^mbon ndau-baengh nyei norm-norm zingh
Joshua13:18 yaac maaih Yaa^haatv Zingh
Joshua13:19 maaih Ki^li^yaa^taa^im
Joshua13:20 Aengx maaih Mbetc Be^o
Joshua13:21 se yiem wuov norm dorngx nyei ndau-baengh nyei yietc zungv zingh
Joshua13:22 I^saa^laa^en Mienh longc nzuqc ndaauv daix mienh wuov zanc
Joshua13:23 Lu^mben Fingx nyei deic-bung fai bung maengx nyei gapv-jaaix se Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Naaiv deix zingh caux laangz benx Lu^mben Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc duqv nzipc nyei buonc.
Joshua13:24 Mose ziux Gaatc Fingx nyei bungh buonc paaiv ndau benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc.
Joshua13:25 Ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung yiem Yaase Mungv caux Gi^le^aatc Deic nyei norm-norm zingh
Joshua13:26 Ninh mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix yaac yiem Hetv^mbon Zingh mingh taux Laamaatv Mitv^be Mungv caux Mbe^to^nim Mungv
Joshua13:27 Yaac maaih horngz gu'nyuoz nyei Mbetc Haalam Mungv
Joshua13:28 Naaiv deix zingh caux laangz benx Gaatc Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc duqv nzipc nyei buonc.
Joshua13:29 Mose yaac zorqv nzipc nyei buonc ndau bun Maa^natv^se ndaamv-fingx ziux Maa^natv^se ndaamv-fingx nyei bungh buonc paaiv bun nqoi.
Joshua13:30 Ninh mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Maa^haa^naa^im Zingh
Joshua13:31 Aengx maaih yietc buonc Gi^le^aatc Deic caux Atc^taa^lotv caux E^nden^i
Joshua13:32 Naaiv se Mose yiem Mo^apc ndau-baengh Jor^ndaen Ndaaih caux Ye^li^ko Zingh nyei dong bung maengx paaiv bun mienh nzipc nyei buonc.
Joshua13:33 Mv baac Mose maiv paaiv nzipc nyei buonc bun Lewi Fingx. Ziouv
Joshua14:1 Naaiv se I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung duqv zipv benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. Se E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux Nun nyei dorn
Joshua14:2 Ninh mbuo ziux Ziouv paaiv ziangx Mose dingc maengc mangc weic zorqv naaiv deix ndau bun nqoi nduoh fingx-bienx mienh nzipc.
Joshua14:3 Mose zungv zorqv yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx nyei ndau bun nqoi benx wuov deix i fingx-bienx mienh nzipc nyei buonc mi'aqv. Mv baac ninh maiv bun Lewi Mienh yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx maaih ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc
Joshua14:4 weic zuqc Yosepv nyei dorn bun njiec zoux i fingx
Joshua14:5 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux Ziouv paaiv ziangx Mose nyei waac zorqv ndau bun nqoi.
Joshua14:6 Maaih deix Yu^ndaa Mienh mingh Gin^gaan lorz Yo^su^waa. Kenatv Mienh nyei zeiv-fun
Joshua14:7 Yie nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv feix ziepc hnyangx wuov zanc
Joshua14:8 Mv baac caux yie mingh nyei gorx-youz gorngv haeqv baeqc fingx
Joshua14:9 Wuov hnoi Mose houv jienv gorngv
Joshua14:10 Mangc maah! Yiem Ziouv caux Mose gorngv naaiv deix waac wuov zanc
Joshua14:11 Ih hnoi yie corc henv ndongc zinh ndaangc Mose paaiv yie mingh caaiv juoqv wuov hnoi. Yie corc maaih qaqv mingh mborqv jaax fai bieqc cuotv hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov nor.

Joshua14:15 He^mbo^lon Zingh zinh ndaangc heuc Ki^li^yaatv Aan^mbaa
Joshua15:1 Paaiv bun Yu^ndaa Fingx ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc duqv nyei ndau njiec naamh bung daaux jienv E^ndom Deic-Bung nyei gapv-jaaix
Joshua15:2 Wuov ndiev naamh bung maengx nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Koiv-Nzauv dueiv-mueiz
Joshua15:3 nzuiz njiec Aakc^lapv^mbim Mbong-qangx nyei naamh bung maengx
Joshua15:4 daaux jienv mingh taux Atc^mon Mungv
Joshua15:5 Dong bung nyei gapv-jaaix yangh Koiv-Nzauv mingh taux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih kuv. Baqv bung maengx nyei gapv-jaaix yiem koiv-congx
Joshua15:6 nzuiz mingh taux Mbetc Hokv^laa Mungv
Joshua15:7 Gapv-jaaix aengx yiem Aako Horngz caengx faaux baqv bung taux Nde^mbi Zingh
Joshua15:8 Gapv-jaaix aengx caengx faaux mingh yangh Mben Hinnom Horngz gan Ye^mbutc Mienh nyei zingh
Joshua15:9 Gapv-jaaix yangh mbong-ningv hungx jienv mingh taux Nepv^to^aa Wuom-Zingv
Joshua15:10 Nqa'haav aengx yiem Mbaa^aa^laa Zingh ngau mingh fai bung maengx taux Se^i Mbong
Joshua15:11 Gapv-jaaix aengx mingh taux E^ko^lon Zingh baqv bung mbong-hlen
Joshua15:12 Fai bung nyei gapv-jaaix se Domh Koiv nyei koiv-hlen. Naaiv se Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei gapv-jaaix ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc.
Joshua15:13 Ziux Ziouv paaiv Yo^su^waa nyei waac
Joshua15:14 Kaalepv ziouc yiem He^mbo^lon Zingh zunc Aanaakv Mienh
Joshua15:15 Ninh yiem naaic cuotv mingh mborqv Nde^mbi Zingh nyei mienh. Nde^mbi Zingh zinh ndaangc heuc Ki^li^yaatv Sefe.

Joshua15:62 Nipv^saan
Joshua15:63 Mv baac Ye^mbutc Mienh corc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Yu^ndaa Mienh zunc ninh mbuo maiv cuotv. Weic naaiv Ye^mbutc Mienh cingx daaih caux Yu^ndaa Mienh yiem naaic taux ih jaax hnoi.
Joshua16:1 Paaiv bun Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun naamh bung nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih
Joshua16:2 Yiem Mbetc^en Zingh
Joshua16:3 Gapv-jaaix aengx njiec mingh fai bung maengx
Joshua16:4 Yosepv nyei dorn
Joshua16:5 Naaiv se E^faa^im Mienh nyei zeiv-fun nzipc nyei buonc ndau ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc. Ninh mbuo nzipc nyei ndau nyei gapv-jaaix yiem dong bung maengx
Joshua16:6 aengx jiex mingh taux koiv. Yiem ninh mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix baqv bung maengx
Joshua16:7 Yiem Yaa^no^aa Mungv njiec naamh bung taux Aa^taa^lotv Mungv caux Naa^aa^laa Mungv
Joshua16:8 Gapv-jaaix yiem Tapv^bu^waa Mungv njiec fai bung maengx taux Kaanaa Ndoqv mingh donx jienv koiv. Naaiv se E^faa^im Fingx ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc nzipc nyei buonc ndau.
Joshua16:9 Yaac maaih yiem Maa^natv^se Mienh nzipc nyei buonc gu'nyuoz paaiv bun E^faa^im Mienh nyei norm-norm mungv caux wuov deix mungv nyei fiuv-laangz.
Joshua16:10 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv zunc yiem Gese Zingh nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh cuotv. Kaa^naa^an Mienh ziouc yiem E^faa^im Mienh gu'nyuoz taux ih jaax hnoi
Joshua17:1 Maa^natv^se se Yosepv nyei dorn-hlo. Maaki se Maa^natv^se nyei dorn-hlo yaac zoux Gi^le^aatc nyei die. Naaiv se paaiv bun Maa^natv^se Mienh nyei ndau. Maaki duqv Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx nyei Gi^le^aatc caux Mbaasaan Deic benx ninh nyei buonc weic zuqc ninh zoux mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng.
Joshua17:2 Naaiv se paaiv bun zengc njiec nyei Maa^natv^se Mienh nyei ndau
Joshua17:3 Se^lo^fe^hatc zoux Hefe nyei dorn
Joshua17:4 Ninh mbuo mingh lorz E^le^aa^saa sai mienh caux Nun nyei dorn
Joshua17:5 Hnangv naaic Maa^natv^se Mienh duqv ziepc gouv ndau
Joshua17:6 weic zuqc Maa^natv^se Fingx nyei sieqv duqv caux jienv Maa^natv^se Fingx nyei dorn maaih buonc nzipc. Maa^natv^se zengc njiec nyei zeiv-fun duqv Gi^le^aatc Deic benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc.
Joshua17:7 Maa^natv^se nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Aa^se nyei gapv-jaaix mingh taux Sekem Zingh dong bung maengx
Joshua17:8 Weih gormx Tapv^bu^waa Mungv nyei ndau benx Maa^natv^se Mienh nyei buonc
Joshua17:9 Gapv-jaaix aengx njiec taux Kaanaa Ndoqv. Yiem ndoqv nyei naamh bung maaih deix E^faa^im Mienh nyei zingh zorpc jienv Maa^natv^se Mienh nyei zingh. Maa^natv^se nyei gapv-jaaix aengx gan ndoqv nyei baqv bung maengx jiex mingh donx jienv koiv.
Joshua17:10 Naamh bung maengx benx E^faa^im Mienh nyei deic-bung. Baqv bung maengx benx Maa^natv^se nyei. Yaac maaih koiv zoux ninh mbuo nyei gapv-jaaix. Baqv bung maengx daaux jienv Aa^se Deic. Dong bung maengx daaux Itc^saax^kaa Deic.
Joshua17:11 Yiem Itc^saax^kaa caux Aa^se nyei deic gu'nyuoz Maa^natv^se aengx maaih Mbetc Saan Zingh
Joshua17:12 Mv baac Maa^natv^se Mienh zunc wuov deix zingh nyei mienh maiv cuotv weic zuqc Kaa^naa^an Mienh corc ngaengc jienv yiem wuov norm deic-bung.
Joshua17:13 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en Mienh henv daaih ziouc aapv Kaa^naa^an Mienh zuqc zoux gong kouv

Joshua23:5 Ziouv
Joshua23:6 “Weic naaiv
Joshua23:7 Hnangv naaic meih mbuo ziouc maiv caux yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zengc njiec naaiv deix ziex fingx mienh jiu tong
Joshua23:8 Meih mbuo oix zuqc kaux wuonv Ziouv
Joshua23:9 “Weic zuqc Ziouv zorqv youc hlo youc henv nyei fingx-fingx yiem meih mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx zunc cuotv mingh. Taux ih zanc maiv maaih haaix dauh mborqv duqv hingh meih mbuo.
Joshua23:10 Meih mbuo yietc laanh mienh haih zunc duqv yietc cin laanh mienh biaux
Joshua23:11 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim
Joshua23:12 “Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux aengx mingh caux yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zengc njiec nyei ganh fingx mienh jiu tong
Joshua23:13 meih mbuo oix zuqc hiuv dingc
Joshua23:14 “Ih zanc yie guei seix nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv. Meih mbuo dauh dauh yiem hnyouv hiuv duqv Ziouv
Joshua23:15 Mv baac hnangv Ziouv
Joshua23:16 Se gorngv meih mbuo ngaengc Ziouv
Joshua24:1 Yo^su^waa heuc fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh daaih gapv zunv yiem Sekem Zingh
Joshua24:2 Yo^su^waa ziouc gorngv mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx
Joshua24:3 Yie dorh meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv
Joshua24:4 Yie yaac ceix Yaakopv caux Esaau bun I^sakc. Yie bun Se^i nyei mbong-aiv dorngx Esaau weic benx ninh nyei buonc
Joshua24:5 “+‘Yie paaiv Mose caux Aalon mingh yaac bun I^yipv Mienh zuqc domh zeqc naanc. Nqa'haav yie dorh meih mbuo cuotv daaih.
Joshua24:6 Yie dorh meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
Joshua24:7 Wuov zanc ninh mbuo qaqv tov Ziouv tengx
Joshua24:8 “+‘Yie yaac dorh meih mbuo daaih taux Aa^mo^lai Mienh yiem nyei deic-bung
Joshua24:9 Wuov zanc Sipc^bo nyei dorn
Joshua24:10 Mv baac yie maiv muangx Mbaa^laa^am nyei waac. Weic naaiv ninh cingx daaih buang waac meih mbuo. Yie ziouc njoux meih mbuo biaux ndutv Mbaalaakv nyei buoz-ndiev.
Joshua24:11 “+‘Meih mbuo jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih daaih taux Ye^li^ko Zingh. Ye^li^ko Zingh nyei mienh caux meih mbuo mborqv jaax. Aengx maaih Aa^mo^lai Mienh
Joshua24:12 Yie bun mueiz-njeiv mingh ndaangc meih mbuo
Joshua24:13 Yie ceix bun meih mbuo nyei deic-bung se meih mbuo maiv ndortv qaqv zoux haaix nyungc nyei deic-bung. Yie ceix bun meih mbuo nyei zingh maiv zeiz meih mbuo ganh ceix mv baac meih mbuo duqv bieqc mingh yiem. Meih mbuo duqv nyanc dongh maiv zeiz meih mbuo zuangx nyei a'ngunc huingx caux ga'lanv huingx nyei biouv.
Joshua24:14 “Weic naaiv
Joshua24:15 Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv buangv hnyouv fu-sux Ziouv
Joshua24:16 Zuangx baeqc fingx dau
Joshua24:17 weic zuqc Ziouv
Joshua24:18 Ziouv zunc fingx-fingx mienh yiem yie mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv
Joshua24:19 Yo^su^waa gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
Joshua24:20 Se gorngv meih mbuo guangc Ziouv
Joshua24:21 Baeqc fingx dau Yo^su^waa
Joshua24:22 Yo^su^waa aengx gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
Joshua24:23 Yo^su^waa ziouc gorngv
Joshua24:24 Baeqc fingx gorngv mbuox Yo^su^waa
Joshua24:25 Wuov hnoi Yo^su^waa ziouc caux baeqc fingx liepc ngaengc waac. Yiem Sekem Zingh ninh liepc leiz-latc caux leiz bun ninh mbuo.
Joshua24:26 Yo^su^waa ziouc fiev naaiv deix waac yiem Tin-Hungh nyei Leiz-Latc Sou. Ninh yaac zorqv norm domh la'bieiv liepc daaih an jienv domh mba'ong zuei ndiangx-gorn ndiev
Joshua24:27 Yo^su^waa gorngv mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx
Joshua24:28 Yo^su^waa ziouc heuc baeqc fingx gorqv-mienh nzuonx gorqv-mienh nzipc nyei buonc dorngx mi'aqv.
Joshua24:29 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
Joshua24:30 I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh ninh nyei sei mingh zangx jienv ninh ganh nzipc nyei buonc ndau
Joshua24:31 Yiem Yo^su^waa nyei seix zeiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh fu-sux Ziouv. Yo^su^waa guei seix liuz
Joshua24:32 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc ninh mbuo dorh jienv Yosepv nyei mbungv cuotv. Ninh mbuo zangx jienv yiem Sekem
Joshua24:33 Aalon nyei dorn
Judges1:1 Yo^su^waa guei seix mi'aqv
Judges1:2 Ziouv gorngv
Judges1:3 Yu^ndaa Fingx nyei mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Judges1:4 Yu^ndaa Mienh ziouc mingh mborqv jaax. Ziouv zorqv Kaa^naa^an Mienh caux Be^litv^si Mienh jiu bun yiem ninh mbuo nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem Mbesekv Mungv daix yietc waanc dauh mienh.
Judges1:5 Yiem wuov ninh mbuo buangh Aa^ndo^ni Mbesekv ziouc caux ninh mborqv jaax yaac mborqv hingh Kaa^naa^an caux Be^litv^si Mienh.
Judges1:6 Aa^ndo^ni Mbesekv biaux mv baac ninh mbuo zunc zaaic
Judges1:7 Aa^ndo^ni Mbesekv gorngv
Judges1:8 Yu^ndaa Mienh yaac mborqv Ye^lu^saa^lem
Judges1:9 Nqa'haav Yu^ndaa Mienh mingh mborqv yiem mbong-aiv dorngx
Judges1:10 Yu^ndaa Mienh aengx mingh mborqv yiem He^mbo^lon Zingh nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh. Zinh ndaangc He^mbo^lon Zingh nyei mbuox heuc Ki^li^yaatv Aan^mbaa. Ninh mbuo mborqv hingh Sesai
Judges1:11 Yu^ndaa Mienh yiem naaic cuotv mingh mborqv Nde^mbi Zingh nyei mienh. Nde^mbi Zingh zinh ndaangc heuc Ki^li^yaatv Sefe.
Judges1:12 Kaalepv gorngv
Judges1:13 Kaalepv nyei youz
Judges1:14 Cuotv gaengh wuov zanc Akc^saax heuc ninh nyei nqox
Judges1:15 Ninh nyei sieqv dau
Judges1:16 Mose nyei ong-daa
Judges1:17 Yu^ndaa Mienh caux ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Judges1:18 Yu^ndaa Mienh yaac caangv duqv Gaasaa Zingh
Judges1:19 Ziouv caux Yu^ndaa Mienh yiem. Ninh mbuo ziouc zunc yiem mbong-aiv dorngx nyei mienh cuotv mv baac yiem ndau-baengh nyei mienh ninh mbuo zunc maiv cuotv
Judges1:20 Yu^ndaa Mienh ziux Mose paaiv nyei waac zorqv He^mbo^lon Zingh jiu bun Kaalepv. Kaalepv ziouc zunc cuotv Aanaakv nyei buo dauh zeiv-fun.
Judges1:21 Mv baac Mben^yaa^min Mienh maiv zunc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Ye^mbutc Mienh cuotv. Weic naaiv Ye^mbutc Mienh cingx daaih caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh taux ih jaax hnoi.
Judges1:22 Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun yaac mingh mborqv Mbetc^en Zingh. Ziouv yaac caux ninh mbuo yiem.
Judges1:23 Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun paaiv mienh mingh Mbetc^en Zingh caaiv juoqv. Zinh ndaangc naaiv norm zingh nyei mbuox heuc Lutv.
Judges1:24 Caaiv juoqv mienh buatc dauh m'jangc dorn yiem wuov norm zingh cuotv daaih ziouc caux ninh gorngv
Judges1:25 Wuov dauh mienh ziouc mbuox bieqc zingh nyei jauv ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo ziouc longc nzuqc ndaauv daix nzengc zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh
Judges1:26 Wuov dauh mienh ziouc mingh Hitv^tai Mienh nyei deic-bung
Judges1:27 Maa^natv^se Mienh maiv duqv zunc cuotv Mbetc Saan caux wuov norm zingh nyei fiuv-laangz nyei mienh
Judges1:28 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^ en Mienh henv jiez daaih
Judges1:29 E^faa^im Mienh maiv zunc yiem Gese Mungv nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh cuotv. Hnangv naaic Kaa^naa^an Mienh corc yiem jienv ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx.
Judges1:30 Se^mbu^lun Mienh yaac maiv zunc Kitv^lon caux Naa^haa^lon Zingh nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh cuotv. Kaa^naa^an Mienh corc yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx mv baac Se^mbu^lun Mienh aapv Kaa^naa^an Mienh zoux gong kouv nyei.
Judges1:31 Aa^se Mienh yaac maiv zunc Akc^ko Zingh nyei mienh fai Sai^ndorn Zingh fai Akc^laapv Zingh fai Akc^sipv Zingh fai Hen^mbaa Zingh fai Aafekv Zingh fai Le^hopc Zingh nyei mienh cuotv.
Judges1:32 Mv baac Aa^se Fingx yiem buonv-deic nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh mbu'ndongx
Judges1:33 Napv^taa^li Mienh yaac maiv zunc Mbetc Semetv caux Mbetc Aanaatv Zingh nyei mienh cuotv
Judges1:34 Aa^mo^lai Mienh aapv Ndaan Mienh yiem mbong
Judges1:35 Yiem Heletv Mbong
Judges1:36 Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei gapv-jaaix se yangh Aakc^lapv^mbim Zorng jiex nyei dorngx
Judges2:1 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh yiem Gin^gaan mingh taux Mbokim. Ninh gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Judges2:2 Meih mbuo maiv dungx caux naaiv norm deic-bung nyei mienh liepc ngaengc waac. Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc caeqv guangc ninh mbuo nyei ziec-dorngh.’ Mv baac meih mbuo maiv muangx yie hatc nyei waac. Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc hnangv naaiv nor zoux?
Judges2:3 Weic naaiv
Judges2:4 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv naaiv deix waac mbuox liuz I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Judges2:5 Ninh mbuo yaac cuotv wuov norm dorngx nyei mbuox heuc Mbokim. Ninh mbuo yiem wuov zorqv ga'naaiv fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv.
Judges2:6 Yo^su^waa heuc I^saa^laa^en baeqc fingx bun nzaanx liuz
Judges2:7 Yiem Yo^su^waa nyei seix zeiv baeqc fingx fu-sux Ziouv. Ziangh gauh lauh Yo^su^waa wuov deix mienh gox
Judges2:8 Ziouv nyei bou
Judges2:9 I^saa^laa^en Mienh dorh ninh mingh zangx jienv ninh ganh nzipc nyei buonc ndau
Judges2:10 Naaiv doic mienh guei seix nzengc mi'aqv. Nqa'haav aengx maaih doic mienh cuotv daaih. Ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv Ziouv
Judges2:11 Hoz daaih ziux Ziouv mangc
Judges2:12 Ninh mbuo guangc Ziouv
Judges2:13 Ninh mbuo guangc Ziouv
Judges2:14 Weic naaiv Ziouv nouz haic I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh ziouc zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem luv mienh wuov deix mienh nyei buoz-ndiev
Judges2:15 Ninh mbuo haaix zanc cuotv mingh mborqv jaax
Judges2:16 Ziouv liepc domh jien daaih weic njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv luv ninh mbuo wuov deix mienh nyei buoz-ndiev.
Judges2:17 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv kangv muangx ninh mbuo nyei domh jien nyei waac. Ninh mbuo maaih hieh hnyouv mingh zaangc
Judges2:18 Ziouv haaix zanc weic ninh mbuo liepc domh jien
Judges2:19 Mv baac domh jien guei seix liuz
Judges2:20 Hnangv naaic Ziouv qiex jiez haic I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh gorngv
Judges2:21 Weic naaiv
Judges2:22 Weic zuqc yie oix longc wuov deix fingx seix I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Judges2:23 Hnangv naaic Ziouv liouh njiec naaiv deix fingx-fingx mienh yiem naaiv norm deic-bung
Judges3:1 Naaiv se Ziouv liouh njiec nyei fingx weic kauv dongh maiv caux Kaa^naa^an Mienh mborqv jiex jaax nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Judges3:2 Ninh kungx oix njaaux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei hoz doic
Judges3:3 Zengc njiec nyei fingx maaih Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei biaa dauh bieiv zeiv
Judges3:4 Liouh njiec naaiv deix ziex fingx se weic seix I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Judges3:5 Weic naaiv I^saa^laa^en Mienh cingx daaih yiem Kaa^naa^an Mienh
Judges3:6 I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh gorngv wuov deix mienh nyei sieqv daaih zoux auv
Judges3:7 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Judges3:8 Weic naaiv Ziouv za'gengh qiex jiez
Judges3:9 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Ziouv ziouc liepc dauh mienh daaih njoux ninh mbuo. Se Kaalepv nyei youz
Judges3:10 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh njiec daaih yiem Otc^ni^en. Ninh ziouc zoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei domh jien
Judges3:11 Deic-bung ziouc taaix-baengh feix ziepc hnyangx. Kenatv nyei dorn
Judges3:12 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Judges3:13 Ekc^lon heuc Ammon Mienh caux Aa^maa^lekv Mienh daaih gapv zunv doic mingh mborqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac caangv duqv Daau-Lomc Zingh.
Judges3:14 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc fu-sux Mo^apc nyei hungh diex
Judges3:15 Yiem gau
Judges3:16 E^hutv daav duqv zung nzuqc ndaauv
Judges3:17 E^hutv ziouc dorh nzou-zinh mingh bun Mo^apc nyei hungh
Judges3:18 E^hutv zorqv nzou-zinh bun liuz
Judges3:19 Taux nitv fatv Gin^gaan nyei miuc-fangx ninh aengx daaux sin nzuonx daaih gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Judges3:20 E^hutv mingh lorz hungh diex. Hungh diex ganh zueiz jienv gu'nguaaic wuov nzangh biauv
Judges3:21 E^hutv sung zaaix jieqv buoz
Judges3:22 Liemh nzuqc jouv yaac bieqc muotv nzengc
Judges3:23 E^hutv cuotv ga'nyiec daaih guon gu'nguaaic wuov nzangh biauv nyei gaengh aengx forv jienv.
Judges3:24 E^hutv ziouc mingh mi'aqv. Nqa'haav hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh daaih mangc buatc gu'nguaaic wuov nzangh biauv nyei gaengh forv jienv. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Judges3:25 Zuov lauh haic
Judges3:26 Ninh mbuo yiem wuov zuov nyei ziangh hoc
Judges3:27 Mingh taux
Judges3:28 Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Judges3:29 Dongh wuov zanc ninh mbuo daix Mo^apc Mienh leih maiv go yietc waanc dauh. Yietc zungv ziangh duqv longx
Judges3:30 Wuov hnoi Mo^apc Mienh suei
Judges3:31 Yiem E^hutv jiex mingh maaih Aanaatv nyei dorn

Judges4:3 Weic zuqc Yaa^mbin Hungh maaih juov baeqv jaax mborqv jaax nyei hlieqv-maaz-cie yaac qaqv zeix I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyic ziepc hnyangx
Judges4:4 Wuov zanc Lapv^bi^ndotc nyei auv
Judges4:5 Ninh yiem E^faa^im mbong-aiv dorngx

Judges4:7 Yie zungv oix bun Yaa^mbin Hungh nyei baeng-bieiv
Judges4:8 Mbaalaakv gorngv mbuox Nde^mbo^laa
Judges4:9 Nde^mbo^laa gorngv
Judges4:10 Mbaalaakv ziouc heuc Se^mbu^lun caux Napv^taa^li Mienh mingh Ke^ndetc. Maaih yietc waanc dauh mienh gan ninh mingh. Nde^mbo^laa yaac caux jienv mingh.
Judges4:11 Kenai Mienh
Judges4:12 Maaih mienh mingh mbuox Si^se^laa
Judges4:13 Si^se^laa ziouc heuc nzoih ninh nyei juov baeqv jaax mborqv jaax nyei hlieqv-maaz-cie
Judges4:14 Nde^mbo^laa ziouc gorngv mbuox Mbaalaakv
Judges4:15 Ziouv zoux bun Si^se^laa caux ninh nyei yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux jun-baeng lunc nzengc ziouc zuqc Mbaalaakv nyei nzuqc ndaauv daix. Si^se^laa ziouc njiec mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie tiux biaux mi'aqv.
Judges4:16 Mv baac Mbaalaakv zunc jienv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux jun-baeng mingh taux Haa^lo^setv Haa^go^yim. Si^se^laa nyei jun-baeng zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daic nzengc
Judges4:17 Kungx maaih Si^se^laa tiux biaux jienv mingh taux Kenai Mienh
Judges4:18 Yaa^en ziouc cuotv daaih zipv Si^se^laa. Ninh gorngv
