Judges4:23 Wuov hnoi
Judges4:24 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gunv zoux gunv henv
Judges5:1 Wuov hnoi Nde^mbo^laa caux Aa^mbi^no^am nyei dorn
Judges5:2 “Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv
Judges5:3 “Zuangx hungh diex aah! Muangx maah! Zuangx bieiv zeiv aac
Judges5:4 “ Ziouv aah! Meih yiem Se^i cuotv wuov zanc
Judges5:5 Mbong yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien dongz
Judges5:6 “Yiem Aanaatv nyei dorn
Judges5:7 Zoux lingh zoux ndeic nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh dingh gong
Judges5:8 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ginv siang-zienh wuov zanc
Judges5:9 Yie nyei hnyouv jangx I^saa^laa^en nyei bieiv zeiv
Judges5:10 “Meih geh lorh baeqc nyei mienh aah! Dongh zueiz jienv dimc geh orn nyei suangx
Judges5:11 Muangx yiem zaangh wuom dorngx baaux nzung mienh nyei qiex. Ninh mbuo nzamc jienv gorngv Ziouv hingh jiex nyei sic
Judges5:12 “Nde^mbo^laa aah! Dorh jauv
Judges5:13 “Wuov zanc zengc njiec nyei mienh
Judges5:14 Maaih gorn-buonv yiem Aa^maa^lekv nyei mienh yiem E^faa^im njiec daaih. Mben^yaa^min Mienh yiem meih nyei baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx gan jienv meih. Maaih bieiv zeiv yiem Maaki njiec daaih
Judges5:15 Itc^saax^kaa nyei bieiv zeiv caux Nde^mbo^laa daaih
Judges5:16 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc yiem wuov ba'gi yungh laanh muangx biomv bun ba'gi yungh muangx nyei hlauv-ndongh nux nyei qiex? Lu^mben Mienh nyei bungh buonc mienh qaqv zaah mangc ganh nyei hnyouv.
Judges5:17 Gi^le^aatc yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Ndaan Fingx weic haaix diuc yiem jienv wuov nzangv? Aa^se Fingx yiem jienv koiv-hlen maiv guen maiv sic nyei
Judges5:18 Se^mbu^lun Fingx maiv longc maengc nyei bieqc mingh mborqv jaax. Napv^taa^li Mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei yiem hlang nyei mborqv jaax ciangv.
Judges5:19 “Yietc zungv hungh diex daaih taux ziouc mborqv jaax
Judges5:20 Hleix yiem lungh tengx mborqv jaax
Judges5:21 Kison Ndaaih guaatv ninh mbuo mingh
Judges5:22 Wuov zanc maaz-deih caaiv ndau mbui haic. Ninh nyei maaz-gouv lorpc lorpc nyei tiux mingh.
Judges5:23 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv
Judges5:24 “Puix duqv ceng camv jiex wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn se Kenai Mienh
Judges5:25 Si^se^laa tov wuom
Judges5:26 Yaa^en sung buoz zorqv corng ndopv-liuh nyei dongc daaih. Mbiaauc jieqv buoz nanv jienv mba'mborng-ngaengv
Judges5:27 Si^se^laa king njiec ndau
Judges5:28 “Si^se^laa nyei maa yiem fong muonh wuov mangc. Ninh yiem fong muonh nyei piaeng heuc jienv gorngv
Judges5:29 Ninh gauh cong-mengh jiex nyei juang-nyouz dau ninh. Si^se^laa nyei maa zungv dau ninh ganh gorngv
Judges5:30 ‘Ninh mbuo lorz jienv yaac bun nqoi mborqv jaax caangv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv maiv zeiz? Yietc dauh baeng duqv yietc dauh
Judges5:31 “O Ziouv aah! Tov bun meih nyei yietc zungv win-wangv hnangv naaiv nor zuqc mietc. Mv baac tov bun hnamv meih wuov deix hnangv mba'hnoi
Judges6:1 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Judges6:2 Mi^ndien Mienh gauh henv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Laaix Mi^ndien Mienh zeix I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Judges6:3 I^saa^laa^en Mienh haaix zanc zuangx ga'naaiv
Judges6:4 Wuov deix mienh liepc ciangv wuov ndeic ziouc zoux waaic gaeng-zuangx mingh taux Gaasaa Zingh. Ninh mbuo maiv liouh yietc nyungc bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyanc. Ba'gi yungh
Judges6:5 Naaiv deix mienh dorh jienv saeng-kuv caux ndopv-liuh daaih hnangv yietc guanh yietc guanh jopv-nyeic nor. Mienh caux lorh torh camv! haic
Judges6:6 I^saa^laa^en Mienh laaix Mi^ndien Mienh zoux nyei jauv jomc duqv kouv haic. Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc jienv tov Ziouv tengx.
Judges6:7 I^saa^laa^en Mienh laaix Mi^ndien Mienh tov Ziouv tengx wuov zanc
Judges6:8 Ziouv ziouc paaiv dauh douc waac mienh daaih lorz I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Douc waac mienh gorngv
Judges6:9 Yie njoux meih mbuo biaux ndutv I^yipv Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev caux zeix meih mbuo yietc zungv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Yie zunc ninh mbuo yiem meih mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv naaiv norm deic-bung
Judges6:10 Yie gorngv mbuox meih mbuo
Judges6:11 Nqa'haav Ziouv nyei fin-mienh mingh O^faa^laa Laangz
Judges6:12 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh hinc cuotv daaih bun Gi^nde^on buatc wuov zanc
Judges6:13 Gi^nde^on dau ninh
Judges6:14 Ziouv huin nzuonx daaih mangc Gi^nde^on aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges6:15 Gi^nde^on gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges6:16 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges6:17 Gi^nde^on dau ninh
Judges6:18 Tov meih maiv dungx gaengh mingh haaix. Zuov yie aengx daaih lorz meih aengx dorh yie fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv daaih an meih nyei nza'hmien.” Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv
Judges6:19 Gi^nde^on ziouc nzuonx biauv mingh liuc leiz dauh yungh dorn
Judges6:20 Tin-Hungh nyei fin-mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges6:21 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh ziouc longc dongh ninh nanv jienv wuov diuh biaav nyei dueiv-mueiz coqv zuqc wuov deix orv caux maiv an bingv nyei njuov
Judges6:22 Gi^nde^on zieqv duqv za'gengh benx Ziouv nyei fin-mienh
Judges6:23 Mv baac Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges6:24 Gi^nde^on ziouc yiem wuov weic Ziouv ceix norm ziec-dorngh yaac cuotv wuov norm dorngx nyei mbuox heuc
Judges6:25 Dongh naaic muonz Ziouv gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges6:26 Meih oix zuqc yiem naaiv norm wuonv nyei dorngx gu'nguaaic weic Ziouv
Judges6:27 Gi^nde^on ziouc dorh ziepc dauh ninh nyei bou ei Ziouv mbuox nyei waac zoux. Lungh hnoi zanc ninh maiv gaamv zoux
Judges6:28 Da'nyeic ndorm
Judges6:29 Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh naaic laanh
Judges6:30 Zingh nyei mienh doix Yo^aatc gorngv
Judges6:31 Mv baac Yo^aatc dau daaih gox ninh nyei dorn wuov deix mienh
Judges6:32 Weic naaiv
Judges6:33 Wuov zanc Mi^ndien Mienh caux Aa^maa^lekv Mienh yietc zungv caux dong bung nyei mienh gapv zunv jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih
Judges6:34 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh ziouc njiec daaih yiem Gi^nde^on. Gi^nde^on ziouc biomv jorng heuc Aa^mbi^ye^se Mienh daaih zunv gan ninh mingh.
Judges6:35 Ninh paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh gormx Maa^natv^se
Judges6:36 Gi^nde^on gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
Judges6:37 wuov nyungc yie zorqv ba'gi yungh biei an jienv mborqv mbiauh ciangv. Se gorngv kungx bun mbiungc-suiv pinx ba'gi yungh biei ndorn hnangv
Judges6:38 Yaac za'gengh hnangv wuov nor. Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
Judges6:39 Gi^nde^on ziouc gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
Judges6:40 Wuov muonz Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Kungx ba'gi yungh biei mborngx nqaai nyei
Judges7:1 Yelupv Mbaa^an
Judges7:2 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges7:3 Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc zunh bun zuangx mienh muangx
Judges7:4 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges7:5 Gi^nde^on ziouc dorh wuov deix mienh njiec taux wuom-hlen. Ziouv gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges7:6 Longc buoz puangv wuom faaux daaih mbiec wuov deix maaih faam-baeqv dauh. Zengc njiec wuov deix yietc zungv gueic njiec hopv.
Judges7:7 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges7:8 Gi^nde^on bun wuov deix nzengc njiec nyei mienh nzuonx ninh mbuo ganh nyei biauv
Judges7:9 Dongh naaic muonz Ziouv gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges7:10 Mv baac se gorngv meih gamh nziex
Judges7:11 Meih duqv muangx haiz ninh mbuo gorngv haaix nyungc
Judges7:12 Mi^ndien Mienh
Judges7:13 Gi^nde^on mingh taux wuov zanc
Judges7:14 Ninh nyei doic dau
Judges7:15 Gi^nde^on haiz liuz naaiv norm mbeix caux porv mbeix nyei eix leiz
Judges7:16 Gi^nde^on ziouc zorqv wuov deix faam-baeqv dauh baeng bun nqoi zoux buo guanh. Ninh bun dauh dauh nanv jienv jorng caux nie-mor-kungx
Judges7:17 Gi^nde^on mbuox ziangx ninh mbuo
Judges7:18 Yie caux gan yie wuov deix biomv jorng nyei ziangh hoc
Judges7:19 Gi^nde^on caux gan ninh wuov deix yietc baeqv dauh mienh ziouc mingh taux ciangv ga'hlen ndaamv muonz nyei dorngx
Judges7:20 Buo guanh baeng zungv biomv jorng yaac mborqv huv nie-mor. Zaaix jieqv buoz nanv jienv douz-baav
Judges7:21 Gi^nde^on mbuo gorqv-mienh souv jienv gorqv-mienh nyei dorngx weih gormx ciangv. Mi^ndien nyei jun-baeng mbiouh mbiouh nyei heuc jienv tiux biaux.
Judges7:22 Gi^nde^on mbuo biomv faam-baeqv norm jorng wuov zanc
Judges7:23 Gi^nde^on heuc Napv^taa^li
Judges7:24 Gi^nde^on bun douc fienx mienh cuotv mingh gormx E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx mbuox mienh
Judges7:25 Ninh mbuo yaac zorqv duqv i dauh Mi^ndien Mienh nyei bieiv-zeiv
Judges8:1 E^faa^im Mienh ziouc gorngv Gi^nde^on. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Judges8:2 Gi^nde^on dau ninh mbuo
Judges8:3 Tin-Hungh zorqv Mi^ndien Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv
Judges8:4 Gi^nde^on caux gan ninh wuov deix faam-baeqv dauh baeng
Judges8:5 Gi^nde^on gorngv mbuox Sukc^kotv Zingh nyei mienh
Judges8:6 Mv baac Sukc^kotv Zingh nyei jien gorngv
Judges8:7 Gi^nde^on ziouc gorngv
Judges8:8 Ninh yiem naaic faaux taux Be^nu^en Zingh yaac fih hnangv nyei gorngv mbuox Be^nu^en Mienh
Judges8:9 Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox Be^nu^en Mienh
Judges8:10 Wuov zanc Ze^mbaa caux Sanx^mun^naa caux ninh mbuo nyei yietc waanc biaa cin dauh baeng yiem Kaanko Zingh. Ninh mbuo dong bung mienh zengc njiec nyei jun-baeng maaih mbuoqc naaiv weic zuqc yietc sinx i waanc dauh nanv nzuqc ndaauv nyei jun-baeng zuqc daix daic mi'aqv.
Judges8:11 Gi^nde^on gan jienv deic-bung youh corng ndopv-liuh wuov deix mienh nyei jauv mingh No^mbaa caux Yokv^mbe^haa Zingh nyei dong bung maengx bieqc mingh mborqv Mi^ndien Mienh nyei jun-baeng guanh
Judges8:12 Mi^ndien Mienh nyei i dauh hungh
Judges8:13 Yo^aatc nyei dorn
Judges8:14 Ninh zorqv duqv dauh Sukc^kotv Zingh nyei houh saeng daaih zaah naaic ninh. Wuov dauh dorn ziouc fiev cietv ziepc cietv dauh Sukc^kotv Mienh nyei jien nyei mbuox
Judges8:15 Gi^nde^on ziouc daaih lorz Sukc^kotv Zingh nyei mienh yaac gorngv
Judges8:16 Gi^nde^on ziouc zorqv wuov norm zingh nyei mienh gox daaih longc deic-bung-huaang nyei njimv-cou njimv-muonc mborqv weic njaaux Sukc^kotv Zingh nyei mienh.
Judges8:17 Ninh yaac caeqv guangc siouv Be^nu^en Zingh nyei laauh yaac daix wuov norm zingh nyei mienh.
Judges8:18 Gi^nde^on naaic Ze^mbaa caux Sanx^mun^naa
Judges8:19 Gi^nde^on ziouc gorngv
Judges8:20 Gi^nde^on ziouc heuc ninh nyei dorn-la'gauv
Judges8:21 Ze^mbaa caux Sanx^mun^naa ziouc gorngv
Judges8:22 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv mbuox Gi^nde^on
Judges8:23 Gi^nde^on gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Judges8:24 Gi^nde^on aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Judges8:25 Ninh mbuo dau Gi^nde^on
Judges8:26 Gi^nde^on tov daaih nyei jiem-m'normh hiun maaih hniev-daauh leih maiv go ziepc nyeic joih jiem. Cuotv liuz naaiv aengx maaih Mi^ndien hungh zorng sin nyei siou-setv
Judges8:27 Gi^nde^on ziouc longc naaiv deix jiem zoux efotv an jienv ninh ganh nyei buonv-zingh
Judges8:28 Hnangv naaic Mi^ndien Mienh suei I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Judges8:29 Yo^aatc nyei dorn
Judges8:30 Gi^nde^on maaih cietv ziepc dauh cien dorn
Judges8:31 Gi^nde^on nyei jaav-zeih auv yiem Sekem Zingh yaac yungz duqv dauh dorn bun ninh. Gi^nde^on tengx cuotv mbuox heuc Aa^mbi^me^lekv.
Judges8:32 Yo^aatc nyei dorn
Judges8:33 Gi^nde^on guei seix liuz
Judges8:34 I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv jangx Ziouv
Judges8:35 Ninh mbuo yaac bungx ndortv
Judges9:1 Yelupv Mbaa^an nyei dorn
Judges9:2 “Tov naaic gaax Sekem Zingh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx
Judges9:3 Ninh nyei maa nyei cien-ceqv ziouc douc naaiv deix waac bun Sekem Zingh nyei zuangx mienh muangx. Sekem Zingh nyei mienh nyei hnyouv ziouc bieqc Aa^mbi^me^lekv wuov bung mi'aqv
Judges9:4 Ninh mbuo zorqv Mbaa^an Mbelitv miuc-biauv nyei cietv ziepc norm nyaanh bun Aa^mbi^me^lekv. Aa^mbi^me^lekv ziouc dorh wuov deix nyaanh mingh cingv deix maiv gunv maengc nyei mienh waaic mienh daaih gan ninh.
Judges9:5 Ninh ziouc mingh O^faa^laa Zingh
Judges9:6 Sekem Zingh nyei mienh caux Mbetc Minlo nyei mienh yietc zungv ziouc gapv zunv yiem Sekem Zingh
Judges9:7 Maaih mienh zorqv naaiv deix sic mingh mbuox Yotaam. Ninh ziouc faaux Ge^li^sim Mbong-ningv heuc mbui nyei mbuox Sekem Mienh
Judges9:8 Maaih hnoi nor
Judges9:9 “Mv baac ga'lanv ndiangx dau
Judges9:10 “Wuov deix ndiangx ziouc mingh gorngv mbuox ngongh nyorx ndiangx
Judges9:11 “Ngongh nyorx ndiangx dau
Judges9:12 “Wuov deix ndiangx ziouc mingh gorngv mbuox a'ngunc hmei
Judges9:13 “Mv baac a'ngunc hmei dau
Judges9:14 “Zuangx ndiangx ziouc mingh gorngv mbuox maaih njimv nyei ndiangx-fomv
Judges9:15 “Maaih njimv nyei ndiangx-fomv dau wuov deix ndiangx
Judges9:16 Yotaam aengx gorngv
Judges9:17 Zinh ndaangc yie nyei die maiv longc maengc nyei mborqv jaax weic njoux meih mbuo biaux ndutv Mi^ndien Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev.
Judges9:18 Mv baac ih hnoi meih mbuo ngaengc yie nyei die nyei hmuangv doic
Judges9:19 Se gorngv ih hnoi meih mbuo ziepc zuoqv
Judges9:20 Mv baac se gorngv maiv zeiz
Judges9:21 Yotaam ziouc gaanv jienv biaux mingh yiem Mbe^e
Judges9:22 Aa^mbi^me^lekv gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh duqv buo hnyangx.
Judges9:23 Tin-Hungh bun dauh hieh guaiv mienv bieqc Aa^mbi^me^lekv caux Sekem Mienh nyei mbu'ndongx. Sekem Zingh nyei mienh ziouc mbienv hnyouv bun Aa^mbi^me^lekv.
Judges9:24 Naaiv se weic jaauv win bun Aa^mbi^me^lekv caux Sekem Zingh nyei baeqc fingx
Judges9:25 Sekem Zingh nyei mienh bun mienh bingx jienv mbong gu'nguaaic zuov zorqv Aa^mbi^me^lekv. Da'faanh jiex wuov diuh jauv nyei mienh
Judges9:26 E^mbetc nyei dorn
Judges9:27 Ninh mbuo cuotv mingh taux a'ngunc huingx gaeqv a'ngunc biouv daaih nyueih
Judges9:28 E^mbetc nyei dorn
Judges9:29 Feix duqv naaiv deix baeqc fingx yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev
Judges9:30 Gunv wuov norm zingh nyei jien
Judges9:31 Ninh ziouc bun douc fienx mienh mingh Aa^lu^maa Mungv gorngv mbuox Aa^mbi^me^lekv
Judges9:32 Weic naaiv meih caux gan meih nyei mienh lungh muonz zanc oix zuqc mingh bingx jienv wuov ndeic zuov.
Judges9:33 Lungh ndorm nziouv
Judges9:34 Aa^mbi^me^lekv caux gan ninh wuov deix zuangx mienh ziouc lungh muonz zanc jiez sin daaih bun nqoi baeng zoux biei guanh
Judges9:35 E^mbetc nyei dorn
Judges9:36 Gaa^an buatc wuov deix mienh ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox Se^mbun
Judges9:37 Gaa^an aengx gorngv
Judges9:38 Se^mbun ziouc gorngv Gaa^an
Judges9:39 Gaa^an ziouc mingh ndaangc dorh jienv Sekem Mienh cuotv mingh caux Aa^mbi^me^lekv mborqv jaax.
Judges9:40 Aa^mbi^me^lekv ziouc zunc Gaa^an. Gaa^an yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx biaux. Maaih mienh camv haic zuqc mun
Judges9:41 Aa^mbi^me^lekv yiem jienv Aa^lu^maa. Se^mbun yaac zunc Gaa^an caux ninh nyei gorx-youz cuotv mingh
Judges9:42 Da'nyeic hnoi Sekem Mienh cuotv zingh mingh wuov ndeic. Maaih mienh mbuox Aa^mbi^me^lekv.
Judges9:43 Ninh ziouc dorh ninh nyei mienh bun nqoi zoux buo guanh mingh bingx jienv wuov ndeic zuov. Ninh buatc mienh yiem zingh cuotv daaih ninh ziouc jiez sin mingh daix ninh mbuo.
Judges9:44 Aa^mbi^me^lekv caux gan ninh nyei yietc guanh mienh ziouc gaanv tiux mingh souv jienv zingh gaengh ndaangc. Wuov deix i guanh gaanv tiux mingh wuov ndeic daix nzengc ninh mbuo yietc zungv.
Judges9:45 Aa^mbi^me^lekv ziangh hnoi mborqv wuov norm zingh taux caangv duqv mi'aqv
Judges9:46 Yiem Sekem Zingh nyei laauh nyei mienh haiz liuz naaiv deix sic
Judges9:47 Maaih mienh mingh mbuox Aa^mbi^me^lekv yiem Sekem Laauh nyei mienh mingh gapv zunv doic yiem wuov norm miuc-biauv.
Judges9:48 Aa^mbi^me^lekv caux gan ninh wuov deix mienh ziouc faaux Sanx^mon Mbong. Aa^mbi^me^lekv dorh bouv mingh jamv ndiangx-nquaah an mba'dauh ndaam jienv daaih. Ninh gorngv mbuox caux ninh yiem wuov deix mienh
Judges9:49 Zuangx mienh ziouc jamv ndiangx-nquaah ndaam gan jienv Aa^mbi^me^lekv mingh ndui gormx wuov norm weih wuonv nyei dorngx yaac bungx douz buov jienv. Yiem gu'nyuoz wuov deix Sekem Laauh nyei mienh ziouc zuqc douz buov daic nzengc. Liemh m'jangc m'sieqv
Judges9:50 Aa^mbi^me^lekv mingh weih jienv Te^mbetc Zingh yaac caangv duqv wuov norm zingh mi'aqv.
Judges9:51 Mv baac zingh gu'nyuoz maaih norm wuonv nyei laauh. Zingh nyei baeqc fingx
Judges9:52 Aa^mbi^me^lekv mborqv jienv mingh taux nitv wuov norm laauh nyei gaengh fatv nyei
Judges9:53 Wuov zanc maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn bungx gu'nguaaic maengx morc njiec dopc zuqc Aa^mbi^me^lekv nyei m'nqorngv-korqv mbaaix mi'aqv.
Judges9:54 Aa^mbi^me^lekv beqv jienv heuc tengx ninh dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh
Judges9:55 I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc Aa^mbi^me^lekv daic mi'aqv. Gorqv-mienh ziouc nzuonx gorqv-mienh nyei dorngx aqv.
Judges9:56 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor winh nzuonx bun Aa^mbi^me^lekv
Judges9:57 Sekem Mienh zoux nyei yietc zungv orqv sic Tin-Hungh yaac winh bun ndortv zuqc ninh mbuo ganh. Yelupv Mbaa^an nyei dorn
Judges10:1 Aa^mbi^me^lekv guei seix liuz
Judges10:2 Ninh zoux domh jien dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyic ziepc faam hnyangx liuz
Judges10:3 Jiex daaih maaih Gi^le^aatc Mienh
Judges10:4 Ninh maaih faah ziepc dauh dorn geh faah ziepc dauh lorh
Judges10:5 Jaa^i guei seix mingh
Judges10:6 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Judges10:7 Ziouv ziouc qiex jiez
Judges10:8 Wuov hnyangx ninh mbuo zeix yaac hoic I^saa^laa^en Mienh kouv haic. Ziepc betv hnyangx gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo zeix yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx
Judges10:9 Ammon Mienh yaac jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mingh mborqv Yu^ndaa Mienh
Judges10:10 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc heuc jienv jouh Ziouv. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Judges10:11 Ziouv gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Judges10:12 Sai^ndorn Mienh
Judges10:13 Mv baac meih mbuo corc guangc yie mingh fu-sux nyiec nyei zienh. Weic naaiv
Judges10:14 Meih mbuo gunv mingh heuc dongh meih mbuo ganh ginv daaih wuov deix zienh aqv. Meih mbuo zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc
Judges10:15 I^saa^laa^en Mienh dau Ziouv
Judges10:16 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc guangc yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx ganh fingx mienh nyei zienh aengx fu-sux Ziouv. Ziouv buatc I^saa^laa^en Mienh ndongc naaiv kouv
Judges10:17 Zoux hlo nyei Ammon Mienh heuc ninh mbuo nyei baeng zorqv ninh mbuo mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc
Judges10:18 Gi^le^aatc Mienh nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv
Judges11:1 Gi^le^aatc Mienh
Judges11:2 Gi^le^aatc nyei zien auv yaac yungz duqv camv-dauh dorn bun ninh. Nqa'haav wuov deix dorn hlo daaih
Judges11:3 Yepv^taa ziouc biaux ninh nyei muoz-doic
Judges11:4 Jiex daaih
Judges11:5 Wuov zanc Gi^le^aatc Mienh nyei mienh gox mingh Topv Deic-Bung oix dorh Yepv^taa nzuonx daaih.
Judges11:6 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Yepv^taa
Judges11:7 Yepv^taa dau Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh gox
Judges11:8 Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh gox gorngv mbuox Yepv^taa
Judges11:9 Yepv^taa ziouc gorngv mbuox Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh gox
Judges11:10 Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh gox dau Yepv^taa
Judges11:11 Yepv^taa ziouc caux jienv Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh gox nzuonx. Baeqc fingx orn Yepv^taa zoux bieiv zeiv
Judges11:12 Yepv^taa ziouc paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh naaic Ammon Mienh nyei hungh diex
Judges11:13 Ammon Mienh nyei hungh diex dau Yepv^taa nyei douc fienx mienh
Judges11:14 Yepv^taa aengx paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh lorz Ammon Mienh nyei hungh.
Judges11:15 Yepv^taa gorngv
Judges11:16 Dongh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih wuov zanc
Judges11:17 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh mbuox E^ndom nyei hungh diex
Judges11:18 “+‘Nqa'haav ninh mbuo yangh deic-bung-huaang
Judges11:19 “+‘I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh Hetv^mbon Zingh lorz Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges11:20 Mv baac Si^honx maiv bungx hnyouv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yangh ninh nyei deic-bung jiex. Si^honx ziouc heuc ninh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx daaih gapv zunv liepc ciangv yiem Yaa^haatv caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax.
Judges11:21 “+‘ Ziouv
Judges11:22 Ninh mbuo caangv duqv Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei deic-bung yiem Aannon Ndaaih mingh taux Yapv^mborkc Ndaaih yaac yiem deic-bung-huaang mingh taux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih.
Judges11:23 “+‘Hnangv naaic Ziouv
Judges11:24 Meih nyei zienh
Judges11:25 Meih gauh longx Mo^apc nyei hungh
Judges11:26 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Hetv^mbon Zingh caux weih gormx nyei fiuv-laangz
Judges11:27 Hnangv naaiv
Judges11:28 Mv baac Ammon Mienh nyei hungh maiv muangx Yepv^taa paaiv mingh nyei mienh gorngv nyei waac.
Judges11:29 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh ziouc daaih yiem Yepv^taa. Ninh ziouc jiex Gi^le^aatc caux Maa^natv^se aengx jiex Gi^le^aatc Deic nyei Mitv^baa Zingh. Ninh yiem Gi^le^aatc Deic nyei Mitv^baa jiex mingh taux Ammon Mienh yiem nyei dorngx.
Judges11:30 Yepv^taa houv waac bun Ziouv. Ninh gorngv
Judges11:31 yie mborqv hingh Ammon Mienh nzuonx taux yie nyei biauv wuov zanc
Judges11:32 Yepv^taa ziouc jiex mingh caux Ammon Mienh mborqv jaax. Ziouv yaac zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev.
Judges11:33 Yepv^taa yiem Aa^lo^e Zingh daix jienv Ammon Mienh mingh taux Minnitv Mungv ga'hlen
Judges11:34 Yepv^taa ziouc nzuonx ninh ganh nyei biauv
Judges11:35 Ninh buatc ninh nyei sieqv wuov zanc
Judges11:36 Ninh nyei sieqv gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges11:37 Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die
Judges11:38 Yepv^taa gorngv
Judges11:39 Nqa'haav buangv i hlaax nyieqc
Judges11:40 Yiem naaic daaih I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih naaiv nyungc leiz-fingx. Mouz hnyangx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei sieqv-dorn longc biei hnoi mingh weic Gi^le^aatc Mienh
Judges12:1 E^faa^im Mienh liuc leiz mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mingh taux Saax^fon
Judges12:2 Yepv^taa ziouc dau ninh mbuo
Judges12:3 Yie buatc meih mbuo maiv daaih tengx yie. Yie ziouc maiv longc maengc nyei jiex mingh caux Ammon Mienh mborqv jaax. Ziouv yaac zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. Ih hnoi meih mbuo weic haaix diuc daaih yie naaiv oix caux yie mborqv jaax?”
Judges12:4 Yepv^taa ziouc heuc Gi^le^aatc Deic nyei zuangx mienh daaih zunv caux E^faa^im Mienh mborqv jaax. Gi^le^aatc Mienh daix E^faa^im Mienh
Judges12:5 Gi^le^aatc Mienh ziouc mingh caangv duqv jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei ziex norm jauv-bouc yaac dangv jienv maiv bun E^faa^ im Mienh jiex. Haaix dauh E^faa^ im Mienh biaux taux wuov gorngv
Judges12:6 ninh mbuo mbuox ninh
Judges12:7 Yepv^taa zoux domh jien dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh juqv hnyangx ziouc guei seix
Judges12:8 Yepv^taa guei seix liuz
Judges12:9 Ninh maaih faah ziepc dauh dorn yaac maaih faah ziepc dauh sieqv. Sieqv ninh bungx cuotv bun ganh fingx mienh longc. Ninh yaac gorngv faah ziepc dauh ganh fingx mienh nyei sieqv daaih zoux mbuangz. Ninh zoux domh jien dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh siec hnyangx.
Judges12:10 Ipc^saan ziouc guei seix mi'aqv
Judges12:11 Ipc^saan guei seix liuz
Judges12:12 Se^mbu^lun Mienh
Judges12:13 Elon guei seix liuz
Judges12:14 Ninh maaih feix ziepc dauh dorn
Judges12:15 Bi^laa^ton Mienh
Judges13:1 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Judges13:2 Wuov zanc maaih dauh Ndaan Fingx nyei mienh
Judges13:3 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh hinc cuotv daaih mbuox naaiv dauh auv
Judges13:4 Weic naaiv oix zuqc faix fim. Meih oix zuqc gec maiv dungx hopv a'ngunc diuv fai haaix nyungc diuv
Judges13:5 weic zuqc meih oix maaih norm sin
Judges13:6 Naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc mingh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei nqox
Judges13:7 Mv baac ninh gorngv mbuox yie
Judges13:8 Maa^no^aa ziouc daux gaux tov Ziouv
Judges13:9 Tin-Hungh muangx haiz Maa^no^aa daux gaux nyei waac. Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn zueiz wuov ndeic gu'nyuoz nyei ziangh hoc
Judges13:10 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn siepv-siepv nyei tiux mingh mbuox ninh nyei nqox
Judges13:11 Maa^no^aa ziouc jiez sin gan jienv ninh nyei auv mingh taux wuov dauh mienh nyei nza'hmien naaic ninh
Judges13:12 Maa^no^aa ziouc gorngv
Judges13:13 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv mbuox Maa^no^aa
Judges13:14 Maiv dungx bun ninh nyanc yiem a'ngunc hmei duqv daaih nyei haaix nyungc. Maiv dungx hopv a'ngunc diuv fai haaix nyungc diuv. Maiv dungx nyanc maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv. Yie hatc nyei haaix nyungc waac ninh oix zuqc ei jienv zoux nzengc.”
Judges13:15 Maa^no^aa gorngv mbuox Ziouv nyei fin-mienh
Judges13:16 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv mbuox Maa^no^aa
Judges13:17 Maa^no^aa naaic Ziouv nyei fin-mienh
Judges13:18 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh gorngv mbuox Maa^no^aa
Judges13:19 Maa^no^aa ziouc zorqv dauh yungh dorn caux jienv fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc daaih an jienv ziec-dorngh
Judges13:20 Ninh mbuo i hmuangv mangc jienv wuov zanc buatc douz-mbietc yiem ziec-dorngh hiaangx faaux lungh. Ziouv nyei fin-mienh yiem ziec-dorngh nyei douz-mbietc gu'nyuoz faaux lungh mi'aqv. Maa^no^aa caux ninh nyei auv buatc ziouc puoqv njiec ndau mingh.
Judges13:21 Yiem naaic daaih Ziouv nyei fin-mienh maiv hinc cuotv bun Maa^no^aa caux ninh nyei auv buatc aqv. Maa^no^aa ziouc hiuv duqv wuov dauh mienh se Ziouv nyei fin-mienh.
Judges13:22 Maa^no^aa gorngv mbuox ninh nyei auv
Judges13:23 Mv baac ninh nyei auv gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges13:24 Nqa'haav wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn yungz duqv dauh dorn ziouc cuotv mbuox heuc Saem^sanx. Wuov dauh dorn hlo jienv faaux
Judges13:25 Ninh yiem Maa^haa^ne Ndaan
Judges14:1 Saem^sanx mingh Tim^naa^haa Zingh nyei ziangh hoc ninh buatc dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei sieqv.
Judges14:2 Ninh nzuonx biauv gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die maa
Judges14:3 Ninh nyei die maa gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges14:4 Ninh nyei die maa maiv hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic yiem Ziouv daaih
Judges14:5 Saem^sanx ziouc caux jienv ninh nyei die maa njiec Tim^naa^haa Zingh. Taux Tim^naa^haa nyei a'ngunc huingx
Judges14:6 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh liemh zeih bun Saem^sanx henv haic. Ninh ziouc zorqv wuov dauh sienh daaih maeqv hnangv mienh maeqv yungh dorn nor
Judges14:7 Saem^sanx ziouc njiec mingh caux wuov dauh sieqv gorngv waac. Saem^sanx yaac buangv hnyouv haic ninh.
Judges14:8 Jiex daaih
Judges14:9 Saem^sanx ziouc sung buoz daaih zorqv wuov deix mueiz-dorngh daaih nyanc jienv gan jauv mingh taux ninh nyei die maa wuov. Ninh ziouc bun deix ninh nyei die maa nyanc. Mv baac ninh maiv mbuox ninh mbuo wuov deix mueiz-dorngh yiem sienh daic nyei qorng zorqv daaih.
Judges14:10 Ninh nyei die mingh taux wuov dauh sieqv nyei biauv. Saem^sanx yiem wuov mbenc hnaangx hlo nyei ziux mienh lunx mienh nyei leiz-fingx.
Judges14:11 Baeqc fingx buatc Saem^sanx taux
Judges14:12 Saem^sanx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Judges14:13 Se gorngv meih mbuo cai maiv zuqc nor
Judges14:14 Saem^sanx ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Judges14:15 Taux da'feix hnoi ninh mbuo ziouc mingh lorz Saem^sanx nyei auv mbuox ninh
Judges14:16 Saem^sanx nyei auv ziouc mingh nyiemv jienv gorngv mbuox Saem^sanx
Judges14:17 Wuov norm yinh nyei siec hnoi gu'nyuoz wuov dauh auv nyiemv bun Saem^sanx muangx. Taux da'cietv hnoi Saem^sanx ziouc porv wuov diuh waac-ormv bun ninh nyei auv muangx
Judges14:18 Taux da'cietv hnoi
Judges14:19 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh aengx bun Saem^sanx maaih qaqv camv haic. Ninh ziouc njiec Atc^ke^lon Mungv daix faah ziepc dauh mienh aengx luv ninh mbuo nyei ga'naaiv yaac zorqv ninh mbuo nyei lui-houx mingh bun cai waac-ormv nyei mienh. Ninh qiex jiez! haic ziouc nzuonx ninh nyei die nyei biauv mi'aqv.
Judges14:20 Nqa'haav Saem^sanx nyei ong-daa zorqv Saem^sanx nyei auv jiu bun Saem^sanx nyei loz-gaeng doic
Judges15:1 Jiex liuz yietc caamx
Judges15:2 Ninh nyei ong-daa gorngv
Judges15:3 Saem^sanx gorngv
Judges15:4 Saem^sanx ziouc mingh caa duqv faam-baeqv dauh hieh juv daaih
Judges15:5 Ninh yaac diemv zieqc wuov deix douz-baav
Judges15:6 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc naaic
Judges15:7 Saem^sanx ziouc gorngv mbuox wuov deix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
Judges15:8 Saem^sanx hngaqv duqv wuov deix mienh doqc haic yaac daix daic camv nyei. Ninh ziouc mingh yiem wuov Edaam nyei mbaengx-kuotv.
Judges15:9 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc mingh liepc ciangv yiem Yu^ndaa Deic ziouc nzaanx mingh mborqv hingh Le^hi Zingh.
Judges15:10 Yu^ndaa Mienh ziouc naaic ninh mbuo
Judges15:11 Maaih buo cin dauh Yu^ndaa Mienh
Judges15:12 Wuov deix mienh gorngv mbuox Saem^sanx
Judges15:13 Ninh mbuo dau Saem^sanx
Judges15:14 Saem^sanx taux fatv deix Le^hi Zingh wuov zanc
Judges15:15 Ninh buatc maaih norm maiv gaengh nqaai nyei lorh haah baah mbungv
Judges15:16 Saem^sanx gorngv
Judges15:17 Gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc guaengx lorh nyei haah baah mbungv guangc mi'aqv. Wuov norm dorngx mienh ziouc cuotv mbuox heuc Laamaatv Lehi.
Judges15:18 Saem^sanx haiz jaang za'gengh nqaatv haic
Judges15:19 Tin-Hungh ziouc bun yiem Le^hi yietc norm njongz nyei dorngx mbaaix
Judges15:20 Doix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gunv deic-bung nyei ziangh hoc. Saem^sanx zoux domh jien gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyic ziepc hnyangx.
Judges16:1 Maaih hnoi Saem^sanx mingh Gaasaa Zingh. Yiem wuov ninh buatc dauh maaic sin nyei m'sieqv dorn ziouc bieqc mingh caux ninh bueix.
Judges16:2 Maaih mienh mbuox Gaasaa Zingh nyei mienh
Judges16:3 Mv baac Saem^sanx bueix taux ndaamv muonz
Judges16:4 Nqa'haav Saem^sanx aengx hnamv dauh yiem Solekv Horngz nyei sieqv
Judges16:5 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei jien mingh lorz wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges16:6 Nde^li^laa ziouc gorngv mbuox Saem^sanx
Judges16:7 Saem^sanx dau
Judges16:8 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei jien ziouc dorh siec diuh maiv gaengh nqaai nyei juang-zinx hlaang daaih bun wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn. Ninh yaac longc ndoh jienv Saem^sanx.
Judges16:9 Maaih mienh bingx jienv gu'nyuoz nyei yietc qongx biauv. Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc gorngv
Judges16:10 Nde^li^laa ziouc gorngv mbuox Saem^sanx
Judges16:11 Saem^sanx dau Nde^li^laa
Judges16:12 Nde^li^laa ziouc longc siang-hlaang ndoh jienv ninh. Maaih mienh bingx jienv yiem gu'nyuoz nyei yietc qongx gen. Nde^li^laa gorngv
Judges16:13 Nde^li^laa ziouc gorngv Saem^sanx
Judges16:14 Ninh m'njormh jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Judges16:15 Nde^li^laa ziouc gorngv Saem^sanx
Judges16:16 Nde^li^laa hnoi jiex hnoi ceuv-faanh jienv ninh yiem
Judges16:17 Saem^sanx ziouc zorqv yiem ninh nyei hnyouv nyei yietc zungv waac gorngv nzengc mbuox Nde^li^laa. Ninh gorngv
Judges16:18 Nde^li^laa buatc Saem^sanx zorqv nzengc yiem hnyouv bingx jienv nyei sic mbuox ninh mi'aqv. Ninh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh heuc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei jien
Judges16:19 Nde^li^laa ziouc bun Saem^sanx nzomz jienv ninh nyei camh zuih m'njormh. Ninh ziouc heuc dauh mienh daaih teix Saem^sanx nyei siec gouv mba'biei. Nde^li^laa ziouc jiez gorn nqamv Saem^sanx. Saem^sanx nyei qaqv yaac nzengc mi'aqv.
Judges16:20 Nde^li^laa ziouc gorngv
Judges16:21 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc zorqv jienv ninh aengx gueix cuotv ninh nyei m'zing ziouc dorh ninh njiec taux Gaasaa Zingh. Ninh mbuo longc dongh siqv limc kaux jienv ninh
Judges16:22 Mv baac yiem ninh nyei mba'biei zuqc teix liuz
Judges16:23 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei jien gapv zunv daaih oix domh ziec ninh mbuo nyei Ndaagon zienh
Judges16:24 Zuangx mienh yietv buatc Saem^sanx ninh mbuo ceng ninh mbuo nyei zienh
Judges16:25 Ninh mbuo zoux jorm
Judges16:26 Saem^sanx ziouc gorngv mbuox ken ninh wuov dauh dorn
Judges16:27 Wuov norm biauv gu'nyuoz maaih m'jangc m'sieqv buangv nzengc. Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei jien yietc zungv yaac yiem wuov. Yiem biauv-ngorh gu'nguaaic corc aengx maaih m'jangc
Judges16:28 Saem^sanx ziouc daux gaux tov Ziouv
Judges16:29 Saem^sanx ziouc sung buoz qam jienv biauv mbu'ndongx gauh longc jienv jiex wuov deix i norm dungz-ndiouh
Judges16:30 Saem^sanx gorngv
Judges16:31 Saem^sanx nyei youz caux ninh nyei biauv zong mienh yietc zungv ziouc mingh zorqv ninh nyei sei dorh nzuonx mingh zangx yiem Solaa caux Etc^taa^on mbu'ndongx
Judges17:1 Maaih dauh mienh yiem E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx. Ninh nyei mbuox heuc Mikaa.
Judges17:2 Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei maa
Judges17:3 Mikaa ziouc zorqv wuov deix hietc joih nyaanh daaih bun ninh nyei maa. Ninh nyei maa gorngv
Judges17:4 Mikaa zorqv wuov deix nyaanh fungx nzuonx bun ninh nyei maa liuz
Judges17:5 Naaiv dauh Mikaa maaih ninh ganh zaangc zienh nyei dorngx. Ninh zoux norm efotv caux deix miuc-fangx
Judges17:6 Wuov jaax lungh ndiev maiv maaih hungh diex gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Gorqv-mienh ziouc sueih eix ziux gorqv-mienh nyei hnyouv zoux.
Judges17:7 Maaih dauh mienh lunx mienh
Judges17:8 Ninh cuotv Yu^ndaa Deic
Judges17:9 Mikaa naaic gaax ninh
Judges17:10 Mikaa ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges17:11 Naaiv dauh Lewi Mienh buangv hnyouv caux Mikaa yiem. Ninh yaac hnangv benx Mikaa ganh nyei dorn.
Judges17:12 Mikaa ziouc orn naaiv dauh Lewi mienh lunx mienh daaih benx ninh nyei sai mienh
Judges17:13 Mikaa gorngv
Judges18:1 Wuov jaax lungh ndiev I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv maaih hungh diex. Wuov deix hnyangx-daauh nyei hnoi-nyieqc Ndaan Fingx nyei mienh youh jienv mingh lorz dorngx yiem
Judges18:2 Ndaan Mienh ziouc yiem ninh mbuo nyei fingx gu'nyuoz
Judges18:3 Ninh mbuo taux Mikaa nyei biauv-hlen
Judges18:4 Ninh dau wuov deix mienh
Judges18:5 Wuov deix mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh “Tov meih tengx yie mbuo naaic Tin-Hungh
Judges18:6 Sai mienh dau ninh mbuo
Judges18:7 Wuov deix biaa dauh mienh ziouc cuotv jauv mingh taux Laa^itc Zingh
Judges18:8 Wuov deix biaa dauh caaiv juoqv mienh nzuonx taux Solaa caux Etc^taa^on
Judges18:9 Ninh mbuo dau
Judges18:10 Meih mbuo mingh taux wuov ziouc buatc wuov deix mienh maiv mbungh haaix nyungc. Deic-bung yaac jangv haic. Tin-Hungh zungv zorqv wuov norm deic-bung jiu bun yiem meih mbuo nyei buoz-ndiev mi'aqv. Naaiv norm deic-bung yaac maiv caa yietc nyungc yiem naaiv lungh ndiev nyei ga'naaiv.”
Judges18:11 Ndaan Fingx nyei luoqc baeqv dauh mienh ziouc dorh jienv wuoqc ginc yiem Solaa caux Etc^taa^on cuotv mingh mborqv jaax.
Judges18:12 Mingh gau
Judges18:13 Ninh mbuo yiem naaic jiex mingh taux E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx ziouc daaih taux Mikaa nyei biauv.
Judges18:14 Dongh zinh ndaangc mingh Laa^itc Deic caaiv juoqv wuov deix biaa dauh mienh gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Judges18:15 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh taux Lewi mienh lunx mienh yiem wuov norm biauv
Judges18:16 Dorh jienv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc wuov deix luoqc baeqv dauh Ndaan Fingx mienh daaih souv jienv biauv nyei laatc gaengh ndaangc.
Judges18:17 Dongh zinh ndaangc mingh caaiv juoqv zaah deic-bung wuov deix biaa dauh mienh ziouc bieqc biauv mingh zorqv ndingh daaih nyei miuc-fangx caux efotv caux biauv zong zaangc nyei miuc-fangx caux dox daaih nyei miuc-fangx dorh mingh. Sai mienh caux dorh jienv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc wuov deix luoqc baeqv dauh souv jienv laatc gaengh ndaangc.
Judges18:18 Naaiv deix mienh bieqc Mikaa nyei biauv zorqv ndingh daaih nyei miuc-fangx caux efotv
Judges18:19 Wuov deix mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
Judges18:20 Wuov dauh sai mienh ziouc a'hneiv haic. Ninh zorqv efotv caux biauv zong zaangc nyei miuc-fangx caux ndingh daaih nyei miuc-fangx gan jienv wuov deix mienh mingh aqv.
Judges18:21 Ninh mbuo daaux sin cuotv wuov norm dorngx wuov zanc
Judges18:22 Ninh mbuo leih Mikaa nyei biauv go deix aqv. Nitv Mikaa nyei biauv nyei mienh gapv zunv daaih zunc yaac zunc zaaic Ndaan Mienh
Judges18:23 ziouc longc qaqv heuc. Ndaan Mienh huin nzuonx naaic Mikaa
Judges18:24 Mikaa dau
Judges18:25 Ndaan Mienh gorngv mbuox Mikaa
Judges18:26 Ndaan Mienh ziouc gan jienv ninh mbuo nyei jauv mingh. Mikaa buatc wuov deix mienh gauh henv ninh
Judges18:27 Ndaan Mienh ziouc dorh Mikaa zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv caux ninh nyei sai mienh gan jauv mingh taux Laa^itc Zingh mborqv baengh orn
Judges18:28 Maiv maaih haaix dauh daaih njoux
Judges18:29 Ninh mbuo cuotv wuov norm zingh nyei mbuox gan ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Judges18:30 Ndaan Mienh yiem wuov weic ganh liepc wuov deix ndingh daaih nyei miuc-fangx. Mose nyei fun
Judges18:31 Ndaan Mienh weic ganh liepc Mikaa ndingh daaih nyei miuc-fangx
Judges19:1 Wuov jaax lungh ndiev I^saa^laa^en Mienh corc maiv maaih hungh diex wuov zanc
Judges19:2 Mv baac naaiv dauh jaav-zeih auv hienx nqox
Judges19:3 Ninh nyei nqox ziouc jiez daaih dorh yietc dauh bou caux i dauh lorh mingh lorz ninh
Judges19:4 Naaiv dauh mienh nyei ong-daa
Judges19:5 Taux da'feix hnoi naaiv dauh Lewi Mienh jiez sin nziouv nyei
Judges19:6 Ninh mbuo i ong-daa laangh ziouc zueiz njiec nyanc yaac hopv. Sieqv nyei die gorngv mbuox ninh nyei laangh
Judges19:7 Naaiv dauh mienh jiez sin oix cuotv jauv wuov zanc
Judges19:8 Taux da'hmz hnoi ninh jiez sin nziouv nyei oix cuotv jauv mingh aqv. Sieqv nyei die gorngv
Judges19:9 Lewi Mienh caux ninh nyei jaav-zeih auv caux jienv ninh nyei bou jiez sin oix cuotv jauv mingh aqv. Ninh nyei ong-daa
Judges19:10 Mv baac wuov dauh mienh maiv kangv aengx hitv muonz. Ninh ziouc jiez sin cuotv jauv mingh taux Ye^mbutc Zingh
Judges19:11 Ninh mbuo taux fatv deix Ye^mbutc Zingh wuov zanc aav lamh deix hmuangx aqv. Wuov dauh bou ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh nyei ziouv
Judges19:12 Ninh nyei ziouv dau
Judges19:13 Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
Judges19:14 Ninh mbuo ziouc jiex mingh taux fatv deix Mben^yaa^min nyei Gi^mbe^aa Zingh wuov zanc mba'hnoi muotv mi'aqv.
Judges19:15 Ninh mbuo bieqc Gi^mbe^aa Zingh mingh oix yiem wuov hitv muonz. Ninh ziouc zueiz jienv wuov domh zuangx zaamc weic zuqc maiv maaih haaix dauh zipv ninh mbuo bieqc biauv bueix.
Judges19:16 Zoux gau aav lamh hmuangx aqv
Judges19:17 Naaiv dauh mienh gox mienh buatc jiex jauv nyei mienh zueiz jienv zingh nyei domh zuangx zaamc ziouc naaic ninh
Judges19:18 Wuov dauh Lewi Mienh dau
Judges19:19 Yie mbuo maaih mbiauh nqaauv caux uix lorh nyei ga'naaiv
Judges19:20 Wuov dauh mienh gox mienh gorngv
Judges19:21 Ninh ziouc dorh wuov dauh m'jangc dorn bieqc biauv mingh
Judges19:22 Ninh mbuo a'hneiv nyei nziaauc wuov zanc
Judges19:23 Wuov dauh biauv-ziouv cuotv daaih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Judges19:24 Mangc maah! Yie maaih dauh maiv gaengh bueix jiex dorn nyei sieqv caux naaiv dauh mienh nyei jaav-zeih auv. Yie ih zanc oix dorh ninh mbuo cuotv daaih bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo gunv longc yaac sueih eix zoux bun ninh mbuo. Mv baac tov meih mbuo maiv dungx zoux laih hlopv nyei orqv sic bun naaiv dauh mienh.”
Judges19:25 Mv baac wuov deix mienh maiv muangx biauv-ziouv nyei waac. Wuov dauh Lewi Mienh ziouc zorqv ninh nyei jaav-zeih auv fongv cuotv mingh bun ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo ziouc ziangh muonz caa nyei caa
Judges19:26 Lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang nyei ziangh hoc
Judges19:27 Lungh ndorm-nziouv wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei ziouv jiez sin daaih koi gaengh
Judges19:28 Ninh gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Judges19:29 Nzuonx taux biauv wuov zanc ninh zorqv nzuqc daaih nqen ninh nyei auv-dorn nyei sei benx ziepc nyeic deix
Judges19:30 Da'faanh duqv buatc nyei mienh gorngv
Judges20:1 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc yiem Ndaan mingh taux Mbe^e^qe^mbaa
Judges20:2 I^saa^laa^en Fingx nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv
Judges20:3 (Wuov zanc Mben^yaa^min Mienh haiz gorngv I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh taux Mitv^baa.) I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv
Judges20:4 Wuov dauh Lewi Mienh
Judges20:5 Wuov muonz Gi^mbe^aa Zingh nyei mienh daaih weih jienv yie hitv wuov norm biauv
Judges20:6 Yie ziouc zorqv yie nyei jaav-zeih auv nyei sei nqen zoux ziex deix
Judges20:7 Meih mbuo I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Oix zuqc tengx jienv caangh laangh mangc gaax
Judges20:8 Zuangx mienh ziouc souv jiez sin daaih dongh diuc hnyouv gorngv
Judges20:9 Yie mbuo oix hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun Gi^mbe^aa Mienh. Yie mbuo oix dingc maengc mangc haaix fingx oix zuqc mingh ndaangc caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax.
Judges20:10 Yie mbuo oix zuqc yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei fingx-fingx gu'nyuoz
Judges20:11 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc gapv zunv daaih dongh diuc hnyouv mingh mborqv wuov norm zingh.
Judges20:12 I^saa^laa^en nyei fingx-fingx mienh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh naaic gormx Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei mienh
Judges20:13 Ih zanc zorqv yiem Gi^mbe^aa Zingh naaiv deix mienh waaic mienh jiu bun yie mbuo daix guangc
Judges20:14 Mben^yaa^min Mienh yiem ninh mbuo nyei norm-norm zingh gapv zunv daaih yiem Gi^mbe^aa
Judges20:15 Wuov zanc Mben^yaa^min Mienh yiem ninh mbuo nyei norm-norm zingh diuc cuotv longc nzuqc ndaauv nyei baeng i waanc juqv cin dauh
Judges20:16 Yiem zuangx jun-baeng mbu'ndongx maaih cietv baeqv dauh ginv daaih nyei baeng longc buoz-kuang liouc nyei. Ninh mbuo longc ndopv-hlaang fengx la'bieiv-dorn bungx mingh mborqv duqv zuqc yietc diuh mba'biei yaac maiv pienx yietc deix.
Judges20:17 Cuotv liuz Mben^yaa^min Mienh
Judges20:18 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc mingh Mbetc^en naaic Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Judges20:19 Da'nyeic ndorm I^saa^laa^en Mienh jiez sin daaih mingh liepc ciangv nitv Gi^mbe^aa Zingh.
Judges20:20 I^saa^ laa^en Mienh ziouc cuotv mingh caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh mborqv jaax aengx ziux mborqv jaax nyei yietc nyeic mbaih jienv nitv Gi^mbe^aa oix mborqv.
Judges20:21 Wuov hnoi Mben^yaa^min Mienh yiem Gi^mbe^aa cuotv daaih daix daic i waanc i cin dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Judges20:22 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh laanh orn laanh nyei hnyouv
Judges20:23 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac mingh dorng jienv Ziouv nyiemv taux lungh maanz-hmuangx. Ninh mbuo naaic Ziouv
Judges20:24 Da'nyeic hnoi I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx mingh caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh mborqv jaax.
Judges20:25 Dongh naaic hnoi Mben^yaa^min Mienh aengx yiem Gi^mbe^aa cuotv daaih daix daic yietc waanc hietc cin dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Yietc zungv se longc nzuqc ndaauv nyei baeng.
Judges20:26 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
Judges20:27 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc naaic Ziouv. (Wuov zanc Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem wuov.
Judges20:28 Wuov deix ziangh hoc Aalon nyei fun
Judges20:29 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc bun baeng bingx jienv weih gormx Gi^mbe^aa.
Judges20:30 Da'faam hnoi I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx mingh caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh mborqv jaax
Judges20:31 Mben^yaa^min Mienh ziouc cuotv daaih caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax
Judges20:32 Mben^yaa^min Mienh gorngv
Judges20:33 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh cuotv ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx mingh mbaih jienv yiem Mbaa^an Taamaa. Bingx jienv Gi^mbe^aa nyei fai bung maengx. Wuov deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc tiux cuotv daaih.
Judges20:34 Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx ginv daaih nyei yietc waanc dauh baeng daaih mborqv Gi^mbe^aa. Mborqv jaax hniev nyei ziangh hoc
Judges20:35 Ziouv bun Mben^yaa^min Mienh suei I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Wuov hnoi I^saa^laa^en Mienh daix daic i waanc biaa cin yietc baeqv dauh Mben^yaa^min Mienh. Yietc zungv se longc nzuqc ndaauv nyei baeng.
Judges20:36 Hnangv naaic
Judges20:37 Dongh bingx jienv wuov deix mienh liemh zeih tiux bieqc Gi^mbe^aa Zingh mingh
Judges20:38 I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux bingx jienv zingh ga'hlen wuov deix baeng jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx norm jangx-hoc. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Judges20:39 I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix zuqc daaux nqaang daaih mborqv jaax. Mben^yaa^min Mienh dongz buoz daix faah ziepc dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv
Judges20:40 Mv baac douz-sioux-don yiem zingh cutv-cutv nyei faaux wuov zanc
Judges20:41 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx daaux sin daaih
Judges20:42 Ninh mbuo yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx daaux sin biaux
Judges20:43 I^saa^laa^en Mienh weih jienv Mben^yaa^min Mienh yaac maiv dingh liouh nyei zunc jienv mingh taux Gi^mbe^aa dong bung maengx ziouc zunc zaaic ninh mbuo.
Judges20:44 Mben^yaa^min Mienh zuqc daix daic nyei maaih yietc waanc hietc cin dauh. Yietc zungv se mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng.
Judges20:45 Zengc njiec wuov deix daaux sin biaux
Judges20:46 Dongh wuov hnoi Mben^yaa^min Mienh zuqc daix daic nyei maaih i waanc biaa cin dauh. Yietc zungv se nanv nzuqc ndaauv
Judges20:47 Mv baac maaih luoqc baeqv dauh daaux sin biaux mingh taux deic-bung-huaang
Judges20:48 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx daaux sin nzuonx mingh mborqv Mben^yaa^min Mienh. Ninh mbuo longc nzuqc ndaauv daix daic zingh nyei zuangx mienh
Judges21:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Mitv^baa houv jienv waac gorngv
Judges21:2 Zuangx mienh ziouc daaih taux Mbetc^en
Judges21:3 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Judges21:4 Da'nyeic hnoi zuangx baeqc fingx jiez sin nziouv nyei aengx yiem wuov ceix norm ziec-dorngh ziouc fongc horc buov ziec caux ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv.
Judges21:5 I^saa^laa^en Mienh laanh naaic laanh
Judges21:6 I^saa^laa^en Mienh korv-lienh ninh mbuo nyei youz
Judges21:7 Mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux lorz auv bun zengc njiec wuov deix Mben^yaa^min Mienh longc? Mbuo ziangv jienv Ziouv houv waac gorngv
Judges21:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh naaic laanh
Judges21:9 Weic zuqc saauv mienh nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo maiv maaih yietc dauh Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh yiem naaic.
Judges21:10 Gapv zunv nyei wuic gu'nyuoz nyei mienh ziouc paaiv yietc waanc i cin dauh mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng yaac jaa waac ninh mbuo
Judges21:11 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Oix zuqc daix yietc zungv m'jangc dorn
Judges21:12 Yiem Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc
Judges21:13 Yiem wuic gapv zunv nyei mienh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh mbuox yiem Limmon nyei la'bieiv-mbaengx wuov deix Mben^yaa^min Mienh
Judges21:14 Mben^yaa^min Mienh ziouc nzuonx daaih. I^saa^laa^en Mienh zorqv dongh ninh mbuo siex cuotv maengc wuov deix feix baeqv dauh Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc nyei sieqv daaih bun Mben^yaa^min Mienh longc zoux auv
Judges21:15 Baeqc fingx weic Mben^yaa^min Mienh haiz hnyouv mun weic zuqc Ziouv zoux bun yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx zoqc yietc fingx mi'aqv.
Judges21:16 Wuic nyei zuangx mienh gox gorngv
Judges21:17 Ninh mbuo aengx gorngv
Judges21:18 Mv baac mbuo maiv haih bungx mbuo nyei sieqv bun ninh mbuo longc zoux auv
Judges21:19 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv
Judges21:20 Ninh mbuo ziouc njaaux ziangx Mben^yaa^min Mienh
Judges21:21 Zuov mangc jienv
Judges21:22 Se gorngv wuov deix sieqv nyei die fai muoz-doic daaih gox yie mbuo
Judges21:23 Mben^yaa^min Mienh ziouc ei jienv zoux. Ziux ninh mbuo nyei soux mouc dauh dauh duqv cangx heix nyei sieqv caangv daaih zoux auv. Ninh mbuo aengx nzuonx mingh yiem ninh mbuo ganh nzipc nyei buonc ndau
Judges21:24 Dongh wuov zanc I^saa^laa^en Mienh leih nqoi wuov norm dorngx
Judges21:25 Wuov jaax lungh ndiev I^saa^laa^en maiv maaih hungh diex
Ruth1:1 Doix domh jien gunv nyei ziangh hoc
Ruth1:2 Naaiv dauh mienh nyei mbuox heuc E^li^me^lekv. Ninh nyei auv heuc Naa^o^mi. Ninh nyei i dauh dorn heuc Maalon caux Ki^li^on. Ninh mbuo se E^faa^taa Mienh
Ruth1:3 Yiem gau wuov
Ruth1:4 Naaiv deix i dauh dorn longc Mo^apc sieqv zoux auv. Maaih dauh heuc Ofaa
Ruth1:5 Maalon caux Ki^li^on mbuo i muoz daic mi'aqv
Ruth1:6 Naa^o^mi yiem Mo^apc Deic haiz gorngv Ziouv ceix fuqv bun ninh nyei mienh maaih nyanc hopv. Ninh ziouc caux ninh nyei i dauh mbuangz yiem Mo^apc liuc leiz cuotv jauv nzuonx.
Ruth1:7 Ninh mbuo buo mbuangz-maac ziouc leih nqoi ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx cuotv jauv nzuonx Yu^ndaa Deic.
Ruth1:8 Mv baac yiem jauv zaangc Naa^o^mi gorngv mbuox ninh nyei i dauh mbuangz
Ruth1:9 Tov Ziouv bun meih mbuo i dauh aengx duqv dorng siang-jaa
Ruth1:10 gorngv mbuox Naa^o^mi
Ruth1:11 Mv baac Naa^o^mi gorngv
Ruth1:12 Yie nyei nyaam aah! Gunv nzuonx mingh maah! Maa gox haic
Ruth1:13 meih mbuo corc oix zuov ninh mbuo hlo daaih fai? Meih mbuo oix zuov jienv maiv mingh dorng jaa fai? Yie nyei nyaam aah! Hnangv naaic maiv duqv. Maa korv-lienh meih mbuo camv haic weic zuqc Ziouv nyei buoz bun yie zuqc ndongc naaiv kouv.”
Ruth1:14 Ninh mbuo ziouc aengx nyiemv nzunc. Ofaa zom liuz ninh nyei maa-buoc
Ruth1:15 Naa^o^mi gorngv
Ruth1:16 Mv baac Lu^te dau
Ruth1:17 Maa yiem haaix daic
Ruth1:18 Naa^o^mi buatc Lu^te liepc dingc hnyouv caux ninh mingh
Ruth1:19 Ninh mbuo i dauh gan jauv mingh taux Mbetc^le^hem Mungv. Taux Mbetc^le^hem wuov zanc
Ruth1:20 Naa^o^mi gorngv
Ruth1:21 Yie cuotv nyei ziangh hoc
Ruth1:22 Hnangv naaic Naa^o^mi caux ninh nyei Mo^apc Mienh mbuangz
Ruth2:1 Naa^o^mi maaih dauh cien-ceqv
Ruth2:2 Wuov dauh Mo^apc Mienh m'sieqv dorn
Ruth2:3 Lu^te ziouc mingh aqv
Ruth2:4 Doix zuqc wuov zanc
Ruth2:5 Mbo^aatc naaic ninh nyei gunv gaatv mbiauh mienh wuov dauh bou
Ruth2:6 Gunv gaatv mbiauh mienh wuov dauh bou dau
Ruth2:7 Ninh gorngv
Ruth2:8 Mbo^aatc ziouc gorngv mbuox Lu^te
Ruth2:9 Meih mangc gaax gaatv mbiauh mienh yiem haaix nzong ndeic gaatv mbiauh
Ruth2:10 Lu^te puoqv njiec hmien taux ndau. Ninh gorngv
Ruth2:11 Mbo^aatc dau
Ruth2:12 Tov Ziouv ziux meih zoux nyei winh bun meih. Tov Ziouv
Ruth2:13 Lu^te dau
Ruth2:14 Taux nyanc hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc Mbo^aatc gorngv mbuox Lu^te
Ruth2:15 Ninh jiez sin mingh nzauz mbiauh ndortv wuov zanc
Ruth2:16 Zungv oix zuqc baeng cuotv deix mbiauh zeiv nyei mbiauh guangc jienv wuov bun ninh nzauz
Ruth2:17 Lu^te ziouc yiem wuov ndeic nzauz mbiauh ndortv taux lungh maanz-hmuangx. Nqa'haav ninh mborqv naaiv deix mbiauh mbaali duqv yietc tongv nyei dorngx.
Ruth2:18 Ninh dorh ninh nyei mbiauh nzuonx mungv mingh bun ninh nyei maa-buoc mangc ninh siou duqv mbu'ziex. Ninh yaac zorqv ninh nyanc beuv zengc njiec nyei ga'naaiv bun ninh nyei maa-buoc.
Ruth2:19 Ninh nyei maa-buoc naaic gaax ninh
Ruth2:20 Naa^o^mi doix ninh nyei mbuangz gorngv
Ruth2:21 Mo^apc Mienh m'sieqv dorn
Ruth2:22 Naa^o^mi gorngv mbuox ninh nyei mbuangz
Ruth2:23 Hnangv naaic Lu^te yiem nitv fatv Mbo^aatc nyei m'sieqv bou nzauz mbiauh taux siou baac mbiauh mbaali caux mbiauh witv. Ninh yaac caux ninh nyei maa-buoc yiem.
Ruth3:1 Maaih hnoi Naa^o^mi gorngv mbuox ninh nyei mbuangz
Ruth3:2 Mbo^aatc
Ruth3:3 Nyaam oix zuqc nzaaux sin
Ruth3:4 Taux ninh bueix nyei ziangh hoc mangc gaax ninh bueix haaix
Ruth3:5 Lu^te dau
Ruth3:6 Ninh ziouc njiec taux mborqv mbiauh ciangv ziux ninh nyei maa-buoc mbuox nyei yietc zungv waac zoux nzengc.
Ruth3:7 Mbo^aatc nyanc liuz hopv liuz
Ruth3:8 Taux ndaamv muonz Mbo^aatc liemh zeih nyie daaih
Ruth3:9 Ninh ziouc naaic
Ruth3:10 Mbo^aatc gorngv
Ruth3:11 Sieqv aac
Ruth3:12 Maiv gunv yie zoux dauh gauh cien jiex nyei cien-ceqv
Ruth3:13 Ih muonz meih bueix naaiv. Njang hnoi mangc gaax ninh oix ziux gauh cien jiex nyei cien-ceqv nyei leiz zoux fai? Se gorngv ninh oix nor
Ruth3:14 Lu^te ziouc bueix jienv Mbo^aatc nyei zaux-hlen taux lungh ndorm
Ruth3:15 Mbo^aatc aengx gorngv
Ruth3:16 Lu^te nzuonx taux ninh nyei maa-buoc wuov
Ruth3:17 Ninh aengx gorngv
Ruth3:18 Naa^o^mi gorngv mbuox ninh
Ruth4:1 Mbo^aatc mingh wuov zingh gaengh
Ruth4:2 Mbo^aatc ziouc heuc ziepc dauh wuov norm zingh nyei mienh gox daaih yaac mbuox ninh mbuo
Ruth4:3 Mbo^aatc mbuox gauh cien jiex wuov dauh cien-ceqv
Ruth4:4 Yie ziouc hnamv daaih oix zuqc bun meih hiuv duqv naaiv deix jauv-louc
Ruth4:5 Mbo^aatc gorngv
Ruth4:6 Wuov dauh mienh gorngv
Ruth4:7 Loz-hnoi yiem I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung ziux ninh mbuo liepc daaih nyei leiz
Ruth4:8 Gauh cien jiex wuov dauh cien-ceqv gorngv
Ruth4:9 Mbo^aatc ziouc gorngv mbuox wuov deix mienh gox caux yiem wuov nyei zuangx mienh
Ruth4:10 Yie yaac duqv Maalon nyei auv-guaav
Ruth4:11 Yiem zingh gaengh nyei mienh gox caux zuangx mienh gorngv
Ruth4:12 Tov Ziouv bun meih yiem naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn duqv daaih nyei fu'jueiv fun-faqv hnangv Beletv
Ruth4:13 Hnangv naaic Mbo^aatc ziouc dorh Lu^te mingh zoux auv. Longc jienv
Ruth4:14 Mungv zaangc nyei m'sieqv dorn gorngv mbuox Naa^o^mi
Ruth4:15 Naaiv dauh dorn haih bun meih nyei maengc aengx longx jiez daaih. Gox nyei ziangh hoc ninh yaac oix yungz meih
Ruth4:16 Naa^o^mi ziouc hlorpv jienv naaiv dauh gu'nguaaz-fun
Ruth4:17 Yiem wuov norm mungv nyei m'sieqv dorn gorngv
Ruth4:18 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv Beletv nyei zeiv-fun. Beletv zoux Hetv^lon nyei die
Ruth4:19 Laam zoux Am^mi^naa^ndapc nyei die
Ruth4:20 Am^mi^naa^ndapc zoux Naason nyei die
Ruth4:21 Sanx^mon zoux Mbo^aatc nyei die
Ruth4:22 O^mbetc zoux Jetc^si nyei die
1Samuel1:1 Yiem E^faa^im mbong-aiv dorngx nyei Laa^maa^taa^im Mungv
1Samuel1:2 En^kaa^naa maaih i dauh auv. Maaih dauh heuc Hannaa
1Samuel1:3 En^kaa^naa hnyangx-hnyangx yiem ninh nyei buonv-zingh mingh Silo baaix yaac fongc horc ziec bun Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv. Yiem wuov maaih Eli nyei i dauh dorn
1Samuel1:4 En^kaa^naa fongc horc ziec wuov hnoi
1Samuel1:5 Mv baac ninh bun i gouv Hannaa
1Samuel1:6 Be^nin^naa qaqv cuoqv Hannaa
1Samuel1:7 Hnyangx jiex hnyangx maaih naaiv deix sic cuotv. Haaix zanc Hannaa mingh zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
1Samuel1:8 Hannaa nyei nqox
1Samuel1:9 Ninh mbuo yiem Silo nyanc liuz hopv liuz
1Samuel1:10 Hannaa nzauh duqv kouv
1Samuel1:11 Ninh ziouc laengz jiez ngaengc waac gorngv
1Samuel1:12 Hannaa yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien daux gaux jienv nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel1:13 Hannaa kungx yiem hnyouv daux gaux
1Samuel1:14 Eli gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel1:15 Hannaa dau
1Samuel1:16 Tov meih maiv dungx laaic yie
1Samuel1:17 Eli gorngv
1Samuel1:18 Hannaa ziouc dau
1Samuel1:19 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei ninh mbuo jiez sin daaih baaix liuz Ziouv ziouc nzuonx Laamaa Zingh
1Samuel1:20 Nqa'haav taux ziangh hoc
1Samuel1:21 En^kaa^naa caux ninh nyei yietc biauv mienh mingh Silo fongc horc hnyangx-hnyangx fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv bun Ziouv yaac mingh jaauv sung ziux ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac.
1Samuel1:22 Mv baac Hannaa maiv mingh. Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei nqox
1Samuel1:23 Ninh nyei nqox
1Samuel1:24 Nqa'haav naaiv dauh dorn guangc liuz nyorx
1Samuel1:25 Ninh mbuo daix wuov dauh ngongh gouv yaac dorh wuov dauh fu'jueiv taux Eli wuov.
1Samuel1:26 Hannaa gorngv mbuox Eli
1Samuel1:27 Yie daux gaux weic oix duqv naaiv dauh fu'jueiv. Ziouv yaac ziux yie tov nyei waac ceix bun yie.
1Samuel1:28 Weic naaiv yie cingx daaih dorh ninh daaih fungx bun Ziouv. Ninh yietc seix benx Ziouv nyei mi'aqv.” Ninh ziouc yiem wuov baaix Ziouv.
1Samuel2:1 Hannaa ziouc daux gaux gorngv
1Samuel2:2 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv Ziouv cing-nzengc. Cih cuotv meih maiv maaih haaix dauh
1Samuel2:3 “Maiv dungx aengx bungx jienv waac-maux mingh aqv. Maiv dungx bun meih nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv ceng-hlo nyei waac
1Samuel2:4 “Henv nyei mienh nyei juang-zinx nauv mi'aqv
1Samuel2:5 Duqv nyanc guenx beuv nyei mienh daaux nzuonx oix zuqc cuotv mingh maaic gong nyanc
1Samuel2:6 “ Ziouv bun mienh daic yaac bun mienh nangh. Ninh bun mienh njiec taux yiemh gen yaac bun mienh cuotv daaih.
1Samuel2:7 Ziouv zoux bun mienh jomc
1Samuel2:8 Ziouv ken mienh jomc mienh yiem nie-mbung jiez daaih. Ninh liepc ga'naanh nyei mienh yiem la'fapv-ndui faaux. Ninh bun ninh mbuo duqv caux hungh dorn juangc dorngx zueiz
1Samuel2:9 Ninh oix goux jienv ninh nyei cing-nzengc mienh
1Samuel2:10 Ziouv nyei win-wangv oix zuqc ninh mborqv muonc. Ninh oix yiem gu'nguaaic lungh longc mba'ong piqv ninh mbuo. Ziouv zungv oix siemv taux jomc lungh ndiev. “Ninh oix ceix qaqv bun ninh liepc daaih nyei hungh diex
1Samuel2:11 En^kaa^naa ziouc nzuonx Laamaa Zingh
1Samuel2:12 Eli nyei i dauh dorn benx mienh waaic mienh. Ninh mbuo maiv taaih Ziouv.
1Samuel2:13 Sai mienh caux baeqc fingx nyei leiz se hnangv naaiv. Haaix dauh mienh dorh saeng-kuv daaih fongc horc ziec
1Samuel2:14 Ninh ziouc longc nzopv bieqc zouv jienv orv nyei caeng gu'nyuoz
1Samuel2:15 Mv baac liemh maiv gaengh duqv buov hmei
1Samuel2:16 Se gorngv fongc horc ziec nyei mienh gorngv
1Samuel2:17 Weic naaiv
1Samuel2:18 Mv baac Saa^mu^en yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien fu-sux. Ninh corc benx fu'jueiv nyei ziangh hoc yaac zuqv jienv la'maah ndie nyei efotv.
1Samuel2:19 Hnyangx-hnyangx Saa^mu^en nyei maa lunh deix siang-lui-ndaauv faix nyei bun ninh. Ninh nyei maa caux jienv ninh nyei die taux yietc hnyangx fongc horc ziec nyei ziangh hoc dorh mingh bun ninh.
1Samuel2:20 Wuov zanc Eli buang waac bun En^kaa^naa caux ninh nyei auv. Ninh gorngv
1Samuel2:21 Ziouv ceix fuqv bun Hannaa. Ninh ziouc aengx maaih fu'jueiv
1Samuel2:22 Eli nyei hnyangx-jeiv gox haic aqv. Ninh yaac haiz gorngv ninh nyei i dauh dorn zoux bun I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh nyei nyungc-nyungc sic yaac haiz gorngv ninh mbuo mingh bueix yiem Wuic Buangh Ndopv-Liuh nyei gaengh ndaangc fu-sux nyei m'sieqv dorn.
1Samuel2:23 Eli ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh nyei i dauh dorn
1Samuel2:24 Yie nyei dorn aac
1Samuel2:25 Se gorngv mienh zoux dorngc bun mienh
1Samuel2:26 Wuov dauh dorn-faix
1Samuel2:27 Maaih dauh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh daaih lorz Eli yaac gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel2:28 Yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx fingx mbu'ndongx yie ginv ninh zoux yie nyei sai mienh
1Samuel2:29 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc mauv dongh yie paaiv mienh fongc horc caux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv? Meih taaih meih nyei dorn gauh camv taaih yie ziouc zorqv yie nyei baeqc fingx
1Samuel2:30 “Weic naaiv Ziouv
1Samuel2:31 Mangc maah! Hnoi-nyieqc oix taux
1Samuel2:32 Meih ganh nyei m'zing ziouc duqv buatc yie yiem nyei dorngx zuqc kouv. Maiv gunv yie zoux longx bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Samuel2:33 Yiem yie nyei ziec-dorngh
1Samuel2:34 “+‘Meih nyei i dauh dorn
1Samuel2:35 Yie oix weic ganh liepc dauh ziepc zuoqv nyei sai mienh. Ninh oix ziux yie nyei hnyouv eix nyei zoux. Yie oix liepc ninh nyei zeiv-fun wuonv jiez daaih. Ninh ziouc yietc liuz yiem yie longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh nyei nza'hmien bieqc cuotv.
1Samuel2:36 Yiem meih nyei douh zong zengc njiec nyei mienh oix daaih baaix ninh yaac tov bun norm nyaanh caux norm njuov yaac oix gorngv
1Samuel3:1 Naaiv dauh dorn
1Samuel3:2 Maaih muonz nor
1Samuel3:3 Tin-Hungh nyei dang maiv gaengh daic. Saa^mu^en bueix jienv Ziouv nyei ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz
1Samuel3:4 Ziouv ziouc heuc
1Samuel3:5 Ninh ziouc tiux mingh taux Eli wuov yaac gorngv
1Samuel3:6 Ziouv aengx heuc
1Samuel3:7 Wuov zanc Saa^mu^en maiv gaengh hiuv duqv Ziouv. Ninh yaac maiv gaengh duqv zipv jiex Ziouv nyei waac.
1Samuel3:8 Ziouv aengx heuc Saa^mu^en da'faam nzunc. Saa^mu^en aengx jiez sin daaih mingh Eli wuov yaac gorngv
1Samuel3:9 Eli ziouc gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel3:10 Ziouv daaih souv jienv wuov aengx hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov deix buo nzunc nor heuc
1Samuel3:11 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel3:12 Taux wuov norm hnoi yie oix zoux ziangx bun dongh yie gorngv jiex Eli nyei zeiv-fun nyei yietc zungv waac yiem gorn taux setv mueiz.
1Samuel3:13 Yie zungv mbuox jiex ninh
1Samuel3:14 Weic naaiv yie houv waac bun Eli nyei zeiv-fun. Yie gorngv
1Samuel3:15 Saa^mu^en aengx bueix taux lungh njang ziouc koi zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gaengh. Saa^mu^en maiv gaamv gorngv wuov deix laauc yaangh nyei sic mbuox Eli.
1Samuel3:16 Eli ziouc heuc Saa^mu^en
1Samuel3:17 Eli naaic
1Samuel3:18 Saa^mu^en ziouc gorngv nzengc yietc zungv waac mbuox Eli
1Samuel3:19 Saa^mu^en hlo jienv faaux
1Samuel3:20 Yiem Ndaan mingh taux Mbe^e^qe^mbaa
1Samuel3:21 Ziouv aengx yiem Silo hinc cuotv weic zuqc Ziouv yiem Silo zorqv ganh nyei waac bun Saa^mu^en hiuv duqv ninh.
1Samuel4:1 Saa^mu^en nyei waac ziouc mingh gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung. I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv mingh caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo liepc ciangv yiem E^mben^e^se. Fi^li^saa^die Mienh liepc ciangv yiem Aafekv.
1Samuel4:2 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh bun ninh mbuo nyei baeng dorng jienv I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbaih jienv. Mborqv jaax gunv zoux gunv hlo nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel4:3 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei baeng nzuonx taux ciangv wuov zanc
1Samuel4:4 Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv mienh mingh Silo wuov
1Samuel4:5 Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang bieqc ciangv gu'nyuoz wuov zanc
1Samuel4:6 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh muangx haiz heuc nyei qiex mbui
1Samuel4:7 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gamh nziex haic. Ninh mbuo gorngv
1Samuel4:8 Mbuo oix zuqc kouv aqv. Haaix dauh haih tengx mbuo biaux ndutv naaiv deix henv haic nyei zienh? Dongh naaiv deix zienh zinh ndaangc yiem deic-bung-huaang longc nyungc-nyungc zeqc naanc daix daic I^yipv Mienh.
1Samuel4:9 O Fi^li^saa^die Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc zungx daamv yaac zoux jun-zeiv mienh. Maiv zei aeqv
1Samuel4:10 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax. I^saa^ laa^en Mienh suei ninh mbuo
1Samuel4:11 Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yaac zuqc caangv mingh. Eli nyei i dauh dorn
1Samuel4:12 Dongh wuov hnoi maaih dauh Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei mienh yiem mborqv jaax ciangv tiux mingh taux Silo. Ninh nyei lui-houx betv huv
1Samuel4:13 Naaiv dauh mienh daaih taux wuov zanc
1Samuel4:14 Eli haiz mienh heuc nyei qiex mbui ziouc naaic
1Samuel4:15 Wuov zanc Eli nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv juov ziepc betv hnyangx. Ninh nyei m'zing dingc mi'aqv
1Samuel4:16 Wuov dauh mienh gorngv mbuox Eli
1Samuel4:17 Dorh fienx nyei mienh dau
1Samuel4:18 Wuov dauh mienh yietv gorngv taux Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
1Samuel4:19 Wuov zanc Eli nyei mbuangz
1Samuel4:20 Dongh ninh aav lamh dangx qiex wuov zanc
1Samuel4:21 Ninh tengx ninh nyei dorn cuotv mbuox heuc I^kaa^mbotc yaac gorngv
1Samuel4:22 Ninh aengx gorngv
1Samuel5:1 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caangv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
1Samuel5:2 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc dorh Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang bieqc Ndaagon zienh nyei miuc-biauv yaac an jienv Ndaagon nyei miuc-fangx ga'hlen.
1Samuel5:3 Da'nyeic ndorm Atc^ndotc Zingh nyei baeqc fingx jiez sin nziouv nyei mingh mangc
1Samuel5:4 Mv baac da'nyeic hnoi ninh mbuo jiez sin nziouv nyei mingh mangc
1Samuel5:5 Weic naaiv Ndaagon zienh nyei sai mienh caux yietc zungv bieqc Ndaagon miuc-biauv nyei mienh cingx daaih maiv caaiv Atc^ndotc Zingh
1Samuel5:6 Ziouv hniev-hniev nyei dingc Atc^ndotc Zingh caux weih gormx wuov deix mienh nyei zuiz. Ninh bun ninh mbuo zuqc kouv yaac ziangh doqc haic nyei zueih.
1Samuel5:7 Atc^ndotc Mienh buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv
1Samuel5:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv mienh mingh heuc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei yietc zungv bieiv zeiv gapv zunv caangh laangh. Ninh mbuo naaic
1Samuel5:9 Ninh mbuo dorh taux Gatc Zingh wuov
1Samuel5:10 Ninh mbuo ziouc fungx Tin-Hungh nyei faang mingh E^ko^lon Zingh. Mv baac Tin-Hungh nyei faang taux E^ko^lon Zingh wuov zanc
1Samuel5:11 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo paaiv mienh mingh heuc Fi^li^saa^die nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv daaih gapv zunv ziouc gorngv
1Samuel5:12 Maiv daic wuov deix mienh ziangh zueih doqc. Wuov norm zingh nyei mienh heuc nyei qiex zungv faaux taux gu'nguaaic lungh.
1Samuel6:1 Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei guoqv siec hlaax nyieqc.
1Samuel6:2 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc heuc sai mienh caux mbouv guaax mienh daaih naaic ninh mbuo
1Samuel6:3 Ninh mbuo dau
1Samuel6:4 Ninh mbuo aengx naaic
1Samuel6:5 Hnangv naaiv meih mbuo zoux meih mbuo ziangh nyei zueih nyei fangx caux zoux waaic meih mbuo nyei deic-bung wuov deix naauz nyei fangx. Yaac oix zuqc taaih I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh. Nziex ninh haih guangc
1Samuel6:6 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc oix zoux hnyouv ngaengc hnangv I^yipv Mienh caux Faalo nor
1Samuel6:7 “Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux jaax siang-ngongh cie aengx lorz yietc doix dorh jienv dorn nyei ngongh nyeiz
1Samuel6:8 Oix zuqc zorqv Ziouv nyei faang an jienv ngongh cie gu'nguaaic
1Samuel6:9 Mv baac oix zuqc mangc jienv. Se gorngv ngongh hungx jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei deic
1Samuel6:10 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc hnangv naaic zoux. Ninh mbuo zorqv yietc doix dorh jienv dorn nyei ngongh nyeiz gaaz jienv ngongh cie
1Samuel6:11 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang caux dapv jiem-naauz
1Samuel6:12 Ngongh ziouc baeng zaqc gan domh jauv hungx jienv Mbetc Semetv Mungv mingh
1Samuel6:13 Mbetc Semetv Mungv nyei mienh jang-jang yiem wuov horngz gaatv mbiauh witv. Ninh mbuo cau hmien mangc buatc Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang
1Samuel6:14 Ngongh cie bieqc Mbetc Semetv Mienh
1Samuel6:15 Lewi Mienh ziouc zorqv Ziouv nyei faang caux yiem ga'hlen dapv jiem-fangx wuov norm hlapv don jienv domh la'bieiv gu'nguaaic. Dongh wuov hnoi Mbetc Semetv nyei mienh ziouc fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv yaac buov saeng-kuv ziec bun Ziouv.
1Samuel6:16 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei biaa dauh bieiv zeiv mangc buatc liuz
1Samuel6:17 Naaiv deix jiem-zueih se Fi^li^saa^die Mienh fungx nzuonx fongc horc bun Ziouv weic zoux fiqv zoux dorngc zuiz nyei ga'naaiv. Maaih norm jiem-zueih se weic Atc^ndotc Zingh
1Samuel6:18 Jiem-naauz nyei soux mouc se ziux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei biaa dauh bieiv zeiv nyei zingh
1Samuel6:19 Ziouv daix Mbetc Semetv Mienh laaix ninh mbuo mangc Ziouv nyei faang gu'nyuoz. Ninh daix cietv ziepc dauh mienh. Baeqc fingx nzauh nyiemv weic zuqc yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx Ziouv daix ninh mbuo camv haic.
1Samuel6:20 Mbetc Semetv Mienh gorngv
1Samuel6:21 Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv fungx fienx mienh mingh mbuox Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim Mungv nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
1Samuel7:1 Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim Mienh ziouc daaih dorh Ziouv nyei faang mingh taux Aa^mbi^naa^ndapc nyei biauv. Ninh nyei biauv yiem norm mbong-aiv gu'nguaaic. Ninh mbuo yaac saax Aa^mbi^naa^ndapc nyei dorn
1Samuel7:2 Laengz ngaengc waac faang yiem Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim lauh haic
1Samuel7:3 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc zungv zeiv-fun
1Samuel7:4 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc guangc Mbaa^an zienh caux Atc^taa^lotv zienh
1Samuel7:5 Saa^mu^en aengx gorngv
1Samuel7:6 Ninh mbuo ziouc gapv zunv yiem Mitv^baa
1Samuel7:7 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh haiz gorngv I^saa^laa^en Mienh gapv zunv yiem Mitv^baa. Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv ziouc cuotv mingh mborqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. I^saa^laa^en Mienh muangx haiz hnangv naaic ziouc gamh nziex haic Fi^li^saa^die Mienh.
1Samuel7:8 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel7:9 Saa^mu^en ziouc zorqv dauh maiv gaengh guangc nyorx nyei ba'gi yungh dorn ziangh dauh buov ziec fongc horc bun Ziouv. Saa^mu^en ziouc weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Ziouv yaac dau ninh.
1Samuel7:10 Saa^mu^en fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv wuov zanc
1Samuel7:11 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Mitv^baa cuotv mingh zunc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel7:12 Saa^mu^en ziouc zorqv norm la'bieiv liepc jiez daaih yiem Mitv^baa Mungv caux Sen mbu'ndongx
1Samuel7:13 Hnangv naaic Fi^li^saa^die Mienh zuqc suei ninh mbuo yaac maiv aengx bieqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei deic aqv. Yiem Saa^mu^en nyei seix zeiv Ziouv dangv jienv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh.
1Samuel7:14 Dongh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caangv I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov deix zingh yiem E^ko^lon mingh taux Gatc Zingh
1Samuel7:15 Saa^mu^en ziangh seix tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh dunx sic.
1Samuel7:16 Hnyangx-hnyangx ninh cuotv mingh youh jienv Mbetc^en
1Samuel7:17 Nqa'haav ninh nzuonx Laamaa Zingh weic zuqc ninh nyei biauv yiem wuov. Yiem naaic ninh yaac tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh dunx sic. Saa^mu^en yaac yiem wuov weic Ziouv ceix norm ziec-dorngh.
1Samuel8:1 Saa^mu^en hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel8:2 Ninh nyei dorn-hlo heuc Yo^en
1Samuel8:3 Mv baac Saa^mu^en nyei dorn maiv zuotc ninh mbuo nyei die nyei nyungc zeiv zoux. Ninh mbuo kungx douh ganh duqv nyaanh hnangv
1Samuel8:4 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx mienh gox ziouc gapv zunv daaih taux Laamaa Zingh lorz Saa^mu^en.
1Samuel8:5 Ninh mbuo gorngv
1Samuel8:6 Mv baac ninh mbuo gorngv
1Samuel8:7 Ziouv dau Saa^mu^en
1Samuel8:8 Yiem yie dorh ninh mbuo cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung taux ih zanc ninh mbuo zanc-zanc guangc yie
1Samuel8:9 Wuov nyungc
1Samuel8:10 Saa^mu^en zorqv Ziouv gorngv nyei yietc zungv waac zunh mbuox dongh tov ninh tengx liepc hungh diex nyei baeqc fingx muangx.
1Samuel8:11 Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel8:12 Maaih deix ninh oix paaiv zoux yietc cin dauh baeng nyei bieiv
1Samuel8:13 Ninh oix zorqv meih mbuo nyei sieqv tengx ninh zoux youh ndaang
1Samuel8:14 Ninh oix zorqv meih mbuo gauh longx jiex nyei lingh deic caux a'ngunc huingx caux ga'lanv huingx jiu bun ninh nyei jien.
1Samuel8:15 Ninh oix zorqv meih mbuo nyei mbiauh caux a'ngunc biouv ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv bun ninh nyei jien caux bou.
1Samuel8:16 Ninh oix zorqv meih mbuo nyei m'jangc bou m'sieqv bou caux gauh longx jiex nyei mienh lunx mienh caux lorh tengx ninh zoux gong.
1Samuel8:17 Ninh oix zorqv meih mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh caux yungh guanh ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv. Meih mbuo yaac zuqc zoux ninh nyei nouh.
1Samuel8:18 Taux wuov hnoi meih mbuo oix laaix meih mbuo ganh ginv daaih nyei hungh diex zuqc kouv
1Samuel8:19 Mv baac baeqc fingx maiv kangv muangx Saa^mu^en gorngv nyei waac. Ninh mbuo ngaengc jienv gorngv
1Samuel8:20 weic bun yie mbuo hnangv norm-norm guoqv nyei mienh maaih hungh diex gunv
1Samuel8:21 Saa^mu^en haiz baeqc fingx gorngv nyei yietc zungv waac ninh ziouc dorh naaiv deix waac mingh mbuox Ziouv.
1Samuel8:22 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel9:1 Maaih dauh Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei mienh
1Samuel9:2 Ninh maaih dauh dorn
1Samuel9:3 Saulo nyei die
1Samuel9:4 Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc yangh E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx yaac jiex Saa^li^saa Deic mv baac lorz maiv buatc. Ninh mbuo aengx jiex Saa^aa^lim Deic mv baac lorh maiv yiem naaic. Ninh mbuo aengx bieqc Mben^yaa^min nyei deic yaac lorz maiv buatc wuov deix lorh.
1Samuel9:5 Ninh mbuo mingh taux Supc Deic wuov zanc
1Samuel9:6 Mv baac wuov dauh bou dau Saulo
1Samuel9:7 Saulo gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel9:8 Ninh nyei bou dau Saulo
1Samuel9:9 (Loz-hnoi yiem I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung se gorngv haaix dauh mienh oix mingh naaic Tin-Hungh nor
1Samuel9:10 Saulo ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel9:11 Ninh mbuo faaux mbong-aiv oix bieqc zingh wuov zanc
1Samuel9:12 Wuov deix sieqv dau
1Samuel9:13 Meih mbuo i dauh yietv bieqc zingh mingh
1Samuel9:14 Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc faaux mingh taux wuov norm zingh. Ninh mbuo yietv bieqc zingh wuov zanc
1Samuel9:15 Saulo maiv gaengh taux
1Samuel9:16 “Njang hnoi leih maiv go naaiv norm ziangh hoc
1Samuel9:17 Saa^mu^en buatc Saulo wuov zanc
1Samuel9:18 Saulo mingh taux Saa^mu^en nyei nza'hmien
1Samuel9:19 Saa^mu^en dau Saulo
1Samuel9:20 Meih nyei lorh
1Samuel9:21 Saulo dau
1Samuel9:22 Saa^mu^en ziouc dorh Saulo caux Saulo nyei bou bieqc yietc qongx biauv hlo nyei yaac bun ninh mbuo zueiz jienv kaeqv mienh yiem wuov norm dorngx nyei dieh gorn. Maaih kaeqv mienh leih maiv go faah ziepc dauh.
1Samuel9:23 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox zouh mienh
1Samuel9:24 Zouh mienh ziouc dorh zaux-zuih an jienv Saulo nyei nza'hmien. Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel9:25 Ninh mbuo yiem wuov jiex nyei ziec-dorngh njiec daaih bieqc zingh wuov zanc
1Samuel9:26 Ninh mbuo i dauh nyie nziouv nyei. Lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang

1Samuel10:1 Saa^mu^en ziouc zorqv baengh longc orn mienh nyei youh daaih dox njiec Saulo nyei m'nqorngv aengx zom ninh nyei hmien yaac gorngv
1Samuel10:2 Meih ih hnoi caux yie leih nqoi doic wuov zanc
1Samuel10:3 “Meih aengx jiex mingh deix taux Taa^mbo
1Samuel10:4 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv wuic buangh waac aengx zorqv i norm njuov cunv bun meih. Meih yaac oix zuqc yiem ninh mbuo nyei buoz zipv daaih.
1Samuel10:5 “Meih mbuo aengx jiex mingh taux Tin-Hungh nyei Mbong
1Samuel10:6 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh oix camv-camv nyei yiem meih. Meih yaac oix caux jienv wuov deix douc waac mienh douc waac. Meih ziouc tiuv benx siang-mienh.
1Samuel10:7 Meih buatc naaiv deix jangx-hoc cuotv daaih wuov zanc
1Samuel10:8 “Meih oix zuqc mingh Gin^gaan ndaangc yie. Nqa'haav yie yaac mingh wuov buangh meih
1Samuel10:9 Saulo guinh sin leih nqoi Saa^mu^en wuov zanc
1Samuel10:10 Saulo caux ninh nyei bou mingh taux Gi^mbe^aa wuov zanc

1Samuel10:13 Saulo douc liuz waac wuov zanc

1Samuel10:18 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Samuel10:19 Mv baac ih hnoi meih mbuo guangc meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh

1Samuel10:26 Saulo yaac nzuonx Gi^mbe^aa Zingh

1Samuel11:1 Ammon Mienh nyei hungh

1Samuel11:4 Douc fienx mienh mingh taux Saulo yiem nyei Gi^mbe^aa Zingh
1Samuel11:5 Wuov zanc Saulo jang-jang yiem ndeic horngh jienv ngongh nzuonx daaih. Saulo ziouc naaic ninh mbuo
1Samuel11:6 Saulo haiz naaiv deix fienx
1Samuel11:7 Ninh ziouc zorqv yietc doix ngongh daaih hngaqv benx ziex deix bun douc fienx mienh dorh mingh gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic yaac gorngv
1Samuel11:8 Saulo yiem Mbesekv diuc nzoih baeng. I^saa^laa^en nyei baeng yietc zungv maaih faah ziepc waanc dauh
1Samuel11:9 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv mbuox wuov deix douc fienx mienh
1Samuel11:10 Yaa^mbetc Mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox Ammon Mienh
1Samuel11:11 Da'nyeic hnoi Saulo zorqv baeqc fingx bun zoux buo guanh. Lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo bieqc Ammon Mienh nyei ciangv daix Ammon Mienh taux nyutc doqc nyei ziangh hoc. Zengc njiec duqv maengc cuotv wuov deix faatv nzaanx nzengc dong dauh fai dauh nyei biaux
1Samuel11:12 Baeqc fingx ziouc gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en “Gorngv
1Samuel11:13 Mv baac Saulo gorngv

1Samuel12:1 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
1Samuel12:2 Ih zanc meih mbuo maaih hungh dorh meih mbuo. Yie ganh hnyangx-jeiv gox
1Samuel12:3 Yie yiem naaiv. Tov meih mbuo yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien caux ninh longc youh orn daaih zoux hungh wuov dauh nyei nza'hmien tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx. Yie zorqv jiex haaix dauh nyei ngongh fai? Yie caangv jiex haaix dauh nyei lorh fai? Yie kuei jiex haaix dauh fai? Yie zeix jiex haaix dauh fai? Yie yiem haaix dauh nyei buoz zipv jiex nyaanh hmuangx ziouc zoux bun yie nyei m'zing maengh nyei fai? Gunv gorngv aqv. Yie ziouc tuix nzuonx bun meih mbuo.”

1Samuel13:1 Saulo faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv faah ziepc hnyangx. Ninh gunv I^saa^laa^en Guoqv feix ziepc nyeic hnyangx.
1Samuel13:2 Saulo yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx ginv buo cin dauh mienh. I cin dauh gan Saulo yiem Mikv^maatv caux Mbetc^en nyei mbong-aiv dorngx. Maaih yietc cin dauh gan Yo^naa^taan yiem Mben^yaa^min Deic nyei Gi^mbe^aa Zingh. Zengc njiec nyei mienh ninh heuc gorqv-mienh nzuonx gorqv-mienh nyei biauv.
1Samuel13:3 Yo^naa^taan mborqv hingh yiem Ge^mbaa Mungv nyei Fi^li^saa^die Mienh goux deic-bung baeng nyei zaamc. Fi^li^saa^die Mienh yaac hiuv duqv mi'aqv. Saulo ziouc paaiv mienh mingh gormx deic-bung biomv jorng heuc Hipv^lu Mienh daaih gapv zunv cuotv mingh mborqv jaax.”
1Samuel13:4 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh muangx haiz gorngv
1Samuel13:5 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gapv zunv oix caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo maaih mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie buo waanc jaax
1Samuel13:6 I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc ganh zuqc sic hniev haic aqv
1Samuel13:7 Maaih deix Hipv^lu Mienh zungv biaux jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih mingh taux Gaatc caux Gi^le^aatc Deic. Saulo corc yiem wuov Gin^gaan. Yietc zungv baeqc fingx sin zinx jienv gan ninh.
1Samuel13:8 Saulo yiem wuov zuov siec hnoi
1Samuel13:9 Hnangv naaic
1Samuel13:10 Saulo jang-jang fongc horc buov ziec liuz
1Samuel13:11 Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel13:12 Yie ziouc gorngv
1Samuel13:13 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel13:14 Mv baac ih zanc meih nyei hungh hoc maiv haih yiem lauh. Ziouv lorz buatc laanh mienh maaih hnyouv hnangv Ziouv ganh nyei hnyouv nor
1Samuel13:15 Saa^mu^en ziouc yiem Gin^gaan mingh taux Mben^yaa^min Deic nyei Gi^mbe^aa Zingh. Saulo saauv gan ninh nyei mienh
1Samuel13:16 Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn
1Samuel13:17 Maaih buo guanh zaqc baeng yiem Fi^li^saa^die nyei ciangv cuotv daaih. Maaih yietc guanh hungx jienv mingh Su^an Deic nyei O^faa^laa Mungv.
1Samuel13:18 Maaih guanh hungx jienv mingh Mbetc Holon. Aengx maaih guanh hungx jienv gapv-jaaix
1Samuel13:19 Wuov zanc gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung lorz maiv duqv yietc dauh hlieqv-zaangc weic zuqc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gorngv
1Samuel13:20 Mv baac dauh dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix zuqc mingh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh wuov nzioux ninh mbuo nyei laih bieiv caux porng caux bouv caux nzuqc limh.
1Samuel13:21 Nzioux laih bieiv caux porng nyei jaax-zinh se nyic zinh nyaanh. Nzioux bouv caux zaengx zunc ngongh biaav dueiv-mueiz nyei hlieqv nyei jaax-zinh se yietc zinh nyaanh.
1Samuel13:22 Weic naaiv
1Samuel13:23 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh goux deic-bung nyei baeng cuotv mingh taux jiex mbong-qangx
1Samuel14:1 Maaih hnoi Saulo nyei dorn
1Samuel14:2 Wuov zanc Saulo yiem Gi^mbe^aa Zingh hlen
1Samuel14:3 Yiem wuov deix mienh gu'nyuoz maaih Aa^hi^yaa zuqv jienv efotv. Aa^hi^yaa se I^kaa^mbotc nyei gorx
1Samuel14:4 Yo^naa^taan oix yangh jiex mbong-qangx wuov diuh jauv mingh taux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei baeng nyei ciangv. Wuov diuh jauv i bung jauv-hlen
1Samuel14:5 Yietc norm mbaengx-citv yiem baqv bung nitv Mikv^maatv. Maaih norm yiem naamh bung nitv Ge^mbaa wuov bung.
1Samuel14:6 Yo^naa^taan gorngv mbuox tengx ninh dorh mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh
1Samuel14:7 Tengx ninh dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel14:8 Yo^naa^taan gorngv
