1Samuel14:11 Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc cuotv daaih bun Fi^li^saa^die baeng nyei ciangv wuov deix baeng buatc. Fi^li^saa^die mienh gorngv
1Samuel14:12 Yiem zaamc nyei baeng ziouc heuc Yo^naa^taan caux tengx ninh dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh dorn. Ninh mbuo gorngv
1Samuel14:13 Yo^naa^taan ziouc nyorng jienv faaux mingh. Tengx ninh dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh yaac gan jienv ninh mingh. Yo^naa^taan daix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien king njiec. Tengx Yo^naa^taan dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh dorn yaac tengx jienv ninh daix.
1Samuel14:14 Yo^naa^taan caux tengx ninh dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh mienh daix daauh nzunc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh maaih leih maiv go nyic ziepc dauh mienh yiem ndongc yietc doix ngongh laih yietc aanx nyei ndau jangv gu'nyuoz.
1Samuel14:15 Yiem ciangv gu'nyuoz
1Samuel14:16 Yiem Mben^yaa^min Deic nyei Gi^mbe^aa Zingh
1Samuel14:17 Saulo ziouc gorngv mbuox gan ninh wuov deix mienh
1Samuel14:18 Saulo gorngv mbuox Aa^hi^yaa
1Samuel14:19 Saulo caux Aa^hi^yaa sai mienh gorngv waac wuov zanc
1Samuel14:20 Saulo caux gan ninh nyei baeng ziouc gapv zunv mingh wuov mborqv jaax ciangv. Mangc maah! Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ganh longc nzuqc ndaauv laanh daix laanh. Za'gengh lunc taux ndiev aqv.
1Samuel14:21 Dongh zinh ndaangc caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh yiem yaac caux ninh mbuo bieqc ninh mbuo nyei ciangv
1Samuel14:22 Dongh bingx jienv E^faa^im mbong-aiv dorngx wuov deix I^saa^laa^en Mienh haiz fienx gorngv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh biaux
1Samuel14:23 Wuov hnoi Ziouv njoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Mborqv jaax nyei jauv zungv jiex ndaangc Mbetc Aawen Deic wuov bung.
1Samuel14:24 Wuov hnoi I^saa^laa^en Mienh za'gengh kouv haic
1Samuel14:25 Zuangx baeqc fingx bieqc gu'nyuoz lomc mingh
1Samuel14:26 Ninh mbuo bieqc lomc wuov zanc
1Samuel14:27 Mv baac Yo^naa^taan maiv duqv haiz ninh nyei die heuc baeqc fingx houv waac
1Samuel14:28 Yiem wuov nyei mienh maaih dauh gorngv mbuox Yo^naa^taan
1Samuel14:29 Yo^naa^taan gorngv
1Samuel14:30 Se gorngv ih hnoi baeqc fingx duqv sueih eix nyanc yiem win-wangv caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv nor
1Samuel14:31 Wuov hnoi I^saa^laa^en Mienh daix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh yiem Mikv^maatv daix jienv mingh taux Ai^yaa^lon. Zuangx baeng za'gengh mau duqv kouv haic.
1Samuel14:32 Zuangx mienh ziouc huaang-huaang zaang-zaang nyei tiux bieqc mingh lorz caangv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
1Samuel14:33 Maaih mienh mbuox Saulo
1Samuel14:34 Saulo aengx gorngv
1Samuel14:35 Saulo weic Ziouv ceix norm ziec-dorngh. Naaiv se ninh weic Ziouv ceix nyei daauh norm ziec-dorngh.
1Samuel14:36 Saulo gorngv
1Samuel14:37 Saulo ziouc naaic Tin-Hungh
1Samuel14:38 Saulo ziouc gorngv
1Samuel14:39 Yie ziangv jienv ziangh jienv nyei Ziouv
1Samuel14:40 Hungh diex ziouc gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
1Samuel14:41 Hnangv naaiv Saulo ziouc daux gaux naaic Ziouv
1Samuel14:42 Saulo gorngv
1Samuel14:43 Saulo ziouc naaic Yo^naa^taan
1Samuel14:44 Saulo gorngv
1Samuel14:45 Baeqc fingx naaic Saulo
1Samuel14:46 Saulo ziouc dingh njiec
1Samuel14:47 Saulo gunv I^saa^laa^en Guoqv wuov zanc
1Samuel14:48 Hungh diex mborqv jaax henv
1Samuel14:49 Saulo nyei dorn maaih Yo^naa^taan
1Samuel14:50 Saulo nyei auv
1Samuel14:51 Saulo nyei die
1Samuel14:52 Yiem Saulo nyei seix zeiv zanc-zanc caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh maaih mborqv domh jaax nyei sic. Saulo buatc haaix dauh ziangh duqv henv
1Samuel15:1 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel15:2 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
1Samuel15:3 Ih zanc meih mingh mborqv Aa^maa^lekv Mienh
1Samuel15:4 Weic naaiv Saulo diuc nzoih baeng daaih yiem Te^laa^im. Ninh saauv yangh ndau nyei baeng
1Samuel15:5 Saulo ziouc mingh taux Aa^maa^lekv Mienh nyei zingh
1Samuel15:6 Saulo gorngv mbuox Kenai Mienh
1Samuel15:7 Saulo ziouc mborqv hingh Aa^maa^lekv Mienh
1Samuel15:8 Ninh longc nzuqc ndaauv daix nzengc Aa^maa^lekv baeqc fingx
1Samuel15:9 Mv baac Saulo caux baeqc fingx liouh Aagakc nyei maengc
1Samuel15:10 Ziouv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel15:11 “Yie liepc Saulo zoux hungh ih zanc yie hnamv-nzuonx aqv
1Samuel15:12 Da'nyeic ndorm Saa^mu^en jiez sin nziouv nyei oix mingh lorz Saulo. Mv baac maaih mienh mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel15:13 Saa^mu^en taux Saulo wuov zanc
1Samuel15:14 Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel15:15 Saulo dau
1Samuel15:16 Saa^mu^en ziouc gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel15:17 Saa^mu^en ziouc gorngv
1Samuel15:18 Ziouv paaiv meih cuotv mingh yaac hatc meih
1Samuel15:19 Meih weic haaix diuc maiv muangx Ziouv nyei waac? Meih weic haaix diuc gaanv jienv caangv ga'naaiv
1Samuel15:20 Saulo gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel15:21 Mv baac baeqc fingx zorqv caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
1Samuel15:22 Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel15:23 laaix mienh ngaengc Ziouv se hnangv mbouv guaax nyei zuiz. Zoux maux se orqv nyei zuiz hnangv baaix miuc-fangx. Laaix meih guangc Ziouv nyei waac
1Samuel15:24 Saulo gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel15:25 Ih zanc tov guangc nqoi yie nyei zuiz
1Samuel15:26 Mv baac Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel15:27 Saa^mu^en guinh sin oix mingh wuov zanc
1Samuel15:28 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel15:29 I^saa^laa^en nyei Qaqv Wuov Dauh
1Samuel15:30 Saulo gorngv
1Samuel15:31 Saa^mu^en ziouc caux jienv Saulo nzuonx. Saulo yaac zaangc Ziouv.
1Samuel15:32 Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel15:33 Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox Aagakc
1Samuel15:34 Saa^mu^en ziouc mingh Laamaa Zingh mi'aqv. Saulo yaac nzuonx ninh ganh nyei biauv yiem Saulo nyei buonv-zingh
1Samuel15:35 Saa^mu^en taux ninh guei seix nyei hnoi
1Samuel16:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel16:2 Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel16:3 Mbuox Jetc^si caux jienv daaih fongc horc ziec
1Samuel16:4 Saa^mu^en ziouc ei jienv Ziouv nyei waac zoux. Ninh taux Mbetc^le^hem wuov zanc
1Samuel16:5 Saa^mu^en dau
1Samuel16:6 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo daaih nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel16:7 Mv baac Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saa^mu^en
1Samuel16:8 Jetc^si ziouc heuc Aa^mbi^naa^ndapc yangh jauv jiex Saa^mu^en nyei nza'hmien. Saa^mu^en gorngv
1Samuel16:9 Jetc^si ziouc heuc Sammaa jiex mingh
1Samuel16:10 Jetc^si heuc ninh nyei siec dauh dorn yangh jauv jiex Saa^mu^en nyei nza'hmien. Saa^mu^en gorngv mbuox Jetc^si
1Samuel16:11 Saa^mu^en naaic Jetc^si
1Samuel16:12 Jetc^si ziouc paaiv mienh mingh heuc wuov dauh dorn nzuonx daaih. Naaiv dauh dorn se hmien-setv njang
1Samuel16:13 Saa^mu^en ziouc zorqv dapv jienv jorng nyei youh yiem wuov dauh dorn nyei zuangx gorx mbu'ndongx orn ninh. Yiem wuov hnoi daaih Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh camv-camv nyei yiem jienv Ndaawitv. Saa^mu^en ziouc jiez sin nzuonx Laamaa mi'aqv.
1Samuel16:14 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh leih nqoi Saulo mi'aqv. Aengx maaih orqv nyei mienv yiem Ziouv daaih morh ninh.
1Samuel16:15 Saulo nyei bou mbuo ziouc gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel16:16 Tov meih
1Samuel16:17 Saulo ziouc mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel16:18 Maaih dauh houh saeng gorngv
1Samuel16:19 Hnangv naaic Saulo ziouc fungx douc fienx mienh mingh mbuox Jetc^si
1Samuel16:20 Jetc^si ziouc paaiv ninh nyei dorn
1Samuel16:21 Ndaawitv mingh taux Saulo wuov ziouc zoux hungh diex nyei gong. Saulo hnamv haic Ndaawitv. Ndaawitv yaac duqv zoux tengx Saulo dorh wuoqc ginc nyei mienh.
1Samuel16:22 Saulo fungx fienx mingh mbuox Jetc^si
1Samuel16:23 Yiem Tin-Hungh daaih nyei orqv mienv haaix zanc daaih morh Saulo
1Samuel17:1 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc diuc nzoih ninh mbuo nyei jun-baeng yaac gapv zunv yiem Yu^ndaa Deic nyei Soko Mungv. Ninh mbuo liepc ciangv yiem Soko Mungv caux Aa^se^kaa Zingh mbu'ndongx
1Samuel17:2 Saulo caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh gapv zunv yiem Elaa Horngz liepc ciangv. Ninh mbuo ziux mborqv jaax nyei yietc nyeic mbaih jienv oix caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax.
1Samuel17:3 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh souv jienv wuov norm zorng
1Samuel17:4 Maaih dauh mborqv jaax henv haic nyei mienh
1Samuel17:5 Ninh nyei m'nqorngv ndongx jienv dongh siqv muoc. Ninh yaac zuqv jienv dongh siqv nyei mborqv jaax lui
1Samuel17:6 Ninh yaac longc dongh siqv daav daaih buang jienv cingh zorng. Mba'dauh buix jienv dongh siqv cang-nangv.
1Samuel17:7 Cang-baengx ndaauv nyei hnangv ndatv ndie nyei ndiangx nor
1Samuel17:8 Go^li^atc souv jienv huin mingh longc qaqv heuc qiex mbui nyei mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei jun-baeng guanh
1Samuel17:9 Se gorngv ninh mborqv duqv hingh yaac daix yie daic nor
1Samuel17:10 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh aengx gorngv
1Samuel17:11 Saulo caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh haiz liuz wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei waac
1Samuel17:12 Ndaawitv se Yu^ndaa Deic
1Samuel17:13 Jetc^si nyei buo dauh dorn-hlo caux Saulo cuotv mingh mborqv jaax mi'aqv. Dongh mingh mborqv jaax wuov deix dorn nyei mbuox
1Samuel17:14 Ndaawitv benx dorn-laai. Wuov deix buo dauh domh gorx gan Saulo mingh mi'aqv.
1Samuel17:15 Mv baac Ndaawitv mingh mingh nzuonx-nzuonx
1Samuel17:16 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ndorm-ndorm
1Samuel17:17 Maaih hnoi Jetc^si gorngv mbuox ninh nyei dorn
1Samuel17:18 Yaac zorqv naaiv deix ziepc ndunh nyorx-hmei ngaengc dorh mingh bun gunv yietc cin dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv. Mangc gaax meih nyei gorx mbuo yiem longx nyei fai? Yaac zorqv deix ninh mbuo nyei ga'naaiv dorh nzuonx daaih.
1Samuel17:19 Ninh mbuo caux Saulo caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
1Samuel17:20 Da'nyeic ndorm Ndaawitv jiez sin nziouv nyei zorqv ba'gi yungh jiu bun ganh dauh mienh goux. Ninh ziouc ziux ninh nyei die paaiv nyei waac dorh nyanc hopv mingh. Ninh daaih taux mborqv jaax ciangv ga'hlen
1Samuel17:21 I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc doix hmien mbaih jienv mborqv
1Samuel17:22 Ndaawitv ziouc zorqv ninh dorh daaih nyei nyanc hopv jiu bun goux ga'naaiv nyei mienh liuz
1Samuel17:23 Ninh mbuo gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc
1Samuel17:24 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh buatc wuov dauh mienh
1Samuel17:25 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv
1Samuel17:26 Ndaawitv naaic souv ninh nyei ga'hlen wuov deix mienh
1Samuel17:27 Baeqc fingx ziouc ziux zinh ndaangc gorngv nyei waac mbuox ninh
1Samuel17:28 Ndaawitv nyei domh gorx
1Samuel17:29 Ndaawitv gorngv
1Samuel17:30 Ndaawitv ziouc huin hmien mingh caux ganh dauh gorngv
1Samuel17:31 Maaih mienh haiz Ndaawitv gorngv nyei waac ziouc mingh mbuox Saulo. Saulo ziouc bun mienh mingh heuc Ndaawitv daaih.
1Samuel17:32 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel17:33 Saulo gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel17:34 Mv baac Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel17:35 yie ziouc zunc zaaic mborqv ninh yaac zorqv yiem ninh nyei nzuih baengx nyei ba'gi yungh dorn nzuonx daaih. Se gorngv ninh jiez sin daaih caux yie borngz nor
1Samuel17:36 Yie
1Samuel17:37 Ndaawitv aengx gorngv
1Samuel17:38 Saulo ziouc zorqv ninh ganh nyei mborqv jaax lui-houx tengx Ndaawitv zuqv jienv
1Samuel17:39 Ndaawitv ziouc zorqv ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv buix jienv mborqv jaax lui-houx ga'nyiec maengx
1Samuel17:40 Ninh ziouc nanv jienv ninh nyei biaav-mbiaac mingh wuov ndoqv-hlen ginv duqv biaa norm hliouv njang nyei la'bieiv daaih dapv jienv ninh buix mingh goux ba'gi yungh nyei mbuoqc jorngx. Buoz nanv jienv fengx la'bieiv nyei ndopv-hlaang. Ninh ziouc mingh nitv fatv wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh.
1Samuel17:41 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh maaih nanv torngv-baaih nyei mienh yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx gunv zoux gunv mingh nitv fatv Ndaawitv.
1Samuel17:42 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mangc buatc Ndaawitv ziouc mangc maiv faaux mueic ninh
1Samuel17:43 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh ziouc naaic Ndaawitv
1Samuel17:44 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel17:45 Ndaawitv yaac gorngv mbuox wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel17:46 Ih hnoi Ziouv oix zorqv meih jiu bun yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. Yie oix daix meih
1Samuel17:47 Gapv zunv yiem naaiv nyei zuangx mienh ziouc hiuv duqv Ziouv maiv zeiz longc nzuqc ndaauv fai cang njoux mienh
1Samuel17:48 Wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gunv zoux gunv daaih fatv Ndaawitv
1Samuel17:49 Ndaawitv longc ninh nyei buoz lom bieqc mbuoqc jorngx mingh
1Samuel17:50 Hnangv naaic Ndaawitv longc diuh ndopv-hlaang caux norm la'bieiv hingh jiex wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel17:51 Ndaawitv tiux mingh souv jienv wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei sin-hlen
1Samuel17:52 I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh ziouc jiez daaih nauc jienv zunc jienv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mingh taux Gatc Zingh caux E^ko^lon nyei zingh gaengh. Hnangv naaic yiem Saa^aa^laa^im mingh taux Gatc caux E^ko^lon wuov diuh jauv kungx maaih zuqc daix daic nyei Fi^li^saa^die Mienh hnangv.
1Samuel17:53 I^saa^laa^en Mienh zunc liuz Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel17:54 Ndaawitv dorh jienv wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei m'nqorngv daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Mv baac wuov dauh nyei wuoqc ginc Ndaawitv an jienv ninh ganh nyei ndopv-liuh.
1Samuel17:55 Saulo buatc Ndaawitv cuotv mingh caux wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax wuov zanc
1Samuel17:56 Hungh diex ziouc gorngv
1Samuel17:57 Ndaawitv mingh daix liuz Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nzuonx daaih
1Samuel17:58 Saulo naaic ninh
1Samuel18:1 Ndaawitv caux Saulo gorngv liuz waac
1Samuel18:2 Wuov hnoi Saulo liouh jienv Ndaawitv caux ninh yiem
1Samuel18:3 Yo^naa^taan ziouc caux Ndaawitv laengz jiez ngaengc waac
1Samuel18:4 Yo^naa^taan ziouc jaiv ninh nyei lui-ndaauv caux mborqv jaax nyei lui
1Samuel18:5 Maiv gunv Saulo paaiv Ndaawitv mingh zoux haaix nyungc
1Samuel18:6 Ndaawitv daix liuz wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel18:7 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn yietc binc cangx heix
1Samuel18:8 Saulo za'gengh! qiex jiez haic. Naaiv deix waac maiv horpc ninh nyei hnyouv. Ninh gorngv
1Samuel18:9 Yiem wuov hnoi daaih Saulo bungx m'zing mangc jienv Ndaawitv.
1Samuel18:10 Da'nyeic hnoi maaih dauh orqv nyei mienv yiem Tin-Hungh daaih morh Saulo. Saulo yiem ganh nyei biauv qaqv gorngv maiv nzang nyei waac. Ndaawitv hnangv yietc gau patv daanh baah bun Saulo muangx. Saulo nyei buoz nanv jienv cang.
1Samuel18:11 Saulo ziouc biu cang mingh. Ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv
1Samuel18:12 Saulo ziouc gamh nziex Ndaawitv
1Samuel18:13 Hnangv naaic Saulo heuc suiv Ndaawitv mingh leih nqoi ninh
1Samuel18:14 Maiv gunv Ndaawitv zoux haaix nyungc ninh yaac zoux duqv cuotv nyei
1Samuel18:15 Saulo buatc Ndaawitv zoux duqv cuotv nyungc-nyungc ninh ziouc gamh nziex haic Ndaawitv.
1Samuel18:16 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh hnamv Ndaawitv
1Samuel18:17 Saulo gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel18:18 Ndaawitv dau Saulo
1Samuel18:19 Nqa'haav taux ziangh hoc bungx Saulo nyei sieqv
1Samuel18:20 Saulo nyei ganh dauh sieqv
1Samuel18:21 Saulo yiem hnyouv hnamv
1Samuel18:22 Saulo gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel18:23 Saulo nyei bou ziouc zorqv naaiv deix waac gorngv bun Ndaawitv muangx
1Samuel18:24 Saulo nyei bou mbuox Saulo
1Samuel18:25 Saulo gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
1Samuel18:26 Wuov deix bou ziouc gorngv naaiv deix waac bun Ndaawitv muangx. Ndaawitv ziouc buangv hnyouv zoux hungh diex nyei sieqv-laangh. Dingc ziangx nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux
1Samuel18:27 Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei mienh mingh daix nyic baeqv dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh. Ndaawitv ziouc dorh wuov deix mienh nyei yietc zungv jaix-zueiv ndopv daaih zorqv buangv soux mouc bun hungh diex weic bun ninh duqv zoux hungh diex nyei sieqv-laangh. Saulo ziouc zorqv ninh nyei sieqv Mikaan
1Samuel18:28 Saulo mangc yaac hiuv duqv Ziouv caux Ndaawitv yiem. Saulo nyei sieqv Mikaan yaac hnamv Ndaawitv.
1Samuel18:29 Saulo ziouc gauh fatv gamh nziex Ndaawitv. Hnangv naaic Saulo zanc-zanc zoux Ndaawitv nyei win-wangv.
1Samuel18:30 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei baeng-bieiv zanc-zanc cuotv daaih mborqv jaax. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo cuotv daaih mbu'ziex nzunc
1Samuel19:1 Saulo heuc ninh nyei dorn
1Samuel19:2 Yo^naa^taan ziouc gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel19:3 Meih bingx haaix nzopv lomc-huaang
1Samuel19:4 Yo^naa^taan ceng Ndaawitv bun ninh nyei die muangx. Ninh gorngv
1Samuel19:5 Ninh maiv longc maengc nyei mingh daix wuov dauh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh. Ziouv tengx I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh duqv hingh jiex. Wuov zanc aa die buatc yaac a'hneiv haic. Ih zanc weic haaix diuc oix zoux zuiz daix Ndaawitv bun maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx.”
1Samuel19:6 Saulo ziouc muangx Yo^naa^taan nyei waac. Saulo houv jienv waac gorngv
1Samuel19:7 Yo^naa^taan ziouc heuc Ndaawitv
1Samuel19:8 Nqa'haav aengx maaih mborqv jaax nyei sic. Ndaawitv ziouc cuotv mingh caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax
1Samuel19:9 Yiem Ziouv daaih nyei orqv mienv aengx daaih morh Saulo mi'aqv. Wuov zanc Saulo yiem ninh nyei dinc nanv jienv cang. Ndaawitv yaac patv daanh baah bun ninh muangx.
1Samuel19:10 Saulo biu cang mingh oix nzopv Ndaawitv bangc njongc ding jienv
1Samuel19:11 Saulo paaiv mienh mingh Ndaawitv nyei biauv cienh mangc
1Samuel19:12 Mikaan ziouc bungx Ndaawitv yangh fong muonh njiec. Ndaawitv ziouc biaux ndutv mi'aqv.
1Samuel19:13 Mikaan aengx zorqv miuc-fangx an jienv coux
1Samuel19:14 Saulo paaiv mienh mingh zorqv Ndaawitv wuov zanc Mikaan gorngv
1Samuel19:15 Saulo aengx paaiv mienh mingh mangc Ndaawitv
1Samuel19:16 Paaiv mingh nyei mienh bieqc mingh
1Samuel19:17 Saulo gorngv Mikaan
1Samuel19:18 Ndaawitv ziouc biaux ndutv mi'aqv. Ninh mingh Laamaa Zingh lorz Saa^mu^en
1Samuel19:19 Maaih mienh mingh gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel19:20 Saulo ziouc paaiv mienh mingh zorqv Ndaawitv. Mingh nyei mienh buatc guanh douc waac mienh yiem wuov douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac
1Samuel19:21 Maaih mienh dorh naaiv deix sic mingh mbuox Saulo. Ninh ziouc aengx paaiv deix mienh mingh. Wuov deix mienh yaac caux jienv douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac. Saulo aengx paaiv da'faam nzunc mienh mingh. Wuov deix yaac fih hnangv nyei douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac.
1Samuel19:22 Saulo ganh ziouc mingh Laamaa Zingh. Daaih taux Seku Mungv nyei domh wuom-kuotv ga'hlen ninh naaic mienh
1Samuel19:23 Saulo ziouc mingh Laamaa Zingh
1Samuel19:24 Ninh yaac jaiv nqoi lui-houx dorng jienv Saa^mu^en douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac
1Samuel20:1 Ndaawitv yiem Laamaa Zingh
1Samuel20:2 Yo^naa^taan dau ninh
1Samuel20:3 Mv baac Ndaawitv aengx houv waac gorngv
1Samuel20:4 Yo^naa^taan ziouc gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel20:5 Ndaawitv ziouc mbuox Yo^naa^taan
1Samuel20:6 Se gorngv meih nyei die buatc yie maiv yiem naaic dieh nor
1Samuel20:7 Se gorngv hungh diex gorngv
1Samuel20:8 Weic naaiv tov meih zoux longx bun yie
1Samuel20:9 Yo^naa^taan ziouc gorngv
1Samuel20:10 Ndaawitv ziouc gorngv mbuox Yo^naa^taan
1Samuel20:11 Yo^naa^taan dau Ndaawitv
1Samuel20:12 Yo^naa^taan gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel20:13 Mv baac se gorngv yie nyei die maaih hnyouv oix hoic meih nyei maengc
1Samuel20:14 Se gorngv yie corc maaih maengc ziangh jienv
1Samuel20:15 Ziouv mietc nzengc yiem ndau-beih meih nyei yietc zungv win-wangv wuov zanc
1Samuel20:16 Yo^naa^taan ziouc caux Ndaawitv
1Samuel20:17 Yo^naa^taan hnamv Ndaawitv ziouc bun Ndaawitv aengx laengz nzunc waac
1Samuel20:18 Yo^naa^taan aengx gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel20:19 Hnaang hnoi oix zuqc siepv-siepv nyei njiec mingh taux meih zinh ndaangc bingx nyei dorngx
1Samuel20:20 Yie oix hungx jienv wuov norm la'bieiv ga'hlen buonv buo nzitv forng hnangv buonv mbaeqc nor.
1Samuel20:21 Buonv liuz
1Samuel20:22 Se gorngv yie mbuox wuov dauh dorn
1Samuel20:23 Hnangv naaic yie caux meih gorngv naaiv deix jauv-louc
1Samuel20:24 Ndaawitv ziouc mingh bingx wuov lomc-huaang. Taux saeng-yietv hnoi
1Samuel20:25 Hungh diex zueiz jienv ninh yietc gau zueiz nyei dorngx nitv jienv njongc. Yo^naa^taan doix hmien zueiz
1Samuel20:26 Wuov hnoi Saulo maiv gorngv haaix nyungc weic zuqc ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv
1Samuel20:27 Mv baac da'nyeic hnoi
1Samuel20:28 Yo^naa^taan dau Saulo
1Samuel20:29 Ninh gorngv
1Samuel20:30 Saulo ziouc qiex jiez! haic Yo^naa^taan. Saulo gorngv
1Samuel20:31 Da'faanh Jetc^si nyei dorn corc maaih maengc ziangh naaiv norm lungh ndiev nor
1Samuel20:32 Yo^naa^taan ziouc dau ninh nyei die
1Samuel20:33 Saulo ziouc biu ninh nyei cang mingh oix nzopv Yo^naa^taan. Yo^naa^taan ziouc hiuv duqv ninh nyei die za'gengh jiez hnyouv oix daix Ndaawitv aqv.
1Samuel20:34 Yo^naa^taan za'gengh qiex jiez haic
1Samuel20:35 Da'nyeic ndorm
1Samuel20:36 Yo^naa^taan mbuox wuov dauh dorn
1Samuel20:37 Wuov dauh dorn mingh taux Yo^naa^taan nyei forng ndortv nyei dorngx
1Samuel20:38 Yo^naa^taan aengx heuc jienv mbuox wuov dauh dorn
1Samuel20:39 Mv baac wuov dauh dorn maiv hiuv duqv naaiv deix jauv-louc. Kungx Yo^naa^taan caux Ndaawitv ganh hiuv hnangv.
1Samuel20:40 Yo^naa^taan ziouc zorqv juang-zinx caux forng bun wuov dauh dorn
1Samuel20:41 Wuov dauh dorn yietv mingh liuz
1Samuel20:42 Yo^naa^taan gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel21:1 Ndaawitv ziouc mingh taux Nopv Mungv
1Samuel21:2 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^hi^me^lekv sai mienh
1Samuel21:3 Meih maaih deix haaix nyungc nyanc yiem meih naaiv fai? Tov bun biaa norm njuov yie fai yiem meih naaiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc hopv yaac duqv.”
1Samuel21:4 Sai mienh dau Ndaawitv
1Samuel21:5 Ndaawitv dau sai mienh
1Samuel21:6 Hnangv naaic sai mienh ziouc zorqv cing-nzengc njuov bun Ndaawitv
1Samuel21:7 Wuov hnoi maaih dauh mienh yiem wuov. Ninh zoux Saulo nyei bou
1Samuel21:8 Ndaawitv naaic Aa^hi^me^lekv
1Samuel21:9 Sai mienh gorngv
1Samuel21:10 Wuov hnoi Ndaawitv biaux Saulo yaac mingh lorz Gatc Zingh nyei hungh
1Samuel21:11 Aakitv nyei bou gorngv mbuox Aakitv
1Samuel21:12 Ndaawitv ziouc yiem hnyouv jangx jienv naaiv deix waac
1Samuel21:13 Ndaawitv ziouc tiuv ninh nyei eix leiz daaih duqv-eix zoux benx butv-ndin mienh
1Samuel21:14 Aakitv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel21:15 Yie qiemx zuqc butv-ndin mienh meih mbuo cingx daaih dorh naaiv dauh lov daaih yiem yie nyei nza'hmien zoux butv-ndin sic bun yie mangc fai? Naaiv nyungc mienh puix duqv bieqc yie nyei biauv fai?”
1Samuel22:1 Ndaawitv cuotv Gatc Zingh biaux mingh yiem Aa^ndun^lam Mbaengx-Kuotv. Ninh nyei gorx mbuo caux ninh nyei die nyei biauv zong mienh muangx haiz
1Samuel22:2 Da'faanh zuqc kouv nyei mienh caux qiemx zaeqv nyei mienh caux maiv buangv hnyouv nyei mienh daaih lorz ninh. Ndaawitv zoux wuov deix zuangx mienh nyei bieiv zeiv. Daaih gan ninh nyei mienh maaih leih maiv go feix baeqv dauh.
1Samuel22:3 Ndaawitv ziouc cuotv wuov norm dorngx mingh Mo^apc Guoqv
1Samuel22:4 Ndaawitv ziouc dorh ninh nyei die maa daaih caux Mo^apc nyei hungh yiem. Da'faanh Ndaawitv corc bingx jienv yiem nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel22:5 Douc waac mienh
1Samuel22:6 Saulo haiz gorngv maaih mienh duqv buatc Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei mienh. Wuov zanc Saulo yiem Gi^mbe^aa Deic
1Samuel22:7 Saulo ziouc gorngv mbuox souv weih gormx ninh wuov deix bou
1Samuel22:8 Se weic naaiv meih mbuo cingx daaih beic ndiev caangh laangh oix hoic yie? Yie nyei dorn caux Jetc^si nyei dorn daav loz-gaeng nyei ziangh hoc maiv maaih haaix dauh mbuox yie
1Samuel22:9 E^ndom Mienh
1Samuel22:10 Aa^hi^me^lekv tengx Ndaawitv naaic Ziouv yaac bun nyanc hopv caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel22:11 Saulo ziouc paaiv mienh mingh heuc Aa^hi^tupv nyei dorn
1Samuel22:12 Saulo ziouc gorngv
1Samuel22:13 Saulo gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel22:14 Aa^hi^me^lekv dau hungh diex
1Samuel22:15 Wuov hnoi yie tengx ninh naaic Tin-Hungh daauh nzunc fai? Zungv maiv zeiz? Tov hungh diex maiv dungx dingc yie
1Samuel22:16 Hungh diex gorngv
1Samuel22:17 Hungh diex ziouc paaiv souv jienv ninh nyei ga'hlen wuov deix sin-hlen mienh
1Samuel22:18 Hungh diex ziouc gorngv mbuox Ndo^ekc
1Samuel22:19 Ninh longc nzuqc ndaauv aengx daix sai mienh nyei mungv
1Samuel22:20 Mv baac maaih dauh Aa^hi^tupv nyei fun
1Samuel22:21 Aa^mbi^yaa^taa yaac gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel22:22 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^mbi^yaa^taa
1Samuel22:23 Meih gunv caux yie yiem naaiv aqv. Maiv dungx gamh nziex weic zuqc oix zorqv meih nyei maengc wuov dauh yaac oix zorqv yie. Meih caux yie yiem naaiv nor meih ziouc biaux ndutv maengc aqv.”
1Samuel23:1 Maaih mienh mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel23:2 Ndaawitv ziouc naaic Ziouv
1Samuel23:3 Mv baac Ndaawitv nyei mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel23:4 Ndaawitv aengx naaic nzunc Ziouv. Ziouv dau ninh
1Samuel23:5 Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh ziouc mingh Ke^i^laa mborqv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
1Samuel23:6 Nqa'haav Aa^hi^me^lekv nyei dorn
1Samuel23:7 Maaih mienh mbuox Saulo
1Samuel23:8 Saulo heuc ninh nyei yietc zungv baeng cuotv mingh mborqv jaax
1Samuel23:9 Ndaawitv hiuv duqv Saulo daav za'eix hoic ninh
1Samuel23:10 Ndaawitv ziouc naaic
1Samuel23:11 Ke^i^laa nyei baeqc fingx oix zorqv yie caux gan yie nyei mienh jiu bun yiem Saulo nyei buoz-ndiev nyei fai? Saulo za'gengh oix daaih daix yie
1Samuel23:12 Ndaawitv aengx naaic
1Samuel23:13 Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei mienh
1Samuel23:14 Ndaawitv mingh yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang wuonv nyei dorngx
1Samuel23:15 Ndaawitv hiuv duqv Saulo cuotv daaih oix zorqv ninh nyei maengc. Wuov zanc Ndaawitv yiem Sipc^aa Deic-Bung-Huaang
1Samuel23:16 Saulo nyei dorn
1Samuel23:17 Yo^naa^taan gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel23:18 Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc dorng jienv Ziouv laengz ngaengc waac. Ndaawitv corc yiem jienv wuov Holetv
1Samuel23:19 Sipc^aa Mienh mingh Gi^mbe^aa Zingh lorz Saulo mbuox ninh
1Samuel23:20 O hungh diex aah! Gunv ziux meih ganh nyei hnyouv daaih
1Samuel23:21 Saulo dau
1Samuel23:22 Tov meih mbuo longx-longx nyei zaah mangc ninh bingx nyei norm-norm dorngx
1Samuel23:23 Hnangv naaic
1Samuel23:24 Wuov deix mienh ziouc mingh Sipc^aa Mungv ndaangc Saulo. Wuov zanc Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh yiem Maa^on Deic-Bung-Huaang
1Samuel23:25 Saulo caux ninh nyei mienh ziouc mingh lorz Ndaawitv. Maaih mienh mingh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv. Ninh ziouc njiec taux norm la'bieiv-mbaengx Maa^on Deic-Bung-Huaang gu'nyuoz. Saulo haiz gorngv Ndaawitv yiem Maa^on Deic-Bung-Huaang
1Samuel23:26 Saulo gan yietc bung mbong mingh. Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh ganh yiem bung mbong gaanv biaux jienv mingh oix biaux Saulo
1Samuel23:27 Mv baac maaih dauh douc fienx mienh daaih gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel23:28 Saulo ziouc dingh
1Samuel23:29 Ndaawitv ziouc yiem naaic cuotv mingh yiem En Ge^ndi weih wuonv nyei dorngx.
1Samuel24:1 Saulo mingh zunc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nzuonx daaih
1Samuel24:2 Saulo ziouc dorh ninh yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx ginv daaih nyei buo cin dauh henv nyei baeng mingh taux Hieh Yungh Mbaengx lorz Ndaawitv caux gan Ndaawitv nyei mienh.
1Samuel24:3 Saulo daaih taux yiem jauv-hlen wuov deix ba'gi yungh laanh. Yiem wuov norm dorngx maaih norm mbaengx-kuotv. Saulo ziouc bieqc mbaengx-kuotv mingh jaiv buoz. Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh yaac zueiz jienv mbaengx-kuotv gu'nyuoz ndo jiex nyei dorngx.
1Samuel24:4 Ndaawitv nyei mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel24:5 Nqa'haav Ndaawitv haiz hnyouv maiv longx
1Samuel24:6 Ninh gorngv mbuox caux ninh yiem wuov deix mienh
1Samuel24:7 Ndaawitv yaac longc naaiv deix waac laanh jienv gan ninh nyei mienh
1Samuel24:8 Nqa'haav Ndaawitv cuotv mbaengx-kuotv mingh heuc Saulo
1Samuel24:9 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel24:10 Ih hnoi hungh diex ganh nyei m'zing duqv buatc liuz yiem mbaengx-kuotv Ziouv zungv zorqv hungh diex jiu bun yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev mi'aqv. Maaih mienh heuc yie daix hungh diex
1Samuel24:11 Yie nyei die aah! Mangc maah! Meih nyei lui-siaam-jieqv nyei gorqv yiem yie nyei buoz
1Samuel24:12 Tov Ziouv yiem hungh diex caux yie mbu'ndongx dunx sic. Tov Ziouv weic yie winh bun meih
1Samuel24:13 Hnangv loz-hnoi mienh maaih waac-puix gorngv
1Samuel24:14 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei hungh diex cuotv daaih lorz haaix dauh? Zunc haaix dauh? Kungx zunc dauh juv-daic
1Samuel24:15 Weic naaiv tov Ziouv yiem yie caux hungh diex mbu'ndongx zoux siemv zuiz jien tengx yie mbuo dunx sic. Tov ninh zaah yaac tengx yie ziouc njoux yie biaux ndutv meih nyei buoz-ndiev.”
1Samuel24:16 Ndaawitv gorngv naaiv deix waac bun Saulo muangx liuz
1Samuel24:17 Ninh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel24:18 Ih hnoi meih bun cing meih hnangv haaix nor zoux longx bun yie
1Samuel24:19 Weic zuqc maiv maaih haaix dauh buangh ninh nyei win-wangv corc aengx bungx ninh baengh orn nyei mingh. Hnangv naaic tov Ziouv zoux longx winh bun meih hnangv meih ih hnoi zoux longx bun yie.
1Samuel24:20 Ih zanc yie hiuv duqv
1Samuel24:21 Weic naaiv tov meih ziangv jienv Ziouv laengz waac mbuox yie
1Samuel24:22 Ndaawitv ziouc houv jienv laengz waac bun Saulo. Saulo ziouc nzuonx biauv mi'aqv. Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh faaux mingh yiem norm weih wuonv nyei dorngx.
1Samuel25:1 Saa^mu^en guei seix liuz
1Samuel25:2 Maaih dauh mienh yiem Maa^on Mungv. Ninh maaih ndau yiem nitv Kaanmen. Naaiv dauh mienh za'gengh butv zoih haic
1Samuel25:3 Naaiv dauh mienh nyei mbuox heuc Naa^mbaan
1Samuel25:4 Ndaawitv yiem deic-bung-huaang wuov zanc
1Samuel25:5 Ndaawitv ziouc paaiv ziepc dauh mienh mingh lorz Naa^mbaan yaac paaiv ziangx waac gorngv
1Samuel25:6 Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel25:7 “+‘Ih zanc yie haiz gorngv meih maaih mienh tengx meih japv ba'gi yungh biei. Meih nyei goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh caux yie mbuo yiem Kaanmen nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel25:8 Gunv naaic meih ganh nyei mienh
1Samuel25:9 Ndaawitv nyei mienh mingh taux wuov
1Samuel25:10 Naa^mbaan dau Ndaawitv nyei bou
1Samuel25:11 Yie fungc oix zuqc zorqv yie nyei njuov caux yie nyei wuom caux yie weic yie nyei japv ba'gi yungh biei nyei gong-mienh daix daaih nyei orv bun yie maiv hiuv duqv yiem haaix daaih nyei mienh?”
1Samuel25:12 Ndaawitv nyei mienh ziouc daaux sin nzuonx mingh aengx gorngv nzengc naaiv deix waac mbuox Ndaawitv.
1Samuel25:13 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox ninh nyei mienh
1Samuel25:14 Maaih dauh Naa^mbaan nyei bou mingh mbuox Naa^mbaan nyei auv
1Samuel25:15 Mv baac wuov deix mienh za'gengh zoux longx bun yie mbuo. Yie mbuo yaac maiv zuqc haaix dauh zoux doqc bun yie mbuo. Da'faanh yie mbuo caux ninh mbuo yiem wuov lomc-huaang nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel25:16 Lungh muonz yie mbuo caux ninh mbuo yiem bungx ba'gi yungh nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel25:17 Ih zanc yie tov bun meih hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic yaac hnamv mangc gaax horpc zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux. Nziex ninh mbuo oix hoic yie mbuo nyei ziouv caux ninh nyei biauv zong mienh. Ninh nyei fiem-fingx ciouv
1Samuel25:18 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin ziouc siepv-siepv nyei liuc leiz nyic baeqc norm njuov
1Samuel25:19 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel25:20 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin geh jienv lorh njiec zorng wuov zanc
1Samuel25:21 Ndaawitv coqv hoqc gorngv liuz
1Samuel25:22 Se gorngv taux njang ndorm yie corc liouh njiec wuov dauh mienh nyei yietc dauh m'jangc dorn nor
1Samuel25:23 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin yietv buatc Ndaawitv
1Samuel25:24 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin mbaapv njiec Ndaawitv nyei zaux ga'hlen gorngv
1Samuel25:25 Tov yie nyei ziouv maiv dungx dingc wuov dauh ciouv haic nyei mienh
1Samuel25:26 “ Ziouv dangv jienv meih
1Samuel25:27 Yie
1Samuel25:28 Tov guangc nqoi meih nyei m'sieqv bou zoux dorngc nyei zuiz. Ziouv ndongc haaix zungv oix bun meih zoux hungh yaac liepc wuonv meih nyei hungh douh
1Samuel25:29 Maiv gunv maaih mienh zunc jienv oix zorqv meih nyei maengc
1Samuel25:30 Taux Ziouv ziux ninh laengz nyei waac zoux longx bun meih aengx liepc meih zoux hungh gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov zanc
1Samuel25:31 meih maiv bun mienh nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv yaac maiv tengx ganh jaauv win
1Samuel25:32 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^mbi^gaa^yin
1Samuel25:33 Laengz zingh Tin-Hungh weic meih maaih cong-mengh. Yaac tov Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv bun meih
1Samuel25:34 Ziouv dangv jienv maiv bun yie hoic meih. Mv baac yie ziangv jienv ziangh jienv nyei Ziouv gorngv
1Samuel25:35 Ndaawitv ziouc zipv Aa^mbi^gaa^yin dorh daaih bun ninh nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv. Ndaawitv aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel25:36 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin nzuonx mingh lorz Naa^mbaan. Wuov zanc ninh yiem biauv mbenc hnaangx hlo nyei hnangv hungh diex mbenc nor. Naa^mbaan hopv diuv nquin duqv longx haic
1Samuel25:37 Da'nyeic ndorm Naa^mbaan nzang daaih
1Samuel25:38 Nqa'haav leih maiv go ziepc hnoi Ziouv ziouc daix Naa^mbaan. Ninh ziouc daic mi'aqv.
1Samuel25:39 Ndaawitv haiz gorngv Naa^mbaan daic mi'aqv
1Samuel25:40 Ndaawitv nyei bou mingh taux Kaanmen wuov
1Samuel25:41 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin ziouc puoqv njiec hmien taux ndau yaac gorngv
1Samuel25:42 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin ziouc siepv-siepv nyei jiez sin daaih geh jienv lorh aengx caux biaa dauh fu-sux ninh nyei nouh beiz gan jienv Ndaawitv nyei douc waac mienh mingh. Ninh ziouc benx Ndaawitv nyei auv mi'aqv.
1Samuel25:43 Ndaawitv longc ndaangc Yitv^le^en Mienh
1Samuel25:44 Mv baac Saulo zorqv ninh nyei sieqv
1Samuel26:1 Sipc^aa Mienh mingh Gi^mbe^aa Zingh lorz Saulo
1Samuel26:2 Saulo ziouc dorh jienv ninh ginv daaih nyei buo cin dauh I^saa^laa^en baeng
1Samuel26:3 Saulo liepc ciangv yiem Haa^ki^laa Mbong
1Samuel26:4 Ndaawitv ziouc paaiv caaiv juoqv mienh mingh zaah mangc
1Samuel26:5 Ndaawitv ziouc mingh Saulo liepc ciangv nyei dorngx
1Samuel26:6 Ndaawitv naaic Hitv^tai Mienh
1Samuel26:7 Ndaawitv caux Aa^mbi^qai lungh muonz zanc njiec mingh taux Saulo nyei ciangv
1Samuel26:8 Aa^mbi^qai gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel26:9 Mv baac Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^mbi^qai
1Samuel26:10 Ndaawitv gorngv
1Samuel26:11 Tov Ziouv baav jienv yie
1Samuel26:12 Ndaawitv ziouc zorqv yiem Saulo nyei m'nqorngv ga'hlen nyei cang caux zaangh wuom nyei baengh ziang naaic mingh mi'aqv. Maiv maaih haaix dauh buatc
1Samuel26:13 Ndaawitv ziouc jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc horngz mingh souv jienv mbong-ningv gu'nguaaic. Yiem ninh mbuo i bung mbu'ndongx maaih dorngx jangv nyei.
1Samuel26:14 Ndaawitv ziouc nauc jienv heuc wuov deix jun-baeng caux Ne nyei dorn
1Samuel26:15 Ndaawitv dau Apc^ne
1Samuel26:16 Meih hnangv naaiv nor zoux za'gengh maiv benx. Yie ziangv jienv ziangh jienv nyei Ziouv laengz waac gorngv
1Samuel26:17 Saulo zieqv duqv Ndaawitv nyei qiex ziouc gorngv
1Samuel26:18 Ndaawitv aengx gorngv
1Samuel26:19 Ih zanc tov yie nyei ziouv
1Samuel26:20 Weic naaiv
1Samuel26:21 Saulo gorngv
1Samuel26:22 Ndaawitv dau
1Samuel26:23 Ziouv ceix zingh nyeic bun dauh dauh mienh ziux ninh mbuo zoux duqv horpc yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux. Weic zuqc ih hnoi Ziouv zorqv meih jiu bun yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. Yie maiv njiec buoz hoic Ziouv longc youh orn daaih nyei mienh.
1Samuel26:24 Ih hnoi yie buatc hungh diex nyei maengc jaaix. Tov Ziouv yaac buatc yie nyei maengc jaaix yaac njoux yie biaux ndutv yietc zungv kouv naanc nyei jauv.”
1Samuel26:25 Saulo gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel27:1 Ndaawitv yiem hnyouv hnamv
1Samuel27:2 Ndaawitv caux jienv gan ninh wuov deix luoqc baeqv dauh mienh ziouc mingh lorz Gatc Mungv nyei hungh diex
1Samuel27:3 Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei yietc zungv mienh mingh yiem Gatc Zingh
1Samuel27:4 Maaih mienh mingh gorngv mbuox Saulo
1Samuel27:5 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aakitv
1Samuel27:6 Wuov hnoi Aakitv ziouc zorqv Sikc^laakv Zingh jiu bun Ndaawitv. Sikc^laakv Zingh ziouc guei Yu^ndaa Hungh taux ih jaax hnoi.
1Samuel27:7 Ndaawitv bieqc mingh yiem Fi^li^saa^die Deic-Bung yietc hnyangx caux biei hlaax nyieqc.
1Samuel27:8 Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei mienh faaux mingh luv Gesu Mienh
1Samuel27:9 Ndaawitv mborqv wuov norm deic-bung
1Samuel27:10 Aakitv haaix zanc naaic
1Samuel27:11 Ndaawitv maiv liouh yietc dauh m'jangc m'sieqv duqv cuotv singx maengc
1Samuel27:12 Aakitv bungx hnyouv Ndaawitv. Ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv
1Samuel28:1 Wuov deix ziangh hoc. Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gapv zunv oix mingh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax. Aakitv gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Samuel28:2 Ndaawitv dau Aakitv
1Samuel28:3 Saa^mu^en guei seix mi'aqv. I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh weic ninh nzauh nyiemv yaac dorh ninh mingh zangx jienv ninh ganh nyei buonv-mungv
1Samuel28:4 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gapv zunv daaih liepc ciangv yiem Sunem. Saulo yaac heuc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gapv zunv daaih ziouc liepc ciangv yiem Gin^mbo^aa Mbong.
1Samuel28:5 Saulo mangc buatc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei jun-baeng guanh ziouc haeqv ninh gamh nziex haic. Ninh nyei hnyouv yaac lunc nzengc.
1Samuel28:6 Saulo naaic Ziouv mv baac Ziouv maiv dau ninh
1Samuel28:7 Saulo gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
1Samuel28:8 Saulo yienc ninh nyei lui-houx zorng benx ganh dauh ziouc caux i dauh m'jangc dorn lungh muonz zanc mingh lorz wuov dauh gaanv hei nyei m'sieqv dorn. Hungh diex gorngv
1Samuel28:9 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv mbuox hungh diex
1Samuel28:10 Saulo ziangv jienv Ziouv houv waac gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
1Samuel28:11 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn naaic
1Samuel28:12 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn yietv buatc Saa^mu^en
1Samuel28:13 Saulo gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel28:14 Saulo naaic wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
1Samuel28:15 Saa^mu^en naaic Saulo
1Samuel28:16 Saa^mu^en dau
1Samuel28:17 Ziouv zoux bun meih hnangv ninh longc yie gorngv mbuox meih nor. Ziouv zungv caangv meih nyei guoqv mingh jiu bun Ndaawitv mi'aqv
1Samuel28:18 weic zuqc meih maiv muangx Ziouv nyei waac. Ninh qiex jiez! haic Aa^maa^lekv Mienh. Meih yaac maiv ei ninh hatc nyei waac mietc ninh mbuo. Weic naaiv ih hnoi Ziouv cingx daaih hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun meih.
1Samuel28:19 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Ziouv oix zorqv I^saa^laa^en caux jienv meih jiu bun yiem Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Njang hnoi meih ganh caux meih nyei dorn mbuo ziouc caux yie yiem naaiv. Ziouv yaac oix zorqv I^saa^laa^en nyei jun-baeng jiu bun yiem Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev.”
1Samuel28:20 Saulo haiz Saa^mu^en hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
1Samuel28:21 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn mingh taux Saulo wuov
1Samuel28:22 Ih zanc tov meih muangx yie
1Samuel28:23 Saulo maiv kangv. Ninh gorngv
1Samuel28:24 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn maaih dauh ngongh dorn junc yiem wuov biauv ziouc siepv-siepv nyei daix daaih. Ninh yaac zorqv mbuonv caix daaih zoux maiv an bingv nyei njuov ziqv ziangx.
1Samuel28:25 Ninh ziouc dorh daaih mbenc bun Saulo caux ninh nyei bou mbuo nyanc. Ninh mbuo nyanc liuz
1Samuel29:1 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh diuc nzoih ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv baeng yiem Aafekv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh liepc ciangv yiem Yitv^le^en Wuom-Zingv ga'hlen.
1Samuel29:2 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv cuotv mingh. Ninh mbuo nyei jun-baeng gan jienv mingh benx yietc guanh yietc guanh nyei. Maaih deix yietc baeqv dauh
1Samuel29:3 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei domh baeng-bieiv gorngv
1Samuel29:4 Mv baac Fi^li^saa^die nyei baeng-bieiv qiex jiez haic Aakitv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel29:5 Ninh mbuo cangx heix baaux nzung gorngv
1Samuel29:6 Aakitv ziouc heuc Ndaawitv daaih gorngv mbuox ninh
1Samuel29:7 Weic naaiv tov meih nzuonx aqv
1Samuel29:8 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aakitv
1Samuel29:9 Aakitv dau Ndaawitv
1Samuel29:10 Hnangv naaic
1Samuel29:11 Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei mienh ziouc lungh ndorm nziouv nyei jiez sin daaih nzuonx Fi^li^saa^die Deic-Bung. Mv baac Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mingh Yitv^le^en mi'aqv.
1Samuel30:1 Nqa'haav taux da'faam hnoi
1Samuel30:2 Ninh mbuo zorqv yiem wuov norm mungv nyei yietc zungv m'sieqv dorn
1Samuel30:3 Wuov zanc Ndaawitv caux jienv ninh nyei mienh daaih taux Sikc^laakv Zingh
1Samuel30:4 Ndaawitv caux jienv ninh nyei baeqc fingx nyiemv qiex mbui haic. Ninh mbuo nyiemv gau liemh maiv maaih qaqv aqv.
1Samuel30:5 Ndaawitv nyei i dauh auv se Yitv^le^en Mienh
1Samuel30:6 Ndaawitv kuonx hnyouv camv haic
1Samuel30:7 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^hi^me^lekv nyei dorn
1Samuel30:8 Ndaawitv naaic Ziouv
1Samuel30:9 Ndaawitv ziouc caux jienv ninh nyei luoqc baeqv dauh mienh zunc jienv Aa^maa^lekv Mienh mingh. Ninh mbuo daaih taux Mbeso Ndoqv. Nqa'haav laai wuov deix baeng ziouc dingh jienv wuov.
1Samuel30:10 Mv baac Ndaawitv ganh caux feix baeqv dauh mienh zunc jienv Aa^maa^lekv Mienh mingh. Maaih nyic baeqv dauh mienh mau haic
1Samuel30:11 Ninh mbuo buangh zuqc dauh I^yipv Mienh yiem wuov ndau-njang ziouc dorh ninh daaih buangh Ndaawitv. Ninh mbuo bun njuov ninh nyanc
1Samuel30:12 bun kuaaiv ngongh nyorx biouv nyei njuov ninh nyanc caux i ndunh a'ngunc biouv-nqaai. Ninh nyanc liuz ziouc henv jiez daaih
1Samuel30:13 Ndaawitv naaic ninh
1Samuel30:14 Yie mbuo daaih luv Ke^le^ti Mienh nyei Negepc
1Samuel30:15 Ndaawitv naaic ninh
1Samuel30:16 Ninh dorh Ndaawitv mbuo njiec taux wuov
1Samuel30:17 Yiem da'nyeic ndorm lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang nyei ziangh hoc
1Samuel30:18 Aa^maa^lekv Mienh luv mingh nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv Ndaawitv zorqv nzuonx nzengc daaih
1Samuel30:19 Ninh maiv caa yietc nyungc
1Samuel30:20 Ndaawitv aengx zorqv Aa^maa^lekv Mienh nyei yietc zungv ngongh guanh yungh guanh. Ninh nyei mienh ziouc zunc jienv yietc zungv saeng-kuv guanh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx yaac gorngv
1Samuel30:21 Ndaawitv nzuonx taux mau kouv
1Samuel30:22 Gan Ndaawitv mingh nyei mienh maaih deix orqv mienh caux mienh waaic mienh gorngv
1Samuel30:23 Mv baac Ndaawitv gorngv
1Samuel30:24 Naaiv deix sic maaih haaix dauh haih muangx meih mbuo? Mingh mborqv jaax nyei mienh duqv caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv mbu'ziex
1Samuel30:25 Yiem naaic daaih
1Samuel30:26 Ndaawitv nzuonx taux Sikc^laakv Zingh
1Samuel30:27 Ndaawitv fungx zingh nyeic bun yiem Mbetc^en Zingh nyei mienh
1Samuel30:28 yiem Aa^lo^e Zingh
1Samuel30:29 yiem Laakaan Zingh nyei mienh caux yiem Ye^laa^me^en caux Kenai Mienh nyei zingh nyei mienh
1Samuel30:30 yiem Homaa Zingh
1Samuel30:31 caux yiem He^mbo^lon Zingh nyei mienh. Ninh fungx ga'naaiv bun norm-norm dorngx nyei mienh
1Samuel31:1 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax. I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx biaux
1Samuel31:2 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh zunc zaaic Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn ziouc daix Saulo nyei dorn
1Samuel31:3 Mborqv jaax nyei jauv gunv zoux gunv hlo yaac gunv zoux gunv nitv Saulo. Buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh zunc zaaic buonv ninh mun duqv siang haic.
1Samuel31:4 Saulo gorngv mbuox tengx ninh dorh mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc wuov dauh
1Samuel31:5 Dorh wuoqc ginc wuov dauh buatc Saulo daic mi'aqv
1Samuel31:6 Hnangv naaic
1Samuel31:7 Yiem wuov norm horngz caux yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh buatc I^saa^laa^en nyei baeng-guanh tiux biaux yaac buatc Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn daic mi'aqv
1Samuel31:8 Da'nyeic hnoi Fi^li^saa^die Mienh daaih tutv nzengc zuqc daix daic nyei mienh nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv ziouc buatc Saulo caux ninh nyei buo dauh dorn nyei sei yiem Gin^mbo^aa Mbong.
1Samuel31:9 Ninh mbuo ziouc tutv nzengc Saulo maaih nyei ga'naaiv
1Samuel31:10 Ninh mbuo zorqv Saulo nyei wuoqc ginc an jienv Atc^taa^lotv zienh nyei miuc-biauv gu'nyuoz
1Samuel31:11 Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc Mienh muangx haiz Fi^li^saa^die Mienh hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun Saulo
1Samuel31:12 yietc zungv mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng ziouc ziangh muonz mingh taux Mbetc Saan nyei zingh laatc zorqv Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn nyei sei njiec
1Samuel31:13 Ninh mbuo dorh mbungv mingh zangx jienv yiem Yaa^mbetc
2Samuel1:1 Saulo guei seix mi'aqv. Nqa'haav Ndaawitv mingh daix Aa^maa^lekv Mienh nzuonx daaih
2Samuel1:2 Taux da'faam hnoi
2Samuel1:3 Ndaawitv naaic ninh
2Samuel1:4 Ndaawitv aengx naaic ninh
2Samuel1:5 Ndaawitv naaic douc fienx nyei mienh lunx mienh
2Samuel1:6 Douc fienx nyei mienh lunx mienh gorngv
2Samuel1:7 Ninh huin nzuonx mangc buatc yie ziouc qaqv heuc yie. Yie gorngv
2Samuel1:8 “Ninh naaic yie
2Samuel1:9 “Ninh gorngv
2Samuel1:10 “Yie ziouc mingh souv jienv ninh nyei ga'hlen daix daic ninh weic zuqc yie hiuv dingc ninh king njiec nor
2Samuel1:11 Ndaawitv ziouc betv ninh nyei lui. Gan ninh wuov deix mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux.
2Samuel1:12 Ninh mbuo nzauh nyiemv
2Samuel1:13 Ndaawitv naaic douc fienx wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh
2Samuel1:14 Ndaawitv gorngv
2Samuel1:15 Ndaawitv ziouc heuc yietc dauh yiem wuov nyei mienh lunx mienh daaih
2Samuel1:16 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel1:17 Ndaawitv weic Saulo caux Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel1:18 Ndaawitv heuc zorqv naaiv diuh nzung njaaux Yu^ndaa Mienh. Nzung fiev jienv Yaasaa nyei Sou. Nzung gorngv
2Samuel1:19 “O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
2Samuel1:20 “Yiem Gatc maiv dungx gorngv naaiv deix sic
2Samuel1:21 “Gin^mbo^aa Mbong-Aiv aac
2Samuel1:22 Yiem zuqc daix daic nyei mienh nyei nziaamv
2Samuel1:23 “Saulo caux Yo^naa^taan aah! Mienh hnamv yaac oix nyei. Maiv gunv ziangh fai daic
2Samuel1:24 “I^saa^laa^en nyei sieqv aah! Oix zuqc weic Saulo nzauh nyiemv. Ninh bun meih mbuo zuqv setv siqv nyiemz nyei ciouh dunc
2Samuel1:25 “Mienh henv mienh yiem mborqv jaax ciangv king njiec daic mi'aqv. Yo^naa^taan yiem I^saa^laa^en hlang nyei dorngx zuqc daix daic.
2Samuel1:26 Yie nyei gorx
2Samuel1:27 “Mienh henv mienh king njiec daic mi'aqv. Mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc yaac zuqc mietc mi'aqv.”
2Samuel2:1 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
2Samuel2:2 Ndaawitv ziouc dorh jienv ninh nyei i dauh auv
2Samuel2:3 Ndaawitv yaac dorh jienv gan ninh wuov deix mienh
2Samuel2:4 Yu^ndaa Mienh ziouc daaih taux He^mbo^lon longc youh orn Ndaawitv zoux Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun nyei hungh. Maaih mienh daaih gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel2:5 Ndaawitv ziouc paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh lorz Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc Mienh
2Samuel2:6 Ih zanc tov Ziouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yaac baengh fim nyei dorh meih mbuo. Yie yaac oix zoux longx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux.
2Samuel2:7 Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc henv
2Samuel2:8 Saulo nyei jun-baeng nyei domh baeng-bieiv
2Samuel2:9 Yiem naaic Apc^ne liepc Itc^mbo^setv zoux hungh gunv Gi^le^aatc Deic caux Aa^se Mienh
2Samuel2:10 Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel2:11 Ndaawitv yiem He^mbo^lon zoux hungh gunv Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun siec hnyangx caux juqv hlaax nyieqc.
2Samuel2:12 Ne nyei dorn
2Samuel2:13 Se^lu^yaa nyei dorn
2Samuel2:14 Apc^ne gorngv mbuox Yo^aapc
2Samuel2:15 Ziux ninh mbuo dingc ziangx nyei soux mouc ninh mbuo jiez sin daaih. Weic Mben^yaa^min caux Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel2:16 Yietc dauh doix yietc dauh nyau jienv m'nqorngv
2Samuel2:17 Wuov hnoi mborqv nyei jaax za'gengh hniev haic. Apc^ne caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc suei Ndaawitv nyei baeng.
2Samuel2:18 Se^lu^yaa nyei buo dauh dorn
2Samuel2:19 Aa^saax^hen zunc jienv Apc^ne mingh
2Samuel2:20 Apc^ne huin nzuonx mangc yaac naaic
2Samuel2:21 Apc^ne gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel2:22 Apc^ne aengx kuinx nzunc Aa^saax^hen
2Samuel2:23 Mv baac Aa^saax^hen maiv kangv dingh
2Samuel2:24 Mv baac Yo^aapc caux Aa^mbi^qai zunc jienv Apc^ne mingh. Mba'hnoi ndortv nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo taux Ammaa Mbong-aiv
2Samuel2:25 Mben^yaa^min Mienh gapv zunv caux Apc^ne benx yietc guanh souv jienv yietc norm mbong-ningv gu'nguaaic.
2Samuel2:26 Apc^ne heuc jienv Yo^aapc
2Samuel2:27 Yo^aapc gorngv
2Samuel2:28 Yo^aapc ziouc biomv jorng. Zuangx mienh ziouc dingh
2Samuel2:29 Apc^ne caux ninh nyei mienh ziangh muonz yangh jauv jiex Aa^laa^mbaa
2Samuel2:30 Yo^aapc zunc gau Apc^ne
2Samuel2:31 Mv baac Ndaawitv nyei mienh daix faam-baeqv luoqc ziepc dauh gan Apc^ne nyei Mben^yaa^min Mienh.
2Samuel2:32 Yo^aapc aengx caux gan ninh nyei mienh ziouc dorh Aa^saax^hen nyei sei mingh taux Mbetc^le^hem zangx jienv ninh nyei die nyei zouv. Nqa'haav ninh mbuo ziangh muonz yangh jauv. Lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo taux He^mbo^lon mi'aqv.
2Samuel3:1 Saulo nyei douh zong nyei jun-baeng caux Ndaawitv nyei douh zong nyei jun-baeng mborqv jaax lauh haic aqv. Ndaawitv gunv zoux gunv henv jienv faaux mv baac Saulo nyei zeiv-fun gunv zoux gunv hei jienv njiec.
2Samuel3:2 Ndaawitv yiem He^mbo^lon duqv ziex dauh dorn. Ninh nyei daauh dauh dorn nyei mbuox heuc Amnon
2Samuel3:3 Da'nyeic dauh dorn nyei mbuox heuc Ki^le^aapc
2Samuel3:4 Da'feix dauh nyei mbuox heuc Aa^ndo^ni^yaa
2Samuel3:5 Da'luoqc dauh nyei mbuox heuc Itc^le^am
2Samuel3:6 Saulo nyei douh zong caux Ndaawitv nyei douh zong mborqv jaax nyei ziangh hoc
2Samuel3:7 Saulo maaih dauh jaav-zeih auv se Ai^aa nyei sieqv
2Samuel3:8 Laaix Itc^mbo^setv gorngv naaiv deix waac Apc^ne qiex jiez haic. Ninh ziouc gorngv
2Samuel3:9 Mv baac ih zanc meih laaix naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn lorz sic gox yie. Se gorngv yie maiv tengx Ndaawitv zoux cuotv Ziouv houv jienv laengz bun nyei waac
2Samuel3:10 Yie oix tuix Saulo nyei douh zong nyei guoqv jiu bun Ndaawitv yaac liepc Ndaawitv nyei weic gunv I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa
2Samuel3:11 Itc^mbo^setv maiv gaamv dau yietc joux Apc^ne
2Samuel3:12 Apc^ne ziouc paaiv mienh mingh He^mbo^lon div ninh buangh Ndaawitv naaic gaax
2Samuel3:13 Ndaawitv gorngv
2Samuel3:14 Ndaawitv paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh mbuox Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel3:15 Itc^mbo^setv ziouc paaiv mienh mingh dorh Mikaan yiem ninh nyei nqox
2Samuel3:16 Mv baac ninh nyei nqox gan jienv mingh
2Samuel3:17 Apc^ne ziouc caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mienh gox caangh laangh gorngv
2Samuel3:18 Ih zanc gunv hnangv naaic zoux aqv. Weic zuqc Ziouv laengz jiex waac mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel3:19 Apc^ne yaac caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh gorngv. Nqa'haav aengx mingh taux He^mbo^lon zorqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh nyei yietc zungv zeiv-fun buatc horpc zuqc zoux nyei sic bun Ndaawitv muangx.
2Samuel3:20 Apc^ne maaih nyic ziepc dauh mienh caux ninh mingh He^mbo^lon buangh Ndaawitv. Taux wuov Ndaawitv ziouc weic Apc^ne caux gan ninh wuov deix mienh mbenc donx hnaangx hlo nyei.
2Samuel3:21 Apc^ne gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel3:22 Wuov zanc Ndaawitv nyei mienh caux Yo^aapc mingh luv mienh nzuonx daaih yaac dorh jienv luv daaih nyei ga'naaiv camv nyei. Mv baac wuov zanc Apc^ne maiv yiem He^mbo^lon
2Samuel3:23 Yo^aapc caux gan ninh daaih nyei jun-baeng daaih taux
2Samuel3:24 Yo^aapc ziouc mingh lorz hungh diex. Ninh gorngv
2Samuel3:25 Meih hiuv duqv Ne nyei dorn
2Samuel3:26 Yo^aapc yiem Ndaawitv wuov cuotv daaih
2Samuel3:27 Apc^ne nzuonx taux He^mbo^lon wuov zanc
2Samuel3:28 Nqa'haav Ndaawitv haiz gorngv taux naaiv deix sic ninh gorngv
2Samuel3:29 Tov bun naaiv deix daix mienh nyei zuiz ndortv zuqc Yo^aapc caux ninh nyei die nyei douh zong. Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun yietc liuz maaih sic
2Samuel3:30 Yo^aapc caux ninh nyei youz
2Samuel3:31 Ndaawitv ziouc mbuox Yo^aapc caux gan ninh wuov deix zuangx baeqc fingx
2Samuel3:32 Ninh mbuo ziouc zangx Apc^ne yiem He^mbo^lon. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv baeqc fingx yaac nyiemv. Hungh Diex yiem Apc^ne nyei zouv bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv Apc^ne. Zuangx baeqc fingx caux jienv nyiemv.
2Samuel3:33 Hungh diex weic Apc^ne baaux naaiv diuh naanc zingh nzung
2Samuel3:34 Meih nyei buoz maiv zuqc ndoh
2Samuel3:35 Mba'hnoi maiv gaengh ndortv nyei ziangh hoc
2Samuel3:36 Zuangx baeqc fingx buatc hungh diex hnangv naaiv nor zoux ninh mbuo buangv hnyouv. Ninh mbuo buangv hnyouv hungh diex nyei nyungc-nyungc sic.
2Samuel3:37 Wuov hnoi I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh hiuv duqv Ne nyei dorn
2Samuel3:38 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox ninh nyei jien
2Samuel3:39 Maiv gunv yie se orn daaih zoux hungh
2Samuel4:1 Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel4:2 Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel4:3 Zinh ndaangc Mbe^e^lotv Mienh biaux daaih yiem Gitc^taa^im ziouc yiem jienv naaic taux ih jaax hnoi.
2Samuel4:4 Saulo nyei dorn
2Samuel4:5 Maaih hnoi nor Mbe^e^lotv Mienh
2Samuel4:6 Ninh mbuo bieqc biauv gu'nyuoz nyei dorngx zoux hnangv oix zorqv mbiauh witv
2Samuel4:7 Ninh mbuo bieqc biauv wuov zanc
2Samuel4:8 Ninh mbuo dorh Itc^mbo^setv nyei m'nqorngv taux He^mbo^lon fungx bun Ndaawitv aengx gorngv
2Samuel4:9 Mv baac Ndaawitv dau Mbe^e^lotv Mienh
2Samuel4:10 maaih dauh mienh daaih mbuox yie wuov zanc
2Samuel4:11 Wuov nyungc
2Samuel4:12 Ndaawitv ziouc paaiv ninh nyei mienh lunx mienh. Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh ninh mbuo i dauh mingh daix daic
2Samuel5:1 Fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh He^mbo^lon
2Samuel5:2 Zinh ndaangc
2Samuel5:3 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx mienh gox daaih taux He^mbo^lon
2Samuel5:4 Ndaawitv zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv faah ziepc hnyangx. Ninh zueiz weic gunv feix ziepc hnyangx.
2Samuel5:5 Ninh yiem He^mbo^lon gunv Yu^ndaa siec hnyangx-bienx. Ninh yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv gormx I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa faah ziepc faam hnyangx.
2Samuel5:6 Hungh Diex caux ninh nyei mienh cuotv mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem mborqv Ye^mbutc Mienh. Yiem wuov nyei Ye^mbutc Mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel5:7 Mv baac Ndaawitv mborqv hingh Si^on weih wuonv nyei dorngx
2Samuel5:8 Wuov hnoi Ndaawitv gorngv
2Samuel5:9 Ndaawitv ziouc mingh yiem jienv wuov norm weih wuonv nyei dorngx
2Samuel5:10 Ndaawitv yietc hnoi beiv yietc hnoi henv jienv faaux
2Samuel5:11 Tailaqv nyei hungh
2Samuel5:12 Ndaawitv ziouc hiuv duqv Ziouv liepc ninh zoux I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh. Tin-Hungh aengx weic ninh nyei baeqc fingx
2Samuel5:13 Ndaawitv cuotv He^mbo^lon mingh
2Samuel5:14 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem duqv daaih nyei fu'jueiv. Maaih Sam^mu^waa
2Samuel5:15 Ipc^haa
2Samuel5:16 E^li^saa^maa
2Samuel5:17 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh haiz gorngv mienh longc youh orn Ndaawitv zoux hungh gunv I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung. Fi^li^saa^die nyei zuangx mienh ziouc cuotv daaih lorz Ndaawitv
2Samuel5:18 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh daaih bun nzaanx yiem buangv Le^faa^im Horngz.
2Samuel5:19 Ndaawitv ziouc naaic Ziouv
2Samuel5:20 Ndaawitv ziouc mingh Mbaa^an Be^laa^sim. Yiem naaic ninh mborqv hingh ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv
2Samuel5:21 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh guangc jienv ninh mbuo nyei miuc-fangx wuov. Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh ziouc bienh mingh nzengc mi'aqv.
2Samuel5:22 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh aengx daaih bun nzaanx yiem buangv Le^faa^im Horngz.
2Samuel5:23 Ndaawitv ziouc naaic Ziouv
2Samuel5:24 Meih mbuo yietv haiz baeng-guanh yangh jauv nyei qiex mbui yiem yienh zouc lomc gu'nguaaic
2Samuel5:25 Ndaawitv ziouc ei jienv Ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem Ge^mbaa mborqv jienv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mingh taux Gese.
2Samuel6:1 Ndaawitv aengx heuc yiem I^saa^laa^en ginv daaih nyei mienh gapv zunv. Yietc zungv maaih buo waanc dauh.
2Samuel6:2 Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei zuangx mienh ziouc yiem Yu^ndaa nyei Mbaa^aa^laa cuotv mingh weic dorh Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem wuov daaih. Naaiv norm faang gan Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei Mbuox heuc
2Samuel6:3 Ninh mbuo zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem mbong gu'nguaaic
2Samuel6:4 Ninh mbuo zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem mbong gu'nguaaic
2Samuel6:5 Ndaawitv caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien longc nzengc qaqv zoux nauc nyitc. Ninh mbuo baaux nzung
2Samuel6:6 Ninh mbuo daaih taux Naakon nyei mborqv mbiauh ciangv
2Samuel6:7 Ziouv qiex jiez haic Utc^saa weic zuqc ninh sung buoz baav Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang. Tin-Hungh ziouc yiem naaic daix ninh. Ninh ziouc yiem Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang ga'hlen daic mi'aqv.
2Samuel6:8 Ndaawitv qiex jiez weic zuqc Ziouv nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv daix Utc^saa. Wuov norm dorngx ziouc maaih mbuox heuc Beletv Utc^saa taux ih jaax hnoi.
2Samuel6:9 Wuov hnoi Ndaawitv gamh nziex Ziouv. Ninh gorngv
2Samuel6:10 Ndaawitv ziouc maiv kangv dorh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang mingh bieqc Ndaawitv nyei Zingh. Ninh ziouc wingc ganh diuh jauv dorh mingh an Gatc Mienh
2Samuel6:11 Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem O^mbetc E^ndom nyei biauv buo hlaax nyieqc. Ziouv ceix fuqv bun ninh yaac ceix fuqv bun ninh nyei yietc biauv mienh.
2Samuel6:12 Maaih mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv Hungh
2Samuel6:13 Gaeng Ziouv nyei laengz ngaengc waac faang wuov deix laamx juqv mbiec
2Samuel6:14 Ndaawitv zuqv jienv longc la'maah ndie zoux daaih nyei efotv. Ninh dorng jienv Ziouv longc nzengc qaqv cangx heix.
2Samuel6:15 Ndaawitv caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx zeiv-fun heuc jienv yaac maaih biomv jorng nyei qiex mbui
2Samuel6:16 Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang bieqc Ndaawitv nyei Zingh wuov zanc
2Samuel6:17 Ninh mbuo dorh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang bieqc daaih an jienv liuc leiz ziangx nyei dorngx yiem Ndaawitv corng daaih weic faang wuov norm ndopv-liuh. Ndaawitv yaac yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv.
2Samuel6:18 Fongc horc ziec liuz buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv
2Samuel6:19 Nqa'haav Ndaawitv aengx bun dauh dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh
2Samuel6:20 Ndaawitv nzuonx biauv oix buang waac bun ninh nyei biauv zong mienh
2Samuel6:21 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Mikaan
2Samuel6:22 Yie zungv oix zatv ganh njiec aiv taux yie ganh nyei m'zing mangc buatc yie se haac horngh mienh. Mv baac meih gorngv wuov deix nouh beiz
2Samuel6:23 Saulo nyei sieqv
2Samuel7:1 Hungh diex duqv yiem ninh ganh nyei dinc
2Samuel7:2 Wuov zanc hungh diex gorngv mbuox douc waac mienh
2Samuel7:3 Naatan gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel7:4 Mv baac dongh wuov muonz Naatan zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
2Samuel7:5 “Mingh mbuox yie nyei bou
2Samuel7:6 Yiem yie dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv taux ih hnoi yie maiv yiem jiex yietc norm biauv. Yie yiem nyei dorngx se ndopv-liuh
2Samuel7:7 Da'faanh yie caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh suiv jiex nyei dorngx
2Samuel7:8 “+‘Ih zanc mbuox yie nyei bou
2Samuel7:9 Maiv gunv meih mingh haaix
2Samuel7:10 Yie oix bun norm dorngx yie nyei baeqc fingx
2Samuel7:11 yaac maiv hnangv yie paaiv domh jien gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei ziangh hoc. Yie yaac oix bun meih duqv taaix-baengh
2Samuel7:12 Meih nyei hnoi-nyieqc buangv
2Samuel7:13 Ninh zungv oix weic yie nyei Mengh ceix norm biauv. Yie yaac oix liepc ninh nyei guoqv nyei hungh weic taux yietc liuz.
2Samuel7:14 Yie oix zoux ninh nyei die. Ninh yaac oix zoux yie nyei dorn. Se gorngv ninh baamz zuiz
2Samuel7:15 Mv baac yie oix yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv ninh
2Samuel7:16 Yie bun meih nyei douh zong caux meih nyei guoqv duqv yiem yie nyei nza'hmien yietc liuz wuonv. Meih nyei hungh weic yaac oix liepc wuonv taux yietc liuz.”+’+”
2Samuel7:17 Naatan ziux naaiv deix yietc zungv waac caux yietc zungv laauc yaangh nyei sic gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv.
2Samuel7:18 Ndaawitv Hungh ziouc bieqc mingh zueiz jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien gorngv

2Samuel8:1 Hoz daaih Ndaawitv mingh mborqv hingh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh

2Samuel8:3 Ndaawitv aengx mingh mborqv So^mbaa nyei hungh

2Samuel8:12 se ninh zorqv yiem E^ndom

2Samuel8:14 Ninh liepc baeng-ciangv yiem E^ndom. Ninh liepc baeng-ciangv yiem gormx E^ndom Deic. E^ndom Mienh ziouc zuqc yiem Ndaawitv nyei buoz-ndiev. Maiv gunv ninh mingh haaix

2Samuel10:13 Yo^aapc caux gan ninh wuov deix baeng cuotv mingh mborqv Silie Mienh. Silie Mienh ziouc yiem Yo^aapc nyei wuov ndaangc maengx tiux biaux.

2Samuel10:17 Maaih mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv

2Samuel10:19 Yiem Haa^ndatc^e^se nyei buoz-ndiev wuov deix yietc zungv hungh buatc ninh mbuo zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv baaic

2Samuel11:4 Ndaawitv paaiv mienh mingh dorh wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn daaih. Ninh ziouc daaih lorz Ndaawitv. Ndaawitv yaac caux ninh bueix. (Wuov zanc Mbatc^qe^mbaa nyei sin-yienc jang-jang nzengc
2Samuel11:5 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc maaih jienv sin aqv. Ninh paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Ndaawitv

2Samuel11:15 Fienx fiev jienv gorngv

2Samuel11:17 Zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh cuotv daaih caux Yo^aapc mborqv jaax. Maaih deix Ndaawitv nyei jien zuqc daic. Hitv^tai Mienh
2Samuel11:18 Yo^aapc paaiv mienh mingh zorqv mborqv jaax nyei yietc zungv sic mingh mbuox Ndaawitv.
2Samuel11:19 Ninh jaa waac douc fienx mienh
2Samuel11:20 Se gorngv hungh diex qiex! jiez haic
2Samuel11:21 Haaix dauh daix Yelupv Mbesetv nyei dorn
2Samuel11:22 Douc fienx mienh ziouc mingh aqv. Mingh taux Ndaawitv wuov ninh ziux Yo^aapc mbuox ninh nyei waac zueih yietv zueih nyeic nyei gorngv mbuox hungh diex.
2Samuel11:23 Douc fienx mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel11:24 Buonv forng nyei mienh yiem zingh laatc gu'nguaaic buonv hungh nyei jien. Maaih deix hungh diex nyei jien daic mi'aqv. Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Meih nyei bou
