2Samuel12:1 Ziouv paaiv Naatan mingh lorz Ndaawitv. Mingh taux Ndaawitv wuov Naatan gorngv
2Samuel12:2 Butv-zoih mienh maaih ba'gi yungh caux ngongh guanh camv nyei.
2Samuel12:3 Mv baac wuov dauh mienh jomc mienh maiv maaih haaix nyungc. Kungx maaih dongh ninh maaiz daaih nyei yietc dauh ba'gi yungh zeic dorn hnangv. Ninh dorh hlo daaih caux ninh yiem yaac caux ninh nyei fu'jueiv hlo daaih. Wuov dauh ba'gi yungh dorn caux ninh mbuo juangc nyanc juangc hopv. Ninh yaac hlorpv jienv bueix ninh nyei la'kuotv
2Samuel12:4 “Maaih dauh kaeqv mienh daaih taux butv-zoih mienh nyei biauv
2Samuel12:5 Ndaawitv qiex! jiez haic wuov dauh butv-zoih mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox Naatan
2Samuel12:6 Ninh oix zuqc weic ba'gi yungh dorn buih biei gouv weic zuqc ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux yaac maiv maaih korv-lienh mienh nyei hnyouv.”
2Samuel12:7 Naatan ziouc gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel12:8 Yie zorqv meih nyei ziouv nyei jaa-dingh jiu bun meih
2Samuel12:9 Meih weic haaix diuc mangc piex Ziouv nyei waac
2Samuel12:10 Hnangv naaic meih nyei douh zong yietc liuz oix zuqc maaih nzuqc ndaauv daix nyei sic
2Samuel12:11 “ Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
2Samuel12:12 Meih bingx jienv zoux naaiv deix sic mv baac yie oix yiem lungh hnoi zanc njang nyei ziangh hoc dorng jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh zoux.’+”
2Samuel12:13 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Naatan
2Samuel12:14 Mv baac laaix meih zoux naaiv deix sic mangc piex Ziouv taux ndoqv
2Samuel12:15 Gorngv liuz
2Samuel12:16 Ndaawitv weic wuov dauh dorn jouh Tin-Hungh. Ninh zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc
2Samuel12:17 Yiem ninh nyei biauv nyei mienh gox daaih souv ninh nyei ga'hlen
2Samuel12:18 Taux da'cietv hnoi wuov hnoi
2Samuel12:19 Ndaawitv buatc ninh nyei jien mbuo gorngv waac-sapv ziouc hiuv duqv gu'nguaaz daic mi'aqv. Ndaawitv ziouc naaic gaax ninh mbuo
2Samuel12:20 Ndaawitv ziouc yiem ndau jiez sin daaih nzaaux liuz sin
2Samuel12:21 Ninh nyei jien naaic ninh
2Samuel12:22 Ndaawitv gorngv
2Samuel12:23 Gu'nguaaz daic yie fungc oix zuqc zei? Yie aengx haih dorh ninh nangh daaih fai? Yie haih mingh ninh wuov mv baac ninh maiv haih nzuonx yie naaiv.”
2Samuel12:24 Ndaawitv ziouc orn ninh nyei auv
2Samuel12:25 Weic zuqc Ziouv hnamv ninh
2Samuel12:26 Yo^aapc mborqv Ammon Mienh nyei Lapv^mbaa Zingh yaac zorqv duqv hungh diex nyei ging-zingh mi'aqv.
2Samuel12:27 Yo^aapc paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel12:28 Ih zanc tov meih diuc nzoih zengc njiec nyei baeng daaih liepc ciangv weih jienv aengx caangv naaiv norm zingh. Nziex yie caangv duqv nor
2Samuel12:29 Ndaawitv ziouc diuc nzoih yietc zungv baeng cuotv mingh Lapv^mbaa
2Samuel12:30 Ninh muonx ninh mbuo nyei hungh diex nyei jiem-ningv. Naaiv norm jiem-ningv se nyic ziepc yietv joih jiem yaac dingx jienv la'bieiv-jaaix. Mienh zorqv naaiv norm ningv daaih ndongx jienv Ndaawitv nyei m'nqorngv. Ndaawitv yaac caangv duqv yiem zingh nyei ga'naaiv za'gengh camv! haic.
2Samuel12:31 Ninh yaac dorh yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh cuotv daaih
2Samuel13:1 Ndaawitv nyei dorn
2Samuel13:2 Amnon ba'laqc hnamv gau
2Samuel13:3 Amnon maaih dauh loz-gaeng doic
2Samuel13:4 Ninh gorngv mbuox Amnon
2Samuel13:5 Yo^naa^ndapc gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel13:6 Amnon ziouc bueix jienv coux zaax laaic butv baengc. Hungh diex daaih mangc ninh nyei ziangh hoc ninh gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel13:7 Ndaawitv ziouc paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Taamaa
2Samuel13:8 Taamaa ziouc mingh ninh nyei gorx
2Samuel13:9 Ninh yaac yiem Amnon nyei nza'hmien zorqv njuov cuotv daaih mv baac Amnon maiv nyanc. Ninh gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh
2Samuel13:10 Amnon gorngv mbuox Taamaa
2Samuel13:11 Mv baac dorh njuov mingh bun ninh nyei gorx nyanc wuov zanc
2Samuel13:12 Taamaa gorngv
2Samuel13:13 Yie ganh aeqv
2Samuel13:14 Mv baac Amnon maiv muangx. Ninh nyei qaqv gauh henv
2Samuel13:15 Nqa'haav Amnon gengh! nzorng haic Taamaa
2Samuel13:16 Taamaa gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel13:17 Ninh ziouc heuc ninh ganh nyei bou daaih mbuox ninh
2Samuel13:18 Amnon nyei bou ziouc zunc Taamaa cuotv mingh aengx sorn jienv gaengh. Wuov zanc Taamaa zuqv jienv lui-ndaauv. Lui-mueiz yaac ndaauv nyei hnangv maiv gaengh dorng jaa nyei hungh sieqv zuqv nor.
2Samuel13:19 Taamaa zorqv saaiv hiaamx jienv m'nqorngv yaac betv ninh zuqv jienv maaih lui-mueiz ndaauv nyei lui
2Samuel13:20 Taamaa nyei gorx
2Samuel13:21 Ndaawitv Hungh haiz naaiv deix yietc zungv sic ninh qiex jiez! haic.
2Samuel13:22 Mv baac Apc^saa^lom maiv caux Amnon gorngv haaix nyungc waac
2Samuel13:23 Jiex liuz i hnyangx
2Samuel13:24 Ninh mingh lorz hungh diex yaac gorngv
2Samuel13:25 Mv baac hungh diex gorngv mbuox Apc^saa^lom
2Samuel13:26 Apc^saa^lom ziouc gorngv
2Samuel13:27 Mv baac Apc^saa^lom qaqv tov
2Samuel13:28 Apc^saa^lom paaiv ninh nyei bou
2Samuel13:29 Apc^saa^lom nyei bou ziouc ei jienv ninh paaiv nyei waac zoux bun Amnon. Hungh diex zengc njiec nyei yietc zungv dorn jiez sin daaih
2Samuel13:30 Ninh mbuo corc yiem ndaamv-jauv wuov zanc maaih waac taux Ndaawitv wuov gorngv
2Samuel13:31 Hungh diex souv jiez daaih betv ninh nyei lui-houx yaac bueix ga'ndiev ndau. Souv jienv hungh nyei ga'hlen wuov deix jien yaac betv ninh mbuo nyei lui-houx.
2Samuel13:32 Mv baac Ndaawitv nyei gorx
2Samuel13:33 Hnangv naaiv
2Samuel13:34 Mv baac Apc^saa^lom biaux. Siouv gaeng wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh cau hmien mangc buatc mienh camv gan jienv Ho^lo^naa^im
2Samuel13:35 Yo^naa^ndapc gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel13:36 Ninh yietv gorngv setv waac hnangv
2Samuel13:37 Apc^saa^lom biaux mingh taux Gesu nyei hungh
2Samuel13:38 Apc^saa^lom biaux mingh Gesu
2Samuel13:39 Hungh diex jangx haic
2Samuel14:1 Se^lu^yaa nyei dorn
2Samuel14:2 Yo^aapc ziouc paaiv mienh mingh Te^ko^aa lorz dauh cong-mengh nyei m'sieqv dorn
2Samuel14:3 Oix zuqc bieqc mingh lorz hungh diex hnangv naaiv nor gorngv mbuox ninh.” Yo^aapc ziouc njaaux ziangx naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv.
2Samuel14:4 Naaiv dauh Te^ko^aa Mienh nyei m'sieqv dorn mingh lorz hungh diex wuov zanc
2Samuel14:5 Hungh diex naaic ninh
2Samuel14:6 Yie
2Samuel14:7 Ih zanc yie nyei zuangx cien-ceqv daaih lorz yie
2Samuel14:8 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
2Samuel14:9 Te^ko^aa Mienh m'sieqv dorn gorngv
2Samuel14:10 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel14:11 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn aengx gorngv
2Samuel14:12 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv
2Samuel14:13 Naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv
2Samuel14:14 Yie mbuo dauh dauh zungv zuqc daic
2Samuel14:15 “Yie daaih gorngv naaiv deix waac mbuox yie nyei ziouv
2Samuel14:16 Yie hnamv daaih hungh diex oix muangx yie
2Samuel14:17 “Yie
2Samuel14:18 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
2Samuel14:19 Ndaawitv naaic
2Samuel14:20 Meih nyei bou
2Samuel14:21 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Yo^aapc
2Samuel14:22 Yo^aapc ziouc puoqv njiec ndau baaix yaac buang waac bun hungh diex. Yo^aapc gorngv
2Samuel14:23 Yo^aapc ziouc jiez sin daaih mingh Gesu
2Samuel14:24 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel14:25 Yiem gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung maiv maaih yietc dauh mienh ndongc Apc^saa^lom nzueic
2Samuel14:26 Ninh nyei mba'biei hniev haic
2Samuel14:27 Apc^saa^lom duqv buo dauh dorn caux yietc dauh sieqv
2Samuel14:28 Apc^saa^lom yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem buangv i hnyangx yaac maiv duqv mingh yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien.
2Samuel14:29 Apc^saa^lom paaiv mienh mingh heuc Yo^aapc daaih
2Samuel14:30 Apc^saa^lom ziouc mbuox ninh nyei bou
2Samuel14:31 Yo^aapc ziouc mingh Apc^saa^lom nyei biauv naaic ninh
2Samuel14:32 Apc^saa^lom dau Yo^aapc
2Samuel14:33 Yo^aapc ziouc mingh mbuox hungh diex. Hungh diex heuc Apc^saa^lom daaih. Ninh ziouc daaih taux hungh diex nyei nza'hmien puoqv njiec ndau. Hungh diex yaac zom Apc^saa^lom.
2Samuel15:1 Nqa'haav Apc^saa^lom weic ganh liuc leiz maaz-cie caux maaz
2Samuel15:2 Apc^saa^lom ndorm-ndorm jiez sin nziouv nyei mingh souv jienv zingh gaengh ndaangc nyei jauv-hlen. Da'faanh haaix dauh mienh maaih sic oix tov hungh diex dunx
2Samuel15:3 Apc^saa^lom aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel15:4 Apc^saa^lom aengx jaa joux waac gorngv
2Samuel15:5 Se gorngv maaih haaix dauh mienh daaih fatv
2Samuel15:6 Apc^saa^lom hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun daaih lorz hungh diex dunx sic nyei dauh dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Apc^saa^lom ziouc nduov duqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei hnyouv gan ninh.
2Samuel15:7 Jiex liuz biei hnyangx
2Samuel15:8 Weic zuqc yie
2Samuel15:9 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel15:10 Mv baac Apc^saa^lom paaiv douc fienx mienh bingx jienv mingh gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei fingx-fingx mienh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
2Samuel15:11 Maaih nyic baeqv dauh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei mienh gan jienv ninh mingh. Mienh cingv ninh mbuo mingh mv baac ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv naaiv deix jauv.
2Samuel15:12 Apc^saa^lom fongc horc ziec nyei ziangh hoc
2Samuel15:13 Maaih dauh douc fienx mienh daaih mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel15:14 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox caux ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei yietc zungv jien
2Samuel15:15 Hungh diex nyei jien gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel15:16 Hungh diex caux ninh nyei yietc biauv mienh ziouc cuotv jauv aqv. Kungx liouh ziepc dauh jaav-zeih auv goux hungh dinc hnangv.
2Samuel15:17 Hungh diex ziouc cuotv jauv
2Samuel15:18 Hungh nyei zuangx jien mingh ndaangc hungh diex. Ke^le^ti Mienh caux Peletv Mienh yietc zungv aengx caux gan ninh wuov deix luoqc baeqv dauh Gatc Mienh jiex ndaangc hungh diex.
2Samuel15:19 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Gatc Mienh
2Samuel15:20 Meih daaih taux maiv gaengh lauh. Yie ih hnoi oix zuqc bun meih gan yie jiex naaiv jiex wuov. Yie ganh zungv maiv hiuv duqv oix mingh haaix. Gunv nzuonx aqv
2Samuel15:21 Mv baac Itc^tai dau hungh diex
2Samuel15:22 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Itc^tai
2Samuel15:23 Zuangx mienh jiex nyei ziangh hoc
2Samuel15:24 Saax^ndokc yaac yiem wuov
2Samuel15:25 Hungh diex yaac gorngv mbuox Saax^ndokc
2Samuel15:26 Mv baac se gorngv Ziouv gorngv
2Samuel15:27 Hungh diex aengx gorngv mbuox Saax^ndokc sai mienh
2Samuel15:28 Yie yiem deic-bung-huaang jiex ndaaih nyei jauv-bouc zuov meih fungx fienx daaih bun yie hiuv.”
2Samuel15:29 Saax^ndokc caux Aa^mbi^yaa^taa ziouc gaeng Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem. Ninh mbuo yaac yiem jienv wuov.
2Samuel15:30 Mv baac Ndaawitv faaux Ga'lanv Mbong
2Samuel15:31 Maaih mienh daaih mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel15:32 Ndaawitv taux mbong-ningv
2Samuel15:33 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel15:34 Mv baac se gorngv meih nzuonx zingh mingh mbuox Apc^saa^lom
2Samuel15:35 Saax^ndokc sai mienh caux Aa^mbi^yaa^taa sai mienh caux meih yiem naaic maiv zeiz? Meih yiem hungh dinc gu'nyuoz muangx haiz haaix nyungc oix zuqc mbuox Saax^ndokc caux Aa^mbi^yaa^taa.
2Samuel15:36 Ninh mbuo nyei i dauh dorn yiem naaic. Maaih Saax^ndokc nyei dorn
2Samuel15:37 Ndaawitv nyei loz-gaeng doic
2Samuel16:1 Ndaawitv jiex ziqc mbong-ningv maiv go
2Samuel16:2 Hungh diex naaic Si^mbaa
2Samuel16:3 Hungh diex aengx naaic
2Samuel16:4 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Si^mbaa
2Samuel16:5 Ndaawitv Hungh taux Mbaa^hu^lim wuov zanc
2Samuel16:6 Ninh zorqv la'bieiv zoi Ndaawitv caux hungh diex nyei zuangx jien
2Samuel16:7 Si^me^i zioux waac gorngv
2Samuel16:8 Ih zanc Ziouv jaauv win bun meih weic meih yiem Saulo nyei biauv zong mienh liouc cuotv nyei yietc zungv nziaamv
2Samuel16:9 Se^lu^yaa nyei dorn
2Samuel16:10 Mv baac hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel16:11 Ndaawitv aengx gorngv mbuox Aa^mbi^qai caux ninh nyei zuangx jien
2Samuel16:12 Nziex Ziouv haih buatc yie nyei kouv naanc
2Samuel16:13 Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh ziouc gan jienv jauv mingh. Si^me^i yiem Ndaawitv nyei doix-ngaanc gan zorng yietc binc mingh yietc binc zioux. Ninh zorqv la'bieiv zoi ninh mbuo yaac nyau nie-mbung faatv ninh mbuo.
2Samuel16:14 Hungh diex caux gan ninh wuov deix zuangx mienh ziouc taux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih kouv nzengc. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem naaic hitv kuonx.
2Samuel16:15 Apc^saa^lom caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem. Aa^hi^to^fen yaac caux jienv daaih.
2Samuel16:16 Ndaawitv nyei loz-gaeng doic
2Samuel16:17 Apc^saa^lom naaic Husai
2Samuel16:18 Husai gorngv mbuox Apc^saa^lom
2Samuel16:19 Aengx maaih diuc. Yie horpc zuqc fu-sux haaix dauh? Yie maiv zeiz oix fu-sux wuov dauh nyei dorn fai? Yie hnangv haaix nor fu-sux meih nyei die
2Samuel16:20 Apc^saa^lom gorngv mbuox Aa^hi^to^fen “Tengx hnamv mangc gaax
2Samuel16:21 Aa^hi^to^fen gorngv mbuox Apc^saa^lom
2Samuel16:22 Ninh mbuo ziouc corng ndopv-liuh yiem hungh dinc nyei biauv-ngorh gu'nguaaic. Apc^saa^lom ziouc dorng jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh bieqc mingh bueix ninh nyei die nyei jaav-zeih auv.
2Samuel16:23 Yiem wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc
2Samuel17:1 Aa^hi^to^fen aengx gorngv mbuox Apc^saa^lom
2Samuel17:2 Ninh kuonx yaac kouv nyei ziangh hoc yie ziouc zunc zaaic
2Samuel17:3 aengx dorh baeqc fingx nzuonx daaih guei meih hnangv siang-mbuangz nzuonx daaih lorz siang-laangh nor. Se gorngv meih lorz wuov dauh mienh zuqc daic
2Samuel17:4 Naaiv nyungc za'eix horpc Apc^saa^lom caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gox nyei hnyouv.
2Samuel17:5 Mv baac Apc^saa^lom gorngv
2Samuel17:6 Husai daaih lorz Apc^saa^lom wuov zanc
2Samuel17:7 Husai gorngv mbuox Apc^saa^lom
2Samuel17:8 Husai aengx gorngv
2Samuel17:9 Daaix ih zanc ninh zungv bingx jienv yietc norm kuotv fai ganh norm dorngx. Nziex ninh nyei baeng haih mborqv meih nyei baeng ndaangc. Muangx haiz nyei mienh ziouc gorngv
2Samuel17:10 Maiv gunv maaih mienh daamv hlo
2Samuel17:11 “Ziux yie nyei za'eix
2Samuel17:12 Hnangv naaic
2Samuel17:13 Se gorngv ninh tuix bieqc norm zingh gu'nyuoz
2Samuel17:14 Apc^saa^lom caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gorngv
2Samuel17:15 Husai gorngv mbuox Saax^ndokc sai mienh caux Aa^mbi^yaa^taa sai mienh
2Samuel17:16 Ih zanc gaanv paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Ndaawitv ‘Ih muonz maiv dungx hitv bieqc deic-bung-huaang nyei jauv-bouc. Ndongc haaix zungv oix zuqc jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Nziex hungh diex caux gan ninh nyei yietc zungv mienh zuqc naqv nzengc.’+”
2Samuel17:17 Wuov zanc Yo^naa^taan caux Aa^hi^maa^atc yiem En Logen zuov. Maaih dauh m'sieqv bou aah loc dorh waac mingh mbuox ninh mbuo
2Samuel17:18 Mv baac maaih dauh mienh lunx mienh buatc ninh mbuo ziouc mingh mbuox Apc^saa^lom. Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc gaanv jienv biaux taux Mbaa^hu^lim
2Samuel17:19 Wuov dauh mienh nyei auv lorz kuaaiv ga'naaiv gomv jienv kuotv-nzuih aengx zorqv cuqv pui jienv gu'nguaaic
2Samuel17:20 Apc^saa^lom nyei jien daaih taux wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei biauv naaic
2Samuel17:21 Apc^saa^lom nyei jien nzuonx mingh
2Samuel17:22 Ndaawitv caux gan ninh nyei zuangx mienh ziouc jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Taux lungh njang yietc zungv jiex nzengc
2Samuel17:23 Aa^hi^to^fen buatc mienh maiv ei ninh nyei za'eix
2Samuel17:24 Ndaawitv mingh taux Maa^haa^naa^im. Apc^saa^lom caux gan ninh nyei zuangx mienh yaac jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih.
2Samuel17:25 Apc^saa^lom liepc Aa^maa^saax zoux domh baeng-bieiv div Yo^aapc. Aa^maa^saax se I^saa^maa^en Mienh
2Samuel17:26 Apc^saa^lom caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh liepc ciangv yiem Gi^le^aatc Deic.
2Samuel17:27 Ndaawitv taux Maa^haa^naa^im nyei ziangh hoc
2Samuel17:28 dorh jienv suangx-dimc
2Samuel17:29 mueiz-dorngh
2Samuel18:1 Ndaawitv dimv mangc gan ninh nyei mienh aengx paaiv gunv yietc cin dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv caux gunv yietc baeqv dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv.
2Samuel18:2 Ndaawitv yaac paaiv jun-baeng cuotv mingh
2Samuel18:3 Mv baac ninh nyei baeng gorngv
2Samuel18:4 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel18:5 Hungh diex paaiv Yo^aapc
2Samuel18:6 Ndaawitv nyei jun-baeng cuotv mingh caux I^saa^laa^en nyei baeng mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo yiem E^faa^im nyei lomc mborqv.
2Samuel18:7 Yiem naaic I^saa^laa^en Mienh suei Ndaawitv nyei jien. Wuov hnoi zuqc daix daic nyei mienh camv! haic
2Samuel18:8 Wuov hnoi mborqv jaax nyei sic nzaanx mingh buangv wuov deix dorngx nyei ndau. Daic wuov lomc nyei mienh gauh camv zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix wuov deix.
2Samuel18:9 Zoux gau
2Samuel18:10 Maaih dauh mienh buatc ziouc mbuox Yo^aapc
2Samuel18:11 Yo^aapc mbuox dongh dorh fienx daaih mbuox ninh wuov dauh
2Samuel18:12 Mv baac wuov dauh mienh dau Yo^aapc
2Samuel18:13 Mv baac se gorngv yie hoic ninh nyei maengc
2Samuel18:14 Yo^aapc gorngv
2Samuel18:15 Maaih ziepc dauh mienh lunx mienh
2Samuel18:16 Yo^aapc ziouc biomv jorng zoux jangx-hoc bun baeng nzuonx daaih
2Samuel18:17 Ninh mbuo zorqv Apc^saa^lom nyei sei dapv norm yiem wuov lomc nyei domh! kuotv yaac zorqv la'bieiv ndui jienv benx yietc domh! ndui la'bieiv. I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
2Samuel18:18 Apc^saa^lom corc yiem seix zaangc wuov zanc
2Samuel18:19 Saax^ndokc nyei dorn
2Samuel18:20 Yo^aapc gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel18:21 Yo^aapc ziouc gorngv mbuox dauh Kutv Mienh
2Samuel18:22 Saax^ndokc nyei dorn
2Samuel18:23 Aa^hi^maa^atc gorngv
2Samuel18:24 Wuov zanc Ndaawitv zueiz jienv gu'nyuoz caux ga'nyiec nyei zingh gaengh mbu'ndongx. Siouv gaeng mienh faaux zuov gaengh nyei laauh gu'nguaaic. Cau hmien mangc ninh buatc maaih yietc dauh mienh ganh tiux jienv daaih hnangv.
2Samuel18:25 Siouv gaeng mienh ziouc heuc jienv mbuox hungh diex. Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel18:26 Siouv gaeng mienh aengx buatc yietc dauh mienh tiux jienv daaih. Siouv gaeng mienh ziouc heuc zuov gaengh mienh mbuox ninh
2Samuel18:27 Siouv gaeng mienh gorngv
2Samuel18:28 Aa^hi^maa^atc heuc jienv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel18:29 Hungh diex naaic
2Samuel18:30 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel18:31 Wuov zanc Kutv Mienh daaih taux aqv. Kutv Mienh gorngv
2Samuel18:32 Hungh diex naaic Kutv Mienh “Wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh
2Samuel18:33 Hungh diex hnyouv mun duqv ndo haic. Ninh faaux zingh gaengh gu'nguaaic nyei yietc qongx nyiemv. Ninh yietc binc mingh yietc binc gorngv
2Samuel19:1 Maaih mienh mbuox Yo^aapc
2Samuel19:2 Wuov hnoi zuangx baeqc fingx duqv hingh nyei njien-youh tiuv benx nzauh nyiemv nyei jauv weic zuqc wuov hnoi baeqc fingx haiz gorngv
2Samuel19:3 Wuov hnoi zuangx mienh sekv-sekv nyei nzuonx daaih bieqc zingh hnangv mborqv jaax bingx jienv biaux
2Samuel19:4 Hungh diex buang jienv hmien nyiemv mbui nyei gorngv
2Samuel19:5 Yo^aapc bieqc hungh dinc gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel19:6 weic zuqc meih hnamv nzorng meih wuov deix mienh. Hnamv meih wuov deix
2Samuel19:7 Ih zanc tov meih cuotv mingh caux meih nyei jien gorngv waac longx. Yie ziangv jienv Ziouv gorngv
2Samuel19:8 Hungh diex ziouc jiez sin daaih cuotv mingh zueiz jienv zingh gaengh. Wuov deix mienh haiz gorngv
2Samuel19:9 Gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei fingx-fingx mienh
2Samuel19:10 Yie mbuo longc youh orn Apc^saa^lom zoux hungh gunv yie mbuo mv baac ninh yiem mborqv jaax nyei ziangh hoc daic mi'aqv. Wuov nyungc meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv gorngv yietc joux taux oix dorh hungh diex nzuonx?”
2Samuel19:11 Ndaawitv Hungh paaiv mienh mingh mbuox Saax^ndokc sai mienh caux Aa^mbi^yaa^taa sai mienh gorngv
2Samuel19:12 Meih mbuo zoux yie nyei gorx-youz
2Samuel19:13 Aengx gorngv mbuox Aa^maa^saax
2Samuel19:14 Ndaawitv nyei waac baeng duqv Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh dongh diuc hnyouv. Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv mienh mingh mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel19:15 Hungh Diex ziouc nzuonx taux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Yu^ndaa Mienh mingh taux Gin^gaan
2Samuel19:16 Yiem Mbaa^hu^lim nyei Mben^yaa^min Mienh
2Samuel19:17 Aengx maaih yietc cin dauh Mben^yaa^min Mienh caux jienv ninh daaih. Aengx maaih Saulo nyei biauv nyei bou
2Samuel19:18 Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem jauv-bouc jiex mingh zipv hungh diex yaac ei jienv hungh diex nyei hnyouv zoux. Hungh diex jang-jang oix jiex ndaaih nyei ziangh hoc
2Samuel19:19 gorngv
2Samuel19:20 Weic zuqc yie
2Samuel19:21 Wuov zanc Se^lu^yaa nyei dorn
2Samuel19:22 Ndaawitv dau
2Samuel19:23 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Si^me^i
2Samuel19:24 Saulo nyei fun
2Samuel19:25 Me^fi^mbo^setv daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem zipv hungh diex wuov zanc
2Samuel19:26 Me^fi^mbo^setv gorngv
2Samuel19:27 Yie nyei bou gorngv jaav mbuox hungh diex. Mv baac yie nyei ziouv
2Samuel19:28 Yie nyei ong nyei zeiv-fun zic duqv yie nyei ziouv
2Samuel19:29 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel19:30 Me^fi^mbo^setv gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel19:31 Gi^le^aatc Mienh
2Samuel19:32 Mbaa^sin^lai gox haic
2Samuel19:33 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Mbaa^sin^lai
2Samuel19:34 Mv baac Mbaa^sin^lai mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel19:35 Yie ih zanc duqv betv ziepc hnyangx aqv. Yie haih bun duqv nqoi haaix nyungc se yaauc fai maiv yaauc? Yie haih seix cuotv haaix nyungc nyanc hopv kuv fai maiv kuv? Yie corc haih muangx duqv haiz m'jangc m'sieqv baaux nzung nyei fai? Hnangv naaic yie
2Samuel19:36 Yie
2Samuel19:37 Tov bun yie
2Samuel19:38 Hungh diex gorngv
2Samuel19:39 Zuangx mienh ziouc jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Hungh diex yaac caux jienv jiex. Hungh diex zom Mbaa^sin^lai yaac buang waac bun ninh. Nqa'haav Mbaa^sin^lai nzuonx ninh ganh nyei biauv mi'aqv.
2Samuel19:40 Hungh diex aengx jiex mingh taux Gin^gaan. Kim^haam yaac gan ninh jiex. Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh caux yietc buonc I^saa^laa^en Mienh fungx hungh diex jiex.
2Samuel19:41 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh daaih buangh hungh diex
2Samuel19:42 Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh dau I^saa^laa^en Mienh
2Samuel19:43 I^saa^laa^en Mienh dau Yu^ndaa Mienh
2Samuel20:1 Yiem wuov maaih dauh cuoqv sic nyei mienh
2Samuel20:2 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc guangc Ndaawitv mingh gan Mbikc^li nyei dorn
2Samuel20:3 Ndaawitv nzuonx taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Samuel20:4 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^maa^saax
2Samuel20:5 Aa^maa^saax ziouc mingh heuc Yu^ndaa Mienh
2Samuel20:6 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Aa^mbi^qai
2Samuel20:7 Yo^aapc caux ninh nyei mienh
2Samuel20:8 Ninh mbuo taux Gi^mbe^on nyei domh la'bieiv wuov
2Samuel20:9 Yo^aapc gorngv mbuox Aa^maa^saax
2Samuel20:10 Aa^maa^saax maiv jangx mangc Yo^aapc nyei buoz nanv nyei nzuqc ndaauv. Yo^aapc nzopv Aa^maa^saax nyei ga'sie
2Samuel20:11 Maaih yietc dauh Yo^aapc nyei mienh souv jienv Aa^maa^saax nyei sei ga'hlen gorngv
2Samuel20:12 Aa^maa^saax nyei sei yiem domh jauv bueix jienv nziaamv-ndorngh gu'nyuoz. Haaix dauh jiex jauv buatc ziouc souv jienv wuov. Wuov dauh mienh buatc mienh hnangv naaiv nor dingh
2Samuel20:13 Zorqv nqoi sei
2Samuel20:14 Qe^mbaa jiex fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei dorngx
2Samuel20:15 Yo^aapc caux ninh nyei jun-baeng ziouc daaih weih jienv oix mborqv Aa^mben Mbetc Maa^aa^kaa
2Samuel20:16 Maaih dauh yiem zingh maaih cong-mengh nyei m'sieqv dorn heuc jienv gorngv
2Samuel20:17 Yo^aapc ziouc mingh fatv. Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn naaic
2Samuel20:18 Yo^aapc gorngv
2Samuel20:19 Yie mbuo naaiv norm zingh nyei mienh se hnamv baengh orn caux ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv. Meih daav za'eix mietc norm zingh
2Samuel20:20 Yo^aapc dau
2Samuel20:21 Naaiv maiv zeiz yie mbuo nyei za'eix. Mv baac maaih dauh E^faa^im Mbong-aiv dorngx nyei mienh
2Samuel20:22 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn longc ninh nyei cong-mengh mingh caux zuangx mienh caangh laangh. Ninh mbuo ziouc hngaqv Mbikc^li nyei dorn
2Samuel20:23 Yo^aapc zoux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx jun-baeng nyei domh baeng-bieiv. Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa nyei dorn
2Samuel20:24 Aa^ndo^ni^lam gunv zoux gong kouv nyei mienh. Aa^hi^lutv nyei dorn
2Samuel20:25 Qewaa zoux sou-biuv
2Samuel20:26 Jaa^i Mienh
2Samuel21:1 Ndaawitv zoux hungh gunv nyei ziangh hoc buangh zuqc linh jienv buo hnyangx nyei domh ngorc. Ndaawitv ziouc mingh yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien naaic Ziouv. Ziouv gorngv
2Samuel21:2 Hungh diex ziouc heuc Gi^mbe^on Mienh daaih. (Gi^mbe^on Mienh se maiv zeiz I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh mbuo se zengc njiec nyei Aa^mo^lai Mienh. I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux ninh mbuo laengz ngaengc waac liouh ninh mbuo nyei maengc
2Samuel21:3 Ndaawitv naaic Gi^mbe^on Mienh
2Samuel21:4 Gi^mbe^on Mienh dau hungh diex
2Samuel21:5 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel21:6 Tov zorqv siec dauh ninh nyei zeiv-fun
2Samuel21:7 Mv baac Ndaawitv liouh Saulo nyei fun
2Samuel21:8 Ninh zorqv Ai^aa nyei sieqv
2Samuel21:9 Ndaawitv jiu bun Gi^mbe^on Mienh. Gi^mbe^on Mienh ziouc yiem norm mbong gu'nguaaic
2Samuel21:10 Ai^aa nyei sieqv
2Samuel21:11 Maaih mienh mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel21:12 Ndaawitv ziouc mingh Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc zorqv Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn
2Samuel21:13 Ndaawitv dorh Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn
2Samuel21:14 Ninh mbuo zangx Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn
2Samuel21:15 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh aengx daaih caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax. Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei jun-baeng njiec mingh mborqv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh. Mborqv gau jaax
2Samuel21:16 Maaih dauh ziangh duqv hlo hlang nyei mienh nyei zeiv-fun
2Samuel21:17 Mv baac Se^lu^yaa nyei dorn
2Samuel21:18 Hoz daaih I^saa^laa^en Mienh aengx caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax yiem Gopc. Wuov nzunc Husaa Mienh
2Samuel21:19 Yiem Gopc aengx maaih caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv nzunc jaax. Mbetc^le^hem Mienh
2Samuel21:20 Nqa'haav yiem Gatc aengx maaih nzunc mborqv jaax. Yiem wuov norm dorngx maaih dauh mienh ziangh duqv hlo hlang nyei. Ninh nyei buoz yietc jieqv maaih juqv norm buoz-ndoqv. Ninh nyei zaux yietc jieqv yaac maaih juqv norm zaux-ndoqv. Yietc zungv maaih nyic ziepc feix norm. Ninh yaac zoux hlo hlang wuov deix mienh nyei zeiv-fun.
2Samuel21:21 Ninh ndouv I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux ninh mborqv jaax. Ndaawitv nyei gorx
2Samuel21:22 Naaiv deix biei dauh se yiem Gatc Zingh hlo hlang mienh nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh mbuo zuqc Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei jien nyei buoz daix nzengc.
2Samuel22:1 Ndaawitv baaux naaiv diuh nzung nyei waac bun Ziouv doix Ziouv njoux ninh biaux ndutv ninh nyei yietc zungv win-wangv caux Saulo nyei buoz-ndiev wuov hnoi.
2Samuel22:2 Ninh gorngv
2Samuel22:3 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh se yie nyei la'bieiv
2Samuel22:4 Yie heuc Ziouv
2Samuel22:5 “Maaih zuqc daic nyei qaqv hnangv wuom-laangc weih jienv yie
2Samuel22:6 Yiemh gen nyei hlaang nzenc jienv yie
2Samuel22:7 Zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc yie heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Yie jouh yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gu'nyuoz muangx haiz yie nyei qiex. Yie heuc jienv ninh nyei qiex bieqc taux ninh nyei m'normh.
2Samuel22:8 “Wuov zanc ndau-beih zuqc mbungh mbungh mbienv-mbienv nyei
2Samuel22:9 Douz-sioux yangh ninh nyei mba'zorng cuotv. Ninh nyei nzuih cuotv haih buov qui nyei douz
2Samuel22:10 Ninh bun lungh nqoi ziouc njiec daaih
2Samuel22:11 Ninh geh ke^lu^mbim ndaix mingh
2Samuel22:12 Ninh bun hmuangx om ninh nyei sin
2Samuel22:13 Yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien njang haic nyei njang hnangv maaih jienv douz nyei taanx njapc njapc nyei cuotv hnangv mba'lingc nor.
2Samuel22:14 Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv cuotv hnangv mba'ong mbui
2Samuel22:15 Ninh buonv cuotv forng-cang zoux bun win-wangv nzaanx. Ninh borngz mba'lingc
2Samuel22:16 Ziouv hatc hniev nyei
2Samuel22:17 “Ninh yiem gu'nguaaic hlang nyei dorngx sung buoz zorqv yie
2Samuel22:18 Ninh njoux yie biaux ndutv yie henv haic nyei win-wangv caux nzorng yie wuov deix mienh
2Samuel22:19 Yie zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc ninh mbuo daaih hoic yie
2Samuel22:20 Ninh dorh yie cuotv daaih taux norm jangv nyei dorngx. Ninh njoux yie weic zuqc ninh a'hneiv yie.
2Samuel22:21 “Ziux yie zoux duqv horpc
2Samuel22:22 Weic zuqc yie gan nzengc Ziouv nyei doz
2Samuel22:23 Ninh nyei yietc zungv leiz yiem yie nyei nza'hmien
2Samuel22:24 Yie yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien maiv maaih dorngc nyei dorngx. Yie yaac goux longx ganh
2Samuel22:25 Weic naaiv
2Samuel22:26 “Weic ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh meih bun cing meih ziepc zuoqv
2Samuel22:27 Weic cing-nzengc wuov deix
2Samuel22:28 Meih njoux nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh
2Samuel22:29 O Ziouv aac
2Samuel22:30 Yie bangc meih ziouc haih mborqv duqv jun-baeng. Yie kaux yie nyei Tin-Hungh haih biu jiex zingh laatc.
2Samuel22:31 “Tin-Hungh aeqv
2Samuel22:32 Cuotv liuz Ziouv
2Samuel22:33 Tin-Hungh se yie kaux duqv wuonv nyei dorngx. Ninh yaac bun yie nyei jauv baengh orn.
2Samuel22:34 Ninh bun yie nyei zaux hnangv njaih nyeiz nyei deih nor
2Samuel22:35 Ninh njaaux yie hoqc linc mborqv jaax
2Samuel22:36 Meih bun meih nyei njoux en weic zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih. Zatv ganh njiec bun yie duqv zoux hlo.
2Samuel22:37 Meih bun yie nyei zaux caaiv nyei dorngx jangv
2Samuel22:38 “Yie zunc yie nyei win-wangv yaac mietc ninh mbuo. Yie maiv daaux sin nzuonx taux ninh mbuo zuqc baaic nzengc.
2Samuel22:39 Yie baaic nzengc ninh mbuo
2Samuel22:40 Weic zuqc meih bun yie maaih qaqv mborqv jaax
2Samuel22:41 Meih yaac bun yie nyei win-wangv huin nqaang biaux. Yie yaac duqv mietc nzengc nzorng yie wuov deix.
2Samuel22:42 Ninh mbuo mangc mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh njoux ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo heuc Ziouv
2Samuel22:43 Yie mborqv ninh mbuo muonc hnangv ndau-beih nyei nie-mbung
2Samuel22:44 “Meih njoux yie biaux ndutv
2Samuel22:45 Ninh mbuo yietv muangx haiz yie nyei mengh dauh ninh mbuo muangx yie
2Samuel22:46 Janx hnyouv mau nzengc
2Samuel22:47 “ Ziouv ziangh jienv. Oix zuqc ceng beu yie nyei La'bieiv. Oix zuqc taaih yie nyei Tin-Hungh
2Samuel22:48 Se naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh tengx yie jaauv win
2Samuel22:49 Ninh dorh yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv
2Samuel22:50 O Ziouv aac
2Samuel22:51 Ninh ceix hlo haic nyei njoux en bun ninh nyei hungh diex
2Samuel23:1 Naaiv se Ndaawitv nyei setv mueiz waac. “Se Jetc^si nyei dorn
2Samuel23:2 “ Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh longc yie gorngv
2Samuel23:3 I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh gorngv
2Samuel23:4 ninh gunv mienh hnangv lungh ndorm mba'hnoi cuotv nyei njang
2Samuel23:5 “Yie nyei zeiv-fun caux Tin-Hungh horpc maiv zeiz? Weic zuqc ninh caux yie liepc yietc liuz nyei ngaengc waac
2Samuel23:6 Mv baac yietc zungv maiv lamh longc nyei mienh hnangv njimv nor
2Samuel23:7 Mv baac haaix dauh mienh muoqv
2Samuel23:8 Naaiv se Ndaawitv henv haic nyei jun-zeiv mienh nyei mbuox. Maaih Takv^mo^ni Mienh
2Samuel23:9 Naaiv deix “Buo Dauh” nyei da'nyeic dauh se Aa^hox^hai Mienh
2Samuel23:10 Mv baac E^le^aa^saa souv jienv wuov daix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh taux ninh nyei buoz nyuix
2Samuel23:11 Wuov deix “Buo Dauh” nyei da'faam dauh se Haalaa Mienh
2Samuel23:12 Mv baac Sammaa souv jienv wuov nzong ndeic gu'nyuoz nzaeng wuov nzong ndeic yaac daix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh. Ziouv tengx I^saa^laa^en Mienh za'gengh! hingh jiex.
2Samuel23:13 Maaih “Faah Ziepc Dauh” wuov deix henv haic nyei jun-zeiv mienh nyei buo dauh njiec taux Aa^ndun^lam nyei mbaengx-kuotv lorz Ndaawitv. Aengx maaih guanh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh liepc ciangv yiem Le^faa^im Horngz.
2Samuel23:14 Wuov zanc Ndaawitv yiem norm weih wuonv nyei dorngx
2Samuel23:15 Ndaawitv haiz ngorc wuom ziouc gorngv cuotv nzuih
2Samuel23:16 Naaiv deix buo dauh henv haic nyei jun-baeng ziouc nimc bieqc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei ciangv
2Samuel23:17 Ninh gorngv
2Samuel23:18 Se^lu^yaa nyei dorn
2Samuel23:19 Yiem wuov deix “Faah Ziepc Dauh” gu'nyuoz ninh duqv mienh taaih gauh camv. Ninh duqv zoux ninh mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv maiv gunv ninh maiv zeiz wuov deix “Buo Dauh” nyei yietc dauh. Mv baac beiv maiv taux wuov deix “Buo Dauh.”
2Samuel23:20 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa nyei dorn
2Samuel23:21 Ninh aengx daix dauh hlo hlang nyei I^yipv Mienh. Wuov dauh I^yipv Mienh nanv jienv cang mv baac Mbe^nai^yaa longc ndiangx-ndonx njiec mingh lorz. Ninh caangv I^yipv Mienh nyei cang daaih
2Samuel23:22 Naaiv se Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa nyei dorn
2Samuel23:23 Ninh duqv mengh dauh gauh hlo wuov deix “Faah Ziepc Dauh” mv baac maiv ndongc wuov deix “Buo Dauh.” Ndaawitv yaac paaiv ninh zoux ninh nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei bieiv zeiv.
2Samuel23:24 Yiem wuov deix “Faah Ziepc Dauh” gu'nyuoz maaih Yo^aapc nyei youz
2Samuel23:25 Haalotv Mienh
2Samuel23:26 Peletv Mienh
2Samuel23:27 Aa^naa^totv Mienh
2Samuel23:28 Aa^hox^hai Mienh
2Samuel23:29 Ne^to^faa Mienh
2Samuel23:30 Bi^laa^ton Mienh
2Samuel23:31 Aa^laa^mbaa Mienh
2Samuel23:32 Saa^an^mbon Mienh

2Samuel24:1 Ziouv aengx qiex! jiez haic I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc coqv Ndaawitv hoic ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuox Ndaawitv
2Samuel24:2 Ndaawitv ziouc gorngv mbuox Yo^aapc aengx caux ninh yiem nyei domh baeng-bieiv
2Samuel24:3 Mv baac Yo^aapc gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Samuel24:4 Mv baac Yo^aapc caux domh baeng-bieiv ngaengc maiv duqv hungh diex nyei waac. Yo^aapc caux jun-baeng nyei domh baeng-bieiv ziouc yiem hungh nyei nza'hmien cuotv mingh saauv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei baeqc fingx.
2Samuel24:5 Ninh mbuo jiex liuz Jor^ndaen Ndaaih ziouc liepc ciangv yiem Aa^lo^e Zingh
2Samuel24:6 Ninh mbuo daaih taux Gi^le^aatc aengx mingh taux Daatim Hotc^qi. Ninh mbuo aengx mingh taux Ndan^yaa^an
2Samuel24:7 Ninh mbuo aengx taux weih wuonv nyei zingh
2Samuel24:8 Ninh mbuo mingh gormx deic-bung liuz
2Samuel24:9 Yo^aapc ziouc mingh mbuox Ndaawitv ninh saauv baeqc fingx nyei soux mouc. Yiem I^saa^laa^en haih longc nzuqc ndaauv yaac zoux henv nyei baeng maaih betv ziepc waanc dauh. Yu^ndaa maaih hmz ziepc waanc.
2Samuel24:10 Ndaawitv saauv liuz mienh
2Samuel24:11 Da'nyeic ndorm Ndaawitv jiez sin daaih
2Samuel24:12 Ninh gorngv
2Samuel24:13 Gaatc ziouc mingh lorz Ndaawitv
2Samuel24:14 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Gaatc
2Samuel24:15 Hnangv naaic
2Samuel24:16 Fin-mienh sung buoz oix mietc Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov zanc
2Samuel24:17 Ndaawitv buatc daix mienh wuov dauh fin-mienh ninh gorngv mbuox Ziouv
2Samuel24:18 Dongh wuov hnoi Gaatc mingh lorz Ndaawitv yaac gorngv mbuox ninh
2Samuel24:19 Ndaawitv ziouc ei jienv Ziouv longc Gaatc hatc nyei waac mingh aqv.
2Samuel24:20 Aa^laau^naa mangc buatc hungh diex caux ninh nyei jien hungx jienv ninh daaih
2Samuel24:21 Aa^laau^naa gorngv
2Samuel24:22 Aa^laau^naa gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv

2Samuel24:24 Mv baac hungh diex gorngv mbuox Aa^laau^naa
2Samuel24:25 Ndaawitv yiem wuov weic Ziouv ceix norm ziec-dorngh

1Kings3:1 Weic Saa^lo^morn Hungh longc I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei hungh

1Kings3:7 “O Ziouv
1Kings3:8 Meih nyei bou yiem meih ginv daaih nyei baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx

1Kings3:10 Saa^lo^morn hnangv naaiv nor tov se horpc Ziouv nyei hnyouv.
1Kings3:11 Tin-Hungh ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
1Kings3:12 yie ziouc ei meih tov nyei zoux. Yie ceix cong-mengh bun meih maaih banh zeic hiuv duqv horpc. Jiex daaih nyei ziangh hoc maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv meih. Nqa'haav hingv yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv meih.
1Kings3:13 Liemh meih maiv tov nyei
1Kings3:14 Se gorngv meih gan longx yie

1Kings3:16 Maaih hnoi maaih i dauh maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn daaih lorz hungh diex yaac souv jienv ninh nyei nza'hmien.
1Kings3:17 Maaih dauh gorngv

1Kings4:27 Dauh dauh saengv-ziouv

1Kings4:29 Tin-Hungh ceix bun hlo haic nyei cong-mengh Saa^lo^morn

1Kings4:34 Lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex haiz gorngv taux Saa^lo^morn nyei cong-mengh ziouc yiem norm-norm guoqv paaiv mienh mingh muangx ninh nyei cong-mengh waac.
1Kings5:1 Tailaqv Zingh nyei hungh

1Kings5:4 Mv baac ih zanc Ziouv
1Kings5:5 Yie ziouc jiez hnyouv oix ceix norm biauv weic Ziouv
1Kings5:6 “Hnangv naaic
1Kings5:7 Hilaam muangx haiz Saa^lo^morn nyei waac
1Kings5:8 Hilaam aengx wuih waac bun Saa^lo^morn. Ninh gorngv
1Kings5:9 Yie nyei gong-mienh oix yiem Le^mbaa^norn Geh wuonc ndiangx njiec taux koiv. Taux koiv ziouc gitv benx mbaih
1Kings5:10 Hilaam ziouc liuc leiz si^ndaa zongh ndiangx caux zongh ndiangx bun Saa^lo^morn ziux Saa^lo^morn oix longc nyei.
1Kings5:11 Saa^lo^morn yaac fungx i sinx i waanc tongv mbiauh witv caux i waanc i cin tongv zien ga'lanv youh mingh bun Hilaam weic ninh nyei biauv zong mienh nyei nyanc hopv. Saa^lo^morn hnyangx-hnyangx hnangv naaiv nor fungx bun Hilaam.
1Kings5:12 Ziouv ceix cong-mengh bun Saa^lo^morn ziux ninh laengz nyei waac. Hilaam caux Saa^lo^morn jiu tong maaih baengh orn
1Kings5:13 Saa^lo^morn Hungh yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ginv cuotv buo waanc dauh gong-mienh aapv tengx zoux gong.
1Kings5:14 Ninh paaiv naaiv deix mienh zoux buo guanh tiuv jienv mingh Le^mbaa^norn
1Kings5:15 Saa^lo^morn yaac maaih siec waanc dauh bienh ga'naaiv nyei mienh yaac maaih hietc waanc yiem mbong-aiv dorngx zuqc la'bieiv.
1Kings5:16 Ganh ca'lengc aengx maaih buo cin faam-baeqv dauh zoux hlo nyei mienh gunv gong
1Kings5:17 Ziux hungh diex paaiv nyei waac
1Kings5:18 Saa^lo^morn zoux biauv nyei zaangc mienh caux Hilaam zoux biauv nyei zaangc mienh caux Ge^mbaan Mienh
1Kings6:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung nqa'haav feix baeqv betv ziepc hnyangx
1Kings6:2 Saa^lo^morn weic Ziouv ceix nyei biauv ndaauv luoqc ziepc ndorqc
1Kings6:3 Bieqc biauv nza'hmien maengx wuov qongx caux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fih ndongc jangv nyic ziepc ndorqc
1Kings6:4 Ninh mbuo zoux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei fong muonh gu'nyuoz maengx jangv
1Kings6:5 Ninh aengx capv biauv ga'nyiec maengx weih gormx
1Kings6:6 Ga'ndiev wuov nzangh jangv biaa ndorqc
1Kings6:7 Ceix biauv nyei ziangh hoc kungx longc yiem la'bieiv-lomc zuqc ziangx nyei la'bieiv. Hnangv naaic
1Kings6:8 Bieqc ga'ndiev wuov nzangh nyei gaengh yiem naamh bung maengx. Aengx maaih tei faaux taux da'nyeic nzangh
1Kings6:9 Saa^lo^morn ziouc ceix ziangx zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv. Ninh yaac longc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx zoux haengh yaac zoux ndiangx-benv gomv gu'nguaaic.
1Kings6:10 Huing jienv biauv ga'nyiec wuov deix dorngx ninh zoux yietc nzangh biaa ndorqc hlang
1Kings6:11 Ziouv caux Saa^lo^morn gorngv waac. Ninh gorngv
1Kings6:12 “Gorngv taux meih ih zanc ceix naaiv norm zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
1Kings6:13 Yie yaac oix yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx
1Kings6:14 Saa^lo^morn ziouc ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv yaac ceix ziangx aqv.
1Kings6:15 Biauv gu'nyuoz maengx ninh longc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx-benv weih yiem ga'ndiev ndau taux gu'nguaaic nyei haengh. Ninh yaac longc zongh ndiangx-benv dimc ga'ndiev ndau.
1Kings6:16 Biauv gu'nyuoz nqa'haav maengx nqenx jienv yietc qongx nyic ziepc ndorqc ndaauv
1Kings6:17 Singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nyei nza'hmien maengx aengx maaih qongx feix ziepc ndorqc ndaauv.
1Kings6:18 Biauv gu'nyuoz yietc zungv buang jienv si^ndaa zongh ndiangx yaac diu jienv ha'louh caux nqoi daaih nyei biangh. Yietc zungv benx si^ndaa zongh ndiangx nzengc
1Kings6:19 Singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx
1Kings6:20 Singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nyic ziepc ndorqc ndaauv
1Kings6:21 Saa^lo^morn longc jiem buang jienv singx dinc gu'nyuoz nzengc
1Kings6:22 Ziangh norm biauv gu'nyuoz ninh longc jiem buang gormx nzengc. Singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nyei buov hung dieh yaac longc jiem buang jienv.
1Kings6:23 Ninh longc ga'lanv ndiangx zoux i dauh ke^lu^mbim
1Kings6:24 Yietc dauh ke^lu^mbim nyei yietc bung ndaatv biaa ndorqc ndaauv. Wuov bung yaac biaa ndorqc. Yiem naaiv bung ndaatv dueiv-mueiz taux wuov bung ndaatv dueiv-mueiz ziepc ndorqc.
1Kings6:25 Da'nyeic dauh ke^lu^mbim yaac fih hnangv nyei. I bung ndaatv maaih ziepc ndorqc
1Kings6:26 Yietc dauh ke^lu^mbim ziepc ndorqc hlang
1Kings6:27 Ninh zorqv ke^lu^mbim an jienv biauv gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx. Ke^lu^mbim nyei ndaatv yang jienv. Yietc dauh nyei yietc bung ndaatv yang donx jienv yietc bung njongc. Da'nyeic dauh ke^lu^mbim nyei wuov bung ndaatv yaac donx jienv wuov bung njongc. I dauh nyei yietc bung ndaatv yang camx jienv jaax wuov qongx mbu'ndongx.
1Kings6:28 Ninh yaac longc jiem buang jienv ke^lu^mbim.
1Kings6:29 Biauv gu'nyuoz caux ga'nyiec maengx weih gormx nyei njongc diu jienv ke^lu^mbim nyei fangx caux daau nyei ndiangx caux nqoi daaih nyei biangh.
1Kings6:30 Biauv gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx caux ga'nyiec wuov qongx ninh longc jiem dimc jienv damc ga'ndiev nyei ndiangx-benv.
1Kings6:31 Bieqc singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nyei gaengh ninh longc ga'lanv ndiangx zoux. Gaengh zouc yaac maaih biaa diuh lorngh.
1Kings6:32 Ninh longc ga'lanv ndiangx zoux i dauh gaengh yaac diu jienv ke^lu^mbim nyei fangx caux daau nyei ndiangx caux nqoi daaih nyei biangh
1Kings6:33 Weic bieqc ga'nyiec wuov qongx nyei gaengh zouc longc ga'lanv ndiangx zoux daaih yaac maaih biei diuh lorngh.
1Kings6:34 Ninh yaac longc zongh ndiangx zoux i dauh gaengh
1Kings6:35 Gaengh
1Kings6:36 Ninh zoux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx gu'nyuoz wuov kang laatc benx buo yiemc zuqc daaih nyei la'bieiv caux yietc yiemc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx.
1Kings6:37 Saa^lo^morn zoux hungh da'feix hnyangx
1Kings6:38 Taux ziepc yietv wuov hnyangx
1Kings7:1 Saa^lo^morn longc ziepc faam hnyangx ceix ninh nyei hungh dinc yaac ceix ziangx nzengc.
1Kings7:2 Maaih mbuox heuc Le^mbaa^norn Gemh wuov norm biauv ninh ceix yietc baeqv ndorqc ndaauv
1Kings7:3 Haengh gu'nguaaic maengx yaac longc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx gomv. Maaih feix ziepc hmz diuh haengh
1Kings7:4 Maaih buo liouz fong muonh nyei qorng. Naaiv bung nyei fong muonh doix wuov bung nyei fong muonh.
1Kings7:5 Norm-norm gaengh qorng caux fong muonh nyei qorng maaih biei gorqv fih hnangv nzengc. Naaiv bung nyei buo liouz fong muonh yaac doix ziangx wuov bung nyei buo liouz fong muonh.
1Kings7:6 Ninh aengx zoux ‘Maaih Domh Ndiouh nyei Biauv
1Kings7:7 Ninh aengx zoux qongx an ninh nyei weic
1Kings7:8 Yiem naaiv qongx nqa'haav maengx
1Kings7:9 Naaiv deix biauv yiem ga'ndiev ndau taux njongc-dueiv
1Kings7:10 Gorn-ndoqv longc jaaix haic nyei domh la'bieiv hietc ndorqc taux ziepc ndorqc ndaauv zoux daaih.
1Kings7:11 Gorn-ndoqv gu'nguaaic longc jaaix haic nyei domh la'bieiv
1Kings7:12 Weih gormx nyei domh laatc longc buo yiemc zuqc daaih nyei la'bieiv caux yietc yiemc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx. Weih zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei laatc caux bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv wuov qongx fih hnangv nyei.
1Kings7:13 Saa^lo^morn Hungh paaiv mienh mingh Tailaqv Zingh dorh Hilaam daaih.
1Kings7:14 Hilaam nyei maa benx Napv^taa^li Fingx nyei yietc dauh auv-guaav. Hilaam nyei die zoux dongh siqv zaangc. Hilaam za'gengh! maaih cong-mengh haic
1Kings7:15 Hilaam dox i norm domh ndiouh
1Kings7:16 Ninh aengx dox dongh siqv borqv ndiouh dueiv-mueiz biaa ndorqc hlang. Da'nyeic norm fih hnangv nyei
1Kings7:17 Ndiouh dueiv-mueiz longc limc ciqv daaih hnangv mungz nor
1Kings7:18 Naaiv deix dongh siqv limc maaih i liouz ziqc liouh biouv huing gormx weic zorng ndiouh gu'nguaaic. I norm ndiouh zoux fih hnangv nyei.
1Kings7:19 Gaengh nza'hmien maengx naaiv deix i norm ndiouh dueiv-mueiz zoux daaih benx baeqc horqc biangh nyei fangx
1Kings7:20 Ndiouh dueiv-mueiz zoux hnangv bienh wuov norm dorngx gu'nguaaic
1Kings7:21 Hilaam zorqv naaiv deix i norm ndiouh liepc jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gaengh ndaangc. Naamh bung nyei ndiouh ninh cuotv mbuox heuc Yaakin. baqv bung wuov norm ndiouh ninh heuc Mbo^aatc.
1Kings7:22 Ndiouh dueiv-mueiz benx baeqc horqc biangh nyei fangx. Hnangv naaic
1Kings7:23 Hilaam aengx longc dongh siqv dox norm domh bunh junh nyei. Bunh nzuih gu'nguaaic naaiv bung taux wuov bung jangv ziepc ndorqc. Bunh yaac hlang biaa ndorqc. Ndorqc huing gormx faah ziepc ndorqc.
1Kings7:24 Yiem bunh nzuih ga'ndiev maaih ha'louh nyei fangx
1Kings7:25 Domh bunh don jienv ziepc nyeic dauh ngongh gouv. Buo dauh ngongh gouv huin baqv bung
1Kings7:26 Domh bunh yietc buoz-zaangv hoz. Bunh nzuih yaac hnangv zaanv nyei nzuih nor
1Kings7:27 Hilaam aengx longc dongh siqv zoux ziepc norm don bunh nyei dieh longz. Norm-norm dieh longz jangv biei ndorqc
1Kings7:28 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux naaiv deix dieh longz ga'hlen benx yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv
1Kings7:29 Naaiv deix yietc kuaaiv
1Kings7:30 Mouz norm dieh longz maaih biei norm dongh siqv yienh caux zaengx yienh nyei guaengv. Norm-norm gorqv maaih dorngx sengh bunh. Naaiv deix dorngx yaac maaih biangh ndingh ga'hlen.
1Kings7:31 Dieh longz gu'nguaaic maengx zoux norm kuotv-nzuih junh nyei yaac maaih yietc ndorqc ndo. Naaiv norm kuotv junh nyei
1Kings7:32 Biei norm yienh yiem wuov deix yietc kuaaiv
1Kings7:33 Yienh yaac zoux daaih hnangv mborqv jaax nyei cie-yienh. Zaengx yienh nyei guaengv caux yienh nyei kuing
1Kings7:34 Mouz norm dieh longz maaih biei norm sengh dieh nyei ga'naaiv
1Kings7:35 Yiem dieh longz gu'nguaaic maaih norm kuing ndaamv-ndorqc hlang. Zungh zaqc nyei qorng caux ga'hlen nyei yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv naetv jienv dieh gu'nguaaic.
1Kings7:36 Dieh qorng caux ga'hlen nyei wuov deix yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv ndingh jienv ke^lu^mbim caux sienh caux daau nyei ndiangx ziux maaih dorngx ndingh nyei
1Kings7:37 Hilaam hnangv naaiv nor zoux naaiv deix ziepc norm dieh longz. Norm-norm ninh mbuo dox daaih fih hnangv nzengc
1Kings7:38 Ninh aengx longc dongh siqv zoux ziepc norm dongh siqv bunh
1Kings7:39 Naaiv deix dieh longz ninh zorqv biaa norm an jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv naamh bung maengx
1Kings7:40 Hilaam yaac zoux caeng caux ga'naaiv-cenv caux nzormc yienv. Hnangv naaic Hilaam tengx Saa^lo^morn Hungh weic zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv zoux ziangx ninh nyei yietc zungv gong. Ninh zoux
1Kings7:41 i norm domh ndiouh
1Kings7:42 feix baeqv norm ziqc liouh biouv weic zorng wuov deix i kuaaiv mungz
1Kings7:43 ziepc norm dieh longz caux dieh longz nyei ziepc norm bunh
1Kings7:44 domh bunh caux yiem domh bunh ga'ndiev wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh ngongh gouv
1Kings7:45 caeng caux ga'naaiv-cenv caux nzormc. Naaiv deix yietc zungv ga'naaiv Hilaam longc nzaatv daaih njang nyei dongh siqv tengx Saa^lo^morn Hungh weic zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv zoux daaih.
1Kings7:46 Hungh diex paaiv mienh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei ndau-baengh
1Kings7:47 Saa^lo^morn maiv heuc mienh nziang naaiv deix haaix nyungc ga'naaiv weic zuqc maaih camv haic. Hnangv naaic ziouc maiv funx dongh siqv nyei hniev-daauh aqv.
1Kings7:48 Saa^lo^morn aengx zoux yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv jaa-dorngx. Ninh zoux buov hung nyei jiem-dieh
1Kings7:49 aengx longc zien jiem zoux dang-jaax
1Kings7:50 jiem-bienh
1Kings7:51 Saa^lo^morn Hungh zoux ziangx zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei yietc zungv gong
1Kings8:1 Saa^lo^morn Hungh heuc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mienh gox caux fingx-fingx nyei bieiv zeiv caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
1Kings8:2 Cietv hlaax
1Kings8:3 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx mienh gox daaih taux
1Kings8:4 Ninh mbuo dorh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang caux Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh caux yietc zungv jaa-dorngx. Sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh gaeng faaux.
1Kings8:5 Saa^lo^morn Hungh caux yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien gapv zunv nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc zungv yiem Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien fongc horc ba'gi yungh caux ngongh weic zoux ziec nyei ga'naaiv camv! haic
1Kings8:6 Sai mienh ziouc dorh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv an faang nyei dorngx
1Kings8:7 Ke^lu^mbim yang ndaatv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nyei dorngx gu'nguaaic yaac nzie jienv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang caux gaeng faang nyei ndiangx.
1Kings8:8 Gaeng faang nyei ndiangx ndaauv nyei. Yiem singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nyei nza'hmien maengx
1Kings8:9 Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang kungx maaih dongh Mose yiem Holepv Mbong an wuov deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv-benv. Cuotv liuz naaic maiv maaih haaix nyungc. Naaiv deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv-benv se I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
1Kings8:10 Sai mienh yiem Cing-Nzengc nyei Dorngx cuotv daaih ziouc maaih mbuonx yiem buangv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv.
1Kings8:11 Laaix mbuonx
1Kings8:12 Wuov zanc Saa^lo^morn daux gaux gorngv
1Kings8:13 Yie weic meih ceix ziangx yietc norm nzueic haic nyei biauv
1Kings8:14 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh corc gapv zunv souv jienv wuov
1Kings8:15 Ninh gorngv
1Kings8:16 ‘Yiem yie dorh yie nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:17 “Yie nyei die
1Kings8:18 Mv baac Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie nyei die
1Kings8:19 Mv baac meih ganh maiv duqv ceix. Se meih nyei cien dorn oix weic yie nyei Mengh ceix norm biauv.’
1Kings8:20 “Ih zanc Ziouv ei ninh laengz nyei waac zoux. Yie nzipc jienv yie nyei die
1Kings8:21 Yie liuc leiz ziangx dorngx an Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang. Faang gu'nyuoz maaih dongh Ziouv dorh mbuo nyei ong-taaix cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc ninh caux ninh mbuo laengz jiez nyei ngaengc waac.”
1Kings8:22 Saa^lo^morn ziouc souv jienv Ziouv nyei ziec-dorngh nza'hmien maengx
1Kings8:23 Ninh gorngv
1Kings8:24 Meih ei jienv meih caux meih nyei bou
1Kings8:25 “ Ziouv
1Kings8:26 O I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh aac
1Kings8:27 “Tin-Hungh za'gengh oix yiem baamh gen fai? Lungh caux gauh hlang jiex nyei lungh
1Kings8:28 O Ziouv
1Kings8:29 Tov meih hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz mangc jienv naaiv norm biauv
1Kings8:30 Meih nyei bou caux meih nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:31 “Se gorngv maaih dauh juangc laangz mienh zoux dorngc ganh dauh mienh
1Kings8:32 Tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh muangx yaac ei jienv zoux. Tov siemv meih nyei bou mbuo yaac dingc zoux dorngc wuov dauh nyei zuiz
1Kings8:33 “Meih nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:34 tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh muangx yaac guangc meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei zuiz
1Kings8:35 “Meih nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:36 tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh muangx haiz yaac guangc meih nyei bou mbuo
1Kings8:37 “Se gorngv yiem naaiv norm deic-bung buangh domh ngorc
1Kings8:38 tov muangx ninh mbuo daux gaux nyei waac. Se gorngv haaix dauh mienh fai meih nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:39 tov yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
1Kings8:40 Hnangv naaic weic bun ninh mbuo yiem meih ceix bun yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyei deic-bung yietc liuz gamh nziex meih
1Kings8:41 “Gorngv taux ganh fingx mienh
1Kings8:42 (weic zuqc maaih mienh duqv haiz taux meih hlo haic nyei mengh caux meih nyei buoz nyei domh qaqv caux meih sung buoz cuotv zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic)
1Kings8:43 Tov yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
1Kings8:44 “Meih nyei baeqc fingx cuotv mingh caux ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv mborqv jaax
1Kings8:45 tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh muangx ninh mbuo daux gaux jouh nyei waac
1Kings8:46 “Meih nyei baeqc fingx haaix zanc baamz zuiz dorngc meih
1Kings8:47 se gorngv yiem ninh mbuo zuqc caangv mingh wuov norm deic-bung ninh mbuo goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz
1Kings8:48 se gorngv ninh mbuo yiem caangv ninh mbuo wuov deix win-wangv nyei deic-bung buangv hnyouv buangv eix nzuonx daaih lorz meih
1Kings8:49 tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
1Kings8:50 Tov guangc meih nyei mienh nyei zuiz
1Kings8:51 weic zuqc ninh mbuo zoux meih nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:52 “Tov Ziouv nungx m'zing mangc jienv meih nyei bou
1Kings8:53 O Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac
1Kings8:54 Saa^lo^morn gueic njiec Ziouv nyei ziec-dorngh nza'hmien sung buoz hungx jienv lungh daux gaux
1Kings8:55 souv jienv longc qiex hlo nyei buang waac bun gapv zunv nyei yietc zuangx I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh gorngv
1Kings8:56 “Ceng Ziouv
1Kings8:57 Tov Ziouv
1Kings8:58 Tov bun yie mbuo nyei hnyouv guei ninh
1Kings8:59 Tov bun yie daux gaux jouh Ziouv naaiv deix waac hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz yiem nitv Ziouv fatv. Yaac tov ninh korv-lienh ninh nyei baeqc fingx
1Kings8:60 weic bun lungh ndiev maanc fingx haih hiuv duqv Ziouv se Tin-Hungh. Maiv maaih ganh dauh aqv.
1Kings8:61 Hnangv naaic meih mbuo horpc zuqc ziepc zuoqv hnyouv gan Ziouv
1Kings8:62 Hungh diex caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien fongc horc ziec.
1Kings8:63 Saa^lo^morn fongc horc ziec bun Ziouv weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv maaih i waanc i cin dauh ngongh caux ziepc nyeic waanc dauh yungh caux ba'gi yungh. Hungh diex caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc zorqv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv fungx bun Ziouv.
1Kings8:64 Dongh wuov hnoi hungh diex zorqv laatc gu'nyuoz
1Kings8:65 Wuov zanc Saa^lo^morn caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yiem wuov jiex zipv. Gapv zunv nyei mienh camv! haic aqv. Maaih yiem Le^mbo Haamatv taux I^yipv Ndoqv daaih nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo yiem Ziouv
1Kings8:66 Nqa'haav wuov hnoi hungh diex mbuox baeqc fingx nzuonx. Ninh mbuo buang waac bun hungh diex ziouc nzuonx biauv
1Kings9:1 Saa^lo^morn ceix ziangx zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc
1Kings9:2 Nqa'haav Ziouv aengx hinc bun ninh buatc da'nyeic nzunc
1Kings9:3 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
1Kings9:4 “Meih ganh aeqv
1Kings9:5 yie ziouc liepc wuonv meih nyei hungh weic bun meih nyei zeiv-fun yietc liuz gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Kings9:6 “Mv baac se gorngv meih fai meih nyei zeiv-fun guangc
1Kings9:7 yie ziouc zorqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh pai guangc
1Kings9:8 Naaiv norm biauv oix mbaang njiec benx ga'naaiv-ndui. Jiex jauv nyei mienh ziouc mbuoqc horngh haic yaac jatv jienv gorngv
1Kings9:9 Mienh ziouc dau
1Kings9:10 Saa^lo^morn longc nyic ziepc hnyangx ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc
1Kings9:11 ninh ziouc zorqv nyic ziepc norm Gaa^li^li nyei zingh bun Tailaqv nyei hungh
1Kings9:12 Mv baac Hilaam yiem Tailaqv cuotv mingh mangc Saa^lo^morn bun ninh wuov deix zingh
1Kings9:13 Ninh ziouc gorngv
1Kings9:14 Hilaam fungx bun Saa^lo^morn nyei jiem yietc zungv maaih i cin feix baeqv cietv ziepc luoqc joih.
1Kings9:15 Daaux naaiv mingh gorngv Saa^lo^morn Hungh aapv mienh zoux gong nyei jauv. Ninh aapv mienh ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc caux Minlo caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zingh laatc caux Haaso caux Me^gitc^ndo caux Gese.
1Kings9:16 (I^yipv nyei Faalo Hungh daaih mborqv yaac caangv duqv Gese Zingh. Ninh longc douz buov yaac daix nzengc yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei Kaa^naa^an Mienh. Nqa'haav bungx ninh nyei sieqv bun Saa^lo^morn longc zoux auv wuov zanc
1Kings9:17 Saa^lo^morn ziouc siang-ceix jiez Gese.) Ninh yaac ceix wuov ndiev wuov norm Mbetc Holon
1Kings9:18 liemh Mbaa^aa^latv caux yiem Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung-Huaang nyei Taamaa Zingh.
1Kings9:19 Ninh mbuo yaac ceix ninh siou ga'naaiv nyei zingh caux siou mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie nyei zingh yaac weic ninh nyei maaz
1Kings9:20 Zengc njiec nyei Aa^mo^lai Mienh
1Kings9:21 se dongh I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv haih mietc maiv nzengc wuov deix mienh nyei zeiv-fun
1Kings9:22 Mv baac Saa^lo^morn maiv bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc zoux nouh. Ninh mbuo zoux ninh nyei baeng
1Kings9:23 Maaih hmz baeqv hmz ziepc dauh domh jien gunv gong-mienh zoux Saa^lo^morn nyei nyungc-nyungc gong.
1Kings9:24 Faalo nyei sieqv yiem Ndaawitv nyei Zingh faaux daaih yiem Saa^lo^morn weic ninh ceix wuov norm hungh dinc. Nqa'haav Saa^lo^morn ceix Minlo.
1Kings9:25 Saa^lo^morn yietc hnyangx buo nzunc yiem ninh ceix wuov norm ziec-dorngh fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh yaac yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien buov hung. Hnangv naaic ninh ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gong zoux ziangx nzengc.
1Kings9:26 Saa^lo^morn Hungh yaac yiem E^si^on Ge^mbe
1Kings9:27 Hilaam paaiv deix ninh ganh nyei nzangv-nouh
1Kings9:28 Ninh mbuo nzaeng nzangv mingh taux Ofi
1Kings10:1 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac haiz gorngv Saa^lo^morn weic Ziouv duqv nyei mengh dauh
1Kings10:2 Hungh maac caux yietc domh guanh ninh nyei mienh daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
1Kings10:3 Saa^lo^morn dau ninh nyei yietc zungv waac. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc aqc jiex ndaangc hungh diex maiv haih gorngv mengh bun ninh muangx.
1Kings10:4 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac buatc Saa^lo^morn maaih nyei yietc zungv cong-mengh caux ninh ceix nyei hungh dinc
1Kings10:5 yaac buatc yiem ninh nyei hnaangx-dieh nyei nyanc hopv
1Kings10:6 Ninh gorngv mbuox hungh diex
1Kings10:7 Mv baac yie maiv sienx wuov deix waac taux yie daaih
1Kings10:8 Meih nyei yietc zungv mienh duqv orn-lorqc. Zanc-zanc souv jienv meih nyei nza'hmien muangx meih nyei cong-mengh waac wuov deix jien yaac duqv orn-lorqc.
1Kings10:9 Ceng Ziouv
1Kings10:10 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac zorqv i cin feix baeqv cietv ziepc luoqc joih jiem caux ndaang nyei ga'naaiv camv caux jaaix nyei la'bieiv-nzueic jiu bun Saa^lo^morn Hungh. Fungx bun hungh diex naaiv deix ndaang nyei ga'naaiv nqa'haav hingv maiv maaih haaix dauh fungx ndongc naaiv dauh hungh maac fungx nyei camv.
1Kings10:11 Cuotv liuz naaiv deix
1Kings10:12 Hungh diex longc hung ndiangx zoux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc nyei gungh gangc ndiangx yaac weic baaux nzung nyei mienh zoux i nyungc daanh baah. Taux ih jaax hnoi maiv maaih haaix dauh dorh hung ndiangx ndongc naaiv camv bieqc guoqv fai buatc hung ndiangx ndongc naaiv camv.
1Kings10:13 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac oix nyei caux tov nyei yietc zungv Saa^lo^morn jiu bun ninh
1Kings10:14 Mouz hnyangx Saa^lo^morn Hungh duqv nyei jiem yietc zungv maaih yietc waanc biei cin nyic baeqv faah ziepc betv joih.
1Kings10:15 Naaiv maiv funx loz-benv caux maaiz maaic nyei mienh fungx bieqc nyei nzou-zinh fai Aa^laa^mbie Deic-Bung nyei yietc zungv hungh diex caux I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei saengv-ziouv fungx bieqc nyei jiem.
1Kings10:16 Saa^lo^morn Hungh daav nyic baeqv norm domh torngv-baaih. Mouz norm longc i joih cietv lungz jiem.
1Kings10:17 Ninh aengx daav faam-baeqv norm torngv-baaih gauh faix
1Kings10:18 Ninh longc zaangz-nyaah zoux norm domh weic yaac longc zien jiex nyei jiem buang jienv.
1Kings10:19 Naaiv norm weic maaih juqv kang tei. Weic nyei nqa'haav maengx gu'nguaaic junh nyei. Weic nyei ga'hlen maaih i bung lorngx buoz nyei dorngx. Lorngx buoz nyei dorngx yietc bung maaih dauh sienh souv ga'hlen.
1Kings10:20 Naaiv deix juqv kang tei
1Kings10:21 Saa^lo^morn Hungh nyei yietc zungv zaanv longc jiem zoux daaih. Le^mbaa^norn Gemh wuov norm biauv nyei jaa-dorngx yaac longc jiem zoux daaih. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc longc nyaanh zoux
1Kings10:22 Hungh diex maaih guanh nzangv caux Hilaam nyei nzangv yietc hnyangx buo nzunc tor jienv jiem
1Kings10:23 Beiv lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex
1Kings10:24 Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh oix daaih lorz Saa^lo^morn
1Kings10:25 Daaih nyei mienh yietc zungv dorh jienv zingh nyeic daaih
1Kings10:26 Saa^lo^morn siou mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux maaz. Ninh maaih yietc cin feix baeqv norm mborqv jaax maaz-cie yaac maaih yietc waanc i cin dauh maaz. Maaz caux maaz-cie ninh an jienv siou mborqv jaax cie nyei zingh. Yaac maaih deix caux ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem.
1Kings10:27 Hungh diex yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem bun nyaanh camv
1Kings10:28 Saa^lo^morn nyei maaz se yiem I^yipv caux Ku^e dorh daaih. Hungh diex nyei saeng-eix mienh ziux dingc nyei jaax-zinh maaiz Ku^e nyei maaz.
1Kings10:29 Yiem I^yipv maaiz daaih nyei mborqv jaax cie yietc norm biei joih ziepc feix lungz nyaanh. Yietc dauh maaz yietc joih nyic lungz. Ninh mbuo yaac maaic mingh bun Hitv^tai Mienh caux Silie nyei zuangx hungh diex.
1Kings11:1 Saa^lo^morn hnamv haic ganh fingx mienh nyei sieqv camv haic. Cuotv liuz Faalo Hungh nyei sieqv ninh longc Mo^apc Mienh
1Kings11:2 Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Kings11:3 Ninh longc cietv baeqv dauh hungh sieqv zoux auv
1Kings11:4 Saa^lo^morn hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei ziangh hoc
1Kings11:5 Saa^lo^morn gan Sai^ndorn Mienh nyei Atc^taa^lotv zienh nyeiz
1Kings11:6 Hnangv naaic
1Kings11:7 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem dong bung maengx nyei mbong gu'nguaaic
1Kings11:8 Ninh aengx fih hnangv nyei zoux weic bun ninh nyei yietc zungv ganh fingx auv haih buov hung fongc horc ga'naaiv ziec ninh mbuo nyei zienh.
1Kings11:9 Ziouv qiex jiez haic Saa^lo^morn
1Kings11:10 Maiv gunv Ziouv hatc Saa^lo^morn maiv dungx gan nyiec nyei zienh
1Kings11:11 Weic naaiv Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saa^lo^morn. “Laaix meih hnangv naaiv nor hnamv
1Kings11:12 Mv baac weic meih nyei die
1Kings11:13 Mv baac yie maiv zorqv ziangh norm guoqv betv cuotv. Weic yie nyei bou
1Kings11:14 Ziouv bun dauh E^ndom Mienh
1Kings11:15 Zinh ndaangc Ndaawitv yiem E^ndom mborqv jaax
1Kings11:16 Yo^aapc caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yiem naaic juqv hlaax nyieqc zuov taux ninh mbuo daix nzengc E^ndom Mienh nyei yietc zungv m'jangc dorn.
1Kings11:17 Wuov zanc Haa^ndatc corc faix nyei. Ninh caux deix E^ndom Mienh
1Kings11:18 Ninh mbuo yiem Mi^ndien cuotv jauv mingh taux Baalaan. Yiem Baalaan ninh mbuo aengx dorh deix mienh mingh taux I^yipv
1Kings11:19 Haa^ndatc horpc Faalo nyei hnyouv haic
1Kings11:20 Taa^be^netv nyei nziez yungz dauh dorn bun Haa^ndatc. Naaiv dauh dorn nyei mbuox heuc Ge^nu^mbatc. Taa^be^netv bun Ge^nu^mbatc yiem Faalo nyei hungh dinc guangc nyorx. Ninh ziouc caux Faalo ganh nyei dorn yiem wuov.
1Kings11:21 Yiem gau I^yipv Deic-Bung
1Kings11:22 Faalo naaic gaax
1Kings11:23 Tin-Hungh aengx bun dauh mienh
1Kings11:24 Ndaawitv mborqv baaic
1Kings11:25 Yiem Saa^lo^morn ziangh jienv nyei hnoi-nyieqc
1Kings11:26 Aengx maaih Ne^mbatc nyei dorn
1Kings11:27 Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv Ye^lo^mbo^am hnangv haaix nor ngaengc hungh diex nyei jauv-louc. Saa^lo^morn zorc Minlo yaac zorc ninh nyei die
1Kings11:28 Ye^lo^mbo^am se maaih banh zeic nyei mienh. Saa^lo^morn buatc naaiv dauh hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei m'jangc dorn
1Kings11:29 Maaih hnoi Ye^lo^mbo^am yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem cuotv mingh. Yiem Silo nyei douc waac mienh
1Kings11:30 Aa^hi^yaa zorqv ninh ganh zuqv jienv nyei siang-lui betv zoux ziepc nyeic kuaaiv.
1Kings11:31 Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox Ye^lo^mbo^am
1Kings11:32 Mv baac weic yie nyei bou
1Kings11:33 Yie hnangv naaiv zoux weic zuqc ninh guangc yie mingh zaangc Sai^ndorn Mienh nyei Atc^taa^lotv zienh nyeiz
1Kings11:34 “+‘Mv baac yie maiv zorqv zuangx guoqv yiem Saa^lo^morn nyei buoz-ndiev cuotv. Yie weic yie ginv daaih nyei bou
1Kings11:35 Yie oix zorqv guoqv yiem ninh nyei dorn nyei buoz-ndiev cuotv yaac zorqv ziepc fingx jiu bun meih.
1Kings11:36 Yie oix jiu yietc fingx bun ninh nyei dorn weic bun yie nyei bou
1Kings11:37 Ye^lo^mbo^am aac
1Kings11:38 Se gorngv meih muangx yie hatc meih nyei yietc zungv waac yaac yangh yie nyei doz-leiz
1Kings11:39 Laaix Saa^lo^morn nyei zuiz
1Kings11:40 Saa^lo^morn lorz qangx daix Ye^lo^mbo^am
1Kings11:41 Cuotv liuz naaiv deix sic
1Kings11:42 Saa^lo^morn yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh feix ziepc hnyangx.
1Kings11:43 Saa^lo^morn guei seix mi'aqv
1Kings12:1 Le^hox^mbo^am mingh Sekem Zingh weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mingh Sekem liepc ninh zoux hungh.
1Kings12:2 (Wuov zanc Ne^mbatc nyei dorn
1Kings12:3 Zuangx mienh ziouc bun mienh mingh heuc Ye^lo^mbo^am daaih. Ye^lo^mbo^am caux yietc zuangx gapv zunv nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh lorz Le^hox^mbo^am. Ninh mbuo gorngv
1Kings12:4 “Meih nyei die
1Kings12:5 Le^hox^mbo^am gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
1Kings12:6 Le^hox^mbo^am ziouc caux zinh ndaangc ninh nyei die
1Kings12:7 “Meih mbuo tengx yie hnamv gaax
1Kings12:8 Mv baac Le^hox^mbo^am maiv longc naaiv deix mienh gox mienh caangh laangh daaih nyei waac. Ninh mingh lorz caux ninh hlo daaih wuov baan mienh
1Kings12:9 Le^hox^mbo^am naaic ninh mbuo
1Kings12:10 Caux ninh hlo daaih naaiv deix mienh lunx mienh gorngv
1Kings12:11 Yie nyei die bun meih mbuo gaaz ndiangx-gaaz hniev. Yie zungv oix bun meih mbuo gauh hniev. Yie nyei die longc biaav-bin mborqv meih mbuo. Yie oix longc ziepc nyeic ndaangh bin mborqv meih mbuo.’+”
1Kings12:12 Jiex liuz buo hnoi
1Kings12:13 Hungh diex longc waac ciouv nyei dau baeqc fingx. Ninh maiv longc wuov deix mienh gox mienh caangh laangh nyei waac.
1Kings12:14 Ninh longc mienh lunx mienh caangh laangh nyei za'eix. Ninh gorngv
1Kings12:15 Hungh diex ziouc maiv muangx baeqc fingx tov nyei waac
1Kings12:16 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh buatc hungh diex maiv muangx ninh mbuo
1Kings12:17 Mv baac Le^hox^mbo^am corc gunv yiem Yu^ndaa Deic nyei zingh nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
1Kings12:18 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh paaiv gunv aapv zoux gong nyei mienh wuov dauh Aa^ndo^ni^lam mingh I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov
1Kings12:19 Hnangv naaic
1Kings12:20 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh haiz gorngv Ye^lo^mbo^am yiem I^yipv nzuonx daaih
1Kings12:21 Le^hox^mbo^am yietv nzuonx taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
1Kings12:22 Mv baac Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
1Kings12:23 “Oix zuqc mbuox Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
1Kings12:24 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv. ‘Maiv dungx mingh caux meih nyei gorx-youz
1Kings12:25 Ye^lo^mbo^am yiem E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx ceix Sekem Zingh yaac yiem jienv wuov. Ninh aengx cuotv wuov norm dorngx mingh ceix Be^ni^en.
1Kings12:26 Ye^lo^mbo^am yiem hnyouv hnamv
1Kings12:27 Se gorngv naaiv deix mienh mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv fongc horc ziec
1Kings12:28 Hungh diex ziouc caangh laangh dingc. Ninh zoux i dauh jiem-ngongh dorn aengx gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
1Kings12:29 Ye^lo^mbo^am ziouc zorqv dauh jiem-ngongh dorn an Mbetc^en Zingh
1Kings12:30 Naaiv yaac benx zuiz mi'aqv
1Kings12:31 Ye^lo^mbo^am yaac yiem ziex norm hlang nyei dorngx ceix zaangc zienh nyei biauv. Yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx ninh orn ziex nyungc mienh zoux sai mienh
1Kings12:32 Ye^lo^mbo^am aengx dingc betv hlaax ziepc hmz weic benx zipv hnangv yiem Yu^ndaa jiex nyei zipv nor. Ninh yaac fongc horc ga'naaiv yiem ziec-dorngh ziec. Ninh yiem Mbetc^en hnangv naaiv nor zoux
1Kings12:33 Betv hlaax ziepc hmz wuov hnoi
1Kings13:1 Maaih dauh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziux Ziouv nyei waac cuotv mingh taux Mbetc^en. Wuov zanc Ye^lo^mbo^am souv jienv wuov ziec-dorngh weic buov hung.
1Kings13:2 Tin-Hungh nyei mienh longc Ziouv nyei waac heuc jienv gorngv ziec-dorngh. Ninh gorngv
1Kings13:3 Dongh naaic hnoi Tin-Hungh nyei mienh bun norm jangx-hoc. Ninh gorngv
1Kings13:4 Ye^lo^mbo^am Hungh haiz Tin-Hungh nyei mienh heuc jienv gorngv Mbetc^en nyei ziec-dorngh wuov deix waac
1Kings13:5 Ziec-dorngh yaac mbaaix mi'aqv. Ziec-dorngh nyei saaiv yaac zuqc dox cuotv hnangv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziux Ziouv nyei waac gorngv nyei jangx-hoc.
1Kings13:6 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
1Kings13:7 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
1Kings13:8 Mv baac Tin-Hungh nyei mienh dau hungh diex
1Kings13:9 weic zuqc maaih Ziouv nyei waac hatc yie
1Kings13:10 Hnangv naaic Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yangh ganh diuh jauv nzuonx. Maiv yangh ninh daaih Mbetc^en wuov diuh jauv nzuonx.
1Kings13:11 Wuov zanc maaih dauh hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei douc waac mienh yiem Mbetc^en. Ninh nyei dorn zorqv dongh wuov hnoi wuov dauh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yiem Mbetc^en zoux nyei caux gorngv nyei yietc zungv sic. Ninh caux hungh diex gorngv nyei waac ninh mbuo yaac gorngv nzengc mbuox ninh mbuo nyei die.
1Kings13:12 Ninh mbuo nyei die naaic gaax
1Kings13:13 Ninh ziouc mbuox ninh nyei dorn
1Kings13:14 ziouc geh jienv mingh zunc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh. Zunc zaaic
1Kings13:15 Gox wuov dauh douc waac mienh mbuox ninh
1Kings13:16 Tin-Hungh nyei mienh dau
1Kings13:17 Weic zuqc maaih Ziouv nyei waac mbuox yie
1Kings13:18 Gox wuov dauh douc waac mienh gorngv
1Kings13:19 Naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziouc caux ninh nzuonx biauv nyanc hnaangx
1Kings13:20 Ninh mbuo zueiz jienv hnaangx-dieh nyei ziangh hoc
1Kings13:21 Ninh ziouc heuc jienv gorngv mbuox yiem Yu^ndaa daaih wuov dauh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
1Kings13:22 Meih nzuonx daaih nyanc hnaangx
1Kings13:23 Nyanc liuz hopv liuz
1Kings13:24 Gan jauv mingh wuov zanc
1Kings13:25 Maaih deix mienh jiex wuov
1Kings13:26 Dorh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh nzuonx wuov dauh douc waac mienh haiz naaiv deix sic ninh gorngv
1Kings13:27 Douc waac mienh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei dorn
1Kings13:28 Ninh ziouc mingh
1Kings13:29 Douc waac mienh ziouc zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh nyei sei daapv jienv lorh
1Kings13:30 Ninh zangx jienv ninh ganh nyei zouv. Ninh mbuo nzauh nyiemv ninh
1Kings13:31 Zangx liuz
1Kings13:32 Weic zuqc ninh longc Ziouv nyei waac heuc jienv gorngv Mbetc^en nyei ziec-dorngh caux Saa^maa^lie nyei norm-norm zingh yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx
1Kings13:33 Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz mv baac Ye^lo^mbo^am maiv guangc ninh zoux nyei waaic sic. Yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx ninh orn mienh yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx zoux sai mienh. Haaix dauh maaih hnyouv zoux sai mienh
1Kings13:34 Hnangv naaiv zoux benx zuiz hoic Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei douh zong zuqc mietc
1Kings14:1 Wuov zanc Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei dorn
1Kings14:2 Ye^lo^mbo^am gorngv mbuox ninh nyei auv
1Kings14:3 Dorh ziepc norm njuov caux deix njuov-gaam caux baengh mueiz-dorngh mingh bun ninh
1Kings14:4 Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei auv ziouc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Ninh mingh Silo Zingh
1Kings14:5 Ziouv jaa-ndaangc mbuox Aa^hi^yaa
1Kings14:6 Mv baac taux gaengh ndaangc wuov zanc
1Kings14:7 Meih nzuonx mingh mbuox Ye^lo^mbo^am
1Kings14:8 Yie betv Ndaawitv nyei douh zong gunv nyei guoqv cuotv jiu bun meih. Mv baac meih maiv hnangv yie nyei bou
1Kings14:9 Meih zoux gauh waaic jiex yiem ndaangc meih wuov deix yietc zungv. Meih weic meih ganh liepc nyiec nyei zienh nyei miuc-fangx
1Kings14:10 “+‘Weic naaiv yie oix bun Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei douh zong zuqc zeqc naanc yaac zorqv Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei dauh dauh m'jangc dorn
1Kings14:11 Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei mienh
1Kings14:12 “Meih ganh gunv nzuonx aqv. Meih nyei zaux yietv caaiv bieqc zingh
1Kings14:13 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc weic ninh nzauh nyiemv yaac dorh ninh mingh zangx. Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei yietc zungv mienh
1Kings14:14 “Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Ziouv oix weic ninh ganh liepc dauh hungh gunv I^saa^laa^en. Ih hnoi naaiv dauh hungh ziouc pai guangc Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei douh zong. Wuov hnoi za'gengh taux aqv.
1Kings14:15 Ziouv oix mborqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Kings14:16 Laaix Ye^lo^mbo^am baamz zuiz yaac dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux jienv baamz zuiz
1Kings14:17 Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei auv ziouc jiez sin nzuonx taux Ti^laa^saa Zingh. Yietv laamx bieqc gaengh
1Kings14:18 Ninh mbuo yaac dorh mingh zangx. I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh weic ninh nzauh nyiemv hnangv Ziouv longc ninh nyei bou wuov dauh douc waac mienh gorngv nor.
1Kings14:19 Ye^lo^mbo^am Hungh zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
1Kings14:20 Ye^lo^mbo^am zoux hungh nyic ziepc nyeic hnyangx
1Kings14:21 Saa^lo^morn nyei dorn
1Kings14:22 Ei Ziouv mangc
1Kings14:23 Ninh mbuo yiem norm-norm mbong gu'nguaaic caux diuh diuh domh ndiangx ga'ndiev
1Kings14:24 Deic-bung gu'nyuoz yaac maaih m'jangc dorn yiem zaangc zienh nyei dorngx zoux maaic buonv-sin nyei mienh. Baeqc fingx zoux zinh ndaangc Ziouv zunc cuotv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh zoux yietc zungv gamh nziev nyei sic.
1Kings14:25 Ye^lo^mbo^am zoux hungh da'hmz hnyangx wuov hnyangx
1Kings14:26 Ninh zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz caux hungh dinc gu'nyuoz yietc zungv jaaix nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh zorqv nyungc-nyungc
1Kings14:27 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh ziouc longc dongh siqv zoux torngv-baaih div yaac jiu bun goux hungh dinc zuov gaengh nyei baeng-bieiv.
1Kings14:28 Hungh diex haaix zanc bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
1Kings14:29 Le^hox^mbo^am gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
1Kings14:30 Le^hox^mbo^am caux Ye^lo^mbo^am zanc-zanc mborqv jaax.
1Kings14:31 Le^hox^mbo^am guei seix mi'aqv
1Kings15:1 Ne^mbatc nyei dorn
1Kings15:2 Ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv buo hnyangx. Ninh nyei maa nyei mbuox heuc Maa^aa^kaa
1Kings15:3 Aa^mbi^yam baamz zuiz hnangv ninh nyei die baamz nyei yietc zungv zuiz. Ninh maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun Ziouv
1Kings15:4 Mv baac weic Ndaawitv
1Kings15:5 weic zuqc ziux Ziouv mangc

1Kings15:11 Ziux Ziouv buatc
1Kings15:12 Yiem deic-bung zaangc zienh nyei dorngx maaic buonv-sin nyei m'jangc dorn ninh zunc cuotv mi'aqv. Ninh yaac zorqv ninh nyei die zoux daaih nyei miuc-fangx guangc nzengc.
1Kings15:13 Ninh yaac tuix ninh nyei gux nyei mengh hoc
1Kings15:14 Mv baac yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx ninh maiv zorqv nqoi. Maiv gunv hnangv naaiv
1Kings15:15 Ninh zorqv ninh nyei die weic jaauv sung laengz ngaengc waac nyei ga'naaiv caux ninh ganh jaauv sung laengz ngaengc waac nyei ga'naaiv caux jiem nyaanh caux jaa-dorngx
1Kings15:16 Yiem Aasaax caux I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
1Kings15:17 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
1Kings15:18 Aasaax ziouc zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc zengc njiec nyei jiem nyaanh yaac paaiv ninh nyei jien mingh taux Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh
1Kings15:19 Ninh gorngv
1Kings15:20 Mben Haa^ndatc muangx Aasaax Hungh nyei waac
1Kings15:21 Mbaa^aa^qaa haiz naaiv deix sic cuotv
1Kings15:22 Aasaax ziouc njiec lingc hatc Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung nyei zuangx mienh mingh bienh Mbaa^aa^qaa longc ceix Laamaa wuov deix la'bieiv caux ndiangx mingh. Maiv maaih haaix dauh maiv zuqc tengx zoux. Aasaax Hungh longc naaiv deix la'bieiv caux ndiangx ceix yiem Mben^yaa^min nyei Ge^mbaa caux Mitv^baa Zingh.
1Kings15:23 Aasaax gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
1Kings15:24 Aasaax ziouc guei seix mi'aqv

1Kings16:1 Ziouv nyei waac daaih taux Haa^naa^ni nyei dorn

1Kings16:10 Simx^li bieqc mingh zorqv ninh daix daic. Wuov zanc Aasaax zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh nyic ziepc cietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx. Nqa'haav Simx^li faaux weic zoux hungh div Elaa.
1Kings16:11 Simx^li yietv zueiz weic gunv wuov zanc
1Kings16:12 Simx^li ziouc mietc nzengc Mbaa^aa^qaa nyei douh zong ziux Ziouv longc douc waac mienh
1Kings16:13 Naaiv se laaix Mbaa^aa^qaa caux ninh nyei dorn
1Kings16:14 Yiem Elaa gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
1Kings16:15 Yiem Aasaax zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh nyic ziepc cietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
1Kings16:16 Yiem ciangv nyei mienh haiz gorngv Simx^li daav za'eix ngaengc hungh diex yaac daix ninh mi'aqv. Dongh wuov hnoi yiem wuov ciangv nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc zungv ziouc orn domh baeng-bieiv
1Kings16:17 Omli caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc cuotv Gipc^mbe^ton mingh weih jienv oix mborqv Ti^laa^saa.
1Kings16:18 Simx^li buatc zingh zuqc caangv mi'aqv
1Kings16:19 laaix ninh baamz nyei zuiz. Ziux Ziouv mangc ninh zoux waaic sic
1Kings16:20 Yiem Simx^li gunv nyei ziangh hoc

1Kings16:22 Mv baac gan jienv Omli wuov guanh hingh jiex gan Ginatv nyei dorn
1Kings16:23 Yiem Aasaax zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh faah ziepc yietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx

1Kings17:4 Meih ziouc duqv hopv ndoqv nyei wuom. Yie yaac paaiv norqc aa yiem naaic uix meih.”
1Kings17:5 E^li^yaa ziouc ei jienv Ziouv nyei waac zoux. Ninh mingh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx
1Kings17:6 Lungh ndorm caux lungh maanz-hmuangx norqc aa dorh njuov caux orv daaih bun ninh nyanc. Ninh yaac hopv ndoqv nyei wuom.

1Kings18:19 Ih zanc meih oix zuqc heuc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gapv zunv yiem Kaanmen Mbong buangh yie. Yaac oix zuqc dorh Mbaa^an zienh nyei feix baeqv hmz ziepc dauh douc waac mienh caux Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei feix baeqv dauh
1Kings18:20 Aa^hapc bun waac mingh taux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yaac bun yietc zungv douc waac mienh gapv zunv yiem Kaanmen Mbong.

1Kings18:22 E^li^yaa gorngv mbuox mienh
1Kings18:23 Tov dorh i dauh ngongh gouv daaih bun yie mbuo. Bun Mbaa^an nyei douc waac mienh ginv dauh yaac hngaqv benx yietc nqanx yietc nqanx
1Kings18:24 Meih mbuo heuc meih mbuo nyei zienh nyei mbuox

1Kings18:27 Ziangx lungh aanx
1Kings18:28 Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc gauh mbui deix. Ninh mbuo yaac ei jienv ninh mbuo nyei leiz longc nzuqc caux cang-nangv guetv ninh mbuo nyei sin bun nziaamv liouc cuotv.
1Kings18:29 Njiec aanx ninh mbuo njoh njoh njaaiz-njaaiz nyei heuc jienv mingh taux lungh maanz-hmuangx
1Kings18:30 E^li^yaa gorngv mbuox baeqc fingx
1Kings18:31 E^li^yaa zorqv ziepc nyeic norm la'bieiv ziux Yaakopv nyei dorn bun njiec nyei fingx. Se dongh Ziouv gorngv mbuox naaiv dauh Yaakopv
1Kings18:32 E^li^yaa longc naaiv deix la'bieiv weic Ziouv nyei mengh ceix norm ziec-dorngh. Ninh aengx wetv zuonx huing gormx ziec-dorngh gaux an ziepc hmz gorngc wuom.
1Kings18:33 Ninh zorqv zaangh an jienv ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic
1Kings18:34 Ninh yaac gorngv
1Kings18:35 Wuom ziouc liouc njiec ziec-dorngh. Liemh zuonx maaih wuom buangv nzengc.
1Kings18:36 Taux lungh maanz-hmuangx ziec nyei ziangh hoc
1Kings18:37 Tov meih dau yie. O Ziouv aah! Tov dau yie weic bun naaiv deix mienh hiuv duqv meih
1Kings18:38 Ziouv ziouc bun douz njiec daaih buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux zaangh caux la'bieiv caux nie qui nzengc
1Kings18:39 Zuangx baeqc fingx buatc liuz naaiv deix sic

1Kings18:43 Ninh mbuox ninh nyei bou

1Kings18:45 Aav deix dangh hnangv lungh hmuangx
1Kings18:46 Ziouv nyei qaqv njiec E^li^yaa. Ninh ziouc baeng domh lui faaux fapv jienv houx-hlaang
1Kings19:1 Aa^hapc zorqv E^li^yaa zoux nyei yietc zungv sic

1Kings19:3 E^li^yaa gamh nziex haic ziouc cuotv jauv biaux maengc. Ninh mingh taux Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung nyei Mbe^e^qe^mbaa
1Kings19:4 Mv baac ninh ganh bieqc deic-bung-huaang yangh yietc hnoi nyei jauv ziouc zueiz njiec yietc diuh ndiangx-gorn tov Tin-Hungh bun ninh daic. Ninh daux gaux gorngv
1Kings19:5 Ninh ziouc bueix njiec ndiangx ga'ndiev m'njormh aqv. Liemh zeih maaih dauh fin-mienh daaih maan jienv ninh gorngv
1Kings19:6 Ninh mangc ziouc buatc yiem ninh nyei m'nqorngv ga'hlen maaih norm njuov ziqv jienv la'bieiv-jorm gu'nguaaic
1Kings19:7 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh aengx daaih da'nyeic nzunc ziouc maan jienv ninh yaac gorngv
1Kings19:8 E^li^yaa ziouc jiez sin nyanc yaac hopv. Naaiv deix nyanc hopv bun ninh maaih qaqv yangh feix ziepc hnoi feix ziepc muonz taux Holepv

1Kings19:14 Ninh gorngv

1Kings20:1 Silie Guoqv nyei hungh
1Kings20:2 Ninh paaiv douc fienx mienh bieqc zingh mingh mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
1Kings20:3 ‘Meih nyei jiem nyaanh benx yie nyei. Meih nyei gauh longx jiex nyei auv caux fu'jueiv yaac benx yie nyei.’+”

1Kings20:10 Mben Haa^ndatc aengx bun waac mingh mbuox Aa^hapc
1Kings20:11 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh dau
1Kings20:12 Mben Haa^ndatc caux zuangx hungh diex yiem ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh hopv diuv wuov zanc
1Kings20:13 Maaih dauh douc waac mienh daaih lorz I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei hungh
1Kings20:14 Aa^hapc naaic
1Kings20:15 Hungh diex ziouc diuc nzoih dauh dauh saengv-ziouv nyei mienh lunx mienh. Yietc zungv maaih nyic baeqv faah ziepc nyeic dauh. Nqa'haav aengx diuc nzoih I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx baeng
1Kings20:16 Ziangx lungh aanx ninh mbuo cuotv zingh mingh mborqv jaax doix Mben Haa^ndatc caux tengx ninh wuov deix faah ziepc nyeic dauh hungh diex yiem ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh hopv gau diuv oix nquin aqv.
1Kings20:17 Saengv-ziouv nyei mienh lunx mienh cuotv zingh ndaangc. Mben Haa^ndatc paaiv mienh cuotv mingh zaah deic-bung. Ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih gorngv
1Kings20:18 Mben Haa^ndatc gorngv
1Kings20:19 Naaiv deix mienh ziouc cuotv zingh mingh
1Kings20:20 Gorqv-mienh daix caux gorqv-mienh mborqv jaax wuov deix win-wangv. Silie Mienh biaux
1Kings20:21 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh cuotv zingh mingh caangv maaz caux mborqv jaax nyei cie yaac daix Silie Mienh camv haic.
1Kings20:22 Nqa'haav wuov dauh douc waac mienh daaih lorz I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei hungh gorngv
1Kings20:23 Silie nyei hungh
1Kings20:24 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Tov zorqv yietc zungv hungh diex cuotv
1Kings20:25 Meih oix zuqc liepc baeng-guanh ndongc zinh ndaangc daic wuov deix camv
1Kings20:26 Taux da'nyeic hnyangx nyei cun-gen hnoi
1Kings20:27 I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac diuc nzoih baeng
1Kings20:28 Tin-Hungh nyei mienh daaih mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
1Kings20:29 I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Silie Mienh nyei ciangv doix-ngaanc. Ninh mbuo yiem ciangv siec hnoi. Taux siec hnoi wuov hnoi ninh mbuo ziouc cuotv mingh mborqv jaax aqv. Nduqc hnoi hnangv I^saa^laa^en Mienh daix yietc sinx dauh Silie Mienh nyei yangh jauv baeng.
1Kings20:30 Silie Mienh zengc njiec nyei baeng biaux bieqc Aafekv Zingh. Zingh laatc mbaang njiec
1Kings20:31 Ninh nyei jien gorngv mbuox ninh
1Kings20:32 Ninh mbuo ziouc sai jienv la'maah ndie-cou
1Kings20:33 Naaiv deix mienh haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ziouc siepv-siepv nyei zorqv ninh nyei waac gorngv
1Kings20:34 Mben Haa^ndatc gorngv
1Kings20:35 Maaih guanh douc waac mienh nyei yietc dauh ziux Ziouv gorngv nyei waac mbuox caux ninh zoux guanh nyei yietc dauh doic
1Kings20:36 Ninh ziouc gorngv
1Kings20:37 Wuov dauh douc waac mienh aengx buangh zuqc ganh dauh mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
1Kings20:38 Naaiv dauh douc waac mienh ziouc mingh souv jienv jauv-hlen zuov hungh diex jiex. Ninh longc ndie buang jienv m'zing weic bun mienh zieqv maiv duqv ninh.
1Kings20:39 Hungh diex jiex jauv wuov zanc
1Kings20:40 Mv baac yie
1Kings20:41 Wuov dauh douc waac mienh ziouc siepv-siepv nyei zorqv nqoi buang m'zing nyei ndie. I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh diex ziouc zieqv duqv ninh benx yietc dauh wuov deix douc waac mienh.
1Kings20:42 Ninh gorngv mbuox hungh diex

1Kings21:11 Caux Naa^mbotc juangc zingh yiem wuov deix mienh gox caux jien ei jienv Ye^se^mben fiev nyei waac zoux. Ziux ninh fungx bun ninh mbuo nyei fienx

1Kings22:34 Mv baac maaih dauh mienh gouv-mueic buonv yietc nzitv forng yaac zuqc I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh yiem ninh zuqv mborqv jaax nyei lui yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv nyei mbu'ndongx-qangx. Hungh ziouc mbuox zaangv ninh nyei cie wuov dauh
1Kings22:35 Wuov hnoi ziangh hnoi mborqv jaax hniev nyei. Ninh mbuo yaac sengh jienv hungh diex yiem ninh nyei cie gu'nyuoz huin mangc jienv Silie Mienh taux lungh hmuangx. Lungh maanz-hmuangx ninh daic mi'aqv. Nziaamv yiem zuqc mun nyei dorngx cuotv daaih liouc njiec cie gu'nyuoz.
1Kings22:36 Mba'hnoi ndortv nyei ziangh hoc
1Kings22:37 Hungh diex ziouc daic mi'aqv. Mienh ziouc dorh ninh nyei sei mingh zangx jienv Saa^maa^lie.
1Kings22:38 Ninh mbuo yiem Saa^maa^lie nyei wuom-domh nzaaux cie. Juv daaih mbiec ninh nyei nziaamv
1Kings22:39 Aa^hapc gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic caux ninh zoux nyei yietc zungv
1Kings22:40 Aa^hapc ziouc guei seix mi'aqv. Ninh nyei dorn
1Kings22:41 Aa^hapc zoux I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh da'feix hnyangx wuov hnyangx
1Kings22:42 Ye^ho^saa^fatv faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv faah ziepc hmz hnyangx. Ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv nyic ziepc hmz hnyangx. Ninh nyei maa se Sin^hi nyei sieqv
1Kings22:43 Ye^ho^saa^fatv ei jienv ninh nyei die zoux nyei jauv
1Kings22:44 Ye^ho^saa^fatv yaac caux I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh zoux longx jiu tong.
1Kings22:45 Ye^ho^saa^fatv gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
1Kings22:46 Ninh yaac zunc cuotv nzengc yiem zaangc zienh nyei dorngx maaic buonv-sin nyei m'jangc dorn
1Kings22:47 Wuov zanc E^ndom Deic-Bung maiv maaih hungh
