2Kings3:25 Ninh mbuo baaic waaic Mo^apc Mienh nyei zingh. Gorqv-mienh zorqv la'bieiv zoi bieqc nzong-nzong longx nyei lingh deic taux naaiv deix lingh deic kungx la'bieiv buangv nzengc. Ninh mbuo yaac zotv ndipc norm-norm wuom-zingv yaac goix yietc zungv longx nyei ndiangx. Kungx zengc Kin Haa^le^setv corc maaih la'bieiv zingh laatc hnangv. Longc ndopv-hlaang bungx la'bieiv nyei baeng ziouc weih gormx mborqv wuov norm zingh.

2Kings4:1 Maaih dauh wuov guanh douc waac mienh nyei auv daaih heuc jienv mbuox E^li^saa
2Kings4:2 E^li^saa naaic ninh
2Kings4:3 E^li^saa gorngv
2Kings4:4 Nqa'haav meih caux meih nyei dorn bieqc biauv mingh dox youh dapv naaiv deix jaa-dorngx. Yietc norm yietc norm dapv buangv mingh aengx ganh an yietc bung.”
2Kings4:5 Wuov dauh auv-guaav ziouc leih nqoi E^li^saa. Nqa'haav ninh dorh ninh nyei dorn bieqc biauv aengx guon jienv gaengh. Ninh nyei dorn dorh wuov deix jaa-dorngx daaih. Ninh nyei maa ziouc dox ga'lanv youh dapv.
2Kings4:6 Norm-norm dapv buangv nzengc
2Kings4:7 Wuov dauh auv-guaav ziouc mingh mbuox Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
2Kings4:8 Maaih hnoi E^li^saa mingh taux Sunem Mungv. Yiem wuov maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn butv-zoih nyei
2Kings4:9 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn mbuox ninh nyei nqox
2Kings4:10 Mbuo yiem gu'nguaaic biauv zoux yietc qongx faix nyei orqc? Gu'nyuoz an jienv coux caux dieh caux eiv caux dang. Ninh haaix zanc daaih mbuo naaiv ziouc bun ninh hitv naaic.”
2Kings4:11 Maaih hnoi E^li^saa daaih taux ziouc bieqc ninh nyei wuov qongx biauv yiem naaic hitv kuonx.
2Kings4:12 Ninh mbuox ninh nyei bou
2Kings4:13 E^li^saa gorngv mbuox Ge^haa^si
2Kings4:14 E^li^saa naaic Ge^haa^si
2Kings4:15 E^li^saa gorngv mbuox Ge^haa^si
2Kings4:16 E^li^saa gorngv
2Kings4:17 Mv baac wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn za'gengh maaih gu'nguaaz mi'aqv. Da'nyeic hnyangx taux naaiv norm ziangh hoc ninh yungz duqv dauh dorn
2Kings4:18 Wuov dauh fu'jueiv hlo jienv faaux. Maaih hnoi nor
2Kings4:19 Wuov dauh dorn mbuox ninh nyei die
2Kings4:20 Bou ziouc hlorpv nzuonx jiu bun ninh nyei maa. Ninh nyei maa zueiz jienv hlorpv taux lungh aanx
2Kings4:21 Maa hlorpv mingh an jienv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh nyei coux ziouc cuotv daaih guon jienv gaengh.
2Kings4:22 Ninh heuc ninh nyei nqox aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
2Kings4:23 Ninh nyei nqox naaic
2Kings4:24 Ninh ziouc zorqv geh orn buic jienv lorh yaac gorngv mbuox ninh nyei bou
2Kings4:25 Ninh ziouc cuotv jauv mingh taux Kaanmen Mbong
2Kings4:26 Tiux mingh zipv ninh yaac naaic gaax ninh
2Kings4:27 Mingh taux mbong
2Kings4:28 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv
2Kings4:29 E^li^saa gorngv mbuox Ge^haa^si
2Kings4:30 Mv baac wuov dauh dorn nyei maa gorngv
2Kings4:31 Ge^haa^si mingh ndaangc zorqv biaav-mbiaac an jienv wuov dauh dorn nyei hmien
2Kings4:32 E^li^saa taux biauv buatc wuov dauh dorn bueix jienv E^li^saa ganh nyei coux
2Kings4:33 Ninh bieqc wuov qongx gen
2Kings4:34 Nqa'haav ninh faaux coux mbaapv wuov dauh dorn gu'nguaaic
2Kings4:35 E^li^saa ziouc njiec coux yiem wuov qongx gu'nyuoz yangh mingh yangh daaih aengx faaux mingh mbaapv jienv wuov dauh dorn nyei sin. Wuov dauh dorn ciuv siec nzunc ziouc nungx nqoi m'zing.
2Kings4:36 E^li^saa heuc Ge^haa^si yaac gorngv
2Kings4:37 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc bieqc wuov qongx mbaapv njiec E^li^saa nyei zaux ga'hlen. Nqa'haav ninh hlorpv ninh nyei dorn cuotv mi'aqv.
2Kings4:38 E^li^saa aengx daaih taux Gin^gaan doix zuqc wuov norm deic-bung ngorc hnaangx. Ninh njaaux wuov guanh douc waac mienh wuov zanc
2Kings4:39 Maaih dauh wuov guanh mienh cuotv mingh lomc-huaang lorz lai. Buatc pou hieh ha'louh luangh ziouc gaeqv duqv deix wuov pou hieh ha'louh zormx jienv buangv lui nzengc. Nzuonx daaih ninh fietv bieqc nyei an jienv wuov norm caeng zouv. Ninh maiv hiuv duqv benx haaix nyungc ga'naaiv.
2Kings4:40 Zouv ziangx ziouc dox cuotv bun zuangx mienh nyanc. Nyanc wuov zanc
2Kings4:41 E^li^saa gorngv
2Kings4:42 Maaih dauh yiem Mbaa^an Qaa^li^qaa Laangz nyei mienh zorqv nyic ziepc norm longc daauh torngx mbiauh mbaali zoux daaih nyei njuov caux deix siang-mbiauh mbaali dapv jienv mbuoqc dorh daaih. E^li^saa gorngv
2Kings4:43 Ninh nyei bou naaic gaax
2Kings4:44 Bou ziouc zorqv daaih mbenc jienv ninh mbuo nyei nza'hmien. Ninh mbuo nyanc beuv nzengc corc maaih zengc hnangv Ziouv gorngv nyei waac nor.
2Kings5:1 Naa^aa^maan zoux Silie hungh nyei domh baeng-bieiv. Ninh nyei ziouv funx ninh zoux longc jienv nyei mienh yaac taaih ninh
2Kings5:2 Maaih nzunc Silie nyei ziex guanh baeng mingh mborqv I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung wuov zanc ninh mbuo caangv duqv dauh sieqv-faix. Naaiv dauh sieqv-faix fu-sux Naa^aa^maan nyei auv.
2Kings5:3 Wuov dauh sieqv gorngv mbuox ninh nyei ziouv

2Kings6:1 Wuov guanh douc waac mienh gorngv mbuox E^li^saa

2Kings6:10 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh zaah mangc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh gorngv wuov norm dorngx. E^li^saa hnangv naaic donv bun hungh diex mbungh maiv zeiv yietc nzunc i nzunc.

2Kings6:24 Zoux gau

2Kings6:30 Hungh diex haiz wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei waac ninh betv ninh ganh nyei lui. Wuov zanc hungh diex yangh zingh laatc gu'nguaaic mingh. Baeqc fingx mangc buatc gu'nyuoz wuov yiemc lui benx la'maah ndie-cou.
2Kings6:31 Ninh gorngv
2Kings6:32 Wuov zanc E^li^saa zueiz jienv ninh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. mienh gox yaac caux ninh zueiz wuov. Hungh diex paaiv dauh mienh mingh ndaangc
2Kings6:33 E^li^saa gorngv jienv waac zungv maiv gaengh setv
2Kings7:1 Mv baac E^li^saa gorngv
2Kings7:2 Maaih dauh hungh diex nyei sin-hlen baeng gorngv

2Kings7:4 Se gorngv mbuo gorngv
2Kings7:5 Taux nziemx-yaangh nyei ziangh hoc
2Kings7:6 weic zuqc Ziouv bun Silie Mienh nyei baeng muangx haiz mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux maaz caux domh baeng-guanh nyei qiex mbui. Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh mbuox laanh
2Kings7:7 Nziemx-yaangh nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo ziouc biaux

2Kings7:14 Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv i norm maaz-cie caux maaz mingh zunc Silie nyei baeng-guanh. Hungh diex jaa waac gorngv
2Kings7:15 Ninh mbuo ziouc gan jienv Silie baeng mingh taux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Ziangh diuh jauv buatc Silie Mienh gaanv biaux nyei ziangh hoc guangc nyei lui-houx caux jaa-sic. Naaiv deix douc fienx mienh ziouc nzuonx mingh mbuox hungh diex.
2Kings7:16 Zuangx mienh ziouc cuotv mingh luv Silie Mienh nyei ciangv. Hnangv naaic siec morqv mbuonv maaic duqv nyic zinh lengh nyaanh. Ziepc hmz morqv mbiauh mbaali yaac maaic duqv nyic zinh lengh nyaanh. Hnangv Ziouv gorngv jiex nyei waac nor.
2Kings7:17 Hungh diex paaiv yiem ninh nyei sin-hlen wuov dauh baeng zuov zingh gaengh. Zuov gaengh nyei ziangh hoc ninh zuqc caaiv daic mi'aqv
2Kings7:18 Sic cuotv daaih hnangv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh gorngv mbuox hungh diex. Ninh gorngv

2Kings10:8 Douc fienx mienh daaih mbuox Ye^hu

2Kings10:10 Oix zuqc hiuv

2Kings10:16 Ye^hu gorngv
2Kings10:17 Mingh taux Saa^maa^lie
2Kings10:18 Ye^hu heuc zuangx baeqc fingx gapv zunv
2Kings10:19 Ih zanc oix zuqc heuc Mbaa^an nyei douc waac mienh yietc zungv caux zaangc Mbaa^an nyei zuangx mienh caux zuangx sai mienh daaih zunv yie naaiv. Maiv dungx bun caa yietc dauh weic zuqc yie oix zoux hlo nyei ziec bun Mbaa^an. Haaix dauh maiv daaih
2Kings10:20 Ye^hu gorngv
2Kings10:21 Ninh bun waac mingh gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung. Da'faanh zaangc Mbaa^an nyei zuangx mienh daaih zunv. Maiv maaih yietc dauh maiv daaih. Ninh mbuo mbengx jienv bieqc Mbaa^an nyei miuc-biauv
2Kings10:22 Ye^hu heuc goux lui nyei mienh
2Kings10:23 Nqa'haav Ye^hu caux Lekaapv nyei dorn
2Kings10:24 Ninh mbuo bieqc mingh ziouc fongc horc ziec yaac buov ziec. Ye^hu jaa-ndaangc paaiv ziangx betv ziepc dauh mienh yiem miuc-biauv ga'nyiec maengx yaac hatc ninh mbuo
2Kings10:25 Ye^hu ziec liuz cuotv daaih mbuox zuov ga'nyiec nyei baeng
2Kings10:26 zorqv yiem Mbaa^an miuc-biauv gu'nyuoz nyei la'bieiv-dongc dorh cuotv buov guangc.
2Kings10:27 Ninh mbuo baaic waaic Mbaa^an nyei la'bieiv-dongc caux Mbaa^an nyei miuc-biauv
2Kings10:28 Hnangv naaic

2Kings11:1 Aa^hatc^yaa nyei maa
2Kings11:2 Mv baac Yolam nyei sieqv

2Kings11:4 Taux da'cietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings11:5 Ninh yaac paaiv ziangx ninh mbuo
2Kings11:6 buo gouv nyei yietc gouv oix zuqc zuov Sux^e Gaengh
2Kings11:7 Ziux luonh baan maiv zuqc zuov wuov deix i guanh oix zuqc yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv goux hungh diex.
2Kings11:8 Gorqv-mienh oix zuqc nanv jienv gorqv-mienh nyei wuoqc ginc weih gormx hungh diex. Haaix dauh daaih nitv fatv meih mbuo nyei guanh oix zuqc daix daic. Hungh diex bieqc cuotv nyei ziangh hoc
2Kings11:9 Zuangx baeng-bieiv ziouc ei jienv Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh paaiv nyei waac zoux. Gorqv-mienh dorh gorqv-mienh nyei baeng
2Kings11:10 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv zinh ndaangc benx Ndaawitv Hungh nyei cang caux torngv-baaih bun zuangx baeng-bieiv.
2Kings11:11 Goux hungh diex nyei baeng
2Kings11:12 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh dorh hungh diex nyei dorn cuotv daaih yaac zorqv hungh ningv tengx ninh ndongx jienv. Ninh mbuo zorqv laengz ngaengc waac sou jiu bun ninh ziouc orn ninh zoux hungh
2Kings11:13 Aa^taa^li^yaa muangx haiz wuov deix goux hungh diex nyei baeng caux zuangx baeqc fingx nyei qiex mbui
2Kings11:14 Ninh mangc ziouc buatc hungh diex ei jienv leiz souv ndiouh ga'hlen. Baeng-bieiv caux biomv nzatc nyei mienh yaac souv jienv hungh diex nyei ga'hlen. Deic-bung nyei zuangx baeqc fingx njien-youh haic yaac biomv nzatc. Aa^taa^li^yaa ziouc betv ninh nyei lui yaac heuc cuotv daaih gorngv
2Kings11:15 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh paaiv baeng-guanh nyei baeng-bieiv
2Kings11:16 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv hungh maac mingh taux hungh dinc
2Kings11:17 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa bun hungh diex caux baeqc fingx caux Ziouv liepc ngaengc waac
2Kings11:18 Guoqv gu'nyuoz nyei zuangx baeqc fingx mingh Mbaa^an zienh nyei miuc-biauv caeqv njiec nzengc. Ninh mbuo mborqv ziec-dorngh caux miuc-fangx huv muonc nzengc yaac yiem ziec-dorngh nza'hmien maengx daix Mbaa^an zienh nyei sai mienh
2Kings11:19 Ninh dorh jienv zuangx baeng-bieiv caux Kaali Mienh caux goux hungh nyei baeng caux guoqv zaangc nyei yietc zungv baeqc fingx. Ninh mbuo lomh nzoih dorh hungh diex yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv daaih
2Kings11:20 Guoqv zaangc nyei zuangx baeqc fingx ziouc njien-youh. Zingh gu'nyuoz taaix-baengh aqv. Weic zuqc Aa^taa^li^yaa Hungh Maac yiem hungh dinc zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix daic mi'aqv.
2Kings11:21 Yo^aatc faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc

2Kings12:13 Dorh bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv wuov deix nyaanh ninh mbuo maiv longc zoux nyaanh zaanv fai njapv dang-cov nyei njiuv fai nzormc fai nzatc fai yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv longc jiem longc nyaanh nyei haaix nyungc jaa-sic.

2Kings16:1 Le^maa^li^yaa nyei dorn
2Kings16:2 Zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv nyic ziepc hnyangx. Ninh yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv ziepc luoqc hnyangx. Ninh maiv ei jienv ninh nyei ong-taaix
2Kings16:3 Ninh ei jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh zoux
2Kings16:4 Ninh yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx caux mbong-ningv caux diuh diuh domh ndiangx ga'ndiev fongc horc ziec yaac buov hung.
2Kings16:5 Silie nyei hungh
2Kings16:6 Wuov zanc Silie nyei hungh
2Kings16:7 Aa^hatc paaiv douc fienx mienh mingh mbuox Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Kings16:8 Aa^hatc zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc nyei jiem nyaanh zoux zingh nyeic fungx bun Atc^si^lie nyei hungh.
2Kings16:9 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh ziouc ei jienv ninh nyei waac. Ninh mingh mborqv Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh yaac caangv duqv mi'aqv. Ninh zorqv Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh nyei baeqc fingx dorh mingh taux Ki^aa yaac daix Lesin Hungh.
2Kings16:10 Aa^hatc Hungh mingh Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh weic oix buangh Tikv^latv Bi^le^se. Yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc buatc norm ziec-dorngh ziouc zoux ziec-dorngh nyei nyungc zeiv caux ceix ziec-dorngh nyei yietc nyeic
2Kings16:11 U^li^yaa sai mienh ziouc ziux fungx daaih nyei yietc nyeic yietc zungv ceix norm ziec-dorngh yaac zoux ziangx ndaangc Aa^hatc Hungh yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc nzuonx.
2Kings16:12 Hungh diex yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh nzuonx daaih buatc ziec-dorngh ziouc mingh fatv
2Kings16:13 Ninh yiem naaiv norm ziec-dorngh fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv
2Kings16:14 Yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien nyei dongh siqv ziec-dorngh
2Kings16:15 Aa^hatc paaiv ziangx U^li^yaa sai mienh
2Kings16:16 U^li^yaa sai mienh ei jienv Aa^hatc Hungh nyei waac zoux nzengc.
2Kings16:17 Aa^hatc Hungh zorqv cuotv mbaeqc dieh longz ga'hlen wuov deix kuaaiv-kuaaiv ga'naaiv yaac zorqv nqoi gu'nyuoz nyei domh bunh. Ninh aengx zorqv yiem dongh siqv ngongh gouv gu'nguaaic nyei domh bunh njiec daaih don jienv la'bieiv gu'nguaaic.
2Kings16:18 Weic zoux horpc Atc^si^lie Hungh nyei hnyouv ninh zorqv nqoi yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv weic Dingh Gong Hnoi gomv daaih nyei dorngx. Ninh yaac guangc hungh diex yiem ga'nyiec bieqc gu'nyuoz nyei dorngx.
2Kings16:19 Aa^hatc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
2Kings16:20 Aa^hatc guei seix mi'aqv
2Kings17:1 Aa^hatc zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh ziepc nyeic hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings17:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings17:3 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Kings17:4 Mv baac Atc^si^lie hungh hiuv duqv Ho^se^yaa ngaengc ninh weic zuqc Ho^se^yaa bun mienh mingh lorz I^yipv nyei So Hungh
2Kings17:5 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh aengx mborqv bieqc buangv I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung yaac weih jienv Saa^maa^lie buo hnyangx.
2Kings17:6 Ho^se^yaa zoux hungh da'juov hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings17:7 Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic cuotv daaih weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh baamz zuiz dorngc Ziouv
2Kings17:8 yaac ei jienv Ziouv zunc cuotv ninh mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh nyei leiz
2Kings17:9 I^saa^laa^en Mienh beic ndiev zoux maiv benx nyei sic dorngc Ziouv
2Kings17:10 Yiem norm-norm mbong-ningv caux diuh diuh domh ndiangx ga'ndiev ninh mbuo liepc zaangc zienh nyei la'bieiv caux zaangc Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx.
2Kings17:11 Yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei norm-norm dorngx ninh mbuo buov hung
2Kings17:12 Ninh mbuo baaix miuc-fangx
2Kings17:13 Ziouv longc ninh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh caux gorngv zinh hoz waac nyei mienh donv I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh
2Kings17:14 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx. Ninh mbuo hnyouv ngaengc hnangv ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix
2Kings17:15 Ninh mbuo guangc Ziouv nyei leiz-latc yaac guangc ninh caux ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix laengz nyei ngaengc waac caux donv ninh mbuo nyei waac. Ninh mbuo mingh gan maiv lamh longc nyei miuc-fangx
2Kings17:16 Ninh mbuo guangc Ziouv
2Kings17:17 Ninh mbuo zorqv ninh mbuo nyei naamh nyouz longc douz buov ziec fongc horc. Ninh mbuo mbouv guaax
2Kings17:18 Weic naaiv Ziouv nouz! haic I^saa^laa^en Mienh
2Kings17:19 Liemh Yu^ndaa yaac maiv ei Ziouv
2Kings17:20 Ziouv ziouc nqemh I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx
2Kings17:21 Ziouv betv I^saa^laa^en cuotv Ndaawitv nyei douh zong liuz
2Kings17:22 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gan jienv Ye^lo^mbo^am baamz nyei yietc zungv zuiz
2Kings17:23 taux nqa'haav Ziouv zunc ninh mbuo cuotv
2Kings17:24 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh siou yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon
2Kings17:25 Coqv hoqc yiem jienv wuov nyei ziangh hoc
2Kings17:26 Maaih mienh mbuox Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Kings17:27 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh ziouc paaiv waac gorngv
2Kings17:28 Maaih dauh yiem Saa^maa^lie zuqc guaatv mingh nyei sai mienh ziouc mingh yiem Mbetc^en njaaux ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor zaangc Ziouv.
2Kings17:29 Mv baac fingx-fingx mienh corc zeix ninh mbuo ganh nyei zienh
2Kings17:30 Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh zeix Sukc^kotv Mbenotv zienh nyei fangx
2Kings17:31 Apc^waa Mienh zeix Nipv^hatc caux Taantakv zienh nyei fangx
2Kings17:32 Ninh mbuo zaangc Ziouv yaac yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx ginv cuotv ziex fingx mienh nyei mienh orn zoux sai mienh yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx fu-sux.
2Kings17:33 Ninh mbuo zaangc Ziouv youc fu-sux ganh nyei zienh
2Kings17:34 Taux ih jaax hnoi ninh mbuo corc gan zinh ndaangc nyei loz-leiz zoux. Ninh mbuo maiv zaangc Ziouv yaac maiv ei jienv Ziouv jiu bun Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun nyei lingc caux leiz-latc caux leiz caux hatc nyei waac
2Kings17:35 Ziouv caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh liepc ngaengc waac wuov zanc ninh hatc ninh mbuo
2Kings17:36 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zaangc Ziouv
2Kings17:37 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc faix fim
2Kings17:38 Maiv dungx la'kuqv yie caux meih mbuo liepc nyei ngaengc waac
2Kings17:39 Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc zaangc Ziouv
2Kings17:40 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx. Ninh mbuo gan zinh ndaangc nyei jauv zoux.
2Kings17:41 Hnangv naaic
2Kings18:1 Elaa nyei dorn
2Kings18:2 Faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings18:3 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings18:4 Ninh caeqv cuotv yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx
2Kings18:5 He^se^ki^yaa kaux Ziouv
2Kings18:6 Ninh kaux wuonv Ziouv
2Kings18:7 Ziouv caux ninh yiem. Ninh haaix zanc cuotv mingh zoux haaix nyungc
2Kings18:8 Ninh mborqv hingh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
2Kings18:9 He^se^ki^yaa zoux hungh da'feix hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings18:10 Jiex liuz buo hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings18:11 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh guaatv I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh Atc^si^lie Guoqv
2Kings18:12 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv muangx Ziouv
2Kings18:13 He^se^ki^yaa zoux hungh ziepc feix hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings18:14 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Kings18:15 He^se^ki^yaa ziouc zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv nyei dorngx nyei yietc zungv nyaanh fungx bun ninh.
2Kings18:16 Wuov zanc Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Kings18:17 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh paaiv buo dauh ninh nyei hlo jiex nyei baeng-bieiv caux jienv baeng-guanh camv nyei yiem Laakitv mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Kings18:18 Ninh mbuo heuc hungh diex wuov zanc maaih goux hungh dinc nyei domh jien
2Kings18:19 Maaih dauh wuov deix domh baeng-bieiv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Kings18:20 Meih hnamv daaih kungx longc baeqc waac hnangv haih maaih za'eix
2Kings18:21 Mangc maah! Meih kaux I^yipv se hnangv kaux luoqc diqc guaengv-mbaaix zoux biaav-mbiaac yangh jauv nor
2Kings18:22 Se gorngv meih mbuox yie
2Kings18:23 “+‘Ih zanc meih caux yie nyei ziouv
2Kings18:24 Se gorngv meih kaux I^yipv nyei mborqv jaax maaz-cie caux geh maaz baeng
2Kings18:25 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Yie daaih mborqv baaic naaiv norm deic-bung se maiv maaih Ziouv caux yie daaih fai? Ziouv ganh gorngv mbuox yie cuotv mingh mietc naaiv norm deic-bung maah!’+”
2Kings18:26 Hin^ki^yaa nyei dorn
2Kings18:27 Mv baac wuov dauh baeng-bieiv gorngv
2Kings18:28 Wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv ziouc souv jiez daaih longc Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei waac heuc jienv gorngv
2Kings18:29 Hungh diex hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
2Kings18:30 Maiv dungx muangx He^se^ki^yaa nduov meih mbuo kaux Ziouv. Ninh oix gorngv
2Kings18:31 “Maiv dungx muangx He^se^ki^yaa nyei waac. Atc^si^lie nyei hungh gorngv
2Kings18:32 Zuov yie dorh meih mbuo mingh taux norm deic-bung hnangv meih mbuo ganh nyei deic-bung nor. Se maaih laangh ziqc
2Kings18:33 Maaih haaix norm guoqv nyei haaix dauh zienh njoux jiex ganh nyei guoqv biaux ndutv Atc^si^lie hungh nyei buoz-ndiev?
2Kings18:34 Haamatv caux Aanbatc Mungv nyei zienh yiem haaix? Se^faan^waa^im
2Kings18:35 Se gorngv naaiv deix guoqv nyei yietc zungv zienh maiv maaih haaix dauh njoux duqv ninh nyei guoqv biaux ndutv yie nyei buoz-ndiev
2Kings18:36 Mv baac baeqc fingx sekv nzieqc nyei
2Kings18:37 Goux hungh dinc wuov dauh jien
2Kings19:1 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh haiz liuz wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv gorngv nyei waac
2Kings19:2 Ninh paaiv goux hungh dinc wuov dauh E^li^yaa^kim caux Sepv^naa sou-biuv caux zoux gauh hlo wuov deix sai mienh
2Kings19:3 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox I^saa^yaa
2Kings19:4 Nziex Ziouv
2Kings19:5 He^se^ki^yaa nyei jien mingh taux I^saa^yaa wuov
2Kings19:6 I^saa^yaa gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Kings19:7 Yie oix bun ninh maaih nyungc hnyouv. Ninh duqv haiz nyungc waac-nziaaux ziouc nzuonx ninh ganh nyei deic-bung. Yiem ninh ganh nyei buonv-deic-bung
2Kings19:8 Wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv haiz gorngv Atc^si^lie nyei hungh cuotv Laakitv Zingh
2Kings19:9 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh haiz fienx gorngv
2Kings19:10 “Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Kings19:11 Meih yaac haiz gorngv Atc^si^lie nyei zuangx hungh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun maanc guoqv
2Kings19:12 Wuov deix norm-norm guoqv nyei dauh dauh zienh haih njoux duqv ninh mbuo fai? Se yie nyei ong-taaix mietc wuov deix guoqv nyei zienh
2Kings19:13 Haamatv nyei hungh
2Kings19:14 He^se^ki^yaa doqc liuz douc fienx mienh dorh daaih nyei fienx
2Kings19:15 He^se^ki^yaa daux gaux gorngv mbuox Ziouv
2Kings19:16 O Ziouv aac
2Kings19:17 “O Ziouv aac
2Kings19:18 yaac zorqv ninh mbuo nyei zienh zoi bieqc douz mietc nzengc
2Kings19:19 O Ziouv
2Kings19:20 Aamortv nyei dorn
2Kings19:21 Naaiv se Ziouv nyei waac gorngv ninh. “+‘Maiv bueix jiex dorn nyei sieqv
2Kings19:22 Meih gorngv doqc ki haaix dauh? Meih longc meih nyei qiex gorngv haaix dauh? Meih nungx meih nyei m'zing zoux maux bun haaix dauh? Meih zoux bun I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Ziouv.
2Kings19:23 Meih longc meih nyei douc fienx mienh ki Ziouv. Meih gorngv
2Kings19:24 Yie yiem ganh norm deic-bung wetv wuom-kuotv yaac yiem wuov hopv wuom. Yie longc yie nyei zaux-benv caaiv nqaai I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei yietc zungv ndoqv.’+”
2Kings19:25 “ Ziouv gorngv
2Kings19:26 Naaiv deix zingh nyei baeqc fingx nyei qaqv nzengc mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo ziouc hnyouv waaic nzengc yaac zuqc nyaiv. Ninh mbuo se hnangv yiem ndau-huaang nyei miev
2Kings19:27 “+‘Mv baac yie hiuv duqv meih yiem haaix
2Kings19:28 Laaix meih qiex jiez nouz yie
2Kings19:29 “O He^se^ki^yaa aah! Naaiv se zoux norm jangx-hoc. “Ih hnyangx meih mbuo duqv nyanc ninh ganh cuotv nyei ga'naaiv
2Kings19:30 Yu^ndaa nyei douh zong duqv biaux ndutv zengc njiec nyei mienh
2Kings19:31 Weic zuqc maaih deix zengc njiec nyei mienh oix yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem cuotv
2Kings19:32 “Weic naaiv Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv Atc^si^lie nyei hungh. ‘Ninh maiv duqv bieqc naaiv norm zingh
2Kings19:33 Ninh yangh haaix diuh jauv daaih yaac oix zuqc yangh wuov diuh jauv nzuonx. Ninh zungv maiv bieqc naaiv norm zingh.’ Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
2Kings19:34 ‘Weic yie ganh yaac weic yie nyei bou
2Kings19:35 Wuov muonz Ziouv nyei fin-mienh cuotv mingh yiem Atc^si^lie Mienh nyei ciangv daix yietc sinx hietc waanc biaa cin dauh mienh daic. Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei mienh jiez sin daaih buatc benx janx-daic nyei sei nzengc mi'aqv.
2Kings19:36 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Kings19:37 Maaih hnoi ninh yiem miuc-biauv gu'nyuoz baaix ninh nyei zienh

2Kings20:3 “O Ziouv aac
2Kings20:4 I^saa^yaa maiv gaengh duqv cuotv hungh dinc mbu'ndongx wuov kang ting wuov zanc
2Kings20:5 “Oix zuqc nzuonx mingh mbuox yie nyei baeqc fingx nyei bieiv zeiv
2Kings20:6 Yie aengx oix jaa bun meih ziangh ziepc hmz hnyangx yaac oix njoux naaiv norm zingh leih ndutv Atc^si^lie hungh nyei buoz-ndiev. Weic yie nyei bou
2Kings20:7 I^saa^yaa gorngv
2Kings20:8 He^se^ki^yaa naaic I^saa^yaa
2Kings20:9 I^saa^yaa dau
2Kings20:10 He^se^ki^yaa dau
2Kings20:11 Douc waac mienh
2Kings20:12 Doix wuov deix ziangh hoc
2Kings20:13 He^se^ki^yaa zipv naaiv deix douc fienx mienh yaac bun ninh mbuo mangc ninh siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv nyei dorngx yietc zungv ga'naaiv. Se bun ninh mbuo mangc jiem
2Kings20:14 Douc waac mienh
2Kings20:15 I^saa^yaa naaic
2Kings20:16 I^saa^yaa gorngv mbuox He^se^ki^yaa
2Kings20:17 ‘Hnoi-nyieqc zungv oix taux. Yiem meih nyei hungh dinc nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv caux meih nyei ong-taaix siou taux ih jaax hnoi nyei ga'naaiv
2Kings20:18 ‘Maaih deix yiem meih ganh nyei nziaamv-fei cuotv nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv zungv oix zuqc guaatv mingh yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh dinc benx zuqc im dov nyei mienh.’+”
2Kings20:19 He^se^ki^yaa dau I^saa^yaa
2Kings20:20 He^se^ki^yaa gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
2Kings20:21 He^se^ki^yaa guei seix mi'aqv
2Kings21:1 Maa^natv^se faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings21:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc ninh zoux waaic sic. Ninh ei jienv Ziouv zunc cuotv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh zoux gamh nziev haic nyei sic.
2Kings21:3 Ninh aengx ceix jiez dongh ninh nyei die
2Kings21:4 Ninh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv ceix ziec-dorngh
2Kings21:5 Ninh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv i norm laatc gu'nyuoz nyei dorngx weic lungh zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc ceix ziec-dorngh.
2Kings21:6 Ninh zorqv ninh ganh nyei dorn buov ziec
2Kings21:7 Ninh zorqv ninh zuqc daaih wuov norm Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx an jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. Se naaiv norm biauv Ziouv gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei dorn
2Kings21:8 Se gorngv I^saa^laa^en Mienh faix fim ei jienv yie hatc nyei yietc zungv waac zoux yaac ei jienv yie nyei bou
2Kings21:9 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx. Maa^natv^se baeng ninh mbuo zoux waaic sic gauh camv Ziouv yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx mietc wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh.
2Kings21:10 Ziouv longc ninh nyei bou
2Kings21:11 “Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Kings21:12 Weic naaiv
2Kings21:13 Yie oix dingc Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zuiz hnangv yie dingc Saa^maa^lie nyei zuiz nor
2Kings21:14 Yie oix guangc yie zengc njiec nyei mienh
2Kings21:15 weic zuqc ei yie mangc
2Kings21:16 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Maa^natv^se daix kuv mienh
2Kings21:17 Maa^natv^se gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
2Kings21:18 Maa^natv^se guei seix mi'aqv
2Kings21:19 Aamon faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings21:20 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings21:21 Ninh zuotc ninh nyei die nyei yietc zungv nyungc zeiv zoux. Ninh zaangc yaac baaix ninh nyei die zaangc nyei miuc-fangx.
2Kings21:22 Ninh guangc Ziouv
2Kings21:23 Aamon nyei jien daav za'eix ngaengc ninh ziouc yiem hungh dinc gu'nyuoz daix ninh.
2Kings21:24 Mv baac Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung nyei baeqc fingx daix dongh daav za'eix daix hungh diex wuov deix mienh. Ninh mbuo yaac liepc Aamon nyei dorn
2Kings21:25 Aamon gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic fiev jienv Yu^ndaa hungh nyei hungh douh daan.
2Kings21:26 Ninh zangx jienv Utc^saa nyei huingx
2Kings22:1 Yo^si^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings22:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings22:3 Yo^si^yaa zoux hungh ziepc betv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings22:4 “Mingh lorz Hin^ki^yaa domh sai mienh mbuox ninh funx nzengc dorh daaih hietv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei nyaanh
2Kings22:5 Zorqv wuov deix nyaanh jiu bun liuc leiz zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gunv gong mienh. Ninh mbuo ziouc haih koi gong-zinh jiu bun zorc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gong-mienh
2Kings22:6 se bun ndiangx-zaangc
2Kings22:7 Mv baac zorqv nyaanh jiu bun ninh mbuo
2Kings22:8 Hin^ki^yaa domh sai mienh gorngv mbuox Saafaan sou-biuv
2Kings22:9 Saafaan sou-biuv ziouc nzuonx hungh diex wuov gorngv mbuox ninh
2Kings22:10 Saafaan sou-biuv aengx gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Kings22:11 Hungh diex haiz Leiz-Latc Sou nyei waac ziouc betv ninh ganh nyei lui.
2Kings22:12 Ninh paaiv Hin^ki^yaa domh sai mienh caux Saafaan nyei dorn
2Kings22:13 “Mingh weic yie caux baeqc fingx caux Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh naaic Ziouv taux naaiv njunc sou gorngv nyei waac. Laaix mbuo nyei ong-taaix maiv muangx naaiv njunc sou nyei waac
2Kings22:14 Hin^ki^yaa domh sai mienh caux Aa^hi^kam caux Akc^mbo
2Kings22:15 Hun^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Kings22:16 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv. “Ziux Yu^ndaa hungh doqc wuov njunc sou nyei yietc zungv waac yie oix bun naaiv norm dorngx caux naaiv norm dorngx nyei baeqc fingx zuqc zeqc naanc.
2Kings22:17 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo guangc yie aengx buov hung bun nyiec nyei zienh
2Kings22:18 Oix zuqc mbuox Yu^ndaa nyei hungh diex
2Kings22:19 ‘Weic zuqc meih haiz yie hnangv haaix nor gorngv naaiv norm dorngx caux naaiv norm dorngx nyei mienh
2Kings22:20 ‘Weic naaiv yie oix bun meih guei seix ndaangc
2Kings23:1 Hungh diex ziouc heuc Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zuangx mienh gox daaih zunv.
2Kings23:2 Ninh caux Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh
2Kings23:3 Hungh diex souv jienv ndiouh ga'hlen
2Kings23:4 Hungh diex paaiv Hin^ki^yaa domh sai mienh caux borng-buoz nyei sai mienh caux zuov zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei mienh zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv longc baaix Mbaa^an zienh caux Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz caux yiem lungh zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv
2Kings23:5 Yo^si^yaa Hungh zorqv guangc Yu^ndaa nyei hungh liepc daaih zaangc nyiec nyei zienh wuov deix sai mienh
2Kings23:6 Ninh yaac zorqv nqoi yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv wuov norm Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx
2Kings23:7 Ninh aengx caeqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv weic zaangc zienh maaic buonv-sin nyei m'jangc dorn yiem nyei dorngx
2Kings23:8 Yo^si^yaa dorh yiem Yu^ndaa nyei norm-norm mungv nyei sai mienh daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem yaac zoux bun yiem Ge^mbaa taux Mbe^e^qe^mbaa
2Kings23:9 Maiv gunv yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx daaih wuov deix sai mienh maiv duqv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Kings23:10 Ninh zoux bun Tofetv maaih uix
2Kings23:11 Ninh zorqv nqoi yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gaengh ndaangc nyei maaz
2Kings23:12 Ninh yaac caeqv njiec Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx hungh yiem biauv-ngorh
2Kings23:13 Yo^si^yaa Hungh yaac zoux bun yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx maaih uix
2Kings23:14 Yo^si^yaa mborqv huv nzengc zaangc zienh nyei la'bieiv-dongc yaac jamv Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx
2Kings23:15 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Yo^si^yaa Hungh yaac caeqv yiem Mbetc^en nyei ziec-dorngh
2Kings23:16 Yo^si^yaa huin m'nqorngv ziouc mangc buatc yiem wuov jiex mbong-hlen maaih deix janx-daic zouv. Ninh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh wuov zouv dorh mbungv daaih aengx an wuov norm ziec-dorngh buov weic bun ziec-dorngh maaih uix. Naaiv se hnangv zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zunh Ziouv nyei zinh hoz waac.
2Kings23:17 Hungh diex naaic gaax
2Kings23:18 Hungh diex gorngv
2Kings23:19 Dongh zinh ndaangc I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh yiem Saa^maa^lie nyei zingh liepc daaih wuov deix yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx cuoqv Ziouv qiex jiez haic
2Kings23:20 Ninh aengx zorqv yietc zungv yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx nyei sai mienh yiem ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic daix. Ninh yaac zorqv mienh nyei mbungv yiem wuov deix ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic buov. Nqa'haav ninh nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Kings23:21 Hungh diex hatc zuangx baeqc fingx
2Kings23:22 Yiem domh jien gunv I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei lungh ndiev zoux liuz taux ih zanc
2Kings23:23 Mv baac Yo^si^yaa zoux hungh ziepc betv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Kings23:24 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Yo^si^yaa mietc nzengc gaanv hei caux mbouv guaax nyei mienh
2Kings23:25 Yiem ndaangc Yo^si^yaa caux yiem nqa'haav wuov deix yietc zungv hungh
2Kings23:26 Mv baac Ziouv corc qiex jiez haic
2Kings23:27 Ziouv gorngv
2Kings23:28 Yo^si^yaa gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic caux ninh zoux liuz nyei yietc zungv
2Kings23:29 Yo^si^yaa zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc
2Kings23:30 Yo^si^yaa nyei jien ziouc zorqv Yo^si^yaa nyei sei dapv jienv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie
2Kings23:31 Ye^ho^aa^haatc faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings23:32 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings23:33 Faalo Neko zorqv ninh mingh wuonx jienv yiem Haamatv Deic nyei Lipv^laa Zingh weic bun ninh maiv duqv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv. Ninh yaac baatc Yu^ndaa Mienh cuotv i cin yietc baeqv joih nyaanh caux nyic ziepc yietv joih jiem.
2Kings23:34 Faalo Neko liepc Yo^si^yaa nyei dorn
2Kings23:35 Ye^ho^yaa^kim cuotv jiem nyaanh bun Faalo Neko ziux ninh hatc nyei waac. Mv baac weic haih maaih naaiv deix jiem nyaanh cuotv
2Kings23:36 Ye^ho^yaa^kim faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv nyic ziepc hmz hnyangx. Ninh yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv ziepc yietv hnyangx. Ninh nyei maa nyei mbuox heuc Se^mbi^ndaa
2Kings23:37 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings24:1 Yiem Ye^ho^yaa^kim gunv nyei ziangh hoc
2Kings24:2 Ziouv bun Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh
2Kings24:3 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih ziux Ziouv hatc nyei waac weic bun Yu^ndaa Mienh maiv duqv yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien. Se laaix Maa^natv^se zoux nyei yietc zungv zuiz
2Kings24:4 yaac laaix ninh daix kuv mienh camv
2Kings24:5 Ye^ho^yaa^kim gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic caux ninh zoux nyei yietc zungv
2Kings24:6 Ye^ho^yaa^kim ziouc guei seix mi'aqv. Ninh nyei dorn
2Kings24:7 I^yipv nyei hungh maiv aengx cuotv ninh nyei guoqv
2Kings24:8 Ye^ho^yaa^kin faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings24:9 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings24:10 Wuov zanc Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh
2Kings24:11 Baeng-bieiv weih jienv zingh wuov zanc
2Kings24:12 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Kings24:13 Hnangv Ziouv gorngv nor
2Kings24:14 Ninh aengx guaatv nzengc Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx
2Kings24:15 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa guaatv Ye^ho^yaa^kin mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon. Liemh hungh maac caux ninh nyei auv mbuo
2Kings24:16 Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh yaac guaatv yietc zungv haih mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng siec cin dauh
2Kings24:17 Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh liepc Ye^ho^yaa^kin nyei youz-diex
2Kings24:18 Se^nde^ki^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Kings24:19 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Kings24:20 Se laaix Ziouv qiex jiez haic
2Kings25:1 Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux hungh da'juov hnyangx ziepc hlaax saeng-ziepc wuov hnoi
2Kings25:2 Ninh mbuo weih jienv zingh taux Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux hungh ziepc yietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx.
2Kings25:3 Taux feix hlaax saeng-juov yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh ngorc hnaangx kouv haic aqv. Baeqc fingx maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc.
2Kings25:4 Ninh mbuo ziouc mborqv zingh laatc tong
2Kings25:5 Mv baac Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei baeng-guanh zunc jienv mingh yaac zunc zaaic Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh yiem Ye^li^ko nyei ndau-baengh. Ninh nyei baeng-guanh guangc jienv ninh
2Kings25:6 Hungh diex yaac zuqc zorqv mi'aqv. Baeng dorh ninh mingh taux Lipv^laa Zingh
2Kings25:7 Ninh mbuo dorng jienv Se^nde^ki^yaa daix nzengc ninh nyei dorn. Ninh mbuo gueix Se^nde^ki^yaa nyei m'zing cuotv
2Kings25:8 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa zoux Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh ziepc juov hnyangx hmz hlaax saeng-cietv wuov hnoi
2Kings25:9 Ninh longc douz buov zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc caux yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei norm-norm biauv. Da'faanh longc jienv nyei biauv ninh buov nzengc.
2Kings25:10 Dongh gan jienv hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei baeng-bieiv wuov deix zuangx baeng mborqv mbaang weih gormx Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zingh laatc.
2Kings25:11 Hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei baeng-bieiv
2Kings25:12 Mv baac hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei baeng-bieiv liouh njiec gauh jomc jiex nyei mienh goux a'ngunc huingx
2Kings25:13 Yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei dongh siqv ndiouh caux yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei dongh siqv dieh longz caux domh dongh siqv bunh wuov deix
2Kings25:14 Ninh mbuo yaac zorqv caeng
2Kings25:15 Hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei baeng-bieiv yaac zorqv siou douz nyei jei caux bunh dorh mingh. Maiv gunv longc jiem longc nyaanh zoux daaih nyei jaa-dorngx ninh dorh mingh benx jiem benx nyaanh.
2Kings25:16 Saa^lo^morn weic zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv zoux wuov deix i norm domh ndiouh caux domh bunh caux dieh longz nyei dongh siqv zungv maiv haih nziang maiv hingh.
2Kings25:17 Norm-norm ndiouh ziepc betv ndorqc hlang. Ndiouh dueiv-mueiz borqv jienv buo ndorqc hlang
2Kings25:18 Hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei baeng-bieiv zorqv Se^lai^aa domh sai mienh caux zoux da'nyeic wuov dauh sai mienh
2Kings25:19 Yiem zingh zengc njiec nyei mienh ninh zorqv dauh dorh baeng mborqv jaax nyei domh baeng-bieiv caux biaa dauh tengx hungh diex caangh laangh nyei mienh. Ninh yaac zorqv dauh dongh diuc deic-bung nyei baeng wuov dauh jun-baeng-bieiv nyei sou-biuv
2Kings25:20 Domh baeng-bieiv
2Kings25:21 Yiem Haamatv Deic
2Kings25:22 Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh
2Kings25:23 Zuangx baeng-bieiv caux ninh mbuo nyei baeng muangx haiz Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh liepc Ge^ndaa^li^yaa zoux saengv-ziouv
2Kings25:24 Ge^ndaa^li^yaa houv jienv laengz waac mbuox ninh mbuo caux ninh mbuo nyei zuangx mienh
2Kings25:25 Mv baac yiem cietv hlaax nyei ziangh hoc
2Kings25:26 Hnangv naaic zuangx baeqc fingx hlo-hlo faix-faix caux yietc zungv baeng-bieiv ziouc biaux mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh.
2Kings25:27 Yiem Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Kings25:28 Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh caux Ye^ho^yaa^kin gorngv longx yaac bun ninh zueiz gauh hlang jiex caux ninh yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon wuov deix zuangx hungh diex zueiz nor.
2Kings25:29 Ye^ho^yaa^kin ziouc jaiv nqoi ninh yiem loh zuqv nyei lui-houx
2Kings25:30 Yiem Ye^ho^yaa^kin corc ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc

1Chronicles2:1 Naaiv se I^saa^laa^en nyei dorn. Maaih Lu^mben
1Chronicles2:2 Ndaan
1Chronicles2:3 Naaiv se Yu^ndaa nyei dorn. Maaih E^aa
1Chronicles2:4 Yu^ndaa nyei mbuangz
1Chronicles2:5 Beletv nyei dorn maaih Hetv^lon caux Haamun.
1Chronicles2:6 Zelaa nyei dorn maaih Simx^li
1Chronicles2:7 Kaanmi nyei dorn
1Chronicles2:8 Etaan maaih nduqc dauh dorn
1Chronicles2:9 Hetv^lon maaih buo dauh dorn
1Chronicles2:10 Laam zoux Am^mi^naa^ndapc nyei die. Am^mi^naa^ndapc zoux Naason nyei die. Naason zoux Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv.
1Chronicles2:11 Naason zoux Sanx^mon nyei die. Sanx^mon zoux Mbo^aatc nyei die.
1Chronicles2:12 Mbo^aatc zoux O^mbetc nyei die. O^mbetc zoux Jetc^si nyei die.
1Chronicles2:13 Jetc^si nyei dorn-hlo se E^li^apc. Da'nyeic dauh dorn heuc Aa^mbi^naa^ndapc. Da'faam dauh heuc Si^me^aa.
1Chronicles2:14 Da'feix dauh heuc Ne^tan^en. Da'hmz dauh heuc Latv^ndai.
1Chronicles2:15 Da'luoqc dauh heuc Osem. Da'cietv dauh heuc Ndaawitv.
1Chronicles2:16 Ninh mbuo nyei dorc heuc Se^lu^yaa caux Aa^mbi^gaa^yin. Se^lu^yaa maaih buo dauh dorn
1Chronicles2:17 Aa^mbi^gaa^yin zoux Aa^maa^saax nyei maa. Ninh nyei die se I^saa^maa^en Mienh
1Chronicles2:18 Hetv^lon nyei dorn
1Chronicles2:19 Aa^su^mbaa guei seix
1Chronicles2:20 Hu^aa zoux Uli nyei die. Uli zoux Mbe^saa^len nyei die.
1Chronicles2:21 Nqa'haav Hetv^lon duqv luoqc ziepc hnyangx nyei ziangh hoc ninh longc Gi^le^aatc nyei die
1Chronicles2:22 Segupc zoux Jaa^i nyei die. Jaa^i gunv nyic ziepc faam norm zingh yiem Gi^le^aatc Deic.
1Chronicles2:23 Mv baac Gesu caux Aalam caangv duqv Haau^wotv Jaa^i
1Chronicles2:24 Hetv^lon yiem Kaalepv E^faa^laa^taa guei seix liuz
1Chronicles2:25 Hetv^lon nyei dorn-hlo
1Chronicles2:26 Ye^laa^me^en aengx maaih dauh auv
1Chronicles2:27 Ye^laa^me^en nyei dorn-hlo
1Chronicles2:28 Onam nyei dorn maaih Sammai caux Yaa^ndaa. Sammai nyei dorn maaih Naa^ndapc caux Aa^mbi^qu.
1Chronicles2:29 Aa^mbi^qu nyei auv nyei mbuox heuc Aa^mbi^haa^in. Aa^mbi^haa^in yungz duqv i dauh dorn
1Chronicles2:30 Naa^ndapc nyei dorn maaih Se^le^letv caux Apc^baa^im. Se^le^letv daic mi'aqv
1Chronicles2:31 Apc^baa^im nyei dorn maaih Itc^i. Itc^i nyei dorn maaih Sesan. Sesan nyei dorn maaih Akc^lai.
1Chronicles2:32 Sammai nyei youz
1Chronicles2:33 Yo^naa^taan nyei dorn maaih Peletv caux Saax^saa. Naaiv se Ye^laa^me^en nyei zeiv-fun.
1Chronicles2:34 Sesan maiv maaih dorn
1Chronicles2:35 Sesan zorqv ninh nyei sieqv zoux Yaa^laa^haa nyei auv. Wuov dauh sieqv yungz dauh dorn
1Chronicles2:36 Atc^tai zoux Naatan nyei die. Naatan zoux Saax^mbaatc nyei die.
1Chronicles2:37 Saax^mbaatc zoux Efaan nyei die
1Chronicles2:38 O^mbetc zoux Ye^hu nyei die
1Chronicles2:39 Aa^saa^li^yaa zoux He^letv^te nyei die
1Chronicles2:40 E^le^aa^saax zoux Si^saa^mai nyei die
1Chronicles2:41 Sanlum zoux Ye^kaa^mi^yaa nyei die
1Chronicles2:42 Kaalepv zoux Ye^laa^me^en nyei youz. Kaalepv nyei dorn-hlo
1Chronicles2:43 He^mbo^lon nyei dorn maaih Kolaa
1Chronicles2:44 Semaa zoux Laa^ham nyei die. Laa^ham zoux Yo^laa^ke^am nyei die. Lekem zoux Sammai nyei die.
1Chronicles2:45 Sammai nyei dorn se Maa^on. Maa^on nyei die heuc Mbetc Sux^aa.
1Chronicles2:46 Kaalepv nyei jaav-zeih auv
1Chronicles2:47 Yaa^ndai nyei dorn maaih Lekem
1Chronicles2:48 Kaalepv nyei jaav-zeih auv
1Chronicles2:49 Maa^aa^kaa yaac yungz Matv^man^naa nyei die
1Chronicles2:50 Naaiv se Kaalepv nyei zeiv-fun. E^faa^laa^taa nyei dorn-hlo se Hu^aa nyei dorn
1Chronicles2:51 Aengx maaih Sanx^maa zoux Mbetc^le^hem
1Chronicles2:52 Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim nyei die
1Chronicles2:53 yaac maaih Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim nyei bungh buonc

1Chronicles2:55 Yaac maaih yiem Yaa^mbetc nyei sou-biuv nyei bungh buonc
1Chronicles3:1 Naaiv se Ndaawitv yiem He^mbo^lon wuov zanc duqv daaih nyei dorn. Dorn-hlo nyei mbuox heuc Amnon. Se Yitv^le^en Mienh
1Chronicles3:2 Da'faam dauh dorn
1Chronicles3:3 Da'hmz dauh dorn
1Chronicles3:4 Naaiv deix juqv dauh dorn se Ndaawitv yiem He^mbo^lon duqv daaih nyei dorn. Yiem naaic ninh gunv siec hnyangx caux juqv hlaax nyieqc. Ndaawitv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv faah ziepc faam hnyangx
1Chronicles3:5 yaac yiem naaic duqv naaiv deix fu'jueiv. Maaih Si^me^aa
1Chronicles3:6 Aengx maaih Ipc^haa
1Chronicles3:7 Nogaa
1Chronicles3:8 E^li^saa^maa
1Chronicles3:9 Naaiv deix yietc zungv se Ndaawitv nyei dorn. Cuotv liuz naaiv aengx maaih ninh nyei jaav-zeih auv nyei dorn mbuo. Taamaa zoux ninh mbuo nyei muoc.
1Chronicles3:10 Saa^lo^morn nyei dorn se Le^hox^mbo^am
1Chronicles3:11 Ye^ho^saa^fatv nyei dorn se Ye^ho^lam
1Chronicles3:12 Yo^aatc nyei dorn se Aa^maa^si^yaa
1Chronicles3:13 Yotaam nyei dorn se Aa^hatc
1Chronicles3:14 Maa^natv^se nyei dorn se Ammon
1Chronicles3:15 Yo^si^yaa nyei dorn maaih Yo^haa^nan zoux dorn-hlo
1Chronicles3:16 Ye^ho^yaa^kim nyei dorn maaih Ye^ho^yaa^kin
1Chronicles3:17 Naaiv se zuqc caangv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon wuov dauh Ye^ho^yaa^kin nyei zeiv-fun. Maaih ninh nyei dorn
1Chronicles3:18 aengx maaih Man^ki^laam
1Chronicles3:19 Be^ndaa^yaa nyei dorn maaih Se^lupv^mbaa^mben caux Si^me^i. Se^lupv^mbaa^mben nyei dorn maaih Me^sun^laam caux Haa^nan^yaa. Ninh mbuo nyei muoc heuc Se^lo^mitv.
1Chronicles3:20 Aengx maaih biaa dauh dorn
1Chronicles3:21 Haa^nan^yaa nyei dorn maaih Be^laa^ti^yaa caux Ye^saa^yaa. Yaac maaih Ye^saa^yaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles3:22 Se^kaa^ni^yaa maaih nduqc dauh dorn

1Chronicles3:24 E^li^o^nai maaih siec dauh dorn. Maaih Ho^ndaa^wi^yaa
1Chronicles4:1 Yu^ndaa nyei dorn maaih Beletv
1Chronicles4:2 So^mbaan nyei dorn

1Chronicles4:7 Helaa nyei dorn maaih Ce^e^letv
1Chronicles4:8 caux Kotc. Kotc zoux Aanupv caux So^mbe^mbaa nyei die yaac zoux Haalum nyei dorn
1Chronicles4:9 Yaa^mbetc yiem zuangx muoz-doic duqv mienh gauh taaih jiex. Ninh nyei maa tengx ninh cuotv mbuox heuc Yaa^mbetc
1Chronicles4:10 Yaa^mbetc heuc jienv tov I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh
1Chronicles4:11 Su^haa nyei gorx
1Chronicles4:12 Etc^ton zoux Mbetc Laafaa
1Chronicles4:13 Kenatv nyei dorn maaih Otc^ni^en caux Se^lai^aa. Otc^ni^en nyei dorn maaih Haataatv caux Me^o^no^tai.
1Chronicles4:14 Me^o^no^tai zoux O^faa^laa nyei die. Se^lai^aa zoux Yo^aapc nyei die

1Chronicles4:21 Yu^ndaa nyei dorn se Qelaa. Qelaa nyei dorn maaih Lekaa nyei die
1Chronicles4:22 Ko^se^mbaa nyei mienh
1Chronicles4:23 Naaiv deix mienh yiem Ne^taa^im caux Ge^nde^laa zoux nanv nie zaangc. Ninh mbuo yiem wuov yaac tengx hungh diex zoux gong.
1Chronicles4:24 Si^me^on nyei dorn maaih Ne^mu^en

1Chronicles4:33 Yaac maaih weih naaiv deix norm-norm zingh nyei fiuv-laangz mingh taux Mbaa^aa^latv. Naaiv se ninh mbuo liepc nguaaz-gorn nyei dorngx. Ninh mbuo yaac fiev douh zong daan.
1Chronicles4:34 Maaih Me^so^mbapc
1Chronicles4:35 Yo^en caux Ye^hu. Ye^hu se Yo^si^mbi^yaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles4:36 Yaac maaih E^li^o^nai
1Chronicles4:37 caux Zizaa. Zizaa se Sifi nyei dorn
1Chronicles4:38 Fiev gu'nguaaic naaiv deix yietc zungv mbuox se ziux bungh buonc nyei bieiv zeiv. Ninh mbuo nyei douh zong hiaangx jienv faaux camv.
1Chronicles4:39 Ninh mbuo cuotv mingh taux Ge^ndo ga'hlen

1Chronicles5:8 caux Aasaatv nyei dorn
1Chronicles5:9 Ninh mbuo yiem dong bung maengx mingh taux naaiv bung Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih nyei deic-bung-huaang weic zuqc ninh mbuo yiem Gi^le^aatc wuov zanc ninh mbuo nyei saeng-kuv hiaangx duqv camv.
1Chronicles5:10 Yiem Saulo zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo mingh caux Haagaa Mienh mborqv jaax ziouc mborqv hingh Haagaa Mienh. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem jienv Haagaa Mienh nyei ndopv-liuh buangv Gi^le^aatc nyei dong bung maengx.

1Chronicles7:15 Maaki tengx Hupc^bim caux Supv^bim lorz auv. Ninh nyei muoc nyei mbuox heuc Maa^aa^kaa. Maaki nyei da'nyeic dauh dorn heuc Se^lo^fe^hatc. Se^lo^fe^hatc kungx duqv sieqv hnangv.

1Chronicles8:9 Ninh nyei auv Ho^ndetc yungz Yo^mbapc
1Chronicles8:10 Ye^utc^e
1Chronicles8:11 Ninh nyei auv
1Chronicles8:12 En^baa^an nyei dorn maaih E^mbe
1Chronicles8:13 Aengx maaih Mbe^li^yaa caux Semaa
1Chronicles8:14 Maaih Aa^hi^yo
1Chronicles8:15 Se^mbaa^ndi^yaa
1Chronicles8:16 Mi^kaa^en
1Chronicles8:17 Se^mbaa^ndi^yaa
1Chronicles8:18 Itc^me^lai
1Chronicles8:19 Yaakim
1Chronicles8:20 E^li^ye^nai
1Chronicles8:21 Aa^ndaa^yaa
1Chronicles8:22 Itc^baan
1Chronicles8:23 Apc^ndon
1Chronicles8:24 Haa^nan^yaa
1Chronicles8:25 Ipc^ndai^yaa caux Be^nu^en zoux Saasakv nyei dorn.
1Chronicles8:26 Sam^se^lai
1Chronicles8:27 Yaa^aa^le^si^yaa
1Chronicles8:28 Naaiv deix mienh yietc zungv zoux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv ziux faaux mbuox yiem ninh mbuo nyei douh zong daan. Ninh mbuo yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh.
1Chronicles8:29 Gi^mbe^on nyei die
1Chronicles8:30 Ninh nyei dorn-hlo heuc Apc^ndon
1Chronicles8:31 Ge^ndo
1Chronicles8:32 caux Mikv^lotv. Mikv^lotv se Si^me^haa nyei die. Ninh mbuo yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nitv ninh mbuo nyei cien-ceqv.
1Chronicles8:33 Ne zoux Kitv nyei die
1Chronicles8:34 Yo^naa^taan nyei dorn maaih Melipv Mbaa^an. Melipv Mbaa^an zoux Mikaa nyei die.
1Chronicles8:35 Mikaa nyei dorn maaih Biton
1Chronicles8:36 Aa^hatc zoux Ye^ho^atc^ndaa nyei die
1Chronicles8:37 Mosaa zoux Mbi^ne^aa nyei die. Mbi^ne^aa nyei dorn
1Chronicles8:38 Aasen maaih juqv dauh dorn. Naaiv se ninh mbuo nyei mbuox. Maaih Atc^li^kam
1Chronicles8:39 Aasen nyei youz
1Chronicles8:40 Ulaam nyei dorn zoux mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng yaac zoux buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo maaih dorn maaih fun camv nyei. Yietc zungv maaih yietc baeqv hmz ziepc dauh. Naaiv deix yietc zungv se Mben^yaa^min nyei zeiv-fun.
1Chronicles9:1 Zuangx I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei douh zong faaux mbuox yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh douh daan. Yu^ndaa Mienh zuqc guaatv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon Guoqv weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv ziepc zuoqv.
1Chronicles9:2 Yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon nzuonx daaih yiem ganh nzipc nyei buonc ndau caux buonv-deic zingh nyei daauh guanh maaih I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Chronicles9:3 Maaih deix Yu^ndaa Mienh
1Chronicles9:4 Am^mi^hutv nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:5 Silo Mienh maaih Silo nyei dorn-hlo
1Chronicles9:6 Zelaa Mienh maaih Ye^u^en. Yu^ndaa Fingx nyei mienh maaih luoqc baeqv juov ziepc dauh.
1Chronicles9:7 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Mben^yaa^min Mienh maaih Me^sun^laam nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:8 Hatc^se^nu^aa se Ipc^ne^yaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:9 Mben^yaa^min Mienh ziux faaux mbuox yiem ninh mbuo nyei douh zong daan
1Chronicles9:10 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei sai mienh maaih Ye^ndaa^yaa
1Chronicles9:11 Maaih Hin^ki^yaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:12 Aa^hi^tupv se Aa^ndaa^yaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:13 Zoux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv nyei sai mienh yietc zungv maaih yietc cin cietv baeqv luoqc ziepc dauh. Ninh mbuo maaih banh zeic yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux gong fu-sux.
1Chronicles9:14 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Lewi Mienh maaih Hatc^supv nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:15 Maaih Mbakc^mbakc^kaa
1Chronicles9:16 Maaih Se^mai^aa nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:17 Zuov gaengh nyei mienh maaih Sanlum
1Chronicles9:18 zanc-zanc yiem Hungh Diex nyei Gaengh dong bung maengx nyei dorngx taux ih zanc. Naaiv deix mienh zinh ndaangc zoux Lewi Mienh nyei ciangv nyei zuov gaengh mienh.
1Chronicles9:19 Maaih Ko^le nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:20 Zinh ndaangc E^le^aa^saa nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:21 Se Me^se^le^mi^yaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles9:22 Ginv daaih yiem gaengh ndaangc zuov gaengh nyei yietc zungv mienh maaih nyic baeqv ziepc nyeic dauh. Ninh mbuo yiem ninh mbuo ganh nyei laangz ziux ninh mbuo nyei douh zong faaux mbuox. Zinh ndaangc Ndaawitv Hungh caux gorngv zinh hoz waac wuov dauh Saa^mu^en paaiv ninh mbuo zoux zuov gaengh mienh.
1Chronicles9:23 Ninh mbuo caux ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc liuc leiz zuov zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gaengh
1Chronicles9:24 Zuov gaengh mienh yiem biei bung
1Chronicles9:25 Ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz yiem ninh mbuo ganh nyei laangz
1Chronicles9:26 Mv baac maaih biei dauh zuov gaengh mienh
1Chronicles9:27 Lungh muonz zanc ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem weih gormx zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
1Chronicles9:28 Maaih deix Lewi Mienh oix zuqc goux yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fu-sux nyei ziangh hoc longc nyei jaa-sic. Zorqv cuotv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc saauv. Fungx bieqc nyei ziangh hoc yaac oix zuqc saauv.
1Chronicles9:29 Aengx maaih deix ninh mbuo paaiv goux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei jaa-dorngx caux yietc zungv cing-nzengc jaa-sic
1Chronicles9:30 Aengx maaih deix sai mienh nyei zeiv-fun liuc leiz peux ga'naaiv-ndaang nyei jauv.
1Chronicles9:31 Maaih dauh Lewi Mienh
1Chronicles9:32 Maaih deix ninh mbuo Ko^haatv Mienh nyei bungh buonc oix zuqc liuc leiz gengx Tin-Hungh nyei njuov. Norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi ninh mbuo oix zuqc liuc leiz daaih mbenc jienv.
1Chronicles9:33 Naaiv se baaux nzung nyei mienh
1Chronicles9:34 Naaiv se yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Lewi Mienh nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv ziux ninh mbuo nyei douh zong.
1Chronicles9:35 Gi^mbe^on nyei die
1Chronicles9:36 Ninh nyei dorn-hlo heuc Apc^ndon. Aengx maaih Sux^aa
1Chronicles9:37 Ge^ndo
1Chronicles9:38 Mikv^lotv zoux Si^me^aa nyei die. Ninh mbuo yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nitv jienv ninh mbuo juangc fingx nyei cien-ceqv.
1Chronicles9:39 Ne se Kitv nyei die
1Chronicles9:40 Yo^naa^taan nyei dorn maaih Melipv Mbaa^an. Melipv Mbaa^an zoux Mikaa nyei die.
1Chronicles9:41 Mikaa nyei dorn maaih Biton
1Chronicles9:42 Aa^hatc zoux Yaalaa nyei die
1Chronicles9:43 Mosaa zoux Mbi^ne^aa nyei die. Mbi^ne^aa nyei dorn se Le^fai^yaa
1Chronicles9:44 Aasen maaih juqv dauh dorn
1Chronicles10:1 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mingh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax. I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx biaux
1Chronicles10:2 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh zunc zaaic Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn
1Chronicles10:3 Mborqv jaax nyei jauv gunv zoux gunv hlo yaac gunv zoux gunv nitv Saulo. Buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh zunc zaaic
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo mbuox tengx ninh dorh mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc wuov dauh
1Chronicles10:5 Dorh mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc wuov dauh buatc Saulo daic mi'aqv
1Chronicles10:6 Hnangv naaic Saulo caux ninh nyei buo dauh dorn
1Chronicles10:7 Yiem wuov norm horngz nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc zungv buatc baeng biaux nzengc
1Chronicles10:8 Da'nyeic hnoi Fi^li^saa^die Mienh daaih tutv nzengc zuqc daix daic nyei mienh nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv
1Chronicles10:9 Ninh mbuo tutv nqoi Saulo nyei ga'naaiv
1Chronicles10:10 Ninh mbuo zorqv Saulo mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc an jienv ninh mbuo nyei zienh nyei biauv. Saulo nyei m'nqorngv ninh mbuo kuangx jienv Ndaagon nyei miuc-biauv.
1Chronicles10:11 Yiem Yaa^mbetc Gi^le^aatc nyei mienh haiz gorngv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh zoux bun Saulo nyei yietc zungv sic
1Chronicles10:12 yietc zungv mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng ziouc mingh zorqv Saulo caux ninh nyei dorn nyei sei dorh nzuonx taux Yaa^mbetc. Ninh mbuo zorqv Saulo dorn-diex doic nyei mbungv biopv yiem Yaa^mbetc nyei yietc diuh mba'ong zuei ndiangx ga'ndiev yaac zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc siec hnoi.
1Chronicles10:13 Saulo daic weic zuqc ninh dorngc Ziouv
1Chronicles10:14 Ninh maiv lorz Ziouv nyei za'eix. Ziouv ziouc bun ninh zuqc daic yaac zorqv ninh nyei guoqv jiu bun Jetc^si nyei dorn
1Chronicles11:1 Zuangx I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh He^mbo^lon gapv zunv yiem Ndaawitv wuov. Ninh mbuo gorngv
1Chronicles11:2 Zinh ndaangc
1Chronicles11:3 I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zuangx mienh gox daaih taux He^mbo^lon
1Chronicles11:4 Ndaawitv caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem
1Chronicles11:5 gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Chronicles11:6 Ndaawitv gorngv
1Chronicles11:7 Ndaawitv mingh yiem jienv wuov norm weih wuonv nyei dorngx gu'nyuoz. Wuov norm dorngx ziouc duqv mbuox heuc Ndaawitv nyei Zingh.
1Chronicles11:8 Ndaawitv aengx ceix wuov norm zingh
1Chronicles11:9 Ndaawitv yietc hnoi beiv yietc hnoi henv jienv faaux
1Chronicles11:10 Yiem naaiv mingh se gan Ndaawitv nyei henv haic nyei jun-zeiv mienh nyei bieiv zeiv. Ninh mbuo caux jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh tengx qaqv Ndaawitv
1Chronicles11:11 Naaiv se Ndaawitv henv jiex nyei jun-zeiv mienh nyei soux mouc. Maaih Hakv^mo^ni Mienh
1Chronicles11:12 Aa^hox^hai Mienh
1Chronicles11:13 Ninh caux Ndaawitv yiem Batc Ndammim doix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh gapv zunv yiem naaic oix mborqv jaax. Yiem naaic maaih nzong ndeic zuangx mbiauh mbaali buangv nzengc. Zuangx mienh yaac biaux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh.
1Chronicles11:14 Mv baac E^le^aa^saa caux ninh nyei mienh souv jienv naaiv nzong ndeic mbu'ndongx beu jienv ndeic
1Chronicles11:15 Yiem naaiv deix henv haic nyei faah ziepc dauh bieiv zeiv gu'nyuoz nyei buo dauh njiec taux Aa^ndun^lam mbaengx-kuotv nyei domh la'bieiv-zorng doix zuqc yietc guanh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh liepc ciangv yiem Le^faa^im Horngz.
1Chronicles11:16 Wuov zanc Ndaawitv yiem weih wuonv nyei dorngx gu'nyuoz. Maaih guanh Fi^li^saa^die Mienh yiem Mbetc^le^hem.
1Chronicles11:17 Ndaawitv haiz ngorc yiem Mbetc^le^hem nyei wuom ziouc gorngv cuotv nzuih
1Chronicles11:18 Naaiv deix “Buo Dauh” ziouc nimc bieqc Fi^li^saa^die Mienh beu nyei dorngx
1Chronicles11:19 Ndaawitv gorngv
1Chronicles11:20 Yo^aapc nyei youz
1Chronicles11:21 Ninh duqv mengh dauh gauh hlo jiex wuov deix “Faah ziepc dauh” yaac duqv zoux ninh mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv. Mv baac ninh nyei mengh dauh corc maiv ndongc wuov deix Buo Dauh.
1Chronicles11:22 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles11:23 Ninh aengx daix dauh I^yipv Mienh. Wuov dauh mienh sin hlang biaa ndorqc. Maiv gunv wuov dauh I^yipv Mienh nanv jienv cang lomh ndatv ndie nyei biaav hlo
1Chronicles11:24 Naaiv se Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles11:25 Ninh yaac duqv mengh dauh gauh hlo wuov deix Faah Ziepc Dauh mv baac maiv duqv funx bieqc caux wuov deix Buo Dauh. Ndaawitv yaac paaiv ninh zoux ninh nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei bieiv zeiv.
1Chronicles11:26 Henv haic nyei jun-zeiv mienh maaih hnangv naaiv
1Chronicles11:27 Haalotv Mienh
1Chronicles11:28 Te^ko^aa Mienh
1Chronicles11:29 Husaa Mienh
1Chronicles11:30 Ne^to^faa Mienh
1Chronicles11:31 Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei Gi^mbe^aa Mienh
1Chronicles11:32 Gaa^atc Horngz nyei mienh
1Chronicles11:33 Mbaa^hu^lim Mienh
1Chronicles11:34 Gimso Mienh
1Chronicles11:35 Haalaa Mienh
1Chronicles11:36 Me^ke^laa Mienh
1Chronicles11:37 Kaanmen Mienh
1Chronicles11:38 Naatan nyei youz
1Chronicles11:39 Ammon Mienh
1Chronicles11:40 Itc^lai Mienh
1Chronicles11:41 Hitv^tai Mienh
1Chronicles11:42 Lu^mben Mienh
1Chronicles11:43 Maa^aa^kaa nyei dorn
1Chronicles11:44 Atc^taa^lotv Mienh
1Chronicles11:45 Simli nyei dorn
1Chronicles11:46 Maa^haa^wai Mienh
1Chronicles11:47 E^li^en
1Chronicles12:1 Ndaawitv mingh yiem Sikc^laakv weic biaux Kitv nyei dorn
1Chronicles12:2 haih buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo haih longc zaaix jieqv mbiaauc jieqv buoz nanv ndopv-hlaang bungx la'bieiv fai buonv juang-zinx yaac duqv. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv se caux Saulo juangc fingx nyei Mben^yaa^min Mienh.
1Chronicles12:3 Maaih ninh mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv
1Chronicles12:4 caux Gi^mbe^on Mienh
1Chronicles12:5 E^lu^sai
1Chronicles12:6 En^kaa^naa
1Chronicles12:7 yaac maaih Ge^ndo Mienh
1Chronicles12:8 Maaih deix Gaatc Mienh biaux mingh Ndaawitv yiem wuov norm wuonv nyei dorngx
1Chronicles12:9 E^se zoux bieiv zeiv
1Chronicles12:10 Mitv^man^naa zoux da'feix
1Chronicles12:11 Atc^tai zoux da'luoqc
1Chronicles12:12 Yo^haa^nan zoux da'betv
1Chronicles12:13 Ye^le^mi zoux da'ziepc
1Chronicles12:14 Naaiv deix Gaatc Mienh zoux baeng-bieiv. Zoux gauh faix wuov deix div duqv yietc baeqv dauh. Zoux hlo wuov deix div duqv yietc cin dauh.
1Chronicles12:15 Se dongh naaiv deix baeng-bieiv jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih doix zuqc zih hlaax wuom hlo buangv kamx
1Chronicles12:16 Aengx maaih deix Mben^yaa^min Mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh mingh taux Ndaawitv weih wuonv nyei dorngx wuov.
1Chronicles12:17 Ndaawitv cuotv mingh zipv ninh mbuo yaac gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
1Chronicles12:18 Wuov zanc Singx Lingh njiec wuov deix “Faah Ziepc Dauh” nyei bieiv zeiv
1Chronicles12:19 Maaih deix Maa^natv^se Mienh yaac biaux mingh bieqc Ndaawitv
1Chronicles12:20 Ndaawitv mingh Sikc^laakv nyei ziangh hoc
1Chronicles12:21 Naaiv deix mienh tengx Ndaawitv mborqv guanh guanh zaqc baeng
1Chronicles12:22 Hnoi-hnoi maaih mienh daaih tengx Ndaawitv
1Chronicles12:23 Naaiv se maaih nzoih mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc mingh He^mbo^lon lorz Ndaawitv wuov deix baeng nyei soux mouc. Ninh mbuo oix zorqv Saulo nyei guoqv jiu bun Ndaawitv ziux Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
1Chronicles12:24 Yu^ndaa Mienh nanv torngv-baaih caux cang liuc leiz ziangx mborqv jaax
1Chronicles12:25 Si^me^on Mienh mborqv jaax henv haic nyei baeng
1Chronicles12:26 Lewi Mienh
1Chronicles12:27 liemh Aalon nyei douh zong nyei bieiv zeiv
1Chronicles12:28 Aengx maaih dauh hnyangx-jeiv lunx
1Chronicles12:29 Caux Saulo juangc fingx nyei Mben^yaa^min Mienh maaih buo cin dauh. Naaiv deix gauh camv jiex zinh ndaangc tengx Saulo.
1Chronicles12:30 E^faa^im Fingx henv haic nyei baeng
1Chronicles12:31 Maa^natv^se nyei ndaamv-fingx
1Chronicles12:32 Itc^saax^kaa Mienh
1Chronicles12:33 Se^mbu^lun Mienh maaih biaa waanc dauh hoqc liuz yaac liuc leiz ziangx cuotv mingh mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo maaih nzoih nyungc-nyungc mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc. Ninh mbuo maaih nduqc diuc hnyouv tengx Ndaawitv.
1Chronicles12:34 Napv^taa^li Mienh maaih yietc cin dauh baeng-bieiv caux jienv buo waanc siec cin dauh nanv torngv-baaih caux cang mborqv jaax nyei baeng.
1Chronicles12:35 Ndaan Fingx maaih mbenc ziangx mborqv jaax nyei mienh i waanc hietc cin luoqc baeqv dauh.
1Chronicles12:36 Aa^se Fingx hoqc liuz mbenc ziangx mborqv jaax nyei mienh maaih biei waanc dauh.
1Chronicles12:37 Yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih dong bung maengx nyei Lu^mben Mienh
1Chronicles12:38 Naaiv deix yietc zungv baeng liuc leiz ziangx mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo daaih taux He^mbo^lon buangv hnyouv oix liepc Ndaawitv zoux hungh
1Chronicles12:39 Ninh mbuo caux Ndaawitv yiem wuov buo hnoi
1Chronicles12:40 Yiem nitv fatv ninh mbuo nyei mienh caux yiem go nyei mienh
1Chronicles13:1 Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei gunv yietc cin dauh nyei baeng-bieiv caux gunv yietc baeqv dauh nyei baeng-bieiv yietc zungv caangh laangh.
1Chronicles13:2 Ninh yaac gorngv mbuox yietc zungv gapv zunv nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Chronicles13:3 Bun mbuo dorh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nzuonx mbuo naaiv daaih
1Chronicles13:4 Gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh dongh hnyouv dingc hnangv naaiv nor zoux
1Chronicles13:5 Ndaawitv ziouc bun I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gapv zunv yiem I^yipv nyei Si^hox Ndaaih taux Haamatv nyei jauv-kuv wuov weic dorh Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim nzuonx.
1Chronicles13:6 Ndaawitv caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mingh Yu^ndaa nyei Mbaa^aa^laa Zingh
1Chronicles13:7 Ninh mbuo yiem Aa^mbi^naa^ndapc nyei biauv dorh Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang cuotv daaih an jienv yietc jaax siang-ngongh cie tor. Utc^saa caux Aa^hi^yo dorh jauv.
1Chronicles13:8 Ndaawitv caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien longc nzengc qaqv zoux jorm
1Chronicles13:9 Ninh mbuo daaih taux Ki^ndon nyei mborqv mbiauh ciangv
1Chronicles13:10 Ziouv qiex jiez! haic Utc^saa
1Chronicles13:11 Ndaawitv qiex jiez haic Ziouv weic zuqc Ziouv ga'qiex baetv cuotv zoux bun Utc^saa. Wuov norm dorngx ziouc heuc Beletv Utc^saa taux ih jaax hnoi.
1Chronicles13:12 Wuov hnoi Ndaawitv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh ziouc gorngv
1Chronicles13:13 Ndaawitv ziouc maiv dorh Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang mingh Ndaawitv nyei Zingh. Ninh dorh mingh Gatc Mienh
1Chronicles13:14 Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem O^mbetc E^ndom nyei biauv buo hlaax nyieqc. Ziouv ceix fuqv bun O^mbetc E^ndom nyei biauv caux ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv.
1Chronicles14:1 Tailaqv nyei hungh
1Chronicles14:2 Ndaawitv ziouc hiuv duqv Ziouv liepc ninh zoux hungh gunv I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung. Weic ninh nyei baeqc fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Chronicles14:3 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
1Chronicles14:4 Naaiv se Ndaawitv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem duqv daaih nyei fu'jueiv nyei mbuox. Maaih Sam^mu^waa
1Chronicles14:5 Ipc^haa
1Chronicles14:6 Nogaa
1Chronicles14:7 E^li^saa^maa
1Chronicles14:8 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh muangx haiz mienh liepc Ndaawitv zoux hungh gunv nzengc I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung
1Chronicles14:9 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh zungv daaih luv Le^faa^im Horngz mi'aqv.
1Chronicles14:10 Ndaawitv ziouc naaic Tin-Hungh
1Chronicles14:11 Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei mienh ziouc mingh Mbaa^an Be^laa^sim
1Chronicles14:12 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei miuc-fangx guangc jienv wuov biaux
1Chronicles14:13 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh aengx daaih luv nzunc Le^faa^im Horngz.
1Chronicles14:14 Ndaawitv ziouc aengx naaic nzunc Tin-Hungh. Tin-Hungh aengx dau
1Chronicles14:15 Meih mbuo yietv haiz baeng-guanh yangh jauv mbui nyei qiex yiem yienh zouc lomc nyei ndiangx gu'nguaaic
1Chronicles14:16 Ndaawitv ei jienv Tin-Hungh paaiv nyei waac zoux. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem Gi^mbe^on mborqv jienv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mingh taux Gese.
1Chronicles14:17 Ndaawitv nyei mengh dauh ziouc sing buangv norm-norm guoqv. Ziouv yaac bun maanc fingx gamh nziex Ndaawitv.
1Chronicles15:1 Ndaawitv yiem Ndaawitv Zingh weic ganh ceix ziangx hungh dinc
1Chronicles15:2 wuov zanc Ndaawitv gorngv
1Chronicles15:3 Ndaawitv ziouc heuc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh gapv zunv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem weic dorh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang daaih an ninh liuc leiz ziangx nyei dorngx.
1Chronicles15:4 Ninh heuc Aalon nyei zeiv-fun caux Lewi Mienh daaih gapv zunv.
1Chronicles15:5 Yiem Ko^haatv nyei zeiv-fun daaih maaih U^li^en zoux bieiv zeiv yaac maaih yietc baeqv nyic ziepc dauh ninh nyei bungh buonc mienh.
1Chronicles15:6 Yiem Me^laa^li nyei zeiv-fun daaih maaih Aa^saax^yaa zoux bieiv zeiv yaac maaih nyic baeqv nyic ziepc dauh ninh nyei bungh buonc mienh.
1Chronicles15:7 Yiem Geson Mienh nyei zeiv-fun daaih maaih Yo^en zoux bieiv zeiv yaac maaih yietc baeqv faah ziepc dauh ninh nyei bungh buonc mienh.
1Chronicles15:8 Yiem E^li^saa^faan nyei zeiv-fun daaih maaih Se^mai^aa zoux bieiv zeiv yaac maaih nyic baeqv dauh ninh nyei bungh buonc mienh.
1Chronicles15:9 Yiem He^mbo^lon nyei zeiv-fun daaih maaih E^li^en zoux bieiv zeiv yaac maaih betv ziepc dauh ninh nyei bungh buonc mienh.
1Chronicles15:10 Yiem Utc^si^en nyei zeiv-fun daaih maaih Am^mi^naa^ndapc zoux bieiv zeiv yaac maaih yietc baeqv ziepc nyeic dauh ninh nyei bungh buonc mienh.
1Chronicles15:11 Ndaawitv aengx heuc sai mienh
1Chronicles15:12 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
1Chronicles15:13 Se laaix meih mbuo Lewi Mienh zinh ndaangc wuov nzunc maiv mingh gaeng naaiv norm Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang daaih
1Chronicles15:14 Sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh ziouc saax ganh cing-nzengc weic dorh Ziouv
1Chronicles15:15 Lewi Mienh longc gaeng Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nyei ndiangx gaeng Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang ziux Ziouv longc Mose paaiv nyei waac.
1Chronicles15:16 Ndaawitv mbuox Lewi Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv paaiv ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz zoux baaux nzung nyei mienh
1Chronicles15:17 Lewi Mienh ziouc paaiv Yo^en nyei dorn
1Chronicles15:18 Ninh mbuo aengx ginv deix ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz weic tengx ninh mbuo. Maaih Se^kaa^li^yaa
1Chronicles15:19 Baaux nzung nyei mienh
1Chronicles15:20 Se^kaa^li^yaa
1Chronicles15:21 Matv^ti^ti^yaa
1Chronicles15:22 Lewi Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv Ke^naa^ni^yaa
1Chronicles15:23 Mbe^le^ki^yaa caux En^kaa^naa zoux zuov gaengh mienh zuov Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang.
1Chronicles15:24 Qe^mbaa^ni^yaa
1Chronicles15:25 Ndaawitv caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mienh gox caux gunv yietc cin dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv ziouc mingh O^mbetc E^ndom nyei biauv
1Chronicles15:26 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh tengx gaeng Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nyei Lewi Mienh
1Chronicles15:27 Ndaawitv zuqv jienv la'maah ndie-muonc zoux daaih nyei lui-ndaauv. Gaeng Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nyei Lewi Mienh caux baaux nzung mienh nyei bieiv
1Chronicles15:28 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ziouc njien-youh nyei heuc mbui
1Chronicles15:29 Dorh Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang daaih taux Ndaawitv nyei Zingh nyei ziangh hoc
1Chronicles16:1 Zuangx mienh dorh Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang bieqc daaih an jienv Ndaawitv corng nyei ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien dorh ga'naaiv fongc horc buov ziec yaac ziec weic jiu tong.
1Chronicles16:2 Ndaawitv fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv liuz
1Chronicles16:3 Ninh aengx bun njuov I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
1Chronicles16:4 Ndaawitv paaiv deix Lewi Mienh yiem Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien maengx fu-sux
1Chronicles16:5 Aasaapc zoux bieiv zeiv
1Chronicles16:6 Sai mienh
1Chronicles16:7 Dongh wuov hnoi Ndaawitv paaiv Aasaapc caux ninh nyei gorx-youz baaux naaiv diuh singx nzung dor-ziec Ziouv.
1Chronicles16:8 Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv
1Chronicles16:9 Oix zuqc dorng jienv ninh baaux nzung
1Chronicles16:10 Oix zuqc weic ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbuox bungx waac-maux
1Chronicles16:11 Oix zuqc zimh lorz Ziouv caux ninh nyei qaqv
1Chronicles16:12 O ninh nyei bou
1Chronicles16:13 
1Chronicles16:14 Ninh se Ziouv
1Chronicles16:15 Ninh jangx jienv ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac taux yietc liuz
1Chronicles16:16 se caux Apc^laa^ham liepc nyei ngaengc waac
1Chronicles16:17 Ninh zorqv naaiv deix ngaengc waac caux Yaakopv liepc benx leiz-latc
1Chronicles16:18 Ninh gorngv
1Chronicles16:19 Ninh mbuo mienh zoqc wuov zanc
1Chronicles16:20 ninh mbuo yiem naaiv norm deic-bung jiex wuov norm deic-bung
1Chronicles16:21 Ninh maiv bun haaix dauh mienh zeix ninh mbuo
1Chronicles16:22 Ninh gorngv
1Chronicles16:23 Gormx lungh ndiev aah! Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng Ziouv. Hnoi-hnoi zunh yaangh ninh nyei njoux en.
1Chronicles16:24 Yiem maanc guoqv zunh yaangh ninh nyei njang-laangc
1Chronicles16:25 Weic zuqc Ziouv se hlo haic
1Chronicles16:26 Weic zuqc zuangx fingx nyei yietc zungv zienh benx miuc-fangx hnangv
1Chronicles16:27 Maaih njang-laangc caux haangh daauh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien
1Chronicles16:28 O mienh maanh nyei maanc fingx aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei qaqv caux njang-laangc.
1Chronicles16:29 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv puix ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox
1Chronicles16:30 Gormx lungh ndiev oix zuqc sin zinx jienv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
1Chronicles16:31 Lungh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh. Ndau aah! Oix zuqc orn-lorqc. Tov bun yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx gorngv
1Chronicles16:32 Koiv caux yiem koiv nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc qom qaau nyei mbui. Lingh deic caux yiem lingh deic nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv
1Chronicles16:33 Wuov zanc lomc zaangc nyei yietc zungv ndiangx oix baaux nzung
1Chronicles16:34 Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh se longx haic
1Chronicles16:35 Yaac oix zuqc gorngv
1Chronicles16:36 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv
1Chronicles16:37 Ndaawitv bun Aasaapc caux ninh juangc fingx nyei gorx-youz yiem Ziouv nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien zanc-zanc fu-sux ziux hnoi-hnoi nyei buonc gong.
1Chronicles16:38 Ninh yaac bun O^mbetc E^ndom caux ninh nyei luoqc ziepc betv dauh gorx-youz caux jienv ninh mbuo fu-sux. Ye^ndu^tun nyei dorn
1Chronicles16:39 Ndaawitv bun Saax^ndokc sai mienh caux ninh juangc zoux sai mienh nyei gorx-youz
1Chronicles16:40 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv nyei ziec-dorngh ndorm-ndorm muonz-muonz ei fiev jienv Ziouv bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Leiz-Latc Sou fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
1Chronicles16:41 Ninh mbuo aengx maaih Hemaan caux Ye^ndu^tun caux zengc njiec ginv daaih nyei mienh
1Chronicles16:42 Hemaan caux Ye^ndu^tun liuc leiz nzatc caux caauh zeiv caux nyungc-nyungc nzung nyei jaa-sic weic longc baaux nzung ceng nyei ziangh hoc. Ye^ndu^tun nyei zeiv-fun duqv zoux zuov gaengh nyei mienh.
1Chronicles16:43 Zuangx mienh ziouc nzuonx. Gorqv-mienh nzuonx gorqv-mienh nyei biauv. Ndaawitv yaac nzuonx ganh nyei biauv weic buang waac bun ninh nyei hmuangv doic.
1Chronicles17:1 Ndaawitv duqv yiem jienv ganh nyei hungh dinc
1Chronicles17:2 Naatan dau Ndaawitv
1Chronicles17:3 Dongh wuov muonz Naatan duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
1Chronicles17:4 “Mingh mbuox yie nyei bou
1Chronicles17:5 Yiem yie dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung taux ih hnoi yie maiv yiem jiex yietc norm biauv. Yie yiem jiex yietc norm ndopv-liuh ciangv suiv jiex ganh norm ndopv-liuh ciangv
1Chronicles17:6 Da'faanh yie caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh suiv jiex nyei dorngx
1Chronicles17:7 “Ih zanc mbuox yie nyei bou
1Chronicles17:8 Maiv gunv meih mingh haaix
1Chronicles17:9 Yie oix bun norm dorngx yie nyei baeqc fingx
1Chronicles17:10 yaac maiv hnangv yie paaiv domh jien gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei ziangh hoc. Yie yaac oix hingh jiex meih nyei yietc zungv win-wangv. “+‘Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Yie yaac mbuox meih
1Chronicles17:11 Meih nyei hnoi-nyieqc buangv
1Chronicles17:12 Ninh zungv oix gomv norm biauv bun yie yiem. Yie yaac oix liepc ninh nyei weic taux yietc liuz.
1Chronicles17:13 Yie oix zoux ninh nyei die. Ninh yaac oix zoux yie nyei dorn. Yie oix yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv ninh
1Chronicles17:14 Yie zungv oix liepc ninh yietc liuz gunv yie nyei baeqc fingx caux yie nyei guoqv. Ninh nyei hungh weic zungv oix liepc taux yietc liuz.”+’+”
1Chronicles17:15 Naatan zorqv Tin-Hungh laauc yaangh bun ninh naaiv deix yietc zungv sic gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv.
1Chronicles17:16 Ndaawitv Hungh ziouc bieqc mingh zueiz jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien gorngv

1Chronicles17:23 “O Ziouv aac

1Chronicles18:2 Ndaawitv yaac mborqv hingh Mo^apc Mienh. Ninh mbuo ziouc zuqc yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev yaac cuotv nzou bun ninh.
1Chronicles18:3 Ndaawitv aengx mingh mborqv So^mbaa nyei hungh
1Chronicles18:4 Ndaawitv caangv duqv ninh mbuo mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie yietc cin jaax
1Chronicles18:5 Ndaa^matv^gatc nyei Silie Mienh cuotv daaih tengx So^mbaa nyei hungh
1Chronicles18:6 Nqa'haav Ndaawitv liepc baeng-ciangv yiem Silie Mienh nyei deic
1Chronicles18:7 Ndaawitv yaac caangv Haa^ndatc^e^se nyei jien nanv jienv nyei jiem-torngv-baaih dorh mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem.
1Chronicles18:8 Ndaawitv aengx mingh Haa^ndatc^e^se nyei i norm zingh

1Chronicles19:1 Hoz daaih Ammon Mienh nyei hungh
1Chronicles19:2 Ndaawitv gorngv
1Chronicles19:3 zoux hlo nyei Ammon Mienh gorngv mbuox Haanun
1Chronicles19:4 Haanun ziouc zorqv Ndaawitv nyei mienh
1Chronicles19:5 Maaih mienh zorqv naaiv deix mienh nyei sic mingh mbuox Ndaawitv wuov zanc
1Chronicles19:6 Ammon Mienh hiuv duqv Ndaawitv qiex jiez ninh mbuo
1Chronicles19:7 Ninh mbuo cingv duqv buo waanc i cin norm mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie
1Chronicles19:8 Ndaawitv muangx haiz naaiv deix sic
1Chronicles19:9 Ammon Mienh cuotv daaih yiem ninh mbuo nyei zingh ziux mborqv jaax nyei yietc nyeic mbaih jienv. Daaih tengx ninh mbuo wuov deix hungh ganh yiem norm dorngx nyei ndau-huaang.
1Chronicles19:10 Yo^aapc buatc mborqv jaax nyei mienh yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx caux ninh nyei nqa'haav nqaang
1Chronicles19:11 Zengc njiec nyei baeng ninh jiu bun ninh nyei youz
1Chronicles19:12 Yo^aapc gorngv
1Chronicles19:13 Oix zuqc henv yaac oix zuqc weic mbuo nyei mienh caux mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei zingh zoux jun-zeiv mienh. Tov Ziouv zoux ziux ninh buatc horpc zuqc zoux nyei.”
1Chronicles19:14 Yo^aapc caux gan ninh wuov deix baeng cuotv mingh mborqv Silie Mienh. Silie Mienh ziouc yiem Yo^aapc nyei wuov ndaangc maengx tiux biaux.
1Chronicles19:15 Ammon Mienh buatc Silie Mienh tiux biaux
1Chronicles19:16 Silie Mienh buatc ninh mbuo ganh suei I^saa^laa^en Mienh
1Chronicles19:17 Maaih mienh gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv
1Chronicles19:18 Mv baac Silie Mienh yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx biaux. Ndaawitv yaac daix Silie Mienh zaangv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie nyei baeng siec cin dauh caux yangh ndau nyei baeng biei waanc dauh
1Chronicles19:19 Yiem Haa^ndatc^e^se nyei buoz-ndiev wuov deix hungh buatc ninh mbuo zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv baaic
1Chronicles20:1 Taux cun-gen hnoi
1Chronicles20:2 Ndaawitv muonx ninh mbuo nyei hungh diex ndongx nyei jiem-ningv. Naaiv norm hungh ningv maaih hniev-daauh nyic ziepc yietv joih. Yiem wuov norm hungh ningv maaih norm jaaix haic nyei la'bieiv. Mienh aengx zorqv naaiv norm hungh ningv ndongx jienv Ndaawitv nyei m'nqorngv. Ninh yaac caangv duqv wuov norm zingh nyei ga'naaiv camv nyei
1Chronicles20:3 aengx dorh yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh cuotv daaih hatc ninh mbuo longc njoux
1Chronicles20:4 Hoz daaih I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem Gese Zingh caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax. Wuov zanc Husaa Mienh
1Chronicles20:5 Aengx maaih nzunc I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh mborqv jaax
1Chronicles20:6 Aengx maaih nzunc yiem Gatc Zingh mborqv jaax. Yiem wuov maaih dauh hlo hlang nyei mienh
1Chronicles20:7 Ninh huotv I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov zanc
1Chronicles20:8 Naaiv se yiem Gatc Zingh hlo hlang mienh nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh mbuo zuqc yiem Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei bou nyei buoz-ndiev zuqc daix.
1Chronicles21:1 Saadaan jiez daaih oix hoic I^saa^laa^en
1Chronicles21:2 Ndaawitv ziouc gorngv mbuox Yo^aapc caux zuangx domh baeng-bieiv
1Chronicles21:3 Mv baac Yo^aapc gorngv
1Chronicles21:4 Mv baac Yo^aapc maiv haih ngaengc maiv duqv hungh diex nyei waac. Ninh ziouc cuotv mingh gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung
1Chronicles21:5 Yo^aapc ziouc mingh mbuox Ndaawitv ninh saauv baeqc fingx nyei soux mouc. I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
1Chronicles21:6 Mv baac Yo^aapc maiv saauv Lewi caux Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei mienh
1Chronicles21:7 Tin-Hungh maiv horpc hnyouv naaiv deix saauv baeqc fingx nyei sic
1Chronicles21:8 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
1Chronicles21:9 Ziouv mbuox Ndaawitv nyei douc waac mienh
1Chronicles21:10 “Mingh mbuox Ndaawitv
1Chronicles21:11 Gaatc ziouc mingh lorz Ndaawitv yaac gorngv mbuox ninh
1Chronicles21:12 Longc buo hnyangx nyei domh ngorc fai buo hlaax nyieqc zuqc win-wangv nyei nzuqc ndaauv zunc meih mbuo fai buo hnoi zuqc Ziouv nyei nzuqc ndaauv
1Chronicles21:13 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Gaatc
1Chronicles21:14 Ziouv ziouc bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc domh wuon-baengc. Maaih siec waanc dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh daic.
1Chronicles21:15 Tin-Hungh yaac paaiv fin-mienh mingh mietc Ye^lu^saa^lem. Mv baac fin-mienh njiec buoz mietc nyei ziangh hoc
1Chronicles21:16 Ndaawitv cau hmien mangc
1Chronicles21:17 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
1Chronicles21:18 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh mbuox Gaatc
1Chronicles21:19 Ndaawitv ziouc ziux Gaatc dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox gorngv nyei waac mingh zoux.

1Chronicles29:1 Ndaawitv gorngv mbuox gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh
1Chronicles29:2 Weic naaiv yie longc nzengc banh zeic liuc leiz ga'naaiv weic zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei jaa-sic. Yie lorz jiem weic zoux jiem nyei jaa-sic
1Chronicles29:3 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Cuotv liuz yie weic yie nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv liuc leiz nyei ga'naaiv
1Chronicles29:4 Maaih jiem juqv waanc buo cin joih
1Chronicles29:5 weic jiem jaa-sic
1Chronicles29:6 I^saa^laa^en Mienh fingx-fingx nyei bieiv zeiv caux bungh buonc nyei bieiv zeiv
1Chronicles29:7 Ninh mbuo weic Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gong fongc horc ziepc waanc biaa cin joih caux hmz ziepc nyeic joih jiem

1Chronicles29:9 Zuangx baeqc fingx ziouc a'hneiv weic zuqc naaiv deix mienh buangv hnyouv cuotv fim fongc horc bun Ziouv. Ndaawitv Hungh yaac za'gengh njien-youh haic aqv.

1Chronicles29:22 Wuov hnoi ninh mbuo ziouc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien njien-njien youh youh nyei nyanc yaac hopv. Ninh mbuo aengx nyiemc Ndaawitv nyei dorn

2Chronicles1:1 Ndaawitv nyei dorn
2Chronicles1:2 Saa^lo^morn paaiv I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh
2Chronicles1:3 Saa^lo^morn caux gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh ziouc mingh Gi^mbe^on yiem hlang nyei dorngx
2Chronicles1:4 (Mv baac Ndaawitv dorh Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem Ki^li^yaatv Ye^aa^lim taux ninh liuc leiz ziangx nyei dorngx
2Chronicles1:5 Hu^aa nyei fun
2Chronicles1:6 Saa^lo^morn ziouc yiem Wuic Buangh nyei Ndopv-Liuh
2Chronicles1:7 Dongh wuov muonz Tin-Hungh hinc cuotv bun Saa^lo^morn buatc yaac gorngv mbuox ninh

2Chronicles1:11 Tin-Hungh dau Saa^lo^morn

2Chronicles1:13 Saa^lo^morn ziouc yiem Gi^mbe^on
2Chronicles1:14 Saa^lo^morn siou mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux maaz. Ninh maaih yietc cin feix baeqv norm mborqv jaax maaz-cie yaac maaih yietc waanc i cin dauh maaz. Maaz caux maaz-cie an jienv siou mborqv jaax cie nyei zingh yaac maaih deix caux ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles1:15 Hungh diex yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem bun jiem bun nyaanh camv nyei
2Chronicles1:16 Saa^lo^morn nyei maaz se yiem I^yipv caux Ku^e dorh daaih. Hungh diex nyei saeng-eix mienh ziux dingc nyei jaax-zinh maaiz Ku^e nyei maaz.
2Chronicles1:17 Yiem I^yipv maaiz daaih nyei mborqv jaax cie yietc norm biei joih ziepc feix lungz nyaanh. Yietc dauh maaz yietc joih nyic lungz. Ninh mbuo yaac maaic mingh bun Hitv^tai Mienh caux Silie nyei zuangx hungh diex.
2Chronicles2:1 Saa^lo^morn dingc hnyouv oix weic Ziouv nyei Mengh ceix norm biauv yaac oix weic ninh ganh ceix norm hungh dinc.
2Chronicles2:2 Ninh ginv cuotv siec waanc dauh mienh bienh ga'naaiv caux hietc waanc dauh yiem mbong-aiv dorngx zuqc la'bieiv. Aengx maaih buo cin luoqc baeqv dauh zoux gunv gong mienh gunv ninh mbuo.
2Chronicles2:3 Saa^lo^morn fungx fienx mingh bun Tailaqv nyei hungh
2Chronicles2:4 Yie oix jiez gorn weic Ziouv
2Chronicles2:5 “Yie oix ceix nyei biauv oix zuqc za'gengh hlo haic

2Chronicles3:1 Saa^lo^morn ziouc jiez gorn ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles3:2 Saa^lo^morn zoux hungh da'feix hnyangx
2Chronicles3:3 Naaiv se Saa^lo^morn ceix zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei ciqv-cunx. Ziux loz-hnoi nyei ciqv-cunx
2Chronicles3:4 Biauv nza'hmien maengx nyei gaengh ndaangc wuov norm dorngx ndaauv nyic ziepc ndorqc
2Chronicles3:5 Gu'nyuoz hlo jiex wuov qongx longc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx weih
2Chronicles3:6 Ninh longc nzueic haic nyei la'bieiv-jaaix zorng biauv gu'nyuoz. Ninh longc nyei jiem se yiem Baan^waa^im daaih nyei jiem.
2Chronicles3:7 Aengx longc jiem buang jienv haengh
2Chronicles3:8 Ninh yaac ceix Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx ndaauv nyic ziepc ndorqc
2Chronicles3:9 Jiem-ding nyei hniev-daauh se ziepc hmz lungz. Biauv gu'nguaaic wuov deix qongx-qongx yaac longc jiem buang jienv.
2Chronicles3:10 Yiem Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx ninh zuqc i dauh ke^lu^mbim nyei fangx longc jiem buang jienv.
2Chronicles3:11 Naaiv deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim yang jienv ndaatv nyic ziepc ndorqc ndaauv. Yietc dauh nyei yietc bung ndaatv biaa ndorqc ndaauv yaac yang donx jienv wuov bung njongc. Naaiv dauh yang nyei wuov bung ndaatv caux wuov dauh yang nyei naaiv bung ndaatv camx jienv jaax.
2Chronicles3:12 Da'nyeic dauh ke^lu^mbim nyei ndaatv
2Chronicles3:13 Naaiv deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim yang ndaatv nyic ziepc ndorqc ndaauv. Naaiv deix i dauh souv jienv
2Chronicles3:14 Ninh longc ba'gi suix setv mbuov
2Chronicles3:15 Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx zoux i norm domh ndiouh hlang faah ziepc hmz ndorqc. I norm ndiouh dueiv-mueiz borqv biaa ndorqc hlang.
2Chronicles3:16 Ninh ciqv limc nzenc jienv ndiouh dueiv-mueiz. Ninh aengx zoux yietc baeqv norm ziqc liouh biouv dingx jienv naaiv deix limc.
2Chronicles3:17 Ninh zorqv naaiv deix i norm ndiouh liepc daaih don jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx. Maaih norm yiem naamh bung
2Chronicles4:1 Ninh longc dongh siqv zoux norm ziec-dorngh ndaauv nyic ziepc ndorqc
2Chronicles4:2 Ninh aengx dox norm domh bunh junh nyei. Bunh nzuih gu'nguaaic naaiv bung taux wuov bung jangv ziepc ndorqc. Bunh yaac hlang biaa ndorqc. Ndorqc huing gormx duqv faah ziepc ndorqc.
2Chronicles4:3 Yiem bunh nzuih ga'ndiev maaih ngongh nyei fangx. Yietc ndorqc maaih ziepc dauh. Dox wuov zanc dox benx i liouz yaac caux domh bunh benx yietc ndunh.
2Chronicles4:4 Domh bunh don jienv ziepc nyeic dauh ngongh gouv. Buo dauh ngongh gouv huin baqv bung
2Chronicles4:5 Domh bunh hoz yietc buoz-zaangv. Bunh nzuih yaac hnangv zaanv nyei nzuih nor
2Chronicles4:6 Ninh aengx zoux ziepc norm bunh weic longc nzaaux ga'naaiv. Biaa norm don jienv naamh bung
2Chronicles4:7 Ninh aengx ziux dingc daaih nyei nyungc zeiv zoux ziepc norm jiem dang-jaax an jienv biauv gu'nyuoz. Naamh bung an biaa norm
2Chronicles4:8 Aengx zoux ziepc norm dieh an zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. Naamh bung an biaa norm
2Chronicles4:9 Ninh mbuo weic sai mienh zoux ting yaac zoux domh ting. Bieqc domh ting nyei laatc nyei gaengh ninh buang jienv dongh siqv.
2Chronicles4:10 Domh bunh ninh an jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv dong bung caux naamh bung mbu'ndongx nyei gorqv.
2Chronicles4:11 Hulaam yaac zoux caeng
2Chronicles4:12 I norm domh ndiouh
2Chronicles4:13 feix baeqv norm ziqc liouh biouv weic zorng wuov deix i kuaaiv mungz. (Yietc kuaaiv mungz longc i liouz ziqc liouh biouv zorng yiem domh ndiouh dueiv-mueiz hnangv baeqc horqc biangh nyei fangx wuov deix i norm ga'naaiv)
2Chronicles4:14 dieh longz caux dieh longz nyei bunh
2Chronicles4:15 domh bunh caux yiem bunh ga'ndiev wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh ngongh gouv
