2Chronicles4:17 Hungh diex bun mienh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndau-Baengh
2Chronicles4:18 Saa^lo^morn zoux naaiv deix yietc zungv ga'naaiv camv! haic
2Chronicles4:19 Saa^lo^morn aengx zoux yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei nyungc-nyungc jaa-dorngx. Ninh zoux buov hung nyei jiem-dieh
2Chronicles4:20 longc zien jiem zoux dang-jaax caux dang-zaanv nyei dang ei jienv leiz an jienv singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nza'hmien maengx buov

2Chronicles5:6 Saa^lo^morn Hungh caux gapv zunv yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc zungv yiem Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang nza'hmien fongc horc ba'gi yungh caux ngongh weic zoux ziec nyei ga'naaiv camv! haic

2Chronicles5:9 Gaeng faang nyei ndiangx ndaauv nyei. Doix ziangx singx dinc gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx nyei nza'hmien maengx
2Chronicles5:10 Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang kungx maaih Mose yiem Holepv Mbong an wuov deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv-benv. Cuotv liuz naaic maiv maaih haaix nyungc. Naaiv deix i kuaaiv la'bieiv-benv se I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung
2Chronicles5:11 Dongh wuov zanc yiem jienv wuov nyei sai mienh saax ganh cing-nzengc daaih yaac maiv bun nqoi ziux ninh mbuo nyei guanh. Sai mienh yiem Cing-Nzengc Dorngx cuotv daaih wuov zanc

2Chronicles6:39 tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
2Chronicles6:40 “Tov yie nyei Tin-Hungh ih zanc nungx m'zing mangc jienv yaac baeng m'normh muangx yiem naaiv norm dorngx daux gaux nyei waac.

2Chronicles7:1 Saa^lo^morn daux gaux liuz
2Chronicles7:2 Sai mienh maiv haih bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
2Chronicles7:3 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh buatc douz yiem lungh njiec daaih
2Chronicles7:4 Hungh diex caux zuangx baeqc fingx yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien fongc horc ziec.
2Chronicles7:5 Saa^lo^morn Hungh longc i waanc i cin dauh ngongh caux yietc sinx i waanc dauh ba'gi yungh fongc horc ziec. Hungh diex caux zuangx baeqc fingx ziouc hnangv naaiv nor zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fungx bun ninh.
2Chronicles7:6 Sai mienh souv jienv gorqv-mienh yiem nyei dorngx. Lewi Mienh caux jienv longc zoux nzung nyei jaa-sic ceng Ziouv
2Chronicles7:7 Saa^lo^morn saax yiem laatc gu'nyuoz
2Chronicles7:8 Wuov zanc Saa^lo^morn jiex wuov norm zipv siec hnoi
2Chronicles7:9 Da'betv hnoi wuov hnoi ninh mbuo gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix
2Chronicles7:10 Cietv hlaax nyic ziepc faam wuov hnoi ninh heuc zuangx mienh nzuonx ninh mbuo nyei biauv. Ninh mbuo za'gengh njien-youh a'hneiv weic Ziouv zoux longx bun Ndaawitv caux Saa^lo^morn caux ninh nyei baeqc fingx
2Chronicles7:11 Saa^lo^morn zoux ziangx zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux ninh ganh nyei hungh dinc
2Chronicles7:12 Nqa'haav maaih muonz Ziouv hinc cuotv bun ninh buatc. Ziouv gorngv
2Chronicles7:13 “Se gorngv yie bun lungh haanz maiv duih mbiungc
2Chronicles7:14 se gorngv yie nyei mienh
2Chronicles7:15 Yie zungv nungx m'zing mangc
2Chronicles7:16 Weic zuqc ih zanc yie ginv naaiv norm biauv yaac bun biauv cing-nzengc weic liepc yie nyei Mengh yietc liuz yiem naaiv. Yie nyei m'zing
2Chronicles7:17 “Meih ganh aeqv
2Chronicles7:18 yie ziouc liepc wuonv meih nyei hungh weic hnangv yie laengz bun meih nyei die
2Chronicles7:19 “Mv baac se gorngv meih guangc
2Chronicles7:20 yie ziouc baeng I^saa^laa^en Mienh cuotv
2Chronicles7:21 Dongh ih zanc mienh taaih naaiv norm biauv
2Chronicles7:22 Mienh ziouc dau
2Chronicles8:1 Saa^lo^morn longc nyic ziepc hnyangx ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux ninh ganh nyei hungh dinc.
2Chronicles8:2 Nqa'haav Saa^lo^morn siang-ceix jiez dongh Hilaam jiu bun ninh wuov deix zingh yaac bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem.
2Chronicles8:3 Saa^lo^morn mingh Haamatv So^mbaa yaac caangv duqv mi'aqv.
2Chronicles8:4 Ninh ceix yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei Tatv^mo Zingh caux yiem Haamatv ceix daaih weic siou ga'naaiv nyei norm-norm zingh.
2Chronicles8:5 Ninh aengx ceix Wuov Jiex nyei Mbetc Holon Zingh caux Wuov Ndiev nyei Mbetc Holon Zingh benx weih wuonv nyei zingh
2Chronicles8:6 Ninh yaac ceix Mbaa^aa^latv Zingh caux Saa^lo^morn siou ga'naaiv nyei yietc zungv zingh
2Chronicles8:7 Zengc njiec nyei Hitv^tai Mienh
2Chronicles8:8 se dongh I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv haih mietc maiv nzengc
2Chronicles8:9 Mv baac Saa^lo^morn maiv bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc zoux nouh. Ninh mbuo zoux ninh nyei baeng
2Chronicles8:10 Aengx maaih nyic baeqv hmz ziepc dauh zoux Saa^lo^morn Hungh nyei domh jien gunv gong-mienh.
2Chronicles8:11 Saa^lo^morn dorh Faalo nyei sieqv yiem Ndaawitv nyei Zingh faaux daaih yiem Saa^lo^morn weic ninh ceix wuov norm hungh dinc. Saa^lo^morn gorngv
2Chronicles8:12 Saa^lo^morn yiem ninh ceix daaih nyei ziec-dorngh
2Chronicles8:13 Ninh ziux Mose paaiv ziangx weic hnoi-hnoi ziec nyei ga'naaiv
2Chronicles8:14 Ei ninh nyei die
2Chronicles8:15 Ninh mbuo ei jienv hungh paaiv zuangx sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh
2Chronicles8:16 Yiem ninh mbuo liepc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gorn-ndoqv taux ih hnoi
2Chronicles8:17 Nqa'haav Saa^lo^morn mingh E^ndom nyei koiv-hlen nyei E^si^on Ge^mbe caux Elatv.
2Chronicles8:18 Hilaam paaiv deix ninh ganh nyei nzangv caux nzangv-jien
2Chronicles9:1 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac muangx haiz Saa^lo^morn nyei mengh dauh
2Chronicles9:2 Saa^lo^morn zorqv ninh naaic nyei yietc zungv waac dau ninh. Maiv maaih yietc joux aqc jiex ndaangc Saa^lo^morn haih porv mengh mbuox ninh.
2Chronicles9:3 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac buatc Saa^lo^morn nyei cong-mengh caux ninh ceix nyei hungh dinc
2Chronicles9:4 yaac buatc yiem ninh nyei hnaangx-dieh nyei nyanc hopv
2Chronicles9:5 Ninh gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Chronicles9:6 Mv baac yie maiv sienx naaiv deix waac taux yie ganh daaih
2Chronicles9:7 Meih nyei yietc zungv mienh duqv orn-lorqc. Zanc-zanc souv jienv meih nyei nza'hmien muangx meih nyei cong-mengh waac wuov deix jien yaac duqv orn-lorqc.
2Chronicles9:8 Ceng Ziouv
2Chronicles9:9 Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac ziouc zorqv i cin feix baeqv cietv ziepc luoqc joih jiem caux ndaang nyei ga'naaiv camv haic caux la'bieiv-jaaix fungx bun Saa^lo^morn Hungh. Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac fungx bun Saa^lo^morn Hungh naaiv deix ndaang nyei ga'naaiv
2Chronicles9:10 (Hilaam caux Saa^lo^morn nyei bou dorh yiem Ofi nyei jiem daaih. Ninh mbuo yaac dorh hung ndiangx caux jaaix nyei la'bieiv-nzueic.
2Chronicles9:11 Hungh diex longc hung ndiangx zoux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc nyei tei yaac weic baaux nzung nyei mienh zoux domh daanh baah caux fiuv-daanh baah. Yiem Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung maiv maaih haaix dauh buatc jiex hnangv naaic aqv.)
2Chronicles9:12 Saa^lo^morn Hungh ziux Qe^mbaa Deic nyei hungh maac oix nyei caux tov nyei yietc zungv jiu bun ninh
2Chronicles9:13 Mouz hnyangx Saa^lo^morn Hungh duqv nyei jiem yietc zungv maaih yietc waanc biei cin nyic baeqv faah ziepc betv joih.
2Chronicles9:14 Naaiv yaac maiv funx loz-benv caux saeng-eix mienh funx bieqc nyei nzou-zinh fai Aa^laa^mbie Deic-Bung nyei hungh caux I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei saengv-ziouv dorh daaih bun Saa^lo^morn nyei jiem nyaanh.
2Chronicles9:15 Saa^lo^morn Hungh daav nyic baeqv norm longc jiem zoux daaih nyei domh torngv-baaih. Mouz norm longc biei joih ziepc nyeic lungz jiem.
2Chronicles9:16 Ninh aengx daav faam-baeqv norm jiem-torngv-baaih gauh faix. Mouz norm maaih i joih cietv lungz zien jiem. Naaiv deix torngv-baaih
2Chronicles9:17 Hungh diex longc zaangz-nyaah zoux norm domh weic yaac longc zien jiex nyei jiem buang jienv.
2Chronicles9:18 Naaiv norm weic maaih juqv kang tei
2Chronicles9:19 Naaiv deix juqv kang tei maaih ziepc nyeic dauh sienh. Kang-kang i bung ga'hlen maaih dauh sienh souv jienv. Maiv maaih haaix norm guoqv hnangv naaiv nor zoux jiex.
2Chronicles9:20 Saa^lo^morn Hungh nyei yietc zungv diuv-zaanv longc jiem zoux daaih. Le^mbaa^norn Geh wuov norm Biauv nyei jaa-dorngx yaac longc jiem zoux daaih. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc longc nyaanh zoux
2Chronicles9:21 Hungh diex maaih guanh nzangv caux Hilaam nyei nzangv-jien buo hnyangx mingh nzunc Taansitv
2Chronicles9:22 Weic naaiv beiv lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex
2Chronicles9:23 Lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex oix daaih lorz Saa^lo^morn
2Chronicles9:24 Daaih nyei mienh
2Chronicles9:25 Saa^lo^morn maaih biei cin qongx bun maaz caux mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie yiem. Ninh maaih yietc waanc i cin dauh geh maaz baeng. Maaz caux maaz-cie ninh an jienv siou mborqv jaax cie nyei zingh. Yaac maaih deix caux ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles9:26 Ninh gunv zuangx hungh diex yiem Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mingh taux Fi^li^saa^die Mienh nyei deic-bung
2Chronicles9:27 Hungh diex yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem bun nyaanh camv
2Chronicles9:28 Saa^lo^morn nyei maaz se yiem I^yipv caux norm-norm guoqv daaih nyei maaz.
2Chronicles9:29 Saa^lo^morn zoux zengc njiec nyei yietc zungv sic
2Chronicles9:30 Saa^lo^morn yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv gormx I^saa^laa^en feix ziepc hnyangx.
2Chronicles9:31 Saa^lo^morn guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles10:1 Le^hox^mbo^am mingh Sekem Zingh weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mingh Sekem liepc ninh zoux hungh.
2Chronicles10:2 (Wuov zanc Ne^mbatc nyei dorn
2Chronicles10:3 Zuangx mienh ziouc bun mienh mingh heuc Ye^lo^mbo^am daaih. Ye^lo^mbo^am caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh mingh lorz Le^hox^mbo^am. Ninh mbuo gorngv
2Chronicles10:4 “Meih nyei die
2Chronicles10:5 Le^hox^mbo^am gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Chronicles10:6 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh ziouc caux zinh ndaangc ninh nyei die
2Chronicles10:7 Ninh mbuo dau
2Chronicles10:8 Mv baac Le^hox^mbo^am maiv longc naaiv deix mienh gox mienh caangh laangh nyei waac. Ninh mingh lorz caux ninh hlo daaih wuov baan mienh
2Chronicles10:9 Le^hox^mbo^am naaic ninh mbuo
2Chronicles10:10 Caux ninh hlo daaih naaiv deix mienh lunx mienh gorngv
2Chronicles10:11 Yie nyei die bun meih mbuo gaaz ndiangx-gaaz hniev. Yie zungv oix bun meih mbuo gauh hniev. Yie nyei die longc biaav-bin mborqv meih mbuo. Yie oix longc ziepc nyeic ndaangh bin mborqv meih mbuo.’+”
2Chronicles10:12 Taux da'faam hnoi
2Chronicles10:13 Hungh diex longc waac ciouv nyei dau baeqc fingx. Ninh maiv longc wuov deix mienh gox mienh caangh laangh nyei waac.
2Chronicles10:14 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh longc mienh lunx mienh caangh laangh nyei za'eix. Ninh gorngv
2Chronicles10:15 Hungh diex ziouc maiv muangx baeqc fingx tov nyei waac. Naaiv deix sic se ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix weic bun doix Ziouv longc Silo Mienh
2Chronicles10:16 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh buatc hungh diex maiv muangx ninh mbuo
2Chronicles10:17 Mv baac Le^hox^mbo^am corc gunv yiem Yu^ndaa Deic nyei zingh nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
2Chronicles10:18 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh paaiv Aa^ndo^ni^lam
2Chronicles10:19 Hnangv naaic I^saa^laa^en Mienh ngaengc jienv Ndaawitv nyei hungh douh taux ih jaax hnoi.
2Chronicles11:1 Le^hox^mbo^am yietv nzuonx taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles11:2 Mv baac Ziouv nyei mienh
2Chronicles11:3 “Oix zuqc mbuox Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles11:4 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
2Chronicles11:5 Le^hox^mbo^am yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles11:6 Ninh ceix Mbetc^le^hem
2Chronicles11:7 Mbetc Sux^aa
2Chronicles11:8 Gatc
2Chronicles11:9 Aa^ndo^laa^im
2Chronicles11:10 Solaa
2Chronicles11:11 Ninh liepc weih wuonv nyei dorngx
2Chronicles11:12 Ninh yaac zorqv torngv-baaih caux cang an naaiv deix mouz norm zingh bun naaiv deix zingh za'gengh wuonv haic. Hnangv naaic ninh cingx duqv gunv jienv Yu^ndaa caux Mben^yaa^min.
2Chronicles11:13 Yiem gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh guangc ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx daaih lorz Le^hox^mbo^am.
2Chronicles11:14 Lewi Mienh guangc ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc miev-ciangv caux biauv mingh taux Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles11:15 Ye^lo^mbo^am paaiv ganh nyei sai mienh weic yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx
2Chronicles11:16 Yiem fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh
2Chronicles11:17 Ninh mbuo tengx Yu^ndaa Guoqv jaa henv
2Chronicles11:18 Le^hox^mbo^am longc Ndaawitv nyei dorn
2Chronicles11:19 Maa^haa^latv yungz buo dauh dorn
2Chronicles11:20 Nqa'haav ninh aengx longc Apc^saa^lom nyei sieqv
2Chronicles11:21 Le^hox^mbo^am hnamv Apc^saa^lom nyei sieqv
2Chronicles11:22 Le^hox^mbo^am liepc Maa^aa^kaa nyei dorn
2Chronicles11:23 Le^hox^mbo^am zoux duqv guai nyei. Ninh bun deix ninh nyei dorn nzaanx mingh gormx Yu^ndaa Deic caux Mben^yaa^min Deic
2Chronicles12:1 Le^hox^mbo^am nyei guoqv liepc wuonv yaac henv nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles12:2 Le^hox^mbo^am zoux hungh da'hmz hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles12:3 Maaih yietc cin nyic baeqv jaax mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie
2Chronicles12:4 Sisakv Hungh caangv duqv yiem Yu^ndaa Deic weih wuonv nyei zingh aengx daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles12:5 Wuov zanc douc waac mienh
2Chronicles12:6 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv caux hungh diex nyiemc ganh zoux faix aengx gorngv
2Chronicles12:7 Ziouv buatc ninh mbuo nyiemc ganh zoux faix
2Chronicles12:8 Mv baac ninh mbuo corc oix zuqc yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev ziouc haih hiuv duqv fu-sux yie caux fu-sux ganh norm guoqv nyei mienh hnangv haaix nor ganh nyungc.”
2Chronicles12:9 I^yipv nyei hungh
2Chronicles12:10 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh ziouc longc dongh siqv zoux torngv-baaih div jiem-torngv-baaih jiu bun goux hungh dinc zuov gaengh nyei baeng-bieiv.
2Chronicles12:11 Hungh diex haaix zanc bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
2Chronicles12:12 Le^hox^mbo^am nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles12:13 Le^hox^mbo^am Hungh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem liepc ganh zoux hungh wuonv nyei. Le^hox^mbo^am jiez gorn gunv wuov zanc
2Chronicles12:14 Le^hox^mbo^am zoux waaic sic
2Chronicles12:15 Le^hox^mbo^am zoux nyei sic yiem gorn taux setv mueiz
2Chronicles12:16 Le^hox^mbo^am guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles13:1 Ne^mbatc nyei dorn
2Chronicles13:2 Ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv buo hnyangx. Ninh nyei maa nyei mbuox heuc Mi^kaa^yaa
2Chronicles13:3 Aa^mbi^yaa dorh biei sinx dauh ginv daaih mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng. Ye^lo^mbo^am maaih hietc sinx dauh ginv daaih mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng doix Aa^mbi^yaa mbaih jienv oix mborqv jaax.
2Chronicles13:4 Aa^mbi^yaa yiem E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx Se^maa^laa^im Mbong gu'nguaaic gorngv
2Chronicles13:5 Meih mbuo maiv hiuv nyei fai? Ziouv
2Chronicles13:6 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic
2Chronicles13:7 Maaih deix maiv lamh longc nyei mienh waaic mienh daaih zunv gan ninh yaac caux Saa^lo^morn nyei dorn
2Chronicles13:8 “Ih zanc meih hnamv daaih meih oix ngaengc Ziouv nyei guoqv
2Chronicles13:9 Meih mbuo zunc Ziouv nyei sai mienh
2Chronicles13:10 “Mv baac yie mbuo ganh aeqv
2Chronicles13:11 Ninh mbuo ndorm-ndorm muonz-muonz fongc horc buov ziec yaac buov hung bun Ziouv. Ninh mbuo yaac zorqv gengx nyei njuov an wuov norm cing-nzengc dieh. Ninh mbuo yaac goux jiem-dang-jaax caux dang-zaanv
2Chronicles13:12 Tin-Hungh caux yie mbuo yiem
2Chronicles13:13 Ye^lo^mbo^am paaiv baeng bingx jienv mingh yiem Yu^ndaa baeng nyei nqa'haav nqaang. Ye^lo^mbo^am nyei jun-baeng ziouc yiem Yu^ndaa nyei nza'hmien maengx. Bingx jienv wuov deix baeng yiem nqa'haav.
2Chronicles13:14 Yu^ndaa huin nzuonx buatc wuov ndaangc maengx caux nqa'haav nqaang maaih baeng
2Chronicles13:15 Yu^ndaa Mienh qaqv heuc cuotv mborqv jaax nyei qiex. Yu^ndaa Mienh heuc cuotv wuov zanc
2Chronicles13:16 I^saa^laa^en Mienh biaux Yu^ndaa Mienh. Tin-Hungh zorqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh jiu bun yiem Yu^ndaa nyei buoz-ndiev.
2Chronicles13:17 Aa^mbi^yaa caux ninh nyei jun-baeng daix ninh mbuo camv nyei. I^saa^laa^en Mienh ginv daaih nyei baeng maaih biaa sinx dauh zuqc daix daic.
2Chronicles13:18 Wuov nzunc I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc suei. Yu^ndaa Mienh duqv hingh
2Chronicles13:19 Aa^mbi^yaa zunc Ye^lo^mbo^am yaac caangv duqv ninh nyei buo norm zingh
2Chronicles13:20 Yiem Aa^mbi^yaa nyei seix zeiv Ye^lo^mbo^am maiv duqv aengx henv jienv faaux. Ziouv yaac daix ninh daic aqv.
2Chronicles13:21 Mv baac Aa^mbi^yaa henv jienv faaux. Ninh longc ziepc feix dauh auv. Maaih nyic ziepc nyeic dauh dorn
2Chronicles13:22 Yiem Aa^mbi^yaa gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
2Chronicles14:1 Aa^mbi^yaa Hungh guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles14:2 Ziux Ziouv
2Chronicles14:3 Ninh zorqv guangc ganh fingx mienh nyei ziec-dorngh caux yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx. Ninh yaac mborqv huv la'bieiv-dongc yaac goix Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx.
2Chronicles14:4 Ninh hatc Yu^ndaa Mienh lorz Ziouv
2Chronicles14:5 Ninh zorqv nqoi Yu^ndaa nyei norm-norm zingh yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx caux buov hung dieh. Ninh gunv nyei guoqv taaix-baengh nyei yiem.
2Chronicles14:6 Yiem Yu^ndaa ninh ceix ziex norm weih wuonv nyei zingh
2Chronicles14:7 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Yu^ndaa Mienh
2Chronicles14:8 Aasaax Hungh nyei jun-baeng maaih Yu^ndaa Mienh buo sinx dauh nanv domh torngv-baaih caux cang. Yaac maaih Mben^yaa^min Mienh i sinx hietc waanc dauh nanv fiuv-torngv-baaih caux juang-zinx.
2Chronicles14:9 E^ti^o^bie Mienh
2Chronicles14:10 Aasaax cuotv mingh caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo i bung ziouc mingh mbaih jienv Se^faa^taa Horngz nitv Maa^le^saa wuov.
2Chronicles14:11 Aasaax ziouc heuc Ziouv
2Chronicles14:12 Weic naaiv
2Chronicles14:13 Aasaax caux gan ninh wuov deix jun-baeng zunc jienv mingh taux Gelaa. E^ti^o^bie Mienh zuqc daix daic camv! nyei
2Chronicles14:14 Weih gormx Gelaa nyei norm-norm mungv nyei mienh gamh nziex Ziouv. Yu^ndaa nyei jun-baeng ziouc mietc nzengc naaiv deix zingh yaac luv njang nzengc
2Chronicles14:15 Ninh mbuo mborqv waaic yungz saeng-kuv nyei mienh nyei ciangv aengx caangv duqv ba'gi yungh caux lorh torh camv nyei. Nqa'haav ninh mbuo nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh mi'aqv.
2Chronicles15:1 Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh njiec daaih yiem O^ndetc nyei dorn
2Chronicles15:2 Ninh ziouc cuotv mingh buangh Aasaax
2Chronicles15:3 Zinh ndaangc I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv maaih zien Tin-Hungh
2Chronicles15:4 Mv baac ninh mbuo buangh zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo huin nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv
2Chronicles15:5 Wuov deix ziangh hoc
2Chronicles15:6 Ninh mbuo zuqc bun nqoi nzengc. Naaiv norm guoqv caux wuov norm guoqv
2Chronicles15:7 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc henv
2Chronicles15:8 Aasaax yietv haiz O^ndetc nyei dorn
2Chronicles15:9 Ninh yaac heuc Yu^ndaa Mienh caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh
2Chronicles15:10 Aasaax zoux hungh duqv ziepc hmz hnyangx wuov hnyangx faah hlaax
2Chronicles15:11 Dongh wuov hnoi ninh mbuo zorqv mborqv jaax caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
2Chronicles15:12 Ninh mbuo ziouc liepc jiez ngaengc waac gorngv ninh mbuo buangv hnyouv buangv eix oix lorz Ziouv
2Chronicles15:13 Da'faanh haaix dauh maiv kangv lorz Ziouv
2Chronicles15:14 Ninh mbuo ziouc qiex hlo nyei heuc yaac biomv nzatc biomv jorng houv jienv laengz waac bun Ziouv.
2Chronicles15:15 Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh weic ninh mbuo houv jienv waac a'hneiv
2Chronicles15:16 Aasaax Hungh yaac bun ninh nyei gux
2Chronicles15:17 Maiv gunv ninh maiv caeqv guangc I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx
2Chronicles15:18 Ninh zorqv dongh ninh nyei die caux ninh ganh fongc horc bun nyei jiem nyaanh caux jaa-dorngx fungx bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv.
2Chronicles15:19 Yiem naaiv mingh taux Aasaax zoux hungh faah ziepc hmz hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles16:1 Aasaax zoux hungh faah ziepc luoqc hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles16:2 Aasaax ziouc yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc
2Chronicles16:3 “Tov meih caux yie liepc ngaengc waac hnangv meih nyei die caux yie nyei die liepc ngaengc waac wuov nor. Yie zorqv jiem nyaanh fungx bun meih. Tov tuix meih caux I^saa^laa^en nyei Mbaa^aa^qaa Hungh liepc nyei ngaengc waac
2Chronicles16:4 Mben Haa^ndatc muangx Aasaax Hungh nyei waac
2Chronicles16:5 Mbaa^aa^qaa haiz naaiv deix sic cuotv
2Chronicles16:6 Hnangv naaic Aasaax Hungh dorh Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh mingh zorqv longc ceix Laamaa Zingh nyei la'bieiv caux ndiangx bienh mingh longc ceix Ge^mbaa caux Mitv^baa.
2Chronicles16:7 Doix wuov deix ziangh hoc douc waac mienh
2Chronicles16:8 E^ti^o^bie Mienh caux Li^mbie Mienh nyei jun-baeng guanh caux mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux geh maaz baeng camv! haic maiv zeiz? Mv baac weic zuqc meih kaux Ziouv
2Chronicles16:9 Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc mingh mangc daaih gormx lungh ndiev weic ceix qaqv bun maaih hnyouv gan nzengc ninh wuov deix. Meih zoux naaiv deix sic se hngongx haic. Yiem naaiv mingh meih ziouc maaih mborqv jaax nyei sic.”
2Chronicles16:10 Aasaax ziouc qiex jiez! douc waac mienh ziouc zorqv ninh wuonx jienv loh. Dongh wuov zanc Aasaax yaac jiez gorn zoux doqc bun deix baeqc fingx.
2Chronicles16:11 Aasaax zoux nyei sic yiem gorn taux setv mueiz fiev jienv yiem Yu^ndaa caux I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh douh daan.
2Chronicles16:12 Ninh gunv faah ziepc juov hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles16:13 Ninh zoux hungh feix ziepc yietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles16:14 Ninh zangx jienv yiem Ndaawitv nyei Zingh
2Chronicles17:1 Aasaax nyei dorn
2Chronicles17:2 Ninh bun baeng yiem jienv Yu^ndaa nyei yietc zungv weih wuonv nyei zingh
2Chronicles17:3 Ziouv caux Ye^ho^saa^fatv yiem
2Chronicles17:4 ninh lorz ninh nyei die nyei Tin-Hungh
2Chronicles17:5 Weic naaiv
2Chronicles17:6 Ninh a'hneiv yangh Ziouv nyei jauv. Ninh zungv zorqv nqoi Yu^ndaa Deic yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx caux Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx.
2Chronicles17:7 Ninh zoux hungh da'faam hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles17:8 Aengx maaih Lewi Mienh caux ninh mbuo mingh. Maaih Se^mai^aa
2Chronicles17:9 Ninh mbuo dorh jienv Ziouv nyei Leiz-Latc Sou mingh gormx Yu^ndaa nyei norm-norm zingh njaaux baeqc fingx.
2Chronicles17:10 Ziouv bun weih gormx nyei guoqv gamh nziex Yu^ndaa ziouc maiv gaamv mingh caux Ye^ho^saa^fatv mborqv jaax.
2Chronicles17:11 Maaih deix Fi^li^saa^die Mienh dorh ga'naaiv daaih zoux zingh nyeic
2Chronicles17:12 Ye^ho^saa^fatv gunv zoux gunv henv. Ninh ceix weih wuonv nyei baeng-ciangv caux siou ga'naaiv nyei zingh.
2Chronicles17:13 Ninh yaac siou ga'naaiv camv! nyei yiem Yu^ndaa nyei zingh. Ninh yaac maaih mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles17:14 Ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc maaih
2Chronicles17:15 Jiex mingh wuov dauh se domh baeng-bieiv
2Chronicles17:16 Jiex mingh wuov dauh
2Chronicles17:17 Yiem Mben^yaa^min Fingx daaih maaih dauh henv haic nyei baeng
2Chronicles17:18 Jiex mingh wuov dauh se Ye^ho^saa^mbaatc caux yietc sinx hietc waanc dauh dorh jienv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc nyei baeng.
2Chronicles17:19 Naaiv deix mienh se fu-sux hungh diex nyei mienh. Aengx maaih dongh hungh diex bun yiem gormx Yu^ndaa nyei weih wuonv nyei zingh wuov deix baeng.
2Chronicles18:1 Ye^ho^saa^fatv butv zoih haic aqv
2Chronicles18:2 Jiex liuz ziex hnyangx
2Chronicles18:3 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles18:4 Yie mbuo ziouc caux meih mingh mborqv jaax.” Mv baac Ye^ho^saa^fatv yaac gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles18:5 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh ziouc heuc douc waac mienh daaih gapv zunv
2Chronicles18:6 Mv baac Ye^ho^saa^fatv naaic
2Chronicles18:7 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh dau Ye^ho^saa^fatv
2Chronicles18:8 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh heuc dauh jien daaih ziouc gorngv
2Chronicles18:9 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh caux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles18:10 Ke^naa^aa^naa nyei dorn
2Chronicles18:11 Zuangx douc waac mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei douc waac. Ninh mbuo gorngv
2Chronicles18:12 Mingh heuc Mi^kaa^yaa daaih wuov dauh douc fienx mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
2Chronicles18:13 Mv baac Mi^kaa^yaa gorngv
2Chronicles18:14 Mingh taux hungh diex wuov zanc
2Chronicles18:15 Mv baac hungh diex gorngv mbuox ninh
2Chronicles18:16 Mi^kaa^yaa ziouc gorngv
2Chronicles18:17 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh gorngv mbuox Ye^ho^saa^fatv
2Chronicles18:18 Mi^kaa^yaa aengx gorngv
2Chronicles18:19 Ziouv gorngv
2Chronicles18:20 Nqa'haav maaih dauh cuotv daaih souv jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien gorngv
2Chronicles18:21 “Ninh gorngv
2Chronicles18:22 “Ih zanc Ziouv zoux bun meih nyei naaiv deix douc waac mienh yietc zungv gorngv-baeqc. Ziouv zungv dingc ziangx bun meih oix zuqc domh zeqc naanc.”
2Chronicles18:23 Ke^naa^aa^naa nyei dorn
2Chronicles18:24 Mi^kaa^yaa dau
2Chronicles18:25 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh gorngv
2Chronicles18:26 Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Chronicles18:27 Mi^kaa^yaa gorngv
2Chronicles18:28 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh caux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles18:29 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh gorngv mbuox Ye^ho^saa^fatv
2Chronicles18:30 Silie nyei hungh paaiv ninh nyei mborqv jaax cie nyei baeng-bieiv
2Chronicles18:31 Mborqv jaax cie nyei baeng-bieiv buatc Ye^ho^saa^fatv ninh mbuo gorngv
2Chronicles18:32 Mborqv jaax cie nyei baeng-bieiv buatc maiv zeiz I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles18:33 Mv baac maaih dauh mienh gouv-mueic buonv yietc nzitv forng yaac zuqc I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh yiem ninh mborqv jaax nyei zorng-zuqv yietc kuaaiv yietc kuaaiv nyei mbu'ndongx-qangx. Hungh diex ziouc mbuox zaangv ninh nyei cie wuov dauh
2Chronicles18:34 Wuov hnoi ziangh hnoi mborqv jaax hniev nyei. Ninh mbuo yaac sengh jienv hungh diex yiem ninh nyei cie gu'nyuoz huin mangc jienv Aalam Mienh taux lungh hmuangx. Lungh maanz-hmuangx ninh daic mi'aqv.
2Chronicles19:1 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles19:2 Haa^naa^ni nyei dorn
2Chronicles19:3 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic
2Chronicles19:4 Ye^ho^saa^fatv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem mv baac ninh aengx cuotv mingh ninh nyei baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx yiem Mbe^e^qe^mbaa mingh taux E^faa^im nyei mbong-aiv dorngx. Ninh dorh ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv
2Chronicles19:5 Ninh yiem Yu^ndaa nyei yietc zungv weih wuonv nyei zingh
2Chronicles19:6 Ninh mbuox naaiv deix mbenc sic jien
2Chronicles19:7 Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc gamh nziex Ziouv. Oix zuqc mbungh longx meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc weic zuqc Ziouv
2Chronicles19:8 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles19:9 Ye^ho^saa^fatv hatc ninh mbuo
2Chronicles19:10 Meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz yiem ninh mbuo nyei haaix norm zingh daaih lorz meih mbuo weic zuqc ninh mbuo maaih daix mienh nyei sic
2Chronicles19:11 “Da'faanh guei Ziouv nyei jauv
2Chronicles20:1 Nqa'haav Mo^apc Mienh caux Ammon Mienh
2Chronicles20:2 Maaih mienh daaih mbuox Ye^ho^saa^fatv Hungh
2Chronicles20:3 Ye^ho^saa^fatv gamh nziex haic ziouc dingc hnyouv lorz Ziouv yaac zunh mbuox gormx Yu^ndaa Deic nyei mienh zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc.
2Chronicles20:4 Yu^ndaa Mienh gapv zunv daaih tov Ziouv tengx. Ninh mbuo zungv yiem Yu^ndaa Deic nyei norm-norm zingh daaih lorz Ziouv.
2Chronicles20:5 Ye^ho^saa^fatv yiem Yu^ndaa Mienh caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Mienh gapv zunv nyei dorngx souv jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
2Chronicles20:6 Ninh gorngv
2Chronicles20:7 Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh aac
2Chronicles20:8 Ninh mbuo yiem naaiv norm dorngx yaac weic meih nyei Mengh ceix norm singx dinc. Ninh mbuo gorngv
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Se gorngv maaih zeqc naanc hoic yie mbuo
2Chronicles20:10 “Mangc maah! Ih zanc Ammon Mienh
2Chronicles20:11 Mangc maah! Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor winh bun yie mbuo. Ninh mbuo oix zunc yie mbuo cuotv meih nyei buonc deic-bung
2Chronicles20:12 O yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh aac
2Chronicles20:13 Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei yietc zungv m'jangc dorn caux ninh mbuo nyei auv
2Chronicles20:14 Yaa^haa^si^en souv jienv gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx wuov zanc
2Chronicles20:15 Yaa^haa^si^en gorngv
2Chronicles20:16 Njang hnoi njiec mingh caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo oix yangh Sitc nyei zorng faaux. Meih mbuo ziouc buangh ninh mbuo yiem Ye^lu^en Deic-Bung-Huaang nyei horngz-kuv.
2Chronicles20:17 Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Mienh aah! Naaiv nzunc meih mbuo maiv zuqc mborqv jaax. Kungx oix zuqc souv mbaih jienv mborqv jaax nyei dorngx dingc nyei
2Chronicles20:18 Ye^ho^saa^fatv ziouc ndoqv m'nqorngv njiec
2Chronicles20:19 Lewi Fingx nyei Ko^haatv Mienh caux Kolaa Mienh souv jiez daaih longc qiex hlo nyei ceng Ziouv
2Chronicles20:20 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei baeqc fingx cuotv jauv mingh Te^ko^aa Deic-Bung-Huaang. Cuotv jauv nyei ziangh hoc Ye^ho^saa^fatv souv jienv gorngv
2Chronicles20:21 Hungh diex caux baeqc fingx caangh laangh liuz
2Chronicles20:22 Ninh mbuo jiez gorn baaux nzung ceng nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles20:23 Weic zuqc Ammon caux Mo^apc Mienh gaeng jienv daix E^ndom Mienh taux daix zutc nzengc. Nqa'haav ninh mbuo meih daix yie
2Chronicles20:24 Yu^ndaa Mienh mingh taux deic-bung-huaang nyei laauh mangc njiec domh jun-baeng guanh wuov
2Chronicles20:25 Ye^ho^saa^fatv caux ninh nyei baeqc fingx mingh nzauz janx-daic nyei ga'naaiv wuov zanc
2Chronicles20:26 Taux da'feix hnoi ninh mbuo yietc zungv yiem Mbe^laa^kaa Horngz
2Chronicles20:27 Nqa'haav yiem Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei dauh dauh mienh nzuonx aqv. Ye^ho^saa^fatv dorh ninh mbuo njien-njien youh youh nyei nzuonx
2Chronicles20:28 Ninh mbuo patv domh daanh baah
2Chronicles20:29 Norm-norm guoqv nyei hungh haiz Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor mborqv hingh I^saa^laa^en nyei win-wangv
2Chronicles20:30 Hnangv naaic Ye^ho^saa^fatv nyei guoqv taaix-baengh
2Chronicles20:31 Hnangv naaiv nor
2Chronicles20:32 Ye^ho^saa^fatv ei jienv ninh nyei die
2Chronicles20:33 Mv baac yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx maiv duqv caeqv guangc. Baeqc fingx maiv gaengh liepc dingc hnyouv gan ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyei Tin-Hungh.
2Chronicles20:34 Ye^ho^saa^fatv gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
2Chronicles20:35 Nqa'haav Yu^ndaa Hungh
2Chronicles20:36 Ninh mbuo i dauh juangc jienv gapv nzangv mingh Taansitv. Naaiv deix nzangv yiem E^si^on Ge^mbe gapv daaih.
2Chronicles20:37 Doix wuov zanc
2Chronicles21:1 Ye^ho^saa^fatv guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles21:2 Ye^ho^lam maaih juqv dauh youz
2Chronicles21:3 Ninh mbuo nyei die zorqv jiem nyaanh caux jaaix nyei ga'naaiv camv nyei zoux zingh nyeic bun ninh mbuo
2Chronicles21:4 Ye^ho^lam zueiz ninh nyei die nyei weic liepc wuonv liuz
2Chronicles21:5 Ye^ho^lam faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles21:6 Ninh ei jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh nyei za'eix
2Chronicles21:7 Mv baac Ziouv weic ninh caux Ndaawitv liepc nyei ngaengc waac maiv oix mietc Ndaawitv nyei douh zong. Ninh yaac laengz bun Ndaawitv yietc liuz maaih zeiv-fun zoux hungh.
2Chronicles21:8 Doix Ye^ho^lam zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles21:9 Ye^ho^lam ziouc dorh ninh nyei jun-baeng-bieiv caux ninh nyei yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie mingh mborqv E^ndom Deic-Bung. E^ndom Mienh weih gormx ninh caux ninh zaangv maaz-cie nyei baeng-bieiv. Ninh mbuo ziouc lungh muonz zanc jiez daaih mborqv tong biaux.
2Chronicles21:10 Hnangv naaic E^ndom ngaengc jienv
2Chronicles21:11 Ninh yaac yiem Yu^ndaa nyei mbong gu'nguaaic liepc zaangc zienh nyei dorngx
2Chronicles21:12 Ye^ho^lam duqv zipv zeiv douc waac mienh
2Chronicles21:13 Daaux nzuonx meih gan I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei jauv yangh. Meih yaac dorh Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux
2Chronicles21:14 Weic naaiv Ziouv oix bun meih nyei baeqc fingx
2Chronicles21:15 Meih ganh oix butv jaangh nyei baengc hniev nyei
2Chronicles21:16 Nqa'haav Ziouv coqv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caux nitv fatv E^ti^o^bie wuov deix Aalapc Mienh oix mingh mborqv Ye^ho^lam.
2Chronicles21:17 Ninh mbuo ziouc mborqv Yu^ndaa
2Chronicles21:18 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
2Chronicles21:19 Ninh butv baengc kouv nyei buangv i hnyangx
2Chronicles21:20 Ye^ho^lam faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles22:1 Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx liepc Ye^ho^lam nyei dorn-faix
2Chronicles22:2 Aa^hatc^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles22:3 Aa^hatc^yaa yaac ei jienv Aa^hapc wuov biauv mienh nyei za'eix zoux
2Chronicles22:4 Ziux Ziouv mangc ninh zoux waaic sic
2Chronicles22:5 Ninh ei jienv wuov deix mienh caangh laangh nyei waac caux I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles22:6 Yolam ziouc nzuonx taux Yitv^le^en zorc ninh yiem Laamotv caux Silie Hungh
2Chronicles22:7 Aa^hatc^yaa njiec mingh buangh Yolam ziouc zuqc mietc se ziux Tin-Hungh dingc daaih nyei za'eix. Weic zuqc Aa^hatc^yaa mingh wuov zanc
2Chronicles22:8 Ye^hu dingc jienv Aa^hapc nyei biauv zong mienh nyei zuiz wuov zanc
2Chronicles22:9 Aa^hatc^yaa bingx jienv yiem Saa^maa^lie
2Chronicles22:10 Aa^hatc^yaa nyei maa buatc ninh nyei dorn zuqc daix daic
2Chronicles22:11 Mv baac Ye^ho^lam Hungh nyei sieqv
2Chronicles22:12 Yo^aatc caux ninh mbuo yiem juqv hnyangx
2Chronicles23:1 Taux da'cietv hnyangx Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh zoux henv jienv faaux. Ninh ziouc bun gunv yietc baeqv dauh nyei baeng-beiv caux ninh laengz waac. Maaih Ye^lo^ham nyei dorn
2Chronicles23:2 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh gormx Yu^ndaa Deic
2Chronicles23:3 Gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh ziouc yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv caux hungh diex liepc jiez ngaengc waac. Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Chronicles23:4 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Taux Dingh Gong Hnoi
2Chronicles23:5 Buo gouv nyei yietc gouv oix zuqc zuov hungh dinc
2Chronicles23:6 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv cuotv liuz zoux gong fu-sux nyei sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh. Naaiv deix bieqc duqv nyei
2Chronicles23:7 Lewi Mienh oix zuqc weih gormx hungh diex
2Chronicles23:8 Lewi Mienh caux Yu^ndaa nyei yietc zungv mienh ziouc ei jienv Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh paaiv nyei waac zoux. Gorqv-mienh dorh ganh nyei mienh
2Chronicles23:9 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh zorqv yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zinh ndaangc benx Ndaawitv Hungh nyei cang caux torngv-baaih bun zuangx baeng-bieiv.
2Chronicles23:10 Ninh yaac paaiv zuangx baeqc fingx
2Chronicles23:11 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh dorh hungh diex nyei dorn cuotv daaih
2Chronicles23:12 Aa^taa^li^yaa haiz baeqc fingx tiux yaac ceng hungh diex nyei qiex mbui
2Chronicles23:13 Hungh maac mangc buatc hungh diex souv jienv bieqc gaengh nyei dorngx
2Chronicles23:14 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh dorh gunv yietc baeqv dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv cuotv daaih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Chronicles23:15 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv hungh maac aqv. Mingh taux hungh dinc
2Chronicles23:16 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa ganh caux baeqc fingx caux hungh diex liepc jiez ngaengc waac laengz ninh mbuo yietc zungv oix zoux Ziouv nyei baeqc fingx.
2Chronicles23:17 Guoqv gu'nyuoz nyei zuangx baeqc fingx mingh Mbaa^an zienh nyei miuc-biauv caeqv njiec nzengc. Ninh mbuo mborqv ziec-dorngh caux miuc-fangx huv muonc nzengc yaac yiem ziec-dorngh nza'hmien maengx daix Mbaa^an zienh nyei sai mienh
2Chronicles23:18 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa paaiv zuov gaengh mienh zuov zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv yaac bun ninh mbuo yiem Lewi sai mienh nyei buoz-ndiev
2Chronicles23:19 Ninh yaac paaiv mienh zuov zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei laatc gaengh
2Chronicles23:20 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa dorh jienv gunv yietc baeqv dauh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv caux zoux hlo nyei mienh caux gunv baeqc fingx nyei domh jien caux guoqv zaangc nyei zuangx mienh. Ninh mbuo dorh hungh diex yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv njiec daaih
2Chronicles23:21 Guoqv zaangc nyei zuangx baeqc fingx ziouc njien-youh. Zingh gu'nyuoz yaac taaix-baengh nyei
2Chronicles24:1 Yo^aatc faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles24:2 Da'faanh Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa sai mienh ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles24:3 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa tengx ninh lorz i dauh auv. Ninh yaac duqv dorn duqv sieqv nyei.
2Chronicles24:4 Nqa'haav Yo^aatc dingc hnyouv zorc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv.
2Chronicles24:5 Ninh heuc sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh gapv zunv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Chronicles24:6 Hungh diex ziouc heuc Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa domh sai mienh daaih
2Chronicles24:7 Wuov dauh waaic haic nyei m'sieqv dorn
2Chronicles24:8 Hungh diex ziouc njiec lingc. Ninh mbuo ziouc zoux norm faang an jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv ga'nyiec maengx
2Chronicles24:9 Maaih fienx zunh gormx Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles24:10 Zuangx bieiv zeiv caux yietc zungv baeqc fingx njien-youh haic. Ninh mbuo dorh ninh mbuo nyei nzou-zinh daaih dapv wuov norm faang taux cuotv nzoih nzengc.
2Chronicles24:11 Lewi Mienh haaix zanc dorh wuov norm faang mingh hungh diex nyei jien wuov
2Chronicles24:12 Hungh diex caux Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa zorqv naaiv deix nyaanh daaih jiu bun zorc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gunv gong mienh. Ninh mbuo cingv la'bieiv-zaangc caux ndiangx-zaangc weic zorc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
2Chronicles24:13 Gong-mienh jienh zoux gong ziouc zorc longx jienv faaux. Ninh mbuo zorc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv hnangv loz wuov nor
2Chronicles24:14 Zoux ziangx nzengc
2Chronicles24:15 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa nyei hnyangx-jeiv hlang
2Chronicles24:16 Ninh mbuo zangx ninh yiem Ndaawitv nyei Zingh
2Chronicles24:17 Ye^ho^yaa^ndaa guei seix liuz
2Chronicles24:18 Ninh mbuo ziouc guangc Ziouv
2Chronicles24:19 Mv baac Tin-Hungh paaiv douc waac mienh daaih yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx
2Chronicles24:20 Zoux gau
2Chronicles24:21 Mv baac ninh mbuo caangh laangh daav za'eix hoic Se^kaa^li^yaa. Zuangx mienh ziouc ziux hungh diex paaiv nyei waac yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
2Chronicles24:22 Hnangv naaic
2Chronicles24:23 Taux hnyangx-dueiv
2Chronicles24:24 Maiv gunv Silie nyei jun-baeng guanh zoqc nyei
2Chronicles24:25 Silie nyei baeng tuix Yo^aatc nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles24:26 Daav za'eix hoic hungh diex wuov deix se Ammon Mienh m'sieqv dorn
2Chronicles24:27 Yo^aatc nyei dorn mbuo nyei jauv-louc
2Chronicles25:1 Aa^maa^si^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv nyic ziepc hmz hnyangx. Ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv nyic ziepc juov hnyangx. Ninh nyei maa nyei mbuox heuc Ye^ho^atc^ndin
2Chronicles25:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Chronicles25:3 Aa^maa^si^yaa yietv duqv gunv jienv guoqv wuonv nyei
2Chronicles25:4 Mv baac ninh maiv daix ninh mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv weic zuqc ziux Mose nyei Leiz-Latc Sou fiev jienv Ziouv hatc nyei waac gorngv
2Chronicles25:5 Aa^maa^si^yaa heuc Yu^ndaa caux Mben^yaa^min nyei zuangx mienh daaih zunv
2Chronicles25:6 Ninh aengx longc i cin yietc baeqv joih nyaanh cingv yietc sinx dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng caux ninh mingh.
2Chronicles25:7 Maaih yietc dauh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh daaih mbuox Aa^maa^si^yaa
2Chronicles25:8 Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo hnamv daaih longc naaiv nyungc za'eix meih haih mborqv jaax gauh henv nor
2Chronicles25:9 Aa^maa^si^yaa naaic Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
2Chronicles25:10 Aa^maa^si^yaa ziouc heuc yiem E^faa^im gan jienv ninh daaih wuov deix jun-baeng nzuonx aqv. Ninh mbuo nouz haic Yu^ndaa
2Chronicles25:11 Aa^maa^si^yaa zungx jienv qaqv dorh ninh nyei baeng mingh taux Nzauv-Horngz
2Chronicles25:12 Yu^ndaa nyei baeng aengx zorqv duqv yietc waanc dauh mienh aengx dorh mingh mbaengx-ningv gu'nguaaic ziouc fongv ninh mbuo ndortv njiec daaih
2Chronicles25:13 Mv baac dongh Aa^maa^si^yaa heuc nzuonx
2Chronicles25:14 Aa^maa^si^yaa daix liuz E^ndom Mienh nzuonx daaih
2Chronicles25:15 Ziouv qiex jiez! haic Aa^maa^si^yaa
2Chronicles25:16 Douc waac mienh caux hungh gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc hungh diex gorngv
2Chronicles25:17 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles25:18 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles25:19 Meih gorngv
2Chronicles25:20 Mv baac Aa^maa^si^yaa maiv kangv muangx. Naaiv se Tin-Hungh zoux nyei jauv weic zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem Ye^ho^aatc nyei buoz-ndiev
2Chronicles25:21 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles25:22 Yu^ndaa ziouc suei I^saa^laa^en. Gorqv-mienh biaux nzuonx gorqv-mienh nyei biauv.
2Chronicles25:23 Yiem Mbetc Semetv
2Chronicles25:24 Ninh zorqv nzengc O^mbetc E^ndom goux nyei jiem nyaanh caux yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei yietc zungv jaa-dorngx caux hungh dinc gu'nyuoz yietc zungv jaaix nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh yaac dorh deix mienh mingh zoux dorngx-daauh ziouc nzuonx Saa^maa^lie Zingh mi'aqv.
2Chronicles25:25 I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles25:26 Aa^maa^si^yaa zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
2Chronicles25:27 Yiem Aa^maa^si^yaa guangc
2Chronicles25:28 Ninh mbuo longc maaz tor ninh nyei sei nzuonx daaih caux ninh nyei ong-taaix zangx jienv Ndaawitv nyei Zingh.
2Chronicles26:1 Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx baeqc fingx liepc Aa^maa^si^yaa nyei dorn
2Chronicles26:2 Ninh nyei die
2Chronicles26:3 Utc^si^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles26:4 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Chronicles26:5 Se^kaa^li^yaa corc ziangh jienv nyei seix zeiv
2Chronicles26:6 Ninh cuotv mingh mborqv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh
2Chronicles26:7 Tin-Hungh tengx ninh mborqv Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caux yiem Gu^aa Mbaa^an nyei Aalapc Mienh
2Chronicles26:8 Ammon Mienh cuotv nzou-zinh bun Utc^si^yaa. Ninh nyei mengh dauh sing taux I^yipv nyei gapv-jaaix
2Chronicles26:9 Utc^si^yaa ceix jiez laauh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Gorqv Gaengh caux Horngz-Gaengh
2Chronicles26:10 Ninh yiem deic-bung ceix ziex norm laauh
2Chronicles26:11 Utc^si^yaa aengx maaih hoqc ziangx haih mborqv jaax nyei jun-baeng
2Chronicles26:12 Bungh buonc nyei yietc zungv bieiv zeiv
2Chronicles26:13 Ninh mbuo gunv nyei jun-baeng maaih buo sinx siec cin hmz baeqv dauh maaih qaqv henv
2Chronicles26:14 Utc^si^yaa weic zuangx jun-baeng liuc leiz torngv-baaih
2Chronicles26:15 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem ninh bun maaih buoz-dauh nyei zaangc mienh hnamv cuotv za'eix zoux mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc an jienv zingh laatc nyei laauh caux zingh gorqv nyei laauh
2Chronicles26:16 Mv baac Utc^si^yaa henv jienv faaux
2Chronicles26:17 Aa^saa^li^yaa sai mienh caux jienv Ziouv nyei betv ziepc dauh daamv hlo nyei sai mienh gan jienv ninh bieqc.
2Chronicles26:18 Ninh mbuo baav jienv Utc^si^yaa
2Chronicles26:19 Utc^si^yaa ziouc qiex jiez haic. Wuov zanc ninh nanv jienv hung-louh oix buov hung. Ninh qiex jiez sai mienh wuov zanc
2Chronicles26:20 Aa^saa^li^yaa domh sai mienh caux zuangx sai mienh mangc ninh
2Chronicles26:21 Utc^si^yaa Hungh butv gomh huv baengc taux ninh guei seix nyei hnoi. Weic zuqc ninh butv gomh huv baengc ninh oix zuqc ganh ca'lengc yiem
2Chronicles26:22 Utc^si^yaa zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
2Chronicles26:23 Utc^si^yaa guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles27:1 Yotaam faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles27:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Chronicles27:3 Yotaam aengx ceix jiez zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv Wuov Jiex nyei Gaengh. Yiem Ofen Deic nyei zingh laatc ninh yaac zorc camv nyei.
2Chronicles27:4 Ninh yiem Yu^ndaa nyei mbong-aiv dorngx ceix zingh yaac yiem ndiangx-lomc nyei dorngx ceix weih wuonv nyei dorngx caux laauh.
2Chronicles27:5 Yotaam mingh caux Ammon Mienh nyei hungh mborqv jaax yaac mborqv hingh mi'aqv. Wuov hnyangx Ammon Mienh cuotv i cin yietc baeqv joih nyaanh
2Chronicles27:6 Yotaam henv jienv faaux weic zuqc ninh yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux.
2Chronicles27:7 Yotaam zoux nyei sic
2Chronicles27:8 Ninh faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv nyic ziepc hmz hnyangx. Ninh yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh gunv ziepc luoqc hnyangx.
2Chronicles27:9 Yotaam guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles28:1 Aa^hatc faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles28:2 Ninh ei jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh zoux. Ninh yaac dox miuc-fangx weic baaix Mbaa^an zienh.
2Chronicles28:3 Ninh yiem Mben Hinnom Horngz buov hung yaac zorqv ninh nyei dorn mbuo longc douz buov ziec fongc horc
2Chronicles28:4 Ninh yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx caux mbong-aiv dorngx
2Chronicles28:5 Weic naaiv Ziouv
2Chronicles28:6 Nduqc hnoi hnangv Le^maa^li^yaa nyei dorn
2Chronicles28:7 Maaih dauh E^faa^im Mienh mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng
2Chronicles28:8 I^saa^laa^en Mienh guaatv ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz
2Chronicles28:9 Mv baac yiem wuov maaih Ziouv nyei yietc dauh douc waac mienh
2Chronicles28:10 Ih zanc meih mbuo maaih hnyouv aapv caux meih mbuo juangc fingx nyei mienh zoux meih mbuo nyei nouh gauv nouh beiz. Mv baac meih mbuo ganh maiv baamz zuiz dorngc Ziouv
2Chronicles28:11 Ih zanc meih mbuo muangx yie gorngv maah! Oix zuqc zorqv meih mbuo guaatv daaih juangc fingx nyei gorx-youz fungx nzuonx weic zuqc Ziouv qiex jiez! haic meih mbuo.
2Chronicles28:12 Maaih deix E^faa^im nyei bieiv zeiv
2Chronicles28:13 Ninh mbuo gorngv
2Chronicles28:14 Baeng ziouc zorqv guaatv daaih nyei mienh caux caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv guangc jienv bieiv zeiv caux gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien.
2Chronicles28:15 Dongh deqv jienv mbuox heuc wuov deix mienh ziouc dorh guaatv daaih nyei mienh. Yiem wuov deix caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv ninh mbuo zorqv deix lui-houx bun laengh gaengv nyei wuov deix zuqv. Ninh mbuo bun lui-houx
2Chronicles28:16 Wuov zanc Aa^hatc Hungh fungx mienh mingh lorz Atc^si^lie nyei hungh tov ninh tengx
2Chronicles28:17 weic zuqc E^ndom Mienh aengx daaih mborqv Yu^ndaa yaac guaatv mienh mingh.
2Chronicles28:18 Fi^li^saa^die Mienh yaac caangv bieqc Yu^ndaa mbong-aiv dorngx caux Negepc. Ninh mbuo caangv duqv aengx yiem jienv Mbetc Semetv
2Chronicles28:19 Ziouv zatv Yu^ndaa njiec
2Chronicles28:20 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Chronicles28:21 Aa^hatc zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei zinh zoih caux hungh dinc nyei zinh zoih caux zoux baeqc fingx nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv nyei zinh zoih fungx bun Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Chronicles28:22 Naaiv dauh Aa^hatc buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles28:23 Ninh dorh ga'naaiv fongc hoc ziec bun Ndaa^matv^gatc nyei zienh
2Chronicles28:24 Aa^hatc zorqv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei yietc zungv jaa-dorngx mborqv huv zoux ziex hlengx. Ninh guon jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gaengh
2Chronicles28:25 Yiem Yu^ndaa nyei norm-norm zingh ninh ceix yiem hlang nyei dorngx weic buov hung bun nyiec nyei zienh
2Chronicles28:26 Aa^hatc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic caux ninh nyei yietc zungv jauv
2Chronicles28:27 Aa^hatc guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles29:1 He^se^ki^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles29:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Chronicles29:3 He^se^ki^yaa zoux hungh da'yietv hnyangx zih hlaax ninh koi zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gaengh yaac zorc gaengh.
2Chronicles29:4 Ninh dorh sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh bieqc daaih bun ninh mbuo gapv zunv yiem biauv nyei dong bung maengx.
2Chronicles29:5 Ninh gorngv
2Chronicles29:6 Mbuo nyei ong-taaix maiv ziepc zuoqv. Ziux Ziouv
2Chronicles29:7 Ninh mbuo guon zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gaengh yaac bun dang daic. Ninh mbuo maiv buov hung yaac maiv yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
2Chronicles29:8 Weic naaiv Ziouv qiex jiez Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles29:9 Weic naaiv mbuo nyei ong-taaix zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix
2Chronicles29:10 Ih zanc yie dingc hnyouv caux Ziouv
2Chronicles29:11 Yie nyei dorn aah! Ih zanc maiv dungx bungx lorx
2Chronicles29:12 Naaiv deix Lewi Mienh ziouc jiez gorn zoux gong aqv. Ko^haatv nyei zeiv-fun maaih Aa^maa^saix nyei dorn
2Chronicles29:13 E^li^saa^faan nyei zeiv-fun maaih Simli caux Ye^u^en. Aasaapc nyei zeiv-fun maaih
2Chronicles29:14 Hemaan nyei zeiv-fun maaih Ye^hu^en caux Si^me^i. Ye^ndu^tun nyei zeiv-fun maaih Se^mai^aa caux Utc^si^en.
2Chronicles29:15 Ninh mbuo heuc ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz gapv zunv daaih saax ganh cing-nzengc liuz
2Chronicles29:16 Sai mienh bieqc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz bienh cuotv ninh mbuo lorz buatc yietc zungv maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv. Lewi Mienh aengx bienh cuotv mingh taux Kitc^lon Horngz.
2Chronicles29:17 Yiem zih hlaax saeng-yietv ninh mbuo jiez gorn saax. Taux saeng-betv wuov hnoi ninh mbuo saax taux capv cuotv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx wuov norm dorngx. Ninh mbuo aengx longc hietc hnoi saax Ziouv nyei biauv ganh. Zih hlaax ziepc luoqc wuov hnoi ninh mbuo saax ziangx nzengc.
2Chronicles29:18 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo mingh mbuox He^se^ki^yaa Hungh
2Chronicles29:19 Dongh Aa^hatc zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux
2Chronicles29:20 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei He^se^ki^yaa jiez sin daaih heuc zingh nyei zuangx jien daaih zunv
2Chronicles29:21 Ninh mbuo dorh siec dauh ngongh gouv
2Chronicles29:22 Ninh mbuo ziouc daix ngongh gouv. Sai mienh aengx dorh nziaamv fuqv ziec-dorngh. Ninh mbuo yaac daix wuov deix ba'gi yungh gouv longc yungh gouv nyei nziaamv fuqv ziec-dorngh. Nqa'haav ninh mbuo daix wuov deix ba'gi yungh gouv dorn
2Chronicles29:23 Longc fiqv zuiz ziec nyei yungh gouv ninh mbuo dorh daaih yiem hungh diex caux gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv longc buoz maan jienv yungh.
2Chronicles29:24 Sai mienh ziouc daix yungh
2Chronicles29:25 Hungh diex aengx paaiv Lewi Mienh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv. Ninh mbuo yaac maaih caauh zeiv caux domh daanh baah
2Chronicles29:26 Lewi Mienh ziouc nanv jienv Ndaawitv zoux nzung nyei jaa-sic. Sai mienh nanv jienv nzatc yaac souv jienv wuov.
2Chronicles29:27 He^se^ki^yaa ziouc paaiv yiem ziec-dorngh buov ziec aqv. Jiez gorn fongc horc buov ziec wuov zanc
2Chronicles29:28 Gapv zunv yiem wuov nyei mienh ziouc baaix. Baaux nzung nyei mienh baaux nzung
2Chronicles29:29 Buov ziec liuz
2Chronicles29:30 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh caux ninh nyei jien paaiv Lewi Mienh longc Ndaawitv caux gorngv zinh hoz waac nyei mienh
2Chronicles29:31 He^se^ki^yaa gorngv
2Chronicles29:32 Gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh dorh weic fongc horc buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv maaih cietv ziepc dauh ngongh gouv
2Chronicles29:33 Aengx ganh ca'lengc fongc horc weic zoux ziec nyei ga'naaiv maaih luoqc baeqv dauh ngongh gouv caux buo cin dauh ba'gi yungh.
2Chronicles29:34 Mv baac sai mienh zoqc haic. Maeqv saeng-kuv nyei ndopv maiv hingh. Ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz
2Chronicles29:35 Maiv daan maaih fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv camv
2Chronicles29:36 He^se^ki^yaa caux zuangx baeqc fingx gengh orn-lorqc haic weic Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor tengx baeqc fingx
2Chronicles30:1 He^se^ki^yaa paaiv mienh mingh mbuox I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh
2Chronicles30:2 Hungh diex caux zuangx jien caux yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gapv zunv nyei yietc zungv mienh caangh laangh dingc longc nyeic hlaax jiex Siex Maengc Zipv.
2Chronicles30:3 Ninh mbuo maiv duqv doix dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc jiex zipv weic zuqc saax ganh cing-nzengc nyei sai mienh maiv gaux soux mouc. Baeqc fingx yaac maiv gaengh duqv gapv zunv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles30:4 Hungh diex caux gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh buatc longc nyeic hlaax jiex zipv naaiv nyungc za'eix se horpc nyei.
2Chronicles30:5 Ninh mbuo ziouc dingc bun fienx mingh mbuox gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung
2Chronicles30:6 Fungx fienx mienh ziouc ziux hungh diex paaiv nyei waac dorh hungh diex caux hungh diex nyei jien nyei fienx mingh gormx I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa. Fienx gorngv
2Chronicles30:7 Maiv dungx hnangv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix caux gorx-youz maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun Ziouv
2Chronicles30:8 Meih mbuo maiv dungx hnyouv ngaengc hnangv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix nor. Oix zuqc zorqv ganh fungx bun Ziouv
2Chronicles30:9 Se gorngv meih mbuo nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv
2Chronicles30:10 Fungx fienx nyei mienh ziouc yietc norm zingh jiex yietc norm zingh mingh gormx E^faa^im caux Maa^natv^se
2Chronicles30:11 Kungx maaih dauh baav yiem Aa^se caux Maa^natv^se caux Se^mbu^lun nyei mienh zatv ganh njiec ziouc mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles30:12 Tin-Hungh bun Yu^ndaa Mienh dongh diuc hnyouv ei jienv hungh diex caux ninh nyei jien
2Chronicles30:13 Nyeic hlaax maaih mienh camv nyei daaih yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem weic jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv. Za'gengh benx domh wuic aqv.
2Chronicles30:14 Ninh mbuo caeqv nqoi yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei ziec-dorngh yaac zorqv nqoi yietc zungv buov hung nyei dieh
2Chronicles30:15 Nyeic hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi ninh mbuo daix Siex Maengc Zipv nyei ba'gi yungh dorn. Sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh nyaiv haic ziouc saax ganh cing-nzengc yaac dorh buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv fungx taux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv.
2Chronicles30:16 Ninh mbuo aengx bieqc mingh zoux gong hnangv zinh ndaangc zoux nor
2Chronicles30:17 Weic zuqc yiem wuic gu'nyuoz maaih mienh camv nyei maiv duqv saax ganh cing-nzengc
2Chronicles30:18 Maaih mienh camv nyei yiem E^faa^im
2Chronicles30:19 se liepc fiem liepc eix lorz Tin-Hungh
2Chronicles30:20 Ziouv muangx He^se^ki^yaa nyei waac aengx zorc ninh nyei baeqc fingx.
2Chronicles30:21 I^saa^laa^en Mienh gapv zunv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem njien-njien youh youh nyei jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv siec hnoi. Lewi Mienh caux sai mienh longc nzengc qaqv hnoi-hnoi baaux nzung ceng Ziouv.
2Chronicles30:22 He^se^ki^yaa orn Lewi Mienh nyei hnyouv
2Chronicles30:23 Gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh caangh laangh dingc aengx oix jiex zipv siec hnoi. Ninh mbuo ziouc njien-njien youh youh nyei jiex siec hnoi.
2Chronicles30:24 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles30:25 Yiem Yu^ndaa gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh
2Chronicles30:26 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh za'gengh! njien-youh haic weic zuqc yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles30:27 Sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh souv jiez daaih buang waac bun baeqc fingx. Tin-Hungh muangx haiz ninh mbuo
2Chronicles31:1 Jiex zipv nyei jauv yietc zungv sung nzengc
2Chronicles31:2 He^se^ki^yaa paaiv sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh benx ziex guanh
2Chronicles31:3 Hungh diex yaac fongc horc ninh ganh nyei ga'naaiv weic hnoi-hnoi lungh ndorm caux lungh maanz-hmuangx buov ziec nyei yaac weic Dingh Gong Hnoi
2Chronicles31:4 Ninh paaiv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx dorh horpc zuqc fongc horc bun sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh duqv nyei buonc
2Chronicles31:5 Naaiv diuh lingc yietv cuotv mingh taux norm-norm dorngx
2Chronicles31:6 Yiem I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa nyei norm-norm zingh nyei mienh yaac dorh ninh mbuo nyei ngongh caux ba'gi yungh ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv fungx bun Ziouv
2Chronicles31:7 Yiem faah hlaax ninh mbuo jiez gorn hnangv naaiv zoux
2Chronicles31:8 He^se^ki^yaa caux zuangx jien daaih mangc buatc naaiv deix ndui jienv nyei ga'naaiv
2Chronicles31:9 He^se^ki^yaa naaic sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh taux ndui jienv naaiv deix ga'naaiv.
2Chronicles31:10 Saax^ndokc nyei douh zong
2Chronicles31:11 He^se^ki^yaa paaiv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv liuc leiz ziex qongx siou ga'naaiv nyei dorngx. Ninh mbuo ziouc zoux aqv.
2Chronicles31:12 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo ziepc zuoqv nyei dorh fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv caux ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv caux fungx bun Ziouv nyei cing-nzengc ga'naaiv. Maaih dauh Lewi Mienh
2Chronicles31:13 Ziux He^se^ki^yaa Hungh caux goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei jien
2Chronicles31:14 Lewi Mienh
2Chronicles31:15 Maaih E^nden
2Chronicles31:16 maiv zeiz ziux ninh mbuo nyei douh zong. Ninh bun dauh dauh faah ziepc hnyangx nyei m'jangc dorn
2Chronicles31:17 Sai mienh faaux mbuox ziux ninh mbuo nyei douh zong nyei bungh buonc. Lewi Mienh faaux mbuox ziux ninh mbuo nyei gong-buonc caux ninh mbuo nyei guanh.
2Chronicles31:18 Ninh mbuo yaac faaux ninh mbuo fu'jueiv-faix nyei mbuox
2Chronicles31:19 Aalon nyei zeiv-fun wuov deix sai mienh
2Chronicles31:20 He^se^ki^yaa hnangv naaiv nor zoux gormx Yu^ndaa Deic. Ziux Ziouv
2Chronicles31:21 Da'faanh ninh weic Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux haaix nyungc gong fu-sux fai ei jienv leiz-latc fai lingc
2Chronicles32:1 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux liuz naaiv deix sic
2Chronicles32:2 He^se^ki^yaa buatc Sen^naa^ke^lipv daaih jiez hnyouv oix mborqv Ye^lu^saa^lem
2Chronicles32:3 ninh ziouc caux ninh nyei jien caux henv haic nyei baeng caangh laangh oix zaeqv zingh nyei wuom-zingv. Ninh mbuo ziouc tengx ninh.
2Chronicles32:4 Maaih mienh camv nyei gapv zunv daaih zaeqv nzengc yietc zungv wuom-zingv caux liouc jiex deic-bung wuov diuh ndoqv-dorn. Ninh mbuo gorngv
2Chronicles32:5 Hungh diex longc qaqv zoux gong zorc zingh laatc mbaang waaic nyei dorngx aengx ceix laauh yiem zingh laatc gu'nguaaic. Yiem zingh laatc ga'nyiec maengx ninh aengx ceix yiemc zingh laatc weih gormx
2Chronicles32:6 Ninh paaiv jun-baeng-bieiv gunv baeqc fingx
2Chronicles32:7 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc henv yaac daamv hlo. Maiv dungx gamh nziex yaac maiv dungx hnyouv namx laaix Atc^si^lie nyei hungh caux gan ninh wuov deix yietc zungv jun-baeng
2Chronicles32:8 Caux ninh yiem nyei se baamh mienh hnangv
2Chronicles32:9 Nqa'haav Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Chronicles32:10 “Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Chronicles32:11 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh mbuox meih mbuo “ Ziouv
2Chronicles32:12 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh ganh caeqv yiem hlang zaangc naaiv dauh zienh nyei dorngx caux ziec-dorngh
2Chronicles32:13 “+‘Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv yie caux yie nyei ong-taaix hnangv haaix nor zoux bun ganh guoqv nyei fingx-fingx mienh fai? Wuov deix guoqv nyei baeqc fingx nyei zienh haih njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv yie nyei buoz-ndiev fai?
2Chronicles32:14 Yie nyei ong-taaix mietc nzengc wuov deix guoqv nyei haaix dauh zienh duqv njoux ninh nyei baeqc fingx biaux ndutv yie fai? Wuov nyungc meih mbuo nyei zienh haih njoux meih mbuo biaux ndutv
2Chronicles32:15 Hnangv naaiv nor
2Chronicles32:16 Sen^naa^ke^lipv nyei jien corc aengx gorngv camv-nyungc daanh Ziouv Tin-Hungh caux ninh nyei bou
2Chronicles32:17 Ninh yaac fiev fienx gorngv doqc Ziouv
2Chronicles32:18 Naaiv deix baeng-bieiv longc Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei waac heuc mbui nyei gorngv mbuox yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zingh laatc gu'nguaaic nyei mienh
2Chronicles32:19 Ninh mbuo gorngv Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Tin-Hungh hnangv ninh mbuo gorngv lungh ndiev nyei ganh fingx mienh nyei zienh
2Chronicles32:20 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh caux Aamortv nyei dorn
2Chronicles32:21 Ziouv ziouc paaiv dauh fin-mienh bieqc Atc^si^lie hungh nyei ciangv daix nzengc ninh henv haic nyei mborqv jaax baeng caux ninh nyei domh baeng-bieiv fiuv-baeng-bieiv. Atc^si^lie nyei hungh ziouc nyaiv haic
2Chronicles32:22 Hnangv naaic Ziouv njoux He^se^ki^yaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx biaux ndutv Atc^si^lie nyei hungh
2Chronicles32:23 Mienh camv nyei daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem dorh ga'naaiv daaih bun Ziouv
2Chronicles32:24 Wuov deix ziangh hoc He^se^ki^yaa butv baengc aav lamh daic aqv. Ninh daux gaux tov Ziouv
2Chronicles32:25 Mv baac He^se^ki^yaa maiv laengz Ziouv nyei zingh en weic zuqc ninh nyei hnyouv maux. Weic naaiv Ziouv nouz haic ninh caux Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles32:26 He^se^ki^yaa ziouc nyiemv aengx goiv hnyouv guangc ninh zoux maux nyei jauv. Weic naaiv yiem He^se^ki^yaa ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc
2Chronicles32:27 He^se^ki^yaa za'gengh! butv zoih haic. Haaix dauh yaac taaih ninh. Ninh zoux dorngx siou ninh nyei jiem nyaanh caux jaaix nyei la'bieiv
2Chronicles32:28 Ninh zoux lamz siou laangh ziqc
2Chronicles32:29 Ninh yaac ceix zingh camv nyei yaac duqv ngongh guanh yungh guanh camv! haic
2Chronicles32:30 Se dongh He^se^ki^yaa caeqv Gi^hon wuov jiex nyei wuom-zingv bun wuom liouc njiec daaih bieqc Ndaawitv nyei Zingh. He^se^ki^yaa zoux haaix nyungc ninh duqv longx.
2Chronicles32:31 Hnangv naaiv nor maaih Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei domh jien paaiv daaih nyei gong-zoh daaih naaic taux yiem guoqv zaangc cuotv nyei jangx-hoc. Tin-Hungh bun ninh sueih ninh ganh nyei hnyouv kauv ninh
2Chronicles32:32 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic caux ninh zoux longx nyei jauv
2Chronicles32:33 He^se^ki^yaa guei seix mi'aqv. Ninh zangx jienv yiem Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun nyei zouv-gemh wuov jiex maengx bung. Ninh daic nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles33:1 Maa^natv^se faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv ziepc nyeic hnyangx. Ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv hmz ziepc hmz hnyangx.
2Chronicles33:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Chronicles33:3 Ninh aengx ceix jiez dongh ninh nyei die
2Chronicles33:4 Ninh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv ceix ziex norm ziec-dorngh
2Chronicles33:5 Ninh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv i norm laatc gu'nyuoz nyei dorngx weic lungh zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc ceix ziec-dorngh.
2Chronicles33:6 Ninh yiem Mben Hinnom Horngz zorqv ninh ganh nyei dorn buov ziec
2Chronicles33:7 Ninh zorqv ninh zuqc daaih wuov norm Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx an jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. Se naaiv norm biauv Ziouv gorngv mbuox Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei dorn
2Chronicles33:8 Se gorngv I^saa^laa^en Mienh faix fim
2Chronicles33:9 Mv baac Maa^natv^se dorh Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Mienh zoux dorngc. Ninh mbuo ziouc zoux orqv sic zungv gauh camv Ziouv yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei nza'hmien mietc nyei ziex norm guoqv.
2Chronicles33:10 Ziouv caux Maa^natv^se caux ninh nyei baeqc fingx gorngv mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx.
2Chronicles33:11 Weic naaiv Ziouv bun Silie Hungh nyei jun-baeng-bieiv daaih mborqv Yu^ndaa. Ninh mbuo zorqv jienv Maa^natv^se
2Chronicles33:12 Maa^natv^se zuqc naanc zingh nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles33:13 Ninh daux gaux tov nyei ziangh hoc
2Chronicles33:14 Nqa'haav Maa^natv^se aengx ceix jiez Ndaawitv nyei Zingh nyei ga'nyiec maengx zingh laatc
2Chronicles33:15 Ninh zorqv ganh fingx mienh nyei zienh guangc yaac zorqv nqoi yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz nyei miuc-fangx. Ninh caeqv caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh ninh yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv ceix daaih nyei yietc zungv ziec-dorngh guangc ga'nyiec ziqc zingh.
2Chronicles33:16 Ninh aengx ceix jiez Ziouv nyei ziec-dorngh yaac yiem wuov fongc horc ziec weic jiu tong yaac weic laengz zingh. Ninh yaac hatc Yu^ndaa Mienh oix zuqc fu-sux Ziouv
2Chronicles33:17 Maiv gunv hnangv naaiv
2Chronicles33:18 Maa^natv^se gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic
2Chronicles33:19 Hungh diex daux gaux nyei waac caux Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor dau ninh
2Chronicles33:20 Maa^natv^se guei seix mi'aqv
2Chronicles33:21 Aamon faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv nyic ziepc nyeic hnyangx. Ninh yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv i hnyangx.
2Chronicles33:22 Ziux Ziouv mangc
2Chronicles33:23 Mv baac ninh maiv hnangv ninh nyei die
2Chronicles33:24 Ninh nyei jien lomh nzoih caangh laangh ngaengc ninh
2Chronicles33:25 Mv baac guoqv gu'nyuoz nyei baeqc fingx aengx daix dongh caangh laangh ngaengc Aamon Hungh wuov deix. Ninh mbuo aengx liepc ninh nyei dorn
2Chronicles34:1 Yo^si^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv hietc hnyangx. Ninh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gunv faah ziepc yietv hnyangx.
2Chronicles34:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc ninh zoux duqv horpc
2Chronicles34:3 Yo^si^yaa zoux hungh gunv hietc hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles34:4 Zuangx mienh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien caeqv waaic nzengc Mbaa^an zienh nyei ziec-dorngh
2Chronicles34:5 Ninh yaac zorqv wuov deix zienh nyei sai mienh nyei mbungv an jienv ziec-dorngh buov
2Chronicles34:6 Ninh yiem Maa^natv^se
2Chronicles34:7 Ninh caeqv nzengc gormx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei ziec-dorngh
2Chronicles34:8 Yo^si^yaa zoux hungh ziepc betv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
2Chronicles34:9 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh lorz Hin^ki^yaa domh sai mienh zorqv zuov gaengh nyei Lewi Mienh siou daaih nyei yietc zungv nyaanh jiu bun ninh. Naaiv deix nyaanh se yiem Maa^natv^se
2Chronicles34:10 Ninh mbuo aengx zorqv naaiv deix nyaanh jiu bun zorc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gunv gong mienh. Naaiv deix gunv gong mienh jiu bun zorc biauv nyei gong-mienh zorc longx daaih hnangv loz wuov nor.
2Chronicles34:11 Ninh mbuo aengx jiu bun ndiangx-zaangc caux gomv biauv zaangc weic maaiz zuqc daaih nyei la'bieiv caux ndiangx zoux haengh
2Chronicles34:12 Naaiv deix mienh ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux gong. Gunv gong mienh maaih Lewi Mienh
2Chronicles34:13 Ninh mbuo gunv bienh ga'naaiv nyei gong-mienh caux gunv zoux nyungc-nyungc gong nyei mienh. Aengx maaih deix Lewi Mienh zoux sou-biuv caux jien caux zuov gaengh mienh.
2Chronicles34:14 Ninh mbuo zorqv dongh dorh bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei nyaanh cuotv wuov zanc
2Chronicles34:15 Hin^ki^yaa gorngv mbuox Saafaan sou-biuv
2Chronicles34:16 Saafaan ziouc dorh sou mingh bun hungh diex. Ninh aengx gorngv
2Chronicles34:17 Ninh mbuo zorqv yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei nyaanh dox cuotv nzengc jiu bun gunv gong mienh caux gong-mienh.”
2Chronicles34:18 Saafaan sou-biuv aengx gorngv mbuox hungh diex
2Chronicles34:19 Hungh diex haiz Leiz-Latc Sou nyei waac
2Chronicles34:20 Ninh ziouc paaiv Hin^ki^yaa caux Saafaan nyei dorn
2Chronicles34:21 “Mingh tengx yie yaac tengx zengc njiec nyei I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa Mienh naaic Ziouv taux lorz buatc naaiv njunc sou gu'nyuoz nyei waac. Ziouv za'gengh! qiex jiez haic mbuo
2Chronicles34:22 Hin^ki^yaa aengx caux hungh diex paaiv nyei wuov deix mienh ziouc mingh lorz dauh douc waac mienh m'sieqv dorn
2Chronicles34:23 Hun^ndaa gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
2Chronicles34:24 Ziouv
2Chronicles34:25 weic zuqc ninh mbuo guangc yie
2Chronicles34:26 Oix zuqc mbuox Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
2Chronicles34:27 Weic zuqc meih haiz ninh gorngv naaiv norm dorngx caux naaiv norm dorngx nyei baeqc fingx wuov zanc
2Chronicles34:28 Yie oix bun meih guei seix
2Chronicles34:29 Yo^si^yaa Hungh ziouc heuc yiem Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei yietc zungv mienh gox gapv zunv daaih.
2Chronicles34:30 Hungh diex caux Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx
2Chronicles34:31 Hungh diex souv jienv ninh nyei dorngx
2Chronicles34:32 Nqa'haav ninh bun yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem caux Mben^yaa^min nyei zuangx mienh laengz ei jienv naaiv deix waac. Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx ziux Tin-Hungh
2Chronicles34:33 Yo^si^yaa zorqv yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei dorngx yietc zungv gamh nziev nyei miuc-fangx guangc
2Chronicles35:1 Yo^si^yaa yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem jiex Siex Maengc Zipv weic taaih Ziouv. Zih hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi
2Chronicles35:2 Ninh paaiv sai mienh
2Chronicles35:3 Ninh gorngv mbuox Lewi Mienh
2Chronicles35:4 Meih mbuo oix zuqc ei jienv I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh
2Chronicles35:5 “Oix zuqc souv jienv cing-nzengc nyei dorngx
2Chronicles35:6 Oix zuqc daix Siex Maengc Zipv nyei ba'gi yungh dorn
2Chronicles35:7 Yo^si^yaa cuotv fim bun weic yiem wuov nyei pou-tong mienh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh bun buo waanc dauh ba'gi yungh caux yungh dorn caux buo cin dauh ngongh gouv. Naaiv deix yietc zungv se yiem hungh diex nyei buonc zorqv cuotv daaih.
2Chronicles35:8 Hungh diex nyei jien yaac cuotv fim bun baeqc fingx caux sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh. Gunv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei mienh
2Chronicles35:9 Aengx maaih Lewi Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv
2Chronicles35:10 Jiex zipv nyei jauv-louc liuc leiz ziangx nzengc
2Chronicles35:11 Lewi Mienh ziouc daix Siex Maengc Zipv nyei ba'gi yungh dorn. Sai mienh zipv wuov deix nziaamv daaih fuqv ziec-dorngh. Lewi Mienh maeqv nqoi ba'gi yungh nyei ndopv.
2Chronicles35:12 Ninh mbuo zorqv fongc horc buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv weic jiu bun pou-tong nyei mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc nyei guanh
2Chronicles35:13 Ninh mbuo ei jienv leiz longc douz ziqv Siex Maengc Zipv nyei ba'gi yungh dorn
2Chronicles35:14 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo weic ganh yaac weic sai mienh liuc leiz weic zuqc sai mienh
2Chronicles35:15 Baaux nzung nyei mienh
2Chronicles35:16 Dongh wuov hnoi ninh mbuo mbenc ziangx Siex Maengc Zipv fu-sux Ziouv
2Chronicles35:17 Wuov zanc yiem wuov nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv yaac jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv siec hnoi.
2Chronicles35:18 Yiem douc waac mienh
2Chronicles35:19 Ninh mbuo jiex naaiv norm zipv se Yo^si^yaa zoux hungh ziepc betv hnyangx wuov hnyangx.
2Chronicles35:20 Yo^si^yaa liuc leiz ziangx zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv sung nzengc
2Chronicles35:21 Mv baac Neko paaiv gong-zoh mingh gorngv mbuox ninh
2Chronicles35:22 Mv baac Yo^si^yaa maiv kangv leih nqoi ninh. Ninh zorng jaav benx ganh dauh oix caux Neko mborqv jaax. Ninh maiv muangx Tin-Hungh longc Neko nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Ninh cuotv mingh Me^gitc^ndo nyei ndau-baengh mborqv jaax.
2Chronicles35:23 Buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh buonv zuqc Yo^si^yaa Hungh. Ninh ziouc mbuox ninh nyei bou
2Chronicles35:24 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh ninh cuotv mborqv jaax nyei cie aengx bieqc ninh nyei da'nyeic norm mborqv jaax nyei cie fungx ninh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem. Ninh ziouc yiem wuov daic mi'aqv
2Chronicles35:25 Ye^le^mi weic Yo^si^yaa zoc nzauh nyiemv nyei naanc zingh nzung. Taux ih jaax hnoi baaux nzung nyei m'jangc m'sieqv baaux naaiv deix naanc zingh nzung weic jangx Yo^si^yaa. Hnangv naaiv zoux yiem I^saa^laa^en benx leiz-fingx aqv
2Chronicles35:26 Yo^si^yaa gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux zengc njiec nyei sic caux ninh ei jienv Ziouv nyei leiz-latc zoux nyei kuv sic
2Chronicles35:27 ninh zoux nyei yietc zungv
2Chronicles36:1 Yu^ndaa Mienh liepc Yo^aa^haatc nzipc jienv ninh nyei die zoux hungh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem.
2Chronicles36:2 Yo^aa^haatc faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles36:3 I^yipv nyei hungh tuix ninh njiec ninh nyei weic aengx baatc Yu^ndaa cuotv i cin yietc baeqv caux biaa joih nyaanh caux nyic ziepc yietv joih jiem.
2Chronicles36:4 I^yipv nyei hungh
2Chronicles36:5 Ye^ho^yaa^kim faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles36:6 Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh daaih caux ninh mborqv jaax
2Chronicles36:7 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa yaac zorqv deix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nyuoz nyei jaa-sic dorh mingh taux Mbaa^mbi^lon
2Chronicles36:8 Ye^ho^yaa^kim gunv nyei ziangh hoc zoux liuz zengc njiec nyei sic
2Chronicles36:9 Ye^ho^yaa^kin faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
2Chronicles36:10 Taux cun gueix hnoi
2Chronicles36:11 Se^nde^ki^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc ninh duqv nyic ziepc yietv hnyangx.
2Chronicles36:12 Ziux Ziouv
2Chronicles36:13 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa aapv ninh ziangv jienv Tin-Hungh houv waac
2Chronicles36:14 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Zuangx sai mienh nyei bieiv zeiv caux baeqc fingx fih hnangv nyei maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux yietc deix. Ninh mbuo gan jienv ganh fingx mienh zoux gamh nziev nyei sic
2Chronicles36:15 Ziouv
2Chronicles36:16 Ninh mbuo jatv ninh nyei douc fienx mienh
2Chronicles36:17 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh bun Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh daaih caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax
2Chronicles36:18 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa yaac dorh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei jaa-dorngx
2Chronicles36:19 Ninh mbuo buov zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
2Chronicles36:20 Dongh biaux ndutv maiv zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix wuov deix
2Chronicles36:21 Deic-bung ziouc benx ndau-huaang cietv ziepc hnyangx
2Chronicles36:22 Besie Hungh
2Chronicles36:23 “Besie nyei hungh
Ezra1:1 Sailatv zoux Besie Guoqv nyei hungh daauh hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Ezra1:2 “Besie Guoqv nyei hungh diex
Ezra1:3 Yiem meih mbuo zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx
Ezra1:4 Maaih haaix dauh zuqc guaatv daaih nyei mienh
Ezra1:5 Yu^ndaa caux Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv caux sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh
Ezra1:6 Yiem nitv fatv ninh mbuo wuov deix mienh bun ga'naaiv weic tengx ninh mbuo. Bun nyaanh jaa-dorngx
Ezra1:7 Sailatv Hungh Diex aengx zorqv cuotv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei jaa-dorngx
Ezra1:8 Besie Guoqv nyei hungh
Ezra1:9 Jaa-dorngx nyei soux mouc maaih hnangv naaiv. Jiem-bunh 30 norm nyaanh bunh 1
Ezra1:10 jiem-nzormc 30 norm nyaanh nzormc 410 norm ganh nyungc jaa-dorngx 1
Ezra1:11 Jiem nyaanh nyei jaa-dorngx yietc zungv maaih biaa cin feix baeqv norm. Zuqc guaatv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei mienh nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov zanc
Ezra2:1 Daaux naaiv mingh gorngv yiem wuov norm saengv zuqc guaatv mingh nzuonx daaih nyei mienh

Ezra2:59 Daaux naaiv mingh gorngv yiem Ten Melaa
Ezra2:60 Nde^lai^yaa
Ezra2:61 Yiem zuangx sai mienh mbu'ndongx maaih Haa^mbaa^yaa
Ezra2:62 Naaiv deix mienh zaah mangc ninh mbuo nyei mienh houz daan yaac lorz maiv buatc ninh mbuo nyei mbuox. Weic naaiv cingx funx ninh mbuo maaih uix
Ezra2:63 Yiutai Mienh nyei saengv-ziouv hatc ninh mbuo maiv dungx nyanc longc ziec bun Tin-Hungh gauh cing-nzengc jiex nyei nyanc hopv. Zuov sai mienh longc Ulim caux Tummim naaic cuotv.
Ezra2:64 Naaiv deix zuangx mienh gapv zunv maaih biei waanc i cin faam-baeqv luoqc ziepc dauh
Ezra2:65 cih cuotv ninh mbuo nyei m'jangc bou m'sieqv bou siec cin faam-baeqv faah ziepc cietv dauh
Ezra2:66 Ninh mbuo maaih maaz
Ezra2:67 lorh torh
