Ezra2:69 Ziux ninh mbuo haih cuotv duqv nyei
Ezra2:70 Sai mienh
Ezra3:1 Taux cietv hlaax
Ezra3:2 Yo^saa^ndakc nyei dorn
Ezra3:3 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo gamh nziex weih gormx nyei buonv-deic mienh
Ezra3:4 Ziux fiev jienv leiz-latc
Ezra3:5 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo aengx dorh zanc-zanc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux bieqc Siang-Hlaax ziec nyei
Ezra3:6 Cietv hlaax saeng-yietv
Ezra3:7 I^saa^laa^en Mienh zorqv nyaanh bun la'bieiv-zaangc caux ndiangx-zaangc. Aengx zorqv nyanc hopv caux ga'lanv youh bun Sai^ndorn Mienh caux Tailaqv Mienh weic zorqv Le^mbaa^norn Mbong nyei si^ndaa zongh ndiangx wuonc njiec taux koiv
Ezra3:8 Nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Ezra3:9 Ye^su^aa caux ninh nyei dorn mbuo caux ninh nyei cien-ceqv
Ezra3:10 Zaangc mienh liepc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei gorn-ndoqv wuov zanc
Ezra3:11 Ninh mbuo baaux nzung ceng yaac laengz zingh Ziouv gorngv
Ezra3:12 Mv baac maaih hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei sai mienh camv nyei
Ezra3:13 Yiem wuov nyei zuangx mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh haih samx duqv cuotv wuov deix qiex mbui
Ezra4:1 Yu^ndaa Mienh caux Mben^yaa^min Mienh nyei win-wangv haiz gorngv
Ezra4:2 Wuov deix win-wangv ziouc mingh lorz Se^lupv^mbaa^mben caux I^saa^laa^en nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Ezra4:3 Mv baac Se^lupv^mbaa^mben
Ezra4:4 Yiem wuov deix ndau nyei mienh ziouc zoux bun Yu^ndaa Mienh tuix bouc
Ezra4:5 Wuov deix mienh yaac beic ndiev nzuiz nyaanh bun jien-fouv dangv jienv Yu^ndaa Mienh
Ezra4:6 Yiem Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh jiez gorn gunv wuov zanc
Ezra4:7 Yiem Besie Guoqv nyei hungh
Ezra4:8 Le^hum saengv-ziouv caux Simsai sou-biuv
Ezra4:9 Saengv-ziouv
Ezra4:10 caux ziex norm guoqv nyei mienh
Ezra4:11 (Naaiv se ninh mbuo juix mingh nyei sou.) Fungx taux Aan^taa^se^sitv Hungh Diex
Ezra4:12 Hungh diex horpc zuqc hiuv duqv
Ezra4:13 Hungh diex horpc zuqc hiuv duqv
Ezra4:14 Yie mbuo yietc zungv yiem meih nyei buoz-ndiev nyei mienh
Ezra4:15 Tov paaiv mienh zaah mangc hungh diex nyei ong-taaix nyei daan. Yiem daan ziouc duqv buatc wuov norm zingh nyei mienh zanc-zanc faanv lunc
Ezra4:16 Yie mbuo oix hungh diex hiuv duqv
Ezra4:17 Hungh diex wuih sou hnangv naaiv nor gorngv. Fungx bun Le^hum saengv-ziouv caux Simsai sou-biuv
Ezra4:18 Meih mbuo juix daaih bun yie wuov zeiv sou maaih mienh doqc aengx faan daaih bun yie muangx liuz aqv.
Ezra4:19 Yie hatc mienh zaah mangc
Ezra4:20 Zinh ndaangc maaih hatc maaz nyei hungh gunv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh caux Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mba'hnoi ndortv maengx nyei yietc zungv deic-bung. Yiem wuov deix deic-bung nyei mienh yaac oix zuqc cuotv nzou-zinh caux korx-zinh bun wuov deix hungh diex.
Ezra4:21 Hnangv naaic
Ezra4:22 Meih mbuo oix zuqc maiv dungx ngaih jienv liuc leiz naaiv deix sic weic maiv hoic hungh diex zuqc kuei.
Ezra4:23 Le^hum saengv-ziouv caux Simsai sou-biuv
Ezra4:24 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh ceix zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gong ziouc dingh taux Besie Guoqv nyei hungh
Ezra5:1 Maaih i dauh douc waac mienh
Ezra5:2 Se^an^ti^en nyei dorn
Ezra5:3 Wuov zanc yiem Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mba'hnoi ndortv maengx nyei saengv-ziouv
Ezra5:4 Ninh mbuo aengx naaic
Ezra5:5 Mv baac Tin-Hungh nyei m'zing mangc jienv Yiutai Mienh nyei mienh gox. Tatv^te^nai saengv-ziouv caux ninh daaih nyei mienh maiv heuc ninh mbuo dingh gong. Zuov fungx sou mbuox tong Ndaa^li^atc Hungh aengx zuov hungh diex wuih sou nzuonx.
Ezra5:6 Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mba'hnoi ndortv maengx nyei Tatv^te^nai saengv-ziouv caux Qetaa Mbo^se^nai
Ezra5:7 Ninh mbuo fiev nyei waac hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Ezra5:8 Hungh diex horpc zuqc hiuv duqv
Ezra5:9 Yie mbuo ziouc naaic wuov deix mienh gox
Ezra5:10 Yie mbuo yaac naaic ninh mbuo nyei mbuox cingx daaih haih fiev ninh mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv nyei mbuox bun hungh diex hiuv.
Ezra5:11 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor dau yie mbuo. “Yie mbuo zoux lungh ndau nyei Tin-Hungh nyei bou. Yie mbuo aengx ceix zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
Ezra5:12 Laaix yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix cuoqv lungh zaangc nyei Tin-Hungh qiex jiez
Ezra5:13 “Nqa'haav yiem Sailatv zoux Mbaa^mbi^lon Guoqv nyei hungh daauh hnyangx
Ezra5:14 Ninh zungv tuix nzuonx zinh ndaangc Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Ezra5:15 Hungh diex yaac mbuox ninh
Ezra5:16 Setv^mbatc^saa ziouc daaih naaiv Ye^lu^saa^lem liepc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gorn-ndoqv. Yiem wuov zanc zoux jienv daaih taux ih zanc yaac zoux maiv ziangx.”
Ezra5:17 Hnangv naaic
Ezra6:1 Ndaa^li^atc Hungh paaiv mienh mingh yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv nyei dorngx
Ezra6:2 Yiem Mi^ndie Saengv
Ezra6:3 Sailatv zoux hungh daauh hnyangx
Ezra6:4 Njongc oix zuqc lapv buo yiemc domh la'bieiv nqenx yiemc ndiangx. Qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv yietc zungv se longc hungh diex nyei nyaanh cuotv.
Ezra6:5 Liemh zinh ndaangc Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
Ezra6:6 Hnangv naaic
Ezra6:7 Maiv dungx la'nyauv ninh mbuo ceix zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gong. Oix zuqc bun Yiutai Mienh nyei saengv-ziouv caux Yiutai Mienh nyei mienh gox ceix zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yiem loz-dorngx.
Ezra6:8 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Yie ih zanc hatc meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux tengx Yiutai Mienh nyei mienh gox ceix naaiv norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Da'faanh naaiv deix mienh qiemx zuqc longc nyei
Ezra6:9 Ninh mbuo qiemx zuqc longc nyei nyungc-nyungc
Ezra6:10 Hnangv naaiv zoux weic bun ninh mbuo haih fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv horpc lungh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei hnyouv
Ezra6:11 Yie aengx hatc meih mbuo
Ezra6:12 Se gorngv haaix dauh hungh fai haaix fingx mienh goiv yie naaiv diuh lingc fai mietc Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei naaiv norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
Ezra6:13 Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mba'hnoi ndortv maengx nyei Tatv^te^nai saengv-ziouv caux Qetaa Mbo^se^nai
Ezra6:14 Yaac maaih douc waac mienh
Ezra6:15 Dongh Aa^ndaa hlaax saeng-faam
Ezra6:16 I^saa^laa^en nyei baeqc fingx
Ezra6:17 Fungx zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv bun Tin-Hungh wuov zanc
Ezra6:18 Ei Mose fiev nyei sou ninh mbuo paaiv sai mienh ziux ninh mbuo nyei guanh yaac paaiv Lewi Mienh ziux ninh mbuo luonh baan yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem fu-sux Tin-Hungh.
Ezra6:19 Taux zih hlaax ziepc feix
Ezra6:20 Yietc zungv sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh ei jienv leiz saax ganh nyei uix
Ezra6:21 Hnangv naaic
Ezra6:22 Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo njien-njien youh youh nyei jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv. Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo a'hneiv weic zuqc ninh goiv Atc^si^lie Guoqv nyei hungh nyei hnyouv bun ninh tengx ninh mbuo ceix zaangc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv.
Ezra7:1 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
Ezra7:2 Hin^ki^yaa zoux Sanlum nyei dorn
Ezra7:3 Aa^hi^tupv zoux Aa^maa^li^yaa nyei dorn
Ezra7:4 Maa^laa^yotv zoux Se^laa^hi^yaa nyei dorn
Ezra7:5 Mbukc^ki zoux Aa^mbi^qu^waa nyei dorn
Ezra7:6 Dongh naaiv dauh E^saa^laa yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem. Ninh zoux fin-saeng
Ezra7:7 Aan^taa^se^sitv zoux hungh da'cietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Ezra7:8 Aan^taa^se^sitv zoux hungh da'cietv hnyangx hmz hlaax
Ezra7:9 Wuov hnyangx zih hlaax saeng-yietv E^saa^laa yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon cuotv jauv. Hmz hlaax saeng-yietv ziouc taux Ye^lu^saa^lem weic zuqc Tin-Hungh za'gengh caux ninh yiem.
Ezra7:10 E^saa^laa longc hnyouv hoqc longx Ziouv nyei Leiz-Latc yaac ei jienv zoux. Ninh aengx njaaux wuov deix leiz-latc caux leiz I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Ezra7:11 Naaiv se Aan^taa^se^sitv Hungh jiu bun E^saa^laa nyei sou. E^saa^laa zoux sai mienh yaac zoux fin-saeng
Ezra7:12 Sou hnangv naaiv nor fiev. Yie
Ezra7:13 Ih zanc yie njiec lingc gorngv yiem yie nyei guoqv
Ezra7:14 Hungh diex caux ninh nyei siec dauh caangh laangh nyei mienh cai meih mingh zaah naaic Yu^ndaa Deic caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh gan meih nyei Tin-Hungh nyei Leiz-Latc
Ezra7:15 Meih yaac oix zuqc dorh yie
Ezra7:16 Aengx dorh jienv yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon Saengv haih siou duqv daaih nyei yietc zungv jiem nyaanh. Yaac dorh baeqc fingx caux sai mienh cuotv fim fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv bun yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
Ezra7:17 Meih oix zuqc za'gengh longc naaiv deix nyaanh maaiz ngongh gouv
Ezra7:18 Zengc njiec nyei jiem nyaanh
Ezra7:19 Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv longc fu-sux Tin-Hungh nyei yietc zungv jaa-sic jiu bun meih mi'aqv. Meih oix zuqc dorh mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem fungx bun Tin-Hungh.
Ezra7:20 Se gorngv yiem meih nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv corc maaih haaix nyungc qiemx zuqc longc yaac oix zuqc lorz nor
Ezra7:21 Ih zanc yie
Ezra7:22 Dingc ziangx haih bun duqv taux nyei nyaanh i cin yietc baeqv joih
Ezra7:23 Da'faanh lungh zaangc Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor paaiv
Ezra7:24 Yie yaac oix bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv meih mbuo maiv maaih leiz siou haaix dauh sai mienh
Ezra7:25 E^saa^laa aac
Ezra7:26 Se gorngv haaix dauh maiv gan meih nyei Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc
Ezra7:27 E^saa^laa gorngv
Ezra7:28 Ziouv ceix en bun yie duqv hungh diex caux hungh diex nyei caangh laangh mienh caux maaih hungh lingc
Ezra8:1 Naaiv se yiem Aan^taa^se^sitv zoux hungh nyei hnyangx-daauh duqv caux yie
Ezra8:2 Fi^ne^hatc nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:3 Se^kaa^ni^yaa nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:4 Baa^hatc Mo^apc nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:5 Satc^tu nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:6 Aa^ndin nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:7 Elaam nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:8 Se^faa^ti^yaa nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:9 Yo^aapc nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:10 Mbaani nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:11 Mbe^mbai nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:12 Atc^gaatc nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:13 Aa^ndo^ni^kam nyei zeiv-fun maaih deix nqa'haav nzuonx. Naaiv se ninh mbuo nyei mbuox
Ezra8:14 Mbikc^wai nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:15 Yie heuc naaiv deix mienh gapv zunv yiem liouc mingh Aa^haa^waa Mungv wuov diuh ndoqv nyei ndoqv-hlen ziouc liepc ciangv yiem wuov buo hnoi. Yie dimv mangc zuangx baeqc fingx caux sai mienh wuov zanc
Ezra8:16 Yie ziouc bun mienh mingh heuc nduoh dauh bieiv zeiv daaih. Maaih E^li^ye^se
Ezra8:17 Yie heuc ninh mbuo mingh Kaa^si^fie wuov norm dorngx lorz wuov guanh mienh nyei bieiv zeiv
Ezra8:18 Tin-Hungh za'gengh korv-lienh yie mbuo
Ezra8:19 Ninh mbuo aengx dorh Me^laa^li nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra8:20 Cuotv liuz naaiv aengx maaih nyic baeqv nyic ziepc dauh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gong-mienh
Ezra8:21 Yiem wuov Aa^haa^waa Ndoqv-hlen yie heuc zuangx mienh zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc
Ezra8:22 Yie nyaiv maiv tov hungh diex bun guanh baeng caux geh maaz baeng goux yie mbuo
Ezra8:23 Yie mbuo ziouc zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc yaac weic naaiv diuh jauv jouh yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Tin-Hungh yaac dau yie mbuo daux gaux nyei waac.
Ezra8:24 Yie ginv cuotv ziepc nyeic dauh zoux hlo wuov yiemc sai mienh caux Se^le^bi^yaa
Ezra8:25 Hungh diex caux ninh nyei caangh laangh mienh
Ezra8:26 Yie nziang liuz jiu bun ninh mbuo nyei nyaanh maaih yietc waanc buo cin luoqc baeqv hmz ziepc joih
Ezra8:27 Jiem-nzormc nyic ziepc norm maaih biaa joih nyic ziepc luoqc lungz
Ezra8:28 Yie gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Ezra8:29 Meih mbuo oix zuqc goux longx
Ezra8:30 Sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh ziouc zipv nziang liuz wuov deix jiem nyaanh caux jaa-sic dorh mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem
Ezra8:31 Zih hlaax ziepc nyeic wuov hnoi
Ezra8:32 Yie mbuo taux Ye^lu^saa^lem ziouc hitv buo hnoi wuov.
Ezra8:33 Da'feix wuov hnoi
Ezra8:34 Nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv ninh mbuo nziang jiex aengx saauv liuz ziouc ziux hniev-daauh caux soux mouc fiev jienv sou-daan.
Ezra8:35 Zuqc caangv mingh nzuonx daaih nyei mienh dorh saeng-kuv buov ziec fongc horc bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh. Weic I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh ninh mbuo longc ngongh gouv ziepc nyeic dauh
Ezra8:36 Ninh mbuo yaac dorh hungh diex njiec lingc nyei sou mingh bun Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mba'hnoi ndortv maengx tengx hungh diex gunv deic-bung nyei domh jien caux saengv-ziouv. Wuov deix domh jien caux saengv-ziouv mbuo ziouc tengx baeqc fingx yaac tengx zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv.
Ezra9:1 Naaiv deix jauv-louc jiex liuz
Ezra9:2 I^saa^laa^en Mienh weic ninh mbuo ganh yaac weic ninh mbuo nyei dorn longc naaiv deix ganh fingx mienh nyei sieqv zoux auv. Ninh mbuo ziouc bun Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc nyei baeqc fingx zorpc jienv weih gormx nyei ganh fingx mienh. Zoux bieiv zeiv nyei mienh caux zoux jien nyei mienh zoux dorngc naaiv deix sic gauh camv.”
Ezra9:3 Yie yietv haiz naaiv deix sic
Ezra9:4 Da'faanh weic gamh nziex I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh nyei waac sin zinx
Ezra9:5 Lungh maanz-hmuangx taux ziec nyei ziangh hoc
Ezra9:6 Yie gorngv
Ezra9:7 Yiem loz-hnoi yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix taux ih zanc yie mbuo zoux dorngc nyei zuiz hniev haic. Laaix yie mbuo nyei zuiz
Ezra9:8 “Mv baac ih zanc Ziouv
Ezra9:9 Yie mbuo zuqc zoux nouh
Ezra9:10 “O yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Ezra9:11 dongh meih longc meih nyei bou
Ezra9:12 Weic naaiv maiv dungx bungx meih mbuo nyei sieqv bun ninh mbuo nyei dorn longc. Yaac maiv dungx lorz ninh mbuo nyei sieqv bun meih mbuo nyei dorn longc zoux auv. Meih mbuo yietc liuz maiv dungx tengx ninh mbuo duqv longx fai ceix ninh mbuo benx daaih. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo ziouc henv daaih
Ezra9:13 “Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Ezra9:14 Yie mbuo corc oix zuqc aengx baamz meih nyei leiz-latc ziouc caux zoux youx haic
Ezra9:15 O Ziouv
Ezra10:1 E^saa^laa yiem Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx mbaapv njiec ndau nyiemv jienv daux gaux nyiemc zuiz wuov zanc
Ezra10:2 Elaam nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra10:3 Ih zanc yie mbuo oix yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien liepc ngaengc waac
Ezra10:4 Meih jiez sin daaih mbenc naaiv deix sic. Yie mbuo laengz tengx jienv meih. Gunv bungx hnyouv aqv.”
Ezra10:5 E^saa^laa ziouc jiez sin daaih bun domh sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh houv jienv laengz ei naaiv deix waac zoux. Ninh mbuo ziouc houv jienv aqv.
Ezra10:6 E^saa^laa yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx mingh bieqc E^li^yaa^sipv nyei dorn
Ezra10:7 Ninh mbuo ziouc bun waac mingh zunh gormx Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem
Ezra10:8 Da'faanh naaiv deix buo hnoi gu'nyuoz
Ezra10:9 Naaiv deix buo hnoi gu'nyuoz
Ezra10:10 E^saa^laa sai mienh souv jiez daaih gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh
Ezra10:11 Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc nyiemc zuiz bun Ziouv
Ezra10:12 Gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh qiex hlo nyei dau
Ezra10:13 Mv baac yiem naaiv maaih baeqc fingx camv nyei. Mbiungc youc hlo. Yie mbuo maiv haih souv naaiv gaengh ka'ndau. Yaac maiv zeiz yietc hnoi i hnoi haih mbenc duqv sung nyei sic
Ezra10:14 Tov bun yie mbuo nyei jien yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem tengx zuangx baeqc fingx mbenc naaiv deix sic. Haaix dauh longc ganh fingx nyei sieqv zoux auv
Ezra10:15 Kungx Aa^saax^hen nyei dorn
Ezra10:16 Zuqc guaatv mingh nzuonx daaih nyei zuangx mienh ziouc ei jienv naaiv nyungc za'eix zoux. E^saa^laa sai mienh ziouc ziux mbuox ginv deix bungh buonc nyei bieiv zeiv
Ezra10:17 Taux zih hlaax saeng-yietv ninh mbuo mbenc sung nzengc longc ganh fingx mienh zoux auv nyei sic.
Ezra10:18 Naaiv se longc ganh fingx mienh nyei sieqv zoux auv wuov deix sai mienh nyei mbuox ziux ninh mbuo nyei douh zong. Yo^saa^ndakc nyei zeiv-fun
Ezra10:19 Ninh mbuo laengz leih ninh mbuo nyei auv yaac weic ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei zuiz fongc horc dauh ba'gi yungh gouv fiqv ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei zuiz.
Ezra10:20 Imme nyei zeiv-fun maaih Haa^naa^ni caux Se^mbaa^ndi^yaa.
Ezra10:21 Haalim nyei zeiv-fun maaih Maa^aa^se^aa
Ezra10:22 Baatc^he nyei zeiv-fun maaih E^li^o^nai
Ezra10:23 Lewi Mienh maaih Yo^saa^mbaatc
Ezra10:24 Baaux nzung nyei mienh maaih E^li^yaa^sipv. Zuov gaengh nyei mienh maaih Sanlum
Ezra10:25 Zengc njiec nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih
Ezra10:26 Elaam nyei zeiv-fun maaih Matv^taa^ni^yaa
Ezra10:27 Satc^tu nyei zeiv-fun maaih E^li^o^nai
Ezra10:28 Mbe^mbai nyei zeiv-fun maaih Ye^ho^haa^nan
Ezra10:29 Mbaani nyei zeiv-fun maaih Me^sun^laam
Ezra10:30 Baa^hatc Mo^apc nyei zeiv-fun maaih Atc^naa
Ezra10:31 Haalim nyei zeiv-fun maaih E^li^ye^se
Ezra10:32 Mben^yaa^min
Ezra10:33 Haasum nyei zeiv-fun maaih Matv^te^nai
Ezra10:34 Mbaani nyei zeiv-fun maaih Maa^aa^ndai
Ezra10:35 Mbe^nai^yaa
Ezra10:36 Waa^ni^yaa
Ezra10:37 Matv^taa^ni^yaa
Ezra10:38 Mbinnui nyei zeiv-fun maaih Si^me^i
Ezra10:39 Se^le^mi^yaa
Ezra10:40 Makv^naa^nde^mbai
Ezra10:41 Aa^saa^len
Ezra10:42 Sanlum
Ezra10:43 Ne^mbo nyei zeiv-fun maaih Ye^i^en
Ezra10:44 Naaiv deix mienh yietc zungv longc ganh fingx mienh nyei sieqv zoux auv. Maaih deix yaac duqv fu'jueiv.
Nehemiah1:1 Naaiv se Haa^kaa^li^yaa nyei dorn
Nehemiah1:2 maaih dauh yie nyei gorx-youz
Nehemiah1:3 Ninh mbuo mbuox yie
Nehemiah1:4 Yie haiz naaiv deix waac
Nehemiah1:5 Yie gorngv
Nehemiah1:6 Tov Ziouv nungx m'zing mangc yaac baeng m'normh muangx yie
Nehemiah1:7 Yie mbuo zoux waaic zoux orqv camv nyei bun meih. Yie mbuo maiv ei jienv meih paaiv bun meih nyei bou
Nehemiah1:8 “Tov Ziouv jangx jienv meih paaiv bun meih nyei bou
Nehemiah1:9 Se gorngv meih mbuo nzuonx daaih lorz yie
Nehemiah1:10 “Naaiv deix mienh se meih nyei bou
Nehemiah1:11 O Ziouv aac
Nehemiah2:1 Aan^taa^se^sitv zoux hungh diex nyic ziepc hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Nehemiah2:2 Hungh diex ziouc naaic yie
Nehemiah2:3 mv baac yie dau hungh diex
Nehemiah2:4 Hungh diex ziouc naaic yie
Nehemiah2:5 yaac dau hungh diex
Nehemiah2:6 Hungh diex caux yie gorngv waac wuov zanc maaih hungh maac zueiz jienv ninh nyei ga'hlen. Hungh diex naaic yie
Nehemiah2:7 Yie ziouc mbuox hungh diex
Nehemiah2:8 Yie aengx tov zeiv sou bun gunv hungh diex nyei ndiangx-lomc wuov dauh Aasaapc
Nehemiah2:9 Yie ziouc mingh taux Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih mba'hnoi ndortv maengx nyei saengv-ziouv
Nehemiah2:10 Mv baac Mbetc Holon Zingh nyei mienh
Nehemiah2:11 Yie ziouc taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
Nehemiah2:12 Yie yaac maiv mbuox haaix dauh mienh Tin-Hungh bun yie maaih hnyouv weic Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh zoux haaix nyungc. Lungh muonz zanc maaih i ziex dauh mienh caux yie jiez sin cuotv mingh. Cuotv liuz yie geh nyei saeng-kuv
Nehemiah2:13 Lungh muonz zanc yie yangh Horngz-Gaengh wuov dauh gaengh cuotv mingh taux Hieh Juv Wuom-Zingv
Nehemiah2:14 Yie aengx jiex mingh taux Wuom-Zingv Gaengh caux Hungh Diex nyei Wuom-Domh mv baac maiv maaih dorngx bun yie geh nyei saeng-kuv jiex duqv mingh.
Nehemiah2:15 Lungh muonz zanc yie gan Kitc^lon Horngz mingh zaah mangc zingh laatc ziouc daaux sin yangh loz-jauv nzuonx aengx gan jienv Horngz-Gaengh bieqc zingh.
Nehemiah2:16 Goux zingh nyei jien yaac maiv hiuv duqv yie mingh haaix fai zoux haaix nyungc. Yie yaac maiv gaengh mbuox Yiutai Mienh
Nehemiah2:17 Yie ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo zuangx mienh
Nehemiah2:18 Yie aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Nehemiah2:19 Mbetc Holon Zingh nyei mienh
Nehemiah2:20 Yie dau ninh mbuo
Nehemiah3:1 E^li^yaa^sipv domh sai mienh caux jienv ninh zoux sai mienh wuov deix gorx-youz njiec buoz ceix Ba'gi Yungh Gaengh. Ninh mbuo fungx bun Tin-Hungh ziouc naetv jienv gaengh. Ninh mbuo aengx ceix jienv zingh laatc mingh taux Yietc Baeqv Baeng nyei Laauh
Nehemiah3:2 Ye^li^ko Mienh aengx ceix daaux jienv wuov douc zingh laatc. Imli nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:3 Hatc^se^naa^aa nyei fun-faqv aengx liepc jiez Mbiauz-Gaengh. Ninh mbuo zoux gaengh qorng
Nehemiah3:4 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:5 Jiex mingh wuov douc Te^ko^aa Zingh nyei mienh zoux. Mv baac ninh mbuo zoux hlo nyei mienh maiv kangv zoux gong-bou-hniev ziux gunv gong mienh paaiv ninh mbuo zoux.
Nehemiah3:6 Baa^se^aa nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:7 Jiex mingh wuov douc se Gi^mbe^on Zingh nyei mienh
Nehemiah3:8 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:9 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:10 Jiex mingh Haa^lu^mapv nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:11 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:12 Daaux jienv mingh wuov douc maaih Han^lo^hetc nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:13 Haanun caux Saax^no^aa Zingh nyei baeqc fingx zorc Horngz-Gaengh. Ninh mbuo zorqv gaengh qorng aengx naetv jienv gaengh
Nehemiah3:14 Lekaapv nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:15 Kon Ho^se nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:16 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:17 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:18 Jiex mingh
Nehemiah3:19 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:20 Daaux jienv mingh maaih Sapc^mbai nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:21 Jiex mingh Hakv^kotc nyei fun
Nehemiah3:22 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:23 Jiex mingh Mben^yaa^min caux Hatc^supv zorc yiem ninh mbuo nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx wuov douc laatc. Aengx jiex mingh Aa^naa^ni^yaa nyei fun
Nehemiah3:24 Daaux naaiv mingh
Nehemiah3:25 Usai nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:26 caux yiem Ofen Mbong zoux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei bou wuov deix zorc taux dong bung maengx Wuom-Gaengh nyei doix-ngaanc caux capv laauh cuotv nyei dorngx.
Nehemiah3:27 Daaux naaiv mingh Te^ko^aa Mienh aengx zorc douc yiem capv cuotv nyei domh laauh mingh taux nitv Ofen nyei zingh laatc.
Nehemiah3:28 Yiem Maaz-Gaengh faaux
Nehemiah3:29 Jiex mingh Imme nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:30 Jiex mingh Se^le^mi^yaa nyei dorn
Nehemiah3:31 Daaux jienv mingh maaih dauh jiem-zaangc
Nehemiah3:32 Yiem gorqv gu'nguaaic nyei laauh mingh taux Ba'gi Yungh Gaengh se jiem-zaangc caux saeng-eix mienh zorc.
Nehemiah4:1 Sanx^mbaan^latv haiz gorngv yie mbuo ceix zingh laatc
Nehemiah4:2 Ninh dorng jienv ninh nyei gorx-youz caux Saa^maa^lie Mienh nyei baeng gorngv
Nehemiah4:3 Ammon Mienh
Nehemiah4:4 Yie daux gaux gorngv
Nehemiah4:5 Maiv dungx buang jienv ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei zuiz. Yaac maiv dungx sortv guangc meih buatc ninh mbuo zoux nyei zuiz
Nehemiah4:6 Yie mbuo ziouc ceix zingh laatc faaux hlang
Nehemiah4:7 Mv baac Sanx^mbaan^latv
Nehemiah4:8 Ninh mbuo lomh nzoih daav za'eix oix mborqv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Nehemiah4:9 Mv baac yie mbuo daux gaux jouh yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh yaac paaiv mienh ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz zuov jienv mbungh ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic.
Nehemiah4:10 Yu^ndaa Mienh yaac gorngv
Nehemiah4:11 Yie mbuo nyei win-wangv yaac sie jienv waac gorngv
Nehemiah4:12 Yiem nitv win-wangv fatv nyei Yiutai Mienh daaih mbuox yie mbuo maiv zeiv ziepc nzunc
Nehemiah4:13 Weic naaiv yie ziouc paaiv baeqc fingx ziux ninh mbuo nyei bungh buonc
Nehemiah4:14 Yie zaah liuz zingh laatc ziouc dorng jienv zoux hlo zoux jien nyei mienh caux zoux baeqc fingx nyei zuangx mienh gorngv
Nehemiah4:15 Yie mbuo nyei win-wangv haiz gorngv yie mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo nyei za'eix. Ninh mbuo yaac hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zoux bun ninh mbuo nyei za'eix waaic mi'aqv. Yie mbuo ziouc nzuonx taux zingh laatc
Nehemiah4:16 Yiem naaic hnoi daaih
Nehemiah4:17 zorc zingh laatc nyei gong-mienh. Liemh bienh ga'naaiv nyei mienh longc yietc jieqv buoz zoux gong
Nehemiah4:18 Dauh dauh ceix zingh laatc nyei gong-mienh buix jienv ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv zoux gong. Mv baac biomv jorng wuov dauh mienh caux yie yiem.
Nehemiah4:19 Yie aengx mbuox zoux hlo zoux jien nyei mienh caux zoux baeqc fingx nyei zuangx mienh
Nehemiah4:20 Meih mbuo haiz jorng mbui haaix norm dorngx
Nehemiah4:21 Yie mbuo ziouc zoux jienv gong mingh. Maaih yietc buonc gong-mienh nanv jienv cang. Lungh ndorm nziouv mbiouz-mbiouz njang taux aav hitv hmuangx hleix cuotv nyei ziangh hoc zuov jienv.
Nehemiah4:22 Wuov zanc yie aengx gorngv mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx
Nehemiah4:23 Liemh yie caux yie nyei gorx-youz caux tengx yie zoux gong nyei mienh caux zuov zingh nyei mienh maiv jaiv lui-houx. Gorqv-mienh yaac buix jienv gorqv-mienh nyei wuoqc ginc
Nehemiah5:1 Maaih baeqc fingx caux ninh mbuo nyei auv qaqv! ngopv ninh mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Nehemiah5:2 Maaih deix gorngv
Nehemiah5:3 Maaih deix gorngv
Nehemiah5:4 Aengx maaih deix gorngv
Nehemiah5:5 Yie mbuo caux yie mbuo nyei gorx-youz dongh fingx Yiutai Mienh. Yie mbuo nyei naamh nyouz caux ninh mbuo nyei naamh nyouz yaac fih hnangv nyei. Mv baac yie mbuo oix zuqc bun yie mbuo nyei dorn
Nehemiah5:6 Yie haiz naaiv deix mienh qaqv gorngv nyei waac
Nehemiah5:7 Yie longx-longx nyei hnamv taux naaiv deix sic ziouc gox zoux hlo zoux jien nyei mienh. Yie gorngv
Nehemiah5:8 Yie gorngv
Nehemiah5:9 Yie aengx gorngv
Nehemiah5:10 Yie caux yie nyei gorx-youz caux yie nyei gong-mienh fih hnangv nyei gaav nyaanh gaav mbiauh bun mbuo nyei gorx-youz. Mv baac oix zuqc guangc njiec
Nehemiah5:11 Ih zanc oix zuqc zorqv ninh mbuo nyei lingh deic
Nehemiah5:12 Zoux hlo nyei mienh gorngv
Nehemiah5:13 Yie yaac sou yie sai jienv wuov kuaaiv ndie yaac gorngv
Nehemiah5:14 Cuotv liuz naaiv
Nehemiah5:15 Yiem ndaangc yie wuov deix saengv-ziouv hoic baeqc fingx ndaam hniev. Mouz hnoi oix zuqc bun nyanc hopv caux a'ngunc diuv caux ziepc lungz nyaanh. Liemh ninh mbuo nyei fiuv-jien caux jienv hoic baeqc fingx. Mv baac yie maiv hnangv naaic zoux weic zuqc yie taaih Tin-Hungh.
Nehemiah5:16 Daaux nzuonx yie longc qaqv zorc zingh laatc
Nehemiah5:17 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Maaih Yiutai Mienh caux jien yietc baeqv hmz ziepc dauh caux yie juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx. Corc aengx maaih deix weih gormx yie mbuo wuov deix norm-norm guoqv nyei mienh daaih yie mbuo naaiv.
Nehemiah5:18 Hnoi-hnoi mbenc nyei nyanc hopv oix zuqc maaih yietc dauh ngongh
Nehemiah5:19 “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Nehemiah6:1 Sanx^mbaan^latv
Nehemiah6:2 Sanx^mbaan^latv caux Gesem bun waac daaih mbuox yie
Nehemiah6:3 Yie cai mienh mingh mbuox ninh mbuo
Nehemiah6:4 Ninh mbuo bun waac daaih biei nzunc
Nehemiah6:5 Taux da'hmz nzunc
Nehemiah6:6 Fienx fiev jienv gorngv

Nehemiah6:17 Yiem naaiv deix hnoi-nyieqc yaac maaih zoux hlo nyei Yu^ndaa Mienh fungx fienx camv nyei mingh bun To^mbi^aa. To^mbi^aa yaac wuih fienx bun ninh mbuo.

Nehemiah7:1 Zorc ziangx zingh laatc

Nehemiah7:3 Yie mbuox ziangx ninh mbuo
Nehemiah7:4 Wuov norm zingh youc hlo youc jangv. Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh yaac zoqc. Biauv yaac maiv gaengh duqv gomv camv.
Nehemiah7:5 Tin-Hungh bun yie yiem hnyouv hiuv duqv oix zuqc heuc zoux hlo zoux jien nyei mienh caux zuangx baeqc fingx ziux mienh buonc faaux mienh houz. Yie yaac lorz buatc zuqc guaatv mingh nzuonx daaih da'yietv baan nyei mienh houz daan. Yie buatc sou-daan hnangv naaiv nor fiev.

Nehemiah12:15 Haalim maaih Atc^naa Me^laa^yotv maaih Henkaai
Nehemiah12:16 Itc^ndo maaih Se^kaa^li^yaa Gin^ne^ton maaih Me^sun^laam
Nehemiah12:17 Aa^mbi^yaa maaih Sikc^li Min^yaa^min caux Mo^atc^yaa maaih Bintai
Nehemiah12:18 Mbin^gaa maaih Sam^mu^waa Se^mai^aa maaih Ye^ho^naa^tan
Nehemiah12:19 Yo^yaa^lipv maaih Matv^te^nai Ye^ndaa^yaa maaih Utc^si
Nehemiah12:20 Sanx^lai maaih Kaanlai Aamokv maaih E^mbe
Nehemiah12:21 Hin^ki^yaa maaih Haa^saa^bi^yaa Ye^ndaa^yaa maaih Ne^tan^en
Nehemiah12:22 Yiem E^li^yaa^sipv
Nehemiah12:23 Lewi Mienh nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv fiev jienv Zunh Doic Douh nyei Sou taux E^li^yaa^sipv nyei zeiv-fun
Nehemiah12:24 Lewi Mienh nyei bieiv zeiv maaih Haa^saa^bi^yaa
Nehemiah12:25 Matv^taa^ni^yaa
Nehemiah12:26 Naaiv deix mienh yiem Yo^saa^ndakc nyei fun
Nehemiah12:27 Ninh mbuo fungx Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zingh laatc jiu bun Ziouv wuov zanc
Nehemiah12:28 Lewi Mienh nyei zeiv-fun wuov deix baaux nzung nyei mienh yiem weih gormx Ye^lu^saa^lem daaih
Nehemiah12:29 Maaih deix yiem Mbetc Gin^gaan
Nehemiah12:30 Zuangx sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh saax ganh cing-nzengc yaac saax zuangx baeqc fingx
Nehemiah12:31 Yie heuc Yu^ndaa Deic nyei bieiv zeiv faaux zingh laatc gu'nguaaic yaac paaiv baaux nzung nyei mienh zoux i domh guanh baaux nzung laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Da'yietv guanh oix zuqc yiem zingh laatc gu'nguaaic yangh mbiaauc maengx
Nehemiah12:32 Maaih Ho^saa^yaa caux yietc buonc Yu^ndaa nyei bieiv zeiv gan jienv ninh mbuo mingh.
Nehemiah12:33 Aengx maaih Aa^saa^li^yaa
Nehemiah12:34 Yu^ndaa
Nehemiah12:35 Aengx maaih deix biomv nzatc nyei sai mienh
Nehemiah12:36 Yaac maaih Yo^naa^taan nyei gorx-youz
Nehemiah12:37 Yiem Wuom-Zingv Gaengh jiex mingh ninh mbuo baeng zaqc nyei yangh Ndaawitv Hungh nyei Zingh nyei tei faaux
Nehemiah12:38 Da'nyeic guanh baaux nzung nyei mienh mingh zaaix maengx. Yie caux yietc buonc baeqc fingx gan jienv ninh mbuo mingh
Nehemiah12:39 Yie mbuo aengx jiex E^faa^im Gaengh
Nehemiah12:40 Wuov deix i guanh baaux nzung laengz zingh Tin-Hungh nyei mienh caux yie aengx caux yietc buonc zoux jien nyei mienh mingh souv jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz.
Nehemiah12:41 Aengx maaih sai mienh nanv jienv ninh mbuo nyei nzatc. Maaih E^li^yaa^kim
Nehemiah12:42 Aengx maaih Maa^aa^se^aa
Nehemiah12:43 Wuov hnoi ninh mbuo buov saeng-kuv ziec bun Tin-Hungh camv haic
Nehemiah12:44 Dongh wuov zanc ninh mbuo paaiv mienh goux siou ga'naaiv nyei dorngx
Nehemiah12:45 Sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh mbuo ei ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh paaiv ziangx zoux yaac tengx mienh saax uix. Aengx maaih baaux nzung nyei mienh caux zuov gaengh nyei mienh yaac ei jienv Ndaawitv Hungh caux ninh nyei dorn
Nehemiah12:46 Weic zuqc loz-hnoi yiem Ndaawitv Hungh caux Aasaapc nyei lungh ndiev maaih dorh nzung nyei mienh
Nehemiah12:47 Hnangv naaic
Nehemiah13:1 Dongh wuov hnoi doqc Mose nyei Sou bun baeqc fingx muangx wuov zanc
Nehemiah13:2 weic zuqc zinh ndaangc ninh mbuo maiv dorh nyanc hopv caux wuom cuotv daaih zipv I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Nehemiah13:3 I^saa^laa^en Mienh haiz liuz naaiv deix leiz-latc
Nehemiah13:4 Zinh ndaangc paaiv E^li^yaa^sipv sai mienh goux zaangc yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv siou ga'naaiv nyei dorngx. Ninh caux To^mbi^aa zuoqc haic.
Nehemiah13:5 E^li^yaa^sipv bun yietc qongx biauv hlo nyei To^mbi^aa longc
Nehemiah13:6 Naaiv deix sic cuotv nyei ziangh hoc yie maiv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem
Nehemiah13:7 Yie ziouc aengx mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem. Taux daaih yie cingx hiuv duqv E^li^yaa^sipv zoux naaiv deix waaic sic
Nehemiah13:8 Yie qiex jiez! haic
Nehemiah13:9 Yie hatc ninh mbuo saax nzengc qongx-qongx biauv nyei uix. Yie ziouc bienh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei jaa-dorngx
Nehemiah13:10 Yie aengx duqv buatc Lewi Mienh horpc zuqc duqv nyei buonc maiv maaih mienh bun ninh mbuo. Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fu-sux nyei Lewi Mienh caux baaux nzung nyei mienh ziouc nzuonx nzengc
Nehemiah13:11 Yie ziouc gorngv goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei jien. Yie gorngv
Nehemiah13:12 Yu^ndaa nyei zuangx mienh ziouc dorh ninh mbuo nyei laangh ziqc
Nehemiah13:13 Yie bun Se^le^mi^yaa sai mienh caux Saax^ndokc sou-biuv
Nehemiah13:14 “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Nehemiah13:15 Wuov deix hnoi yie yiem Yu^ndaa Deic buatc mienh doix Dingh Gong Hnoi nyueih a'ngunc biouv zoux diuv. Maaih deix zorqv mbiauh caux a'ngunc diuv
Nehemiah13:16 Maaih deix yiem Tailaqv Zingh daaih yiem jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh yaac dorh mbiauz caux nyungc-nyungc huox daaih doix Dingh Gong Hnoi maaic bun Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh.
Nehemiah13:17 Yie ziouc hemx zoux hlo nyei Yu^ndaa Mienh. Yie gorngv
Nehemiah13:18 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix fih hnangv nyei zoux maiv zeiz? Weic naaiv mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh bun mbuo caux naaiv norm zingh zuqc naaiv deix zeqc naanc maiv zeiz? Ih zanc laaix bun Dingh Gong Hnoi maaih uix
Nehemiah13:19 Jiex daaih aav lamh taux Dingh Gong Hnoi wuov muonz
Nehemiah13:20 Maaih deix saeng-eix mienh caux maaic nyungc-nyungc huox nyei mienh daaih nzunc i nzunc hitv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh ga'nyiec maengx.
Nehemiah13:21 Mv baac yie donv ninh mbuo yaac gorngv
Nehemiah13:22 Yie heuc Lewi Mienh saax nzengc ganh nyei uix daaih zuov zingh gaengh weic goux jienv Dingh Gong Hnoi benx cing-nzengc hnoi. “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Nehemiah13:23 Yiem wuov deix hnoi yie yaac buatc maaih deix Yu^ndaa Mienh longc Atc^ndotc
Nehemiah13:24 Ninh mbuo nyei fu'jueiv maaih yietc buonc kungx gorngv Atc^ndotc waac. Ninh mbuo maiv haih gorngv Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei waac. Kungx haih gorngv ninh mbuo wuov deix ganh fingx waac hnangv.
Nehemiah13:25 Yie ziouc hemx ninh mbuo
Nehemiah13:26 Se laaix ganh fingx m'sieqv dorn
Nehemiah13:27 Se horpc nyei fai? Yie mbuo corc oix zuqc muangx meih mbuo aengx zoux naaiv nyungc waaic haic nyei sic
Nehemiah13:28 E^li^yaa^sipv domh sai mienh nyei dorn
Nehemiah13:29 “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Nehemiah13:30 Hnangv naaic
Nehemiah13:31 Yie yaac liuc leiz ziangx bun mienh ziux dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc fongc horc zaangh caux daauh torngx gaeng-zuangx ga'naaiv. “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Esther1:1 Naaiv deix sic cuotv doix zuqc Aa^haa^su^e^latv zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc. Ninh gunv yietc baeqv nyic ziepc cietv norm saengv
Esther1:2 Wuov zanc Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh yiem Susaax Domh Zingh nyei hungh dinc.
Esther1:3 Ninh zoux hungh da'faam hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Esther1:4 Hungh diex zorqv ninh nyei guoqv nyei zinh zoih siou-setv caux longx jiex
Esther1:5 Naaiv deix hnoi jiex liuz
Esther1:6 Yiem wuov huingx maaih buic-ndie-baeqc caux ndie-mbuov corng jienv
Esther1:7 Maaih jiem-zaanv weic zaangh a'ngunc diuv hopv. Zaanv yietc norm caux yietc norm yaac maiv fih hnangv. A'ngunc diuv yaac maaih camv
Esther1:8 Hopv nyei ziangh hoc ziux leiz hopv
Esther1:9 Watv^qaa^ti Hungh Maac yaac yiem Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh nyei hungh dinc weic m'sieqv dorn mbenc norm yinh.
Esther1:10 Da'cietv hnoi wuov hnoi
Esther1:11 dorh Watv^qaa^ti Hungh Maac daaih. Ninh oix zuqc ndongx jienv ninh nyei hungh maac nyei hungh ningv yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien bun zoux hlo nyei mienh caux baeqc fingx mangc ninh ndongc haaix nzueic
Esther1:12 Wuov deix jien dorh hungh diex nyei waac mingh mbuox hungh maac mv baac Watv^qaa^ti Hungh Maac ngaengc jienv maiv kangv mingh. Hungh diex ziouc qiex jiez! haic hnangv oix njopc douz nor.
Esther1:13 Ziux leiz-fingx
Esther1:14 se caux gauh nitv hungh diex fatv wuov deix zoux hlo nyei mienh Kaan^se^naa
Esther1:15 Hungh diex naaic ninh mbuo
Esther1:16 Me^mu^kaan ziouc dorng jienv hungh diex caux zuangx jien dau
Esther1:17 weic zuqc hungh maac zoux nyei sic oix sing taux dauh dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei m'normh. Ninh mbuo ziouc mangc piex ninh mbuo nyei nqox aqv. Ninh mbuo oix gorngv
Esther1:18 Ih hnoi haaix dauh Besie caux Mi^ndie Guoqv zoux hlo nyei mienh nyei m'sieqv dorn haiz liuz hungh maac zoux nyei sic
Esther1:19 Se gorngv horpc hungh diex nyei hnyouv nor
Esther1:20 Hnangv naaic
Esther1:21 Naaiv deix waac horpc hungh diex caux ninh nyei jien nyei hnyouv. Hungh diex ziouc ei jienv Me^mu^kaan nyei za'eix zoux.
Esther1:22 Ninh fungx sou mingh taux ninh gunv nyei norm-norm saengv. Yietc norm saengv fiev ziux wuov norm saengv nyei nzaangc
Esther2:1 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
Esther2:2 Fu-sux hungh diex wuov deix jien ziouc mbuox hungh diex
Esther2:3 Hungh diex oix zuqc paaiv deix jien yiem meih gunv nyei norm-norm saengv
Esther2:4 Haaix dauh sieqv gauh horpc hungh diex nyei hnyouv
Esther2:5 Yiem Susaax Zingh maaih dauh Yiutai Mienh
Esther2:6 Mbaa^mbi^lon Guoqv nyei Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh caangv Yu^ndaa Deic nyei hungh
Esther2:7 Mo^nde^kai nyei youz-diex maaih dauh sieqv
Esther2:8 Hungh diex njiec nyei lingc zunh gormx deic-bung wuov zanc ziouc maaih sieqv camv nyei zuqc gapv zunv dorh taux Susaax Domh Zingh
Esther2:9 Hegai a'hneiv haic E^se^te
Esther2:10 E^se^te maiv bun haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh zoux haaix fingx mienh
Esther2:11 Mo^nde^kai hnoi-hnoi mingh taux wuov deix m'sieqv dorn yiem nyei biauv nyei laatc nza'hmien maengx. Ninh oix hiuv E^se^te hnangv haaix nor yaac mangc gaax ninh maaih haaix nyungc jauv cuotv.
Esther2:12 Dauh dauh sieqv maiv gaengh bieqc mingh buangh Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh nyei ziangh hoc
Esther2:13 Sieqv bieqc mingh buangh hungh diex wuov zanc se hnangv naaiv. Sieqv oix longc yiem m'sieqv dorn nyei biauv nyei haaix nyungc dorh mingh
Esther2:14 Lungh maanz-hmuangx
Esther2:15 Taux Mo^nde^kai nyei domh nauz
Esther2:16 Dorh E^se^te bieqc hungh dinc mingh buangh hungh diex wuov zanc
Esther2:17 Hungh diex hnamv E^se^te gauh camv wuov deix yietc zungv m'sieqv dorn. E^se^te horpc ninh nyei hnyouv haic
Esther2:18 Hungh diex weic E^se^te mbenc donx hnaangx hlo nyei yaac cingv ninh nyei zuangx jien caux zoux hlo nyei mienh. Ninh yaac zunh gormx ninh nyei guoqv heuc mienh dongh wuov hnoi dingh gong hitv kuonx yaac zoux hnyouv jangv nyei fungx zingh nyeic bun mienh.
Esther2:19 Maiv nziaauc jiex dorn nyei sieqv zuqc gapv zunv da'nyeic nzunc wuov zanc
Esther2:20 E^se^te maiv bun haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh zoux haaix fingx mienh yaac maiv bun haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh nyei cien-ceqv
Esther2:21 Mo^nde^kai zueiz jienv hungh dinc nyei laatc gaengh nyei ziangh hoc
Esther2:22 Mo^nde^kai hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic
Esther2:23 Mienh zaah mangc naaiv deix sic
Esther3:1 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
Esther3:2 Yiem hungh dinc nyei laatc gaengh nyei zuangx jien gueic njiec baaix Haamaan
Esther3:3 Yiem hungh dinc fu-sux hungh diex nyei jien naaic Mo^nde^kai
Esther3:4 Wuov deix mienh hnoi-hnoi kuinx ninh
Esther3:5 Haamaan buatc Mo^nde^kai maiv gueic maiv baaix
Esther3:6 Mv baac Haamaan hiuv duqv Mo^nde^kai se Yiutai Mienh
Esther3:7 Aa^haa^su^e^latv zoux hungh ziepc nyeic hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Esther3:8 Haamaan gorngv mbuox Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh
Esther3:9 Hungh diex buatc horpc nor
Esther3:10 Hungh diex ziouc hlutv ninh nyei buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng yienx bun Yiutai Mienh nyei win-wangv
Esther3:11 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Haamaan
Esther3:12 Zih hlaax ziepc faam wuov hnoi
Esther3:13 Fungx fienx nyei mienh fungx sou mingh taux hungh diex gunv nyei norm-norm saengv. Sou gorngv
Esther3:14 Oix zuqc ceu naaiv diuh hungh lingc fungx mingh taux norm-norm saengv
Esther3:15 Fungx fienx nyei mienh ziouc dengv hungh diex nyei lingc gaanv jienv cuotv mingh. Wuov diuh hungh lingc yaac yiem Susaax Domh Zingh zunh cuotv. Hungh diex caux Haamaan zueiz jienv hopv diuv
Esther4:1 Mo^nde^kai hiuv duqv cuotv daaih naaiv deix yietc zungv sic ziouc betv ninh nyei lui-houx
Esther4:2 Ninh mingh taux hungh dinc nyei laatc gaengh mv baac maiv bieqc laatc gu'nyuoz
Esther4:3 Yiem norm-norm saengv
Esther4:4 Fu-sux E^se^te nyei m'sieqv bou caux jien dorh Mo^nde^kai zoux nyei sic daaih mbuox E^se^te. E^se^te gengh! nzauh haic. Ninh fungx lui-houx mingh bun Mo^nde^kai weic bun ninh yienc nqoi la'maah ndie-cou
Esther4:5 E^se^te ziouc heuc dauh dongh hungh diex paaiv daaih fu-sux E^se^te nyei jien
Esther4:6 Haataakv ziouc cuotv taux zingh nyei domh zuangx zaamc yiem hungh dinc nyei laatc gaengh ndaangc lorz Mo^nde^kai.
Esther4:7 Mo^nde^kai zueih yietv zueih nyeic nyei gorngv nzengc ninh buangh nyei sic
Esther4:8 Mo^nde^kai aengx zorqv zeiv ceu daaih nyei sou
Esther4:9 Haataakv nzuonx mingh aengx zorqv Mo^nde^kai nyei waac mbuox nzengc E^se^te.
Esther4:10 E^se^te ziouc paaiv Haataakv dorh naaiv deix waac mingh mbuox Mo^nde^kai.
Esther4:11 Ninh gorngv
Esther4:12 Mienh dorh E^se^te nyei waac mingh mbuox Mo^nde^kai.
Esther4:13 Mo^nde^kai ziouc bun naaiv deix waac nzuonx mingh mbuox E^se^te
Esther4:14 Ih zanc se gorngv doix naaiv deix ziangh hoc meih sekv-sekv nyei yiem
Esther4:15 E^se^te bun mienh mingh wuih Mo^nde^kai nyei waac gorngv
Esther4:16 “Gunv mingh lorz da'faanh yiem Susaax Zingh nyei Yiutai Mienh gapv zunv weic yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Buo hnoi buo muonz maiv dungx nyanc
Esther4:17 Mo^nde^kai ziouc mingh aqv
Esther5:1 E^se^te zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc nyei da'faam hnoi
Esther5:2 Hungh diex buatc E^se^te Hungh Maac souv jienv hungh dinc gu'nyuoz wuov kangv dorngx
Esther5:3 Hungh diex naaic gaax
Esther5:4 E^se^te dau
Esther5:5 Hungh diex mbuox mienh
Esther5:6 Hopv jienv a'ngunc diuv wuov zanc
Esther5:7 E^se^te dau
Esther5:8 Se gorngv hungh diex buatc yie horpc hungh diex nyei hnyouv
Esther5:9 Wuov hnoi Haamaan haiz orn-lorqc haic
Esther5:10 Mv baac Haamaan nyienz jienv qiex nzuonx biauv mi'aqv. Haamaan ziouc heuc ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic caux ninh nyei auv
Esther5:11 Ninh ceng ninh ganh butv zoih haic
Esther5:12 Ninh aengx nzipc jienv gorngv
Esther5:13 Mv baac da'faanh buatc wuov dauh Yiutai Mienh
Esther5:14 Ninh nyei auv
Esther6:1 Wuov muonz hungh diex bueix maiv njormh. Ninh ziouc paaiv mienh mingh dorh hungh douh sou
Esther6:2 Yiem wuov sou buatc fiev jienv Mo^nde^kai hiuv duqv ziouc gorngv cuotv hungh diex nyei i dauh zuov gaengh jien
Esther6:3 Hungh diex naaic gaax
Esther6:4 Hungh diex naaic
Esther6:5 Hungh nyei jien dau
Esther6:6 Haamaan bieqc daaih
Esther6:7 Ninh ziouc dau hungh diex
Esther6:8 oix zuqc zorqv hungh diex zuqv jiex nyei domh lui-ndaauv caux geh jiex nyei maaz
Esther6:9 Aengx zorqv lui caux maaz jiu bun dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex nyei jien. Bun wuov dauh domh jien tengx dongh hungh diex buangv hnyouv taaih wuov laanh mienh zuqv jienv hungh lui
Esther6:10 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Haamaan
Esther6:11 Haamaan ziouc dorh hungh diex nyei domh lui-ndaauv tengx Mo^nde^kai zuqv jienv
Esther6:12 Nqa'haav Mo^nde^kai nzuonx hungh dinc nyei laatc gaengh. Haamaan cietv nzauh betv yieqv nyei buang jienv m'nqorngv
Esther6:13 zorqv ninh buangh nyei yietc zungv sic mbuox ninh nyei auv
Esther6:14 Ninh mbuo caux Haamaan corc gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc
Esther7:1 Hungh diex caux Haamaan ziouc mingh caux E^se^te Hungh Maac nyanc hnaangx.
Esther7:2 Nyanc naaiv da'nyeic hnoi hnaangx
Esther7:3 E^se^te Hungh Maac dau
Esther7:4 weic zuqc yie caux yie nyei mienh zuqc maaic bun mienh daix
Esther7:5 Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh naaic E^se^te Hungh Maac
Esther7:6 E^se^te Hungh Maac gorngv
Esther7:7 Hungh diex gengh! qiex jiez haic
Esther7:8 Hungh diex yiem wuov huingx nzuonx taux mbenc hnaangx wuov norm dorngx
Esther7:9 Maaih dauh fu-sux hungh diex nyei jien
Esther7:10 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv Haamaan mingh ndiux jienv Haamaan zoux daaih ndiux Mo^nde^kai nyei dorngx. Hungh diex nyei ga'qiex ziouc fiu mi'aqv.
Esther8:1 Dongh wuov hnoi
Esther8:2 Hungh diex hlutv ninh yiem Haamaan zorqv nzuonx nyei buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng yienx
Esther8:3 E^se^te aengx puoqv njiec hungh diex nyei zaux-hlen
Esther8:4 Hungh diex sung jiem-biaav cuotv bun E^se^te. E^se^te ziouc jiez sin daaih souv jienv hungh diex nyei nza'hmien.
Esther8:5 Ninh gorngv
Esther8:6 Yie hnangv haaix nor haih diev duqv mangc yie nyei buonv-fingx mienh zuqc naaiv deix heiv sic? Hnangv haaix nor haih diev duqv mangc jienv yie nyei cien-ceqv zuqc mietc?”
Esther8:7 Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh gorngv mbuox E^se^te Hungh Maac caux Yiutai Mienh
Esther8:8 Ih zanc meih mbuo gunv ziux meih mbuo nyei hnyouv dengv hungh diex nyei mbuox ganh fiev diuh lingc bun Yiutai Mienh
Esther8:9 Wuov zanc faah hlaax
Esther8:10 Mo^nde^kai dengv Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh nyei mbuox fiev yaac nqaapv jienv hungh nyei buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng yienx ziouc jiu bun douc fienx mienh geh jienv maaz-siepv fungx mingh. Naaiv deix maaz se lengc jeiv yungz weic zoux hungh diex nyei gong nyei maaz.
Esther8:11 Naaiv zeiv sou nyei lingc gorngv hungh diex nqoi nzuih bun yiem norm-norm zingh nyei Yiutai Mienh maaih leiz gapv zunv beu ninh mbuo ganh nyei maengc. Maiv gunv haaix fingx mienh yiem haaix norm saengv dorh jienv wuoqc ginc daaih mborqv Yiutai Mienh
Esther8:12 Naaiv zeiv sou nyei lingc cuotv yiem Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh gunv nyei norm-norm saengv doix dingc daaih weic daix Yiutai Mienh wuov norm hnoi
Esther8:13 Ceu naaiv diuh hungh lingc fungx mingh taux norm-norm saengv
Esther8:14 Fungx fienx mienh ziouc geh jienv longc zoux hungh diex nyei gong nyei maaz-siepv
Esther8:15 Mo^nde^kai zuqv jienv hungh diex nyei lui-ndaauv setv mbuov caux baeqc
Esther8:16 Yiutai Mienh njien-youh orn-lorqc
Esther8:17 Hungh nyei lingc zunh mingh taux haaix norm saengv haaix norm zingh
Esther9:1 Ziepc nyeic hlaax
Esther9:2 Yiem Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh gunv nyei norm-norm saengv norm-norm zingh
Esther9:3 Yaac maaih norm-norm saengv zoux hlo nyei zuangx mienh
Esther9:4 Mo^nde^kai yiem hungh dinc zoux hlo. Ninh nyei mengh dauh sing buangv norm-norm saengv. Ninh nyei hatc maaz yaac gunv zoux gunv hlo.
Esther9:5 Yiutai Mienh longc nzuqc ndaauv daix nzengc mietc nzengc ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv
Esther9:6 Yiem Susaax Zingh
Esther9:7 Ninh mbuo yaac daix Baan^qan^ndaa^taa
Esther9:8 Bo^laa^taa
Esther9:9 Baan^matv^taa
Esther9:10 Naaiv deix ziepc dauh se Ham^me^ndaa^taa nyei fun
Esther9:11 Dongh wuov hnoi yiem Susaax Zingh zuqc daix daic nyei mienh nyei soux mouc maaih mienh mingh mbuox hungh diex.
Esther9:12 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox E^se^te Hungh Maac
Esther9:13 E^se^te Hungh Maac dau
Esther9:14 Hungh diex ziouc njiec lingc heuc yiem Susaax Zingh hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Mienh ziouc zorqv Haamaan nyei ziepc dauh dorn ndiux jienv.
Esther9:15 Aa^ndaa hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi
Esther9:16 Aengx yiem hungh gunv nyei norm-norm saengv zengc njiec nyei Yiutai Mienh gapv zunv beu ganh nyei maengc
Esther9:17 Naaiv deix sic cuotv doix Aa^ndaa hlaax
Esther9:18 Mv baac yiem Susaax Zingh nyei Yiutai Mienh doix ziepc faam caux ziepc feix wuov deix i hnoi gapv zunv daix win-wangv. Ziepc hmz wuov hnoi ninh mbuo hitv gong
Esther9:19 Weic naaiv yiem fiuv-laangz nyei Yiutai Mienh longc Aa^ndaa hlaax
Esther9:20 Mo^nde^kai faaux jienv naaiv deix sic yaac fungx fienx mingh bun yiem gormx Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh gunv nyei norm-norm saengv nyei Yiutai Mienh
Esther9:21 heuc ninh mbuo hnyangx-hnyangx oix zuqc longc Aa^ndaa hlaax
Esther9:22 Naaiv deix i hnoi se houc Yiutai Mienh hingh jiex win-wangv duqv baengh orn nyei hnoi. Naaiv norm hlaax ninh mbuo nyei you-nzauh goiv benx njien-youh. Nzauh nyiemv goiv benx orn-lorqc. Oix zuqc longc naaiv norm hnoi mbenc nyanc mbenc hopv
Esther9:23 Yiutai Mienh ziouc laengz ei jienv Mo^nde^kai fiev nyei waac zoux
Esther9:24 weic zuqc Aagakc Mienh
Esther9:25 Naaiv deix sic douc taux hungh diex
Esther9:26 (Weic naaiv Yiutai Mienh gan bu^aa wuov joux waac heuc wuov deix hnoi zoux Bulim Zipv.) Weic Mo^nde^kai fiev naaiv zeiv fienx nyei waac yaac weic m'zing buatc nyei
Esther9:27 Yiutai Mienh cingx weic ninh mbuo ganh caux hoz doic zeiv-fun caux bieqc benx ninh mbuo nyei mienh wuov deix
Esther9:28 Norm-norm saengv
Esther9:29 Aa^mbi^haa^in nyei sieqv
Esther9:30 Naaiv zeiv fienx fungx mingh bun Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh gunv nyei guoqv gu'nyuoz nyei yietc baeqv nyic ziepc cietv norm saengv nyei yietc zungv Yiutai Mienh
Esther9:31 Fienx yaac heuc ninh mbuo ziux dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc jiex Bulim Zipv nyei hnoi
Esther9:32 E^se^te Hungh Maac nyei lingc dingc ziangx jiex Bulim Zipv nyei yietc nyeic yaac fiev jienv sou-daan.
Esther10:1 Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh aapv yiem gormx ninh gunv nyei guoqv caux yiem koiv-hlen nyei mienh cuotv korx-zinh.
Esther10:2 Ninh zoux nyei sic maaih hatc maaz maaih qaqv haic. Ninh yaac bun Mo^nde^kai nyei jien-mengh faaux hlang
Esther10:3 Cuotv liuz Aa^haa^su^e^latv Hungh
Job1:1 Yiem Utc Deic maaih laanh mienh

Job1:15 Liemh zeih maaih Se^mbaa Mienh daaih zorqv saeng-kuv caangv mingh nzengc

Job1:17 Ninh corc gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc

Job2:1 Aengx maaih norm hnoi fin-mienh daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Job2:2 Ziouv naaic Saadaan
Job2:3 Ziouv naaic Saadaan
Job2:4 Saadaan dau

Job2:6 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saadaan
Job2:7 Saadaan ziouc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien cuotv mingh hoic Yopv bun Yopv ziangh doqc haic nyei zueih yiem zaux-ndoqv-nyeiz faaux taux m'nqorngv-baengh.
Job2:8 Ninh ziouc zueiz jienv saaiv-ndui zorqv hlengx nie-mor huv guaaih ganh nyei sin.

Job2:10 Mv baac Yopv dau ninh
Job2:11 Yopv nyei buo dauh loz-gaeng doic
Job2:12 Ninh mbuo yiem go nyei buatc ninh

Job3:1 Nqa'haav Yopv nqoi nzuih zioux ninh nyei cuotv seix hnoi.
Job3:2 Yopv gorngv
Job3:3 “Tov bun yie cuotv seix nyei hnoi caux ninh mbuo gorngv
Job3:4 Tov bun wuov hnoi hmuangx mingh. Tov bun gu'nguaaic nyei Tin-Hungh maiv lorz wuov norm hnoi
Job3:5 Tov bun wuov hnoi mapv maengh mapv hmuangx
Job3:6 Tov bun wuov muonz mapv maengh mapv hmuangx nyei
Job3:7 Tov bun wuov muonz maiv maaih saeng-yungz
Job3:8 Tov bun haih zioux hnoi nyei mienh zioux wuov hnoi
Job3:9 Tov bun wuov ndorm nyei Taaix-Baeqc Fing hmuangx mingh
Job3:10 weic zuqc wuov muonz bun yie cuotv seix bun yie zuqc ziex nyungc kouv naanc hoic.
Job3:11 “Yie cuotv seix wuov zanc
Job3:12 Weic haaix diuc maaih cingh mborqc zipv yie? Fai maa bun ninh nyei nyorx yie hopv?
Job3:13 Maiv hnangv naaic yie duqv bueix njiec sekv zieqc. Yie daic ziouc duqv hitv kuonx
Job3:14 caux lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex caux caangh laangh nyei mienh yiem
Job3:15 fai caux zoux hlo nyei mienh yiem
Job3:16 Fai yie weic haaix diuc maiv hnangv mbaang waaic nyei gu'nguaaz biopv jienv
Job3:17 Yiem naaic orqv mienh dingh njiec
Job3:18 Yiem wuov zuqc wuonx nyei mienh duqv lomh nzoih henh
Job3:19 Hlo-hlo faix-faix nyei mienh yiem naaic
Job3:20 “Weic haaix diuc ceix njang bun zuqc siouc kouv nyei mienh? Weic haaix diuc bun nzauh kouv nyei mienh maaih maengc ziangh?
Job3:21 Ninh mbuo zuov jienv daic
Job3:22 Ninh mbuo zuov jienv daic bieqc zouv ziouc a'hneiv
Job3:23 Tin-Hungh bingx jienv mienh hoz nqaang nyei jauv
Job3:24 Yie tauv qiex-ndoqc dorngx nyanc hnaangx
Job3:25 Weic zuqc yie gamh nziex nyei sic zungv zuqc yie mi'aqv. Dongh yie gamh nziex jiex nyei sic ndortv zuqc yie.
Job3:26 Yie maiv maaih baengh orn
Job4:1 Temaan Mienh
Job4:2 “Se gorngv mienh caux meih gorngv joux waac
Job4:3 Hnamv mangc gaax meih ganh njaaux mienh camv
Job4:4 Meih nyei waac baav jienv ndiqv zuqc ndorpc nyei mienh
Job4:5 Mv baac ih zanc zeqc naanc taux meih
Job4:6 Meih taaih Tin-Hungh ziouc bun meih maaih lamh kaux maiv zeiz? Meih zoux nyei sic maiv maaih dorngx nqemh
Job4:7 “Hnamv mangc gaax! Maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh maaih haaix dauh zuqc mietc jiex nyei fai? Maaih haaix dauh hnyouv zingx nyei mienh zuqc pai guangc?
Job4:8 Yie buatc jiex
Job4:9 Tin-Hungh biomv qiex bun ninh mbuo zuqc mietc
Job4:10 Sienh heuc nyei qiex caux sienh ciouv nyei qiex sekv
Job4:11 Sienh henv maiv maaih ga'naaiv zorqv nyanc ziouc daic mi'aqv. Sienh nyeiz nyei dorn yaac zuqc nzaanx nzengc.
Job4:12 “Maaih joux waac sekv-sekv nyei taux yie
Job4:13 doix yie lungh muonz zanc m'njormh ndo nyei ziangh hoc
Job4:14 haeqv yie gamh nziex
Job4:15 Maaih gorng nziaaux zuqc yie nyei hmien
Job4:16 Nziaaux dingh yaac maaih nyungc yiem wuov
Job4:17 ‘Baamh mienh haih yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien baengh fim nyei fai? Baamh mienh haih yiem Zeix Ninh Daaih Wuov Dauh nyei nza'hmien cing-nzengc nyei fai?
Job4:18 Tin-Hungh zungv maiv bungx hnyouv ninh nyei bou
Job4:19 hnangv naaic ninh gauh maiv bungx hnyouv longc nie zoux daaih nyei baamh mienh
Job4:20 Yiem lungh ndorm taux lungh hmuangx mbu'ndongx ninh mbuo zuqc mietc
Job4:21 Se gorngv yiem ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz nyei hlaang zuqc baeng cuotv
Job5:1 “Yopv aah! Ih zanc gunv heuc maah! Maaih haaix dauh dau meih? Meih haih lorz haaix dauh fin-mienh tengx?
Job5:2 Qiex jiez nyei jauv haih daix daic hngongx nyei mienh
Job5:3 Yie buatc hngongx nyei mienh liepc wuonv hnangv njiec nzungh nor
Job5:4 Ninh nyei dorn sieqv lorz maiv duqv baengh orn nyei dorngx
Job5:5 Ninh siou nyei gaeng-zuangx zuqc hnyouv sie nyei mienh nyanc
Job5:6 Zeqc naanc maiv zeiz yiem nie-mbung cuotv
Job5:7 Mv baac mienh cuotv seix zungv zuqc buangh kuonx naanh hnangv douz-fing ndaix faaux.
Job5:8 “Se gorngv yie nor
Job5:9 Ninh zoux hlo nyei sic zungv hnamv maiv zaaic
Job5:10 Ninh bun mbiungc njiec ndau-beih
Job5:11 Ninh zorqv zoux faix nyei mienh bouh faaux hlang
Job5:12 Ninh porx waaic guv guaix mienh daav nyei za'eix
Job5:13 Ninh bun cong-mengh mienh zuqc ninh mbuo ganh nyei za'eix hlopv ninh mbuo
Job5:14 Yiem lungh hnoi zanc ninh mbuo buangh zuqc hmuangx
Job5:15 Mv baac Tin-Hungh njoux mienh jomc mienh biaux ndutv
Job5:16 Hnangv naaic mienh jomc mienh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx
Job5:17 “Tin-Hungh gorngv-njaaux nyei mienh maaih orn-lorqc. Weic naaiv maiv dungx mangc piex Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh mborqv njaaux
Job5:18 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh bun zuqc mun
Job5:19 Ninh oix njoux meih biaux ndutv juqv nzunc zeqc naanc
Job5:20 Ngorc hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc
Job5:21 Ninh beu jienv meih
Job5:22 Meih buangh zuqc mietc nyei sic caux ngorc hnaangx meih ziouc kuh jatv. Meih yaac maiv gamh nziex ndau-beih nyei hieh zoih.
Job5:23 Weic zuqc meih zoux nyei ndeic zungv maiv maaih la'bieiv
Job5:24 Meih ziouc hiuv duqv meih nyei ndopv-liuh yiem longx nyei. Meih zaah mangc meih nyei ba'gi yungh laanh yaac buatc maiv caa haaix nyungc.
Job5:25 Meih zungv oix hiuv duqv meih nyei fun-faqv oix hiaangx camv
Job5:26 Meih nyei siouc nyuonh ndaauv
Job5:27 “Naaiv deix yietc zungv yie mbuo longx-longx nyei zaah mangc liuz aqv. Muangx maah! Oix zuqc hiuv duqv se weic tengx meih duqv longx.”
Job6:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job6:2 “Feix duqv haih zorqv yie nzauh faanh nyei jauv daaih nziang
Job6:3 zungv gauh hniev koiv nyei saa-ziou. Weic naaiv yie nyei waac beqv nyei
Job6:4 weic zuqc Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei forng-cang yiem yie nyei sin
Job6:5 Hieh lorh maaih miev nyanc
Job6:6 Maiv maaih mueix nyei ga'naaiv maiv an nzauv haih nyanc duqv nyei fai? Jaux-orv maaih haaix nyungc mueix doc fai?
Job6:7 Weic yie naaiv se gamh nziev nyei ga'naaiv
Job6:8 “Feix duqv ziux yie tov nyei yie gengh haih duqv
Job6:9 Feix duqv Tin-Hungh hlienx yie huv muonc
Job6:10 Hnangv naaic zoux haih orn yie nyei hnyouv
Job6:11 “Yie maaih haaix nyungc qaqv bun yie corc haih zuov jienv? Yie nyei setv mueiz hnangv haaix nor
Job6:12 Yie nyei qaqv se la'bieiv nyei qaqv fai? Yie nyei orv sin benx dongh siqv fai?
Job6:13 Yie ganh zungv maiv maaih qaqv tengx yie ganh aqv. Yie yaac jomc za'eix mi'aqv.
Job6:14 “Haaix dauh duqv-eix maiv zoux longx bun ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic
Job6:15 Yie nyei gorx-youz nduov yie hnangv wuom-seix
Job6:16 Ndoqv gitv sorng ziouc hmuangx
Job6:17 Yuoqv nyei ziangh hoc sorng yuqc mi'aqv. Nyutc jorm ziouc mitc nzengc
Job6:18 Gapv doic cuotv jauv nyei mienh leih ninh mbuo nyei jauv
Job6:19 Yiem Temaa Deic gapv doic cuotv jauv nyei mienh lorz wuom
Job6:20 Ninh mbuo maaih lamh hnamv haih duqv mv baac maiv duqv aqv. Mingh taux wuov ninh mbuo ziouc hnyouv lunc nzengc.
Job6:21 Ih zanc meih mbuo weic yie se hnangv naaic aqv. Meih mbuo buatc yie zuqc kouv nyei sic ziouc haeqv meih mbuo gamh nziex.
Job6:22 Yie gorngv jiex ‘Tov meih mbuo bun zingh nyeic yie’? Fai ‘Longc meih mbuo nyei zinh zoih nzuiz nyaanh hmuangx bun yie’?
Job6:23 Fai yie gorngv jiex ‘Njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev’? Fai ‘Zuoqc yie yiem zeix mienh nyei mienh nyei buoz-ndiev cuotv daaih’?
Job6:24 “Njaaux yie maah! Yie ziouc maiv ko lo. Tov bun yie bieqc hnyouv yie hnangv haaix nor zoux dorngc.
Job6:25 Zingx nyei waac maaih hatc maaz hlo
Job6:26 Maiv lamh hnamv nyei mienh gorngv nyei waac se hnangv nziaaux nor
Job6:27 Meih mbuo zungv dingc maengc mangc weic duqv guh hanh fu'jueiv
Job6:28 “Ih zanc tov meih mbuo mangc yie
Job6:29 Tov meih mbuo aengx hnamv nzunc. Maiv dungx zoux maiv baengh fim. Ih zanc tov aengx hnamv nzunc. Oix zuqc bun cing yie zoux duqv zingx nyei.
Job6:30 Yie gorngv nyei waac maaih haaix nyungc dorngc fai? Meih mbuo hnamv daaih yie maiv haih seix maiv cuotv zeqc naanc?
Job7:1 “Baamh mienh yiem lungh ndiev kungx zuqc zoux kouv
Job7:2 hnangv nouh za'gengh oix lorz dorngx bingx laangh
Job7:3 Fih hnangv nyei
Job7:4 Yie bueix njiec nyei ziangh hoc
Job7:5 Yie nyei sin butv gaeng buangv nzengc
Job7:6 “Yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc gauh siepv nzenc suix ndatv ndie nyei biaav
Job7:7 O Tin-Hungh aac
Job7:8 Ih zanc mangc jienv yie wuov dauh nyei m'zing maiv duqv aengx buatc yie. Meih oix lorz yie
Job7:9 “Hnangv mbuonx nzaanx mitc nzengc
Job7:10 Ninh maiv aengx nzuonx ganh nyei biauv. Ninh yiem nyei dorngx nyei mienh yaac la'kuqv ninh mi'aqv.
Job7:11 “Weic naaiv yie ziouc maiv nqapc yie nyei nzuih
Job7:12 Yie zoux koiv fai koiv nyei domh mbiauz meih cingx oix zuqc bun mienh zuov jienv yie?
Job7:13 Yie gorngv
Job7:14 Mv baac meih bun yie mbeix buatc haeqv yie
Job7:15 Weic naaiv yie oix ginv goh jaang daic gauh longx yiem jienv yie naaiv norm sin.
Job7:16 Yie youx yie nyei maengc
Job7:17 “Baamh mienh benx haaix nyungc meih cingx funx longc jienv yaac hietv hnyouv ninh?
Job7:18 Meih ndorm-ndorm mingh zaah mangc ninh
Job7:19 Aengx ndongc haaix lauh meih cingx huin ganh bung maiv mangc yie
Job7:20 Mangc mienh nyei Tin-Hungh aah? Se gorngv yie baamz zuiz yie hnangv haaix nor hoic zuqc meih? Meih weic haaix diuc zorqv yie dorngx meih nyei forng-cang nyei mbaeqc? Yie weic haaix diuc benx meih oix zuqc ndaam hniev nyei ga'naaiv?
Job7:21 Meih weic haaix diuc maiv guangc yie dorngc nyei dorngx
Job8:1 Quwaa Mienh
Job8:2 “Naaiv deix waac meih oix gorngv taux haaix zanc? Meih nyei waac hnangv nziaaux buonc nor.
Job8:3 Tin-Hungh haih zoux baengh fim nyei jauv pien fai? Fai Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh haih bun zoux horpc nyei jauv pien mingh fai?
Job8:4 Se gorngv meih nyei fu'jueiv baamz zuiz dorngc Tin-Hungh
Job8:5 Se gorngv meih jienh lorz Tin-Hungh yaac jouh Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh
Job8:6 se gorngv meih cing-nzengc
Job8:7 Maiv gunv meih jiez gorn wuov zanc meih faix nyei
Job8:8 “Yie tov meih
Job8:9 weic zuqc yie mbuo a'hnoi koqv hoqc cuotv seix
Job8:10 Ninh mbuo oix njaaux meih
Job8:11 Maiv maaih njaangh
Job8:12 Corc maeng nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaatv nor
Job8:13 Da'faanh la'kuqv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yaac hnangv wuov nor. Maiv gan Tin-Hungh nyei mienh maaih lamh hnamv nyei
Job8:14 Ninh kaux nyei jauv dangx mi'aqv. Ninh kaux nyei se hnangv gaeng-nyorc mbiorngz nor.
Job8:15 Ninh bangc ninh nyei biauv
Job8:16 Ninh se hnangv miev
Job8:17 Ninh nyei nzungh nzenc jienv la'bieiv
Job8:18 Mv baac se gorngv ninh yiem wuov norm dorngx zuqc baeng cuotv
Job8:19 Mangc maah! Naaiv se ninh nyei jauv nyei njien-youh. Ganh deix mienh oix yiem wuov ndau cuotv daaih.
Job8:20 “Mangc maah! Tin-Hungh zungv maiv guangc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh. Yaac maiv tengx zoux orqv nyei mienh.
Job8:21 Ninh oix bun meih nyei nzuih aengx a'hneiv nyei jatv
Job8:22 Nzorng meih wuov deix oix zuqc baaic hmien nyaiv
Job9:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job9:2 “Yie za'gengh hiuv duqv se hnangv naaic. Mv baac mienh hnangv haaix nor haih yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien benx zoux duqv horpc nyei mienh?
Job9:3 Se gorngv haaix dauh maaih hnyouv oix caux ninh nzaeng
Job9:4 Tin-Hungh nyei hnyouv maaih cong-mengh
Job9:5 “Ninh qiex jiez wuov zanc
Job9:6 Tin-Hungh nqamv baamh gen dongz cuotv ninh nyei dorngx
Job9:7 Ninh hatc mba'hnoi
Job9:8 Ninh ganh nduqc dauh corng lungh
Job9:9 Ninh zeix Ba'dauv Hleix caux Siec Muoz-Sieqv Hleix
Job9:10 Ninh zoux hlo haic nyei sic jiex ndaangc yie mbuo haih mengh baeqc
Job9:11 Tin-Hungh yangh yie nyei ga'hlen jiex
Job9:12 Ninh zorqv ninh oix longc nyei
Job9:13 Tin-Hungh maiv bun ninh nyei ga'qiex fiu
Job9:14 “Wuov nyungc yie hnangv haaix nor haih dau ninh? Yie hnangv haaix nor haih ginv waac caux ninh luonx?
Job9:15 Maiv gunv yie maiv zoux dorngc
Job9:16 Se gorngv yie heuc ninh
Job9:17 Ninh longc domh nziaaux buonc mborqv yie
Job9:18 Ninh zungv maiv bun yie tauv qiex
Job9:19 Se gorngv saaix qaqv
Job9:20 Maiv gunv yie maiv dorngc
Job9:21 “Yie maiv maaih dorngx nqemh
Job9:22 Yietc zungv fih hnangv nzengc. Weic naaiv yie gorngv
Job9:23 Mienh zuqc zeqc naanc liemh zeih daic
Job9:24 Tin-Hungh zorqv baamh gen jiu bun yiem orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh buang jienv baamh gen siemv zuiz mienh nyei hmien. Se gorngv maiv zeiz ninh
Job9:25 “Yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc jiex siepv hnangv saaix tiux nyei mienh tiux nor. Yie nyei hnoi liemh zeih jiex mi'aqv
Job9:26 Yie nyei hnoi jiex siepv hnangv siepv haic nyei nzangv nor
Job9:27 Se gorngv yie gorngv
Job9:28 yie ziouc gamh nziex yie nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc
Job9:29 Yie zungv zuqc dingc zuiz. Wuov nyungc yie weic haaix diuc baeqc baeqc zoux kouv?
Job9:30 Se gorngv yie longc sorng nzaaux sin
Job9:31 mv baac meih zoi yie ndortv kuotv
Job9:32 “Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz baamh mienh hnangv yie nor
Job9:33 Feix duqv maaih dauh yiem yie mbuo mbu'ndongx tengx muangx
Job9:34 Tov Tin-Hungh zorqv nqoi ninh nyei biaav maiv mborqv yie
Job9:35 Wuov nyungc yie ziouc gorngv waac yaac maiv gamh nziex ninh
Job10:1 “Yie youx haic yie nyei maengc
Job10:2 Yie oix gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
Job10:3 Meih zeix mienh aengx mangc piex meih nyei buoz zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Job10:4 Meih nyei m'zing hnangv baamh mienh nyei m'zing fai? Meih buatc hnangv baamh mienh buatc fai?
Job10:5 Meih nyei hnoi hnangv baamh mienh nyei hnoi fai? Meih nyei hnyangx yaac hnangv mienh nyei hnyangx fai?
Job10:6 Hnangv naaic meih cingx daaih lorz yie zoux dorngc nyei sic
Job10:7 maiv gunv meih hiuv duqv yie maiv maaih dorngc nyei dorngx
Job10:8 “Meih nyei buoz nanv yie
Job10:9 Tov jangx jienv meih longc ba'naih nie zeix yie
Job10:10 Meih dox yie cuotv daaih hnangv nyorx
Job10:11 Meih longc ndopv caux orv benx lui bun yie zuqv
Job10:12 Meih bun yie maaih maengc ziangh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie. Meih yaac longx-longx nyei beu jienv yie nyei maengc.
Job10:13 “Mv baac naaiv deix sic meih bingx jienv yiem hnyouv
Job10:14 Se gorngv yie baamz zuiz meih mangc jienv yie. Meih zungv oix dingc yie nyei zuiz
Job10:15 Se gorngv yie zoux orqv
Job10:16 Se gorngv yie bouh yie ganh faaux
Job10:17 Meih aengx jaa liepc zorng-zengx mienh daaih gox yie
Job10:18 “Tin-Hungh aah! Meih weic haaix diuc dorh yie cuotv maa nyei ga'sie? Feix duqv yie daic ndaangc mienh nyei m'zing buatc yie
Job10:19 ziouc hnangv maiv maaih jiex yie
Job10:20 Yie ziangh seix nyei hnoi-nyieqc zoqc haic maiv zeiz? Tov bungx yie ganh yiem
Job10:21 ndaangc yie mingh maiv nzuonx nyei dorngx
Job10:22 Naaiv norm deic-bung se hmuangx haic
Job11:1 Naa^aa^me Mienh
Job11:2 “Gorngv waac ndongc naaic camv maiv zuqc dau fai? Gorngv waac camv nyei mienh oix zuqc funx ninh horpc nyei fai?
Job11:3 Meih gorngv nyei henh waac haih bun mienh sekv fai? Meih huotv mienh nyei ziangh hoc
Job11:4 Weic zuqc meih gorngv
Job11:5 Mv baac feix duqv Tin-Hungh caux meih gorngv. Feix duqv ninh morngx nqoi nzuih gorngv meih.
Job11:6 Ninh ziouc zorqv gem jienv nyei cong-mengh mbuox meih
Job11:7 “Meih haih zaah duqv toux Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor fai? Meih haih hiuv duqv nzengc Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh fai?
Job11:8 Ninh nyei cong-mengh gauh hlang jiex lungh. Meih haih zoux haaix nyungc? Se gauh ndo jiex yiemh gen. Meih haih hiuv haaix nyungc?
Job11:9 Ndorqc mangc gaax
Job11:10 “Se gorngv Tin-Hungh jiex mingh yaac zorqv meih wuonx jienv
Job11:11 Tin-Hungh hiuv duqv maiv lamh longc nyei mienh. Ninh buatc ninh mbuo zoux nyei waaic sic
Job11:12 Mv baac hngongx nyei mienh haih maaih cong-mengh nor
Job11:13 “Se gorngv meih mbenc sung hnyouv aengx sung jienv buoz hungx jienv ninh
Job11:14 se gorngv meih maaih zuiz oix zuqc guangc go-go nyei
Job11:15 Wuov zanc meih duqv cau hmien yaac maiv lamh nqemh dorngx
Job11:16 Meih ziouc la'kuqv meih nyei kouv naanc. Kungx jangx jienv hnangv benx liouc jiex mingh nyei wuom hnangv.
Job11:17 Meih ziangh seix zaangc nyei maengc oix gauh njang lungh aanx zanc nyei njang
Job11:18 Weic meih maaih lamh hnamv meih ziouc yiem duqv wuonv. Tin-Hungh oix beu jienv meih
Job11:19 Meih oix bueix njiec
Job11:20 Mv baac orqv mienh nyei m'zing oix mbuov mingh
Job12:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job12:2 “Zeiz aqv
Job12:3 Mv baac yie yaac maaih cong-mengh caux meih mbuo fih hnangv nyei. Yie maiv gauh aiv meih mbuo. Meih mbuo gorngv naaiv deix sic fungc maaih haaix dauh maiv hiuv laeh?
Job12:4 “Yie benx yie nyei doic jatv nyei ga'naaiv. Zinh ndaangc yie jouh Tin-Hungh
Job12:5 Orn-lorqc nyei mienh yiem hnyouv mangc piex zuqc zeqc naanc nyei mienh
Job12:6 Janx-zaqc nyei ndopv-liuh baengh orn nyei
Job12:7 “Gunv naaic saeng-kuv
Job12:8 Caux ndau gorngv waac
Job12:9 Yiem naaiv deix yietc zungv maaih haaix nyungc maiv hiuv duqv Ziouv nyei buoz hnangv naaiv zoux?
Job12:10 Da'faanh ziangh jienv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv caux zuangx baamh mienh tauv nyei qiex yiem ninh nyei buoz.
Job12:11 M'normh maiv zeiz haih seix waac hnangv mbietc seix nyanc hopv nyei mueix fai?
Job12:12 Mienh gox mienh maaih cong-mengh. Siouc nyuonh ndaauv nyei mienh gauh haih bieqc hnyouv.
Job12:13 “Tin-Hungh maaih cong-mengh caux qaqv. Ninh maaih za'eix yaac haih bieqc hnyouv.
Job12:14 Tin-Hungh caeqv nyei
Job12:15 Se gorngv ninh dangv jienv wuom
Job12:16 Tin-Hungh maaih qaqv
Job12:17 Ninh se zorqv nzengc caangh laangh mienh nyei cong-mengh
Job12:18 Ninh jaiv nqoi hungh diex ndoh mienh nyei limc
Job12:19 Ninh zorqv sai mienh laengh gaengv nyei dorh mingh
Job12:20 Ninh bun ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh sekv nzieqc
Job12:21 Ninh mangc piex zoux hlo nyei mienh
Job12:22 Ninh bun yiem ndo
Job12:23 Ninh bun guoqv henv
Job12:24 Ninh zorqv lungh ndiev baeqc fingx nyei bieiv zeiv nyei cong-mengh mingh mi'aqv
Job12:25 Ninh mbuo yiem hmuangx gu'nyuoz huaax jienv mingh
Job13:1 “Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic yie nyei m'zing duqv buatc jiex
Job13:2 Meih mbuo hiuv nyei
Job13:3 Mv baac yie oix caux Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh gorngv waac
Job13:4 Meih mbuo longc gorngv-baeqc nyei waac nzaatv jienv meih mbuo maiv hiuv nyei. Meih mbuo se hnangv maiv lamh longc nyei ndie-sai.
Job13:5 Feix duqv meih mbuo sekv nzieqc nyei. Naaiv ziouc benx meih mbuo nyei cong-mengh aqv.
Job13:6 “Ih zanc tov muangx yie luonx nyei jauv yaac muangx yie sux nyei waac.
Job13:7 Meih mbuo oix weic Tin-Hungh gorngv jaav nyei waac fai? Meih mbuo oix weic ninh gorngv-baeqc?
Job13:8 Meih mbuo oix tengx Tin-Hungh wuov bung nzaeng fai? Meih mbuo oix weic ninh luonx leiz?
Job13:9 Se gorngv ninh zaah mangc meih mbuo
Job13:10 Se gorngv meih mbuo bingx jienv tengx yietc bung
Job13:11 Ninh nyei haangh daauh bun meih gamh nziex
Job13:12 Meih mbuo nyei waac-puix hnangv saaiv maiv lamh longc
Job13:13 “Tov meih mbuo sekv dangh maah! Yie oix gorngv. Nqa'haav maiv gunv benx haaix nyungc
Job13:14 Maiv gunv hnangv haaix nor yie oix zoux aqv
Job13:15 Maiv gunv ninh daix yie
Job13:16 Naaiv oix benx yie nyei njoux en
Job13:17 “Tov longx-longx nyei muangx yie gorngv nyei waac
Job13:18 Yie liuc leiz ziangx yie nyei sic aqv. Yie hiuv duqv zungv biux mengh yie maiv dorngc.
Job13:19 Maaih haaix dauh oix gox yie? Maaih nor
Job13:20 “Kungx tov bun i nyungc yie hnangv
Job13:21 Tov hluotv meih nyei buoz leih go yie
Job13:22 Tin-Hungh aac
Job13:23 Yie nyei zuiz caux zoux dorngc nyei sic maaih mbu'ziex? Tov bun yie hiuv duqv yie zoux dorngc nyei jauv caux yie baamz nyei zuiz.
Job13:24 “Meih weic haaix diuc bingx meih nyei hmien
Job13:25 Meih oix haeqv yietc kuaaiv zuqc nziaaux buonc nyei ndiangx-normh yaac zunc mbiauh nqaauv nqaai fai?
Job13:26 Meih fiev jienv hniev haic nyei sic gox yie
Job13:27 Meih zorqv ndiangx gapc jienv yie nyei zaux
Job13:28 “Mienh gunv zoux gunv zitc hnangv ga'naaiv-huv
Job14:1 “Mienh yiem m'sieqv dorn cuotv seix nyei hnoi-nyieqc zoqc nyei
Job14:2 Ninh cuotv daaih hnangv biangh nor
Job14:3 Hnangv yie naaiv nyungc mienh meih bungx m'zing mangc jienv ninh aengx dorh ninh daaih yiem meih nyei nza'hmien zuqc siemv fai?
Job14:4 Haaix dauh haih dorh cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv yiem maiv cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv cuotv? Maiv maaih yietc dauh.
Job14:5 Ninh ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx aqv
Job14:6 Tov huin ganh bung
Job14:7 “Se gorngv ndiangx zuqc goix
Job14:8 Maiv gunv ninh nyei nzungh yiem ndau-ndiev gox
Job14:9 yietv duqv wuom nyei qiex ninh ziouc cuotv cunx
Job14:10 Mv baac mienh daic
Job14:11 Hnangv koiv nyei wuom nqaai
Job14:12 mienh daic mingh maiv aengx nangh daaih
Job14:13 “Feix duqv meih zorqv yie bingx jienv yiemh gen. Feix duqv meih torngv jienv yie
Job14:14 Se gorngv mienh daic mingh
Job14:15 Meih oix heuc
Job14:16 Taux wuov zanc meih oix saauv yie nyei zaux-mbiec
Job14:17 Yie zoux dorngc nyei sic meih dapv jienv mbuoqc aengx mborqv jienv yienx. Meih yaac buang jienv yie nyei zuiz.
Job14:18 “Mv baac mbong mbaang huv mi'aqv. La'bieiv-zorng yaac suiv nqoi leih ninh nyei dorngx.
Job14:19 Wuom congx la'bieiv
Job14:20 Meih yietc liuz hingh jiex mienh
Job14:21 Ninh nyei dorn mbuo duqv mienh taaih
Job14:22 Ninh kungx haiz ninh ganh nyei sin zaangc mun
Job15:1 Temaan Mienh
Job15:2 “Cong-mengh mienh longc maiv lamh longc nyei wuonh zaang dau
Job15:3 Ninh longc maiv maaih eix leiz nyei waac fai tengx maiv duqv haaix nyungc nyei waac jaiv sin fai?
Job15:4 Mv baac taaih Tin-Hungh wuov nyungc hnyouv meih guangc mi'aqv
Job15:5 Weic zuqc meih nyei zuiz njaaux meih nyei nzuih gorngv waac
Job15:6 Meih ganh nyei nzuih dingc meih zoux dorngc
Job15:7 “Meih dongh cuotv seix ndaangc nyei daauh dauh baamh mienh fai? Meih cuotv seix ndaangc Tin-Hungh zeix mbong fai?
Job15:8 Tin-Hungh caangh laangh nyei wuic gapv zunv nyei ziangh hoc meih haiz nyei fai? Meih liouh jienv cong-mengh weic meih ganh longc fai?
Job15:9 Maaih haaix nyungc meih hiuv
Job15:10 Yiem yie mbuo mbu'ndongx maaih mba'biei baeqc nyei mienh caux hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei mienh
Job15:11 Tin-Hungh longc suonc nyei waac orn meih nyei hnyouv. Meih haiz se maiv gaengh gaux fai?
Job15:12 Meih weic haaix diuc sueih ganh nyei hnyouv
Job15:13 bun meih nyei hnyouv ngaengc Tin-Hungh yaac bun naaiv nyungc waac yiem meih nyei nzuih cuotv?
Job15:14 “Baamh mienh hnangv haaix nor ninh cingx daaih haih cing-nzengc? Fai yiem m'sieqv dorn cuotv seix nyei mienh hnangv haaix nor haih benx zoux horpc nyei mienh?
Job15:15 Tin-Hungh zungv maiv bungx hnyouv ninh nyei cing-nzengc fin-mienh. Ziux Tin-Hungh mangc
Job15:16 Wuov nyungc waaic haic
Job15:17 “Muangx yie maah! Yie oix mbuox meih. Yie buatc jiex nyei
Job15:18 dongh cong-mengh mienh gorngv jiex
Job15:19 (Naaiv norm deic-bung kungx ninh mbuo ganh duqv nzipc
Job15:20 Orqv mienh yiem seix zaangc nyei yietc zungv hnoi-nyieqc zuqc siouc kouv. Se zeix mienh nyei mienh waaic mienh ziux ninh nyei yietc zungv hnyangx-soux.
Job15:21 Za'gengh! gamh nziex haic nyei qiex yiem ninh nyei m'normh
Job15:22 Ninh maiv sienx ninh haih yiem hmuangx gu'nyuoz nzuonx. Ninh zungv oix zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix.
Job15:23 Ninh youh jienv mingh lorz nyanc yaac gorngv
Job15:24 Ninh oix zuqc zeqc naanc kuonx kouv bun ninh gamh nziex
Job15:25 Weic zuqc ninh nyuotv buoz-juonh bun Tin-Hungh
Job15:26 ziouc nanv jienv hoz nyei torngv-baaih ngaengc jienv bieqc mingh mborqv ninh.
Job15:27 “Weic zuqc ninh nyei hmien junc haic
Job15:28 ninh duqv yiem zingh huaang
Job15:29 Ninh ziouc maiv duqv butv zoih. Ninh nyei zinh zoih yaac maiv duqv yiem lauh. Ninh nyei jaa-dingh maiv duqv yiem deic-bung hiaangx.
Job15:30 Mienh biaux maiv ndutv hmuangx. Douz yaac oix buov nqaai ninh nyei cunx. Tin-Hungh nyei qiex yaac oix biomv ninh mingh mi'aqv.
Job15:31 Maiv dungx bun ninh kaux maiv lamh longc nyei haaix nyungc nduov ganh
Job15:32 Ninh nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv gaengh taux ninh ziouc zuqc winh sung
Job15:33 Ninh yaac hnangv a'ngunc hmei maiv gaengh zuoqc nyei biouv bioh ndortv nzengc
Job15:34 Maiv taaih Tin-Hungh wuov deix maiv maaih hoz doic zeiv-fun
Job15:35 Ninh mbuo hnamv cuotv orqv sic hnangv maaih gu'nguaaz faaux sin
Job16:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job16:2 “Naaiv nyungc waac yie haiz camv! haic aqv. Meih mbuo dauh dauh oix orn hnyouv mv baac meih mbuo bun mienh jaa nzauh.
Job16:3 Meih maiv dingh maiv hitv nyei gorngv waac maiv haih jomc fai? Maaih haaix nyungc cuoqv zuqc meih dau waac?
Job16:4 Se gorngv meih mbuo caux yie tiuv dorngx yiem
Job16:5 Mv baac yie haih longc yie nyei nzuih ceix meih mbuo henv jiez daaih
Job16:6 “Maiv gunv yie gorngv waac
Job16:7 Tin-Hungh aac
Job16:8 Meih bun yie soqv
Job16:9 Tin-Hungh qiex jiez jienv betv yie yaac nzorng yie
Job16:10 Ninh mbuo morngx nzuih bun yie. Ninh mbuo mbaix yie nyei hmien huotv yie. Ninh mbuo gapv zunv daaih oix zoux bun yie.
Job16:11 Tin-Hungh zorqv yie jiu bun orqv mienh
Job16:12 Yie kuh yiem nyei ziangh hoc ninh zorqv yie wuotv nauv. Ninh nanv jienv yie nyei jaang guaeqv yie muonc nzengc. Ninh zorqv yie zoux ninh nyei mbaeqc.
Job16:13 Ninh nyei buonv juang-zinx mienh weih gormx yie. Ninh buonv tong yie nyei nyutc zeiv yaac maiv korv-lienh
Job16:14 Ninh mborqv yie yietc nzunc jiex yietc nzunc
Job16:15 “Yie lunh la'maah ndie-cou nitv jienv yie nyei ndopv
Job16:16 Weic zuqc yie nyiemv
Job16:17 maiv gunv yie nyei buoz maiv zoux haaix nyungc doqc
Job16:18 “Ndau aah! Maiv dungx buang yie nyei nziaamv. Maiv dungx bun yie heuc nyei qiex maaih dorngx hitv.
Job16:19 Ih zanc maaih dauh yiem tin-dorngh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx
Job16:20 Yie nyei loz-gaeng doic huotv yie
Job16:21 Tov bun ninh tengx mienh jouh Tin-Hungh
Job16:22 “Weic zuqc aengx jiex liuz i ziex hnyangx
Job17:1 “Yie nyei mba'nziu yuqc
Job17:2 Zien nyei
Job17:3 “Tin-Hungh aac
Job17:4 Meih bun ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv haih mengh baeqc. Weic naaiv meih ziouc maiv bun ninh mbuo hingh jiex.
Job17:5 Mienh maaic ganh nyei gorx-youz weic duqv zinh nyaanh
Job17:6 “Tin-Hungh bun yie yiem baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx zoux gouv gorngv. Ninh mbuo yaac tuiv wuom-nzuih naetv yie nyei hmien.
Job17:7 Laaix nzauh kouv yie nyei m'zing maiv njang aqv. Yie nyei buoz-zaux hnangv dongh linh nor.
Job17:8 Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh laaix naaiv deix sic za'gengh! gamh nziex haic. Maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh jiez daaih gorngv yie maiv gan Tin-Hungh.
Job17:9 Kuv mienh gan longx ninh yangh nyei jauv. Buoz cing-nzengc nyei mienh gunv zoux gunv henv jienv faaux.
Job17:10 “Mv baac meih mbuo
Job17:11 “Yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc jiex mi'aqv. Yie daav nyei za'eix
Job17:12 Yie nyei loz-gaeng doic bun lungh muonz zanc benx lungh hnoi zanc. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Job17:13 Se gorngv yie maaih lamh hnamv yiemh gen benx yie nyei biauv
Job17:14 se gorngv yie mbuox zouv
Job17:15 wuov nyungc yie maaih lamh hnamv nyei yiem haaix? Yie maaih lamh hnamv nyei haaix dauh duqv buatc?
Job17:16 Yie maaih lamh hnamv nyei oix njiec taux yiemh gen nyei gaengh fai? Yie mbuo lomh nzoih oix njiec nie-mbung fai?”
Job18:1 Quwaa Mienh
Job18:2 “Meih oix gorngv naaiv gorngv wuov ndongc haaix lauh? Hnamv longx maah! Yie mbuo ziouc caux meih gorngv waac.
Job18:3 Weic haaix diuc funx yie mbuo hnangv saeng-kuv? Ziux meih mangc
Job18:4 Meih qiex jiez hoic ganh mun nyei mienh aah! Ndau-beih laaix meih oix zuqc guangc benx ndau-huaang fai? La'bieiv oix zuqc suiv nqoi ninh nyei dorngx fai?
Job18:5 “Orqv mienh nyei njang zungv zuqc hnangv dang nor daic mi'aqv. Ninh nyei douz-mbietc yaac maiv ziux njang.
Job18:6 Yiem ninh nyei ndopv-liuh nyei njang benx hmuangx
Job18:7 Ninh henv nyei zaux-mbiec ih zanc laamx duqv nangv. Ninh ganh daav nyei za'eix zungv hoic ninh ndiqv zuqc ndorpc.
Job18:8 Ninh ganh nyei zaux dorh ninh mingh zuqc mungz nzenc
Job18:9 Hlaang ziouc hlopv jienv ninh nyei zaux-nqo
Job18:10 Maaih hlaang weic ninh bingx jienv ga'ndiev ndau
Job18:11 Haeqv ninh gamh nziex haic nyei sic weih jienv biei bung
Job18:12 Laaix ngorc
Job18:13 Ninh nyei ndopv butv ciouv nyei baengc huv nzengc. Doqc haic nyei wuon-baengc naqv ninh nyei buoz-zaux.
Job18:14 Yiem ninh kaux nyei ndopv-liuh ninh zuqc baeng cuotv
Job18:15 Dongh maiv zeiz ninh nyei ga'naaiv yiem ninh nyei ndopv-liuh
Job18:16 Ninh nyei nzungh nqaai mingh
Job18:17 Yiem lungh ndiev maiv maaih haaix dauh jangx ninh
Job18:18 Ninh yiem njang zuqc zunc bieqc hmuangx gu'nyuoz
Job18:19 Yiem ninh nyei douh zong maiv maaih ninh nyei hoz doic zeiv-fun. Ninh yiem jiex nyei dorngx maiv maaih yietc dauh cuotv singx maengc.
Job18:20 Fai bung mienh muangx haiz ninh nyei setv mueiz zuqc nyei sic ziouc hnyouv waaic nzengc. Dong bung mienh yaac gamh nziex haic aqv.
Job18:21 Orqv mienh yiem nyei dorngx zungv hnangv naaiv. Maiv hiuv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yaac hnangv naaiv aqv.”
Job19:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job19:2 “Meih mbuo oix zoux bun yie nyei hnyouv kouv
Job19:3 Meih mbuo gorngv doqc yie maiv zeiv ziepc nzunc aqv. Meih mbuo dorngc yie
Job19:4 Se gorngv yie za'gengh zoux dorngc
Job19:5 Se gorngv meih mbuo ceng meih mbuo ganh gauh hlo yie
Job19:6 wuov nyungc meih mbuo oix zuqc hiuv duqv se Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv zoux bun yie
Job19:7 “Yie heuc jienv gorngv
Job19:8 Tin-Hungh dangv jienv yie nyei jauv yie ziouc jiex maiv duqv. Ninh yaac bun yie nyei jauv hmuangx mingh.
Job19:9 Ninh zorqv nqoi yie nyei njang-laangc
Job19:10 Ninh weih jienv yie biei bung mborqv yie
Job19:11 Ninh qiex jiez
Job19:12 Ninh nyei jun-baeng guanh lomh nzoih daaih. Ninh mbuo liuc leiz jauv mborqv yie
Job19:13 Tin-Hungh bun yie nyei gorx-youz guangc yie
Job19:14 Yie nyei cien-ceqv leih nqoi yie
Job19:15 Yiem yie nyei biauv nyei kaeqv mienh caux m'sieqv bou funx yie zoux ga'nyiec nyei mienh. Ziux ninh mbuo nyei m'zing mangc
Job19:16 Yie heuc yie nyei bou mv baac ninh maiv dau
Job19:17 Yie nyei auv youx yie nyei nzuih nyei qiex. Yie ganh nyei cien gorx cien youz gamh nziev yie.
Job19:18 Liemh faix nyei fu'jueiv mangc piex yie. Yie jiez sin ninh mbuo gorngv yie.
Job19:19 Yie zuoqc jiex nyei yietc zungv loz-gaeng doic youx yie
Job19:20 Yie nyei ndopv naetv jienv mbungv
Job19:21 “Loz-gaeng aah! Korv-lienh yie maah! Tov korv-lienh yie
Job19:22 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc oix hoic yie hnangv Tin-Hungh hoic? Meih mbuo corc zoux doqc bun yie maiv gaengh gaux?
Job19:23 “Feix duqv yie gorngv nyei waac duqv fiev jienv
Job19:24 Feix duqv longc hlieqv-jaa-sic zuqc la'bieiv
Job19:25 Weic zuqc yie hiuv duqv Zuoqc yie Wuov Dauh ziangh jienv
Job19:26 Zuov yie ndopv huv nzengc
Job19:27 Yie ganh duqv buatc ninh
Job19:28 “Se gorngv meih mbuo gorngv
Job19:29 meih mbuo oix zuqc gamh nziex nzuqc ndaauv
Job20:1 Naa^aa^me Mienh
Job20:2 “Yopv aah! Meih nyei waac bun yie hnyouv maiv longx
Job20:3 Yie haiz meih gorngv-hemx nyei waac gorngv doqc yie
Job20:4 “Meih maiv hiuv fai? Yiem loz! hnoi daaih
Job20:5 orqv mienh duqv hingh nyei ziangh hoc se nangv nyei
Job20:6 Maiv gunv ninh duqv zoux hlo
Job20:7 ninh oix yietc liuz zuqc mietc
Job20:8 Ninh hnangv norm mbeix jiex mi'aqv
Job20:9 Buatc jiex ninh nyei mienh yietc liuz maiv duqv aengx buatc
Job20:10 Ninh nyei dorn-jueiv oix zuqc jaauv sung mienh jomc mienh. Ganh nyei buoz oix zuqc tuix nzuonx ninh nyei zinh zoih.
Job20:11 Ninh nyei mbungv maaih mienh lunx mienh nyei qaqv
Job20:12 “Maiv gunv orqv sic yiem ninh nyei nzuih se gaam nyei
Job20:13 maiv gunv ninh maiv kangv liev cuotv
Job20:14 ninh nyanc nyei ga'naaiv yiem ga'sie tiuv mi'aqv
Job20:15 Orqv mienh naqv zinh zoih aengx lov cuotv
Job20:16 Ninh oix sorqv naang-jieqv nyei ndie-doqc
Job20:17 Ninh maiv duqv mangc ndoqv
Job20:18 Ninh cuotv qaqv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc tuix nzuonx
Job20:19 Weic zuqc ninh zeix mienh jomc mienh aengx guangc ninh mbuo
Job20:20 “Weic zuqc ninh mauv nyei jauv maiv haih dingh
Job20:21 Ninh nyanc liuz
Job20:22 Ninh gauh benx jiex nyei ziangh hoc
Job20:23 “Orqv mienh nyanc beuv
Job20:24 Ninh oix biaux hlieqv-jaa-sic
Job20:25 Ninh baeng forng cuotv
Job20:26 Ninh siou nyei zinh zoih oix zuqc mietc nzengc. Maiv zeiz mienh biomv nyei douz oix zorqv ninh buov qui. Yiem ninh nyei ndopv-liuh zengc njiec nyei ga'naaiv yaac zuqc buov mietc nzengc.
Job20:27 Lungh oix bun cing ninh zoux nyei zuiz
Job20:28 Ninh nyei jaa-dingh zungv zuqc dorh mingh nzengc aqv
Job20:29 Naaiv se orqv mienh yiem Tin-Hungh duqv nyei buonc
Job21:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job21:2 “Tov meih mbuo longx-longx nyei muangx yie nyei waac
Job21:3 Tov diev jienv muangx yie gorngv. Yie gorngv liuz sueih meih mbuo jatv aqv.
Job21:4 “Yie aeqv
Job21:5 Mangc yie maah! Ziouc haeqv meih mbuo gamh nziex
Job21:6 Yie haaix zanc jangx taux
Job21:7 “Tin-Hungh weic haaix diuc bun orqv mienh duqv ziangh jienv
Job21:8 Ninh mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv dorng jienv ninh mbuo liepc wuonv
Job21:9 Ninh mbuo nyei biauv baengh orn nyei
Job21:10 Ninh mbuo nyei ngongh gouv douc buonv maiv dangx
Job21:11 Ninh mbuo bun ninh mbuo nyei fu'jueiv-faix cuotv hnangv ba'gi yungh guanh
Job21:12 Ninh mbuo gan nzoz caux daanh baah nyei qiex baaux nzung
Job21:13 Ninh mbuo yiem seix zaangc nyei hnoi-nyieqc duqv longx
Job21:14 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
Job21:15 Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh se haaix dauh
Job21:16 Ninh mbuo duqv longx se ninh mbuo kaux ninh mbuo ganh nyei qaqv. Orqv mienh caangh laangh nyei za'eix yie simv nqoi.
Job21:17 “Orqv mienh nyei dang zuqc daic ndongc haaix maqc? Ninh mbuo zuqc kuonx naanh nyei sic ndongc haaix maqc? Ninh mbuo zuqc Tin-Hungh qiex jiez
Job21:18 Ninh mbuo hnangv zuqc nziaaux buonc nyei mbiauh nqaauv
Job21:19 Meih mbuo gorngv
Job21:20 Tov bun ninh mbuo ganh nyei m'zing buatc ninh mbuo ganh zuqc mietc. Bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh qiex jiez haic ninh mbuo.
Job21:21 Ninh ziangh nyei hlaax-nyieqc buangv
Job21:22 “Maaih haaix dauh haih zorqv wuonh zaang njaaux Tin-Hungh? Weic zuqc ninh zungv siemv yiem hlang wuov deix.
Job21:23 Maaih laanh mienh daic nyei ziangh hoc
Job21:24 Ninh nyei sin henv
Job21:25 Aengx maaih laanh mienh daic nyei ziangh hoc
Job21:26 Ninh mbuo fih hnangv nyei daic
Job21:27 “Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv hnangv haaix nor hnamv
Job21:28 Weic zuqc meih mbuo gorngv
Job21:29 Meih mbuo maiv duqv naaic jiex jauv nyei mienh fai? Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zoux nyei zorng-zengx
Job21:30 se zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi orqv mienh duqv njoux
Job21:31 Haaix dauh dorng jienv orqv mienh gorngv ninh? Ziux ninh zoux nyei haaix dauh winh bun ninh?
Job21:32 Gaeng ninh mingh taux zouv wuov zanc
Job21:33 Weic ninh wuov norm horngz nyei nie heng nyei. Zuangx mienh gan jienv ninh mingh
Job21:34 “Meih mbuo ni? Meih mbuo kungx hnamv longc kungx-waac orn yie nyei hnyouv? Meih mbuo dau nyei waac maiv maaih haaix nyungc cuotv liuz nduov mienh nyei waac.”
Job22:1 Temaan Mienh
Job22:2 “Mienh haih weic Tin-Hungh maaih lamh longc nyei fai? Cong-mengh mienh weic ninh maaih lamh longc nyei fai?
Job22:3 Se gorngv meih zoux kuv mienh
Job22:4 “Se weic zuqc meih taaih ninh
Job22:5 Se meih zoux nyei orqv sic hlo haic maiv zeiz? Meih zoux nyei zuiz yaac maiv maaih jomc nyei dorngx.
Job22:6 Meih aapv gorx-youz an dorngx-daauh yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx. Zungv zorqv nzengc ninh mbuo nyei lui-houx bun ninh mbuo laengh gaengv nyei yiem.
Job22:7 Kouv nyei mienh meih maiv bun wuom ninh mbuo hopv
Job22:8 Meih longc meih nyei hatc maaz duqv lingh deic
Job22:9 Meih zunc auv-guaav kungx-buoz baeqc zaux nyei nzuonx yaac zoux doqc guh hanh fu'jueiv.
Job22:10 Weic naaiv maaih mungz zaeng weih gormx meih. Meih jangx maiv zaaic nyei ziangh hoc liemh zeih zuqc gamh nziex nyei sic.
Job22:11 Hmuangx om jienv meih
Job22:12 “Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz yiem gu'nguaaic lungh hlang nyei dorngx fai? Mangc hlang jiex nyei hleix
Job22:13 Meih corc gorngv
Job22:14 Mbuonx-hoz om jienv ninh
