Job22:15 “Meih corc oix gan loz-jauv fai? Naaiv se orqv mienh yangh jiex nyei jauv.
Job22:16 Maiv gaengh taux daic nyei ziangh hoc
Job22:17 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh
Job22:18 Mv baac Tin-Hungh corc bun longx nyei ga'naaiv buangv nzengc ninh mbuo nyei biauv. Orqv mienh hnamv nyei jauv yie yaac maiv haih mengh baeqc.
Job22:19 “Kuv mienh buatc ninh mbuo zuqc baaic ziouc a'hneiv
Job22:20 gorngv
Job22:21 “Yopv aac
Job22:22 Oix zuqc zipv ninh nyei nzuih njaaux nyei waac
Job22:23 Se gorngv meih nzuonx daaih lorz Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh meih ziouc duqv ceix jiez hnangv loz wuov nor. Se gorngv meih guangc orqv sic leih meih nyei ndopv-liuh go
Job22:24 se gorngv meih zorqv jiem guangc jienv nie-mbung
Job22:25 se gorngv Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh benx meih nyei jiem
Job22:26 hnangv naaiv meih ziouc a'hneiv Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh yaac cau hmien lorz Tin-Hungh.
Job22:27 Meih ziouc daux gaux jouh ninh
Job22:28 Meih dingc hnyouv zoux haaix nyungc
Job22:29 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zatv jienv zoux maux nyei mienh
Job22:30 Liemh zoux dorngc nyei mienh ninh yaac oix njoux. Se gorngv meih zoux duqv horpc meih ziouc duqv njoux.”
Job23:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job23:2 “Ih hnoi yie corc ngaengc jienv ngopv Tin-Hungh
Job23:3 Feix duqv yie haih hiuv mingh haaix ndau lorz ninh
Job23:4 Yie ziouc yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien sux yie nyei sic. Yie oix gorngv nzengc yie nyei diuh diuh jauv.
Job23:5 Yie oix hiuv duqv ninh hnangv haaix nor dau yie
Job23:6 Tin-Hungh oix longc ninh nyei domh qaqv caux yie nzaeng fai? Maiv zeiz! Ninh zungv oix muangx yie gorngv nyei waac.
Job23:7 Yiem ninh wuov
Job23:8 “Yie mingh dong bung lorz Tin-Hungh mv baac ninh maiv yiem naaic. Mingh fai bung
Job23:9 Ninh yiem baqv bung zoux gong nyei ziangh hoc yie mangc maiv buatc ninh. Yie huin mingh naamh bung mv baac maiv duqv buatc ninh.
Job23:10 Mv baac ninh hiuv duqv yie yangh nyei jauv. Ninh seix liuz yie
Job23:11 Yie nyei zaux yangh nitv jienv ninh nyei zaux-mbiec mingh. Yie gan jienv ninh nyei jauv
Job23:12 Yie maiv simv ninh nyei nzuih hatc nyei waac. Yie funx yiem ninh nyei nzuih cuotv nyei waac gauh jaaix jiex yie qiemx longc nyei nyanc hopv.
Job23:13 “Tin-Hungh yietc liuz maiv goiv yienc. Maaih haaix dauh haih tiuv ninh nyei za'eix? Ninh oix zoux nyei ninh ziouc zoux.
Job23:14 Ninh weic yie dingc nyei za'eix oix zoux ziangx
Job23:15 Weic naaiv yie yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien gamh nziex sin-zinx. Yie hnamv taux ninh yie ziouc gamh nziex haic.
Job23:16 Tin-Hungh bun yie hnyouv mau. Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh bun yie gamh nziex haic aqv
Job23:17 weic zuqc hmuangx weih gormx yie
Job24:1 “Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh weic haaix diuc maiv dingc siemv zuiz nyei hnoi? Hiuv duqv ninh wuov deix weic haaix diuc maiv duqv buatc ninh dingc daaih nyei hnoi?
Job24:2 Mienh suiv ndeic-nqenx nyei dongc
Job24:3 Ninh mbuo zorqv guh hanh fu'jueiv nyei lorh
Job24:4 Ninh mbuo fongv guh hanh fu'jueiv cuotv jauv-hlen
Job24:5 Hnangv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei hieh lorh
Job24:6 Ninh mbuo mingh mienh nyei ndeic nzauz mbiauh dorngc
Job24:7 Ninh mbuo laengh gaengv nyei bueix jiex muonz
Job24:8 Ninh mbuo yiem mbong zuqc mbiungc liemh ndorn
Job24:9 Orqv mienh caangv maiv maaih die nyei guh hanh fu'jueiv yiem maa nyei la'kuotv mingh
Job24:10 Mienh jomc mienh jiex naaiv jiex wuov laengh gaengv nyei yiem
Job24:11 Ninh mbuo yiem orqv mienh nyei yietc liouz yietc liouz ga'lanv ndiangx mbu'ndongx zaax ga'lanv youh
Job24:12 Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz maaih aav lamh daic nyei mienh njunh nyei qiex cuotv
Job24:13 “Aengx maaih mienh nqemh njang
Job24:14 Lungh maiv gaengh njang
Job24:15 Hienx auv nyei mienh zuov jienv nziemx-yaangh nyei ziangh hoc taux. Ninh gorngv
Job24:16 Lungh muonz zanc janx-zaqc mborqv tong kuotv bieqc biauv
Job24:17 Mapv maengh mapv hmuangx nyei ziangh hoc weic ninh mbuo yietc zungv se hnangv lungh ndorm nyei njang
Job24:18 “Orqv mienh hnangv wuom-mbiaauz siepv-siepv mbiouh jienv gan wuom-minc mingh. Ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung duqv nyei buonc zuqc zioux. Ninh mbuo maiv duqv mingh ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc huingx.
Job24:19 Lungh haanz
Job24:20 Ninh mbuo nyei maa zungv la'kuqv ninh mbuo
Job24:21 Ninh mbuo pienx maiv yungz jiex gu'nguaaz nyei m'sieqv dorn
Job24:22 Mv baac Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei qaqv mietc nzengc henv haic nyei mienh. Tin-Hungh yietv dongz sin ninh mbuo ziouc daic nzengc.
Job24:23 Tin-Hungh ceix baengh orn bun ninh mbuo
Job24:24 Ninh mbuo duqv mienh taaih se weic caamx baav hnangv
Job24:25 “Se gorngv maiv zeiz hnangv naaic
Job25:1 Quwaa Mienh
Job25:2 “Tin-Hungh maaih hlo jiex nyei lingc gunv. Maanc mienh oix zuqc taaih ninh. Ninh yiem ninh hlang nyei dorngx liepc baengh orn.
Job25:3 Maaih haaix dauh haih saauv duqv hingh ninh nyei tin-baeng? Ninh nyei njang cuotv daaih maaih haaix dauh ninh ziux maiv taux?
Job25:4 Wuov nyungc baamh mienh hnangv haaix nor haih yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien zoux duqv horpc? Yiem m'sieqv dorn cuotv seix nyei mienh hnangv haaix nor haih cing-nzengc?
Job25:5 Ziux Tin-Hungh mangc
Job25:6 Wuov nyungc
Job26:1 Yopv ziouc dau
Job26:2 “Meih gengh! tengx yie
Job26:3 Meih tengx maiv maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh caangh laangh duqv longx haic
Job26:4 Haaix dauh tengx meih gorngv cuotv naaiv deix waac? Maaih haaix dauh dongz zuqc meih hnangv naaiv nor gorngv?
Job26:5 “Yiem yiemh gen nyei mienh
Job26:6 Yiemh gen yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien buatc duqv nqaengc nyei
Job26:7 Tin-Hungh zorqv baqv bung nyei lungh corng kungx nyei dorngx gu'nguaaic
Job26:8 Ninh beu wuom yiem buangv mbuonx-hoz gu'nyuoz
Job26:9 Ninh bun mbuonx torngv jienv ninh nyei weic
Job26:10 Ninh yiem wuom-minc guetv huing gormx
Job26:11 Ninh hemx lungh nyei ndiouh
Job26:12 Ninh longc ninh nyei qaqv bun koiv sekv
Job26:13 Ninh bun ninh nyei nziaaux buonc lungh nzang
Job26:14 Mv baac naaiv se gorngv deix baav Tin-Hungh nyei jauv-louc. Yie mbuo kungx haiz diqv dien waac-sapv gorngv taux ninh hnangv. Mv baac ninh nyei domh qaqv mbui hnangv mba'ong nor
Job27:1 Yopv aengx borqv jienv gorngv ninh nyei jauv-louc. Ninh gorngv
Job27:2 “Yie ziangv jienv yietc liuz ziangh nyei Tin-Hungh
Job27:3 da'faanh yie corc maaih qiex tauv
Job27:4 yie nyei nzuih meix zungv maiv gorngv jaav nyei waac
Job27:5 Yie ndongc haaix zungv maiv gorngv meih mbuo horpc
Job27:6 Yie ngaengc jienv gorngv yie zoux duqv horpc
Job27:7 “Tov bun yie nyei win-wangv hnangv orqv mienh nor
Job27:8 Maiv taaih Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zuqc Tin-Hungh pai guangc
Job27:9 Ninh zuqc zeqc naanc nyei ziangh hoc
Job27:10 Ninh ziouc a'hneiv Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh fai? Ninh oix zanc-zanc heuc Tin-Hungh fai?
Job27:11 “Yie oix njaaux meih mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv ndongc haaix hlo
Job27:12 Naaiv meih mbuo yietc zungv buatc jiex. Wuov nyungc meih mbuo weic haaix diuc gorngv cuotv maiv lamh longc nyei waac?
Job27:13 “Naaiv se Tin-Hungh bun orqv mienh duqv nyei buonc
Job27:14 Maiv gunv ninh nyei fu'jueiv hiaangx camv
Job27:15 Ninh zengc njiec nyei mienh zungv zuqc wuon-baengc daic
Job27:16 Maiv gunv orqv mienh zornc nyaanh ndui jienv hnangv nie-mbung
Job27:17 maiv gunv ninh ndui jienv
Job27:18 Orqv mienh zoux biauv hnangv gaeng-nyorc mbiorngz
Job27:19 Ninh bueix njiec nyei ziangh hoc ninh butv zoih nyei
Job27:20 Ninh zuqc gamh nziex haic nyei sic hnangv wuom yiemx nor. Lungh muonz zanc nziaaux-zunc hlorv ninh mingh mi'aqv.
Job27:21 Dong bung nyei nziaaux hlorv ninh mingh
Job27:22 Nziaaux zorqv ninh zoi mingh yaac maiv korv-lienh. Ninh njiec qaqv biaux nziaaux nyei qaqv.
Job27:23 Mienh mbaix buoz haav-haav nyei jatv
Job28:1 “Zien aqv
Job28:2 Hlieqv yiem ndau-ndiev wetv cuotv daaih
Job28:3 Mienh bun hmuangx nyei dorngx tiuv benx njang. Ninh mbuo zimh lorz yiem go jiex nyei dorngx
Job28:4 Ninh mbuo yiem leih mienh nyei dorngx go nyei
Job28:5 Ndau-beih aeqv
Job28:6 Ndau-ndiev nyei la'bieiv maaih la'bieiv-jaaix mbuov nyei
Job28:7 “Wuov diuh jauv maiv maaih haaix norm domh jaangv hiuv
Job28:8 Ciouv nyei hieh zoih maiv caaiv jiex
Job28:9 “Mienh sung buoz mborqv ngaengc haic nyei la'bieiv
Job28:10 Ninh yiem la'bieiv-mbaengx gu'nyuoz wetv jauv
Job28:11 Ninh zaeqv jienv wuom-nyuonh
Job28:12 “Mv baac cong-mengh aeqv
Job28:13 Mienh maiv hiuv duqv cong-mengh nyei jaax-zinh
Job28:14 Ndau-ndiev nyei wuom gorngv
Job28:15 “Longc jiem maaiz yaac maiv duqv
Job28:16 Ofi nyei jiem caux jaaix haic nyei la'bieiv-jieqv baeqc fai mbuov nyei la'bieiv-jaaix yaac maaiz maiv ndutv
Job28:17 jiem caux jaaix nyei gingx yaac beiv maiv taux. Yaac maiv haih longc zien jiem nyei jaa-sic maaiz ndutv.
Job28:18 Liemh maiv zuqc gorngv taux yiem koiv jaaix nyei la'bieiv fai nzang jiex nyei gingx
Job28:19 E^ti^o^bie yangh ungv nyei la'bieiv-jaaix yaac maiv haih beiv maiv taux
Job28:20 Wuov nyungc cong-mengh yiem haaix daaih? Wuonh zaang nyei dorngx yiem haaix?
Job28:21 Cong-mengh se bingx jienv yietc zungv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv nyei m'zing
Job28:22 Zuqc mietc nyei dorngx caux yiemh gen gorngv
Job28:23 “Tin-Hungh mengh baeqc lorz cong-mengh wuov diuh jauv
Job28:24 Weic zuqc ninh mangc taux jomc ndau-beih
Job28:25 Tin-Hungh bun nziaaux maaih hniev-daauh wuov zanc
Job28:26 ninh paaiv ziangx mbiungc nyei soux mouc
Job28:27 wuov zanc ninh buatc cong-mengh yaac gorngv se longx nyei. Ninh liepc jiez yaac zaah mangc.
Job28:28 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox mienh
Job29:1 Yopv aengx borqv jienv gorngv ninh nyei jauv-louc. Ninh gorngv
Job29:2 “O feix duqv yie nyei maengc haih nzuonx daaih hnangv zinh ndaangc nyei hlaax-nyieqc
Job29:3 Wuov zanc ninh nyei dang ziux jienv yie nyei m'nqorngv gu'nguaaic
Job29:4 Wuov zanc yie lunx
Job29:5 Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh corc caux yie yiem
Job29:6 Yie yangh nyei jauv zungv maaih ngongh nyorx nzaaux zaux
Job29:7 “Yie cuotv taux zingh gaengh nyei ziangh hoc
Job29:8 mienh lunx mienh buatc yie ziouc simv nqoi
Job29:9 Baeqc fingx nyei bieiv zeiv maiv ko lo
Job29:10 Maaih mengh dauh nyei mienh yaac sekv nzieqc nyei
Job29:11 “Da'faanh m'normh haiz nyei mienh
Job29:12 weic zuqc yie tengx heuc jienv tov nyei mienh jomc mienh caux maiv maaih mienh tengx nyei guh hanh fu'jueiv.
Job29:13 Aav lamh zuqc mietc nyei mienh buang waac bun yie
Job29:14 Yie longc zoux horpc nyei jauv dorngx lui zuqv
Job29:15 Yie zoux m'zing maengh mienh nyei m'zing
Job29:16 Yie dorngx mienh jomc mienh nyei die
Job29:17 Yie mborqv nauv mienh waaic mienh nyei nyaah ngau
Job29:18 “Wuov zanc yie hnamv
Job29:19 Yie hnangv diuh ndiangx maaih nzungh ndaauv jienv mingh taux wuom
Job29:20 Mienh zanc-zanc taaih yie
Job29:21 “Mienh muangx yie yaac zuov jienv
Job29:22 Yie gorngv liuz ninh mbuo maiv ko lo
Job29:23 Ninh mbuo zuov yie hnangv zuov mbiungc
Job29:24 Ninh mbuo hnyouv mau nyei ziangh hoc
Job29:25 Yie zoux ninh mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv
Job30:1 “Mv baac gauh lunx yie wuov deix mienh jatv yie. Naaiv deix mienh nyei die yie buatc maiv zic duqv caux zuov yie nyei ba'gi yungh guanh nyei juv yiem.
Job30:2 Ninh mbuo nyei buoz nyei qaqv haih tengx haaix nyungc yie? Ninh mbuo nyei qaqv-leqc nzengc mi'aqv.
Job30:3 Laaix jomc kouv yaac ngorc
Job30:4 Ninh mbuo gaeqv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei ndiangx-normh
Job30:5 Ninh mbuo yiem mienh mbu'ndongx zuqc zunc cuotv
Job30:6 Ninh mbuo zuqc yiem ndoqv-zuonx nqaai yaac yiem ndau-kuotv caux mbaengx-ngaamh.
Job30:7 Ninh mbuo yiem ndau-huaang hnangv hieh zoih nor heuc
Job30:8 Ninh mbuo benx yietc guanh maiv lamh longc nyei haac horngh mienh
Job30:9 “Ih zanc naaiv deix mienh dorh yie benx nzung baaux
Job30:10 Ninh mbuo youx yie
Job30:11 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh bun yie mau
Job30:12 Naaiv deix ceux lunc nyei mienh yiem yie nyei mbiaauc maengx jiez daaih
Job30:13 Ninh mbuo bun yie biaux nyei jauv dangx
Job30:14 Ninh mbuo ndutc ndutc nyei daaih hnangv bieqc zingh laatc tong nyei dorngx. Yiem baaic waaic nyei dorngx ninh mbuo wuz-wuz nyei daaih.
Job30:15 Gamh nziex haic nyei sic hoic yie kouv haic
Job30:16 “Ih zanc yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh kouv haic
Job30:17 Lungh muonz zanc yie nyei mbungv hlam
Job30:18 Tin-Hungh nyei domh qaqv dorngx hnangv yie nyei lui
Job30:19 Tin-Hungh zorqv yie zoi njiec wuom-bamc ndorngh
Job30:20 “Tin-Hungh aac
Job30:21 Meih tiuv hnyouv zoux doqc yie
Job30:22 Meih bouh yie faaux yiem nziaaux gu'nguaaic
Job30:23 Yie hiuv duqv meih dorh yie mingh zuqc daic
Job30:24 “Mv baac mienh yiem baaic waaic nyei ga'naaiv-ndui sung buoz
Job30:25 Mienh ndortv naanc nyei ziangh hoc yie maiv zeiz weic ninh mbuo nyiemv fai? Yie nyei hnyouv maiv zeiz weic mienh jomc mienh nzauh fai?
Job30:26 Yie hnamv jienv oix duqv longx mv baac duqv ciouv. Yie zuov jienv njang mv baac hmuangx daaih taux.
Job30:27 Yie nyei hnyouv faan-fei lunc
Job30:28 Yie nzauh
Job30:29 Yie caux hieh juv benx muoz-doic
Job30:30 Yie nyei ndopv jieqv yaac nqorqv mi'aqv
Job30:31 Weic naaiv yie nyei daanh baah nyei qiex tiuv benx nzauh nyei qiex. Yie nyei hlauv-ndongh nux nyei qiex tiuv benx mienh nyiemv nyei qiex.
Job31:1 “Yie caux yie nyei m'zing laengz jiez ngaengc waac. Wuov nyungc yie hnangv haaix nor haih hanc cing-nzengc nyei sieqv?
Job31:2 Yiem gu'nguaaic nyei Tin-Hungh oix bun yie duqv nyei buonc se haaix nyungc? Yiem hlang nyei dorngx Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh oix bun yie duqv nzipc haaix nyungc?
Job31:3 Ninh maiv zeiz oix bun zoux maiv horpc nyei mienh zuqc zeqc naanc
Job31:4 Ninh maiv zeiz mangc yie mingh nyei jauv yaac saauv yie nyei norm-norm zaux-mbiec fai?
Job31:5 “Se gorngv yie zoux jaav nyei jauv
Job31:6 tov Tin-Hungh nziang yie yiem baengh fim nyei tin-baengh nziangx
Job31:7 “Se gorngv yie nyei zaux-mbiec yangh pien zien jauv
Job31:8 gunv bun yie zuangx yaac bun ganh dauh nyanc
Job31:9 “Se gorngv yie nyei hnyouv zuqc baeng mingh lorz m'sieqv dorn
Job31:10 gunv bun yie nyei auv weic ganh dauh m'jangc dorn morc mbuonv
Job31:11 Hnangv naaic za'gengh waaic nyei sic
Job31:12 weic zuqc naaiv nyungc zuiz benx douz buov taux zuqc mietc nyei dorngx
Job31:13 “Se gorngv yie nyei nouh gauv nouh beiz daaih gox yie
Job31:14 wuov nyungc Tin-Hungh jiez daaih naaic yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux? Ninh zaah naaic yie nyei ziangh hoc yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor dau?
Job31:15 Zeix yie yiem maa nyei ga'sie wuov dauh fih hnangv nyei zeix ninh maiv zeiz? Yaac dongh naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh bun yie mbuo yiem maa nyei ga'sie zeix daaih maiv zeiz?
Job31:16 “Se gorngv yie ngaengc jienv maiv tengx dongh mienh jomc mienh oix duqv nyei
Job31:17 se gorngv yie ganh nyanc yie maaih nyei diqv dien
Job31:18 (weic zuqc ninh lunx nyei ziangh hoc yie dorh ninh hlo daaih hnangv benx ninh nyei die nor
Job31:19 se gorngv yie buatc haaix dauh daic laaix maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv
Job31:20 se gorngv yie maiv bun ninh duqv yie nyei ba'gi yungh nyei biei tengx ninh siouv
Job31:21 se gorngv yie hiuv duqv yiem zingh gaengh ndaangc nyei sic dorngh maaih mienh tengx yie
Job31:22 tov bun yie nyei mba'dauh caux mbungv-zeih ndutv mingh
Job31:23 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh bun daaih nyei zeqc naanc bun yie gamh nziex haic. Yaac weic ninh nyei haangh daauh yie maiv haih zoux naaiv nyungc sic.
Job31:24 “Se gorngv yie longc jiem zoux yie kaux nyei dorngx
Job31:25 se gorngv yie weic yie maaih zinh zoih bungx-zuoqc
Job31:26 se gorngv yie buatc mba'hnoi ziux cuotv njang
Job31:27 yie nyei hnyouv beic ndiev zuqc yuoqc
Job31:28 naaiv yaac benx siemv zuiz jien oix zuqc dingc nyei zuiz
Job31:29 “Se gorngv yie buatc nzorng yie wuov deix zuqc baaic
Job31:30 (Yie zungv maiv bun yie nyei nzuih baamz zuiz
Job31:31 se gorngv yiem yie nyei ndopv-liuh nyei mienh maiv gorngv
Job31:32 (yiem go daaih nyei mienh maiv zuqc yiem hei-horngc jiex muonz
Job31:33 se gorngv yie bingx yie baamz nyei zuiz hnangv Aa^ndam
Job31:34 weic zuqc yie gamh nziex zuangx mienh camv
Job31:35 “O feix duqv maaih dauh muangx yie. (Naaiv yie faaux yie nyei mbuox. Tov Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh dau yie.) Tov gox yie wuov dauh zorqv gox nyei waac fiev jienv.
Job31:36 Yie ziouc an jienv yie nyei mba'dauh
Job31:37 Yie oix gorngv mengh mbuox Tin-Hungh yie zoux nyei yietc zungv
Job31:38 “Se gorngv yie nyei ndau gox yie
Job31:39 se gorngv yie nyanc ndau nyei gaeng-zuangx yaac maiv cuotv nyaanh
Job31:40 tov bun njimv cuotv div mbiauh witv
Job32:1 Naaiv deix buo laanh mienh ziouc dingh njiec
Job32:2 Mv baac maaih dauh Laam Fingx
Job32:3 Ninh yaac qiex jiez Yopv nyei buo dauh doic
Job32:4 E^li^hu zuov jienv oix caux Yopv gorngv weic zuqc wuov deix gauh gox ninh.
Job32:5 E^li^hu buatc naaiv deix buo laanh mienh maiv maaih waac dau ninh ziouc qiex jiez haic.
Job32:6 Mbusi Mienh
Job32:7 Yie gorngv
Job32:8 Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh nyei qiex bun baamh mienh nyei hnyouv maaih banh zeic haih mengh baeqc.
Job32:9 Se maiv zeiz laaix hnyangx-jeiv hlang
Job32:10 Weic naaiv yie gorngv. Muangx yie maah! Tov bun yie ziux yie nyei hnyouv hnamv nyei gorngv.
Job32:11 “Yie zuov jienv muangx meih mbuo gorngv nyei waac. Yie muangx meih mbuo hnamv cuotv nyei za'eix
Job32:12 Yie longc hnyouv muangx meih mbuo
Job32:13 Faix fim
Job32:14 Yopv maiv zeiz zueih yietv zueih nyeic doix yie gorngv
Job32:15 “Ninh mbuo gamh nziex
Job32:16 Ninh mbuo maiv gorngv waac
Job32:17 Yie ganh yaac oix dau
Job32:18 Weic zuqc yie maaih waac camv
Job32:19 Yie nyei hnyouv hnangv a'ngunc diuv dapv mbuoqc
Job32:20 Yie hnangv haaix oix zuqc gorngv cingx duqv kuh yiem
Job32:21 Yie maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien
Job32:22 Weic zuqc yie maiv hiuv duqv hnangv haaix nor la'guaih ceng
Job33:1 “Yopv aac
Job33:2 Mangc maah! Ih zanc yie oix gorngv
Job33:3 Yie nyei waac bun cing yie nyei hnyouv zingx
Job33:4 Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh zeix yie
Job33:5 Se gorngv meih haih dau yie
Job33:6 Ziux Tin-Hungh mangc
Job33:7 Weic naaiv meih maiv zuqc gamh nziex yie
Job33:8 “Meih gorngv nyei waac yie haiz mi'aqv. Meih gorngv waac nyei qiex bieqc yie nyei m'normh.
Job33:9 Meih gorngv
Job33:10 Mv baac Tin-Hungh lorz sic hoic yie
Job33:11 Ninh zorqv ndiangx gapc jienv yie nyei zaux
Job33:12 “Yopv aac
Job33:13 Meih weic haaix diuc caux ninh nzaeng gorngv
Job33:14 Tin-Hungh longc naaiv nyungc za'eix gorngv
Job33:15 Lungh muonz zanc mienh bueix jienv coux
Job33:16 Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo nyei m'normh muangx duqv haiz
Job33:17 weic bun mienh leih nqoi zoux orqv nyei sic
Job33:18 Ninh dangv jienv bun mienh maiv zuqc bieqc yiemh gen
Job33:19 “Mienh yaac zuqc mborqv njaaux bueix jienv coux diev mun
Job33:20 Ninh nyei nzuih ziouc youx nyanc hopv
Job33:21 Ninh jaic gau
Job33:22 Ninh nyei lingh wuonh taux fatv yiemh gen
Job33:23 “Se gorngv maaih dauh fin-mienh daaih tengx ninh zoux mbu'ndongx mienh
Job33:24 Wuov dauh fin-mienh korv-lienh ninh ziouc gorngv
Job33:25 Ninh nyei sin ziouc nzuonx lunx daaih hnangv fu'jueiv nyei
Job33:26 Ninh daux gaux jouh Tin-Hungh
Job33:27 Ninh yiem mienh nyei nza'hmien baaux nzung gorngv
Job33:28 Ninh njoux yie
Job33:29 “Tin-Hungh zoux naaiv deix yietc zungv sic bun mienh
Job33:30 Ninh njoux mienh leih ndutv yiemh gen
Job33:31 “O Yopv aac
Job33:32 Se gorngv meih maaih waac gorngv
Job33:33 Se gorngv meih maiv gorngv
Job34:1 E^li^hu aengx gorngv
Job34:2 “Meih mbuo cong-mengh nyei mienh aah! Muangx yie nyei waac maah! Meih mbuo maaih wuonh zaang nyei mienh
Job34:3 weic zuqc m'normh seix waac hnangv mbietc seix nyanc hopv nyei mueix.
Job34:4 Mbuo oix zuqc ginv haaix nyungc se horpc nyei
Job34:5 “Yopv gorngv
Job34:6 Maiv gunv yie zoux duqv horpc
Job34:7 Maaih haaix laanh mienh hnangv Yopv diev duqv mienh huotv ndongc hopv wuom hec.
Job34:8 Ninh caux orqv mienh zoux doic
Job34:9 Weic zuqc ninh gorngv
Job34:10 “Weic naaiv meih mbuo mienh guai mienh aah! Muangx yie maah! Tin-Hungh za'gengh! maiv haih zoux orqv sic. Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh zungv maiv haih zoux dorngc.
Job34:11 Ninh ziux mienh zoux nyei winh bun ninh mbuo
Job34:12 Zien nyei
Job34:13 Haaix dauh orn Tin-Hungh gunv ndau-beih? Fai haaix dauh paaiv ninh gunv gormx lungh ndiev?
Job34:14 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh dingc hnyouv siou ninh bun mienh maaih maengc nyei qiex nzuonx guei ninh ganh
Job34:15 da'faanh maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv ziouc liemh zeih daic
Job34:16 “Se gorngv meih mengh baeqc
Job34:17 Haaix dauh nzorng baengh fim nyei jauv horpc zuqc gunv nyei fai? Meih oix dingc baengh fim nyei
Job34:18 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Job34:19 Ninh maiv mangc domh jien nyei hmien
Job34:20 Ndaamv muonz nyei ziangh hoc
Job34:21 Tin-Hungh mangc jienv mienh nyei jauv
Job34:22 Maiv maaih hmatv jieqv fai mapv hmuangx nyei dorngx bun zoux orqv nyei mienh bingx duqv mbueiz.
Job34:23 Tin-Hungh zungv maiv zuqc dingc ziangh hoc bun mienh mingh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien zuqc siemv.
Job34:24 Ninh mborqv baaic maaih qaqv nyei mienh yaac maiv zuqc zaah naaic ndaangc. Ninh aengx liepc ganh deix mienh div ninh mbuo.
Job34:25 Hnangv naaic
Job34:26 Laaix ninh mbuo zoux nyei orqv sic ninh dorng jienv zuangx mienh mborqv ninh mbuo
Job34:27 weic zuqc ninh mbuo mingh pien maiv gan ninh
Job34:28 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo bun mienh jomc mienh nyei qiex mingh taux Tin-Hungh wuov. Zuqc kouv heuc nyei mienh nyei qiex
Job34:29 Se gorngv ninh sekv nzieqc
Job34:30 weic bun maiv gan Tin-Hungh nyei mienh maiv duqv gunv
Job34:31 “Se gorngv maaih dauh mienh gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh ‘Yie zuqc mborqv njaaux liuz
Job34:32 Yie mangc maiv buatc nyei tov meih njaaux yie. Se gorngv yie zoux zuiz
Job34:33 Tin-Hungh oix zuqc ziux meih oix nyei winh bun meih
Job34:34 “Cong-mengh mienh oix gorngv mbuox yie
Job34:35 “Yopv gorngv waac yaac maiv hiuv haaix nyungc
Job34:36 Feix duqv bun Yopv zuqc seix taux ndiev. Weic zuqc ninh dau nyei waac hnangv orqv mienh nor.
Job34:37 Ninh ngaengc Tin-Hungh aengx jaa ninh nyei zuiz
Job35:1 E^li^hu aengx gorngv
Job35:2 “Meih hnamv daaih naaiv se baengh fim nyei fai? Meih gorngv
Job35:3 meih cingx daaih naaic Tin-Hungh
Job35:4 “Yie oix dau meih yaac dau caux meih yiem nyei loz-gaeng doic.
Job35:5 “Cau hmien mangc wuov lungh! Mangc yiem meih gu'nguaaic hlang nyei mbuonx.
Job35:6 Se gorngv meih baamz zuiz
Job35:7 Se gorngv meih zoux kuv mienh
Job35:8 Meih zoux orqv sic kungx hoic baamh mienh hnangv meih nor. Meih zoux kuv mienh kungx tengx baamh mienh duqv longx.
Job35:9 “Mienh laaix zuqc zeix camv ziouc heuc
Job35:10 Mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh gorngv
Job35:11 Ninh njaaux yie mbuo gauh camv njaaux ndau-beih nyei hieh zoih
Job35:12 Ninh mbuo heuc jienv tov tengx mv baac Tin-Hungh maiv dau
Job35:13 Ninh mbuo baeqc baeqc heuc
Job35:14 “Wuov nyungc
Job35:15 Ih zanc meih hnamv daaih
Job35:16 Weic naaiv Yopv gorngv jienv maiv lamh longc nyei waac mingh
Job36:1 E^li^hu aengx nzipc jienv gorngv
Job36:2 “Tov aengx diev jienv muangx yie gorngv diqv dien
Job36:3 Yie oix zorqv yie hiuv nyei jauv yiem go nyei dorngx daaih
Job36:4 Za'gengh zien nyei
Job36:5 “Tin-Hungh se henv haic yaac maiv mangc piex haaix dauh
Job36:6 Ninh maiv bun orqv mienh duqv ziangh jienv
Job36:7 Ninh zanc-zanc mangc jienv kuv mienh
Job36:8 Se gorngv ninh mbuo zuqc limc ndoh jienv yaac zuqc siouc kouv nyei hlaang nzenc jienv
Job36:9 Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic
Job36:10 Ninh bun ninh mbuo nyei m'normh muangx duqv haiz ninh njaaux nyei waac
Job36:11 Se gorngv ninh mbuo muangx Tin-Hungh yaac fu-sux ninh
Job36:12 Mv baac se gorngv ninh mbuo maiv muangx
Job36:13 “Maiv maaih hnyouv taaih Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zanc-zanc qiex jiez. Ninh mbuo zuqc dingc zuiz
Job36:14 Lunx nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo daic mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo nyei setv mueiz nyei maengc zuqc nyaiv.
Job36:15 Tin-Hungh longc siouc kouv nyei jauv njoux siouc kouv nyei mienh. Ninh longc zuqc zeix nyei sic koi nqoi ninh mbuo nyei m'normh.
Job36:16 “Tin-Hungh yienz meih cuotv kuonx naanh nyei jauv
Job36:17 Mv baac meih zungv zuqc dingc zuiz hnangv orqv mienh
Job36:18 Faix fim oc. Maiv dungx bun zinh zoih yuoqc meih mingh dorngc jauv
Job36:19 Meih heuc jienv tov nyei haih tengx meih biaux ndutv kouv naanc fai? Meih ganh nyei yietc zungv qaqv haih tengx duqv meih nyei fai?
Job36:20 Maiv dungx hnamv oix buatc lungh muonz zanc taux
Job36:21 Faix fim
Job36:22 “Jangx jienv Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv ndongc haaix hlo! Maiv maaih haaix dauh zoux fin-saeng hnangv ninh.
Job36:23 Haaix dauh paaiv Tin-Hungh zoux nyei jauv? Haaix dauh haih gorngv mbuox ninh
Job36:24 Meih oix zuqc jangx jienv ceng ninh zoux nyei sic se hlo haic
Job36:25 Maanc mienh duqv buatc ninh zoux nyei sic
Job36:26 “Tin-Hungh za'gengh hlo
Job36:27 Ninh baeng wuom-ndiepv faaux
Job36:28 lungh ziouc duih njiec
Job36:29 Maaih haaix dauh mengh baeqc mbuonx hnangv haaix nor mingh mingh daaih daaih
Job36:30 Ninh bun mba'lingc faatv nzaanx ziux gormx ninh ganh
Job36:31 Weic zuqc ninh longc naaiv deix siemv maanc fingx
Job36:32 Ninh longc mba'lingc buang jienv ninh nyei buoz
Job36:33 Mba'ong mbui nyei qiex biux mengh ninh zoux nyei sic
Job37:1 “Naaiv deix sic bun yie nyei mba'nziu dongz mbokc mbokc nyei
Job37:2 Muangx maah! Muangx Tin-Hungh nyei qiex mbui hnangv mba'ong nor
Job37:3 Ninh bungx mba'lingc cuotv buangv lungh ndiev
Job37:4 Nqa'haav maaih ninh nyei qiex njunh jienv daaih
Job37:5 Tin-Hungh nyei qiex mbui cuotv haiz mbuoqc horngh haic. Ninh zoux hlo haic nyei sic
Job37:6 Weic zuqc ninh mbuox sorng
Job37:7 Ninh bun dauh dauh mienh nyei buoz dingh njiec
Job37:8 Hieh zoih bieqc ninh mbuo nyei zunh
Job37:9 Nziaaux-jieqv yiem naamh bung cuotv daaih
Job37:10 Tin-Hungh nyei qiex bun wuom gitv sorng
Job37:11 Ninh bun mbuonx-hoz maaih wuom buangv nzengc
Job37:12 Ziux Tin-Hungh paaiv
Job37:13 Ninh bun naaiv deix jauv cuotv daaih weic dingc zuiz fai weic yungz ndau-beih
Job37:14 “Yopv aah! Dingh jienv longx-longx nyei muangx taux Tin-Hungh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Job37:15 Meih hiuv nyei fai? Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor hatc naaiv deix ga'naaiv
Job37:16 Meih hiuv duqv mbuonx hnangv haaix nor mbiouh jienv ndaamv-lungh nyei fai? Se maaih dunh yunh nyei wuonh zaang wuov dauh zoux nyei mbuoqc horngh sic.
Job37:17 Naamh bung nyei nziaaux bun ndau jorm zongc-zongc nyei
Job37:18 Meih haih hnangv Tin-Hungh corng lungh
Job37:19 “Tov njaaux yie mbuo
Job37:20 Oix zuqc mbuox ninh
Job37:21 Ih zanc nziaaux buonc mbuonx mingh
Job37:22 Yiem baqv bung maaih njang-laangc cuotv hnangv jiem nor
Job37:23 “Yie mbuo maiv haih mingh nitv fatv Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh. Ninh maaih domh qaqv
Job37:24 Weic naaiv mienh taaih ninh. Da'faanh ceng ganh maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh ninh maiv taaih aqv.”
Job38:1 Wuov zanc Ziouv yiem nziaaux-zunc dau Yopv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv
Job38:2 “Naaiv dongh haaix dauh longc maiv maaih wuonh zaang nyei waac bun yie nyei za'eix muangh mingh?
Job38:3 Meih oix zuqc liuc leiz ziangx hnangv dauh jun-zeiv mienh. Yie oix naaic meih
Job38:4 “Yie liepc baamh gen nyei gorn-ndoqv wuov zanc
Job38:5 Haaix dauh dingc ndau lomh haaix hlo? Daaix meih hiuv nyei saah? Haaix dauh baeng hlaang ndorqc?
Job38:6 Ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv liepc yiem haaix nyungc gu'nguaaic? Haaix dauh an baamh gen nyei gorqv gauh longc jienv jiex wuov norm la'bieiv?
Job38:7 Wuov zanc lungh ndorm nyei hleix lomh nzoih baaux nzung
Job38:8 “Koiv nyei wuom baetv cuotv hnangv gu'nguaaz cuotv maa nyei ga'sie wuov zanc
Job38:9 Se yie longc mbuonx buang jienv koiv
Job38:10 Yie dingc koiv nyei gapv-jaaix
Job38:11 yaac gorngv
Job38:12 “Yopv aac
Job38:13 weic bun ninh haih ziux jomc lungh gorn
Job38:14 Ndau-beih goiv yienc hnangv mborqv jienv yienx nyei ba'naih nie
Job38:15 Orqv mienh nyei njang zuqc zorqv nqoi
Job38:16 “Meih bieqc jiex taux koiv nyei nyuonh
Job38:17 Maaih haaix dauh bun meih hiuv duqv zuqc daic nyei gaengh? Yiemh gen hmuangx nyei dorngx nyei gaengh meih buatc jiex nyei fai?
Job38:18 Meih hiuv duqv ndau-beih ndongc haaix jangv fai? Meih hiuv duqv naaiv deix yietc zungv nor
Job38:19 “Njang yiem nyei dorngx yangh haaix mingh? Hmuangx yiem nyei dorngx yiem haaix?
Job38:20 Meih haih dorh ninh mingh taux ninh nyei dorngx
Job38:21 Meih za'gengh hiuv nyei
Job38:22 “Meih bieqc jiex sorng nyei lamz
Job38:23 Yie liouh jienv sorng caux borqc weic zeqc naanc nyei ziangh hoc
Job38:24 Mingh taux njang bun nqoi nyei dorngx yiem haaix? Fai mingh taux dong bung nyei nziaaux bun nzaanx buangv ndau-beih nyei dorngx yiem haaix?
Job38:25 “Haaix dauh weic domh mbiungc wetv wuom-zuonx
Job38:26 Haaix dauh bun mbiungc duih njiec maiv maaih mienh yiem nyei ndau
Job38:27 Haaix dauh bun ndau-huaang ndau-nqaai duqv wuom gaux weic yungz ndau cuotv miev-maeng?
Job38:28 Mbiungc maaih die nyei fai? Fai haaix dauh yungz mbiungc-suiv ndiepv?
Job38:29 Haaix dauh zoux sorng nyei maa? Lungh zaangc nyei mbiungc-suiv gitv
Job38:30 Wuom ngaengc mingh hnangv la'bieiv
Job38:31 “Meih haih zorqv Siec Muoz-Sieqv Hleix ndoh jienv
Job38:32 Meih haih dorh hleix-guanh ziux ninh mbuo nyei gueix
Job38:33 Meih hiuv duqv lungh nyei leiz-latc fai? Meih haih bun naaiv deix leiz-latc gunv lungh ndiev fai?
Job38:34 “Meih haih heuc mbuonx duih mbiungc njiec yiemx jienv meih fai?
Job38:35 Meih haih paaiv mba'lingc njiec
Job38:36 Haaix dauh bun mienh nyei hnyouv maaih cong-mengh
Job38:37 Haaix dauh maaih cong-mengh saauv mbuonx? Fai haaix dauh haih dox cuotv lungh nyei wuom-ongx
Job38:38 bun nie-mbung gitv benx ndunh
Job38:39 “Sienh mbaapv jienv yiem ninh mbuo nyei kuotv fai yiem mbueiz nyei dorngx zuov
Job38:40 
Job38:41 Norqc aa laaix maiv maaih ga'naaiv nyanc jiex naaiv jiex wuov
Job39:1 “La'bieiv-mbaengx nyei hieh yungh haaix zanc njiec dorn
Job39:2 Ninh maaih jienv dorn nyei hlaax-nyieqc meih haih saauv nyei fai? Haaix zanc njiec dorn meih hiuv nyei?
Job39:3 Meih hiuv duqv ninh mbuo haaix zanc mbaapv njiec
Job39:4 Ninh mbuo nyei dorn henv jienv faaux
Job39:5 “Haaix dauh bungx hieh lorh? Haaix dauh jaiv ninh nyei hlaang?
Job39:6 Yie zorqv ndau-huaang benx ninh nyei biauv
Job39:7 Ninh jatv zingh coh coh nyei qiex
Job39:8 Ninh youh gormx mbong benx ninh nyei miev-ciangv
Job39:9 “Hieh ngongh kangv fu-sux meih fai? Ninh oix yiem meih nyei miev-zoh ga'hlen bueix jiex muonz fai?
Job39:10 Meih haih longc hlaang ndoh jienv hieh ngongh laih ndau fai? Ninh oix gan meih baah yuonh komv nyei dorngx fai?
Job39:11 Weic zuqc ninh maaih qaqv henv meih haih kaux ninh fai? Meih zorqv meih nyei gong-hniev jiu bun ninh zoux?
Job39:12 Meih bungx hnyouv ninh dorh meih nyei laangh ziqc nzuonx daaih? Yaac siou meih nyei mbiauh taux mborqv mbiauh nyei ciangv?
Job39:13 “Norqc lorh torh njien-youh nyei yaapv ndaatv
Job39:14 Norqc lorh torh ndauc jaux guangc wuov ndau
Job39:15 Ninh maiv hnamv taux haih zuqc zaux caaiv huv
Job39:16 Ninh zoux doqc bun ninh nyei dorn
Job39:17 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh maiv bun ninh maaih cong-mengh
Job39:18 Mv baac ninh yang jienv ndaatv tiux wuov zanc
Job39:19 “Yopv aac
Job39:20 Meih bun ninh biu hnangv jopv-nyeic
Job39:21 Ninh yiem wuov horngz nyaaiv ndau
Job39:22 Ninh jatv gamh nziex nyei sic
Job39:23 Geh maaz mienh buix nyei forng-ndongh saev-saev nyei mbui
Job39:24 Ninh ciouv-ciouv nyei nyaaiv ndau yaac tiux jienv mingh
Job39:25 Jorng nyei qiex haaix zanc mbui ninh heuc
Job39:26 “Domh jaangv yang ndaatv ndaix
Job39:27 Se meih paaiv domh jaangv ndaix faaux
Job39:28 Ninh yiem hlang jiex nyei mbaengx zoux ninh nyei biauv
Job39:29 Yiem naaiv ninh mangc jienv zorqv ga'naaiv nyanc
Job39:30 Ninh nyei dorn sorqv nziaamv
Job40:1 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox Yopv
Job40:2 “Yopv aah! Daanh nyei mienh oix caux Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh nzaeng nyei fai? Caux Tin-Hungh nzaeng nyei mienh dau ninh maah!”
Job40:3 Yopv ziouc dau Ziouv. Ninh gorngv
Job40:4 “ Ziouv aac
Job40:5 Yie gorngv nzunc liuz
Job40:6 Wuov zanc Ziouv yiem nziaaux-zunc dau Yopv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv
Job40:7 “Meih oix zuqc liuc leiz ziangx hnangv jun-zeiv mienh nor. Yie oix naaic meih
Job40:8 “Meih oix bun cing yie maiv baengh fim fai? Meih oix dingc yie zoux dorngc weic bun meih ganh horpc fai?
Job40:9 Meih maaih buoz hnangv Tin-Hungh nyei buoz henv fai? Meih maaih qiex ndomh ndomh nyei mbui hnangv ninh nyei qiex mbui fai?
Job40:10 Wuov nyungc
Job40:11 Zoux maux nyei mienh meih qiex jiez
Job40:12 Mangc dauh dauh ceng-hlo nyei mienh yaac baeng ninh mbuo ndortv njiec
Job40:13 Zorqv ninh mbuo yietc zungv biopv jienv nie-mbung
Job40:14 Hnangv naaic yie ziouc nyiemc bun meih
Job40:15 “Mangc Mbe^he^motv maah! Yie zeix ninh hnangv yie zeix meih. Ninh nyanc miev hnangv ngongh nor.
Job40:16 Ninh nyei qaqv yiem ninh nyei jaaiv
Job40:17 Ninh bun ninh nyei dueiv ngaengc hnangv si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Job40:18 Ninh nyei mbungv hnangv dongh siqv ndongh
Job40:19 Ninh se Tin-Hungh zeix daaih nyei da'yietv dauh
Job40:20 Zuangx mbong cuotv nyanc nyei ga'naaiv bun ninh
Job40:21 Ninh bueix njiec ndiangx-njimv ga'ndiev
Job40:22 Weic zuqc ndiangx-njimv tengx ninh bingx laangh
Job40:23 Maiv gunv wuom seix
Job40:24 Haaix dauh haih buang jienv ninh nyei m'zing zorqv ninh? Haaix dauh haih zorqv ninh aengx cunx tong ninh nyei mba'zorng?
Job41:1 “Yopv aah! Meih haih longc diux zorqv Le^wi^aa^taan
Job41:2 Meih haih longc hlaang cunx ninh nyei mba'zorng
Job41:3 Ninh oix qaqv tov meih korv-lienh nyei fai? Ninh oix longc suonc nyei waac caux meih gorngv?
Job41:4 Ninh oix caux meih liepc ngaengc waac
Job41:5 Meih haih zorqv ninh dorngx norqc longc a'nziaauc
Job41:6 Zorqv mbiauz mienh dorh ninh daaih gorngv jaax-zinh
Job41:7 Meih haih longc cang-fou cunx ninh nyei ndopv
Job41:8 Longc meih nyei buoz muoqv ninh
Job41:9 Mienh maaih lamh hnamv oix zorqv ninh mv baac maiv zeiz aqv
Job41:10 Maiv maaih haaix dauh ciouv gaux cuoqv ninh. Wuov nyungc
Job41:11 Maaih haaix dauh bun haaix nyungc yie
Job41:12 “Yie yaac maiv nyienz jienv maiv gorngv taux ninh nyei buoz-zaux
Job41:13 Haaix dauh haih ciev ninh nyei ga'nyiec wuov yiemc lui? Haaix dauh haih nzopv bieqc ninh nyei i yiemc hlieqv-lui?
Job41:14 Haaix dauh haih maeqv nqoi ninh nyei nzuih baengx? Huing gormx ninh nyei nzuih nyei nyaah haeqv mienh gamh nziex haic.
Job41:15 Ninh nyei diqc daanz nyei jiex benx yietc liouz yietc liouz hnangv torngv-baaih nor
Job41:16 Naaiv deix jiex yietc kuaaiv gapv yietc kuaaiv ndipc haic
Job41:17 Jiex gitv jienv jaax
Job41:18 Ninh ciuv ziouc maaih njang njapc dangh cuotv daaih. Ninh nyei m'zing hnangv lungh ndorm nziouv nyei njang-laangc.
Job41:19 Ninh nyei nzuih cuotv douz hnangv douz-baav
Job41:20 Ninh nyei mba'zorng cuotv douz-sioux
Job41:21 Ninh biomv qiex bun douz-taanx zieqc
Job41:22 Ninh nyei jaang za'gengh henv haic
Job41:23 Ninh nyei orv-nziu ciqv jienv jaax zietc nyei
Job41:24 Ninh nyei hnyouv ngaengc hnangv la'bieiv
Job41:25 Ninh jiez sin
Job41:26 Maiv gunv longc nzuqc ndaauv nzopv
Job41:27 Weic ninh nor
Job41:28 Forng haeqv maiv duqv ninh biaux
Job41:29 Ndiangx-ndonx dorngx mbiauh nqaauv gorn
Job41:30 Ga'sie ndoqv nyei jiex laic hnangv nie-mor huv. Ninh luih jienv gan wuom-bamc jiex hnangv nyueih mbiauh nyei jaa-sic.
Job41:31 Ninh bun ndo nyei wuom mbueix hnangv caeng mbueix
Job41:32 Ninh jiex mingh nyei jauv nqa'haav maengx cuotv njang njapc njapc nyei
Job41:33 Yiem lungh ndiev maiv maaih haaix nyungc hnangv ninh. Ninh benx zeix cuotv nyei ga'naaiv
Job41:34 Ninh mangc nyungc-nyungc yiem hlang nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh zoux zuangx hieh zoih nyei hungh.”
Job42:1 Yopv ziouc dau Ziouv
Job42:2 “Yie hiuv duqv maanc sic meih haih zoux nyei
Job42:3 Meih naaic
Job42:4 Meih gorngv
Job42:5 Zinh ndaangc yie nyei m'normh haiz mienh gorngv taux meih
Job42:6 Weic naaiv yie youx yie ganh
Job42:7 Ziouv caux Yopv gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
Job42:8 Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc dorh siec dauh ngongh gouv caux siec dauh yungh gouv mingh taux yie nyei bou
Job42:9 Temaan Mienh
Job42:10 Yopv weic ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic daux gaux liuz
Job42:11 Yopv nyei muoz-doic caux zinh ndaangc hiuv duqv ninh wuov deix mienh yietc zungv daaih lorz ninh yaac yiem ninh nyei biauv caux ninh nyanc hnaangx. Ninh mbuo yaac weic Ziouv bun ninh zuqc orqv nyei yietc zungv zeqc naanc bun cing ninh mbuo korv-lienh ninh yaac orn ninh nyei hnyouv. Mouz dauh mienh bun norm nyaanh caux norm jiem-buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng.
Job42:12 Ziouv ceix fuqv bun Yopv setv mueiz nyei hnoi duqv gauh camv zinh ndaangc nyei hnoi-nyieqc. Ninh maaih ba'gi yungh yietc waanc biei cin dauh
Job42:13 Ninh aengx maaih siec dauh dorn
Job42:14 Ninh tengx sieqv-hlo cuotv mbuox heuc Ye^mi^maa
Job42:15 Yiem gormx wuov norm deic-bung lorz maiv duqv ndongc Yopv nyei sieqv nzueic. Yopv yaac bun ninh nyei sieqv duqv caux ninh mbuo nyei gorx
Job42:16 Nqa'haav Yopv aengx ziangh jienv yietc baeqv feix ziepc hnyangx yaac duqv buatc ninh nyei dorn caux ninh nyei fun-faqv njiec taux biei doic mienh.
Job42:17 Yopv ziangh duqv siouc nyuonh ndaauv
Psalms1:1 Maaih orn-lorqc nyei mienh se maiv muangx mienh waaic mienh nyei za'eix
Psalms1:2 Daaux nzuonx ninh a'hneiv Ziouv nyei leiz-latc
Psalms1:3 Ninh se hnangv diuh ndiangx zuangx wuov ndoqv-hlen
Psalms1:4 Mv baac mienh waaic mienh zungv maiv hnangv naaic. Ninh mbuo se hnangv mbieqv zuqc nziaaux buonc nzaanx mingh nor.
Psalms1:5 Taux siemv zuiz nyei ziangh hoc mienh waaic mienh oix zuqc Tin-Hungh dingc zuiz
Psalms1:6 Weic zuqc Ziouv ziux goux kuv mienh nyei jauv
Psalms2:1 Maanc guoqv nyei mienh weic haaix diuc faanv lunc? Maanc fingx mienh weic haaix diuc daav maiv lamh longc nyei za'eix?
Psalms2:2 Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx hungh diex dongh hnyouv caangh laangh
Psalms2:3 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms2:4 Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh zueiz jienv weic jatv ninh mbuo
Psalms2:5 Ninh qiex jiez jienv caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac
Psalms2:6 “Yie zungv liepc yie ginv daaih nyei hungh
Psalms2:7 Hungh diex gorngv
Psalms2:8 Gunv tov yie maah! Yie ziouc zorqv maanc guoqv jiu bun meih nzipc
Psalms2:9 Meih ziouc longc hlieqv-biaav mborqv ninh mbuo huv
Psalms2:10 O zuangx hungh diex aah! Hnangv naaic oix zuqc maaih cong-mengh. O gunv lungh ndiev nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc muangx naaiv deix donv nyei waac.
Psalms2:11 Oix zuqc gamh nziex jienv fu-sux Ziouv
Psalms2:12 Oix zuqc puoqv njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien. Maiv zei aeqv
Psalms3:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms3:2 Maaih mienh camv hnangv naaiv gorngv yie
Psalms3:3 Mv baac Ziouv aac
Psalms3:4 Yie heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Ninh yaac yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbong dau yie.
Psalms3:5 Yie bueix njiec m'njormh mingh
Psalms3:6 Maiv gunv maaih waanc-waanc dauh win-wangv weih gormx yie
Psalms3:7 O Ziouv aah! Daaih maah! O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Njoux yie maah! Weic zuqc meih mbaix yie nyei yietc zungv win-wangv nyei kamx-bui
Psalms3:8 Njoux en se yiem Ziouv daaih
Psalms4:1 O yie nyei baengh fim nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie heuc nyei ziangh hoc tov meih dau yie. Yie buangh zuqc kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms4:2 O meih mbuo naaiv deix mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix mangc piex bun yie zuqc nyaiv taux haaix zanc? Meih mbuo oix longc maiv lamh longc nyei waac yaac lorz gorngv-baeqc nyei jauv taux haaix zanc?
Psalms4:3 Oix zuqc hiuv duqv Ziouv ginv cuotv gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh weic ninh ganh. Yie heuc Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms4:4 Qiex jiez nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx baamz zuiz. Bueix jienv coux sekv nzieqc nyei
Psalms4:5 Oix zuqc fongc horc dongh horpc zuqc fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms4:6 Maaih mienh camv gorngv
Psalms4:7 Meih bun yie nyei hnyouv orn-lorqc gauh camv duqv mbiauh caux siang-a'ngunc diuv camv nyei mienh.
Psalms4:8 Yie oix baengh orn nyei bueix njiec m'njormh weic zuqc Ziouv aac
Psalms5:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms5:2 Yie nyei Hungh
Psalms5:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms5:4 Meih se maiv zeiz a'hneiv waaic sic nyei Tin-Hungh. Orqv mienh maiv haih caux meih yiem.
Psalms5:5 Ceng-hlo nyei mienh maiv duqv souv meih nyei nza'hmien. Da'faanh zoux orqv nyei mienh meih nzorng haic.
Psalms5:6 Meih mietc nzengc gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh. Daix mienh nyei mienh caux nduov mienh nyei mienh
Psalms5:7 Mv baac yie ganh aeqv
Psalms5:8 O Ziouv aac
Psalms5:9 Win-wangv nyei nzuih maiv maaih zien waac. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv kungx oix zoux mietc. Ninh mbuo nyei jaang-hoh hnangv wetv tong nyei janx-daic zouv nor
Psalms5:10 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz
Psalms5:11 Mv baac da'faanh kaux meih wuov deix oix zuqc orn-lorqc
Psalms5:12 O Ziouv aac
Psalms6:1 O Ziouv aah! Tov maiv dungx nouz jienv gorngv-hemx yie. Maiv dungx qiex jiez jienv dingc yie nyei zuiz.
Psalms6:2 O Ziouv aac
Psalms6:3 Yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh kouv haic. O Ziouv aac
Psalms6:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms6:5 Mienh daic mingh
Psalms6:6 Yie njunh jienv yiem
Psalms6:7 Nzauh gau
Psalms6:8 Meih mbuo yietc zungv zoux orqv nyei mienh aah! Biaux nqoi yie
Psalms6:9 Ziouv muangx haiz yie jouh nyei waac
Psalms6:10 Yie nyei yietc zungv win-wangv oix zuqc nyaiv
Psalms7:1 O Ziouv
Psalms7:2 Nziex ninh mbuo hnangv sienh nor betv yie
Psalms7:3 O Ziouv
Psalms7:4 se gorngv yie zoux waaic bun caux yie horpc nyei mienh
Psalms7:5 tov bun win-wangv zunc zaaic yie
Psalms7:6 O Ziouv aac
Psalms7:7 Tov bun maanc fingx gapv zunv weih gormx meih
Psalms7:8 Ziouv siemv maanc fingx. O Ziouv aac
Psalms7:9 Meih se zoux horpc nyei Tin-Hungh. Meih zaah mienh nyei hnyouv caux eix. Tov bun zoux orqv nyei mienh nyei jauv dangx
Psalms7:10 Tin-Hungh se yie nyei torngv-baaih beu jienv yie
Psalms7:11 Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei siemv zuiz jien
Psalms7:12 Se gorngv haaix dauh maiv goiv hnyouv
Psalms7:13 Ninh mbenc ziangx daix mienh nyei wuoqc ginc
Psalms7:14 Orqv mienh kungx hnamv cuotv orqv sic
Psalms7:15 Ninh wetv ziangx kuotv
Psalms7:16 Ninh zoux nyei waaic sic daaux nzuonx daaih hoic ninh ganh. Ninh zoux doqc nyei sic kungx ndortv zuqc ninh ganh hnangv.
Psalms7:17 Yie oix dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh baengh fim nyei. Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv
Psalms8:1 O Ziouv
Psalms8:2 Fu'jueiv caux gu'nguaaz heuc jienv ceng Ziouv. Laaix meih nyei win-wangv meih liepc dorngx wuonv nyei
Psalms8:3 Yie cau hmien mangc lungh
Psalms8:4 Meih funx baamh mienh benx haaix nyungc cingx jangx taux ninh? Funx seix zaangc mienh benx haaix nyungc cingx daaih goux ninh?
Psalms8:5 Meih bun ninh zoux gauh aiv deix meih ganh
Psalms8:6 Meih paaiv ninh gunv meih nyei buoz zeix daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc
Psalms8:7 se gunv yietc zungv ngongh caux yungh
Psalms8:8 yiem ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc
Psalms8:9 O Ziouv
Psalms9:1 Yie oix longc nzengc hnyouv dor-ziec Ziouv
Psalms9:2 Yie oix weic meih a'hneiv njien-youh. O Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh aac
Psalms9:3 Yie nyei win-wangv daaux sin tuix nzuonx nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms9:4 Meih zueiz jienv siemv zuiz nyei weic baengh fim nyei siemv
Psalms9:5 Meih hemx ganh fingx mienh
Psalms9:6 Win-wangv zuqc baaic zuqc mbaang taux yietc liuz
Psalms9:7 Mv baac Ziouv yietc liuz zueiz jienv ninh nyei weic gunv
Psalms9:8 Ninh baengh fim nyei siemv lungh ndiev mienh
Psalms9:9 Ziouv zoux wuonv nyei dorngx bun zuqc zeix zuqc hoic nyei mienh kaux
Psalms9:10 O Ziouv aac
Psalms9:11 Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng yiem Si^on nyei Ziouv
Psalms9:12 Weic zuqc ninh zoux jaauv mienh maengc win wuov dauh
Psalms9:13 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih korv-lienh yie. Tov meih mangc nzorng yie wuov deix mienh bun yie zuqc nyei kouv naanc. Se meih njoux yie yiem zuqc daic nyei gaengh cuotv daaih
Psalms9:14 weic bun yie yiem Si^on nyei zingh gaengh
Psalms9:15 Maanc fingx mienh ndortv njiec ninh mbuo ganh wetv nyei kuotv. Ninh mbuo nyei zaux yaac zuqc ninh mbuo ganh zaeng nyei mungz nzenc jienv.
Psalms9:16 Ziouv bun mienh hiuv duqv ninh ganh
Psalms9:17 Orqv mienh
Psalms9:18 Ninh maiv zeiz yietc liuz la'kuqv dangx-donx nyei mienh. Mienh jomc mienh maiv zeiz yietc liuz maiv lamh hnamv dorngx.
Psalms9:19 O Ziouv aah! Daaih maah! Maiv dungx bun baamh mienh duqv hingh. Tov bun maanc fingx yiem meih nyei nza'hmien zuqc siemv.
Psalms9:20 O Ziouv aah! Tov bun ninh mbuo gamh nziex. Tov bun maanc fingx zieqv duqv ninh mbuo benx baamh mienh hnangv.
Psalms10:1 Ziouv aah! Meih weic haaix diuc leih yie mbuo ndongc naaiv go? Yie mbuo zuqc kouv naanc meih weic haaix diuc bingx?
Psalms10:2 Orqv mienh zoux maux zeix mienh jomc mienh. Tov bun ninh mbuo daav cuotv nyei za'eix hoic zuqc ninh mbuo ganh.
Psalms10:3 Orqv mienh ceng ganh hnyouv hanc zoux nyei sic
Psalms10:4 Mienh waaic mienh hnyouv maux ziouc maiv lorz ninh. Orqv mienh kungx hnamv maiv maaih Tin-Hungh.
Psalms10:5 Orqv mienh zoux nyei jauv zanc-zanc duqv longx
Psalms10:6 Ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv
Psalms10:7 Zioux mienh
Psalms10:8 Ninh yiem laangz gu'nyuoz mbueiz nyei dorngx
Psalms10:9 Ninh bingx jienv yiem mbueiz nyei dorngx
Psalms10:10 Maiv maaih dorngx kaux nyei mienh zuqc zatv njiec
Psalms10:11 Orqv mienh yiem hnyouv hnamv
Psalms10:12 O Ziouv aah! Daaih maah! Tov meih sung buoz tengx
Psalms10:13 Orqv mienh weic haaix diuc nqemh Tin-Hungh? Orqv mienh yiem hnyouv hnamv
Psalms10:14 Mv baac meih buatc nyei
Psalms10:15 Tov meih wuotv mienh waaic mienh caux orqv mienh nyei buoz nauv. Tov wetv cuotv ninh nyei waaic sic taux maiv maaih yietc deix.
Psalms10:16 Ziouv yietc liuz zoux hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Maanc fingx mienh yiem ninh nyei ndau-beih zuqc mietc nzengc.
Psalms10:17 O Ziouv aac
Psalms10:18 weic bun guh hanh fu'jueiv caux zuqc zeix wuov deix duqv baengh fim
Psalms11:1 Yie ndaauh kaux Ziouv
Psalms11:2 Mangc maah! Orqv mienh baeng juang-zinx
Psalms11:3 Se gorngv gorn-ndoqv zuqc baaic waaic
Psalms11:4 Ziouv yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc biauv gu'nyuoz
Psalms11:5 Ziouv kauv kuv mienh caux orqv mienh
Psalms11:6 Ninh oix zorqv zieqc jienv nyei douz-taanx caux hungh bungx njiec mienh waaic mienh gu'nguaaic
Psalms11:7 Weic zuqc Ziouv zoux duqv horpc
Psalms12:1 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih tengx yie mbuo
Psalms12:2 Dauh dauh gorngv-baeqc nduov ganh nyei juangc laangz mienh. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv waac mbiaangc ceng mienh
Psalms12:3 Tov Ziouv gaatv guangc ceng weic nduov mienh a'hneiv nyei yietc zungv nzuih meix caux bungx waac-maux
Psalms12:4 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms12:5 Ziouv gorngv
Psalms12:6 Ziouv nyei waac se cing-nzengc nyei waac
Psalms12:7 O Ziouv aac
Psalms12:8 Baamh mienh ceng orqv nyei
Psalms13:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms13:2 Yie oix zuqc yiem hnyouv diev mun ndongc haaix lauh? Yie nyei hnyouv oix zuqc nzauh taux haaix zanc? Yie nyei win-wangv oix hingh jiex yie taux haaix zanc?
Psalms13:3 O Ziouv
Psalms13:4 Nziex yie nyei win-wangv gorngv
Psalms13:5 Mv baac yie kaux meih weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie. Yie nyei hnyouv weic meih nyei njoux en orn-lorqc haic.
Psalms13:6 Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv
Psalms14:1 Mienh hngongx mienh yiem hnyouv gorngv
Psalms14:2 Ziouv yiem tin-dorngh mangc njiec
Psalms14:3 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv yangh pien jauv
Psalms14:4 Yietc zungv zoux orqv nyei mienh maiv hiuv haaix nyungc fai? Ninh mbuo naqv yie nyei baeqc fingx hnangv ninh mbuo nyanc hnaangx. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv tov Ziouv.
Psalms14:5 Mv baac ninh mbuo yiem wuov gengh! gamh nziex haic
Psalms14:6 Meih mbuo zoux orqv nyei mienh oix bun mienh jomc mienh nyei za'eix ndortv
Psalms14:7 Tov bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei njoux en yiem Si^on cuotv daaih. Ziouv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov zanc
Psalms15:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms15:2 Dongh yiem seix zaangc zoux nyei sic maiv maaih dorngx daanh wuov dauh. Ninh haaix zanc yaac kungx zoux horpc hnangv. Ninh hnyouv zingx gorngv zien waac nyei mienh.
Psalms15:3 Ninh maiv longc ninh nyei mbietc gorngv doqc mienh
Psalms15:4 Ninh mangc piex waaic haic
Psalms15:5 Ninh bungx zaeqv
Psalms16:1 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms16:2 Yie gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Psalms16:3 Yiem baamh gen nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx
Psalms16:4 Ginv gan nyiec nyei zienh wuov deix jaa nzauh camv. Ninh mbuo dox ziec zienh nyei nziaamv
Psalms16:5 Ziouv se yie nzipc nyei buonc
Psalms16:6 Longc hlaang ndorqc bun yie nyei gapv-jaaix ndortv zuqc kuh yiem nyei dorngx. Yie duqv nzipc longx haic nyei buonc.
Psalms16:7 Yie oix ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh dorh yie. Lungh muonz zanc yie nyei hnyouv yaac njaaux yie.
Psalms16:8 Yie zanc-zanc bun Ziouv yiem yie nyei nza'hmien. Weic zuqc ninh yiem yie nyei mbiaauc maengx maiv maaih haaix nyungc ging-dongz yie.
Psalms16:9 Weic naaiv yie nyei hnyouv njien-youh a'hneiv haic. Yie nyei sin yaac yiem duqv wuonv nyei
Psalms16:10 weic zuqc meih maiv guangc yie yiem yiemh gen
Psalms16:11 Meih oix bun yie hiuv duqv ziangh maengc nyei jauv. Yiem meih nyei nza'hmien meih bun yie maaih njien-youh taux daauh. Yiem meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz maaih yietc liuz nyei orn-lorqc.
Psalms17:1 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih muangx haiz yie tov baengh fim nyei jauv. Tov muangx yie heuc jienv gorngv. Baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac
Psalms17:2 Tov meih bun cing yie se maiv dorngc
Psalms17:3 Meih zungv kauv yie nyei hnyouv
Psalms17:4 Gorngv taux mienh zoux nyei sic
Psalms17:5 Yie nyei zaux-mbiec kungx gan meih nyei jauv mingh
Psalms17:6 O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie jouh meih weic zuqc meih zungv oix dau yie. Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie nyei waac.
Psalms17:7 Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Psalms17:8 Tov beu yie hnangv beu meih nyei m'zing-mienh nor
Psalms17:9 bun yie biaux ndutv zeix yie wuov deix orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev caux weih gormx oix hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix win-wangv.
Psalms17:10 Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv korv-lienh mienh
Psalms17:11 Ninh mbuo zimh jienv yie mingh
Psalms17:12 Ninh mbuo hnangv sienh nor
Psalms17:13 Ziouv aah! Tov daaih caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax
Psalms17:14 O Ziouv aah! Tov longc meih nyei buoz njoux yie leih ndutv dongh yiem naaiv seix zaangc duqv liuz ninh mbuo nyei buonc nyei mienh. Tov bun dongh meih weic ninh mbuo siou daaih nyei buangv ninh mbuo nyei ga'sie. Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv duqv gaux nzengc. Zengc njiec wuov deix liouh njiec bun ninh mbuo nyei fu'jueiv.
Psalms17:15 Mv baac yie ganh zoux duqv horpc ziouc duqv buatc meih nyei hmien. Yie nyie daaih nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms18:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms18:2 Ziouv zoux yie nyei la'bieiv
Psalms18:3 Yie heuc Ziouv
Psalms18:4 Maaih haih daic nyei qaqv hnangv hlaang nzenc jienv yie
Psalms18:5 Yiemh gen nyei hlaang nzenc jienv yie
Psalms18:6 Zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc yie heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Yie heuc jienv tov yie nyei Tin-Hungh tengx. Ninh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gu'nyuoz muangx haiz yie nyei qiex. Yie heuc jienv ninh nyei qiex bieqc taux ninh nyei m'normh.
Psalms18:7 Wuov zanc ndau-beih zuqc mbungh mbungh mbienv-mbienv nyei
Psalms18:8 Douz-sioux yangh ninh nyei mba'zorng cuotv. Ninh nyei nzuih cuotv haih buov qui nyei douz
Psalms18:9 Ninh bun lungh nqoi ziouc njiec daaih
Psalms18:10 Ninh geh ke^lu^mbim ndaix mingh
Psalms18:11 Ninh bun hmuangx om ninh nyei sin
Psalms18:12 Yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien nyei njang
Psalms18:13 Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv cuotv hnangv mba'ong mbui. Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh heuc cuotv ziouc maaih borqc caux zieqc jienv douz nyei douz-taanx.
Psalms18:14 Ninh buonv cuotv ninh nyei forng-cang zoux bun win-wangv nzaanx. Ninh borngz mba'lingc njapc njapc nyei
Psalms18:15 O Ziouv aac
Psalms18:16 Ninh yiem gu'nguaaic hlang nyei dorngx sung buoz zorqv yie
Psalms18:17 Ninh njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei henv haic nyei win-wangv caux nzorng yie wuov deix mienh
Psalms18:18 Yie zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc ninh mbuo daaih hoic yie
Psalms18:19 Ninh dorh yie cuotv daaih taux norm jangv nyei dorngx. Ninh njoux yie weic zuqc ninh a'hneiv yie.
Psalms18:20 Ziux yie zoux duqv horpc
Psalms18:21 Weic zuqc yie gan nzengc Ziouv nyei doz yie maiv zoux waaic ngaengc yie nyei Tin-Hungh.
Psalms18:22 Ninh nyei yietc zungv leiz yiem yie nyei nza'hmien
Psalms18:23 Yie yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien maiv maaih dorngc nyei dorngx. Yie yaac goux longx ganh
Psalms18:24 Weic naaiv
Psalms18:25 Weic ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh meih ziepc zuoqv nyei daaix ninh mbuo. Weic maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh
Psalms18:26 Weic cing-nzengc wuov deix
Psalms18:27 Meih njoux nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms18:28 Meih diemv zieqc yie nyei dang. Ziouv
Psalms18:29 Yie bangc meih ziouc haih mborqv duqv jun-baeng. Yie kaux yie nyei Tin-Hungh haih biu jiex zingh laatc.
Psalms18:30 Naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh
Psalms18:31 Cuotv liuz Ziouv
Psalms18:32 Naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh bun yie maaih qaqv yaac bun yie nyei jauv baengh orn.
Psalms18:33 Ninh bun yie nyei zaux hnangv njaih nyeiz nyei deih nor caaiv duqv jienv
Psalms18:34 Ninh njaaux yie hoqc linc mborqv jaax
Psalms18:35 Meih bun meih nyei njoux en weic zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih. Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz baav jienv yie. Meih tengx yie
Psalms18:36 Meih bun yie nyei zaux caaiv nyei dorngx jangv
Psalms18:37 Yie zunc yie nyei win-wangv yaac zunc zaaic ninh mbuo. Yie maiv daaux sin nzuonx taux ninh mbuo zuqc baaic nzengc.
Psalms18:38 Yie mborqv ninh mbuo
Psalms18:39 Weic zuqc meih bun yie maaih qaqv mborqv jaax
Psalms18:40 Meih yaac bun yie nyei win-wangv huin nqaang biaux. Yie duqv mietc nzengc nzorng yie wuov deix.
Psalms18:41 Ninh mbuo heuc jienv tov tengx
Psalms18:42 Yie mborqv ninh mbuo muonc hnangv nziaaux buonc nyei nie-mbung. Yie zorqv ninh mbuo zoi guangc hnangv jauv zaangc nyei wuom-bamc ndorngh nor.
Psalms18:43 Meih njoux yie biaux ndutv
Psalms18:44 Ninh mbuo yietv muangx haiz yie nyei mengh dauh ninh mbuo muangx yie. Ganh fingx mienh daaih mbaapv njiec yie nyei nza'hmien.
Psalms18:45 Ganh fingx mienh hnyouv mau nzengc
Psalms18:46 Ziouv ziangh jienv. Oix zuqc ceng yie nyei La'bieiv. Oix zuqc taaih yie nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms18:47 Se naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh tengx yie jaauv win
Psalms18:48 Ninh njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv
Psalms18:49 O Ziouv aac
Psalms18:50 Ninh ceix hlo haic nyei njoux en bun ninh nyei hungh diex
Psalms19:1 Lungh zunh yaangh Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc
Psalms19:2 Yietc hnoi zunh mbuox jiex yietc hnoi
Psalms19:3 Mouc nyinh mouc waac
Psalms19:4 mv baac ninh nyei fienx mingh gormx baamh gen
Psalms19:5 Mba'hnoi cuotv daaih hnangv siang-laangh yiem ninh nyei gen cuotv. Yaac hnangv saaix tiux nyei mienh henv mienh njien-youh nyei gan saaix nyei jauv mingh.
Psalms19:6 Mba'hnoi yiem naaiv bung lungh cuotv daaih
Psalms19:7 Ziouv nyei leiz-latc se dunh yunh nyei
Psalms19:8 Ziouv hatc nyei waac horpc nyei
Psalms19:9 Mienh taaih Ziouv se longx haic
Psalms19:10 Se gauh jaaix jiex jiem
Psalms19:11 Naaiv deix leiz-latc kuinx meih nyei bou. Mienh ei jienv naaiv deix waac zoux ziouc maaih domh zingh nyeic.
Psalms19:12 Haaix dauh haih zieqv duqv ganh zoux dorngc nyei jauv? Tov guangc nqoi yie zoux dorngc
Psalms19:13 Tov dangv jienv bun meih nyei bou maiv dungx duqv-eix baamz zuiz. Maiv dungx bun naaiv deix zuiz gunv yie. Hnangv naaic yie ziouc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh
Psalms19:14 O Ziouv aac
Psalms20:1 Meih buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc tov Ziouv dau
Psalms20:2 Tov ninh yiem singx dinc tengx meih
Psalms20:3 Tov ninh jangx meih fongc horc nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv
Psalms20:4 Tov ninh bun meih duqv ziux meih nyei hnyouv oix nyei
Psalms20:5 Yie mbuo ziouc njien-youh nyei heuc weic meih hingh jiex
Psalms20:6 Ih zanc yie hiuv duqv Ziouv oix tengx ninh longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh. Ninh oix yiem ninh cing-nzengc nyei tin-dorngh dau. Ninh longc ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz nyei domh qaqv tengx hingh jiex.
Psalms20:7 Maaih deix kaux ninh mbuo nyei mborqv jaax cie
Psalms20:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc ndorpc
Psalms20:9 O Ziouv aac
Psalms21:1 Ziouv aac
Psalms21:2 Ziux ninh nyei hnyouv oix nyei meih ceix bun ninh. Ziux ninh nyei nzuih tov nyei waac meih yaac dau.
Psalms21:3 Meih ceix longx haic nyei fuqv bun ninh
Psalms21:4 Ninh tov meih bun ninh maaih siouc nyuonh
Psalms21:5 Weic meih tengx ninh
Psalms21:6 Meih bun ninh maaih fuqv taux yietc liuz
Psalms21:7 Hungh diex sienx kaux Ziouv
Psalms21:8 Meih nyei buoz oix lorz buatc meih nyei yietc zungv win-wangv. Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz haih lorz buatc nzorng meih nyei mienh.
Psalms21:9 Meih hinc cuotv nyei ziangh hoc meih ziouc bun ninh mbuo hnangv jorm haic nyei douz-louh. Ziouv nouz ninh mbuo ziouc oix naqv ninh mbuo. Douz yaac oix buov ninh mbuo qui nzengc.
Psalms21:10 Meih ziouc bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun yiem lungh ndiev zutc nzengc
Psalms21:11 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo daav za'eix hoic meih
Psalms21:12 Weic zuqc meih baeng meih nyei juang-zinx hungx jienv ninh mbuo nyei hmien
Psalms21:13 O Ziouv aac
Psalms22:1 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie nyei Tin-Hungh! Meih weic haaix diuc guangc yie? Meih weic haaix diuc leih go
Psalms22:2 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Lungh hnoi zanc yie heuc
Psalms22:3 Mv baac meih zueiz weic benx Cing-Nzengc Wuov Dauh. Meih se I^saa^laa^en Mienh ceng wuov dauh.
Psalms22:4 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix kaux meih
Psalms22:5 Ninh mbuo heuc meih
Psalms22:6 Mv baac yie se hnangv norm gaeng-mau
Psalms22:7 Da'faanh buatc yie nyei mienh jatv yie
Psalms22:8 “Ninh kaux Ziouv
Psalms22:9 Se dongh meih bun yie yiem maa nyei ga'sie cuotv seix
Psalms22:10 Yiem yie cuotv seix daaih yie kaux meih. Yiem yie nyei maa yungz yie daaih
Psalms22:11 Tov meih maiv dungx leih go yie
Psalms22:12 Win-wangv camv hnangv ngongh gouv nor weih gormx yie
Psalms22:13 Ninh mbuo se hnangv njunh jienv nyei sienh morngx nzuih baengx oix betv yie.
Psalms22:14 Yie zuqc dox cuotv hnangv wuom nor. Yie nyei yietc zungv mbungv-daaux piatv nzengc. Yie nyei mba'nziu se hnangv mueiz-nzing
Psalms22:15 Yie nyei qaqv nqaai nzengc hnangv hlengx nie-mor-huv nor
Psalms22:16 Maaih guanh orqv mienh huing jienv yie
Psalms22:17 Yie nyei mbungv yie zungv haih saauv nzengc
Psalms22:18 Ninh mbuo bun nqoi yie nyei lui-houx
Psalms22:19 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih maiv dungx leih go yie. Tengx yie wuov dauh Ziouv aah! Siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie.
Psalms22:20 Tov njoux yie nyei maengc biaux ndutv nzuqc ndaauv. Tov njoux yie nyei maengc leih ndutv naaiv deix juv.
Psalms22:21 Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv sienh nyei nzuih baengx
Psalms22:22 Yie oix zunh meih nyei mengh mbuox yie nyei gorx-youz. Yie oix yiem gapv zunv nyei wuic mbu'ndongx ceng meih.
Psalms22:23 Gamh nziex Ziouv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng ninh. Yaakopv nyei zuangx zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc taaih ninh. I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc zungv hoz doic zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc gamh nziex ninh.
Psalms22:24 Weic zuqc ninh maiv mangc piex yaac maiv youx siouc kouv nyei mienh zuqc siouc nyei kouv naanc. Ninh maiv buang jienv hmien maiv mangc ninh mbuo
Psalms22:25 Yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei dorngx yie ceng nyei waac yiem meih daaih. Yiem taaih meih nyei mienh nyei nza'hmien yie oix jaauv sung yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac.
Psalms22:26 Mienh jomc mienh duqv nyanc beuv. Haaix dauh lorz Ziouv zungv oix ceng ninh. Tov bun meih mbuo yietc liuz ziangh jienv.
Psalms22:27 Jomc lungh ndiev norm-norm dorngx nyei mienh oix jangx Ziouv ziouc huin nzuonx daaih lorz ninh. Maanc guoqv nyei maanc fingx oix yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien baaix ninh.
Psalms22:28 Ziouv maaih hungh lingc
Psalms22:29 Yiem lungh ndiev zoux maux nyei mienh oix yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec baaix. Da'faanh nzuonx benx nie-mbung nyei mienh
Psalms22:30 Doic-doic zeiv-fun oix fu-sux ninh. Mienh oix zorqv Ziouv nyei sic gorngv mbuox hoz doic mienh.
Psalms22:31 Ninh mbuo oix zunh ninh zoux baengh fim nyei jauv mbuox maiv gaengh cuotv seix nyei mienh
Psalms23:1 Ziouv goux yie hnangv goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh goux ninh nyei ba'gi yungh nor
Psalms23:2 Ninh bun yie bueix njiec miev nyiemz nyei dorngx
Psalms23:3 Ninh bun yie nyei hnyouv fingv jiez daaih. Weic ninh ganh nyei mbuox ninh yienz yie yangh zoux horpc nyei jauv.
Psalms23:4 Maiv gunv yie yangh zuqc daic nyei dongh linh
Psalms23:5 Meih yiem yie nyei win-wangv nyei nza'hmien meih mbenc nyanc hopv bun yie. Meih longc youh hietv yie nyei m'nqorngv
Psalms23:6 Yie hiuv dingc Ziouv yietc seix korv-lienh yaac zoux longx bun yie. Yie yaac duqv yiem Ziouv nyei biauv taux maanc gouv maanc doic.
Psalms24:1 Ndau-beih caux yiem ndau-beih nyei maanc muotc benx Ziouv nyei. Lungh ndiev caux lungh ndiev nyei maanc mienh yaac ninh nyei.
Psalms24:2 Ninh ceix baamh gen jiez daaih yiem koiv gu'nguaaic
Psalms24:3 Haaix dauh maaih leiz faaux Ziouv nyei mbong? Haaix dauh haih souv jienv yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc dorngx?
Psalms24:4 Se dongh zoux nyei sic caux hnamv nyei jauv cing-nzengc nyei mienh
Psalms24:5 Ninh oix duqv Ziouv ceix fuqv. Njoux ninh wuov dauh Tin-Hungh yaac oix bun cing ninh zoux duqv horpc.
Psalms24:6 Se dongh naaiv nyungc mienh daaih lorz ninh
Psalms24:7 Koi nqoi laatc gaengh maah! Koi nqoi loz-hnoi nyei gaengh. Maaih njang-laangc nyei Hungh oix bieqc daaih.
Psalms24:8 Naaiv dauh njang-laangc nyei Hungh dongh haaix dauh? Se dongh maaih qaqv henv haic nyei Ziouv
Psalms24:9 Koi nqoi laatc gaengh maah! Koi nqoi loz-hnoi nyei gaengh. Maaih njang-laangc nyei Hungh oix bieqc daaih.
Psalms24:10 Naaiv dauh njang-laangc nyei Hungh dongh haaix dauh? Se Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv. Dongh naaiv dauh zoux njang-laangc nyei Hungh.

Psalms25:2 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac

Psalms25:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms25:5 Tov meih dorh yie gan meih nyei zien leiz yaac njaaux yie
Psalms25:6 O Ziouv aac
Psalms25:7 Maiv dungx jangx yie lunx nyei ziangh hoc zoux dorngc
Psalms25:8 Ziouv se longx nyei
Psalms25:9 Ninh dorh nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh zoux horpc nyei sic
Psalms25:10 Da'faanh ei jienv Ziouv nyei ngaengc waac caux ninh gorngv nyei waac nyei mienh ninh hnamv yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei dorh.
Psalms25:11 O Ziouv aah! Weic meih ganh nyei mengh tov guangc yie nyei zuiz
Psalms25:12 Haaix dauh taaih Ziouv
Psalms25:13 Yiem ninh nyei seix zeiv ninh duqv siouc fuqv-loqc
Psalms25:14 Ziouv caux taaih ninh wuov deix zoux doic. Ninh bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac.
Psalms25:15 Yie nyei m'zing zanc-zanc mangc Ziouv
Psalms25:16 Tov meih huin nzuonx daaih mangc yie
Psalms25:17 Yie nyei hnyouv nzauh duqv kouv haic. Tov tengx yie biaux ndutv yie nyei kouv naanc.
Psalms25:18 Tov meih tengx corngh yie nyei kouv naanc caux naanc zingh
Psalms25:19 Tov meih hnamv mangc gaax
Psalms25:20 Tov meih beu jienv yie nyei maengc aengx njoux yie
Psalms25:21 Meih hnyouv zaqc hnyouv zingx nyei ziouc tov meih beu jienv yie
Psalms25:22 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih njoux I^saa^laa^en mienh biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc.

Psalms26:2 O Ziouv aac

Psalms26:8 O Ziouv aac

Psalms26:10 Ninh mbuo nyei buoz zanc-zanc zoux orqv sic. Ninh mbuo nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz kungx nzuiz nyaanh hmuangx hnangv.

Psalms26:12 Yie nyei zaux souv jienv ndau-baengh nyei dorngx
Psalms27:1 Ziouv zoux yie nyei njang caux njoux yie wuov dauh

Psalms27:3 Maiv gunv maaih jun-baeng daaih weih gormx yie

Psalms27:5 Yie zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc ninh oix beu jienv yie yiem ninh ganh nyei dorngx. Se zorqv yie bingx jienv yiem ninh nyei ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz
Psalms27:6 Ih zanc yie oix cau jiez m'nqorngv

Psalms27:14 Oix zuqc zuov Ziouv
Psalms28:1 O Ziouv aah! Yie heuc jienv meih
Psalms28:2 Tov muangx haiz yie daux gaux heuc jienv tov meih tengx
Psalms28:3 Tov maiv dungx zorqv yie caux mienh waaic mienh caux zoux orqv nyei mienh yietc njiec dingc zuiz. Ninh mbuo caux juangc laangz mienh gorngv baengh orn nyei waac
Psalms28:4 Tov meih ei ninh mbuo zoux nyei jauv

Psalms28:6 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv

Psalms28:9 Tov njoux meih nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms29:1 Yiem lungh nyei zuangx fin-mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei njang-laangc caux qaqv.
Psalms29:2 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv puix ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox. Oix zuqc zaangc Ziouv weic ninh cing-nzengc nyei mbuox njang-laangc haic.
Psalms29:3 Ziouv nyei sing-qiex yiem wuov koiv gu'nguaaic. Njang-laangc nyei Tin-Hungh nyei qiex mbui hnangv mba'ong mbui nor
Psalms29:4 Ziouv nyei sing-qiex maaih domh qaqv
Psalms29:5 Ziouv nyei qiex wuotv nauv si^ndaa zongh ndiangx. Ziouv wuotv nauv Le^mbaa^norn nyei si^ndaa zongh ndiangx.
Psalms29:6 Ninh bun Le^mbaa^norn Geh dongz hnangv ngongh dorn ndiuh lungh
Psalms29:7 Ziouv nyei sing-qiex njopc cuotv benx douz-mbietc.
Psalms29:8 Ziouv nyei sing-qiex ndanc dongz deic-bung-huaang. Ziouv nqamv dongz Kaa^ndetc nyei deic-bung-huaang.
Psalms29:9 Ziouv nyei qiex ndanc domh mba'ong zuei ndiangx
Psalms29:10 Ziouv zueiz jienv weic gunv mbiungc-suiv-imx. Ziouv zueiz jienv weic
Psalms29:11 Tov Ziouv ceix qaqv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx. Tov Ziouv ceix fuqv bun ninh nyei mienh duqv baengh orn.

Psalms31:1 Ziouv aac

Psalms31:4 Tov bun yie biaux ndutv mienh weic yie zaeng nyei mungz
Psalms31:5 Yie zorqv yie nyei lingh wuonh jiu bun yiem meih nyei buoz gu'nyuoz. O Ziouv
Psalms31:6 Meih nzorng haic baaix maiv lamh longc nyei miuc-fangx wuov deix
Psalms31:7 Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie
Psalms31:8 Meih yaac maiv zorqv yie jiu bun yiem win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev. Meih bun yie nyei zaux caaiv jienv jangv nyei dorngx.

Psalms31:17 O Ziouv aac
Psalms31:18 Tov bun gorngv-baeqc mienh nyei nzuih
Psalms31:19 Meih za'gengh longx haic. Meih siou longx nyei ga'naaiv yaac bungx-zuoqc
Psalms31:20 Meih dorh ninh mbuo bingx jienv meih nyei nza'hmien mbueiz nyei dorngx
