Psalms31:24 Da'faanh zuov jienv Ziouv nyei mienh oix zuqc henv
Psalms32:1 Haaix dauh zoux dorngc zuiz mv baac duqv Tin-Hungh guangc nqoi
Psalms32:2 Ziouv funx maiv maaih zuiz nyei mienh
Psalms32:3 Yie nyienz jienv maiv nyiemc yie nyei zuiz wuov zanc
Psalms32:4 Meih nyei buoz ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz ngatv jienv yie
Psalms32:5 Yie ziouc nyiemc yie nyei zuiz bun meih aqv. Yie maiv bingx yie zoux dorngc nyei sic. Yie gorngv
Psalms32:6 Tov bun gan longx meih wuov deix mienh dorng jienv meih daux gaux. Doix zuqc buangh kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms32:7 Meih zoux yie bingx nyei dorngx. Meih beu jienv yie leih ndutv kouv naanc
Psalms32:8 Yie oix njaaux meih
Psalms32:9 Maiv dungx zoux hnangv maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei lorh maaz. Oix zuqc longc hlieqv fapv jienv nzuih
Psalms32:10 Orqv mienh zuqc siouc kouv camv
Psalms32:11 Meih mbuo kuv mienh aah! Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv njien-youh orn-lorqc. Meih mbuo hnyouv zingx nyei zuangx mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc mbui.
Psalms33:1 Kuv mienh aah! Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv orn-lorqc. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh horpc zuqc ceng ninh.
Psalms33:2 Oix zuqc patv daanh baah ceng Ziouv
Psalms33:3 Dorng jienv ninh baaux diuh siang-nzung
Psalms33:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv nyei waac se zien nyei
Psalms33:5 Haaix nyungc horpc nyei
Psalms33:6 Ziouv longc ninh nyei waac zeix cuotv lungh
Psalms33:7 Ninh zorqv koiv nyei wuom siou zunv hnangv dapv gingx-baengh
Psalms33:8 Tov bun gormx lungh ndiev taaih Ziouv. Tov bun lungh ndiev mienh gamh nziex ninh.
Psalms33:9 Weic zuqc ninh yietv gorngv
Psalms33:10 Ziouv bun zuangx fingx caangh laangh nyei jauv maiv lamh longc
Psalms33:11 Ziouv caangh laangh nyei waac yietc liuz yiem
Psalms33:12 Maaih Ziouv zoux ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh wuov norm guoqv nyei mienh maaih orn-lorqc. Se ninh ginv daaih zoux ninh ganh nzipc nyei wuov deix baeqc fingx maaih orn-lorqc.
Psalms33:13 Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh mangc njiec
Psalms33:14 Ninh yiem ninh zueiz nyei weic mangc njiec lungh ndiev maanc mienh yietc zungv.
Psalms33:15 Ninh se zeix ziangx ninh mbuo zuangx mienh nyei hnyouv
Psalms33:16 Hungh diex maiv zeiz weic kaux baeng camv duqv hingh. Mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng maiv zeiz weic qaqv hlo duqv njoux.
Psalms33:17 Kaux mborqv jaax nyei maaz weic hingh jiex se maiv lamh hnamv aqv. Maiv gunv maaz nyei qaqv hlo
Psalms33:18 Mv baac Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc jienv gamh nziex ninh
Psalms33:19 Ninh oix njoux ninh mbuo
Psalms33:20 Yie mbuo nyei hnyouv maaih lamh hnamv zuov jienv Ziouv. Ninh tengx mbuo yaac zoux mbuo nyei torngv-baaih.
Psalms33:21 Yie mbuo nyei hnyouv zungv kaux ninh njien-youh
Psalms33:22 Ziouv aac
Psalms34:1 Yie maiv dingh liouh nyei oix ceng Ziouv. Ceng ninh nyei waac zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei nzuih.
Psalms34:2 Yie nyei hnyouv oix weic Ziouv bungx waac-maux
Psalms34:3 Tov caux yie ceng Ziouv weih hlo. Tov bun mbuo lomh nzoih taaih ninh nyei mengh.
Psalms34:4 Yie daux gaux tov Ziouv
Psalms34:5 Zuqc zeix nyei mienh mangc jienv ninh
Psalms34:6 Naaiv dauh mienh jomc mienh heuc jienv tov
Psalms34:7 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh beu jienv taaih Ziouv nyei mienh yaac njoux ninh mbuo.
Psalms34:8 Gunv seix mueix ziouc hiuv duqv Ziouv se longx haic. Ndaauh kaux ninh nyei mienh maaih orn-lorqc.
Psalms34:9 Ziouv nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx aah! Oix zuqc taaih ninh
Psalms34:10 Liemh sienh lunx haih dangx haih ngorc nyanc nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms34:11 Yie nyei naamh nyouz aac
Psalms34:12 Haaix dauh baamh mienh oix ziangh jienv
Psalms34:13 Oix zuqc faix fim
Psalms34:14 Orqv nyei oix zuqc simv nqoi
Psalms34:15 Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc jienv kuv mienh. Ninh nyei m'normh yaac muangx ninh mbuo heuc jienv tov nyei waac.
Psalms34:16 Ziouv ngaengc jienv zoux orqv nyei mienh
Psalms34:17 Kuv mienh heuc jienv tov
Psalms34:18 Ziouv yiem nitv fatv hnyouv mun nyei mienh
Psalms34:19 Kuv mienh buangh kuonx naanh camv nyei
Psalms34:20 Ninh beu jienv kuv mienh nyei sin
Psalms34:21 Orqv mienh oix zuqc orqv nyei sic daic
Psalms34:22 Ziouv yaac njoux ninh nyei bou nyei maengc. Ndaauh kaux ninh wuov deix
Psalms35:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms35:2 Tov nanv jienv domh torngv-baaih
Psalms35:3 Yaamh jiez cang caux mborqv jaax nyei bouv mborqv zunc yie wuov deix mienh. Tov meih caux yie nyei hnyouv gorngv waac
Psalms35:4 Tov bun oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix zuqc nyaiv
Psalms35:5 Tov bun ninh mbuo hnangv zuqc nziaaux buonc nyei mbieqv nor
Psalms35:6 Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei jauv youc hmuangx youc mbiaangc
Psalms35:7 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo zaeng mungz zorqv yie yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx. Ninh mbuo yaac wetv kuotv ndo nyei oix zorqv yie nyei maengc
Psalms35:8 Ninh mbuo jangx maiv zaaic nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms35:9 Yie nyei hnyouv ziouc kaux Ziouv njien-youh haic
Psalms35:10 Yie oix longc nzengc hnyouv gorngv
Psalms35:11 Hiuang orqv nyei mienh cuotv daaih zoux zorng-zengx
Psalms35:12 Weic yie zoux nyei kuv sic ninh mbuo winh orqv bun yie
Psalms35:13 Yie ganh aeqv
Psalms35:14 hnangv yie weic yie nyei loz-gaeng doic fai yie nyei muoz-doic nzauh fai hnangv mienh weic ganh nyei cien-maa nzauh nyiemv
Psalms35:15 Yie buangh zuqc kouv ninh mbuo lomh nzoih a'hneiv. Ninh mbuo gapv zunv jatv yie. Dongh yie maiv hiuv nyei mienh maiv dingh liouh nyei gorngv doqc yie.
Psalms35:16 Hnangv maiv hiuv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ninh mbuo huotv yie
Psalms35:17 O Ziouv aah! Meih oix mangc jienv yaac maiv tengx yie ndongc haaix lauh? Tov meih njoux yie biaux ndutv maiv zuqc ninh mbuo zoux doqc hoic
Psalms35:18 Yie oix yiem gapv zunv nyei domh wuic dor-ziec meih
Psalms35:19 Tov meih maiv dungx bun zoux win-wangv mv baac maiv maaih gorn-baengx wuov deix a'hneiv nyei jatv yie. Maiv dungx bun nzorng yie yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx wuov deix nzuei kamx-bui bun yie.
Psalms35:20 Ninh mbuo maiv gorngv baengh orn nyei waac. Daaux nzuonx ninh mbuo hnamv cuotv nduov mienh nyei waac hoic yiem deic-bung sekv nyei mienh.
Psalms35:21 Ninh mbuo morngx nqoi nzuih mangc jienv yie gorngv
Psalms35:22 O Ziouv aac
Psalms35:23 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms35:24 Ziouv
Psalms35:25 Tov maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo yiem ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih gorngv
Psalms35:26 Tov bun a'hneiv yie zuqc kouv naanc wuov deix yietc zungv zuqc nyaiv
Psalms35:27 Tov bun a'hneiv yie zuqc siemv dingc maiv maaih zuiz wuov deix njien-youh orn-lorqc nyei heuc. Tov bun ninh mbuo zanc-zanc gorngv
Psalms35:28 Yie oix zunh gorngv meih se baengh fim nyei
Psalms36:1 Zuiz yiem orqv mienh nyei hnyouv ndo nyei dorngx caux orqv mienh gorngv. Ziux ninh nyei m'zing mangc
Psalms36:2 Ninh ceng ninh ganh nyei haah baah buang
Psalms36:3 Ninh nyei nzuih gorngv orqv nyei waac
Psalms36:4 Ninh bueix jienv coux hnamv cuotv zoux waaic nyei sic. Ninh dingc hnyouv zoux maiv benx nyei jauv
Psalms36:5 O Ziouv aac
Psalms36:6 Meih se baengh fim hnangv Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mbong. Meih dunx sic se hnangv ndo haic nyei koiv. O Ziouv aac
Psalms36:7 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms36:8 Ninh mbuo nyanc yiem meih nyei biauv bungx-zuoqc nyei ga'naaiv beuv
Psalms36:9 Weic zuqc yiem wuov maaih ziangh maengc nyei wuom-zingv. Yiem meih nyei njang yie mbuo duqv buatc njang.
Psalms36:10 Tov meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv jienv mingh dongh hiuv duqv meih wuov deix
Psalms36:11 Tov maiv dungx bun zoux maux nyei mienh nyei zaux caaiv yie
Psalms36:12 Mangc maah! Zoux orqv nyei mienh king njiec bueix jienv wuov. Ninh mbuo zuqc fongv ndorpc mingh
Psalms37:1 Maiv dungx weic zoux orqv nyei mienh guaax hnyouv. Yaac maiv dungx mueic jieqv zoux dorngc nyei mienh.
Psalms37:2 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo hnangv miev nor
Psalms37:3 Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv yaac zoux kuv sic
Psalms37:4 Oix zuqc a'hneiv lorz Ziouv nyei orn-lorqc
Psalms37:5 Oix zuqc zorqv meih nyei jauv fungx bun Ziouv
Psalms37:6 Ninh oix bun meih zoux baengh fim nyei jauv hnangv njang nor ziux cuotv daaih
Psalms37:7 Oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien sekv-sekv nyei longc noic zuov ninh. Maiv dungx weic ei ganh nyei jauv duqv longx fai ei waaic nyei za'eix zoux wuov deix guaax hnyouv.
Psalms37:8 Maiv dungx qiex jiez
Psalms37:9 Zoux orqv nyei mienh oix zuqc pai guangc mingh
Psalms37:10 Maiv lauh maiv maaih orqv mienh aqv. Maiv gunv meih longx-longx nyei mangc ninh yiem nyei dorngx
Psalms37:11 Mv baac nyiemc ganh zoux faix wuov deix oix duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung. Ninh mbuo yaac bungx-zuoqc
Psalms37:12 Mienh waaic mienh daav za'eix hoic kuv mienh
Psalms37:13 Ziouv kuh jatv haic zoux waaic nyei mienh weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zuqc mietc nyei ziangh hoc oix taux aqv.
Psalms37:14 Orqv mienh baeng cuotv nzuqc ndaauv yaac baeng juang-zinx
Psalms37:15 Mv baac ninh mbuo nyei nzuqc ndaauv oix nzopv ninh mbuo ganh nyei mba'nziu
Psalms37:16 Kuv mienh maaih nyei deix baav ga'naaiv
Psalms37:17 Weic zuqc mienh waaic mienh nyei buoz oix zuqc nauv
Psalms37:18 Ziouv hiuv duqv maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh nyei hnoi-nyieqc. Ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc oix yietc liuz yiem.
Psalms37:19 Ninh mbuo yiem kuonx naanh nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv zuqc nyaiv
Psalms37:20 Mv baac mienh waaic mienh oix zuqc mietc. Ziouv nyei win-wangv se hnangv lomc nyei miev-biangh nyei njang-laangc ziec nzengc
Psalms37:21 Mienh waaic mienh gaav mingh yaac maiv jaauv
Psalms37:22 Weic zuqc Ziouv ceix fuqv nyei mienh oix duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung
Psalms37:23 Ziouv liepc wuonv mienh yangh nyei zaux-caaiv. Ninh yaac a'hneiv wuov dauh yangh nyei jauv.
Psalms37:24 Maiv gunv ninh ndorpc
Psalms37:25 Zinh ndaangc yie lunx
Psalms37:26 Ninh zoux hnyouv jangv yaac a'hneiv bun mienh gaav
Psalms37:27 Oix zuqc leih nqoi orqv sic
Psalms37:28 Weic zuqc Ziouv a'hneiv baengh fim nyei jauv
Psalms37:29 Kuv mienh zungv oix nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung
Psalms37:30 Kuv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv cong-mengh nyei waac
Psalms37:31 Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc yiem ninh nyei hnyouv
Psalms37:32 Mienh waaic mienh cienh kuv mienh
Psalms37:33 Ziouv maiv guangc ninh yiem win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev
Psalms37:34 Zuov jienv Ziouv
Psalms37:35 Yie buatc jiex mienh waaic mienh maaih hatc maaz hlo haic
Psalms37:36 Mv baac yie aengx yangh naaic jiex
Psalms37:37 Samx mangc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh
Psalms37:38 mv baac baamz zuiz nyei mienh zungv oix zuqc mietc nzengc. Orqv mienh nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc pai guangc mingh.
Psalms37:39 Kuv mienh duqv njoux se yiem Ziouv daaih
Psalms37:40 Ziouv tengx ninh mbuo
Psalms38:1 O Ziouv aah! Maiv dungx qiex jiez
Psalms38:2 Weic zuqc meih nyei forng-cang buonv bieqc yie gu'nyuoz
Psalms38:3 Weic zuqc meih nouz yie
Psalms38:4 Yie zoux dorngc nyei zuiz yiemx gauh hlang jiex yie nyei m'nqorngv
Psalms38:5 Laaix yie zoux hngongx nyei sic yie mun nyei dorngx zueix yaac huv.
Psalms38:6 Yie zuqc kouv
Psalms38:7 Yie nyei jaaiv jorm hnangv douz buov jienv nor
Psalms38:8 Yie suei nzengc
Psalms38:9 Ziouv aah! Yie nyei hnyouv oix longc nyei meih hiuv nzengc mi'aqv. Yie njunh jienv nyei qiex bingx maiv mbueiz meih.
Psalms38:10 Yie nyei mba'nziu dongz seix nyei
Psalms38:11 Laaix yie nyei zeqc naanc yie nyei doic caux gorx-youz simv yie go
Psalms38:12 Oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix zaeng ninh mbuo nyei mungz. Oix hoic yie wuov deix kungx gorngv hnangv haaix nor haih bun yie zuqc baaic
Psalms38:13 Mv baac yie hnangv m'normh ndung nyei mienh muangx maiv haiz. Yaac hnangv ga'naaiv-hngongx
Psalms38:14 Yie hnangv yietc dauh muangx maiv haiz nyei mienh
Psalms38:15 O Ziouv aah! Yie zuov jienv meih. O Ziouv
Psalms38:16 Weic zuqc yie daux gaux gorngv
Psalms38:17 Weic zuqc yie zungv oix ndorpc haic aqv. Yie yaac zanc-zanc mun jienv yiem.
Psalms38:18 Yie nyiemc yie nyei zuiz
Psalms38:19 Yie nyei win-wangv youc camv youc henv. Nzorng yie mv baac maiv maaih gorn-baengx nyei mienh yaac maaih camv.
Psalms38:20 Longc orqv sic jaauv yie zoux nyei kuv sic wuov deix caux yie doix-dekc
Psalms38:21 O Ziouv aah! Tov maiv dungx guangc yie. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Maiv dungx leih go yie.
Psalms38:22 Njoux yie wuov dauh Ziouv aah! Tov siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie.
Psalms39:1 Yie gorngv
Psalms39:2 Yie sekv nzieqc nyei
Psalms39:3 Yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz za'gengh nzauh duqv kouv haic. Yie hnamv nyei ziangh hoc hnangv douz zieqc jienv yie nyei hnyouv nor
Psalms39:4 O Ziouv aah! Tov bun yie hiuv duqv yie setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc. Yie haih ziangh duqv ndongc haaix lauh? Tov bun yie hiuv duqv yie nyei maengc oix jiex ndongc haaix siepv.
Psalms39:5 Meih bun yie ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc ndongc i ziex buoz-zaangv jangv. Ziux meih mangc yie yietc seix nyei maengc se hnangv maiv maaih haaix nyungc aqv. Gorqv-mienh nyei maengc kungx hnangv tauv nzunc qiex nor.
Psalms39:6 Baamh mienh mingh mingh daaih daaih hnangv dongh linh nor
Psalms39:7 “Ziouv aah! Yie ih zanc zuov haaix nyungc? Yie kaux meih maaih lamh hnamv dorngx.
Psalms39:8 Tov njoux yie leih ndutv yie nyei yietc zungv zuiz
Psalms39:9 Yie sekv nzieqc nyei
Psalms39:10 Tov meih zorqv nqoi meih bun yie zuqc nyei zeqc naanc. Yie zuqc meih nyei buoz mborqv taux aav lamh daic aqv.
Psalms39:11 Laaix mienh zoux zuiz meih gorngv-hemx weic mborqv njaaux. Meih mietc mienh hnamv nyei ga'naaiv hnangv gaeng ngaatc waaic nzengc nor. Dauh dauh baamh mienh nyei maengc se hnangv tauv yietc nzunc qiex hnangv.
Psalms39:12 “O Ziouv aah! Tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. Tov muangx yie heuc jienv jouh nyei waac. Yie nyei wuom-mueic liouc jienv tov maiv dungx zoux hnangv maiv haiz nor. Weic zuqc yie zoux hnangv meih nyei jiex jauv nyei kaeqv mienh
Psalms39:13 Tov huin ganh bung maiv mangc yie weic bun yie aengx duqv deix orn-lorqc. Yie cingx daaih leih nqoi
Psalms40:1 Yie longc noic zuov jienv Ziouv
Psalms40:2 Ninh cie yie yiem zuqc mietc nyei kuotv cuotv daaih
Psalms40:3 Ninh bun yie nyei nzuih baaux diuh siang-nzung
Psalms40:4 Haaix dauh sienx kaux Ziouv
Psalms40:5 O Ziouv
Psalms40:6 Meih maiv zeiz oix mienh buov ziec caux fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms40:7 Yie ziouc gorngv
Psalms40:8 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Meih nyei leiz-latc yiem yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz. Yie a'hneiv ei jienv meih nyei eix zoux.
Psalms40:9 Yie yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei dorngx zunh njoux en nyei kuv fienx. O Ziouv aah! Meih hiuv duqv yie nyei nzuih meix maiv dingh liouh nyei zunh.
Psalms40:10 Yie maiv zorqv meih tengx yie mbuo nyei njoux en bingx jienv yie nyei hnyouv. Yie gorngv meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv caux meih nyei njoux en. Yie yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei dorngx
Psalms40:11 Ziouv aac
Psalms40:12 Maaih ciouv nyei zeqc naanc
Psalms40:13 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih nqoi eix njoux yie. Tov Ziouv siepv-siepv nyei tengx yie.
Psalms40:14 Tov bun oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix mienh zuqc nyaiv zuqc lunc. Tov bun dongh a'hneiv yie zuqc kouv wuov deix tuix nzuonx nqa'haav yaac zuqc baaic hmien.
Psalms40:15 Tov bun gorngv
Psalms40:16 Tov bun yietc zungv daaih lorz meih wuov deix
Psalms40:17 Mv baac yie se kouv
Psalms41:1 Maaih hnyouv jangx mienh jomc mienh
Psalms41:2 Ziouv beu jienv ninh
Psalms41:3 Ninh butv baengc bueix jienv coux nyei ziangh hoc Ziouv oix goux ninh. Maaih baengc wuov zanc meih zungv oix zorc ninh longx daaih.
Psalms41:4 Yie gorngv
Psalms41:5 Yie nyei win-wangv gorngv doqc yie. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms41:6 Haaix dauh daaih mangc yie
Psalms41:7 Nzorng yie wuov deix yietc zungv longc waac-sapv gorngv taux yie
Psalms41:8 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms41:9 Liemh yie gauh zuoqc jiex nyei loz-gaeng doic
Psalms41:10 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih korv-lienh yie
Psalms41:11 Yie ziouc hiuv duqv meih a'hneiv yie
Psalms41:12 Meih baav jienv yie weic zuqc yie hnyouv zingx
Psalms41:13 Ceng Ziouv
Psalms42:1 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms42:2 Yie nyei hnyouv ngorc Tin-Hungh
Psalms42:3 Yie ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz nyanc wuom-mueic dorngx hnaangx. Mienh yaac maiv dingh liouh nyei naaic yie
Psalms42:4 Yie jangx zuqc naaiv deix ziex nyungc sic yie hnyouv mun jienv yiem. Yie jangx zuqc zinh ndaangc caux mienh camv mingh. Yie dorh jienv ninh mbuo bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Zuangx mienh lomh nzoih jiex zipv
Psalms42:5 Yie weic haaix diuc ndongc naaiv nzauh? Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc paan-paan puoqv-puoqv nyei? Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx weic zuqc yie aengx duqv ceng ninh
Psalms42:6 Yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh mun haic
Psalms42:7 Wuom ndortv meih nyei domh mbaengx hnangv mba'ong nor
Psalms42:8 Lungh hnoi zanc Ziouv laauc yaangh ninh ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei jauv
Psalms42:9 Yie gorngv mbuox yie nyei La'bieiv
Psalms42:10 Yie nyei win-wangv huotv yie hnangv zoux bun yie nyei mbungv nauv nzengc. Ninh mbuo maiv dingh liouh nyei naaic
Psalms42:11 Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc ndongc naaiv nzauh? Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc paan-paan puoqv-puoqv nyei? Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx weic zuqc yie aengx duqv ceng ninh
Psalms43:1 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih siemv bun cing yie maiv dorngc. Tov tengx yie caengx sic
Psalms43:2 Weic zuqc meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei Tin-Hungh. Meih weic haaix diuc guangc yie? Yie weic haaix diuc oix zuqc zanc-zanc nzauh nyiemv
Psalms43:3 Tov bun meih nyei njang caux zien leiz cuotv daaih yienz yie
Psalms43:4 Yie ziouc mingh taux Tin-Hungh nyei ziec-dorngh
Psalms43:5 Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc ndongc naaiv nzauh? Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc paan-paan puoqv-puoqv nyei? Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx weic zuqc yie aengx duqv ceng ninh
Psalms44:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Yie mbuo ganh nyei m'normh duqv haiz jiex
Psalms44:2 Meih longc meih ganh nyei buoz zunc cuotv yiem wuov nyei norm-norm guoqv nyei mienh
Psalms44:3 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv zeiz weic ganh nyei nzuqc ndaauv duqv wuov norm deic-bung
Psalms44:4 Meih zoux yie nyei Hungh caux yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Tov paaiv bun Yaakopv duqv hingh.
Psalms44:5 Yie mbuo kaux meih fongv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv njiec. Yie mbuo kaux meih nyei mengh caaiv jienv caux yie mbuo mborqv jaax wuov deix.
Psalms44:6 Yie maiv kaux yie nyei juang-zinx
Psalms44:7 mv baac meih njoux yie mbuo leih ndutv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv
Psalms44:8 Yie mbuo ziangh hnoi weic Tin-Hungh bungx waac-maux. Yie mbuo yaac oix yietc liuz dor-ziec meih nyei mbuox.
Psalms44:9 Mv baac ih zanc meih guangc yie mbuo
Psalms44:10 Meih bun yie mbuo tuix nzuonx biaux win-wangv. Nzorng yie mbuo wuov deix win-jaa caangv yie mbuo nyei ga'naaiv.
Psalms44:11 Meih bun yie mbuo hnangv zuqc daix nyanc nyei ba'gi yungh
Psalms44:12 Meih laanh zaanc maaic meih nyei baeqc fingx hnangv maiv maaih jaax-zinh nyei ga'naaiv. Ziux maaic nyei jaax-zinh zungv maiv duqv yietc deix leic.
Psalms44:13 Meih bun yie mbuo zuqc laangz zaangc mienh ki
Psalms44:14 Meih bun yie mbuo yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx zoux gouv gorngv
Psalms44:15 Yie ziangh hnoi zuqc diev nyaiv
Psalms44:16 laaix mienh gorngv doqc gorngv ki
Psalms44:17 Yie mbuo zuqc naaiv deix yietc zungv sic maiv gunv yie mbuo maiv la'kuqv meih fai ngaengc meih caux yie mbuo laengz nyei ngaengc waac.
Psalms44:18 Yie mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv daaux nqaang. Yie mbuo nyei zaux yaac maiv caaiv piatv meih nyei jauv.
Psalms44:19 Mv baac meih zaax jienv yie mbuo
Psalms44:20 Se gorngv yie mbuo la'kuqv yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei mbuox
Psalms44:21 Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz haih zaah cuotv naaiv deix sic fai? Weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv mienh nyei hnyouv gem jienv nyei sic.
Psalms44:22 Weic meih yie mbuo ziangh hnoi zuqc mienh daix jienv yiem. Mienh funx yie mbuo hnangv benx oix zuqc daix nyei ba'gi yungh nor.
Psalms44:23 O Ziouv aah! Nyie daaih maah! Meih weic haaix diuc m'njormh? Jiez sin aqv
Psalms44:24 Meih weic haaix diuc buang meih nyei hmien maiv mangc yie? Meih weic haaix diuc la'kuqv yie mbuo zuqc kouv naanc
Psalms44:25 Yie mbuo zuqc mbaapv njiec taux nie-mbung
Psalms44:26 Tov meih daaih tengx yie mbuo. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Psalms45:1 Yie nyei hnyouv maaih longx haic nyei jauv mienz cuotv. Yie weic hungh diex doqc naaiv diuh nzung. Yie nyei mbietc hnangv fiev nzaangc liouc nyei mienh nyei batv nor.
Psalms45:2 Beiv lungh ndiev mienh
Psalms45:3 Henv haic nyei hungh diex aah! Zorqv meih nyei nzuqc ndaauv tapv paiv sai jienv jaaiv. Meih zoux hlo yaac maaih njang-laangc.
Psalms45:4 Weic zien leiz caux suonc nyei jauv caux baengh fim nyei sic meih zoux hlo geh jienv maaz cuotv mingh hingh jiex. Tov bun meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz zoux cuotv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Psalms45:5 Meih nyei forng laic
Psalms45:6 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih nyei weic oix yietc liuz yiem taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Meih oix baengh fim nyei gunv meih nyei baeqc fingx.
Psalms45:7 Zoux kuv sic nyei meih hnamv
Psalms45:8 Meih nyei lui ndaang haic
Psalms45:9 Maaih deix hungh diex nyei sieqv yiem meih taaih nyei m'sieqv dorn mbu'ndongx. Hungh maac zorng jienv yiem Ofi daaih nyei jiem souv jienv hungh diex nyei mbiaauc maengx.
Psalms45:10 O sieqv aah! Meih oix zuqc hnamv longx yaac baeng m'normh muangx. Maiv dungx jangx meih ganh nyei mienh fai meih nyei die nyei biauv.
Psalms45:11 Weic zuqc meih nzueic haic hungh diex oix meih aqv. Ninh se meih nyei ziouv
Psalms45:12 Tailaqv Mienh oix daaih fungx zingh nyeic tov meih tengx. Baeqc fingx gu'nyuoz gauh butv zoih jiex nyei mienh oix longc nyungc-nyungc jaaix nyei ga'naaiv bun meih a'hneiv.
Psalms45:13 Hungh sieqv yiem gu'nyuoz zorng jienv njang-laangc haic. Ninh nyei zorng-zuqv longc jiem-finx zorpc jienv ndatv daaih.
Psalms45:14 Ninh zuqv jienv longc ziex nyungc setv congx daaih nyei lui-ndaauv
Psalms45:15 Mienh dorh ninh mbuo njien-youh orn-lorqc nyei bieqc hungh diex nyei dinc.
Psalms45:16 Meih oix duqv dorn camv nzipc jienv meih nyei ong-taaix nyei weic
Psalms45:17 Yie nyei nzung oix bun doic jiex doic ceng meih nyei mengh. Zuangx mienh ziouc yietc liuz ceng meih taux maanc gouv maanc doic.
Psalms46:1 Tin-Hungh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx yaac zoux yie mbuo nyei qaqv. Yie mbuo haaix zanc buangh zuqc kouv naanc ninh yaac tengx.
Psalms46:2 Weic naaiv
Psalms46:3 maiv gunv wuom jiez laangc njunh njunh zoz-zoz nyei
Psalms46:4 Maaih diuh ndaaih bun njiec nyei ndoqv liouc mingh bun Tin-Hungh nyei zingh a'hneiv. Naaiv norm zingh se Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei dinc.
Psalms46:5 Tin-Hungh yiem naaiv norm zingh gu'nyuoz
Psalms46:6 Maanc fingx mbiouh mbiouh nyei lunc nzengc
Psalms46:7 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv caux yie mbuo yiem. Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx.
Psalms46:8 Daaih maah! Daaih mangc Ziouv zoux nyei sic. Mangc gaax ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun ndau huaang nzengc.
Psalms46:9 Ninh bun mborqv jaax nyei jauv dingh taux jomc lungh ndiev
Psalms46:10 Dingh njiec aqv
Psalms46:11 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv caux yie mbuo yiem. Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx.
Psalms47:1 Maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc mbaix buoz longc njien-youh nyei qiex heuc Tin-Hungh.
Psalms47:2 Oix zuqc gamh nziex Ziouv
Psalms47:3 Ninh bun maanc fingx yiem yie mbuo nyei buoz-ndiev. Bun maanc guoqv yiem yie mbuo nyei zaux-ndiev.
Psalms47:4 Ninh weic yie mbuo ginv yie mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. Se Yaakopv
Psalms47:5 Mienh heuc mbui houc Tin-Hungh faaux weic. Nzatc nyei qiex mbui houc Ziouv faaux.
Psalms47:6 Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms47:7 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zoux Hungh gunv gormx lungh ndiev
Psalms47:8 Tin-Hungh gunv maanc guoqv. Tin-Hungh zueiz jienv ninh nyei cing-nzengc weic.
Psalms47:9 Gunv maanc guoqv nyei jien gapv zunv caux jienv Apc^laa^ham nyei Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx. Weic zuqc lungh ndiev nyei torngv-baaih benx Tin-Hungh nyei. Oix zuqc taaih ninh zoux hlo jiex.
Psalms48:1 Ziouv za'gengh weih hlo
Psalms48:2 Mangc naaiv norm mbong youc hlang youc nzueic
Psalms48:3 Tin-Hungh yiem zingh gu'nyuoz yietc norm wuonv nyei dorngx
Psalms48:4 Mangc maah! Zuangx hungh diex gapv zunv daaih
Psalms48:5 Ninh mbuo yietv buatc naaiv norm zingh ninh mbuo mbuoqc horngh haic. Gamh nziex gau
Psalms48:6 Ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic
Psalms48:7 yaac hnangv Taansitv nyei nzangv zuqc dong bung nyei domh nziaaux buonc waaic.
Psalms48:8 Yie mbuo haiz jiex hnangv haaix nor
Psalms48:9 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms48:10 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms48:11 Tov bun Si^on Mbong nyei mienh a'hneiv
Psalms48:12 Yangh gormx Si^on maah! Huing gormx nzengc. Saauv zingh nyei laauh.
Psalms48:13 Samx mangc zingh nyei zingh laatc
Psalms48:14 Weic zuqc naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh
Psalms49:1 Maanc mienh aah! Muangx naaiv deix waac oc. Lungh ndiev mienh aah! Oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx
Psalms49:2 maiv gunv zoux hlo zoux faix
Psalms49:3 Yie nyei nzuih oix gorngv cong-mengh nyei waac. Yie nyei hnyouv hnamv duqv tong
Psalms49:4 Yie oix bungx m'normh muangx waac-beiv
Psalms49:5 Buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc yie maiv gamh nziex
Psalms49:6 Se kaux ninh mbuo nyei zinh zoih yaac bungx waac-maux gorngv zinh zoih camv nyei mienh.
Psalms49:7 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih zuoqc ninh nyei gorx-youz nzuonx
Psalms49:8 weic zuqc yietc diuh maengc se jaaix haic. Bun mbu'ziex yaac maiv haih gaux
Psalms49:9 weic bun ninh yietc liuz ziangh jienv
Psalms49:10 Ninh buatc cong-mengh mienh fih hnangv nyei daic
Psalms49:11 Ninh mbuo nyei zouv benx ninh mbuo yietc liuz yiem nyei biauv
Psalms49:12 Mienh butv zoih mv baac maiv tengx ninh mbuo maiv zuqc daic. Ninh ziouc hnangv saeng-kuv zuqc mietc mi'aqv.
Psalms49:13 Naaiv se kaux ganh hngongx nyei jauv nyei mienh
Psalms49:14 Ninh mbuo hnangv dingc ziangx daix nyei ba'gi yungh. Zuqc daic nyei qaqv yaac oix zoux ninh mbuo goux yungh nyei mienh. Taux lungh ndorm kuv mienh oix gunv jienv ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo nyei sin oix huv jienv njiec. Yiemh gen yaac oix zoux ninh mbuo nyei biauv.
Psalms49:15 Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix njoux yie nyei maengc leih ndutv yiemh gen nyei qaqv
Psalms49:16 Meih buatc mienh butv zoih
Psalms49:17 weic zuqc ninh daic nyei ziangh hoc ninh maiv haih dorh haaix nyungc mingh
Psalms49:18 Maiv gunv ninh ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms49:19 ninh oix zuqc guei seix hnangv ninh nyei ong-taaix mbuo nor
Psalms49:20 Mienh butv zoih mv baac maiv tengx ninh maiv zuqc daic. Ninh m'daaih caux saeng-kuv fih hnangv nyei zuqc mietc mi'aqv.
Psalms50:1 Ziouv
Psalms50:2 Yiem gauh nzueic jiex nyei Si^on Zingh
Psalms50:3 Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh daaih
Psalms50:4 Ninh heuc lungh caux ndau zoux zorng-zengx
Psalms50:5 Ninh gorngv
Psalms50:6 Zuangx lungh bun cing Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei
Psalms50:7 “O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Muangx maah! Yie ziouc gorngv
Psalms50:8 Yie maiv zeiz weic meih mbuo ziec nyei ga'naaiv gorngv-hemx meih mbuo. Meih mbuo buov ziec bun yie nyei ga'naaiv zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei nza'hmien.
Psalms50:9 Yie maiv qiemx zuqc yietc dauh yiem meih mbuo nyei ngongh laanh nyei ngongh gouv
Psalms50:10 Weic zuqc yiem lomc nyei yietc zungv hieh zoih benx yie nyei
Psalms50:11 Yiem lungh nyei yietc zungv norqc yie yaac hiuv nyei
Psalms50:12 Se gorngv yie hnyouv sie
Psalms50:13 Yie nyanc ngongh nyei orv fai? Yie hopv yungh nyei nziaamv fai?
Psalms50:14 Oix zuqc longc dor-ziec nyei waac benx fongc horc ziec bun Tin-Hungh nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms50:15 Buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc tov yie. Yie ziouc njoux meih
Psalms50:16 Mv baac Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox orqv mienh
Psalms50:17 Meih nzorng yie mborqv njaaux nyei waac
Psalms50:18 Se gorngv meih buatc dauh janx-zaqc
Psalms50:19 Meih nyei nzuih sueih gorngv orqv nyei waac
Psalms50:20 Meih zueiz jienv sueih binc gorngv ganh nyei muoz-doic
Psalms50:21 Meih zoux naaiv deix sic
Psalms50:22 “Meih mbuo la'kuqv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh aah! Longx-longx nyei hnamv mangc gaax! Maiv zei aeqv
Psalms50:23 Haaix dauh dor-ziec weic zoux fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv bun yie
Psalms51:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih korv-lienh yie
Psalms51:2 Tov meih nzaaux nzengc yie nyei zuiz-nipc
Psalms51:3 Yie zieqv duqv yie zoux dorngc nyei sic
Psalms51:4 Yie baamz zuiz dorngc meih
Psalms51:5 Yie cuotv seix daaih benx zuiz-mienh
Psalms51:6 Meih oix nyei se mienh hnyouv zingx
Psalms51:7 Tov longc husopc miev saax yie
Psalms51:8 Tov bun yie aengx muangx duqv haiz njien-youh
Psalms51:9 Tov meih buang jienv hmien
Psalms51:10 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov yiem yie gu'nyuoz zeix cing-nzengc nyei hnyouv
Psalms51:11 Maiv dungx zunc yie biaux
Psalms51:12 Tov bun yie duqv meih nyei njoux en nyei njien-youh hnangv loz nor. Yaac bun yie maaih hnyouv oix gan longx meih.
Psalms51:13 Yie ziouc zorqv meih nyei jauv njaaux zuiz-mienh
Psalms51:14 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms51:15 O Ziouv aac
Psalms51:16 Meih maiv zeiz a'hneiv fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Se gorngv yie fongc horc buov ziec ga'naaiv
Psalms51:17 Tin-Hungh oix nyei ga'naaiv-ziec se mienh hnyouv mun
Psalms51:18 Tov ziux meih nyei kuv za'eix bun Si^on Zingh duqv longx. Tov ceix jiez Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zingh laatc.
Psalms51:19 Wuov zanc meih ziouc a'hneiv mienh ziec duqv horpc nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms52:1 Mienh henv mienh aah! Meih weic haaix diuc bungx waac-maux meih zoux nyei orqv sic? Tin-Hungh ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.
Psalms52:2 Meih daav za'eix mietc mienh. Meih nyei mbietc hnangv teix-do nor laic
Psalms52:3 Meih hnamv orqv sic gauh camv kuv sic
Psalms52:4 O meih gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei mbietc aah! Meih hnamv yietc zungv hoic mienh nyei waac.
Psalms52:5 Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix bun meih zuqc mietc taux yietc liuz. Ninh oix zorqv meih yiem ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz ciev cuotv daaih. Ninh oix yiem yaangh gen baeng meih cuotv hnangv liemh nzungh baeng cuotv nor.
Psalms52:6 Kuv mienh duqv buatc yaac gamh nziex. Ninh mbuo oix jatv ninh yaac gorngv
Psalms52:7 mangc maah! Maiv ndaauh kaux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
Psalms52:8 Mv baac yie se hnangv zungh ga'lanv ndiangx nyiemz yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. Yie kaux Tin-Hungh
Psalms52:9 Yie oix dor-ziec meih taux yietc liuz weic meih zoux nyei sic. Yie oix dorng jienv meih nyei baeqc fingx zunh meih nyei mengh
Psalms53:1 Mienh hngongx mienh yiem hnyouv gorngv
Psalms53:2 Tin-Hungh yiem tin-dorngh mangc njiec
Psalms53:3 Mouz dauh mienh tuix nqaang
Psalms53:4 Zoux orqv nyei mienh maiv hiuv haaix nyungc fai? Ninh mbuo naqv yie nyei baeqc fingx hnangv ninh mbuo nyanc hnaangx nor. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv tov Tin-Hungh.
Psalms53:5 Ninh mbuo yiem wuov za'gengh! gamh nziex haic. Maiv maaih jiex ndongc naaiv gamh nziex. Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix zorqv dongh liepc ciangv daaih mborqv meih wuov deix mienh nyei mbungv faatv nzaanx nzengc. Meih oix bun ninh mbuo zuqc nyaiv weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nqemh ninh mbuo.
Psalms53:6 Tov bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei njoux en yiem Si^on cuotv. Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov zanc
Psalms54:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov longc meih nyei mengh njoux yie. Tov longc meih nyei domh qaqv bun cing yie maiv dorngc.
Psalms54:2 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih muangx yie daux gaux
Psalms54:3 Weic zuqc maaih deix ceng-hlo nyei mienh cuotv daaih mborqv yie. Mienh doqc mienh oix zorqv yie nyei maengc. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh.
Psalms54:4 Tin-Hungh se dongh tengx yie wuov dauh. Ziouv yaac baav jienv yie nyei maengc.
Psalms54:5 Tov Tin-Hungh ziux win-wangv zoux nyei orqv sic winh bun ninh mbuo. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei
Psalms54:6 Yie oix cuotv fim zorqv fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv bun meih. O Ziouv aac
Psalms54:7 Meih njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc. Yie ganh nyei m'zing yaac buatc jienv yie nyei win-wangv zuqc suei.
Psalms55:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. Maiv dungx bingx
Psalms55:2 Tov muangx yie yaac dau yie oc. Yie hnyouv faanv lunc nzengc.
Psalms55:3 Weic haiz win-wangv nyei qiex
Psalms55:4 Yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz za'gengh! mun haic. Zuqc daic nyei jauv haeqv yie gamh nziex gau.
Psalms55:5 Yie gengh! gamh nziex
Psalms55:6 Yie gorngv
Psalms55:7 Yie oix youh jienv mingh go nyei dorngx
Psalms55:8 Yie oix gaanv jienv lorz dorngx bingx
Psalms55:9 O Ziouv aah! Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei za'eix waaic aengx bun ninh mbuo nyei waac lunc nzengc
Psalms55:10 Ninh mbuo ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz yiem zingh laatc gu'nguaaic youh jienv mingh huing gormx. Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz maaih baamz zuiz nyei sic caux waaic sic buangv nzengc.
Psalms55:11 Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz maaih zoux waaic nyei jauv. Hei zaangc maaih hoic mienh
Psalms55:12 Se maiv zeiz win-wangv jatv yie. Hnangv naaic yie diev duqv nyei. Yaac maiv zeiz nzorng yie nyei mienh ceng-hlo cuoqv yie. Hnangv naaic yie haih bingx ninh.
Psalms55:13 Mv baac se meih
Psalms55:14 Zinh ndaangc yie mbuo laanh caux laanh gorngv waac zuoqc haic
Psalms55:15 Ninh mbuo jangx maiv zaaic nyei ziangh hoc tov bun ninh mbuo zuqc mietc. Bun ninh mbuo liemh nangh nyei zuqc njiec mingh yiem yiemh gen
Psalms55:16 Mv baac yie jouh Tin-Hungh
Psalms55:17 Maiv gunv lungh ndorm lungh muonz fai lungh aanx yie njunh jienv gorngv yie kouv nyei jauv
Psalms55:18 Ninh njoux yie nyei maengc leih ndutv caux yie mborqv jaax nyei mienh
Psalms55:19 Tin-Hungh
Psalms55:20 Caux yie zoux doic nyei mienh sung ninh nyei buoz mborqv ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic
Psalms55:21 Ninh nyei nzuih gauh mbiaangc jiex ngongh nyorx hmei
Psalms55:22 Zorqv meih nyei kouv naanc fungx bun Ziouv
Psalms55:23 Mv baac Tin-Hungh aah! Meih oix zorqv orqv mienh zoi njiec taux yiemh gen. Daix mienh nyei mienh caux maaic mienh nyei mienh zungv maiv ziangh taux ndaamv-seix. Mv baac yie ganh aeqv
Psalms56:1 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms56:2 Yie nyei win-wangv ziangh hnoi ki yie
Psalms56:3 Yie gamh nziex nyei ziangh hoc yie kaux meih.
Psalms56:4 Yie kaux Tin-Hungh
Psalms56:5 Ninh mbuo ziangh hnoi mbienv yie nyei waac. Ninh mbuo hnamv nyei jauv yietc zungv kungx oix hoic yie hnangv.
Psalms56:6 Ninh mbuo gapv zunv bingx jienv cienh mangc yie zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc jauv
Psalms56:7 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms56:8 Yie buangh nyei kuonx naanh meih saauv jienv. Yie nyei wuom-mueic meih yaac dapv jienv meih nyei ndopv-mbuoqc. Naaiv maiv zeiz fiev jienv meih nyei sou-daan fai?
Psalms56:9 Yie heuc jienv tov nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Psalms56:10 Yie kaux Tin-Hungh
Psalms56:11 Yie kaux Tin-Hungh zungv maiv gamh nziex. Baamh mienh haih zoux haaix nyungc bun yie?
Psalms56:12 O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie oix zuqc jaauv sung yie caux meih laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Yie oix zorqv ziec weic laengz zingh nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun meih.
Psalms56:13 Weic zuqc meih njoux yie nyei maengc biaux ndutv zuqc daic nyei jauv
Psalms57:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov korv-lienh yie. Tov! korv-lienh yie maah! Weic zuqc yie ndaauh kaux meih. Yie ndaauh kaux meih
Psalms57:2 Yie heuc Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms57:3 Ninh oix yiem gu'nguaaic lungh dau yie
Psalms57:4 Yie bueix jienv sienh mbu'ndongx
Psalms57:5 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms57:6 Ninh mbuo zaeng mungz yie nyei zaux caaiv nyei dorngx. Yie zuqc naanc zingh ngatv jienv yie nyei hnyouv. Ninh mbuo wetv kuotv yie yangh nyei jauv
Psalms57:7 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms57:8 Yie nyei hnyouv aah! Nyie daaih maah! Domh daanh baah
Psalms57:9 O Ziouv aac
Psalms57:10 Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh mbaengc lungh hlang. Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv yaac mbaengc mbuonx hlang.
Psalms57:11 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms58:1 Meih mbuo zoux hlo nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo baengh fim nyei gorngv fai? Meih mbuo hnyouv zingx nyei siemv baamh mienh fai?
Psalms58:2 Zungv maiv zeiz! Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv kungx hnamv zoux orqv nyei sic hnangv. Meih mbuo yiem ndau-beih longc buoz zoux cuotv doqc haic nyei sic.
Psalms58:3 Zoux orqv nyei mienh cuotv seix daaih m'daaih yangh orqv nyei jauv. Yiem ninh mbuo cuotv seix daaih ninh mbuo kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv.
Psalms58:4 Ninh mbuo nyei doqc qiex hnangv naang nyei ndie-doqc. Ninh mbuo zotv jienv m'normh hnangv m'normh ndung nyei naang-jieqv
Psalms58:5 ninh mbuo ziouc muangx maiv haiz zoux faatv bun naang hngongx nyei mienh nyei qiex maiv gunv zoux faatv ndongc haaix guv guaix.
Psalms58:6 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov mborqv nquaqv ninh mbuo nyei nzuih nyei nyaah. O Ziouv aac
Psalms58:7 Tov bun ninh mbuo zutc nzengc hnangv wuom liouc mingh nzengc nor. Ninh mbuo baeng jienv juang-zinx oix buonv wuov zanc
Psalms58:8 Tov bun ninh mbuo hnangv korng gueiv manc-manc huv yuqc nzengc. Yaac bun ninh mbuo hnangv gu'nguaaz-mbaang nor
Psalms58:9 Longc njimv buov douz
Psalms58:10 Kuv mienh buatc orqv mienh zuqc jaauv win
Psalms58:11 Mienh ziouc gorngv
Psalms59:1 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv. Tov beu yie biaux ndutv oix mborqv yie wuov deix mienh.
Psalms59:2 Njoux yie biaux ndutv zoux orqv sic wuov deix
Psalms59:3 Mangc maah! Ninh mbuo bingx jienv zuov oix zorqv yie nyei maengc. Ciouv nyei mienh gapv zunv oix mborqv yie. O Ziouv aah! Maiv zeiz weic yie zoux dorngc fai yie zoux nyei haaix nyungc zuiz
Psalms59:4 maiv gunv yie maiv zoux haaix nyungc dorngc
Psalms59:5 Ziouv
Psalms59:6 Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx nzuonx daaih
Psalms59:7 Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih qaqv gorngv maiv benx nyei waac. Ninh mbuo hnangv maaih nzuqc ndaauv yiem ninh mbuo nyei nzuih meix
Psalms59:8 Mv baac Ziouv aah! Meih jatv ninh mbuo. Meih huotv maanc fingx.
Psalms59:9 Meih zoux yie nyei Qaqv. Yie zuov jienv meih. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux yie wuonv haic nyei dorngx.
Psalms59:10 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie
Psalms59:11 O Ziouv
Psalms59:12 Laaix ninh mbuo nyei nzuih nyei zuiz
Psalms59:13 tov meih qiex jiez
Psalms59:14 Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx nzuonx daaih
Psalms59:15 Ninh mbuo hnangv juv nor
Psalms59:16 Mv baac yie oix baaux nzung ceng meih nyei qaqv. Lungh ndorm yie oix baaux nzung mbui nyei ceng meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Weic zuqc meih zoux yie wuonv haic nyei dorngx
Psalms59:17 O yie nyei Qaqv aah! Yie oix baaux nzung ceng meih. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux yie wuonv nyei laauh
Psalms60:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Meih guangc yie mbuo
Psalms60:2 Meih bun ndau dongz
Psalms60:3 Meih bun meih nyei baeqc fingx zuqc diev kouv. Meih bun yie mbuo hopv diuv nquin
Psalms60:4 Meih cie jienv geh bun taaih meih wuov deix mienh daaih gapv zunv leih buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh.
Psalms60:5 Tov dau yie mbuo
Psalms60:6 Tin-Hungh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gorngv
Psalms60:7 Gi^le^aatc se yie nyei
Psalms60:8 Mo^apc se yie nyei nzaaux buoz-zaux bunh. Yie yaac zoi yie nyei heh njiec E^ndom. Yie heuc jienv gorngv
Psalms60:9 Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux wuov norm weih wuonv nyei zingh? Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux E^ndom Deic-Bung?
Psalms60:10 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv zeiz guangc yie mbuo fai? O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv caux yie mbuo nyei jun-baeng guanh cuotv mingh mborqv jaax fai?
Psalms60:11 Tov meih tengx yie mbuo mborqv win-wangv
Psalms60:12 Yie mbuo kaux Tin-Hungh yie mbuo ziouc duqv hingh jiex. Se dongh ninh oix caaiv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv njiec.
Psalms61:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov muangx yie heuc nyei qiex. Tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac.
Psalms61:2 Yie nyei hnyouv maiv lamh hnamv nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms61:3 Weic zuqc meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx
Psalms61:4 Tov bun yie yietc liuz yiem meih nyei ndopv-liuh. Tov bun yie yiem meih nyei ndaatv ga'ndiev bingx jienv.
Psalms61:5 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih muangx haiz yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Meih zorqv dongh taaih meih nyei mienh nzipc nyei buonc ceix bun yie.
Psalms61:6 Tov jaa hungh diex nyei siouc nyuonh ndaauv
Psalms61:7 Tov bun ninh yietc liuz zueiz weic yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien. Tov meih hnyouv zingx caux ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei jauv beu jienv ninh.
Psalms61:8 Hnangv naaic
Psalms62:1 Yie nyei hnyouv sekv nzieqc nyei zuov Tin-Hungh ganh nduqc dauh hnangv. Yie nyei njoux en yiem ninh daaih.
Psalms62:2 Kungx ninh ganh zoux yie nyei La'bieiv yaac zoux yie nyei Njoux En. Ninh se yie wuonv nyei dorngx
Psalms62:3 Meih mbuo zuangx mienh oix mborqv oix baaic waaic yietc laanh mienh ndongc haaix lauh? Ninh hnangv zingh laatc laih mingh
Psalms62:4 Ninh mbuo daav za'eix oix tuix ninh nyei baaih njiec. Ninh mbuo a'hneiv gorngv-baeqc. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv buang nyei waac mv baac hnyouv gu'nyuoz kungx zioux hnangv.
Psalms62:5 Yie nyei hnyouv sekv nzieqc nyei zuov Tin-Hungh ganh nduqc dauh hnangv
Psalms62:6 Kungx ninh ganh zoux yie nyei la'bieiv yaac zoux yie nyei njoux en. Ninh se yie wuonv nyei dorngx
Psalms62:7 Tin-Hungh se yie nyei njoux en caux yie nyei njang-laangc. Tin-Hungh yaac zoux yie henv haic nyei la'bieiv
Psalms62:8 O meih mbuo zuangx baeqc fingx aah! Oix zuqc zanc-zanc kaux Tin-Hungh. Zorqv ganh nyei hnyouv yietc zungv mbuox Ninh. Ninh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx.
Psalms62:9 Haac horngh mienh beiv tauv yietc nzunc qiex. Zaangc horngh mienh yaac kungx jaav nyei hnangv. Longc tin-baengh dangv nziang ninh mbuo yaac maiv maaih hniev-daauh. I nyungc gapv daaih gauh heng tauv yietc nzunc nyei qiex.
Psalms62:10 Maiv dungx bangc niouv mienh nyei sic weic duqv nyaanh
Psalms62:11 Tin-Hungh gorngv nzunc
Psalms62:12 O Ziouv aah! Se dongh meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Weic zuqc meih ziux gorqv-mienh zoux nyei winh zingh nyeic bun mienh.
Psalms63:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms63:2 Yie yiem singx dinc buatc jiex meih
Psalms63:3 Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh se gauh longx ziangh maengc
Psalms63:4 Da'faanh corc maaih maengc nyei ziangh hoc yie oix ceng meih. Yie oix dengv meih nyei mengh sung yie nyei buoz daux gaux.
Psalms63:5 Yie nyei hnyouv hnangv nyanc beuv yinh wuic nyei lai-hnaangx. Yie nyei nzuih yaac oix njien-youh nyei ceng meih.
Psalms63:6 Yie bueix jienv coux jangx taux meih
Psalms63:7 Weic zuqc meih zanc-zanc tengx yie
Psalms63:8 Yie nyei hnyouv kaux wuonv meih. Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz baav jienv yie.
Psalms63:9 Oix hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix mienh zungv oix ndortv njiec yiemh gen.
Psalms63:10 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix
Psalms63:11 Mv baac hungh diex oix kaux Tin-Hungh njien-youh. Da'faanh ziangv jienv ninh houv waac nyei mienh oix ceng ninh
Psalms64:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Yie tauv domh qiex nyei ziangh hoc tov muangx yie nyei qiex. Tov meih beu jienv yie nyei maengc
Psalms64:2 Tov meih tengx yie bingx jienv beic ndiev daav za'eix wuov deix orqv mienh
Psalms64:3 Ninh mbuo nzioux ganh nyei mbietc hnangv nzuqc ndaauv nor laic
Psalms64:4 Ninh mbuo bingx jienv buonv maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh
Psalms64:5 Ninh mbuo laanh kuinx laanh ei ninh mbuo waaic nyei za'eix zoux. Ninh mbuo beic ndiev caangh laangh zaeng hlaang hlopv mienh. Ninh mbuo hnamv daaih
Psalms64:6 Haaix dauh haih wetv cuotv yie mbuo zoux nyei waaic sic? Yie mbuo hnamv cuotv guaix haic nyei za'eix.” Mienh nyei hnyouv caux eix za'gengh ndo haic.
Psalms64:7 Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix longc forng-cang buonv ninh mbuo
Psalms64:8 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo ganh nyei mbietc oix hoic ninh mbuo zuqc baaic. Da'faanh buatc ninh mbuo nyei mienh ziouc huangx m'nqorngv.
Psalms64:9 Zuangx mienh ziouc gamh nziex haic
Psalms64:10 Kuv mienh ziouc kaux Ziouv njien-youh yaac oix ndaauh kaux ninh. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh yaac oix ceng ninh.
Psalms65:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Yie mbuo horpc zuqc yiem Si^on ceng meih
Psalms65:2 Meih muangx baamh mienh daux gaux nyei waac. Baamh mienh yietc zungv oix daaih lorz meih
Psalms65:3 weic mienh baamz zuiz. Yie mbuo nyei zuiz-nipc hingh yie mbuo nyei ziangh hoc meih zungv guangc mi'aqv.
Psalms65:4 Meih ginv dorh daaih yiem nitv fatv meih wuov deix
Psalms65:5 O yie mbuo njoux en nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Meih longc mbuoqc horngh nyei sic njoux yie mbuo
Psalms65:6 Meih longc meih nyei qaqv liepc mbong jiez daaih
Psalms65:7 Meih bun koiv mbui nyei qiex caux wuom-laangc nyei qiex sekv
Psalms65:8 Yiem lungh ndiev go jiex nyei dorngx nyei mienh ziouc weic meih zoux nyei jangx-hoc gamh nziex. Meih bun mba'hnoi cuotv caux mba'hnoi muotv wuov deix dorngx nyei mienh njien-youh nyei heuc.
Psalms65:9 Meih goux ndau-beih yaac bun mbiungc njiec daaih bun ndau junc haic. Tin-Hungh nyei ndaaih maaih wuom buangv nzengc. Meih yaac bun mienh duqv laangh ziqc weic zuqc meih hnangv naaic liuc leiz ziangx ndau.
Psalms65:10 Meih bun lungh duih mbiungc njiec laih ziangx nyei ndau
Psalms65:11 Meih bun hnyangx-daauh bungx-zuoqc
Psalms65:12 Yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei miev-ciangv nyiemz haic
Psalms65:13 Miev-ciangv hnangv maaih yungh guanh zorng jienv
Psalms66:1 Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Tin-Hungh.
Psalms66:2 Baaux nzung ceng ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox. Ceng ninh bun cing ninh njang-laangc haic.
Psalms66:3 Oix zuqc mbuox Tin-Hungh
Psalms66:4 Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh baaix meih. Ninh mbuo baaux nzung ceng meih. Ninh mbuo baaux nzung ceng meih nyei mengh.”
Psalms66:5 Daaih mangc Tin-Hungh zoux nyei sic maah! Ninh yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx zoux domh mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Psalms66:6 Ninh tiuv koiv benx ndau-nqaai
Psalms66:7 Ninh longc domh qaqv yietc liuz gunv
Psalms66:8 Maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms66:9 Ninh beu jienv bun yie mbuo maaih maengc ziangh
Psalms66:10 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih kauv yie mbuo. Meih sinx yie mbuo hnangv sinx nyaanh nor.
Psalms66:11 Meih bun yie mbuo zuqc mungz zaaux jienv
Psalms66:12 Meih bun mienh geh mborqv jaax cie nganx yie mbuo nyei m'nqorngv. Yie mbuo zuqc jiex wuom jiex douz
Psalms66:13 Yie oix dorh buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv bieqc meih nyei biauv. Yie oix jaauv sung yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac
Psalms66:14 ziux zuqc kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc caux yie nyei nzuih meix gorngv cuotv nyei waac
Psalms66:15 Yie oix fongc horc junc nyei saeng-kuv zoux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux jienv ba'gi yungh gouv zoux ndaang nyei qiex. Yie longc ngongh gouv caux yungh gouv fongc horc bun meih.
Psalms66:16 Da'faanh taaih Tin-Hungh nyei mienh gunv daaih muangx maah! Yie ziouc mbuox meih mbuo ninh weic yie zoux nyei sic.
Psalms66:17 Yie heuc jienv tov ninh
Psalms66:18 Se gorngv yie sueih zuiz yiem yie nyei hnyouv
Psalms66:19 Mv baac Tin-Hungh za'gengh muangx yie. Ninh baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac.
Psalms66:20 Ceng Tin-Hungh weic zuqc ninh maiv nqemh yie daux gaux nyei waac. Ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie
Psalms67:1 Tov Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yie mbuo
Psalms67:2 weic bun lungh ndiev mienh hiuv duqv meih nyei jauv-louc
Psalms67:3 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun fingx-fingx mienh ceng meih. Tov bun maanc fingx ceng meih.
Psalms67:4 Tov bun maanc guoqv a'hneiv
Psalms67:5 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun fingx-fingx mienh ceng meih. Tov bun maanc fingx ceng meih.
Psalms67:6 Ndau cuotv gaeng-zuangx. Tin-Hungh
Psalms67:7 Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv bun yie mbuo. Tov bun yiem jomc lungh ndiev nyei maanc mienh taaih ninh.
Psalms68:1 Tov Tin-Hungh jiez daaih
Psalms68:2 Tov zunc ninh mbuo biaux
Psalms68:3 Mv baac tov bun kuv mienh a'hneiv
Psalms68:4 Baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms68:5 Tin-Hungh yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc dorngx zoux guh hanh fu'jueiv nyei die yaac beu jienv auv-guaav.
Psalms68:6 Tin-Hungh bun kou-ndoqc mienh maaih biauv yiem
Psalms68:7 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih yiem meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv mingh yangh jiex deic-bung-huaang wuov zanc
Psalms68:8 ndau dorng jienv Tin-Hungh dongz
Psalms68:9 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih bun lungh duih domh mbiungc njiec. Meih nzipc nyei buonc ndau nqaai
Psalms68:10 Meih nyei baeqc fingx liepc nguaaz-gorn yiem wuov. O Tin-Hungh aah! Weic zuqc meih longx haic
Psalms68:11 Ziouv hatc waac
Psalms68:12 “Gunv jun-baeng nyei hungh tiux biaux nzengc. Biaux nzengc aqv loh!” Yiem biauv wuov deix m'sieqv dorn bun nqoi caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv.
Psalms68:13 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo corc bueix ba'gi yungh laanh mbu'ndongx
Psalms68:14 Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh bun yiem deic-bung wuov deix hungh diex nzaanx mingh nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms68:15 Mbaasaan Mbong benx hlo hlang nyei domh mbong. Mbaasaan Mbong maaih ziex norm mbong-ningv.
Psalms68:16 Ningv camv nyei mbong aah! Meih weic haaix diuc mangc buatc korv-fiqv Tin-Hungh oix longc benx ninh yiem nyei dorngx
Psalms68:17 Ziouv yiem Sinaai Mbong dorh jienv cin-cin waanc-waanc norm mborqv jaax cie bieqc cing-nzengc nyei dorngx.
Psalms68:18 Meih faaux hlang nyei dorngx wuov zanc meih dorh zuqc caangv nyei mienh gan jienv mingh
Psalms68:19 Ceng Ziouv
Psalms68:20 Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh se njoux yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Se Ziouv Tin-Hungh
Psalms68:21 Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix mborqv huv ninh nyei win-wangv nyei m'nqorngv
Psalms68:22 Ziouv gorngv
Psalms68:23 weic bun meih mbuo comx jienv meih mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei nziaamv gu'nyuoz
Psalms68:24 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms68:25 Baaux nzung nyei mienh yiem wuov ndaangc maengx
Psalms68:26 “O I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei wuic mbu'ndongx ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms68:27 Gauh faix jiex nyei Mben^yaa^min Fingx mingh ndaangc. Gan nqa'haav daaih maaih Yu^ndaa Fingx nyei bieiv zeiv
Psalms68:28 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun meih nyei qaqv cuotv. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov longc meih nyei qaqv tengx yie mbuo hnangv meih weic yie mbuo zoux jiex nor.
Psalms68:29 Weic meih yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei biauv zuangx hungh diex dorh zingh nyeic bun meih.
Psalms68:30 Tov meih hemx I^yipv
Psalms68:31 Maaih gong-zoh oix yiem I^yipv daaih. E^ti^o^bie Mienh oix siepv-siepv nyei sung buoz jouh Tin-Hungh.
Psalms68:32 O lungh ndiev maanc guoqv aah! Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms68:33 Ceng geh jienv gu'nguaaic lungh wuov dauh
Psalms68:34 Zunh gorngv Tin-Hungh maaih qaqv
Psalms68:35 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms69:1 Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih njoux yie. Wuom hlo jienv faaux
Psalms69:2 Yie zemh njiec ndo haic nyei wuom-bamc gu'nyuoz
Psalms69:3 Yie heuc jienv tov gau kouv nzengc
Psalms69:4 Nzorng yie yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx wuov deix mienh gauh camv yie nyei m'nqorngv nyei mba'biei. Maiv maaih gorn-baengx mv baac oix hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix win-wangv henv haic
Psalms69:5 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih hiuv duqv yie ndongc haaix hngongx. Yie zoux dorngc nyei sic yaac bingx maiv mbueiz meih.
Psalms69:6 O Ziouv
Psalms69:7 Se weic meih yie cingx zuqc mienh gorngv doqc
Psalms69:8 Yie nyei gorx-youz buatc yie benx ninh mbuo maiv hiuv nyei mienh. Caux yie juangc maa nyei muoz-doic yaac funx yie benx ganh fingx mienh.
Psalms69:9 Yie weic meih nyei biauv jorm hnyouv hnangv douz zieqc jienv yie nor. Mienh gorngv doqc meih mv baac ninh mbuo nyei waac gorngv zuqc yie.
Psalms69:10 Yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc weic zatv ganh zoux faix
Psalms69:11 Yie zuqv la'maah ndie-cou dorngx lui
Psalms69:12 Zueiz jienv zingh gaengh ndaangc nyei mienh kuanv yie
Psalms69:13 Mv baac Ziouv aah! Yie daux gaux tov meih. O Tin-Hungh aah! Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Psalms69:14 Tov njoux yie maiv zuqc zemh njiec wuom-bamc gu'nyuoz. Tov tengx yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv caux ndo nyei wuom.
Psalms69:15 Tov maiv dungx bun wuom yiemx yie
Psalms69:16 O Ziouv aah! Tov dau yie
Psalms69:17 Maiv dungx bingx meih nyei hmien
Psalms69:18 Tov daaih nitv fatv yie
Psalms69:19 Meih hiuv duqv yie zuqc mienh huotv
Psalms69:20 Yie zuqc mienh huotv
Psalms69:21 Ninh mbuo zorqv daamv dorngx nyanc hopv bun yie. Yie jaang nqaatv ninh mbuo bun a'ngunc diuv-sui yie hopv.
Psalms69:22 Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei yinh wuic benx koux hlopv ninh mbuo
Psalms69:23 Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei m'zing mbuov
Psalms69:24 Meih bun mienh nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv bun ninh mbuo. Tov bun meih qiex jiez
Psalms69:25 Tov bun ninh mbuo yiem nyei ciangv benx ndau-huaang
Psalms69:26 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo hoic meih mborqv nyei mienh
Psalms69:27 Tov meih dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz aengx jaa dingc
Psalms69:28 Tov sortv ninh mbuo nyei mbuox cuotv ziangh maengc daan
Psalms69:29 Mv baac yie zuqc kouv naanc yaac zuqc mun. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun meih nyei njoux en bouh yie faaux hlang.
Psalms69:30 Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh nyei mengh
Psalms69:31 Hnangv naaic ziouc bun Ziouv gauh horpc hnyouv fongc horc ngongh gouv
Psalms69:32 Zuqc zeix nyei mienh buatc liuz ziouc a'hneiv. Lorz Tin-Hungh nyei mienh aah! Tov bun meih nyei hnyouv fingv jiez daaih maah!
Psalms69:33 Weic zuqc Ziouv muangx dangx-donx nyei mienh
Psalms69:34 Tov lungh caux ndau caux koiv caux yiem naaiv deix yietc zungv gu'nyuoz haih dongz nyei ga'naaiv ceng ninh.
Psalms69:35 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix njoux Si^on
Psalms69:36 Ninh nyei bou nyei zeiv-fun oix duqv nzipc wuov norm deic-bung. Hnamv ninh nyei mengh nyei mienh yaac oix duqv yiem wuov.
Psalms70:1 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov gaanv daaih njoux yie. O Ziouv aah! Tov siepv-siepv nyei tengx yie.
Psalms70:2 Tov bun oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix mienh zuqc nyaiv zuqc lunc. Tov bun dongh a'hneiv yie zuqc kouv wuov deix zuqc tuix nzuonx nqa'haav yaac zuqc baaic hmien.
Psalms70:3 Tov bun gorngv
Psalms70:4 Tov bun yietc zungv daaih lorz meih wuov deix
Psalms70:5 Mv baac yie kouv yaac jomc haic. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov siepv-siepv nyei daaih yie naaiv. Meih se dongh tengx yie
Psalms71:1 O Ziouv aah! Yie ndaauh kaux meih. Tov bun yie yietc liuz maiv zuqc nyaiv.
Psalms71:2 Weic zuqc meih maaih gong-fim nyei
Psalms71:3 Tov meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei la'bieiv
Psalms71:4 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev
Psalms71:5 O Ziouv aah! Meih zoux yie maaih lamh hnamv nyei dorngx. Ziouv aah! Yiem yie lunx taux ih zanc yie kaux meih hnangv.
Psalms71:6 Yiem yie cuotv seix taux ih zanc yie bangc meih
Psalms71:7 Mienh camv nyei mbuoqc horngh haic yie mv baac meih zoux yie kaux wuonv nyei dorngx.
Psalms71:8 Yie ziangh hnoi longc yie nyei nzuih ceng meih
Psalms71:9 Yie gox nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms71:10 Yie nyei win-wangv lorz jauv gorngv yie
Psalms71:11 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms71:12 O Tin-Hungh aah! Maiv dungx leih go yie. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie.
Psalms71:13 Tov bun yie nyei win-wangv zuqc nyaiv zuqc baaic nzengc. Tov bun lorz jauv hoic yie wuov deix baaic hmien diev nyaiv.
Psalms71:14 Mv baac yie nor
Psalms71:15 Yie nyei nzuih oix gorngv meih zoux nyei kuv sic
Psalms71:16 Ziouv Tin-Hungh aah! Yie oix dorh meih zoux henv haic nyei sic daaih gorngv
Psalms71:17 O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie yiem hnyangx-jeiv lunx taux ih zanc meih njaaux yie. Yie corc zunh meih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Psalms71:18 O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie taux hnyangx-jeiv gox
Psalms71:19 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux horpc nyei jauv mbaengc lungh hlang. O Tin-Hungh aah! Se meih zoux hlo haic nyei sic. Haaix dauh haih hnangv meih?
Psalms71:20 Meih bun yie zuqc domh kouv naanc
Psalms71:21 Meih oix taaih yie zoux gauh hlo zinh ndaangc yaac aengx orn nzunc yie nyei hnyouv.
Psalms71:22 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie yaac oix longc daanh baah ceng meih
Psalms71:23 Yie baaux nzung ceng meih nyei ziangh hoc yie nyei nzuih meix oix njien-youh nyei heuc. Yie nyei hnyouv yaac oix njien-youh nyei heuc
Psalms71:24 Yie nyei mbietc ziangh hnoi oix gorngv meih zoux horpc nyei jauv tengx mienh
Psalms72:1 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov ceix bun hungh diex baengh fim nyei siemv hnangv meih nor
Psalms72:2 Tov bun ninh longc gong-fim siemv meih nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms72:3 Weic baeqc fingx zoux horpc nyei jauv tov bun domh mbong fiuv-mbong duqv bungx-zuoqc.
Psalms72:4 Tov bun hungh diex baengh fim nyei tengx baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx nyei mienh jomc mienh
Psalms72:5 Mba'hnoi caux hlaax corc yiem jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms72:6 Tov bun hungh diex hnangv mbiungc duih njiec mbietv liuz miev nyei ndau
Psalms72:7 Ninh yiem nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Psalms72:8 Tov bun ninh gunv nyei guoqv yiem naaiv bung koiv taux wuov bung koiv
Psalms72:9 Tov bun yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei mienh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec baaix
Psalms72:10 Tov bun Taansitv caux zuangx koiv-nzou nyei hungh diex cuotv korx-zinh bun ninh. Yaac bun Qe^mbaa caux Se^mbaa nyei hungh diex dorh zingh nyeic bun ninh.
Psalms72:11 Tov bun zuangx hungh diex puoqv njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien
Psalms72:12 Weic zuqc dangx-donx nyei mienh heuc jienv tov nyei ziangh hoc ninh njoux
Psalms72:13 Ninh korv-lienh mau nyei mienh caux mienh jomc mienh
Psalms72:14 Ninh zuoqc ninh mbuo nyei maengc leih ndutv zuqc zeix
Psalms72:15 Tov bun hungh diex ziangh duqv ndaauv. Tov bun ninh duqv Qe^mbaa nyei jiem. Tov bun mienh maiv dingh liouh nyei weic ninh daux gaux
Psalms72:16 Tov bun deic-bung nyei ndau cuotv laangh ziqc bungx-zuoqc
Psalms72:17 Tov bun hungh diex nyei mbuox yietc liuz yiem
Psalms72:18 Ceng Ziouv
Psalms72:19 Oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox
Psalms72:20 Jetc^si nyei dorn
Psalms73:1 Tin-Hungh za'gengh! zoux longx bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Psalms73:2 Mv baac yie ganh aeqv
Psalms73:3 Weic zuqc yie buatc orqv mienh duqv longx wuov zanc
Psalms73:4 Ninh mbuo daic nyei ziangh hoc maiv zuqc diev mun
Psalms73:5 Ninh mbuo maiv zuqc siouc kouv hnangv nyiec nyei mienh
Psalms73:6 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo zoux maux nyei jauv beiv jiem-limc dangh jienv jaang. Zoux doqc nyei sic buang jienv ninh mbuo hnangv zuqv lui nor.
Psalms73:7 Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv ngaengc
Psalms73:8 Ninh mbuo jatv mienh
Psalms73:9 Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv doqc yiem gu'nguaaic lungh nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo nyei mbietc zoux maux gorngv doqc lungh ndiev mienh.
Psalms73:10 Weic naaiv baeqc fingx huin nzuonx ceng ninh mbuo
Psalms73:11 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms73:12 Mangc maah! Orqv mienh se hnangv naaiv nor. Ninh mbuo zanc-zanc kuh yiem kuh nyanc
Psalms73:13 Wuov nyungc yie goux longx yie nyei hnyouv cing-nzengc yaac maiv baamz zuiz se maiv lamh longc.
Psalms73:14 Weic zuqc yie ziangh hnoi kungx zuqc kouv hnangv
Psalms73:15 Se gorngv yie gorngv
Psalms73:16 Yie hnamv mangc gaax hnangv haaix nor haih bieqc hnyouv naaiv deix sic
Psalms73:17 taux yie bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei singx dinc
Psalms73:18 Meih za'gengh bun ninh mbuo yiem mbiaangc nyei dorngx
Psalms73:19 Ninh mbuo nduqc dangh hnangv zuqc mietc mi'aqv. Zuqc gamh nziex haic nyei sic guaatv ninh mbuo mingh nzengc.
Psalms73:20 Hnangv mienh mbeix buatc liuz nyie daaih maiv buatc mi'aqv. O Ziouv aah! Meih nyie daaih meih la'kuqv ninh mbuo nyei fangx mi'aqv.
Psalms73:21 Yie nyei hnyouv kouv wuov zanc
Psalms73:22 Yie ziouc hngongx
Psalms73:23 Mv baac yie zanc-zanc caux meih yiem. Meih nanv jienv yie nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz.
Psalms73:24 Meih tengx yie caangh laangh weic dorh yie nyei jauv. Nqa'haav meih oix zipv yie
Psalms73:25 Yiem wuov gu'nguaaic lungh
Psalms73:26 Yie nyei sin caux yie nyei hnyouv haih mau jienv njiec
Psalms73:27 Mangc maah! Leih meih go nyei mienh zungv oix zuqc mietc. Meih oix mietc nzengc maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun meih wuov deix mienh.
Psalms73:28 Mv baac yie nor
Psalms74:1 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih weic haaix diuc yietc liuz guangc yie mbuo? Meih weic haaix diuc qiex jiez meih nyei yungh ciangv nyei ba'gi yungh hnangv cuotv douz-sioux?
Psalms74:2 Tov meih jangx jienv meih loz-hnoi ginv daaih nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms74:3 Tov meih laamx mingh mangc naaiv deix yietc liuz baaic huaang nyei dorngx. Win-wangv mietc nzengc yiem singx dinc nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv.
Psalms74:4 Meih nyei win-wangv yiem meih nyei wuic dorngh qaqv heuc. Ninh mbuo cie ninh mbuo ganh nyei geh faaux weic zoux jangx-hoc.
Psalms74:5 Buatc ninh mbuo hnangv mienh yiem lomc yaamh bouv hngaqv ndiangx nor.
Psalms74:6 Yiem singx dinc gu'nyuoz yietc zungv diu daaih nyei ndiangx
Psalms74:7 Ninh mbuo longc douz buov meih nyei singx dinc njiec taux ndau
Psalms74:8 Ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv hnamv
Psalms74:9 Yie mbuo maiv buatc yie mbuo nyei jangx-hoc
Psalms74:10 O Tin-Hungh aah! Win-jaa oix huotv ndongc haaix lauh? Win-wangv oix yietc liuz gorngv doqc meih nyei mengh fai?
Psalms74:11 Meih weic haaix diuc nyuotv jienv buoz
Psalms74:12 Mv baac Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms74:13 Meih longc meih nyei domh qaqv zorqv koiv bun nqoi
Psalms74:14 Meih zienv Le^wi^aa^taan nyei m'nqorngv huv
Psalms74:15 Meih bun wuom-zingv caux ndoqv nyei wuom liouc cuotv. Zanc-zanc maaih wuom liouc jienv nyei ndaaih meih bun nqaai mingh.
Psalms74:16 Lungh hnoi zanc benx meih nyei
Psalms74:17 Ndau-beih nyei yietc zungv gapv-jaaix se meih dingc daaih. Meih yaac bun maaih haac gueix caux dong gueix.
Psalms74:18 O Ziouv aah! Tov meih jangx jienv win-wangv ndongc haaix huotv meih. Mienh hngongx mienh yaac gorngv doqc meih nyei mengh.
Psalms74:19 Maiv dungx zorqv meih nyei norqc nqo nyei maengc jiu bun hieh zoih. Tov maiv dungx yietc liuz la'kuqv meih nyei mienh jomc mienh nyei maengc.
Psalms74:20 Tov jangx jienv meih liepc nyei ngaengc waac weic zuqc ndau-beih norm-norm hmuangx nyei dorngx maaih zoux doqc hoic mienh nyei sic buangv nzengc.
Psalms74:21 Tov maiv dungx bun zuqc zeix nyei mienh zuqc nyaiv. Tov bun mienh jomc mienh caux dangx-donx nyei mienh ceng meih nyei mengh.
Psalms74:22 O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih jiez daaih maah! Tov weic ganh caengx sic. Jangx jienv mienh hngongx mienh hnangv haaix nor ziangh hnoi huotv meih.
Psalms74:23 Maiv dungx la'kuqv meih nyei win-wangv qaqv heuc nyei qiex. Se meih nyei win-jaa maiv dingh liouh nyei nauc jienv heuc mbui nyei qiex.
Psalms75:1 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms75:2 Tin-Hungh gorngv
Psalms75:3 Baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei yietc zungv mienh lungh lungh laih laih wuov zanc
Psalms75:4 Yie gorngv mbuox ceng-hlo nyei mienh
Psalms75:5 Maiv dungx taaih ganh hlo
Psalms75:6 Bouh mienh faaux hlang maiv zeiz yiem dong bung fai bung daaih
Psalms75:7 Se Tin-Hungh dunx sic. Ninh zatv yietc dauh njiec aiv
Psalms75:8 Weic zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei buoz maaih norm zaanv
Psalms75:9 Mv baac yie nor
Psalms75:10 Yie oix zoux waaic orqv mienh nyei qaqv
Psalms76:1 Yiem Yu^ndaa Deic mienh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh. Yiem I^saa^laa^en ninh nyei mengh hlo haic.
Psalms76:2 Yiem Saalem ninh liepc ninh nyei ndopv-liuh
Psalms76:3 Yiem wuov ninh wuotv nauv maaih douz nyei forng-cang
Psalms76:4 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms76:5 Ninh mbuo hnyouv henv nyei mienh nyei ga'naaiv zungv zuqc caangv nzengc. Ninh mbuo daic nzengc mi'aqv. Mborqv jaax nyei zuangx mienh
Psalms76:6 O Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms76:7 Mv baac mienh gamh nziex nyei se kungx meih ganh hnangv. Meih qiex jiez nyei ziangh hoc haaix dauh haih yiem meih nyei nza'hmien?
Psalms76:8 Meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv siemv zuiz nyei waac
Psalms76:9 dongh Tin-Hungh daaih dingc zuiz
Psalms76:10 Baamh mienh qiex jiez
Psalms76:11 Meih mbuo oix zuqc laengz ngaengc waac bun Ziouv
Psalms76:12 Ninh zatv jienv zoux hlo wuov deix nyei hnyouv
Psalms77:1 Yie heuc jienv jouh Tin-Hungh. Yie heuc jienv tov
Psalms77:2 Yie zuqc kouv naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc yie lorz Ziouv
Psalms77:3 Yie hnamv taux Tin-Hungh ziouc tauv domh qiex. Yie jangx taux naaiv deix jauv
Psalms77:4 Meih bun yie maiv haih m'njormh. Yie hnyouv nzauh kouv haic
Psalms77:5 Yie hnamv taux jiex daaih nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Psalms77:6 Yie lungh muonz zanc yiem hnyouv hnamv
Psalms77:7 “Ziouv oix yietc liuz guangc yie mbuo
Psalms77:8 Ninh yietc liuz maiv aengx hnamv yie mbuo fai? Ninh laengz nyei waac yietc liuz yietc seix baac nzengc mi'aqv fai?
Psalms77:9 Tin-Hungh la'kuqv ceix en bun yie mbuo fai? Ninh qiex jiez ziouc maiv korv-lienh fai?”
Psalms77:10 Yie aengx gorngv
Psalms77:11 Yie oix jangx taux Ziouv zoux jiex nyei sic
Psalms77:12 Yie yiem hnyouv buih meih zoux nyei yietc zungv gong
Psalms77:13 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms77:14 Meih se zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic wuov dauh Tin-Hungh. Meih yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx bun ninh mbuo buatc meih nyei domh qaqv.
Psalms77:15 Meih longc meih nyei qaqv njoux meih nyei mienh
Psalms77:16 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms77:17 Mbuonx dox cuotv wuom
Psalms77:18 Mba'ong yiem domh nziaaux-zunc mbui cuotv. Meih nyei mba'lingc bun lungh ndiev njang nzengc. Ndau-beih ndanc dongz nzengc.
Psalms77:19 Meih nyei jauv se yiem koiv jiex
Psalms77:20 Meih dorh meih nyei baeqc fingx hnangv goux yungh mienh dorh ba'gi yungh guanh nor
Psalms78:1 O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx yie njaaux nyei jauv
Psalms78:2 Yie oix gorngv waac-beiv
Psalms78:3 Se yie mbuo duqv haiz duqv hiuv nyei jauv
Psalms78:4 Yie mbuo maiv zorqv naaiv deix sic bingx yie mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv
Psalms78:5 Ninh yiem Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun mbu'ndongx liepc leiz-nyeic
Psalms78:6 weic bun nqa'haav wuov doic zeiv-fun
Psalms78:7 Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo ziouc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx
Psalms78:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc maiv hnangv ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix nor
Psalms78:9 E^faa^im Mienh nanv jienv juang-zinx forng-cang
Psalms78:10 Ninh mbuo maiv ei Tin-Hungh liepc nyei ngaengc waac
Psalms78:11 Ninh mbuo la'kuqv ninh zoux jiex nyei sic
Psalms78:12 Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung
Psalms78:13 Ninh zorqv koiv bun nqoi
Psalms78:14 Lungh hnoi zanc ninh longc mbuonx
Psalms78:15 Ninh yiem deic-bung-huaang mborqv mbaaix la'bieiv
Psalms78:16 Ninh bun wuom yiem la'bieiv mbeux cuotv benx ndoqv
Psalms78:17 Mv baac ninh mbuo corc baamz zuiz dorngc Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang ngaengc jienv Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh.
Psalms78:18 Ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv duqv-eix seix Tin-Hungh
Psalms78:19 Ninh mbuo gorngv doqc Tin-Hungh ziouc gorngv
Psalms78:20 Ninh mborqv la'bieiv-zorng bun wuom baetv cuotv
Psalms78:21 Ziouv muangx haiz ninh mbuo nyei waac ziouc qiex jiez haic. Ninh longc douz buov Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh yietc zei gauh fatv qiex jiez I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Psalms78:22 weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv sienx Tin-Hungh yaac maiv kaux ninh nyei njoux en.
Psalms78:23 Mv baac ninh hatc lungh
Psalms78:24 Ninh bun maa^naa duih njiec bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nyanc
Psalms78:25 Baamh mienh duqv nyanc fin-mienh nyei laangh ziqc
Psalms78:26 Tin-Hungh bun dong bung nyei nziaaux yiem wuov lungh buonc daaih
Psalms78:27 Ninh bun orv njiec ndongc nie-mbung camv
Psalms78:28 Ninh bun norqc ndortv njiec ninh mbuo nyei ciangv mbu'ndongx
Psalms78:29 Ninh mbuo ziouc nyanc yaac nyanc duqv beuv. Tin-Hungh ziux ninh mbuo ngorc nyanc nyei ceix bun ninh mbuo.
Psalms78:30 Mv baac ninh mbuo nyanc ngorc nyei ga'naaiv maiv gaengh gaux
Psalms78:31 Tin-Hungh qiex jiez! haic ninh mbuo
Psalms78:32 Maiv gunv maaih naaiv deix sic
Psalms78:33 Ninh ziouc zoux bun ninh mbuo setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv lamh longc
Psalms78:34 Tin-Hungh daix ninh mbuo nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo ziouc lorz ninh aqv. Ninh mbuo goiv hnyouv
Psalms78:35 Ninh mbuo jangx zuqc Tin-Hungh se ninh mbuo nyei La'bieiv. Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh dongh Zuoqc Ninh Mbuo Wuov Dauh.
Psalms78:36 Ninh mbuo longc nzuih gorngv waac-gaam ceng ninh
Psalms78:37 Ninh mbuo maiv liepc dingc hnyouv kaux ninh
Psalms78:38 Mv baac ninh corc korv-lienh ninh mbuo
Psalms78:39 Ninh jangx ninh mbuo kungx benx haih daic nyei baamh mienh
Psalms78:40 Yiem deic-bung-huaang ninh mbuo ngaengc ninh ndongc wuov camv
Psalms78:41 Ninh mbuo seix ninh yietc nzunc jiex yietc nzunc. Ninh mbuo cuoqv I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh.
Psalms78:42 Ninh mbuo maiv jangx ninh nyei domh qaqv
Psalms78:43 dongh yiem I^yipv ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc
Psalms78:44 Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei ndaaih goiv benx nziaamv
Psalms78:45 Ninh bun mungz faanv daaih hoic
Psalms78:46 Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei gaeng-zuangx bun jopv-nyeic lunx
Psalms78:47 Ninh bun borqc mborqv waaic ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc hmei
Psalms78:48 Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei ngongh bun borqc mborqv
Psalms78:49 Ninh nyei ga'qiex biuih cuotv
Psalms78:50 Ninh liuc leiz ziangx bun qiex jiez nyei jauv cuotv. Ninh maiv liouh ninh mbuo nyei maengc
Psalms78:51 Yiem I^yipv ninh daix mouz dauh dorn-la'gauv
Psalms78:52 Nqa'haav ninh dorh ninh nyei baeqc fingx cuotv daaih hnangv ba'gi yungh. Ninh dorh ninh mbuo jiex deic-bung-huaang hnangv yungh guanh nor.
Psalms78:53 Ninh dorh longx ninh mbuo
Psalms78:54 Ninh dorh ninh mbuo mingh taux ninh cing-nzengc deic-bung nyei gapv-jaaix dorngx
Psalms78:55 Ninh zunc fingx-fingx mienh yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv mingh. Ninh ndorqc ndau bun nqoi weic benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc
Psalms78:56 Mv baac ninh mbuo corc seix yaac ngaengc jienv Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms78:57 Daaux nzuonx ninh mbuo ngaengc hnangv ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Psalms78:58 Ninh mbuo ceix yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx cuoqv ninh qiex jiez haic. Laaix ninh mbuo zoux miuc-fangx
Psalms78:59 Tin-Hungh muangx haiz ziouc qiex jiez! haic
Psalms78:60 Yiem Silo
Psalms78:61 Ninh zorqv ninh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang jiu bun mienh caangv mingh
Psalms78:62 Ninh qiex jiez haic ninh nzipc nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms78:63 Douz mietc nzengc ninh mbuo nyei houh saeng
Psalms78:64 Ninh mbuo nyei sai mienh zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix
Psalms78:65 Wuov zanc Ziouv nyie hnangv mienh m'njormh mingh nyie daaih nor
Psalms78:66 Ninh mborqv ninh nyei win-wangv tuix nzuonx
Psalms78:67 Ninh nqemh Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun
Psalms78:68 Mv baac ninh ginv Yu^ndaa Fingx
Psalms78:69 Ninh ceix ninh nyei singx dinc hnangv hlang haic nyei lungh
Psalms78:70 Ninh ginv ninh nyei bou
Psalms78:71 Ndaawitv goux dorh jienv dorn nyei ba'gi yungh nyeiz wuov zanc
Psalms78:72 Ndaawitv longc hnyouv zingx nyei goux ninh mbuo
Psalms79:1 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms79:2 Ninh mbuo zorqv meih nyei bou nyei sei zoux lungh zaangc norqc nyei nyanc hopv
Psalms79:3 Ninh mbuo bun meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv hnangv wuom nor
Psalms79:4 Yie mbuo zuqc juangc laangz mienh ki yie mbuo
Psalms79:5 O Ziouv aac
Psalms79:6 Tov bun maiv nyiemc meih wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh caux maiv heuc meih nyei mbuox wuov deix maanc guoqv
Psalms79:7 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo naqv nzengc Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun
Psalms79:8 Tov meih maiv dungx jangx yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix zoux nyei zuiz
Psalms79:9 O yie mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv
Psalms79:10 Ganh fingx mienh weic haaix diuc naaic
Psalms79:11 Tov meih muangx haiz zuqc wuonx nyei mienh njunh nyei qiex
Psalms79:12 O Ziouv aac
Psalms79:13 Hnangv naaic yie mbuo
Psalms80:1 O goux I^saa^laa^en nyei Ziouv aac
Psalms80:2 yiem E^faa^im
Psalms80:3 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms80:4 O Ziouv
Psalms80:5 Meih zorqv wuom-mueic dorngx hnaangx bun ninh mbuo nyanc
Psalms80:6 Meih bun weih gormx yie mbuo wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh nzaeng yie mbuo nyei deic-bung. Yie mbuo nyei win-wangv lomh nzoih jatv.
Psalms80:7 O Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms80:8 Meih dorh diuh a'ngunc hmei cuotv I^yipv
Psalms80:9 Meih fioux ndau bun nzungh njiec ndo
Psalms80:10 Naaiv diuh hmei nzie jienv geh zorng
Psalms80:11 Hmei nyei nquaah mbiorngz mingh taux domh koiv
Psalms80:12 Meih weic haaix diuc mborqv waaic naaiv norm laatc? Jiex jauv nyei yietc zungv mienh ziouc gaeqv biouv.
Psalms80:13 Hieh dungz yiem lomc cuotv daaih caaiv waaic
Psalms80:14 O Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms80:15 dongh meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz zuangx nyei a'ngunc hmei
Psalms80:16 Ninh mbuo longc douz buov naaiv diuh hmei yaac hngaqv njiec nzengc. Tov bun ninh mbuo buatc meih nyei hmien qiex jiez
Psalms80:17 Tov bun meih nyei buoz maan jienv yiem meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz nyei mienh
Psalms80:18 Hnangv naaic yie mbuo ziouc yietc liuz maiv tuix nzuonx leih nqoi meih. Tov bun yie mbuo duqv maengc ziangh
Psalms80:19 O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms81:1 Baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms81:2 Jiez gorn baaux nzung
Psalms81:3 Siang-Hlaax caux ziepc hmz
Psalms81:4 Naaiv se weic I^saa^laa^en benx diuh leiz-nyeic
Psalms81:5 Ninh cuotv mingh mborqv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc
Psalms81:6 “Yie zorqv meih mbuo nyiex hniev nyei ga'naaiv bouh njiec
Psalms81:7 Zuqc naanc zingh nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo heuc
Psalms81:8 “O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Muangx yie kuinx meih mbuo. O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Feix duqv meih mbuo muangx yie gorngv nyei waac.
Psalms81:9 Yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maiv dungx maaih nyiec nyei zienh
Psalms81:10 Yie se Ziouv
Psalms81:11 “Mv baac yie nyei mienh maiv muangx yie nyei waac. I^saa^laa^en Mienh zungv maiv longc yie.
Psalms81:12 Yie ziouc sueih binc ninh mbuo ziux ninh mbuo hnyouv ngaengc nyei eix zoux. Sueih ninh mbuo ei ninh mbuo ganh nyei za'eix.
Psalms81:13 “Feix duqv yie nyei baeqc fingx muangx yie nyei waac. Feix duqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yangh yie nyei jauv.
Psalms81:14 Yie ziouc siepv-siepv nyei hingh jiex ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv
Psalms81:15 Nzorng Ziouv nyei mienh zungv zuqc mbaapv njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien
Psalms81:16 Ziouv oix zorqv gauh longx jiex nyei mbiauh bun meih mbuo nyanc
Psalms82:1 Tin-Hungh yiem lungh zaangc nyei wuic zueiz ninh nyei weic
Psalms82:2 “Meih mbuo oix longc maiv baengh fim nyei leiz siemv yaac bouc orqv mienh nyei leiz ndongc haaix lauh?
Psalms82:3 Oix zuqc baengh fim nyei tengx mau nyei mienh caux guh hanh fu'jueiv yaac bouc doh naanc caux guh hanh fu'jueiv nyei leiz.
Psalms82:4 Oix zuqc njoux mau nyei caux jomc kouv nyei mienh
Psalms82:5 “Ninh mbuo maiv hiuv yaac maiv mengh baeqc
Psalms82:6 “Yie gorngv
Psalms82:7 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc daic hnangv baamh mienh nor
Psalms82:8 O Tin-Hungh aac. Tov meih daaih siemv lungh ndiev
Psalms83:1 Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms83:2 Mangc maah! Meih nyei win-wangv faanv. Nzorng meih wuov deix cau jiez m'nqorngv daaih aqv.
Psalms83:3 Ninh mbuo daav guv guaix nyei za'eix hoic meih nyei baeqc fingx. Ninh mbuo lomh nzoih caangh laangh zoux bun meih beu jienv nyei mienh.
Psalms83:4 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms83:5 Ninh mbuo dongh hnyouv daav za'eix
Psalms83:6 Se maaih E^ndom Mienh caux I^saa^maa^en Mienh
Psalms83:7 maaih Ge^mbaan Mienh
Psalms83:8 Atc^si^lie Mienh yaac caux ninh mbuo gapv jienv doic. Ninh mbuo tengx qaqv Lotv nyei zeiv-fun.
Psalms83:9 Tov zoux bun ninh mbuo hnangv meih zoux bun Mi^ndien Mienh
Psalms83:10 dongh yiem En^ndo zuqc mietc
Psalms83:11 Tov bun ninh mbuo zoux hlo nyei mienh zuqc hnangv Olepv caux Se^epc
Psalms83:12 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms83:13 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms83:14 Hnangv douz buov qui gemh
Psalms83:15 tov hnangv naaic longc meih nyei domh nziaaux zunc ninh mbuo
Psalms83:16 O Ziouv aac
Psalms83:17 Tov bun ninh mbuo yietc liuz nyaiv yaac gamh nziex
Psalms83:18 Tov bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv kungx meih ganh hnangv
Psalms84:1 O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv aac
Psalms84:2 Yie nyei hnyouv ndongc haaix oix yiem Ziouv nyei biauv
Psalms84:3 O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv
Psalms84:4 Yiem meih nyei biauv wuov deix mienh maaih orn-lorqc
Psalms84:5 Kaux meih duqv qaqv wuov deix
Psalms84:6 Ninh mbuo jiex Mbaakaa Horngz
Psalms84:7 Mingh nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo gunv mingh gunv henv
Psalms84:8 O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aah! Tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. O Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov baeng m'normh muangx.
Psalms84:9 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms84:10 Yiem meih nyei biauv nyei laatc gu'nyuoz yietc hnoi se gauh longx yiem ganh norm dorngx yietc cin hnoi. Yie yiem yie nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zuov gaengh se gauh longx yiem orqv mienh nyei biauv.
Psalms84:11 Ziouv Tin-Hungh se mba'hnoi caux torngv-baaih
Psalms84:12 O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv aac
Psalms85:1 Ziouv aac
Psalms85:2 Meih guangc meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei zuiz-nipc
Psalms85:3 Meih dingh njiec
Psalms85:4 Yie mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv
Psalms85:5 Meih oix qiex jiez yie mbuo taux yietc liuz fai? Oix nouz yie mbuo taux maanc gouv maanc doic fai?
Psalms85:6 Meih maiv bun yie mbuo aengx fingv jiez daaih weic bun yie mbuo kaux meih duqv njien-youh fai?
Psalms85:7 O Ziouv aac
Psalms85:8 Yie oix muangx Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv nyei waac. Se gorngv ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms85:9 Ninh nyei njoux en ndongc haaix zungv yiem nitv fatv taaih ninh wuov deix mienh
Psalms85:10 Ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei jauv caux hnyouv zingx nyei jauv oix faang-buangh
Psalms85:11 Ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv oix yiem ndau cuotv
Psalms85:12 Ziouv oix zorqv longx nyei ga'naaiv bun yie mbuo. Yie mbuo nyei deic-bung ziouc aengx cuotv gaeng-zuangx longx.
Psalms85:13 Baengh fim nyei jauv oix yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc mingh
Psalms86:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms86:2 Tov beu yie nyei maengc weic zuqc yie gan longx meih. Tov njoux yie
Psalms86:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms86:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms86:5 O Ziouv aac
Psalms86:6 O Ziouv aac
Psalms86:7 Buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc yie heuc meih

Psalms86:9 O Ziouv aac

Psalms86:11 O Ziouv aac
Psalms86:12 O Ziouv
Psalms86:13 Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv se hlo haic. Meih yaac njoux yie
Psalms86:14 Tin-Hungh aac
