Psalms87:1 Ziouv liepc nyei zingh yiem cing-nzengc mbong gu'nguaaic.
Psalms87:2 Ninh hnamv Si^on nyei zingh gaengh
Psalms87:3 O Tin-Hungh nyei zingh aac
Psalms87:4 Mangc maah! Yiem hiuv duqv yie nyei mienh yie lengc jeiv oix tih taux Laa^hapc caux Mbaa^mbi^lon. Fi^li^saa^die caux Tailaqv caux jienv E^ti^o^bie. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms87:5 Ninh mbuo oix zorqv Si^on nyei jauv-louc daaih gorngv
Psalms87:6 Ziouv faaux maanc fingx nyei mienh hoz daan nyei ziangh hoc ninh fiev jienv
Psalms87:7 Baaux nzung caux cangx heix nyei mienh oix gorngv
Psalms88:1 O Ziouv
Psalms88:2 Tov bun yie daux gaux nyei waac daaih taux meih nyei nza'hmien. Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie heuc jienv tov nyei waac.
Psalms88:3 Weic zuqc yie nyei hnyouv maaih kuonx naanh buangv nzengc. Yie nyei maengc yiem nitv fatv yiemh gen.
Psalms88:4 Yie funx caux aav lamh bieqc yiemh gen wuov deix fih hnangv nyei. Yie yaac hnangv maiv maaih qaqv nyei mienh.
Psalms88:5 Yie hnangv zuqc guangc yiem janx-daic mbu'ndongx nyei mienh nor
Psalms88:6 Meih zorqv yie dapv ndo jiex nyei kuotv
Psalms88:7 Meih nouz yie hnangv ngatv jienv yie nyei sin
Psalms88:8 Meih bun yie nyei loz-gaeng doic guangc yie
Psalms88:9 Laaix nzauh kouv yie nyei m'zing maiv njang. O Ziouv aac
Psalms88:10 Meih weic daic mingh nyei mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic fai? Ninh mbuo haih jiez sin ceng meih fai?
Psalms88:11 Yiem zouv gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo gorngv meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh nyei fai? Yiem zuqc mietc nyei dorngx gorngv taux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv fai?
Psalms88:12 Yiem hmuangx nyei dorngx ninh mbuo fungc hiuv duqv meih zoux nyei mbuoqc horngh sic? Yiem la'kuqv mienh nyei dorngx ninh mbuo haih hiuv duqv meih ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv fai?
Psalms88:13 Mv baac Ziouv aac
Psalms88:14 O Ziouv aac
Psalms88:15 Yiem yie lunx taux ih zanc yie zuqc zeqc naanc morh
Psalms88:16 Meih qiex jiez nouz hnangv ngatv jienv yie. Meih bun yie zuqc gamh nziex nyei sic zorqv yie mietc nzengc.
Psalms88:17 Naaiv deix ziangh hnoi weih jienv yie
Psalms88:18 Meih zorqv yie hnamv nyei doic caux yie nyei loz-gaeng doic leih guangc yie. Kungx maaih hmuangx zoux yie nyei doic hnangv.
Psalms89:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms89:2 Yie oix gorngv meih oix yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Meih maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv ndongc lungh wuonv.
Psalms89:3 Meih gorngv
Psalms89:4 gorngv
Psalms89:5 O Ziouv aac
Psalms89:6 Yiem wuov lungh maaih haaix dauh haih hnangv Ziouv? Yiem lungh zaangc wuov deix maaih haaix dauh haih ndongc Ziouv?
Psalms89:7 Se yiem cing-nzengc wuov deix nyei wuic gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo taaih nyei Tin-Hungh. Yiem weih gormx ninh nyei yietc zungv ninh gauh hlo gauh peix fuc jiex.
Psalms89:8 O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms89:9 Meih gunv seix haic nyei koiv. Koiv jiez domh laangc meih bun sekv nzengc.
Psalms89:10 Meih mborqv huv Laa^hapc hnangv daix daic nyei mienh
Psalms89:11 Lungh benx meih nyei. Ndau yaac meih nyei. Baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei maanc muotc meih zeix daaih.
Psalms89:12 Naamh bung caux baqv bung meih zeix daaih. Taa^mbo Mbong caux Hemon Mbong njien-youh nyei ceng meih nyei mengh.
Psalms89:13 Meih nyei buoz maaih qaqv henv haic. Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz yaac sung faaux hlang.
Psalms89:14 Zoux horpc nyei jauv caux baengh fim nyei sic zoux meih nyei weic nyei gorn-ndoqv. Meih zoux nyei yietc zungv se meih hnamv mienh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux.
Psalms89:15 O Ziouv aac
Psalms89:16 Ninh mbuo weic meih nyei mbuox ziangh hnoi njien-youh. Ninh mbuo yaac ceng meih weic meih zoux horpc nyei jauv.
Psalms89:17 Meih se ninh mbuo nyei qaqv nyei njang-laangc. Meih ceix en bun yie mbuo nyei qaqv henv jienv faaux.
Psalms89:18 Yie mbuo nyei torngv-baaih benx Ziouv nyei
Psalms89:19 Zinh ndaangc lauh aqv
Psalms89:20 Yie lorz buatc yie nyei bou
Psalms89:21 Yie nyei buoz oix liepc ninh wuonv
Psalms89:22 Win-wangv zungv maiv haih noic maiv duqv ninh
Psalms89:23 Yie oix yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx mborqv muonc ninh nyei win-wangv
Psalms89:24 Yie oix hnamv ninh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei caux ninh yiem. Weic yie nyei mengh ninh nyei qaqv oix henv jienv faaux.
Psalms89:25 Yie oix bun ninh nyei buoz sung koiv gu'nguaaic
Psalms89:26 Ninh oix heuc jienv mbuox yie
Psalms89:27 Yie oix bun ninh zoux yie nyei dorn-la'gauv
Psalms89:28 Yie oix ziepc zuoqv nyei yietc liuz hnamv ninh
Psalms89:29 Yie oix liepc ninh nyei hungh douh taux yietc liuz
Psalms89:30 Se gorngv ninh nyei zeiv-fun guangc yie nyei leiz-latc
Psalms89:31 se gorngv ninh mbuo baamz yie nyei leiz-nyeic
Psalms89:32 yie ziouc longc biaav dingc ninh mbuo baamz nyei zuiz
Psalms89:33 Mv baac yie ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei hnyouv yie maiv zorqv nzuonx
Psalms89:34 Yie maiv bungx ndortv yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac
Psalms89:35 Yie ziangv jienv yie nyei cing-nzengc mbuox houv nzunc dorngx yietc liuz
Psalms89:36 Ninh nyei hungh douh oix yietc liuz yiem
Psalms89:37 aengx hnangv hlaax nor
Psalms89:38 Mv baac meih qiex jiez meih longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh ziouc guangc aengx nqemh ninh.
Psalms89:39 Meih tuix meih caux meih nyei bou liepc nyei ngaengc waac. Meih zorqv ninh nyei hungh ningv zoi njiec nie-mbung bun maaih uix.
Psalms89:40 Meih caeqv nzengc ninh nyei yietc zungv zingh laatc
Psalms89:41 Da'faanh jiex jauv nyei mienh caangv ninh nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms89:42 Meih bun ninh nyei win-wangv duqv hingh jiex
Psalms89:43 Meih zungv bun ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv nyei nza'hmien mbienv mi'aqv
Psalms89:44 Meih bun ninh nyei njang-laangc zitc nzengc
Psalms89:45 Meih jamv ninh lunx nyei ziangh hoc zoqc njiec
Psalms89:46 O Ziouv aac
Psalms89:47 O Ziouv aac
Psalms89:48 Maaih haaix dauh ziangh yaac maiv zuqc daic? Fai haaix dauh haih njoux ninh ganh leih ndutv yiemh gen nyei qaqv?
Psalms89:49 Ziouv aac

Psalms90:2 Zinh ndaangc meih maiv gaengh zeix cuotv mbong
Psalms90:3 Meih bun mienh nzuonx benx nie-mbung. Meih gorngv
Psalms90:4 Weic zuqc ziux meih mangc
Psalms90:5 Meih guaatv mienh mingh mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo hnangv mbeix norm mbeix nor
Psalms90:6 lungh ndorm nziouv baetv cuotv hlo daaih
Psalms90:7 Yie mbuo zuqc meih qiex jiez
Psalms90:8 Meih zorqv yie mbuo nyei zuiz baaiv jienv meih nyei nza'hmien
Psalms90:9 Yie mbuo ziangh jienv nyei yietc zungv hnoi-nyieqc zuqc meih nouz. Yie mbuo ziangh nyei hnyangx-daauh jiex liuz hnangv tauv nzunc qiex-ndoqc nor.
Psalms90:10 Yie mbuo nyei hnyangx-daauh ziangh duqv taux cietv ziepc
Psalms90:11 Haaix dauh mengh baeqc meih qiex jiez nyei qaqv? Haaix dauh hiuv meih nouz nyei jauv hnangv taaih meih nyei mienh?
Psalms90:12 Tov njaaux yie mbuo saauv ganh nyei hnoi-nyieqc

Psalms91:1 Haaix dauh yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei torngv laangh dorngx
Psalms91:2 wuov dauh ziouc gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Psalms91:3 Ninh oix njoux meih simv ndutv zaeng norqc mienh nyei koux
Psalms91:4 Ninh zungv longc ninh nyei ndaatv gomv jienv meih. Yiem ninh nyei ndaatv ga'ndiev ziouc bun meih maaih ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv zoux domh torngv-baaih
Psalms91:5 Meih yaac maiv zuqc gamh nziex lungh muonz-zanc nyei heiv sic
Psalms91:6 fai lungh muonz zanc daaih nyei domh wuon-baengc

Psalms94:3 Ziouv aac
Psalms94:4 Ninh mbuo bungx waac-maux. Yietc zungv zoux orqv nyei mienh ceng-hlo.
Psalms94:5 O Ziouv aac

Psalms94:9 Tin-Hungh zeix m'normh
Psalms94:10 Ninh mborqv njaaux maanc guoqv mienh

Psalms94:12 O Ziouv aac
Psalms94:13 Yiem ninh zuqc kouv nyei hnoi-nyieqc meih bun ninh duqv fong deix
Psalms94:14 Weic zuqc Ziouv zungv maiv guangc ninh ganh nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms94:15 Siemv nyei jauv ziouc aengx nzuonx daaih gan baengh fim nyei leiz. Yietc zungv hnyouv zingx nyei mienh yaac oix gan.
Psalms94:16 Maaih haaix dauh weic yie jiez daaih ngaengc orqv mienh? Haaix dauh weic yie ngaengc jienv zoux orqv nyei mienh?
Psalms94:17 Se gorngv Ziouv maiv tengx yie

Psalms95:1 Daaih maah! Mbuo oix zuqc daaih baaux nzung ceng Ziouv. Mbuo njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng njoux yie mbuo nyei La'bieiv.
Psalms95:2 Mbuo oix zuqc daaih yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien dor-ziec ninh
Psalms95:3 Weic zuqc Ziouv se hlo haic nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms95:4 Ndau-ndiev ndo jiex nyei dorngx yiem ninh nyei buoz gu'nyuoz. Hlang jiex nyei mbong yaac benx ninh nyei.
Psalms95:5 Koiv benx ninh nyei
Psalms95:6 Daaih maah! Mbuo oix zuqc puoqv njiec baaix ninh. Mbuo oix zuqc gueic njiec Zeix Mbuo Daaih Wuov Dauh Ziouv nyei nza'hmien.
Psalms95:7 Weic zuqc ninh benx mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Mbuo se ninh nyei miev-ciangv nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms95:8 Maiv dungx zoux hnyouv ngaengc hnangv zinh ndaangc yiem Me^li^mbaa
Psalms95:9 Wuov zanc meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix seix yie yaac cuoqv yie
Psalms95:10 Feix ziepc hnyangx gu'nyuoz yie nouz haic naaic doic mienh. Yie gorngv
Psalms95:11 Weic naaiv yie qiex jiez ziouc houv jienv gorngv
Psalms96:1 Oix zuqc baaux diuh siang-nzung bun Ziouv. Lungh ndiev oix zuqc baaux nzung bun Ziouv.
Psalms96:2 Baaux nzung bun Ziouv
Psalms96:3 Yiem maanc guoqv zunh yaangh ninh nyei njang-laangc. Yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx gorngv ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Psalms96:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv se hlo haic
Psalms96:5 Weic zuqc zuangx fingx nyei yietc zungv zienh benx miuc-fangx hnangv
Psalms96:6 Maaih njang-laangc caux haangh daauh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien
Psalms96:7 O maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei njang-laangc caux qaqv.
Psalms96:8 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv puix ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox
Psalms96:9 Zaangc Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc zuqv cing-nzengc nyei lui-houx. Lungh ndiev mienh aah! Oix zuqc sin zinx jienv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien.
Psalms96:10 Yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx oix zuqc gorngv
Psalms96:11 Lungh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh. Ndau aah! Oix zuqc orn-lorqc. Koiv caux yiem koiv nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv oix zuqc zoz-zoz nyei mbui.
Psalms96:12 Lingh deic caux yiem lingh deic gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv
Psalms96:13 yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Psalms97:1 Ziouv zoux hungh
Psalms97:2 Maaih mbuonx caux hmatv jieqv nyei hmuangx weih gormx ninh
Psalms97:3 Maaih douz yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx buov qui weih gormx ninh wuov deix win-wangv.
Psalms97:4 Ninh nyei mba'lingc bun lungh ndiev njang nzengc. Ndau-beih buatc ziouc dongz nzengc.
Psalms97:5 Mbong yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien yuqc hnangv mueiz-nzing nor
Psalms97:6 Lungh bun cing Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei
Psalms97:7 Bun yietc zungv baaix miuc-fangx nyei mienh zuqc nyaiv
Psalms97:8 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms97:9 O Ziouv aac
Psalms97:10 Meih mbuo hnamv Ziouv nyei mienh oix zuqc nzorng orqv nyei sic. Ninh beu jienv ninh nyei cing-nzengc mienh nyei maengc. Ninh njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev.
Psalms97:11 Njang ziux jienv kuv mienh
Psalms97:12 Meih mbuo kuv mienh aah! Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv njien-youh
Psalms98:1 Oix zuqc baaux diuh siang-nzung ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz caux cing-nzengc qaqv bun ninh duqv hingh jiex.
Psalms98:2 Ziouv bun mienh hiuv duqv ninh hingh jiex ninh bun maanc fingx hiuv duqv ninh baengh fim nyei.
Psalms98:3 Ninh jangx taux ninh weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv yaac hnamv ninh mbuo. Gormx lungh ndiev duqv buatc mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh duqv hingh jiex.
Psalms98:4 Lungh ndiev mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Ziouv. Cuotv qiex njien-youh nyei baaux nzung ceng ninh.
Psalms98:5 Patv daanh baah baaux nzung ceng Ziouv
Psalms98:6 Longc nzatc caux jorng nyei qiex
Psalms98:7 Koiv caux yiem koiv nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms98:8 Bun zuangx ndaaih mbaix ninh mbuo nyei buoz
Psalms98:9 yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Psalms99:1 Ziouv zoux hungh. Oix zuqc bun maanc fingx sin zinx. Ninh yiem wuov deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim mbu'ndongx nyei weic
Psalms99:2 Ziouv yiem Si^on zoux hlo
Psalms99:3 Dauh dauh oix zuqc ceng meih hlo haic caux mbuoqc horngh nyei mbuox. Ninh se cing-nzengc.
Psalms99:4 Henv nyei Hungh Diex aah! Meih hnamv baengh fim nyei jauv yaac liepc gong-fim. Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx meih zoux horpc caux baengh fim nyei sic.
Psalms99:5 Ceng Ziouv
Psalms99:6 Yiem ninh nyei sai mienh mbu'ndongx maaih Mose caux Aalon. Saa^mu^en yaac benx dauh jouh ninh nyei mbuox nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo heuc Ziouv
Psalms99:7 Ninh yiem mbuonx-ndiouh gu'nyuoz caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac. Ninh mbuo ei jienv ninh gorngv nyei waac caux jiu bun ninh mbuo nyei leiz-nyeic.
Psalms99:8 O Ziouv
Psalms99:9 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv
Psalms100:1 Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Ziouv.
Psalms100:2 Oix zuqc a'hneiv nyei fu-sux Ziouv
Psalms100:3 Oix zuqc hiuv duqv Ziouv se Tin-Hungh
Psalms100:4 Oix zuqc dor-ziec jienv bieqc ninh nyei singx dinc nyei laatc gaengh
Psalms100:5 weic zuqc Ziouv za'gengh longx haic. Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv taux maanc gouv maanc doic.
Psalms101:1 Yie oix baaux nzung gorngv ziepc zuoqv nyei caux baengh fim nyei jauv. O Ziouv aac
Psalms101:2 Yie oix longc hnyouv yangh maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei jauv. Meih taux haaix zanc cingx daaih yie naaiv? Yie oix hnyouv zingx nyei yiem yie nyei biauv.
Psalms101:3 Orqv haic nyei ga'naaiv yie zungv maiv bun doix hmien doix minc. Yie nzorng leih Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zoux nyei sic
Psalms101:4 Yie yaac maiv nyiemc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh
Psalms101:5 Haaix dauh beic ndiev gorngv doqc ninh juangc laangz nyei gorx-youz yie oix mietc nzengc. Zoux maux
Psalms101:6 Yie nyei m'zing oix mangc jienv yiem deic-bung ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh
Psalms101:7 Haaix dauh zoux nduov mienh nyei mienh maiv duqv yiem yie nyei biauv. Haaix dauh gorngv-baeqc
Psalms101:8 Ndorm-ndorm yie oix mietc yiem deic-bung nyei yietc zungv orqv mienh. Yie oix zorqv dauh dauh zoux waaic sic nyei mienh pai guangc
Psalms102:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms102:2 Yie zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms102:3 Weic zuqc yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc hnangv douz-sioux mitc nzengc. Yie nyei mbungv yaac hnangv douz buov jienv nor.
Psalms102:4 Yie nyei hnyouv zuqc siang hnangv miev nor nyaux nqaai
Psalms102:5 Laaix yie njunh duqv mbui
Psalms102:6 Yie hnangv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei domh jaangv
Psalms102:7 Yie bueix maiv njormh
Psalms102:8 Yie nyei win-wangv ziangh hnoi huotv yie. Ki yie wuov deix longc yie nyei mbuox zioux mienh.
Psalms102:9 Yie nyanc saaiv dorngx hnaangx
Psalms102:10 weic zuqc meih qiex jiez nouz yie
Psalms102:11 Yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc se hnangv nziemx-yaangh nyei dongh linh. Yie hnangv miev nor nyaux nqaai.
Psalms102:12 Mv baac Ziouv aac
Psalms102:13 Meih oix jiez daaih korv-lienh Si^on weic zuqc korv-lienh ninh nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv. Dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc zungv taux aqv.
Psalms102:14 Meih nyei bou hnamv Si^on Zingh nyei la'bieiv
Psalms102:15 Maanc fingx oix gamh nziex Ziouv nyei mengh
Psalms102:16 Weic zuqc Ziouv oix ceix Si^on. Ninh oix yiem ninh nyei njang-laangc hinc cuotv daaih.
Psalms102:17 Ninh oix muangx jomc kouv nyei mienh daux gaux. Ninh maiv mangc piex ninh mbuo jouh nyei waac.
Psalms102:18 Oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix sic fiev jienv weic hoz doic zeiv-fun
Psalms102:19 “ Ziouv yiem ninh hlang jiex nyei cing-nzengc dorngx mangc njiec
Psalms102:20 weic muangx zuqc wuonx nyei mienh njunh nyei qiex
Psalms102:21 weic bun mienh yiem Si^on zunh Ziouv nyei mengh
Psalms102:22 Wuov zanc maanc fingx caux maanc guoqv ziouc gapv zunv zaangc Ziouv.
Psalms102:23 Yie corc lunx nyei ziangh hoc ninh bun yie mau
Psalms102:24 Yie gorngv
Psalms102:25 Dongh cor meih liepc ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv
Psalms102:26 Lungh ndau zungv oix zuqc mietc
Psalms102:27 Mv baac meih zanc-zanc hnangv loz nor
Psalms102:28 Meih nyei bou nyei dorn-jueiv oix duqv yiem longx. Ninh mbuo nyei hoz doic oix liepc wuonv yiem meih nyei nza'hmien.
Psalms103:1 Yie nyei hnyouv aac
Psalms103:2 Yie nyei hnyouv oix ceng Ziouv
Psalms103:3 Ninh guangc yie nyei yietc zungv zuiz
Psalms103:4 Ninh zuoqc yie nyei maengc leih ndutv ndo haic nyei kuotv
Psalms103:5 Ninh ceix longx nyei ga'naaiv bun yie buangv eix
Psalms103:6 Ziouv zoux kuv sic yaac baengh fim nyei tengx zuqc zeix nyei mienh.
Psalms103:7 Ninh bun Mose hiuv duqv ninh nyei za'eix
Psalms103:8 Ziouv korv-lienh mienh
Psalms103:9 Ninh maiv zanc-zanc hemx
Psalms103:10 Ninh maiv ziux mbuo zoux nyei zuiz dingc
Psalms103:11 Lungh leih ndau ndongc haaix hlang
Psalms103:12 Dong bung leih fai bung ndongc haaix go
Psalms103:13 Die hnangv haaix nor korv-lienh ninh nyei fu'jueiv
Psalms103:14 weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv mbuo nyei sin zaangc
Psalms103:15 Baamh mienh aeqv
Psalms103:16 zuqc nziaaux buonc
Psalms103:17 Mv baac Ziouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv taaih ninh wuov deix yietc liuz taux yietc liuz
Psalms103:18 se ei jienv ninh nyei ngaengc waac caux jangx ninh nyei leiz-latc wuov deix.
Psalms103:19 Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh liepc ninh nyei weic
Psalms103:20 Meih mbuo
Psalms103:21 Ninh nyei zuangx baeng
Psalms103:22 Meih mbuo yietc zungv zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc aah! Yiem ninh gunv nyei norm-norm dorngx
Psalms104:1 Yie nyei hnyouv aac
Psalms104:2 Meih buix jienv njang hnangv buix lui-ndaauv. Meih corng lungh hnangv corng ndopv-liuh wuov nor.
Psalms104:3 Yiem lungh gu'nguaaic maengx nyei wuom meih liepc meih yiem nyei dorngx. Meih longc mbuonx zoux meih nyei cie
Psalms104:4 Meih longc nziaaux zoux meih nyei douc fienx mienh
Psalms104:5 Meih zorqv ndau liepc yiem gorn-ndoqv gu'nguaaic
Psalms104:6 Meih longc ndo nyei wuom yiemx ndau-beih gu'nguaaic hnangv lui nor
Psalms104:7 Meih yietv hatc
Psalms104:8 Geh zorng baetv faaux
Psalms104:9 Meih dingc ziangx gapv-jaaix bun wuom maiv haih jiex ndaangc
Psalms104:10 Meih bun wuom-zingv yiem horngz baetv cuotv
Psalms104:11 bun zuangx hieh zoih duqv hopv
Psalms104:12 Yiem wuom-hlen maaih norqc zoux lauz
Psalms104:13 Yiem lungh gu'nguaaic meih bun mbiungc duih njiec mbong
Psalms104:14 Meih bun miev-maeng cuotv daaih yungz saeng-kuv
Psalms104:15 Aengx cuotv a'ngunc diuv tengx mienh njien-youh
Psalms104:16 Ziouv nyei ndiangx duqv wuom gaux
Psalms104:17 Norqc zoux lauz yiem wuov deix ndiangx. Norqc nyieh yiem zongh ndiangx zoux ninh nyei biauv.
Psalms104:18 Mbong-hlang benx hieh yungh nyei dinc
Psalms104:19 Meih zeix hlaax weic dingc gueix
Psalms104:20 Meih zeix hmuangx benx lungh muonz zanc
Psalms104:21 Sienh lunx heuc jienv mingh lorz nyanc
Psalms104:22 Mba'hnoi cuotv nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo ziouc mingh aqv. Mingh bueix ninh mbuo ganh nyei kuotv.
Psalms104:23 Mienh ziouc cuotv mingh zoux ninh mbuo nyei gong
Psalms104:24 O Ziouv aac
Psalms104:25 Yiem wuov maaih koiv youc hlo youc jangv. Koiv gu'nyuoz maaih haih dongz nyei ga'naaiv saauv maiv hingh
Psalms104:26 Yiem wuov maaih nzangv mingh daaih
Psalms104:27 Naaiv deix yietc zungv kaux meih ziux ziangh hoc bun ga'naaiv ninh mbuo nyanc.
Psalms104:28 Meih bun ninh mbuo
Psalms104:29 Meih buang hmien maiv mangc ninh mbuo
Psalms104:30 Meih bun meih nyei Singx Lingh cuotv mingh wuov zanc ninh mbuo duqv zeix cuotv daaih aqv. Meih yaac bun ndau-beih goiv yienc siang daaih.
Psalms104:31 Tov Ziouv nyei njang-laangc yietc liuz yiem. Tov Ziouv a'hneiv ninh zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv.
Psalms104:32 Ninh mangc ndau
Psalms104:33 Yie yietc seix oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv. Yie corc ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms104:34 Tov ninh weic yie buih nyei waac horpc hnyouv
Psalms104:35 Tov bun zuiz-mienh yiem baamh gen zuqc mietc nzengc
Psalms105:1 Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv
Psalms105:2 Oix zuqc dorng jienv ninh baaux nzung
Psalms105:3 Oix zuqc weic ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbuox bungx waac-maux. Bun zimh lorz Ziouv nyei mienh nyei hnyouv njien-youh.
Psalms105:4 Oix zuqc zimh lorz Ziouv caux ninh nyei qaqv
Psalms105:5 Ninh nyei bou
Psalms105:6 
Psalms105:7 Ninh se Ziouv
Psalms105:8 Ninh jangx ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac taux yietc liuz
Psalms105:9 se caux Apc^laa^ham liepc nyei ngaengc waac
Psalms105:10 Ninh zorqv naaiv deix ngaengc waac caux Yaakopv liepc benx leiz-nyeic
Psalms105:11 Ninh gorngv
Psalms105:12 Ninh mbuo mienh zoqc wuov zanc
Psalms105:13 ninh mbuo yiem naaiv norm deic-bung jiex wuov norm deic-bung
Psalms105:14 Ninh maiv bun haaix dauh mienh zeix ninh mbuo
Psalms105:15 Ninh gorngv
Psalms105:16 Ninh bun wuov norm deic-bung zuqc domh huaang domh ngorc
Psalms105:17 ninh paaiv laanh mienh mingh ndaangc ninh mbuo
Psalms105:18 Yosepv nyei zaux zuqc hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv mun
Psalms105:19 zuov taux ninh gorngv oix cuotv nyei sic cuotv daaih zien. Ziouv nyei waac seix ninh.
Psalms105:20 Hungh diex paaiv mienh mingh bungx nqoi ninh
Psalms105:21 liepc ninh zoux hungh dinc nyei ziouv
Psalms105:22 bun ninh sueih eix njaaux hungh diex nyei jien
Psalms105:23 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en daaih taux I^yipv
Psalms105:24 Ziouv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx hiaangx camv
Psalms105:25 Ninh bun win-wangv nyei hnyouv nzorng ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms105:26 Ninh paaiv ninh nyei bou
Psalms105:27 Ninh mbuo yiem wuov deix mienh mbu'ndongx zoux jangx-hoc
Psalms105:28 Ninh bun hmuangx daaih om jienv deic-bung
Psalms105:29 Ninh bun ninh mbuo nyei wuom benx nziaamv
Psalms105:30 Yiem ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung
Psalms105:31 Ninh gorngv ziouc maaih mungz faanv
Psalms105:32 Ninh bun borqc div mbiungc duih njiec
Psalms105:33 Ninh mborqv waaic ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc hmei caux ngongh nyorx ndiangx
Psalms105:34 Ninh gorngv yietc joux
Psalms105:35 nyanc ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei nyungc-nyungc lai-coix
Psalms105:36 Ninh daix yiem ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv dorn-la'gauv
Psalms105:37 Nqa'haav ninh dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Psalms105:38 Ninh mbuo biaux cuotv
Psalms105:39 Tin-Hungh bun mbuonx om jienv
Psalms105:40 Ninh mbuo tov
Psalms105:41 Ninh mborqv nqoi la'bieiv
Psalms105:42 weic zuqc ninh jangx ninh caux ninh nyei bou
Psalms105:43 Ninh dorh ninh nyei baeqc fingx njien-youh nyei cuotv
Psalms105:44 Ninh zorqv ganh fingx mienh nyei deic-bung jiu bun ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo duqv nzipc wuov deix mienh ndortv qaqv zoux nyei buonc
Psalms105:45 weic bun ninh mbuo gan ninh nyei leiz-nyeic yaac ei nzengc ninh nyei leiz-latc. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.
Psalms106:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh se longx haic
Psalms106:2 Haaix dauh haih gorngv Ziouv zoux hlo haic nyei sic? Fai haaix dauh haih biux mengh puix duqv ceng ninh nyei yietc zungv?
Psalms106:3 Da'faanh ei jienv baengh fim nyei jauv zoux wuov deix
Psalms106:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms106:5 weic bun yie buatc meih ginv daaih nyei mienh duqv bungx-zuoqc
Psalms106:6 Yie mbuo caux yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix fih hnangv nyei baamz zuiz. Yie mbuo zoux dorngc
Psalms106:7 Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc
Psalms106:8 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic
Psalms106:9 Ninh hatc Koiv-Siqv
Psalms106:10 Ninh njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev
Psalms106:11 Wuom yiemx ninh mbuo nyei win-jaa
Psalms106:12 Wuov zanc ninh mbuo sienx ninh nyei waac
Psalms106:13 Mv baac maiv lauh ninh mbuo la'kuqv ninh zoux nyei sic
Psalms106:14 Yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang ninh mbuo cei duqv kouv haic
Psalms106:15 Ziux ninh mbuo tov nyei ninh ceix bun ninh mbuo
Psalms106:16 Yiem ndopv-liuh ciangv gu'nyuoz mienh mueic jieqv Mose caux Ziouv nyei cing-nzengc mienh
Psalms106:17 ndau nqoi
Psalms106:18 Maaih douz yiem ninh mbuo nyei guanh mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih
Psalms106:19 Yiem Holepv Mbong ninh mbuo zoux dauh ngongh gouv dorn
Psalms106:20 Ninh mbuo zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc tiuv nyanc miev nyei ngongh gouv nyei miuc-fangx.
Psalms106:21 Ninh mbuo la'kuqv ninh mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv
Psalms106:22 yiem Haam nyei deic zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jauv
Psalms106:23 Weic naaiv ninh gorngv ninh oix mietc ninh nyei baeqc fingx. Kaux bangc maaih ninh ginv daaih wuov dauh Mose dorng jienv Tin-Hungh tengx ninh mbuo gorngv
Psalms106:24 Ninh mbuo yaac mangc piex wuov norm kuh yiem nyei deic-bung
Psalms106:25 Ninh mbuo yiem ganh nyei ndopv-liuh ngopv
Psalms106:26 Weic naaiv ninh sung jienv buoz houv waac gorngv ninh oix bun ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang ndortv nzengc.
Psalms106:27 Bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun nzaanx mingh yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx
Psalms106:28 Nqa'haav yiem Be^o ninh mbuo bieqc Mbaa^an zienh yaac nyanc ziec bun maiv maaih maengc nyei zienh nyei ga'naaiv.
Psalms106:29 Ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic cuoqv Ziouv qiex jiez haic
Psalms106:30 Wuov zanc Fi^ne^hatc souv jiez daaih dingc zoux dorngc nyei mienh nyei zuiz
Psalms106:31 Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux
Psalms106:32 Ninh mbuo yiem Me^li^mbaa Wuom cuoqv Ziouv qiex jiez. Laaix ninh mbuo
Psalms106:33 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo bun Mose nyei hnyouv mun
Psalms106:34 Ninh mbuo maiv ei Ziouv hatc nyei waac mietc wuov deix ganh fingx mienh.
Psalms106:35 Daaux nzuonx zorpc jienv caux wuov deix fingx yiem
Psalms106:36 Tin-Hungh nyei mienh fu-sux wuov deix mienh nyei miuc-fangx ziouc benx koux hlopv jienv ninh mbuo.
Psalms106:37 Ninh mbuo zorqv ninh mbuo ganh nyei naamh nyouz ziec bun mienv.
Psalms106:38 Ninh mbuo daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh
Psalms106:39 Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo ganh zoux nyei jauv bun ninh mbuo maaih uix
Psalms106:40 Weic naaiv Ziouv ziouc qiex jiez ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms106:41 Ninh ziouc zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem camv-fingx mienh nyei buoz-ndiev
Psalms106:42 Ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv yaac zeix ninh mbuo
Psalms106:43 Ninh njoux ninh nyei baeqc fingx ziex nzunc
Psalms106:44 Maiv gunv hnangv naaic
Psalms106:45 Ninh jangx jienv ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac
Psalms106:46 Ninh bun yietc zungv caangv ninh nyei mienh wuov deix korv-lienh ninh mbuo.
Psalms106:47 O Ziouv
Psalms106:48 Ceng Ziouv
Psalms107:1 Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh longx haic
Psalms107:2 Tov bun Ziouv zuoqc nzuonx nyei mienh hnangv naaic nor gorngv
Psalms107:3 yaac yiem norm-norm deic-bung
Psalms107:4 Ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang
Psalms107:5 Ninh mbuo youc hnyouv sie youc jaang nqaatv
Psalms107:6 Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv
Psalms107:7 Ninh dorh ninh mbuo yangh diuh jauv-zaqc
Psalms107:8 Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Psalms107:9 Ninh bun jaang nqaatv nyei mienh jaiv nqaatv
Psalms107:10 Maaih deix mienh yiem hmuangx zong
Psalms107:11 weic zuqc ninh mbuo ngaengc Tin-Hungh nyei waac
Psalms107:12 Ninh bun ninh mbuo zuqc zoux gong kouv weic zatv ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv njiec. Ninh mbuo ndorpc
Psalms107:13 Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Ninh ziouc njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc.
Psalms107:14 Ninh dorh ninh mbuo yiem hmuangx caux zuqc daic nyei dongh linh gu'nyuoz cuotv daaih
Psalms107:15 Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Psalms107:16 Ninh mborqv huv dongh siqv gaengh
Psalms107:17 Maaih deix butv baengc laaix ninh mbuo zoux nyei zuiz
Psalms107:18 Ninh mbuo youx haic nyungc-nyungc nyanc nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms107:19 Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv
Psalms107:20 Ninh gorngv cuotv waac zorc ninh mbuo longx
Psalms107:21 Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Psalms107:22 Oix zuqc bun ninh mbuo fongc horc ziec weic dor-ziec
Psalms107:23 Maaih deix bieqc nzangv
Psalms107:24 Ninh mbuo buatc Ziouv zoux nyei gong
Psalms107:25 Ninh yietv hatc
Psalms107:26 Ninh mbuo nyei nzangv faaux taux ndaamv-lungh
Psalms107:27 Ninh mbuo laih mingh laih daaih hnangv diuv nquin nyei mienh nor
Psalms107:28 Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv. Ninh ziouc tengx ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc.
Psalms107:29 Ninh bun domh nziaaux dingh
Psalms107:30 Ninh mbuo ziouc a'hneiv weic zuqc sekv nzieqc nyei. Ninh yaac dorh ninh mbuo mingh taux ninh mbuo oix mingh nyei nzangv-bouc.
Psalms107:31 Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh yaac weic baamh mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Psalms107:32 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem baeqc fingx gapv zunv nyei dorngx zunh gorngv ninh zoux hlo
Psalms107:33 Ninh bun ndaaih tiuv benx deic-bung-huaang
Psalms107:34 bun ndau-junc tiuv benx ndau-nzaaih ndau-huaang
Psalms107:35 Ninh bun deic-bung-huaang benx wuom-domh
Psalms107:36 Ninh bun ngorc nyei mienh yiem wuov
Psalms107:37 Ninh mbuo zoux ndeic zuangx ga'naaiv
Psalms107:38 Ninh ceix fuqv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx hiaangx camv
Psalms107:39 Baeqc fingx zuqc zeix
Psalms107:40 ninh bun zeix ninh nyei baeqc fingx wuov deix zoux hlo nyei mienh zuqc mangc piex
Psalms107:41 Mv baac ninh bouh mienh jomc mienh faaux hlaang
Psalms107:42 Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh buatc ninh mbuo ziouc a'hneiv. Zoux orqv nyei mienh nqapc jienv nzuih
Psalms107:43 Haaix dauh maaih cong-mengh oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx naaiv deix sic
Psalms108:1 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms108:2 Domh daanh baah
Psalms108:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms108:4 Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh gauh hlang jiex lungh. Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv yaac mbaengc mbuonx hlang.
Psalms108:5 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms108:6 Tov dau yie mbuo
Psalms108:7 Tin-Hungh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gorngv
Psalms108:8 Gi^le^aatc se yie nyei
Psalms108:9 Mo^apc se yie nyei nzaaux buoz-zaux bunh. Yie yaac zoi yie nyei heh njiec E^ndom. Yie heuc jienv gorngv
Psalms108:10 Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux wuov norm weih wuonv nyei zingh? Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux E^ndom Deic-Bung?
Psalms108:11 O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv zeiz guangc yie mbuo fai? O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv caux yie mbuo nyei jun-baeng cuotv mingh mborqv jaax fai?
Psalms108:12 Tov meih tengx yie mbuo mborqv win-wangv
Psalms108:13 Yie mbuo kaux Tin-Hungh yie mbuo ziouc duqv hingh jiex. Se dongh ninh oix caaiv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv njiec.
Psalms109:1 O yie ceng nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms109:2 weic zuqc orqv mienh caux guv guaix nyei mienh gorngv yie. Ninh mbuo longc gorngv-baeqc nyei waac hoic yie.
Psalms109:3 Ninh mbuo weih gormx yie gorngv nzorng nyei waac yaac mborqv yie mv baac maiv maaih gorn-baengx.
Psalms109:4 Maiv gunv yie hnamv ninh mbuo yaac weic ninh mbuo daux gaux
Psalms109:5 Yie zoux longx nyei ninh mbuo winh orqv nyei bun yie
Psalms109:6 Tov paaiv dauh orqv mienh daaih caux ninh doix-dekc
Psalms109:7 Siemv nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms109:8 Tov bun ninh nyei siouc nyuonh nangv
Psalms109:9 Tov bun ninh nyei fu'jueiv benx guh hanh fu'jueiv
Psalms109:10 Tov bun ninh nyei naamh nyouz benx njouh huaax mienh youh jienv mingh tov nyanc. Ninh mbuo yiem baaic waaic nyei dorngx
Psalms109:11 Tov bun zaeqv-ziouv daaih zorqv ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv
Psalms109:12 Tov maiv dungx bun haaix dauh zoux longx bun ninh
Psalms109:13 Tov bun ninh nyei hoz doic zeiv-fun zutc nzengc. Tov bun ninh nyei mbuox zuqc sortv guangc
Psalms109:14 Tov Ziouv jangx jienv ninh nyei ong-taaix mbuo zoux nyei zuiz. Yaac maiv dungx sortv ninh nyei maa nyei zuiz guangc.
Psalms109:15 Tov bun naaiv deix zuiz zanc-zanc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Psalms109:16 Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz maiv hnamv taux zoux longx bun mienh
Psalms109:17 Ninh oix zioux
Psalms109:18 Ninh zorqv zioux nyei waac dorngx lui zuqv
Psalms109:19 Tov bun zioux nyei waac hnangv domh lui buang jienv ninh
Psalms109:20 Tov Ziouv bun gox yie caux gorngv doqc hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix
Psalms109:21 Mv baac yie nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms109:22 Weic zuqc yie jomc
Psalms109:23 Yie nyei maengc jiex jienv mingh hnangv lungh maanz-hmuangx nyei dongh linh nor
Psalms109:24 Yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc cingh mborqc ziouc mau. Yie nyei sin zaangc jaic jienv njiec.
Psalms109:25 Gox yie wuov deix kungx huotv yie hnangv. Ninh mbuo buatc yie
Psalms109:26 O Ziouv
Psalms109:27 Tov bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv naaiv se meih nyei buoz zoux nyei. O Ziouv aac
Psalms109:28 Sueih ninh mbuo zioux
Psalms109:29 Tov bun gox yie wuov deix zuqc buang hmien diev nyaiv
Psalms109:30 Yie oix longc yie nyei nzuih camv-camv nyei dor-ziec Ziouv. Yie oix yiem zuangx mienh camv nyei mbu'ndongx ceng ninh
Psalms109:31 weic zuqc ninh souv jienv mienh jomc mienh nyei mbiaauc maengx
Psalms110:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie nyei Ziouv
Psalms110:2 Ziouv oix yiem Si^on sung cuotv meih nyei domh qaqv nyei biaav
Psalms110:3 Meih dorh meih nyei jun-baeng mingh cing-nzengc mbong gu'nguaaic wuov hnoi
Psalms110:4 Ziouv laengz ngaengc waac gorngv
Psalms110:5 Ziouv yiem meih nyei mbiaauc maengx. Taux ninh qiex jiez wuov hnoi
Psalms110:6 Ninh oix dingc maanc guoqv mienh nyei zuiz
Psalms110:7 Ninh oix hopv jauv-hlen nyei ndoqv nyei wuom
Psalms111:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Yie oix yiem hnyouv zingx nyei mienh gapv zunv nyei mbu'ndongx longc nzengc hnyouv dor-ziec Ziouv.
Psalms111:2 Ziouv zoux nyei sic za'gengh hlo haic
Psalms111:3 Ninh zoux nyei sic maaih njang-laangc
Psalms111:4 Ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic bun mienh jangx
Psalms111:5 Ninh ceix nyanc hopv bun taaih ninh wuov deix. Ninh yietc liuz jangx ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac.
Psalms111:6 Ninh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx buatc ninh longc domh qaqv zoux nyei jauv
Psalms111:7 Ninh nyei buoz zoux nyei gong se ziepc zuoqv baengh fim nyei

Psalms111:9 Ninh zuoqc ninh nyei baeqc fingx yaac liepc ninh nyei ngaengc waac taux yietc liuz. Ninh nyei mengh se cing-nzengc
Psalms111:10 Taaih Ziouv zoux gorn bun mienh maaih cong-mengh. Da'faanh ei jienv ninh nyei lingc wuov deix haih mengh baeqc longx. Oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng ninh.

Psalms118:2 Bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv
Psalms118:3 Bun Aalon nyei zeiv-fun gorngv

Psalms118:27 Ziouv se dongh Tin-Hungh. Ninh yaac ceix njang bun yie mbuo. Longc hlaang ndoh jienv fongc horc ziec weic jiex zipv nyei saeng-kuv yaac dorh mingh taux ziec-dorngh nyei jorng.

Psalms119:1 Da'faanh ninh mbuo zoux nyei jauv maiv maaih dorngx nqemh

Psalms119:9 Houh saeng mienh oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor goux duqv ninh ganh nyei jauv cing-nzengc? Se oix zuqc ei jienv meih nyei waac zoux.

Psalms119:89 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:90 Doic jiex doic meih se ziepc zuoqv nyei. Meih liepc baamh gen daaih
Psalms119:91 Ziux meih hatc nyei waac yietc zungv yiem jienv taux ih hnoi weic zuqc maanc muotc se benx meih nyei bou.
Psalms119:92 Se gorngv meih nyei leiz-latc maiv zeiz bun yie a'hneiv
Psalms119:93 Yie yietc liuz maiv la'kuqv meih hatc nyei waac
Psalms119:94 Yie benx meih nyei mienh

Psalms119:97 O yie za'gengh hnamv meih nyei leiz-latc
Psalms119:98 Meih nyei lingc zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei hnyouv
Psalms119:99 Yie gauh hnamv duqv tong yie nyei yietc zungv fin-saeng
Psalms119:100 Beiv mienh gox mienh yie gauh mengh baeqc weic zuqc yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac.
Psalms119:101 Yie hatc jienv maiv bun yie nyei zaux yangh yietc zungv orqv nyei jauv
Psalms119:102 Yie maiv leih nqoi meih nyei leiz weic zuqc meih ganh njaaux jiex yie.
Psalms119:103 Yie seix liuz meih nyei waac
Psalms119:104 Yie kaux meih hatc nyei waac tengx yie bieqc hnyouv
Psalms119:105 Meih nyei waac se hnangv dang ziux yie nyei zaux-mbiec
Psalms119:106 Yie houv jienv liepc ngaengc waac yaac laengz ei jienv baengh fim nyei leiz zoux.
Psalms119:107 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:108 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:109 Yie nyei maengc zanc-zanc zuqc gamh nziex nyei sic
Psalms119:110 Orqv mienh zaeng koux oix hlopv yie
Psalms119:111 Meih njaaux nyei waac se yie yietc liuz nzipc nyei buonc
Psalms119:112 Yie liepc dingc hnyouv gan meih nyei leiz-nyeic
Psalms119:113 Maaih i diuc hnyouv nyei mienh yie nzorng haic
Psalms119:114 Meih zoux yie bingx nyei dorngx yaac zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih. Yie kaux meih nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx.
Psalms119:115 Zoux orqv nyei mienh aah! Biaux nqoi yie maah! Weic bun yie haih gan longx yie nyei Tin-Hungh hatc nyei lingc.
Psalms119:116 Tov ziux meih laengz nyei waac baav jienv yie
Psalms119:117 Tov baav jienv yie
Psalms119:118 Meih nqemh maiv ei meih nyei leiz-nyeic nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo guv guaix nyei za'eix se maiv lamh longc.
Psalms119:119 Meih zorqv lungh ndiev nyei orqv mienh funx hnangv hlieqv-nqaiv nor
Psalms119:120 Yie sin zinx weic zuqc yie gamh nziex meih. Yie yaac gamh nziex meih siemv nyei waac. Aayin
Psalms119:121 Yie zoux nyei se baengh fim
Psalms119:122 Tov beu jienv meih nyei bou bun yie duqv longx
Psalms119:123 Yie zuov gau meih nyei njoux en
Psalms119:124 Tov meih ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh dorh meih nyei bou
Psalms119:125 Yie se meih nyei bou. Tov bun yie bieqc hnyouv
Psalms119:126 Ziouv dingc zuiz nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv
Psalms119:127 Yie za'gengh hnamv meih nyei lingc gauh camv jiem
Psalms119:128 Weic naaiv yie yangh meih hatc nyei waac
Psalms119:129 Meih njaaux nyei waac gengh peix fuc haic
Psalms119:130 Meih nyei waac porv nqoi se hnangv ziux njang nor
Psalms119:131 Yie morngx nqoi nzuih tauv qiex hae hae nyei
Psalms119:132 Tov huin mangc yie yaac korv-lienh yie
Psalms119:133 Tov meih longc meih nyei waac bun yie nyei zaux-mbiec haih caaiv duqv jienv
Psalms119:134 Tov tengx yie biaux ndutv zeix yie wuov deix mienh
Psalms119:135 Tov meih nyei hmien ziux njang meih nyei bou
Psalms119:136 Yie nyei wuom-mueic liouc njiec hnangv ndoqv nor
Psalms119:137 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:138 Meih dingc daaih nyei leiz-nyeic se horpc nyei
Psalms119:139 Yie nyei hnyouv qiex jiez haic hnangv douz buov jienv nor
Psalms119:140 Meih laengz nyei waac seix liuz
Psalms119:141 Yie zoux faix
Psalms119:142 Meih se baengh fim nyei
Psalms119:143 Yie zuqc doh naanc
Psalms119:144 Meih njaaux nyei waac yietc liuz baengh fim nyei
Psalms119:145 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:146 Yie heuc jienv meih
Psalms119:147 Lungh maiv gaengh njang yie jiez sin heuc meih tengx. Yie kaux meih nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx.
Psalms119:148 Yie ziangh muonz nungx jienv m'zing weic fei-fangv meih laengz nyei waac.
Psalms119:149 Ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh tov muangx yie nyei qiex. O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:150 Daav orqv za'eix zeix yie wuov deix mienh taux fatv aqv. Ninh mbuo leih go meih nyei leiz-latc.
Psalms119:151 Mv baac Ziouv aac
Psalms119:152 Yie weic hoqc meih njaaux nyei waac hiuv duqv lauh aqv
Psalms119:153 Tov mangc buatc yie nyei kouv naanc yaac njoux yie
Psalms119:154 Tov tengx mbenc yie nyei sic yaac zuoqc yie. Ziux meih laengz nyei waac tov bun yie duqv ziangh jienv.
Psalms119:155 Zoux orqv nyei mienh maiv haih duqv njoux
Psalms119:156 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:157 Zeix yie
Psalms119:158 Yie buatc maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh ziouc youx haic weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv ei meih nyei waac.
Psalms119:159 Samx mangc gaax yie ndongc haaix hnamv meih hatc nyei waac. Tov ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh beu yie nyei maengc.
Psalms119:160 Meih nyei waac nzutv zunv gorngv se zien leiz
Psalms119:161 Zoux hlo nyei mienh maiv longc leiz nyei hoic yie
Psalms119:162 Yie weic meih nyei waac a'hneiv
Psalms119:163 Yie nzorng haic
Psalms119:164 Weic meih baengh fim nyei leiz yie yietc hnoi ceng meih siec nzunc.
Psalms119:165 Hnamv meih nyei leiz nyei mienh duqv baengh orn camv
Psalms119:166 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:167 Yie nyei hnyouv ei jienv meih nyei waac. Yie za'gengh! hnamv haic meih nyei waac.
Psalms119:168 Yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei
Psalms119:169 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:170 Tov bun yie jouh nyei waac taux meih nyei nza'hmien
Psalms119:171 Yie nyei nzuih meix oix gorngv cuotv ceng nyei waac
Psalms119:172 Yie nyei mbietc oix baaux nzung gorngv meih nyei waac
Psalms119:173 Tov liuc leiz ziangx meih nyei buoz tengx yie
Psalms119:174 O Ziouv aac
Psalms119:175 Tov bun yie duqv ziangh jienv weic bun yie haih ceng meih
Psalms119:176 Yie mingh dorngc jauv hnangv ba'gi yungh dingx laaih nor
Psalms120:1 Yie zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc yie heuc Ziouv
Psalms120:2 O Ziouv aac
Psalms120:3 Meih mbuo gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc bun haaix nyungc meih? Aengx jaa haaix nyungc bun meih?
Psalms120:4 Ninh oix longc mborqv jaax baeng nyei forng-cang laic nyei
Psalms120:5 Yie zuqc kouv aqv
Psalms120:6 Yie yiem nzorng baengh orn nyei jauv wuov deix mienh mbu'ndongx lauh jiex ndaangc.
Psalms120:7 Yie oix taaix-baengh
Psalms121:1 Yie cau hmien mangc mbong
Psalms121:2 Tengx yie wuov dauh se Ziouv
Psalms121:3 Ninh zungv maiv bun meih nyei zaux caaiv piatv
Psalms121:4 Beu I^saa^laa^en wuov dauh zungv maiv njormh da'hngatv yaac maiv bueix m'njormh.
Psalms121:5 Ziouv beu jienv meih
Psalms121:6 Lungh hnoi zanc mba'hnoi maiv hoic meih
Psalms121:7 Ziouv oix beu jienv meih
Psalms121:8 Meih bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv
Psalms122:1 Maaih mienh mbuox yie
Psalms122:2 O Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh aac
Psalms122:3 Ye^lu^saa^lem ceix daaih benx norm zingh zunv nyei
Psalms122:4 Zuangx fingx
Psalms122:5 Yiem naaiv liepc siemv zuiz nyei weic
Psalms122:6 Oix zuqc daux gaux tov bun Ye^lu^saa^lem duqv baengh orn
Psalms122:7 bun yiem meih nyei zingh laatc gu'nyuoz baengh orn
Psalms122:8 Weic yie nyei gorx-youz caux loz-gaeng doic yie oix gorngv
Psalms122:9 Weic Ziouv
Psalms123:1 Yiem lungh gu'nguaaic zueiz weic nyei Ziouv aac
Psalms123:2 Hnangv m'jangc bou kaux ganh nyei ziouv
Psalms123:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms123:4 Yie mbuo zuqc butv zoih butv zieqv nyei mienh huotv yie mbuo
Psalms124:1 Se gorngv Ziouv maiv caux yie mbuo yiem naaiv bung hnangv haaix nor? I^saa^laa^en Mienh dau maah!
Psalms124:2 Se gorngv Ziouv maiv caux yie mbuo yiem naaiv bung
Psalms124:3 se ninh mbuo qiex jiez yie mbuo hnangv njopc douz nor
Psalms124:4 Wuom yiemx oix torngx yie mbuo mingh
Psalms124:5 domh wuom beqv yaac oix guaatv yie mbuo mingh.
Psalms124:6 Ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh maiv bun yie mbuo zuqc win-wangv hoic hnangv zuqc hieh ga'naaiv nyei nyaah betv nor.
Psalms124:7 Yie mbuo hnangv norqc yiem zaeng norqc mienh nyei koux biaux ndutv. Koux dangx
Psalms124:8 Tengx yie mbuo wuov dauh se Ziouv
Psalms125:1 Da'faanh kaux Ziouv nyei mienh hnangv Si^on Mbong maiv zuqc ndanc dongz
Psalms125:2 Zuangx mbong hnangv haaix nor weih gormx Ye^lu^saa^lem
Psalms125:3 Orqv mienh maiv duqv yietc liuz gunv paaiv bun kuv mienh nyei buonc deic-bung. Nzauh heix kuv mienh haih sung buoz zoux orqv sic.
Psalms125:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms125:5 Mv baac haaix dauh huin mingh gan hnyouv njuotv mienh nyei jauv
Psalms126:1 Ziouv bun Si^on nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv loz wuov zanc
Psalms126:2 Yie mbuo nyei nzuih ziouc qaqv jatv
Psalms126:3 Ziouv weic yie mbuo zoux hlo haic nyei sic
Psalms126:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms126:5 Tov bun liouc jienv wuom-mueic zuangx nyei mienh duqv njien-youh nyei heuc jienv siou.
Psalms126:6 Liouc jienv wuom-mueic dorh nyim cuotv mingh zuangx nyei mienh
Psalms127:1 Se gorngv maiv zeiz Ziouv zoux biauv
Psalms127:2 Lungh ndorm jiez sin nziouv
Psalms127:3 Naamh nyouz se Ziouv bun nzipc nyei buonc
Psalms127:4 Mienh hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc yungz nyei naamh nyouz
Psalms127:5 Maaih forng buangv forng-ndongh nyei mienh orn-lorqc haic. Yiem zingh gaengh caux win-wangv dunx sic nyei ziangh hoc yaac maiv zuqc nyaiv.
Psalms128:1 Dauh dauh taaih Ziouv nyei mienh
Psalms128:2 Meih duqv nyanc meih ganh nyei buoz zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms128:3 Meih nyei auv oix yiem meih nyei biauv hnangv a'ngunc hmei ziangh biouv gitv nor. Meih nyei naamh nyouz oix weih gormx meih nyei dieh
Psalms128:4 Mangc maah! Taaih Ziouv nyei mienh zungv oix hnangv naaic duqv fuqv.
Psalms128:5 Tov Ziouv yiem Si^on ceix fuqv bun meih. Tov bun meih yietc seix buatc Ye^lu^saa^lem duqv longx.
Psalms128:6 Yaac tov bun meih maaih maengc ziangh jienv duqv buatc meih nyei fun-faqv. Tov bun I^saa^laa^en duqv baengh orn.
Psalms129:1 Ninh mbuo hoic yie zuqc kouv yiem yie hnyangx-jeiv lunx taux ih zanc. I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Ih zanc gorngv maah!
Psalms129:2 Ninh mbuo hoic yie zuqc kouv yiem yie hnyangx-jeiv lunx taux ih zanc
Psalms129:3 Ninh mbuo mborqv yie nyei diqc daanz butv mbiuz ndaauv nyei
Psalms129:4 Ziouv se baengh fim nyei. Ninh hngaqv ndutv orqv mienh ndoh nyei hlaang.
Psalms129:5 Tov bun nzorng Si^on wuov deix yietc zungv mienh zuqc nyaiv yaac zuqc tuix nzuonx nqa'haav.
Psalms129:6 Tov bun ninh mbuo hnangv yiem biauv-ngorh cuotv nyei miev
Psalms129:7 Gaatv mbiauh nyei mienh maiv zorqv daaih gaatv
Psalms129:8 Jiex jauv nyei mienh maiv gorngv
Psalms130:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms130:2 Ziouv aac
Psalms130:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms130:4 Mv baac meih guangc mienh nyei zuiz weic bun mienh taaih meih.
Psalms130:5 Yie zuov Ziouv
Psalms130:6 Yie nyei hnyouv zuov Ziouv gauh camv jiex siouv gaeng mienh zuov lungh njang
Psalms130:7 O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
Psalms130:8 Ninh yaac oix zuoqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh biaux ndutv yietc zungv zoux dorngc nyei zuiz.
Psalms131:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms131:2 Mv baac yie bun yie nyei hnyouv sekv nzieqc
Psalms131:3 O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
Psalms132:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms132:2 Jangx jienv ninh hnangv haaix nor caux Ziouv houv jienv laengz waac
Psalms132:3 “Yie zungv maiv bieqc yie nyei biauv yaac maiv faaux yie nyei coux.
Psalms132:4 Yie maiv bun yie nyei m'zing m'njormh
Psalms132:5 Zuov taux yie weic Ziouv lorz duqv dorngx yiem
Psalms132:6 Muangx gaax
Psalms132:7 “Mbuo oix zuqc bieqc ninh yiem nyei dorngx
Psalms132:8 Ziouv aac
Psalms132:9 Tov bun meih nyei sai mienh zanc-zanc zoux horpc
Psalms132:10 Tov weic meih nyei bou
Psalms132:11 Ziouv dorng jienv Ndaawitv ziepc zuoqv nyei laengz ngaengc waac
Psalms132:12 Se gorngv meih nyei dorn mbuo ei jienv yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac
Psalms132:13 Weic zuqc Ziouv ginv Si^on. Ninh oix longc weic zoux ninh yiem nyei dorngx.
Psalms132:14 Ninh gorngv
Psalms132:15 Yie oix ceix fuqv bun naaiv norm zingh nyei laangh ziqc bungx-zuoqc
Psalms132:16 Yie oix bun ninh nyei sai mienh duqv njoux en. Ninh nyei baeqc fingx yaac oix njien-youh nyei heuc.
Psalms132:17 Yie oix bun Ndaawitv nyei yietc dauh zeiv-fun yiem wuov zoux hungh. Yie weic yie longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh liepc dauh nzipc jienv zoux hungh.
Psalms132:18 Yie oix bun ninh nyei win-wangv zuqc nyaiv
Psalms133:1 Mangc maah! Gorx-youz horpc fim dongh eix nyei yiem se za'gengh longx nyei
Psalms133:2 Naaiv beiv jaaix haic nyei youh dox jienv Aalon nyei m'nqorngv aengx liouc njiec siaam
Psalms133:3 Se hnangv Hemon Mbong nyei mbiungc-suiv duih njiec Si^on Mbong. Weic zuqc yiem wuov maaih Ziouv ceix nyei fuqv
Psalms134:1 Ziouv nyei zuangx bou daaih maah! Dongh lungh muonz zanc souv jienv Ziouv nyei biauv nyei mienh
Psalms134:2 Hungx jienv cing-nzengc nyei dorngx sung buoz ceng Ziouv.
Psalms134:3 Tov Ziouv
Psalms135:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei mengh. Ziouv nyei zuangx bou aah! Oix zuqc ceng
Psalms135:2 se meih mbuo souv jienv Ziouv nyei biauv
Psalms135:3 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv weic zuqc Ziouv se longx haic. Baaux nzung ceng ninh nyei mengh
Psalms135:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv ginv Yaakopv weic ninh ganh
Psalms135:5 Yie hiuv duqv Ziouv se hlo haic
Psalms135:6 Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
Psalms135:7 Ninh bun mbuonx yiem lungh gorn faaux
Psalms135:8 Se dongh ninh daix yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei daauh toi dorn
Psalms135:9 O I^yipv Mienh aah! Ninh yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic dingc Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei zuangx jien nyei zuiz.
Psalms135:10 Ninh mietc ziex! ziex fingx mienh
Psalms135:11 Ninh daix Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh
Psalms135:12 Ninh yaac zorqv ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung jiu bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms135:13 O Ziouv aac
Psalms135:14 Ziouv oix tengx ninh nyei baeqc fingx caengx sic
Psalms135:15 Ganh fingx mienh nyei miuc-fangx longc jiem longc nyaanh zoux
Psalms135:16 Naaiv deix miuc-fangx maaih nzuih mv baac maiv haih gorngv waac
Psalms135:17 Ninh mbuo maaih m'normh mv baac ninh mbuo muangx maiv haiz
Psalms135:18 Zoux naaiv deix miuc-fangx nyei mienh ziouc hnangv naaiv deix miuc-fangx nor. Da'faanh kaux miuc-fangx nyei mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei.
Psalms135:19 O I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. O Aalon nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.
Psalms135:20 O Lewi nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Taaih Ziouv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.
Psalms135:21 Oix zuqc yiem Si^on ceng Ziouv
Psalms136:1 Meih mbuo oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh longx haic. Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.
Psalms136:2 Oix zuqc dor-ziec maanc zienh nyei Zienh
Psalms136:3 Oix zuqc dor-ziec maanc ziouv nyei Ziouv
Psalms136:4 Kungx ninh ganh zoux domh mbuoqc horngh nyei sic
Psalms136:5 Ninh longc ninh ganh nyei wuonh zaang zeix lungh
Psalms136:6 Ninh ceix ndau yiem wuom-minc gu'nguaaic
Psalms136:7 Ninh zeix domh njang cuotv daaih
Psalms136:8 Ninh zeix mba'hnoi gunv lungh hnoi zanc
Psalms136:9 Ninh zeix hlaax caux hleix gunv lungh muonz zanc
Psalms136:10 Ninh daix I^yipv Mienh nyei dorn-la'gauv
Psalms136:11 Ninh dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih
Psalms136:12 Ninh sung cuotv ninh domh qaqv nyei buoz
Psalms136:13 Ninh bun nqoi Koiv-Siqv nyei wuom
Psalms136:14 Ninh dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yangh koiv mbu'ndongx jiex Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.
Psalms136:15 Ninh zorqv Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei baeng-guanh mbienv njiec Koiv-Siqv. Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.
Psalms136:16 Mv baac ninh yienz ganh nyei baeqc fingx jiex deic-bung-huaang
Psalms136:17 Ninh daix domh hungh diex
Psalms136:18 Ninh daix ziex dauh maaih mengh hoc nyei hungh
Psalms136:19 Ninh daix Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh
Psalms136:20 Ninh aengx daix Mbaasaan Deic nyei Okc Hungh
Psalms136:21 Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nzipc
Psalms136:22 Se jiu bun ninh nyei bou
Psalms136:23 Yie mbuo ndortv njiec zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc ninh jangx yie mbuo
Psalms136:24 Ninh njoux yie mbuo biaux ndutv win-wangv
Psalms136:25 Ninh ceix nyanc hopv bun maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv
Psalms136:26 Oix zuqc dor-ziec lungh zaangc nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms137:1 Yie mbuo zueiz jienv Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei ndoqv-hlen
Psalms137:2 Yie mbuo zorqv yie mbuo nyei daanh baah kuangx jienv yiem naaiv nyei suiv-liemh ndiangx
Psalms137:3 weic zuqc caangv yie mbuo daaih wuov deix oix yie mbuo baaux nzung
Psalms137:4 Yie mbuo yiem ganh fingx mienh nyei deic-bung
Psalms137:5 O Ye^lu^saa^lem aah! Se gorngv yie la'kuqv meih
Psalms137:6 Se gorngv yie maiv jangx Ye^lu^saa^lem
Psalms137:7 O Ziouv aac
Psalms137:8 O Mbaa^mbi^lon aah! Weic meih zoux bun yie mbuo nyei sic
Psalms137:9 Zorqv meih nyei gu'nguaaz-faix guaeqv la'bieiv wuov dauh yaac maaih orn-lorqc aqv.
Psalms138:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms138:2 Yie hungx jienv meih nyei singx dinc baaix
Psalms138:3 Yie heuc meih wuov hnoi meih dau yie
Psalms138:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms138:5 Ninh mbuo oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv zoux nyei jauv
Psalms138:6 Maiv gunv Ziouv yiem hlang
Psalms138:7 Maiv gunv yie yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz
Psalms138:8 Ziouv oix zoux ziangx nyungc-nyungc ziux ninh weic yie maaih nyei za'eix. O Ziouv aac
Psalms139:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms139:2 Yie zueiz njiec fai jiez sin meih hiuv nyei. Meih yiem go nyei dorngx hiuv duqv yie nyei hnyouv hnamv nyei jauv.
Psalms139:3 Yie bieqc cuotv fai bueix njiec meih mangc muonc nyei
Psalms139:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms139:5 Meih yiem yie nyei nza'hmien maengx caux yie nyei nqa'haav nqaang
Psalms139:6 Meih ndongc naaiv hiuv yie
Psalms139:7 Yie haih mingh haaix cingx haih biaux ndutv meih nyei Singx Lingh? Fai yie haih biaux mingh haaix cingx leih ndutv meih nyei hmien?
Psalms139:8 Se gorngv yie faaux lungh
Psalms139:9 Se gorngv yie ndaix mingh mba'hnoi cuotv nyei dorngx
Psalms139:10 meih zungv yiem wuov dorh yie
Psalms139:11 Se gorngv yie gorngv
Psalms139:12 Weic meih nor
Psalms139:13 Meih zeix yiem yie gu'nyuoz nyei nyungc-nyungc. Yiem maa nyei ga'sie meih gapv yie daaih.
Psalms139:14 Yie ceng meih weic zuqc meih zeix yie cuotv daaih peix fuc haic
Psalms139:15 Yie yiem maa nyei ga'sie zeix cuotv
Psalms139:16 Yie nyei sin maiv gaengh benx fangx zeiv
Psalms139:17 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms139:18 Se gorngv yie saauv nor
Psalms139:19 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms139:20 Ninh mbuo gorngv orqv nyei waac daanh meih
Psalms139:21 O Ziouv aac
Psalms139:22 Yie nzorng ninh mbuo taux mbungv-fim
Psalms139:23 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms139:24 Mangc gaax yiem yie maaih haaix nyungc orqv nyei sic
Psalms140:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms140:2 Ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv daav cuotv waaic nyei za'eix
Psalms140:3 Ninh mbuo bun ninh mbuo nyei mbietc laic hnangv naang nyei mbietc laic nor. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih meix maaih naang-jieqv nyei ndie-doqc.
Psalms140:4 O Ziouv aac
Psalms140:5 Zoux maux nyei mienh bingx jienv zaeng koux zorqv yie
Psalms140:6 Yie gorngv mbuox Ziouv
Psalms140:7 O Ziouv
Psalms140:8 O Ziouv aac
Psalms140:9 Tov maiv dungx bun weih jienv yie wuov deix mienh hingh jiex. Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac nzuonx daaih hoic ninh mbuo ganh.
Psalms140:10 Tov bun zieqc jienv douz nyei taanx ndortv njiec ninh mbuo. Tov bun ninh mbuo zuqc zoi njiec ndo nyei kuotv
Psalms140:11 Tov maiv dungx bun gorngv waac-huv nyei mienh liepc nguaaz-gorn yiem deic-bung. Tov bun orqv nyei sic siepv-siepv zorqv jienv zoux doqc nyei mienh.
Psalms140:12 Yie hiuv duqv Ziouv baav jienv ndortv naanc nyei mienh
Psalms140:13 Kuv mienh zungv oix ceng meih nyei mengh
Psalms141:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms141:2 Tov bun yie daux gaux nyei waac hnangv hung yiem meih nyei nza'hmien. Yie sung jienv nyei buoz hnangv lungh maanz-hmuangx ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Psalms141:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms141:4 Tov bun yie maiv maaih hnyouv zoux orqv sic
Psalms141:5 Tov bun kuv mienh mborqv yie. Naaiv se weih zoux longx. Tov bun ninh gorngv-hemx yie
Psalms141:6 Ninh mbuo nyei siemv zuiz jien zuqc zoi njiec la'bieiv-mbaengx wuov zanc
Psalms141:7 Hnangv mienh laih ndau cenv muonc nzengc
Psalms141:8 O Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms141:9 Tov beu jienv yie biaux ndutv ninh mbuo zaeng weic hlopv yie nyei koux
Psalms141:10 Tov bun orqv mienh ndortv njiec ninh mbuo ganh zaeng nyei mungz
Psalms142:1 Yie cuotv qiex heuc Ziouv
Psalms142:2 Yie yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien qaqv gorngv yie nyei kouv-zingh kouv-latc
Psalms142:3 Yie hnyouv mau jienv njiec nyei ziangh hoc
Psalms142:4 Tov meih huin mbiaauc bung mangc
Psalms142:5 O Ziouv aac
Psalms142:6 Tov muangx yie heuc jienv jouh nyei waac
Psalms142:7 Tov dorh yie cuotv loh
Psalms143:1 O Ziouv aac
Psalms143:2 Tov maiv dungx siemv yie
Psalms143:3 Yie nyei win-wangv zunc yie
Psalms143:4 Weic naaiv yie nyei hnyouv mau jienv njiec
Psalms143:5 Yie jangx taux loz-hnoi
Psalms143:6 Yie hungx jienv meih sung buoz. Yie ngorc meih ndongc ndau-nqaai ngorc mbiungc.
Psalms143:7 O Ziouv aac
Psalms143:8 Tov bun yie lungh ndorm nziouv duqv haiz meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv yie weic zuqc yie kaux meih. Tov meih bun yie hiuv duqv horpc yangh nyei jauv
Psalms143:9 O Ziouv aac
Psalms143:10 Tov meih njaaux yie ei meih nyei eix
Psalms143:11 O Ziouv aac
Psalms143:12 Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie
Psalms144:1 Ceng Ziouv
Psalms144:2 Ninh se ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie wuov dauh Ziouv
Psalms144:3 O Ziouv aac
Psalms144:4 Mienh se hnangv tauv nzunc qiex. Ninh nyei hnoi-nyieqc jiex hnangv dongh linh siepv-siepv nyei jiex mingh nor.
Psalms144:5 O Ziouv aac
Psalms144:6 Tov borngz mba'lingc cuotv bun win-wangv nzaanx nzengc. Buonv meih nyei forng-cang bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx nyei biaux.
Psalms144:7 Tov meih yiem hlang nyei dorngx sung buoz cuotv daaih
Psalms144:8 Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv
Psalms144:9 O Tin-Hungh aac
Psalms144:10 Meih bun hungh diex duqv hingh
Psalms144:11 Tov meih njoux yie
Psalms144:12 Tov bun yie mbuo nyei dorn yiem hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc hnangv ndiangx hlo dingc nor. Tov bun yie mbuo nyei sieqv hnangv zuqc daaih zoux hungh dinc biauv-gorqv nyei ndiouh.
Psalms144:13 Tov bun yie mbuo nyei lamz dapv buangv nyungc-nyungc laangh ziqc. Tov bun yie mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh yiem yie mbuo nyei ciangv njiec dorn cin-cin waanc-waanc.
Psalms144:14 Tov bun yie mbuo nyei ngongh njiec dorn camv
Psalms144:15 Duqv naaiv nyungc fuqv nyei baeqc fingx maaih orn-lorqc. Maaih Ziouv zoux ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh wuov deix baeqc fingx maaih orn-lorqc.
Psalms145:1 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh
Psalms145:2 Yie oix hnoi-hnoi ceng meih. Yie oix ceng meih nyei mengh yietc liuz yietc seix.
Psalms145:3 Ziouv za'gengh hlo haic
Psalms145:4 Naaiv doic oix ceng meih zoux nyei sic bun wuov doic muangx
Psalms145:5 Yie oix fei-fangv meih domh njang-laangc nyei haangh daauh caux zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jauv.
Psalms145:6 Mienh oix zunh gorngv Ziouv zoux mbuoqc horngh
Psalms145:7 Ninh mbuo oix zunh gorngv meih longx haic nyei jauv
Psalms145:8 Ziouv ceix en yaac korv-lienh mienh. Ninh maiv qiex jiez siepv yaac maaih hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv buangv nzengc.
Psalms145:9 Ziouv zoux longx bun maanc mienh. Ninh yaac korv-lienh ninh zeix daaih nyei yietc zungv.
Psalms145:10 O Ziouv aac
Psalms145:11 Ninh mbuo oix zunh gorngv meih nyei guoqv nyei njang-laangc
Psalms145:12 weic bun zuangx mienh hiuv duqv meih zoux henv haic nyei sic
Psalms145:13 Meih nyei guoqv se yietc liuz nyei guoqv. Meih yietc liuz duqv gunv taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Ziouv ziepc zuoqv ei jienv ninh yietc zungv laengz nyei waac zoux. Yiem ninh zoux nyei yietc zungv sic ninh korv-lienh.
Psalms145:14 Ziouv oix baav jienv yietc zungv zuqc ndorpc nyei mienh. Zuqc kouv nyei mienh ninh yaac liepc jiez daaih.
Psalms145:15 Da'faanh maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv mangc jienv meih
Psalms145:16 Meih zoux hnyouv jangv bun nyungc-nyungc maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv duqv nyanc beuv.
Psalms145:17 Ziouv yiem ninh zoux nyei diuc-diuc jauv baengh fim nyei. Yiem ninh zoux nyei yietc zungv sic ninh yaac korv-lienh.
Psalms145:18 Ziouv yiem nitv fatv dauh dauh heuc jienv jouh ninh nyei mienh
Psalms145:19 Ninh oix ei jienv taaih ninh wuov deix nyei hnyouv oix nyei zoux ziangx. Ninh yaac muangx haiz ninh mbuo heuc jienv tov ziouc njoux ninh mbuo.
Psalms145:20 Ziouv beu jienv yietc zungv hnamv ninh nyei mienh
Psalms145:21 Yie nyei nzuih oix gorngv cuotv ceng Ziouv nyei waac. Zuangx mienh oix zuqc lomh nzoih yietc liuz ceng ninh nyei cing-nzengc mengh taux yietc liuz.
Psalms146:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Yie nyei hnyouv aac
Psalms146:2 Da'faanh yie ziangh jienv nyei hnoi-nyieqc yie oix ceng Ziouv. Yie yietc seix oix baaux nzung ceng yie nyei Tin-Hungh.
Psalms146:3 Meih mbuo maiv dungx kaux zoux hlo nyei mienh
Psalms146:4 Ninh yietv dangx qiex ziouc nzuonx benx nie. Dongh wuov hnoi ninh daav nyei za'eix zuqc mietc nzengc mi'aqv.
Psalms146:5 Maaih Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh tengx wuov dauh maaih orn-lorqc
Psalms146:6 dongh zeix lungh zeix ndau zeix koiv
Psalms146:7 Ninh baengh fim nyei siemv tengx zuqc zeix nyei mienh yaac ceix nyanc hopv bun hnyouv sie nyei mienh nyanc. Ziouv bun zuqc wuonx nyei mienh duqv bungx nqoi.
Psalms146:8 Ziouv bun m'zing maengh nyei mienh haih mangc duqv buatc. Zuqc kouv nyei mienh
Psalms146:9 Ziouv goux jienv yiem deic-bung nyei ganh fingx mienh
Psalms146:10 Ziouv yietc liuz zoux hungh. O Si^on aah! Meih nyei Tin-Hungh duqv gunv taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.
Psalms147:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Baaux nzung ceng yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh se za'gengh longx haic. Ceng ninh se za'gengh horpc yaac puix haic.
Psalms147:2 Ziouv ceix Ye^lu^saa^lem jiez daaih. Ninh siou zunv zuqc guaatv mingh nzaanx nzengc nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh.
Psalms147:3 Zuqc hnyouv mun kouv nyei mienh ninh zorc longx yaac beu jienv ninh mbuo zuqc mun nyei dorngx.
Psalms147:4 Ninh dingc ziangx hleix nyei soux mouc
Psalms147:5 Yie mbuo nyei Ziouv za'gengh hlo haic
Psalms147:6 Ziouv bouh zuqc zeix nyei mienh faaux
Psalms147:7 Oix zuqc dor-ziec
Psalms147:8 Ninh longc mbuonx om jienv lungh
Psalms147:9 Ninh ceix nyanc hopv bun saeng-kuv
Psalms147:10 Ninh a'hneiv nyei se maiv zeiz maaz nyei qaqv
Psalms147:11 Ziouv a'hneiv nyei se taaih ninh nyei mienh
Psalms147:12 O Ye^lu^saa^lem aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. O Si^on aah! Oix zuqc ceng meih nyei Tin-Hungh.
Psalms147:13 Ninh bun meih nyei zingh laatc nyei gaengh sorn wuonv
Psalms147:14 Ninh bun meih nyei gapv-jaaix gu'nyuoz taaix-baengh
Psalms147:15 Ninh bun ninh nyei lingc cuotv mingh gormx lungh ndiev
Psalms147:16 Ninh bun sorng hnangv ba'gi yungh biei
Psalms147:17 Ninh bun duih borqc njiec hnangv la'bieiv-muonc nor. Ninh bun nziaaux-namx buonc daaih
Psalms147:18 Ninh yietv gorngv cuotv waac
Psalms147:19 Ninh zorqv ninh nyei waac bun Yaakopv
Psalms147:20 Ninh maiv hnangv naaiv zoux weic ganh fingx mienh
Psalms148:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc yiem gu'nguaaic lungh ceng Ziouv
Psalms148:2 Ninh nyei zuangx fin-mienh oix zuqc ceng ninh. Ninh nyei zuangx fin-mienh baeng oix zuqc ceng ninh.
Psalms148:3 Mba'hnoi aah! Hlaax aah! Oix zuqc ceng ninh. Ziux njang nyei yietc zungv hleix aah! Oix zuqc ceng ninh.
Psalms148:4 Hlang jiex nyei lungh caux yiem lungh gu'nguaaic nyei wuom aah! Oix zuqc ceng ninh.
Psalms148:5 Tov bun naaiv deix yietc zungv ceng Ziouv nyei mengh
Psalms148:6 Ninh liepc naaiv deix daaih yietc liuz taux yietc liuz. Ninh njiec nyei lingc yietc liuz maiv haih jiex.
Psalms148:7 Oix zuqc yiem ndau-beih ceng Ziouv. Koiv nyei domh mbiauz caux yiem koiv ndo nyei dorngx yietc zungv oix zuqc ceng.
Psalms148:8 Douz caux borqc
Psalms148:9 domh mbong fiuv-mbong yietc zungv
Psalms148:10 hieh zoih caux yietc zungv saeng-kuv
Psalms148:11 Lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex caux maanc fingx mienh
Psalms148:12 houh saeng caux sieqv
Psalms148:13 Tov bun naaiv deix yietc zungv ceng Ziouv nyei mengh
Psalms148:14 Ninh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx henv weic bun ninh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx ceng ninh
Psalms149:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc baaux diuh siang-nzung bun Ziouv. Oix zuqc yiem ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei baeqc fingx gapv zunv nyei dorngx ceng ninh.
Psalms149:2 Oix zuqc bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh weic Zeix Ninh Mbuo Daaih Wuov Dauh a'hneiv. Oix zuqc bun Si^on nyei baeqc fingx weic ninh mbuo nyei Hungh Diex orn-lorqc.
Psalms149:3 Oix zuqc bun ninh mbuo cangx heix ceng ninh nyei mengh
Psalms149:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv a'hneiv ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Psalms149:5 Tov bun gan longx ninh wuov deix weic ninh mbuo duqv hingh jiex nyei njang-laangc njien-youh. Tov bun ninh mbuo yiem ninh mbuo nyei coux njien-youh nyei baaux nzung.
Psalms149:6 Tov bun ninh mbuo baaux nzung mbui nyei ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms149:7 weic jaauv win bun maanc guoqv mienh
Psalms149:8 weic zorqv ninh mbuo nyei hungh ndoh jienv
Psalms149:9 weic zoux ziangx ziux fiev jienv oix hnangv haaix nor dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz. Naaiv se Tin-Hungh nyei yietc zungv baeqc fingx duqv nyei njang-laangc. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.
Psalms150:1 Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc yiem ninh nyei singx dinc ceng Tin-Hungh
Psalms150:2 Ceng ninh weic ninh zoux domh qaqv nyei sic. Ceng ninh weic zuqc ninh za'gengh! hlo haic.
Psalms150:3 Longc nzatc ceng ninh
Psalms150:4 Mborqv nzoz
Psalms150:5 Nqaapv caauh zeiv ceng ninh
Psalms150:6 Yietc zungv haih tauv qiex nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.
Proverbs1:1 Naaiv se Ndaawitv nyei dorn
Proverbs1:2 weic bun mienh hiuv duqv cong-mengh caux njaaux nyei jauv
Proverbs1:3 weic njaaux mienh yiem naaiv seix zaangc longc cong-mengh
Proverbs1:4 weic bun maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh haih guai
Proverbs1:5 weic bun cong-mengh mienh muangx yaac haih jaa hoqc hiuv camv
Proverbs1:6 weic bun mienh haih mengh baeqc cong-mengh waac caux meiv jienv gorngv nyei waac
Proverbs1:7 Wuonh zaang nyei gorn se oix zuqc taaih Ziouv. Mienh hngongx mienh mangc piex cong-mengh caux njaaux nyei waac.
Proverbs1:8 Yie nyei dorn aah! Oix zuqc muangx meih nyei die kuinx nyei waac
Proverbs1:9 weic zuqc naaiv deix i nyungc benx nzueic haic nyei ningv ndongx jienv meih nyei m'nqorngv
Proverbs1:10 Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv zuiz-mienh yuoqc meih
Proverbs1:11 Se gorngv ninh mbuo gorngv
Proverbs1:12 Mbuo oix zorqv ninh mbuo liemh nangh naqv hnangv njiec yiemh gen
Proverbs1:13 Mbuo ziouc duqv nyungc-nyungc jaaix nyei ga'naaiv
Proverbs1:14 Meih gunv caux yie mbuo maaih buonc
Proverbs1:15 Yie nyei dorn aah! Maiv dungx gan ninh mbuo mingh! Maiv dungx bun meih nyei zaux caaiv ninh mbuo yangh nyei jauv
Proverbs1:16 weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei zaux tiux mingh zoux orqv
Proverbs1:17 Norqc buatc jienv mienh zaeng mungz se maiv lamh longc.
Proverbs1:18 Naaiv deix mienh zuov jienv bun ganh zuqc daic
Proverbs1:19 Da'faanh longc orqv nyei jauv lorz zinh nyaanh yaac hnangv naaiv nor
Proverbs1:20 Cong-mengh se hnangv dauh m'sieqv dorn yiem jaai-horngc heuc
Proverbs1:21 Ninh yiem nauc nyitc nyei jaai-daauh heuc
Proverbs1:22 Ninh gorngv
Proverbs1:23 Yie gorngv-njaaux meih mbuo
Proverbs1:24 Weic zuqc yie heuc meih mbuo
Proverbs1:25 Meih mbuo nqemh yie kuinx nyei yietc zungv waac. Yie gorngv-njaaux
Proverbs1:26 Meih mbuo zuqc zeqc naanc yie ziouc jatv. Meih mbuo zuqc domh heiv sic haeqv meih mbuo
Proverbs1:27 Meih mbuo zuqc domh heiv sic hnangv domh nziaaux
Proverbs1:28 “Wuov zanc meih mbuo oix heuc yie
Proverbs1:29 weic zuqc meih mbuo nzorng wuonh zaang
Proverbs1:30 Yie kuinx nyei waac meih mbuo maiv muangx yietc deix
Proverbs1:31 Weic naaiv meih mbuo ziouc duqv puix meih mbuo zoux nyei sic
Proverbs1:32 Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh nqemh cong-mengh ziouc zuqc daic
Proverbs1:33 Mv baac haaix dauh muangx yie
Proverbs2:1 Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv meih zipv yie nyei waac
Proverbs2:2 meih baeng m'normh muangx cong-mengh nyei waac
Proverbs2:3 Zeiz nyei
Proverbs2:4 se gorngv meih lorz cong-mengh hnangv lorz nyaanh
Proverbs2:5 hnangv naaic meih ziouc mengh baeqc taaih Ziouv
Proverbs2:6 Weic zuqc Ziouv ceix cong-mengh bun mienh
Proverbs2:7 Ninh siou cong-mengh weic tengx hnyouv zingx wuov deix
Proverbs2:8 Ninh goux baengh fim mienh nyei jauv
Proverbs2:9 Wuov zanc meih ziouc mengh baeqc haaix nyungc horpc nyei
Proverbs2:10 weic zuqc cong-mengh oix bieqc meih nyei hnyouv
Proverbs2:11 Guai nyei jauv oix beu jienv meih
Proverbs2:12 aengx njoux meih biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei jauv caux gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh.
Proverbs2:13 Naaiv nyungc mienh guangc zoux horpc nyei jauv
Proverbs2:14 Ninh mbuo a'hneiv zoux orqv sic
Proverbs2:15 Ninh mbuo nyei jauv ngau njuotv
Proverbs2:16 Meih ziouc duqv simv nqoi hienx nqox nyei auv
Proverbs2:17 Ninh guangc hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc longc daaih nyei nqox
Proverbs2:18 Se gorngv mingh ninh nyei biauv
Proverbs2:19 Da'faanh mingh ninh wuov nyei mienh maiv maaih yietc dauh duqv nzuonx
Proverbs2:20 Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc yangh mienh longx mienh nyei jauv
Proverbs2:21 Weic zuqc hnyouv zingx nyei mienh duqv yiem deic-bung
Proverbs2:22 Mv baac orqv mienh oix zuqc pai guangc
Proverbs3:1 Yie nyei dorn aah! Maiv dungx la'kuqv yie njaaux nyei waac. Meih nyei hnyouv oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei leiz-latc.
Proverbs3:2 meih yiem seix zaangc nyei hnoi-nyieqc caux hnyangx-soux ziouc haih ziangh duqv ndaauv
Proverbs3:3 Maiv dungx guangc hnamv nyei
Proverbs3:4 Hnangv naaic ziux Tin-Hungh caux baamh mienh mangc
Proverbs3:5 Oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv kaux Ziouv
Proverbs3:6 Yiem meih zoux nyei diuh diuh jauv oix zuqc nyiemc ninh
Proverbs3:7 Maiv dungx hnamv ganh maaih cong-mengh
Proverbs3:8 Hnangv naaic ziouc hnangv longx haic nyei ndie zorc meih wangc siangx
Proverbs3:9 Oix zuqc longc meih nyei zinh zoih caux meih nyei yietc zungv gaeng-zuangx nyei daauh torngx biouv taaih Ziouv.
Proverbs3:10 Hnangv naaic meih nyei lamz ziouc buangv nzengc
Proverbs3:11 Yie nyei dorn aah! Maiv dungx mangc piex Ziouv mborqv njaaux nyei waac
Proverbs3:12 weic zuqc Ziouv hnamv wuov dauh ninh gorngv-njaaux wuov dauh
Proverbs3:13 Duqv cong-mengh yaac duqv bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh
Proverbs3:14 weic zuqc duqv cong-mengh nyei ndaauv-daauh se gauh longx jiex nyaanh
Proverbs3:15 Cong-mengh gauh jaaix jiex la'bieiv-jaaix. Meih oix duqv nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv
Proverbs3:16 Yiem ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz maaih siouc nyuonh ndaauv
Proverbs3:17 Ninh nyei jauv se bun mienh maaih orn-lorqc
Proverbs3:18 Cong-mengh beiv diuh ziangh maengc nyei ndiangx. Haaix dauh nanv jienv ninh
Proverbs3:19 Ziouv longc cong-mengh liepc ndau
Proverbs3:20 Ninh nyei wuonh zaang bun ndau-ndiev nyei wuom mbeux cuotv
Proverbs3:21 Yie nyei dorn aah! Meih oix zuqc goux jienv cong-mengh caux haih samx duqv cuotv nyei jauv. Maiv dungx bun naaiv deix i nyungc leih nqoi meih nyei m'zing-ndaangc.
Proverbs3:22 I nyungc ziouc bun meih ziangh duqv maengc ndaauv
Proverbs3:23 Meih ziouc baengh orn nyei gan meih nyei jauv yangh
Proverbs3:24 Meih bueix njiec nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx gamh nziex
Proverbs3:25 Liemh zeih zuqc heiv sic maiv dungx gamh nziex
Proverbs3:26 Weic zuqc Ziouv zoux meih kaux nyei dorngx
Proverbs3:27 Meih maaih banh zeic tengx mienh nyei ziangh hoc
Proverbs3:28 Se gorngv meih ih zanc maaih jienv gaux tengx mienh nyei
Proverbs3:29 Maiv dungx daav za'eix hoic juangc laangz mienh

Proverbs11:12 Haaix dauh mangc piex juangc laangz mienh se hnamv maiv tong haaix nyungc nyei mienh. Mv baac bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh sekv nzieqc nyei.
Proverbs11:13 Jiex naaiv jiex wuov gorngv henh waac nyei mienh gorngv cuotv gem jienv nyei jauv
Proverbs11:14 Maiv maaih mienh dorh
Proverbs11:15 Haaix dauh beu ganh dauh mienh zungv oix zuqc kouv aqv. Mv baac haaix dauh nzorng beu mienh nyei jauv ziouc yiem duqv wuonv.
Proverbs11:16 Hnyouv longx
Proverbs11:17 Korv-lienh mienh nyei mienh tengx ganh duqv longx
Proverbs11:18 Orqv mienh nyei gong-zinh setv mueiz se maiv duqv haaix nyungc
Proverbs11:19 Haaix dauh liepc hnyouv zoux kuv sic ziouc duqv maengc ziangh
Proverbs11:20 Hnyouv buv longh buv dangv nyei mienh
Proverbs11:21 Oix zuqc hiuv dingc
Proverbs11:22 M'sieqv dorn nzueic mv baac zieqv maiv duqv haaix nyungc horpc se hnangv norm jiem-kuing cunx jienv dungz nyei mba'zorng.
Proverbs11:23 Kuv mienh oix nyei
Proverbs11:24 Maaih laanh mienh zoux hnyouv jangv yaac gunv zoux gunv butv zoih. Maaih laanh zoux hnyouv hepc
Proverbs11:25 Hnyouv jangv nyei mienh oix duqv bungx-zuoqc. Haaix dauh bun wuom mienh hopv
Proverbs11:26 Haaix dauh ngaengc jienv maiv maaic laangh ziqc
Proverbs11:27 Haaix dauh jienh lorz zoux longx nyei jauv ziouc duqv mienh taaih

Proverbs17:1 Nduqc aax hnaangx-nqaai
Proverbs17:2 Zoux duqv gong longx
Proverbs17:3 Nyaanh korqv se weic sinx nyaanh
Proverbs17:4 Zoux orqv nyei mienh muangx mienh waaic mienh nyei nzuih gorngv. Gorngv-baeqc mienh muangx gorngv-baeqc mienh nyei waac.
Proverbs17:5 Haaix dauh huotv mienh jomc mienh se mangc piex Zeix Ninh Daaih Nyei Tin-Hungh. Haaix dauh a'hneiv mienh zuqc zeqc naanc
Proverbs17:6 Fu'jueiv-fun benx mienh gox mienh nyei ningv
Proverbs17:7 Mienh hngongx mienh bungx waac-maux se maiv puix. Zoux hlo nyei mienh gorngv-baeqc se gauh fatv maiv puix.
Proverbs17:8 Ziux bun nyei mienh nyei m'zing buatc
Proverbs17:9 Haaix dauh guangc nqoi mienh zoux dorngc nyei sic ziouc duqv mienh hnamv
Proverbs17:10 Yietc joux gorngv-hemx nyei waac haih tengx hnyouv mengh baeqc nyei mienh gauh camv mienh hngongx mienh zuqc mborqv yietc baeqv biaav.
Proverbs17:11 Orqv mienh kungx oix lorz jauv faanv lunc
Proverbs17:12 Mienh mingh buangh dauh zuqc guangc dorn nyei jiepv-nyeiz
Proverbs17:13 Haaix dauh zoux orqv sic winh mienh zoux nyei kuv sic
Proverbs17:14 Jiez gorn nzaeng jaax se hnangv bungx wuom liouc cuotv. Hnangv naaic oix zuqc guangc nqoi ndaangc maaih nzaeng jaax nyei sic cuotv.
Proverbs17:15 Haaix dauh bungx zoux dorngc nyei mienh
Proverbs17:16 Mienh hngongx mienh nyei buoz weic haaix diuc oix nanv jienv nyaanh maaiz cong-mengh? Ninh zungv maiv maaih hnyouv hoqc hiuv.
Proverbs17:17 Loz-gaeng doic zanc-zanc hnamv jaax
Proverbs17:18 Samx maiv cuotv haaix nyungc nyei mienh laengz beu mienh nyei zaeqv
Proverbs17:19 Haaix dauh a'hneiv zoux waaic sic
Proverbs17:20 Hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh maiv haih duqv longx
Proverbs17:21 Die maaih dorn hngongx ziouc bun die nzauh
Proverbs17:22 Hnyouv njien-youh se longx haic nyei ndie. Hnyouv kouv hoic sin kouv jienv njiec.
Proverbs17:23 Orqv mienh beic ndiev zipv nyaanh hmuangx weic zoux waaic baengh fim nyei jauv.
Proverbs17:24 Mienh guai mienh nyei hmien hungx jienv cong-mengh nyei jauv mingh
Proverbs17:25 Hngongx nyei dorn bun ninh nyei die zuqc nzauh

Proverbs18:1 Haaix dauh leih nqoi maiv caux mienh
Proverbs18:2 Mienh hngongx mienh maiv a'hneiv mengh baeqc haaix nyungc
Proverbs18:3 Orqv mienh daaih taux
Proverbs18:4 Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac hnangv ndo nyei wuom
Proverbs18:5 Bouc orqv mienh se maiv benx
Proverbs18:6 Mienh hngongx mienh nyei waac coqv cuotv nzaeng jaax nyei sic. Ninh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac yuoqc mienh mborqv jaax.
Proverbs18:7 Mienh hngongx mienh nyei nzuih bun ganh zuqc baaic. Ninh gorngv nyei waac zoux koux hlopv ninh ganh.
Proverbs18:8 Gorngv waac-sapv daanh mienh se hnangv duqv nyanc aax kuv nyei ga'naaiv
Proverbs18:9 Zoux gong ndanh nyei mienh caux zoux mietc nyei mienh benx muoz-doic.
Proverbs18:10 Ziouv nyei mengh se hnangv wuonv haic nyei laauh
Proverbs18:11 Butv-zoih mienh nyei zinh zoih se ninh wuonv haic nyei zingh
Proverbs18:12 Mienh nyei hnyouv maux ndaangc cingx daaih zuqc mietc
Proverbs18:13 Haaix dauh maiv gaengh muangx longx ziouc dau ndaangc
Proverbs18:14 Mienh butv baengc
Proverbs18:15 Mienh guai mienh nyei hnyouv duqv wuonh zaang. Cong-mengh mienh nyei hnyouv lorz wuonh zaang.
Proverbs18:16 Zingh nyeic tengx fungx nyei mienh koi jauv dorh ninh bieqc taux zoux hlo nyei mienh nyei nza'hmien.
Proverbs18:17 Haaix dauh gorngv ninh nyei sic ndaangc
Proverbs18:18 Dingc maengc mangc haih bun nzaeng nyei jauv dingh
Proverbs18:19 Ziqc zuiz liuz gorx-youz
Proverbs18:20 Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac bun ga'sie beuv
Proverbs18:21 Nzuih nyei hatc maaz haih bun mienh ziangh fai daic. Ziux ninh a'hneiv gorngv nyei waac ziouc winh nzuonx bun ninh.
Proverbs18:22 Haaix dauh lorz duqv dauh auv se duqv longx nyei ga'naaiv yaac duqv Ziouv ceix fuqv.
Proverbs18:23 Mienh jomc mienh qaqv tov tengx
Proverbs18:24 Maaih a'nziaauc doic zoux hnangv benx loz-gaeng doic
Proverbs19:1 Zoux duqv zingx nyei mienh jomc mienh zungv gauh longx mienh hngongx mienh gorngv-baeqc.
Proverbs19:2 Mienh maiv maaih wuonh zaang se maiv benx. Hnyouv beqv nyei mienh yaac haih zoux dorngc sic.
Proverbs19:3 Mienh laaix ganh hngongx zuqc baaic
Proverbs19:4 Maaih zinh maaih nyaanh ziouc maaih gorx-youz camv
Proverbs19:5 Zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh simv maiv ndutv zuqc dingc zuiz. Gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh setv mueiz yaac biaux maiv ndutv.
Proverbs19:6 Hnyouv jangv nyei mienh maaih mienh camv tov ninh tengx. Fungx zingh nyeic nyei mienh duqv dauh dauh zoux ninh nyei doic.
Proverbs19:7 Mienh jomc mienh nyei yietc zungv muoz-doic youx ninh
Proverbs19:8 Duqv cong-mengh nyei mienh hnamv ganh
Proverbs19:9 Zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh simv maiv ndutv zuqc dingc zuiz
Proverbs19:10 Mienh hngongx mienh hnangv butv-zoih mienh yiem se maiv puix
Proverbs19:11 Hnamv duqv tong nyei mienh maiv qiex jiez siepv
Proverbs19:12 Hungh diex qiex jiez se hnangv sienh njunh nor
Proverbs19:13 Hngongx nyei fu'jueiv haih bun domh mienh zuqc baaic. Auv hengx nzaeng jaax se hnangv mbiungc maiv dingh liouh nyei ndiepv jienv yiem.
Proverbs19:14 Biauv caux zinh zoih yiem die nzipc daaih
Proverbs19:15 Zoux lueic nyei jauv bun mienh m'njormh duqv ndo. Kungx oix henh nyei mienh oix zuqc ngorc.
Proverbs19:16 Gan leiz-latc nyei mienh goux ninh nyei maengc
Proverbs19:17 Haaix dauh korv-lienh mienh jomc mienh se hnangv gaav ga'naaiv bun Ziouv. Weic ninh zoux longx nyei jauv Ziouv oix winh bun ninh.
Proverbs19:18 Dongh maaih lamh hnamv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc mborqv njaaux meih nyei fu'jueiv. Maiv dungx dingc sueih ninh zuqc mietc.
Proverbs19:19 Ga'qiex beqv nyei mienh oix zuqc dingc zuiz
Proverbs19:20 Oix zuqc muangx mienh kuinx
Proverbs19:21 Mienh nyei hnyouv daav za'eix camv
Proverbs19:22 Mienh gauh oix jiex nyei se maaih hnyouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv. Mienh jomc mienh corc gauh longx gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh.
Proverbs19:23 Taaih Ziouv ziouc bun mienh duqv maengc ziangh
Proverbs19:24 Mienh lueic mienh nyei buoz lom bieqc nzormc

Proverbs20:1 A'ngunc diuv zoux bun laanh huotv laanh
Proverbs20:2 Hungh diex nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv haeqv mienh gamh nziex se hnangv sienh njunh nor. Haaix dauh cuoqv ninh qiex jiez zungv zuqc guangc maengc.
Proverbs20:3 Simv nqoi nzaeng jaax nyei jauv se puix duqv taaih nyei

Proverbs23:1 Meih caux zoux hlo nyei mienh juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx
Proverbs23:2 Se gorngv meih zoux mauv nyanc nyei mienh
Proverbs23:3 Maiv dungx mauv nyanc ninh kuv haic nyei ga'naaiv
Proverbs23:4 Maiv dungx laauh luic weic lorz zinh zoih
Proverbs23:5 Meih kungx bungx m'zing mangc maiv lamh longc nyei zinh zoih fai? Weic zuqc zinh zoih liemh zeih hnangv cuotv ndaatv
Proverbs23:6 Maiv dungx nyanc mienh njapv mienh nyei lai-hnaangx
Proverbs23:7 Weic zuqc ninh se hnangv dauh yiem hnyouv gu'nyuoz saauv jienv nyei mienh. Ninh heuc meih
Proverbs23:8 Meih nyanc liuz wuov deix diqv dien lai-hnaangx zungv zuqc lov cuotv
Proverbs23:9 Maiv dungx gorngv waac bun mienh hngongx mienh muangx
Proverbs23:10 Maiv dungx suiv loz-hnoi deic-jaaix nyei dongc

Proverbs23:13 Meih oix zuqc mborqv njaaux fu'jueiv
Proverbs23:14 Se gorngv meih longc biaav fitv
Proverbs23:15 Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv meih nyei hnyouv maaih cong-mengh

Proverbs23:21 weic zuqc mauv nyanc hopv nquin nyei mienh oix jomc. Mauv m'njormh nyei mienh ziouc zuqv lui-houx-huv.
Proverbs23:22 Meih nyei die bun meih maaih maengc

Proverbs23:26 Yie nyei dorn aac

Proverbs23:29 Haaix dauh maaih kuonx naanh? Haaix dauh maaih you-nzauh? Haaix dauh maaih nzaeng jaax nyei sic? Haaix dauh maaih la'ngopv nyei jauv? Haaix dauh zuqc mun yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx? Haaix dauh m'zing siqv?
Proverbs23:30 Se dongh liouh linh hopv a'ngunc diuv caux mingh seix hopv peux daaih nyei diuv wuov deix mienh.
Proverbs23:31 Maiv dungx mangc a'ngunc diuv-siqv yiem gu'nyuoz zaanv aengv njang
