Proverbs24:1 Maiv dungx mueic jieqv orqv mienh
Proverbs24:2 weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv daav doqc nyei za'eix. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv orqv haic nyei waac.
Proverbs24:3 Zoux biauv oix zuqc longc cong-mengh
Proverbs24:4 Maaih wuonh zaang
Proverbs24:5 Cong-mengh mienh maaih qaqv hlo. Maaih wuonh zaang nyei mienh jaa henv jienv faaux
Proverbs24:6 weic zuqc meih mingh mborqv jaax oix zuqc bangc cong-mengh nyei za'eix
Proverbs24:7 Cong-mengh nyei jauv weic mienh hngongx mienh ba'laqc hlang haic. Yiem zingh gaengh ninh maiv gorngv haaix nyungc aqv.
Proverbs24:8 Daav za'eix zoux orqv sic wuov dauh ziouc duqv mienh heuc cuoqv sic mienh.
Proverbs24:9 Hnamv cuotv zoux hngongx nyei sic benx zuiz. Mienh yaac youx huotv mienh nyei mienh.
Proverbs24:10 Se gorngv meih zuqc sic nyei hnoi meih hnyouv mau
Proverbs24:11 Oix zuqc njoux dorh mingh daix daic nyei mienh
Proverbs24:12 Se gorngv meih gorngv
Proverbs24:13 Yie nyei dorn aah! Gunv nyanc mueiz-dorngh weic zuqc mueiz-dorngh se longx haic. Nyanc mueiz-pengx ndiepv njiec nyei mueiz-dorngh haiz mueix doc gaam.
Proverbs24:14 Oix zuqc hiuv duqv meih nyei hnyouv duqv cong-mengh se hnangv wuov nor. Se gorngv meih lorz buatc cong-mengh
Proverbs24:15 Maiv dungx mbaapv jienv zuov hnangv orqv mienh zuov jienv hoic kuv mienh nyei biauv. Maiv dungx zoux doqc
Proverbs24:16 weic zuqc kuv mienh ndorpc siec nzunc corc haih jiez sin daaih
Proverbs24:17 Meih nyei win-wangv ndorpc
Proverbs24:18 Nziex Ziouv buatc ziouc maiv a'hneiv
Proverbs24:19 Maiv dungx weic orqv mienh guaax hnyouv
Proverbs24:20 weic zuqc orqv mienh maiv maaih hoz nqaang. Mienh waaic mienh nyei dang yaac oix zuqc biomv daic.
Proverbs24:21 Yie nyei dorn aac
Proverbs24:22 weic zuqc maaih zeqc naanc oix liemh zeih yiem ninh mbuo i dauh daaih. Haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo i dauh oix hnangv haaix nor bun mienh zuqc baaic?
Proverbs24:23 Aengx jiex mingh maaih cong-mengh mienh gorngv nyei waac. Dunx sic nyei ziangh hoc mangc mienh nyei hmien se maiv horpc.
Proverbs24:24 Haaix dauh gorngv mbuox orqv mienh
Proverbs24:25 Mv baac haaix dauh bun ninh zuqc dingc zuiz
Proverbs24:26 Haaix dauh longc zien nyei waac dau
Proverbs24:27 Oix zuqc zoux ziangx ga'nyiec nyei gong ndaangc
Proverbs24:28 Maiv dungx zoux maiv maaih gorn-baengx nyei zorng-zengx hoic juangc laangz mienh
Proverbs24:29 Maiv dungx gorngv
Proverbs24:30 Yie jiex mienh lueic mienh nyei liangx-ndeic
Proverbs24:31 mangc maah! Maaih njimv cuotv daaih buangv ndau-beih
Proverbs24:32 Yie yietc binc mangc
Proverbs24:33 aengx bueix dangh
Proverbs24:34 jomc nyei jauv ziouc liemh zeih taux hnangv janx-zaqc. Dangx-donx nyei jauv oix daaih hnangv mienh dorh jienv wuoqc ginc daaih taux.
Proverbs25:1 Yiem naaiv mingh yaac benx Saa^lo^morn nyei cong-mengh waac
Proverbs25:2 Zorqv sic gem jienv benx Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc
Proverbs25:3 Lungh ndongc haaix hlang
Proverbs25:4 Zorqv cuotv nyaanh nqaiv
Proverbs25:5 Zorqv nqoi yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien nyei orqv mienh
Proverbs25:6 Yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien maiv dungx taaih ganh hlo
Proverbs25:7 weic zuqc maaih mienh gorngv
Proverbs25:8 Meih nyei m'zing buatc nyei maiv dungx siepv-siepv nyei dorh mingh wuov sic dorngh. Nziex maaih ganh nyei juangc laangz mienh daaih bun meih zuqc nyaiv
Proverbs25:9 Se gorngv meih caux dauh juangc laangz mienh nzaeng
Proverbs25:10 Nziex muangx haiz nyei mienh bun meih zuqc nyaiv. Meih waaic nyei mengh dauh yaac maiv haih longx aqv.
Proverbs25:11 Gorngv yietc joux waac puix duqv horpc ziangh hoc
Proverbs25:12 Cong-mengh mienh kuinx maaih m'normh oix muangx nyei mienh se hnangv jiem-buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng fai zien jiem zoux daaih nyei siou-setv.
Proverbs25:13 Ziepc zuoqv nyei douc fienx mienh bun paaiv ninh wuov deix ziouv nyei hnyouv fingv
Proverbs25:14 Mienh bungx waac-maux gorngv oix fungx zingh nyeic mv baac maiv fungx
Proverbs25:15 Longc noic yuoqc duqv zoux hlo nyei mienh. Gorngv waac suonc zungv haih bun ninh nyei hnyouv mau njiec.
Proverbs25:16 Se gorngv meih duqv mueiz-dorngh oix zuqc nyanc horpc. Nyanc camv jiex jaax nor
Proverbs25:17 Meih oix zuqc lauh lauh mingh nzunc meih nyei juangc laangz mienh nyei biauv hnangv. Maiv zei aeqv
Proverbs25:18 Zoux jaav zorng-zengx hoic juangc laangz mienh wuov dauh se hnangv mborqv jaax nyei ndiangx-ndonx fai nzuqc ndaauv fai forng-cang laic.
Proverbs25:19 Zuqc zeqc naanc nyei ziangh hoc kaux maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh se hnangv nyaah nquaqv fai zaux waaic.

Proverbs25:21 Se gorngv meih nyei win-wangv hnyouv sie
Proverbs25:22 Meih hnangv naaiv zoux ninh ziouc nyaiv aqv
Proverbs25:23 Baqv bung nyei nziaaux dorh mbiungc daaih
Proverbs25:24 Yiem biauv-ngorh gu'nguaaic nyei gorqv corc gauh longx caux zanc-zanc nzaeng jaax nyei m'sieqv dorn juangc biauv yiem.
Proverbs25:25 Maaih longx nyei fienx yiem go nyei deic-bung daaih
Proverbs25:26 Kuv mienh nyiemc suei bun orqv mienh se hnangv njoqc nyei wuom-nyuonh fai laih hlopv nyei wuom-zingv.

Wuov dauh nyei mbuox heuc haaix nyungc? Ninh nyei dorn nyei mbuox heuc haaix nyungc? Meih zungv hiuv nyei saah?

Proverbs31:31 Tov bun ninh duqv zingh nyeic ziux ninh nyei buoz zoux nyei gong

Ecclesiastes1:7 Diuh diuh ndoqv liouc mingh gapv koiv

Ecclesiastes1:10 Maaih haaix nyungc bun mienh haih gorngv

Ecclesiastes1:12 Yie
Ecclesiastes1:13 Yie liepc hnyouv longc cong-mengh zaah mangc yaac hoqc hiuv yiem naaiv lungh ndiev zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc sic. Tin-Hungh bun baamh mienh ging jiex nyei sic za'gengh aqc nyei

Ecclesiastes1:18 Weic zuqc yietc zei maaih cong-mengh camv
Ecclesiastes2:1 Yie yiem hnyouv hnamv
Ecclesiastes2:2 Yie gorngv taux oix kuh jatv nyei jauv se buv longh buv dangv nyei sic. Zoux njien-youh nauc nyitc fungc maaih haaix nyungc maaih lamh longc?
Ecclesiastes2:3 Yie hnamv mangc gaax
Ecclesiastes2:4 Yie zoux camv-nyungc domh gong. Yie weic yie ganh zoux ziex norm biauv
Ecclesiastes2:5 Yie zoux ziex norm huingx
Ecclesiastes2:6 Yie wetv ziex norm wuom-njaangh siou wuom yungz naaiv deix ndiangx.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Yie maaiz nouh gauv nouh beiz
Ecclesiastes2:8 Yie aengx weic ganh siou jiem nyaanh
Ecclesiastes2:9 Yie ziouc duqv zoux hlo
Ecclesiastes2:10 Yie nyei m'zing buatc oix longc haaix nyungc yie maiv ngaengc
Ecclesiastes2:11 Yie samx mangc yie nyei buoz zoux jiex daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc
Ecclesiastes2:12 Yie aengx ganh hnamv diuc jauv
Ecclesiastes2:13 Yie zieqv duqv cong-mengh gauh longx zoux hngongx nyei
Ecclesiastes2:14 Cong-mengh mienh nyei m'zing njang
Ecclesiastes2:15 Yie ziouc yiem hnyouv hnamv
Ecclesiastes2:16 Weic zuqc cong-mengh mienh caux mienh hngongx mienh fih hnangv nyei maiv maaih mienh jangx ninh mbuo lauh. Hoz nqaang nyei hnoi-nyieqc i nyungc zungv la'kuqv nzengc mi'aqv. Maiv gunv guai fai hngongx
Ecclesiastes2:17 Yie ziouc nzorng haic maengc
Ecclesiastes2:18 Yie nzorng yie yiem naaiv seix zaangc laauh luic zoux nyei yietc zungv gong
Ecclesiastes2:19 Maaih haaix dauh hiuv duqv wuov laanh mienh guai fai hngongx? Mv baac ninh duqv gunv nzengc yie longc yie nyei cong-mengh yiem naaiv seix zaangc laauh luic duqv daaih nyei yietc zungv. Naaiv yaac fih hnangv nyei kungx-morngh.
Ecclesiastes2:20 Yie ziouc weic yie yiem naaiv seix zaangc laauh luic zoux nyei yietc zungv gong maiv lamh hnamv dorngx aqv.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Weic zuqc mienh longc cong-mengh
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mienh yiem seix zaangc hnyouv nzauh
Ecclesiastes2:23 Weic zuqc ninh ziangh seix zaangc nyei hnoi-nyieqc ninh zoux gong
Ecclesiastes2:24 Weic baamh mienh maiv maaih haaix nyungc gauh longx nyanc yaac hopv
Ecclesiastes2:25 Mienh maiv kaux Tin-Hungh
Ecclesiastes2:26 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh ceix cong-mengh
Ecclesiastes3:1 Nyungc-nyungc maaih dingc nyei cun-ciou. Yiem lungh ndiev maanc sic maaih dingc nyei ziangh hoc.
Ecclesiastes3:2 Maaih ziangh hoc cuotv seix
Ecclesiastes3:3 Maaih ziangh hoc daix
Ecclesiastes3:4 Maaih ziangh hoc nyiemv
Ecclesiastes3:5 Maaih ziangh hoc zoi la'bieiv guangc
Ecclesiastes3:6 Maaih ziangh hoc lorz
Ecclesiastes3:7 Maaih ziangh hoc betv
Ecclesiastes3:8 Maaih ziangh hoc hnamv
Ecclesiastes3:9 Laauh luic zoux nyei gong-mienh duqv haaix nyungc longx?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Yie buatc Tin-Hungh bun baamh mienh dauh dauh maaih ninh ganh nyei gong zoux.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Tin-Hungh bun maanc muotc ziux ganh nyei cun-ciou nzueic. Tin-Hungh zorqv yietc liuz nyei jauv hietv jienv baamh mienh nyei hnyouv. Mv baac baamh mienh corc hiuv maiv taux yiem gorn taux setv mueiz Tin-Hungh zoux haaix nyungc.
Ecclesiastes3:12 Baamh mienh ziangh seix zaangc
Ecclesiastes3:13 Tin-Hungh ceix bun dauh dauh baamh mienh duqv nyanc duqv hopv yaac buangv hnyouv ninh laauh luic zoux nyei gong.
Ecclesiastes3:14 Yie hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zoux nyei yietc zungv oix yietc liuz yiem. Maiv haih tipv deix bieqc
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ih zanc maaih nyei
Ecclesiastes3:16 Yie buatc yiem naaiv seix zaangc aengx maaih yietc nyungc. Horpc zuqc maaih baengh fim nyei dorngx
Ecclesiastes3:17 Yie yiem hnyouv hnamv
Ecclesiastes3:18 Yie yiem hnyouv aengx hnamv
Ecclesiastes3:19 Weic zuqc baamh mienh buangh nyei caux saeng-kuv buangh nyei
Ecclesiastes3:20 I nyungc zungv mingh yietc norm dorngx. Yietc zungv yiem nie-mbung benx cuotv daaih. Yietc zungv aengx nzuonx benx nie-mbung.
Ecclesiastes3:21 Haaix dauh haih hiuv duqv baamh mienh nyei wuonh faaux gu'nguaaic fai hiuv duqv saeng-kuv nyei wuonh bieqc ndau?”
Ecclesiastes3:22 Weic naaiv yie buatc maiv maaih yietc nyungc gauh longx jiex baamh mienh a'hneiv ninh zoux nyei buonc gong
Ecclesiastes4:1 Yie aengx mangc ziouc buatc yiem seix zaangc yietc zungv zeix mienh nyei sic. Mangc maah! Yie buatc zuqc zeix nyei mienh nyei wuom-mueic liouc njiec
Ecclesiastes4:2 Weic naaiv yie hnamv daaih
Ecclesiastes4:3 Mv baac gauh longx jiex naaiv deix i nyungc se maiv gaengh duqv cuotv seix nyei mienh
Ecclesiastes4:4 Yie aengx buatc yietc zungv laauh luic caux cuotv buoz-dauh zoux nyei gong se weic zuqc mienh caux ninh nyei juangc laangz mienh
Ecclesiastes4:5 Mienh hngongx mienh qopv jienv buoz
Ecclesiastes4:6 Duqv yietc nyau ziouc hnyouv nqaai se gauh longx oix zuqc laauh luic weic duqv i nyau. Naaiv se kungx bun nziaaux saaux hnangv.
Ecclesiastes4:7 Yie aengx buatc yietc nyungc yiem lungh ndiev kungx-morngh.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Maaih nduqc laanh mienh ganh yiem hnangv. Ninh maiv maaih fu'jueiv

Ecclesiastes4:10 Se gorngv yietc laanh ndorpc
Ecclesiastes4:11 Aengx maaih nyungc. Se gorngv i laanh juangc jienv bueix
Ecclesiastes4:12 Maiv gunv yietc laanh mienh haih mborqv duqv hingh yietc laanh
Ecclesiastes4:13 Jomc mv baac maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh lunx mienh se gauh longx gox nyei
Ecclesiastes4:14 maiv gunv ninh yiem loh cuotv daaih faaux weic zoux hungh fai yiem ninh ganh nyei guoqv cuotv seix benx mienh jomc mienh.
Ecclesiastes4:15 Yie buatc yiem seix zaangc jiex mingh jiex daaih nyei mienh
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ninh gunv nyei zuangx mienh camv
Ecclesiastes5:1 Meih mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv oix zuqc faix fim. Mingh fatv muangx se gauh longx mienh hngongx mienh fongc horc ziec. Ninh mbuo zungv maiv hiuv ninh mbuo zoux nyei orqv sic.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien maiv dungx zoux hnyouv beqv
Ecclesiastes5:3 Yietc zei hnamv camv
Ecclesiastes5:4 Meih laengz ngaengc waac bun Tin-Hungh maiv dungx ngaih. Oix zuqc siepv-siepv nyei jaauv sung. Ninh maiv a'hneiv mienh hngongx mienh. Oix zuqc jaauv sung meih laengz nyei ngaengc waac.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Meih maiv laengz waac se gauh longx laengz liuz yaac maiv jaauv.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Maiv dungx bun meih nyei nzuih zoux gorn dorh meih baamz zuiz. Yaac maiv dungx dorng jienv sai mienh gorngv
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mbeix mbeix camv

Ecclesiastes5:9 Ndau-beih cuotv nyei nyungc-nyungc se weic zuangx mienh. Hungh diex ganh yaac bangc ndeic duqv longx.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Hnamv nyaanh nyei mienh

Ecclesiastes5:14 Ninh zoux saeng-eix

Ecclesiastes6:1 Yiem naaiv seix zaangc yie buatc nyungc hienv haic nyei sic. Naaiv deix sic se hniev nyei

Ecclesiastes7:4 Cong-mengh mienh nyei hnyouv yiem mienh nzauh nyiemv nyei biauv. Mv baac mienh hngongx mienh nyei hnyouv yiem mienh zoux nauc nyitc nyei biauv.

Ecclesiastes7:6 Mienh hngongx mienh jatv nyei qiex se hnangv buov njimv-nyang mbui nyei qiex. Naaiv se kungx-morngh nyei sic.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Zien nyei

Ecclesiastes7:19 Cong-mengh bun cong-mengh mienh maaih qaqv gauh henv yiem norm zingh nyei ziepc dauh jien.

Ecclesiastes8:1 Haaix dauh haih hnangv cong-mengh mienh? Haaix dauh haih porv mengh sic nyei eix leiz? Mienh nyei cong-mengh bun ninh nyei hmien njang
Ecclesiastes8:2 Oix zuqc muangx hungh diex nyei lingc yaac maiv dungx la'guaih dorng jienv Tin-Hungh laengz jiez ngaengc waac.
Ecclesiastes8:3 maiv dungx huaang jienv leih hungh diex nyei nza'hmien. Maiv dungx tengx jienv baav orqv nyei jauv weic zuqc hungh diex m'daaih ei ganh nyei hnyouv zoux.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Hungh diex nyei waac maaih hatc maaz. Maaih haaix dauh gaamv naaic ninh
Ecclesiastes8:5 Haaix dauh ei jienv ninh nyei lingc zungv maiv zuqc hoic. Hnyouv maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh hiuv duqv horpc nyei ziangh hoc caux horpc nyei za'eix.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Weic zuqc nyungc-nyungc sic maaih horpc nyei ziangh hoc caux horpc nyei za'eix
Ecclesiastes8:7 Maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv oix cuotv daaih nyei sic
Ecclesiastes8:8 Maiv maaih mienh maaih hatc maaz gunv duqv ziangh maengc nyei qiex
Ecclesiastes8:9 Yie longc hnyouv mangc yiem seix zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc sic
Ecclesiastes8:10 Yie aengx buatc orqv mienh daic mingh zangx jienv. Ninh zinh ndaangc yiem cing-nzengc dorngx bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv. Maaih yiem ninh zoux waaic sic wuov norm zingh nyei mienh ceng ninh. Naaiv yaac kungx-morngh.
Ecclesiastes8:11 Dingc liuz zuiz mv baac maiv siepv-siepv nyei ei jienv dingc daaih nyei zoux
Ecclesiastes8:12 Maiv gunv orqv mienh zoux orqv yietc baeqv nzunc
Ecclesiastes8:13 Mv baac orqv mienh maiv haih duqv longx. Ninh ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc hnangv dongh linh nor
Ecclesiastes8:14 Yiem naaiv lungh ndiev aengx maaih yietc nyungc sic kungx-morngh. Kuv mienh buangh nyei sic se puix orqv mienh oix zuqc buangh nyei. Orqv mienh yaac buangh puix kuv mienh oix zuqc buangh nyei. Yie gorngv naaiv se fih hnangv nyei kungx-morngh.
Ecclesiastes8:15 Yie ziouc heuc mienh njien-youh orn-lorqc
Ecclesiastes8:16 Yie jiez hnyouv oix hiuv cong-mengh nyei jauv yaac oix mangc lungh ndiev zoux nyei sic wuov zanc
Ecclesiastes8:17 yie ziouc buatc Tin-Hungh zoux nyei yietc zungv sic. Mienh maiv haih mengh baeqc yiem naaiv seix zaangc cuotv daaih nyei sic. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo longc nzengc qaqv lorz
Ecclesiastes9:1 Yie ziouc zorqv naaiv deix yietc zungv sic yiem hnyouv corngh ziouc hiuv duqv kuv mienh
Ecclesiastes9:2 Nqa'haav hingv dauh dauh buangh fih hnangv nyei. Kuv mienh caux orqv mienh
Ecclesiastes9:3 Naaiv se yiem seix zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc sic maaih nyei zeqc naanc. Yietc zungv oix zuqc buangh fih hnangv nyei. Baamh mienh nyei hnyouv maaih orqv sic buangv nzengc. Ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc hnyouv yaac buv longh buv dangv nyei. Nqa'haav ninh mbuo ziouc daic.
Ecclesiastes9:4 Haaix dauh caux ziangh jienv nyei mienh yiem
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ziangh jienv nyei mienh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo oix zuqc daic mv baac daic mingh nyei mienh maiv hiuv haaix nyungc. Ninh mbuo maiv haih aengx duqv zipv zingh nyeic. Zuangx mienh yaac la'kuqv nzengc ninh mbuo aqv.
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ninh mbuo hnamv nyei
Ecclesiastes9:7 Gunv mingh njien-njien youh youh nyei nyanc meih nyei hnaangx
Ecclesiastes9:8 Meih nyei lui-houx oix zuqc zanc-zanc baeqc
Ecclesiastes9:9 Yiem meih kungx-morngh nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Ecclesiastes9:10 Da'faanh meih nyei buoz lorz buatc haaix nyungc zoux
Ecclesiastes9:11 Yie aengx buatc yiem naaiv seix zaangc aengx maaih yietc nyungc se
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mienh m'daaih maiv hiuv ganh nyei ziangh hoc haaix zanc taux. Hnangv mbiauz zuqc doqc haic nyei mungz nzenc

Ecclesiastes12:12 Yie nyei dorn aac

SongOfSongs1:1 Saa^lo^morn gauh kuh muangx jiex nyei nzung.
SongOfSongs1:2 Tov meih longc meih nyei nzuih zom yie
SongOfSongs1:3 Meih nzaatv sin nyei youh huonh huonh nyei ndaang
SongOfSongs1:4 Tov dorh yie caux meih mingh. Bun yie mbuo siepv-siepv nyei mingh maah! Hungh diex dorh yie bieqc ninh nyei gen. Yie mbuo ziouc weic meih njien-youh orn-lorqc. Yie mbuo ziouc oix ceng meih ndongc naaic hnamv yie gauh camv a'ngunc diuv-kuv. Zuangx m'sieqv dorn hnamv meih se horpc nyei.
SongOfSongs1:5 O Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zuangx sieqv aac
SongOfSongs1:6 Maiv dungx mangc piex yie weic zuqc yie jieqv. Yie jieqv weic zuqc nyutc pui. Caux yie juangc maa nyei gorx qiex jiez yie

Isaiah1:4 Aa

Isaiah1:6 Yiem zaux-benv taux m'nqorngv-baengh

Isaiah1:14 Yie nzorng haic meih mbuo nyei Siang-Hlaax zipv caux dingc daaih nyei zipv. Ih zanc yie ndaam hniev
Isaiah1:15 Meih mbuo sung jienv buoz daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc

Isaiah1:17 Oix zuqc hoqc zoux horpc nyei sic
Isaiah1:18 Ziouv gorngv

Isaiah1:21 Naaiv norm ziepc zuoqv zingh ih zanc tiuv hnangv benx maaic sin nyei m'sieqv dorn. Zinh ndaangc maaih baengh fim buangv nzengc
Isaiah1:22 Meih mbuo nyei nyaanh tiuv benx nyaanh nqaiv
Isaiah1:23 Meih mbuo nyei jien ngaengc yie
Isaiah1:24 Weic naaiv
Isaiah1:25 Yie oix longc yie nyei buoz zoux bun meih mbuo. Oix sinx meih mbuo hnangv sinx jiem nyaanh nyei nqaiv cuotv. Se hnangv longc nzie-wuom nzox nzengc nor
Isaiah1:26 Yie oix bun meih mbuo nyei siemv zuiz jien hnangv loz wuov nor
Isaiah1:27 Si^on weic baengh fim nyei jauv duqv zuoqc nzuonx
Isaiah1:28 Mv baac hnyouv ngaengc nyei mienh caux zuiz-mienh oix lomh nzoih zuqc baaic nzengc. Guangc Ziouv wuov deix yaac oix zuqc mietc.
Isaiah1:29 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc nyaiv laaix meih mbuo a'hneiv wuov deix mba'ong zuei ndiangx. Meih mbuo laaix meih mbuo ginv daaih nyei huingx oix zuqc baaic hmien.

Isaiah4:2 Taux wuov hnoi

Isaiah4:4 Ziouv oix saax nzengc Si^on nyei sieqv nyei uix. Ziouv oix longc ninh nyei qaqv siemv yaac longc douz buov fioux nzengc guoqv Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei nziaamv.
Isaiah4:5 Wuov zanc Ziouv oix zeix dorv mbuonx yiem gormx Si^on Mbong caux yiem naaic gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh gu'nguaaic. Weic lungh hnoi zanc se hnangv mbuonx-sioux
Isaiah4:6 Lungh hnoi zanc ziouc torngv laangh yaac benx norm dorngx bingx torngv jienv mbiungc-nziaaux.
Isaiah5:1 Yie oix baaux diuh nzung bun yie hnamv wuov dauh muangx
Isaiah5:2 Ninh wetv huingx nzauz cuotv la'bieiv
Isaiah5:3 “O Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx caux Yu^ndaa Mienh aah! Tov dunx yie caux yie nyei a'ngunc huingx nyei sic.
Isaiah5:4 Yie weic yie nyei a'ngunc huingx aengx maaih haaix nyungc horpc zuqc zoux dongh yie maiv gaengh zoux fai? Yie mingh lorz a'ngunc biouv longx nyei
Isaiah5:5 Ih zanc yie mbuox meih mbuo yie oix hnangv haaix nor zoux bun yie nyei a'ngunc huingx. Yie oix caeqv weih huingx nyei njimv-laatc
Isaiah5:6 Yie oix bun huingx benx ndau-huaang
Isaiah5:7 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei a'ngunc huingx se I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun. Yu^ndaa Mienh se ninh a'hneiv nyei a'ngunc hmei. Ninh lorz baengh fim nyei jauv mv baac kungx buatc daix mienh
Isaiah5:8 Meih mbuo yietc norm biauv nzaeng jiex yietc norm biauv
Isaiah5:9 Yie haiz Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah5:10 Ziepc doix ngongh laih duqv yietc hnoi nyei ndau
Isaiah5:11 Lungh ndorm nziouv jiez sin daaih zunc diuv hopv
Isaiah5:12 Ninh mbuo nyei yinh wuic maaih domh daanh baah
Isaiah5:13 Weic naaiv yie nyei baeqc fingx zuqc guaatv mingh
Isaiah5:14 Yiemh gen ziouc mbae jaang
Isaiah5:15 Zaangc dangv caux haac dangv mienh zungv zuqc zatv njiec. M'zing hlang nyei mienh yaac zuqc zatv njiec aiv.
Isaiah5:16 Mv baac Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv weic baengh fim nyei jauv duqv mienh taaih. Cing-Nzengc nyei Tin-Hungh weic zoux horpc nyei jauv biux mengh ninh cing-nzengc.
Isaiah5:17 Wuov zanc ba'gi yungh dorn oix yiem wuov nyanc miev hnangv yiem ganh nyei miev-ciangv. Saeng-kuv junc caux yungh dorn yaac yiem butv-zoih mienh nyei ndau-huaang.
Isaiah5:18 Longc jaav nyei sic zoux hlaang tor zuiz gan jienv mingh
Isaiah5:19 Meih mbuo gorngv
Isaiah5:20 Gorngv orqv sic benx kuv sic
Isaiah5:21 Ziux ganh nyei m'zing mangc

Isaiah15:2 Ndi^mbon Mienh faaux mingh taux yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx nyiemv. Mo^apc Mienh weic Ne^mbo caux Me^nde^mbaa Zingh qaqv nyiemv. Dauh dauh mienh nyei m'nqorngv teix njang
Isaiah15:3 Yiem jauv zaangc ninh mbuo zuqv la'maah ndie-cou. Yiem biauv-ngorh caux domh zuangx zaamc dauh dauh qaqv nyiemv duqv kouv haic.

Isaiah27:7 Ziouv mborqv I^saa^laa^en hnangv ninh mborqv dongh mborqv I^saa^laa^en wuov deix mienh fai? I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc daix hnangv daix ninh mbuo wuov deix mienh zuqc daix nyei fai?
Isaiah27:8 Meih zunc ninh mbuo

Isaiah27:13 Dongh wuov hnoi ziouc maaih domh nzatc nyei qiex mbui. Yiem Atc^si^lie zuqc mietc jienv yiem nyei mienh caux zuqc guaatv mingh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov deix ziouc daaih yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei cing-nzengc mbong zaangc Ziouv.
Isaiah28:1 E^faa^im oix zuqc kouv aqv. Ninh nyei njang-laangc oix ziec nzengc

Isaiah28:15 Meih mbuo gorngv

Isaiah33:21 Yiem wuov Ziouv oix weic yie mbuo hinc ninh nyei njang-laangc

Isaiah33:23 Meih mbuo corng nyei hlaang ndanh mi'aqv. Corng hlaang nyei ndiouh ziouc maiv haih wuonv. Ndie-mbuangh yaac corng maiv duqv jangv. Wuov zanc ninh mbuo ziouc bun nqoi caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv camv nyei. Liemh zaux mbai nyei mienh yaac duqv caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv.
Isaiah33:24 Yiem Si^on Zingh nyei mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh gorngv
Isaiah34:1 O maanc guoqv mienh aah! Daaih fatv muangx. O maanc mienh aah! Oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx. Ndau-beih caux yiem ndau-beih nyei maanc muotc
Isaiah34:2 Weic zuqc Ziouv qiex jiez maanc fingx
Isaiah34:3 Zuqc daix daic nyei mienh oix zuqc tor guangc. Ninh mbuo nyei sei huonh huonh nyei zueix
Isaiah34:4 Lungh zaangc nyei maanc muotc oix huv muonc
Isaiah34:5 Weic zuqc yie nyei nzuqc ndaauv yiem wuov lungh hopv beuv. Mangc maah! Naaiv nzuqc ndaauv njiec daaih dingc E^ndom nyei zuiz
Isaiah34:6 Ziouv nyei nzuqc ndaauv maaih nziaamv guoqv buangv nzengc
Isaiah34:7 Hieh ngongh caux ngongh gouv dorn
Isaiah34:8 Weic zuqc Ziouv maaih jaauv win nyei hnoi
Isaiah34:9 E^ndom nyei ndoqv oix tiuv benx ndau nyei zung. Nie-mbung yaac tiuv benx hungh
Isaiah34:10 Douz ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz zungv maiv daic
Isaiah34:11 Mv baac norqc guv long caux norqc m'lomh miu oix duqv benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Domh jaangv caux norqc aa yaac oix yiem naaic. Tin-Hungh oix baeng hlaang jiex gu'nguaaic ndorqc bun wuov deix dorngx lunc. Ninh oix longc dingc zaqc nyei hlaang bun wuov deix dorngx benx guangc huaang nyei dorngx.
Isaiah34:12 Yiem naaic zoux hlo nyei mienh oix cuotv mbuox heuc wuov deix ndau
Isaiah34:13 Njimv oix mbiorngz bieqc ninh nyei hungh dinc
Isaiah34:14 Deic-bung-huaang nyei hieh zoih oix buangh hieh juv-ben
Isaiah34:15 Norqc guv long oix yiem wuov zoux lauz ndauc jaux
Isaiah34:16 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbienv lorz Ziouv nyei sou doqc naaiv deix waac. Naaiv deix ga'naaiv maiv caa yietc dauh fai yietc norm. Maiv maaih yietc nyungc maiv maaih ninh nyei doix. Weic zuqc Ziouv nyei nzuih hnangv naaiv hatc
Isaiah34:17 Ninh paaiv bun ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Ninh ganh nyei buoz longc hlaang ndorqc bun nqoi. Ninh mbuo yietc liuz duqv nzipc benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Doic jiex doic yaac duqv yiem naaic.
Isaiah35:1 Deic-bung-huaang caux ndau-nqaai oix a'hneiv. Deic-bung-haanz oix njien-youh nyei nqoi biangh
Isaiah35:2 zungv oix nqoi nzueic nyei biangh camv nyei yaac njien-youh nyei heuc jienv orn-lorqc nyei baaux nzung. Ninh oix duqv njang-laangc hnangv Le^mbaa^norn nyei njang-laangc
Isaiah35:3 Meih mbuo oix zuqc bun mau nyei buoz henv
Isaiah35:4 Oix zuqc mbuox daamv mapv nyei mienh
Isaiah35:5 Wuov zanc m'zing maengh nyei mienh haih mangc duqv buatc
Isaiah35:6 Wuov zanc zaux mbai nyei mienh haih tiux hnangv njaih
Isaiah35:7 Jorm haic nyei saa-ziou oix tiuv benx wuom-domh
Isaiah35:8 Yiem wuov oix maaih diuh domh jauv. Wuov diuh jauv mienh oix heuc Cing-Nzengc Jauv. Maaih uix nyei mienh maiv duqv yangh wuov diuh jauv
Isaiah35:9 Yiem naaic maiv maaih sienh
Isaiah35:10 Ziouv zuoqc nyei mienh oix nzuonx. Ninh mbuo oix baaux jienv nzung bieqc Si^on. Ninh mbuo ziouc maaih orn-lorqc hnangv norm hungh ningv bun ninh mbuo yietc liuz ndongx jienv. Ninh mbuo oix duqv njien-youh orn-lorqc taux daauh. You-nzauh caux tauv qiex-ndoqc nyei jauv yaac jiex nzengc.
Isaiah36:1 He^se^ki^yaa zoux hungh ziepc feix hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Isaiah36:2 Atc^si^lie nyei hungh paaiv dauh ninh nyei domh baeng-bieiv caux jienv baeng-guanh camv nyei yiem Laakitv mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
Isaiah36:3 Maaih goux hungh dinc nyei domh jien
Isaiah36:4 Maaih dauh wuov deix domh baeng-bieiv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Isaiah36:5 Meih hnamv daaih gorngv kungx-waac hnangv meih haih maaih za'eix
Isaiah36:6 Mangc maah! Meih kaux I^yipv se hnangv kaux luoqc diqc guaengv-mbaaix zoux biaav-mbiaac yangh jauv nor
Isaiah36:7 Se gorngv meih mbuox yie
Isaiah36:8 “+‘Ih zanc meih caux yie nyei ziouv

Isaiah36:10 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Yie daaih mborqv baaic naaiv norm deic-bung se maiv maaih Ziouv caux yie daaih fai? Ziouv ganh gorngv mbuox yie cuotv mingh mietc naaiv norm deic-bung maah!’+”
Isaiah36:11 E^li^yaa^kim caux Sepv^naa caux Yo^aa gorngv mbuox wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv

Isaiah36:19 Haamatv caux Aanbatc Mungv nyei zienh yiem haaix? Se^faan^waa^im nyei zienh yiem haaix? Ninh mbuo njoux Saa^maa^lie leih ndutv yie nyei buoz-ndiev fai?

Isaiah37:1 He^se^ki^yaa Hungh haiz liuz wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv gorngv nyei waac

Isaiah37:12 Wuov deix ziex norm guoqv nyei zienh haih njoux ninh mbuo fai? Se yie nyei ong-taaix mietc wuov deix guoqv nyei zienh

Isaiah37:26 “ Ziouv gorngv

Isaiah37:31 Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun duqv maengc cuotv zengc njiec nyei mienh

Isaiah38:7 “+‘Naaiv se Ziouv oix bun meih nyei jangx-hoc

Isaiah38:9 Naaiv se Yu^ndaa nyei hungh

Tin-Hungh zorqv yie japv ndutv hnangv ndie yiem ndatv ndie nyei jaa-sic japv ndutv nor. Lungh hnoi lungh muonz meih oix bun yie nyei maengc taux setv mueiz.

Isaiah38:14 Yie heuc hnangv norqc mba'hinx caux norqc aapv

Isaiah39:8 He^se^ki^yaa dau I^saa^yaa
Isaiah40:1 Meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh gorngv

Isaiah40:11 Ninh goux ninh nyei mienh hnangv goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh goux ganh nyei yungh guanh nor. Ninh longc buoz hlorv zunv ninh nyei ba'gi yungh dorn hlorpv jienv yiem ninh nyei la'kuotv

Isaiah41:1 Tin-Hungh gorngv

Isaiah41:17 “Mienh jomc mienh caux dangx-donx nyei mienh lorz wuom

Isaiah41:20 weic bun mienh buatc ziouc hiuv
Isaiah41:21 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah41:22 Gunv dorh daaih mbuox yie mbuo oix maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv. Jiex daaih nyei sic oix zuqc mbuox yie mbuo weic bun yie mbuo zaah mangc ziouc hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic nyei setv mueiz oix hnangv haaix nor.
Isaiah41:23 Gorngv bun yie mbuo muangx weic bun yie mbuo hiuv duqv hoz nqaang oix maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv. Yie mbuo ziouc haih hiuv duqv meih mbuo se zienh. Zoux kuv sic fai zoux orqv sic weic bun yie mbuo nzauh yaac gamh nziex.
Isaiah41:24 Mangc maah! Meih mbuo se za'gengh maiv lamh longc. Meih mbuo nyei gong yaac zoux maiv cuotv haaix nyungc. Ginv meih mbuo wuov dauh se gamh nziev haic.
Isaiah41:25 “Yie yiem baqv bung ginv dauh mienh daaih

Isaiah41:27 Yie zoux daauh dauh gorngv mbuox Si^on

Isaiah41:29 Mangc maah! Ninh mbuo yietc zungv maiv lamh longc. Ninh mbuo zoux nyei jauv yaac maiv lamh longc. Ninh mbuo dox daaih nyei miuc-fangx hnangv kungx-nziaaux nor.”

Isaiah42:19 Haaix dauh m'zing maengh? Se yie nyei bou. Fai haaix dauh m'normh ndung hnangv yie paaiv mingh nyei douc fienx mienh? Haaix dauh m'zing maengh hnangv caux yie horpc hnyouv wuov dauh
Isaiah42:20 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Meih mbuo buatc ziex nyungc

Isaiah42:24 Haaix dauh jiu Yaakopv benx zuqc caangv nyei ga'naaiv
Isaiah42:25 Weic naaiv ninh nouz haic

Isaiah43:2 Meih jiex wuom nyei ziangh hoc

Isaiah43:11 Yie
Isaiah43:12 Yie bun meih mbuo hiuv
Isaiah43:13 Yiem loz! hnoi daaih yie m'daaih yietc liuz zoux Tin-Hungh. Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih njoux mienh biaux ndutv yie nyei buoz. Yie zoux nyei haaix nyungc
Isaiah43:14 I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh
Isaiah43:15 Yie se Ziouv
Isaiah43:16 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv. Ziouv koi tong koiv nyei jauv
Isaiah43:17 Ninh bun mborqv jaax nyei cie caux maaz
Isaiah43:18 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah43:19 Mangc maah! Yie oix zoux yietc nyungc siang-sic
Isaiah43:20 Lomc nyei hieh zoih oix taaih yie
Isaiah43:21 se weic yie ganh zeix daaih nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo ziouc haih ceng yie.
Isaiah43:22 “O Yaakopv aac
Isaiah43:23 Meih maiv dorh ba'gi yungh daaih ziec yie
Isaiah43:24 Meih maiv longc nyaanh maaiz gamh ziex bun yie
Isaiah43:25 “Kungx maaih yie weic ganh sortv guangc meih zoux dorngc nyei sic
Isaiah43:26 Wetv cuotv jiex daaih nyei sic bun yie muangx
Isaiah43:27 Meih nyei daauh dauh ong-taaix-ngaeqv baamz zuiz. Meih nyei bieiv zeiv yaac ngaengc yie.
Isaiah43:28 Yie oix bun yiem singx dinc zoux hlo wuov deix maaih uix
Isaiah44:1 “O yie nyei bou
Isaiah44:2 Meih yiem gu'nguaaz-mbuoqc wuov zanc yie zeix meih cuotv daaih yaac oix tengx meih. Yie
Isaiah44:3 Yie oix dox wuom njiec bun jaang nqaatv nyei mienh
Isaiah44:4 Ninh mbuo oix cuotv daaih hnangv yiem miev-ciangv nyei miev nor
Isaiah44:5 Naaiv dauh oix gorngv
Isaiah44:6 “ Ziouv
Isaiah44:7 Wuov nyungc maaih haaix dauh hnangv yie? Gunv bun ninh zunh aqv. Bun ninh gorngv mengh yaac zueih yietc zueih nyeic nyei mbuox yie. Yiem yie liepc yie loz-hnoi nyei baeqc fingx daaih maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv? Aengx oix maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv? Bun ninh jaa-ndaangc gorngv oix maaih haaix nyungc.’
Isaiah44:8 Maiv dungx gamh nziex
Isaiah44:9 Da'faanh zoux miuc-fangx nyei mienh se maiv lamh longc. Ninh mbuo funx jaaix nyei se maiv zic zinh. Ninh mbuo nyei zorng-zengx mienh mangc maiv buatc yaac maiv hiuv
Isaiah44:10 Haaix dauh zoux zienh nyei fangx fai dox miuc-fangx se zoux tengx maiv duqv haaix nyungc nyei fangx?
Isaiah44:11 Mangc maah! Caux ninh zoux doic nyei mienh yietc zungv yaac oix zuqc nyaiv. Zoux zaangc nyei mienh m'daaih baamh mienh hnangv. Bun ninh mbuo daaih zunv
Isaiah44:12 Hlieqv-zaangc zorqv hlieqv an louh douz buov
Isaiah44:13 Ndiangx-zaangc baeng hlaang ndorqc
Isaiah44:14 Ninh goix si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Isaiah44:15 Naaiv deix ndiangx
Isaiah44:16 Ninh zorqv buonc buov douz
Isaiah44:17 Zengc njiec nyei ndiangx ninh longc zoux dauh zienh
Isaiah44:18 Ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv yaac maiv haih mengh baeqc. Weic zuqc Ziouv buang jienv ninh mbuo nyei m'zing
Isaiah44:19 Maiv maaih haaix dauh hnamv taux
Isaiah44:20 Ninh longc saaiv dorngx nyanc hopv. Ninh ganh nyei hnyouv nduov ninh mingh dorngc. Ninh maiv haih njoux ninh ganh yaac maiv haih gorngv
Isaiah44:21 “O Yaakopv aac
Isaiah44:22 Yie sortv guangc meih zoux dorngc yie nyei sic hnangv mbuonx meih baamz nyei zuiz hnangv lungh ndorm nyei mouc. Oix zuqc nzuonx daaih lorz yie weic zuqc yie zuoqc liuz meih aqv.”
Isaiah44:23 O lungh aac
Isaiah44:24 Ziouv
Isaiah44:25 Yie bun gorngv zinh hoz waac nyei mienh nyei waac benx gorngv-baeqc nyei waac
Isaiah44:26 Yie bun yie nyei bou nyei waac cuotv daaih zien
Isaiah44:27 Yie mbuox ndo nyei wuom
Isaiah44:28 Yie yaac gorngv taux Sailatv
Isaiah45:1 “Yie
Isaiah45:2 “Yie oix mingh ndaangc meih
Isaiah45:3 Yie oix zorqv yiem hmuangx zong jaaix nyei ga'naaiv caux bingx mbueiz nyei dorngx nyei zinh zoih jiu bun meih
Isaiah45:4 Weic yie nyei bou
Isaiah45:5 Yie se Ziouv
Isaiah45:6 weic bun mienh yiem mba'hnoi cuotv bung taux mba'hnoi muotv bung
Isaiah45:7 Yie zeix njang yaac zeix hmuangx. Yie ceix fuqv yaac bun zeqc naanc. Yie se Ziouv. Yie zoux naaiv deix yietc zungv sic.
Isaiah45:8 “O lungh aac
Isaiah45:9 “Haaix dauh caux Zeix Ninh Daaih Wuov Dauh nzaeng nor
Isaiah45:10 Haaix dauh gaamv caux die nzaeng gorngv
Isaiah45:11 “ Ziouv

Isaiah45:13 Yie oix longc yie baengh fim nyei za'eix liepc Sailatv. Yie oix koi zaqc ninh nyei diuh diuh jauv
Isaiah45:14 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah45:15 O Tin-Hungh
Isaiah45:16 Da'faanh zoux miuc-fangx nyei mienh oix zuqc nyaiv
Isaiah45:17 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en oix duqv Ziouv yietc liuz nyei njoux en njoux ninh mbuo. Meih mbuo ziouc yietc liuz maiv zuqc nyaiv
Isaiah45:18 Ziouv zeix lungh. Dongh naaiv dauh se Tin-Hungh. Ninh zeix cuotv ndau
Isaiah45:19 Yie maiv zeiz yiem norm hmuangx nyei deic-bung bingx jienv gorngv. Yie maiv mbuox Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun
Isaiah45:20 “Meih mbuo yiem ziex guoqv biaux cuotv maengc nyei mienh oix zuqc lomh nzoih gapv zunv daaih. Ndaam jienv longc ndiangx zoux daaih nyei miuc-fangx
Isaiah45:21 Meih mbuo gunv gorngv aqv. Gorngv mengh meih mbuo nyei sic
Isaiah45:22 “Yiem jomc lungh ndiev nyei mienh aac

Isaiah45:24 Ninh mbuo oix gorngv taux yie

Isaiah46:1 Mben ndoqv njiec
Isaiah46:2 Ninh mbuo jaaiv jutv
Isaiah46:3 “O Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun aac
Isaiah46:4 Taux meih mbuo hnyangx-jeiv gox
Isaiah46:5 “Meih mbuo oix zorqv yie beiv haaix dauh? Oix bun yie caux haaix dauh fih ndongc? Meih mbuo oix zorqv yie beiv yie caux haaix dauh fih hnangv?
Isaiah46:6 Zorqv mbuoqc dox cuotv jiem
Isaiah46:7 Ninh mbuo zorqv zienh nyei fangx an jienv mba'dauh gaeng mingh. Ninh mbuo orn jienv yietc norm dorngx
Isaiah46:8 “Jangx jienv
Isaiah46:9 Jangx jienv loz-hnoi cuotv daaih nyei sic

Isaiah47:1 “O Mbaa^mbi^lon Zingh nyei mienh aah! Njiec daaih zueiz jienv nie-mbung maah! Ken^ndie Mienh aah! Meih maiv maaih weic zueiz. Oix zuqc zueiz jienv ndau. Yiem naaiv mingh mienh maiv heuc meih zoux mau nyei
Isaiah47:2 Nanv morc morc mbuonv maah! Zorqv nqoi mbiorngz hmien nyei ndie. Jaiv nqoi meih nyei lui-ndaauv
Isaiah47:3 Meih nyei sin oix zuqc laengh gaengv nyei yiem
Isaiah47:4 Zuoqc Yie Mbuo Wuov Dauh nyei mbuox heuc Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv. Ninh se I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh.
Isaiah47:5 “O Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh aac
Isaiah47:6 Yie qiex jiez yie nyei baeqc fingx
Isaiah47:7 Meih ganh gorngv
Isaiah47:8 “Meih hnamv njien-youh
Isaiah47:9 Yietc sih gen hnangv
Isaiah47:10 Meih kaux ganh zoux nyei orqv sic ziouc gorngv
Isaiah47:11 Mv baac meih oix zuqc buangh ciouv nyei sic. Meih yaac maiv haih zoux faatv nqaeqv ndutv. Meih oix zuqc buangh domh zeqc naanc
Isaiah47:12 “Liepc wuonv meih lunx nyei ziangh hoc qaqv zoux nyei faatv
Isaiah47:13 Meih caangh laangh camv taux meih zungv kouv haic. Bun mangc lungh samx hleix nyei mienh
Isaiah47:14 Mangc maah! Ninh mbuo se hnangv mbiauh nqaauv gorn
Isaiah47:15 Dongh meih caux jienv zoux gong nyei mienh
Isaiah48:1 “O Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun aah! Muangx naaiv deix waac maah! Meih mbuo gan I^saa^laa^en nyei mbuox heuc
Isaiah48:2 Meih mbuo gorngv ganh benx cing-nzengc zingh nyei mienh
Isaiah48:3 Jiex liuz nyei sic yie jaa-ndaangc gorngv mbuox meih mbuo. Se yiem yie nyei nzuih cuotv yie yaac zunh mbuox mienh. Yie liemh zeih zoux ziouc ei wuov cuotv daaih.
Isaiah48:4 Weic zuqc yie hiuv duqv meih m'normh hoz
Isaiah48:5 Weic naaiv loz-hnoi yie zorqv naaiv deix sic gorngv bun meih hiuv. Naaiv deix sic maiv gaengh cuotv nyei ziangh hoc yie jaa-ndaangc mbuox meih. Nziex meih oix gorngv
Isaiah48:6 Meih haiz liuz
Isaiah48:7 Naaiv deix sic se ih zanc cuotv daaih siang nyei sic
Isaiah48:8 Meih maiv haiz jiex yaac maiv hiuv duqv. Yiem loz-hnoi daaih
Isaiah48:9 Weic yie ganh nyei mengh yie zuov jienv maiv gaengh qiex jiez. Weic bun mienh ceng yie
Isaiah48:10 Mangc maah! Yie sinx meih mv baac maiv hnangv sinx nyaanh. Yie bun meih yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz hnangv yiem douz-louh zuqc seix.
Isaiah48:11 Yie hnangv naaiv zoux se weic yie ganh
Isaiah48:12 “O Yaakopv
Isaiah48:13 Yie ganh liepc ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv
Isaiah48:14 “Meih mbuo yietc zungv daaih gapv zunv muangx. Wuov deix miuc-fangx maaih haaix dauh jaa-ndaangc gorngv naaiv deix sic? Ziouv ginv daaih nyei mienh oix ei jienv ninh nyei za'eix zoux bun Mbaa^mbi^lon. Ninh nyei buoz yaac oix mborqv Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh.
Isaiah48:15 Yie
Isaiah48:16 “Daaih nitv fatv yie
Isaiah48:17 I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh
Isaiah48:18 Feix duqv meih muangx yie hatc nyei waac. Meih ziouc maaih baengh orn hnangv ndaaih nor
Isaiah48:19 Meih nyei zeiv-fun ziouc hnangv saa-ziou
Isaiah48:20 Cuotv Mbaa^mbi^lon maah! Biaux cuotv Ken^ndie. Njien-youh nyei heuc jienv zunh yaangh
Isaiah48:21 Ziouv dorh ninh mbuo jiex deic-bung-huaang ninh mbuo jaang maiv nqaatv. Ninh weic ninh mbuo bun wuom yiem la'bieiv liouc cuotv. Ninh mborqv la'bieiv mbaaix
Isaiah48:22 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah49:1 O Koiv-Nzou nyei mienh aah! Muangx yie maah! Yiem go nyei zuangx fingx

Isaiah49:11 Yie oix bun yie nyei zuangx mbong benx jauv
Isaiah49:12 Mangc maah! Yie nyei baeqc fingx oix yiem go nyei deic-bung daaih. Maaih deix oix yiem baqv bung caux fai bung daaih. Maaih deix oix yiem Sinim Deic-Bung daaih.”
Isaiah49:13 O lungh aac
Isaiah49:14 Mv baac Si^on Mienh gorngv
Isaiah49:15 “Maa haih la'kuqv hopv ninh nyei nyorx nyei gu'nguaaz fai maiv korv-lienh ninh ganh yungz nyei fu'jueiv fai? Maiv gunv ninh haih la'kuqv
Isaiah49:16 Mangc maah! Yie zorqv meih nyei mbuox fiev jienv yie nyei buoz-zaangv-or. Meih nyei zingh laatc zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei nza'hmien.
Isaiah49:17 Ceix meih wuov deix hingh jiex oix mietc meih wuov deix. Baaic waaic meih wuov deix oix leih nqoi meih.
Isaiah49:18 Cau hmien mangc huing nzuonx nyei dorngx
Isaiah49:19 “Maiv gunv meih zuqc guangc huaang
Isaiah49:20 Yiem meih nzauh nyiemv nyei ziangh hoc cuotv seix nyei naamh nyouz
Isaiah49:21 Wuov zanc meih oix yiem hnyouv gorngv
Isaiah49:22 Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah49:23 Zuangx hungh diex oix hnangv benx meih nyei die. Ninh mbuo nyei hungh maac oix hnangv meih nyei maa nyorx. Ninh mbuo oix yiem meih nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec hmien taux ndau
Isaiah49:24 Mienh henv mienh caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Isaiah49:25 Mv baac Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah49:26 Yie oix bun zeix meih mbuo wuov deix nyanc ninh mbuo ganh nyei orv. Ninh mbuo yaac oix zuqc hopv ganh nyei nziaamv nquin mingh hnangv hopv diuv nor. Wuov zanc maanc mienh ziouc hiuv duqv
Isaiah50:1 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah50:2 Yie daaih nyei ziangh hoc weic haaix diuc maiv maaih mienh zuov? Yie heuc nyei ziangh hoc weic haaix diuc maiv maaih haaix dauh dau? Yie nyei buoz nangv haic
Isaiah50:3 Yie bun lungh hmuangx mingh dorngx lui-houx
Isaiah50:4 Ziouv Tin-Hungh njaaux yie oix zuqc gorngv haaix nyungc horpc nyei waac weic longc waac tengx baav jienv kouv nyei mienh. Ziouv ndorm-ndorm heuc yie nyie daaih

Isaiah51:20 Meih nyei mienh meih mingh

Isaiah51:22 Meih nyei Ziouv

Isaiah52:1 Si^on aac
Isaiah52:2 O Ye^lu^saa^lem aah! Oix zuqc sou nqoi nie-mbung jiez sin daaih zueiz jienv weic. O zuqc caangv nyei Si^on aac
Isaiah52:3 Weic zuqc Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah52:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah52:5 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah52:6 Hnangv naaiv yie nyei baeqc fingx ziouc hiuv duqv yie nyei mbuox. Weic naaiv taux wuov hnoi ninh mbuo zungv hiuv duqv se yie jaa-ndaangc gorngv. Zeiz nyei
Isaiah52:7 Yangh mbong yangh zorng daaih mbuox kuv fienx nyei mienh nyei zaux nzueic haic. Ninh zunh baengh orn nyei jauv
Isaiah52:8 Muangx maah! Meih nyei siouv gaeng mienh heuc mbui
Isaiah52:9 Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei ndau-huaang aac
Isaiah52:10 Ziouv oix yiem maanc guoqv mienh nyei nza'hmien longc ninh maaih qaqv nyei cing-nzengc buoz. Yiem jomc lungh ndiev nyei mienh ziouc buatc mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei njoux en.
Isaiah52:11 Mingh aqv. Mingh aqv. Leih Mbaa^mbi^lon cuotv mingh maah! Maiv dungx muoqv zuqc maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv. Yiem naaic gu'nyuoz cuotv mingh. Meih mbuo gaeng Ziouv nyei jaa-dorngx nyei mienh oix zuqc saax ganh cing-nzengc.
Isaiah52:12 Meih mbuo maiv zuqc huaang-huaang zaang-zaang nyei cuotv
Isaiah52:13 Mangc maah! Yie nyei bou oix longc cong-mengh zoux nyungc-nyungc. Ninh oix duqv mienh taaih
Isaiah52:14 Mienh camv buatc ninh ziouc haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex weic zuqc ninh nyei hmien-mueic waaic
Isaiah52:15 Ninh ziouc haeqv ziex guoqv mienh gamh nziex. Hungh diex oix weic ninh nqapc jienv nzuih
Isaiah53:1 Haaix dauh haih sienx yie mbuo zunh nyei jauv? Ziouv nyei qaqv cuotv daaih bun haaix dauh buatc?
Isaiah53:2 Ninh yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien hlo daaih hnangv cunx lunx
Isaiah53:3 Ninh zuqc mienh mangc piex
Isaiah53:4 Ninh ndaam yie mbuo nyei baengc tongx
Isaiah53:5 Daaux nzuonx ninh laaix yie mbuo zoux dorngc nyei sic zuqc mun
Isaiah53:6 Yie mbuo yietc zungv hnangv ba'gi yungh
Isaiah53:7 Ninh zuqc hoic
Isaiah53:8 Ninh zuqc zeix
Isaiah53:9 Maiv gunv ninh maiv zoux doqc
Isaiah53:10 Mv baac se Ziouv nyei za'eix bun ninh zuqc faaux nziaamv
Isaiah53:11 Ninh zungv duqv buatc ganh weic siouc kouv zoux cuotv daaih nyei sic ziouc buangv hnyouv. Weic naaiv dauh kuv mienh
Isaiah53:12 Weic naaiv yie oix bun ninh caux zoux hlo nyei mienh maaih buonc. Ninh caux mienh henv mienh bun nqoi caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Isaiah54:1 “O maiv haih maaih saeng-yungz
Isaiah54:2 “Oix zuqc capv meih corng ndopv-liuh nyei ndau
Isaiah54:3 Weic zuqc meih oix hiaangx mingh zaaix mingh mbiaauc. Meih nyei zeiv-fun yaac duqv nzipc camv-guoqv
Isaiah54:4 “Maiv dungx gamh nziex weic zuqc meih maiv zuqc nyaiv. Maiv dungx nyaiv weic zuqc meih maiv zuqc siouc mangc piex nyei jauv. Meih zungv oix la'kuqv lunx nyei ziangh hoc zuqc nyaiv nyei sic
Isaiah54:5 Weic zuqc Zeix Meih Daaih Wuov Dauh se meih nyei nqox. Ninh nyei mbuox se Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv. I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh se Zuoqc Meih Wuov Dauh. Mienh heuc ninh benx gormx lungh ndiev nyei Tin-Hungh.
Isaiah54:6 Ziouv heuc meih hnangv zuqc leih guangc
Isaiah54:7 “Yie guangc meih dangh baav hnangv
Isaiah54:8 Yie ga'qiex baetv cuotv ziouc bingx yie nyei hmien maiv mangc meih nduqc dangh hnangv
Isaiah54:9 “Naaiv deix sic weic yie se hnangv Noyaa nyei lungh ndiev. Wuov zanc yie laengz maiv bun mbiungc-suiv-imx aengx yiemx lungh ndiev hnangv yiem Noyaa nyei ziangh hoc yiemx nor. Yie yaac hnangv wuov nor houv waac yie maiv aengx qiex jiez meih
Isaiah54:10 Maiv gunv domh mbong zuqc zorqv nqoi
Isaiah54:11 “O zuqc kouv
Isaiah54:12 Yie oix longc la'bieiv-jaaix siqv nyei
Isaiah54:13 Yie
Isaiah54:14 Meih oix kaux baengh fim nyei jauv liepc wuonv. Meih duqv leih nqoi zuqc zeix nyei jauv weic zuqc meih maiv zuqc gamh nziex. Haeqv mienh gamh nziex nyei sic leih meih go
Isaiah54:15 Se gorngv haaix dauh coqv mienh gapv zunv mborqv meih se maiv zeiz yie zoux. Haaix dauh daaih mborqv meih
Isaiah54:16 “Mangc maah! Yie zeix hlieqv-zaangc. Ninh biomv douz-taanx cuotv douz-mbietc
Isaiah54:17 Zoux cuotv hoic meih nyei wuoqc ginc maiv haih hoic maiv zuqc. Da'faanh gox meih nyei mienh
Isaiah55:1 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah55:2 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc longc nyaanh maaiz maiv zeiz zien nyanc hopv
Isaiah55:3 Meih mbuo oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx yaac daaih lorz yie. Muangx maah! Meih ziouc duqv ziangh jienv. Yie oix caux meih mbuo liepc yietc liuz nyei ngaengc waac
Isaiah55:4 Mangc maah! Yie paaiv ninh zoux zorng-zengx bun maanc fingx mienh
Isaiah55:5 Meih maiv hiuv nyei guoqv nyei mienh meih oix heuc daaih. Maiv hiuv duqv meih wuov nyei ganh guoqv mienh oix tiux daaih lorz meih
Isaiah55:6 Corc lorz duqv buatc nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc lorz Ziouv. Ninh corc yiem fatv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc tov ninh.
Isaiah55:7 Orqv mienh oix zuqc leih nqoi ninh zoux orqv nyei jauv. Mienh waaic mienh oix zuqc guangc nqoi ninh hnamv cuotv nyei sic. Bun ninh nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv
Isaiah55:8 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah55:9 Weic zuqc lungh leih ndau ndongc haaix hlang
Isaiah55:10 Mbiungc caux sorng yiem lungh duih njiec
Isaiah55:11 Yie nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv nyei waac se hnangv naaic
Isaiah55:12 Meih mbuo zungv oix njien-njien youh youh nyei cuotv Mbaa^mbi^lon. Baengh baengh orn-orn nyei nzuonx. Domh mbong fiuv-mbong oix yiem meih mbuo nyei nza'hmien cuotv qiex mbui nyei baaux nzung. Yiem lomc-huaang nyei ndiangx yaac oix mbaix buoz-zaangv.
Isaiah55:13 Zongh ndiangx oix cuotv daaih div njimv-mbiorqc
Isaiah56:1 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Isaiah56:2 Hnangv naaiv ei jienv zoux nyei mienh
Isaiah56:3 Caux Ziouv horpc nyei ganh fingx mienh maiv dungx bun gorngv
Isaiah56:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Isaiah56:5 yie zungv oix bun ninh mbuo yiem yie nyei singx dinc caux laatc gu'nyuoz maaih jangx-hoc yaac maaih mbuox gauh longx maaih naamh nyouz. Yie zungv oix bun ninh mbuo maaih yietc liuz nyei mbuox
Isaiah56:6 Aengx maaih daaih nyiemc Ziouv nyei ganh fingx mienh oix fu-sux ninh

Isaiah56:8 Ziouv Tin-Hungh

Isaiah56:11 Wuov deix juv cei haic
Isaiah56:12 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Isaiah57:1 Kuv mienh daic mingh yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh yiem hnyouv jangx. Gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh guei seix
Isaiah57:2 Ninh mbuo duqv bieqc baengh orn nyei dorngx. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh yiem zouv gu'nyuoz duqv hitv kuonx.
Isaiah57:3 “Mv baac gaanv hei m'sieqv dorn nyei dorn-jueiv caux hienx nqox fai maaic buonv-sin nyei mienh nyei naamh nyouz
Isaiah57:4 Meih mbuo jatv haaix dauh? Meih mbuo morngx nzuih hlaix mbietc huotv haaix dauh? Meih mbuo zoux ceux lunc nyei naamh nyouz
Isaiah57:5 Meih mbuo yiem mba'ong zuei ndiangx mbu'ndongx yaac yiem diuh diuh ndiangx-nyiemz ga'ndiev saanx. Meih mbuo yiem horngz gu'nyuoz
Isaiah57:6 Meih mbuo yiem horngz gu'nyuoz
Isaiah57:7 Yiem hlang haic nyei mbong-hlang meih mbuo dimc dorngx bueix
Isaiah57:8 Yiem gaengh nqa'haav maengx yaac yiem gaengh zouc meih mbuo liepc meih mbuo nyei jangx-hoc. Meih mbuo guangc yie
Isaiah57:9 Meih mbuo dorh jienv youh mingh taux Molekv zienh
Isaiah57:10 Meih mbuo kouv weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei jauv go
Isaiah57:11 “Maaih haaix nyungc haeqv meih mbuo gamh nziex cingx daaih gorngv-baeqc
Isaiah57:12 Yie oix gorngv cuotv meih mbuo funx ganh zoux duqv horpc caux meih mbuo zoux nyei sic
Isaiah57:13 Meih mbuo heuc jienv tov nyei ziangh hoc
Isaiah57:14 Aengx maaih dauh oix gorngv
Isaiah57:15 Weic zuqc yiem gauh hlang jiex Wuov Dauh
Isaiah57:16 Weic zuqc yie maiv yietc liuz nzaeng
Isaiah57:17 Yie qiex jiez ninh weic zuqc ninh mauv ziouc baamz zuiz. Yie mborqv ninh
Isaiah57:18 Yie buatc ninh zoux nyei jauv mv baac yie corc oix zorc ninh. Yie oix dorh ninh
Isaiah57:19 Yie bun nzauh nyiemv nyei mienh ceng yie.” Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah57:20 Mv baac orqv mienh hnangv koiv nyei wuom mietv mingh mietv daaih
Isaiah57:21 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh gorngv
Isaiah58:1 “Oix zuqc heuc mbui
Isaiah58:2 Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi lorz yie
Isaiah58:3 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Isaiah58:4 Mangc maah! Meih zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc weic nzaeng jaax mborqv jaax
Isaiah58:5 Hnangv naaic zei se yie ginv daaih bun mienh longc wuov norm hnoi zatv ganh zoux faix hnangv fai? Se mienh ndoqv m'nqorngv hnangv mboux-mbetv
Isaiah58:6 “Yie ginv zei maiv nyanc se hnangv naaiv maiv zeiz? Se oix zuqc cutv ndutv hiuang orqv nyei limc
Isaiah58:7 Oix zuqc zorqv meih nyei nyanc hopv bun nqoi hnyouv sie nyei mienh
Isaiah58:8 Hnangv naaic meih nyei njang ziouc cuotv hnangv lungh ndorm nziouv nyei njang. Meih yaac duqv siepv-siepv nyei zorc longx. Meih zoux horpc nyei jauv oix yiem meih nyei wuov ndaangc maengx. Ziouv nyei njang-laangc yaac oix yiem meih nqa'haav nqaang beu jienv meih.
Isaiah58:9 Wuov zanc meih heuc jienv tov
Isaiah58:10 se gorngv meih zorqv nyanc hopv bun hnyouv sie nyei mienh
Isaiah58:11 Ziouv yaac oix yietc liuz dorh jauv meih
Isaiah58:12 Meih oix siang-ceix jiez mbaang mingh lauh nyei dorngx
Isaiah58:13 “Se gorngv meih gan longx Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei leiz
Isaiah58:14 meih ziouc kaux Ziouv a'hneiv. Gormx lungh ndiev nyei mienh ziouc taaih meih. Yie yaac oix bun meih nyei ong-taaix
Isaiah59:1 Mangc maah! Ziouv nyei buoz maiv zeiz nangv
Isaiah59:2 Mv baac meih mbuo nyei zuiz bun meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nqaeqv jienv. Meih mbuo nyei zuiz torngv ninh nyei hmien
Isaiah59:3 Weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei buoz maaih nziaamv guoqv jienv. Zuiz yaac guoqv jienv meih mbuo nyei buoz-ndoqv. Meih mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv-baeqc
Isaiah59:4 Maiv maaih yietc dauh baengh fim nyei gox sic
Isaiah59:5 Ninh mbuo hnangv buoc naang-doqc jaux
Isaiah59:6 Ninh mbuo nyei gaeng-nyorc mbiorngz maiv haih longc dorngx lui-houx. Ninh mbuo zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv yaac maiv haih buang ganh nyei sin. Ninh mbuo zoux nyei kungx benx zuiz hnangv
Isaiah59:7 Ninh mbuo nyei zaux tiux mingh zoux orqv sic
Isaiah59:8 Baengh orn nyei jauv ninh mbuo maiv hiuv
Isaiah59:9 Weic naaiv baengh fim nyei jauv leih yie mbuo go
Isaiah59:10 Yie mbuo hluo jienv njongc hnangv m'zing maengh nor
Isaiah59:11 Yie mbuo yietc zungv hnangv jiepv nor njunh
Isaiah59:12 Weic zuqc yie mbuo nyei zuiz yiem meih nyei nza'hmien hiaangx jienv faaux
Isaiah59:13 Yie mbuo ngaengc jienv
Isaiah59:14 Baengh fim tuix nzuonx nqa'haav
Isaiah59:15 Yietc deix zien leiz maiv maaih. Haaix dauh guangc orqv sic
Isaiah59:16 Ninh buatc maiv maaih yietc dauh
Isaiah59:17 Ninh longc zoux horpc nyei jauv weic hlieqv-jaapv zuqv jienv
Isaiah59:18 Ziux ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic ninh oix jaauv win. Ninh oix nouz ninh nyei win-wangv
Isaiah59:19 Hnangv naaic yiem fai bung
Isaiah59:20 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah59:21 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah60:1 “Jiez daaih
Isaiah60:2 Mangc maah! Hmuangx oix gomv buangv lungh ndiev
Isaiah60:3 Maanc guoqv mienh oix daaih lorz meih nyei njang
Isaiah60:4 “Cau meih nyei hmien mangc biei bung
Isaiah60:5 Wuov zanc meih mangc buatc ziouc a'hneiv haic
Isaiah60:6 Lorh torh guanh
Isaiah60:7 Ke^ndaa nyei yietc zungv ba'gi yungh guanh oix gapv zunv meih naaiv. Ne^mbaa^yotv nyei ba'gi yungh gouv oix fu-sux meih. Ninh mbuo oix faaux yie nyei ziec-dorngh
Isaiah60:8 “Ndaix daaih hnangv mbuonx yaac hnangv baeqc gopv nzuonx ninh nyei lauz naaiv deix se haaix dauh?

Isaiah60:11 Meih nyei zingh gaengh oix zanc-zanc koi nqoi
Isaiah60:12 Weic zuqc haaix norm guoqv
Isaiah60:13 “Le^mbaa^norn gauh longx jiex nyei ndiangx

Isaiah60:15 “Maiv gunv meih zuqc guangc zuqc nzorng
Isaiah60:16 Maanc guoqv maanc hungh oix goux jienv meih
Isaiah60:17 Yie oix dorh jiem daaih div dongh siqv
Isaiah60:18 Yiem naaiv mingh yiem meih nyei deic-bung maiv haiz ciouv nyei
Isaiah60:19 Mba'hnoi maiv aengx zoux meih lungh hnoi zanc nyei njang
Isaiah60:20 Meih nyei mba'hnoi maiv muotv
Isaiah60:21 Meih nyei yietc zungv baeqc fingx ziouc benx kuv mienh. Ninh mbuo duqv nzipc deic-bung benx ninh mbuo yietc liuz nyei buonc. Ninh mbuo se yie zuangx nyei cunx
Isaiah60:22 Gauh zoqc jiex nyei mienh oix benx yietc fingx
Isaiah61:1 Ziouv Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh caux yie yiem
Isaiah61:2 aengx zunh gorngv
Isaiah61:3 bun yiem Si^on nzauh nyiemv nyei mienh maaih njien-youh a'hneiv div saaiv
Isaiah61:4 Ninh mbuo oix ceix jiez loz! hnoi mbaang waaic nyei ga'naaiv
Isaiah61:5 Ganh fingx mienh oix daaih goux meih mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh guanh. Ganh guoqv mienh oix zoux meih mbuo nyei ndeic yaac goux meih mbuo nyei a'ngunc huingx.
Isaiah61:6 Mv baac mienh oix heuc meih mbuo zoux Ziouv nyei sai mienh. Mienh yaac oix gorngv meih mbuo zoux bou fu-sux yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Meih mbuo duqv nyanc camv-guoqv nyei zinh zoih. Weic duqv ninh mbuo nyei zinh zoih meih mbuo ziouc a'hneiv haic.
Isaiah61:7 Meih mbuo zuqc nyaiv
Isaiah61:8 “Weic zuqc yie
Isaiah61:9 Yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx
Isaiah61:10 Yie weic Ziouv za'gengh! njien-youh. Yie nyei hnyouv kaux yie nyei Tin-Hungh maaih orn-lorqc
Isaiah61:11 Weic zuqc ndau hnangv haaix nor bun ga'naaiv cuotv
Isaiah62:1 Weic Si^on yie nyienz maiv jienv qiex
Isaiah62:2 Maanc guoqv oix buatc meih zoux horpc nyei jauv
Isaiah62:3 Meih ziouc benx nzueic haic nyei ningv yiem Ziouv nyei buoz
Isaiah62:4 Yiem naaiv mingh mienh maiv gorngv meih se “Zuqc Guangc Mi'aqv.” Meih nyei deic-bung yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh gorngv benx “Guangc Huaang Nyei Deic-Bung.” Mv baac meih oix duqv mienh heuc “Yie A'hneiv Nyei Se Ninh.” Meih nyei deic-bung yaac heuc “Dorng Jaa Mi'aqv.” Weic zuqc Ziouv a'hneiv meih
Isaiah62:5 Hnangv dauh dorn caux dauh maiv bueix jiex dorn nyei sieqv dorng jaa
Isaiah62:6 O Ye^lu^saa^lem aac
Isaiah62:7 yaac maiv dungx bun ninh hitv kuonx. Zuov taux ninh liepc jiez Ye^lu^saa^lem
Isaiah62:8 Ziouv sung cuotv ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz
Isaiah62:9 Mv baac siou nyei mienh duqv nyanc yaac ceng Ziouv. Siou a'ngunc biouv wuov deix yaac duqv yiem yie nyei singx dinc nyei laatc gu'nyuoz hopv.”
Isaiah62:10 Jiex mingh
Isaiah62:11 Mangc maah! Ziouv zunh jomc lungh ndiev gorngv
Isaiah62:12 Mienh oix heuc ninh mbuo benx “Cing-Nzengc nyei Baeqc Fingx
Isaiah63:1 Yiem E^ndom Deic nyei Mbo^saa^laa Zingh zuqv jienv nyomc daaih hongc siqv nyei lui-houx naaiv dauh se haaix dauh? Zorng jienv njang-laangc nyei lui-houx longc ninh henv haic nyei domh qaqv gan jauv daaih naaiv dauh se haaix dauh? “Se yie
Isaiah63:2 Meih nyei zorng-zuqv weic haaix diuc siqv? Meih nyei lui-houx weic haaix diuc hnangv yiem a'ngunc diuv nyei zorngh nyueih a'ngunc diuv nyei mienh?
Isaiah63:3 “Yie ganh nduqc dauh hnangv yiem wuov zorngh nyueih a'ngunc diuv
Isaiah63:4 Weic zuqc jaauv win nyei hnoi yiem yie nyei hnyouv
Isaiah63:5 Yie mangc yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh tengx. Yie mbuoqc horngh haic maiv maaih haaix dauh daaih baav. Yie ganh nyei buoz ziouc bun yie duqv hingh
Isaiah63:6 Yie nouz haic
Isaiah63:7 Yie oix gorngv taux Ziouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh
Isaiah63:8 Weic zuqc Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah63:9 Yiem ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc
Isaiah63:10 Mv baac ninh mbuo ngaengc jienv
Isaiah63:11 Wuov zanc ninh mbuo jangx loz-hnoi nyei ziangh hoc
Isaiah63:12 Ninh bun ninh henv haic nyei qaqv yiem Mose nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz
Isaiah63:13 Ninh dorh ninh nyei baeqc fingx jiex ndo nyei koiv hnangv maaz yangh deic-bung-huaang. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv ndiqv zuqc ndorpc.
Isaiah63:14 Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh bun ninh mbuo hitv kuonx
Isaiah63:15 Ziouv aac

Isaiah63:17 O Ziouv aac

Isaiah64:1 O Ziouv aac
Isaiah64:2 hnangv douz zieqc yietc ndui ndiangx-nquaah nyang buov wuom mbueix
Isaiah64:3 Meih zoux dongh yie mbuo hnamv maiv taux nyei mbuoqc horngh sic. Meih njiec daaih
Isaiah64:4 Yiem loz-hnoi daaih maiv maaih haaix dauh haiz jiex
Isaiah64:5 Meih zipv a'hneiv zoux horpc nyei mienh

Isaiah65:1 Ziouv
Isaiah65:2 Yie ziangh hnoi sung jienv yie nyei buoz bun yietc fingx hnyouv ngaengc nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo sueih ninh mbuo ganh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv nyei sic
Isaiah65:3 Naaiv deix baeqc fingx dorng jienv yie zanc-zanc cuoqv yie. Ninh mbuo yiem huingx zorqv ga'naaiv fongc horc ziec
Isaiah65:4 Ninh mbuo mingh zueiz jienv zouv mbu'ndongx
Isaiah65:5 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Isaiah65:6 “Mangc maah! Maaih waac fiev jienv yie nyei nza'hmien gorngv
Isaiah65:7 liemh ninh mbuo nyei zuiz caux ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyei zuiz. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo yiem mbong gu'nguaaic buov hung
Isaiah65:8 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah65:9 Yie oix bun Yaakopv maaih hoz doic zeiv-fun
Isaiah65:10 Saalon Ndau-Baengh oix benx ba'gi yungh caux yungh guanh nyei miev-ciangv
Isaiah65:11 “Mv baac meih mbuo guangc Ziouv nyei mienh
Isaiah65:12 Yie ziouc dingc bun meih mbuo nyei hoz nqaang zuqc nzuqc ndaauv
Isaiah65:13 Weic naaiv Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah65:14 Yie nyei zuangx bou oix baaux nzung weic hnyouv gu'nyuoz njien-youh
Isaiah65:15 Meih mbuo zuqc guangc meih mbuo ganh nyei mbuox
Isaiah65:16 Hnangv naaic
Isaiah65:17 “Mangc maah! Yie oix zeix siang-lungh siang-ndau. Zinh ndaangc nyei sic zungv maiv jangx
Isaiah65:18 Mv baac oix zuqc a'hneiv
Isaiah65:19 Yie ziouc weic Ye^lu^saa^lem njien-youh
Isaiah65:20 “Yiem naaic gu'nyuoz yietc liuz maiv aengx maaih gu'nguaaz ziangh i ziex hnoi hnangv
Isaiah65:21 Ninh mbuo oix zoux biauv weic ganh bieqc mingh yiem. Ninh mbuo oix zoux huingx zuangx a'ngunc biouv yaac nyanc huingx nyei biouv.
Isaiah65:22 Ninh mbuo maiv zoux biauv bun ganh dauh yiem. Ninh mbuo maiv zoux huingx zuangx a'ngunc biouv bun ganh dauh nyanc. Weic zuqc yie nyei baeqc fingx ziangh nyei hnoi zungv hnangv ndiangx ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc. Yie ginv daaih nyei mienh ziouc a'hneiv ninh mbuo nyei buoz zoux nyei gong lauh nyei.
Isaiah65:23 Ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong ninh mbuo maiv baeqc baeqc zoux
Isaiah65:24 Ninh mbuo maiv gaengh tov
Isaiah65:25 Hieh juv caux ba'gi yungh dorn oix juangc jienv nyanc. Sienh oix nyanc mbiauh nqaauv hnangv ngongh. Nie-mbung benx naang nyei nyanc hopv. Da'faanh yiem yie nyei cing-nzengc mbong nyei dorngx
Isaiah66:1 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Isaiah66:2 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Isaiah66:3 Mv baac haaix dauh longc ngongh ziec se hnangv daix mienh. Haaix dauh longc ba'gi yungh ziec se hnangv mborqv juv nyei jaang nauv. Haaix dauh fongc horc laangh ziqc se hnangv longc dungz nyei nziaamv fongc horc. Haaix dauh buov hung se hnangv ninh zaangc miuc-fangx. Naaiv nyungc mienh ginv ganh nyei jauv. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv a'hneiv zoux gamh nziev nyei sic.
Isaiah66:4 Yie ziouc oix ginv zeqc naanc hoic ninh mbuo
Isaiah66:5 Meih mbuo weic Ziouv nyei waac sin zinx nyei mienh aah! Muangx ninh nyei waac maah! “Meih mbuo nyei gorx-youz
Isaiah66:6 Muangx maah! Maaih qiex coh coh nyei yiem zingh gu'nyuoz cuotv. Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yaac cuotv mbui nyei qiex. Se Ziouv winh bun ninh nyei win-wangv nyei qiex mbui.
Isaiah66:7 “Yie nyei cing-nzengc zingh se hnangv dauh m'sieqv dorn maiv gaengh mun
Isaiah66:8 Haaix dauh haiz naaiv nyungc sic? Haaix dauh buatc jiex naaiv nyungc sic? Yietc norm guoqv yietc hnoi hnangv haih cuotv daaih fai? Yietc guoqv mienh nduqc dangh hnangv haih yungz cuotv seix fai? Weic zuqc Si^on yietv mun ninh yungz cuotv ninh nyei naamh nyouz mi'aqv.”
Isaiah66:9 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah66:10 “Meih mbuo yietc zungv hnamv Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc caux ninh njien-youh orn-lorqc. Meih mbuo nzauh nyiemv ninh nyei yietc zungv mienh
Isaiah66:11 Meih mbuo duqv yiem ninh orn hnyouv nyei la'kuotv hopv nyorx beuv nzengc. Meih mbuo yaac a'hneiv ninh bungx-zuoqc nyei njang-laangc.”
Isaiah66:12 Weic zuqc Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Isaiah66:13 Hnangv maa orn ninh nyei fu'jueiv nyei hnyouv
Isaiah66:14 Meih mbuo mangc buatc
Isaiah66:15 Mangc maah! Ziouv oix yiem douz gu'nyuoz daaih
Isaiah66:16 Weic zuqc Ziouv oix longc douz caux ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv siemv dingc maanc mienh nyei zuiz
Isaiah66:17 “Saax uix
Isaiah66:18 “Yie hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zoux nyei caux yiem hnyouv hnamv nyei
Isaiah66:19 “Yie oix zorqv norm jangx-hoc an ninh mbuo nyei mbu'ndongx. Yie yaac oix paaiv deix biaux cuotv maengc nyei mienh mingh taux ziex fingx
Isaiah66:20 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh meih mbuo nyei yietc zungv gorx-youz yiem maanc guoqv daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
Isaiah66:21 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah66:22 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah66:23 Ziouv gorngv
Isaiah66:24 Ninh mbuo oix cuotv mingh mangc ngaengc yie wuov deix mienh nyei sei. Nyanc ninh mbuo nyei sei wuov deix gaeng-mau yietc liuz maiv daic. Buov ninh mbuo nyei douz yietc liuz yaac maiv daic. Ninh mbuo ziouc benx lungh ndiev mienh gamh nziev haic nyei ga'naaiv.”

Jeremiah6:4 “Oix zuqc liuc leiz ziangx caux ninh mborqv jaax. Jiez daaih maah! Mbuo lungh aanx nyei ziangh hoc mingh mborqv. Mbuo zuqc kouv aqv

Jeremiah6:20 Yiem Qe^mbaa daaih nyei hung fai yiem go nyei deic-bung dorh daaih nyei laapc liuc fungx bun yie weic haaix nyungc eix leiz? Meih mbuo buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv yie maiv haih zipv

Jeremiah7:4 Maiv dungx kaux naaiv deix nduov nyei waac

Jeremiah9:1 O feix duqv yie nyei m'nqorngv benx wuom

I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun caux Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun zoux dorngc yie caux ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix laengz nyei ngaengc waac.

Jeremiah14:1 Naaiv se Ye^le^mi aengx zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv taux lungh haanz nyei sic. Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah14:2 “Yu^ndaa nzauh nyiemv
Jeremiah14:3 Yiem zingh zoux hlo nyei mienh heuc ninh mbuo nyei bou mingh zaangh wuom. Ninh mbuo mingh taux siou wuom nyei kuotv buatc maiv maaih wuom. Ninh mbuo dorh jienv ongx-kungx nzuonx
Jeremiah14:4 Laaix maiv maaih mbiungc njiec ndau-beih
Jeremiah14:5 Liemh yiem lomc-huaang nyei njaih nyeiz guangc ninh coqv hoqc njiec nyei dorn weic zuqc maiv maaih miev.
Jeremiah14:6 Hieh lorh souv jienv mbong gu'nguaaic
Jeremiah14:7 Ziouv aac
Jeremiah14:8 Meih se dongh I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih lamh hnamv wuov dauh. Yie mbuo zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc meih zoux ninh mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv. Meih yiem naaiv norm deic-bung meih weic haaix diuc hnangv kaeqv mienh yaac hnangv jiex jauv hitv muonz baav nyei mienh?
Jeremiah14:9 Meih weic haaix diuc hnangv dauh liemh zeih hnyouv lunc
Jeremiah14:10 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv taux naaiv deix baeqc fingx. “Ninh mbuo a'hneiv hnangv naaiv youh jienv mingh
Jeremiah14:11 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox yie

Jeremiah31:40 Guangc sei
Jeremiah32:1 Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh da'ziepc hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Jeremiah32:2 Wuov zanc Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh nyei jun-baeng weih jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem. Douc waac mienh
Jeremiah32:3 Weic zuqc Yu^ndaa hungh
Jeremiah32:4 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Jeremiah32:5 Ninh oix dorh Se^nde^ki^yaa mingh taux Mbaa^mbi^lon. Se^nde^ki^yaa yaac oix zuqc yiem naaic taux yie mingh lorz ninh. Maiv gunv meih mborqv Ken^ndie Mienh
Jeremiah32:6 Ye^le^mi gorngv
Jeremiah32:7 “Meih nyei youz-diex
Jeremiah32:8 “Yie nyei youz-diex nyei dorn
Jeremiah32:9 Yie ziouc tengx youz-diex nyei dorn
Jeremiah32:10 Yie ziouc faaux mbuox yiem wuov ndau-sou yaac naetv jienv heuc mienh zoux zorng-zengx aengx longc dangv nziang nyaanh.
Jeremiah32:11 Yie zorqv naetv jienv nyei ndau-sou
Jeremiah32:12 Nqa'haav yie dorng jienv yie nyei youz-diex nyei dorn
Jeremiah32:13 Yie dorng jienv ninh mbuo hatc Mbaalukv. Yie gorngv
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv
Jeremiah32:15 Weic zuqc Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv
Jeremiah32:16 “Yie zorqv maaiz ndau nyei sou bun Ne^li^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah32:17 “Ziouv Tin-Hungh aah! Se dongh meih sung meih nyei buoz cuotv
Jeremiah32:18 Meih bun cing meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv cin-cin waanc-waanc mienh. Mv baac die baamz zuiz meih winh bun ninh nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv. Hlo haic
Jeremiah32:19 meih nyei za'eix hlo haic
Jeremiah32:20 Meih yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic taux ih jaax hnoi yaac yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux zuangx baamh mienh mbu'ndongx zoux
Jeremiah32:21 Meih longc jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic yaac sung cuotv meih henv haic nyei buoz aengx longc gamh nziex nyei domh sic dorh meih nyei baeqc fingx
Jeremiah32:22 Meih zorqv naaiv norm deic-bung jiu bun ninh mbuo
Jeremiah32:23 Ninh mbuo duqv bieqc naaiv norm deic-bung nzipc benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx meih nyei waac yaac maiv yangh meih nyei leiz-latc. Meih hatc ninh mbuo zoux nyei yietc zungv ninh mbuo yietc nyungc yaac maiv zoux. Weic naaiv meih bun ninh mbuo zuqc naaiv deix yietc zungv ciouv nyei zeqc naanc.
Jeremiah32:24 Mangc maah! Nie ndui jienv daaih weih gormx oix mborqv naaiv norm zingh. Yaac laaix nzuqc ndaauv caux ngorc hnaangx nyei jauv caux wuon-baengc
Jeremiah32:25 Mv baac Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac
Jeremiah32:26 Ye^le^mi duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Jeremiah32:27 “Yie se Ziouv
Jeremiah32:28 Weic naaiv Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah32:29 Mborqv naaiv norm zingh nyei Ken^ndie Mienh oix daaih bungx douz buov naaiv norm zingh
Jeremiah32:30 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh yiem lunx nyei ziangh hoc m'daaih yiem yie nyei nza'hmien kungx zoux orqv sic hnangv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh kungx longc ninh mbuo nyei buoz zoux nyei gong cuoqv yie qiex jiez hnangv.” Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
Jeremiah32:31 “Naaiv norm zingh yiem ceix jiez daaih wuov hnoi taux ih hnoi cuoqv yie qiex jiez
Jeremiah32:32 laaix I^saa^laa^en Mienh caux Yu^ndaa Mienh zoux nyei yietc zungv orqv sic cuoqv yie qiex jiez
Jeremiah32:33 Ninh mbuo huin diqc daanz bun yie
Jeremiah32:34 Ninh mbuo zorqv gamh nziev nyei ga'naaiv liepc yiem dongh gan yie nyei Mbuox heuc wuov norm biauv
Jeremiah32:35 Ninh mbuo yiem Mben Hinnom Horngz weic Mbaa^an zienh ceix hlang nyei dorngx
Jeremiah32:36 “Meih mbuo hnangv naaiv gorngv taux naaiv norm zingh
Jeremiah32:37 ‘Yie oix yiem dongh yie qiex jiez
Jeremiah32:38 Ninh mbuo oix zoux yie nyei baeqc fingx
Jeremiah32:39 Yie oix bun ninh mbuo maaih nduqc diuh hnyouv
Jeremiah32:40 Yie oix caux ninh mbuo liepc yietc liuz nyei ngaengc waac
Jeremiah32:41 Yie oix a'hneiv nyei zoux longx bun ninh mbuo yaac longc nzengc hnyouv
Jeremiah32:42 “Weic zuqc Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah32:43 Meih mbuo gorngv
Jeremiah32:44 Mienh oix longc nyaanh maaiz ndau
Jeremiah33:1 Ye^le^mi corc zuqc wuonx jienv siouv gaeng nyei baeng nyei laatc gu'nyuoz
Jeremiah33:2 “ Ziouv
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Gunv tov yie
Jeremiah33:4 Weic zuqc Ziouv
Jeremiah33:5 Mienh oix caux Ken^ndie Mienh mborqv jaax
Jeremiah33:6 “+‘Mangc maah! Yie zungv oix bun naaiv norm zingh duqv zorc longx. Yie oix zorc ninh mbuo longx daaih yaac bun ninh mbuo za'gengh bungx-zuoqc yaac duqv baengh orn nyei yiem.
Jeremiah33:7 Yie oix bun zuqc caangv mingh nyei Yu^ndaa Mienh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh duqv nzuonx daaih aengx liepc ninh mbuo jiez hnangv dongh cor wuov nor.
Jeremiah33:8 Yie oix saax nzengc ninh mbuo zoux dorngc yie nyei yietc zungv zuiz
Jeremiah33:9 Lungh ndiev maanc guoqv mienh muangx haiz yie hnangv haaix nor zoux longx bun naaiv norm zingh nyei yietc zungv sic
Jeremiah33:10 “ Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah33:11 mv baac yiem naaic zungv aengx duqv muangx haiz njien-youh
Jeremiah33:12 “Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah33:13 Yiem mbong-aiv dorngx nyei zingh
Jeremiah33:14 Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah33:15 “Taux wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc caux wuov deix ziangh hoc
Jeremiah33:16 Yiem wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc Yu^ndaa zungv duqv njoux
Jeremiah33:17 Weic zuqc Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah33:18 Lewi sai mienh yietc liuz yaac maaih mienh yiem yie nyei nza'hmien dorh fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv
Jeremiah33:19 Ye^le^mi aengx duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Jeremiah33:20 “ Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah33:21 yie caux yie nyei bou
Jeremiah33:22 Lungh nyei hleix saauv maiv hingh
Jeremiah33:23 Ye^le^mi duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Jeremiah33:24 “Meih maiv jangx muangx naaiv deix baeqc fingx gorngv nyei waac fai? Ninh mbuo gorngv
Jeremiah33:25 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah33:26 yie ziouc guangc Yaakopv caux yie nyei bou
Jeremiah34:1 Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh
Jeremiah34:2 “ Ziouv
Jeremiah34:3 Meih biaux maiv ndutv ninh nyei buoz
Jeremiah34:4 “+‘Mv baac Yu^ndaa hungh
Jeremiah34:5 Meih duqv baengh orn nyei guei seix. Mienh hnangv haaix nor weic taaih meih nyei ong-taaix buov ndaang nyei ga'naaiv
Jeremiah34:6 Douc waac mienh
Jeremiah34:7 Wuov zanc Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh nyei jun-baeng mborqv jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem yaac mborqv Yu^ndaa zengc njiec nyei yietc zungv zingh
Jeremiah34:8 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx liepc ngaengc waac gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo zunh bungx nqoi nyei leiz gorngv
Jeremiah34:9 gorqv-mienh oix zuqc bungx nqoi gorqv-mienh nyei Hipv^lu nouh maiv gunv m'jangc m'sieqv
Jeremiah34:10 Ninh mbuo ziouc muangx
Jeremiah34:11 Mv baac nqa'haav ninh mbuo hnamv-nzuonx aengx zorqv dongh ninh mbuo bungx nqoi wuov deix nouh gauv nouh beiz nzuonx
Jeremiah34:12 Ye^le^mi aengx duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Jeremiah34:13 “ Ziouv
Jeremiah34:14 “Taux da'cietv hnyangx gorqv-mienh oix zuqc bungx zuqc maaic bun meih longc zoux nouh nyei juangc Hipv^lu fingx nyei mienh
Jeremiah34:15 Jiex daaih maiv lauh meih mbuo goiv hnyouv zoux ziux yie nyei m'zing mangc buatc horpc nyei
Jeremiah34:16 Mv baac meih mbuo aengx mbienv hnyouv bun yie nyei mbuox maaih uix weic zuqc meih mbuo zorqv meih mbuo nyei nouh gauv nouh beiz nzuonx daaih
Jeremiah34:17 “Weic naaiv
Jeremiah34:18 Yu^ndaa nyei jien
Jeremiah34:19 
Jeremiah34:20 Yie oix zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev yaac jiu bun yiem lorz ninh mbuo nyei maengc wuov deix mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh mbuo nyei sei ziouc benx ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc caux ndau-beih nyei hieh zoih nyei nyanc hopv.
Jeremiah34:21 “+‘Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Jeremiah34:22 Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah35:1 Yo^si^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah35:2 “Mingh lorz Lekaapv wuov bungh mienh caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac yaac dorh ninh mbuo bieqc zaangc Ziouv nyei yietc qongx biauv
Jeremiah35:3 Yie ziouc dorh Haa^mbaa^sin^yaa nyei fun
Jeremiah35:4 Yie dorh ninh mbuo taux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv aengx bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
Jeremiah35:5 Yie ziouc zorqv dapv jienv a'ngunc diuv nyei baengh caux zaanv an jienv ninh mbuo nyei nza'hmien yaac gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Jeremiah35:6 Mv baac ninh mbuo dau
Jeremiah35:7 Yaac maiv dungx gomv biauv
Jeremiah35:8 Yie mbuo muangx yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Jeremiah35:9 Yie mbuo yaac maiv gomv biauv yiem. Yie mbuo maiv maaih a'ngunc huingx fai lingh deic fai ga'naaiv-nyim.
Jeremiah35:10 Yie mbuo yiem ndopv-liuh yaac ei jienv yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Jeremiah35:11 Mv baac Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh
Jeremiah35:12 Ye^le^mi aengx zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Jeremiah35:13 “Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv
Jeremiah35:14 Lekaapv nyei dorn
Jeremiah35:15 Yie paaiv yie nyei zuangx bou
Jeremiah35:16 Lekaapv nyei dorn
Jeremiah35:17 “+‘Weic naaiv Ziouv
Jeremiah35:18 Ye^le^mi ziouc gorngv mbuox Lekaapv wuov bungh mienh
Jeremiah35:19 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv
Jeremiah36:1 Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Jeremiah36:2 “Meih zorqv njunc sou fiev jienv yie gorngv I^saa^laa^en caux Yu^ndaa caux maanc guoqv mienh mbuox meih nyei yietc zungv waac
Jeremiah36:3 Nziex Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun muangx haiz yie oix bun ninh mbuo zuqc nyei yietc zungv ciouv nyei zeqc naanc
Jeremiah36:4 Ye^le^mi ziouc heuc Ne^li^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah36:5 Ye^le^mi ziouc paaiv Mbaalukv. Ninh gorngv
Jeremiah36:6 Hnangv naaic meih oix zuqc mingh. Zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc nyei hnoi meih oix zuqc zorqv dongh meih ziux yie gorngv nyei waac fiev jienv sou-njunc doqc bun yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei zuangx mienh muangx. Meih yaac oix zuqc doqc bun yiem Yu^ndaa nyei zingh cuotv daaih nyei yietc zungv mienh muangx.
Jeremiah36:7 Nziex ninh mbuo tov nyei waac haih mingh duqv taux Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Jeremiah36:8 Ne^li^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah36:9 Yo^si^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah36:10 Mbaalukv ziouc yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
Jeremiah36:11 Saafaan nyei fun
Jeremiah36:12 ninh ziouc mingh taux hungh dinc bieqc sou-biuv wuov qongx
Jeremiah36:13 Mi^kaa^yaa ziouc gorngv nzengc ninh haiz Mbaalukv doqc wuov njunc sou bun baeqc fingx muangx nyei yietc zungv waac mbuox ninh mbuo.
Jeremiah36:14 Weic naaiv zuangx jien ziouc paaiv Kusi nyei faqv
Jeremiah36:15 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
Jeremiah36:16 Ninh mbuo muangx haiz naaiv deix yietc zungv waac
Jeremiah36:17 Ninh mbuo naaic Mbaalukv
Jeremiah36:18 Mbaalukv dau
Jeremiah36:19 Wuov deix jien ziouc mbuox Mbaalukv
Jeremiah36:20 Ninh mbuo zorqv sou-njunc an jienv E^li^saa^maa sou-biuv wuov qongx biauv ziouc mingh taux hungh diex nyei ting. Ninh mbuo yaac gorngv nzengc naaiv deix yietc zungv waac mbuox hungh diex.
Jeremiah36:21 Hungh diex paaiv Ye^hu^ndi mingh dorh wuov njunc sou daaih. Ninh ziouc mingh E^li^saa^maa sou-biuv wuov qongx biauv zorqv sou-njunc daaih. Ye^hu^ndi ziouc doqc bun hungh diex caux souv hungh diex ga'hlen nyei zuangx jien muangx.
Jeremiah36:22 Wuov zanc doix zuqc juov hlaax. Hungh diex zueiz jienv jiex dong-gen nyei biauv gu'nyuoz
Jeremiah36:23 Ye^hu^ndi doqc liuz buo biei douc
Jeremiah36:24 Mv baac liemh hungh diex fai ninh nyei haaix dauh jien
Jeremiah36:25 Maiv gunv En^naa^tan caux Nde^lai^yaa caux Ge^maa^li^yaa qaqv tov hungh diex maiv dungx buov sou-njunc
Jeremiah36:26 Hungh diex ziouc paaiv ninh nyei dorn
Jeremiah36:27 Hungh diex buov liuz Mbaalukv ziux Ye^le^mi gorngv nyei waac fiev nyei sou-njunc
Jeremiah36:28 “Meih aengx ganh zorqv njunc sou fiev jienv Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Jeremiah36:29 Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv gorngv mbuox Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Jeremiah36:30 Weic naaiv Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv taux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Jeremiah36:31 Yie yaac oix dingc ninh caux ninh nyei zeiv-fun caux ninh nyei jien nyei zuiz weic ninh mbuo nyei zuiz-nipc. Yie oix bun ninh mbuo yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei baeqc fingx caux Yu^ndaa Mienh zuqc dongh yie gorngv oix bun ninh mbuo zuqc nyei yietc zungv ciouv nyei zeqc naanc. Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx.’+”
Jeremiah36:32 Ye^le^mi ziouc aengx zorqv njunc sou bun Ne^li^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah37:1 Yo^si^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah37:2 Mv baac Se^nde^ki^yaa fai ninh nyei jien fai deic-bung nyei baeqc fingx maiv maaih haaix dauh muangx Ziouv nyei waac
Jeremiah37:3 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh paaiv Se^le^mi^yaa nyei dorn
Jeremiah37:4 Wuov zanc Ye^le^mi corc yiem baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv
Jeremiah37:5 Faalo nyei jun-baeng guanh zungv cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung. Weih jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei Ken^ndie Mienh muangx haiz fienx gorngv taux wuov deix mienh
Jeremiah37:6 Douc waac mienh
Jeremiah37:7 “ Ziouv
Jeremiah37:8 Ken^ndie Mienh aengx oix daaih mborqv naaiv norm zingh
Jeremiah37:9 “ Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah37:10 Maiv gunv meih mbuo mborqv hingh Ken^ndie nyei yietc zungv jun-baeng
Jeremiah37:11 Ken^ndie nyei jun-baeng tuix Ye^lu^saa^lem weic zuqc Faalo nyei jun-baeng taux fatv wuov zanc
Jeremiah37:12 Ye^le^mi yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem cuotv jauv mingh Mben^yaa^min Deic weic yiem wuov deix baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx duqv nzipc ninh ganh nyei buonc.
Jeremiah37:13 Mingh taux Mben^yaa^min Gaengh
Jeremiah37:14 Ye^le^mi gorngv
Jeremiah37:15 Wuov deix jien qiex jiez! haic Ye^le^mi
Jeremiah37:16 Ye^le^mi zuqc wuonx jienv loh hmuangx yaac yiem wuov camv-hnoi nyei.
Jeremiah37:17 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh paaiv mienh mingh dorh Ye^le^mi cuotv daaih ziouc zipv ninh. Hungh diex yiem ninh nyei dinc bingx jienv naaic ninh
Jeremiah37:18 Ye^le^mi aengx naaic Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh
Jeremiah37:19 Douc waac gorngv
Jeremiah37:20 Ih zanc tov yie nyei ziouv
Jeremiah37:21 Hungh diex ziouc njiec lingc. Ninh mbuo dorh Ye^le^mi mingh yiem siouv gaeng nyei baeng nyei laatc gu'nyuoz. Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi bun norm njuov ninh
Jeremiah38:1 Matv^taan nyei dorn
Jeremiah38:2 Ninh gorngv
Jeremiah38:3 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah38:4 Wuov deix jien gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Jeremiah38:5 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh gorngv
Jeremiah38:6 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv Ye^le^mi
Jeremiah38:7 Yiem hungh dinc maaih dauh im dov nyei E^ti^o^bie Mienh
Jeremiah38:8 E^mbetc Melekv ziouc yiem hungh dinc cuotv mingh gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Jeremiah38:9 “Yie nyei ziouv
Jeremiah38:10 Hungh diex ziouc paaiv E^ti^o^bie Mienh
Jeremiah38:11 E^mbetc Melekv ziouc dorh wuov deix mienh caux jienv ninh mingh. Ninh mbuo mingh taux hungh dinc
Jeremiah38:12 E^ti^o^bie Mienh
Jeremiah38:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc longc wuov deix hlaang cie ninh cuotv siou wuom nyei kuotv. Ye^le^mi corc yiem siouv gaeng nyei baeng nyei laatc gu'nyuoz.
Jeremiah38:14 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh paaiv mienh mingh dorh douc waac mienh
Jeremiah38:15 Ye^le^mi gorngv mbuox Se^nde^ki^yaa
Jeremiah38:16 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh ziouc bingx jienv caux Ye^le^mi houv waac gorngv
Jeremiah38:17 Ye^le^mi ziouc gorngv mbuox Se^nde^ki^yaa
Jeremiah38:18 Se gorngv meih maiv nyiemc suei
Jeremiah38:19 Se^nde^ki^yaa Hungh gorngv mbuox Ye^le^mi
Jeremiah38:20 Ye^le^mi dau
Jeremiah38:21 Mv baac se gorngv meih maiv nyiemc suei
Jeremiah38:22 Mangc maah! Yiem Yu^ndaa nyei hungh dinc zengc njiec nyei m'sieqv dorn zuqc dorh cuotv jiu bun Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh nyei jien. Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gorngv
Jeremiah38:23 “Ninh mbuo oix zorqv meih nyei yietc zungv auv caux naamh nyouz jiu bun Ken^ndie Mienh. Meih ganh yaac maiv haih biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei buoz-ndiev
Jeremiah38:24 Se^nde^ki^yaa gorngv mbuox Ye^le^mi
Jeremiah38:25 Se gorngv wuov deix jien haiz gorngv yie duqv caux meih gorngv waac ziouc daaih lorz meih gorngv
Jeremiah38:26 meih oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo
Jeremiah38:27 Nqa'haav zuangx jien daaih lorz Ye^le^mi naaic ninh
Jeremiah38:28 Ye^le^mi yiem jienv siouv gaeng mienh nyei laatc gu'nyuoz taux Ye^lu^saa^lem zuqc Ken^ndie Mienh zorqv wuov hnoi.
Jeremiah39:1 Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh da'juov hnyangx ziepc hlaax wuov zanc
Jeremiah39:2 Yiem Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux hungh ziepc yietv wuov hnyangx
Jeremiah39:3 Ye^lu^saa^lem zuqc mborqv baaic nyei ziangh hoc
Jeremiah39:4 Yu^ndaa hungh
Jeremiah39:5 Mv baac Ken^ndie nyei jun-baeng zunc jienv ninh mbuo mingh. Zunc taux Ye^li^ko nyei ndau-baengh ziouc zunc zaaic Se^nde^ki^yaa aqv. Ninh mbuo zorqv duqv ninh ziouc dorh mingh taux Haamatv Deic
Jeremiah39:6 Yiem Lipv^laa
Jeremiah39:7 Ninh aengx zoux bun Se^nde^ki^yaa nyei m'zing maengh yaac kaux jienv limc weic dorh ninh mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon.
Jeremiah39:8 Ken^ndie Mienh longc douz buov hungh dinc yaac buov baeqc fingx nyei biauv
Jeremiah39:9 Goux hungh nyei domh baeng-bieiv

Jeremiah48:19 Aa^lo^e Mienh aah! Souv jienv jauv-hlen mangc maah! Naaic biaux daaih nyei m'jangc dorn

Jeremiah48:23 caux Ki^li^yaa^taa^im caux Mbetc Gaamun caux Mbetc Me^on
Jeremiah48:24 caux Ke^li^otc caux Mbo^saa^laa caux Mo^apc Deic nyei norm-norm zingh maiv gunv go fai fatv.

Jeremiah48:26 “Oix zuqc bun Mo^apc diuv nquin
Jeremiah48:27 Mo^apc aah! Meih maiv zeiz jatv I^saa^laa^en fai? Meih buatc ninh yiem janx-zaqc mbu'ndongx cingx daaih haaix zanc gorngv taux ninh meih huangx m'nqorngv fai?

Jeremiah49:16 Meih haeqv mienh gamh nziex haic
Jeremiah49:17 “E^ndom ziouc benx bun mienh gamh nziex nyei dorngx. Da'faanh jiex jauv nyei mienh za'gengh gamh nziex haic
Jeremiah49:18 Hnangv So^ndom caux Go^mo^laa caux nitv fatv nyei zingh zuqc baaic
Jeremiah49:19 “Hnangv dauh sienh yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih hlen nyei lomc daaih borngz wuonv nyei ba'gi yungh laanh
Jeremiah49:20 Weic naaiv
Jeremiah49:21 E^ndom mbaang njiec nyei qiex mbui ndanc ndau dongz
Jeremiah49:22 Mangc maah! Maaih dauh hnangv domh jaangv oix yang nqoi ndaatv ndaix daaih mborqv Mbo^saa^laa. Wuov hnoi E^ndom mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng nyei hnyouv hnangv m'sieqv dorn mun gu'nguaaz nor.”
Jeremiah49:23 Gorngv taux Ndaa^matv^gatc. “Haamatv caux Aanbatc zuqc baaic hmien weic zuqc ninh mbuo muangx haiz ciouv nyei fienx. Ninh mbuo mba'nziu yuqc mi'aqv
Jeremiah49:24 Ndaa^matv^gatc mau mi'aqv. Ninh guinh sin biaux
Jeremiah49:25 Maaih mengh dauh wuov norm zingh zuqc guangc mi'aqv
Jeremiah49:26 Weic naaiv ninh nyei mienh lunx mienh ziouc yiem domh zuangx zaamc zuqc daix daic. Dongh wuov hnoi ninh nyei yietc zungv baeng zuqc mietc nzengc.” Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv.
Jeremiah49:27 “Yie oix yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc nyei zingh laatc diemv douz
Jeremiah49:28 Naaiv gorngv taux Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh
Jeremiah49:29 Ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh caux ba'gi yungh guanh
Jeremiah49:30 Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah49:31 Ziouv gorngv

Jeremiah49:33 “Haaso oix zuqc benx hieh juv yiem nyei dorngx
Jeremiah49:34 Se^nde^ki^yaa jiez gorn zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh wuov zanc
Jeremiah49:35 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah49:36 Yie oix bun biei bung nziaaux yiem biei bung lungh buonc daaih taux Elaam. Yie oix bun ninh mbuo gan wuov deix yietc zungv nziaaux nzaanx mingh. Wuov deix zuqc zunc cuotv Elaam nyei mienh maiv maaih yietc norm guoqv ninh mbuo maiv taux.”
Jeremiah49:37 Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah49:38 Yie oix yiem Elaam liepc yie nyei weic

Jeremiah50:1 Naaiv se Ziouv longc douc waac mienh

Jeremiah50:5 Ninh mbuo oix naaic jauv mingh Si^on
Jeremiah50:6 “Yie nyei baeqc fingx hnangv dorngc jauv nyei ba'gi yungh
Jeremiah50:7 Da'faanh lorz buatc ninh mbuo wuov deix zorqv ninh mbuo naqv nzengc mingh. Ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv gorngv
Jeremiah50:8 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Oix zuqc yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon gu'nyuoz biaux cuotv. Cuotv Ken^ndie Mienh nyei deic-bung maah! Zoux hnangv yiem ba'gi yungh guanh dorh jauv nyei yungh gouv.
Jeremiah50:9 Weic zuqc yie oix coqv ziex norm yiem baqv bung nyei domh guoqv benx domh guanh daaih mborqv Mbaa^mbi^lon. Ninh mbuo ziouc mbaih jienv daaih mborqv ninh. Mbaa^mbi^lon ziouc yiem naaic zuqc zorqv mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo nyei forng-cang se hnangv maaih buoz-dauh mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng maiv kungx-buoz nyei nzuonx.
Jeremiah50:10 Ken^ndie oix zuqc luv. Da'faanh luv ninh nyei mienh buangv eix nzengc.” Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
Jeremiah50:11 “Luv yie nzipc nyei baeqc fingx nyei mienh aah! Maiv gunv meih mbuo njien-youh

Jeremiah50:13 Weic zuqc Ziouv qiex jiez
Jeremiah50:14 “Meih mbuo yietc zungv baeng juang-zinx nyei mienh aah! Mbaih jienv weih gormx buonv Mbaa^mbi^lon maah! Gunv buonv yaac maiv dungx korv-fiqv forng
Jeremiah50:15 Oix zuqc yiem ninh nyei biei bung heuc
Jeremiah50:16 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zorqv yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon zuangx ga'naaiv nyei mienh caux nanv nzuqc limh siou cun-gaeng nyei mienh pai guangc. Weic zeix mienh wuov deix nyei nzuqc ndaauv
Jeremiah50:17 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh se hnangv zuqc sienh zunc nzaanx nyei ba'gi yungh. Daauh dangh Atc^si^lie hungh nyanc ninh. Setv mueiz Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh
Jeremiah50:18 Weic naaiv Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv

Jeremiah50:24 Mbaa^mbi^lon aah! Yie weic meih zaeng hlaang

Jeremiah50:27 Daix nzengc ninh nyei ngongh gouv

Jeremiah50:37 Bun ninh nyei maaz caux mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie caux yiem ninh mbu'ndongx yietc zungv ganh fingx nyei baeng zuqc nzuqc ndaauv weic bun ninh mbuo hnangv m'sieqv dorn nor mau. Bun Mbaa^mbi^lon yietc zungv jaaix nyei ga'naaiv zuqc nzuqc ndaauv aqv
Jeremiah50:38 Bun lungh haanz hoic ninh nyei wuom nqaai nzengc. Weic zuqc ninh nyei deic-bung benx miuc-fangx nyei dorngx

Jeremiah51:2 Yie yaac oix paaiv mienh mingh nyomx Mbaa^mbi^lon

Jeremiah51:4 Ken^ndie Mienh yiem ganh nyei deic-bung zuqc daix daic
