Jeremiah51:6 “Yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon gu'nyuoz biaux maah! Gorqv-mienh njoux gorqv-mienh nyei maengc. Maiv dungx laaix ninh zuqc dingc zuiz weic zuqc naaiv se Ziouv jaauv win nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv
Jeremiah51:7 Zinh ndaangc Mbaa^mbi^lon hnangv norm jiem-zaanv yiem Ziouv nyei buoz
Jeremiah51:8 Mbaa^mbi^lon liemh zeih mbaang njiec huv nzengc
Jeremiah51:9 “+‘Yie mbuo oix zorc Mbaa^mbi^lon mv baac zorc maiv longx. Oix zuqc guangc ninh aqv

Jeremiah51:16 Ninh yietv cuotv qiex
Jeremiah51:17 “Dauh dauh baamh mienh se hngongx nyei
Jeremiah51:18 Miuc-fangx maiv maaih jaax-zinh
Jeremiah51:19 Yaakopv nyei Buonc maiv hnangv naaiv deix
Jeremiah51:20 “Meih se yie longc mborqv jaax nyei hlieqv-zueih caux wuoqc ginc. Yie longc meih mborqv muonc ziex fingx. Yie longc meih mietc camv-norm guoqv.
Jeremiah51:21 Yie longc meih mborqv muonc maaz caux geh maaz mienh. Yie longc meih mborqv muonc mborqv jaax maaz-cie caux zaangv cie nyei mienh.
Jeremiah51:22 Yie longc meih mborqv muonc m'jangc m'sieqv. Yie longc meih mborqv muonc mienh gox mienh caux mienh lunx mienh. Yie longc meih mborqv muonc houh saeng caux sieqv-dorn.
Jeremiah51:23 Yie longc meih mborqv muonc goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh caux ninh nyei ba'gi yungh guanh. Yie longc meih mborqv muonc zoux ndeic nyei mienh caux ninh nyei yietc doix ngongh. Yie longc meih mborqv muonc saengv-ziouv caux zoux hlo nyei jien.”
Jeremiah51:24 Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah51:25 Ziouv gorngv
Jeremiah51:26 “Mienh maiv yiem meih naaiv zorqv la'bieiv fai zoux biauv-gorqv nyei la'bieiv
Jeremiah51:27 “Yiem ndau-beih liepc geh
Jeremiah51:28 Liuc leiz maanc guoqv mienh daaih mborqv Mbaa^mbi^lon
Jeremiah51:29 Ndau dongz
Jeremiah51:30 Mbaa^mbi^lon mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng dingh njiec maiv mborqv
Jeremiah51:31 Douc fienx mienh yietc dauh tiux mingh nzipc yietc dauh
Jeremiah51:32 Jiex nyei jauv-bouc zuqc caangv mi'aqv. Weih wuonv nyei dorngx zuqc douz buov. Jun-baeng yaac lunc nzengc.

Jeremiah51:34 “Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh

Jeremiah51:39 Ninh mbuo jorm jienv zoux nyei ziangh hoc

Jeremiah51:41 “Mbaa^mbi^lon zuqc caangv mi'aqv. Lungh ndiev mienh ceng nyei dorngx zuqc caangv mi'aqv. Mbaa^mbi^lon yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx benx mienh gamh nziex nyei dorngx.
Jeremiah51:42 Koiv nyei wuom faaux yiemx Mbaa^mbi^lon
Jeremiah51:43 Ninh nyei zingh benx gamh nziex nyei dorngx

Jeremiah51:46 Maiv dungx bun meih nyei hnyouv mau
Jeremiah51:47 Weic naaiv mangc maah! Hnoi-nyieqc oix taux
Jeremiah51:48 Wuov zanc lungh caux ndau caux yiem lungh ndau gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv ziouc weic Mbaa^mbi^lon njien-youh nyei heuc weic zuqc zoux mietc nyei mienh oix yiem baqv bung daaih mborqv ninh mbuo. Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv.
Jeremiah51:49 Mbaa^mbi^lon oix zuqc mbaang laaix bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh daic

Jeremiah51:52 Ziouv gorngv

Jeremiah51:54 “Muangx maah! Maaih qiex yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon heuc. Yiem Ken^ndie Mienh nyei deic-bung maaih zuqc mietc nyei domh qiex mbui.
Jeremiah51:55 Weic zuqc Ziouv zoux bun Mbaa^mbi^lon benx ndau-huaang
Jeremiah51:56 Zoux mietc wuov dauh daaih mborqv
Jeremiah51:57 Yie oix bun ninh nyei jien caux ninh nyei cong-mengh mienh
Jeremiah51:58 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Jeremiah51:59 Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh da'feix hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Jeremiah51:60 Ye^le^mi zorqv Mbaa^mbi^lon oix zuqc buangh nyei yietc zungv ciouv nyei zeqc naanc fiev njiec sou. Naaiv deix yietc zungv waac gorngv taux Mbaa^mbi^lon.
Jeremiah51:61 Ye^le^mi gorngv mbuox Se^lai^aa
Jeremiah51:62 yaac gorngv

Jeremiah52:1 Se^nde^ki^yaa faaux weic zoux hungh wuov zanc
Jeremiah52:2 Ziux Ziouv mangc
Jeremiah52:3 Ndongc haaix zungv se laaix Ziouv qiex jiez
Jeremiah52:4 Se^nde^ki^yaa gunv da'juov hnyangx
Jeremiah52:5 Naaiv norm zingh zuqc weih jienv taux Se^nde^ki^yaa zoux hungh ziepc yietv hnyangx wuov hnyangx.
Jeremiah52:6 Taux feix hlaax saeng-juov yiem zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh maaih domh huaang domh ngorc kouv haic. Baeqc fingx maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc aqv.
Jeremiah52:7 Zingh laatc ziouc zuqc mborqv tong mi'aqv. Yietc zungv baeng ziouc lungh muonz zanc yangh nitv hungh diex nyei huingx i kang zingh laatc mbu'ndongx nyei gaengh biaux cuotv maiv gunv Ken^ndie Mienh weih gormx zingh. Ninh mbuo hungx jienv Aa^laa^mbaa Deic mingh.
Jeremiah52:8 Mv baac Ken^ndie nyei jun-baeng zunc jienv hungh diex mingh ziouc yiem Ye^li^ko nyei ndau-baengh zunc zaaic. Gan Se^nde^ki^yaa nyei zuangx jun-baeng ziouc guangc jienv ninh
Jeremiah52:9 Ken^ndie baeng ziouc zorqv jienv hungh diex
Jeremiah52:10 Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh dorng jienv Se^nde^ki^yaa daix ninh nyei dorn mbuo
Jeremiah52:11 Ninh gueix cuotv Se^nde^ki^yaa nyei m'zing
Jeremiah52:12 Mbaa^mbi^lon hungh
Jeremiah52:13 Ninh longc douz buov zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux hungh dinc caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei yietc zungv biauv. Norm-norm domh biauv ninh buov qui nzengc.
Jeremiah52:14 Gan jienv goux hungh nyei domh baeng-bieiv wuov deix Ken^ndie Mienh nyei yietc zungv jun-baeng ziouc caeqv weih gormx Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zingh laatc mbaang nzengc.
Jeremiah52:15 Goux hungh nyei domh baeng-bieiv
Jeremiah52:16 Mv baac goux hungh diex nyei domh baeng-bieiv
Jeremiah52:17 Yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei dongh siqv ndiouh
Jeremiah52:18 Ninh mbuo yaac zorqv caeng
Jeremiah52:19 Ninh mbuo yaac dorh nzormc-faix
Jeremiah52:20 Saa^lo^morn zoux weic zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv wuov deix i norm domh ndiouh caux yietc norm domh bunh caux sengh domh bunh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh dongh siqv ngongh caux dieh longz nyei yietc zungv dongh siqv camv gau
Jeremiah52:21 Wuov deix i norm ndiouh
Jeremiah52:22 Ndiouh dueiv-mueiz aengx borqv jienv
Jeremiah52:23 Ndiouh nyei biei bung maaih juov ziepc luoqc norm ziqc liouh biouv
Jeremiah52:24 Goux hungh diex nyei domh baeng-bieiv zorqv Se^lai^aa domh sai mienh caux zoux da'nyeic wuov dauh sai mienh
Jeremiah52:25 Yiem wuov norm zingh ninh zorqv yietc dauh gunv mborqv jaax jun-baeng nyei domh baeng-bieiv
Jeremiah52:26 Goux hungh nyei domh baeng-bieiv
Jeremiah52:27 Yiem Haamatv Deic
Jeremiah52:28 Naaiv se Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa guaatv mingh nyei Yu^ndaa Mienh nyei soux mouc. Da'cietv hnyangx maaih buo cin lengh nyic ziepc faam dauh.
Jeremiah52:29 Yiem Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa zoux hungh ziepc betv hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Jeremiah52:30 Taux Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa zoux hungh nyic ziepc faam wuov hnyangx
Jeremiah52:31 Yu^ndaa Hungh
Jeremiah52:32 aengx caux ninh gorngv longx yaac bun ninh nyei weic gauh hlang jiex lomh nzoih caux ninh yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon wuov deix zuangx hungh nyei weic.
Jeremiah52:33 Ye^ho^yaa^kin ziouc jaiv nqoi ninh yiem loh nyei lui-houx. Ninh ziangh seix nyei hnoi-nyieqc hnoi-hnoi yiem hungh diex nyei dieh nyanc hnaangx.
Jeremiah52:34 Gorngv taux ninh qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv
Lamentations1:1 Zinh ndaangc maaih baeqc fingx yiem buangv nyei zingh
Lamentations1:2 Ninh ziangh muonz nyiemv duqv kouv haic. Wuom-mueic liouc njiec ninh nyei kamx-bui. Yiem yietc zungv hnamv ninh nyei mienh mbu'ndongx
Lamentations1:3 Yu^ndaa zuqc guaatv mingh
Lamentations1:4 Bieqc Si^on nyei jauv se huaang-huaang wuov
Lamentations1:5 Ninh nyei win-wangv duqv zoux bieiv zeiv
Lamentations1:6 Si^on nyei yietc zungv njang-laangc zitc nzengc mi'aqv. Ninh nyei bieiv zeiv hnangv njaih guanh lorz maiv buatc miev-ciangv. Ninh mbuo yiem zunc ninh mbuo wuov deix nyei wuov ndaangc maengx
Lamentations1:7 Ye^lu^saa^lem zuqc kouv
Lamentations1:8 Ye^lu^saa^lem baamz zuiz hlo haic
Lamentations1:9 Ninh nyei uix guoqv jienv ninh nyei junh
Lamentations1:10 Win-wangv sung buoz luv ninh nyei yietc zungv jaaix nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh mangc jienv buatc ganh fingx mienh borngz bieqc ninh nyei singx dinc
Lamentations1:11 Zingh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx njunh jienv lorz ga'naaiv nyanc. Ninh mbuo zorqv ninh mbuo jaaix nyei ga'naaiv yienc hmeiv weic njoux singx maengc. “O Ziouv aac
Lamentations1:12 “Meih mbuo yietc zungv jiex jauv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo maiv haiz fungc fai? Meih mbuo mangc maah! Ziouc buatc maaih haaix nyungc nzauh nyei sic ndongc yie zuqc nyei nzauh kouv? Se yiem Ziouv qiex jiez haic

Lamentations4:1 Jiem nyei njang zitc mi'aqv. Zien jiem yaac tuix setv. Zoux singx dinc nyei la'bieiv faatv nzaanx yiem diuh diuh jaai-horngc nyei jauv-kuv.
Lamentations4:2 Si^on jaaix haic nyei houh saeng ndongc zien jiem jaaix. Ih zanc funx ninh mbuo nyei jaax-zinh ndongc nanv nie-mor zaangc nyei buoz nanv nyei nie-mor.
Lamentations4:3 Liemh hieh juv bun nyorx ninh mbuo nyei dorn hopv
Lamentations4:4 Hopv nyorx nyei gu'nguaaz nyei mbietc nqaai

Lamentations4:14 Ninh mbuo hnangv m'zing maengh nyei mienh huaax jienv gan jaai-horngc mingh. Ninh mbuo zuqc nziaamv guoqv jienv maaih uix

Ezekiel22:27 Yiem deic-bung gu'nyuoz nyei bieiv zeiv hnangv hieh juv betv ga'naaiv nyanc. Ninh mbuo daix mienh bun nziaamv liouc cuotv
Ezekiel22:28 Deic-bung nyei douc waac mienh longc hui-baeqc nzaatv jienv weic buang baeqc fingx zoux nyei sic ziouc weic ninh mbuo buatc jaav hinc yaangh nyei sic yaac mbouv guaax gorngv benx gorngv-baeqc nyei waac. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Ezekiel22:29 Deic-bung nyei mienh niouv mienh

Ezekiel28:5 Meih kaux ganh guai haic nyei cong-mengh zoux saeng-eix duqv zinh zoih camv jienv faaux. Weic zuqc meih butv zoih meih nyei hnyouv ziouc zoux maux.”
Ezekiel28:6 Weic naaiv Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv
Ezekiel28:7 weic naaiv yie oix dorh ganh fingx mienh daaih mborqv meih. Yiem zuangx guoqv mbu'ndongx se ciouv jiex nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo oix baeng cuotv nzuqc ndaauv

Ezekiel34:19 Yie nyei ba'gi yungh oix zuqc nyanc meih mbuo caaiv njiec nyei miev yaac hopv meih mbuo nyei deih qouv njoqc nyei wuom se horpc nyei fai?
Ezekiel34:20 “+‘Weic naaiv Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo

Ezekiel40:3 Ninh dorh yie taux wuov
Ezekiel40:4 Wuov laanh mienh gorngv mbuox yie
Ezekiel40:5 Yie buatc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv huing nzuonx nyei dorngx maaih laatc weih gormx. Wuov laanh mienh nanv jienv ndorqc nyei biaav
Ezekiel40:6 Ninh aengx mingh taux huin dong bung wuov dauh laatc gaengh nyei jauv. Ninh faaux tei gu'nguaaic ndorqc gaengh bieqc nyei dorngx ndongc yietc diuh biaav-ndorqc ndo.
Ezekiel40:7 Aengx maaih diuh jauv bieqc gu'nyuoz. I bung jauv ga'hlen maaih buo qongx siouv gaeng mienh nyei dorngx. Mouz qongx ndaauv ndongc yietc diuh biaav-ndorqc
Ezekiel40:8 Ninh aengx ndorqc cuotv laatc gaengh bieqc gu'nyuoz wuov kang laatc wuov qongx
Ezekiel40:9 Laatc ndiouh hoz i ndorqc. Laatc gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx nyei gaengh huin mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv.
Ezekiel40:10 Yiem dong bung nyei laatc gaengh gu'nyuoz
Ezekiel40:11 Naaiv laanh mienh aengx ndorqc bieqc laatc nyei gaengh ndaangc
Ezekiel40:12 Yiem i bung jauv ga'hlen
Ezekiel40:13 Yiem yietc qongx nqa'haav maengx njongc gu'nguaaic taux doix-ngaanc wuov qongx nqa'haav maengx njongc gu'nguaaic jangv nyic ziepc hmz ndorqc
Ezekiel40:14 Ninh ndorqc gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx jangv nyic ziepc ndorqc. Yiem gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx ga'hlen maaih laatc weih gormx.
Ezekiel40:15 Yiem nza'hmien maengx wuov kang gaengh ndaangc ndorqc mingh taux wuov bung gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx maaih hmz ziepc ndorqc.
Ezekiel40:16 Bieqc laatc gaengh wuov diuh jauv maaih fong muonh weih gormx. Qongx-qongx nyei ndiouh maaih fong muonh. Fong muonh gu'nyuoz jangv
Ezekiel40:17 Ninh aengx dorh yie bieqc ga'nyiec wuov kang laatc nyei gu'nyuoz maengx. Yiem wuov nqenx jienv benx ziex qongx ziex qongx nyei
Ezekiel40:18 Naaiv deix dimc la'bieiv nyei ndau yaac yiem dauh dauh laatc gaengh nyei jauv i bung ga'hlen
Ezekiel40:19 Naaiv laanh mienh yiem aiv wuov dauh laatc gaengh gu'nyuoz maengx ndorqc mingh taux bieqc gu'nyuoz wuov kang laatc nyei gaengh ga'nyiec
Ezekiel40:20 Wuov laanh mienh aengx ndorqc ga'nyiec wuov kang laatc gu'nyuoz maengx
Ezekiel40:21 Bieqc gaengh ga'hlen
Ezekiel40:22 Fong muonh caux bieqc laatc gaengh wuov qongx caux diu daaih nyei daau-ndiangx caux huin dong bung gaengh nyei ciqv-cunx fih hnangv nyei. Maaih siec kang tei faaux gu'nguaaic taux bieqc gaengh nyei dorngx. Yaac maaih gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx.
Ezekiel40:23 Hnangv huin dong bung nyei gaengh
Ezekiel40:24 Wuov laanh mienh aengx dorh yie mingh taux naamh bung. Yiem naamh bung yaac maaih dauh gaengh. Ninh ziouc ndorqc ndiouh caux bieqc gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx. Naaiv dauh gaengh caux wuov deix gaengh nyei ciqv-cunx fih hnangv nyei.

Ezekiel40:27 Yiem gu'nyuoz wuov kang laatc nyei naamh bung maaih dauh gaengh. Ninh ziouc yiem naaiv dauh gaengh ndorqc taux huin naamh bung wuov dauh gaengh

Ezekiel40:29 Ga'hlen wuov deix siouv gaeng mienh nyei qongx caux wuov deix ndiouh caux gaengh gu'nyuoz maengx wuov qongx caux wuov deix ganh dauh laatc gaengh fih lomh nyei. Ezekiel40:31 Gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx huin mingh ga'nyiec wuov kang laatc. Ndiouh yaac diu jienv daau-ndiangx yaac maaih hietc kang tei faaux taux gaengh.

Ezekiel40:38 Yiem gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx nyei ndiouh ga'hlen maaih yietc qongx yaac maaih gaengh bieqc. Se nzaaux buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv nyei dorngx.
Ezekiel40:39 Laatc gaengh gu'nyuoz wuov qongx ga'hlen maaih biei norm dieh

Ezekiel40:47 Ninh aengx ndorqc laatc gu'nyuoz

Ezekiel41:1 Wuov laanh mienh aengx dorh yie bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv

Ezekiel41:3 Ninh aengx bieqc gu'nyuoz wuov qongx. Bieqc nyei jauv i bung ga'hlen nyei ndiouh jangv i ndorqc. Bieqc nyei jauv jangv juqv ndorqc. Jauv bieqc nyei i bung ga'hlen nyei njongc jangv siec ndorqc.

Ezekiel41:11 Capv cuotv ga'hlen wuov deix qongx-qongx nyei gaengh huin mingh dinh daaih zengc njiec nyei ndau. Maaih yietc dauh gaengh huin mingh baqv bung
Ezekiel41:12 Maaih norm biauv huin mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fai bung maengx wuov deix kungx-dorngx. Wuov norm biauv jangv cietv ziepc ndorqc

Ezekiel41:18 hnangv ke^lu^mbim caux daau-ndiangx nyei fangx. I dauh ke^lu^mbim mbu'ndongx maaih zungh daau-ndiangx. Dauh dauh ke^lu^mbim maaih i norm hmien.

Ezekiel45:7 “+‘+“Hungh diex nyei ndau oix zuqc yiem cing-nzengc nyei ndau caux liepc zingh nyei ndau i bung ga'hlen
Ezekiel45:8 Naaiv deix ndau yiem I^saa^laa^en mbu'ndongx paaiv benx hungh nyei buonc. Yiem naaiv mingh hungh diex maiv aengx zeix yie nyei baeqc fingx. Mv baac hungh oix bun ninh mbuo ziux ninh mbuo nyei fingx duqv ninh mbuo nyei ndau.”
Ezekiel45:9 “+‘Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv
Ezekiel45:10 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc longc nziang duqv horpc nyei tin-baengh dangv. Hlaau ga'naaiv oix zuqc hlaau horpc.
Ezekiel45:11 E^faa caux mbatc oix zuqc doix
Ezekiel45:12 Yietc se^kenx oix zuqc maaih nyic ziepc ge^laa. Biaa se^kenx oix zuqc za'gengh biaa se^kenx
Ezekiel45:13 “+‘+“Naaiv se meih mbuo oix zuqc fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv. Yietc ho^me mbiauh witv oix zuqc fongc horc yietc e^faa juqv gouv nyei yietc gouv. Yietc ho^me mbiauh mbaali oix zuqc fongc horc yietc e^faa juqv gouv nyei yietc gouv.
Ezekiel45:14 Meih mbuo fongc horc nyei ga'lanv youh
Ezekiel45:15 Yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei norm-norm nyiemz nyei miev-ciangv
Ezekiel45:16 “Ziangh norm deic-bung nyei baeqc fingx oix zuqc dorh naaiv deix ga'naaiv fongc horc bun I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh.
Ezekiel45:17 Hungh ganh nyei buonc se oix zuqc weic jiex nyei zipv
Ezekiel45:18 “+‘Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv
Ezekiel45:19 Sai mienh oix zuqc zorqv deix ziec weic fiqv zuiz nyei saeng-kuv nziaamv zaix zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gaengh zouc caux ziec-dorngh kuang bieqc wuov deix dorngx nyei biei norm gorqv
Ezekiel45:20 Naaiv norm hlaax saeng-cietv oix zuqc weic caqv-bouc fai maiv gorqc jaang baamz zuiz nyei haaix dauh mienh fiqv zuiz. Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv weic zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv fiqv zuiz.
Ezekiel45:21 “+‘+“Zih hlaax ziepc feix wuov hnoi oix zuqc jiex Siex Maengc Zipv. Siec hnoi gu'nyuoz oix zuqc nyanc maiv an bingv nyei njuov.
Ezekiel45:22 Dongh wuov hnoi hungh diex oix zuqc weic ganh yaac weic guoqv gu'nyuoz nyei zuangx baeqc fingx liuc leiz dauh ngongh gouv lunx zoux ziec fiqv zuiz nyei ga'naaiv.
Ezekiel45:23 Jiex zipv nyei siec hnoi gu'nyuoz
Ezekiel45:24 Ninh yaac oix zuqc liuc leiz fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc. Yietc dauh ngongh gouv oix zuqc maaih yietc tongv lengh Laangh ziqc caux jienv fongc horc. Yietc dauh yungh gouv yaac oix zuqc longc yietc tongv lengh laangh ziqc caux jienv fongc horc. Yietc tongv lengh laangh ziqc oix zuqc longc biei gorngc ga'lanv youh caux jienv.
Ezekiel45:25 “+‘+“Taux cietv hlaax ziepc hmz wuov hnoi
Ezekiel46:1 “+‘Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv
Ezekiel46:2 Hungh diex oix zuqc yiem ga'nyiec yangh wuov dauh gaengh bieqc daauh kang souv jienv gaengh zouc ga'hlen. Sai mienh ziouc weic ninh fongc horc buov ziec yaac ziec weic jiu tong. Ninh ziouc yiem wuov gaengh ndaangc baaix Tin-Hungh. Baaix liuz ziouc cuotv mi'aqv. Mv baac wuov dauh laatc gaengh maiv guon taux lungh hmuangx.
Ezekiel46:3 Mouz norm Dingh Gong Hnoi caux saeng-yietv hnoi
Ezekiel46:4 Dingh Gong Hnoi dongh hungh diex oix zuqc fongc horc buov ziec bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Ezekiel46:5 Yietc dauh ba'gi yungh gouv oix zuqc fongc horc yietc tongv mbuonv zoux doix. Ba'gi yungh dorn nor
Ezekiel46:6 Saeng-yietv wuov hnoi oix zuqc fongc horc dauh maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei ngongh gouv dorn
Ezekiel46:7 Fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc oix zuqc weic yietc dauh ngongh gouv fongc horc yietc tongv lengh laangh ziqc caux jienv. Fongc horc ba'gi yungh gouv yaac oix zuqc bun yietc tongv lengh. Weic ba'gi yungh dorn nor
Ezekiel46:8 Hungh diex bieqc nyei ziangh hoc ninh oix zuqc yangh laatc gu'nyuoz wuov qongx bieqc aengx yangh naaic cuotv.
Ezekiel46:9 “+‘+“Taux dingc daaih nyei zipv
Ezekiel46:10 Baeqc fingx bieqc nyei ziangh hoc hungh diex oix zuqc caux jienv bieqc. Baeqc fingx cuotv nyei ziangh hoc hungh diex yaac oix zuqc caux jienv cuotv.
Ezekiel46:11 “+‘+“Jiex zipv nyei hnoi caux dingc daaih nyei zipv fongc horc
Ezekiel46:12 Hungh diex haaix zanc cuotv fim fongc horc
Ezekiel46:13 “+‘+“Ninh oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi bun dauh maiv maaih dorngx nqemh
Ezekiel46:14 Ndorm-ndorm oix zuqc bun fongc horc ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux jienv. Oix zuqc bun buo morqv bienx laangh ziqc caux yietc gorngc lengh ga'lanv youh weic zorpc jienv wuov deix laangh ziqc
Ezekiel46:15 Hnangv naaic oix zuqc ndorm-ndorm mbenc dauh ba'gi yungh dorn caux ziec nyei laangh ziqc caux ga'lanv youh weic zanc-zanc zoux fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv.”
Ezekiel46:16 “+‘Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv
Ezekiel46:17 Mv baac se gorngv hungh diex zorqv deix ninh nzipc nyei buonc ndau zoux zingh nyeic bun dauh ninh nyei bou
Ezekiel46:18 Hungh diex maiv horpc zuqc nzaeng haaix dauh baeqc fingx nzipc nyei buonc aengx zunc ninh guangc jienv ndau biaux mingh. Ninh oix zuqc zorqv ninh ganh nzipc nyei buonc ndau bun ninh ganh nyei dorn nzipc. Hnangv naaic maiv maaih haaix dauh baeqc fingx zuqc zunc cuotv guangc jienv ninh nzipc nyei buonc ndau mingh.”+’+”
Ezekiel46:19 Nqa'haav wuov laanh mienh dorh yie yangh laatc gaengh ga'hlen bieqc gu'nyuoz nyei dorngx taux huin mingh baqv bung wuov mbaih biauv nyei cing-nzengc qongx
Ezekiel46:20 Wuov laanh mienh mbuox yie
Ezekiel46:21 Ninh aengx dorh yie cuotv taux ga'nyiec wuov kang laatc
Ezekiel46:22 Naaiv deix biei norm weih nyei dorngx gauh faix deix
Ezekiel46:23 Naaiv deix biei norm gorqv gu'nyuoz maengx weih gormx nyei dorngx longc la'bieiv gorqv daaih zoux nzox buov douz.
Ezekiel46:24 Wuov laanh mienh gorngv mbuox yie
Ezekiel47:1 Wuov laanh mienh aengx dorh yie nzuonx taux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gaengh ndaangc. Yie buatc gaengh ga'ndiev maaih wuom liouc cuotv mingh dong bung (weic zuqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv huin dong bung). Naaiv deix wuom yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei gaengh ndaangc ga'ndiev liouc cuotv naamh bung
Ezekiel47:2 Ninh aengx dorh yie cuotv baqv bung nyei gaengh
Ezekiel47:3 Wuov laanh mienh nanv jienv ndorqc nyei hlaang yangh dong bung mingh ndorqc yietc cin ndorqc. Ninh dorh yie yangh wuom mingh. Wuom mbaengc zaux-mueic hnangv.
Ezekiel47:4 Ninh aengx ndorqc yietc cin ndorqc yaac bun yie yangh wuom mingh. Wuom ndo taux cingh mborqc. Ninh aengx ndorqc yietc cin ndorqc yaac bun yie yangh wuom mingh. Wuom ziouc mbaengc jaaiv.
Ezekiel47:5 Ninh aengx ndorqc yietc cin ndorqc
Ezekiel47:6 Ninh gorngv mbuox yie
Ezekiel47:7 Nzuonx nyei ziangh hoc yie buatc i bung ndoqv-hlen
Ezekiel47:8 Ninh gorngv mbuox yie
Ezekiel47:9 Naaiv diuh ndoqv liouc mingh taux haaix
Ezekiel47:10 Maaih borngz mbiauz mienh souv wuov koiv-hlen. Yiem En Ge^ndi mingh taux En Ekc^laa^im ziouc maaih pui mungz nyei dorngx. Maaih ziex! ziex nyungc mbiauz
Ezekiel47:11 Mv baac wuom-njaangh caux ndorngh nyei dorngx maiv haih zaamv. Oix zuqc guangc jienv wuov benx nzauv.

Ezekiel47:13 Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv
Ezekiel47:14 Oix zuqc bun fih mbuoqc nyei. Yie houv jienv zorqv naaiv deix ndau bun meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix. Naaiv deix ndau ziouc benx meih mbuo nzipc nyei buonc.
Ezekiel47:15 “Naaiv se deic-bung nyei gapv-jaaix. “Baqv bung nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Domh Koiv mingh Hetv^lon Zingh nyei jauv jiex Haamatv nyei jauv-kuv aengx jiex mingh taux Se^ndatc
Ezekiel47:16 Mbe^lo^taa
Ezekiel47:17 Hnangv naaic baqv bung nyei gapv-jaaix yiem koiv mingh taux Haasaa Enon
Ezekiel47:18 “Dong bung nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Haulaan caux Ndaa^matv^gatc
Ezekiel47:19 “Naamh bung nyei gapv-jaaix yiem Taamaa mingh taux Me^li^mbatc Kaa^ndetc nyei wuom
Ezekiel47:20 “Fai bung maaih Domh Koiv zoux gapv-jaaix mingh taux bieqc Haamatv nyei jauv doix-ngaanc nyei dorngx. Naaiv se fai bung nyei gapv-jaaix.
Ezekiel47:21 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc ziux I^saa^laa^en nyei fingx paaiv naaiv deix ndau.
Ezekiel47:22 Naaiv deix ndau oix zuqc paaiv bun nqoi benx meih mbuo ganh nzipc nyei buonc caux yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei ganh fingx mienh
Ezekiel47:23 Ganh fingx mienh yiem meih mbuo haaix fingx mienh mbu'ndongx
Ezekiel48:1 “Yiem naaiv mingh se fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei mbuox. Yiem baqv bung maengx jiez gorn yiem koiv gan Hetv^lon wuov diuh jauv mingh taux Haamatv nyei jauv-kuv aengx mingh taux Haasaa Enon

Ezekiel48:15 “Zengc njiec nyei ndau jangv biaa cin ndorqc

Ezekiel48:20 Meih mbuo ganh ca'lengc zorqv cuotv nyei cing-nzengc ndau
Ezekiel48:21 “Cing-nzengc nyei ndau caux zingh nyei ndau i bung ga'hlen zengc njiec nyei ndau oix zuqc benx hungh diex nyei. Yiem wuov deix i waanc biaa cin ndorqc nyei ga'hlen mingh taux dong bung nyei gapv-jaaix
Ezekiel48:22 Lewi Mienh nyei ndau caux zingh nyei ndau oix zuqc yiem hungh diex nyei buonc mbu'ndongx. Yiem Yu^ndaa Fingx nyei gapv-jaaix caux Mben^yaa^min Fingx nyei gapv-jaaix mbu'ndongx benx hungh diex nyei buonc.
Ezekiel48:23 “Zengc njiec nyei fingx

Ezekiel48:26 “Nitv jienv Itc^saax^kaa Fingx nyei gapv-jaaix
Ezekiel48:27 “Nitv jienv Se^mbu^lun Fingx nyei gapv-jaaix
Ezekiel48:28 “Gaatc Fingx nyei naamh bung gapv-jaaix yiem Taamaa mingh taux Me^li^mbatc Kaa^ndetc nyei wuom
Ezekiel48:29 “Naaiv deix ndau se meih mbuo oix zuqc paaiv bun nqoi fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. Naaiv ziouc benx ninh mbuo duqv nyei buonc ndau.” Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv.
Ezekiel48:30 “Yiem naaiv mingh gorngv cuotv zingh nyei laatc gaengh. Zingh nyei baqv bung biei cin hmz baeqv ndorqc.

Ezekiel48:32 “Dong bung biei cin hmz baeqv ndorqc. Maaih buo dauh laatc gaengh. Maaih Yosepv nyei laatc gaengh

Ezekiel48:35 “Ndorqc huing gormx zingh maaih yietc waanc hietc cin ndorqc. “Yiem naaiv mingh naaiv norm zingh nyei mbuox heuc
Daniel1:1 Yiem Ye^ho^yaa^kim zoux Yu^ndaa nyei hungh da'faam hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Daniel1:2 Ziouv zorqv Yu^ndaa nyei hungh
Daniel1:3 Hungh diex ziouc heuc yiem hungh dinc zoux hlo jiex nyei domh jien
Daniel1:4 Naaiv deix mienh lunx mienh nyei sin zaangc oix zuqc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh yaac nzueic nyei. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc maaih banh zeic hoqc nyungc-nyungc
Daniel1:5 Hungh diex yaac paaiv ziangx bun ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi duqv buonc hungh diex nyanc gauh longx jiex nyei ga'naaiv caux ninh hopv nyei a'ngunc diuv. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc hoqc buangv buo hnyangx
Daniel1:6 Yiem naaiv deix mienh mbu'ndongx maaih Yu^ndaa Fingx
Daniel1:7 Wuov dauh hlo jiex nyei domh jien cuotv siang-mbuox bun ninh mbuo. Ndaa^ni^en ninh heuc Mben^te^satv^saa
Daniel1:8 Mv baac Ndaa^ni^en dingc hnyouv maiv nyanc hungh diex gauh longx jiex nyei ga'naaiv yaac maiv hopv hungh diex nyei a'ngunc diuv bun ganh maaih uix. Ninh ziouc tov wuov dauh domh jien nqoi nzuih bun ninh maiv zoux bun ganh maaih uix.
Daniel1:9 Tin-Hungh ziouc bun domh jien horpc hnyouv Ndaa^ni^en yaac korv-lienh ninh.
Daniel1:10 Domh jien gorngv mbuox Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel1:11 Ndaa^ni^en ziouc gorngv mbuox domh jien paaiv daaih gunv Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel1:12 “Tov seix yie mbuo
Daniel1:13 Nqa'haav beiv mangc yie mbuo nyei hmien-mueic caux nyanc hungh diex ginv daaih kuv nyei wuov deix mienh lunx mienh nyei hmien
Daniel1:14 Gunv ninh mbuo wuov dauh jien ziouc laengz nzuih hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Daniel1:15 Jiex liuz ziepc hnoi buatc ninh mbuo nyei hmien-mueic gauh wangc siangx
Daniel1:16 Gunv ninh mbuo wuov dauh jien ziouc siou nqoi hungh diex paaiv bun ninh mbuo nyei nyanc hopv caux a'ngunc diuv aengx bun lai ninh mbuo nyanc.
Daniel1:17 Tin-Hungh bun naaiv deix biei laanh mienh lunx mienh maaih wuonh zaang guai haic
Daniel1:18 Taux hungh diex dingc ziangx dorh naaiv deix mienh lunx mienh bieqc daaih buangh ninh nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Daniel1:19 Hungh diex caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac
Daniel1:20 Maiv gunv hungh diex naaic taux haaix nyungc wuonh zaang caux cong-mengh nyei jauv
Daniel1:21 Ndaa^ni^en yiem wuov zoux jienv mingh taux Sailatv zoux hungh gunv Mbaa^mbi^lon daauh hnyangx.
Daniel2:1 Yiem Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa zoux hungh gunv da'nyeic hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Daniel2:2 Hungh diex ziouc paaiv mienh mingh heuc yietc zungv zoux huaax-nyinz
Daniel2:3 hungh diex mbuox ninh mbuo
Daniel2:4 Samx hleix nyei mienh ziouc longc Aalam waac dau hungh diex
Daniel2:5 Hungh diex dau naaiv deix samx hleix mienh
Daniel2:6 Se gorngv meih mbuo haih gorngv yie nyei mbeix aengx porv mbeix nyei eix leiz mbuox yie
Daniel2:7 Wuov deix mienh aengx gorngv da'nyeic nzunc
Daniel2:8 Hungh diex ziouc dau
Daniel2:9 Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv gorngv mbeix mbuox yie
Daniel2:10 Samx hleix nyei mienh dau hungh diex
Daniel2:11 Hungh diex naaic nyei waac se ba'laqc aqc haic. Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih dau cuotv liuz zienh. Zienh yaac maiv yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx.”
Daniel2:12 Weic naaiv hungh diex qiex jiez! haic. Qiex biuih cuotv ziouc hatc gorngv oix zuqc daix nzengc yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei yietc zungv guai-qaauv mienh.
Daniel2:13 Hnangv naaic ziouc maaih hungh njiec nyei lingc cuotv mingh oix daix yietc zungv guai-qaauv mienh. Mienh ziouc mingh lorz Ndaa^ni^en caux ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic
Daniel2:14 Hungh diex nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei bieiv zeiv
Daniel2:15 Ndaa^ni^en naaic gaax hungh nyei sin-hlen mienh nyei bieiv
Daniel2:16 Ndaa^ni^en ziouc bieqc mingh yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien tov bun deix ziangh hoc ninh
Daniel2:17 Ndaa^ni^en ziouc nzuonx ninh nyei biauv zorqv naaiv deix sic gorngv mbuox ninh nyei doic Haa^nan^yaa
Daniel2:18 Ninh mbuox ninh mbuo tov lungh zaangc nyei Tin-Hungh korv-lienh ninh mbuo aengx porv mengh naaiv deix maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic weic bun Ndaa^ni^en caux ninh nyei doic caux yiem Mbaa^mbi^lon zengc njiec nyei guai-qaauv mienh maiv zuqc daic.
Daniel2:19 Wuov muonz buatc laauc yaangh nyei sic porv mengh bun Ndaa^ni^en hiuv duqv naaiv deix maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic. Ndaa^ni^en ziouc ceng lungh zaangc nyei Tin-Hungh.
Daniel2:20 Ninh gorngv
Daniel2:21 Ninh goiv yienc ziangh hoc caux gueix
Daniel2:22 Ninh laauc yaangh ndo haic caux gem jienv nyei sic. Ninh hiuv duqv yiem hmuangx zong nyei sic
Daniel2:23 O yie nyei ong-taaix nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Daniel2:24 Ndaa^ni^en ziouc bieqc mingh lorz Aa^li^okc
Daniel2:25 Aa^li^okc siepv-siepv nyei dorh Ndaa^ni^en mingh gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Daniel2:26 Hungh diex naaic gaax Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel2:27 Ndaa^ni^en dau hungh diex
Daniel2:28 Mv baac yiem lungh zaangc maaih dauh Tin-Hungh haih laauc yaangh gem jienv nyei sic. Ninh zungv biux mengh bun Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh hiuv duqv nqa'haav setv mueiz nyei hnoi oix hnangv haaix nor. Meih bueix jienv coux mbeix nyei mbeix caux yiem hnyouv buatc laauc yaangh nyei sic se hnangv naaiv.
Daniel2:29 “O hungh diex aac
Daniel2:30 Yie aeqv
Daniel2:31 “O hungh diex aac
Daniel2:32 Naaiv dauh ga'naaiv nyei m'nqorngv se longc zien jiem zoux daaih. La'kuotv caux buoz longc nyaanh zoux. Ga'sie caux camh zuih longc dongh siqv.
Daniel2:33 Zaux longc hlieqv. Zaux-benv longc hlieqv zorpc jienv ba'naih nie.
Daniel2:34 Meih mangc jienv wuov zanc
Daniel2:35 Hlieqv caux ba'naih nie
Daniel2:36 “Naaiv se hungh diex nyei mbeix. Ih zanc yie mbuo oix porv mbeix mbuox hungh diex.
Daniel2:37 O hungh diex aac
Daniel2:38 Ninh zorqv maanc mienh caux lomc-huaang nyei hieh zoih caux ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc jiu bun yiem meih nyei buoz-ndiev. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo yiem haaix
Daniel2:39 “Meih jiex mingh aengx maaih norm guoqv faaux daaih mv baac maiv ndongc meih nyei. Aengx maaih da'faam norm guoqv
Daniel2:40 Nqa'haav maaih da'feix norm guoqv hnangv hlieqv nor henv
Daniel2:41 Hnangv meih buatc wuov norm ga'naaiv nyei zaux-benv caux zaux-ndoqv maaih yietc buonc ba'naih nie
Daniel2:42 Yaac hnangv zaux-ndoqv benx yietc buonc hlieqv
Daniel2:43 Hnangv meih buatc wuov deix hlieqv zorpc ba'naih nie
Daniel2:44 “Wuov deix hungh diex gunv nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel2:45 Naaiv se hnangv hungh diex buatc wuov norm la'bieiv
Daniel2:46 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau baaix Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel2:47 Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel2:48 Hungh diex aengx taaih Ndaa^ni^en faaux hlang
Daniel2:49 Ndaa^ni^en yaac tov hungh diex
Daniel3:1 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh zoux norm jiem-fangx hlang luoqc ziepc ndorqc
Daniel3:2 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh paaiv mienh mingh heuc yietc zungv zoux hlo nyei mienh daaih
Daniel3:3 Zungx
Daniel3:4 Wuov zanc zunh waac nyei jien zunh waac gorngv mbui nyei
Daniel3:5 Meih mbuo yietv haiz biomv jorng biomv nzatc nyei qiex
Daniel3:6 Haaix dauh maiv mbaapv njiec baaix ziouc liemh zeih zuqc zoi bieqc buov jienv douz nyei domh! nzox.”
Daniel3:7 Weic naaiv
Daniel3:8 Wuov zanc maaih deix samx hleix nyei mienh bieqc daaih gox Yiutai Mienh.
Daniel3:9 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh
Daniel3:10 O hungh diex aah! Meih njiec lingc gorngv
Daniel3:11 Da'faanh haaix dauh maiv mbaapv njiec baaix ziouc zuqc zoi bieqc buov jienv douz nyei domh nzox gu'nyuoz.
Daniel3:12 Mv baac maaih deix Yiutai Mienh
Daniel3:13 Hungh diex muangx haiz
Daniel3:14 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa naaic ninh mbuo
Daniel3:15 Ih zanc
Daniel3:16 Satv^lakv
Daniel3:17 Se gorngv yie mbuo zuqc zoi bieqc buov jienv douz nyei domh nzox gu'nyuoz
Daniel3:18 O hungh diex aac
Daniel3:19 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh gauh fatv qiex jiez
Daniel3:20 Ninh heuc jun-baeng gu'nyuoz nyei ziex dauh henv jiex nyei baeng zorqv Satv^lakv
Daniel3:21 Baeng ziouc zorqv naaiv deix buo laanh mienh
Daniel3:22 Weic zuqc hungh diex hatc duqv beqv haic
Daniel3:23 Naaiv deix buo laanh mienh
Daniel3:24 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh liemh zeih nquaqv sin daaih mbuoqc horngh haic
Daniel3:25 Hungh diex gorngv
Daniel3:26 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa ziouc mingh nitv fatv buov jienv douz hiaangx nyei nzox-kuotv ndaangc heuc
Daniel3:27 Zungx
Daniel3:28 Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh ziouc gorngv
Daniel3:29 Ih zanc yie njiec lingc
Daniel3:30 Wuov zanc hungh diex orn Satv^lakv
Daniel4:1 Yie
Daniel4:2 Yie a'hneiv gorngv Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh weic yie zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic zunh mbuox meih mbuo.
Daniel4:3 Ninh nyei jangx-hoc ndongc haaix hlo
Daniel4:4 Yie
Daniel4:5 Yie mbeix norm mbeix bun yie gamh nziex. Yie bueix jienv yie nyei coux wuov zanc
Daniel4:6 Yie ziouc heuc Mbaa^mbi^lon Saengv nyei yietc zungv guai-qaauv mienh daaih yie naaiv weic tengx yie porv mbeix.
Daniel4:7 Zoux huaax-nyinz
Daniel4:8 Nqa'haav laai Ndaa^ni^en daaih yiem yie nyei nza'hmien
Daniel4:9 “O huaax-nyinz mienh nyei bieiv
Daniel4:10 Yie bueix jienv coux buatc naaiv deix laauc yaangh nyei sic. Yie buatc yiem baamh gen mbu'ndongx maaih diuh domh! ndiangx hlo haic
Daniel4:11 Naaiv diuh ndiangx gunv zoux gunv hlang
Daniel4:12 Ndiangx nyei normh nzueic nyei
Daniel4:13 “Yie bueix jienv coux buatc naaiv deix laauc yaangh nyei sic
Daniel4:14 Ninh heuc mbui nyei gorngv
Daniel4:15 Mv baac bun ndiangx-gorn caux nzungh corc ziangh jienv ndau
Daniel4:16 Bun ninh nyei hnyouv goiv yienc
Daniel4:17 “+‘Naaiv deix siemv nyei waac se siouv gaeng nyei cing-nzengc fin-mienh dingc nyei waac. Cing-nzengc fin-mienh gorngv naaiv deix dingc daaih nyei waac weic bun lungh ndiev mienh hiuv duqv Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh gunv baamh mienh nyei guoqv
Daniel4:18 “Naaiv se yie
Daniel4:19 Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel4:20 Meih buatc wuov diuh ndiangx
Daniel4:21 normh yaac nzueic
Daniel4:22 O hungh diex aah! Meih se wuov diuh ndiangx aqv. Meih hlo yaac henv
Daniel4:23 “O hungh diex aac
Daniel4:24 “O hungh diex aac
Daniel4:25 Meih zungv oix zuqc yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx zuqc zunc cuotv mingh caux hieh zoih yiem. Meih oix zuqc hnangv ngongh nor
Daniel4:26 Fin-mienh gorngv oix zuqc liouh ndiangx-gorn caux nzungh ziangh jienv ndau nyei eix leiz se
Daniel4:27 O hungh diex aah! Tov muangx yie kuinx nyei waac. Tov guangc meih nyei zuiz aengx zoux duqv horpc. Guangc zoux waaic nyei sic
Daniel4:28 naaiv deix yietc zungv sic cuotv daaih zuqc Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa Hungh.
Daniel4:29 Jiex liuz ziepc nyeic hlaax nyieqc
Daniel4:30 hungh diex gorngv
Daniel4:31 Naaiv deix waac corc yiem hungh diex nyei nzuih gorngv maiv gaengh setv
Daniel4:32 Meih zungv zuqc zunc cuotv
Daniel4:33 Gorngv Ne^mbu^katv^netv^saa naaiv deix waac jang-jang gorngv baac hnangv
Daniel4:34 Wuov deix ziangh hoc jiex liuz
Daniel4:35 Lungh ndiev maanc mienh ninh maiv funx maaih jaax-zinh. Yiem lungh maaih qaqv nyei ga'naaiv caux yiem lungh ndiev nyei baamh mienh mbu'ndongx
Daniel4:36 Yie nzang daaih wuov zanc
Daniel4:37 Ih zanc yie
Daniel5:1 Mben^satv^saa Hungh mbenc donx nyanc hopv hlo! nyei
Daniel5:2 Mben^satv^saa hopv diuv nyei ziangh hoc ninh paaiv mienh mingh zorqv dongh ninh nyei die
Daniel5:3 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei singx dinc
Daniel5:4 Ninh mbuo yietc binc hopv diuv
Daniel5:5 Liemh zeih maaih baamh mienh nyei buoz-ndoqv hinc cuotv yiem hungh dinc gu'nyuoz
Daniel5:6 ninh nyei hmien mbienc nzengc mi'aqv. Gamh nziex haic
Daniel5:7 Hungh diex heuc zoux faatv nyei mienh
Daniel5:8 Hungh diex nyei yietc zungv guai-qaauv mienh ziouc bieqc daaih mv baac ninh mbuo maiv haih doqc naaiv deix nzaangc yaac maiv haih porv eix leiz.
Daniel5:9 Mben^satv^saa Hungh gauh fatv gamh nziex
Daniel5:10 Hungh maac haiz hungh diex caux ninh zoux hlo nyei mienh gorngv waac nyei qiex
Daniel5:11 Yiem meih nyei guoqv maaih dauh mienh maaih singx zienh bun daaih nyei cong-mengh yiem ninh nyei hnyouv. Yiem meih nyei die nyei seix zeiv naaiv dauh mienh maaih hnyouv-zoih longx
Daniel5:12 Naaiv dauh mienh
Daniel5:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh Ndaa^ni^en daaih yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien. Hungh diex naaic Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel5:14 Yie haiz gorngv meih maaih singx zienh bun daaih nyei cong-mengh yiem meih gu'nyuoz. Meih maaih hnyouv-zoih longx
Daniel5:15 Ih zanc mienh dorh guai-qaauv mienh caux zoux faatv nyei mienh daaih doqc naaiv deix nzaangc aengx porv eix leiz bun yie
Daniel5:16 Yie haiz gorngv meih haih porv mengh yaac haih jaiv kuonx hnyouv nyei sic. Se gorngv meih haih doqc naaiv deix nzaangc aengx porv nzaangc nyei eix leiz
Daniel5:17 Ndaa^ni^en ziouc dau hungh diex
Daniel5:18 “O hungh diex aah! Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh ceix hlo haic nyei guoqv bun meih nyei die
Daniel5:19 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh bun ninh zoux hlo
Daniel5:20 Mv baac ninh nyei hnyouv maux jienv faaux
Daniel5:21 Ninh yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx zuqc zunc cuotv. Ninh nyei hnyouv yaac hnangv hieh zoih nyei hnyouv. Ninh caux hieh lorh yiem
Daniel5:22 “O Mben^satv^saa aac
Daniel5:23 Daaux nzuonx
Daniel5:24 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh bun jieqv buoz hinc cuotv daaih fiev naaiv deix nzaangc.
Daniel5:25 “Naaiv deix nzaangc hnangv naaiv nor fiev. Mene
Daniel5:26 “Naaiv deix waac nyei eix leiz se hnangv naaiv. Mene se Tin-Hungh saauv meih nyei guoqv nyei hnyangx-daauh buangv ziouc taux setv mueiz aqv.
Daniel5:27 Teken se meih zuqc yiem tin-baengh nziangx nziang
Daniel5:28 Baasin se meih nyei guoqv bun nqoi benx Mi^ndie Mienh caux Besie Mienh nyei.”
Daniel5:29 Mben^satv^saa ziouc paaiv waac. Mienh zorqv lui-ndaauv-luoqc bun Ndaa^ni^en zuqv jienv
Daniel5:30 Dongh wuov muonz Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh
Daniel5:31 Mi^ndie Mienh nyei hungh
Daniel6:1 Ndaa^li^atc Hungh dingc hnyouv liepc yietc baeqv nyic ziepc dauh zungx gunv gormx ninh nyei guoqv.
Daniel6:2 Ninh aengx liepc buo dauh zoux gunv sic jien gunv naaiv deix yietc baeqv nyic ziepc dauh. Ndaa^ni^en se naaiv deix buo dauh nyei yietc dauh. Zungx oix zuqc caux naaiv deix buo dauh tong fienx weic bun hungh diex maiv caa haaix nyungc.
Daniel6:3 Beiv mangc wuov deix gunv sic jien caux zungx
Daniel6:4 Hnangv naaiv nor
Daniel6:5 Naaiv deix mienh ziouc gorngv
Daniel6:6 Wuov deix gunv sic jien caux zungx ziouc gapv zunv daaih lorz hungh diex. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Daniel6:7 O hungh diex aac
Daniel6:8 O hungh diex aac
Daniel6:9 Ndaa^li^atc Hungh ziouc liepc diuh lingc aengx njiec jienv mbuox.
Daniel6:10 Ndaa^ni^en hiuv duqv hungh diex njiec mbuox naaiv diuh lingc
Daniel6:11 Naaiv deix mienh ziouc lomh nzoih mingh wuov
Daniel6:12 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh gox hungh diex gorngv taux ninh njiec nyei lingc. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Daniel6:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv mbuox hungh diex
Daniel6:14 Hungh diex haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ninh nzauh aqv
Daniel6:15 Nqa'haav wuov guanh mienh ziouc lomh nzoih daaih lorz hungh diex yaac gorngv mbuox ninh
Daniel6:16 Hungh diex ziouc paaiv mienh. Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh Ndaa^ni^en daaih zoi bieqc sienh nyei kuotv. Hungh diex gorngv mbuox Ndaa^ni^en
Daniel6:17 Maaih mienh zorqv norm la'bieiv mbaeqc jienv kuotv-nzuih. Hungh diex mborqv jienv ninh ganh nyei buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng nyei yienx caux ninh zoux hlo nyei mienh nyei buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng yienx weic maiv bun Ndaa^ni^en nyei sic haih goiv yienc.
Daniel6:18 Hungh diex ziouc nzuonx hungh dinc ziangh muonz maiv nyanc ga'naaiv yaac maiv longc haaix dauh dorh haaix nyungc zoux nauc nyitc nyei jauv. Ninh yaac bueix maiv njormh.
Daniel6:19 Lungh yietv njang
Daniel6:20 Hungh diex mingh fatv deix sienh nyei kuotv
Daniel6:21 Ndaa^ni^en dau
Daniel6:22 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh nyei fin-mienh daaih bun sienh nyei nzuih baengx nqapc jienv. Sienh maiv hoic yie weic zuqc ziux Tin-Hungh mangc yie maiv dorngc haaix nyungc. O hungh diex aah! Yie yaac yiem meih nyei nza'hmien maiv zoux dorngc haaix nyungc.”
Daniel6:23 Hungh diex za'gengh a'hneiv haic ziouc paaiv mienh zorqv Ndaa^ni^en yiem kuotv cuotv daaih. Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv ninh cuotv daaih. Buatc ninh nyei sin zaangc maiv maaih yietc norm dorngx mun weic zuqc ninh sienx kaux ninh nyei Tin-Hungh.
Daniel6:24 Hungh diex ziouc hatc mienh zorqv gox Ndaa^ni^en wuov deix mienh
Daniel6:25 Nqa'haav Ndaa^li^atc Hungh fungx fienx tong lungh ndiev maanc guoqv
Daniel6:26 “Yie njiec lingc gorngv
Daniel6:27 Ninh tengx mienh biaux ndutv yaac njoux mienh. Yiem lungh yiem ndau
Daniel6:28 Hnangv naaiv
Daniel7:1 Mben^satv^saa zoux Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei hungh daauh hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Daniel7:2 Ndaa^ni^en gorngv “Yie lungh muonz zanc buatc laauc yaangh nyei sic
Daniel7:3 Maaih biei dauh domh hieh ga'naaiv yiem koiv cuotv daaih
Daniel7:4 “Da'yietv dauh hnangv sienh nor
Daniel7:5 “Aengx maaih dauh
Daniel7:6 “Nqa'haav yie mangc
Daniel7:7 “Jiex daaih
Daniel7:8 “Yie mangc jienv aengx hnamv taux naaiv deix jorng nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel7:9 “Yie mangc jienv wuov zanc
Daniel7:10 Yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien maaih douz njopc cuotv
Daniel7:11 “Wuov zanc yie mangc jienv weic zuqc wuov norm jorng-faix bungx waac-maux. Mangc jienv wuov zanc wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv zuqc daix daic
Daniel7:12 Zengc njiec wuov deix hieh ga'naaiv
Daniel7:13 “Yiem lungh muonz zanc mangc jienv wuov deix hinc yaangh nyei sic wuov zanc
Daniel7:14 Ninh duqv zipv lingc gunv yaac duqv njang-laangc caux hungh lingc weic bun maanc guoqv
Daniel7:15 “Mv baac yie
Daniel7:16 Yie ziouc mingh nitv fatv souv jienv wuov nyei yietc dauh aengx naaic ninh naaiv deix yietc zungv sic nyei zien eix leiz. “Ninh ziouc porv mengh bun yie hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic nyei eix leiz.
Daniel7:17 ‘Naaiv deix biei dauh domh hieh ga'naaiv se yiem ndau-beih cuotv daaih nyei biei norm guoqv.
Daniel7:18 Mv baac Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx oix duqv guoqv
Daniel7:19 “Wuov zanc yie oix gauh hiuv duqv cing da'feix dauh hieh ga'naaiv nyei eix leiz
Daniel7:20 Yie yaac oix hiuv duqv taux yiem ninh nyei m'nqorngv wuov deix ziepc norm jorng caux nqa'haav cuotv daaih wuov norm
Daniel7:21 Yie mangc jienv wuov zanc ninh caux Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx mborqv jaax yaac mborqv hingh
Daniel7:22 zuov Yietc Liuz Ziangh Wuov Dauh daaih taux. Ninh siemv dingc bun Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx duqv hingh
Daniel7:23 “Ninh ziouc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Daniel7:24 Wuov deix ziepc norm jorng se oix yiem naaiv norm guoqv cuotv daaih. Nqa'haav aengx maaih dauh hungh cuotv daaih caux cuotv ndaangc wuov deix hungh maiv fih hnangv. Ninh yaac zoux bun buo dauh hungh suei.
Daniel7:25 Ninh oix gorngv ki Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh
Daniel7:26 “+‘Mv baac siemv zuiz jien oix zueiz jienv weic. Wuov dauh hungh nyei lingc ziouc zuqc zorqv mingh
Daniel7:27 Wuov zanc lungh ndiev nyei yietc zungv guoqv nyei domh lingc caux qaqv ziouc jiu bun cing-nzengc baeqc fingx
Daniel7:28 “Naaiv deix sic nzengc mi'aqv. Yie
Daniel8:1 Mben^satv^saa zoux hungh da'faam hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Daniel8:2 Yiem naaiv deix hinc yaangh nyei jauv buatc yie ganh yiem Elaam Saengv
Daniel8:3 Yie cau hmien mangc
Daniel8:4 Yie buatc wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv ceux mingh fai bung
Daniel8:5 Yie yiem hnyouv hnamv taux naaiv deix jauv nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel8:6 Ninh hungx jienv zinh ndaangc yie buatc souv jienv ndaaih hlen maaih i norm jorng wuov dauh ba'gi yungh gouv
Daniel8:7 Yie buatc ninh daaih nitv ba'gi yungh gouv
Daniel8:8 Naaiv dauh yungh gouv zoux hlo jienv faaux
Daniel8:9 Naaiv deix biei norm jorng nyei yietc norm aengx cuotv norm jorng-dorn. Naaiv norm jorng za'gengh zoux hlo
Daniel8:10 Naaiv norm jorng hlo jienv faaux
Daniel8:11 Ninh taaih ninh ganh zoux hlo
Daniel8:12 Laaix zuiz nyei gorn
Daniel8:13 Nqa'haav yie haiz dauh cing-nzengc nyei fin-mienh gorngv waac. Aengx maaih ganh dauh cing-nzengc nyei fin-mienh daaih naaic gorngv waac wuov dauh
Daniel8:14 Ninh gorngv mbuox yie
Daniel8:15 Yie
Daniel8:16 Yie yaac haiz dauh mienh nyei qiex yiem Ulai Ndaaih i bung mbu'ndongx
Daniel8:17 Gaa^mbe^lien ziouc daaih nitv jienv yie souv nyei dorngx. Ninh yietv daaih
Daniel8:18 Ninh caux yie gorngv waac nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel8:19 Ninh gorngv
Daniel8:20 Dongh meih buatc cuotv i norm jorng nyei ba'gi yungh gouv
Daniel8:21 Wuov dauh yungh gouv se Gikc Guoqv nyei hungh. I norm m'zing mbu'ndongx nyei domh jorng se wuov norm guoqv nyei daauh dauh hungh diex.
Daniel8:22 Nauv mingh wuov norm jorng nqa'haav aengx cuotv biei norm jorng
Daniel8:23 “Naaiv deix guoqv nyei setv mueiz hnoi aav lamh taux
Daniel8:24 Ninh nyei qaqv oix henv jienv faaux mv baac maiv zeiz laaix kaux ganh nyei qaqv. Ninh yaac oix zoux cuotv baaic waaic nyei jauv gamh nziex haic. Ninh oix zoux nyei sic ninh zoux duqv cuotv nyei. Ninh oix mietc nzengc maaih qaqv nyei mienh caux Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx.
Daniel8:25 Ninh oix longc guv guaix nyei za'eix bun nduov mienh nyei sic camv jienv faaux. Yiem ganh nyei hnyouv ninh yaac ceng ganh hlo. Ninh oix mietc mienh camv yaac maiv jaa-ndaangc mbuox. Ninh zungv oix mborqv maanc hungh dorn nyei Hungh Dorn. Mv baac ninh oix zuqc mietc yaac maiv zeiz baamh mienh zoux.
Daniel8:26 “Buatc lungh ndorm caux lungh maanz-hmuangx hinc yaangh nyei sic se zien nyei. Mv baac oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix hinc yaangh nyei sic gem jienv weic zuqc corc maaih hnoi-nyieqc camv nyei cingx daaih cuotv.”
Daniel8:27 Yie
Daniel9:1 Cuotv seix benx Mi^ndie Mienh
Daniel9:2 se ninh zueiz weic gunv da'yietv hnyangx
Daniel9:3 Yie ziouc huin mingh lorz Ziouv Tin-Hungh. Yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc
Daniel9:4 Yie daux gaux nyiemc zuiz bun Ziouv
Daniel9:5 Yie mbuo baamz zuiz zoux dorngc sic
Daniel9:6 Yie mbuo maiv muangx meih nyei bou
Daniel9:7 “O Ziouv aac
Daniel9:8 O Ziouv aac
Daniel9:9 Maiv gunv yie mbuo ngaengc Ziouv
Daniel9:10 Yie mbuo maiv muangx Ziouv
Daniel9:11 I^saa^laa^en nyei zuangx mienh baamz meih nyei leiz-latc
Daniel9:12 Meih ei jienv meih gorngv nyei waac zoux
Daniel9:13 Hnangv fiev jienv Mose nyei Leiz-Latc nor
Daniel9:14 Ziouv liuc leiz ziangx yaac bun yie mbuo zuqc naaiv deix zeqc naanc
Daniel9:15 “O Ziouv
Daniel9:16 O Ziouv aac
Daniel9:17 “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Daniel9:18 O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac
Daniel9:19 O Ziouv aac
Daniel9:20 Yie daux gaux jienv mingh
Daniel9:21 Corc daux gaux jienv wuov zanc
Daniel9:22 Gaa^mbe^lien gorngv mengh mbuox yie
Daniel9:23 Meih jiez gorn daux gaux jouh wuov zanc Tin-Hungh ziouc dau meih. Yie daaih mbuox meih weic zuqc ninh hnamv meih camv nyei. Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc longx-longx nyei hnamv aengx bieqc hnyouv naaiv deix hinc yaangh nyei sic.
Daniel9:24 “Tin-Hungh dingc weic meih nyei baeqc fingx caux meih nyei cing-nzengc zingh maaih cietv ziepc norm leiz-baaix oix zoux bun baamz zuiz nyei jauv dangx nzengc
Daniel9:25 “Weic naaiv oix zuqc hiuv duqv
Daniel9:26 Jiex liuz luoqc ziepc nyeic norm leiz-baaix
Daniel9:27 Ninh caux mienh camv liepc jiez yietc norm leiz-baaix nyei ngaengc waac. Mv baac jiex liuz ndaamv-norm leiz-baaix ninh oix bun fongc horc caux buov ziec nyei jauv-louc dingh. zoux bun nyungc-nyungc waaic wuov dauh domh hieh youx ziouc taux aqv. Taux dingc daaih nyei setv mueiz dox cuotv bun ninh.”
Daniel10:1 Besie nyei hungh
Daniel10:2 Wuov zanc yie
Daniel10:3 Haaix nyungc kuv yie yaac maiv nyanc. Orv fai a'ngunc diuv yaac maiv bieqc yie nyei nzuih. Naaiv deix buo norm leiz-baaix gu'nyuoz yie yaac maiv longc haaix nyungc youh nzaatv yie nyei sin.
Daniel10:4 Zih hlaax nyic ziepc feix wuov hnoi yie souv jienv Taigitc domh ndaaih hlen.
Daniel10:5 Yie cau hmien mangc
Daniel10:6 Ninh nyei sin njang hnangv mbuov-lunx nyei la'bieiv-jaaix. Ninh nyei hmien hnangv mba'lingc
Daniel10:7 Naaiv deix laauc yaangh nyei sic kungx yie
Daniel10:8 Kungx zengc yie nduqc laanh mienh hnangv. Yie buatc naaiv deix domh laauc yaangh nyei sic
Daniel10:9 Yie aengx haiz ninh gorngv waac nyei qiex mbui. Yietv haiz ninh nyei qiex mbui yie mbaapv njiec
Daniel10:10 Wuov zanc maaih jieqv buoz maan yie nyei sin
Daniel10:11 Fin-mienh gorngv mbuox yie
Daniel10:12 Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox yie
Daniel10:13 Mv baac gunv Besie Guoqv wuov dauh mienv dangv jienv yie nyic ziepc yietv hnoi. Nqa'haav maaih dauh fin-mienh bieiv
Daniel10:14 Ih zanc yie daaih oix bun meih mengh baeqc caux meih juangc fingx nyei mienh nqa'haav hingv oix buangh nyei sic
Daniel10:15 Ninh gorngv naaiv deix waac mbuox yie wuov zanc
Daniel10:16 Aengx maaih dauh hnangv baamh mienh nor
Daniel10:17 Yie nyei ziouv nyei bou hnangv haaix nor haih caux yie nyei ziouv gorngv waac? Yie nyei sin maiv maaih yietc aax qaqv yaac maiv maaih qiex tauv aqv.”
Daniel10:18 Dongh maaih fangx zeiv hnangv mienh wuov dauh aengx maan jienv yie
Daniel10:19 Ninh gorngv
Daniel10:20 Ninh ziouc gorngv
Daniel10:21 Mv baac yie oix bun meih hiuv duqv fiev jienv Zien Leiz nyei Sou wuov deix waac. Maiv maaih haaix dauh tengx yie mborqv wuov deix gunv guoqv nyei mienv
Daniel11:1 “Yie ganh aeqv
Daniel11:2 “Ih zanc yie oix zorqv zien leiz biux mengh bun meih. Corc maaih buo dauh hungh oix yiem Besie cuotv daaih. Aengx maaih da'feix dauh gauh butv zoih jiex wuov deix yietc zungv. Laaix butv zoih ninh ziouc henv
Daniel11:3 Nqa'haav aengx maaih dauh gauh henv jiex nyei hungh cuotv daaih
Daniel11:4 Ninh jiez daaih henv nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel11:5 “Jiex daaih
Daniel11:6 Jiex liuz ziex hnyangx
Daniel11:7 “Nqa'haav maiv lauh maaih dauh ninh nyei cien-ceqv cuotv daaih div zoux hungh diex. Ninh oix daaih mborqv Baqv Bung nyei jun-baeng
Daniel11:8 Ninh oix bienh ninh mbuo nyei zienh caux ninh mbuo dox daaih nyei miuc-fangx caux ninh mbuo longc jiem nyaanh zoux daaih jaaix nyei jaa-dorngx caangv mingh Naamh Bung. Ziex hnyangx gu'nyuoz ninh guangc
Daniel11:9 Nqa'haav Baqv Bung nyei hungh ziouc daaih caangv bieqc Naamh Bung hungh nyei guoqv mv baac nzuonx ninh ganh nyei deic-bung mi'aqv.
Daniel11:10 Ninh nyei hungh dorn oix liuc leiz mborqv jaax ziouc diuc nzoih jun-baeng guanh camv! nyei. Maaih dauh hungh dorn nyei jun-baeng mingh ndaangc hnangv wuom yiemx nor
Daniel11:11 “Naamh Bung nyei hungh diex qiex jiez! haic
Daniel11:12 Naamh Bung nyei hungh duqv caangv baeng-guanh camv nyei ziouc yiem hnyouv zoux maux. Ninh daix mienh benx waanc-waanc dauh
Daniel11:13 Baqv Bung nyei hungh aengx diuc nzoih jun-baeng zungv gauh camv zinh ndaangc wuov nzunc. Nqaeqv ziex hnyangx ninh ziouc dorh jienv domh guanh jun-baeng daaih aengx dorh nzoih ninh mbuo qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv.
Daniel11:14 “Wuov zanc maaih mienh camv nyei oix ngaengc Naamh Bung nyei hungh. Ndaa^ni^en aac
Daniel11:15 Baqv Bung nyei hungh ziouc daaih ceix mborqv jaax nyei jaa-sic weih jienv ziouc caangv duqv norm weih wuonv nyei zingh. Naamh Bung nyei jun-baeng maiv haih mborqv maiv hingh. Liemh ginv daaih gauh longx jiex nyei baeng yaac maiv maaih qaqv gaux ngaengc duqv hingh.
Daniel11:16 Baqv Bung nyei hungh
Daniel11:17 Baqv Bung nyei hungh ziouc dingc hnyouv longc nzengc ninh nyei yietc norm guoqv nyei qaqv daaih
Daniel11:18 Nqa'haav ninh oix huin mingh koiv-hlen
Daniel11:19 Hungh diex ziouc huin nzuonx hungx jienv ninh ganh nyei deic-bung weih wuonv nyei dorngx. Mv baac ninh oix zuqc suei
Daniel11:20 “Nqa'haav maaih dauh oix nzipc jienv ninh zoux hungh. Ninh ziouc paaiv dauh siou nzou mienh mingh siou nzou ceix ninh nyei guoqv maaih njang-laangc. Maiv lauh ninh ziouc zuqc daic
Daniel11:21 “Aengx maaih dauh youx haic nyei mienh cuotv daaih nzipc jienv ninh zoux hungh
Daniel11:22 Jun-baeng oix zuqc guaatv mingh yaac zuqc baaic waaic
Daniel11:23 Mienh yietv caux ninh gapv hnyouv daaih ninh ziouc lorz jauv nduov. Maiv gunv ninh nyei guoqv faix
Daniel11:24 Dongh mienh maiv gorqc jaang nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel11:25 “Ninh oix bun ninh nyei qaqv henv jienv faaux
Daniel11:26 Caux hungh diex juangc nyanc nyei mienh yaac oix mbienv hnyouv bun ninh. Ninh nyei jun-baeng yaac oix zuqc guaatv mingh. Zuqc daix daic nyei mienh yaac camv nyei.
Daniel11:27 Nqa'haav naaiv deix i dauh hungh diex hnyouv hnamv cuotv waaic nyei za'eix. Ninh mbuo juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx
Daniel11:28 Baqv Bung nyei hungh ziouc nzuonx ninh ganh nyei buonv-guoqv yaac dorh jienv ninh caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv camv nyei. Mv baac ninh nyei hnyouv oix zoux waaic cing-nzengc nyei ngaengc waac. Ninh ziouc sueih eix zoux
Daniel11:29 “Taux dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc ninh aengx mingh caangv bieqc Naamh Bung. Mv baac nqa'haav naaiv nzunc yaac maiv hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov nzunc.
Daniel11:30 Weic zuqc Kitv^tim nyei nzangv nyei jun-baeng oix daaih mborqv ninh
Daniel11:31 “Ninh paaiv daaih nyei baeng-guanh ziouc bun zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv caux weih wuonv nyei dorngx yietc zungv maaih uix. Yaac zorqv nqoi
Daniel11:32 Ninh longc ceng nyei waac nduov baamz ngaengc waac wuov deix mienh gan ninh. Mv baac
Daniel11:33 “Yiem baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx maaih cong-mengh wuov deix ziouc bun mienh camv bieqc hnyouv
Daniel11:34 Ninh mbuo zuqc daix jienv yiem nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel11:35 Maaih deix wuov deix cong-mengh nyei mienh yaac zuqc daix
Daniel11:36 “Baqv Bung nyei hungh ziouc sueih ninh ganh nyei eix zoux. Ninh oix bungx waac-maux ceng ganh gauh hlo jiex dauh dauh zienh. Ninh oix gorngv mbuoqc horngh nyei waac ki maanc zienh nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh oix duqv longx taux Tin-Hungh qiex jiez buangv soux mouc
Daniel11:37 Ninh maiv nyiemc ninh nyei ong-taaix nyei zienh
Daniel11:38 Daaux nzuonx ninh zaangc weih wuonv nyei dorngx nyei zienh
Daniel11:39 Ninh oix kaux ganh fingx nyei zienh tengx ninh mborqv gauh longx jiex weih wuonv nyei dorngx. Haaix dauh nyiemc ninh
Daniel11:40 “Taux setv mueiz nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel11:41 Ninh zungv oix caangv bieqc wuov norm Nzueic nyei Deic-Bung
Daniel11:42 Ninh oix sung buoz mingh mborqv wuov deix guoqv. I^yipv Deic-Bung yaac biaux maiv ndutv.
Daniel11:43 Ninh oix luv I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei jiem nyaanh caux yietc zungv jaaix nyei ga'naaiv. Li^mbie Mienh caux E^ti^o^bie Mienh yaac zuqc yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev.
Daniel11:44 Mv baac yiem dong bung caux baqv bung daaih nyei fienx oix haeqv ninh gamh nziex. Ninh ziouc qiex jiez! haic
Daniel11:45 Ninh ziouc yiem koiv caux njang-laangc nyei cing-nzengc mbong mbu'ndongx liepc ninh nyei hungh dinc nyei ndopv-liuh. Mv baac ninh daic nyei ziangh hoc
Daniel12:1 “Wuov zanc goux meih nyei baeqc fingx wuov dauh domh fin-mienh bieiv
Daniel12:2 Daic mingh nyei mienh camv nyei oix nangh daaih. Maaih deix ziouc duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc
Daniel12:3 Maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh oix ziux cuotv njang hnangv lungh zaangc nyei njang. Dorh mienh camv zoux duqv horpc wuov deix oix yietc liuz hnangv hleix njang taux maanc gouv maanc doic.
Daniel12:4 Ndaa^ni^en aac
Daniel12:5 Wuov zanc yie
Daniel12:6 Maaih dauh gorngv mbuox zuqv jienv la'maah ndie souv jienv ndaaih gu'nguaaic wuov dauh
Daniel12:7 Zuqv jienv la'maah ndie souv jienv ndaaih nyei wuom gu'nguaaic wuov dauh sung mbiaauc jieqv buoz caux zaaix jieqv buoz hungx jienv lungh. Yie yaac haiz ninh ziangv jienv Yietc Liuz Ziangh Wuov Dauh laengz waac gorngv
Daniel12:8 Yie muangx haiz mv baac maiv mengh baeqc yie ziouc gorngv
Daniel12:9 Ninh gorngv
Daniel12:10 Maaih mienh camv saax ganh cing-nzengc
Daniel12:11 “Yiem zuqc zorqv guangc zanc-zanc fongc horc buov ziec nyei jauv taux liepc jiez zoux bun nyungc-nyungc waaic wuov dauh domh hieh youx maaih yietc cin nyic baeqv juov ziepc hnoi.
Daniel12:12 Zuov duqv taux yietc cin faam-baeqv faah ziepc hmz hnoi jiex liuz wuov deix maaih orn-lorqc.
Daniel12:13 “Ndaa^ni^en aac
Hosea1:1 Utc^si^yaa
Hosea1:2 Ziouv longc Ho^se^yaa douc daauh nzunc waac
Hosea1:3 Weic naaiv Ho^se^yaa mingh longc Ndipc^laa^im nyei sieqv
Hosea1:4 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Ho^se^yaa
Hosea1:5 Taux wuov hnoi yie oix yiem Yitv^le^en Horngz wuotv nauv I^saa^laa^en nyei juang-zinx.”
Hosea1:6 Go^me aengx maaih jienv sin
Hosea1:7 Mv baac yie oix korv-lienh Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun
Hosea1:8 Go^me bun Lo Lu^haa^maa guangc liuz nyorx

Hosea1:10 “Mv baac I^saa^laa^en nyei mienh soux oix hnangv koiv nyei saa-ziou
Hosea1:11 Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun yietc zungv duqv gapv zunv daaih
Hosea2:1 “Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox meih mbuo nyei youz
Hosea2:2 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc qaqv tov meih mbuo nyei maa. Za'gengh oix zuqc qaqv tov
Hosea2:3 Maiv zei aeqv
Hosea2:4 Yie yaac maiv korv-lienh ninh nyei fu'jueiv weic zuqc ninh mbuo se maaic sin mienh duqv daaih nyei fu'jueiv.
Hosea2:5 Ninh mbuo nyei maa mingh maaic sin. Duqv ninh mbuo daaih wuov dauh maa zoux nyaiv haic nyei sic. Ninh gorngv
Hosea2:6 Weic naaiv yie oix longc njimv-m'njormh mbiorngz jienv ninh nyei jauv
Hosea2:7 Ninh oix zunc ninh hnamv wuov deix mv baac zunc maiv zaaic. Ninh oix lorz ninh mbuo mv baac lorz maiv buatc. Ninh ziouc gorngv
Hosea2:8 Ninh maiv hiuv duqv se dongh yie bun mbiauh
Hosea2:9 Weic naaiv taux siou mbiauh nyei ziangh hoc
Hosea2:10 Ih zanc yie oix yiem dongh ninh hnamv wuov deix nyei nza'hmien biux mengh ninh zoux laih hlopv nyei sic
Hosea2:11 Yie oix bun ninh yietc zungv njien-youh nyei jauv baac mi'aqv
Hosea2:12 Yie yaac oix zoux waaic ninh nyei a'ngunc hmei caux ninh nyei ngongh nyorx ndiangx
Hosea2:13 Yie oix dingc ninh nyei zuiz
Hosea2:14 Weic naaiv mangc maah! Yie oix yuoqc ninh
Hosea2:15 Yiem wuov yie oix zorqv a'ngunc huingx bun ninh
Hosea2:16 Ziouv gorngv
Hosea2:17 Weic zuqc yie oix zorqv Mbaa^an zienh nyei mbuox cuotv ninh nyei nzuih
Hosea2:18 Taux wuov zanc yie oix weic ninh caux lomc-huaang nyei hieh zoih
Hosea2:19 Yie oix gorngv ziangh meih
Hosea2:20 Yie oix ziepc zuoqv nyei gorngv ziangh meih. Meih ziouc hiuv duqv yie
Hosea2:21 Ziouv gorngv
Hosea2:22 Ndau yaac oix dau mbiauh
Hosea2:23 Yie oix weic yie ganh zorqv ninh zuangx jienv naaiv norm deic-bung. Yie ziouc korv-lienh Lo Lu^haa^maa yaac gorngv mbuox Lo Ammi
Hosea3:1 Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie
Hosea3:2 Hnangv naaic yie ziouc longc ziepc hmz norm zinh caux ziepc luoqc tongv-bienx mbiauh mbaali maaiz naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn.
Hosea3:3 Yie ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
Hosea3:4 Weic zuqc I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc yiem maiv maaih hungh
Hosea3:5 Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun oix nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv
Hosea4:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx Ziouv nyei waac
Hosea4:2 Maaih houv nyei sic
Hosea4:3 Weic naaiv deic-bung nzauh nyiemv yiem deic-bung gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv mienh kouv jienv njiec
Hosea4:4 Mv baac maiv dungx bun haaix dauh gorngv baeqc fingx fai bun haaix dauh gox haaix dauh
Hosea4:5 Lungh hnoi zanc meih mbuo ndiqv zuqc ndorpc
Hosea4:6 Yie nyei baeqc fingx zuqc mietc laaix maiv maaih wuonh zaang. “Weic zuqc meih mbuo nqemh wuonh zaang
Hosea4:7 Sai mienh yietc zei camv yietc zei baamz zuiz dorngc yie. Yie oix zorqv ninh mbuo nyei njang-laangc tiuv benx nyaiv nyei sic.
Hosea4:8 Ninh mbuo bangc yie nyei baeqc fingx nyei zuiz nyanc
Hosea4:9 Sai mienh hnangv haaix nor
Hosea4:10 “Ninh mbuo duqv nyanc mv baac maiv beuv. Ninh mbuo oix hienx mv baac maiv hiaangx
Hosea4:11 “Loz-a'ngunc diuv caux siang-a'ngunc diuv caangv cuotv mienh bieqc hnyouv nyei jauv.
Hosea4:12 Yie nyei baeqc fingx naaic longc ndiangx zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Hosea4:13 Ninh mbuo yiem mbong-ningv gu'nguaaic
Hosea4:14 Meih mbuo nyei sieqv mingh maaic sin
Hosea4:15 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Maiv gunv meih mingh hienx
Hosea4:16 I^saa^laa^en Mienh hnyouv ngaengc hnangv maiv muangx waac nyei ngongh nyeiz. Ih zanc Ziouv haih yungz ninh mbuo hnangv bungx ba'gi yungh dorn yiem jangv nyei miev-ciangv fai?
Hosea4:17 E^faa^im mingh gan miuc-fangx mi'aqv
Hosea4:18 Ninh mbuo benx guanh hopv diuv nquin nyei mienh
Hosea4:19 Nziaaux oix buonc ninh mbuo mingh
Hosea5:1 “Sai mienh aah! Muangx naaiv maah! I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx. Hungh nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx
Hosea5:2 Ninh mbuo yiem Sitv^tim zoux daix mienh nyei sic siem haic
Hosea5:3 Yie hiuv E^faa^im nyei
Hosea5:4 “Ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic dangv jienv bun ninh mbuo maiv haih nzuonx mingh lorz Tin-Hungh
Hosea5:5 I^saa^laa^en zoux maux nyei jauv dorng jienv ninh ganh nyei hmien zoux zorng-zengx gox ninh ganh. I^saa^laa^en caux E^faa^im laaix ganh zoux dorngc nyei zuiz ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. Yu^ndaa yaac caux jienv ninh mbuo ndiqv zuqc ndorpc.
Hosea5:6 Ninh mbuo dorh jienv ba'gi yungh guanh
Hosea5:7 Ninh mbuo maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun Ziouv
Hosea5:8 Oix zuqc yiem Gi^mbe^aa biomv jorng
Hosea5:9 Taux dingc zuiz nyei hnoi E^faa^im zuqc benx ndau-huaang. Yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei fingx mbu'ndongx yie zunh gorngv zien nyei sic.
Hosea5:10 Yu^ndaa nyei jien ih zanc hnangv suiv gapv-jaaix nyei mienh. Yie nyei ga'qiex oix baetv cuotv hnangv dox wuom njiec ninh mbuo.
Hosea5:11 E^faa^im zuqc zeix
Hosea5:12 Hnangv naaic yie weic E^faa^im hnangv norm baeqc yieqc
Hosea5:13 E^faa^im buatc ganh butv baengc
Hosea5:14 Yie zungv oix doix E^faa^im hnangv dauh sienh
Hosea5:15 Yie oix nzuonx yie nyei dorngx
Hosea6:1 Baeqc fingx gorngv
Hosea6:2 Aengx jiex mingh i hnoi ninh oix bun mbuo fingv. Taux da'faam hnoi ninh ziouc liepc mbuo jiez
Hosea6:3 Mbuo oix zuqc hiuv duqv Ziouv
Hosea6:4 Ziouv gorngv
Hosea6:5 Weic naaiv yie longc douc waac mienh hngaqv ninh mbuo. Yie longc yie ganh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac daix ninh mbuo. Yie siemv zuiz nyei sic cuotv mingh hnangv njang.
Hosea6:6 Yie a'hneiv nyei se mienh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv
Hosea6:7 Ninh mbuo hnangv Aa^ndam ngaengc jienv yie caux ninh mbuo laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Yiem wuov ninh mbuo maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun yie.
Hosea6:8 Gi^le^aatc benx orqv mienh nyei zingh
Hosea6:9 Hnangv guanh janx-zaqc bingx jienv zuov mienh
Hosea6:10 Yiem I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun mbu'ndongx yie buatc gamh nziev nyei sic. Yiem wuov E^faa^im maaih hienx nyei jauv
Hosea6:11 “Yu^ndaa Mienh aah! Weic meih yaac fih hnangv nyei
Hosea7:1 Yie oix zorc I^saa^laa^en nyei ziangh hoc
Hosea7:2 Ninh mbuo maiv hnamv taux yie jangx ninh mbuo zoux nyei yietc zungv orqv sic. Ih zanc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz weih gormx ninh mbuo
Hosea7:3 Ninh mbuo zoux nyei orqv sic bun hungh diex a'hneiv
Hosea7:4 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv benx hienx nyei mienh
Hosea7:5 Houc yie mbuo nyei hungh diex wuov hnoi
Hosea7:6 Ninh mbuo jorm hnyouv hnangv douz-louh nor jorm
Hosea7:7 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv jorm hnangv douz-louh
Hosea7:8 “E^faa^im ganh mingh zorpc ziex fingx mienh
Hosea7:9 Ganh fingx mienh naqv ninh nyei qaqv
Hosea7:10 I^saa^laa^en Mienh zoux maux nyei jauv zoux zorng-zengx gorngv ninh mbuo
Hosea7:11 “E^faa^im se hnangv norm baeqc gopv
Hosea7:12 Ninh mbuo mingh nyei ziangh hoc
Hosea7:13 Weic zuqc ninh mbuo leih yie
Hosea7:14 Ninh mbuo maiv longc hnyouv heuc yie
Hosea7:15 Maiv gunv yie njaaux ninh mbuo hoqc linc
Hosea7:16 Ninh mbuo huin mingh lorz Mbaa^an zienh
Hosea8:1 “Biomv nzatc maah! Weic zuqc maaih dauh win-wangv hnangv domh jaangv-ngongh yiem Ziouv nyei biauv gu'nguaaic
Hosea8:2 Ninh mbuo heuc jienv yie gorngv
Hosea8:3 Longx nyei wuov nyungc
Hosea8:4 Ninh mbuo liepc hungh diex
Hosea8:5 Saa^maa^lie aah! Yie nqemh meih mbuo nyei ngongh dorn. Yie nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv bun ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo taux haaix zanc cingx daaih cing-nzengc?
Hosea8:6 Ninh mbuo yiem I^saa^laa^en
Hosea8:7 “Weic zuqc ninh mbuo zuangx nyei se nziaaux
Hosea8:8 I^saa^laa^en zuqc naqv nzengc mi'aqv. Ih zanc yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx benx maiv lamh longc nyei nie-mor huv.
Hosea8:9 Ninh mbuo mingh kaux Atc^si^lie hnangv dauh hieh lorh ndoqc youh jienv mingh. E^faa^im yaac cingv mienh hnamv ninh.
Hosea8:10 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo cingv ganh guoqv mienh zoux doic
Hosea8:11 E^faa^im jaa zoux ziec-dorngh weic fiqv zuiz daaux nzuonx naaiv deix ziec-dorngh bun ninh baamz zuiz.
Hosea8:12 Se gorngv yie weic ninh fiev waanc-waanc diuh yie nyei leiz-latc
Hosea8:13 Ninh mbuo a'hneiv fongc horc ziec. Ninh mbuo longc saeng-kuv fongc horc ziec yaac nyanc wuov deix orv
Hosea8:14 I^saa^laa^en Mienh la'kuqv Zeix Ninh Mbuo Daaih Wuov Dauh yaac ceix hungh dinc. Yu^ndaa Mienh yaac liepc weih wuonv nyei zingh jaa camv jienv faaux
Hosea9:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Maiv dungx hnangv ganh fingx mienh njien-youh orn-lorqc
Hosea9:2 Mborqv mbiauh ciangv caux nyueih a'ngunc diuv nyei zorngh maiv gaux uix ninh mbuo. Siang-a'ngunc diuv yaac dangx mi'aqv.
Hosea9:3 Ninh mbuo maiv duqv yiem Ziouv nyei deic-bung. Mv baac E^faa^im oix zuqc nzuonx I^yipv Deic-Bung. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem Atc^si^lie nyanc maaih uix nyei ga'naaiv.
Hosea9:4 Ninh mbuo maiv duqv longc a'ngunc diuv ciev bun Ziouv
Hosea9:5 Taux dingc daaih jiex zipv nyei hnoi
Hosea9:6 Mangc maah! Ninh mbuo biaux zuqc mietc nyei jauv
Hosea9:7 Dingc zuiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc taux daaih aqv. Zuqc jaauv win nyei hnoi taux
Hosea9:8 Douc waac mienh zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx
Hosea9:9 Ninh mbuo zoux waaic sic ndo haic
Hosea9:10 “Yie lorz buatc I^saa^laa^en hnangv lorz buatc a'ngunc biouv yiem deic-bung-huaang. Yie lorz buatc meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Hosea9:11 E^faa^im Mienh nyei njang-laangc oix hnangv norm norqc ndaix mingh
Hosea9:12 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo dorh fu'jueiv hlo
Hosea9:13 Hnangv sienh dorh ninh nyei dorn cuotv mingh zuqc ga'naaiv daix
Hosea9:14 O Ziouv aac
Hosea9:15 Ziouv gorngv
Hosea9:16 E^faa^im zuqc kouv. Ninh mbuo nyei nzungh nqaai mi'aqv
Hosea9:17 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh oix zoi ninh mbuo guangc laaix ninh mbuo maiv muangx ninh nyei waac. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc youh jienv mingh maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx.
Hosea10:1 I^saa^laa^en hnangv zungh nzueic haic nyei a'ngunc hmei ziangh biouv gitv. Yietc zei ziangh biouv camv
Hosea10:2 Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv guaix
Hosea10:3 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv
Hosea10:4 Ninh mbuo gorngv kungx-waac
Hosea10:5 Yiem Saa^maa^lie nyei mienh weic Mbetc Aawen nyei ngongh dorn sin zinx. Baaix ngongh dorn nyei mienh oix weic ngongh dorn nzauh nyiemv
Hosea10:6 Naaiv norm miuc-fangx zungv zuqc dorh mingh Atc^si^lie fungx benx zingh nyeic bun Atc^si^lie nyei domh hungh diex. E^faa^im oix zuqc nyaiv
Hosea10:7 Saa^maa^lie nyei hungh oix zuqc mietc hnangv kuaaiv ndiangx-peix-zaa yiem wuom-minc.
Hosea10:8 Yiem Mbetc Aawen nyei mbong gu'nguaaic nyei ziec-dorngh
Hosea10:9 Ziouv gorngv
Hosea10:10 Ei yie nyei hnyouv yie oix dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz
Hosea10:11 E^faa^im se hnangv dauh njaaux liuz nyei ngongh nyeiz
Hosea10:12 Meih mbuo oix zuqc weic ganh zuangx baengh fim nyei nyim
Hosea10:13 Meih mbuo zuangx nyei se zuiz
Hosea10:14 mborqv jaax nyei qiex mbui ziouc yiem meih mbuo nyei baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx. Meih mbuo yietc zungv weih wuonv nyei dorngx oix zuqc baaic
Hosea10:15 I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc mienh hnangv naaiv zoux bun meih mbuo
Hosea11:1 “I^saa^laa^en hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc yie hnamv ninh
Hosea11:2 Yie yietc zei heuc ninh mbuo
Hosea11:3 Mv baac se dongh yie njaaux E^faa^im yangh jauv
Hosea11:4 Yie longc korv-lienh mienh nyei hnyouv zoux hlaang ken ninh mbuo
Hosea11:5 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc nzuonx I^yipv Deic-Bung
Hosea11:6 Mienh oix longc nzuqc ndaauv yiem ninh mbuo nyei zingh mborqv jaax
Hosea11:7 Yie nyei baeqc fingx kungx maaih hnyouv oix leih nqoi yie
Hosea11:8 “E^faa^im aah! Yie hnangv haaix nor haih bungx guangc meih? I^saa^laa^en aah! Yie hnangv haaix nor haih zorqv meih jiu bun ganh dauh? Yie hnangv haaix nor haih bun meih hnangv Atc^maa? Yie hnangv haaix nor haih zoux bun meih hnangv zoux bun Se^mbo^yim? Yie nyei hnyouv faanv-fei lunc
Hosea11:9 Yie maiv ei yie qiex jiez haic nyei jauv zoux bun meih mbuo. Yie maiv aengx mietc E^faa^im
Hosea11:10 Ninh mbuo oix gan jienv Ziouv
Hosea11:11 Ninh mbuo ziouc sin zinx jienv daaih hnangv I^yipv daaih nyei norqc
Hosea11:12 E^faa^im longc gorngv-baeqc nyei waac
Hosea12:1 E^faa^im nyanc nziaaux
Hosea12:2 Ziouv gox Yu^ndaa
Hosea12:3 Yiem maa nyei ga'sie gu'nyuoz ninh nanv jienv ninh gorx nyei zaux-nqo. Benx domh mienh nyei ziangh hoc ninh caux Tin-Hungh borngz.
Hosea12:4 Ninh caux fin-mienh borngz yaac borngz duqv hingh
Hosea12:5 se Ziouv
Hosea12:6 Hnangv naaic meih oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh tengx nzuonx daaih. Oix zuqc goux longx hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv caux baengh fim nyei jauv
Hosea12:7 Saeng-eix mienh
Hosea12:8 E^faa^im gorngv
Hosea12:9 Yiem meih cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung daaih yie zoux Ziouv
Hosea12:10 Yie caux douc waac mienh gorngv waac
Hosea12:11 Yiem Gi^le^aatc maaih zuiz nyei fai? Ninh mbuo ndongc haaix zungv maiv lamh longc. Ninh mbuo yiem Gin^gaan fongc horc ngongh gouv ziec. Ninh mbuo nyei ziec-dorngh hnangv yiem ndeic laih liuz nyei zuonx nyei la'bieiv-ndui.
Hosea12:12 (Zinh ndaangc Yaakopv biaux taux Aalam Deic
Hosea12:13 Ziouv longc douc waac mienh dorh I^saa^laa^en yiem I^yipv cuotv daaih. I^saa^laa^en yaac bangc dauh douc waac mienh beu jienv ninh.
Hosea12:14 E^faa^im za'gengh! cuoqv Ziouv nouz haic. Ninh daix mienh nyei zuiz ninh ganh oix zuqc ndaam-dorng. Laaix ninh mangc piex Ziouv
Hosea13:1 Zinh ndaangc E^faa^im gorngv waac
Hosea13:2 Ih zanc ninh mbuo gunv zoux gunv baamz zuiz camv jienv faaux
Hosea13:3 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo ziouc hnangv lungh ndorm nziouv nyei mouc
Hosea13:4 “Yiem I^yipv cuotv daaih yie se Ziouv
Hosea13:5 Se yie yiem deic-bung-huaang
Hosea13:6 Naaiv deix baeqc fingx ziux yie ceix nyei nyanc hopv duqv nyanc beuv. Ninh mbuo beuv
Hosea13:7 Yie ziouc doix ninh mbuo hnangv dauh sienh
Hosea13:8 Yie oix caa jienv ninh mbuo hnangv zuqc guangc dorn nyei jiepv-nyeiz
Hosea13:9 “I^saa^laa^en aah! Yie oix mietc meih
Hosea13:10 Dongh meih gorngv
Hosea13:11 Yie qiex jiez jienv zorqv hungh bun meih
Hosea13:12 E^faa^im nyei zuiz-nipc fiev jienv aqv
Hosea13:13 Ninh hiuv duqv ninh nyei maa mun gu'nguaaz oix yungz ninh
Hosea13:14 Yie horpc zuqc zuoqc ninh mbuo leih ndutv yiemh gen nyei qaqv fai? Yie horpc zuqc zuoqc ninh mbuo biaux ndutv zuqc daic nyei qaqv fai? O zuqc daic nyei qaqv aah! Meih nyei zeqc naanc yiem haaix? O yiemh gen aah! Meih baaic mietc nyei qaqv yiem haaix? “Yiem yie nyei nza'hmien se hnangv buang jienv
Hosea13:15 Maiv gunv ninh yiem gorx-youz mbu'ndongx hiaangx
Hosea13:16 Saa^maa^lie Mienh oix zuqc weic ganh nyei zuiz ndaam-dorng
Hosea14:1 O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv
Hosea14:2 Oix zuqc dorh jienv nyiemc zuiz nyei waac nzuonx daaih lorz Ziouv. Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox ninh
Hosea14:3 Atc^si^lie maiv haih njoux yie mbuo
Hosea14:4 “Yie oix zorc ninh mbuo maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv
Hosea14:5 Yie ziouc weic I^saa^laa^en hnangv mbiungc-suiv
Hosea14:6 Ninh nyei cunx oix hiaangx jienv mingh
Hosea14:7 Ninh mbuo oix nzuonx daaih yiem jienv yie nyei dongh linh ga'ndiev. Ninh mbuo yaac duqv longx jienv faaux hnangv huingx. Ninh mbuo duqv nqoi biangh hnangv a'ngunc hmei
Hosea14:8 O E^faa^im aac
Hosea14:9 Haaix dauh maaih cong-mengh bun ninh bieqc hnyouv naaiv deix waac. Haaix dauh haih samx duqv cuotv
Joel1:1 Naaiv se Be^tu^en nyei dorn
Joel1:2 Meih mbuo mienh gox mienh aah! Muangx naaiv deix waac maah! Yiem deic-bung nyei yietc zungv baeqc fingx oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx. Yiem meih mbuo ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc fai meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Joel1:3 Zorqv naaiv deix sic mbuox meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv
Joel1:4 Jopv-nyeic guanh nyanc zengc nyei
Joel1:5 Diuv nquin nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc nyie daaih nyiemv. Hopv diuv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc nzauh nyiemv
Joel1:6 Maaih guanh henv haic nyei fingx
Joel1:7 Ninh baaic waaic yie nyei a'ngunc hmei yaac pai yie nyei ngongh nyorx biouv ndiangx
Joel1:8 Oix zuqc nzauh nyiemv hnangv dauh maiv bueix jiex dorn nyei sieqv zuqv jienv la'maah ndie-cou
Joel1:9 Fongc horc nyei laangh ziqc caux ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv yiem Ziouv nyei biauv dangx mi'aqv. Fu-sux Ziouv nyei sai mienh ziouc nzauh nyiemv.
Joel1:10 Lingh deic huaang nzengc mi'aqv. Ndau mborngx nqaai nyei. Weic zuqc mbiauh zuqc mietc
Joel1:11 Zoux ndeic nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc nzauh aqv. Fioux a'ngunc hmei nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc nzauh nyiemv. Weic zuqc mbiauh witv caux mbiauh mbaali
Joel1:12 A'ngunc hmei nqaai nzengc. Ngongh nyorx biouv ndiangx nyaux mi'aqv. Ziqc liouh biouv
Joel1:13 Sai mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc zuqv jienv la'maah ndie-cou nzauh nyiemv
Joel1:14 Oix zuqc dingc ziangx norm zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc nyei hnoi
Joel1:15 Kouv aqv! Wuov norm hnoi oix taux. Ziouv nyei hnoi taux fatv aqv
Joel1:16 Nyanc hopv dorng jienv yie mbuo nyei m'zing dangx mi'aqv
Joel1:17 Ga'naaiv-nyim yiem ndau-ndiev huv mi'aqv. Siou ga'naaiv nyei dorngx zuqc guangc huaang
Joel1:18 Saeng-kuv qaqv heuc
Joel1:19 O Ziouv aah! Yie heuc jienv tov meih weic zuqc douz buov mietc deic-bung-huaang nyei miev-ciangv. Douz-mbietc buov nzengc lomc-huaang nyei ndiangx.
Joel1:20 Liemh hieh zoih heuc jienv tov meih
Joel2:1 Oix zuqc yiem Si^on biomv jorng
Joel2:2 Benx norm hmuangx nyei hnoi
Joel2:3 Yiem ninh mbuo nza'hmien maengx maaih douz buov qui
Joel2:4 Ninh mbuo nyei fangx zeiv hnangv maaz
Joel2:5 Ninh mbuo tiux gan mbong-ningv mingh
Joel2:6 Zuangx fingx yietv buatc
Joel2:7 Ninh mbuo hnangv henv haic nyei baeng tiux
Joel2:8 Ninh mbuo laanh maiv nziangc zuqc laanh
Joel2:9 Ninh mbuo borngz bieqc zingh gu'nyuoz
Joel2:10 Yiem ninh mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc maengx ndau dongz
Joel2:11 Ziouv yiem ninh nyei jun-baeng guanh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv qiex mbui. Ninh nyei baeng-guanh za'gengh! hlo haic. Muangx ninh hatc nyei waac wuov deix yaac henv. Ziouv nyei hnoi za'gengh hlo haic
Joel2:12 Ziouv gorngv
Joel2:13 Oix zuqc betv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
Joel2:14 Haaix dauh haih hiuv duqv? Nziex ninh haih goiv za'eix ziouc korv-lienh mienh
Joel2:15 Oix zuqc yiem Si^on biomv jorng. Oix zuqc dingc ziangx norm zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc nyei hnoi
Joel2:16 Oix zuqc mbuox zuangx baeqc fingx gapv zunv aengx saax gapv zunv nyei mienh cing-nzengc. Bun zuangx mienh gox daaih zunv. Dorh fu'jueiv
Joel2:17 Bun fu-sux Ziouv nyei sai mienh yiem capv cuotv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nza'hmien maengx caux ziec-dorngh mbu'ndongx nyiemv
Joel2:18 Wuov zanc Ziouv oix nzaeng jienv ninh nyei deic-bung
Joel2:19 Ziouv oix dau ninh nyei baeqc fingx gorngv
Joel2:20 “Yie oix zunc yiem baqv bung daaih nyei domh guanh leih meih mbuo go
Joel2:21 Ndau aah! Maiv dungx gamh nziex. Oix zuqc njien-youh orn-lorqc
Joel2:22 Lomc-huaang nyei hieh zoih aah! Maiv dungx gamh nziex. Weic zuqc deic-bung-huaang nyei miev-ciangv cuotv miev nyiemz aqv. Ndiangx yaac ziangh biouv. Ngongh nyorx ndiangx caux a'ngunc hmei ziangh biouv gitv.
Joel2:23 O Si^on nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc a'hneiv. Oix zuqc weic Ziouv
Joel2:24 Mborqv mbiauh nyei ciangv ziouc maaih mbiauh buangv nzengc. A'ngunc diuv caux ga'lanv youh zungv mienz cuotv siou nyei dorngx.
Joel2:25 “Jopv-nyeic nyanc waaic ga'naaiv nyei hnyangx-soux yie oix jaauv meih mbuo
Joel2:26 Meih mbuo duqv nyanc gaux
Joel2:27 Meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx
Joel2:28 “Hoz daaih yie oix dox yie nyei Singx Lingh ceix bun maanc mienh. Meih mbuo nyei dorn
Joel2:29 Yiem wuov deix hnoi yie yaac oix dox yie nyei Singx Lingh ceix bun liemh m'jangc bou
Joel2:30 Yie oix yiem lungh yiem ndau zoux cuotv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic
Joel2:31 Ziouv nyei wuov norm gamh nziex haic nyei domh hnoi maiv gaengh taux
Joel2:32 Taux wuov zanc haaix dauh heuc Ziouv nyei mbuox
Joel3:1 Ziouv gorngv
Joel3:2 yie oix zorqv maanc guoqv mienh gapv zunv daaih
Joel3:3 Ninh mbuo dingc maengc mangc
Joel3:4 “O Tailaqv
Joel3:5 Meih mbuo zorqv yie nyei jiem nyaanh yaac dorh yie jaaix jiex nyei ga'naaiv mingh an meih mbuo nyei zienh nyei miuc-biauv.
Joel3:6 Meih mbuo zorqv Yu^ndaa caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei mienh maaic bun Janx-Gikc
Joel3:7 “Mangc maah! Yie ih zanc oix yiem ninh mbuo zuqc maaic mingh nyei dorngx dorh ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih. Ziux meih mbuo zoux nyei yie oix winh bun meih mbuo.
Joel3:8 Yie oix bun meih mbuo nyei dorn
Joel3:9 Oix zuqc yiem maanc guoqv mienh mbu'ndongx zunh gorngv
Joel3:10 Zorqv laih bieiv daav benx nzuqc ndaauv
Joel3:11 Meih mbuo weih gormx nyei maanc guoqv mienh aah! Siepv-siepv nyei daaih gapv zunv yiem wuov. “O Ziouv aac
Joel3:12 “Maanc guoqv oix zuqc jiez daaih. Oix zuqc mingh Ye^ho^saa^fatv Horngz
Joel3:13 Longc limh gaatv maah! Gaeng-zuangx zuoqc aqv. Daaih maah! Daaih nyueih a'ngunc biouv
Joel3:14 Cin-cin waanc-waanc laanh mienh yiem siemv dingc nyei horngz
Joel3:15 Mba'hnoi caux hlaax oix hmuangx mingh
Joel3:16 Ziouv yiem Si^on njunh njunh nyei heuc
Joel3:17 “Hnangv naaic meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie se Ziouv
Joel3:18 “Taux wuov hnoi domh mbong maaih a'ngunc huingx buangv nzengc. Fiuv-mbong yaac maaih ngongh guanh. Yu^ndaa nyei diuh diuh ndoqv maaih wuom liouc
Joel3:19 I^yipv oix zuqc benx baaic huaang nyei dorngx
Joel3:20 Mv baac Yu^ndaa zungv yietc liuz maaih mienh yiem
Joel3:21 Ninh mbuo zuqc daix
