Amos1:2 Aamotv gorngv
Amos1:3 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos1:4 Yie ziouc bun douz njiec Haa^saa^en nyei biauv
Amos1:5 Yie oix mborqv baaic Ndaa^matv^gatc nyei zingh gaengh
Amos1:6 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos1:7 Yie ziouc bun douz njiec Gaasaa nyei zingh laatc
Amos1:8 Yie oix mietc nzengc Atc^ndotc nyei mienh
Amos1:9 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos1:10 Yie ziouc bun douz njiec Tailaqv nyei zingh laatc
Amos1:11 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos1:12 Yie ziouc bun douz njiec Temaan Zingh
Amos1:13 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos1:14 Yie ziouc diemv douz buov Lapv^mbaa nyei zingh laatc. Douz ziouc buov qui zingh gu'nyuoz weih wuonv nyei dinc. Wuov hnoi maaih mborqv jaax nyei qiex mbui
Amos1:15 Ninh mbuo nyei hungh oix zuqc guaatv mingh
Amos2:1 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos2:2 Yie oix bun douz njiec Mo^apc
Amos2:3 Yie oix mietc gunv deic-bung wuov dauh
Amos2:4 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos2:5 Yie ziouc bun douz njiec Yu^ndaa
Amos2:6 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos2:7 Ninh mbuo caaiv mienh jomc mienh nyei m'nqorngv njiec ga'ndiev ndau nyei nie-mbung
Amos2:8 Ninh mbuo yiem norm-norm ziec-dorngh ga'hlen zorqv mienh dorh daaih dorngx nyei lui dimc jienv bueix. Yiem ninh mbuo nyei zienh nyei biauv
Amos2:9 “Mv baac yie yiem ninh mbuo nyei nza'hmien mietc Aa^mo^lai Mienh maiv gunv ninh mbuo hlo hlang hnangv si^ndaa zongh ndiangx
Amos2:10 “Yie yaac dorh meih mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih
Amos2:11 Yie yiem meih mbuo nyei dorn mbu'ndongx liepc douc waac mienh
Amos2:12 “Mv baac meih mbuo aapv Naasi Mienh hopv a'ngunc diuv
Amos2:13 “Mangc maah! Yie oix zatv meih mbuo njiec meih mbuo yiem nyei dorngx
Amos2:14 Tiux siepv nyei mienh biaux maiv ndutv. Mienh henv mienh nyei qaqv oix zitc mi'aqv. Mienh henv mienh maiv haih njoux maiv duqv ganh nyei maengc.
Amos2:15 Nanv juang-zinx nyei mienh souv maiv jienv. Zaux siepv nyei mienh maiv haih njoux ganh
Amos2:16 Maiv gunv daamv hlo jiex nyei mborqv jaax baeng
Amos3:1 O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
Amos3:2 “Yiem lungh ndiev fingx-fingx mienh mbu'ndongx yie kungx ginv meih mbuo hnangv. Weic naaiv yie ziouc dingc meih mbuo baamz nyei yietc zungv zuiz.”
Amos3:3 Se gorngv i laanh mienh maiv dunx ziangx gapv doic
Amos3:4 Se gorngv sienh zorqv maiv duqv orv nyanc
Amos3:5 Se gorngv yiem ndau zaeng koux maiv an gaeng
Amos3:6 Se gorngv yiem zingh biomv mborqv jaax nyei nzatc mbui
Amos3:7 Ziouv Tin-Hungh za'gengh maiv zoux haaix nyungc cuotv liuz ninh zorqv gem jienv nyei sic mbuox ninh nyei bou
Amos3:8 Sienh njunh nyei ziangh hoc
Amos3:9 Mingh zunh mbuox Atc^ndotc weih wuonv nyei dinc nyei mienh
Amos3:10 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos3:11 Weic naaiv
Amos3:12 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Amos3:13 Ziouv Tin-Hungh
Amos3:14 “Dongh yie dingc I^saa^laa^en nyei zuiz wuov hnoi
Amos3:15 Yie oix caeqv ninh mbuo dong-gen nyei biauv caux ninh mbuo nqaai gorng nyei biauv. Longc zaangz-nyaah zorng wuov deix biauv oix zuqc mietc
Amos4:1 Meih mbuo yiem Saa^maa^lie Mbong nyei m'sieqv dorn aah! Muangx naaiv deix waac maah! Meih mbuo se hnangv Mbaasaan nyei ngongh nyeiz. Meih mbuo zeix mienh jomc mienh yaac zatv dangx-donx mienh. Meih mbuo zunc meih mbuo nyei nqox gorngv
Amos4:2 Ziouv Tin-Hungh se cing-nzengc nyei. Ninh houv jienv gorngv
Amos4:3 Meih mbuo gorqv-mienh oix zuqc baeng zaqc gan gorqv-mienh nyei zingh laatc tong nyei kuotv cuotv. Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc zoi bieqc Haamon.” Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
Amos4:4 “I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
Amos4:5 Gunv zorqv an bingv nyei njuov fongc horc ziec bun Tin-Hungh
Amos4:6 “Yiem meih mbuo nyei norm-norm zingh yie bun meih mbuo ngorc hnaangx. Norm-norm dorngx maiv maaih laangh ziqc
Amos4:7 “Yiem meih mbuo maiv gaengh siou gaeng-zuangx buo hlaax nyieqc
Amos4:8 I buo norm zingh nyei baeqc fingx youh jienv mingh ganh norm zingh lorz wuom hopv mv baac maiv duqv hopv beuv. Meih mbuo corc maiv nzuonx daaih lorz yie.” Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
Amos4:9 “Yie bun nziaaux-jorm buonc hoic mbiauh butv latc douz. Meih mbuo nyei huingx caux a'ngunc biouv
Amos4:10 “Yie bun zeqc naanc yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx hnangv zinh ndaangc yiem I^yipv nor. Yie longc nzuqc ndaauv daix meih mbuo nyei mienh lunx mienh
Amos4:11 “Yie oix mietc meih mbuo hnangv zinh ndaangc yie mietc So^ndom caux Go^mo^laa Zingh. Meih mbuo hnangv nqanx zaangh yiem douz-nzauc baeng cuotv daaih
Amos4:12 “O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
Amos4:13 Tin-Hungh zeix mbong yaac zeix nziaaux
Amos5:1 O I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zeiv-fun aac
Amos5:2 “I^saa^laa^en ndorpc njiec
Amos5:3 Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv. “I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun nyei zingh fungx yietc cin dauh baeng cuotv
Amos5:4 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun
Amos5:5 Maiv dungx mingh lorz Mbetc^en
Amos5:6 Oix zuqc lorz Ziouv ziouc duqv ziangh jienv
Amos5:7 Meih mbuo zorqv baengh fim nyei jauv tiuv hnangv yangh meuz nor im. Meih mbuo yaac zorqv zoux horpc nyei jauv zoi njiec ndau.
Amos5:8 Ziouv zeix Faam-Cing Hleix caux Siec Muoz-Sieqv Hleix. Ninh yaac zorqv lungh muonz zanc nyei hmuangx tiuv benx lungh ndorm nyei njang
Amos5:9 Ninh bun henv nyei mienh njapc dangh zuqc mietc nzengc
Amos5:10 Ninh mbuo nzorng yiem zingh gaengh baav mienh wuov deix
Amos5:11 Meih mbuo caaiv mienh jomc mienh yaac aapv ninh cuotv laangh ziqc bun meih mbuo. Weic naaiv maiv gunv meih mbuo longc la'bieiv ceix biauv longx
Amos5:12 Weic zuqc yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyei zuiz ndongc haaix camv
Amos5:13 Weic naaiv
Amos5:14 Meih mbuo oix zuqc lorz longx nyei jauv
Amos5:15 Oix zuqc nzorng orqv yaac hnamv zoux longx nyei
Amos5:16 Weic naaiv Ziouv
Amos5:17 Yiem norm-norm a'ngunc huingx zungv maaih nyiemv nyei qiex
Amos5:18 Zuov jienv Ziouv nyei hnoi wuov deix oix zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc zuov Ziouv nyei hnoi? Wuov norm hnoi se hmuangx nyei hnoi
Amos5:19 hnangv mienh biaux sienh buangh zuqc jiepv
Amos5:20 Ziouv nyei hnoi se hmuangx
Amos5:21 “Yie siouc maiv duqv meih mbuo nyei zipv
Amos5:22 Maiv gunv meih mbuo fongc horc buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv
Amos5:23 Dorh meih mbuo baaux nzung nyei qiex mingh nqoi. Meih mbuo patv daanh baah nyei qiex yie maiv oix muangx.
Amos5:24 Oix zuqc bun baengh fim nyei jauv liouc njiec hnangv ndoqv nor
Amos5:25 O I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun aah! Meih mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang wuov deix feix ziepc hnyangx dorh fongc horc nyei caux ziec nyei ga'naaiv fai?
Amos5:26 Meih mbuo ziouc gaeng meih mbuo nyei hungh
Amos5:27 Weic naaiv yie oix guaatv meih mbuo jiex ndaangc Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh mingh.” Naaiv se Ziouv
Amos6:1 Yiem Si^on kauv jienv lorqc nyeic zaux nyei mienh
Amos6:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mingh Kaanne
Amos6:3 Meih mbuo oix tuix zeqc naanc nyei hnoi mingh go
Amos6:4 Meih mbuo zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo bueix jienv zaangz-nyaah nyei coux
Amos6:5 meih mbuo patv daanh baah baaux maiv lamh longc nyei nzung
Amos6:6 Meih mbuo longc nzormc hopv a'ngunc diuv
Amos6:7 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux guaatv mingh nyei daauh baan
Amos6:8 Ziouv Tin-Hungh ziangv jienv ganh houv waac. Ziouv
Amos6:9 Se gorngv yietc norm biauv zengc njiec ziepc laanh mienh
Amos6:10 Se gorngv daic wuov deix mienh nyei cien-ceqv daaih zorqv sei yiem gu'nyuoz jiex wuov qongx biauv cuotv daaih buov nyei ziangh hoc
Amos6:11 Weic zuqc Ziouv hatc nyei ziangh hoc
Amos6:12 Maaz yiem la'bieiv gu'nguaaic tiux fai? Mienh haih longc ngongh laih koiv duqv nyei fai? Mv baac meih mbuo zorqv baengh fim nyei jauv tiuv benx ndie-doqc
Amos6:13 Meih mbuo a'hneiv ceng ganh mborqv duqv hingh Lo Nde^mbaa Mungv
Amos6:14 Ziouv
Amos7:1 Ziouv Tin-Hungh hinc bun yie buatc ninh zeix cuotv yietc domh guanh jopv-nyeic doix zuqc jang-jang cuotv da'nyeic torngx ga'naaiv-zuangx
Amos7:2 Jopv-nyeic nyanc nzengc wuov norm deic-bung nyei miev
Amos7:3 Ziouv ziouc goiv ninh nyei hnyouv. Ziouv gorngv
Amos7:4 Ziouv Tin-Hungh hinc bun yie buatc. Ziouv Tin-Hungh heuc longc douz dingc zuiz. Douz ziouc buov nzengc ndo nyei koiv yaac buov jienv ndau-beih.
Amos7:5 Yie ziouc gorngv
Amos7:6 Ziouv aengx goiv ninh nyei hnyouv. Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv
Amos7:7 Ziouv aengx bun yie mangc yietc nyungc. Yie buatc Ziouv souv jienv longc dingc zaqc nyei hlaang zoux daaih nyei zingh laatc ga'hlen
Amos7:8 Ziouv naaic yie
Amos7:9 “I^sakc nyei zeiv-fun yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx yie oix baaic huaang
Amos7:10 Mbetc^en nyei sai mienh
Amos7:11 Weic zuqc Aamotv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Amos7:12 Aa^maa^si^yaa gorngv mbuox Aamotv
Amos7:13 Yiem naaiv mingh maiv dungx aengx yiem Mbetc^en douc meih nyei waac
Amos7:14 Aamotv gorngv mbuox Aa^maa^si^yaa
Amos7:15 Ziouv dorh yie cuotv daaih
Amos7:16 Weic naaiv ih zanc muangx Ziouv nyei waac maah! Meih gorngv
Amos7:17 “Weic naaiv Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv

Amos8:2 Ninh naaic
Amos8:3 Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv
Amos8:4 “Meih mbuo caaiv dangx-donx nyei mienh

Amos8:6 Meih mbuo longc nyaanh maaiz mienh jomc mienh
Amos8:7 Ziouv
Amos8:8 “Ndau maiv zeiz weic naaiv deix sic ndanc dongz fai? Yiem deic-bung gu'nyuoz nyei mienh yaac oix zuqc nzauh nyiemv. Ziangh norm deic-bung oix faaux hnangv Nai^aa Ndaaih nor
Amos8:9 Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv

Amos8:14 Ziangv jienv Saa^maa^lie nyei zienh nyeiz
Amos9:1 Yie buatc Ziouv souv jienv ziec-dorngh ga'hlen. Ninh gorngv
Amos9:2 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo wetv kuotv njiec taux yiemh gen
Amos9:3 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo bingx jienv yiem Kaanmen Mbong
Amos9:4 Maiv gunv zuqc win-wangv guaatv ninh mbuo mingh
Amos9:5 Ziouv Tin-Hungh
Amos9:6 Ninh ceix ninh yiem nyei dorngx yiem gu'nguaaic lungh
Amos9:7 “O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac
Amos9:8 “Ziouv Tin-Hungh nyei m'zing mangc jienv naaiv norm maaih zuiz nyei guoqv. Yie yaac oix yiem naaiv ndau-beih mietc nzengc
Amos9:9 “Weic zuqc yie oix njiec lingc bun yiem zuangx guoqv mbu'ndongx nyei I^saa^laa^en zeiv-fun hnangv longc siang-jei lorh mbiauh nor
Amos9:10 Yiem yie nyei baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx yietc zungv zuiz-mienh
Amos9:11 Taux wuov hnoi yie oix liepc jiez Ndaawitv nyei guoqv
Amos9:12 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc duqv nzipc E^ndom zengc njiec nyei guoqv caux gan yie nyei mbuox heuc nyei norm-norm guoqv. Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv nyei waac
Amos9:13 Ziouv gorngv
Amos9:14 Yie oix dorh yie nyei baeqc fingx
Amos9:15 Yie oix zorqv yie nyei baeqc fingx
Obadiah1:1 Naaiv se O^mbaa^ndi buatc laauc yaangh nyei sic. Ziouv Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv gorngv E^ndom. Ziouv paaiv dauh douc fienx mienh mingh norm-norm guoqv. Yie mbuo yaac duqv haiz ninh douc daaih nyei fienx. Ninh gorngv
Obadiah1:2 Ziouv gorngv mbuox E^ndom
Obadiah1:3 Meih nyei hnyouv zoux maux nduov meih ganh. Meih yiem mbaengx-qangx
Obadiah1:4 Maiv gunv meih hnangv domh jaangv ndaix hlang
Obadiah1:5 Ziouv gorngv
Obadiah1:6 Mv baac Esaau nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc luv nzengc
Obadiah1:7 Caux meih dongh hnyouv gapv qaqv nyei mienh nduov meih
Obadiah1:8 Ziouv gorngv
Obadiah1:9 O Temaan aac
Obadiah1:10 “Weic meih zoux doqc hoic meih nyei youz
Obadiah1:11 Ganh guoqv mienh bieqc mingh luv ninh nyei zinh zoih wuov hnoi
Obadiah1:12 Meih nyei youz zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc meih maiv horpc zuqc bungx m'zing a'hneiv nyei mangc hnangv. Yu^ndaa Mienh zuqc mietc nyei hnoi
Obadiah1:13 Yie nyei baeqc fingx zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc
Obadiah1:14 Meih maiv horpc zuqc souv jienv jauv-caax weic zorqv oix biaux wuov deix. Yiem ninh mbuo zuqc doh naanc nyei hnoi
Obadiah1:15 “ Ziouv siemv maanc guoqv nyei hnoi taux fatv aqv. E^ndom aac
Obadiah1:16 Meih yiem yie nyei cing-nzengc mbong hnangv haaix nor hopv zuqc siouc kouv nyei zaanv
Obadiah1:17 “Mv baac yiem Si^on Mbong maaih deix mienh duqv biaux ndutv. Wuov norm mbong zungv oix benx cing-nzengc mbong. Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun yaac duqv nzipc ninh mbuo zinh ndaangc nzipc nyei buonc ndau nzuonx.
Obadiah1:18 Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun ziouc hnangv douz
Obadiah1:19 Yiem Negepc nyei mienh duqv Esaau Mbong benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Yiem fai bung mbong-juoqv mienh duqv Fi^li^saa^die Deic benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Ninh mbuo duqv E^faa^im caux Saa^maa^lie Deic benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc
Obadiah1:20 Yiem Kaa^naa^an zuqc caangv mingh nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh duqv nzipc Fi^ni^sie faaux mingh baqv bung taux Saax^le^fatv. Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem zuqc caangv mingh Se^faa^laatv nyei mienh
Obadiah1:21 Duqv hingh nyei mienh ziouc faaux Si^on Mbong weic gunv Esaau Mbong. Wuov norm guoqv ziouc benx Ziouv nyei.
Jonah1:1 Maaih hnoi nor
Jonah1:2 “Meih mingh wuov norm domh zingh
Jonah1:3 Mv baac Yonaa biaux Ziouv. Ninh cuotv jauv hungx jienv Taansitv Zingh mingh. Mingh taux Yapv^faa Mungv
Jonah1:4 Mv baac mingh gau
Jonah1:5 Nzangv-nouh gamh nziex haic
Jonah1:6 Nzangv-ziouv buatc Yonaa bueix wuov nzangv-ndoqv m'njormh
Jonah1:7 Nzangv-nouh
Jonah1:8 Nzangv-nouh gorngv mbuox ninh
Jonah1:9 Yonaa dau
Jonah1:10 Yonaa aengx mbuox ninh mbuo ih zanc ninh biaux Ziouv. Nzangv-nouh gengh gamh nziex haic. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Jonah1:11 Nziaaux buonc koiv nyei wuom-laangc gunv zoux gunv hlo. Ninh mbuo naaic gaax Yonaa
Jonah1:12 Yonaa dau
Jonah1:13 Nzangv-nouh mbuo maiv muangx
Jonah1:14 Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc Ziouv
Jonah1:15 Gorngv baac ninh mbuo zorqv Yonaa zoi njiec koiv mingh. Wuom-laangc ziouc liemh zeih dingh mi'aqv.
Jonah1:16 Naaiv deix mienh buatc
Jonah1:17 Ziouv yaac bun dauh domh mbiauz daaih naqv Yonaa. Yonaa yiem domh mbiauz nyei ga'sie buo hnoi buo muonz.
Jonah2:1 Yonaa yiem domh mbiauz nyei ga'sie gu'nyuoz daux gaux mbuox Ziouv
Jonah2:2 “ Ziouv aac
Jonah2:3 Meih zorqv yie zoi njiec koiv ndo nyei dorngx
Jonah2:4 Yie laaic yietc liuz maiv duqv aengx yiem meih nyei nza'hmien aqv. Yietc liuz yaac maiv duqv buatc meih nyei singx dinc.
Jonah2:5 Wuom yiemx jienv yie gu'nguaaic
Jonah2:6 Yie ndortv njiec taux mbong ga'ndiev maengx
Jonah2:7 “ Ziouv aac
Jonah2:8 “Mienh zaangc maiv maaih qaqv nyei miuc-fangx
Jonah2:9 Mv baac yie oix baaux nzung ceng meih
Jonah2:10 Yonaa daux gaux baac
Jonah3:1 Yonaa aengx duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac da'nyeic nzunc
Jonah3:2 “Meih mingh Ni^naa^we wuov norm domh zingh ei jienv yie paaiv nyei waac zunh mbuox ninh mbuo.”
Jonah3:3 Yonaa ziouc muangx Ziouv nyei waac
Jonah3:4 Yonaa bieqc wuov norm zingh aengx mingh yietc hnoi liuz
Jonah3:5 Ni^naa^we Zingh nyei mienh sienx Ziouv nyei waac. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv ziouc dongh hnyouv zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Yiem zoux hlo jiex taux zoux faix jiex nyei mienh zuqv jienv la'maah ndie-cou.
Jonah3:6 Ni^naa^we Zingh nyei hungh haiz naaiv deix waac
Jonah3:7 Ninh yaac bun waac taux zingh nyei norm-norm dorngx mbuox baeqc fingx
Jonah3:8 Liemh mienh liemh saeng-kuv oix zuqc buix jienv la'maah ndie-cou. Dauh dauh oix zuqc jorm hnyouv daux gaux jouh Tin-Hungh. Mbuo zoux waaic nyei jauv yietc zungv oix zuqc guangc nzengc.
Jonah3:9 Nziex Tin-Hungh oix tiuv ninh nyei za'eix
Jonah3:10 Tin-Hungh buatc naaiv deix mienh goiv hnyouv guangc ninh mbuo zoux waaic nyei jauv
Jonah4:1 Yonaa buatc Ziouv hnangv naaic nor zoux maiv horpc ninh nyei hnyouv
Jonah4:2 Ninh ziouc daux gaux mbuox Ziouv
Jonah4:3 Ziouv aah! Meih ih zanc bun yie daic aqv maah! Yie daic zungv gauh longx ziangh jienv.”
Jonah4:4 Ziouv dau
Jonah4:5 Yonaa cuotv ziqc zingh mingh dong bung maengx mbiorv diqv dien liuh zueiz jienv wuov bingx laangh. Ninh zuov jienv mangc gaax
Jonah4:6 Ziouv Tin-Hungh bun mbiorngz hmei cuotv daaih mbiorngz jienv wuov
Jonah4:7 Da'nyeic ndorm lungh njang
Jonah4:8 Mba'hnoi cuotv daaih
Jonah4:9 Mv baac Tin-Hungh gorngv
Jonah4:10 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Jonah4:11 Ni^naa^we Domh Zingh maaih yietc sinx i waanc maiv hiuv duqv haaix hnoi njang haaix hnoi hmuangx nyei mienh. Saeng-kuv yaac maaih camv. Yie maiv zeiz oix zuqc gauh korv-lienh ninh mbuo fai?”
Micah1:1 Doix Yotaam
Micah1:2 Maanc fingx mienh aah! Meih mbuo dauh dauh oix zuqc muangx. Baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei yietc zungv
Micah1:3 Mangc maah! Ziouv cuotv ninh yiem nyei dorngx daaih. Ninh oix njiec daaih caaiv jienv ndau hlang nyei dorngx mingh.
Micah1:4 Zuangx mbong oix yiem ninh ga'ndiev yuqc
Micah1:5 Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic cuotv daaih se laaix Yaakopv ngaengc Tin-Hungh
Micah1:6 Weic naaiv Ziouv gorngv
Micah1:7 Yie oix zorqv yiem Saa^maa^lie zuqc daaih nyei yietc zungv miuc-fangx mborqv muonc nzengc. Yiem zaangc zienh nyei biauv maaic sin bietv daaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv oix zuqc longc douz buov. Ninh nyei yietc zungv miuc-fangx yie oix baaic waaic. Weic zuqc se yiem maaic buonv-sin mienh nyei gong-zinh siou daaih
Micah1:8 Hnangv naaic Mikaa gorngv
Micah1:9 Weic zuqc Saa^maa^lie zuqc siang nyei dorngx zorc maiv haih longx
Micah1:10 Maiv dungx yiem Gatc gorngv naaiv deix sic
Micah1:11 Saafi nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc diev nyaiv
Micah1:12 Maalotv Mienh jorm hnyouv zuov jienv hnamv daaih maaih dorngx tengx
Micah1:13 Laakitv Mienh aah! Oix zuqc zorqv mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie buic jienv maaz. Meih mbuo zoux gorn bun Si^on baamz zuiz
Micah1:14 Weic naaiv meih mbuo Yu^ndaa Mienh oix zuqc fungx leih hiaang nyei zingh nyeic bun Mo^le^setv Gatc Mungv nyei mienh. I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh laaic duqv Akc^sipv Zingh nyei mienh tengx mv baac maiv duqv.
Micah1:15 Maa^le^saa Mungv nyei mienh aah! Ziouv oix zorqv meih mbuo jiu bun yiem win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev. I^saa^laa^en nyei bieiv zeiv oix biaux mingh yiem Aa^ndun^lam.
Micah1:16 Yu^ndaa Mienh aah! Teix nqoi meih mbuo nyei mba'biei bun cing meih mbuo nzauh weic meih mbuo buangv hnyouv nyei fu'jueiv. Bun meih mbuo nyei m'nqorngv njang hnangv domh jaangv-ngongh nyei m'nqorngv njang nor
Micah2:1 “Daav za'eix zoux waaic sic
Micah2:2 Ninh mbuo mauv lingh deic yaac caangv aqv
Micah2:3 Weic naaiv Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Micah2:4 Taux wuov zanc meih mbuo ziouc benx nzung bun mienh baaux huotv meih mbuo. Ninh mbuo oix nzauh nyiemv hnyouv mun nyei gorngv
Micah2:5 Weic naaiv yiem Ziouv gapv zunv nyei wuic meih mbuo maiv maaih haaix dauh duqv yiem jienv dingc maengc mangc
Micah2:6 Zuangx mienh zunh mbuox yie
Micah2:7 Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun aah! Horpc zuqc hnangv naaiv gorngv aqv fai? “ Ziouv nyei Singx Lingh maiv maaih noic aqv fai? Naaiv deix sic ninh za'gengh zoux nyei?” Yie gorngv nyei waac maiv haih tengx zoux horpc nyei mienh duqv longx fai?
Micah2:8 Meih mbuo jiez daaih hnangv win-wangv nor
Micah2:9 Meih mbuo zunc yie nyei baeqc fingx gu'nyuoz nyei m'sieqv dorn cuotv ninh mbuo kuh yiem nyei biauv. Meih zorqv nqoi yie oix ceix bun ninh mbuo nyei naamh nyouz nyei fuqv weic yietc liuz.
Micah2:10 Jiez sin daaih mingh aqv
Micah2:11 Se gorngv maaih mienh jiex naaiv jiex wuov gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh ziouc gorngv
Micah2:12 Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun aah! Yie ndongc haaix zungv oix siou meih mbuo zunv. Yie oix gapv zunv zengc njiec nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Yie oix dorh ninh mbuo yiem zunv yietc norm dorngx hnangv ba'gi yungh yiem ba'gi yungh laanh
Micah2:13 Tengx ninh mbuo koi jauv wuov dauh oix yiem ninh mbuo nyei wuov ndaangc mingh. Ninh mbuo oix mborqv tong gan zingh laatc gaengh cuotv. Ninh mbuo nyei hungh ziouc mingh ndaangc
Micah3:1 Yie gorngv
Micah3:2 Daaux nzuonx meih mbuo nzorng zoux longx nyei jauv
Micah3:3 Meih mbuo nyanc yie nyei baeqc fingx nyei orv
Micah3:4 Wuov zanc ninh mbuo ziouc heuc jienv tov Ziouv mv baac ninh maiv dau ninh mbuo. Wuov zanc ninh maiv huin hmien mangc ninh mbuo
Micah3:5 Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Micah3:6 Hmuangx ziouc njiec daaih om jienv meih mbuo
Micah3:7 Douc waac mienh ziouc zuqc nyaiv
Micah3:8 Mv baac yie ganh aeqv
Micah3:9 Meih mbuo Yaakopv douh zong nyei bieiv zeiv aah! Meih mbuo gunv I^saa^laa^en nyei douh zong nyei mienh aah! Muangx yie nyei waac maah! Meih mbuo mangc piex baengh fim nyei jauv
Micah3:10 Meih mbuo longc daix mienh nyei nziaamv liepc Si^on
Micah3:11 Zingh nyei bieiv-zeiv nyanc nyaanh hmuangx siemv zuiz. Ninh nyei sai mienh njaaux weic douh duqv nyaanh
Micah3:12 Se laaix meih mbuo Si^on zungv oix zuqc laih hnangv laih lingh nor. Ye^lu^saa^lem oix benx ga'naaiv-ndui
Micah4:1 Nqa'haav laai nyei hnoi-nyieqc oix hnangv naaiv nor. Zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv yiem nyei mbong duqv liepc gauh hlang jiex zuangx mbong. Zungv oix ceix gauh hlang jiex yietc zungv mbong-aiv. Maanc fingx mienh oix ndutc ndutc nyei daaih.
Micah4:2 Camv-norm guoqv nyei mienh oix daaih gorngv
Micah4:3 Ninh oix siemv naaiv fingx caux wuov fingx gu'nyuoz nyei sic
Micah4:4 Gorqv-mienh duqv zueiz gorqv-mienh nyei a'ngunc hmei ga'ndiev
Micah4:5 Maanc fingx mienh ei jienv ninh mbuo nyei zienh nyei mbuox zoux
Micah4:6 Ziouv gorngv
Micah4:7 Yie oix bun zaux waaic nyei mienh benx zengc njiec nyei mienh
Micah4:8 O Ye^lu^saa^lem aac
Micah4:9 Meih weic haaix diuc nyiemv ndongc naaic mbui? Yiem meih gu'nyuoz maiv maaih hungh diex fai? Meih nyei caangh laangh mienh zuqc mietc meih cingx daaih liemh zeih mun hnangv m'sieqv dorn mun gu'nguaaz nor fai?
Micah4:10 O Si^on aah! Gunv niouv sin njunh jienv yiem
Micah4:11 Mv baac ih zanc maaih camv-norm guoqv nyei baeqc fingx gapv zunv daaih mborqv meih. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Micah4:12 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv Ziouv hnamv nyei sic
Micah4:13 O Si^on aah! Jiez sin daaih mborqv mbiauh maah! Weic zuqc yie oix bun meih nyei jorng benx hlieqv-jorng
Micah5:1 Ye^lu^saa^lem Mienh aah! Diuc nzoih meih nyei jun-baeng
Micah5:2 Ziouv gorngv
Micah5:3 Hnangv naaic Ziouv oix zorqv ninh nyei baeqc fingx jiu bun ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv
Micah5:4 Ninh daaih nyei ziangh hoc ninh kaux Ziouv nyei qaqv gunv ninh nyei baeqc fingx
Micah5:5 Ninh oix dorh baengh orn nyei jauv daaih. Atc^si^lie Mienh bieqc yie mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei ziangh hoc
Micah5:6 Ninh mbuo ziouc longc nzuqc ndaauv gunv Atc^si^lie Guoqv
Micah5:7 Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun zengc njiec nyei mienh oix zuqc yiem camv-fingx mienh mbu'ndongx
Micah5:8 Yaakopv zengc njiec nyei mienh ziouc zuqc yiem camv-guoqv mienh mbu'ndongx
Micah5:9 I^saa^laa^en Mienh ziouc duqv hingh jiex win-wangv
Micah5:10 Ziouv gorngv
Micah5:11 Yie oix mietc nzengc meih mbuo nyei guoqv gu'nyuoz nyei zingh
Micah5:12 Yie oix mietc nzengc yietc zungv zoux faatv nyei mienh
Micah5:13 Yie oix mietc meih mbuo zuqc daaih nyei miuc-fangx caux yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx nyei la'bieiv-dongc. Jiex mingh meih mbuo maiv duqv aengx gueic njiec baaix ganh nyei buoz zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv.
Micah5:14 Yie oix caeqv nzengc yiem meih mbuo nyei guoqv nyei Aa^se^laa zienh nyeiz nyei fangx
Micah5:15 Yie oix qiex jiez
Micah6:1 I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Muangx Ziouv gox nyei waac. “Jiez daaih dorng jienv domh mbong gorngv meih gox nyei waac
Micah6:2 O zuangx mbong caux ndau yietc liuz wuonv nyei gorn-ndoqv aac
Micah6:3 “O yie nyei baeqc fingx aac
Micah6:4 Yie dorh meih mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih
Micah6:5 O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Jangx jienv Mo^apc nyei hungh
Micah6:6 Yie oix zuqc dorh haaix nyungc daaih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien
Micah6:7 Ziouv a'hneiv yie fongc horc cin-cin ba'gi yungh gouv fai? Oix zuqc dorh waanc-waanc diuh ga'lanv youh nyei ndoqv? Yie horpc zuqc weic ganh nyei zuiz fongc horc yie nyei dorn-hlo fai? Se weic hnyouv gu'nyuoz nyei zuiz fongc horc ganh nyei cien dorn fai?
Micah6:8 O baamh mienh aac
Micah6:9 Ziouv nyei qiex heuc jienv zunh mbuox naaiv norm zingh. Cong-mengh mienh oix zuqc taaih meih nyei mengh. “O yiem zingh gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh aah! Muangx maah!
Micah6:10 Yie maiv haih la'kuqv yiem orqv mienh nyei biauv longc hnyouv maiv zingx pienx daaih nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh mbuo longc ga'naaiv-hlaau pienx mienh
Micah6:11 Se gorngv mienh longc waengc mienh nyei nziangx caux kuei mienh nyei nziangx-dorh
Micah6:12 Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz meih mbuo nyei butv-zoih mienh za'gengh! doqc haic
Micah6:13 Weic naaiv yie jiez gorn mborqv meih mbuo
Micah6:14 Meih mbuo duqv nyanc mv baac nyanc maiv beuv
Micah6:15 Meih mbuo duqv zuangx mv baac maiv duqv siou. Meih mbuo duqv zaax ga'lanv biouv mv baac maiv duqv longc ga'lanv youh nzaatv ganh nyei sin. Meih mbuo duqv a'ngunc biouv mv baac maiv duqv hopv a'ngunc diuv
Micah6:16 meih mbuo zuotc Omli Hungh orqv nyei leiz
Micah7:1 Yie zuqc kouv aqv. Yie se hnangv siou baac nqaai gorng nyei biouv nor
Micah7:2 Yiem naaiv norm deic-bung maiv zengc yietc dauh gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh. Yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx maiv maaih yietc dauh hnyouv zingx. Dauh dauh mienh zuov jienv daix mienh
Micah7:3 Ninh mbuo nyei buoz za'gengh haih zoux orqv sic. Zoux jien nyei mienh caux siemv zuiz jien oix nyanc nyaanh hmuangx
Micah7:4 Yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx gauh longx jiex nyei mienh se hnangv maaih njimv nyei miev. Meih mbuo hnyouv gauh zingx jiex nyei mienh yaac hnangv njimv nyei laatc. Siouv gaeng mienh gorngv oix taux nyei hnoi
Micah7:5 Maiv dungx kaux meih nyei juangc laangz mienh
Micah7:6 Weic zuqc dorn mangc piex die
Micah7:7 Mv baac yie ganh aeqv
Micah7:8 Yie nyei win-wangv aac
Micah7:9 Yie oix zuqc diev jienv Ziouv nouz yie
Micah7:10 Wuov zanc yie nyei win-wangv ziouc duqv buatc
Micah7:11 Ye^lu^saa^lem aac
Micah7:12 Taux wuov hnoi meih nyei baeqc fingx ziouc yiem norm-norm dorngx nzuonx daaih lorz meih. Ninh mbuo yiem Atc^si^lie Guoqv taux I^yipv Deic-Bung
Micah7:13 Ndau-beih ziouc zuqc baaic huaang nzengc
Micah7:14 Ziouv aac
Micah7:15 Ziouv gorngv
Micah7:16 Maanc guoqv mienh ziouc buatc yaac zuqc nyaiv
Micah7:17 Ninh mbuo ziouc mbiec nie-mbung hnangv naang nor
Micah7:18 O Tin-Hungh aac
Micah7:19 Meih aengx oix korv-lienh nzunc yie mbuo
Micah7:20 Meih oix ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun Yaakopv
Nahum1:1 Naaiv se douc daaih gorngv Ni^naa^we Zingh nyei waac. Naaiv buonv sou gorngv Enkotc Mienh
Nahum1:2 Ziouv se nzaeng mienh yaac jaauv win nyei Tin-Hungh
Nahum1:3 Ziouv maiv qiex jiez siepv yaac maaih domh qaqv. Haaix dauh dorngc zuiz
Nahum1:4 Ninh hatc koiv
Nahum1:5 Domh mbong yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien dongz
Nahum1:6 Ninh qiex jiez
Nahum1:7 Ziouv se longx haic. Yiem kouv naanc hnoi ninh zoux kaux duqv wuonv nyei dorngx. Ninh yaac goux ndaauh kaux ninh nyei mienh.
Nahum1:8 Mv baac ninh oix longc hongh suiv yiemx
Nahum1:9 Ni^naa^we Mienh aah! Meih mbuo daav haaix nyungc za'eix hoic Ziouv? Ninh oix bun caux ninh doix-dekc wuov deix zuqc mietc nzengc. Win-wangv zungv maiv duqv njiec da'nyeic nzunc qaqv.
Nahum1:10 Meih mbuo se hnangv njimv-mbiorngz
Nahum1:11 Maaih dauh yiem Ni^naa^we cuotv daaih. Ninh hnamv cuotv orqv nyei za'eix zoux bun Ziouv
Nahum1:12 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Nahum1:13 Atc^si^lie Mienh nyei ndiangx-gaaz yiem meih mbuo nyei jaang
Nahum1:14 Ziouv ziangv jienv Ni^naa^we hatc waac gorngv
Nahum1:15 Mangc maah! Maaih laanh mienh nyei zaux yangh wuov mbong daaih dorh kuv fienx
Nahum2:1 Ni^naa^we Zingh aac
Nahum2:2 Ziouv oix bun Yaakopv nyei njang-laangc nzuonx daaih hnangv loz wuov nor
Nahum2:3 Ninh nyei mborqv jaax henv nyei baeng nyei torngv-baaih siqv nyei. Baeng zuqv nyei lui-houx siqv-hongc. Ninh mbuo liuc leiz mborqv jaax wuov hnoi
Nahum2:4 Mborqv jaax cie ndutc ndutc nyei gan hei-horngc mingh
Nahum2:5 Ninh heuc ninh nyei baeng-bieiv daaih
Nahum2:6 Zaeqv ndaaih nyei gaengh koi nqoi mi'aqv
Nahum2:7 Baeng ciev nzengc hungh maac nyei lui-houx
Nahum2:8 Ni^naa^we se hnangv wuom-domh
Nahum2:9 Luv jiem
Nahum2:10 Baaic waaic baaic huaang
Nahum2:11 Sienh nyei dorngx caux dorh sienh dorn nyei kuotv yiem haaix? Se sienh gouv sienh nyeiz bieqc cuotv nyei dorngx yiem haaix? Sienh dorn yiem wuov yaac maiv maaih mienh haeqv.
Nahum2:12 Sienh gouv betv ninh duqv daaih nyei orv gaux uix sienh dorn
Nahum2:13 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Nahum3:1 Guoqv jienv mienh nziaamv nyei zingh oix zuqc kouv aqv. Maaih gorngv-baeqc nyei sic caux luv daaih nyei ga'naaiv buangv nzengc. Caangv nyei sic yaac maiv dingh.
Nahum3:2 Muangx maah! Biaav-bin nyei qiex mbui fiuv-fiuv nyei
Nahum3:3 Geh maaz baeng tiux mingh mborqv jaax
Nahum3:4 Ni^naa^we hnangv naaiv nor zuqc daaih weic zuqc ninh se hnangv maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn maaih hienx nyei sic camv. Ninh zoux nzueic yuoqc mienh
Nahum3:5 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Nahum3:6 Yie oix zorqv laih hlopv nyei ga'naaiv zoi meih
Nahum3:7 Haaix dauh buatc meih ziouc oix hluotv nqaang biaux yaac gorngv
Nahum3:8 Ni^naa^we aac
Nahum3:9 E^ti^o^bie caux I^yipv se ninh nyei qaqv
Nahum3:10 Mv baac ninh corc zuqc caangv mingh
Nahum3:11 Ni^naa^we aac
Nahum3:12 Meih wuonv nyei zingh laatc ziouc hnangv ngongh nyorx ndiangx maaih zuoqc ndaangc nyei daauh torngx ngongh nyorx biouv. Yietv nqamv ziouc ndortv bieqc oix nyanc nyei mienh nyei nzuih.
Nahum3:13 Mangc maah! Meih nyei baeng se hnangv yiem meih mbu'ndongx nyei m'sieqv dorn nor. Meih nyei guoqv nyei gaengh yiem win-wangv nyei nza'hmien koi nqoi. Douz yaac buov mietc meih nyei gaengh sorn.
Nahum3:14 Oix zuqc zaangh wuom liouh jienv win-wangv daaih weih jienv
Nahum3:15 Yiem wuov meih zungv zuqc douz buov qui
Nahum3:16 Meih jaa saeng-eix mienh gauh camv lungh nyei hleix. Mv baac ih zanc maiv buatc mi'aqv
Nahum3:17 Meih nyei zoux hlo nyei mienh hnangv jopv-nyeic nor camv
Nahum3:18 O Atc^si^lie nyei hungh diex aah! Meih nyei goux yungh mienh m'njormh nzengc mi'aqv. Meih nyei zoux hlo nyei mienh yaac m'njormh nzengc. Meih nyei baeqc fingx faatv nzaanx nyei yiem wuov mbong
Nahum3:19 Meih zuqc mun kouv
Habakkuk1:1 Naaiv se douc waac mienh
Habakkuk1:2 Ziouv aac
Habakkuk1:3 Meih weic haaix diuc bun yie buatc naaiv deix orqv sic
Habakkuk1:4 Weic naaiv leiz-latc mau haic. Baengh fim nyei leiz yietc liuz maiv hingh. Weic zuqc orqv mienh weih gormx kuv mienh
Habakkuk1:5 Ziouv gorngv
Habakkuk1:6 Weic naaiv yie liepc Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh
Habakkuk1:7 Ninh mbuo ciouv
Habakkuk1:8 Ninh mbuo nyei maaz gauh siepv nda'maauh mbeux
Habakkuk1:9 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv daaih weic zoux doqc. Ninh mbuo nyei guanh hungx jienv wuov ndaangc mingh hnangv deic-bung-huaang nyei nziaaux buonc nor. Ninh mbuo zorqv caangv daaih nyei mienh gapv zunv ndongc saa-ziou camv.
Habakkuk1:10 Ninh mbuo huotv hungh diex
Habakkuk1:11 Ninh mbuo hnangv nziaaux nor puotv jiex mingh. Benx maaih zuiz nyei mienh
Habakkuk1:12 O Ziouv
Habakkuk1:13 Meih nyei m'zing cing-nzengc haic
Habakkuk1:14 Meih bun mienh hnangv yiem koiv nyei mbiauz
Habakkuk1:15 Mbaa^mbi^lon Mienh longc diux zorqv zuangx mienh
Habakkuk1:16 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo fongc horc buov ziec bun ninh mbuo nyei mungz
Habakkuk1:17 Ninh mbuo maiv dingh liouh nyei longc nzuqc ndaauv daix maanc guoqv mienh
Habakkuk2:1 Yie oix souv jienv siouv gaeng nyei dorngx yiem laauh gu'nguaaic mangc. Mangc gaax Ziouv oix gorngv haaix nyungc mbuox yie
Habakkuk2:2 Ziouv hnangv naaiv dau yie
Habakkuk2:3 Weic zuqc naaiv deix laauc yaangh nyei sic corc zuov taux dingc ziangx nyei ziangh hoc cingx daaih cuotv. Wuov deix ziangh hoc oix siepv-siepv nyei taux
Habakkuk2:4 “Mangc maah! Hnyouv maiv zingx nyei mienh zungv maiv duqv ziangh
Habakkuk2:5 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Zinh zoih nduov mienh zoux dorngc
Habakkuk2:6 “Naaiv deix guoqv nyei mienh oix saac yaev aengx huotv dongh hingh ninh mbuo wuov deix maiv zeiz? Ninh mbuo gorngv
Habakkuk2:7 Qiemx zaeqv wuov deix maiv zeiz oix liemh zeih jiez daaih fai? Bun meih sin zinx wuov deix yaac maiv zeiz oix liemh zeih nyie fai? Meih ziouc zuqc ninh mbuo luv aqv.
Habakkuk2:8 Weic zuqc meih luv camv-norm guoqv nyei mienh
Habakkuk2:9 “Weic ganh nyei biauv zornc duqv maiv zingx nyei zinh zoih
Habakkuk2:10 Mv baac meih daav nyei za'eix zoux bun meih nyei biauv zong mienh zuqc nyaiv. Weic zuqc meih bun camv-guoqv nyei baeqc fingx zuqc guangc maengc
Habakkuk2:11 Njongc nyei la'bieiv zungv oix heuc cuotv gorngv meih
Habakkuk2:12 “Daix mienh bun nziaamv liouc cuotv weic liepc mungv
Habakkuk2:13 Maanc guoqv mienh laauh luic zoux nyei se weic bun douz buov. Maanc fingx mienh zoux kouv yaac maiv duqv haaix nyungc. Hnangv naaic se maiv zeiz Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv zoux fai?
Habakkuk2:14 Hiuv Ziouv nyei njang-laangc nyei mienh oix yiem buangv lungh ndiev
Habakkuk2:15 “Haaix dauh bun weih gormx nyei mienh hopv diuv yaac zorpc deix ndie-doqc ziouc nquin mingh
Habakkuk2:16 Meih ganh oix zuqc nyaiv taux ndiev
Habakkuk2:17 Meih zoux doqc bun Le^mbaa^norn nyei sic oix winh bun meih. Hieh zoih zuqc mietc yaac oix haeqv meih gamh nziex
Habakkuk2:18 “Miuc-fangx maaih haaix nyungc maaih lamh longc? Kungx benx mienh diu daaih
Habakkuk2:19 Gorngv mbuox longc ndiangx zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv
Habakkuk2:20 Mv baac Ziouv yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc nyei singx dinc. Bun lungh ndiev maanc mienh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien nzieqc nzingz.”
Habakkuk3:1 Naaiv se Ziouv nyei douc waac mienh
Habakkuk3:2 O Ziouv aac
Habakkuk3:3 Tin-Hungh yiem Temaan daaih
Habakkuk3:4 Ninh nyei njang hnangv mba'hnoi
Habakkuk3:5 Wuon-baengc mingh ndaangc ninh
Habakkuk3:6 Ninh souv jienv ndorqc baamh gen. Ninh mangc yaac nqamv maanc fingx mienh. Yietc liuz yiem nyei geh zorng huv muonc nzengc. Maanc gouv nyei mbong-aiv yaac biopc njiec. Ninh nyei jauv hnangv loz-hnoi nyei nor.
Habakkuk3:7 Yie duqv buatc Kuqan Mienh nyei ndopv-liuh zuqc kouv naanc
Habakkuk3:8 Ziouv aac
Habakkuk3:9 Tin-Hungh baeng juang-zinx cuotv
Habakkuk3:10 Zuangx mbong buatc meih ziouc dongz
Habakkuk3:11 Meih nyei forng buonv cuotv mingh siepv njapc njapc nyei
Habakkuk3:12 Meih nouz jienv nyei yangh tong lungh ndiev. Meih qiex jiez jienv caaiv maanc guoqv mienh.
Habakkuk3:13 Meih cuotv mingh njoux meih nyei baeqc fingx
Habakkuk3:14 Win-wangv daaih hnangv nziaaux-zunc oix buonc yie mbuo nzaanx nzengc
Habakkuk3:15 Meih longc meih nyei maaz caaiv koiv
Habakkuk3:16 Yie muangx haiz naaiv deix qiex ziouc sin zinx. Yie nyei nzuih meix ndenz-ndenz nyei. Yie nyei mbungv yaac latv nzengc
Habakkuk3:17 Maiv gunv ngongh nyorx ndiangx maiv nqoi biangh
Habakkuk3:18 yie corc oix kaux Ziouv njien-youh
Habakkuk3:19 Ziouv Tin-Hungh se yie nyei qaqv. Ninh bun yie nyei zaux hnangv njaih nyeiz nyei deih caaiv duqv jienv nor. Ninh bun yie yangh hlang nyei dorngx. Bun taux dorh nzung nyei mienh. Longc patv nyei jaa-sic.
Zephaniah1:1 Dongh Aamon nyei dorn
Zephaniah1:2 “Da'faanh yiem ndau-beih nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv

Zephaniah1:4 “Yie oix sung yie nyei buoz mborqv Yu^ndaa

Zephaniah2:3 Meih mbuo yietc zungv yiem deic-bung nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh
Zephaniah2:4 Gaasaa oix zuqc guangc huaang

Zephaniah2:7 Naaiv koiv-hlen nyei ndau ziouc benx Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun zengc njiec nyei mienh duqv nyei buonc. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem wuov bungx yungh. Lungh maanz-hmuangx ninh mbuo duqv bueix Atc^ke^lon Zingh nyei biauv
Zephaniah2:8 “Yie haiz Mo^apc Mienh gorngv doqc
Zephaniah2:9 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv

Zephaniah2:11 Ziouv oix zoux bun ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic! Zungv bun lungh ndiev nyei zuangx zienh jaic jienv njiec. Norm-norm guoqv nyei baeqc fingx
Zephaniah2:12 O E^ti^o^bie Mienh aah! Meih mbuo fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc yie nyei nzuqc ndaauv daix.
Zephaniah2:13 Ziouv oix sung cuotv ninh nyei buoz mborqv baqv bung
Zephaniah2:14 benx ngongh guanh
Zephaniah2:15 Naaiv se njien-youh

Haggai1:1 Yiem Ndaa^li^atc zoux hungh diex da'nyeic hnyangx luoqc hlaax saeng-yietv

Haggai1:3 Ziouv aengx longc douc waac mienh
Haggai1:4 “Hnangv naaic
Haggai1:5 Ih zanc Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Haggai1:6 Meih mbuo zuangx camv mv baac siou duqv zoqc. Meih mbuo duqv nyanc mv baac yietc liuz maiv beuv. Duqv hopv mv baac yietc liuz maiv gaux. Meih mbuo duqv lui-houx zuqv mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh siouv. Haaix dauh duqv gong-zinh yaac maiv gaux yungz maengc.”
Haggai1:7 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Haggai1:8 Oix zuqc faaux wuov jiex mbong lorz ndiangx daaih zoux zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv. Hnangv naaic yie ziouc a'hneiv naaiv norm biauv yaac duqv mienh taaih yie.”

Zechariah1:1 Ndaa^li^atc zoux Besie nyei hungh da'nyeic hnyangx wuov hnyangx
Zechariah1:2 “ Ziouv qiex jiez haic meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix.
Zechariah1:3 Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc mbuox baeqc fingx
Zechariah1:4 “Maiv dungx hnangv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix. Zinh ndaangc nyei douc waac mienh zunh mbuox ninh mbuo
Zechariah1:5 Meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem haaix? Wuov deix douc waac mienh yietc liuz ziangh nyei fai?
Zechariah1:6 Yie longc yie nyei bou
Zechariah1:7 Ndaa^li^atc zoux hungh da'nyeic hnyangx

Zechariah1:11 Geh maaz wuov deix mbuox souv jienv faan ziqc liouh ndiangx-lomc gu'nyuoz wuov dauh

Zechariah2:13 Maanc mienh aah! Oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien sekv nzieqc nyei
Zechariah3:1 Ziouv aengx bun yie mangc buatc Yo^su^waa domh sai mienh souv jienv Ziouv nyei fin-mienh nyei nza'hmien. Saadaan yaac souv jienv Yo^su^waa nyei mbiaauc bung ga'hlen oix gox ninh.
Zechariah3:2 Ziouv gorngv mbuox Saadaan
Zechariah3:3 Yo^su^waa zuqv jienv laih hlopv nyei lui-houx souv jienv fin-mienh nyei nza'hmien.
Zechariah3:4 Wuov dauh fin-mienh ziouc mbuox souv ga'hlen wuov deix
Zechariah3:5 Yie ziouc gorngv
Zechariah3:6 Ziouv nyei fin-mienh hnangv naaiv nor kuinx Yo^su^waa
Zechariah3:7 “Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Zechariah3:8 “+‘O Yo^su^waa domh sai mienh aah! Meih caux zueiz jienv meih nyei nza'hmien nyei doic
Zechariah3:9 Mangc maah! Yie zorqv norm la'bieiv an jienv Yo^su^waa nyei nza'hmien. Yiem wuov norm la'bieiv maaih siec bung. Yie yaac oix ndingh jangx-hoc yiem wuov norm la'bieiv. Nduqc hnoi hnangv yie oix zorqv nqoi naaiv norm deic-bung zoux dorngc nyei zuiz.’ Naaiv se Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
Zechariah3:10 “+‘Taux wuov hnoi gorqv-mienh oix heuc gorqv-mienh nyei juangc laangz mienh daaih zueiz jienv ninh nyei a'ngunc hmei caux ngongh nyorx ndiangx ga'ndiev.’+” Naaiv se Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv nyei waac.
Zechariah4:1 Zinh ndaangc caux yie gorngv waac wuov dauh fin-mienh nzuonx daaih heuc yie nyie hnangv yie m'njormh mingh nyie daaih nor.

Zechariah5:2 Fin-mienh naaic yie
Zechariah5:3 Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox yie
Zechariah5:4 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Zechariah5:5 Caux yie gorngv waac naaiv dauh fin-mienh cuotv daaih mbuox yie
Zechariah5:6 Yie naaic gaax
Zechariah5:7 Yie buatc longc jungz zoux daaih nyei nqaaix zuqc zorqv nqoi. Yiem ndaan gu'nyuoz maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn zueiz jienv.
Zechariah5:8 Wuov dauh fin-mienh gorngv
Zechariah5:9 Yie aengx cau hmien mangc
Zechariah5:10 Yie naaic caux yie gorngv waac wuov dauh fin-mienh
Zechariah5:11 Ninh dau
Zechariah6:1 Yie aengx cau hmien mangc
Zechariah6:2 Da'yietv jaax cie nyei maaz siqv nyei
Zechariah6:3 da'faam jaax nyei maaz baeqc nyei
Zechariah6:4 Yie ziouc naaic caux yie gorngv waac wuov dauh fin-mienh
Zechariah6:5 Fin-mienh dau yie
Zechariah6:6 Maaz-jieqv wuov jaax maaz-cie mingh baqv bung. Maaz-baeqc wuov jaax mingh fai bung
Zechariah6:7 Naaiv deix maaz cuotv daaih beqv jienv oix mingh zaah baamh gen. Fin-mienh ziouc gorngv
Zechariah6:8 Fin-mienh aengx heuc jienv gorngv mbuox yie
Zechariah6:9 Yie aengx duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Zechariah6:10 “Meih oix zuqc mingh zuqc guaatv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon nzuonx daaih nyei mienh Hen^ndai
Zechariah6:11 Dorh naaiv deix jiem nyaanh zoux norm ningv yaac tengx Yo^saa^ndatc nyei dorn
Zechariah6:12 Oix zuqc mbuox ninh
Zechariah6:13 Dongh naaiv dauh oix ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv
Zechariah6:14 Wuov norm ningv oix zuqc an jienv zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv weic jangx Hen^ndai
Zechariah6:15 Yiem go nyei mienh oix daaih tengx jienv ceix zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv. Meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv paaiv yie daaih meih mbuo naaiv. Se gorngv meih mbuo longc hnyouv muangx Ziouv
Zechariah7:1 Ndaa^li^atc zoux hungh da'feix hnyangx juov hlaax
Zechariah7:2 Mbetc^ten Mienh paaiv Saa^le^se caux Legem Melekv caux ninh mbuo nyei mienh mingh tov Ziouv ceix fuqv
Zechariah7:3 yaac naaic yiem Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei biauv nyei sai mienh caux douc waac mienh
Zechariah7:4 Wuov zanc yie duqv zipv Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Zechariah7:5 “Oix zuqc mbuox deic-bung nyei zuangx mienh caux sai mienh
Zechariah7:6 Meih mbuo nyanc yaac hopv
Zechariah7:7 Ye^lu^saa^lem caux weih gormx nyei zingh maaih mienh yiem yaac bungx-zuoqc
Zechariah7:8 Se^kaa^li^yaa aengx duqv zipv Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Zechariah7:9 “Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Zechariah7:10 Maiv dungx zeix auv-guaav
Zechariah7:11 “Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv kangv muangx
Zechariah7:12 Ninh mbuo bun ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv ngaengc ndongc la'bieiv. Nzauh heix muangx haiz leiz-latc caux Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv longc ninh nyei Singx Lingh bun zinh ndaangc nyei douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Weic naaiv Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv qiex jiez! haic ninh mbuo.
Zechariah7:13 “Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Zechariah7:14 Yie ziouc hnangv nziaaux-zunc bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx mingh yiem dongh ninh mbuo maiv hiuv nyei maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx. Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo guangc nyei deic-bung ziouc benx ndau-huaang
Zechariah8:1 Yie aengx duqv zipv Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei waac gorngv
Zechariah8:2 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:3 Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:4 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:5 Zingh gu'nyuoz nyei jaai-horngc yaac maaih dorn maaih sieqv caux fu'jueiv nziaauc buangv nzengc.”
Zechariah8:6 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:7 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:8 Yie oix dorh ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem gu'nyuoz. Ninh mbuo ziouc zoux yie nyei baeqc fingx. Yie yaac zoux ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh
Zechariah8:9 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:10 Wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc maiv gaengh taux
Zechariah8:11 Mv baac ih zanc yie maiv zoux bun naaiv deix zengc njiec nyei mienh hnangv zinh ndaangc nor.” Naaiv se Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv.
Zechariah8:12 “Weic zuqc ninh mbuo oix duqv baengh orn nyei zuangx. A'ngunc hmei oix ziangh biouv
Zechariah8:13 Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun caux I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun aah! Meih mbuo zinh ndaangc hnangv haaix nor benx zuqc ziex guoqv zioux nyei ga'naaiv
Zechariah8:14 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:15 Ih zanc yie hnangv wuov nor dingc aengx zoux longx bun Ye^lu^saa^lem caux Yu^ndaa nyei zeiv-fun. Meih mbuo maiv dungx gamh nziex.
Zechariah8:16 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux nyei se hnangv naaiv. Oix zuqc laanh caux laanh gorngv zien waac hnangv. Yiem meih mbuo nyei sic dorngh oix zuqc baengh fim nyei siemv weic bun duqv baengh orn.
Zechariah8:17 Maiv dungx daav orqv nyei za'eix hoic meih mbuo nyei juangc laangz mienh
Zechariah8:18 Yie aengx duqv zipv Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei waac.
Zechariah8:19 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah8:20 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv

Zechariah8:22 Ziex fingx mienh caux henv haic nyei guoqv nyei mienh oix daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem lorz Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv
Zechariah8:23 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv hnangv naaiv gorngv
Zechariah9:1 Naaiv se Ziouv nyei waac. Ziouv gorngv Hatc^laakv Deic
Zechariah9:2 Ninh yaac mangc nitv gapv-jaaix nyei Haamatv Zingh
Zechariah9:3 Tailaqv weic ganh ceix weih wuonv nyei zingh laatc
Zechariah9:4 Mv baac mangc maah! Ziouv oix zorqv Tailaqv maaih nyei ga'naaiv mingh
Zechariah9:5 Atc^ke^lon Zingh buatc ziouc gamh nziex
Zechariah9:6 Maaih lorpc zorpc buonv nyei mienh oix yiem Atc^ndotc. Yie
Zechariah9:7 Yie oix zorqv cuotv yiem ninh mbuo nyei nzuih nyei nziaamv
Zechariah9:8 Wuov zanc yie oix liepc ciangv weih gormx yie nyei biauv weic beu jienv
Zechariah9:9 O Si^on nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc njien-youh orn-lorqc. Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc heuc mbui nyei. Mangc maah! Meih mbuo nyei hungh daaih meih mbuo naaiv
Zechariah9:10 Yie oix mietc yiem E^faa^im mborqv jaax nyei maaz-cie
Zechariah9:11 Si^on Mienh aah! Yie
Zechariah9:12 Zuqc guaatv mingh corc maaih lamh hnamv nyei mienh aah! Nzuonx meih mbuo weih wuonv nyei dorngx daaih. Ih hnoi yie gorngv yie oix jaa buih bun meih mbuo duqv longx i gouv.
Zechariah9:13 Yie wuotv Yu^ndaa ngau zoux yie nyei juang-zinx
Zechariah9:14 Ziouv oix yiem ninh mbuo gu'nguaaic hinc cuotv

Zechariah9:17 Ninh mbuo nzueic
Zechariah10:1 Yiem cun gueix meih mbuo oix zuqc gan Ziouv tov mbiungc
Zechariah10:2 Weic zuqc an biauv nyei miuc-fangx dau maiv lamh longc nyei jauv. Mbouv guaax mienh gorngv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac. Mbeix mbeix mienh gorngv nyei mbeix se jaav nyei
Zechariah10:3 Ziouv gorngv
Zechariah10:4 An biauv-gorqv longc jienv jiex nyei la'bieiv oix yiem Yu^ndaa cuotv. Mborng ndau corng ndopv-liuh nyei dongc yaac oix yiem ninh cuotv
Zechariah10:5 Ninh mbuo lomh nzoih oix hnangv mborqv jaax nyei mienh henv mienh caaiv win-wangv njiec jaai-horngc nyei wuom-bamc. Ninh mbuo mborqv jaax weic zuqc Ziouv caux ninh mbuo yiem

Zechariah10:8 Yie oix heuc ninh mbuo yaac siou ninh mbuo zunv
Zechariah10:9 Maiv gunv yie bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx yiem ziex guoqv mbu'ndongx
Zechariah10:10 Yie oix dorh ninh mbuo yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung nzuonx daaih
Zechariah10:11 Ninh mbuo oix jiex I^yipv nyei koiv
Zechariah10:12 Yie oix bun yie nyei baeqc fingx kaux yie
Zechariah11:1 O Le^mbaa^norn aah! Koi nqoi meih nyei gaengh
Zechariah11:2 O zongh ndiangx aah! Oix zuqc nyiemv aqv. Weic zuqc si^ndaa zongh ndiangx mbaang mi'aqv
Zechariah11:3 Muangx maah! Goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh nyiemv
Zechariah11:4 Ziouv
Zechariah11:5 Maaiz ninh mbuo wuov deix daix ninh mbuo yaac maiv zuqc dingc zuiz. Maaic ba'gi yungh wuov deix gorngv
Zechariah11:6 Ziouv gorngv
Zechariah11:7 Yie ziouc zoux goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh goux oix zuqc daix daic nyei ba'gi yungh. Yie aengx zorqv i diuh biaav-mbiaac. Maaih diuh heuc “Hungh En
Zechariah11:8 Yietc hlaax nyieqc gu'nyuoz yie zunc cuotv buo dauh goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh weic zuqc yie maiv noic faanh ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo yaac nzorng yie.
Zechariah11:9 Yie ziouc gorngv mbuox ba'gi yungh guanh
Zechariah11:10 Yie aengx zorqv yie nyei biaav-mbiaac
Zechariah11:11 Dongh wuov hnoi wuov deix liepc nyei ngaengc waac jiex mi'aqv. Maaiz maaic ba'gi yungh nyei mienh mangc jienv yie ziouc hiuv duqv naaiv se Ziouv ganh gorngv nyei waac.
Zechariah11:12 Yie ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Zechariah11:13 Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie
Zechariah11:14 Yie aengx wuotv nauv yie nyei da'nyeic diuh biaav-mbiaac
Zechariah11:15 Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox yie
Zechariah11:16 weic zuqc yie oix yiem naaiv norm deic-bung liepc dauh goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh. Ninh maiv gunv oix zuqc daic nyei

Zechariah12:1 Naaiv se Ziouv gorngv taux I^saa^laa^en nyei waac. Dongh corng lungh
Zechariah12:2 “Mangc maah! Yie oix bun Ye^lu^saa^lem hnangv yietc zaanv diuv. Weih gormx nyei maanc guoqv mienh oix zuqc hopv ziouc lungh lungh laih laih. Ye^lu^saa^lem zuqc weih gormx nyei ziangh hoc
Zechariah12:3 Wuov hnoi yie oix bun Ye^lu^saa^lem weic maanc fingx benx norm hniev nyei la'bieiv. Haaix dauh bouh ziouc zuqc mun siang. Lungh ndiev maanc guoqv mienh oix gapv zunv daaih mborqv ninh.”
Zechariah12:4 Ziouv gorngv
Zechariah12:5 Yu^ndaa nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv ziouc yiem hnyouv hnamv
Zechariah12:6 “Wuov hnoi yie oix bun Yu^ndaa nyei bungh buonc bieiv zeiv hnangv zorqv douz an jienv zaangh ndui yaac hnangv douz-baav yiem mbiauh zeiv mbu'ndongx. Ninh mbuo ziouc buov qui weih gormx zaaix mbiaauc nyei maanc guoqv mienh. Mv baac Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei mienh duqv yiem ninh mbuo nyei loz-dorngx
Zechariah12:7 “Yie
Zechariah12:8 Wuov hnoi Ziouv oix beu jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem
Zechariah12:9 Wuov hnoi yie zungv jiez hnyouv oix mietc daaih mborqv Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei maanc guoqv mienh.
Zechariah12:10 “Yie oix bun Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh maaih hnyouv korv-lienh yaac maaih hnyouv daux gaux. Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo ziouc mangc yie
Zechariah12:11 Wuov hnoi yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem oix maaih nzauh nyiemv nyei sic hlo haic
Zechariah12:12 Yiem deic-bung gu'nyuoz
Zechariah12:13 Lewi nyei bungh buonc m'jangc dorn yaac ganh ca'lengc nzauh nyiemv
Zechariah12:14 Zengc njiec nyei bungh buonc nyei m'jangc dorn ganh ca'lengc. Ninh mbuo nyei m'sieqv dorn yaac ganh ca'lengc nzauh nyiemv.
Zechariah13:1 “Wuov hnoi oix maaih norm wuom-zingv koi nqoi weic Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun caux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei mienh nzaaux zuiz

Zechariah14:1 Mangc maah! Ziouv nyei hnoi taux fatv aqv. Ye^lu^saa^lem oix zuqc luv. Wuov deix zinh zoih ziouc yiem meih mbuo nyei nza'hmien bun nqoi.
Zechariah14:2 Weic zuqc yie oix siou zunv maanc guoqv caux Ye^lu^saa^lem mborqv jaax. Wuov norm zingh ziouc zuqc zorqv mi'aqv. Biauv oix zuqc luv
Zechariah14:3 Nqa'haav Ziouv ziouc cuotv mingh caux wuov deix guoqv mborqv jaax hnangv zinh ndaangc mborqv wuov nor.
Zechariah14:4 Wuov hnoi ninh nyei zaux oix souv jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei nza'hmien maengx
Zechariah14:5 Meih mbuo oix zuqc yangh yie nyei mbong nyei horngz biaux weic zuqc i bung mbong nyei horngz nzuiz mingh taux Aasen. Meih mbuo oix zuqc biaux
Zechariah14:6 Wuov hnoi
Zechariah14:7 Kungx maaih lungh hnoi zanc
Zechariah14:8 Wuov hnoi maaih wuom-daaih yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem liouc cuotv. Yietc buonc liouc mingh dong bung nyei koiv
Zechariah14:9 Ziouv ziouc duqv zoux gormx lungh ndiev nyei hungh. Wuov hnoi kungx maaih ninh zoux nduqc dauh Ziouv yaac kungx maaih ninh ganh nyei mengh hnangv.
Zechariah14:10 Ziangh norm deic-bung yiem baqv bung Ge^mbaa wuov taux Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei naamh bung
Zechariah14:11 Zingh gu'nyuoz oix maaih mienh yiem weic zuqc yietc liuz maiv aengx zuqc mietc
Zechariah14:12 Naaiv se Ziouv oix bun yietc zungv daaih caux Ye^lu^saa^lem mborqv jaax wuov deix guoqv nyei mienh zuqc ciouv nyei zeqc naanc. Ninh mbuo nyei zaux corc souv jienv nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo nyei orv ziouc yuqc. M'zing yiem jienv m'zing-komv huv
Zechariah14:13 Wuov hnoi Ziouv oix bun ninh mbuo domh lunc. Gorqv-mienh ziouc nyau jienv gorqv-mienh nyei buoz
Zechariah14:14 Liemh Yu^ndaa oix mborqv Ye^lu^saa^lem. Weih gormx nyei maanc guoqv nyei zinh zoih
Zechariah14:15 Maaz caux maaz-li
Zechariah14:16 Nqa'haav daaih mborqv Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov deix yietc zungv guoqv zengc njiec nyei mienh
Zechariah14:17 Se gorngv lungh ndiev haaix fingx mienh maiv faaux mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem baaix Hungh Diex
Zechariah14:18 Se gorngv I^yipv Mienh maiv mingh caux jienv zoux
Zechariah14:19 Naaiv se I^yipv caux maiv mingh jiex Mbiorv Liuh Zipv wuov deix guoqv nyei mienh zuqc dingc nyei zuiz.
Zechariah14:20 Wuov hnoi maaz nyei lingh ziouc ndingh jienv nzaangc gorngv
Zechariah14:21 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem caux Yu^ndaa nyei norm-norm caeng ziouc weic Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv cing-nzengc. Da'faanh daaih ziec nyei mienh yaac zorqv naaiv deix caeng zouv longc ziec nyei saeng-kuv orv. Wuov hnoi Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei biauv maiv aengx maaih maaiz maaic nyei mienh aqv.
Malachi1:1 Naaiv se Ziouv longc Maa^laa^ki douc bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei waac.
Malachi1:2 Ziouv gorngv
Malachi1:3 mv baac yie nzorng Esaau. Yie zoux bun ninh nyei mbong-aiv dorngx benx ndau-huaang
Malachi1:4 Se gorngv Esaau nyei zeiv-fun
Malachi1:5 Meih mbuo ganh nyei m'zing oix duqv buatc naaiv deix sic. Meih mbuo ziouc gorngv
Malachi1:6 “Dorn taaih ninh nyei die
Malachi1:7 “Meih mbuo dorh maaih uix nyei nyanc hopv daaih an yie nyei ziec-dorngh. “Meih mbuo gorngv
Malachi1:8 “Meih mbuo dorh m'zing maengh nyei saeng-kuv daaih zoux ziec nyei ga'naaiv se maiv zeiz zoux orqv sic fai? Meih mbuo dorh buoz-zaux waaic
Malachi1:9 “Ih zanc gunv tov Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yie mbuo. Meih mbuo nyei buoz fongc horc naaiv nyungc ga'naaiv

Malachi2:1 “O zuangx sai mienh aah! Yie ih zanc hnangv naaiv nor hatc meih mbuo.”
Malachi2:2 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Malachi2:3 “Mangc maah! Yie oix hemx meih mbuo nyei fun-faqv
Malachi2:4 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv aengx gorngv
Malachi2:5 Yie caux ninh mbuo liepc ngaengc waac oix bun ninh mbuo siouc nyuonh ndaauv
Malachi2:6 “Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih kungx njaaux zien leiz. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih meix yaac maiv gorngv haaix nyungc jaav. Ninh mbuo caux yie maaih jiu tong yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei gan longx yie. Ninh mbuo yaac dorh mienh camv goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz.
Malachi2:7 “Sai mienh oix zuqc beu jienv Tin-Hungh nyei zien leiz. Baamh mienh oix zuqc lorz ninh njaaux nyei waac
Malachi2:8 Mv baac daaux nzuonx meih mbuo guangc zoux horpc nyei jauv. Meih mbuo njaaux nyei waac yaac bun mienh camv zoux dorngc.” Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Malachi2:9 Yie ziouc bun meih mbuo zuqc zuangx mienh mangc piex
Malachi2:10 “Yie mbuo dauh dauh mienh maaih nduqc dauh Die maiv zeiz? Nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh zeix mbuo daaih
Malachi2:11 “Yu^ndaa Mienh maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei gan laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Yiem I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh maaih waaic haic nyei sic cuotv daaih weic zuqc Yu^ndaa Mienh zoux bun Ziouv hnamv nyei singx dinc maaih uix. Ninh mbuo longc baaix ganh fingx mienh nyei zienh wuov deix sieqv zoux auv.
Malachi2:12 Da'faanh zoux naaiv nyungc sic nyei mienh tov Ziouv pai guangc
Malachi2:13 “Meih mbuo yaac hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Meih mbuo wuom-mueic liouc njiec yiemx Ziouv nyei ziec-dorngh. Meih mbuo nzauh haic
Malachi2:14 Meih mbuo naaic gaax
Malachi2:15 “Se maiv zeiz wuov dauh nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo benx yietc dauh fai? Liemh sin liemh hnyouv yaac ninh nyei maiv zeiz? Ninh weic haaix diuc bun ninh mbuo benx yietc dauh? Weic zuqc ninh oix ninh mbuo maaih gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz. Weic naaiv oix zuqc faix fim gunv jienv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv. Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun dongh hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc duqv daaih nyei auv.”
Malachi2:16 Ziouv
Malachi2:17 “Laaix meih mbuo gorngv nyei waac

Malachi3:2 “Mv baac ninh daaih nyei hnoi
Malachi3:3 Ninh oix siemv zuiz hnangv sinx nyaanh nyei mienh sinx nyaanh zien nor. Ninh oix saax nzengc Lewi Mienh
Malachi3:4 Wuov zanc Yu^ndaa Mienh caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh oix fongc horc bun Ziouv nyei ga'naaiv
Malachi3:5 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv gorngv
Malachi3:6 “O Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun aah! Yie

Malachi3:9 Laaix meih mbuo pienx yie

Malachi3:13 Ziouv gorngv
Malachi3:14 “Meih mbuo gorngv

Matthew1:1 Yesu Giduc zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei zeiv-fun. Ndaawitv Hungh yaac zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun. Ih zanc fiev naaiv se Yesu Giduc doic jiex doic nyei douh zong.
Matthew1:2 Apc^laa^ham zoux I^sakc nyei die. I^sakc zoux Yaakopv nyei die. Yaakopv zoux Yu^ndaa mbuo muoz-dorn doic nyei die.
Matthew1:3 Yu^ndaa zoux Beletv caux Zelaa nyei die. Ninh mbuo nyei maa heuc Taamaa. Beletv zoux Hetv^lon nyei die. Hetv^lon zoux Laam nyei die.
Matthew1:4 Laam zoux Am^mi^naa^ndapc nyei die. Am^mi^naa^ndapc zoux Naason nyei die. Naason zoux Sanx^mon nyei die.
Matthew1:5 Sanx^mon zoux Mbo^aatc nyei die. Mbo^aatc nyei maa heuc Laa^hapc. Mbo^aatc zoux O^mbetc nyei die. O^mbetc nyei maa heuc Lu^te. O^mbetc zoux Jetc^si nyei die.
Matthew1:6 Jetc^si zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei die. Ndaawitv Hungh zoux Saa^lo^morn nyei die. Saa^lo^morn nyei maa zinh ndaangc zoux U^li^yaa nyei auv.
Matthew1:7 Saa^lo^morn zoux Le^hox^mbo^am nyei die. Le^hox^mbo^am zoux Aa^mbi^yaa nyei die. Aa^mbi^yaa zoux Aasaax nyei die.
Matthew1:8 Aasaax zoux Ye^ho^saa^fatv nyei die. Ye^ho^saa^fatv zoux Yolam nyei die. Yolam zoux Utc^si^yaa nyei die.
Matthew1:9 Utc^si^yaa zoux Yotaam nyei die. Yotaam zoux Aa^hatc nyei die. Aa^hatc zoux He^se^ki^yaa nyei die.
Matthew1:10 He^se^ki^yaa zoux Maa^natv^se nyei die. Maa^natv^se zoux Aamon nyei die. Aamon zoux Yo^si^yaa nyei die.
Matthew1:11 Yo^si^yaa zoux Ye^ko^ni^yaa mbuo muoz-doic nyei die. Wuov zanc doix zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc caangv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon Deic-Bung.
Matthew1:12 Zuqc caangv mingh liuz
Matthew1:13 Se^lupv^mbaa^mben zoux Aa^mbi^yutv nyei die. Aa^mbi^yutv zoux E^li^yaa^kim nyei die. E^li^yaa^kim zoux Aasor nyei die.
Matthew1:14 Aasor zoux Saax^ndokc nyei die. Saax^ndokc zoux Aakim nyei die. Aakim zoux E^li^utc nyei die.
Matthew1:15 E^li^utc zoux E^le^aa^saa nyei die. E^le^aa^saa zoux Matv^taan nyei die. Matv^taan zoux Yaakopv nyei die.
Matthew1:16 Yaakopv zoux Yosepv nyei die. Yosepv se Maa^li^yaa nyei nqox. Maa^li^yaa zoux Yesu nyei maa. Yesu dongh mienh heuc Giduc wuov dauh.
Matthew1:17 Hnangv naaic
Matthew1:18 Yesu Giduc cuotv seix nyei jauv-louc se hnangv naaiv. Yesu nyei maa
Matthew1:19 Ninh nyei nqox
Matthew1:20 Yosepv yiem hnyouv hnangv naaiv nor hnamv. Maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh daaih box mbeix mbuox ninh
Matthew1:21 Ninh oix duqv dauh dorn. Meih oix zuqc tengx wuov dauh dorn cuotv mbuox heuc Yesu
Matthew1:22 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih weic bun doix nzengc zinh ndaangc Ziouv longc wuov dauh douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv
Matthew1:23 “Maaih dauh maiv nziaauc jiex dorn nyei sieqv
Matthew1:24 Yosepv nyie daaih
Matthew1:25 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv nitv doic taux Maa^li^yaa duqv naaiv dauh dorn daaih. Yosepv tengx wuov dauh dorn cuotv mbuox heuc Yesu.
Matthew2:1 Yesu cuotv seix yiem Yu^ndie Saengv
Matthew2:2 naaic gaax
Matthew2:3 Helotv Hungh muangx haiz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc hnyouv maiv henh yietc deix. Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zuangx mienh yietc zungv yaac hnyouv maiv henh nzengc.
Matthew2:4 Helotv ziouc heuc Yiutai Mienh nyei zuangx sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng daaih nzoih yiem zunv ziouc naaic ninh mbuo

Matthew2:6 ‘Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung

Matthew2:18 “Haiz mienh yiem wuov Laamaa Zingh mbiouh mbiouh bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv. Laasen nyiemv ninh nyei fu'jueiv
Matthew2:19 Helotv Hungh daic mi'aqv. Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh daaih box mbeix Yosepv.
Matthew2:20 Fin-mienh gorngv
Matthew2:21 Yosepv ziouc jiez sin dorh jienv fu'jueiv caux fu'jueiv nyei maa nzuonx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung aqv.

Matthew7:1 “Maiv dungx dingc mienh nyei zuiz
Matthew7:2 weic zuqc meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor dingc mienh nyei zuiz
Matthew7:3 “Meih weic haaix diuc buatc meih nyei gorx-youz nyei m'zing maaih la'fapv yaac maiv hnamv taux meih ganh nyei m'zing maaih nqanx ndiangx?
Matthew7:4 Ganh nyei m'zing maaih nqanx ndiangx
Matthew7:5 Beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc zorqv cuotv ganh nyei m'zing wuov nqanx ndiangx ndaangc cingx daaih haih mangc duqv zien tengx gorx-youz ban cuotv m'zing nyei la'fapv.
Matthew7:6 “Maiv dungx zorqv cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv bun juv. Gamh nziex juv haih daaux sin daaih ngaatc meih mbuo. Yaac maiv dungx zorqv jaaix nyei la'bieiv-zou zoi bun dungz. Dungz kungx oix caaiv waaic hnangv.
Matthew7:7 “Oix zuqc tov ziouc duqv
Matthew7:8 Weic zuqc haaix dauh tov ziouc duqv
Matthew7:9 “Meih mbuo haaix dauh mienh
Matthew7:10 Dorn tov mbiauz
Matthew7:11 Meih mbuo ndongc naaic waaic nyei mienh zungv hiuv duqv bun longx nyei ga'naaiv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv
Matthew7:12 “Meih mbuo oix mienh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun meih mbuo
Matthew7:13 “Oix zuqc bieqc hepc wuov dauh gaengh
Matthew7:14 Mv baac bieqc mingh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc wuov dauh gaengh se hepc nyei. Jauv yaac aqc duqv yangh. Lorz buatc wuov diuh jauv nyei mienh zoqc.
Matthew7:15 “Oix zuqc mbungh jienv jaav douc waac mienh. Ninh mbuo daaih lorz meih mbuo wuov zanc
Matthew7:16 Meih mbuo samx mangc ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv ninh mbuo aqv. Ndiangx-njimv maiv haih ziangh a'ngunc biouv. Mungv long njimv yaac maiv haih ziangh ngongh nyorx biouv.
Matthew7:17 Ndiangx longx ziangh longx nyei biouv. Ndiangx maiv benx ziangh maiv benx nyei biouv.
Matthew7:18 Ndiangx longx maiv haih ziangh maiv benx nyei biouv. Maiv benx nyei ndiangx maiv haih ziangh longx nyei biouv.

Matthew9:3 Maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng haiz Yesu hnangv naaic nor gorngv

Matthew9:5 Gorngv

Matthew10:1 Yesu heuc ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx daaih zunv

Matthew10:18 Meih mbuo laaix yie oix zuqc mienh dorh meih mbuo mingh yiem zungx caux hungh diex nyei nza'hmien weic kuv fienx zoux zorng-zengx bun ninh mbuo caux Janx muangx.

Mark3:1 Maaih nzunc Yesu aengx bieqc wuic dorngh. Yiem wuov maaih dauh m'jangc dorn maaih jieqv buoz waaic nyei.
Mark3:2 Maaih deix mienh oix lorz jauv gox Yesu
Mark3:3 Yesu mbuox buoz waaic wuov dauh mienh
Mark3:4 Ninh ziouc naaic zuangx mienh
Mark3:5 Yesu qiex jiez haic
Mark3:6 Faa^li^si Mienh ziouc yiem wuic dorngh cuotv mingh caux deix gan Helotv Hungh wuov jauv mienh caangh laangh hnangv haaix nor haih daix Yesu.
Mark3:7 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx yiem wuov norm dorngx aengx cuotv mingh taux Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen. Mienh camv nyei gan jienv mingh. Maaih deix yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv daaih. Maaih deix yiem Yu^ndie Saengv
Mark3:8 maaih deix yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Mark3:9 Mienh za'gengh! camv haic
Mark3:10 Weic zuqc ninh zorc mienh camv nyei baengc longx
Mark3:11 Zuqc mienv muoqv nyei mienh haaix zanc buatc Yesu ziouc mbaapv njiec Yesu nyei nza'hmien heuc jienv gorngv
Mark3:12 Yesu hatc mienv cin-maanc maiv dungx gorngv ninh dongh haaix dauh.
Mark3:13 Jiex daaih Yesu faaux wuov jiex mbong
Mark3:14 Yesu ginv cuotv ziepc nyeic laanh mienh yaac heuc ninh mbuo zoux gong-zoh. Ninh mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark3:15 yaac bun meih mbuo maaih hatc maaz zunc mienv cuotv.”
Mark3:16 Yesu ginv wuov deix ziepc nyeic laanh se Simon
Mark3:17 aengx maaih Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn
Mark3:18 Aengx maaih An^ndaa^lu
Mark3:19 caux maaic Yesu wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc I^saa^kaa^li^otc.
Mark3:20 Yesu ziouc bieqc norm biauv mi'aqv. Mienh camv haic aengx gapv zunv daaih. Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx liemh maiv maaih ziangh hoc nyanc hnaangx.
Mark3:21 Yesu nyei biauv zong mienh haiz naaiv deix sic
Mark3:22 Maaih deix yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh daaih nyei njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng gorngv
Mark3:23 Yesu ziouc heuc ninh mbuo daaih ninh wuov yaac longc waac-beiv caux ninh mbuo gorngv. Ninh gorngv
Mark3:24 Se gorngv maaih norm guoqv bun nqoi zoux ziex jauv
Mark3:25 Se gorngv yietc biauv mienh bun nqoi
Mark3:26 Hnangv naaic
Mark3:27 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih bieqc mienh henv mienh nyei biauv caangv ninh nyei ga'naaiv. Oix zuqc ndoh jienv wuov dauh mienh henv mienh ndaangc cingx daaih haih caangv duqv ninh nyei ga'naaiv.
Mark3:28 “Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo

Mark4:1 Aengx maaih nzunc Yesu yiem Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen jiez gorn njaaux mienh. Mienh camv! haic weih jienv ninh

Mark4:3 “Muangx oc
Mark4:4 Haaz nyei ziangh hoc
Mark4:5 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc la'bieiv-lomc

Mark4:16 Aengx maaih deix mienh se hnangv ndortv zuqc la'bieiv-lomc nyei nyim. Yietv haiz Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx ziouc a'hneiv zipv.
Mark4:17 Mv baac se hnangv kuv fienx njiec nzungh maiv ndo

Mark4:20 Mv baac maaih deix mienh hnangv ndortv zuqc ndau-longx wuov deix nyim. Ninh mbuo haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac ziouc zipv daaih
Mark4:21 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo

Mark4:23 Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx oc.”
Mark4:24 Ninh yaac mbuox ninh mbuo

Mark4:26 Yesu gorngv jienv mingh. “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv laanh mienh mingh haaz nyim wuov ndeic.

Mark4:32 Zuangx njiec ndau zunx cuotv hlo daaih
Mark4:33 Yesu aengx longc naaiv nyungc waac-beiv zunh doz bun zuangx mienh muangx. Ziux mienh haih mengh baeqc nyei
Mark4:34 Ninh kungx longc waac-beiv njaaux ninh mbuo hnangv. Ganh nyungc waac ninh maiv longc. Mv baac kungx ninh ganh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc
