Mark8:1 Yiem wuov deix hnoi mienh camv haic aengx gapv zunv. Zoux gau
Mark8:2 “Yie korv-lienh haic naaiv deix mienh. Ninh mbuo daaih caux yie yiem duqv buo hnoi aqv. Ih zanc yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc.
Mark8:3 Se gorngv yie bun ninh mbuo hnyouv sie jienv nzuonx biauv
Mark8:4 Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo dau
Mark8:5 Yesu naaic ninh mbuo
Mark8:6 Yesu ziouc heuc zuangx mienh zueiz jienv wuov ndau. Ninh zorqv wuov deix siec norm njuov daaih laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh
Mark8:7 Ninh mbuo aengx maaih i ziex dauh mbiauz-dorn. Yesu ziouc weic naaiv deix mbiauz laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh
Mark8:8 Zuangx mienh nyanc beuv nzengc. Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc mingh siou nyanc zengc wuov deix daaih dapv buangv siec norm ndaan.
Mark8:9 Nyanc nyei mienh leih maiv go biei cin laanh. Yesu heuc zuangx mienh bun nzaanx liuz
Mark8:10 ziouc caux ninh nyei sai-gorx liemh zeih bieqc nzangv mingh Ndaan^maa^nu^taa Deic.
Mark8:11 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh daaih lorz Yesu
Mark8:12 Yesu tauv jienv domh qiex gorngv
Mark8:13 Yesu ziouc leih nqoi ninh mbuo mi'aqv. Aengx bieqc nzangv nzaeng jienv mingh wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn.
Mark8:14 Sai-gorx mbuo la'kuqv maiv dorh njuov mingh. Ninh mbuo yiem wuov nzangv kungx maaih nduqc norm njuov hnangv.
Mark8:15 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark8:16 Sai-gorx mbuo
Mark8:17 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor gorngv
Mark8:18 Meih mbuo maaih m'zing yaac mangc maiv buatc? Maaih m'normh yaac muangx maiv haiz? Meih mbuo maiv jangx fai?
Mark8:19 Yie maeqv nqoi biaa norm njuov bun biaa cin laanh mienh nyanc wuov zanc
Mark8:20 Yesu aengx naaic
Mark8:21 Yesu aengx naaic
Mark8:22 Yesu mbuo daaih taux Mbetc^sai^ndaa Laangz
Mark8:23 Yesu ken jienv wuov dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc laangz ziouc tuiv wuom-nzuih zaah jienv ninh nyei m'zing
Mark8:24 Wuov dauh mienh cau hmien daaih mangc yaac gorngv
Mark8:25 Yesu aengx maan nzunc ninh nyei m'zing. Ninh ziouc qaqv mangc. Naaiv nzunc ziouc mangc duqv buatc aqv. Haaix nyungc yaac buatc duqv zien.
Mark8:26 Yesu heuc ninh nzuonx biauv aengx hatc ninh
Mark8:27 Jiex mingh
Mark8:28 Ninh mbuo dau
Mark8:29 Yesu aengx naaic ninh mbuo
Mark8:30 Yesu ziouc hatc ninh mbuo
Mark8:31 Yiem naaic daaih Yesu jiez gorn njaaux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo
Mark8:32 Ninh gorngv naaiv deix sic mengh nyei. Bide ziouc ken Yesu mingh pien deix kuinx ninh.
Mark8:33 Mv baac Yesu huin nzuonx mangc jienv sai-gorx mbuo
Mark8:34 Yesu ziouc heuc zuangx mienh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo daaih zunv yaac mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark8:35 Haaix dauh kungx hnamv njoux ninh ganh nyei maengc hnangv
Mark8:36 Haaix dauh duqv nzengc lungh ndiev nyei ga'naaiv mv baac zuqc guangc ninh nyei maengc
Mark8:37 Ninh maaih haaix nyungc haih tiuv duqv ninh nyei maengc nzuonx?
Mark8:38 Yiem naaiv doic orqv haic
Mark9:1 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark9:2 Nqa'haav juqv hnoi
Mark9:3 Ninh nyei lui-houx mbopv baeqc nyei
Mark9:4 Wuov deix buo dauh sai-gorx aengx buatc E^li^yaa caux Mose hinc cuotv yiem wuov caux Yesu gorngv waac.
Mark9:5 Bide ziouc gorngv mbuox Yesu
Mark9:6 Bide caux wuov deix sai-gorx gamh nziex haic
Mark9:7 Maaih dorv mbuonx daaih om jienv ninh mbuo. Aengx maaih qiex yiem wuov mbuonx gorngv
Mark9:8 Sai-gorx mbuo liemh zeih mangc naaiv mangc wuov
Mark9:9 Yiem mbong njiec daaih wuov zanc Yesu hatc ninh mbuo
Mark9:10 Sai-gorx mbuo haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc yiem hnyouv jangx jienv
Mark9:11 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc naaic Yesu
Mark9:12 Yesu dau
Mark9:13 Yie mbuox meih mbuo
Mark9:14 Yesu mbuo aengx nzuonx taux wuov deix sai-gorx mbuo wuov
Mark9:15 Zuangx mienh yietv buatc Yesu
Mark9:16 Yesu naaic ninh nyei sai-gorx
Mark9:17 Yiem zuangx mienh gu'nyuoz
Mark9:18 Maiv gunv yiem haaix
Mark9:19 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark9:20 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh wuov dauh dorn daaih. Mienv yietv buatc Yesu
Mark9:21 Yesu naaic wuov dauh dorn nyei die
Mark9:22 Ziex nzunc wuov dauh hieh guaiv mienv muoqv ninh king bieqc douz-nzauc fai ndortv wuom
Mark9:23 Yesu gorngv
Mark9:24 Wuov dauh dorn nyei die liemh zeih heuc jienv gorngv
Mark9:25 Yesu buatc zuangx mienh mbengx jienv daaih fatv haic ziouc hatc wuov dauh hieh guaiv mienv. Ninh gorngv
Mark9:26 Mienv waiz-waiz nyei heuc
Mark9:27 Mv baac Yesu nanv jienv ninh nyei buoz
Mark9:28 Nqa'haav Yesu bieqc biauv
Mark9:29 Yesu dau
Mark9:30 Yesu mbuo leih nqoi wuov norm dorngx aengx jiex Gaa^li^li Saengv. Yesu maiv oix haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh yiem haaix
Mark9:31 weic zuqc ninh njaaux jienv ninh nyei sai-gorx. Ninh gorngv mbuox sai-gorx mbuo
Mark9:32 Mv baac sai-gorx mbuo maiv mengh baeqc naaiv joux waac nyei eix leiz yaac gamh nziex maiv naaic Yesu.
Mark9:33 Ninh mbuo mingh taux Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv. Bieqc biauv mingh
Mark9:34 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv ko lo weic zuqc gan jauv daaih wuov zanc ninh mbuo nzaeng haaix dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex.
Mark9:35 Yesu ziouc zueiz njiec
Mark9:36 Yesu aengx ken dauh fu'jueiv daaih souv jienv ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx yaac hlorpv jienv mbuox sai-gorx mbuo
Mark9:37 “Haaix dauh dengv yie nyei mbuox zipv dauh naaiv deix faix nyei fu'jueiv
Mark9:38 Yo^han mbuox Yesu
Mark9:39 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark9:40 Weic zuqc haaix dauh maiv caux mbuo doix-dekc
Mark9:41 Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo
Mark9:42 “Se gorngv haaix dauh nduov yietc dauh naaiv deix sienx yie nyei fu'jueiv-faix baamz zuiz
Mark9:43 “Se gorngv meih nyei buoz nduov meih baamz zuiz
Mark9:44 Yiem wuov nyanc ninh mbuo wuov deix gaeng-mau yietc liuz maiv daic. Buov ninh mbuo wuov nyungc douz yaac yietc liuz zieqc jienv nyei.
Mark9:45 “Se gorngv meih nyei zaux nduov meih baamz zuiz
Mark9:46 Yiem wuov nyanc ninh mbuo wuov deix gaeng-mau yietc liuz maiv daic. Buov ninh mbuo wuov nyungc douz yaac yietc liuz zieqc jienv nyei.
Mark9:47 “Se gorngv meih nyei m'zing nduov meih baamz zuiz oix zuqc gueix guangc mingh. Zoqc norm m'zing mv baac duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv corc gauh longx maaih i norm m'zing yaac zuqc zoi njiec deic nyuoqc.
Mark9:48 Yiem wuov nyanc ninh mbuo wuov deix gaeng-mau yietc liuz maiv daic. Buov ninh mbuo wuov nyungc douz yaac yietc liuz zieqc jienv nyei.
Mark9:49 “Tin-Hungh oix longc douz bun dauh dauh mienh cing-nzengc
Mark9:50 “Nzauv se longx nyei. Mv baac se gorngv nzauv nyei mueix tuix zaamv mingh
Mark10:1 Yesu cuotv wuov norm dorngx mingh Yu^ndie Saengv aengx jiex Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. Mienh camv haic aengx daaih gapv zunv ninh wuov. Ninh ziouc hnangv yietc gau nor
Mark10:2 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh daaih oix seix Yesu ziouc naaic
Mark10:3 Yesu dau
Mark10:4 Ninh mbuo dau
Mark10:5 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark10:6 Mv baac zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc
Mark10:7 ‘Weic naaiv m'jangc dorn dorng jaa
Mark10:8 Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc benx yietc dauh mi'aqv.’ Hnangv naaic
Mark10:9 Weic naaiv
Mark10:10 Bieqc biauv mingh wuov zanc
Mark10:11 Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark10:12 Auv yaac fih hnangv nyei. Se gorngv leih ninh nyei nqox aengx longc siang-nqox
Mark10:13 Maaih deix mienh dorh fu'jueiv daaih lorz Yesu
Mark10:14 Yesu buatc ziouc qiex jiez haic
Mark10:15 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
Mark10:16 Gorngv liuz
Mark10:17 Yesu aengx cuotv jauv wuov zanc
Mark10:18 Yesu naaic ninh
Mark10:19 Meih yaac hiuv duqv leiz-latc. Leiz-latc gorngv
Mark10:20 Wuov dauh mienh gorngv
Mark10:21 Yesu mangc jienv ninh
Mark10:22 Wuov dauh mienh yietv haiz naaiv joux waac
Mark10:23 Yesu huin mangc ninh nyei sai-gorx
Mark10:24 Sai-gorx mbuoqc horngh naaiv joux waac mv baac Yesu nzipc jienv gorngv
Mark10:25 Lorh torh cunx jiex sim-mbiuic corc gauh hungh hec butv-zoih mienh bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv.”
Mark10:26 Sai-gorx mbuo gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic ziouc naaic
Mark10:27 Yesu mangc jienv ninh mbuo aengx gorngv
Mark10:28 Bide ziouc mbuox ninh
Mark10:29 Yesu gorngv
Mark10:30 wuov dauh guangc naaiv deix yietc gouv
Mark10:31 Mv baac yiem wuov ndaangc maaih mienh camv oix zuqc nzuonx nqa'haav
Mark10:32 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Mingh wuov zanc
Mark10:33 Ninh gorngv
Mark10:34 Janx ziouc guatc doqc jatv ninh
Mark10:35 Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn
Mark10:36 Yesu dau
Mark10:37 Ninh mbuo dau
Mark10:38 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark10:39 Ninh mbuo dau
Mark10:40 Mv baac yie maiv maaih leiz paaiv haaix dauh zueiz yie nyei mbiaauc maengx fai zaaix maengx. Tin-Hungh liuc leiz ziangx bun haaix dauh zueiz
Mark10:41 Wuov deix ziepc dauh sai-gorx haiz liuz naaiv deix sic
Mark10:42 Yesu heuc ninh mbuo yietc zungv daaih nzoih yaac gorngv
Mark10:43 Mv baac
Mark10:44 Haaix dauh oix zoux hlo jiex
Mark10:45 Weic zuqc liemh yie
Mark10:46 Ninh mbuo mingh taux Ye^li^ko Zingh. Yesu caux jienv ninh nyei sai-gorx
Mark10:47 Ninh haiz gorngv
Mark10:48 Mienh camv nyei hemx ninh
Mark10:49 Yesu ziouc dingh jienv yaac gorngv
Mark10:50 Mbaa^ti^me^atc ziouc jaiv guangc ninh nyei domh lui
Mark10:51 Yesu naaic ninh
Mark10:52 Yesu mbuox ninh
Mark11:1 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx taux fatv deix Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Mark11:2 mbuox ziangx ninh mbuo
Mark11:3 Se gorngv haaix dauh naaic meih mbuo
Mark11:4 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh
Mark11:5 Sai-gorx mbuo jaiv wuov zanc
Mark11:6 Ninh mbuo ziouc ei Yesu nyei waac dau. Wuov deix mienh ziouc bun ninh mbuo ken jienv mingh aqv.
Mark11:7 Ken taux Yesu wuov
Mark11:8 Mienh camv nyei longc ganh nyei domh lui dimc wuov jauv. Maaih deix yaac mingh ndeic gaeqv ndiangx-normh yietc dorv yietc dorv nyei
Mark11:9 Mingh ndaangc wuov deix
Mark11:10 Tov Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv bun meih oix liepc nyei guoqv
Mark11:11 Yesu taux Ye^lu^saa^lem yaac bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv mangc nzengc nyungc-nyungc. Mv baac lungh aav lamh deix hmuangx aqv. Ninh aengx caux ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx ziouc cuotv zingh mingh Mbe^taa^ni Laangz.
Mark11:12 Da'nyeic ndorm
Mark11:13 Ninh buatc maaih zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx yiem go deix nyei
Mark11:14 Yesu mbuox wuov zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx
Mark11:15 Mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Mark11:16 Ninh yaac maiv bun haaix dauh bienh haaix nyungc yangh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei laatc gu'nyuoz jiex.
Mark11:17 Yesu njaaux zuangx mienh
Mark11:18 Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng haiz liuz naaiv deix sic
Mark11:19 Lungh maanz-hmuangx deix
Mark11:20 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
Mark11:21 Bide jangx zuqc Yesu nyei waac ziouc mbuox ninh
Mark11:22 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
Mark11:23 Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo
Mark11:24 Weic naaiv
Mark11:25 Meih mbuo souv jienv daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc
Mark11:26 Se gorngv mienh zoux dorngc meih mbuo
Mark11:27 Yesu mbuo aengx nzuonx taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei laatc gu'nyuoz yangh jauv wuov zanc
Mark11:28 naaic ninh
Mark11:29 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
Mark11:30 Dau yie oc. Haaix dauh bun Yo^han maaih leiz tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz
Mark11:31 Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh caux laanh caangh laangh
Mark11:32 Mv baac
Mark11:33 Ninh mbuo ziouc dau Yesu
Mark12:1 Yesu ziouc longc waac-beiv mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark12:2 Taux biouv zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc
Mark12:3 Gouv huingx nyei mienh zorqv wuov dauh bou mborqv
Mark12:4 Huingx-ziouv aengx paaiv dauh bou mingh. Gouv huingx nyei mienh mborqv wuov dauh bou nyei m'nqorngv dangx aengx zoux doqc bun ninh nyaiv.
Mark12:5 Huingx-ziouv aengx paaiv dauh bou mingh. Wuov dauh yaac zuqc ninh mbuo daix. Aengx maaih bou camv nyei zuqc gouv huingx nyei mienh zoux doqc. Maaih deix ninh mbuo mborqv
Mark12:6 “Zoux gau
Mark12:7 “Mv baac gouv huingx nyei mienh
Mark12:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv ninh daix daic
Mark12:9 Yesu naaic
Mark12:10 Ging-Sou fiev jienv naaiv deix waac meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex fai? ‘Gomv biauv zaangc nqemh cuotv wuov norm la'bieiv
Mark12:11 Naaiv se Ziouv zoux nyei sic. Ziux yie mbuo nyei m'zing mangc
Mark12:12 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh hiuv duqv Yesu gorngv wuov diuh waac-beiv ziqv zuqc ninh mbuo ziouc oix zorqv ninh haic aqv. Mv baac ninh mbuo gamh nziex zuangx mienh ziouc ziang naaic mingh mi'aqv.
Mark12:13 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo paaiv deix Faa^li^si Mienh caux deix Helotv Hungh wuov jauv mienh mingh lorz Yesu
Mark12:14 Mingh taux Yesu wuov ninh mbuo gorngv
Mark12:15 Mv baac Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv ziouc gorngv
Mark12:16 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv norm nyaanh bun Yesu. Ninh ziouc naaic gaax
Mark12:17 Yesu gorngv
Mark12:18 Aengx maaih deix Saa^ndu^si Mienh daaih lorz Yesu. Saa^ndu^si wuov jauv mienh gorngv mienh daic mingh maiv haih nangh aqv.
Mark12:19 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu
Mark12:20 Zinh ndaangc maaih siec muoz-dorn. Dorn-hlo dorng jienv jaa
Mark12:21 Da'naix longc nyaam-guaav
Mark12:22 Zoux gau
Mark12:23 Hnangv naaic
Mark12:24 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
Mark12:25 Daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih wuov zanc
Mark12:26 Gorngv mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih wuov diuc jauv. Meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex Mose fiev jienv gorngv
Mark12:27 Ninh maiv zeiz daic mingh nyei mienh nyei Tin-Hungh
Mark12:28 Maaih dauh njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng daaih taux yaac haiz ninh mbuo nzaeng leiz. Ninh haiz Yesu dau duqv wuov deix mienh horpc haic
Mark12:29 Yesu dau
Mark12:30 Oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv
Mark12:31 Da'nyeic diuh leiz se dongh naaiv
Mark12:32 Wuov dauh njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng dau Yesu
Mark12:33 Mienh oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv
Mark12:34 Yesu buatc naaiv dauh mienh longc hnyouv dau
Mark12:35 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh wuov zanc
Mark12:36 Singx Lingh bun Ndaawitv ganh gorngv
Mark12:37 Ndaawitv ganh heuc ninh zoux ‘Ziouv.’ Wuov nyungc
Mark12:38 Njaaux ninh mbuo wuov zanc Yesu gorngv
Mark12:39 Mingh wuic dorngh ninh mbuo ginv longx jiex nyei dorngx zueiz. Bieqc yinh ninh mbuo kungx oix zueiz dieh gorn hnangv.
Mark12:40 Ninh mbuo nduov auv-guaav nyei jaa-dingh nyanc
Mark12:41 Yesu zueiz jienv nitv siou nyaanh nyei faang mangc mienh fongc horc nyaanh. Butv-zoih mienh camv nyei dapv nyaanh camv.
Mark12:42 Aengx maaih dauh auv-guaav-jomc daaih dapv i norm dongh zinh siqv. Dongh zinh siqv se jaax-zinh aiv jiex nyei nyaanh.
Mark12:43 Yesu heuc ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo daaih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark12:44 Weic zuqc wuov deix mienh maaih nyaanh camv. Ninh mbuo fongc horc deix baav hnangv. Naaiv dauh auv-guaav ndongc naaic jomc
Mark13:1 Yesu cuotv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov zanc
Mark13:2 Yesu dau
Mark13:3 Yesu zueiz jienv Ga'lanv Mbong
Mark13:4 “Tov mbuox yie mbuo oc. Naaiv deix sic haaix zanc oix cuotv? Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic cuotv wuov zanc
Mark13:5 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark13:6 Maaih mienh camv nyei oix longc yie nyei mbuox daaih gorngv
Mark13:7 Meih mbuo haiz mienh mborqv domh jaax yaac haiz mborqv domh jaax nyei fienx wuov zanc
Mark13:8 Naaiv fingx caux wuov fingx oix mborqv jaax. Naaiv norm guoqv caux wuov norm guoqv yaac mborqv domh jaax. Maaih deix dorngx ndau dongz
Mark13:9 “Mv baac meih mbuo ganh oix zuqc faix fim. Mienh oix zorqv meih mbuo mingh sic dorngh. Yiem wuic dorngh ninh mbuo oix longc biaav-bin mborqv meih mbuo. Meih mbuo laaix yie yaac oix zuqc souv jienv zungx caux hungh diex nyei nza'hmien dorng jienv ninh mbuo zoux zorng-zengx.
Mark13:10 Kuv fienx oix zuqc zunh bun fingx-fingx mienh muangx
Mark13:11 Mienh zorqv meih mbuo dorh mingh sic dorngh wuov zanc
Mark13:12 “Muoz-doic oix zorqv muoz-doic jiu bun mienh daix
Mark13:13 Weic yie
Mark13:14 “Meih mbuo buatc zoux bun nyungc-nyungc waaic wuov dauh domh hieh youx yiem jienv maiv horpc zuqc yiem nyei dorngx wuov zanc
Mark13:15 Yiem biauv-ngorh wuov deix njiec daaih
Mark13:16 Yiem ndeic nyei mienh
Mark13:17 Yiem wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc
Mark13:18 Oix zuqc daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh maiv dungx bun naaiv deix sic cuotv doix zuqc dong-gen hnoi
Mark13:19 weic zuqc taux wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc maaih domh zeqc naanc. Yiem Tin-Hungh zeix lungh zeix ndau taux ih zanc
Mark13:20 Se gorngv Ziouv maiv bun wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc nangv
Mark13:21 “Wuov zanc
Mark13:22 Weic zuqc maaih mienh gorngv ninh mbuo zoux Giduc mv baac jaav nyei
Mark13:23 Meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim oc. Naaiv deix sic maiv gaengh cuotv yie jaa-ndaangc mbuox meih mbuo.
Mark13:24 “Zeqc naanc jiex liuz wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc
Mark13:25 Zuangx hleix yiem wuov lungh oix ndortv njiec daaih
Mark13:26 “Mienh ziouc buatc yie
Mark13:27 Yie ziouc paaiv fin-mienh mingh biei bung nziaaux
Mark13:28 “Oix zuqc longc ngongh nyorx ndiangx hoqc yietc nyungc. Buatc ndiangx-nquaah cuotv cunx
Mark13:29 Fih hnangv nyei
Mark13:30 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
Mark13:31 Lungh ndau oix jiex nzengc
Mark13:32 “Wuov norm hnoi
Mark13:33 Meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim
Mark13:34 “Se hnangv laanh mienh oix cuotv jauv mingh go nyei
Mark13:35 Hnangv naaic
Mark13:36 Nziex ninh liemh zeih nzuonx daaih yaac buatc meih mbuo m'njormh nzengc mi'aqv.
Mark13:37 Naaiv joux waac yie mbuox meih mbuo
Mark14:1 Aengx maaih i hnoi hnangv ziouc taux Siex Maengc Zipv caux Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv. Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng daav za'eix hnangv haaix nor haih bingx jienv zorqv Yesu daix guangc.
Mark14:2 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Mark14:3 Yesu yiem Mbe^taa^ni Laangz
Mark14:4 Maaih deix yiem wuov nyei mienh qiex jiez haic. Laanh ziouc mbuox laanh
Mark14:5 Naaiv deix youh ndaang maaic duqv faam-baeqv hnoi gong-zinh nyei nyaanh bun mienh jomc mienh niaa.” Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv hniev nyei bun wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn.
Mark14:6 Mv baac Yesu gorngv
Mark14:7 Meih mbuo zanc-zanc maaih mienh jomc mienh caux meih mbuo yiem. Haaix zanc oix zoux longx bun ninh mbuo se zoux duqv nyei. Mv baac meih mbuo maiv duqv yie yietc liuz caux meih mbuo yiem.
Mark14:8 Naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn
Mark14:9 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
Mark14:10 Yesu nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx maaih dauh
Mark14:11 Sai mienh bieiv haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Mark14:12 Jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv daauh hnoi
Mark14:13 Yesu ziouc paaiv i dauh sai-gorx mingh yaac mbuox ziangx ninh mbuo
Mark14:14 Ninh bieqc haaix norm biauv
Mark14:15 Biauv-ziouv ziouc dorh meih mbuo faaux mingh mangc gu'nguaaic wuov nzangh biauv
Mark14:16 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc cuotv jauv mingh aqv. Bieqc zingh mingh
Mark14:17 Lungh maanz-hmuangx
Mark14:18 Nyanc jienv hnaangx wuov zanc
Mark14:19 Sai-gorx mbuo nzauh haic ziouc yietc dauh yietc dauh nyei naaic Yesu
Mark14:20 Yesu dau
Mark14:21 Yie
Mark14:22 Nyanc jienv hnaangx wuov zanc
Mark14:23 Yesu aengx zorqv zaanv a'ngunc diuv daaih
Mark14:24 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark14:25 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
Mark14:26 Ninh mbuo baaux liuz nzung ziouc cuotv daaih
Mark14:27 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx
Mark14:28 Mv baac yie daic mingh Tin-Hungh aengx bun yie nangh daaih
Mark14:29 Bide mbuox Yesu
Mark14:30 Yesu mbuox Bide
Mark14:31 Bide aengx gorngv gauh ngaengc
Mark14:32 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh taux norm dorngx
Mark14:33 Ninh ziouc dorh Bide
Mark14:34 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark14:35 Yesu aengx jiex mingh deix ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh se gorngv haih nor
Mark14:36 Ninh gorngv
Mark14:37 Yesu daux gaux liuz
Mark14:38 Oix zuqc ging jienv hnyouv daux gaux
Mark14:39 Yesu aengx mingh daux gaux nzunc
Mark14:40 Ninh aengx nzuonx taux sai-gorx wuov
Mark14:41 Yesu aengx nzuonx da'faam nzunc
Mark14:42 Jiez sin daaih
Mark14:43 Yesu gorngv waac zungv maiv gaengh setv
Mark14:44 Maaic Yesu wuov dauh jaa-ndaangc mbuox ziangx wuov deix
Mark14:45 Yu^ndaatc yietv taux ziouc baeng zaqc nyei mingh Yesu wuov yaac gorngv
Mark14:46 Wuov deix mienh ziouc njiec buoz zorqv Yesu qam jienv aqv.
Mark14:47 Mv baac maaih dauh souv ga'hlen nyei mienh baeng ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv cuotv
Mark14:48 Yesu doix ninh mbuo gorngv
Mark14:49 Yie hnoi-hnoi caux meih mbuo yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh
Mark14:50 Sai-gorx mbuo yietc zungv ziang naaic guangc jienv ninh biaux nzengc mi'aqv.
Mark14:51 Maaih dauh houh saeng
Mark14:52 mv baac ninh guangc jienv la'maah ndie wuov
Mark14:53 Zorqv Yesu wuov deix dorh Yesu mingh domh sai mienh nyei biauv. Zuangx sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng yaac gapv zunv wuov.
Mark14:54 Bide gan jienv mingh mv baac leih go deix nyei
Mark14:55 Sai mienh bieiv caux Gunv Sic Wuic nyei zuangx mienh oix lorz zorng-zengx gox Yesu weic daix ninh
Mark14:56 Maaih mienh camv nyei zoux jaav zorng-zengx gox ninh
Mark14:57 Aengx maaih deix mienh souv jiez daaih zoux jaav zorng-zengx gox Yesu. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Mark14:58 “Yie mbuo haiz ninh gorngv
Mark14:59 Mv baac liemh ninh mbuo gorngv naaiv deix zorng-zengx nyei waac maiv doix.
Mark14:60 Domh sai mienh yiem zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien souv jiez daaih naaic Yesu
Mark14:61 Mv baac Yesu maiv ko lo. Yietc joux yaac maiv dau. Domh sai mienh aengx naaic Yesu
Mark14:62 Yesu dau
Mark14:63 Domh sai mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc betv ninh ganh nyei lui yaac gorngv
Mark14:64 Meih mbuo haiz ninh ki Tin-Hungh. Meih mbuo oix hnangv haaix nor dingc ninh?” Ninh mbuo yietc zungv dingc ninh dorngc. Zic duqv daic aqv.
Mark14:65 Maaih deix yiem wuov nyei mienh ziouc tuiv wuom-nzuih naetv Yesu
Mark14:66 Bide corc yiem jienv ga'ndiev
Mark14:67 Ninh buatc Bide yiem wuov nzaaux douz ziouc nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc jienv ninh gorngv
Mark14:68 Mv baac Bide maiv nyiemc. Ninh dau
Mark14:69 Wuov dauh m'sieqv bou buatc ninh yiem wuov aengx mbuox souv ga'hlen wuov deix mienh
Mark14:70 Mv baac Bide aengx maiv nyiemc. Yietc zanc jiex
Mark14:71 Bide ziouc ndouv jiez zioux gorngv
Mark14:72 Liemh zeih jai ziouc nqaaix da'nyeic nzunc. Bide jangx zuqc Yesu mbuox jiex ninh
Mark15:1 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
Mark15:2 Bilaatv naaic ninh
Mark15:3 Sai mienh bieiv yaac gox camv-nyungc sic Yesu.
Mark15:4 Bilaatv ziouc naaic ninh
Mark15:5 Mv baac Yesu maiv dau yietc joux. Bilaatv ziouc mbuoqc horngh haic.
Mark15:6 Hnyangx-hnyangx taux Siex Maengc Zipv
Mark15:7 Maaih dauh zuqc wuonx jienv loh
Mark15:8 Zuangx mienh daaih tov Bilaatv zoux hnangv ninh yietc gau zoux nor.
Mark15:9 Bilaatv ziouc naaic
Mark15:10 Bilaatv hiuv duqv sai mienh bieiv mueic jieqv Yesu cingx daaih zorqv jiu bun ninh.
Mark15:11 Mv baac sai mienh bieiv coqv zuangx mienh tov bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc div Yesu.
Mark15:12 Bilaatv aengx naaic nzunc zuangx mienh
Mark15:13 Ninh mbuo nauc jienv gorngv
Mark15:14 Bilaatv naaic
Mark15:15 Bilaatv oix bun zuangx mienh a'hneiv ziouc ei ninh mbuo tov nyei waac bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc. Ninh aengx heuc baeng longc biaav-bin mborqv Yesu
Mark15:16 Baeng ziouc dorh Yesu bieqc zungx nyei dinc gu'nyuoz
Mark15:17 Ninh mbuo zorqv deix lui-ndaauv setv luoqc tengx Yesu buix jienv
Mark15:18 Baeng zorqv yieqv bun Yesu yaac gorngv
Mark15:19 Ninh mbuo aengx longc luoqc diqc guaengv mborqv ninh nyei m'nqorngv
Mark15:20 Guatc doqc jatv liuz
Mark15:21 Mingh gau
Mark15:22 Ninh mbuo dorh Yesu mingh taux norm dorngx
Mark15:23 Yiem wuov ninh mbuo zorqv a'ngunc diuv peux jienv mu^yorc ndie bun Yesu hopv
Mark15:24 Nqa'haav baeng zorqv Yesu ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax. Ninh mbuo zorqv ninh nyei lui-houx bun nqoi
Mark15:25 Zorqv Yesu ding ziepc nzaangc jaax wuov zanc se lungh ndorm nduoh norm ziangh hoc.
Mark15:26 Gox Yesu wuov deix waac yaac fiev jienv gorngv
Mark15:27 Ninh mbuo aengx ding i dauh zaqc baeng yiem Yesu nyei ga'hlen. Maaih dauh yiem mbiaauc maengx. Maaih dauh yiem zaaix maengx.
Mark15:28 Hnangv naaic
Mark15:29 Jiex jauv nyei mienh ki ninh
Mark15:30 Njoux meih ganh aqv. Njiec ziepc nzaangc jaax daaih maah!”
Mark15:31 Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng fih hnangv nyei jatv ninh. Laanh gorngv mbuox laanh
Mark15:32 I^saa^laa^en nyei Hungh
Mark15:33 Lungh ziangx aanx
Mark15:34 Njiec aanx buo norm ziangh hoc
Mark15:35 Maaih deix souv ga'hlen nyei mienh haiz ninh heuc ziouc gorngv
Mark15:36 Maaih dauh mienh tiux mingh zorqv lai-nzeix-sortv
Mark15:37 Yesu aengx heuc nzunc qiex hlo nyei
Mark15:38 Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz wuov kuaaiv mbaeqc gaengh ndie yiem gu'nguaaic mbaaix dorng ga'ndiev zoux i maengx mi'aqv.
Mark15:39 Souv jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax nza'hmien maengx wuov dauh baeng-bieiv buatc Yesu hnangv naaiv nor daic ziouc gorngv
Mark15:40 Maaih deix m'sieqv dorn yaac yiem wuov go deix nyei mangc jienv. Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn maaih dauh Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv nyei Maa^li^yaa
Mark15:41 Yesu yiem Gaa^li^li wuov zanc
Mark15:42 Lungh maanz-hmuangx aqv
Mark15:43

Mark15:47 Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv nyei Maa^li^yaa caux Yosetc nyei maa
Mark16:1 Jiex liuz Dingh Gong Hnoi
Mark16:2 Wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi lungh ndorm nziouv nyei
Mark16:3 Gan jauv mingh wuov zanc
Mark16:4 Weic zuqc wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv hlo haic. Ninh mbuo cau hmien mangc
Mark16:5 Bieqc zouv mingh
Mark16:6 Wuov dauh gorngv
Mark16:7 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mingh mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx
Mark16:8 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn cuotv zouv huaang-huaang zaang-zaang nyei biaux
Mark16:9 Wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi
Mark16:10 Maa^li^yaa mingh mbuox zinh ndaangc caux Yesu yiem wuov deix mienh. Ninh mbuo corc nzauh haic
Mark16:11 Ninh mbuo haiz Maa^li^yaa gorngv Yesu nangh daaih aqv. Ninh yaac duqv buatc liuz aqv
Mark16:12 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
Mark16:13 Naaiv deix i dauh nzuonx mingh mbuox wuov deix sai-gorx
Mark16:14 Nqa'haav wuov nzunc
Mark16:15 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Mark16:16 Haaix dauh sienx yaac jiex wuom nyei leiz
Mark16:17 Sienx nyei mienh yaac maaih Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv haih zoux duqv naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh mbuo dengv yie nyei mbuox haih zunc mienv cuotv
Mark16:18 Se gorngv ninh mbuo nanv naang-doqc fai hopv ndie-laengc
Mark16:19 Ziouv Yesu caux ninh mbuo gorngv liuz waac
Mark16:20 Sai-gorx mbuo cuotv mingh taux norm-norm dorngx zunh doz. Ziouv yaac caux ninh mbuo juangc gong zoux
Luke1:1 Zien oix nyei domh gorx
Luke1:2 Zunh doz mienh nyei m'zing buatc naaiv deix sic yiem gorn cuotv wuov zanc yaac zunh mbuox yie mbuo
Luke1:3 Naaiv deix jauv yiem gorn daaih yietc zungv yie ganh dimv liuz ziouc zueih yietv zueih nyeic nyei fiev jienv bun meih.
Luke1:4 Hnangv naaiv
Luke1:5 Yiem Yu^ndie nyei hungh
Luke1:6 Ziux Tin-Hungh mangc
Luke1:7 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv maaih fu'jueiv weic zuqc E^li^saa^mbetc maiv haih maaih. Ninh mbuo i hmuangv yaac gox haic aqv.
Luke1:8 Maaih hnoi Se^kaa^li^yaa yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux sai mienh nyei gong ei ninh mbuo nyei luonh baan hnoi zoux.
Luke1:9 Dongh naaic hnoi
Luke1:10 Ninh buov hung nyei ziangh hoc
Luke1:11 Wuov zanc maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh hinc cuotv daaih souv jienv buov hung dieh mbiaauc maengx.
Luke1:12 Se^kaa^li^yaa yietv buatc ziouc haeqv ninh hnyouv huaang nzengc

Luke1:14 Meih ziouc njien-youh
Luke1:15 Ei Ziouv mangc

Luke1:17 Ninh oix mingh ndaangc Ziouv
Luke1:18 Se^kaa^li^yaa naaic fin-mienh
Luke1:19 Fin-mienh dau
Luke1:20 Meih maiv sienx yie nyei waac
Luke1:21 Zuangx mienh corc yiem ga'nyiec maengx zuov jienv Se^kaa^li^yaa. Ninh mbuo maiv mengh baeqc ninh weic haaix diuc yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz ndongc naaic lauh.
Luke1:22 Zoux gau
Luke1:23 Se^kaa^li^yaa yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux ziangx ninh nyei buonc gong ziouc nzuonx mi'aqv.
Luke1:24 Nqa'haav E^li^saa^mbetc maaih jienv sin. Ninh ziouc yiem biaa hlaax nyieqc biauv
Luke1:25 Ninh gorngv
Luke1:26 E^li^saa^mbetc maaih jienv sin duqv juqv hlaax nyieqc
Luke1:27 douc fienx mbuox dauh sieqv
Luke1:28 Fin-mienh mingh taux Maa^li^yaa wuov mbuox ninh
Luke1:29 Maa^li^yaa haiz naaiv deix waac
Luke1:30 Fin-mienh aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
Luke1:31 Meih oix maaih norm sin
Luke1:32 Ninh oix duqv zoux hlo
Luke1:33 Ninh oix yietc liuz gunv Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh nyei hungh hoc yietc liuz maiv haih jiex.”
Luke1:34 Maa^li^yaa naaic gaax fin-mienh
Luke1:35 Fin-mienh aengx dau
Luke1:36 Meih hnamv mangc gaax meih nyei cien-ceqv
Luke1:37 Maiv maaih haaix nyungc Tin-Hungh maiv haih zoux.”
Luke1:38 Maa^li^yaa dau
Luke1:39 Nqa'haav maiv lauh Maa^li^yaa ziouc mbenc ga'naaiv gaanv jienv cuotv jauv mingh Yu^ndie Saengv
Luke1:40 Mingh taux
Luke1:41 E^li^saa^mbetc yietv haiz Maa^li^yaa nyei qiex
Luke1:42 ziouc heuc qiex mbui nyei gorngv
Luke1:43 Yie weic haaix diuc duqv ndongc naaiv longx? Duqv yie nyei Ziouv nyei maa daaih caux yie nziaauc ni?
Luke1:44 Yie yietv haiz meih nyei qiex
Luke1:45 Meih sienx Ziouv gorngv liuz wuov deix waac za'gengh oix cuotv daaih zien nyei
Luke1:46 Maa^li^yaa gorngv
Luke1:47 yie nyei Njoux Ziouv
Luke1:48 Yie zoux ninh nyei bou
Luke1:49 weic zuqc Maaih Domh Qaqv nyei Tin-Hungh ceix mbuoqc horngh haic nyei sic bun yie. Ninh nyei mbuox se cing-nzengc haic.
Luke1:50 Ninh korv-lienh taaih ninh nyei mienh
Luke1:51 Ninh sung ninh nyei buoz zoux cuotv domh sic
Luke1:52 Zoux hlo nyei mienh
Luke1:53 Ngorc nyei mienh ninh ceix longx nyei ga'naaiv bun nyanc beuv
Luke1:54 Ninh ei ninh caux mbuo nyei ong-taaix laengz liuz nyei waac tengx ninh nyei bou
Luke1:55 
Luke1:56 Maa^li^yaa caux E^li^saa^mbetc yiem aav lamh duqv buo hlaax nyieqc nyei dorngx
Luke1:57 E^li^saa^mbetc maaih sin nyei ziangh hoc gaux
Luke1:58 Ninh nyei laangz zaangc mienh caux cien-ceqv haiz Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor korv-lienh ninh
Luke1:59 Gu'nguaaz cuotv seix daaih duqv hietc hnoi
Luke1:60 Mv baac ninh nyei maa gorngv
Luke1:61 Wuov deix mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
Luke1:62 Gorngv liuz ninh mbuo ziouc longc buoz uv naaic gaax gu'nguaaz nyei die oix tengx ninh nyei dorn cuotv mbuox heuc haaix nyungc.
Luke1:63 Se^kaa^li^yaa tov kuaaiv fiev nzaangc benv daaih fiev jienv gorngv
Luke1:64 Se^kaa^li^yaa liemh zeih aengx haih gorngv cuotv waac daaih ziouc ceng Tin-Hungh.
Luke1:65 Laangz zaangc mienh za'gengh gamh nziex haic. Naaiv deix sic nyei fienx nqa'haav sing buangv Yu^ndie Saengv
Luke1:66 Haiz liuz nyei mienh zorqv naaiv deix sic an jienv hnyouv hnamv
Luke1:67 Yo^han nyei die
Luke1:68 “Mbuo oix zuqc ceng Ziouv
Luke1:69 Ninh yiem ninh nyei bou
Luke1:70 hnangv loz-hnoi Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei cing-nzengc douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac.
Luke1:71 Tin-Hungh oix njoux mbuo leih ndutv mbuo nyei win-wangv
Luke1:72 Ninh gorngv ninh oix korv-lienh mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Luke1:73 Tin-Hungh laengz ngaengc waac bun mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv
Luke1:74 Ninh gorngv ninh oix bun yiem mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev biaux cuotv daaih buoqc zaangc ninh
Luke1:75 yaac bun mbuo yietc seix yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien cing-nzengc
Luke1:76 Yie nyei dorn aac
Luke1:77 Oix zuqc bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx hiuv duqv ninh mbuo duqv njoux se weic zuqc duqv ninh mbuo nyei zuiz guangc liuz.
Luke1:78 Tin-Hungh korv-lienh mienh
Luke1:79 ziux jienv yiem hmuangx nyei caux yiem zuqc daic nyei dongh linh gu'nyuoz wuov deix. Ninh yaac oix yienz mbuo yangh baengh orn nyei jauv.”

Luke2:5 Yosepv gorngv ziangh Maa^li^yaa
Luke2:6 Yiem Mbetc^le^hem Mungv wuov zanc
Luke2:7 Maa^li^yaa ziouc yungz duqv ninh nyei daauh dauh dorn daaih
Luke2:8 Wuov norm deic-bung maaih deix goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh lungh muonz zanc yiem yungh ciangv goux ninh mbuo nyei yungh.

Luke2:10 Fin-mienh gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke2:11 Ih hnoi
Luke2:12 Naaiv se zoux jangx-hoc bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo oix lorz buatc dauh gu'nguaaz beu jienv suangx bueix maaz-zoh gu'nyuoz.”
Luke2:13 Liemh zeih aengx hinc cuotv yietc domh guanh fin-mienh daaih caux jienv hinc cuotv ndaangc wuov dauh
Luke2:14 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Luke2:15 Fin-mienh ziouc leih nqoi ninh mbuo

Luke2:17 Goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh buatc
Luke2:18 Haaix dauh haiz yaac mbuoqc horngh goux yungh mienh gorngv nyei waac.

Luke2:20 Mangc yungh nyei mienh weic ninh mbuo buatc liuz
Luke2:21 Yesu cuotv seix daaih buangv hietc hnoi wuov hnoi

Luke2:25 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh maaih laanh mienh
Luke2:26 Singx Lingh bun ninh hiuv duqv ninh zuov taux duqv buatc Ziouv laengz bun wuov dauh Giduc cingx daaih daic.
Luke2:27 Singx Lingh dorh Si^me^on bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Yosepv caux Maa^li^yaa yaac dorh Yesu bieqc mingh oix ei jienv Leiz-Latc zoux.
Luke2:28 Si^me^on ziouc hlorpv jienv Yesu ceng Tin-Hungh. Ninh gorngv
Luke2:29 “Ziouv aac

Luke8:1 Nqa'haav maiv lauh

Luke8:29 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc Yesu hatc hieh guaiv mienv cuotv wuov dauh mienh nyei sin. Maiv gunv maaih limc ndoh jienv buoz-zaux aengx maaih mienh zuov jienv

Luke8:33 Mienv ziouc cuotv wuov dauh mienh mingh bieqc wuov guanh dungz mi'aqv. Ziangh guanh dungz ziouc tiux njiec kamx ndortv koiv-dorn ziemx daic nzengc mi'aqv.

Luke8:37 Yiem Ge^laa^saa Deic nyei zuangx mienh tov Yesu leih nqoi ninh mbuo weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic. Yesu ziouc bieqc nzangv mingh aqv.

Luke11:40 Ga'naaiv-hngongx aah! Tin-Hungh zeix cuotv ga'nyiec maengx yaac maiv zeiz aengx zeix cuotv gu'nyuoz maengx?
Luke11:41 Oix zuqc zorqv yiem meih mbuo nyei nzormc yienv gu'nyuoz wuov deix ga'naaiv fungx mienh jomc mienh
Luke11:42 “Meih mbuo Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo dorh baeqc citv caux yienh si caux nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv-ndaang ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv fongc horc Tin-Hungh. Mv baac zoux baengh fim nyei jauv caux hnamv Tin-Hungh nyei jauv meih mbuo la'kuqv maiv zoux. Meih mbuo horpc zuqc zoux naaiv deix jauv mv baac maiv dungx la'kuqv ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv ga'naaiv fongc horc Tin-Hungh.
Luke11:43 “Meih mbuo Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo yiem wuic dorngh oix zueiz longx jiex nyei dorngx. Yiem hei-horngc yaac oix mienh zorqv yieqv taaih meih mbuo.
Luke11:44 Meih mbuo oix zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo se hnangv maiv maaih jangx-hoc nyei janx-daic zouv. Mienh caaiv zuqc yaac liemh maiv hiuv caaiv zuqc janx-daic zouv.”
Luke11:45 Maaih dauh njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng gorngv
Luke11:46 Yesu dau
Luke11:47 Meih mbuo gengh oix zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo ceix douc waac mienh nyei zouv mv baac naaiv deix douc waac mienh meih mbuo ganh nyei ong-taaix daix daic.
Luke11:48 Hnangv naaic meih mbuo biux mengh meih mbuo a'hneiv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix zoux nyei sic
Luke11:49 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei cong-mengh gorngv
Luke11:50 Hnangv naaiv

Luke18:6 Ziouv aengx gorngv
Luke18:7 Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz oix baengh fim nyei tengx ninh ginv daaih nyei yaac ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz jouh ninh wuov deix mienh fai? Tin-Hungh oix ngaih lauh cingx daaih tengx ninh mbuo fai?
Luke18:8 Yie mbuox meih mbuo
Luke18:9 Maaih deix mienh ceng ninh mbuo ganh zoux kuv mienh
Luke18:10 Ninh gorngv
Luke18:11 Faa^li^si Mienh souv jienv wuov daux gaux gorngv
Luke18:12 Yietc norm leiz-baaix yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc i nzunc. Yie duqv haaix nyungc
Luke18:13 “Mv baac siou nzou-zinh wuov dauh souv jienv wuov maengx go deix nyei. Ninh liemh maiv cau hmien mangc gu'nguaaic lungh. Ninh za'gengh haiz hnyouv nzauh haic ziouc sung buoz nzuei la'kuotv gorngv
Luke18:14 Yesu aengx gorngv
Luke18:15 Maaih deix mienh yaac dorh ninh mbuo nyei gu'nguaaz daaih oix Yesu maan. Sai-gorx mbuo buatc mienh hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Luke18:16 Mv baac Yesu heuc fu'jueiv daaih. Ninh gorngv
Luke18:17 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
Luke18:18 Maaih dauh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh naaic Yesu
Luke18:19 Yesu naaic ninh
Luke18:20 Meih yaac hiuv duqv leiz-latc gorngv
Luke18:21 Wuov laanh mienh gorngv
Luke18:22 Yesu haiz hnangv naaiv gorngv
Luke18:23 Wuov laanh mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc nzauh
Luke18:24 Yesu buatc ninh nzauh haic ziouc gorngv
Luke18:25 Lorh torh cunx jiex sim-mbiuic corc gauh hungh hec butv-zoih mienh bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv.”
Luke18:26 Maaih deix mienh haiz Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ziouc naaic gaax
Luke18:27 Yesu dau
Luke18:28 Bide ziouc gorngv
Luke18:29 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke18:30 yiem naaiv seix ninh oix duqv gauh camv jiex ziex gouv. Nqa'haav hingv yaac oix duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.”
Luke18:31 Yesu dorh jienv wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx mingh pien deix mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke18:32 Taux wuov yie oix zuqc mienh zorqv jiu bun Janx
Luke18:33 Ninh mbuo oix longc biaav-bin mborqv yaac zorqv yie daix guangc
Luke18:34 Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac
Luke18:35 Yesu mingh aav lamh taux Ye^li^ko Zingh
Luke18:36 Haiz mienh camv jiex jauv ninh naaic gaax
Luke18:37 Mienh mbuox ninh
Luke18:38 Wuov dauh m'zing maengh mienh ziouc heuc
Luke18:39 Mingh ndaangc wuov deix hemx ninh

Luke20:1 Maaih hnoi Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh yaac zunh kuv fienx. Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux mienh gox daaih gorngv
Luke20:2 “Mbuox yie mbuo oc. Meih maaih haaix nyungc leiz zoux naaiv deix sic? Naaiv nyungc leiz haaix dauh bun meih?”
Luke20:3 Yesu dau
Luke20:4 Haaix dauh bun Yo^han maaih leiz tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz
Luke20:5 Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh caux laanh caangh laangh
Luke20:6 Mv baac se gorngv mbuo gorngv

Luke20:11 Huingx-ziouv ziouc aengx paaiv dauh bou mingh
Luke20:12 Huingx-ziouv aengx paaiv da'faam dauh mingh. Gouv huingx nyei mienh aengx mborqv duqv ninh siang haic

Luke20:20 Njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux sai mienh bieiv ziouc zanc-zanc cienh mangc jienv Yesu. Ninh mbuo paaiv mienh mingh zoux sic hnangv kuv mienh

Luke20:27 Maaih deix Saa^ndu^si Mienh daaih lorz Yesu. Saa^ndu^si wuov jauv mienh gorngv mienh daic mingh maiv haih nangh aqv.

Luke20:36 Ninh mbuo yaac maiv haih daic weic zuqc ninh mbuo hnangv fin-mienh nor. Ninh mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz weic zuqc ninh mbuo daic mingh aengx nangh daaih.
Luke20:37 Mose yaac bun cing mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih weic zuqc ninh gorngv douz zieqc ndiangx-dorn-fomv wuov diuh jauv. Ninh heuc Ziouv zoux ‘Apc^laa^ham nyei Tin-Hungh

Luke20:43 zuov yie bun meih nyei win-wangv zoux meih lorngx zaux nyei dorngx.”+’

Luke22:27 Haaix dauh zoux gauh hlo? Zueiz jienv nyanc wuov dauh fai liuc leiz wuov dauh? Zueiz jienv wuov dauh zoux gauh hlo maiv zeiz? Mv baac yie yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx hnangv fu-sux nyei mienh nor.
Luke22:28 Yie buangh zuqc kouv meih mbuo caux yie yiem
Luke22:29 Yie nyei Die hnangv haaix nor zorqv norm guoqv bun yie
Luke22:30 Se weic bun meih mbuo yiem yie nyei guoqv caux yie juangc dieh nyanc juangc dieh hopv. Meih mbuo yaac duqv zueiz weic
Luke22:31 “Simon aah! Simon! Muangx oc. Saadaan duqv Tin-Hungh nqoi nzuih seix meih mbuo yietc zungv hnangv mienh nyomx cuqv nor.

Luke22:33 Bide dau
Luke22:34 Yesu gorngv
Luke22:35 Yesu aengx naaic gaax ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo
Luke22:36 Yesu gorngv
Luke22:37 Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Luke22:38 Sai-gorx mbuo gorngv
Luke22:39 Yesu cuotv zingh mingh yaac hnangv yietc gau nor
Luke22:40 Taux wuov norm dorngx
Luke22:41 Gorngv liuz
Luke22:42 Ninh gorngv
Luke22:43 Maaih dauh fin-mienh yiem tin-dorngh daaih hinc cuotv tengx qaqv Yesu.
Luke22:44 Yesu ba'laqc nzauh duqv kouv haic ziouc jaa longc qaqv daux gaux. Ninh cuotv hanc yietc norm yietc norm hlo nyei
Luke22:45 Yesu daux gaux baac
Luke22:46 Ninh gorngv mbuox sai-gorx mbuo
Luke22:47 Yesu gorngv waac zungv maiv gaengh setv
Luke22:48 Mv baac Yesu naaic
Luke22:49 Caux Yesu yiem wuov deix sai-gorx buatc oix maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv
Luke22:50 Maaih dauh zungv hngaqv domh sai mienh nyei nouh ziouc pai zuqc nouh nyei mbiaauc bung m'normh ndutv mi'aqv.
Luke22:51 Mv baac Yesu gorngv
Luke22:52 Yesu gorngv mbuox daaih zorqv ninh wuov deix sai mienh bieiv caux goux hungh dinc nyei baeng-bieiv caux mienh gox
Luke22:53 Yie hnoi-hnoi caux meih mbuo yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
Luke22:54 Ninh mbuo zorqv Yesu dorh mingh domh sai mienh nyei biauv. Bide yaac gan jienv mingh mv baac leih go deix nyei.
Luke22:55 Yiem laatc gu'nyuoz
Luke22:56 Maaih dauh m'sieqv bou buatc Bide zueiz douz-nzauc hlen
Luke22:57 Mv baac Bide maiv nyiemc. Ninh gorngv
Luke22:58 Aav dangh aengx maaih dauh mienh buatc Bide ziouc gorngv
Luke22:59 Nqa'haav yietc norm ziangh hoc nyei dorngx
Luke22:60 Mv baac Bide dau
Luke22:61 Ziouv huin nzuonx mangc jienv Bide
Luke22:62 Bide ziouc cuotv mingh qaqv nyiemv duqv kouv haic.
Luke22:63 Goux Yesu wuov deix mienh guatc doqc jatv Yesu yaac mborqv ninh.
Luke22:64 Ninh mbuo buang jienv ninh nyei m'zing naaic ninh
Luke22:65 Ninh mbuo yaac gorngv waac camv nyei huotv Yesu.
Luke22:66 Lungh njang wuov zanc
Luke22:67 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Luke22:68 Se gorngv yie naaic joux waac meih mbuo
Luke22:69 Mv baac yangh naaiv jiex
Luke22:70 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv gorngv
Luke22:71 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Luke23:1 Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh yietc zungv ziouc jiez sin dorh Yesu mingh Bilaatv Zungx wuov.
Luke23:2 Yiem wuov ninh mbuo gox Yesu. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Luke23:3 Bilaatv ziouc naaic gaax Yesu
Luke23:4 Bilaatv ziouc gorngv mbuox sai mienh bieiv yaac mbuox zuangx mienh
Luke23:5 Mv baac ninh mbuo njiec qaqv jaa gorngv
Luke23:6 Bilaatv haiz ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ninh ziouc naaic gaax
Luke23:7 Bilaatv hiuv duqv Yesu zoux Helotv Hungh nyei baeqc fingx
Luke23:8 Helotv buatc Yesu ziouc a'hneiv haic aqv
Luke23:9 Helotv ziouc naaic camv-nyungc nyei mv baac Yesu maiv dau yietc joux.
Luke23:10 Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng souv jienv wuov
Luke23:11 Helotv caux ninh nyei baeng mangc piex
Luke23:12 Zinh ndaangc Bilaatv caux Helotv zoux win-jaa. Mv baac dongh naaic hnoi ninh mbuo zoux longx daav loz-gaeng.
Luke23:13 Bilaatv heuc sai mienh bieiv caux jien-fouv caux baeqc fingx daaih gapv zunv
Luke23:14 gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke23:15 Helotv yaac fih hnangv nyei maiv buatc ninh maaih haaix nyungc dorngc nyei dorngx
Luke23:16 Hnangv naaic
Luke23:17 Hnyangx-hnyangx taux Siex Maengc Zipv
Luke23:18 Zuangx mienh yietc zungv nauc jienv kih kungx kaatv nyei gorngv
Luke23:19 Naaiv dauh Mbaa^lapv^mbatc ceux lunc zingh gu'nyuoz yaac daix jiex mienh cingx daaih zuqc wuonx jienv loh.
Luke23:20 Bilaatv maaih hnyouv oix bungx Yesu
Luke23:21 Mv baac ninh mbuo aengx nih nungx nauc nyei heuc jienv gorngv
Luke23:22 Bilaatv aengx gorngv da'faam nzunc
Luke23:23 Mv baac zuangx mienh yietc zei kih kungx kaatv nyei gorngv oix zuqc dorh Yesu mingh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax. Zuangx mienh heuc taux hingh.
Luke23:24 Bilaatv ziouc dingc ei ninh mbuo tov nyei zoux.
Luke23:25 Ninh bungx ninh mbuo tov wuov dauh
Luke23:26 Ninh mbuo dorh Yesu cuotv jauv wuov zanc
Luke23:27 Mienh camv nyei yaac gan jienv Yesu mingh. Maaih deix m'sieqv dorn yaac nyiemv duqv kouv haic weic zuqc ninh mbuo korv-lienh haic Yesu.
Luke23:28 Yesu huin nzuonx daaih gorngv
Luke23:29 Weic zuqc ziangh hoc oix taux
Luke23:30 Taux wuov zanc mienh oix gorngv mbuox domh zorng
Luke23:31 Se gorngv ndiangx nyiemz nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo zungv hnangv naaiv zoux
Luke23:32 Ninh mbuo aengx dorh i dauh zuiz-mienh mingh caux Yesu yietc jauv daix.
Luke23:33 Ninh mbuo mingh taux norm dorngx mbuox heuc M'nqorngv-Korqv Dorngx
Luke23:34 Yesu gorngv
Luke23:35 Zuangx mienh souv jienv wuov mangc. Mv baac zoux hlo wuov deix Yiutai Mienh jatv ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Luke23:36 Baeng yaac fih hnangv nyei huotv Yesu
Luke23:37 yaac gorngv
Luke23:38 Yiem Yesu gu'nguaaic fiev jienv naaiv deix waac
Luke23:39 Caux Yesu ding jienv wuov deix i dauh zuiz-mienh maaih dauh gorngv doqc ki Yesu
Luke23:40 Mv baac wuov dauh zuiz-mienh baav ninh gorngv
Luke23:41 Weic mbuo se horpc nyei
Luke23:42 Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox Yesu
Luke23:43 Yesu dau ninh
Luke23:44 Wuov zanc aav lamh ziangx aanx nyei ziangh hoc
Luke23:45 Mba'hnoi yaac hmuangx mingh. Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov kuaaiv mbaeqc gaengh ndie yaac mbaaix zoux i maengx.
Luke23:46 Yesu heuc qiex hlo nyei gorngv
Luke23:47 Maaih dauh baeng-bieiv buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv ziouc ceng Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv
Luke23:48 Gapv zunv mangc naaiv deix sic nyei zuangx mienh buatc sic hnangv naaiv nor cuotv
Luke23:49 Caux Yesu jiu zuoqc wuov deix mienh aengx caux yiem Gaa^li^li gan Yesu daaih wuov deix m'sieqv dorn souv jienv go deix nyei mangc naaiv deix sic.
Luke23:50 Maaih dauh Yu^ndie Saengv
Luke23:51 
Luke23:52 Yosepv mingh lorz Bilaatv tov Yesu nyei sei.
Luke23:53 Tov liuz ziouc mingh zorqv sei njiec daaih
Luke23:54 Wuov hnoi se liuc leiz jiex Dingh Gong nyei Hnoi
Luke23:55 Yiem Gaa^li^li gan Yesu daaih wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gan jienv Yosepv mingh mangc zouv
Luke23:56 Mangc liuz ninh mbuo ziouc nzuonx mingh mbenc jienv ndaang nyei ndie
Luke24:1 Taux wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi lungh ndorm nziouv nyei
Luke24:2 Taux wuov buatc mbaeqc zouv-gaengh wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv tui nqoi mi'aqv.
Luke24:3 Ninh mbuo ziouc bieqc mingh mangc
Luke24:4 Ninh mbuo souv jienv wuov hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Liemh zeih maaih i laanh mienh zuqv jienv lui-houx zaengh zaengh nyei souv jienv ninh mbuo nyei ga'hlen.
Luke24:5 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gamh nziex haic ziouc puoqv njiec ndau. Naaiv deix i laanh mienh naaic ninh mbuo
Luke24:6 Ninh maiv yiem naaiv lorqc. Ninh nangh daaih aqv. Meih mbuo oix zuqc jangx taux ninh yiem Gaa^li^li wuov zanc gorngv mbuox meih mbuo wuov deix waac.
Luke24:7 Ninh gorngv
Luke24:8 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn ziouc jangx zuqc Yesu nyei waac aqv.
Luke24:9 Yiem zouv nzuonx mingh
Luke24:10 Mbuox gong-zoh mbuo wuov deix m'sieqv dorn
Luke24:11 Mv baac gong-zoh mbuo maiv sienx. Laaic naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn la'guaih gorngv hnangv.
Luke24:12 Mv baac Bide jiez sin tiux jienv mingh taux zouv
Luke24:13 Dongh naaic hnoi maaih i dauh Yesu nyei sai-gorx mingh norm laangz heuc Em^maa^utc
Luke24:14 Gan jauv mingh wuov zanc
Luke24:15 Doix ninh mbuo gorngv jienv wuov zanc
Luke24:16 Ninh mbuo buatc nyei mv baac weic haaix diuc mv bei
Luke24:17 Yesu naaic gaax ninh mbuo
Luke24:18 Maaih dauh
Luke24:19 Yesu aengx naaic
Luke24:20 Yie mbuo nyei sai mienh bieiv caux jien-fouv zorqv ninh jiu bun Janx dingc zuiz daix ninh ziouc dorh ninh mingh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax daic.
Luke24:21 Yie mbuo yaac hnamv jienv dongh naaiv dauh oix zuoqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nzuonx. Yaac maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv hnangv. Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz duqv buo hnoi aqv.
Luke24:22 Mv baac yiem yie mbuo wuov maaih deix m'sieqv dorn zoux bun yie mbuo hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Ninh mbuo a'ndorm nziouv nyei mingh wuov zouv mangc.
Luke24:23 Maiv buatc ninh nyei sei mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih gorngv ninh mbuo buatc fin-mienh hinc cuotv daaih mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke24:24 Yie mbuo maaih deix mingh mangc yaac buatc hnangv naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn gorngv nor. Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv buatc Yesu.”
Luke24:25 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke24:26 Giduc oix zuqc siouc liuz naaic deix kouv nyei sic cingx daaih bieqc ninh nyei njang-laangc maiv zeiz?”
Luke24:27 Yesu ziouc gorngv mengh Ging-Sou ziangv jienv ninh ganh gorngv nyei joux-joux waac bun ninh mbuo muangx
Luke24:28 Mingh aav lamh taux ninh mbuo oix mingh wuov norm laangz
Luke24:29 Mv baac ninh mbuo qaqv liouh ninh gorngv
Luke24:30 Yesu caux ninh mbuo juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx wuov zanc
Luke24:31 Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo i laanh liemh zeih zieqv duqv Yesu
Luke24:32 Laanh mbuox laanh
Luke24:33 Ninh mbuo liemh zeih jiez sin nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem. Ninh mbuo buatc wuov deix ziepc yietv dauh sai-gorx caux deix ninh mbuo nyei doic gapv zunv wuov
Luke24:34 haiz ninh mbuo gorngv
Luke24:35 Wuov deix i laanh yaac gorngv ninh mbuo yiem jauv zaangc buangh nyei sic yaac gorngv Yesu maeqv njuov wuov zanc ninh mbuo zieqv duqv ninh aqv.
Luke24:36 Wuov deix i laanh gorngv jienv naaiv deix jauv wuov zanc
Luke24:37 Ninh mbuo laaic buatc janx-daic njoiz mv bei
Luke24:38 Mv baac Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke24:39 Samx mangc gaax yie nyei buoz-zaux! Hluo mangc
Luke24:40 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv yaac bun ninh mbuo mangc ninh nyei buoz-zaux.
Luke24:41 Mangc liuz ninh mbuo a'hneiv haic
Luke24:42 Ninh mbuo zorqv deix ziqv daaih nyei mbiauz bun ninh.
Luke24:43 Ninh zipv daaih ziouc dorng jienv ninh mbuo nyanc.
Luke24:44 Nyanc liuz
Luke24:45 Yesu ziouc porv nqoi ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv bun ninh mbuo mengh baeqc Ging-Sou.
Luke24:46 Ninh yaac gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Luke24:47 Oix zuqc dengv ninh nyei mbuox mingh zunh mbuox mienh goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz. Oix zuqc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiez gorn zunh cuotv buangv maanc guoqv maanc fingx.
Luke24:48 Meih mbuo zoux naaiv deix sic nyei zorng-zengx mienh.
Luke24:49 Dongh yie nyei Die laengz bun nyei
Luke24:50 Yesu dorh ninh mbuo cuotv mingh taux Mbe^taa^ni Laangz-hlen ziouc cau jienv buoz buang waac ninh mbuo.
Luke24:51 Buang gau waac
Luke24:52 Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem wuov baaix ninh
Luke24:53 yaac zanc-zanc yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ceng Tin-Hungh.
John1:1 Dongh cor maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc
John1:2 Zinh ndaangc yiem gorn wuov zanc
John1:3 Tin-Hungh longc ninh zeix cuotv maanc muotc. Maiv maaih yietc nyungc Tin-Hungh maiv longc Doz zeix.
John1:4 Doz zoux ziangh maengc nyei gorn-nyuonh. Naaiv nyungc maengc dorh njang daaih ziux baamh mienh.
John1:5 Njang ziux bieqc hmuangx nyei dorngx
John1:6 Tin-Hungh paaiv dauh mienh daaih
John1:7 Ninh daaih tengx njang zoux zorng-zengx bun maanc mienh haih sienx.
John1:8 Ninh ganh maiv zeiz zoux naaiv njang. Ninh kungx tengx njang zoux zorng-zengx hnangv.
John1:9 Naaiv njang se zien haic nyei njang yaac bieqc baamh gen ziux njang lungh ndiev mienh maanh.
John1:10 Naaiv Doz yiem baamh gen. Tin-Hungh longc ninh zeix baamh gen
John1:11 Ninh daaih taux ninh ganh nyei deic-bung
John1:12 Mv baac zipv ninh yaac sienx kaux ninh wuov deix
John1:13 Ninh mbuo benx Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz se maiv zeiz ei baamh mienh nyei nziaamv-fei fai ei baamh mienh nyei eix yungz. Tin-Hungh ganh zoux ninh mbuo nyei die.
John1:14 Doz benx dauh baamh mienh yiem mbuo mbu'ndongx. Ninh maaih en-ceix caux zien leiz buangv nzengc. Yie mbuo duqv buatc ninh nyei njang-laangc
John1:15 Yo^han tengx ninh zoux zorng-zengx. Ninh heuc jienv gorngv
John1:16 Ninh nyei en hlo haic ziouc zanc-zanc ceix fuqv bun mbuo.
John1:17 Tin-Hungh longc Mose bun mbuo duqv leiz-latc
John1:18 Maiv maaih haaix dauh buatc jiex Tin-Hungh. Kungx maaih ninh nyei ndoqc Dorn
John1:19 Yo^han zoux nyei zorng-zengx se hnangv naaiv. Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh paaiv deix sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh mingh naaic ninh

John1:21 Ninh mbuo aengx naaic
John1:22 Ninh mbuo aengx gorngv

John1:24 Faa^li^si Mienh paaiv daaih wuov deix mienh
John1:25 ziouc naaic Yo^han
John1:26 Yo^han dau
John1:27 Yie daaih ndaangc

John1:29 Da'nyeic hnoi Yo^han buatc Yesu hungx jienv ninh daaih ziouc gorngv
John1:30 Dongh naaiv dauh yie gorngv jiex mbuox meih mbuo
John1:31 Yie ganh maiv hiuv duqv ninh dongh haaix dauh
John1:32 Yo^han aengx zoux zorng-zengx gorngv
John1:33 Yie yaac maiv hiuv ninh dongh haaix dauh
John1:34 Yie buatc liuz aqv
John1:35 Da'nyeic hnoi Yo^han caux i dauh ninh nyei sai-gorx aengx souv jienv wuov.
John1:36 Buatc Yesu jiex jauv
John1:37 Wuov deix i dauh sai-gorx haiz Yo^han hnangv naaiv nor gorngv

John1:39 Yesu dau
John1:40 Haiz Yo^han gorngv ziouc gan jienv Yesu mingh wuov deix i dauh
John1:41 An^ndaa^lu liemh zeih mingh lorz ninh nyei gorx
John1:42 An^ndaa^lu ziouc dorh Simon mingh taux Yesu wuov. Yesu mangc jienv Simon ziouc gorngv
John1:43 Da'nyeic hnoi Yesu dingc hnyouv mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv. Ninh buatc Filipv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
John1:44 Filipv se Mbetc^sai^ndaa Mungv nyei mienh hnangv An^ndaa^lu caux Simon nor.
John1:45 Filipv lorz buatc Naa^taa^naa^en ziouc gorngv

John2:1 Da'faam hnoi yiem Gaa^li^li Deic-Bung
John2:2 Mienh yaac cingv Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh wuov norm yinh.

John2:4 Yesu dau

John2:6 Yiutai Mienh ei jienv leiz nzaaux buoz-zaux nyei uix. Weic naaiv
John2:7 Yesu mbuox wuov deix bou
John2:8 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo
John2:9 Cing-suiv seix naaiv deix wuom benx daaih nyei a'ngunc diuv. Ninh maiv hiuv duqv naaiv deix diuv yiem haaix daaih

John2:13 Wuov zanc aav lamh taux Siex Maengc Zipv. Yesu ziouc mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh.

John2:23 Yesu yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv. Maaih mienh camv nyei sienx kaux ninh weic zuqc ninh mbuo buatc ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc.
John2:24 Mv baac Yesu maiv bungx hnyouv ninh mbuo weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv maanc mienh.

John3:8 Nziaaux oix buonc haaix
John3:9 Ni^ko^nde^matv naaic ninh

John3:12 Se gorngv yie gorngv baamh gen nyei jauv meih mbuo zungv maiv sienx
John3:13 Maiv gaengh maaih haaix dauh duqv faaux jiex tin-dorngh cuotv liuz yie
John3:14 “Loz-hnoi Mose yiem deic-bung-huaang hnangv haaix nor zorqv dongh naang an wuov dongc liepc faaux hlang
John3:15 bun haaix dauh sienx kaux yie ziouc duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.
John3:16 “Tin-Hungh ndongc naaic hnamv lungh ndiev mienh cingx zorqv ninh nyei ndoqc Dorn ceix bun ninh mbuo. Haaix dauh sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn maiv zuqc mietc mv baac duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.
John3:17 Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh nyei Dorn njiec taux baamh gen maiv zeiz weic dingc baamh mienh nyei zuiz. Kungx oix bun baamh mienh duqv njoux hnangv.
John3:18 “Haaix dauh sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn
John3:19 “Siemv zuiz nyei gorn se hnangv naaiv. Njang daaih bieqc baamh gen. Mienh maiv oix longc njang
John3:20 Haaix dauh zoux waaic sic
John3:21 Mv baac haaix dauh ei jienv zien leiz zoux
John3:22 Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz
John3:23 Wuov zanc Yo^han yaac tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz. Ninh yiem Aainon Mungv
John3:24 (Wuov zanc Yo^han maiv gaengh zuqc wuonx loh.)
John3:25 Maaih deix Yo^han nyei sai-gorx caux dauh Yiutai Mienh nzaeng saax uix nyei leiz.
John3:26 Wuov deix sai-gorx ziouc mingh mbuox Yo^han
John3:27 Yo^han dau
John3:28 Meih mbuo ganh haih tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx
John3:29 Longc siang-mbuangz wuov dauh m'daaih siang-laangh. Kaeqv-lorngh zuov jienv muangx siang-laangh nyei qiex. Yietv haiz siang-laangh gorngv waac ninh ziouc njien-youh haic. Weic naaiv yie ih zanc duqv naaiv nyungc orn-lorqc taux daauh aqv.
John3:30 “Ninh oix zuqc zoux hlo jienv faaux
John3:31 “Yiem tin-dorngh daaih wuov dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex yietc zungv. Yiem baamh gen daaih wuov dauh guei baamh gen

John3:33 Haaix dauh zipv ninh nyei waac se hnangv nqaapv jienv yienx nor

John3:35 Zaangc Diex hnamv ninh nyei Dorn
