John4:1 Faa^li^si Mienh haiz gorngv Yesu duqv sai-gorx gauh camv yaac tengx sai-gorx jiex wuom nyei leiz gauh camv Yo^han.
John4:2 Mv baac zien sic se maiv zeiz Yesu tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz. Kungx ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo tengx hnangv.
John4:3 Yesu hiuv duqv mienh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
John4:4 Ninh haiz hnangv haaix oix zuqc yangh Saa^maa^lie Saengv nzuonx.
John4:5 Gan Saa^maa^lie Saengv mingh gau
John4:6 Yaakopv nyei wuom-kuotv yaac yiem wuov norm dorngx. Yesu yangh gau jauv
John4:7 Maaih dauh Saa^maa^lie Janx-muangz mingh wuov wuom-kuotv zaangh wuom. Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John4:8 (Doix jienv wuov norm ziangh hoc sai-gorx mbuo bieqc mungv maaiz ga'naaiv nyanc.)
John4:9 Wuov dauh Saa^maa^lie muangz gorngv
John4:10 Yesu dau
John4:11 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv
John4:12 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv
John4:13 Yesu dau
John4:14 Mv baac haaix dauh hopv yie bun nyei wuom
John4:15 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn aengx gorngv
John4:16 Yesu mbuox ninh
John4:17 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz dau
John4:18 Meih longc jiex biaa torngx nqox mi'aqv. Ih zanc longc jienv naaiv dauh yaac maiv zeiz meih nyei nqox. Meih nyei waac gengh zien nyei.”
John4:19 Janx-muangz gorngv
John4:20 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem naaiv norm mbong zaangc Tin-Hungh
John4:21 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John4:22 Meih mbuo Saa^maa^lie Mienh maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo zaangc haaix dauh. Mv baac yie mbuo Yiutai Mienh zaangc haaix dauh yie mbuo hiuv nyei
John4:23 Wuov norm ziangh hoc oix taux
John4:24 Tin-Hungh se Singx Lingh. Zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh oix zuqc longc Singx Lingh caux zien leiz zaangc.”
John4:25 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz gorngv mbuox ninh
John4:26 Yesu gorngv
John4:27 Wuov zanc sai-gorx mbuo nzuonx daaih buatc Yesu caux wuov dauh Janx-muangz gorngv waac ziouc hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh naaic wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
John4:28 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz ziouc guangc jienv ninh nyei nie-ha'louh wuov
John4:29 “Meih mbuo daaih mangc gaax
John4:30 Zuangx mienh ziouc cuotv mungv mingh mangc Yesu.
John4:31 Janx-muangz nzuonx mingh wuov zanc
John4:32 Mv baac Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John4:33 Sai-gorx mbuo laanh naaic laanh
John4:34 Yesu dau
John4:35 Meih mbuo maaih joux waac gorngv
John4:36 Ih zanc siou gaeng-zuangx nyei mienh duqv ninh mbuo nyei gong-zinh yaac siou gaeng-zuangx weic bun duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. Zuangx nyei mienh caux siou nyei mienh ziouc lomh nzoih a'hneiv.
John4:37 Weic zuqc mienh gorngv
John4:38 Yie paaiv meih mbuo mingh siou dongh meih mbuo maiv ndortv qaqv zuangx nyei. Ganh dauh ndortv qaqv zuangx mv baac meih mbuo baeqc baeqc duqv ninh nyei qaqv.”
John4:39 Wuov norm mungv nyei Saa^maa^lie Mienh camv nyei sienx Yesu weic zuqc wuov dauh Saa^maa^lie Janx-muangz zoux zorng-zengx gorngv
John4:40 Hnangv naaic
John4:41 Weic Yesu gorngv nyei waac aengx maaih mienh camv nyei sienx ninh.
John4:42 Naaiv deix mienh gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
John4:43 Jiex liuz wuov deix i hnoi
John4:44 Yesu ganh gorngv jiex
John4:45 Taux Gaa^li^li Saengv
John4:46 Yesu aengx nzuonx Gaa^li^li Saengv
John4:47 Domh jien haiz gorngv Yesu yiem Yu^ndie Saengv daaih taux Gaa^li^li
John4:48 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John4:49 Domh jien gorngv
John4:50 Yesu gorngv
John4:51 Nzuonx gau
John4:52 Ninh naaic ninh nyei bou
John4:53 Wuov dauh dorn nyei die ziouc jangx zuqc za'gengh doix Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John4:54 Naaiv se Yesu yiem Yu^ndie Saengv mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv zoux da'nyeic nzunc mbuoqc horngh haic nyei jangx-hoc.
John5:1 Nqa'haav Yesu mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Yiutai Mienh nyei yietc norm zipv.
John5:2 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem maaih dauh gaengh heuc Ba'gi Yungh Gaengh. Gaengh ga'hlen maaih norm wuom-domh
John5:3 Butv-baengc mienh camv nyei bueix wuov. M'zing maengh
John5:4 weic zuqc maaih deix ziangh hoc maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh njiec daaih muoqv wuom dongz. Wuom dongz liuz
John5:5 Yiem wuov maaih dauh mienh butv faah ziepc betv hnyangx baengc.
John5:6 Yesu buatc ninh bueix wuov yaac hiuv duqv ninh butv baengc lauh haic
John5:7 Wuov dauh baengc mienh dau
John5:8 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John5:9 Wuov dauh mienh liemh zeih longx daaih ziouc dorh jienv ninh nyei jiuc yangh jauv mingh mi'aqv. Wuov hnoi se doix zuqc Dingh Gong Hnoi.
John5:10 Yiutai Mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox baengc longx wuov dauh
John5:11 Ninh dau
John5:12 Wuov deix mienh aengx naaic ninh
John5:13 Mv baac baengc longx wuov dauh mienh maiv hiuv duqv zorc ninh longx wuov dauh dongh haaix dauh
John5:14 Nqa'haav Yesu aengx buatc ninh zorc longx wuov dauh mienh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
John5:15 Wuov dauh mienh nzuonx mingh gorngv mbuox zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh
John5:16 Weic zuqc Yesu longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zoux naaiv deix sic
John5:17 Mv baac Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John5:18 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
John5:19 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John5:20 Zaangc Diex hnamv ninh nyei Dorn
John5:21 Zaangc Diex hnangv haaix nor bun daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih ziangh jienv
John5:22 Zaangc Diex ganh maiv siemv haaix dauh nyei zuiz. Ninh zorqv lingc jiu bun ninh nyei Dorn siemv yietc zungv zuiz
John5:23 weic bun mienh taaih ninh nyei Dorn hnangv ninh mbuo taaih Zaangc Diex nor. Haaix dauh maiv taaih ninh nyei Dorn
John5:24 “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John5:25 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John5:26 Zaangc Diex hnangv haaix nor zoux ziangh maengc nyei gorn-nyuonh
John5:27 Zaangc Diex yaac bun ninh nyei Dorn maaih lingc siemv zuiz weic zuqc ninh nyei Dorn zoux Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn.
John5:28 “Meih mbuo maiv dungx weic naaiv deix sic hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Ziangh hoc oix taux
John5:29 ziouc yiem zouv cuotv daaih. Zoux longx wuov deix duqv nangh daaih ziangh jienv. Zoux waaic wuov deix nangh daaih zuqc dingc zuiz.
John5:30 “Yie maiv haih ei yie ganh nyei hnyouv zoux haaix nyungc. Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor mbuox yie
John5:31 Se gorngv yie weic yie ganh zoux zorng-zengx
John5:32 Mv baac aengx maaih dauh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx. Yie hiuv duqv ninh nyei zorng-zengx waac za'gengh zien nyei.
John5:33 “Meih mbuo paaiv mienh mingh Yo^han wuov
John5:34 Yie maiv zeiz qiemx zuqc mienh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx. Yie kungx hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic bun meih mbuo duqv njoux hnangv.
John5:35 Yo^han beiv norm dang
John5:36 “Yie yaac maaih nyungc zoux zorng-zengx gauh hlo jiex Yo^han zoux nyei. Se dongh Zaangc Diex paaiv yie zoux ziangx nyei nyungc-nyungc gong. Se ih zanc yie zoux jienv naaiv deix gong bun cing Zaangc Diex ganh paaiv yie daaih.
John5:37 Zaangc Diex paaiv yie daaih
John5:38 Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv zaangh ninh nyei waac
John5:39 Meih mbuo qaqv zaah Ging-Sou
John5:40 mv baac meih mbuo maiv kangv daaih lorz yie duqv ziangh maengc.
John5:41 “Yie maiv zeiz lorz mienh ceng yie.
John5:42 Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo
John5:43 Yie ndaam yie nyei Die nyei mengh daaih mv baac meih mbuo maiv zipv yie. Se gorngv maaih dauh ndaam jienv ninh ganh nyei mengh daaih
John5:44 Meih mbuo a'hneiv duqv mienh ceng
John5:45 “Meih mbuo maiv dungx hnamv yie oix yiem Zaangc Diex nyei nza'hmien gox meih mbuo. Oix gox meih mbuo wuov dauh se Mose
John5:46 Se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh sienx Mose
John5:47 Mv baac meih mbuo maiv sienx Mose fiev nyei nor
John6:1 Nqa'haav Yesu jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn (aengx maaih ganh norm mbuox heuc Ti^mbe^lietv).
John6:2 Mienh camv nyei gan jienv ninh mingh weic zuqc ninh mbuo buatc ninh zoux jiex mbuoqc horngh nyei sic zorc longx butv-baengc mienh.
John6:3 Yesu ziouc faaux mbong-aiv mingh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo zueiz jienv wuov.
John6:4 Wuov zanc aav lamh deix taux Yiutai Mienh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv aqv.
John6:5 Yesu cau hmien mangc
John6:6 Yesu kungx hnangv naaiv nor naaic weic seix Filipv. Ninh ganh oix hnangv haaix nor zoux ninh zungv hiuv mi'aqv.
John6:7 Filipv dau
John6:8 Maaih dauh Yesu nyei sai-gorx
John6:9 “Yiem naaiv maaih dauh dorn maaih biaa norm longc mbiauh mbaali zoux daaih nyei njuov caux i dauh mbiauz. Mv baac mienh ndongc naaic camv hnangv haaix nor haih bun duqv nqoi?”
John6:10 Yesu gorngv
John6:11 Yesu ziouc zorqv wuov deix njuov daaih daux gaux
John6:12 Zuangx mienh ziouc nyanc beuv nzengc. Yesu mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo
John6:13 Dongh wuov deix biaa norm njuov zuangx mienh nyanc beuv nzengc
John6:14 Zuangx mienh buatc Yesu zoux naaiv nyungc mbuoqc horngh nyei sic
John6:15 Yesu hiuv duqv mienh oix daaih zorqv ninh
John6:16 Lungh maanz-hmuangx deix
John6:17 bieqc nzangv hungx jienv mingh wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv
John6:18 Wuov zanc borngz gorng domh nziaaux buonc koiv jiez laangc.
John6:19 Sai-gorx mbuo nzaeng nzangv mingh biaa juqv gilo nyei dorngx
John6:20 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John6:21 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc a'hneiv zipv ninh bieqc nzangv. Nzangv liemh zeih taux ninh mbuo oix mingh wuov norm dorngx mi'aqv.
John6:22 Da'nyeic hnoi corc yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv wuov deix zuangx mienh hiuv duqv yiem wuov kungx maaih nduqc poux nzangv hnangv. Yesu yaac maiv zeiz caux ninh nyei sai-gorx bieqc wuov poux nzangv
John6:23 Maaih deix nzangv yiem Ti^mbe^lietv Mungv daaih dingh jienv wuov koiv-hlen
John6:24 Zuangx mienh buatc Yesu caux sai-gorx mbuo maiv yiem naaic
John6:25 Zuangx mienh lorz buatc Yesu yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv ninh mbuo naaic
John6:26 Yesu dau
John6:27 Meih mbuo maiv dungx cuotv qaqv lorz haih waaic nyei nyanc hopv. Oix zuqc lorz bun mienh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc wuov nyungc nyanc hopv. Yie
John6:28 Ninh mbuo ziouc naaic Yesu
John6:29 Yesu dau
John6:30 Ninh mbuo ziouc mbuox Yesu
John6:31 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem deic-bung-huaang duqv nyanc maa^naa hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
John6:32 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John6:33 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei nyanc hopv se dongh yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih bun baamh mienh duqv ziangh jienv wuov dauh.”
John6:34 Ninh mbuo gorngv
John6:35 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John6:36 Mv baac hnangv yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo nor
John6:37 Da'faanh yie nyei Die ceix bun yie nyei mienh yietc zungv oix daaih lorz yie. Haaix dauh daaih lorz yie
John6:38 Weic zuqc yie yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih mv baac maiv zeiz sueih yie ganh nyei eix zoux. Yie daaih zoux ei paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei eix hnangv.
John6:39 Paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei eix se hnangv naaiv. Dongh ninh ceix bun yie wuov deix mienh
John6:40 Weic zuqc yie nyei Die nyei eix se hnangv naaiv. Haaix dauh buatc ninh nyei Dorn
John6:41 Yiutai Mienh ziouc ngopv Yesu weic zuqc ninh gorngv
John6:42 Ninh mbuo gorngv
John6:43 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
John6:44 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih daaih lorz yie cuotv liuz Zaangc Diex
John6:45 Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou fiev jienv gorngv
John6:46 Naaiv maiv zeiz gorngv maaih haaix dauh duqv buatc jiex Zaangc Diex. Kungx yiem Tin-Hungh daaih wuov dauh duqv buatc jiex Zaangc Diex hnangv.
John6:47 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John6:48 Yie zoux yungz maengc nyei nyanc hopv.
John6:49 Meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyanc maa^naa mv baac ninh mbuo daic mi'aqv.
John6:50 Haaix dauh nyanc yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv maiv zuqc daic.
John6:51 Yie zoux ziangh jienv nyei nyanc hopv yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih. Haaix dauh nyanc naaiv nyungc nyanc hopv
John6:52 Yiutai Mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc nzaeng jiez jaax daaih gorngv
John6:53 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John6:54 Haaix dauh nyanc yie nyei orv
John6:55 Weic zuqc yie nyei orv caux yie nyei nziaamv se zien nyanc hopv.
John6:56 Haaix dauh nyanc yie nyei orv yaac hopv yie nyei nziaamv
John6:57 Ziangh jienv nyei Zaangc Diex paaiv yie daaih
John6:58 Naaiv se yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv. Se maiv hnangv mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyanc nyei maa^naa. Nyanc liuz corc haih daic nyei. Mv baac haaix dauh nyanc yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv ziouc duqv yietc liuz ziangh jienv.”
John6:59 Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac wuov zanc ninh yiem Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv nyei wuic dorngh njaaux mienh.
John6:60 Yesu nyei sai-gorx camv nyei haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc gorngv
John6:61 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh nyei sai-gorx hnangv naaiv nor ngopv naaiv deix waac ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John6:62 Wuov nyungc se gorngv meih mbuo buatc yie
John6:63 Se Singx Lingh bun mienh maaih ziangh maengc. Baamh mienh maiv haih bun mienh maaih ziangh maengc. Yie gorngv nyei waac haih bun meih mbuo duqv Singx Lingh. Singx Lingh yaac bun meih mbuo duqv ziangh maengc.
John6:64 Mv baac meih mbuo maaih deix maiv sienx.” Weic zuqc Yesu yiem gorn m'daaih hiuv duqv wuov deix mienh haaix dauh maiv sienx ninh
John6:65 Ninh ziouc gorngv
John6:66 Yiem naaic daaih Yesu nyei sai-gorx camv nyei tuix bouc
John6:67 Yesu ziouc naaic gaax wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx
John6:68 Simon Bide dau
John6:69 Yie mbuo sienx yaac hiuv duqv meih zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Cing-Nzengc Mienh.”
John6:70 Yesu dau
John6:71 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se gorngv zuqc Simon I^saa^kaa^li^otc nyei dorn
John7:1 Nqa'haav Yesu youh jienv Gaa^li^li Saengv mingh. Ninh dingc hnyouv maiv mingh Yu^ndie Saengv weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv yiem wuov zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh oix lorz qangx daix ninh.
John7:2 Wuov zanc aav lamh taux Mbiorv Liuh nyei Zipv aqv.
John7:3 Yesu nyei youz mbuo ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
John7:4 Haaix dauh oix duqv mengh dauh
John7:5 Liemh Yesu ganh nyei youz mbuo yaac maiv sienx ninh.
John7:6 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John7:7 Baamh mienh maiv maaih dorngx nzorng meih mbuo mv baac ninh mbuo nzorng yie
John7:8 Meih mbuo gunv mingh jiex Zipv aqv. Yie maiv gaengh mingh weic zuqc yie horpc zuqc mingh nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux.”
John7:9 Yesu caux ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz
John7:10 Yesu nyei youz mbuo mingh jiex Zipv mi'aqv. Yesu nqa'haav mingh mv baac ninh maiv dorng zuangx mingh
John7:11 Yiem wuov zipv nyei yinh gu'nyuoz
John7:12 Yiem wuov jiex zipv nyei zuangx mienh sih sungx sapv nyei gorngv Yesu. Maaih deix gorngv
John7:13 Mv baac haaix dauh yaac maiv gaamv dorng zuangx gorngv taux Yesu
John7:14 Jiex Zipv taux ndaamv-dingh
John7:15 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh mbuoqc horngh haic yaac gorngv
John7:16 Yesu ziouc dau ninh mbuo
John7:17 Haaix dauh dingc hnyouv ei Tin-Hungh nyei eix zoux
John7:18 Haaix dauh ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix hnamv cuotv daaih njaaux
John7:19 Mose bun leiz-latc meih mbuo maiv zeiz? Mv baac meih mbuo yaac maiv maaih yietc dauh gan leiz-latc. Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc lorz qangx daix yie?”
John7:20 Zuangx mienh gorngv
John7:21 Yesu gorngv
John7:22 Mose heuc meih mbuo tengx mienh jiex gaatv nyei leiz. (Mv baac naaiv nyungc leiz maiv zeiz yiem Mose daaih
John7:23 Se gorngv meih mbuo doix Dingh Gong Hnoi tengx mienh jiex gaatv nyei leiz weic maiv oix dorngc Mose nyei leiz
John7:24 Maiv dungx mangc beih zaangc siemv
John7:25 Weic naaiv maaih deix Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh gorngv
John7:26 Mangc gaax
John7:27 Mv baac naaiv laanh mienh yiem haaix daaih mbuo hiuv nyei. Giduc yiem haaix daaih maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv. ”
John7:28 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh wuov zanc ninh longc qiex hlo nyei gorngv
John7:29 Mv baac yie hiuv duqv ninh nyei
John7:30 Ninh mbuo ziouc oix zorqv ninh haic aqv
John7:31 Yiem wuov nyei zuangx mienh corc maaih camv nyei sienx ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
John7:32 Faa^li^si Mienh haiz zuangx mienh sih sungx sapv nyei gorngv Yesu nyei jauv
John7:33 Yesu gorngv
John7:34 Meih mbuo oix lorz yie yaac lorz maiv buatc
John7:35 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh
John7:36 Ninh gorngv mbuo oix lorz ninh yaac lorz maiv buatc
John7:37 Zipv nyei nqa'haav laai wuov hnoi
John7:38 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv nor
John7:39 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se gorngv taux Singx Lingh
John7:40 Zuangx mienh haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
John7:41 Aengx maaih deix gorngv
John7:42 Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
John7:43 Weic naaiv mienh ziouc laaix Yesu bun nqoi.
John7:44 Maaih deix oix zorqv Yesu mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh njiec buoz zorqv.
John7:45 Mingh zorqv Yesu wuov deix baeng nzuonx daaih
John7:46 Wuov deix baeng dau
John7:47 Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv
John7:48 Maaih haaix dauh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh fai Faa^li^si Mienh sienx jiex ninh nyei fai?
John7:49 Maiv maaih lorqc. Mv baac naaiv guanh mienh maiv hiuv duqv Mose nyei Leiz-Latc ziouc zuqc Tin-Hungh zioux ninh mbuo.”
John7:50 Maaih dauh wuov deix Faa^li^si Mienh
John7:51 “Ei mbuo nyei leiz
John7:52 Ninh mbuo dau
John7:53 Jiex zipv nyei wuic nzaanx
John8:1 Mv baac Yesu mingh wuov Ga'lanv Mbong.
John8:2 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
John8:3 Maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh dorh dauh hienx jienv nqox zorqv daaih nyei m'sieqv dorn
John8:4 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Yesu
John8:5 Mose nyei Leiz-Latc hatc mbuo oix zuqc longc la'bieiv zong naaiv nyungc mienh daic. Meih ni? Hnangv haaix nor gorngv?”
John8:6 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor naaic se oix nduov Yesu gorngv dorngc ziouc haih lorz gorn-baengx gox ninh. Mv baac Yesu ndoqv njiec longc buoz-ndoqv fiev ga'ndiev ndau.
John8:7 Wuov deix mienh maiv dingh liouh nyei naaic. Yesu ziouc cau jiez daaih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John8:8 Gorngv liuz
John8:9 Ninh mbuo haiz Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
John8:10 Yesu aengx cau jiez daaih naaic wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
John8:11 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn dau
John8:12 Yesu aengx njaaux zuangx mienh. Ninh gorngv
John8:13 Faa^li^si Mienh aengx gorngv
John8:14 Yesu dau
John8:15 “Meih mbuo ei baamh mienh nyei za'eix siemv mienh. Yie maiv siemv haaix dauh.
John8:16 Mv baac se gorngv yie siemv mienh nor
John8:17 Meih mbuo ganh nyei Leiz-Latc fiev jienv gorngv
John8:18 Yie tengx yie ganh zoux zorng-zengx. Aengx maaih yie nyei Die
John8:19 Ninh mbuo naaic
John8:20 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
John8:21 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John8:22 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh gorngv
John8:23 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John8:24 Weic naaiv yie gorngv mbuox jiex meih mbuo
John8:25 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu
John8:26 Yie aengx maaih camv-nyungc jauv gorngv meih mbuo
John8:27 Wuov deix mienh maiv mengh baeqc Yesu gorngv taux Zaangc Diex.
John8:28 Yesu ziouc gorngv
John8:29 Paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh yaac caux yie yiem. Ninh maiv guangc bun yie ganh yiem weic zuqc yie zanc-zanc zoux horpc ninh nyei hnyouv.”
John8:30 Mienh camv nyei haiz Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac ziouc sienx ninh.
John8:31 Yesu gorngv mbuox sienx ninh wuov deix Yiutai Mienh
John8:32 Meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv zien leiz. Zien leiz yaac oix bungx nqoi meih mbuo.”
John8:33 Ninh mbuo dau
John8:34 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
John8:35 Zoux nouh nyei mienh maiv haih yietc liuz caux biauv-ziouv yiem. Kungx cien dorn duqv yietc liuz yiem hnangv.
John8:36 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn bungx nqoi meih mbuo
John8:37 Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun. Mv baac meih mbuo corc oix daix yie weic zuqc yie njaaux nyei leiz meih mbuo maiv muangx.
John8:38 Yie gorngv nyei se yiem Zaangc Diex wuov buatc jiex nyei sic. Meih mbuo zoux nyei se meih mbuo nyei die mbuox meih mbuo zoux.”
John8:39 Ninh mbuo dau
John8:40 Yie kungx gorngv dongh yie haiz Tin-Hungh gorngv jiex nyei zien leiz mbuox meih mbuo
John8:41 Meih mbuo kungx zoux hnangv meih mbuo nyei Die nor zoux.” Ninh mbuo dau
John8:42 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John8:43 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv mengh baeqc yie gorngv nyei waac? Se weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv haih muangx yie nyei doz.
John8:44 Meih mbuo nyei die se mienv nyei hungh. Meih mbuo kungx oix ei jienv meih mbuo nyei die nyei eix zoux hnangv. Yiem gorn wuov ninh m'daaih daix mienh. Ninh yietc liuz maiv a'hneiv zien leiz
John8:45 Mv baac yie gorngv zien nyei
John8:46 Meih mbuo haaix dauh haih zaah duqv cuotv yie maaih zuiz? Wuov nyungc
John8:47 Haaix dauh yiem Tin-Hungh daaih
John8:48 Wuov deix Yiutai Mienh dau Yesu
John8:49 Yesu dau
John8:50 Yie maiv zeiz lorz mienh taaih yie
John8:51 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John8:52 Yiutai Mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
John8:53 Mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv
John8:54 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
John8:55 Meih mbuo yietc liuz maiv hiuv duqv ninh
John8:56 Meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix
John8:57 Ninh mbuo aengx gorngv ninh
John8:58 Yesu dau
John8:59 Ninh mbuo haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc zorqv la'bieiv oix zong ninh
John9:1 Yesu yangh jienv jauv mingh
John9:2 Sai-gorx mbuo naaic Yesu
John9:3 Yesu dau
John9:4 Maiv gaengh hmuangx
John9:5 Yie corc yiem jienv baamh gen nyei ziangh hoc yie zoux njang ziux baamh gen.”
John9:6 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
John9:7 mbuox ninh
John9:8 Ninh nyei laangz zaangc mienh caux aah loc buatc ninh tov nyaanh wuov deix
John9:9 Maaih deix gorngv
John9:10 Wuov deix mienh ziouc naaic ninh
John9:11 Ninh dau
John9:12 Wuov deix mienh aengx naaic
John9:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh m'zing maengh longx daaih wuov dauh mienh mingh Faa^li^si Mienh wuov.
John9:14 Dongh Yesu caix wuom-bamc tengx ninh nzaatv jienv m'zing njang daaih wuov hnoi se Dingh Gong Hnoi.
John9:15 Wuov deix Faa^li^si Mienh yaac naaic ninh
John9:16 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv
John9:17 Faa^li^si Mienh aengx naaic nzunc wuov dauh mienh
John9:18 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh corc maiv sienx ninh zinh ndaangc m'zing maengh
John9:19 naaic ninh mbuo
John9:20 Wuov dauh mienh nyei diex maac dau
John9:21 Mv baac yie mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh hnangv haaix nor haih mangc duqv buatc
John9:22 Ninh nyei diex maac hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh. Zoux hlo nyei wuov deix zungv gorngv liuz
John9:23 Weic naaiv ninh nyei diex maac cingx daaih gorngv
John9:24 Faa^li^si Mienh heuc m'zing maengh zorc longx wuov dauh mienh aengx daaih da'nyeic nzunc yaac mbuox ninh
John9:25 Wuov dauh mienh dau
John9:26 Ninh mbuo aengx naaic
John9:27 Ninh dau
John9:28 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv doqc ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
John9:29 Yie mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh caux Mose gorngv waac. Mv baac wuov dauh lov yie mbuo liemh maiv hiuv duqv ninh yiem haaix daaih.”
John9:30 Wuov dauh mienh dau
John9:31 Mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh maiv muangx baamz zuiz mienh nyei waac. Mv baac haaix dauh taaih Tin-Hungh
John9:32 Yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau cuotv daaih taux ih zanc
John9:33 Se gorngv naaiv dauh mienh maiv zeiz yiem Tin-Hungh daaih nor
John9:34 Zoux hlo nyei wuov deix dau
John9:35 Yesu haiz gorngv ninh mbuo zunc naaiv dauh mienh cuotv wuic dorngh. Ninh ziouc mingh lorz buatc yaac naaic ninh
John9:36 Wuov dauh mienh dau
John9:37 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John9:38 Wuov dauh mienh gorngv
John9:39 Yesu gorngv
John9:40 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh caux Yesu yiem wuov haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ziouc naaic
John9:41 Yesu dau
John10:1 Yesu gorngv
John10:2 Mv baac yangh gaengh bieqc wuov dauh se goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh.
John10:3 Zuov gaengh nyei mienh tengx ninh koi gaengh. Ba'gi yungh yaac muangx ninh nyei qiex. Ninh ei dauh dauh ba'gi yungh nyei mbuox ziaaux
John10:4 Bungx ninh ganh nyei ba'gi yungh cuotv nzengc daaih
John10:5 Ganh dauh mienh yungh maiv gan. Kungx oix biaux hnangv
John10:6 Yesu gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv mbuox ninh mbuo mv baac ninh mbuo maiv mengh baeqc eix leiz.
John10:7 Yesu ziouc aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John10:8 Daaih ndaangc yie wuov deix yietc zungv zoux janx-zaqc nimc yungh
John10:9 Yie se laatc gaengh. Haaix dauh yangh yie naaiv dauh gaengh bieqc oix duqv njoux yaac bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv lorz nyanc.
John10:10 Janx-zaqc daaih kungx oix nimc
John10:11 “Yie se goux ba'gi yungh longx nyei ziouv. Goux ba'gi yungh longx wuov dauh nyunc weic ba'gi yungh siev ninh nyei maengc.
John10:12 Cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh maiv zeiz zien goux ba'gi yungh nyei ziouv. Ba'gi yungh yaac maiv zeiz ninh ganh nyei. Buatc hieh juv daaih ziouc guangc jienv biaux. Hieh juv ziouc betv
John10:13 Cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh biaux mi'aqv
John10:14 “Yie se goux ba'gi yungh longx nyei ziouv. Yie hiuv duqv yie nyei ba'gi yungh
John10:15 hnangv Zaangc Diex hiuv duqv yie
John10:16 Yie aengx ganh maaih ba'gi yungh
John10:17 “Zaangc Diex hnamv yie weic zuqc yie siev yie ganh nyei maengc daic. Yie siev yie nyei maengc weic aengx duqv maengc nzuonx.
John10:18 Maiv maaih haaix dauh zorqv yie nyei maengc
John10:19 Laaix naaiv deix waac Yiutai Mienh aengx bun nqoi mi'aqv.
John10:20 Maaih camv nyei gorngv
John10:21 Mv baac maaih deix gorngv
John10:22 Wuov zanc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Houc Zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Biauv nyei Zipv se dong-gen hnoi.
John10:23 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
John10:24 Yiutai Mienh daaih gapv zunv ninh wuov yaac naaic
John10:25 Yesu dau
John10:26 Mv baac meih mbuo maiv sienx weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv zeiz yie nyei ba'gi yungh.
John10:27 Yie nyei ba'gi yungh muangx yie nyei qiex. Yie yaac hiuv duqv ninh mbuo
John10:28 Yie bun ninh mbuo maaih yietc liuz nyei maengc
John10:29 Yie nyei Die zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yie. Die yaac gauh hlo jiex maanc muotc. Ninh mbuo yiem yie nyei Die nyei buoz
John10:30 Yie caux yie nyei Die benx yietc dauh hnangv.”
John10:31 Yiutai Mienh aengx zorqv la'bieiv oix zong Yesu haic aqv.
John10:32 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John10:33 Ninh mbuo dau
John10:34 Yesu dau
John10:35 Mbuo hiuv duqv Ging-Sou nyei waac yietc liuz maiv haih goiv yienc. Se gorngv zipv Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov deix mienh Tin-Hungh heuc zienh nor
John10:36 wuov nyungc
John10:37 Se gorngv yie maiv ei yie nyei Die nyei za'eix zoux nor
John10:38 Mv baac se gorngv yie ei jienv zoux
John10:39 Wuov deix mienh aengx oix zorqv Yesu
John10:40 Yesu aengx nzuonx wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih
John10:41 Maaih mienh camv nyei daaih lorz ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
John10:42 Yiem wuov maaih mienh camv nyei ziouc sienx Yesu.
John11:1 Maaih dauh mienh
John11:2 (Naaiv dauh Maa^li^yaa se dongh longc ndaang nyei youh dox Ziouv nyei zaux
John11:3 Maataa mbuo i muoz-sieqv ziouc bun waac mingh mbuox Yesu
John11:4 Yesu haiz naaiv deix waac ninh gorngv
John11:5 Yesu hnamv haic Maataa mbuo i muoz-sieqv caux Laa^saa^latv.
John11:6 Ninh haiz mienh gorngv Laa^saa^latv butv jienv baengc
John11:7 cingx daaih gorngv mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx
John11:8 Sai-gorx mbuo dau
John11:9 Yesu dau
John11:10 Mv baac se gorngv ninh lungh muonz zanc yangh jauv nor
John11:11 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz ninh aengx gorngv
John11:12 Sai-gorx mbuo dau
John11:13 Yesu gorngv nyei eix leiz se Laa^saa^latv daic mi'aqv. Mv baac sai-gorx mbuo laaic Laa^saa^latv kungx m'njormh hnangv.
John11:14 Yesu ziouc gorngv zaqc mbuox ninh mbuo
John11:15 Mv baac weic tengx meih mbuo sienx yie
John11:16 Tomatv
John11:17 Yesu mingh taux Mbe^taa^ni Laangz wuov zanc
John11:18 Mbe^taa^ni Laangz leih Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh buo gilo jauv nyei dorngx.
John11:19 Yiutai Mienh camv nyei daaih mangc Maataa caux Maa^li^yaa
John11:20 Maataa haiz gorngv Yesu daaih aqv
John11:21 Maataa gorngv mbuox Yesu
John11:22 Mv baac
John11:23 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John11:24 Maataa dau
John11:25 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John11:26 Haaix dauh ziangh jienv yaac sienx yie
John11:27 Maataa dau
John11:28 Maataa hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz
John11:29 Maa^li^yaa haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc siepv-siepv nyei jiez sin mingh Yesu wuov.
John11:30 Wuov zanc Yesu maiv gaengh bieqc laangz
John11:31 Caux Maa^li^yaa yiem biauv tengx ninh jaiv nzauh wuov deix mienh
John11:32 Maa^li^yaa mingh taux Yesu wuov
John11:33 Yesu buatc Maa^li^yaa nyiemv
John11:34 Yesu naaic
John11:35 Yesu nyiemv.
John11:36 Wuov deix Yiutai Mienh gorngv
John11:37 Mv baac maaih deix gorngv
John11:38 Yesu aengx haiz hnyouv mun
John11:39 Yesu gorngv
John11:40 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John11:41 Wuov deix mienh ziouc zorqv nqoi la'bieiv. Yesu cau hmien mangc gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv
John11:42 Yie hiuv duqv Die haaix zanc yaac muangx yie
John11:43 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac ninh qiex hlo nyei heuc jienv gorngv
John11:44 Daic mingh wuov dauh mienh ziouc cuotv daaih aqv. Ninh nyei buoz-zaux corc maaih ndie nzenc jienv. Hmien yaac maaih ndie buang jienv. Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John11:45 Hnangv naaic daaih mangc Maa^li^yaa wuov deix Yiutai Mienh camv buatc Yesu zoux naaiv deix sic ziouc sienx ninh.
John11:46 Mv baac maaih deix nzuonx mingh gorngv nzengc Yesu zoux nyei jauv-louc bun Faa^li^si Mienh muangx.
John11:47 Naaiv deix sai mienh bieiv caux Faa^li^si Mienh ziouc heuc Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh gapv zunv caangh laangh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
John11:48 Se gorngv mbuo sueih ninh hnangv naaiv zoux jienv mingh
John11:49 Naaiv guanh mienh maaih dauh
John11:50 Meih mbuo maiv hiuv fai? Bun yietc dauh mienh daic div baeqc fingx se gauh longx yietc fingx mienh zuqc mietc nzengc.”
John11:51 Kaa^yaa^faatv gorngv naaiv deix waac se maiv zeiz ei ninh ganh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih gorngv. Se weic zuqc wuov hnyangx ninh zoux domh sai mienh ziouc gorngv zinh hoz waac
John11:52 Yaac maiv zeiz weic wuov fingx daic hnangv. Ninh yaac daic weic siou zunv Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz
John11:53 Yiem naaic hnoi daaih
John11:54 Weic naaiv Yesu maiv hnangv zinh ndaangc dorng zuangx youh Yu^ndie Saengv bun Yiutai Mienh buatc. Ninh mingh norm laangz heuc E^faa^im
John11:55 Aav lamh deix taux Yiutai Mienh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv
John11:56 Ninh mbuo yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv-hlen lorz Yesu. Laanh naaic laanh
John11:57 Wuov zanc sai mienh bieiv caux Faa^li^si Mienh jaa ziangx waac gorngv
John12:1 Siex Maengc Zipv maiv gaengh taux
John12:2 Yiem wuov ninh mbuo mbenc donx hnaangx houc Yesu. Maataa liuc leiz ninh mbuo. Laa^saa^latv yaac caux Yesu mbuo juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx.
John12:3 Wuov zanc
John12:4 Maaih dauh Yesu nyei sai-gorx
John12:5 “Zoux haaix nyungc maiv dorh naaiv deix youh mingh maaic duqv nyaanh daaih bun mienh jomc mienh? Naaiv funx daaih horpc faam-baeqv hnoi nyei gong-zinh niaa.”
John12:6 Yu^ndaatc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se maiv zeiz ninh maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh jomc mienh. Se weic zuqc ninh ganh zoux janx-zaqc. Ninh tengx goux Yesu mbuo nyei domh zuangx nyaanh mbuoqc mv baac ninh ganh yaac pinx nyaanh cuotv.
John12:7 Yesu gorngv
John12:8 Meih mbuo zanc-zanc maaih mienh jomc mienh caux meih mbuo yiem
John12:9 Maaih Yiutai Mienh camv haiz gorngv Yesu yiem Mbe^taa^ni Laangz. Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh wuov maiv zeiz kungx lorz Yesu hnangv. Ninh mbuo yaac oix mangc daic mingh
John12:10 Sai mienh bieiv mbuo ziouc daav za'eix oix liemh Laa^saa^latv daix
John12:11 weic zuqc ninh nyei sic cuotv daaih bun mienh camv guangc jienv sai mienh bieiv sienx Yesu.
John12:12 Da'nyeic hnoi
John12:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc nanv jienv daau-normh cuotv mingh zipv
John12:14 Yesu lorz duqv dauh maaz-li caan ziouc geh jienv daaih
John12:15 “Si^on Zingh aah! Maiv dungx gamh nziex. Meih nyei hungh diex geh jienv maaz-li caan daaih.”
John12:16 Daauh dangh Yesu nyei sai-gorx mbuo maiv mengh baeqc naaiv deix jauv. Mv baac Yesu daic
John12:17 Buatc Yesu heuc Laa^saa^latv yiem zouv nangh cuotv daaih wuov deix zuangx mienh zoux zorng-zengx gorngv nzengc naaiv deix jauv-louc.
John12:18 Weic zuqc zuangx mienh haiz gorngv Yesu zoux naaiv nzunc mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc
John12:19 Faa^li^si Mienh ziouc laanh mbuox laanh
John12:20 Mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv wuov zanc
John12:21 Naaiv deix Janx daaih lorz Filipv
John12:22 Filipv ziouc mingh mbuox An^ndaa^lu. Ninh mbuo i dauh ziouc mingh mbuox Yesu.
John12:23 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
John12:24 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John12:25 Haaix dauh kungx hnamv ninh ganh nyei maengc
John12:26 Haaix dauh oix tengx yie zoux bou
John12:27 “Ih zanc yie hnyouv nzauh haic. Yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv ni? Oix zuqc gorngv
John12:28 Aa Die aah! Tov bun Die nyei mbuox duqv njang-laangc.” Aengx maaih qiex yiem wuov lungh gorngv
John12:29 Souv jienv wuov nyei zuangx mienh haiz wuov nyungc qiex mbui
John12:30 Mv baac Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John12:31 Ih zanc taux ziangh hoc Tin-Hungh oix dingc lungh ndiev mienh nyei zuiz. Gunv baamh gen wuov dauh yaac oix zuqc zunc cuotv.
John12:32 Yie yiem ndau zuqc mienh liepc faaux hlang wuov zanc
John12:33 (Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic bun cing ninh oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor daic.)
John12:34 Zuangx mienh gorngv
John12:35 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John12:36 Maaih njang nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo oix zuqc sienx kaux njang. Meih mbuo ziouc benx yiem njang nyei mienh.” Gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
John12:37 Maiv gunv Yesu zoux mbuoqc horngh haic nyei jangx-hoc ndongc naaic camv bun Yiutai Mienh buatc
John12:38 Hnangv naaic weic bun douc waac mienh
John12:39 Weic naaiv ninh mbuo maiv haih sienx. Weic zuqc I^saa^yaa aengx gorngv
John12:40 “Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo nyei m'zing maengh
John12:41 I^saa^yaa hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc ninh duqv buatc Yesu nyei njang-laangc yaac gorngv taux ninh.
John12:42 Maaih zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh camv nyei sienx Yesu. Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv dorng zuangx nyiemc weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex Faa^li^si Mienh oix zunc ninh mbuo cuotv wuic dorngh.
John12:43 Ninh mbuo a'hneiv mienh ceng ninh mbuo gauh camv duqv Tin-Hungh ceng.
John12:44 Yesu longc qiex hlo nyei aengx gorngv
John12:45 Haaix dauh buatc yie
John12:46 Yie daaih bieqc baamh gen weic zoux norm njang. Haaix dauh sienx yie
John12:47 Haaix dauh haiz yie nyei waac yaac maiv ei jienv zoux
John12:48 Haaix dauh nqemh yie
John12:49 Weic zuqc yie nyei waac maiv zeiz ei yie ganh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih gorngv. Zaangc Diex paaiv yie daaih mbuox yie gorngv haaix nyungc yaac oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv.
John12:50 Yie hiuv duqv ninh nyei lingc haih bun mienh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. Weic naaiv yie gorngv nyei waac yietc zungv se ei yie nyei Die mbuox yie gorngv.”
John13:1 Siex Maengc Zipv zinh ndaangc wuov hnoi
John13:2 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo nyanc lungh hmuangx wuov zanc
John13:3 Yesu hiuv duqv Zaangc Diex zorqv maanc muotc jiu bun yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev
John13:4 Ninh ziouc yiem wuov dieh jiez sin daaih jaiv ga'nyiec wuov yiemc lui
John13:5 yaac zorqv wuom dox jienv bunh
John13:6 Nzaaux taux Simon Bide
John13:7 Yesu dau
John13:8 Bide gorngv
John13:9 Simon Bide dau
John13:10 Yesu gorngv
John13:11 Yesu hiuv duqv haaix dauh oix maaic ninh cingx daaih gorngv
John13:12 Yesu nzaaux liuz sai-gorx mbuo nyei zaux
John13:13 Meih mbuo heuc yie zoux Sai-Diex yaac zoux Ziouv. Meih mbuo gorngv duqv horpc nyei weic zuqc yie za'gengh zeiz aqv.
John13:14 Yie zoux meih mbuo nyei Ziouv yaac zoux meih mbuo nyei Sai-Diex tengx meih mbuo nzaaux liuz zaux. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo oix zuqc laanh tengx laanh nzaaux zaux.
John13:15 Yie zoux nyungc zeiv bun meih mbuo zuotc. Yie hnangv haaix nor tengx meih mbuo zoux liuz
John13:16 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John13:17 Ih zanc meih mbuo hiuv duqv naaiv deix jauv. Se gorngv meih mbuo ei jienv zoux ziouc maaih njien-youh aqv.
John13:18 “Yie maiv zeiz gorngv taux meih mbuo yietc zungv. Yie ginv daaih wuov deix yie hiuv nyei
John13:19 Sic maiv gaengh cuotv yie jaa-ndaangc mbuox meih mbuo. Sic cuotv wuov zanc meih mbuo ziouc sienx yie se yietc liuz ziangh jienv wuov dauh.
John13:20 Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo
John13:21 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac ninh haiz hnyouv mun haic
John13:22 Sai-gorx mbuo
John13:23 Maaih dauh sai-gorx
John13:24 Simon Bide ziouc hnaqv m'nqorngv mbuox wuov dauh sai-gorx
John13:25 Wuov dauh sai-gorx ziouc ndeng mingh gauh fatv deix naaic Yesu
John13:26 Yesu dau
John13:27 Yu^ndaatc nyanc liuz wuov aax njuov
John13:28 Juangc dieh nyei mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh mengh baeqc Yesu weic haaix diuc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv.
John13:29 Weic zuqc Yu^ndaatc goux nyaanh mbuoqc
John13:30 Yu^ndaatc nyanc liuz naaiv aax njuov ziouc mingh mi'aqv. Wuov zanc yaac hmuangx aqv.
John13:31 Yu^ndaatc cuotv mingh
John13:32 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh weic yie duqv njang-laangc
John13:33 “Yie nyei fu'jueiv aac
John13:34 Ih zanc yie bun diuh siang-lingc meih mbuo
John13:35 Se gorngv meih mbuo laanh hnamv laanh
John13:36 Simon Bide naaic Yesu
John13:37 Bide naaic
John13:38 Yesu dau
John14:1 Yesu aengx gorngv
John14:2 Yie nyei Die nyei biauv maaih yiem nyei dorngx camv nyei. Se gorngv maiv maaih yie zungv mbuox meih mbuo mi'aqv. Yie yaac mingh liuc leiz dorngx bun meih mbuo yiem.
John14:3 Yie mingh liuc leiz ziangx dorngx bun meih mbuo yiem
John14:4 Yie oix mingh nyei dorngx wuov diuh jauv
John14:5 Tomatv gorngv mbuox ninh
John14:6 Yesu dau
John14:7 Se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh hiuv duqv yie
John14:8 Filipv gorngv mbuox Yesu
John14:9 Yesu gorngv
John14:10 Meih maiv sienx yie yiem Zaangc Diex gu'nyuoz
John14:11 Meih mbuo oix zuqc sienx yie yiem Zaangc Diex gu'nyuoz
John14:12 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John14:13 Meih mbuo dengv yie nyei mbuox tov haaix nyungc
John14:14 Se gorngv meih mbuo dengv yie nyei mbuox tov haaix nyungc
John14:15 “Se gorngv meih mbuo hnamv yie
John14:16 Yie oix tengx Zaangc Diex tov
John14:17 Naaiv dauh se Singx Lingh
John14:18 Yie maiv guangc meih mbuo benx guh hanh dorn. Yie aengx oix daaih lorz meih mbuo.
John14:19 Maiv lauh baamh mienh maiv buatc yie
John14:20 Taux wuov hnoi meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie yiem yie nyei Die gu'nyuoz
John14:21 “Haaix dauh zipv yie nyei lingc yaac ei jienv zoux
John14:22 Yu^ndaatc
John14:23 Yesu dau ninh
John14:24 Haaix dauh maiv hnamv yie ziouc maiv ei yie njaaux nyei waac. Meih mbuo haiz yie gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
John14:25 “Yie corc caux meih mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc yie gorngv nzengc naaiv deix waac mbuox meih mbuo.
John14:26 Tengx Mienh Wuov Dauh
John14:27 “Yie liouh baengh orn bun meih mbuo. Se yie ganh nyei baengh orn yie ceix bun meih mbuo. Yie bun nyei maiv hnangv baamh mienh bun nyei. Maiv dungx nzauh faanh yaac maiv dungx gamh nziex.
John14:28 “Meih mbuo haiz yie gorngv jiex
John14:29 Naaiv deix sic maiv gaengh cuotv yie jaa-ndaangc mbuox ziangx meih mbuo. Zuov naaiv deix sic cuotv meih mbuo ziouc sienx aqv.
John14:30 “Yangh naaiv jiex yie maiv duqv caux meih mbuo gorngv waac camv weic zuqc gunv baamh gen wuov dauh oix daaih. Ninh maiv maaih hatc maaz gunv yie.
John14:31 Mv baac yie ei nzengc Zaangc Diex paaiv yie nyei waac weic bun lungh ndiev mienh hiuv duqv yie hnamv Zaangc Diex. Jiez sin daaih. Mbuo mingh aqv.
John15:1 “Yie se zien a'ngunc hmei. Yie nyei Die zoux goux huingx wuov dauh.
John15:2 Haaix diuh nquaah ziangh jienv yie yaac maiv ziangh biouv nor
John15:3 Yie njaaux nyei waac se hnangv daav hmei-nquaah dueiv nor
John15:4 Meih mbuo oix zuqc ziangh jienv yie
John15:5 “Yie se a'ngunc hmei. Meih mbuo se a'ngunc nquaah. Haaix dauh ziangh jienv yie
John15:6 Haaix dauh maiv ziangh jienv yie
John15:7 Se gorngv meih mbuo ziangh jienv yie
John15:8 Se gorngv meih mbuo ziangh biouv gitv
John15:9 “Zaangc Diex hnangv haaix nor hnamv yie
John15:10 Se gorngv meih mbuo ei jienv yie nyei lingc zoux
John15:11 “Naaiv deix waac yie mbuox meih mbuo
John15:12 Yie nyei lingc se hnangv naaiv
John15:13 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih hnamv ninh nyei gorx-youz gauh camv jiex naaiv. Se mienh weic ninh nyei gorx-youz siev maengc daic.
John15:14 Se gorngv meih mbuo ei jienv yie mbuox nyei waac zoux
John15:15 Yangh naaiv jiex
John15:16 Maiv zeiz meih mbuo ginv yie
John15:17 Naaiv se yie nyei lingc
John15:18 “Se gorngv baamh mienh nzorng meih mbuo
John15:19 Se gorngv meih mbuo guei baamh gen
John15:20 Meih mbuo oix zuqc jangx jienv yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo naaiv deix waac
John15:21 Weic meih mbuo zoux yie nyei mienh
John15:22 “Se gorngv yie maiv daaih njaaux jiex ninh mbuo
John15:23 Haaix dauh nzorng yie
John15:24 Se gorngv yie maiv daaih yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux mienh maiv gaengh zoux jiex nyei sic nor
John15:25 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih weic bun doix nzengc fiev jienv ninh mbuo nyei Leiz-Latc naaiv deix waac
John15:26 “Yie oix paaiv Tengx Mienh Wuov Dauh daaih lorz meih mbuo. Ninh yiem Zaangc Diex wuov daaih
John15:27 Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx weic zuqc yiem gorn taux ih zanc meih mbuo caux yie yiem.
John16:1 “Naaiv deix waac yie mbuox meih mbuo weic bun meih mbuo maiv tuix bouc.
John16:2 Ninh mbuo oix zunc meih mbuo cuotv wuic dorngh. Ziangh hoc oix taux
John16:3 Ninh mbuo oix hnangv naaiv zoux weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv Zaangc Diex
John16:4 Naaiv deix sic yie mbuox ziangx meih mbuo. Haaix zanc buangh naaiv deix sic meih mbuo ziouc haih jangx duqv yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo mi'aqv. “Naaiv deix sic zinh ndaangc yie maiv mbuox meih mbuo
John16:5 Mv baac ih zanc yie oix zuqc nzuonx taux paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh. Meih mbuo yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh naaic yie
John16:6 Weic zuqc yie gorngv naaiv deix sic mbuox meih mbuo
John16:7 Mv baac yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John16:8 “Tengx Mienh Wuov Dauh daaih wuov zanc
John16:9 Taux zuiz nyei jauv
John16:10 Taux zoux horpc nyei jauv
John16:11 Taux siemv zuiz nyei jauv
John16:12 “Yie corc maaih sic camv nyei mbuox meih mbuo mv baac nzauh heix meih mbuo ih zanc diev maiv duqv.
John16:13 Bun mienh hiuv duqv zien leiz wuov dauh Singx Lingh daaih wuov zanc
John16:14 Ninh oix bun mienh taaih yie ziouc dorh yie nyei waac daaih gorngv mbuox meih mbuo.
John16:15 Zaangc Diex maaih nyei yietc zungv se yie nyei. Weic naaiv yie cingx daaih gorngv Singx Lingh oix zorqv yie mbuox ninh nyei yietc zungv mbuox meih mbuo.
John16:16 “Maiv nangc lauh meih mbuo maiv duqv buatc yie. Nqa'haav maiv nangc lauh meih mbuo aengx duqv buatc yie.”
John16:17 Maaih deix ninh nyei sai-gorx
John16:18 Ninh mbuo yaac naaic
John16:19 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo oix naaic ninh
John16:20 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John16:21 M'sieqv dorn oix ndutv sin nyei ziangh hoc taux
John16:22 “Meih mbuo yaac hnangv naaiv nor. Ih zanc meih mbuo hnyouv nzauh
John16:23 Taux wuov hnoi meih mbuo maiv naaic haaix nyungc yie. Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo
John16:24 Taux ih zanc meih mbuo maiv gaengh dengv yie nyei mbuox tov jiex haaix nyungc. Gunv tov maah! Meih mbuo zungv oix duqv
John16:25 “Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic yie longc waac-beiv mbuox meih mbuo. Ziangh hoc oix taux
John16:26 Taux wuov hnoi meih mbuo oix dengv yie nyei mbuox tengx Zaangc Diex tov haaix nyungc. Yie maiv zeiz gorngv yie tengx meih mbuo tov. Yie maiv zuqc tengx tov
John16:27 weic zuqc Zaangc Diex ganh hnamv meih mbuo. Ninh hnamv meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hnamv yie yaac sienx yie yiem Zaangc Diex daaih.
John16:28 Yie yiem Zaangc Diex daaih bieqc baamh gen. Ih zanc yie oix leih baamh gen nzuonx Zaangc Diex wuov.”
John16:29 Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo aengx gorngv mbuox ninh. “Ih zanc Sai-Diex gorngv mengh nyei mbuox yie mbuo yaac maiv longc waac-beiv.
John16:30 Ih zanc yie mbuo hiuv duqv meih hiuv nzengc maanc sic
John16:31 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
John16:32 Ziangh hoc oix taux
John16:33 Yie hnangv naaiv mbuox meih mbuo
John17:1 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
John17:2 Die bun yie maaih hatc maaz gunv maanc mienh yie cingx daaih haih bun dongh Die bun yie wuov deix duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.
John17:3 Yietc liuz nyei maengc se dongh naaiv aqv. Se ninh mbuo hiuv duqv meih
John17:4 Yie yiem naaiv baamh gen taaih Die
John17:5 Aa Die aah! Tov Die bun yie ih zanc yiem Die nyei nza'hmien aengx taaih yie zoux hlo
John17:6 “Yiem baamh gen
John17:7 Ih zanc ninh mbuo hiuv duqv dongh Die ceix bun yie nyei nyungc-nyungc
John17:8 Die mbuox yie wuov deix waac
John17:9 Yie tengx ninh mbuo daux gaux. Maiv zeiz tengx maanc mienh daux gaux. Yie tengx Die bun yie wuov deix mienh daux gaux hnangv
John17:10 Yie maaih nyei yietc zungv se Die nyei. Die maaih nyei yietc zungv se yie nyei. Yie yaac weic naaiv deix mienh duqv njang-laangc.
John17:11 Ih zanc yie oix nzuonx Die wuov
John17:12 Yie corc caux ninh mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc
John17:13 “Ih zanc yie oix nzuonx Die wuov
John17:14 Yie zorqv Die nyei waac jiu bun ninh mbuo mi'aqv. Baamh mienh yaac nzorng ninh mbuo weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv guei baamh gen
John17:15 Yie maiv tov Die dorh ninh mbuo cuotv baamh gen. Mv baac yie tov Die beu jienv ninh mbuo
John17:16 Ninh mbuo maiv guei baamh gen
John17:17 Tov Die longc meih nyei zien leiz bun ninh mbuo cing-nzengc daaih. Meih nyei waac se zien leiz.
John17:18 Die hnangv haaix nor paaiv yie daaih yiem baamh gen
John17:19 Yie weic ninh mbuo zorqv yie ganh fungx bun Die weic bun ninh mbuo zien-zien benx Die nyei cing-nzengc mienh.
John17:20 “Yie maiv daan tengx naaiv deix daux gaux hnangv. Yie yaac weic naaiv deix mienh oix zunh nyei doz sienx yie wuov deix yietc zungv daux gaux.
John17:21 Tov Die bun ninh mbuo dongh diuc hnyouv. Aa Die aah! Tov bun ninh mbuo caux mbuo juangc maengc ziangh
John17:22 Die ceix bun yie nyei njang-laangc yie ceix bun ninh mbuo mi'aqv
John17:23 Yie caux ninh mbuo juangc maengc ziangh hnangv Die caux yie juangc maengc ziangh nor
John17:24 “Aa Die aah! Die bun yie naaiv deix mienh
John17:25 “Baengh fim nyei Die aah! Baamh mienh maiv hiuv duqv Die
John17:26 Yie bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv meih
John18:1 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor daux gaux liuz
John18:2 Oix maaic Yesu wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc yaac hiuv duqv wuov norm dorngx
John18:3 Yu^ndaatc ziouc dorh deix Lomaa baeng caux sai mienh bieiv caux Faa^li^si Mienh paaiv daaih goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov deix baeng mingh wuov huingx. Naaiv deix baeng hnengx jienv dang
John18:4 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh ganh oix zuqc buangh nyei nyungc-nyungc sic ziouc cuotv daaih naaic gaax ninh mbuo
John18:5 Ninh mbuo dau
John18:6 Yesu gorngv
John18:7 Yesu aengx naaic nzunc
John18:8 Yesu aengx dau
John18:9 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic bun zinh ndaangc caux ninh nyei Die gorngv wuov deix waac cuotv daaih doix nzengc. Wuov zanc ninh gorngv
John18:10 Simon Bide buix jienv zung nzuqc ziouc baeng cuotv daaih hngaqv domh sai mienh nyei nouh
John18:11 Yesu mbuox Bide
John18:12 Wuov deix Lomaa baeng caux domh baeng-bieiv caux goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei baeng ziouc zorqv Yesu ndoh jienv
John18:13 dorh ninh mingh taux Annaatv nyei nza'hmien ndaangc. Annaatv zoux Kaa^yaa^faatv nyei ong-daa. Wuov hnyangx Kaa^yaa^faatv zoux domh sai mienh.
John18:14 Dongh naaiv dauh Kaa^yaa^faatv zinh ndaangc gorngv mbuox zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh
John18:15 Simon Bide caux ganh dauh sai-gorx gan jienv Yesu mingh. Naaiv dauh sai-gorx se domh sai mienh zuoqc nyei
John18:16 Mv baac Bide souv ga'nyiec maengx laatc gaengh. Dongh domh sai mienh zuoqc wuov dauh sai-gorx ziouc cuotv mingh tengx zuov laatc gaengh wuov dauh m'sieqv bou tov bun Bide caux jienv bieqc. Wuov dauh sai-gorx ziouc dorh Bide bieqc.
John18:17 Zuov laatc gaengh wuov dauh m'sieqv bou gorngv mbuox Bide
John18:18 Bou mbuo caux goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov deix baeng zorqv taanx buov douz daaih souv jienv wuov nzaaux douz weic zuqc juangv haic. Bide yaac caux ninh mbuo souv jienv wuov nzaaux douz.
John18:19 Domh sai mienh zaah naaic Yesu taux ninh nyei sai-gorx caux ninh njaaux nyei leiz.
John18:20 Yesu dau
John18:21 Meih weic haaix diuc naaic yie? Oix zuqc naaic haiz yie gorngv jiex wuov deix mienh. Yie gorngv haaix nyungc ninh mbuo hiuv nyei.”
John18:22 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv setv
John18:23 Yesu dau ninh
John18:24 Annaatv aengx fungx ninh mingh Kaa^yaa^faatv domh sai mienh wuov. Ninh mbuo corc ndoh jienv ninh.
John18:25 Simon Bide corc souv jienv wuov nzaaux douz. Yiem wuov nzaaux douz nyei mienh naaic ninh
John18:26 Maaih domh sai mienh nyei yietc dauh nouh
John18:27 Bide aengx gorngv
John18:28 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
John18:29 Weic naaiv
John18:30 Ninh mbuo dau
John18:31 Bilaatv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John18:32 Naaiv deix sic cuotv weic bun zinh ndaangc Yesu gorngv ninh oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor daic wuov deix waac cuotv daaih doix-diuc.
John18:33 Bilaatv ziouc bieqc gu'nyuoz dinc mingh yaac heuc Yesu daaih ziouc naaic ninh
John18:34 Yesu dau
John18:35 Bilaatv dau
John18:36 Yesu dau
John18:37 Bilaatv ziouc naaic Yesu
John18:38 Bilaatv aengx naaic
John18:39 Mv baac ei meih mbuo nyei leiz-fingx
John18:40 Zuangx mienh aengx nauc-nauc nyei gorngv
John19:1 Bilaatv ziouc dorh Yesu mingh bun baeng longc biaav-bin mborqv.
John19:2 Naaiv deix baeng longc njimv ciqv norm hungh ningv tengx ninh ndongx jienv
John19:3 Aengx mingh fatv nyei gorngv
John19:4 Bilaatv aengx cuotv mingh mbuox zoux hlo wuov deix Yiutai Mienh
John19:5 Yesu ziouc cuotv daaih yaac ndongx jienv longc njimv ciqv daaih nyei hungh ningv
John19:6 Sai mienh bieiv caux goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei baeng yietv buatc ziouc kih kungx kaatv nyei gorngv
John19:7 Yiutai Mienh dau
John19:8 Bilaatv haiz naaiv joux waac ninh gauh fatv gamh nziex
John19:9 ziouc aengx bieqc dinc gu'nyuoz naaic Yesu
John19:10 Bilaatv ziouc gorngv
John19:11 Yesu dau
John19:12 Yiem naaic daaih Bilaatv yietc zei lorz qangx bungx Yesu mv baac Yiutai Mienh nauc jienv gorngv
John19:13 Bilaatv haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc dorh Yesu cuotv mingh yaac zueiz jienv ninh siemv zuiz nyei weic. Wuov norm dorngx nyei mbuox heuc “La'bieiv-Dimc.” Hipv^lu waac heuc “Gapc^mbaa^taa.”
John19:14 Wuov norm hnoi se dongh mbenc jiex Siex Maengc Zipv nyei hnoi. Lungh aav lamh deix aanx aqv. Bilaatv gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh
John19:15 Wuov deix mienh nauc jienv gorngv
John19:16 Gorngv gau
John19:17 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh Yesu mingh
John19:18 Taux wuov ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv Yesu ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax. Aengx maaih i dauh mienh zuqc ding yiem wuov
John19:19 Bilaatv yaac fiev baaih bun mienh naetv jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax. Baaih gorngv
John19:20 Yiutai Mienh camv nyei doqc wuov norm baaih nyei waac
John19:21 Sai mienh bieiv tov Bilaatv
John19:22 Bilaatv dau
John19:23 Baeng zorqv Yesu ding ziepc nzaangc jaax liuz
John19:24 Wuov deix baeng
John19:25 Souv jienv Yesu nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax ga'hlen maaih Yesu nyei maa
John19:26 Yesu buatc ninh nyei maa yaac buatc ninh hnamv wuov dauh sai-gorx
John19:27 Ninh yaac gorngv mbuox wuov dauh sai-gorx
John19:28 Hoz daaih
John19:29 Maaih norm baengh zaangh buangv a'ngunc diuv-sui don jienv wuov ndau. Baeng ziouc zorqv lai-nzeix-sortv ziemx a'ngunc diuv-sui daaih
John19:30 Yesu hopv liuz a'ngunc diuv-sui ninh gorngv
John19:31 Wuov hnoi se mbenc jiex Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei hnoi. Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh ziouc tov Bilaatv bun baeng mborqv ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax wuov deix mienh nyei zaux nauv
John19:32 Baeng ziouc mingh mborqv caux Yesu zuqc ding wuov deix mienh nyei zaux nauv. Mborqv liuz da'yietv dauh
John19:33 Taux Yesu wuov
John19:34 Mv baac maaih dauh baeng longc cang nzopv Yesu nyei la'nyaapv. Liemh zeih maaih nziaamv caux wuom liouc cuotv daaih.
John19:35 Buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz wuov laanh mienh yaac zoux zorng-zengx. Ninh nyei waac yaac za'gengh zien nyei. Ninh ganh yaac hiuv duqv ninh gorngv duqv zien nyei weic bun meih mbuo haih sienx.
John19:36 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic bun Ging-Sou nyei waac cuotv daaih doix-diuc. Maaih douc Ging-Sou gorngv
John19:37 Aengx maaih douc Ging-Sou gorngv
John19:38 Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz
John19:39 Aengx maaih dongh zinh ndaangc lungh muonz zanc daaih lorz Yesu wuov dauh Ni^ko^nde^matv caux Yosepv mingh. Ninh dorh jienv mu^yorc caux aa^lo ndie-ndaang
John19:40 Ninh mbuo i dauh zorqv Yesu nyei sei yaac ei Yiutai Mienh biopv janx-daic nyei leiz
John19:41 Yesu zuqc ding ziepc nzaangc jaax daic wuov norm dorngx maaih norm huingx. Huingx gu'nyuoz maaih norm siang-zouv
John19:42 Weic zuqc wuov norm hnoi se Yiutai Mienh mbenc jiex Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei hnoi
John20:1 Wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi nziouv nyei
John20:2 Maa^li^yaa ziouc tiux mingh mbuox Simon Bide caux Yesu hnamv wuov dauh sai-gorx
John20:3 Bide caux wuov dauh sai-gorx ziouc mingh mangc.
John20:4 Ninh mbuo i dauh tiux mingh mv baac wuov dauh sai-gorx tiux gauh siepv
John20:5 Ninh ndoqv njiec ciepv mangc gu'nyuoz
John20:6 Simon Bide nqa'haav taux
John20:7 yaac buatc beu m'nqorngv wuov kuaaiv ndie njunc jienv ganh an norm dorngx
John20:8 Taux ndaangc wuov dauh sai-gorx yaac gan jienv bieqc. Ninh buatc liuz yaac sienx.
John20:9 (Ninh mbuo corc maiv mengh baeqc Ging-Sou fiev jienv Yesu oix zuqc daic mingh aengx nangh daaih wuov deix waac.)
John20:10 Ninh mbuo i dauh sai-gorx ziouc nzuonx ninh mbuo nyei biauv mi'aqv.
John20:11 Mv baac Maa^li^yaa souv jienv wuov zouv ga'hlen nyiemv. Nyiemv jienv aengx ndoqv njiec mangc zouv gu'nyuoz
John20:12 buatc i dauh fin-mienh zuqv jienv lui-baeqc zueiz jienv zinh ndaangc Yesu nyei sei yiem wuov norm dorngx. Maaih dauh zueiz m'nqorngv wuov bung
John20:13 Fin-mienh naaic
John20:14 Maa^li^yaa gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac ninh huin nzuonx buatc Yesu souv jienv wuov ndau
John20:15 Yesu naaic
John20:16 Yesu gorngv
John20:17 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John20:18 Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv nyei Maa^li^yaa ziouc mingh mbuox sai-gorx mbuo
John20:19 Wuov hnoi
John20:20 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz
John20:21 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
John20:22 Gorngv liuz
John20:23 Se gorngv meih mbuo guangc haaix dauh nyei zuiz
John20:24 Ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx maaih dauh heuc Tomatv
John20:25 Wuov deix sai-gorx ziouc mbuox ninh
John20:26 Nqa'haav yietc norm leiz-baaix
John20:27 Yesu ziouc mbuox Tomatv
John20:28 Tomatv gorngv
John20:29 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John20:30 Yesu dorng jienv sai-gorx mbuo aengx zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc camv nyei
John20:31 Fiev jienv naaiv deix se weic bun meih mbuo sienx Yesu zoux Giduc yaac zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn. Weic zuqc meih mbuo sienx ninh
John21:1 Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz
John21:2 Maaih Simon Bide caux Tomatv
John21:3 Simon Bide gorngv mbuox wuov deix
John21:4 Zoux gau
John21:5 Yesu ziouc naaic ninh mbuo
John21:6 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John21:7 Dongh Yesu hnamv wuov dauh sai-gorx gorngv mbuox Bide. “Ov
John21:8 Aengx maaih wuov deix sai-gorx nzaeng jienv nzangv tor jienv maaih mbiauz buangv nyei mungz cuotv wuom-hlen
John21:9 Cuotv nzangv daaih faaux mbienx buatc maaih guaax taanx nyei douz. Maaih mbiauz ziqv jienv wuov yaac maaih njuov.
John21:10 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo
John21:11 Bide ziouc bieqc nzangv
John21:12 Yesu mbuox sai-gorx mbuo
John21:13 Yesu ziouc zorqv njuov daaih bun ninh mbuo
John21:14 Naaiv nzunc se dongh Yesu daic mingh aengx nangh daaih hinc cuotv bun sai-gorx mbuo buatc nyei da'faam nzunc.
John21:15 Nyanc liuz lungh ndorm
John21:16 Yesu aengx naaic da'nyeic nzunc
John21:17 Yesu aengx naaic da'faam nzunc
John21:18 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih
John21:19 Yesu hnangv naaic gorngv weic bun cing Bide oix hnangv haaix nor daic bun mienh taaih Tin-Hungh. Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox Bide
John21:20 Bide huin nzuonx buatc Yesu hnamv wuov dauh sai-gorx gan jienv ninh mbuo daaih. Naaiv dauh sai-gorx se dongh ninh mbuo nyanc wuov donx hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc ndeng mingh fatv naaic Yesu
John21:21 Bide buatc ninh ziouc naaic Yesu
John21:22 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh
John21:23 Weic naaiv maaih waac sing buangv gan Yesu nyei gorx-muoc
John21:24 Naaiv dauh sai-gorx zoux zorng-zengx gorngv taux naaiv deix sic. Yaac dongh naaiv dauh sai-gorx fiev jienv naaiv deix sic. Yie mbuo yaac hiuv duqv ninh zoux nyei zorng-zengx se zien nyei.
John21:25 Yesu zoux nyei sic corc maaih camv haic. Se gorngv nyungc-nyungc fiev duqv nzengc
Acts1:1 Zien oix nyei Te^o^fi^latv aac
Acts1:2 taux Tin-Hungh dorh ninh faaux tin-dorngh. Maiv gaengh faaux tin-dorngh wuov zanc
Acts1:3 Yesu zuqc hoic liuz maengc
Acts1:4 Yesu caux gong-zoh mbuo yiem wuov zanc
Acts1:5 Yo^han longc wuom tengx meih mbuo jiex leiz mv baac maiv maaih mbu'ziex hnoi Tin-Hungh oix longc Singx Lingh tengx meih mbuo jiex leiz.”
Acts1:6 Gapv zunv wuov zanc
Acts1:7 Yesu dau ninh mbuo
Acts1:8 Mv baac Singx Lingh njiec daaih yiem meih mbuo nyei sin wuov zanc
Acts1:9 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
Acts1:10 Gong-zoh mbuo corc yiem wuov nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc jienv lungh
Acts1:11 “Gaa^li^li Mienh aah! Meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc souv naaiv qaqv mangc gu'nguaaic lungh? Leih nqoi meih mbuo naaiv dauh Yesu
Acts1:12 Gong-Zoh mbuo yiem Ga'lanv Mbong nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Acts1:13 Taux zingh ninh mbuo faaux gu'nguaaic ninh mbuo dingh wuov nzangh biauv. Daaih zunv wuov zanc maaih Bide
Acts1:14 Aengx maaih deix m'sieqv dorn caux Yesu nyei maa
Acts1:15 Wuov deix hnoi gapv zunv nyei mienh nziex maaih leih maiv go yietc baeqv nyic ziepc dauh. Bide yiem zuangx gorx-muoc mbu'ndongx souv jiez daaih gorngv
Acts1:16 “Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Acts1:17 Yu^ndaatc zoux yietc dauh mbuo naaiv guanh mienh nyei mienh yaac caux mbuo juangc naaiv nyungc gong zoux.”
Acts1:18 (Naaiv dauh Yu^ndaatc longc ninh zoux waaic sic duqv daaih nyei nyaanh maaiz nzong ndau. Ninh yiem wuov nzong ndau ndorpc
Acts1:19 Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zuangx mienh hiuv duqv naaiv kang sic ziouc ei ninh mbuo nyei waac cuotv wuov nzong ndau nyei mbuox heuc “Aa^ken^ndaa^maa.” Eix leiz se “Maaih Nziaamv nyei Ndau.”)
Acts1:20 Bide aengx gorngv
Acts1:21 Hnangv naaiv oix zuqc aengx ginv dauh mienh daaih caux mbuo juangc jienv zoux Ziouv Yesu nangh daaih nyei zorng-zengx. Naaiv dauh oix zuqc zoux mbuo nyei guanh nyei mienh
Acts1:22 
Acts1:23 Ninh mbuo ziouc ginv cuotv i dauh mienh. Maaih dauh heuc Yosepv
Acts1:24 Ginv liuz
Acts1:25 zoux gong-zoh fu-sux div Yu^ndaatc
Acts1:26 Daux gaux liuz ninh mbuo ziouc dingc maengc mangc
Acts2:1 Jiex Pen^te^kortv Zipv wuov hnoi taux
Acts2:2 Liemh zeih yiem lungh maaih qiex mbui hnangv borngz domh nziaaux nor
Acts2:3 Ninh mbuo buatc hinc cuotv daaih hnangv douz-mbietc nor
Acts2:4 Mouz dauh duqv Singx Lingh buangv hnyouv ziouc jiez gorn gorngv cuotv ganh nyungc waac daaih
Acts2:5 Wuov zanc maaih lungh ndiev norm-norm guoqv
Acts2:6 Ninh mbuo haiz naaiv deix qiex mbui
Acts2:7 Zuangx mienh hnamv maiv mengh baeqc yaac mbuoqc horngh haic
Acts2:8 Ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih gorngv yie mbuo dauh dauh mienh nyei hiaang-bung waac ni?
Acts2:9 Yie mbuo se Baantie Mienh
Acts2:10 Faa^li^jie caux Bam^fi^lie Saengv daaih nyei mienh
Acts2:11 Maaih deix yiem Kelitv Koiv-Nzou daaih
Acts2:12 Ninh mbuo mbuoqc horngh haic
Acts2:13 Mv baac maaih deix jatv jienv gorngv
Acts2:14 Bide caux jienv wuov deix ziepc yietv dauh gong-zoh ziouc souv jiez daaih longc qiex hlo nyei gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh
Acts2:15 Meih mbuo laaic naaiv deix mienh hopv diuv nquin mv baac maiv zeiz. Ih zanc lungh domh ndorm hnangv.
Acts2:16 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih ei jienv douc waac mienh
Acts2:17 ‘Tin-Hungh gorngv
Acts2:18 Yiem wuov deix hnoi yie yaac oix dox yie nyei Singx Lingh ceix bun yie nyei m'jangc bou
Acts2:19 Yiem gu'nguaaic lungh yie oix zoux cuotv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Yiem ga'ndiev ndau oix zoux cuotv jangx-hoc
Acts2:20 Ziouv longc jienv jiex nyei domh hnoi maiv gaengh taux
Acts2:21 Wuov zanc haaix dauh heuc Ziouv nyei mbuox
Acts2:22 “I^saa^laa^en gorx-youz aah! Muangx yie gorngv nyei waac oc. Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu
Acts2:23 Tin-Hungh ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx bun Yesu zuqc zorqv jiu bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo yaac bun orqv mienh zorqv ninh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax daix ninh.
Acts2:24 Mv baac Tin-Hungh bun ninh aengx nangh daaih
Acts2:25 Hnangv Ndaawitv Hungh gorngv taux ninh nor
Acts2:26 Weic naaiv yie a'hneiv haic
Acts2:27 weic zuqc meih maiv guangc yie nyei lingh wuonh yiem yiemh gen
Acts2:28 Meih bun yie hiuv duqv ziangh maengc nyei jauv. Meih caux yie yiem ziouc bun yie njien-youh orn-lorqc taux daauh.’
Acts2:29 “Zuangx gorx-youz aah! Yie oix bungx laangc nyei gorngv taux mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv
Acts2:30 Ninh zoux dauh douc waac mienh yaac hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh caux ninh laengz ngaengc waac oix bun dauh ninh nyei zeiv-fun zoux hungh hnangv Ndaawitv ganh zoux hungh nor.
Acts2:31 Ndaawitv jaa-ndaangc hiuv ziangx nqa'haav hingv oix cuotv nyei sic ziouc gorngv Giduc oix nangh daaih nyei jauv-louc. Ndaawitv gorngv
Acts2:32 Dongh naaiv dauh Yesu daic mingh
Acts2:33 Tin-Hungh dorh Yesu faaux mingh yiem ninh nyei mbiaauc maengx
Acts2:34 Maiv zeiz Ndaawitv ganh faaux tin-dorngh mv baac ninh gorngv
Acts2:35 zuov yie bun meih nyei win-wangv zoux meih lorngx zaux nyei dorngx.’
Acts2:36 “Hnangv naaic
Acts2:37 Zuangx mienh haiz liuz naaiv deix waac
Acts2:38 Bide dau
Acts2:39 Tin-Hungh laengz naaiv deix ngaengc waac se weic meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei fun-faqv
Acts2:40 Bide aengx gorngv waac camv nyei zoux zorng-zengx kuinx ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv
Acts2:41 Mienh camv nyei sienx Bide nyei waac ziouc jiex wuom nyei leiz. Dongh wuov hnoi maaih leih maiv go buo cin dauh mienh tim bieqc gong-zoh mbuo nyei guanh.
Acts2:42 Ninh mbuo longc hnyouv muangx gong-zoh mbuo njaaux leiz yaac lomh nzoih jiu tong
Acts2:43 Gong-Zoh mbuo zoux camv-nyungc jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic
Acts2:44 Sienx Yesu nyei mienh gapv zunv yiem. Maaih haaix nyungc ninh mbuo juangc jienv longc.
Acts2:45 Ninh mbuo yaac maaic ninh mbuo nyei lingh deic jaa-dingh ga'naaiv
Acts2:46 Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi gapv zunv yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yaac yiem ninh mbuo nyei biauv maeqv njuov. Ninh mbuo juangc nyanc juangc hopv
Acts2:47 yaac ceng Tin-Hungh. Zuangx mienh yaac taaih ninh mbuo. Ziouv hnoi-hnoi bun duqv njoux nyei mienh tim bieqc ninh mbuo nyei guanh.
Acts3:1 Maaih hnoi njiec aanx buo norm ziangh hoc
Acts3:2 Maaih dauh yiem-toi waaic
Acts3:3 Buatc Bide caux Yo^han oix bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
Acts3:4 Ninh mbuo nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc jienv zaux mbai nyei mienh. Bide gorngv
Acts3:5 Ninh ziouc mangc
Acts3:6 Mv baac Bide aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts3:7 Bide ziouc nanv jienv wuov laanh mienh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz
Acts3:8 Ninh biu jiez sin daaih jiez gorn yangh jauv aqv. Ninh ziouc gan Bide caux Yo^han bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
Acts3:9 Zuangx mienh buatc ninh yangh jienv jauv ceng Tin-Hungh
Acts3:10 ninh mbuo zieqv duqv se dongh aah loc yiem Gaengh Nzueic nyei gaengh ndaangc tov nyaanh wuov laanh mienh. Zuangx mienh za'gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic
Acts3:11 Naaiv laanh mienh corc nanv jienv Bide caux Yo^han wuov zanc
Acts3:12 Bide buatc zuangx mienh hnangv naaiv nor daaih mangc ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Acts3:13 Maiv zeiz. Se Apc^laa^ham
Acts3:14 Meih mbuo nqemh maiv longc cing-nzengc
Acts3:15 Meih mbuo daix bun mienh maaih ziangh maengc wuov dauh
Acts3:16 Se ninh nyei mbuox nyei qaqv bun naaiv laanh zaux mbai nyei mienh henv daaih. Meih mbuo buatc nyei caux hiuv nyei yiem naaiv laanh mienh cuotv daaih nyei sic se weic sienx Yesu nyei mbuox. Weic sienx kaux Yesu naaiv laanh mienh cingx daaih longx nzengc
Acts3:17 “Zuangx gorx-youz aah! Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei jien zoux bun Yesu se laaix meih mbuo maiv hiuv cingx daaih zoux.
Acts3:18 Zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh gorngv Giduc oix zuqc siouc kouv. Ih zanc ninh longc naaiv nyungc za'eix bun naaiv deix waac cuotv daaih zien nyei.
Acts3:19 Weic naaiv
Acts3:20 yaac oix paaiv Yesu daaih
Acts3:21 Giduc zungv oix zuqc yiem tin-dorngh zuov taux Tin-Hungh liepc nyungc-nyungc siang nyei ziangh hoc
Acts3:22 Mose gorngv
Acts3:23 Haaix dauh maiv muangx ninh nyei waac ziouc zuqc pai guangc
Acts3:24 “Zuangx douc waac mienh yiem Saa^mu^en njiec daaih
Acts3:25 Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei douc waac mienh douc daaih nyei waac caux meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix laengz jiex nyei ngaengc waac
Acts3:26 Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei bou nangh daaih
Acts4:1 Bide caux Yo^han caux zuangx mienh gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc
Acts4:2 Ninh mbuo maiv horpc hnyouv laaix gong-zoh mbuo njaaux zuangx mienh Yesu daic aengx nangh daaih
Acts4:3 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv naaiv deix i dauh wuonx jienv loh taux da'nyeic hnoi
Acts4:4 Mv baac muangx liuz doz maaih mienh jaa sienx camv nyei. Liemh loz nyei maaih m'jangc dorn leih maiv go biaa cin dauh.
Acts4:5 Da'nyeic hnoi zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh caux mienh gox caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng gapv zunv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh.
Acts4:6 Aengx maaih Annaatv domh sai mienh caux Kaa^yaa^faatv
Acts4:7 Ninh mbuo heuc mienh dorh Bide caux Yo^han daaih souv jienv ninh mbuo nyei nza'hmien naaic gaax
Acts4:8 Bide duqv Singx Lingh buangv hnyouv ziouc dau ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv
Acts4:9 Se gorngv meih mbuo ih hnoi naaic taux zoux naaiv deix kuv sic bun naaiv dauh zaux mbai nyei mienh yaac naaic taux ninh hnangv haaix nor zorc longx
Acts4:10 meih mbuo zuangx mienh caux I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc zungv mienh oix zuqc hiuv
Acts4:11 Yesu se dongh Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Acts4:12 “Cuotv liuz Yesu
Acts4:13 Wuov deix zoux hlo nyei mienh caux mienh gox buatc Bide caux Yo^han bungx duqv laangc haic
Acts4:14 Ninh mbuo yaac buatc zorc longx wuov laanh mienh souv jienv Bide caux Yo^han nyei ga'hlen
Acts4:15 Ninh mbuo heuc Bide mbuo cuotv Gunv Sic Wuic. Ninh mbuo ganh yiem wuov caangh laangh
Acts4:16 gorngv
Acts4:17 Mbuo oix zuqc hatc jienv maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo dengv Yesu nyei mbuox caux haaix dauh gorngv haaix nyungc
Acts4:18 Caangh laangh baac
Acts4:19 Mv baac Bide caux Yo^han dau ninh mbuo
Acts4:20 Yie mbuo buatc jiex
Acts4:21 Gunv sic mienh hnamv maiv tong hnangv haaix nor haih dingc Bide mbuo nyei zuiz
Acts4:22 Dongh duqv mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc zorc longx wuov laanh mienh nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv feix ziepc lengh hnyangx.
Acts4:23 Gunv sic mienh bungx Bide caux Yo^han cuotv wuov zanc
Acts4:24 Haiz liuz naaiv deix waac
Acts4:25 Meih longc Singx Lingh bun yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Acts4:26 Baamh gen nyei hungh mbenc ziangx
Acts4:27 “Za'gengh maaih Helotv Hungh caux Born^ti^atc Bilaatv yiem naaiv norm zingh caux jienv Janx
Acts4:28 Ninh mbuo zoux nyungc-nyungc ei meih ganh nyei hatc maaz caux ei meih nyei eix jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx oix cuotv daaih nyei sic.
Acts4:29 Ziouv aah! Tov meih ih zanc jangx jienv ninh mbuo gorngv haeqv yie mbuo wuov deix waac
Acts4:30 “Tov Ziouv sung buoz cuotv daaih zorc baengc aengx bun yie mbuo kaux meih nyei cing-nzengc bou
Acts4:31 Daux gaux baac
Acts4:32 Zuangx sienx Yesu nyei mienh horpc fim dongh eix. Maiv maaih haaix dauh gorngv haaix nyungc benx ninh ganh nyei siqc jeiv ga'naaiv. Yietc zungv benx domh zuangx nyei
Acts4:33 Gong-zoh mbuo maaih domh qaqv zoux zorng-zengx gorngv Ziouv Yesu nangh daaih nyei jauv-louc. Tin-Hungh yaac camv-camv nyei ceix fuqv bun ninh mbuo mouz laanh mienh.
Acts4:34 Yiem naaiv guanh mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh caa haaix nyungc weic zuqc haaix dauh maaih lingh deic
Acts4:35 Gong-zoh mbuo ziouc ei gorqv-mienh qiemx longc nyei bun nqoi gorqv-mienh.
Acts4:36 Maaih dauh Lewi Mienh
Acts4:37 Ninh maaic nzong ninh nyei ndeic
Acts5:1 Aengx maaih dauh mienh
Acts5:2 Aa^naa^nie nzepv cuotv deix maaic ndau nyei nyaanh liouh ninh ganh longc. Ninh nyei auv yaac hiuv nyei. Ninh aengx dorh deix mingh jiu bun gong-zoh mbuo.
Acts5:3 Bide gorngv
Acts5:4 Maiv gaengh maaic se meih nyei ndau maiv zeiz? Naaiv deix ndau maaic liuz se meih ganh nyei nyaanh maiv zeiz? Haaix nyungc bun meih nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv hnangv naaiv nor zoux? Meih maiv zeiz gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh
Acts5:5 Aa^naa^nie haiz naaiv deix waac
Acts5:6 Yiem wuov nyei mienh lunx mienh dongz sin zorqv ndie-damh
Acts5:7 Aengx nqaeqv aav lamh deix buo norm ziangh hoc
Acts5:8 Bide naaic ninh
Acts5:9 Bide ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts5:10 Wuov dauh auv liemh zeih king njiec Bide nyei zaux-hlen daic mi'aqv. Wuov deix mienh lunx mienh bieqc daaih buatc ninh daic mi'aqv
Acts5:11 Zuangx jiu-baang caux haiz naaiv deix jauv-louc nyei mienh za'gengh! gamh nziex haic aqv.
Acts5:12 Gong-Zoh mbuo yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic camv nyei. Sienx Yesu nyei zuangx mienh haaix zanc yaac gapv zunv yiem Saa^lo^morn nyei Bingx Laangh Dorngx.
Acts5:13 Ga'nyiec nyei mienh maiv gaamv caux ninh mbuo gapv zunv mv baac zuangx mienh taaih ninh mbuo.
Acts5:14 Sienx Ziouv nyei mienh m'jangc m'sieqv gunv zoux gunv tim bieqc camv.
Acts5:15 Weic gong-zoh mbuo zoux nyei jangx-hoc
Acts5:16 Yiem nitv Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov deix mungv nyei mienh
Acts5:17 Zoux gau
Acts5:18 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv gong-zoh mbuo dorh mingh wuonx jienv domh zuangx loh.
Acts5:19 Mv baac naaic muonz maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh daaih koi loh gaengh dorh ninh mbuo cuotv mi'aqv
Acts5:20 mbuox ninh mbuo
Acts5:21 Lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang hnangv
Acts5:22 Mv baac mingh taux wuov
Acts5:23 “Yie mbuo taux wuov loh yaac buatc forv jienv longx nyei. Baeng yaac zuov jienv gaengh ndaangc nyei
Acts5:24 Goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei baeng-bieiv caux sai mienh bieiv mbuo haiz naaiv deix waac
Acts5:25 Wuov zanc maaih laanh mienh daaih gorngv
Acts5:26 Baeng-bieiv caux jienv ninh nyei baeng ziouc mingh dorh gong-zoh mbuo daaih
Acts5:27 Baeng dorh gong-zoh daaih souv jienv gunv sic mienh nyei nza'hmien. Domh sai mienh ziouc zaah naaic ninh mbuo.
Acts5:28 Ninh gorngv
Acts5:29 Bide caux wuov deix gong-zoh mbuo dau
Acts5:30 Meih mbuo zorqv Yesu ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax daix ninh
Acts5:31 Tin-Hungh taaih ninh faaux hlang
Acts5:32 Yie mbuo weic naaiv deix sic zoux zorng-zengx. Tin-Hungh ceix Singx Lingh bun muangx ninh nyei waac nyei mienh. Singx Lingh yaac caux yie mbuo zoux zorng-zengx.”
Acts5:33 Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh haiz naaiv deix waac
Acts5:34 Mv baac maaih dauh Faa^li^si Mienh
Acts5:35 Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox Gunv Sic Wuic nyei zuangx mienh
Acts5:36 Zinh ndaangc maaih dauh
Acts5:37 “Nqa'haav faaux mienh houz wuov zanc
Acts5:38 Hnangv naaic
Acts5:39 Mv baac se gorngv yiem Tin-Hungh daaih nor
Acts5:40 Gunv sic nyei mienh ziouc ei Gaa^maa^li^en nyei waac zoux aqv. Ninh mbuo heuc gong-zoh mbuo bieqc daaih bun mienh longc biaav-bin mborqv
Acts5:41 Gong-zoh mbuo cuotv wuic mingh ninh mbuo njien-youh haic
Acts5:42 Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yaac zueih mienh nyei biauv
Acts6:1 Wuov deix caamx
Acts6:2 Ziepc nyeic dauh gong-zoh ziouc heuc sai-gorx mbuo daaih zunv
Acts6:3 Gorx-youz aah! Yiem meih mbuo naaiv gu'nyuoz oix zuqc ginv siec laanh mienh
Acts6:4 Yie mbuo ziouc haih longc nzengc hnyouv daux gaux
Acts6:5 Zuangx mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ninh mbuo horpc hnyouv nyei
Acts6:6 Zuangx mienh dorh naaiv deix sai-gorx mingh gong-zoh mbuo wuov. Gong-zoh mbuo ziouc maan jienv ninh mbuo daux gaux.
Acts6:7 Nqa'haav Tin-Hungh nyei doz hiaangx jienv mingh. Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Acts6:8 Saa^te^fen duqv Tin-Hungh nyei en caux domh qaqv yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx zoux domh jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Acts6:9 Mv baac maaih deix mienh daaih caux ninh doix-dekc nzaeng. Daaih nzaeng naaiv deix mienh yiem Sailin Mungv
Acts6:10 Mv baac ninh mbuo nzaeng maiv hingh weic zuqc Singx Lingh bun Saa^te^fen maaih cong-mengh gorngv waac.
Acts6:11 Ninh mbuo ziouc beic ndiev cingv mienh gorngv
Acts6:12 Ninh mbuo ziouc coqv zuangx mienh caux mienh gox caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng mingh zorqv Saa^te^fen dorh mingh Yiutai Mienh nyei Gunv Sic Wuic wuov.
Acts6:13 Ninh mbuo aengx lorz mienh zoux jaav zorng-zengx gorngv
Acts6:14 weic zuqc yie mbuo haiz ninh gorngv Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu oix zoux waaic naaiv norm dorngx yaac goiv nzengc loz-hnoi Mose jiu bun mbuo nyei leiz-fingx.”
Acts6:15 Zueiz jienv Gunv Sic Wuic nyei zuangx mienh nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc jienv Saa^te^fen nyei hmien
Acts7:1 Domh sai mienh naaic gaax Saa^te^fen
Acts7:2 Saa^te^fen dau
Acts7:3 gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts7:4 “Apc^laa^ham ziouc cuotv Ken^ndie mienh nyei deic-bung mingh yiem Haalaan Deic-Bung. Ninh nyei die daic mingh
Acts7:5 Wuov zanc Tin-Hungh liemh yietc norm zaux-benv caaiv nyei ndau yaac maiv bun zoux ninh nyei buonc. Mv baac Apc^laa^ham maiv gaengh maaih fu'jueiv wuov zanc Tin-Hungh laengz bun naaiv norm deic-bung ninh caux ninh nyei zeiv-fun.
Acts7:6 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts7:7 Mv baac yie oix dingc hoic ninh mbuo zoux nouh wuov deix mienh nyei zuiz. Nqa'haav ninh mbuo oix cuotv wuov norm deic-bung daaih yiem naaiv norm dorngx zaangc yie.’
Acts7:8 Tin-Hungh ziouc bun jiex gaatv nyei leiz zoux laengz ngaengc waac nyei jangx-hoc. Hnangv naaic Apc^laa^ham nyei dorn
Acts7:9 “Naaiv deix ong-taaix mueic jieqv ninh mbuo nyei youz
Acts7:10 njoux ninh biaux ndutv naanc zingh. Tin-Hungh bun Yosepv maaih cong-mengh yaac zoux duqv horpc I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei Faalo Hungh. Faalo Hungh ziouc bun ninh zoux zungx gunv I^yipv Deic-Bung yaac gunv nzengc hungh dinc.
Acts7:11 “Nqa'haav I^yipv Deic-Bung caux Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung buangh zuqc domh ngorc hoic ninh mbuo kouv. Mbuo nyei ong-taaix lorz maiv duqv haaix nyungc nyanc aqv.
Acts7:12 Mv baac Yaakopv haiz gorngv I^yipv Deic-Bung maaih laangh ziqc
Acts7:13 Da'nyeic nzunc Yosepv bun ninh nyei gorx caux youz hiuv duqv ninh. Faalo Hungh ziouc hiuv duqv Yosepv nyei hmuangv doic nyei jauv-louc.
Acts7:14 Yosepv ziouc bun waac mingh mbuox ninh nyei die
Acts7:15 Yaakopv caux mbuo nyei ong-taaix ziouc suiv mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung yaac yiem wuov guei seix.
Acts7:16 Ninh mbuo nyei sei dorh nzuonx Sekem
Acts7:17 “Aav lamh deix taux Tin-Hungh oix zoux ei ninh laengz bun Apc^laa^ham nyei waac
Acts7:18 Zoux gau
Acts7:19 Ninh nduov mbuo naaiv fingx mienh yaac zoux doqc bun mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Acts7:20 “Doix zuqc wuov zanc Mose cuotv seix daaih
Acts7:21 Taux zuqc guangc ga'nyiec wuov zanc
Acts7:22 Mose duqv hoqc nzengc I^yipv Mienh nyei cong-mengh nyei jauv. Ninh gorngv nyei waac
Acts7:23 “Mose duqv feix ziepc hnyangx wuov zanc
Acts7:24 Mingh gau
Acts7:25 (Mose laaic caux ninh juangc fingx nyei mienh haih hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh oix longc ninh njoux ninh mbuo
Acts7:26 Da'nyeic hnoi ninh aengx buatc i dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh mborqv jaax
Acts7:27 “Mv baac dongh dorngc wuov dauh fongv Mose biaux nqoi. Ninh gorngv
Acts7:28 Meih oix daix yie hnangv a'hnoi meih daix wuov dauh I^yipv Mienh norh?’
Acts7:29 Mose haiz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc biaux cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung mingh yiem Mi^ndien Deic-Bung. Yiem wuov ninh duqv i dauh dorn daaih aqv.
Acts7:30 “Jiex liuz feix ziepc hnyangx
Acts7:31 Mose buatc ziouc mbuoqc horngh haic. Mingh fatv deix mangc ziouc haiz Ziouv nyei qiex gorngv
Acts7:32 ‘Yie se meih nyei ong-taaix nyei Tin-Hungh
Acts7:33 “Ziouv aengx gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts7:34 Yie buatc yie nyei mienh yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung siouc kouv
Acts7:35 “Naaiv dauh Mose dongh zinh ndaangc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nqemh wuov dauh. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Acts7:36 Ninh dorh baeqc fingx cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung yaac yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung
Acts7:37 “Dongh naaiv dauh Mose gorngv mbuox I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Acts7:38 Dongh naaiv dauh caux I^saa^laa^en Mienh gapv zunv yiem deic-bung-huaang. Ninh caux mbuo nyei ong-taaix yaac caux yiem Sinaai Mbong caux ninh gorngv waac wuov dauh fin-mienh yiem
Acts7:39 “Mv baac mbuo nyei ong-taaix nqemh Mose
Acts7:40 Ninh mbuo ziouc mbuox Aalon
Acts7:41 Dongh wuov nzunc ninh mbuo zoux dauh ngongh gouv dorn nyei fangx
Acts7:42 Tin-Hungh ziouc maiv mangc ninh mbuo aqv. Sueih ninh mbuo zaangc gu'nguaaic lungh nyei hleix
Acts7:43 Meih mbuo gaeng Molekv zienh nyei ndopv-liuh
Acts7:44 “Mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem deic-bung-huaang wuov zanc
Acts7:45 Nqa'haav mbuo nyei ong-taaix duqv nzipc wuov norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh yaac bienh gan jienv Yo^su^waa mingh. Taux ninh mbuo daaih nzaeng deic-bung
Acts7:46 Ndaawitv Hungh duqv Tin-Hungh a'hneiv ninh
Acts7:47 Mv baac dongh Saa^lo^morn weic Tin-Hungh duqv zoux wuov norm biauv.
Acts7:48 “Mv baac Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz yiem mienh zoux daaih nyei biauv. Hnangv douc waac mienh gorngv
Acts7:49 “Lungh se yie nyei weic
Acts7:50 Naaiv deix ga'naaiv yietc zungv se yie ganh nyei buoz zeix daaih maiv zeiz?”+’
Acts7:51 “Meih mbuo hnyouv ngaengc nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo m'normh hoz
Acts7:52 Maaih haaix dauh douc waac mienh maiv zuqc meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix zoux doqc jiex? Liemh daaih douc waac gorngv Baengh Fim Wuov Dauh oix daaih
Acts7:53 Fin-mienh jiu Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc bun meih mbuo
Acts7:54 Gunv sic wuov guanh mienh haiz Saa^te^fen gorngv naaiv deix waac
