Acts7:58 lanc ninh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc zingh
Acts7:59 Mienh longc la'bieiv zong gau Saa^te^fen
Acts7:60 Ninh gueic njiec ndau heuc qiex hlo nyei gorngv
Acts8:1 Naaiv deix mienh daix Saa^te^fen
Acts8:2 Maaih deix gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh dorh Saa^te^fen nyei sei mingh zangx
Acts8:3 Mv baac Saulo oix mietc jiu-baang
Acts8:4 Biaux nzaanx wuov deix sienx Yesu nyei mienh mingh taux haaix
Acts8:5 Filipv mingh taux Saa^maa^lie Saengv nyei yietc norm zingh zunh mbuox mienh Giduc se dongh Yesu.
Acts8:6 Zuangx mienh haiz Filipv gorngv nyei waac yaac buatc ninh zoux cuotv mbuoqc horngh haic nyei sic
Acts8:7 Hieh guaiv mienv yiem mienh nyei sin ngaauv-ngaauv nyei heuc jienv cuotv. Zaux mbai zaux waaic nyei mienh duqv zorc longx camv haic.
Acts8:8 Wuov norm zingh nyei mienh ziouc njien-youh orn-lorqc haic aqv.
Acts8:9 Maaih dauh mienh
Acts8:10 Maiv gunv haaix horngh mienh
Acts8:11 Simon zoux faatv bun mienh mbuoqc horngh haic
Acts8:12 Mv baac Filipv zunh kuv fienx gorngv Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh yaac gorngv Yesu Giduc nyei jauv-louc. Zuangx mienh sienx ninh nyei waac
Acts8:13 Simon ganh yaac sienx. Ninh jiex liuz wuom nyei leiz. Ninh zanc-zanc gan jienv Filipv mingh yaac mbuoqc horngh haic Filipv zoux nyei domh jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Acts8:14 Gong-zoh mbuo yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh haiz gorngv Saa^maa^lie Mienh zipv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei doz mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv Bide caux Yo^han mingh ninh mbuo wuov.
Acts8:15 Bide caux Yo^han mingh taux
Acts8:16 weic zuqc Singx Lingh maiv gaengh njiec caux haaix dauh yiem. Mienh kungx dengv Ziouv Yesu nyei mbuox jiex wuom nyei leiz hnangv.
Acts8:17 Bide caux Yo^han longc buoz maan jienv ninh mbuo
Acts8:18 Simon buatc gong-zoh mbuo longc buoz maan jienv mienh
Acts8:19 Ninh gorngv
Acts8:20 Bide dau ninh
Acts8:21 Meih yiem yie mbuo nyei gong maiv maaih meih nyei buonc
Acts8:22 Meih oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc nzengc naaiv nyungc waaic haic nyei za'eix. Meih yiem hnyouv hnamv cuotv naaiv deix waaic sic mv baac meih oix zuqc daux gaux tov
Acts8:23 Yie buatc meih nyei hnyouv ba'laqc mueic jieqv haic
Acts8:24 Simon gorngv mbuox Bide caux Yo^han
Acts8:25 Bide caux Yo^han zoux liuz zorng-zengx yaac zunh liuz Ziouv nyei doz
Acts8:26 Maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh daaih mbuox Filipv
Acts8:27 Filipv ziouc cuotv jauv mingh aqv. Maaih dauh E^ti^o^bie Guoqv nyei domh jien tengx E^ti^o^bie Hungh Maac
Acts8:28 
Acts8:29 Singx Lingh gorngv mbuox Filipv
Acts8:30 Filipv ziouc tiux jienv mingh taux ninh nyei ga'hlen
Acts8:31 Domh jien dau
Acts8:32 Domh jien doqc wuov douc Ging-Sou nyei waac hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Acts8:33 Ninh zuqc mienh baaic ninh nyei hmien
Acts8:34 Wuov dauh domh jien naaic Filipv
Acts8:35 Filipv ziouc jiez gorn longc naaiv douc Ging-Sou gorngv Yesu nyei kuv fienx bun domh jien muangx.
Acts8:36 Ninh mbuo zueiz jienv maaz-cie mingh gau
Acts8:37 Filipv dau
Acts8:38 Gorngv liuz
Acts8:39 Ninh mbuo cuotv wuom daaih
Acts8:40 Nqa'haav mienh buatc Filipv yiem wuov Aa^so^tatv Zingh. Ninh yiem naaic zueih mungv zueih laangz zunh jienv kuv fienx mingh taux Si^saa^li^yaa Zingh.
Acts9:1 Saulo haaix zanc yaac sie jienv waac oix daix Ziouv nyei mienh. Ninh ziouc mingh taux domh sai mienh wuov
Acts9:2 tov sou dorh mingh Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh
Acts9:3 Saulo mingh gau
Acts9:4 Ninh ziouc king njiec ndau yaac haiz gorngv
Acts9:5 Saulo ziouc naaic gaax
Acts9:6 Jiez sin daaih bieqc zingh aqv. Meih oix zuqc zoux nyei ziouc maaih mienh mbuox meih.”
Acts9:7 Caux Saulo daaih wuov deix mienh dingh jienv wuov
Acts9:8 Saulo jiez sin daaih nungx nqoi m'zing yaac mangc maiv buatc haaix nyungc. Gan ninh daaih wuov deix mienh ken ninh mingh taux Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh.
Acts9:9 Duqv buo hnoi gu'nyuoz ninh nyei m'zing mangc maiv buatc haaix nyungc. Ninh yaac maiv nyanc maiv hopv haaix nyungc.
Acts9:10 Yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh maaih dauh sai-gorx
Acts9:11 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts9:12 yaac buatc hinc yaangh nyei sic. Ninh buatc laanh mienh
Acts9:13 Aa^naa^nie dau
Acts9:14 Ninh yaac duqv sai mienh bieiv nyei lingc daaih naaiv
Acts9:15 Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts9:16 Yie ganh oix bun ninh hiuv duqv ninh weic yie nyei mbuox oix zuqc siouc ndongc haaix kouv.”
Acts9:17 Aa^naa^nie ziouc mingh aqv. Taux wuov ninh bieqc biauv mingh
Acts9:18 Liemh zeih maaih ga'naaiv hnangv mbiauz-jiex nor
Acts9:19 Nyanc liuz hnaangx
Acts9:20 Ninh liemh zeih mingh Yiutai Mienh nyei wuic dorngh zunh mbuox mienh Yesu za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn.
Acts9:21 Muangx haiz nyei mienh yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh haic ziouc naaic
Acts9:22 Saulo gunv zoux gunv maaih hatc maaz zunh doz
Acts9:23 Yiem wuov camv-hnoi deix nyei
Acts9:24 Mv baac ninh mbuo daav nyei za'eix Saulo hiuv mi'aqv. Wuov deix mienh ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz zuov jienv zingh gaengh oix daix ninh.
Acts9:25 Mv baac maaih muonz Saulo nyei sai-gorx longc norm mbaatc bungx ninh gan zingh laatc kuotv cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc zingh mi'aqv.
Acts9:26 Saulo mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Acts9:27 Mv baac Mbaa^naa^mbatc dorh ninh mingh gong-zoh mbuo wuov gorngv bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv
Acts9:28 Saulo ziouc caux ninh mbuo yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv
Acts9:29 Ninh yaac caux gorngv Gikc waac wuov deix Yiutai Mienh gorngv leiz luonx leiz
Acts9:30 Gorx-youz mbuo hiuv duqv mienh oix daix ninh
Acts9:31 Naaiv deix jauv jiex liuz
Acts9:32 Bide youh gormx norm-norm dorngx. Maaih nzunc ninh mingh Litv^ndaa Mungv mangc sienx Yesu nyei mienh.
Acts9:33 Yiem wuov ninh buatc laanh mienh
Acts9:34 Bide gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts9:35 Yietc zungv yiem Litv^ndaa caux Saalon Mungv nyei mienh buatc naaiv laanh mienh longx
Acts9:36 Yiem Yapv^faa Mungv maaih dauh sienx Yesu nyei m'sieqv dorn
Acts9:37 Dongh wuov deix ziangh hoc ninh butv baengc daic mi'aqv. Mienh nzaaux ninh nyei sin aengx geqc jienv gu'nguaaic wuov nzangh biauv.
Acts9:38 Litv^ndaa caux Yapv^faa Mungv leih maiv go. Yapv^faa Mungv nyei sienx Yesu nyei mienh haiz gorngv Bide yiem Litv^ndaa Mungv
Acts9:39 Bide ziouc gan ninh mbuo mingh aqv. Mingh taux

Acts9:41 Bide sung buoz ken ninh jiez sin daaih souv jienv
Acts9:42 Naaiv deix sic nyei fienx sing buangv Yapv^faa Mungv. Mienh camv nyei yaac sienx Ziouv.

Acts10:1 Si^saa^li^yaa Zingh maaih dauh Lomaa Janx

Acts10:4 Haeqv Ko^ne^li^atc gamh nziex haic
Acts10:5 Ih zanc meih oix zuqc bun mienh mingh Yapv^faa Mungv lorz dongh maaih mbuox heuc Simon Bide wuov dauh daaih naaiv.
Acts10:6 Ninh yiem koiv-hlen
Acts10:7 Caux ninh gorngv waac nyei fin-mienh leih nqoi mi'aqv. Ko^ne^li^atc ziouc heuc i dauh ninh nyei bou caux dauh ninh nyei sin-hlen baeng daaih. Wuov dauh baeng yaac gan longx Tin-Hungh.
Acts10:8 Ko^ne^li^atc zorqv fin-mienh mbuox nyei waac gorngv bun ninh mbuo muangx
Acts10:9 Da'nyeic hnoi ninh mbuo gan jauv mingh taux fatv deix Yapv^faa Mungv aqv. Lungh aav lamh aanx
Acts10:10 Ninh haiz hnyouv sie nyei
Acts10:11 Buatc lungh gaengh nqoi. Aengx maaih nyungc ga'naaiv hnangv yietc kuaaiv ndie jangv nyei
Acts10:12 Wuov kuaaiv ndie gu'nyuoz maaih nyungc-nyungc saeng-kuv
Acts10:13 Ninh aengx haiz qiex gorngv
Acts10:14 Mv baac Bide gorngv
Acts10:15 Aengx maaih qiex gorngv da'nyeic nzunc mbuox ninh
Acts10:16 Hnangv naaiv buo nzunc liuz
Acts10:17 Bide buatc liuz naaiv deix hinc yaangh nyei sic
Acts10:18 Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc naaic gaax
Acts10:19 Wuov zanc Bide corc hnamv maiv tong ninh buatc liuz wuov deix hinc yaangh nyei sic. Singx Lingh gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts10:20 Meih jiez sin daaih njiec aqv. Maiv dungx samh soqv. Gunv gan ninh mbuo mingh aqv
Acts10:21 Bide ziouc njiec mingh mbuox wuov deix mienh
Acts10:22 Ninh mbuo dau
Acts10:23 Bide ziouc heuc wuov deix mienh bieqc biauv caux ninh hitv wuov. Da'nyeic hnoi Bide mbenc daaih caux jienv ninh mbuo mingh aqv. Aengx maaih deix Yapv^faa Mungv nyei gorx-youz yaac caux ninh mingh.
Acts10:24 Aengx jiex daaih yietc hnoi
Acts10:25 Bide bieqc biauv wuov zanc

Acts10:27 Bide caux Ko^ne^li^atc gorngv jienv waac bieqc biauv mingh ziouc buatc mienh camv nyei gapv zunv yiem wuov.

Acts10:34 Bide ziouc gorngv

Acts12:1 Wuov zanc Helotv Hungh jiez gorn zoux doqc hoic ziex laanh jiu-baang mienh.

Acts12:3 Buatc Yiutai Mienh a'hneiv ninh hnangv naaiv zoux
Acts12:4 Helotv zorqv Bide daaih wuonx jienv loh
Acts12:5 Bide zuqc wuonx jienv loh mv baac jiu-baang mienh longc hnyouv njiec qaqv weic ninh daux gaux.
Acts12:6 Taux Helotv Hungh oix dorh Bide cuotv zinh ndaangc wuov muonz
Acts12:7 Liemh zeih maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh hinc cuotv daaih yaac maaih njang ziux jienv wuov qongx loh. Fin-mienh mbaix Bide nyei la'nyaapv mbuox ninh
Acts12:8 Fin-mienh gorngv mbuox ninh
Acts12:9 Bide gan jienv fin-mienh cuotv loh. Ninh maiv hiuv duqv fin-mienh zoux nyei se zien sic. Laaic duqv buatc hinc yaangh nyei sic hnangv.
Acts12:10 Ninh mbuo jiex zuov loh nyei baeng da'yietv kang
Acts12:11 Wuov zanc Bide ziouc mengh baeqc naaiv deix sic se zien nyei. Ninh gorngv
Acts12:12 Bide hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic cing nyei
Acts12:13 Bide mingh ngaengv ga'nyiec wuov dauh gaengh. Maaih dauh m'sieqv bou
Acts12:14 Ninh zieqv duqv Bide nyei qiex ziouc a'hneiv haic aengx tiux bieqc biauv
Acts12:15 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Acts12:16 Bide corc yiem wuov ngaengv gaengh. Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh koi gaengh buatc Bide souv jienv wuov. Ninh mbuo za'gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic.
Acts12:17 Bide huangx buoz mbuox ninh mbuo maiv dungx ko lo. Ninh ziouc gorngv Ziouv hnangv haaix nor tengx ninh cuotv loh daaih. Ninh aengx gorngv
Acts12:18 Da'nyeic ndorm zuov loh nyei baeng lunc nzengc. Maiv hiuv duqv Bide jiex haaix mi'aqv.
Acts12:19 Helotv heuc baeng gaanv lorz

Acts13:23 “Tin-Hungh ei laengz nyei waac bun dauh Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun

Acts13:26 “Zuangx gorx-youz
Acts13:27 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zuangx mienh caux zoux hlo nyei wuov deix maiv hiuv duqv Yesu zoux Njoux Ziouv. Norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi ninh mbuo muangx mienh doqc zuangx Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou yaac maiv bieqc hnyouv. Mv baac ninh mbuo dingc Yesu nyei zuiz wuov zanc

Acts13:38 “Yie nyei gorx-youz aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc hiuv duqv
Acts13:39 Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc hiuv duqv gan Mose nyei leiz-latc maiv haih bun mienh leih ndutv zuiz. Mv baac haaix dauh sienx kaux Yesu
Acts13:40 Faix fim oc. Nzauh heix meih mbuo haih zuqc douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Acts13:41 ‘Mangc maah! Meih mbuo mangc piex mienh nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc mbuoqc horngh yaac zuqc mietc

Acts13:47 Weic zuqc Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor paaiv yie mbuo
Acts13:48 Janx haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc a'hneiv haic

Acts14:1 Taux I^ko^ni^yum Zingh
Acts14:2 Mv baac maiv sienx wuov deix Yiutai Mienh coqv Janx bun ninh mbuo maaih hnyouv oix zoux doqc wuov deix gorx-youz.
Acts14:3 Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc yiem wuov lauh nyei
Acts14:4 Zingh nyei zuangx mienh ziouc bun nqoi nzengc. Maaih deix gan Yiutai Mienh
Acts14:5 Wuov zanc
Acts14:6 Mv baac gong-zoh mbuo hiuv duqv ziouc biaux mingh Li^kaa^o^nie Deic nyei Li^saa^daa Mungv caux Nde^mbi Zingh caux huing nzuonx wuov deix dorngx
Acts14:7 yiem wuov zunh kuv fienx.
Acts14:8 Yiem Li^saa^daa Mungv maaih laanh yiem-toi zaux waaic nyei mienh zueiz jienv wuov
Acts14:9 Ninh zueiz jienv wuov muangx Baulo gorngv. Baulo nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc
Acts14:10 ziouc longc qiex hlo nyei gorngv
Acts14:11 Zuangx mienh buatc
Acts14:12 Mbaa^naa^mbatc ninh mbuo cuotv mbuox heuc Sutv. Baulo ninh mbuo heuc Hemetv
Acts14:13 Sutv zienh nyei miuc-biauv yiem zingh ga'nyiec. Sutv nyei sai mienh dorh ngongh gouv
Acts14:14 Mbaa^naa^mbatc caux Baulo haiz mienh gorngv ninh mbuo oix hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Acts14:15 “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc hnangv naaiv zoux laeh? Yie mbuo yaac baamh mienh hnangv meih mbuo nor. Yie mbuo daaih zunh kuv fienx mbuox meih mbuo guangc nqoi naaiv deix henh sic aengx lorz ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh
Acts14:16 Loz-hnoi Tin-Hungh bun maanc fingx sueih ninh mbuo ganh nyei hnyouv zoux.
Acts14:17 Mv baac ninh haaix zanc zoux longx bun mbuo
Acts14:18 Gong-zoh mbuo gorngv naaiv deix waac donv ninh mbuo mv baac kaav deix gorngv maiv hingh. Zuangx mienh corc oix dorh ga'naaiv daaih ziec bun ninh mbuo.
Acts14:19 Maaih deix Yiutai Mienh yiem An^ti^okc caux I^ko^ni^yum daaih nduov zuangx mienh caux ninh mbuo dongh hnyouv longc la'bieiv zong Baulo. Zong liuz
Acts14:20 Mv baac sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz daaih weih jienv ninh
Acts14:21 Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc yiem Nde^mbi Zingh zunh kuv fienx ziouc duqv mienh camv nyei daaih zoux sai-gorx. Nqa'haav Baulo mbuo nzuonx Li^saa^daa Mungv
Acts14:22 yiem wuov deix dorngx tengx sai-gorx mbuo sienx wuonv yaac kuinx ninh mbuo haaix zanc oix zuqc gan longx sienx Yesu nyei jauv
Acts14:23 Yiem norm-norm jiu-baang ninh mbuo orn mienh zoux mienh gox. Ninh mbuo daux gaux
Acts14:24 Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc aengx jiex Bi^si^ndie Deic-Bung mingh taux Bam^fi^lie.
Acts14:25 Yiem wuov Begaa Zingh zunh liuz doz
Acts14:26 Yiem naaic bieqc nzangv nzuonx Silie Deic-Bung
Acts14:27 Nzuonx taux An^ti^okc
Acts14:28 Ninh mbuo yaac caux sai-gorx mbuo yiem lauh nyei.
Acts15:1 Maaih deix mienh yiem Yu^ndie Saengv mingh taux An^ti^okc Zingh njaaux sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz. Ninh mbuo gorngv
Acts15:2 Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc caux ninh mbuo njiec qaqv nzaeng-ngaengc luonx leiz. Jiu-baang ziouc dingc paaiv Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc caux deix gorx-youz mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh lorz gong-zoh caux mienh gox mbuo caangh laangh naaiv deix sic.
Acts15:3 Jiu-baang ziouc fungx ninh mbuo cuotv jauv mingh. Ninh mbuo jiex Fi^ni^sie caux Saa^maa^lie Saengv
Acts15:4 Mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh wuov zanc
Acts15:5 Mv baac maaih deix Faa^li^si wuov jauv sienx Yesu nyei mienh souv jiez daaih gorngv
Acts15:6 Gong-zoh caux mienh gox yietc zungv gapv zunv caangh laangh naaiv deix sic.
Acts15:7 Ninh mbuo luonx leiz lauh nyei
Acts15:8 Tin-Hungh hiuv duqv maanc mienh nyei hnyouv yaac bun cing ninh a'hneiv Janx
Acts15:9 Yiutai Mienh fai Janx Tin-Hungh maiv funx ganh nyungc. Weic ninh mbuo sienx
Acts15:10 Wuov nyungc
Acts15:11 Maiv zeiz hnangv naaic lorqc. Mbuo sienx mbuo duqv njoux se weic Ziouv Yesu nyei en hnangv ninh mbuo nor.”
Acts15:12 Zuangx mienh sekv-sekv nyei muangx Mbaa^naa^mbatc caux Baulo gorngv Tin-Hungh longc ninh mbuo yiem Janx gu'nyuoz zoux nyei jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Acts15:13 Gorngv setv
Acts15:14 Simon coqv hoqc gorngv liuz Tin-Hungh lorz Janx daauh nzunc
Acts15:15 Naaiv za'gengh doix zuqc douc waac mienh nyei waac hnangv fiev jienv gorngv nor
Acts15:16 ‘Nqa'haav yie oix nzuonx daaih
Acts15:17 Hnangv naaic se weic bun nyiec nyei mienh oix daaih lorz Ziouv
Acts15:18 Loz-hnoi bun mienh hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic oix cuotv daaih wuov dauh Ziouv gorngv naaiv deix waac.’+”
Acts15:19 Yaagorpc aengx gorngv
Acts15:20 Mv baac mbuo oix zuqc fiev fienx mbuox ninh mbuo gec
Acts15:21 Weic zuqc loz-hnoi taux ih zanc yiem norm-norm zingh maaih mienh zunh Mose nyei Leiz. Norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi maaih mienh yiem wuic dorngh doqc ninh nyei Leiz-Latc Sou.”
Acts15:22 Wuov zanc gong-zoh caux mienh gox caux zuangx jiu-baang mienh caangh laangh horpc ginv deix mienh paaiv gan Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc mingh An^ti^okc Zingh. Ninh mbuo ginv nyei mienh maaih laanh heuc Yu^ndaatc
Acts15:23 Gong-zoh caux mienh gox ziouc fiev fienx bun ninh mbuo dorh jienv mingh. Fienx gorngv
Acts15:24 Yie mbuo haiz mienh gorngv maaih deix yiem yie mbuo naaiv nyei mienh mingh meih mbuo naaic zunh doz coqv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv lunc nzengc. Mv baac maiv zeiz yie mbuo paaiv ninh mbuo mingh oc.
Acts15:25 Yie mbuo ziouc dongh hnyouv ginv deix mienh daaih paaiv ninh mbuo mingh meih mbuo naaic caux jienv yie mbuo hnamv nyei doic
Acts15:26 Naaiv deix i laanh weic Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox maiv funx maengc nyei zoux.
Acts15:27 Hnangv naaic
Acts15:28 Singx Lingh caux yie mbuo fih hnangv nyei maiv oix tipv haaix nyungc jaa bun meih mbuo hniev
Acts15:29 Meih mbuo oix zuqc gec maiv dungx nyanc ziec jiex miuc-fangx nyei ga'naaiv. Maiv dungx nyanc nziaamv
Acts15:30 Sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz ziouc fungx naaiv deix mienh cuotv jauv mingh An^ti^okc Zingh. Taux wuov ninh mbuo heuc jiu-baang mienh gapv zunv ziouc zorqv wuov zeiv fienx bun ninh mbuo.
Acts15:31 Doqc dorng naaiv zeiv fienx
Acts15:32 Yu^ndaatc caux Silaa zoux douc waac mienh yaac gorngv camv nyei kuinx gorx-youz mbuo
Acts15:33 Yiem yietc caamx wuov
Acts15:34 Mv baac Silaa dingc hnyouv yiem wuov.
Acts15:35 Baulo caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc corc yiem An^ti^okc Zingh. Ninh mbuo caux mienh camv nyei njaaux yaac zunh Ziouv nyei doz.
Acts15:36 Nqa'haav camv-hnoi deix nyei
Acts15:37 Mbaa^naa^mbatc yaac oix dorh Yo^han Maako caux jienv mingh.
Acts15:38 Mv baac Baulo haiz maiv horpc zuqc dorh
Acts15:39 Ninh mbuo i dauh fiuv-congx liuz
Acts15:40 Mv baac Baulo ginv Silaa caux ninh mingh. Sienx Yesu nyei zuangx mienh ziouc zorqv ninh mbuo i laanh fungx bun Ziouv ei ninh nyei en goux.
Acts15:41 Cuotv jauv mingh
Acts16:1 Baulo aengx mingh Nde^mbi Zingh caux Li^saa^daa Mungv. Li^saa^daa Mungv maaih dauh sai-gorx
Acts16:2 Li^saa^daa caux I^ko^ni^yum nyei gorx-youz yaac ceng Ti^mo^tai.
Acts16:3 Baulo oix dorh Ti^mo^tai gan ninh mingh ziouc tengx ninh jiex gaatv nyei leiz
Acts16:4 Baulo mbuo zueih mungv youh jienv mingh. Mingh taux haaix yaac zorqv gong-zoh caux mienh gox yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh dingc daaih nyei leiz jiu bun mienh ei jienv zoux.
Acts16:5 Weic naaiv zuangx jiu-baang ziouc gauh sienx duqv henv. Hnoi-hnoi maaih mienh tim bieqc camv jienv faaux.
Acts16:6 Singx Lingh maiv bun Baulo yiem Esie Saengv zunh doz. Ninh mbuo ziouc jiex Faa^li^jie caux Gaa^laa^tie Deic-Bung.
Acts16:7 Taux Misie Deic-Bung nyei gapv-jaaix ga'hlen ninh mbuo oix bieqc Mbi^ti^nie
Acts16:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc jiex Misie Deic-Bung mingh taux Do^atc.
Acts16:9 Mingh taux wuov muonz
Acts16:10 Baulo buatc liuz hinc yaangh nyei sic
Acts16:11 Yie mbuo ziouc yiem Do^atc bieqc nzangv
Acts16:12 Yiem naaic yie mbuo cuotv nzangv yangh jauv mingh Fi^lipv^poi Zingh. Fi^lipv^poi se Maa^si^ndo^nie Deic-Bung nyei yietc norm domh zingh
Acts16:13 Taux Dingh Gong Hnoi yie mbuo cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc zingh mingh wuov ndaaih hlen
Acts16:14 Maaih dauh Ti^yaa^ti^laa Zingh nyei m'sieqv dorn
Acts16:15 Ninh caux ninh nyei biauv zong hmuangv doic yietc zungv ziouc jiex wuom nyei leiz. Nqa'haav ninh heuc yie mbuo mingh hitv ninh nyei biauv. Ninh gorngv
Acts16:16 Maaih hnoi yie mbuo mingh mienh gapv zunv daux gaux nyei dorngx. Mingh gau
Acts16:17 Naaiv dauh nouh beiz gan jienv Baulo caux yie mbuo mingh heuc jienv gorngv
Acts16:18 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux camv-hnoi aqv. Zoux gau
Acts16:19 Naaiv dauh nouh beiz nyei ziouv zieqv duqv ninh mbuo duqv nyaanh nyei jauv maiv lamh hnamv aqv
Acts16:20 Yiem Lomaa jien nyei nza'hmien ninh mbuo gox gorngv
Acts16:21 Ninh mbuo njaaux nyei leiz se dorngc yie mbuo Lomaa Mienh nyei leiz. Yie mbuo maiv haih longc
Acts16:22 Zuangx mienh tengx jienv zoux doqc bun Baulo caux Silaa. Wuov deix jien ziouc heuc baeng ciev Baulo mbuo nyei lui-houx guangc
Acts16:23 Baeng ziouc mborqv duqv ninh mbuo siang haic
Acts16:24 Gunv loh jien duqv domh jien nyei waac ziouc zorqv Baulo mbuo wuonx jienv gu'nyuoz wuov qongx loh
Acts16:25 Ndaamv muonz nyei ziangh hoc
Acts16:26 Liemh zeih ndau dongz duqv seix haic
Acts16:27 Gunv loh jien nyie daaih buatc loh gaengh nqoi nzengc
Acts16:28 Mv baac Baulo huon norm kaatv
Acts16:29 Gunv loh jien heuc mienh lorz dang daaih ziux jienv tiux bieqc Baulo mbuo wuov
Acts16:30 Ninh dorh Baulo mbuo cuotv daaih naaic gaax ninh mbuo
Acts16:31 Baulo mbuo dau
Acts16:32 Baulo mbuo ziouc gorngv Ziouv nyei doz bun ninh caux ninh nyei yietc biauv mienh muangx.
Acts16:33 Dongh naaic muonz
Acts16:34 Jiex liuz leiz
Acts16:35 Lungh njang
Acts16:36 Gunv loh jien ziouc mbuox Baulo
Acts16:37 Mv baac Baulo gorngv mbuox wuov deix sin-hlen baeng
Acts16:38 Baeng ziouc ziang naaiv deix waac mingh gorngv bun domh jien muangx. Domh jien hiuv duqv Baulo caux Silaa se Lomaa Mienh
Acts16:39 Domh jien ziouc mingh tov zuiz Baulo mbuo
Acts16:40 Baulo caux Silaa cuotv loh daaih mingh Li^ndie nyei biauv. Yiem wuov ninh mbuo buangh gorx-youz
Acts17:1 Baulo caux Silaa jiex Am^fi^mbu^li Mungv caux Aa^bor^lo^nie Mungv daaih taux Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa Zingh. Yiem wuov maaih norm Yiutai Mienh nyei wuic dorngh.
Acts17:2 Baulo hnangv yietc gau nor
Acts17:3 Baulo gorngv mengh Ging-Sou bun ninh mbuo hiuv dingc Giduc oix zuqc siouc kouv taux daic aengx nangh daaih. Baulo yaac gorngv
Acts17:4 Maaih deix wuov deix mienh muangx liuz yaac sienx ziouc caux Baulo caux Silaa juangc jauv. Aengx maaih zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Janx-Gikc camv caux maaih mengh hoc nyei m'sieqv dorn camv nyei yaac gan ninh mbuo.
Acts17:5 Mv baac Yiutai Mienh hanc Baulo mbuo. Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh wuov hei-horngc lorz mengh dauh waaic
Acts17:6 Lorz gau Baulo mbuo maiv buatc
Acts17:7 Yaasonx yaac zipv ninh mbuo yiem ninh nyei biauv. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv yaac ngaengc jienv Sisaa Hungh nyei lingc. Ninh mbuo gorngv aengx maaih ganh dauh hungh
Acts17:8 Zuangx baeqc fingx caux gunv zingh nyei jien haiz naaiv deix waac
Acts17:9 Wuov deix jien aapv Yaasonx mbuo an jienv ndapv-ornx nyaanh ziouc bungx ninh mbuo nzuonx.
Acts17:10 Dongh naaic hnoi hmuangx
Acts17:11 Naaiv deix Yiutai Mienh gauh hnamv duqv nqoi wuov deix Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa Mienh
Acts17:12 Maaih mienh camv nyei sienx Yesu. Maaih mengh hoc nyei Janx-Gikc m'sieqv dorn sienx camv. Aengx maaih Janx-Gikc m'jangc dorn yaac sienx camv.
Acts17:13 Mv baac yiem Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa nyei Yiutai Mienh hiuv duqv Baulo yiem Mbe^lo^aa Zingh zunh doz
Acts17:14 Sienx Yesu nyei mienh liemh zeih fungx Baulo mingh wuov koiv-hlen
Acts17:15 Fungx Baulo wuov deix mienh fungx ninh mingh taux Aaten Zingh ziouc daaux nqaang nzuonx. Baulo jaa waac mbuox Silaa caux Ti^mo^tai gaanv daaih caux ninh gapv doic.
Acts17:16 Baulo yiem Aaten Zingh zuov Silaa caux Ti^mo^tai wuov zanc
Acts17:17 Ninh ziouc yiem wuov wuic dorngh caux Yiutai Mienh caux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Janx-Gikc luonx leiz. Ninh mbuo yaac hnoi-hnoi yiem domh zuangx zaamc caux mingh wuov nziaauc nyei mienh luonx leiz.
Acts17:18 Maaih guanh E^bi^ku^lien fin-saeng caux guanh Saa^do^ikc fin-saeng daaih caux Baulo bungx leiz. Maaih deix gorngv
Acts17:19 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh Baulo mingh Aa^le^o^baa^gatc
Acts17:20 Meih gorngv nyei sic maaih deix yie mbuo haiz ganh nyungc haic
Acts17:21 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc Aaten buonv-zingh nyei mienh caux daaih yiem jienv wuov deix ganh fingx mienh maiv longc ninh mbuo nyei ziangh hoc zoux haaix nyungc. Kungx oix gorngv
Acts17:22 Baulo ziouc yiem Aa^le^o^baa^gatc nyei wuic mbu'ndongx souv jiez daaih gorngv
Acts17:23 Yie mingh saau
Acts17:24 “Tin-Hungh
Acts17:25 Ninh yaac maiv longc baamh mienh nyei buoz fu-sux ninh hnangv ninh qiemx zuqc haaix nyungc nor. Daaux nzuonx ninh ganh bun mbuo maaih maengc
Acts17:26 Tin-Hungh longc yietc laanh mienh zoux buonv zeix cuotv maanc fingx bun yiem buangv lungh ndiev. Ninh jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx ziangh hoc caux ninh mbuo yiem nyei gapv-jaaix.
Acts17:27 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic bun baamh mienh lorz ninh
Acts17:28 Maaih dauh mienh gorngv
Acts17:29 “Hnangv naaic mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz
Acts17:30 Zinh ndaangc mienh maiv hiuv nyei ziangh hoc
Acts17:31 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh dingc ziangx hnoi siemv lungh ndiev mienh nyei zuiz. Ninh yaac longc ninh ginv daaih nyei mienh baengh fim nyei siemv. Naaiv dauh mienh daic mingh mv baac Tin-Hungh bun ninh nangh daaih bun zuangx mienh hiuv dingc naaiv deix sic.”
Acts17:32 Yietv haiz Baulo gorngv taux mienh daic aengx nangh daaih nyei sic
Acts17:33 Baulo ziouc cuotv wuic mi'aqv.
Acts17:34 Maaih deix mienh gan Baulo mingh yaac sienx Yesu. Maaih dauh se Aa^le^o^baa^gatc Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh
Acts18:1 Nqa'haav Baulo cuotv Aaten Zingh aengx mingh Ko^lin^to Zingh.
Acts18:2 Yiem wuov ninh buangh zuqc dauh Yiutai Mienh
Acts18:3 aengx caux ninh mbuo yiem juangc gong zoux weic zuqc Baulo hnangv wuov deix i hmuangv nor
Acts18:4 Norm-norm Dingh Gong Hnoi
Acts18:5 Silaa caux Ti^mo^tai yiem Maa^si^ndo^nie Deic-Bung daaih taux
Acts18:6 Yiutai Mienh caux ninh doix-dekc
Acts18:7 Baulo cuotv wuov norm wuic dorngh mingh
Acts18:8 Goux wuic dorngh nyei mienh gox wuov dauh Kaa^litv^batc caux ninh nyei biauv zong mienh sienx Ziouv nzengc. Aengx maaih Ko^lin^to Zingh nyei mienh camv nyei haiz liuz doz ziouc sienx aengx jiex wuom nyei leiz.
Acts18:9 Maaih muonz nor
Acts18:10 weic zuqc yie caux meih yiem. Zungv maiv maaih haaix dauh zoux haaix nyungc hoic meih
Acts18:11 Baulo ziouc yiem hnyangx-bienx wuov
Acts18:12 Gan^li^o zoux Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv nyei zungx wuov zanc
Acts18:13 Ninh mbuo gox ninh gorngv
Acts18:14 Baulo oix gorngv waac wuov zanc
Acts18:15 Mv baac meih mbuo nzaeng nyinh daux nyouz
Acts18:16 Gorngv liuz
Acts18:17 Cuotv mingh ninh mbuo ziouc nyau jienv goux wuic dorngh nyei mienh gox
Acts18:18 Baulo aengx yiem Ko^lin^to Zingh camv-hnoi deix nyei. Nqa'haav ninh caux sienx Yesu nyei gorx-muoc gorngv liuz leih hiaang waac
Acts18:19 Taux E^fe^so Zingh
Acts18:20 Zuangx mienh liouh ninh yiem wuov gauh lauh deix mv baac ninh maiv laengz.
Acts18:21 Ninh mingh wuov zanc
Acts18:22 Taux Si^saa^li^yaa Zingh
Acts18:23 Yiem caamx wuov
Acts18:24 Maaih dauh Yiutai Mienh
Acts18:25 Ninh duqv hoqc jiex Ziouv nyei jauv ziouc jorm hnyouv njaaux bun mienh hiuv duqv Yesu
Acts18:26 Aa^bor^lo yiem wuic dorngh bungx laangc nyei zunh doz njaaux mienh. Bitc^sinx^laa caux Aa^kuin^laa haiz ninh gorngv ziouc zipv ninh mingh ninh mbuo nyei biauv aengx gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei jauv bun ninh gauh hiuv duqv nzoih.
Acts18:27 Aa^bor^lo oix jiex taux Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv
Acts18:28 weic zuqc ninh dorng zuangx nzaeng hingh Yiutai Mienh. Ninh longc Ging-Sou bun cing Yesu se dongh Giduc.
Acts19:1 Aa^bor^lo yiem Ko^lin^to Zingh wuov zanc
Acts19:2 Baulo naaic ninh mbuo
Acts19:3 Baulo aengx naaic
Acts19:4 Baulo gorngv
Acts19:5 Haiz Baulo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz
Acts19:6 Baulo maan jienv ninh mbuo
Acts19:7 Naaiv deix mienh nziex maaih ziepc nyeic dauh.
Acts19:8 Baulo longc buo hlaax nyieqc mingh wuov wuic dorngh gorngv doz-leiz. Ninh luonx leiz gorngv Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei sic kuinx mienh sienx.
Acts19:9 Mv baac yiem wuov maaih deix mienh hnyouv ngaengc
Acts19:10 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux duqv i hnyangx
Acts19:11 Tin-Hungh longc Baulo nyei buoz zoux cuotv lengc jeiv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.
Acts19:12 Baulo longc jiex nyei siqc jaauv caux ninh torngv lui-houx wuov kuaaiv ndie
Acts19:13 Maaih deix Yiutai Mienh youh jienv zueih laangz zueih mungv mingh tengx zunc hieh guaiv mienv cuotv mienh nyei sin. Ninh mbuo seix mangc gaax ninh mbuo longc Ziouv Yesu nyei mbuox haih zunc duqv mienv cuotv fai maiv cuotv. Ninh mbuo mbuox mienv
Acts19:14 Maaih Yiutai Mienh nyei yietc dauh sai mienh bieiv
Acts19:15 Wuov dauh mienv dau ninh mbuo
Acts19:16 Maaih hieh guaiv mienv yiem sin wuov laanh mienh ziouc biu mingh nyau jienv borngz hingh ninh mbuo yietc zungv. Ninh mbuo laengh gaengv nyei biaux cuotv wuov norm biauv
Acts19:17 Yiem E^fe^so Zingh
Acts19:18 E^fe^so Zingh sienx Yesu nyei mienh camv nyei daaih dorng zuangx nyiemc zuiz gorngv ninh mbuo zoux jiex nyei sic.
Acts19:19 Zoux faatv nyei mienh camv nyei dorh ninh mbuo nyei faatv-sou daaih ndui jienv dorng zuangx mienh buov guangc nzengc mi'aqv. Naaiv deix sou nyei jaax-zinh funx daaih zic duqv biaa waanc loz-hnoi nyei zinh.
Acts19:20 Naaiv kang sic cuotv liuz
Acts19:21 Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz
Acts19:22 Ninh paaiv i dauh ninh nyei borng-buoz mienh
Acts19:23 Wuov zanc laaix Yesu nyei Jauv
Acts19:24 Maaih dauh nyaanh zaangc
Acts19:25 Nde^metv^li^atc heuc yietc zungv nyaanh zaangc caux bangc naaiv nyungc saeng-eix duqv nyaanh nyei mienh daaih zunv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Acts19:26 Meih mbuo duqv buatc yaac duqv haiz wuov dauh lov
Acts19:27 Hnangv naaiv
Acts19:28 Zuangx mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ninh mbuo gengh! qiex jiez haic
Acts19:29 Maiv lauh yietc norm zingh lunc nzengc. Ninh mbuo ziouc nyau jienv mbienz Baulo daaih wuov deix Maa^si^ndo^nie Mienh
Acts19:30 Baulo ganh yaac oix mingh zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien wuov mv baac sienx Yesu nyei mienh maiv bun ninh mingh.
Acts19:31 Maaih deix Esie Saengv nyei domh jien zoux Baulo nyei doic
Acts19:32 Gapv zunv nyei mienh ceuv-ceuv nauc-nauc nyei. Maaih deix heuc naaiv
Acts19:33 Yiutai Mienh fongv Aa^lekv^saan^nde cuotv wuov ndaangc maengx. Aengx maaih deix mbuox ninh hnangv haaix nor gorngv. Aa^lekv^saan^nde ziouc huangx buoz oix jaiv sin mbuox zuangx mienh.
Acts19:34 Mv baac mienh zieqv duqv ninh se Yiutai Mienh ziouc dongh dangh nauc-nauc nyei heuc leih maiv go i norm ziangh hoc. Ninh mbuo heuc jienv gorngv
Acts19:35 Zoux gau
Acts19:36 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih gorngv maiv zeiz. Hnangv naaiv
Acts19:37 Meih mbuo dorh naaiv deix mienh daaih naaiv. Ninh mbuo maiv nimc miuc-biauv nyei haaix nyungc ga'naaiv
Acts19:38 Se gorngv Nde^metv^li^atc caux ninh juangc gong nyei zaangc mienh maaih sic oix gox haaix dauh
Acts19:39 Se gorngv meih mbuo aengx maaih haaix nyungc sic
Acts19:40 Gamh nziex ih hnoi cuotv nyei sic hungh jaa zungv oix gox mv bei
Acts19:41 Gorngv baac ninh ziouc heuc zuangx mienh nzuonx nzengc.
Acts20:1 Zingh nyei mienh lunc baac
Acts20:2 Jiex naaiv norm deic-bung mingh taux haaix
Acts20:3 yiem wuov buo hlaax nyieqc. Oix bieqc nzangv mingh Silie Deic-Bung wuov zanc
Acts20:4 Caux ninh mingh nyei mienh maaih yiem Mbe^lo^aa Zingh daaih wuov dauh Bilatv nyei dorn
Acts20:5 Naaiv deix mingh ndaangc yiem wuov Do^atc zuov yie mbuo.
Acts20:6 Jiex liuz Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv
Acts20:7 Wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei daauh hnoi wuov muonz
Acts20:8 Yie mbuo gapv zunv wuov nzangh biauv buov jienv dang camv nyei.
Acts20:9 Maaih laanh mienh lunx mienh
Acts20:10 Baulo njiec mingh mbaapv njiec qam jienv wuov dauh dorn yaac gorngv
Acts20:11 Baulo aengx faaux gu'nguaaic mingh zorqv njuov daaih maeqv bun nqoi nyanc aengx gorngv waac lauh nyei
Acts20:12 Zuangx mienh dorh wuov dauh maaih maengc ziangh jienv nyei dorn nzuonx biauv
Acts20:13 Yie mbuo bieqc nzangv mingh Atc^sotc Zingh ndaangc
Acts20:14 Yiem Atc^sotc Zingh
Acts20:15 Yangh nzangv mingh
Acts20:16 Baulo dingc hnyouv maiv hitv E^fe^so Zingh
Acts20:17 Yiem Mi^le^tatv Zingh
Acts20:18 Ninh mbuo daaih taux nzoih
Acts20:19 Yie nyiemc ganh zoux faix
Acts20:20 Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv maaih haaix nyungc haih tengx meih mbuo yie zunh mbuox meih mbuo
Acts20:21 Maiv gunv Yiutai Mienh fai Janx
Acts20:22 “Ih zanc weic Singx Lingh aapv yie
Acts20:23 Kungx hiuv duqv yiem norm-norm zingh Singx Lingh box bun yie hiuv duqv oix zuqc wuonx loh yaac oix zuqc siouc ziex nyungc kouv.
Acts20:24 Yie yaac maiv funx yie nyei maengc weic yie maaih haaix nyungc jaax-zinh. Yie kungx oix zoux ziangx Ziouv Yesu paaiv yie zoux nyei gong. Naaiv se zoux zorng-zengx gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei en nyei kuv fienx.
Acts20:25 “Yie mingh mingh daaih daaih yiem meih mbuo naaiv zunh Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei kuv fienx bun meih mbuo muangx. Ih zanc yie hiuv duqv nqa'haav hingv meih mbuo maiv duqv buatc yie nyei hmien aqv.
Acts20:26 Weic naaiv yie longx-longx nyei gorngv
Acts20:27 Weic zuqc yie zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix yietc zungv zunh mbuox meih mbuo nzengc mi'aqv
Acts20:28 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbungh jienv oc. Oix zuqc goux longx meih mbuo ganh yaac goux longx Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo goux wuov deix mienh. Oix zuqc goux Tin-Hungh nyei jiu-baang
Acts20:29 Yie hiuv duqv yie leih nqoi meih mbuo liuz
Acts20:30 Yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz zungv oix maaih mienh zorqv zien leiz tiuv benx jaav leiz nduov sienx Yesu nyei mienh mingh gan.
Acts20:31 Oix zuqc ging hnyouv jangx jienv. Buo hnyangx gu'nyuoz yie ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz maaih wuom-mueic liouc jienv kuinx meih mbuo dauh dauh.
Acts20:32 “Ih zanc yie zorqv meih mbuo jiu bun Tin-Hungh caux ninh ceix en nyei doz. Naaiv doz haih ceix meih mbuo jiez daaih yaac bun meih mbuo caux ninh nyei cing-nzengc mienh duqv nzipc meih mbuo nyei buonc.
Acts20:33 Yie yaac maiv mauv jiex haaix dauh nyei jiem nyaanh fai lui-houx.
Acts20:34 Meih mbuo ganh hiuv duqv yie longc yie ganh nyei buoz lorz duqv yie aengx caux yie yiem nyei mienh qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv.
Acts20:35 Yie zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc se zoux nyungc zeiv bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux gong kouv weic tengx mau nyei mienh. Jangx jienv Ziouv Yesu gorngv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv
Acts20:36 Baulo gorngv setv naaiv deix waac ninh caux wuov deix zuangx mienh gueic njiec ndau daux gaux.
Acts20:37 Zuangx mienh nyiemv nzengc
Acts20:38 Ninh mbuo gauh nzauh jiex se weic ninh gorngv nqa'haav hingv maiv duqv aengx buatc ninh nyei hmien wuov joux waac. Ninh mbuo ziouc lomh nzoih fungx Baulo mingh bieqc nzangv aqv.
Acts21:1 Caux zuangx mienh gorngv liuz leih hiaang waac
Acts21:2 Yiem wuov buatc maaih poux nzangv oix mingh Fi^ni^sie Deic-Bung
Acts21:3 Mingh gau
Acts21:4 Yiem wuov yie mbuo lorz buatc sienx Yesu nyei mienh ziouc caux ninh mbuo yiem yietc norm leiz-baaix. Singx Lingh longc ninh mbuo mbuox Baulo maiv dungx mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh.
Acts21:5 Mv baac yiem yietc norm leiz-baaix liuz
Acts21:6 yie mbuo bieqc nzangv. Wuov deix yaac nzuonx biauv mi'aqv.
Acts21:7 Yie mbuo yiem Tailaqv yangh nzangv mingh taux Tor^le^mi caux yiem wuov nyei gorx-youz gorngv wuic buangh waac aengx caux ninh mbuo yiem hnoi wuov.
Acts21:8 Da'nyeic hnoi yie mbuo aengx mingh Si^saa^li^yaa mungv. Taux wuov yie mbuo hitv zunh kuv fienx wuov dauh Filipv nyei biauv. Naaiv dauh Filipv dongh zinh ndaangc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem jiu-baang ginv daaih nyei wuov deix siec dauh nyei yietc dauh.
Acts21:9 Ninh maaih biei dauh sieqv maiv gaengh longc nqox. Ninh mbuo yaac duqv zingh nyeic douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac.
Acts21:10 Yiem ziex hnoi wuov
Acts21:11 Ninh daaih lorz yie mbuo
Acts21:12 Haiz liuz naaiv deix waac yie mbuo caux yiem wuov nyei mienh qaqv tov Baulo maiv dungx mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh.
Acts21:13 Baulo dau
Acts21:14 Ndongc haaix gorngv Baulo yaac maiv muangx. Yie mbuo ziouc maiv gorngv aqv. Kungx gorngv
Acts21:15 Nqa'haav yie mbuo mbenc ziangx ga'naaiv mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem.
Acts21:16 Maaih deix yiem Si^saa^li^yaa nyei sai-gorx gan jienv yie mbuo mingh yaac dorh yie mbuo mingh yie mbuo oix zuqc hitv wuov dauh Maa^naa^sanx nyei biauv. Maa^naa^sanx se yiem Saibatc Koiv-Nzou daaih nyei mienh yaac zoux dauh sienx ndaangc jiex wuov baan sai-gorx.
Acts21:17 Mingh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem
Acts21:18 Da'nyeic hnoi Baulo caux yie mbuo mingh Yaagorpc wuov. Jiu-baang nyei mienh gox yietc zungv yaac yiem wuov nyei.
Acts21:19 Baulo gorngv liuz wuic buangh waac
Acts21:20 Yiem wuov nyei mienh haiz ninh gorngv liuz naaiv deix sic ziouc ceng Tin-Hungh
Acts21:21 Ninh mbuo haiz gorngv meih yiem Janx nyei deic-bung njaaux zuangx Yiutai Mienh guangc Mose nyei Leiz-Latc. Meih yaac mbuox ninh mbuo maiv zuqc tengx fu'jueiv jiex gaatv nyei leiz yaac maiv zuqc ei mbuo Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-fingx.
Acts21:22 Wuov nyungc
Acts21:23 Meih oix zuqc ei yie mbuo nyei waac zoux. Yiem yie mbuo naaiv maaih biei laanh mienh caux Tin-Hungh laengz jiex ngaengc waac.
Acts21:24 Meih oix zuqc gan jienv ninh mbuo mingh yaac caux jienv ninh mbuo saax uix
Acts21:25 Mv baac sienx Yesu nyei Janx aeqv
Acts21:26 Da'nyeic hnoi Baulo ziouc dorh wuov deix mienh yaac caux jienv ninh mbuo saax uix. Ninh aengx bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv mbuox sai mienh aengx maaih mbu'ziex hnoi cingx buangv saax uix nyei hnoi. Taux wuov hnoi sai mienh oix zuqc weic ninh mbuo dauh dauh longc ga'naaiv ziec bun Tin-Hungh.
Acts21:27 Wuov deix siec hnoi aav lamh buangv
Acts21:28 nauc-nauc nyei heuc jienv gorngv
Acts21:29 (Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc ninh mbuo buatc yiem E^fe^so Zingh daaih wuov dauh Do^fi^matv caux Baulo yiem zingh gu'nyuoz ziouc laaic Baulo dorh ninh bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv.)
Acts21:30 Ziangh norm zingh nyei mienh ziouc lunc nzengc
Acts21:31 Ziangh guanh mienh oix daix Baulo wuov zanc
Acts21:32 Ninh ziouc dorh deix baeng-bieiv caux baeng
Acts21:33 Domh baeng-bieiv mingh taux ziouc zorqv Baulo aengx heuc baeng longc i diuh hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv. Ninh naaic gaax
Acts21:34 Zuangx mienh maaih deix hnangv naaiv gorngv
Acts21:35 Taux wuov tei-gorn zuangx mienh ciouv haic
Acts21:36 Zuangx mienh gan jienv nqa'haav mingh kih kungx kaatv nyei gorngv
Acts21:37 Baeng oix dorh Baulo bieqc ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx gu'nyuoz wuov zanc ninh gorngv mbuox dauh baeng-bieiv
Acts21:38 Wuov nyungc meih maiv zeiz zinh ndaangc ceux lunc dorh biei cin zaqc baeng mingh deic-bung-huaang wuov dauh I^yipv Mienh fai?”
Acts21:39 Baulo dau
Acts21:40 Domh baeng-bieiv nqoi nzuih bun ninh gorngv. Baulo souv jienv tei-daauh huangx buoz mbuox mienh sekv. Zuangx mienh sekv mingh
Acts22:1 Ninh gorngv
Acts22:2 Mienh haiz ninh gorngv Hipv^lu waac ninh mbuo ziouc aengx gauh sekv. Baulo gorngv jienv mingh.
Acts22:3 “Yie se Yiutai Mienh
Acts22:4 Yie zoux doqc gan naaiv diuh Jauv nyei mienh
Acts22:5 Domh sai mienh caux Gunv Sic Wuic nyei zuangx mienh gox haih zoux zorng-zengx weic zuqc yie mingh ninh mbuo wuov zorqv sou dorh mingh bun Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh nyei gorx-youz. Yie ziouc mingh Ndaa^matv^gatc oix zorqv gan naaiv diuh Jauv nyei mienh ndoh jienv limc dorh ninh mbuo nzuonx naaiv Ye^lu^saa^lem dingc zuiz.
Acts22:6 “Yie mingh gau
Acts22:7 Yie king njiec ndau mingh
Acts22:8 “Yie ziouc naaic
Acts22:9 Caux yie mingh wuov deix mienh kungx buatc njang hnangv
Acts22:10 “Yie aengx naaic
Acts22:11 Laaix naaiv henv haic nyei njang aengv yie nyei m'zing yie mangc maiv buatc. Gan yie mingh nyei mienh ziouc ken yie bieqc Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh.
Acts22:12 “Yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh maaih laanh mienh
Acts22:13 Aa^naa^nie daaih lorz yie. Ninh souv jienv yie nyei ga'hlen gorngv
Acts22:14 “Ninh yaac gorngv
Acts22:15 Weic zuqc ninh oix meih gan ninh zoux zorng-zengx mbuox zuangx mienh meih buatc jiex caux haiz jiex nyei sic.
Acts22:16 Ih zanc meih zoux haaix nyungc ngaih? Jiez sin daaih dengv Yesu nyei mbuox jiex wuom nyei leiz
Acts22:17 “Nqa'haav yie nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem
Acts22:18 Wuov zanc Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie
Acts22:19 “Yie dau
Acts22:20 Tengx meih zoux zorng-zengx wuov dauh Saa^te^fen zuqc mienh daix wuov zanc
Acts22:21 “Ziouv aengx mbuox yie
Acts22:22 Zuangx mienh muangx taux Baulo gorngv naaiv joux waac ziouc nih nungx nauc nyei heuc jienv gorngv
Acts22:23 Mienh nauc jienv mingh
Acts22:24 Domh baeng-bieiv ziouc mbuox baeng dorh Baulo bieqc baeng yiem nyei dorngx gu'nyuoz
Acts22:25 Baeng longc ndopv-hlaang ndoh jienv oix mborqv wuov zanc
Acts22:26 Baeng-bieiv haiz Baulo hnangv naaiv gorngv
Acts22:27 Domh baeng-bieiv ziouc mingh naaic gaax Baulo
Acts22:28 Domh baeng-bieiv aengx gorngv
Acts22:29 Oix zaah naaic Baulo wuov deix mienh liemh zeih simv nqoi. Domh baeng-bieiv hiuv duqv Baulo se Lomaa Mienh ninh ziouc gamh nziex haic weic zuqc longc hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv.
Acts22:30 Da'nyeic hnoi
Acts23:1 Baulo nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh yaac gorngv
Acts23:2 Aa^naa^nie domh sai mienh heuc souv jienv Baulo nyei ga'hlen wuov deix mienh mbaix Baulo nyei nzuih.
Acts23:3 Baulo gorngv
Acts23:4 Souv Baulo nyei ga'hlen wuov deix mienh gorngv
Acts23:5 Baulo aengx gorngv
Acts23:6 Baulo buatc yiem wuov nyei zuangx mienh maaih deix se Saa^ndu^si Mienh
Acts23:7 Baulo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv
Acts23:8 Weic zuqc Saa^ndu^si Mienh maiv sienx mienh daic mingh aengx haih nangh daaih
Acts23:9 Zuangx mienh ziouc nzaeng jiez domh jaax. Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh yaac zoux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng souv jiez daaih congh qiex gorngv
Acts23:10 Gunv nzaeng gau qiex jiez
Acts23:11 Wuov muonz Ziouv daaih souv jienv Baulo nyei ga'hlen gorngv
Acts23:12 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei
Acts23:13 Dongh hnyouv zoux nyei mienh maaih feix ziepc lengh laanh.
Acts23:14 Ninh mbuo mingh sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox mbuo wuov gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo
Acts23:15 Hnangv naaic
Acts23:16 Mv baac Baulo nyei muoc nyei dorn haiz gorngv naaiv deix mienh hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Acts23:17 Baulo ziouc heuc dauh baeng-bieiv daaih mbuox ninh
Acts23:18 Baeng-bieiv ziouc dorh ninh mingh buangh domh baeng-bieiv ziouc gorngv
Acts23:19 Domh baeng-bieiv ziouc ken wuov dauh houh saeng mingh lengh deix naaic ninh
Acts23:20 Wuov dauh houh saeng gorngv
Acts23:21 Mv baac tov meih maiv dungx muangx ninh mbuo nyei waac weic zuqc maaih feix ziepc lengh dauh zuov jienv ndaamv-jauv. Ninh mbuo ndouv jiez zioux gorngv ninh mbuo maiv nyanc yaac maiv hopv haaix nyungc taux duqv daix Baulo guangc. Ninh mbuo mbenc ziangx aqv
Acts23:22 Domh baeng-bieiv mbuox wuov dauh dorn nzuonx aqv. Aengx jaa waac gorngv
Acts23:23 Domh baeng-bieiv ziouc heuc i dauh baeng-bieiv daaih mbuox ninh mbuo
Acts23:24 Yaac oix zuqc liuc leiz maaz bun Baulo geh
Acts23:25 Domh baeng-bieiv yaac fiev zeiv fienx. Fienx hnangv naaiv gorngv.
Acts23:26 “Zien oix nyei Felikv Zungx aah! Yie Kaa^laau^ndi^atc Lisietv fiev fienx bun meih. Yie jangx taux meih.
Acts23:27 Yiutai Mienh zorqv naaiv laanh mienh yaac kaav deix daix ninh mi'aqv. Mv baac yie haiz gorngv ninh zoux Lomaa Mienh
Acts23:28 Yie oix hiuv duqv ninh mbuo weic haaix diuc gox ninh ziouc dorh ninh mingh taux ninh mbuo nyei Gunv Sic Wuic wuov.
Acts23:29 Yie ziouc hiuv duqv ninh maiv dorngc haaix nyungc zic duqv daix fai zic duqv wuonx loh. Ninh mbuo gox nyei se nzaeng Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz hnangv.
Acts23:30 Yie hiuv duqv maaih deix mienh daav za'eix oix zorqv ninh nyei maengc
Acts23:31 Baeng ziouc ei jienv domh baeng-bieiv nyei waac zoux. Wuov muonz ninh mbuo fungx mingh An^ti^baa^di Mungv wuov.
Acts23:32 Da'nyeic hnoi yangh jauv nyei baeng daaux sin nzuonx. Kungx geh maaz nyei baeng ganh fungx ninh mingh hnangv.
Acts23:33 Mingh taux Si^saa^li^yaa Zingh
Acts23:34 Zungx doqc liuz fienx
Acts23:35 “Zuov gox meih wuov deix mienh daaih taux
Acts24:1 Nqa'haav biaa hnoi
Acts24:2 Dorh Baulo bieqc daaih
Acts24:3 Yie mbuo haaix dauh yiem haaix norm dorngx a'hneiv haic yaac za'gengh maaih hnyouv laengz zingh meih.
Acts24:4 Mv baac ih zanc yie mbuo maiv oix zorv meih nyei ziangh hoc lauh. Tov meih longc noic muangx yie mbuo gorngv i ziex joux waac oc.
Acts24:5 “Yie mbuo buatc naaiv laanh mienh kungx cuoqv sic hnangv
Acts24:6 Maiv daan cuoqv sic hnangv
Acts24:7 Mv baac wuov dauh domh baeng-bieiv
Acts24:8 yaac gorngv gox Baulo wuov deix mienh oix zuqc daaih meih naaiv gox. Se gorngv meih ganh zaah naaic ninh
Acts24:9 Yiutai Mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei gorngv gox Baulo wuov deix sic yietc zungv zien nyei.
Acts24:10 Felikv Zungx uv mbuox Baulo gorngv
Acts24:11 Yie mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem baaix Tin-Hungh se maiv gaengh jiex ziepc nyeic hnoi. Naaiv meih ganh naaic duqv cuotv nyei.
Acts24:12 Gox yie naaiv deix mienh maiv buatc yie yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nzaeng haaix nyungc jaax
Acts24:13 Ninh mbuo gox yie naaiv deix sic ninh mbuo lorz maiv duqv haaix nyungc zoux zorng-zengx bun cing za'gengh hnangv naaic.
Acts24:14 “Mv baac yie nyiemc bun meih
Acts24:15 Yie yaac hnangv ninh mbuo nor
Acts24:16 Weic naaiv yie longc nzengc qaqv yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien caux zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien zanc-zanc longc ziepc zuoqv nyei laangh fim.
Acts24:17 “Yie leih Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh ziex hnyangx aqv. Nqa'haav aengx nzuonx mingh weic dorh deix nyaanh tengx caux yie juangc fingx nyei mienh
Acts24:18 Ninh mbuo buatc yie yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ei leiz saax liuz uix aqv. Wuov zanc maiv maaih mienh camv caux yie gapv zunv yiem
Acts24:19 Mv baac maaih deix yiem Esie Saengv daaih nyei Yiutai Mienh. Se gorngv naaiv deix mienh maaih haaix nyungc sic oix gox yie
Acts24:20 Maiv zei nor
Acts24:21 Se gorngv dorngc dongh naaiv nduqc nyungc hnangv
Acts24:22 Felikv Zungx hiuv duqv wuov diuh Jauv muonc deix nyei
Acts24:23 Ninh yaac mbuox baeng-bieiv goux longx Baulo
Acts24:24 Jiex daaih camv-hnoi deix
Acts24:25 Baulo gorngv taux zoux horpc nyei jauv
Acts24:26 Aengx maaih diuc
Acts24:27 I hnyangx jiex liuz
Acts25:1 Fe^saa^tatv daaih taux ninh nyei saengv
Acts25:2 Sai mienh bieiv caux Yiutai Mienh nyei bieiv ziouc mingh Fe^saa^tatv wuov gox Baulo
Acts25:3 tov ninh tengx deix ninh mbuo
Acts25:4 Fe^saa^tatv dau
Acts25:5 Se gorngv Baulo zoux dorngc haaix diuc
Acts25:6 Fe^saa^tatv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh maiv gauh lauh hietc hnoi fai ziepc hnoi cingx daaih nzuonx Si^saa^li^yaa Zingh. Da'nyeic hnoi ninh zueiz jienv sic dorngh heuc mienh dorh Baulo daaih.
Acts25:7 Baulo bieqc daaih
Acts25:8 Baulo ziouc gorngv jaiv sin nyei waac. Ninh gorngv
Acts25:9 Fe^saa^tatv oix Yiutai Mienh a'hneiv ninh ziouc naaic Baulo
Acts25:10 Baulo gorngv
Acts25:11 Se gorngv yie zoux dorngc haaix nyungc zic duqv daic
Acts25:12 Fe^saa^tatv caux ninh nyei gunv sic mienh caangh laangh liuz ninh ziouc gorngv
Acts25:13 Nqa'haav lauh deix
Acts25:14 Yiem wuov camv-hnoi deix nyei
Acts25:15 Yie mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov zanc
Acts25:16 Mv baac yie dau ninh mbuo
Acts25:17 Gox ninh wuov deix mienh daaih taux naaiv yie maiv ngaih. Da'nyeic hnoi hnangv yie mingh zueiz sic dorngh heuc mienh dorh Baulo bieqc daaih.
Acts25:18 Gox ninh wuov deix souv jiez sin daaih gorngv mv baac maiv gox hnangv yie laaic ninh mbuo oix gox nyei orqv sic nor.
Acts25:19 Ninh mbuo kungx nzaeng taux ninh mbuo Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz hnangv
Acts25:20 Yie maiv hiuv duqv oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor mbenc naaiv deix sic ziouc naaic Baulo ninh nyunc mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem dunx naaiv deix sic fai?
Acts25:21 Mv baac Baulo tov mingh Domh Ziuh Hungh wuov siemv
Acts25:22 Aa^nqi^paa gorngv mbuox Fe^saa^tatv
Acts25:23 Da'nyeic hnoi Aa^nqi^paa caux Mbenitv zorng nzoih
Acts25:24 Fe^saa^tatv gorngv
Acts25:25 Mv baac yie zaah naaic ninh
Acts25:26 Mv baac yie lorz maiv duqv haaix nyungc sic fiev bun Lomaa Hungh. Yie ziouc dorh ninh daaih naaiv
Acts25:27 Weic zuqc ei yie hnamv
Acts26:1 Aa^nqi^paa Hungh gorngv mbuox Baulo
Acts26:2 Ninh gorngv
Acts26:3 weic zuqc meih hiuv Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-fingx yaac hiuv duqv ninh mbuo nzaeng nyei jauv camv nyei. Hnangv naaic
Acts26:4 “Zuangx Yiutai Mienh hiuv duqv yie nyei seix hnangv haaix nor. Yiem yie lunx nyei ziangh hoc yie yiem yie ganh nyei buonv-guoqv nyei baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh.
Acts26:5 Ninh mbuo hiuv duqv yie lauh haic aqv. Se gorngv ninh mbuo nyunc tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx nor
Acts26:6 Ih zanc yie souv jienv naaiv zuqc siemv se weic yie maaih lamh hnamv Tin-Hungh oix zoux ei ninh caux yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix laengz jiez nyei ngaengc waac.
Acts26:7 Yie mbuo ziepc nyeic fingx Yiutai Mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei maaih naaiv nyungc maaih lamh hnamv cingx daaih ndorm zinh nziouv hmuangx zaangc Tin-Hungh zuov jienv. Hungh diex aah! Se weic naaiv nyungc maaih lamh hnamv Yiutai Mienh cingx daaih gox yie.
Acts26:8 Meih mbuo Yiutai Mienh weic haaix diuc maiv haih sienx mienh daic mingh mv baac Tin-Hungh haih bun nangh daaih?
Acts26:9 “Zinh ndaangc yie yaac hnamv yie oix zuqc longc nzengc za'eix zoux doqc Naa^saa^letv Mungv wuov dauh Yesu nyei mbuox.
Acts26:10 Yie yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh hnangv naaic zoux. Sai mienh bieiv bun yie maaih lingc zorqv sienx Yesu nyei mienh camv nyei daaih wuonx jienv loh. Ninh mbuo zuqc dingc daix wuov zanc yie yaac a'hneiv nyei.
Acts26:11 Yie mingh norm-norm wuic dorngh hoic ninh mbuo camv-nzunc aqv. Oix aapv ninh mbuo gorngv ki Yesu. Yie qiex jiez haic ninh mbuo
Acts26:12 “Maaih nzunc yie duqv sai mienh bieiv nyei hatc maaz caux lingc mingh Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh.
Acts26:13 Hungh diex aah! Yie gan jauv mingh gau
Acts26:14 Yie mbuo yietc zungv king njiec ndau mi'aqv. Yie yaac haiz maaih qiex gorngv benx Hipv^lu waac mbuox yie
Acts26:15 “Yie ziouc naaic gaax
Acts26:16 Ih zanc jiez sin souv jienv maah! Yie hinc bun meih buatc weic paaiv meih zoux yie nyei bou. Yie oix meih gan yie zoux zorng-zengx gorngv ih hnoi meih buatc yie naaiv deix sic aengx caux nqa'haav yie oix bun meih buatc nyei sic.
Acts26:17 Yie oix njoux meih cuotv Yiutai Mienh nyei buoz-ndiev aengx caux yie paaiv meih mingh wuov deix Janx nyei buoz-ndiev.
Acts26:18 Yie paaiv meih mingh bun ninh mbuo haih mangc duqv buatc
Acts26:19 “Aa^nqi^paa Hungh aah! Yie maiv ngaengc yietc deix yiem lungh hinc yaangh nyei sic.
Acts26:20 Yie ziouc yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh zunh doz ndaangc
Acts26:21 Weic naaiv
Acts26:22 Mv baac maaih Tin-Hungh tengx yie taux ih hnoi
Acts26:23 Ninh mbuo gorngv Giduc oix zuqc siouc kouv
Acts26:24 Baulo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv jaiv sin nyei waac
Acts26:25 Baulo dau
Acts26:26 Hungh Diex hiuv nzengc naaiv deix nyungc-nyungc sic
Acts26:27 Aa^nqi^paa Hungh aah! Meih sienx Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh nyei waac fai? Yie hiuv duqv meih sienx nyei.”
Acts26:28 Aa^nqi^paa Hungh mbuox Baulo
Acts26:29 Baulo dau
Acts26:30 Gorngv liuz
Acts26:31 cuotv mingh. Laanh caux laanh gorngv
Acts26:32 Aa^nqi^paa yaac gorngv mbuox Fe^saa^tatv
Acts27:1 Lomaa jien dingc hnyouv bun yie mbuo bieqc nzangv mingh I^daa^li Deic-Bung. Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv Baulo caux deix zuiz-mienh jiu bun dauh Or^gatc^datc Hungh wuov guanh baeng nyei baeng-bieiv
Acts27:2 Yie mbuo ziouc bieqc poux Atc^laa^mitv^ti^yum Mungv nyei nzangv. Naaiv poux nzangv oix gan koiv-hlen
Acts27:3 Da'nyeic hnoi yie mbuo taux Sai^ndorn Mungv
Acts27:4 Aengx yiem naaic nzaeng nzangv mingh
Acts27:5 aengx jiex koiv
Acts27:6 Yiem wuov baeng-bieiv aengx lorz duqv poux nzangv yiem Aa^lekv^saan^nde^lie Zingh daaih
Acts27:7 Naaiv deix ziex hnoi
Acts27:8 Nzangv gengh! aqc duqv mingh haic
Acts27:9 Mingh gau
Acts27:10 “Zuangx gorx-youz aah! Yie buatc mbuo cuotv naaiv nzunc jauv za'gengh oix buangh sic aqv. Maiv daan nzangv caux huox haih laaih zitc hnangv. Liemh mbuo nyei maengc zungv oix zuqc guangc mv bei.”
Acts27:11 Mv baac baeng-bieiv sienx nzangv-jien caux nzangv-ziouv nyei waac
Acts27:12 Weic zuqc wuov norm nzangv-bouc maiv nangc benx jiex dong-gen hnoi
Acts27:13 Yiem gau wuov norm dorngx
Acts27:14 Mingh maiv lauh buangh gorng domh nziaaux-jieqv
Acts27:15 Nziaaux ziouc daaih niouv nzangv
Acts27:16 Nziaaux buonc jienv mingh gau
Acts27:17 Ndoh liuz nzangv-dorn
Acts27:18 Nziaaux-jieqv corc niouv jienv nzangv. Da'nyeic hnoi ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv huox guangc wuov koiv
Acts27:19 aengx da'faam hnoi ninh mbuo aengx zorqv deix nzangv nyei wuoqc ginc guaengx guangc koiv aqv.
Acts27:20 Duqv ziex hnoi yie mbuo maiv buatc mba'hnoi
Acts27:21 Duqv ziex hnoi zuangx mienh maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Baulo ziouc souv jienv ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx gorngv
Acts27:22 Hnangv haaix yaac baac
Acts27:23 weic zuqc dongh yie benx ninh nyei yaac buoqc zaangc nyei Tin-Hungh
Acts27:24 Ninh gorngv
Acts27:25 Zuangx gorx-youz aah! Gunv bungx hnyouv maah! Yie sienx Tin-Hungh. Ninh hnangv haaix nor gorngv za'gengh oix hnangv wuov nor zoux.
Acts27:26 Mv baac mbuo nyei nzangv zungv oix zuqc piu mingh dox mbuo guangc yietc norm koiv-nzou.”
Acts27:27 Taux ziepc feix hnoi wuov muonz yie mbuo nyei nzangv zuqc nziaaux buonc mbiouh mingh mbiouh daaih nyei yiem wuov Me^ndi^de^le^nien Koiv. Ndaamv muonz nyei dorngx
Acts27:28 Ninh mbuo ziouc longc diuh hlaang ndoh jienv ga'naaiv hniev nyei bungx njiec ndorqc mangc gaax ndongc haaix ndo
Acts27:29 Ninh mbuo gamh nziex nzangv haih nziangc zuqc la'bieiv
Acts27:30 Nzangv-nouh hnamv oix biaux
Acts27:31 Mv baac Baulo gorngv mbuox baeng-bieiv caux baeng
Acts27:32 Baeng ziouc hngaqv dangx ndoh nzangv-dorn nyei hlaang bungx guangc mi'aqv.
Acts27:33 Lungh aav lamh deix njang aqv
Acts27:34 Hnangv naaiv yie kuinx meih mbuo oix zuqc nyanc deix ga'naaiv cingx daaih haih duqv maengc cuotv. Meih mbuo gorqv-mienh nyei mba'biei liemh yietc diuh maiv zuqc mietc.”
Acts27:35 Gorngv setv
Acts27:36 Zuangx mienh ziouc haiz hnyouv longx deix
Acts27:37 Yie mbuo yiem nzangv nyei mienh yietc zungv maaih nyic baeqv cietv ziepc luoqc laanh.
Acts27:38 Dauh dauh nyanc beuv ziouc bienh mbiauh guangc wuov koiv
Acts27:39 Lungh njang daaih
Acts27:40 Ninh mbuo ziouc hngaqv dangx zuic nzangv nyei ga'naaiv guangc
Acts27:41 Mv baac mingh gau
Acts27:42 Baeng hnamv oix daix guangc zuiz-mienh
Acts27:43 Mv baac baeng-bieiv oix liouh Baulo ziouc maiv bun ninh mbuo daix yietc dauh. Ninh heuc haaix dauh haih ziouh wuom gunv tiux njiec wuom ziouh cuotv wuov mbienx aqv.
Acts27:44 Haaix dauh maiv haih ziouh wuom oix zuqc qam ndiangx-benv fai yiem nzangv haih mbiouh nyei ga'naaiv ziouh cuotv mbienx. Hnangv naaiv yietc zungv ziouc cuotv mbienx
Acts28:1 Zuangx mienh yietc zungv duqv maengc cuotv nzengc
Acts28:2 Yiem wuov nyei buonv-deic mienh zipv yie mbuo longx haic. Duih mbiungc
Acts28:3 Baulo mingh lorz duqv yietc baav zaangh daaih buov douz. An wuov douz-nzauc douz jaamh zuqc jorm
Acts28:4 Buonv-deic mienh buatc naang ngaatc jienv Baulo nyei buoz saaih saaih wuov
Acts28:5 Mv baac Baulo fengx ndutv naang bieqc douz-nzauc. Ninh yaac maiv benx haaix nyungc.
Acts28:6 Yiem wuov nyei mienh laaic ninh haih omx fai king wuov ndau daic mv baac mangc lauh dangh nyei maiv buatc fungc. Ninh mbuo ziouc goiv waac gorngv
Acts28:7 Leih wuov norm dorngx maiv nangc go maaih wuov norm koiv-nzou nyei daauh mienh
Acts28:8 Bupc^li^atc nyei die butv baengc sin jorm
Acts28:9 Hnangv naaiv nor zoux liuz
Acts28:10 Ninh mbuo yaac taaih yie mbuo
Acts28:11 Yie mbuo yiem Morn^daa Koiv-Nzou buo hlaax nyieqc aengx bieqc nzangv mingh aqv. Wuov poux nzangv se yiem Aa^lekv^saan^nde^lie Zingh daaih yaac yiem naaiv norm koiv-nzou jiex dong-gen hnoi. Nzangv-m'nqorngv diu jienv i dauh zienh nyei fangx benx sung-gu'nguaaz-dorn
Acts28:12 Bieqc nzangv mingh taux Sai^laa^kiu hitv buo hnoi wuov.
Acts28:13 Yiem naaic aengx mingh taux Le^yi^um Mungv. Da'nyeic hnoi maaih nziaaux yiem naamh bung maengx daaih
Acts28:14 Taux wuov yie mbuo buangh zuqc deix sienx Yesu nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo tov yie mbuo yiem yietc norm leiz-baaix wuov. Hnangv naaic yie mbuo ziouc mingh taux Lomaa Zingh.
Acts28:15 Yiem wuov nyei gorx-youz haiz fienx gorngv yie mbuo daaih
Acts28:16 Yie mbuo taux Lomaa Zingh
Acts28:17 Nqa'haav buo hnoi
Acts28:18 Ninh mbuo siemv liuz yaac maiv buatc yie dorngc haaix nyungc zic duqv daix ziouc oix bungx yie.
Acts28:19 Mv baac Yiutai Mienh nzaeng jienv
Acts28:20 Weic naaiv yie heuc meih mbuo daaih doix hmien gorngv. I^saa^laa^en Mienh maaih lamh hnamv weic zuqc ninh mbuo zuov jienv maaih dauh daaih. Se weic ninh mbuo zuov wuov dauh yie cingx zuqc naaiv hlieqv-limc ndoh.”
Acts28:21 Muangx nyei mienh dau
Acts28:22 Mv baac yie mbuo oix muangx meih ganh hnamv cuotv nyei jauv
Acts28:23 Hnangv naaic gorngv liuz
Acts28:24 Baulo gorngv naaiv deix waac maaih deix ziouc sienx
Acts28:25 Ninh mbuo ziouc fiuv-congx jienv cuotv. Maiv gaengh cuotv wuov zanc Baulo aengx tipv waac. Ninh gorngv
Acts28:26 I^saa^yaa gorngv
Acts28:27 Weic zuqc naaiv deix mienh nyei hnyouv nzotv. Ninh mbuo zotv jienv m'normh kuotv
Acts28:28 Baulo aengx gorngv
Acts28:29 Baulo gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac
Acts28:30 Baulo yiem ninh ganh gouv daaih nyei biauv buangv i hnyangx. Haaix dauh daaih lorz ninh
Acts28:31 Ninh bungx laangc nyei zunh Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei doz
Romans1:1 Yie
Romans1:2 Naaiv kuv fienx zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh laengz liuz aqv
Romans1:3 Kuv fienx gorngv ninh nyei Dorn
Romans1:4 Cing-nzengc nyei Singx Lingh yaac bun cing ninh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn
Romans1:5 Tin-Hungh longc ninh ceix en bun yie mbuo zoux gong-zoh
Romans1:6 Liemh meih mbuo Lomaa Zingh nyei mienh
Romans1:7 Yie ziouc fiev fienx bun meih mbuo yiem Lomaa Zingh nyei zuangx mienh
Romans1:8 Da'yietv
Romans1:9 Tin-Hungh
Romans1:10 Yie oix mingh meih mbuo naaic lauh haic aqv
Romans1:11 Yie za'gengh! oix buatc haic meih mbuo
Romans1:12 Yie gorngv nyei se
Romans1:13 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Romans1:14 Maiv gunv haaix nyungc mienh
Romans1:15 Weic naaiv yie za'gengh oix zunh kuv fienx bun meih mbuo Lomaa Zingh nyei mienh.
Romans1:16 Yie zungv maiv nyaiv kuv fienx weic zuqc naaiv kuv fienx se Tin-Hungh nyei domh qaqv haih njoux yietc zungv sienx nyei mienh
Romans1:17 Naaiv kuv fienx biux mengh Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor bun mienh caux ninh horpc hnyouv
Romans1:18 Tin-Hungh yiem wuov tin-dorngh biux mengh ninh nouz haic mienh mangc piex ninh
Romans1:19 Tin-Hungh ziouc dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz
Romans1:20 Yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau daaih wuov zanc
Romans1:21 Ninh mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh mv baac maiv taaih ninh zoux Tin-Hungh yaac maiv laengz zingh ninh. Ninh mbuo hnamv nyei jauv ziouc maiv lamh longc aqv. Hnyouv hngongx yaac hmuangx mi'aqv.
Romans1:22 Ninh mbuo ceng ganh cong-mengh mv baac ninh mbuo hngongx haic.
Romans1:23 Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc zaangc yietc liuz ziangh
Romans1:24 Weic naaiv
Romans1:25 Ninh mbuo dorh Tin-Hungh nyei zien leiz goiv benx jaav leiz daaih longc. Ninh mbuo buoqc zaangc zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv div Zeix Maanc Muotc Wuov Dauh
Romans1:26 Laaix mienh hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Romans1:27 M'jangc dorn yaac fih hnangv nyei guangc m'sieqv dorn maiv longc. M'jangc dorn hanc oix longc m'jangc hnangv douz zieqc jienv hnyouv nor jorm
Romans1:28 Laaix mienh hnyouv ngaengc
Romans1:29 Ninh mbuo kungx zoux nyungc-nyungc waaic haic
Romans1:30 pien buix daanh mienh
Romans1:31 Ninh mbuo hngongx
Romans1:32 Ninh mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei leiz gorngv zoux naaiv nyungc sic nyei mienh oix zuqc daic. Maiv daan ninh mbuo ganh zoux hnangv
Romans2:1 Mienh muoz aac
Romans2:2 Mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh dingc zoux wuov nyungc sic nyei mienh maaih zuiz se horpc nyei.
Romans2:3 Mienh muoz aac
Romans2:4 Tin-Hungh nyei en jaaix haic
Romans2:5 Mv baac meih nyei hnyouv ngaengc
Romans2:6 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix ziux mouz laanh mienh zoux nyei sic winh bun ninh mbuo.
Romans2:7 Maaih deix mienh zanc-zanc longc hnyouv zoux kuv sic
Romans2:8 Mv baac kungx douh ganh duqv longx
Romans2:9 Dauh dauh zoux orqv nyei baamh mienh zungv oix zuqc buangh kouv nyei naanc zingh. Yiutai Mienh zuqc ndaangc
Romans2:10 Mv baac dongh zoux longx nyei mienh
Romans2:11 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien.
Romans2:12 Janx maiv maaih Mose nyei leiz-latc. Ninh mbuo baamz zuiz ninh mbuo zuqc mietc mv baac maiv zeiz leiz-latc dingc. Yiutai Mienh maaih Mose nyei leiz-latc. Ninh mbuo baamz zuiz
Romans2:13 Maiv zeiz mienh haiz liuz leiz-latc ziouc haih duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Kungx dongh ei jienv leiz-latc zoux wuov deix hnangv duqv caux ninh horpc hnyouv.
Romans2:14 Janx maiv maaih Mose nyei leiz-latc. Mv baac se gorngv ninh mbuo ei ganh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih zoux horpc leiz-latc
Romans2:15 Ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic bun cing leiz-latc fiev jienv ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv aqv. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zoux horpc fai maiv horpc. Maaih ziangh hoc hnyouv gox ninh mbuo
Romans2:16 Ziux yie zunh nyei kuv fienx
Romans2:17 Meih ganh ni? Meih gorngv meih zoux Yiutai Mienh yaac kaux leiz-latc. Meih bungx waac-maux gorngv ganh gauh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh
Romans2:18 yaac hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh oix meih hnangv haaix nor zoux. Meih yaac gorngv meih hoqc jiex leiz-latc cingx daaih hiuv duqv zoux haaix nyungc gauh horpc jiex.
Romans2:19 Meih yaac sienx meih haih ken m'zing maengh nyei mienh
Romans2:20 meih haih njaaux hngongx nyei mienh
Romans2:21 Hnangv naaic
Romans2:22 Meih gorngv
Romans2:23 Meih bungx waac-maux gorngv meih maaih Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc
Romans2:24 Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Romans2:25 Se gorngv meih ei jienv leiz-latc zoux
Romans2:26 Se gorngv Janx maiv gaengh jiex gaatv nyei leiz mv baac ei jienv leiz-latc zoux nor
Romans2:27 Maiv jiex gaatv nyei leiz mv baac ei jienv leiz-latc zoux nyei mienh ziouc dingc meih mbuo nyei zuiz
Romans2:28 Zien-zien Yiutai Mienh se maiv zeiz kungx ei beih zaangc funx. Zien jiex gaatv nyei leiz yaac maiv zeiz kungx ei sin gaatv hnangv.
Romans2:29 Zien-zien Yiutai Mienh se dongh yiem hnyouv gu'nyuoz zoux nyei. Ninh nyei hnyouv jiex gaatv nyei leiz. Naaiv se Singx Lingh zoux nyei gong
Romans3:1 Wuov nyungc
Romans3:2 Maaih nyei lorqc. Weic nyungc-nyungc maaih lamh longc nyei. Da'yietv
Romans3:3 Se gorngv maaih deix maiv ziepc zuoqv hnangv haaix nor? Wuov nyungc ninh mbuo zoux bun Tin-Hungh ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv maiv lamh longc fai?
Romans3:4 Maiv zeiz! Maiv gunv lungh ndiev mienh dauh dauh gorngv-baeqc
Romans3:5 Ih zanc yie oix gorngv naaiv deix waac se hnangv baamh mienh hnamv cuotv daaih gorngv nor. Nziex maaih mienh gorngv
Romans3:6 Zungv maiv zeiz! Se gorngv Tin-Hungh maiv baengh fim
Romans3:7 Nziex maaih mienh haih gorngv
Romans3:8 Weic haaix diuc maiv gorngv
Romans3:9 Wuov nyungc
Romans3:10 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Romans3:11 Maiv maaih haaix dauh mengh baeqc
Romans3:12 Dauh dauh huin nqaang leih Tin-Hungh. Yietc zungv ziouc waaic nzengc mi'aqv. Maiv maaih haaix dauh zoux longx
Romans3:13 “Ninh mbuo nyei jaang-hoh hnangv wetv tong nyei janx-daic zouv nor. Ninh mbuo longc mbietc gorngv waac nduov mienh.” “Nzuih meix yaac gorngv waac-doqc hnangv naang-doqc nyei ndie nor.”
Romans3:14 “Maaih im haic
Romans3:15 “Ninh mbuo hungh hec zoux doqc daix mienh siepv
Romans3:16 mingh taux haaix yaac kungx zoux waaic bun mienh kouv hnangv.
Romans3:17 Baengh orn nyei jauv ninh mbuo maiv hiuv.”
Romans3:18 “Ninh mbuo yaac maiv hiuv duqv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh.”
Romans3:19 Mbuo hiuv duqv leiz-latc fiev daaih gorngv nyei yietc zungv se gorngv bun yiem leiz-latc ga'ndiev nyei mienh. Hnangv naaiv bun mouz laanh mienh maiv maaih waac gorngv
Romans3:20 Weic zuqc ei Tin-Hungh mangc
Romans3:21 Ih zanc Tin-Hungh bun mienh hiuv duqv hnangv haaix nor haih duqv caux ninh horpc hnyouv daaih. Se maiv zeiz kaux leiz-latc. Mv baac Leiz-Latc caux Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou zoux zorng-zengx gorngv naaiv maiv kaux leiz-latc nyei za'eix.
Romans3:22 Weic zuqc mienh sienx kaux Yesu Giduc
Romans3:23 weic zuqc mouz laanh mienh zungv baamz zuiz
Romans3:24 Mv baac Tin-Hungh baeqc baeqc ceix en
Romans3:25 Tin-Hungh jiu Yesu zoux ziec nyei ga'naaiv weic bun mienh sienx kaux Yesu nyei nziaamv ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh guangc zuiz. Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Romans3:26 Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh bun cing ninh baengh fim nyei
Romans3:27 Hnangv naaic
Romans3:28 Mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh bun mienh caux ninh horpc hnyouv se weic mbuo sienx kaux Yesu
Romans3:29 Tin-Hungh kungx zoux Yiutai Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh hnangv fai? Ninh maiv zoux Janx nyei Tin-Hungh? Zoux nyei lorqc. Ninh yaac zoux Janx nyei Tin-Hungh.
Romans3:30 Kungx maaih nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh hnangv. Ninh oix bun liemh Yiutai Mienh
Romans3:31 Wuov nyungc
Romans4:1 Wuov nyungc
Romans4:2 Se gorngv Apc^laa^ham weic ninh zoux nyei sic duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv
Romans4:3 Ging-Sou gorngv
Romans4:4 Mienh zoux gong duqv gong-zinh. Ninh nyei gong-zinh maiv funx zoux zingh nyeic
Romans4:5 Haaix dauh maiv kaux ganh zoux nyei sic mv baac sienx kaux Tin-Hungh
Romans4:6 Ndaawitv yaac fih hnangv nyei gorngv
Romans4:7 Ndaawitv gorngv
Romans4:8 Haaix dauh maiv zuqc Ziouv funx ninh maaih zuiz
Romans4:9 Naaiv nyungc njien-youh
Romans4:10 Tin-Hungh ziangh haaix funx Apc^laa^ham caux ninh horpc hnyouv? Wuov zanc Apc^laa^ham jiex gaatv nyei leiz fai maiv gaengh jiex? Wuov zanc ninh corc maiv gaengh jiex.
Romans4:11 Ninh nqa'haav cingx daaih jiex. Naaiv jiex gaatv nyei leiz zoux jangx-hoc hnangv nqaapv jienv yienx
Romans4:12 Apc^laa^ham yaac zoux jiex gaatv nyei leiz wuov deix mienh nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv. Maiv zeiz laaix ninh mbuo jiex gaatv nyei leiz
Romans4:13 Tin-Hungh laengz waac bun Apc^laa^ham caux ninh nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh gorngv baamh gen oix benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor laengz maiv zeiz weic Apc^laa^ham ei leiz-latc zoux. Se weic Apc^laa^ham sienx Tin-Hungh
Romans4:14 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh laengz naaiv deix waac bun ei leiz-latc zoux nyei mienh
Romans4:15 Mienh maiv ei jienv leiz-latc zoux
Romans4:16 Weic naaiv
Romans4:17 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Romans4:18 Maiv gunv Apc^laa^ham ganh buatc maiv lamh hnamv aqv
Romans4:19 Wuov zanc Apc^laa^ham aav lamh ndapv bieqc yietc baeqv hnyangx. Ninh hiuv duqv ninh ganh nyei sin dorngx hnangv daic mi'aqv nor. Saalaa saeng-yungz nyei ziangh hoc yaac jiex mi'aqv. Mv baac Apc^laa^ham corc sienx wuonv Tin-Hungh
Romans4:20 Ninh sienx Tin-Hungh oix ei jienv wuov deix laengz nyei waac zoux. Ninh nyei hnyouv yaac maiv hlungh hluotv
Romans4:21 Apc^laa^ham sienx dingc Tin-Hungh oix ei wuov deix laengz nyei waac zoux.
Romans4:22 Weic zuqc Apc^laa^ham hnangv naaiv nor sienx Tin-Hungh
Romans4:23 “Funx ninh caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv mi'aqv
Romans4:24 Yaac weic mbuo fiev weic zuqc mbuo sienx Tin-Hungh
Romans4:25 Yesu zuqc jiu bun mienh daix se laaix mbuo nyei zuiz. Zuqc daix daic mv baac Tin-Hungh aengx bun ninh nangh daaih weic bun mbuo duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv.
Romans5:1 Mbuo sienx kaux Tin-Hungh ziouc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Hnangv naaic
Romans5:2 Weic zuqc mbuo sienx kaux Giduc ninh ziouc bun mbuo hiuv Tin-Hungh nyei en
Romans5:3 Maiv daan naaiv hnangv
Romans5:4 Mbuo maaih noic diev
Romans5:5 Hnangv naaic maaih lamh hnamv maiv haih bun mbuo piatv
Romans5:6 Dongh mbuo maiv maaih qaqv tengx duqv mbuo ganh wuov zanc
Romans5:7 Weic gan leiz-latc muonc nyei mienh daic se aqc nyei. Weic kuv mienh daic nziex haih maaih dauh baav gaamv daic mv bei.
Romans5:8 Mv baac Tin-Hungh bun cing ninh ndongc haaix hnamv mbuo. Dongh mbuo corc zoux zuiz-mienh nyei ziangh hoc Giduc weic mbuo daic.
Romans5:9 Ih zanc mbuo kaux Giduc nyei nziaamv ziouc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Hnangv naaic
Romans5:10 Mbuo corc zoux Tin-Hungh nyei win-wangv wuov zanc
Romans5:11 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Mbuo a'hneiv weic zuqc Tin-Hungh longc mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc bun mbuo caux ninh horpc hnyouv.
Romans5:12 Laaix nduqc laanh mienh baamz zuiz
Romans5:13 Tin-Hungh maiv gaengh bun leiz-latc mienh wuov zanc
Romans5:14 Hnangv haaix yaac baac
Romans5:15 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh baeqc baeqc bun nyei zingh nyeic caux Aa^ndam baamz nyei zuiz maiv fih hnangv. Laaix yietc laanh mienh baamz zuiz
Romans5:16 Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei zingh nyeic caux yietc laanh mienh baamz nyei zuiz maiv fih hnangv. Yietc laanh mienh baamz yietc nzunc zuiz ziouc zuqc dingc jienv zuiz aqv. Mienh camv baamz zuiz mv baac weic Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei zingh nyeic ninh mbuo duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv.
Romans5:17 Laaix yietc laanh mienh baamz nyei zuiz
Romans5:18 Hnangv naaic
Romans5:19 Nduqc laanh mienh maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac
Romans5:20 Tin-Hungh bun leiz-latc yiem naaiv lungh ndiev zoux bun zuiz jaa camv jienv faaux. Mv baac zuiz yiem haaix cuotv camv
Romans5:21 Hnangv naaic
Romans6:1 Wuov nyungc
Romans6:2 Zungv maiv zeiz! Ei zoux zuiz nyei jauv mbuo zungv daic mi'aqv. Wuov nyungc mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih zoux jienv zuiz mingh?
Romans6:3 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz
Romans6:4 Hnangv naaic
Romans6:5 Se gorngv mbuo duqv caux Giduc juangc maengc daic
Romans6:6 Mbuo yaac hiuv duqv mbuo nyei loz-hnyouv zuqc caux Giduc ding wuov ziepc nzaangc jaax weic bun baamz zuiz nyei hnyouv zuqc mietc. Mbuo yaac maiv zuqc aengx zoux zuiz nyei nouh.
Romans6:7 Weic zuqc haaix dauh daic mingh ziouc leih ndutv zuiz nyei qaqv mi'aqv.
Romans6:8 Se gorngv mbuo caux Giduc daic mi'aqv
Romans6:9 Mbuo hiuv duqv Giduc daic mingh Tin-Hungh aengx bun ninh nangh daaih. Nqa'haav ninh yietc liuz maiv daic aqv. Haih daic nyei qaqv maiv haih gunv ninh.
Romans6:10 Giduc daic weic bun zuiz maiv haih gunv ninh. Daic nzunc
Romans6:11 Meih mbuo fih hnangv nyei
Romans6:12 Weic naaiv maiv dungx bun zuiz gunv meih mbuo haih daic nyei sin
Romans6:13 Maiv dungx bun sin zaangc nyei haaix nyungc zoux zuiz
Romans6:14 Zuiz maiv duqv aengx zoux meih mbuo nyei ziouv
Romans6:15 Wuov nyungc
Romans6:16 Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv fai? Se gorngv fungx ganh zoux haaix dauh nyei nouh
Romans6:17 Laengz zingh Tin-Hungh! Maiv gunv zinh ndaangc meih mbuo zoux zuiz nyei nouh
Romans6:18 Tin-Hungh bungx meih mbuo leih ndutv zuiz nyei qaqv
Romans6:19 Weic zuqc meih mbuo zoux baamh mienh
Romans6:20 Meih mbuo zoux zuiz nyei nouh wuov zanc
Romans6:21 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo zoux nyei sic
Romans6:22 Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh bungx meih mbuo biaux ndutv zuiz
Romans6:23 Weic zuqc zuiz nyei gong-zinh se bun mienh zuqc daic
Romans7:1 Gorx-youz aac
Romans7:2 Hnangv m'sieqv dorn longc jienv nqox nor. Nqox corc ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc
Romans7:3 Hnangv naaic
Romans7:4 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
Romans7:5 Dongh mbuo corc maaih baamz zuiz nyei fiem-fingx gunv jienv mbuo wuov zanc
Romans7:6 Mv baac ih zanc mbuo leih ndutv leiz-latc mi'aqv. Mbuo se hnangv daic mi'aqv nor. Maiv maaih leiz-latc gunv jienv hnangv zinh ndaangc gunv mbuo wuov nor. Mbuo ih zanc maiv longc fiev jienv wuov deix loz-leiz-latc fu-sux Tin-Hungh. Mbuo longc Singx Lingh nyei siang-leiz fu-sux Tin-Hungh.
Romans7:7 Wuov nyungc mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv? Leiz-latc ganh baamz zuiz fai? Zungv maiv zeiz! Mv baac se gorngv maiv zeiz weic leiz-latc
Romans7:8 Zuiz bangc leiz-latc zoux gorn lorz qangx bun yie mauv naaiv mauv wuov. Se gorngv maiv maaih leiz-latc
Romans7:9 Yie zinh ndaangc ziangh jienv maiv gaengh maaih leiz-latc gunv yie
Romans7:10 Leiz-latc horpc zuqc bun mienh ziangh jienv. Daaux nzuonx leiz-latc bun yie zuqc daic.
Romans7:11 Weic zuqc zuiz lorz qangx bun leiz-latc nduov yie
Romans7:12 Hnangv naaic
Romans7:13 Wuov nyungc
Romans7:14 Mbuo hiuv duqv leiz-latc se yiem Tin-Hungh daaih. Mv baac yie zoux baamh mienh
Romans7:15 Yie ganh zoux nyei
Romans7:16 Dongh yie zoux liuz yie maiv oix zoux nyei sic
Romans7:17 Hnangv naaic
Romans7:18 Yie hiuv duqv yiem yie baamh mienh nyei hnyouv maiv maaih haaix nyungc longx. Yie gengh oix zoux longx nyei yaac maiv haih zoux.
Romans7:19 Yie oix zoux nyei kuv sic yie yaac maiv zoux. Mv baac dongh yie maiv oix zoux nyei waaic sic yie corc zoux jienv mingh.
Romans7:20 Se gorngv yie zoux dongh yie maiv oix zoux nyei sic
Romans7:21 Hnangv naaic
Romans7:22 Yiem yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz yie a'hneiv haic Tin-Hungh nyei leiz.
Romans7:23 Mv baac yiem yie nyei sin maaih ganh nyungc leiz. Naaiv nyungc leiz aengx caux yie nyei hnyouv a'hneiv wuov nyungc leiz mborqv jaax. Hnangv naaic
Romans7:24 Aav! Yie za'gengh kouv haic aqv. Haaix dauh haih njoux yie leih ndutv naaiv haih zuqc daic nyei sin?
Romans7:25 Zongc zingh Tin-Hungh! Ninh bun mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc njoux cuotv yie. Wuov nyungc
Romans8:1 Hnangv naaic
Romans8:2 weic zuqc Singx Lingh nyei leiz
Romans8:3 Weic zuqc baamh mienh mau haic
Romans8:4 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic bun mbuo
Romans8:5 Ei baamh mienh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux wuov deix
Romans8:6 Se gorngv bun baamh mienh nyei hnyouv gunv nor
Romans8:7 Hnangv naaic
Romans8:8 Ei ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux wuov deix
Romans8:9 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh zien-zien yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
Romans8:10 Se gorngv Giduc yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
Romans8:11 Yesu daic mv baac Tin-Hungh bun ninh aengx nangh daaih. Se gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
Romans8:12 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
Romans8:13 Se gorngv meih mbuo ei baamh mienh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux
Romans8:14 Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh dorh wuov deix benx Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn mi'aqv.
Romans8:15 Meih mbuo zipv daaih nyei Singx Lingh maiv zeiz hoic meih mbuo zoux nouh
Romans8:16 Singx Lingh caux mbuo nyei lingh wuonh fih hnangv nyei zoux zorng-zengx gorngv mbuo se Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz.
Romans8:17 Mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz ziouc oix duqv nzipc Tin-Hungh liouh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nyei fuqv. Dongh Tin-Hungh liouh bun Giduc
Romans8:18 Yie funx mbuo ih zanc buangh nyei kouv naanc maiv fungc beiv Tin-Hungh oix hinc bun mbuo nyei njang-laangc.
Romans8:19 Zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc zuov jienv gengh! oix buatc Tin-Hungh nyei dorn mbuo hinc cuotv daaih.
Romans8:20 Zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc zuqc dingc benx maiv maaih eix leiz nyei ga'naaiv. Naaiv maiv zeiz ei maanc muotc ganh nyei za'eix
Romans8:21 maaih norm hnoi zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc oix biaux ndutv
Romans8:22 Mbuo hiuv duqv
Romans8:23 Maiv daan zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc hnangv. Liemh mbuo yaac njunh jienv yiem. Mbuo duqv zipv Tin-Hungh nyei da'yietv nyungc zingh nyeic
Romans8:24 Weic zuqc mbuo hnangv naaiv maaih lamh hnamv
Romans8:25 Mv baac se gorngv mbuo maiv gaengh buatc nyei mbuo corc hnamv oix duqv buatc
Romans8:26 Fih hnangv nyei
Romans8:27 Tin-Hungh zaah mienh nyei hnyouv ziouc hiuv Singx Lingh nyei eix leiz
Romans8:28 Mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh bun hnamv ninh
Romans8:29 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh jaa-ndaangc ginv wuov deix
Romans8:30 Tin-Hungh jaa-ndaangc ginv wuov deix
Romans8:31 Hnangv naaic
Romans8:32 Tin-Hungh liemh maiv nzaeng ninh ganh nyei Dorn
Romans8:33 Haaix dauh haih gox Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei mienh? Tin-Hungh ganh gorngv ninh mbuo maiv maaih zuiz.
Romans8:34 Hnangv naaic
Romans8:35 Giduc hnamv mbuo. Maaih haaix nyungc haih zoux bun mbuo nqaeqv duqv ndutv? Naanc zingh fai? Kuonx hnyouv nyei sic fai? Zuqc mienh zoux doqc fai? Ngorc hnaangx fai? Laaix jomc maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv fai? Haih hoic maengc nyei sic fai? Zuqc daix daic fai?
Romans8:36 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Romans8:37 Yiem naaiv deix yietc zungv nzaic zingh
Romans8:38 Yie sienx dingc Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc haih nqaeqv ndutv bun ninh maiv hnamv
Romans8:39 yiem gu'nguaaic lungh fai ga'ndiev ndau nyei
Romans9:1 Yie caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh
Romans9:2 Yie weic yie ganh nyei fingx
Romans9:3 Se gorngv haih tengx duqv ninh mbuo nor
Romans9:4 Ninh mbuo se I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Romans9:5 Ninh mbuo se zoux maaih mengh dauh wuov deix ong-taaix nyei zeiv-fun. Giduc cuotv seix benx baamh mienh yaac yiem ninh mbuo nyei buonv cuotv daaih. Zuangx mienh oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng Tin-Hungh
Romans9:6 Yie maiv zeiz gorngv Tin-Hungh bungx ndortv ninh laengz nyei waac
Romans9:7 Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun yaac maiv zeiz yietc zungv zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz. Tin-Hungh mbuox Apc^laa^ham
Romans9:8 Eix leiz se maiv zeiz Apc^laa^ham zoux die duqv daaih nyei fu'jueiv zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz. Se kungx ei Tin-Hungh laengz nyei waac cuotv seix wuov deix cingx funx zien zeiv-fun.
Romans9:9 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh laengz nyei waac hnangv naaiv nor gorngv. “Taux dingc ziangx nyei ziangh hoc yie aengx daaih
Romans9:10 Maiv daan hnangv naaic. Le^mbe^kaa nyei i dauh dorn juangc dauh die. Dongh mbuo nyei ong-taaix
Romans9:11 Mv baac naaiv deix sung-gu'nguaaz maiv gaengh cuotv seix
Romans9:12 Tin-Hungh ziouc mbuox Le^mbe^kaa
Romans9:13 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv nor
Romans9:14 Wuov nyungc mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv? Tin-Hungh maiv baengh fim fai? Zungv maiv zeiz!
Romans9:15 Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox Mose
Romans9:16 Hnangv naaic
Romans9:17 Yiem wuov Ging-Sou
Romans9:18 Hnangv naaic
Romans9:19 Wuov nyungc
Romans9:20 Meih zoux haaix dauh cingx gaamv caux Tin-Hungh nzaeng? Meih kungx zoux baamh mienh hnangv. Nie-ongx zungv maiv naaic nanv nie zaangc
Romans9:21 Nanv nie zaangc maaih leiz zorqv ndunh nie sueih eix nanv i norm ongx maiv zeiz? Nanv norm zoux pou-tong nyei ongx
Romans9:22 Tin-Hungh yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux. Ninh oix bun cing ninh nouz haic mienh yaac bun ninh mbuo buatc ninh nyei domh qaqv. Mv baac ninh zoux hnyouv ndaauv nyienz jienv dongh ninh nouz haic
Romans9:23 Tin-Hungh yaac oix bun ninh nyei domh njang-laangc cuotv daaih
Romans9:24 Mbuo se dongh wuov nyungc mienh aqv
Romans9:25 Yiem Ho^se^yaa fiev daaih nyei sou Tin-Hungh gorngv
Romans9:26 “Aengx yiem Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox jiex ninh mbuo
Romans9:27 I^saa^yaa yaac heuc jienv gorngv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh gorngv
Romans9:28 Weic zuqc Ziouv oix yiem naaiv lungh ndiev siepv-siepv nyei siemv nzengc mienh nyei zuiz.”
Romans9:29 Aengx hnangv zinh ndaangc I^saa^yaa gorngv jiex
Romans9:30 Wuov nyungc
Romans9:31 I^saa^laa^en Mienh hnamv oix kaux leiz-latc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv mv baac ninh mbuo maiv duqv caux ninh horpc.
Romans9:32 Weic haaix diuc? Weic zuqc ninh mbuo bangc ninh mbuo ganh zoux nyei sic
Romans9:33 Ging-Sou gorngv
Romans10:1 Gorx-youz aac
Romans10:2 Yie tengx ninh mbuo zoux zorng-zengx gorngv ninh mbuo weic Tin-Hungh jorm hnyouv haic
Romans10:3 Ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor bun mienh caux ninh horpc hnyouv ziouc daav ganh nyei za'eix oix caux Tin-Hungh horpc. Ninh mbuo maiv longc Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix.
Romans10:4 Giduc zoux bun leiz-latc nzengc mi'aqv. Hnangv naaic
Romans10:5 Mose fiev jienv gorngv mienh gan leiz-latc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv nyei za'eix. Ninh gorngv

Romans10:8 Ging-Sou hnangv naaiv nor gorngv

Romans11:1 Wuov nyungc
Romans11:2 Tin-Hungh maiv guangc ninh yiem gorn ginv daaih nyei mienh. Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv E^li^yaa dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei sic mingh gox Tin-Hungh wuov douc Ging-Sou fai?
Romans11:3 E^li^yaa gorngv
Romans11:4 Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor dau ninh? Tin-Hungh gorngv
Romans11:5 Ih jaax hnoi yaac fih hnangv nyei. Tin-Hungh ei jienv ninh nyei en ginv deix mienh zoqc nyei.
Romans11:6 Tin-Hungh ginv ninh mbuo daaih se ei ninh nyei en hnangv. Maiv zeiz ninh mbuo ganh zoux nyei sic. Se gorngv Tin-Hungh ei mienh zoux nyei ginv ninh mbuo nor

Romans11:11 Yie ziouc aengx naaic gaax

Romans11:14 Nziex yie haih zoux bun caux yie juangc fingx nyei mienh mueic jieqv ziouc maaih deix weic yie zoux nyei
Romans11:15 Tin-Hungh guangc I^saa^laa^en Mienh wuov zanc
Romans11:16 Se gorngv yietc ndunh njuov-nyiemz

Romans11:21 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh maiv liouh zien ga'lanv nquaah nor

Romans11:28 Laaix Yiutai Mienh maiv zipv kuv fienx ninh mbuo benx Tin-Hungh nyei win-wangv mi'aqv. Naaiv se weic tengx meih mbuo Janx. Mv baac Tin-Hungh ginv ninh mbuo daaih

Romans11:31 Hnangv naaic
Romans11:32 Tin-Hungh sueih zuangx mienh maiv muangx ninh nyei waac

Romans16:4 Ninh mbuo maiv longc maengc nyei njoux yie. Yie za'gengh laengz zingh ninh mbuo. Yaac maiv daan yie hnangv. Janx nyei zuangx jiu-baang yaac laengz zingh ninh mbuo.
Romans16:5 Yie yaac jangx taux yiem ninh mbuo nyei biauv gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix wuov norm jiu-baang. Yaac jangx taux yie hnamv nyei doic E^be^ne^tatv. Yiem Esie Saengv ninh sienx Giduc ndaangc jiex.

Romans16:11 Yie yaac jangx taux caux yie juangc Yiutai Fingx wuov dauh He^lo^ndi^on. Yaac jangx taux Naa^sitv^satc biauv zong sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz.

Romans16:15 Yie yaac jangx taux Fi^lo^lo^gatc

Romans16:19 Zuangx mienh haiz gorngv meih mbuo ei kuv fienx zoux

Romans16:21 Caux yie juangc gong zoux wuov dauh Ti^mo^tai yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. Caux yie juangc Yiutai Fingx nyei Lu^si^atc

1Corinthians1:7 Weic naaiv

1Corinthians2:6 Yie zunh cong-mengh nyei doz-leiz bun ei sienx nyei jauv benx domh mienh wuov deix muangx. Se maiv zeiz ih jaax nyei cong-mengh
1Corinthians2:7 Yie mbuo gorngv nyei cong-mengh se maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei cong-mengh
1Corinthians2:8 Gunv ih jaax nyei baamh gen wuov deix mienh maiv maaih yietc dauh mengh baeqc naaiv nyungc cong-mengh. Se gorngv ninh mbuo mengh baeqc nor
1Corinthians2:9 Mv baac hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv. “M'zing maiv buatc jiex
1Corinthians2:10 Mv baac maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic
1Corinthians2:11 Kungx gorqv-mienh ganh nyei hnyouv haih hiuv duqv gorqv-mienh ganh hnamv nyei sic. Fih hnangv nyei
1Corinthians2:12 Mbuo maiv zeiz zipv baamh mienh nyei hnyouv. Mbuo zipv nyei se Tin-Hungh paaiv daaih nyei Singx Lingh weic bun mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei nyungc-nyungc.
1Corinthians2:13 Hnangv naaic
1Corinthians2:14 Haaix dauh maiv maaih Singx Lingh maiv haih zipv Tin-Hungh bun daaih nyei zingh nyeic. Naaiv nyungc mienh maiv haih mengh baeqc naaiv deix zingh nyeic

1Corinthians3:3 weic zuqc meih mbuo corc yiem hnangv guei baamh gen nyei mienh yiem nor. Yiem naaic maaih laanh hanc laanh caux fiuv-nzaeng nyei sic. Naaiv bun cing meih mbuo corc guei baamh gen yaac zoux hnangv guei baamh gen nyei mienh zoux nor
1Corinthians3:4 Meih mbuo maaih laanh gorngv
1Corinthians3:5 Aa^bor^lo zoux haaix nyungc mienh? Baulo zoux haaix nyungc mienh? Yie mbuo kungx zoux Tin-Hungh nyei bou dorh meih mbuo sienx. Ziux Ziouv paaiv nyei gong
1Corinthians3:6 Yie zuangx nyim

1Corinthians3:9 Yie mbuo caux Tin-Hungh juangc gong zoux. Meih mbuo se Tin-Hungh nyei liangx-ndeic. Meih mbuo yaac benx Tin-Hungh nyei biauv.
1Corinthians3:10 Ei Tin-Hungh ceix bun yie nyei en
1Corinthians3:11 Weic zuqc maiv maaih haaix dauh haih liepc ganh norm gorn-ndoqv

1Corinthians3:13 Taux Siemv Zuiz Hnoi

1Corinthians9:1 Yie maiv zeiz bungx nqoi nyei mienh fai? Yie maiv zeiz zoux gong-zoh fai? Yie maiv buatc jiex mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu fai? Yie tengx Ziouv zoux gong meih mbuo cingx daaih sienx maiv zeiz?
1Corinthians9:2 Maiv gunv mienh maiv laengz yie zoux gong-zoh
