1Corinthians9:6 Kungx maaih Mbaa^naa^mbatc caux yie oix zuqc zoux gong douc maengc hnangv fai?
1Corinthians9:7 Maaih haaix dauh zoux baeng oix zuqc cuotv ganh nyei bienh fuix? Maaih haaix dauh zoux huingx zuangx a'ngunc biouv yaac maiv duqv ninh ganh nyei biouv nyanc? Maaih haaix dauh yungz ba'gi yungh yaac maiv duqv hopv ninh ganh nyei yungh nyorx?
1Corinthians9:8 Yie hnangv naaiv gorngv se maiv zeiz kungx ei baamh mienh nyei za'eix. Leiz-Latc yaac fih hnangv nyei gorngv maiv zeiz?
1Corinthians9:9 Mose nyei Leiz fiev jienv gorngv
1Corinthians9:10 Tin-Hungh gorngv naaiv deix waac
1Corinthians9:11 Yie mbuo zunh kuv fienx hnangv zuangx Singx Lingh nyei nyim yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv nor. Wuov nyungc
1Corinthians9:12 Se gorngv ganh deix mienh maaih leiz heuc meih mbuo juang ninh mbuo
1Corinthians9:13 Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv fai? Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux gong nyei mienh duqv wuov norm biauv nyei nyanc hopv. Yiem ziec-dorngh longc saeng-kuv ziec bun Tin-Hungh wuov deix sai mienh yaac duqv buonc wuov deix orv.
1Corinthians9:14 Fih hnangv nyei
1Corinthians9:15 Mv baac naaiv deix leiz yie maiv gaengh longc jiex yietc nzunc. Ih zanc yie fiev naaiv deix waac yaac maiv zeiz oix tov haaix nyungc longc. Yie daic gauh longx weic zuqc maiv oix haaix dauh zorqv yie bungx nyei waac-maux tiuv benx henh waac.
1Corinthians9:16 Yie zunh kuv fienx mv baac naaiv maiv zeiz bun yie maaih gorn-baengx bungx waac-maux. Yie feix-nyungc zungv oix zuqc zunh kuv fienx. Se gorngv maiv zunh nor
1Corinthians9:17 Se gorngv yie ganh liepc hnyouv zunh kuv fienx
1Corinthians9:18 yie ziouc duqv haaix nyungc fin-kouv? Dongh naaiv aqv. Yie zunh kuv fienx yaac maiv zuqc heuc mienh cuotv fin-kouv. Weic zunh kuv fienx maaih leiz duqv haaix nyungc yie yaac maiv tengx mienh tov.
1Corinthians9:19 Yie maiv zoux haaix dauh nyei nouh gauv. Mv baac yie nyunc zoux zuangx mienh nyei nouh

1Corinthians9:21 Fih hnangv nyei

1Corinthians9:24 Meih mbuo hiuv nyei
1Corinthians9:25 Ndouv saaix nyei mienh dauh dauh oix zuqc gunv ganh
1Corinthians9:26 Weic naaiv yie tiux mingh maiv zeiz hnangv maiv maaih dingc ziangx nyei dorngx. Yie hnangv mborqv jaax

1Corinthians10:2 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv yiem mbuonx yaac yiem koiv jiex wuom nyei leiz guei Mose.
1Corinthians10:3 Yietc zungv nyanc Singx Lingh bun nyei hnaangx
1Corinthians10:4 yaac hopv Singx Lingh bun nyei wuom
1Corinthians10:5 Hnangv haaix yaac baac
1Corinthians10:6 Naaiv deix sic yietc zungv zoux nyungc zeiv donv mbuo
1Corinthians10:7 Maiv dungx baaix miuc-fangx hnangv ninh mbuo maaih deix mienh baaix nor. Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
1Corinthians10:8 Mbuo maiv dungx zoux hienx nyei sic hnangv ninh mbuo maaih deix mienh zoux nor
1Corinthians10:9 Mbuo maiv dungx seix Ziouv hnangv ninh mbuo maaih deix mienh seix nor
1Corinthians10:10 Mbuo maiv dungx la'ngopv hnangv ninh mbuo maaih deix mienh la'ngopv ziouc zuqc mietc maengc wuov dauh fin-mienh mietc mi'aqv.
1Corinthians10:11 Naaiv deix sic yietc zungv cuotv daaih zoux nyungc zeiv yaac fiev jienv weic donv mbuo
1Corinthians10:12 Haaix dauh hnamv ganh souv duqv wuonv
1Corinthians10:13 Meih mbuo buangh zuqc nyungc-nyungc seix hnyouv nyei sic se baamh mienh aah loc buangh nyei sic. Mv baac Tin-Hungh kaux duqv wuonv nyei. Ninh maiv bun meih mbuo zuqc seix jiex ndaangc meih mbuo nyei qaqv. Zuqc seix wuov zanc
1Corinthians10:14 Yie hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
1Corinthians10:15 Yie funx meih mbuo maaih cong-mengh ziouc caux meih mbuo gorngv. Meih mbuo ganh hnamv mangc gaax yie gorngv nyei waac.
1Corinthians10:16 Mbuo weic wuov norm laengz zingh nyei zaanv laengz zingh Tin-Hungh liuz ziouc hopv
1Corinthians10:17 Weic zuqc maaih nduqc norm njuov hnangv cingx daaih maiv gunv maaih mienh camv
1Corinthians10:18 Hnamv mangc gaax I^saa^laa^en Mienh! Nyanc ziec nyei ga'naaiv wuov deix ziouc caux ziec-dorngh maaih ninh mbuo nyei buonc
1Corinthians10:19 Wuov nyungc
1Corinthians10:20 Zungv maiv maaih. Yie gorngv nyei se
1Corinthians10:21 Meih mbuo hopv Ziouv nyei zaanv
1Corinthians10:22 Mbuo oix zoux bun Ziouv mueic jieqv fai? Mbuo gauh henv ninh fai?
1Corinthians10:23 Maaih deix mienh gorngv
1Corinthians10:24 Haaix dauh maiv dungx douh ganh duqv longx. Oix zuqc zoux bun ga'nyiec nyei mienh duqv longx.
1Corinthians10:25 Yiem hei maaic nyei nyungc-nyungc orv sueih binc maaiz nyanc. Hnyouv yaac maiv dungx jangx zuqc gamh nziex dorngc ziouc naaic haaix nyungc
1Corinthians10:26 weic zuqc hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
1Corinthians10:27 Se gorngv maaih dauh maiv sienx nyei mienh cingv meih mbuo mingh nyanc hnaangx
1Corinthians10:28 Mv baac se gorngv maaih dauh mbuox meih
1Corinthians10:29 Naaiv yie maiv zeiz gorngv meih ganh yiem hnyouv gamh nziex nyanc dorngc

1Corinthians10:31 Weic naaiv

1Corinthians10:33 Oix zuqc hnangv yie nor
1Corinthians11:1 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zuotc yie nyei nyungc
1Corinthians11:2 Yie ceng meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo yiem maanc sic zanc-zanc jangx jienv yie. Yie zorqv yie njaaux nyei diuh diuh leiz jiu bun meih mbuo
1Corinthians11:3 Mv baac yie oix meih mbuo hiuv duqv
1Corinthians11:4 Weic naaiv
1Corinthians11:5 Haaix dauh m'sieqv dorn daux gaux fai douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac mv baac maiv mbiorngz m'nqorngv nor
1Corinthians11:6 Se gorngv m'sieqv dorn maiv mbiorngz m'nqorngv
1Corinthians11:7 M'jangc dorn maiv horpc zuqc mbiorngz m'nqorngv

1Corinthians11:9 Tin-Hungh yaac maiv zeiz zeix m'jangc dorn daaih weic m'sieqv dorn. Ninh zeix m'sieqv dorn daaih weic m'jangc dorn.
1Corinthians11:10 Hnangv naaic

1Corinthians11:13 Meih mbuo ganh hnamv mangc gaax
1Corinthians11:14 Baamh mienh pou-tong nyei jauv maiv zeiz njaaux mbuo hiuv duqv m'jangc dorn liouh mba'biei ndaauv se nyaiv haic nyei sic fai?
1Corinthians11:15 Mv baac m'sieqv dorn liouh mba'biei ndaauv se nzueic haic. Tin-Hungh bun m'sieqv dorn maaih mba'biei ndaauv weic buang m'nqorngv.

1Corinthians11:20 Meih mbuo gapv zunv nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo nyanc nyei se maiv zeiz nyanc Ziouv liepc daaih weic jangx ninh wuov donx hnaangx.
1Corinthians11:21 Weic zuqc nyanc wuov zanc

1Corinthians11:23 Weic zuqc Ziouv jiu bun yie nyei leiz yie zipv daaih yaac jiu bun meih mbuo mi'aqv. Se dongh Ziouv Yesu zuqc maaic wuov muonz

1Corinthians12:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac

1Corinthians12:6 Maaih camv-nyungc gong zoux
1Corinthians12:7 Dauh dauh mienh duqv yietc nyungc bun cing Singx Lingh yiem ninh nyei hnyouv weic tengx zuangx mienh duqv longx.

1Corinthians12:12 Giduc se hnangv yietc norm sin

1Corinthians12:19 Se gorngv sin nyei yietc zungv kungx nduqc nyungc hnangv

1Corinthians12:21 Weic naaiv

1Corinthians12:24 Nzueic nyei dorngx maiv qiemx zuqc zorng. Mv baac Tin-Hungh gapv sin zaangc daaih
1Corinthians12:25 Hnangv naaic sin cingx daaih maiv lamh nzaeng dorngx. Sin nyei nyungc-nyungc
1Corinthians12:26 Se gorngv sin nyei yietc nyungc zuqc mun
1Corinthians12:27 Meih mbuo se Giduc nyei sin. Meih mbuo dauh dauh yaac zoux sin nyei yietc nyungc.

1Corinthians12:30 fai haih zorc baengc

1Corinthians15:4 Yaac hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv
1Corinthians15:5 Ninh yaac hinc bun Bide buatc
1Corinthians15:6 Nqa'haav ninh aengx hinc bun hmz baeqv lengh dauh gan ninh nyei mienh lomh nzoih buatc. Naaiv deix mienh camv jiex corc ziangh jienv nyei
1Corinthians15:7 Nqa'haav ninh hinc bun Yaagorpc buatc

1Corinthians15:31 Gorx-youz aac

1Corinthians15:33 Maiv dungx bun mienh nduov. “Kuv mienh caux mienh waaic mienh zoux doic

1Corinthians15:35 Maaih mienh oix naaic

1Corinthians15:37 Meih zuangx yietc norm nyim
1Corinthians15:38 Tin-Hungh ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix bun wuov norm nyim cuotv daaih maaih ganh nyei miuh. Norm-norm nyim ei nyim nyei buonv maaih nyim nyei miuh.
1Corinthians15:39 Maaih orv nyei ga'naaiv
1Corinthians15:40 Lungh zaangc maaih lungh zaangc ga'naaiv nyei sin
1Corinthians15:41 Mba'hnoi maaih ganh nyungc njang-laangc
1Corinthians15:42 Daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih se hnangv naaiv aqv. Biopv nyei sin haih huv nyei. Daic mingh aengx nangh daaih nyei sin maiv haih huv aqv.
1Corinthians15:43 Zuqc biopv nyei sin se aqc mangc. Nangh daaih nyei sin se nzueic nyei. Zuqc biopv nyei sin se mau. Nangh daaih nyei sin se henv.

1Corinthians15:45 Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv
1Corinthians15:46 Cuotv ndaangc se maiv zeiz Singx Lingh bun maaih maengc nyei
1Corinthians15:47 Da'yietv dauh Aa^ndam
1Corinthians15:48 Longc nie zeix wuov dauh baamh mienh hnangv haaix nor

1Corinthians15:50 Gorx-youz aac
1Corinthians15:51 Muangx longx yie oix gorngv naaiv deix maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic mbuox meih mbuo. Mbuo maiv zeiz yietc zungv daic
1Corinthians15:52 Nzatc mbui nqa'haav laai wuov nzunc
1Corinthians15:53 Weic zuqc haih huv nyei sin oix tiuv benx maiv haih huv nyei sin. Haih daic nyei yaac oix tiuv benx maiv haih daic nyei.
1Corinthians15:54 Haih huv nyei sin tiuv benx maiv haih huv nyei
1Corinthians15:55 “Zuqc daic nyei qaqv aah! Meih duqv hingh nyei qaqv yiem haaix? Daic nyei qaqv aah! Danx mienh daic nyei ndie-doqc yiem haaix?”
1Corinthians15:56 Danx mienh daic nyei ndie-doqc se zuiz. Zuiz nyei qaqv yaac yiem leiz-latc daaih.
1Corinthians15:57 Mv baac laengz zingh Tin-Hungh
1Corinthians15:58 Yie hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
1Corinthians16:1 Ih zanc yie oix gorngv gapv nyaanh tengx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh wuov nyungc jauv. Yie mbuox Gaa^laa^tie Deic-Bung nyei zuangx jiu-baang hnangv haaix nor zoux
1Corinthians16:2 Norm-norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi
1Corinthians16:3 Yie taux meih mbuo naaic wuov zanc
1Corinthians16:4 Se gorngv yie horpc zuqc mingh nor
1Corinthians16:5 Yie yangh Maa^si^ndo^nie Saengv jiex
1Corinthians16:6 Nziex yie maaih ziangh hoc caux meih mbuo yiem caamx
1Corinthians16:7 Yie maiv zeiz oix jiex jauv buatc dangh meih mbuo hnangv. Se gorngv Ziouv nyei za'eix nor
1Corinthians16:8 Mv baac yie corc oix yiem naaiv E^fe^so Zingh taux Pen^te^kortv.
1Corinthians16:9 Weic zuqc yiem naaiv maaih qangx zoux maaih lamh longc nyei gong camv haic
1Corinthians16:10 Se gorngv Ti^mo^tai taux meih mbuo naaic
1Corinthians16:11 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh mangc piex ninh. Oix zuqc tengx ninh baengh orn nyei cuotv jauv nzuonx taux yie naaiv
1Corinthians16:12 Mbuo nyei gorx-youz Aa^bor^lo aeqv
1Corinthians16:13 Oix zuqc ging jienv hnyouv
1Corinthians16:14 Meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc oix zuqc maaih hnyouv hnamv mienh.
1Corinthians16:15 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv Saa^te^faa^natv mbuo yietc biauv mienh yiem Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv sienx Yesu ndaangc. Ninh mbuo gengh jorm hnyouv fu-sux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh.
1Corinthians16:16 Gorx-youz aac

2Corinthians3:1 Naaiv meih mbuo haiz hnangv yie mbuo bungx waac-maux aengx ceng yie mbuo ganh fai? Meih mbuo buatc yie mbuo hnangv maaih deix mienh nor
2Corinthians3:2 Meih mbuo ganh zoux yie mbuo nyei fienx
2Corinthians3:3 Meih mbuo biux mengh meih mbuo benx Giduc nyei fienx jiu bun yie mbuo dorh mingh. Se maiv zeiz longc matc fiev wuov la'bieiv-benv. Se ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh fiev jienv mienh nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz.
2Corinthians3:4 Yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc yie mbuo sienx Giduc ziouc hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh se kaux duqv wuonv nyei.
2Corinthians3:5 Yie mbuo maiv zeiz funx yie mbuo ganh maaih haaix nyungc banh zeic zoux naaiv nyungc gong. Se Tin-Hungh bun yie mbuo maaih banh zeic zoux
2Corinthians3:6 bun yie mbuo haih ei jienv siang-ngaengc waac fu-sux ninh. Naaiv siang-ngaengc waac se yie mbuo maiv zeiz ei fiev daaih nyei leiz-latc zoux. Yie mbuo ei Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh zoux. Fiev daaih nyei leiz-latc bun mienh zuqc daic. Singx Lingh bun mienh maaih ziangh maengc.
2Corinthians3:7 Bun mienh zuqc daic nyei leiz-latc longc nzaangc ndingh jienv la'bieiv-benv. Bun leiz-latc wuov zanc
2Corinthians3:8 Hnangv naaic
2Corinthians3:9 Se gorngv bun mienh zuqc dingc zuiz wuov diuh jauv ndongc naaic maaih njang-laangc nor
2Corinthians3:10 Zinh ndaangc nyei njang-laangc ih zanc maiv njang-laangc aqv. Weic zuqc ih zanc maaih gauh njang jiex nyei njang-laangc ziux jienv aqv.
2Corinthians3:11 Se gorngv haih yiem douc baav wuov nyungc maaih njang-laangc nor
2Corinthians3:12 Yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor maaih lamh hnamv
2Corinthians3:13 Yie mbuo maiv hnangv Mose oix zuqc longc ndie buang hmien weic bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh maiv haih mangc ninh hmien nyei njang-laangc mitc jienv njiec.
2Corinthians3:14 Mv baac I^saa^laa^en Mienh hnyouv ngaengc haic. Taux ih hnoi ninh mbuo haaix zanc doqc Loz-Ngaengc Waac nyei Sou
2Corinthians3:15 Taux ih hnoi ninh mbuo haaix zanc doqc Mose nyei leiz-latc

2Corinthians6:12 Se gorngv maaih haaix diuc nqaeqv jienv se maiv zeiz yiem yie mbuo. Se yiem meih mbuo ganh nyei hnyouv.
2Corinthians6:13 Yie caux meih mbuo gorngv hnangv die caux ninh nyei fu'jueiv gorngv nor. Tov meih mbuo maeqv nqoi mba'nziu winh yie mbuo.
2Corinthians6:14 Sienx nyei mienh caux maiv sienx nyei mienh maiv dungx jiu doic. Kuv sic caux waaic sic hnangv haaix nor haih jiu tong? Njang caux hmuangx hnangv haaix nor haih juangc yiem?
2Corinthians6:15 Giduc caux Mbe^li^an hnangv haaix nor haih da'goih? Sienx nyei mienh caux maiv sienx nyei mienh maaih haaix nyungc juangc jienv nyei buonc?

2Corinthians7:4 Yie za'gengh bungx hnyouv caux meih mbuo gorngv yaac a'hneiv haic meih mbuo. Hnangv naaiv orn duqv yie nyei hnyouv haic. Yiem yie mbuo buangh zuqc nyei yietc zungv naanc zingh

2Corinthians7:11 Hnamv mangc gaax! Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor longc meih mbuo nyei you-nzauh tengx meih mbuo. Meih mbuo nyei you-nzauh bun meih mbuo jorm hnyouv
2Corinthians7:12 Weic naaiv maiv gunv yie fiev wuov zeiv fienx

2Corinthians7:16 Yie za'gengh orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc yie haih bungx hnyouv meih mbuo taux daauh.

2Corinthians8:6 Weic naaiv yie mbuo tov Tidatc
2Corinthians8:7 Meih mbuo yiem nyungc-nyungc maaih duqv nzoih
2Corinthians8:8 Yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se maiv zeiz weic hatc meih mbuo. Mv baac yie dorh jorm hnyouv wuov deix mienh nyei nyungc zeiv daaih seix mangc gaax
2Corinthians8:9 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei en. Maiv gunv ninh ndongc naaic butv zoih mv baac weic meih mbuo ninh benx mienh jomc mienh. Ninh benx mienh jomc mienh weic bun meih mbuo butv zoih.

2Corinthians8:15 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv nor
2Corinthians8:16 Yie mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh weic zuqc ninh bun Tidatc hnangv yie mbuo jorm hnyouv oix tengx meih mbuo.

2Corinthians8:18 Yie mbuo yaac paaiv dauh yiem zuangx jiu-baang maaih mengh dauh zunh kuv fienx nyei gorx-youz caux jienv Tidatc mingh.
2Corinthians8:19 Maiv daan naaiv hnangv

2Corinthians8:21 Yie mbuo nyei hnyouv kungx oix zoux duqv horpc
2Corinthians8:22 Yie mbuo aengx paaiv dauh gorx-youz caux Tidatc mbuo mingh. Naaiv dauh gorx-youz yie mbuo seix jiex camv-nzunc yaac buatc ninh zanc-zanc jorm hnyouv. Ih zanc ninh aengx gauh jorm weic zuqc ninh bungx duqv hnyouv meih mbuo.

2Corinthians8:24 Oix zuqc bun cing meih mbuo hnamv naaiv deix mienh ziouc bun zuangx jiu-baang hiuv duqv yie mbuo ceng meih mbuo wuov deix waac za'gengh zien nyei.
2Corinthians9:1 Yie maiv zeiz qiemx zuqc fiev fienx gorngv gapv nyaanh nzie Tin-Hungh nyei mienh
2Corinthians9:2 weic zuqc yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo zungv maaih hnyouv tengx. Yie ziouc ceng meih mbuo bun Maa^si^ndo^nie Mienh muangx. Yie mbuox ninh mbuo
2Corinthians9:3 Mv baac yie paaiv naaiv deix gorx-youz mingh meih mbuo naaic ndaangc weic zuqc maiv oix bun yie mbuo ceng meih mbuo wuov deix waac ndortv. Oix meih mbuo ziux yie gorngv nyei waac liuc leiz ziangx.
2Corinthians9:4 Maiv zei aeqv
2Corinthians9:5 Yie ziouc hnamv daaih horpc zuqc tov naaiv deix gorx-youz mingh meih mbuo naaic ndaangc
2Corinthians9:6 Jangx jienv oc. Haaix dauh zuangx zoqc ziouc siou duqv zoqc. Haaix dauh zuangx camv ziouc siou duqv camv.
2Corinthians9:7 Mouz dauh oix zuqc bun ziux ganh nyei hnyouv dingc oix bun nyei. Bun yaac oix zuqc buangv hnyouv
2Corinthians9:8 Tin-Hungh haih ceix nyungc-nyungc en camv-camv nyei bun meih mbuo. Meih mbuo ziouc zanc-zanc maaih gaux
2Corinthians9:9 Hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
2Corinthians9:10 Tin-Hungh ceix nyim bun zuangx nyei mienh yaac ceix hnaangx bun mienh nyanc. Ninh oix bun meih mbuo maaih nzoih meih mbuo qiemx longc nyei nyim
2Corinthians9:11 Ninh oix bun meih mbuo nyungc-nyungc maaih duqv nzoih
2Corinthians9:12 Weic zuqc meih mbuo gapv nyaanh nzie Tin-Hungh nyei mienh maiv daan tengx ninh mbuo duqv qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv hnangv
2Corinthians9:13 Meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gapv nyaanh nzie mienh
2Corinthians9:14 Ninh mbuo gengh! oix jangx haic meih mbuo
2Corinthians9:15 Mbuo oix zuqc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh weic ninh bun dongh liemh maiv maaih waac gorngv duqv taux nyei zingh nyeic.
2Corinthians10:1 Yie
2Corinthians10:2 tov! meih mbuo
2Corinthians10:3 Yie mbuo yiem baamh gen zeiz nyei
2Corinthians10:4 Yie mbuo longc nyei wuoqc ginc se maiv zeiz baamh gen nyei wuoqc ginc
2Corinthians10:5 caux ceng-hlo nyei nyungc-nyungc
2Corinthians10:6 Yie mbuo liuc leiz ziangx zuov meih mbuo gengh ei jienv yie mbuo nyei waac. Haaix dauh maiv muangx
2Corinthians10:7 Meih mbuo kungx mangc beih zaangc hnangv. Yiem meih mbuo naaic maaih haaix dauh funx ninh benx Giduc nyei mienh fai? Ninh oix zuqc aengx longx-longx nyei hnamv gaax
2Corinthians10:8 Ziouv ceix hatc maaz bun yie mbuo
2Corinthians10:9 Yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc maiv oix meih mbuo laaic yie fiev fienx haeqv meih mbuo.
2Corinthians10:10 Maaih deix mienh gorngv
2Corinthians10:11 Gorngv naaiv nyungc waac nyei mienh oix zuqc hiuv duqv
2Corinthians10:12 Yie mbuo maiv gaamv funx yie mbuo caux ceng ganh hlo wuov deix benx yietc horngh mienh
2Corinthians10:13 Yie mbuo maiv bungx waac-maux jiex ndaangc soux mouc. Kungx ziux Tin-Hungh dingc bun yie mbuo nyei deic-jaaix zoux nyei gong bungx waac-maux hnangv. Meih mbuo yaac yiem yie mbuo nyei deic-jaaix gu'nyuoz.
2Corinthians10:14 Yie mbuo mingh meih mbuo naaic
2Corinthians10:15 Yie mbuo maiv zeiz bungx waac-maux gorngv ganh deix mienh jiex ndaangc yie mbuo nyei deic-jaaix zoux nyei gong. Mv baac yie mbuo maaih lamh hnamv meih mbuo jaa sienx henv jienv faaux
2Corinthians10:16 yie mbuo ziouc haih zunh kuv fienx jiex ndaangc meih mbuo nyei deic-jaaix. Weic zuqc yie mbuo maiv oix zorqv ganh laanh mienh yiem nyei deic-jaaix zoux liuz nyei gong bungx waac-maux.
2Corinthians10:17 Mv baac hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
2Corinthians10:18 Weic zuqc ceng ganh nyei mienh maiv zic duqv taaih. Zic duqv taaih nyei se dongh Ziouv ceng wuov dauh.
2Corinthians11:1 Yie tov meih mbuo longc noic diev jienv muangx yie gorngv deix baav ga'naaiv-hngongx waac. Mv baac meih mbuo zungv diev jienv nyei.
2Corinthians11:2 Yie nzaeng jienv meih mbuo hnangv Tin-Hungh nzaeng jienv meih mbuo nor
2Corinthians11:3 Mv baac yie nzauh heix Haawaa hnangv haaix nor zuqc naang longc guv guaix nyei sic nduov
2Corinthians11:4 Weic zuqc haaix dauh mingh meih mbuo naaic zunh ganh dauh Yesu
2Corinthians11:5 Yie hnamv daaih yie maiv zeiz gauh faix yietc deix wuov deix domh gong-zoh.
2Corinthians11:6 Maiv gunv yie maiv haih gorngv waac mbiaangc
2Corinthians11:7 Yie zunh Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx bun meih mbuo muangx yaac maiv heuc meih mbuo cuotv fin-kouv. Yie yaac zatv ganh zoux faix weic bouh meih mbuo faaux. Hnangv naaiv zoux
2Corinthians11:8 Yie yiem meih mbuo naaic zoux gong nyei ziangh hoc maaih ganh deix jiu-baang juang yie. Naaiv se hnangv yie luv ganh deix jiu-baang nyei nyaanh weic tengx meih mbuo nor.
2Corinthians11:9 Yie caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc
2Corinthians11:10 Yie maaih Giduc nyei zien leiz yiem yie nyei hnyouv ziouc gaamv gorngv
2Corinthians11:11 Yie weic haaix diuc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv? Yie maiv hnamv meih mbuo fai? Tin-Hungh hiuv duqv yie hnamv meih mbuo nyei.
2Corinthians11:12 Yie ih zanc hnangv haaix nor zoux
2Corinthians11:13 Wuov deix mienh zoux jaav gong-zoh
2Corinthians11:14 Mv baac naaiv maiv zeiz mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Liemh Saadaan yaac haih goiv nyungc zeiv zoux hnangv dauh njang-laangc nyei fin-mienh.
2Corinthians11:15 Hnangv naaic
2Corinthians11:16 Yie aengx gorngv nzunc
2Corinthians11:17 Yie ih zanc gorngv naaiv deix waac se maiv zeiz ei Ziouv Yesu oix yie gorngv. Se hnangv mienh hngongx mienh bungx waac-maux ceng ganh.
2Corinthians11:18 Weic zuqc maaih mienh camv nyei ei baamh mienh nyei eix bungx waac-maux
2Corinthians11:19 Meih mbuo cong-mengh haic cingx daaih a'hneiv diev jienv muangx mienh hngongx mienh.
2Corinthians11:20 Weic zuqc haaix dauh aapv meih mbuo bouc ninh
2Corinthians11:21 Yie nyaiv haic oix zuqc nyiemc yie mbuo daamv faix
2Corinthians11:22 Ninh mbuo zoux Hipv^lu Mienh fai? Yie yaac zeiz nyei. Ninh mbuo zoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh fai? Yie yaac zeiz. Ninh mbuo zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun fai? Yie yaac zeiz.
2Corinthians11:23 Ninh mbuo zoux Giduc nyei bou fai? Yie corc zoux bou gauh longx ninh mbuo. (Yie gorngv hnangv butv ndin mienh nyei waac nor.) Yie zoux gong gauh kouv
2Corinthians11:24 Yie zuqc Yiutai Mienh longc biaav-bin mborqv biaa nzunc
2Corinthians11:25 Yie zuqc Lomaa Janx longc biaav mborqv buo nzunc. Yie zuqc mienh longc la'bieiv zong yietc nzunc. Yie yiem nzangv zuqc nzangv waaic zemh buo nzunc. Aengx maaih nzunc yie mbiouh jienv koiv-minc yietc hnoi yietc muonz.
2Corinthians11:26 Yie zanc-zanc oix zuqc cuotv jauv mingh
2Corinthians11:27 Yie zoux gong kouv
2Corinthians11:28 Maiv daan naaiv deix sic hnangv. Yie hnoi-hnoi weic zuangx jiu-baang guaax hnyouv hnangv hniev nyei ga'naaiv ngatv jienv yie nor.
2Corinthians11:29 Maaih haaix dauh mau
2Corinthians11:30 Se gorngv yie oix zuqc bungx waac-maux
2Corinthians11:31 Ziouv Yesu nyei Die
2Corinthians11:32 Yie yiem Ndaa^matv^gatc Zingh wuov zanc
2Corinthians11:33 Mv baac maaih deix mienh longc domh mbaatc bungx yie gan zingh laatc nyei fong muonh njiec
2Corinthians12:1 Yie oix zuqc bungx waac-maux
2Corinthians12:2 Yie hiuv duqv dauh Giduc Mienh
2Corinthians12:3 Yie hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zipv naaic dauh mienh mingh orn-lorqc huingx mv baac yie aengx gorngv
2Corinthians12:4 Yiem wuov ninh haiz dongh baamh mienh liemh maiv maaih waac gorngv yaac gorngv maiv duqv nyei waac.
2Corinthians12:5 Yie oix weic naaiv dauh mienh bungx waac-maux mv baac weic yie ganh yie maiv bungx waac-maux
2Corinthians12:6 Se gorngv yie oix bungx waac-maux
2Corinthians12:7 Weic zuqc yie duqv buatc laauc yaangh nyei sic ndongc naaic camv
2Corinthians12:8 Weic naaiv deix sic yie daux gaux buo nzunc tov Ziouv zorqv naaiv diuh ceix cuotv yie nyei sin mingh.
2Corinthians12:9 Mv baac Ziouv dau yie
2Corinthians12:10 Yie ziouc weic Giduc buangv hnyouv diev mau
2Corinthians12:11 Yie bungx naaiv deix waac-maux yie zoux hnangv mienh hngongx mienh nor
2Corinthians12:12 Yie yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx longc nyungc-nyungc noic yaac zoux jangx-hoc
2Corinthians12:13 Yie kuei zuqc meih mbuo
2Corinthians12:14 Ih zanc yie mbenc ziangx mingh meih mbuo naaic da'faam nzunc. Yie mingh yaac maiv oix feix luic meih mbuo haaix nyungc. Yie oix longc nyei se meih mbuo ganh
2Corinthians12:15 Yie a'hneiv longc yie maaih nyei nyungc-nyungc yaac longc yie ganh weic tengx meih mbuo. Yie yietc zei hnamv meih mbuo
2Corinthians12:16 Hnangv haaix yaac baac
2Corinthians12:17 Yie hnangv haaix nor nduov meih mbuo? Yie paaiv mienh mingh meih mbuo naaic
2Corinthians12:18 Yie tov Tidatc mingh meih mbuo naaic aengx paaiv ganh dauh gorx-youz caux jienv ninh mingh. Tidatc zoux kuei meih mbuo fai? Ninh caux yie maiv zeiz dongh diuc eix yaac caux yie zoux fih hnangv nyei fai?
2Corinthians12:19 Nziex meih mbuo zanc-zanc laaic yie mbuo kungx doix meih mbuo gorngv naaiv deix waac jaiv sin hnangv. Zungv maiv zeiz. Yie mbuo yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien gorngv hnangv Giduc oix yie mbuo gorngv nor. Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
2Corinthians12:20 Yie nzauh heix yie mingh taux nyei ziangh hoc ziouc buatc meih mbuo ganh nyungc
2Corinthians12:21 Yie nzauh heix yie aengx taux meih mbuo naaic
2Corinthians13:1 Naaiv se yie oix mingh meih mbuo naaic da'faam nzunc. Ging-Sou gorngv
2Corinthians13:2 Yie donv jiex zinh ndaangc baamz zuiz wuov deix caux zuangx mienh. Ih zanc yie maiv caux meih mbuo yiem naaic
2Corinthians13:3 Hnangv naaic
2Corinthians13:4 Maiv gunv Giduc weic mau zuqc ding ziepc nzaangc jaax
2Corinthians13:5 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zaah ganh mangc gaax
2Corinthians13:6 Yie sienx meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie mbuo yaac kauv duqv nyei.
2Corinthians13:7 Yie mbuo daux gaux tengx meih mbuo tov Tin-Hungh
2Corinthians13:8 Yie mbuo maiv haih zoux haaix nyungc zaeqv zien leiz
2Corinthians13:9 Yie mbuo haaix zanc mau
2Corinthians13:10 Weic naaiv yie maiv caux meih mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc yie cingx fiev naaiv zeiv fienx. Zuov yie taux meih mbuo naaic yie ziouc maiv zuqc longc Ziouv bun yie nyei hatc maaz hniev-hniev nyei mbenc meih mbuo nyei sic. Ziouv bun yie nyei hatc maaz se weic ceix meih mbuo
2Corinthians13:11 Setv mueiz yie aengx maaih deix waac. Zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Corinthians13:12 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux hnyouv cing-nzengc
2Corinthians13:13 Sienx Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh jangx taux meih mbuo.
2Corinthians13:14 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo zuangx mienh. Tov bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh hnamv meih mbuo
Galatians1:1 Yie
Galatians1:2 Yie caux yiem naaiv nyei gorx-youz fiev fienx bun meih mbuo Gaa^laa^tie Saengv nyei zuangx jiu-baang.
Galatians1:3 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo.
Galatians1:4 Giduc weic mbuo nyei zuiz siev ninh ganh nyei maengc weic njoux mbuo leih ndutv naaiv hiuang orqv nyei lungh ndiev. Naaiv se ei mbuo nyei Die
Galatians1:5 Oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng Tin-Hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen.
Galatians1:6 Yie mbuoqc horngh haic meih mbuo guangc longc Giduc nyei en heuc meih mbuo daaih wuov dauh ndongc naaic siepv
Galatians1:7 Zungv maiv maaih ganh nyungc kuv fienx. Yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc maaih deix mienh jiuv lunc meih mbuo
Galatians1:8 Maiv gunv yie mbuo fai yiem tin-dorngh daaih nyei fin-mienh zunh ganh nyungc kuv fienx
Galatians1:9 Yie mbuo zungv gorngv jiex nyei
Galatians1:10 Yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se oix duqv mienh ceng yie fai oix bun Tin-Hungh ceng? Yie oix zoux bun mienh a'hneiv yie fai? Se gorngv yie corc oix zoux bun mienh a'hneiv nor
Galatians1:11 Gorx-youz aac
Galatians1:12 Naaiv kuv fienx yie maiv zeiz yiem haaix laanh mienh zipv daaih
Galatians1:13 Meih mbuo haiz jiex yie zinh ndaangc gan longx Yiutai Mienh sienx nyei jauv wuov zanc
Galatians1:14 Caux yie dongh baan Yiutai Mienh
Galatians1:15 Mv baac yie maiv gaengh cuotv seix wuov zanc
Galatians1:16 zorqv ninh nyei Dorn laauc yaangh weic bun yie zunh ninh nyei Dorn nyei kuv fienx bun maanc fingx Janx muangx. Wuov zanc yie maiv caux haaix dauh baamh mienh caangh laangh.
Galatians1:17 Yie yaac maiv mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh lorz dongh zoux gong-zoh ndaangc yie wuov deix. Yie siepv-siepv nyei mingh Aa^laa^mbie Deic-Bung
Galatians1:18 Jiex liuz buo hnyangx yie cingx daaih mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh lorz Bide yaac caux ninh yiem wuov ziepc hmz hnoi.
Galatians1:19 Mv baac cuotv liuz Ziouv nyei youz
Galatians1:20 (Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh mbuox meih mbuo
Galatians1:21 Nqa'haav yie aengx mingh Silie caux Si^li^sie Deic nyei horngc zaangc.
Galatians1:22 Wuov zanc yiem Yu^ndie Saengv zuangx jiu-baang nyei Giduc Mienh maiv buatc jiex yie.
Galatians1:23 Ninh mbuo kungx haiz mienh gorngv
Galatians1:24 Hnangv naaic
Galatians2:1 Nqa'haav ziepc feix hnyangx yie caux Mbaa^naa^mbatc aengx mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh yaac dorh Tidatc caux jienv mingh.
Galatians2:2 Yie mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem weic zuqc Tin-Hungh laauc yaangh bun yie hiuv duqv oix zuqc mingh. Yiem wuov yie zorqv yie zunh bun Janx nyei kuv fienx lengc jeiv gorngv mengh mbuox zoux hlo wuov deix muangx. Yie hnangv naaiv zoux weic zuqc nzauh heix yie zinh ndaangc zoux nyei gong caux ih zanc zoux nyei gong ndortv.
Galatians2:3 Tidatc yaac caux yie mingh. Maiv gunv ninh se Janx-Gikc
Galatians2:4 hnangv maaih deix jaav gorx-youz oix ninh jiex nor. Naaiv deix mienh bingx jienv bieqc daaih weic zaah mangc gaax
Galatians2:5 Mv baac yie mbuo oix weic meih mbuo beu jienv kuv fienx nyei zien leiz ziouc ngaengc jienv
Galatians2:6 Aengx maaih dongh buatc hnangv zoux hlo nyei wuov deix. (Ninh mbuo zoux jiex haaix nyungc mienh yie maiv gunv aqv
Galatians2:7 Daaux nzuonx ninh mbuo zieqv duqv Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zunh kuv fienx bun Janx hnangv ninh paaiv Bide zunh kuv fienx bun Yiutai Mienh wuov nor.
Galatians2:8 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh yiem yie nyei hnyouv zoux gong bun yie zoux gong-zoh tengx maanc fingx Janx hnangv bun Bide zoux gong-zoh tengx Yiutai Mienh wuov nor.
Galatians2:9 Yaagorpc
Galatians2:10 Ninh mbuo kungx oix yie mbuo jangx jienv mienh jomc mienh. Naaiv deix jauv yie m'daaih maaih hnyouv zoux aqv.
Galatians2:11 Bide daaih taux An^ti^okc Zingh wuov zanc
Galatians2:12 Yaagorpc paaiv daaih nyei mienh maiv gaengh taux
Galatians2:13 Yiem wuov sienx Yesu nyei Yiutai Mienh ziouc gan jienv Bide zoux jaav. Liemh Mbaa^naa^mbatc yaac gan jienv ninh mbuo fih hnangv nyei zoux.
Galatians2:14 Yie buatc ninh mbuo yangh maiv ziangx kuv fienx nyei zien leiz ziouc dorng jienv zuangx mienh mbuox Bide
Galatians2:15 “Yie mbuo cuotv seix daaih zoux Yiutai Mienh
Galatians2:16 Mv baac yie mbuo hiuv duqv mienh maiv zeiz gan leiz-latc cingx duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv
Galatians2:17 “Se gorngv yie mbuo qaqv lorz oix kaux Giduc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv mv baac corc zoux zuiz-mienh nor
Galatians2:18 Se gorngv yie aengx ceix jiez dongh zinh ndaangc yie caeqv guangc nyei
Galatians2:19 Gorngv taux leiz-latc nor
Galatians2:20 Yie caux Giduc juangc ding ziepc nzaangc jaax daic cingx daaih ih zanc ziangh jienv wuov dauh se maiv zeiz yie
Galatians2:21 Yie maiv nqemh Tin-Hungh nyei en. Se gorngv mienh haih gan leiz-latc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv nor
Galatians3:1 Meih mbuo hngongx haic nyei Gaa^laa^tie Mienh aah! Haaix dauh zoux faatv nduov meih mbuo hnamv dorngc? Yie mengh mengh nyei gorngv Yesu Giduc yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax daic nyei jauv
Galatians3:2 Yie oix meih mbuo mbuox yietc nyungc yie. Meih mbuo zipv Singx Lingh se weic meih mbuo ei jienv leiz-latc zoux fai weic meih mbuo haiz kuv fienx ziouc sienx?
Galatians3:3 Meih mbuo fungc ndongc naaic hngongx? Meih mbuo longc Singx Lingh jiez ziangx gorn
Galatians3:4 Meih mbuo siouc kouv ndongc naaic camv se maiv lamh longc fai? Ndongc haaix maaih lamh longc nyei saah?
Galatians3:5 Tin-Hungh bun Singx Lingh meih mbuo yaac yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic se weic meih mbuo ei jienv leiz-latc zoux fai weic meih mbuo haiz kuv fienx ziouc sienx?
Galatians3:6 Hnamv mangc gaax Apc^laa^ham! “Ninh sienx Tin-Hungh
Galatians3:7 Wuov nyungc
Galatians3:8 Ging-Sou jaa-ndaangc hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh oix bun Janx weic sienx ninh duqv caux ninh horpc hnyouv. Ging-Sou ziouc jaa-ndaangc zunh kuv fienx mbuox Apc^laa^ham
Galatians3:9 Apc^laa^ham sienx Tin-Hungh
Galatians3:10 Da'faanh kaux leiz-latc nyei mienh zuqc zioux
Galatians3:11 Hnangv naaic buatc duqv mengh nyei. Ei Tin-Hungh mangc
Galatians3:12 Mv baac leiz-latc maiv bangc sienx fim zoux gorn-ndoqv. Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv
Galatians3:13 Leiz-latc bun mbuo zuqc zioux mv baac Giduc zuqc zioux div mbuo ziouc zuoqc mbuo leih ndutv leiz-latc. Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv
Galatians3:14 Giduc Yesu hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic bun Janx haih sienx ninh ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv hnangv ninh ceix fuqv bun Apc^laa^ham wuov nor. Hnangv naaic bun mbuo weic sienx Giduc ziouc duqv zipv Tin-Hungh laengz bun nyei Singx Lingh.
Galatians3:15 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Galatians3:16 Tin-Hungh laengz ziangx waac bun Apc^laa^ham caux ninh nyei zeiv-fun. Gorngv “zeiv-fun” wuov joux waac
Galatians3:17 Yie nyei eix leiz se hnangv naaiv. Tin-Hungh liepc ziangx ngaengc waac yaac laengz ei jienv ngaengc waac zoux. Nqa'haav feix baeqv faah ziepc hnyangx Tin-Hungh liepc leiz-latc daaih
Galatians3:18 Se gorngv oix zuqc kaux leiz-latc cingx duqv nzipc Tin-Hungh oix ceix bun nyei nor
Galatians3:19 Wuov nyungc
Galatians3:20 Zoux mbu'ndongx mienh maiv zeiz kungx tengx yietc bung hnangv. Mv baac Tin-Hungh benx yietc dauh.
Galatians3:21 Hnangv naaic
Galatians3:22 Mv baac Ging-Sou gorngv lungh ndiev mienh zuqc zuiz nyei qaqv gunv weic bun sienx Yesu Giduc wuov deix haih duqv Tin-Hungh laengz ceix bun nyei. Ninh mbuo duqv daaih se weic ninh mbuo sienx.
Galatians3:23 Mienh sienx Giduc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux
Galatians3:24 Hnangv naaic
Galatians3:25 Ih zanc sienx Giduc nyei ziangh hoc taux
Galatians3:26 Meih mbuo yietc zungv weic sienx Giduc Yesu duqv zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz.
Galatians3:27 Meih mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz duqv caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh
Galatians3:28 Weic naaiv Yiutai Mienh fai Janx maiv ganh nyungc
Galatians3:29 Se gorngv meih mbuo benx Giduc nyei
Galatians4:1 Yie gorngv nyei eix leiz se hnangv naaiv
Galatians4:2 Hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc
Galatians4:3 Mbuo fih hnangv nyei. Zoux fu'jueiv nyei ziangh hoc mbuo yiem gunv lungh ndiev wuov deix mienv nyei buoz-ndiev zuqc zoux nouh.
Galatians4:4 Mv baac taux ziangh hoc buangv
Galatians4:5 weic zuoqc yiem leiz-latc ga'ndiev nyei mienh nzuonx
Galatians4:6 Weic zuqc meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz
Galatians4:7 Hnangv naaic
Galatians4:8 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo maiv gaengh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei ziangh hoc
Galatians4:9 Mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh
Galatians4:10 Meih mbuo gan duqv jienv dingc daaih nyei hnoi
Galatians4:11 Yie tengx meih mbuo nzauh haic. Nziex yie weic meih mbuo zoux nyei gong zoux maiv cuotv haaix nyungc.
Galatians4:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Galatians4:13 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv zunh daauh nzunc kuv fienx bun meih mbuo muangx wuov zanc se weic zuqc yie nyei sin zaangc daaix jienv baengc.
Galatians4:14 Mv baac maiv gunv yie nyei baengc hoic meih mbuo kouv
Galatians4:15 Wuov zanc meih mbuo orn-lorqc haic. Ih zanc meih mbuo nyei orn-lorqc jiex haaix mi'aqv? Yie ganh haih tengx meih mbuo zoux zorng-zengx
Galatians4:16 Laaix yie gorngv zien leiz mbuox meih mbuo
Galatians4:17 Wuov deix mienh jorm hnyouv caux meih mbuo zoux longx mv baac maiv zeiz oix tengx meih mbuo duqv longx. Ninh mbuo oix caeqv nqoi meih mbuo
Galatians4:18 Jorm hnyouv caux mienh zoux longx se horpc nyei
Galatians4:19 Yie hnamv haic nyei fu'jueiv aah! Yie weic meih mbuo hnyouv mun hnangv m'sieqv dorn mun gu'nguaaz nor
Galatians4:20 Feix duqv yie ih zanc duqv caux meih mbuo yiem
Galatians4:21 Oix yiem leiz-latc ga'ndiev nyei mienh aah! Leiz-latc hnangv haaix nor gorngv meih mbuo maiv haiz fai? Mbuox yie maah!
Galatians4:22 Leiz-Latc Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Galatians4:23 Nouh beiz yungz nyei dorn se hnangv pou-tong mienh yungz nyei. Mv baac bungx nqoi wuov dauh nyei
Galatians4:24 Naaiv deix sic mbuo haih longc zoux waac-beiv. Wuov deix i dauh m'sieqv dorn beiv i nyungc ngaengc waac. Maaih dauh beiv yiem Sinaai Mbong liepc daaih nyei ngaengc waac. Naaiv dauh se Haagaa. Yungz daaih nyei fu'jueiv zoux nouh.
Galatians4:25 Haagaa beiv yiem Aa^laa^mbie Deic-Bung nyei Sinaai Mbong yaac beiv ih jaax hnoi nyei Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh
Galatians4:26 Mv baac yiem gu'nguaaic nyei Ye^lu^saa^lem se bungx nqoi nyei
Galatians4:27 weic zuqc Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Galatians4:28 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Galatians4:29 Wuov zanc pou-tong mienh yungz nyei wuov dauh dorn zoux doqc bun ei Singx Lingh yungz daaih wuov dauh. Ih zanc yaac fih hnangv nyei.
Galatians4:30 Mv baac Ging-Sou hnangv haaix nor gorngv? Ging-Sou gorngv
Galatians4:31 Gorx-youz aac
Galatians5:1 Weic bun mbuo zoux bungx nqoi nyei mienh
Galatians5:2 Muangx longx oc. Yie
Galatians5:3 Yie aengx mbuox dauh dauh gan jiex gaatv nyei leiz nyei mienh
Galatians5:4 Meih mbuo oix gan leiz-latc duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo leih ndutv Giduc mi'aqv
Galatians5:5 Mv baac mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv
Galatians5:6 Weic zuqc mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh
Galatians5:7 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo sienx duqv longx. Haaix dauh dangv jienv meih mbuo
Galatians5:8 Nduov meih mbuo se maiv zeiz Tin-Hungh
Galatians5:9 Maaih waac gorngv
Galatians5:10 Mv baac yie kaux Ziouv sienx dingc meih mbuo caux yie maiv oix maaih ganh nyungc hnyouv. Jiuv lunc meih mbuo wuov dauh
Galatians5:11 Gorx-youz aac
Galatians5:12 Feix duqv jiuv lunc meih mbuo wuov deix mienh maiv daan jiex gaatv hnangv
Galatians5:13 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Galatians5:14 weic zuqc leiz-latc yietc zungv nzutv zunv juangc diuh
Galatians5:15 Se gorngv meih mbuo zoux hnangv hieh zoih
Galatians5:16 Yie gorngv nyei eix leiz se hnangv naaiv. Oix zuqc bun Singx Lingh dorh meih mbuo. Maiv dungx ei ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux.
Galatians5:17 Mienh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux nyei se maiv doix Singx Lingh oix zoux nyei. Singx Lingh oix zoux nyei yaac maiv doix mienh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux. Naaiv deix i nyungc zoux win-wangv cingx daaih meih mbuo oix zoux nyei
Galatians5:18 Mv baac se gorngv Singx Lingh dorh meih mbuo
Galatians5:19 Mienh ei ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux se buatc duqv mengh nyei hnangv naaiv. Zoux buangh liouh nyei sic
Galatians5:20 baaix miuc-fangx
Galatians5:21 hanc mienh
Galatians5:22 Mv baac Singx Lingh bun nyei se
Galatians5:23 zoux hnyouv suonc
Galatians5:24 Za'gengh zoux Giduc Yesu nyei mienh wuov deix
Galatians5:25 Mbuo kaux Singx Lingh ziangh jienv
Galatians5:26 Maiv dungx taaih ganh hlo
Galatians6:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Galatians6:2 Haaix dauh maaih haaix nyungc sic oix zuqc laanh tengx laanh ndaam. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo ziouc ei jienv Giduc nyei lingc zoux.
Galatians6:3 Haaix dauh maiv zeiz longc jienv nyei mienh mv baac taaih ganh zoux longc jienv nyei mienh nor
Galatians6:4 Gorqv-mienh oix zuqc zaah ganh zoux nyei sic. Zoux duqv longx
Galatians6:5 Weic zuqc gorqv-mienh maaih gorqv-mienh nyei buonc oix zuqc ndaam.
Galatians6:6 Haaix dauh duqv mienh njaaux Giduc nyei doz
Galatians6:7 Maiv dungx nduov ganh. Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih nduov duqv Tin-Hungh. Mienh zuangx haaix nyungc ziouc siou duqv wuov nyungc.
Galatians6:8 Se gorngv mienh sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux se hnangv zuangx nyim njiec ndau nor
Galatians6:9 Zoux kuv sic
Galatians6:10 Hnangv naaic
Galatians6:11 Meih mbuo mangc gaax! Yie longc yie ganh nyei buoz fiev nzaangc ndongc naaiv hlo bun meih mbuo.
Galatians6:12 Dongh oix douh ganh duqv hmien-minc wuov deix oix aapv meih mbuo jiex gaatv nyei leiz. Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux se weic zuqc maiv oix weic Giduc nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax zuqc mienh zoux doqc ninh mbuo.
Galatians6:13 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo ganh jiex gaatv nyei leiz
Galatians6:14 Mv baac yie ganh zungv maiv oix bungx waac-maux
Galatians6:15 Jiex gaatv nyei leiz fai maiv jiex se maiv longc jienv. Longc jienv nyei se zoux siang-zeix daaih nyei mienh.
Galatians6:16 Tov Tin-Hungh ceix baengh orn yaac korv-lienh yietc zungv gan naaiv nyungc leiz nyei mienh
Galatians6:17 Setv mueiz yie oix gorngv
Galatians6:18 Gorx-youz aac
Ephesians1:1 Yie
Ephesians1:2 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo.
Ephesians1:3 Ceng mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei Die
Ephesians1:4 Yiem maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc
Ephesians1:5 Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo ziouc jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx longc Yesu Giduc bun mbuo benx ninh nyei naamh nyouz. Naaiv se ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix yaac horpc ninh nyei hnyouv.
Ephesians1:6 Mbuo oix zuqc ceng Tin-Hungh weic ninh hlo haic nyei en
Ephesians1:7 Mbuo kaux Giduc nyei nziaamv zuoqc mbuo nzuonx daaih
Ephesians1:8 dongh ninh ei ninh nyei cong-mengh caux ninh hiuv maanc sic camv-camv nyei ceix bun mbuo.
Ephesians1:9 Tin-Hungh bun mbuo hiuv duqv ninh jaa-ndaangc dingc longc Giduc zoux ziangx nyei za'eix
Ephesians1:10 Ninh nyei za'eix se hnangv naaiv. Zuov dingc daaih nyei nyutc zeiv buangv
Ephesians1:11 Yietc zungv sic cuotv daaih ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix yaac ei ninh dingc ziangx. Tin-Hungh weic ninh ganh nyei za'eix ginv mbuo
Ephesians1:12 Weic naaiv
Ephesians1:13 Meih mbuo haiz zien leiz nyei doz wuov zanc
Ephesians1:14 Singx Lingh zoux hnangv dingc-zinh dingc jienv mbuo
Ephesians1:15 Weic naaiv
Ephesians1:16 yie maiv dingh liouh nyei weic meih mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Haaix zanc daux gaux yaac jangx taux meih mbuo.
Ephesians1:17 Yie tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei Tin-Hungh
Ephesians1:18 Yie tov Zaangc Diex koi nqoi meih mbuo nyei hnyouv bun meih mbuo haih hiuv duqv ninh nyei njang
Ephesians1:19 yaac bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv ninh nyei qaqv weic mbuo sienx ninh nyei mienh za'gengh hlo haic. Naaiv nyungc qaqv se fih hnangv
Ephesians1:20 Giduc daic mingh mv baac Tin-Hungh longc bun Giduc nangh daaih yaac bun yiem tin-dorngh zueiz jienv ninh nyei mbiaauc maengx wuov nyungc domh qaqv.
Ephesians1:21 Ninh bun Giduc zungv gauh hlang jiex yietc zuangx gunv ndaamv-lungh nyei
Ephesians1:22 Tin-Hungh yaac zorqv maanc muotc hietv Giduc nyei zaux-ndiev
Ephesians1:23 Jiu-baang se Giduc nyei sin yaac zoux bun Giduc dunh yunh nzengc. Giduc se dongh bun nyungc-nyungc dunh yunh nzengc wuov dauh.
Ephesians2:1 Zinh ndaangc laaix meih mbuo maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac yaac baamz zuiz
Ephesians2:2 Wuov zanc meih mbuo kungx gan baamh gen orqv haic nyei za'eix hnangv. Meih mbuo muangx gunv ndaamv-lungh wuov dauh
Ephesians2:3 Zinh ndaangc mbuo yietc zungv yiem wuov deix mienh mbu'ndongx kungx ei mbuo nyei hnyouv hanc zoux
Ephesians2:4 Mv baac Tin-Hungh za'gengh korv-lienh haic mienh yaac ndongc naaic hnamv mbuo
Ephesians2:5 maiv gunv mbuo laaix maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac dorngx daic mi'aqv
Ephesians2:6 Tin-Hungh bun mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc nangh daaih yaac caux ninh zueiz jienv wuov tin-dorngh.
Ephesians2:7 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv zoux weic nqa'haav gitv-gitv lungh ndiev ninh haih biux mengh ninh hlo! haic nyei en
Ephesians2:8 Meih mbuo duqv njoux se weic Tin-Hungh nyei en
Ephesians2:9 Mienh duqv njoux se maiv zeiz kaux ganh zoux nyei sic
Ephesians2:10 Se Tin-Hungh nyei buoz-dauh zeix mbuo daaih
Ephesians2:11 Meih mbuo oix zuqc jangx jienv meih mbuo zinh ndaangc hnangv haaix nor. Meih mbuo cuotv seix daaih m'daaih Janx
Ephesians2:12 Oix zuqc jangx jienv
Ephesians2:13 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo leih Tin-Hungh go mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo kaux Giduc Yesu nyei nziaamv duqv nitv fatv Tin-Hungh.
Ephesians2:14 Weic zuqc Giduc ganh bun i bung horpc hnyouv daaih
Ephesians2:15 Ninh longc ninh ganh nyei sin guangc Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-latc
Ephesians2:16 Yesu yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax daic weic mietc nzengc ninh mbuo i bung nyei win
Ephesians2:17 Giduc daaih zunh baengh orn nyei kuv fienx mbuox meih mbuo
Ephesians2:18 Weic zuqc Giduc bun mbuo yietc zungv
Ephesians2:19 Hnangv naaic
Ephesians2:20 Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo bangc zuangx gong-zoh caux Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh liepc daaih nyei gorn-ndoqv ceix jiez daaih. Giduc Yesu ganh zoux biauv-gorqv gauh longc jienv jiex wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv.
Ephesians2:21 Giduc bun wuov norm biauv nyei nyungc-nyungc bangc ninh daaux jienv
Ephesians2:22 Meih mbuo kaux ninh ziouc duqv caux yietc zungv kaux ninh nyei mienh ceix jiez benx norm Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh yiem nyei dorngx.
Ephesians3:1 Weic naaiv yie
Ephesians3:2 Yie hnamv daaih meih mbuo zungv haiz gorngv Tin-Hungh ceix en bun yie maaih naaiv nyungc gong zoux weic tengx meih mbuo Janx.
Ephesians3:3 Tin-Hungh laauc yaangh ninh maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei za'eix bun yie hiuv
Ephesians3:4 Meih mbuo doqc liuz wuov deix waac meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie hnangv haaix nor bieqc hnyouv gorngv taux Giduc naaiv deix mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic.
Ephesians3:5 Zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh maiv bun mienh hiuv naaiv deix sic mv baac ih zanc ninh longc Singx Lingh laauc yaangh bun ninh nyei cing-nzengc gong-zoh caux douc waac mienh hiuv.
Ephesians3:6 Se hnangv naaiv. Kuv fienx bun Janx maaih buonc juangc Tin-Hungh laengz bun Yiutai Mienh siouc nyei jaa-dingh
Ephesians3:7 Yie duqv zoux naaiv kuv fienx nyei bou se weic Tin-Hungh nyei en-zingh hnangv
Ephesians3:8 Beiv Tin-Hungh nyei yietc zungv mienh
Ephesians3:9 Yie yaac gorngv mengh bun zuangx mienh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zinh ndaangc maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei za'eix hnangv haaix nor zoux ziangx. Zinh ndaangc yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau daaih
Ephesians3:10 Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh oix longc jiu-baang bun yiem ndaamv-lungh maaih lingc maaih qaqv nyei wuov deix hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei nyungc-nyungc cong-mengh.
Ephesians3:11 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor zoux se ei ninh yietc liuz nyei za'eix
Ephesians3:12 Mbuo sienx Giduc
Ephesians3:13 Hnangv naaic
Ephesians3:14 Weic naaiv yie gueic njiec Zaangc Diex nyei nza'hmien
Ephesians3:15 yiem tin-dorngh caux yiem baamh gen maiv gunv haaix fingx haaix nyungc mienh
Ephesians3:16 Yie tov Zaangc Diex ei ninh hlo haic nyei domh njang-laangc longc ninh nyei Singx Lingh ceix qaqv bun meih mbuo nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz henv jiez daaih.
Ephesians3:17 Yaac tov Giduc
Ephesians3:18 Hnangv naaic
Ephesians3:19 Yie tov Zaangc Diex bun meih mbuo mengh baeqc Giduc hnamv meih mbuo ndongc haaix camv
Ephesians3:20 Tin-Hungh
Ephesians3:21 Yie ziouc tov ninh longc Giduc Yesu yiem jiu-baang bun mienh yietc liuz ceng ninh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen.
Ephesians4:1 Yie
Ephesians4:2 Oix zuqc yiem maanc sic nyiemc ganh zoux faix
Ephesians4:3 Oix zuqc longc hnyouv laanh caux laanh baengh orn nyei yiem weic beu jienv Singx Lingh ceix bun horpc fim dongh eix nyei hnyouv.
Ephesians4:4 Maaih nduqc norm sin yaac maaih nduqc dauh Singx Lingh
Ephesians4:5 Maaih nduqc dauh Ziouv
Ephesians4:6 Yaac maaih nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh
Ephesians4:7 Mbuo gorqv-mienh duqv nyei en se ziux Giduc ganh bun nqoi zingh nyeic gorqv-mienh.
Ephesians4:8 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
Ephesians4:9 “Ninh faaux hlang” wuov joux waac nyei eix leiz hnangv haaix nor? Eix leiz se ninh njiec taux baamh gen gauh aiv nyei dorngx ndaangc.
Ephesians4:10 Njiec daaih wuov dauh se dongh faaux gu'nguaaic zungv gauh hlang jiex zuangx lungh weic yiem buangv maanc muotc wuov dauh.
Ephesians4:11 Dongh naaiv dauh fungx zingh nyeic bun maanc mienh. Maaih deix duqv zingh nyeic zoux gong-zoh. Maaih deix duqv zoux douc waac mienh
Ephesians4:12 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic liuc leiz ziangx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zoux Giduc nyei gong weic ceix jiez Giduc nyei sin.
Ephesians4:13 Zuov taux mbuo yietc zungv dongh diuc hnyouv sienx longx
Ephesians4:14 Taux wuov zanc mbuo ziouc maiv zeiz fu'jueiv aqv. Maiv zuqc guv guaix nyei mienh njaaux naaiv njaaux wuov nduov mbuo hnangv zuqc nziaaux buonc mingh buonc daaih
Ephesians4:15 Daaux nzuonx
Ephesians4:16 Giduc gunv jienv sin zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc
Ephesians4:17 Weic naaiv yie dengv Ziouv Yesu nyei mbuox kuinx meih mbuo
Ephesians4:18 Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv hmuangx
Ephesians4:19 Ninh mbuo hmien-beih hoz
Ephesians4:20 Mv baac meih mbuo zuotc Giduc nyei nyungc se maiv zeiz hnangv naaic.
Ephesians4:21 Meih mbuo ndongc haaix zungv haiz gorngv jiex ninh nyei jauv-louc yaac gan ninh ziouc hoqc jiex ninh njaaux nyei zien leiz.
Ephesians4:22 Oix zuqc guangc nqoi ganh nyei loz-maengc
Ephesians4:23 Oix zuqc bun Tin-Hungh goiv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
Ephesians4:24 Yaac oix zuqc duqv siang-maengc. Naaiv nyungc maengc Tin-Hungh zeix daaih zuangv ninh ganh
Ephesians4:25 Hnangv naaic
Ephesians4:26 Se gorngv “Meih mbuo qiex jiez
Ephesians4:27 Yaac maiv dungx bun mienv nyei hungh maaih qangx bieqc.
Ephesians4:28 Zinh ndaangc zoux zaqc nimc ga'naaiv wuov deix oix zuqc guangc
Ephesians4:29 Maiv dungx bun meih nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv maiv benx nyei waac. Oix zuqc gorngv haih tengx mienh nyei waac hnangv
Ephesians4:30 Yaac maiv dungx bun Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh nzauh. Tin-Hungh bun Singx Lingh meih mbuo
Ephesians4:31 Oix zuqc guangc im nyei hnyouv
Ephesians4:32 Daaux nzuonx
Ephesians5:1 Weic zuqc meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh hnamv haic nyei naamh nyouz oix zuqc zuotc ninh nyei nyungc zoux.
Ephesians5:2 Meih mbuo zoux nyungc-nyungc sic oix zuqc hnamv mienh hnangv Giduc hnamv mbuo
Ephesians5:3 Meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziouc yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maiv dungx zoux
Ephesians5:4 Meih mbuo yaac maiv horpc zuqc kuanv tien gorngv waac-zaanc
Ephesians5:5 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hiuv dingc
Ephesians5:6 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh longc kungx-waac nduov meih mbuo. Se laaix naaiv nyungc sic Tin-Hungh nouz haic
Ephesians5:7 Weic naaiv
Ephesians5:8 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yiem hmuangx mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo sienx Ziouv meih mbuo ziouc yiem njang gu'nyuoz. Hnangv naaic
Ephesians5:9 weic zuqc yiem njang cuotv nyei se nyungc-nyungc longx nyei
Ephesians5:10 Meih mbuo oix zuqc samx mangc gaax haih zoux haaix nyungc weic bun Ziouv a'hneiv.
Ephesians5:11 Maiv dungx caux yiem hmuangx nyei mienh zoux ninh mbuo maiv lamh longc nyei sic. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc bun naaiv deix sic cuotv yaangh daaih
Ephesians5:12 weic zuqc liemh gorngv taux ninh mbuo bingx jienv zoux nyei sic zungv nyaiv haic aqv.
Ephesians5:13 Njang ziux jienv haaix nyungc
Ephesians5:14 weic zuqc njang ziux haaix nyungc
Ephesians5:15 Hnangv naaic
Ephesians5:16 Oix zuqc longc duqv horpc ziangh hoc
Ephesians5:17 Maiv dungx zoux mienh hngongx mienh. Oix zuqc mengh baeqc Ziouv nyei za'eix hnangv haaix nor.
Ephesians5:18 Maiv dungx hopv diuv nquin. Diuv se bun mienh zoux waaic sic. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc bun Singx Lingh yiem buangv hnyouv.
Ephesians5:19 Oix zuqc longc singx nzung
Ephesians5:20 Yaac oix zuqc dengv mbuo Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox zanc-zanc weic maanc sic laengz zingh Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh.
Ephesians5:21 Meih mbuo oix zuqc laanh mbuoqc laanh weic zuqc meih mbuo lomh nzoih taaih Giduc.
Ephesians5:22 Meih mbuo zoux auv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbuoqc ganh nyei nqox hnangv meih mbuo mbuoqc Ziouv Yesu wuov nor.
Ephesians5:23 Weic zuqc nqox zoux auv nyei m'nqorngv hnangv Giduc zoux jiu-baang nyei m'nqorngv wuov nor. Jiu-baang zoux Giduc nyei sin
Ephesians5:24 Jiu-baang hnangv haaix nor mbuoqc Giduc
Ephesians5:25 Zoux nqox nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv hnangv Giduc hnamv jiu-baang
Ephesians5:26 weic bun jiu-baang cing-nzengc daaih. Ninh longc wuom yaac longc ninh nyei doz nzaaux jiu-baang
Ephesians5:27 weic zorqv jiu-baang fungx bun ninh ganh
Ephesians5:28 Fih hnangv nyei
Ephesians5:29 Maiv maaih haaix dauh nzorng ganh nyei sin
Ephesians5:30 Weic zuqc mbuo dauh dauh zoux Giduc nyei sin nyei yietc nyungc.
Ephesians5:31 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv naaiv joux waac
Ephesians5:32 Yiem naaiv deix waac gu'nyuoz maaih diuh hlo haic nyei zien leiz ih zanc mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih aqv. Ei yie ganh mengh baeqc nor
Ephesians5:33 Mv baac naaiv deix waac yaac gorngv zuqc meih mbuo. Meih mbuo dauh dauh zoux nqox nyei mienh oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv hnangv hnamv ganh nor. Auv yaac oix zuqc taaih ganh nyei nqox.
Ephesians6:1 Fu'jueiv aac
Ephesians6:2 “Oix zuqc tongx nimc meih mbuo nyei diex maac.” Naaiv se da'yietv diuh lingc maaih laengz nyei waac caux jienv.
Ephesians6:3 Hnangv naaiv
Ephesians6:4 Zoux die nyei mienh aah! Maiv dungx cuoqv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv qiex jiez. Oix zuqc ei Ziouv nyei leiz dorh longx fu'jueiv
Ephesians6:5 Zoux nouh nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc gamh nziex
Ephesians6:6 Maiv dungx kungx dorng ziouv yiem nyei ziangh hoc zoux longx weic bun ninh mbuo a'hneiv hnangv. Oix zuqc hnangv Giduc nyei nouh nor
Ephesians6:7 Zoux gong oix zuqc njang hmien njang mueic nyei zoux
Ephesians6:8 Weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv
Ephesians6:9 Zoux ziouv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc fih hnangv nyei zoux bun meih mbuo nyei nouh. Maiv dungx gorngv haeqv ninh mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv meih mbuo caux ninh mbuo juangc dauh yiem tin-dorngh nyei Ziouv. Ninh yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien.
Ephesians6:10 Setv mueiz yie kuinx meih mbuo
Ephesians6:11 Oix zuqc zorqv Tin-Hungh bun nyei yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc zorng jienv. Meih mbuo ziouc haih souv duqv wuonv
Ephesians6:12 Weic zuqc mbuo maiv caux baamh mienh mborqv jaax. Se caux yiem ndaamv-lungh zoux hlo nyei
Ephesians6:13 Weic naaiv oix zuqc zorqv Tin-Hungh bun daaih mborqv jaax nyei yietc zungv wuoqc ginc zorng jienv. Taux wuov norm orqv haic nyei hnoi meih mbuo ziouc haih caux wuov deix win-wangv doix-dekc. Zoux liuz nyungc-nyungc meih mbuo corc haih yiem duqv wuonv nyei.
Ephesians6:14 Hnangv naaic
Ephesians6:15 Yaac oix zuqc zanc-zanc liuc leiz ziangx zunh baengh orn nyei kuv fienx weic zoux heh daapc.
Ephesians6:16 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Oix zuqc longc sienx fim zoux torngv-baaih nanv jienv ziouc haih mietc hiuang orqv wuov dauh maaih douz nyei forng-cang.
Ephesians6:17 Oix zuqc longc njoux en zoux hlieqv-muoc ndongx jienv. Yaac nanv jienv Singx Lingh nyei nzuqc ndaauv
Ephesians6:18 Oix zuqc kaux Singx Lingh zanc-zanc weic nyungc-nyungc jauv daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh. Weic naaiv oix zuqc ging jienv hnyouv daux gaux
Ephesians6:19 Yaac weic yie daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh tengx yie taux gorngv nyei ziangh hoc haih maaih waac gorngv ziouc bungx laangc nyei zunh yaangh kuv fienx maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei jauv.
Ephesians6:20 Yie weic naaiv kuv fienx zoux douc fienx mienh yaac zuqc hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv. Tov meih mbuo tengx yie tov Tin-Hungh bun yie bungx laangc nyei zunh kuv fienx ziux yie horpc zuqc zunh nor.
Ephesians6:21 Ziouv nyei ziepc zuoqv bou
Ephesians6:22 Weic naaiv yie paaiv ninh mingh meih mbuo naaic
Ephesians6:23 Tov Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix baengh orn
Ephesians6:24 Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en bun yietc zungv maaih hnyouv hnamv Ziouv Yesu Giduc taux daauh taux mueiz nyei mienh.
Philippians1:1 Yie
Philippians1:2 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo.
Philippians1:3 Yie haaix zanc jangx taux meih mbuo
Philippians1:4 Yie haaix zanc tengx meih mbuo zuangx mienh daux gaux
Philippians1:5 Weic zuqc yie jangx zuqc yiem daauh hnoi taux ih zanc meih mbuo caux yie juangc jienv kuv fienx nyei gong zoux.
Philippians1:6 Yie sienx dingc Tin-Hungh yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv jiez gorn zoux kuv gong
Philippians1:7 Yie yiem hnyouv haaix zanc yaac jangx zuqc meih mbuo zuangx mienh yaac hnamv meih mbuo. Yie hnangv naaiv nor haiz se horpc nyei
Philippians1:8 Tin-Hungh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx gorngv yie za'gengh! hnamv meih mbuo zuangx mienh hnangv Giduc Yesu hnamv meih mbuo nor.
Philippians1:9 Yie daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv jaa camv jienv faaux
Philippians1:10 Hnangv naaiv
Philippians1:11 Meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc kaux Yesu Giduc zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic weic bun mienh taaih Tin-Hungh
Philippians1:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Philippians1:13 Weic zuqc yie yiem naaiv loh
Philippians1:14 Yie zuqc wuonx jienv loh mv baac naaiv deix sic tengx duqv gorx-youz mbuo camv sienx Ziouv Yesu gauh wuonv ziouc bungx laangc nyei zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz yaac maiv gamh nziex.
Philippians1:15 Za'gengh maaih deix zunh Giduc nyei doz laaix ninh mbuo mueic jieqv oix nzaeng jaax. Mv baac maaih deix longc hnyouv zunh.
Philippians1:16 Naaiv se weic ninh mbuo hnamv yie yaac hiuv duqv laaix yie nzaeng kuv fienx maiv bun ndortv yie cingx daaih zuqc wuonx jienv naaiv loh.
Philippians1:17 Mueic jieqv nzaeng jaax wuov deix maiv longc hnyouv zunh Giduc nyei kuv fienx
Philippians1:18 Mv baac maiv benx haaix nyungc. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo longc hnyouv zunh fai la'guaih zunh
Philippians1:19 Yie yietc zei oix jaa a'hneiv weic zuqc hiuv duqv meih mbuo tengx yie daux gaux
Philippians1:20 Yie za'gengh! maaih lamh hnamv yie maiv maaih haaix nyungc bun yie zuqc nyaiv. Yie ih zanc yaac oix hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov nor
Philippians1:21 Yie ziangh jienv se ziangh weic Giduc. Daic mingh corc duqv gauh longx.
Philippians1:22 Mv baac se gorngv yie ziangh jienv haih zoux duqv maaih lamh longc nyei gong gauh camv nor
Philippians1:23 Naaiv i diuc baeng jienv yie. Yie haiz oix mingh caux Giduc yiem. Gauh longx naaiv maiv maaih aqv.
Philippians1:24 Mv baac yie ziangh jienv se weic meih mbuo gauh longc jienv jiex.
Philippians1:25 Weic naaiv yie hiuv dingc yie corc oix zuqc yiem seix zaangc. Yie ziouc oix ziangh jienv weic tengx meih mbuo zuangx mienh gauh gan duqv longx meih mbuo sienx nyei jauv yaac gauh njien-youh.
Philippians1:26 Wuov nyungc yie aengx nzuonx meih mbuo naaic
Philippians1:27 Gauh longc jienv jiex
Philippians1:28 Maiv dungx gamh nziex caux meih mbuo doix-dekc wuov deix. Meih mbuo maiv gamh nziex se zoux jangx-hoc bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo oix zuqc mietc mv baac meih mbuo oix duqv njoux. Se Tin-Hungh oix njoux meih mbuo.
Philippians1:29 Tin-Hungh ceix en bun meih mbuo fu-sux Giduc. Se maiv daan sienx ninh hnangv
Philippians1:30 Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv yie nor nzaeng kuv fienx
Philippians2:1 Se gorngv meih mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh ziouc gauh jorm hnyouv
Philippians2:2 tov bun yie njien-youh taux daauh. Meih mbuo oix zuqc dongh diuc hnyouv
Philippians2:3 Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc weic douh ganh duqv longx fai ceng ganh hlo. Oix zuqc laanh caux laanh nyiemc zoux faix
Philippians2:4 Maiv dungx kungx hnamv ganh nyei nza'hmien
Philippians2:5 Meih mbuo oix zuqc maaih hnyouv hnangv Giduc Yesu nyei hnyouv.
Philippians2:6 Giduc m'daaih maaih Tin-Hungh nyei fiem-fingx. Ninh caux Tin-Hungh fih hnangv nyei mv baac ninh maiv nzaeng zoux fih hnangv.
Philippians2:7 Daaux nzuonx ninh maaih nyei nyungc-nyungc siev jienv guangc nzengc
Philippians2:8 Za'gengh maaih mienh nyei fangx zeiv. Ninh ganh yaac laengz zoux faix
Philippians2:9 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh taaih ninh zoux gauh hlo jiex
Philippians2:10 Hnangv naaiv
Philippians2:11 Dauh dauh oix nyiemc Yesu Giduc zoux Ziouv
Philippians2:12 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
Philippians2:13 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zanc-zanc yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv zoux gong
Philippians2:14 Zoux haaix nyungc maiv dungx ngopv yaac maiv dungx daux nzuih
Philippians2:15 meih mbuo ziouc zoux Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc
Philippians2:16 zunh ziangh maengc nyei doz bun ninh mbuo. Meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Philippians2:17 Meih mbuo nyei sienx fim se hnangv ziec bun Tin-Hungh nyei ga'naaiv nor. Se gorngv yie zuqc daix dox nziaamv cuotv meih mbuo nyei sienx fim gu'nguaaic hnangv ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv nor
Philippians2:18 Fih hnangv nyei
Philippians2:19 Se gorngv ei Ziouv Yesu nyei za'eix nor
Philippians2:20 Yie maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv Ti^mo^tai nor
Philippians2:21 Dauh dauh kungx gunv ganh nyei nza'hmien hnangv
Philippians2:22 Ti^mo^tai nyei hnyouv meih mbuo hiuv nyei. Ninh caux yie zunh kuv fienx hnangv i dorn-diex juangc gong zoux nor.
Philippians2:23 Yie yietv hiuv duqv yie ganh nyei jauv aengx maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv
Philippians2:24 Yie yaac kaux Ziouv hnamv daaih maiv lauh yie ganh yaac duqv mingh meih mbuo naaic.
Philippians2:25 Yie hnamv daaih oix zuqc paaiv dauh mbuo nyei gorx-youz E^baa^fo^ndi^tatv nzuonx meih mbuo naaic. Ninh caux yie juangc gong zoux
Philippians2:26 Ninh za'gengh! jangx haic meih mbuo. Hnyouv yaac nzauh haic weic zuqc meih mbuo haiz gorngv ninh butv baengc.
Philippians2:27 Ninh gengh butv kouv nyei
Philippians2:28 Weic naaiv yie gauh oix heuc ninh nzuonx. Meih mbuo aengx duqv buatc ninh ziouc hnyouv longx aqv. Yie ganh nyei you-nzauh yaac tuix deix mi'aqv.
Philippians2:29 Ninh zoux dauh sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz
Philippians2:30 weic zuqc ninh weic zoux Giduc nyei gong kaav deix daic mi'aqv. Meih mbuo maiv haih tengx yie zoux nyei
Philippians3:1 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
Philippians3:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbungh jienv wuov deix juv
Philippians3:3 Jiex zien gaatv nyei leiz se dongh mbuo weic zuqc mbuo kaux Singx Lingh zaangc Tin-Hungh. Mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh ziouc njien-youh haic. Mbuo yaac maiv kaux ganh haih zoux nyei haaix nyungc.
Philippians3:4 Maiv gunv yie haih kaux ganh zoux nyei
Philippians3:5 Yie cuotv seix daaih buangv hietc hnoi ziouc jiex gaatv nyei leiz. Yie cuotv seix benx I^saa^laa^en Mienh
Philippians3:6 Yie yaac jorm hnyouv haic
Philippians3:7 Mv baac zinh ndaangc yie funx zic zinh nyei
Philippians3:8 Maiv daan naaiv. Yie funx nyungc-nyungc se maiv zic zinh weic duqv yietc nyungc gauh jaaix jiex. Jaaix jiex wuov nyungc se yie haih hiuv duqv yie nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu. Yie guangc nyungc-nyungc funx benx ga'naaiv-guangc weic duqv Giduc
Philippians3:9 yaac weic duqv caux ninh juangc maengc ziangh. Yie gan Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-latc zoux mv baac maiv duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Yie duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv se weic yie sienx Giduc. Se dongh Tin-Hungh ganh bun yie horpc ninh nyei hnyouv weic zuqc yie sienx Giduc.
Philippians3:10 Yie kungx oix hiuv duqv Giduc
Philippians3:11 weic zuqc yie maaih lamh hnamv se yie daic mingh mv baac Tin-Hungh zungv oix bun yie nangh daaih.
Philippians3:12 Yie maiv zeiz gorngv yie duqv liuz naaiv deix yietc zungv. Yaac maiv zeiz gorngv yie dunh yunh nzengc. Yie njiec qaqv tiux jienv mingh weic oix zorqv duqv zingh nyeic. Se weic naaiv Giduc Yesu zungv zorqv yie ndaangc
Philippians3:13 Gorx-youz aac
Philippians3:14 baeng zaqc tiux taux zorqv duqv zingh nyeic nyei dorngx
Philippians3:15 Mbuo haaix dauh ei lingh wuonh nyei jauv benx domh mienh oix zuqc maaih naaiv nyungc hnyouv. Se gorngv maaih deix ganh nyungc hnamv
Philippians3:16 Mv baac mbuo yangh Yesu nyei jauv taux haaix
Philippians3:17 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
Philippians3:18 Weic zuqc yie mbuox ziex nzunc meih mbuo
Philippians3:19 Mv baac setv mueiz ninh mbuo zungv zuqc mietc weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei zienh se ninh mbuo ganh nyei ga'sie. Horpc zuqc nyaiv nyei sic daaux nzuonx ninh mbuo dorh daaih zoux mengh dauh. Ninh mbuo kungx hnamv taux baamh gen nyei jauv hnangv.
Philippians3:20 Mv baac mbuo zoux tin-dorngh nyei baeqc fingx yaac zuov jienv mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv yiem wuov tin-dorngh daaih
Philippians3:21 Ninh oix longc ninh nyei domh qaqv
Philippians4:1 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
Philippians4:2 Yie tov! Yu^o^ndie caux Sinx^ti^ke
Philippians4:3 Ziepc zuoqv juangc gong zoux nyei doic aah! Yie yaac tov meih tengx naaiv deix i dauh m'sieqv dorn
Philippians4:4 Meih mbuo oix zuqc kaux Ziouv Yesu zanc-zanc maaih orn-lorqc. Yie aengx gorngv nzunc
Philippians4:5 Oix zuqc bun mienh zieqv duqv meih mbuo zoux hnyouv suonc nyei mienh. Ziouv yiem fatv aqv.
Philippians4:6 Maiv dungx weic haaix nyungc guaax hnyouv. Oix zuqc weic nyungc-nyungc sic daux gaux jouh Tin-Hungh
Philippians4:7 Tin-Hungh nyei baengh orn
Philippians4:8 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
Philippians4:9 Yie njaaux meih mbuo hoqc liuz yaac bun meih mbuo duqv zipv nyei
Philippians4:10 Ziouv bun yie za'gengh orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc nqaeqv lauh deix mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo aengx jangx taux yie. Yie maiv zeiz gorngv meih mbuo maiv jangx
Philippians4:11 Yie yaac maiv zeiz hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc yie qiemx zuqc haaix nyungc. Yie hoqc liuz ziouc hiuv duqv maiv gunv maaih camv fai zoqc yie buangv hnyouv aqv.
Philippians4:12 Yie hiuv duqv buangh dangx-douh nyei ziangh hoc
Philippians4:13 Giduc bun yie maaih qaqv
Philippians4:14 Mv baac yie maaih kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo tengx yie
Philippians4:15 Meih mbuo Fi^lipv^poi Mienh hiuv duqv yie jiez gorn zunh kuv fienx
Philippians4:16 Yie yiem Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa wuov zanc yie qiemx zuqc nyei meih mbuo juix daaih maiv zeiv yietc nzunc.
Philippians4:17 Yie yaac maiv zeiz kungx oix zipv meih mbuo nyei zingh nyeic. Yie oix meih mbuo nyei zaeqv-daan duqv leic zinh camv jienv faaux.
Philippians4:18 Meih mbuo fungx daaih nyei ga'naaiv yie duqv zipv nzoih mi'aqv
Philippians4:19 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh maaih nzoih nyungc-nyungc. Meih mbuo qiemx zuqc nyei yietc zungv
Philippians4:20 Mbuo oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen.
Philippians4:21 Tov mbuox sienx Giduc Yesu nyei zuangx mienh yie jangx taux ninh mbuo. Caux yie yiem naaiv nyei zuangx gorx-youz yaac jangx taux ninh mbuo.
Philippians4:22 Yietc zuangx sienx Giduc nyei mienh
Philippians4:23 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo.
Colossians1:1 Yie
Colossians1:2 fiev fienx bun meih mbuo yiem Ko^lo^si Zingh
Colossians1:3 Yie mbuo haaix zanc tengx meih mbuo daux gaux
Colossians1:4 weic zuqc yie mbuo haiz gorngv meih mbuo sienx longx Giduc Yesu yaac hnamv Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh.
Colossians1:5 Kuv fienx nyei zien doz taux meih mbuo naaic wuov zanc
Colossians1:6 Naaiv kuv fienx maaih mienh camv nyei sienx yaac hiaangx jienv mingh buangv lungh ndiev
Colossians1:7 Meih mbuo hiuv Tin-Hungh nyei en se meih mbuo yiem E^baa^faa hoqc daaih. E^baa^faa se yie mbuo hnamv haic juangc zoux bou nyei mienh
Colossians1:8 Ninh yaac mbuox yie mbuo
Colossians1:9 Weic naaiv
Colossians1:10 Meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc ziouc zoux puix Ziouv
Colossians1:11 Tov Tin-Hungh longc ninh njang-laangc nyei qaqv bun meih mbuo yiem nyungc-nyungc sic maaih qaqv henv jiez daaih
Colossians1:12 laengz zingh Zaangc Diex weic zuqc ninh bun meih mbuo puix duqv caux ninh nyei mienh maaih buonc yiem ninh njang haic nyei guoqv.
Colossians1:13 Tin-Hungh njoux mbuo leih ndutv hmuangx nyei qaqv
Colossians1:14 Ninh nyei Dorn zuoqc mbuo nzuonx daaih
Colossians1:15 Yesu se dongh mangc maiv buatc nyei Tin-Hungh nyei fangx zeiv. Ninh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn-hlo yaac gauh hlo jiex zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc.
Colossians1:16 Tin-Hungh longc ninh zeix yiem lungh yiem ndau nyei maanc muotc daaih
Colossians1:17 Yesu yiem ndaangc maanc muotc. Yietc zungv yaac bangc ninh maaih yietc nyeic.
Colossians1:18 Ninh zoux sin nyei m'nqorngv
Colossians1:19 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh ganh dingc bun ninh nyei Dorn maaih Tin-Hungh ganh nyei fiem-fingx dunh yunh nzengc
Colossians1:20 yaac longc ninh bun maanc muotc caux ninh horpc hnyouv
Colossians1:21 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo zoux nyei caux hnamv nyei waaic sic bun meih mbuo leih Tin-Hungh go
Colossians1:22 Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo caux ninh horpc hnyouv se weic Giduc nyei orv sin zuqc daic
Colossians1:23 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc gan longx meih mbuo sienx nyei doz
Colossians1:24 Ih zanc yie orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc yie duqv weic meih mbuo siouc kouv. Giduc weic ninh nyei sin
Colossians1:25 Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zoux jiu-baang nyei bou
Colossians1:26 Naaiv doz se zinh ndaangc maanc gouv maanc doic Tin-Hungh maiv gaengh bun mbiaangx yaangh mv baac ih zanc mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih bun ninh nyei mienh hiuv.
Colossians1:27 Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix se oix bun ninh nyei mienh hiuv duqv naaiv maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic ndongc haaix jaaix
Colossians1:28 Yie mbuo ziouc zunh Giduc nyei jauv bun zuangx mienh muangx. Yie mbuo longc nyungc-nyungc cong-mengh kuinx mienh
Colossians1:29 Weic naaiv yie zoux gong kouv
Colossians2:1 Yie oix meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie weic meih mbuo caux Lau^ndi^sie Mienh caux yietc zungv maiv buatc jiex yie nyei hmien nyei mienh zoux gong ndongc haaix kouv.
Colossians2:2 Yie hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic tengx ninh mbuo zungx qaqv
Colossians2:3 Tin-Hungh jaaix nyei cong-mengh caux hnyouv-zoih yaac gem jienv yiem Giduc gu'nyuoz.
Colossians2:4 Yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic maiv bun nzuih mbiaangc nyei mienh gorngv kuh muangx nyei waac nduov meih mbuo.
Colossians2:5 Weic zuqc maiv gunv yie nyei sin maiv caux meih mbuo yiem
Colossians2:6 Weic naaiv
Colossians2:7 Oix zuqc yiem ninh gu'nyuoz hnangv njiec nzungh nor
Colossians2:8 Oix zuqc faix fim
Colossians2:9 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei fiem-fingx yiem Giduc nyei sin nzoih nzengc
Colossians2:10 meih mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh ziouc nyungc-nyungc maaih nzoih. Giduc yaac gunv yietc zungv yiem ndaamv-lungh maaih lingc maaih qaqv gunv sic wuov deix.
Colossians2:11 Meih mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh ziouc jiex liuz gaatv nyei leiz aqv. Maiv zeiz mienh nyei buoz gaatv
Colossians2:12 Meih mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov zanc
Colossians2:13 Zinh ndaangc laaix meih mbuo baamz zuiz
Colossians2:14 Ninh betv guangc dingc mbuo nyei zuiz nyei zaeqv-daan
Colossians2:15 Yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax Giduc hingh jiex yiem ndaamv-lungh maaih lingc maaih qaqv gunv sic wuov deix
Colossians2:16 Weic naaiv maiv dungx bun haaix dauh weic meih mbuo nyanc nyei hopv nyei
Colossians2:17 Naaiv deix sic kungx zoux dongh linh biux mengh nqa'haav oix daaih nyei sic hnangv. Mv baac zien nyei se Giduc.
Colossians2:18 Maaih deix mienh zoux eix leiz hnangv nyiemc ganh zoux faix
Colossians2:19 Wuov nyungc mienh yaac maiv kaux Giduc zoux m'nqorngv. M'nqorngv zoux gorn yungz sin bun sin daaux duqv horpc
Colossians2:20 Meih mbuo caux Giduc daic
Colossians2:21 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Colossians2:22 Mv baac naaiv deix yietc zungv ga'naaiv se longc liuz ziouc baac mi'aqv. Naaiv deix leiz kungx benx baamh mienh liepc daaih nyei leiz caux njaaux nyei waac hnangv.
Colossians2:23 Mienh buatc hnangv maaih cong-mengh weic zuqc bun mienh ei gan hnamv cuotv nyei za'eix baaix
Colossians3:1 Meih mbuo zungv duqv caux Giduc nangh daaih
Colossians3:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zunv hnyouv hnamv gu'nguaaic nyei sic
Colossians3:3 Weic zuqc meih mbuo se dorngx daic mi'aqv. Meih mbuo nyei ziangh maengc caux Giduc bingx jienv yiem Tin-Hungh gu'nyuoz.
Colossians3:4 Giduc dongh mbuo nyei zien ziangh maengc. Ninh hinc cuotv nyei ziangh hoc
Colossians3:5 Weic naaiv oix zuqc mietc nzengc meih mbuo nyei sin zaangc hanc oix zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc waaic sic. Oix zuqc guangc buangh liouh nyei sic
Colossians3:6 Laaix naaiv deix sic Tin-Hungh oix bun maiv muangx ninh nyei waac wuov deix zuqc ninh nouz jienv.
Colossians3:7 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yaac hnangv naaiv nor zoux
Colossians3:8 Mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc guangc naaiv deix yietc zungv sic. Maiv dungx nouz mienh
Colossians3:9 Laanh maiv dungx gorngv-baeqc nduov laanh
Colossians3:10 aengx duqv siang-maengc. Naaiv nyungc siang-maengc
Colossians3:11 Hnangv naaic
Colossians3:12 Tin-Hungh hnamv meih mbuo yaac ginv meih mbuo daaih benx ninh ganh nyei cing-nzengc mienh. Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh
Colossians3:13 Oix zuqc zoux hnyouv ndaauv
Colossians3:14 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv
Colossians3:15 Oix zuqc longc Giduc bun daaih nyei baengh orn gunv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv. Se weic bun meih mbuo maaih naaiv nyungc baengh orn Tin-Hungh ginv meih mbuo daaih benx yietc norm sin. Yaac oix zuqc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh.
Colossians3:16 Oix zuqc zaangh Giduc nyei doz buangv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv ziouc longc nyungc-nyungc cong-mengh laanh njaaux laanh
Colossians3:17 Maiv gunv meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc
Colossians3:18 Zoux auv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc mbuoqc ganh nyei nqox. Hnangv naaiv zoux se puix sienx Ziouv nyei mienh.
Colossians3:19 Zoux nqox nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv
Colossians3:20 Fu'jueiv aah! Yiem maanc sic oix zuqc muangx diex maac weic zuqc naaiv se zoux horpc Ziouv nyei hnyouv.
Colossians3:21 Zoux die nyei mienh aah! Maiv dungx cuoqv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv. Nzauh heix ninh mbuo hnyouv namx.
Colossians3:22 Zoux nouh nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc yiem maanc sic muangx meih mbuo baamh gen nyei ziouv. Maiv dungx kungx dorng ziouv yiem nyei ziangh hoc zoux longx weic bun ninh a'hneiv hnangv. Oix zuqc hnyouv zingx nyei zoux weic zuqc meih mbuo taaih Tin-Hungh.
Colossians3:23 Maiv gunv zoux haaix nyungc
Colossians3:24 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv meih mbuo oix nzipc Ziouv weic ninh nyei mienh siou nyei jaa-dingh zoux zingh nyeic
Colossians3:25 Haaix dauh zoux waaic sic ziouc zuqc ei ninh zoux nyei winh bun ninh. Tin-Hungh yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien.
Colossians4:1 Meih mbuo zoux ziouv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux baengh fim yaac zoux hnyouv yuonh bun meih mbuo nyei nouh
Colossians4:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zanc-zanc jienh daux gaux
Colossians4:3 Yaac oix zuqc tengx yie mbuo daux gaux
Colossians4:4 Oix zuqc tov Tin-Hungh tengx yie haih gorngv mengh naaiv deix mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic hnangv yie horpc zuqc gorngv nor.
Colossians4:5 Oix zuqc longc cong-mengh caux maiv sienx nyei mienh jiu tong. Yaac oix zuqc maiv dungx guangc ziangh hoc.
Colossians4:6 Meih mbuo oix zuqc gorngv waac kuh muangx yungz mienh
Colossians4:7 Mbuo hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz
Colossians4:8 Se weic naaiv yie paaiv ninh mingh meih mbuo naaic
Colossians4:9 Aengx maaih dauh hnamv haic
Colossians4:10 Caux yie zuqc wuonx jienv loh wuov dauh Aa^litv^taa^katv jangx taux meih mbuo. Mbaa^naa^mbatc nyei baeqv-muoz dorn
Colossians4:11 Yesu
Colossians4:12 E^baa^faa zoux meih mbuo ganh nyei mienh yaac zoux Giduc Yesu nyei bou. Ninh yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. E^baa^faa zanc-zanc weic meih mbuo njiec qaqv daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo sienx duqv wuonv
Colossians4:13 Yie tengx E^baa^faa zoux zorng-zengx ninh weic meih mbuo yaac weic Lau^ndi^sie caux Hi^e^laa^mbu^li Zingh nyei mienh zoux gong kouv.
Colossians4:14 Mbuo hnamv haic nyei ndie-sai
Colossians4:15 Tov mbuox Lau^ndi^sie Zingh nyei gorx-youz caux Nimfaa aengx caux yiem ninh nyei biauv nyei jiu-baang
Colossians4:16 Mienh doqc naaiv zeiv fienx bun meih mbuo muangx liuz
Colossians4:17 Yaac oix zuqc mbuox Aan^kipv^batc
Colossians4:18 Yie ganh nanv batv fiev naaiv deix waac
1Thessalonians1:1 Yie
1Thessalonians1:2 Yie mbuo zanc-zanc weic meih mbuo zuangx mienh laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Haaix zanc daux gaux yaac tih taux meih mbuo.
1Thessalonians1:3 Yie mbuo yiem yie mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien zanc-zanc jangx meih mbuo weic sienx Yesu zoux nyei gong. Meih mbuo hnamv ninh ziouc zoux gong kouv
1Thessalonians1:4 Tin-Hungh hnamv nyei zuangx gorx-youz aah! Yie mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh ginv meih mbuo
1Thessalonians1:5 weic zuqc yie mbuo taux meih mbuo naaic zunh kuv fienx
1Thessalonians1:6 Meih mbuo zuotc yie mbuo nyei nyungc yaac zuotc Ziouv nyei nyungc. Maiv gunv meih mbuo zuqc siouc kouv camv
1Thessalonians1:7 Weic naaiv meih mbuo zoux nyungc zeiv bun yiem Maa^si^ndo^nie caux Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv nyei sienx Yesu nyei zuangx mienh zuotc.
1Thessalonians1:8 Ziouv nyei doz maiv daan yiem meih mbuo naaic zunh cuotv mingh gormx Maa^si^ndo^nie Saengv caux Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv hnangv
1Thessalonians1:9 Wuov deix zuangx mienh gorngv yie mbuo mingh meih mbuo naaic meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor zipv yie mbuo
1Thessalonians1:10 Ninh mbuo gorngv meih mbuo yaac zuov Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih
1Thessalonians2:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians2:2 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv zinh ndaangc maiv gaengh mingh wuov zanc
1Thessalonians2:3 Yie mbuo kuinx mienh sienx Yesu
1Thessalonians2:4 Daaux nzuonx Tin-Hungh seix liuz yie mbuo
1Thessalonians2:5 Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv
1Thessalonians2:6 Yie mbuo maiv lorz mienh ceng yie mbuo. Maiv lorz meih mbuo yaac maiv lorz haaix dauh ceng yie mbuo.
1Thessalonians2:7 Maiv gunv yie mbuo zoux Giduc nyei gong-zoh ziouc maaih leiz feix luic meih mbuo
1Thessalonians2:8 Yie mbuo hnamv haic meih mbuo ziouc maiv daan zunh Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx bun meih mbuo
1Thessalonians2:9 Gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians2:10 Meih mbuo tengx yie mbuo zoux zorng-zengx
1Thessalonians2:11 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie mbuo daaix meih mbuo hnangv die daaix ninh ganh nyei fu'jueiv nor.
1Thessalonians2:12 Yie mbuo tengx meih mbuo zungx qaqv
1Thessalonians2:13 Aengx maaih yietc diuc bun yie mbuo zanc-zanc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Se weic zuqc yie mbuo zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz
1Thessalonians2:14 Gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians2:15 Yiutai Mienh daix Ziouv Yesu
1Thessalonians2:16 Ninh mbuo dangv jienv maiv oix bun yie mbuo zunh doz bun Janx weic bun Janx duqv njoux. Hnangv naaic
1Thessalonians2:17 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians2:18 Yie mbuo gengh oix mingh meih mbuo naaic. Yie
1Thessalonians2:19 Ziouv Yesu aengx daaih wuov zanc
1Thessalonians2:20 Meih mbuo za'gengh! zoux yie mbuo nyei njang-laangc
1Thessalonians3:1 Zoux gau
1Thessalonians3:2 aengx paaiv yie mbuo nyei youz
1Thessalonians3:3 weic zuqc maiv oix haaix dauh laaix zuqc mienh zoux doqc haih tuix bouc. Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv mbuo zuqc mienh zoux doqc se jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx mbuo oix zuqc buangh nyei sic.
1Thessalonians3:4 Yie mbuo corc caux meih mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc
1Thessalonians3:5 Weic naaiv yie haiz zuov maiv duqv gauh lauh
1Thessalonians3:6 Ih zanc Ti^mo^tai mingh meih mbuo naaic nzuonx daaih aqv. Ninh dorh longx haic nyei fienx daaih mbuox yie mbuo meih mbuo corc sienx longx
1Thessalonians3:7 Gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians3:8 Weic zuqc meih mbuo kaux wuonv Ziouv Yesu
1Thessalonians3:9 Yie mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor weic meih mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh? Yie mbuo laengz zingh ninh weic zuqc meih mbuo bun yie mbuo duqv yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien orn-lorqc haic.
1Thessalonians3:10 Yie mbuo hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz qaqv tov Tin-Hungh bun yie mbuo aengx duqv buatc meih mbuo nyei hmien. Meih mbuo nyei sienx fim caa zuqc haaix nyungc yie mbuo ziouc haih tipv bun meih mbuo.
1Thessalonians3:11 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh yaac tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu koi jauv bun yie mbuo haih mingh taux meih mbuo naaic.
1Thessalonians3:12 Yaac tov Ziouv Yesu bun meih mbuo laanh hnamv laanh yaac hnamv zuangx mienh camv jienv faaux
1Thessalonians3:13 Tov ninh liepc wuonv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
1Thessalonians4:1 Gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians4:2 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie mbuo longc Ziouv Yesu nyei hatc maaz hnangv haaix nor paaiv ziangx meih mbuo.
1Thessalonians4:3 Tin-Hungh nyei eix se hnangv naaiv. Ninh oix meih mbuo zoux cing-nzengc
1Thessalonians4:4 Meih mbuo gorqv-mienh oix zuqc hiuv duqv hnangv haaix nor longc cing-nzengc nyei
1Thessalonians4:5 Maiv dungx sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux
1Thessalonians4:6 Hnangv naaic
1Thessalonians4:7 Tin-Hungh heuc mbuo daaih maiv zeiz weic zoux maiv cing-nzengc. Ninh oix mbuo zoux cing-nzengc nyei.
1Thessalonians4:8 Hnangv naaic
1Thessalonians4:9 Gorngv taux hnamv gorx-youz nyei sic yie mbuo maiv zuqc fiev
1Thessalonians4:10 Meih mbuo zungv hnangv naaiv nor hnamv yiem gormx Maa^si^ndo^nie Saengv nyei zuangx gorx-youz. Mv baac gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians4:11 Oix zuqc liepc dingc hnyouv zoux buonv-suonc mienh
1Thessalonians4:12 Hnangv naaiv nor zoux meih mbuo ziouc duqv ga'nyiec nyei mienh taaih meih mbuo
1Thessalonians4:13 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians4:14 Yie mbuo sienx Yesu daic mingh aengx nangh daaih ziouc sienx Tin-Hungh yaac oix dorh yietc zungv sienx Yesu nyei mienh
1Thessalonians4:15 Ih zanc yie mbuo mbuox meih mbuo nyei se ziux Ziouv njaaux yie mbuo nyei waac. Ziouv aengx daaih wuov hnoi
1Thessalonians4:16 Wuov zanc Ziouv ganh ziouc yiem wuov tin-dorngh njiec daaih. Maaih qiex hatc mbui nyei
1Thessalonians4:17 Nqa'haav mbuo corc ziangh jienv nyei mienh caux nangh daaih wuov deix ziouc faaux mingh yiem mbuonx gu'nyuoz buangh Ziouv yiem wuov ndaamv-lungh. Hnangv naaic
1Thessalonians4:18 Weic naaiv oix zuqc longc naaiv deix waac laanh orn laanh nyei hnyouv.
1Thessalonians5:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians5:2 weic zuqc meih mbuo mengh mengh nyei hiuv duqv Ziouv daaih nyei hnoi oix taux hnangv janx-zaqc lungh muonz zanc daaih wuov nor.
1Thessalonians5:3 Zuangx mienh gorngv
1Thessalonians5:4 Gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians5:5 Meih mbuo yietc zungv zoux yiem njang nyei mienh yaac guei lungh hnoi zanc. Mbuo maiv zeiz guei lungh muonz zanc fai zoux yiem hmuangx nyei mienh.
1Thessalonians5:6 Hnangv naaiv
1Thessalonians5:7 weic zuqc bueix m'njormh nyei mienh se lungh muonz zanc m'njormh. Diuv nquin nyei mienh lungh muonz zanc nquin.
1Thessalonians5:8 Mv baac mbuo guei lungh hnoi zanc
1Thessalonians5:9 Tin-Hungh ginv mbuo daaih maiv zeiz weic oix bun mbuo zuqc ninh nouz. Ninh oix bun mbuo kaux Ziouv Yesu Giduc duqv njoux.
1Thessalonians5:10 Giduc weic mbuo daic. Hnangv naaic
1Thessalonians5:11 Weic naaiv oix zuqc laanh tengx laanh zungx qaqv
1Thessalonians5:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians5:13 Oix zuqc weic ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong longx-longx nyei taaih yaac hnamv ninh mbuo. Laanh yaac oix zuqc caux laanh baengh orn nyei yiem.
1Thessalonians5:14 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians5:15 Oix zuqc faix fim
1Thessalonians5:16 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc orn-lorqc.
1Thessalonians5:17 Yaac oix zuqc maiv dingh liouh nyei daux gaux.
1Thessalonians5:18 Yiem maanc sic oix zuqc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Meih mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh
1Thessalonians5:19 Maiv dungx mborqv daic Singx Lingh nyei douz.
1Thessalonians5:20 Maiv dungx mangc piex Singx Lingh bun mienh douc daaih nyei waac.
1Thessalonians5:21 Oix zuqc seix mangc nyungc-nyungc. Longx nyei oix zuqc ei jienv zoux.
1Thessalonians5:22 Nyungc-nyungc orqv nyei oix zuqc simv nqoi.
1Thessalonians5:23 Tov ceix baengh orn nyei Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo cing-nzengc taux daauh
1Thessalonians5:24 Heuc meih mbuo daaih wuov dauh se ziepc zuoqv nyei. Ninh oix hnangv naaiv nor zoux ziangx.
1Thessalonians5:25 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
1Thessalonians5:26 Wuic buangh nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc zoux hnyouv cing-nzengc zom hmien naaic baengh orn.
1Thessalonians5:27 Yie longc Ziouv nyei hatc maaz mbuox meih mbuo
1Thessalonians5:28 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo.
2Thessalonians1:1 Yie
2Thessalonians1:2 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo.
2Thessalonians1:3 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians1:4 Weic naaiv
