2Thessalonians1:5 Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic bun cing Tin-Hungh baengh fim nyei siemv mienh yaac biux mengh meih mbuo puix duqv yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv. Se weic naaiv norm guoqv meih mbuo ih zanc zuqc siouc kouv.
2Thessalonians1:6 Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei. Hoic meih mbuo zuqc kuonx naanh wuov deix mienh
2Thessalonians1:7 Ninh yaac oix bun meih mbuo buangh zuqc kuonx naanh nyei mienh caux yie mbuo lomh nzoih duqv baengh orn. Wuov zanc Ziouv Yesu caux jienv ninh maaih qaqv nyei fin-mienh yiem wuov lungh hinc cuotv
2Thessalonians1:8 Ziouv Yesu oix winh bun maiv nyiemc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yaac maiv muangx Ziouv Yesu nyei kuv fienx wuov deix mienh zuqc dingc zuiz.
2Thessalonians1:9 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc siouc zuiz
2Thessalonians1:10 dongh ninh daaih wuov hnoi weic bun ninh nyei zuangx mienh
2Thessalonians1:11 Weic naaiv yie mbuo zanc-zanc tengx meih mbuo daux gaux tov mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo puix duqv ninh ginv daaih nyei mienh. Yaac tov ninh longc ninh nyei qaqv bun meih mbuo zoux ziangx meih mbuo maaih hnyouv zoux nyei kuv sic
2Thessalonians1:12 Hnangv naaic
2Thessalonians2:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians2:2 maiv dungx hnyouv huaang hnyouv lunc
2Thessalonians2:3 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh longc haaix nyungc za'eix nduov meih mbuo. Wuov norm hnoi maiv gaengh taux
2Thessalonians2:4 Ninh oix ngaengc jienv yaac ceng ganh gauh hlo jiex dongh mienh heuc zienh caux mienh zaangc nyei yietc zungv. Ninh zungv oix zueiz jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz gorngv ninh ganh zoux Tin-Hungh.
2Thessalonians2:5 Meih mbuo jangx maiv duqv fai? Yie caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie zungv zorqv naaiv deix sic mbuox meih mbuo mi'aqv.
2Thessalonians2:6 Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv haaix nyungc dangv jienv maiv gaengh bun naaiv deix sic cuotv. Hnangv naaic
2Thessalonians2:7 Ih zanc baamz leiz-latc nyei qaqv beic ndiev zoux gong
2Thessalonians2:8 Taux wuov zanc baamz leiz-latc wuov dauh oix hinc cuotv daaih. Mv baac Ziouv Yesu aengx njiec daaih wuov zanc
2Thessalonians2:9 Baamz leiz-latc wuov dauh daaih wuov zanc se ziux Saadaan zoux nyei gong
2Thessalonians2:10 Ninh yaac oix longc nyungc-nyungc guv guaix nyei orqv za'eix nduov oix zuqc mietc nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo zuqc mietc weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv hnamv zien leiz ziouc maiv duqv njoux.
2Thessalonians2:11 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo zuqc nduov mienh zoux dorngc nyei qaqv gunv jienv
2Thessalonians2:12 Hnangv naaic
2Thessalonians2:13 Ziouv hnamv nyei zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians2:14 Tin-Hungh longc yie mbuo zunh nyei kuv fienx heuc meih mbuo daaih sienx. Yaac heuc meih mbuo daaih weic duqv buonc mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei njang-laangc.
2Thessalonians2:15 Gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians2:16 Tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc ganh caux mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh
2Thessalonians2:17 orn meih mbuo nyei hnyouv yaac liepc wuonv meih mbuo weic zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic yaac gorngv nyungc-nyungc kuv waac.
2Thessalonians3:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians3:2 Yaac tov Tin-Hungh njoux yie mbuo leih ndutv waaic haic
2Thessalonians3:3 Mv baac Ziouv se ziepc zuoqv nyei. Ninh oix tengx meih mbuo maaih qaqv yaac beu jienv maiv bun hiuang orqv wuov dauh hoic meih mbuo.
2Thessalonians3:4 Ziouv bun yie mbuo haih bungx duqv hnyouv meih mbuo. Yie mbuo sienx dingc
2Thessalonians3:5 Tov Ziouv yienz meih mbuo
2Thessalonians3:6 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians3:7 Meih mbuo ganh hiuv duqv meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zuotc yie mbuo nyei nyungc zoux. Yie mbuo caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie mbuo maiv lueic.
2Thessalonians3:8 Yie mbuo yaac maiv nyanc haaix dauh nyei baeqc hnaangx
2Thessalonians3:9 Yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux
2Thessalonians3:10 Yie mbuo caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie mbuo mbuox meih mbuo
2Thessalonians3:11 Yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc yie mbuo haiz mienh gorngv
2Thessalonians3:12 Yie mbuo dengv Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox hatc naaiv nyungc mienh yaac kuinx ninh mbuo oix zuqc zoux suonc nyei
2Thessalonians3:13 Gorx-youz aac
2Thessalonians3:14 Se gorngv yiem meih mbuo naaic haaix dauh maiv muangx yie mbuo fiev naaiv zeiv fienx nyei waac
2Thessalonians3:15 Mv baac maiv dungx funx ninh zoux win-wangv. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc kuinx ninh hnangv kuinx gorx-youz nor.
2Thessalonians3:16 Tov ceix baengh orn nyei Ziouv ganh zanc-zanc yiem nyungc-nyungc jauv ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo. Tov Ziouv caux meih mbuo zuangx mienh yiem.
2Thessalonians3:17 Yie ganh nanv batv fiev naaiv deix waac
2Thessalonians3:18 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo zuangx mienh.
1Timothy1:1 Yie
1Timothy1:2 Yie fiev fienx bun Ti^mo^tai
1Timothy1:3 Yie kuinx meih yiem njiec E^fe^so Zingh hnangv zinh ndaangc yie oix mingh Maa^si^ndo^nie wuov zanc yie kuinx meih nor. Yiem naaic maaih deix mienh zunh jaav doz-leiz
1Timothy1:4 Oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo guangc
1Timothy1:5 Yie hnangv naaiv nor hatc se weic bun meih mbuo laanh hnamv laanh. Laanh hnangv naaiv hnamv laanh oix zuqc longc cing-nzengc nyei hnyouv
1Timothy1:6 Mv baac maaih deix mienh guangc naaiv deix jauv mingh pien
1Timothy1:7 Ninh mbuo oix zoux fin-saeng njaaux Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc mv baac ninh mbuo gorngv nyei waac ninh mbuo ganh maiv mengh baeqc. Ninh mbuo ngaengc jienv gorngv nyei sic ninh mbuo ganh zungv maiv bieqc hnyouv.
1Timothy1:8 Se gorngv mienh longc duqv horpc nor
1Timothy1:9 Mv baac oix zuqc jangx jienv leiz-latc se maiv zeiz weic kuv mienh liepc daaih. Leiz-latc liepc daaih weic mienh waaic mienh caux maiv muangx leiz nyei mienh
1Timothy1:10 maiv luonx horngc nyei
1Timothy1:11 Naaiv zien doz-leiz se horpc zuqc ceng nyei Tin-Hungh jiu bun yie zunh wuov nyungc njang-laangc nyei kuv fienx.
1Timothy1:12 Yie laengz zingh mbuo nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu
1Timothy1:13 Maiv gunv zinh ndaangc yie ki ninh
1Timothy1:14 Mbuo nyei Ziouv ceix en camv-camv nyei ziouc bun yie kaux Giduc Yesu maaih sienx fim yaac maaih hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv.
1Timothy1:15 Giduc Yesu njiec baamh gen weic njoux zuiz-mienh. Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien haic
1Timothy1:16 Mv baac Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yie
1Timothy1:17 Oix zuqc taaih yietc liuz yiem nyei Hungh Diex
1Timothy1:18 Yie nyei dorn
1Timothy1:19 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc sienx longx yaac maaih kuv laangh fim. Maaih deix mienh waaic laangh fim
1Timothy1:20 Naaiv nyungc mienh maaih i dauh
1Timothy2:1 Hnangv naaiv
1Timothy2:2 Yaac oix zuqc weic zuangx hungh diex caux yietc zungv zoux hlo gunv baeqc fingx wuov deix daux gaux
1Timothy2:3 Hnangv naaiv daux gaux se longx nyei
1Timothy2:4 Tin-Hungh oix maanc mienh duqv njoux yaac oix ninh mbuo hiuv duqv zien leiz.
1Timothy2:5 Weic zuqc maaih nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh hnangv. Yaac maaih nduqc dauh yiem Tin-Hungh caux mienh mbu'ndongx zoux mbu'ndongx mienh
1Timothy2:6 Giduc Yesu siev ninh ganh nyei maengc weic zuoqc maanc mienh nzuonx. Taux horpc nyei ziangh hoc ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun cing Tin-Hungh oix maanc mienh duqv njoux.
1Timothy2:7 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zoux zunh doz mienh yaac paaiv yie zoux gong-zoh
1Timothy2:8 Yie oix yiem norm-norm dorngx nyei m'jangc dorn sung jiez cing-nzengc nyei buoz daux gaux
1Timothy2:9 Yie yaac oix m'sieqv dorn zuqv zong horngh lui-houx. Maiv dungx zorng weic saaix-liangz mienh
1Timothy2:10 M'sieqv dorn oix zuqc zoux kuv sic weic zorng ganh. Naaiv se puix nyiemc sienx Tin-Hungh nyei m'sieqv dorn zoux nyei sic.
1Timothy2:11 Hoqc doz-leiz nyei ziangh hoc
1Timothy2:12 Yie maiv bun m'sieqv dorn njaaux fai longc hatc maaz gunv m'jangc dorn. M'sieqv dorn oix zuqc nzieqc nzingz nyei
1Timothy2:13 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zeix Aa^ndam ndaangc
1Timothy2:14 Zuqc nduov nyei se maiv zeiz Aa^ndam. Zuqc nduov nyei se m'sieqv dorn
1Timothy2:15 Mv baac weic zuqc m'sieqv dorn yungz gu'nguaaz
1Timothy3:1 Naaiv joux waac se za'gengh zien nyei. “Haaix dauh maaih hnyouv oix zoux jiu-baang nyei mienh gox
1Timothy3:2 Jiu-baang nyei mienh gox oix zuqc zoux maiv maaih dorngx daanh nyei mienh
1Timothy3:3 Ninh maiv hengx hopv diuv
1Timothy3:4 Oix zuqc haih gunv duqv longx ganh nyei hmuangv doic
1Timothy3:5 Se gorngv mienh maiv haih gunv duqv ganh nyei hmuangv doic
1Timothy3:6 Siang-sienx nyei mienh maiv horpc zuqc zoux jiu-baang nyei mienh gox. Nzauh heix ninh haih ceng-hlo ziouc zuqc dingc zuiz
1Timothy3:7 Zoux mienh gox nyei mienh oix zuqc dongh jiu-baang ga'nyiec nyei mienh funx mengh hoc longx nyei mienh. Ninh ziouc maiv zuqc mienh daanh yaac maiv zuqc mienv nyei hungh zaeng koux hlopv ninh.
1Timothy3:8 Jiu-baang nyei borng-buoz mienh fih hnangv. Oix zuqc benx mienh taaih nyei mienh
1Timothy3:9 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc longc cing-nzengc nyei laangh fim sienx wuonv Tin-Hungh bun mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih nyei zien leiz.
1Timothy3:10 Haaix dauh oix zoux borng-buoz mienh oix zuqc seix ninh mbuo ndaangc. Buatc ninh mbuo maiv maaih dorngx daanh nor
1Timothy3:11 Fu-sux Ziouv nyei m'sieqv dorn yaac fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc maaih mengh dauh longx
1Timothy3:12 Borng-buoz mienh oix zuqc longc nduqc dauh auv hnangv
1Timothy3:13 Ninh mbuo zoux duqv gong longx ziouc duqv mienh taaih yaac duqv bungx laangc nyei zunh ninh mbuo sienx Giduc Yesu nyei jauv-louc.
1Timothy3:14 Yie hnamv daaih maiv nangc lauh yie oix mingh meih naaic
1Timothy3:15 Hnangv naaic
1Timothy3:16 Mbuo oix zuqc nyiemc mbuo sienx nyei jauv mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih nyei sic za'gengh hlo haic aqv. Ninh hinc cuotv benx dauh baamh mienh
1Timothy4:1 Singx Lingh mengh mengh nyei gorngv
1Timothy4:2 Beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh longc gorngv-baeqc nyei waac nduov weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei laangh fim hnangv buov hlieqv naatv daic mi'aqv.
1Timothy4:3 Ninh mbuo maiv bun mienh dorng jaa
1Timothy4:4 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv
1Timothy4:5 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei waac caux mbuo daux gaux nyei waac bun nyungc-nyungc cing-nzengc daaih.
1Timothy4:6 Se gorngv meih zorqv naaiv deix jauv mbuox gorx-youz mbuo
1Timothy4:7 Oix zuqc simv nqoi maiv sienx Tin-Hungh wuov deix mienh nyei gouv-laic. Yaac oix zuqc hoqc linc gan longx Tin-Hungh.
1Timothy4:8 Hoqc linc sin zaangc nyei qaqv haih tengx duqv nyungc baav. Mv baac hoqc linc gan longx Tin-Hungh weic nyungc-nyungc maaih lamh longc
1Timothy4:9 Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien nyei
1Timothy4:10 Weic naaiv yie mbuo zoux gong kouv
1Timothy4:11 Naaiv deix sic meih oix zuqc hatc mienh
1Timothy4:12 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh laaix meih hnyangx-jeiv lunx mangc faix meih. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc zoux nyungc zeiv longx
1Timothy4:13 Oix zuqc longc hnyouv dorng zuangx doqc Ging-Sou
1Timothy4:14 Maiv dungx bungx lorx meih zipv daaih nyei zingh nyeic
1Timothy4:15 Naaiv deix jauv oix zuqc liepc fiem liepc eix jorm hnyouv zoux
1Timothy4:16 Oix zuqc faix fim longx-longx nyei goux jienv ganh caux ganh njaaux nyei doz-leiz. Meih longc hnyouv zoux nor
1Timothy5:1 Maiv dungx hemx mienh gox mienh. Oix zuqc kuinx ninh hnangv kuinx ganh nyei die nor. Oix zuqc kuinx hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei wuov deix hnangv ganh nyei gorx
1Timothy5:2 Hnyangx-jeiv gox wuov deix m'sieqv dorn oix zuqc kuinx hnangv ganh nyei maa. Gauh lunx wuov deix oix zuqc kuinx hnangv ganh nyei dorc
1Timothy5:3 Oix zuqc taaih ginx maiv lamh kaux dorngx nyei auv-guaav.
1Timothy5:4 Haaix dauh auv-guaav maaih dorn-jueiv fun-faqv
1Timothy5:5 Mv baac dongh maiv lamh kaux dorngx nyei auv-guaav-ndoqc
1Timothy5:6 Kungx hnamv oix ganh duqv njien-youh nyei auv-guaav
1Timothy5:7 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor njaaux zuangx mienh cingx daaih maiv maaih haaix dauh zuqc daanh.
1Timothy5:8 Se gorngv haaix dauh maiv goux ganh nyei cien-ceqv
1Timothy5:9 Auv-guaav oix zuqc buangv luoqc ziepc hnyangx yaac longc jiex nduqc torngx nqox hnangv cingx daaih faaux mbuox yiem auv-guaav daan.
1Timothy5:10 Ninh yaac oix zuqc maaih mengh dauh zoux kuv sic
1Timothy5:11 Lunx wuov deix auv-guaav
1Timothy5:12 Hnangv naaic
1Timothy5:13 Ninh mbuo yaac hoqc saau laangz guangc ziangh hoc bieqc naaiv norm biauv
1Timothy5:14 Weic naaiv yie oix lunx wuov deix auv-guaav aengx longc nqox
1Timothy5:15 Maaih deix auv-guaav-lunx zungv huin nqaang gan Saadaan mi'aqv.
1Timothy5:16 Se gorngv sienx Yesu nyei m'sieqv dorn maaih muoz-doic cien-ceqv zoux auv-guaav
1Timothy5:17 Gunv duqv jiu-baang longx wuov deix mienh gox
1Timothy5:18 Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv
1Timothy5:19 Se gorngv maaih haaix dauh gox jiu-baang nyei mienh gox
1Timothy5:20 Se gorngv haaix laanh jiu-baang nyei mienh gox zanc-zanc baamz zuiz
1Timothy5:21 Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh caux Giduc Yesu caux ginv daaih nyei zuangx fin-mienh longx-longx kuinx meih
1Timothy5:22 Maiv dungx huaang jienv maan haaix dauh weic orn ninh. Maiv dungx caux haaix dauh maaih buonc zoux zuiz. Oix zuqc goux ganh zoux cing-nzengc mienh.
1Timothy5:23 Yangh naaiv jiex
1Timothy5:24 Maaih deix mienh baamz nyei zuiz se nqaengc nyei
1Timothy5:25 Fih hnangv nyei
1Timothy6:1 Zoux nouh wuov deix oix zuqc yiem nyungc-nyungc sic taaih ganh nyei ziouv
1Timothy6:2 Haaix dauh nouh maaih sienx Yesu nyei ziouv
1Timothy6:3 Haaix dauh njaaux ganh nyungc doz-leiz
1Timothy6:4 wuov dauh ceng ganh hlo hnangv
1Timothy6:5 Naaiv nyungc mienh zanc-zanc nzaeng nyinh cox nyouz
1Timothy6:6 Haaix dauh gan longx Tin-Hungh yaac buangv hnyouv ninh maaih nyei
1Timothy6:7 Mbuo maiv duqv dorh haaix nyungc bieqc naaiv baamh gen. Mbuo cuotv baamh gen yaac maiv haih dorh haaix nyungc mingh.
1Timothy6:8 Hnangv naaic
1Timothy6:9 Mv baac mauv oix butv zoih wuov deix mienh zuqc nduov baamz zuiz
1Timothy6:10 Weic zuqc mauv zinh mauv nyaanh se nyungc-nyungc orqv sic nyei gorn. Laaix mauv zinh nyaanh maaih deix mienh leih ninh mbuo sienx nyei jauv ziouc zoux bun ganh zuqc nzauh camv
1Timothy6:11 Ti^mo^tai aah! Meih zoux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziouc oix zuqc biaux nqoi naaiv deix yietc zungv sic. Oix zuqc hungx mingh zoux horpc nyei jauv
1Timothy6:12 Oix zuqc njiec qaqv weic mbuo sienx nyei jauv mborqv longx nyei jaax
1Timothy6:13 Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh
1Timothy6:14 Meih oix zuqc ziepc zuoqv nyei ei jienv naaiv diuh lingc
1Timothy6:15 Tin-Hungh oix ei ninh dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc bun Ziouv Yesu Giduc aengx daaih. Tin-Hungh puix duqv mienh ceng. Ninh nduqc dauh hnangv gauh hlo jiex se zoux maanc hungh nyei Hungh
1Timothy6:16 Kungx Tin-Hungh ganh yietc liuz ziangh jienv. Ninh yiem jienv nyei njang
1Timothy6:17 Oix zuqc hatc yiem naaiv baamh gen nyei butv-zoih mienh maiv dungx zoux maux
1Timothy6:18 Oix zuqc hatc ninh mbuo zoux longx
1Timothy6:19 Hnangv naaiv zoux se siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv zoux gorn-buonv weic nqa'haav hingv ziouc haih duqv zien-zien nyei ziangh maengc.
1Timothy6:20 Ti^mo^tai aah! Dongh jiu bun meih
1Timothy6:21 Maaih deix mienh gorngv ninh mbuo maaih naaiv nyungc wuonh zaang ziouc guangc
2Timothy1:1 Yie
2Timothy1:2 Yie fiev fienx bun yie hnamv haic nyei dorn
2Timothy1:3 Yie laengz zingh Tin-Hungh
2Timothy1:4 Yie jangx zuqc meih nyiemv nyei wuom-mueic ziouc za'gengh! oix buatc meih haic. Duqv buatc meih nor
2Timothy1:5 Yie jangx zuqc meih zien-zien nyei sienx
2Timothy1:6 Weic naaiv yie tengx meih jangx jienv yie maan jienv meih wuov zanc
2Timothy1:7 Tin-Hungh ceix bun mbuo se maiv zeiz gamh nziex nyei hnyouv. Ninh bun mbuo nyei hnyouv maaih qaqv
2Timothy1:8 Hnangv naaic
2Timothy1:9 Tin-Hungh njoux mbuo
2Timothy1:10 Mv baac ih zanc mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Giduc Yesu njiec daaih biux mengh naaiv nyungc en
2Timothy1:11 Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zoux zunh doz mienh
2Timothy1:12 Weic naaiv kuv fienx yie ih zanc hnangv naaiv nor siouc kouv. Mv baac yie maiv nyaiv
2Timothy1:13 Oix zuqc longc meih haiz yie njaaux jiex nyei zien waac zoux nyungc zeiv. Yaac oix zuqc kaux Giduc Yesu duqv daaih nyei sienx fim caux hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv ei jienv zoux.
2Timothy1:14 Singx Lingh yiem mbuo gu'nyuoz. Oix zuqc kaux Singx Lingh goux jienv jiu bun meih nyei zien leiz.
2Timothy1:15 Meih hiuv duqv Esie Saengv nyei mienh yietc zungv guangc yie nzengc
2Timothy1:16 Yie tov Ziouv korv-lienh O^ne^si^fo^latv wuov biauv mienh weic zuqc O^ne^si^fo^latv nunz yie nyei hnyouv ziex nzunc. Yie zuqc limc ndoh jienv
2Timothy1:17 Yietv taux Lomaa Zingh ninh ziouc njiec qaqv zimh lorz yie
2Timothy1:18 Meih yaac hiuv duqv yiem E^fe^so Zingh wuov zanc ninh tengx yie ndongc haaix camv! Yie ziouc tov Ziouv
2Timothy2:1 Yie nyei dorn aac
2Timothy2:2 Meih haiz yie dorng jienv zorng-zengx mienh camv nyei nza'hmien njaaux wuov deix waac
2Timothy2:3 Meih oix zuqc caux yie mbuo maaih buonc siouc kouv naanc hnangv Giduc Yesu nyei kuv baeng.
2Timothy2:4 Dorng baeng nyei mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh zanc-zanc la'nyauv ga'nyiec nyei sic. Ninh kungx oix zoux bun gunv ninh wuov dauh baeng-bieiv buangv hnyouv hnangv.
2Timothy2:5 Ndouv saaix nyei mienh saaix nyei ziangh hoc
2Timothy2:6 cuotv qaqv zoux ndeic nyei mienh maaih leiz duqv ninh nyei buonc laangh ziqc ndaangc.
2Timothy2:7 Meih oix zuqc longx-longx nyei hnamv taux yie gorngv nyei waac
2Timothy2:8 Oix zuqc jangx jienv Yesu Giduc
2Timothy2:9 Weic naaiv kuv fienx yie zuqc siouc kouv
2Timothy2:10 Hnangv naaic yie weic Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei mienh diev nyungc-nyungc
2Timothy2:11 Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien nyei. “Se gorngv mbuo caux ninh daic
2Timothy2:12 Se gorngv mbuo diev taux daauh
2Timothy2:13 Maiv gunv mbuo hnyouv maiv zingx
2Timothy2:14 Oix zuqc mbuox zuangx mienh jangx jienv naaiv deix sic. Yaac oix zuqc yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien hatc ninh mbuo maiv dungx nzaeng nyinh nzaeng nyouz. Nzaeng nyinh nyouz se maiv lamh longc
2Timothy2:15 Meih oix zuqc njiec qaqv zoux nyungc-nyungc weic bun Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv
2Timothy2:16 Oix zuqc simv nqoi maiv sienx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh nyei henh mbienx waac
2Timothy2:17 Naaiv nyungc waac oix faanv jienv mingh hnangv butv doqc haic nyei faang huv jienv orv mingh nor. Njaaux naaiv nyungc waac nyei mienh maaih i dauh heuc Hi^me^ne^atc caux Fi^le^tatv.
2Timothy2:18 Ninh mbuo guangc zien leiz nyei jauv yaac gorngv mienh nangh daaih nyei hnoi jiex liuz aqv
2Timothy2:19 Mv baac Tin-Hungh liepc daaih nyei gorn-ndoqv se wuonv haic yaac maaih yienx nqaapv jienv gorngv
2Timothy2:20 Yietc norm domh biauv nyei jaa-dorngx
2Timothy2:21 Se gorngv haaix dauh fioux ganh cing-nzengc
2Timothy2:22 Hnangv naaic
2Timothy2:23 Oix zuqc simv jienv mienh nzaeng hngongx haic
2Timothy2:24 Ziouv nyei bou maiv horpc zuqc nzaeng jaax. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc zoux longx bun zuangx mienh
2Timothy2:25 Oix zuqc longc suonc hnyouv kuinx caux ninh doix-dekc wuov deix mienh. Nziex Tin-Hungh oix bun ninh mbuo maaih qangx goiv hnyouv
2Timothy2:26 Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo haih nzang daaih ziouc biaux ndutv mienv nyei hungh nyei koux
2Timothy3:1 Meih oix zuqc hiuv duqv taux setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc maaih kouv haic nyei sic.
2Timothy3:2 Baamh mienh kungx oix hnamv ganh hnangv
2Timothy3:3 Ninh mbuo maiv hnamv mienh
2Timothy3:4 maaic guoqv maaic gorx-youz
2Timothy3:5 beih zaangc zoux hnangv sienx Tin-Hungh
2Timothy3:6 Maaih deix naaiv nyungc mienh borngz bieqc mienh nyei biauv gunv hnyouv hngongx nyei m'sieqv dorn
2Timothy3:7 Naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn maiv gunv zanc-zanc hoqc mv baac hoqc taux haaix zanc maiv haih hiuv zien leiz.
2Timothy3:8 Zinh ndaangc Yannetv caux Yam^mbe hnangv haaix nor ngaengc Mose
2Timothy3:9 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux mv baac zoux maiv duqv ndongc haaix lauh weic zuqc zuangx mienh ziouc buatc ninh mbuo ndongc haaix hngongx
2Timothy3:10 Mv baac meih hiuv duqv yie njaaux nyei doz-leiz
2Timothy3:11 buatc yie zuqc mienh zoux doqc yaac zuqc siouc kouv. Meih yaac hiuv duqv yiem An^ti^okc Mungv
2Timothy3:12 Haaix dauh oix caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh
2Timothy3:13 Orqv nyei mienh caux nduov mienh nyei mienh yietc hnoi beiv yietc hnoi waaic
2Timothy3:14 Mv baac meih ganh hoqc liuz
2Timothy3:15 Yiem meih zoux fu'jueiv nyei ziangh hoc meih zungv hiuv duqv Ging-Sou. Ging-Sou haih bun meih maaih cong-mengh hiuv duqv oix zuqc sienx kaux Giduc Yesu cingx duqv njoux.
2Timothy3:16 Douc-douc Ging-Sou
2Timothy3:17 Hnangv naaic ziouc bun Tin-Hungh nyei mienh duqv dunh yunh nzoih weic zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic.
2Timothy4:1 Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh yaac dorng jienv Giduc Yesu
2Timothy4:2 Oix zuqc zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz. Maiv gunv maaih qangx fai maiv maaih qangx
2Timothy4:3 Ziangh hoc oix taux
2Timothy4:4 Ninh mbuo maiv oix muangx zien leiz ziouc hlioux m'normh mingh muangx maiv maaih gorn-buonv nyei gouv-laic.
2Timothy4:5 Mv baac meih ganh yiem maanc sic oix zuqc gunv jienv ganh
2Timothy4:6 Yie ih zanc zuqc ciev ziec. Yie leih seix nyei ziangh hoc yaac taux aqv.
2Timothy4:7 Yie longc nzengc qaqv mborqv liuz longx nyei jaax aqv. Yie saaix tiux yaac tiux taux dorngx mi'aqv. Yie sienx nyei doz yie goux longx aqv.
2Timothy4:8 Ih zanc maaih norm ningv liouh jienv bun yie
2Timothy4:9 Tov meih siepv-siepv nyei daaih yie naaiv oc
2Timothy4:10 weic zuqc Ndemaatv hnamv naaiv baamh gen nyei jauv ziouc guangc yie mingh Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa Zingh mi'aqv. Ke^le^sen mingh Gaa^laa^tie Saengv
2Timothy4:11 Kungx Lugaa caux yie yiem naaiv hnangv. Tov meih mingh lorz Maako
2Timothy4:12 Yie paaiv Ti^ki^gatc mingh E^fe^so Zingh mi'aqv.
2Timothy4:13 Meih daaih nyei ziangh hoc
2Timothy4:14 Wuov dauh dongh zaangc
2Timothy4:15 Meih ganh oix zuqc mbungh jienv ninh
2Timothy4:16 Yie jaiv da'yietv nzunc sin wuov zanc
2Timothy4:17 Mv baac Ziouv caux yie yiem
2Timothy4:18 Ziouv yaac oix njoux yie leih ndutv nyungc-nyungc orqv sic
2Timothy4:19 Yie jangx taux Bitc^sinx^laa caux Aa^kuin^laa yaac jangx taux O^ne^si^fo^latv wuov biauv mienh.
2Timothy4:20 E^latv^tatv corc yiem Ko^lin^to Zingh. Do^fi^matv butv baengc
2Timothy4:21 Tov meih jienv sic daaih yie naaiv ndaangc dong-gen hnoi oc. Yu^mbu^latv
2Timothy4:22 Tov Ziouv caux meih yiem yaac tov ninh ceix en bun meih mbuo.
Titus1:1 Yie
Titus1:2 Ninh mbuo sienx nyei caux hiuv nyei zien leiz nyei gorn-ndoqv se bun mienh maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc
Titus1:3 Dingc daaih nyei nyutc zeiv taux
Titus1:4 Tidatc aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih
Titus1:5 Yie liouh meih yiem wuov Kelitv Koiv-Nzou
Titus1:6 Jiu-baang nyei mienh gox oix zuqc zoux maiv maaih dorngx daanh nyei mienh
Titus1:7 Weic zuqc jiu-baang nyei mienh gox se Tin-Hungh nyei gunv gong mienh
Titus1:8 Daaux nzuonx ninh oix zuqc maaih hnyouv zipv kaeqv
Titus1:9 Ninh oix zuqc goux longx kaux duqv wuonv nyei zien doz
Titus1:10 Weic zuqc maaih mienh camv nyei
Titus1:11 Meih ndongc haaix zungv oix zuqc zoux bun naaiv deix mienh sekv
Titus1:12 Ninh mbuo Kelitv Mienh ganh maaih dauh douc waac mienh gorngv jiex naaiv deix waac. “Kelitv Mienh zanc-zanc gorngv-baeqc
Titus1:13 Ninh gorngv nyei waac za'gengh zien nyei. Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc hniev-hniev nyei gorngv ninh mbuo
Titus1:14 maiv muangx Yiutai Mienh nyei gouv-laic
Titus1:15 Cing-nzengc nyei mienh funx nyungc-nyungc se cing-nzengc nyei. Mv baac waaic nyei
Titus1:16 Ninh mbuo gorngv ninh mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh mv baac ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic bun cing ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh. Ninh mbuo se mienh youx mienh
Titus2:1 Meih njaaux mienh
Titus2:2 Oix zuqc njaaux hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei m'jangc dorn zanv duqv ganh
Titus2:3 Fih hnangv nyei
Titus2:4 Hnangv naaic
Titus2:5 haih gunv duqv ganh
Titus2:6 Fih hnangv nyei
Titus2:7 Yiem maanc sic meih yaac oix zuqc zoux longx nyei nyungc zeiv bun ninh mbuo zuotc. Njaaux doz nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc ziepc zuoqv nyei longc hnyouv njaaux.
Titus2:8 Oix zuqc longc maaih gorn-ndoqv nyei waac
Titus2:9 Oix zuqc njaaux zoux nouh wuov deix yiem nyungc-nyungc sic mbuoqc ganh nyei ziouv gunv
Titus2:10 yaac maiv dungx nimc ziouv nyei nyaanh. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem maanc sic bun cing ninh mbuo zanc-zanc ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux weic bun ninh mbuo zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc duqv mienh taaih mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh nyei doz.
Titus2:11 Tin-Hungh nyei en zungv biux mengh cuotv daaih weic bun maanc mienh duqv njoux.
Titus2:12 Naaiv nyungc en njaaux mbuo guangc nqoi dongh maiv taaih Tin-Hungh nyei caux baamh mienh hnyouv hanc zoux nyei yietc zungv
Titus2:13 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux zuov jienv mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei orn-lorqc
Titus2:14 Ninh weic mbuo siev ninh ganh nyei maengc zuoqc mbuo nzuonx
Titus2:15 Meih oix zuqc longc naaiv deix waac njaaux mienh. Oix zuqc longc nzengc meih nyei hatc maaz kuinx mienh
Titus3:1 Oix zuqc tengx sienx Yesu nyei mienh jangx jienv. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc mbuoqc hungh jaa jien-fouv gunv. Oix zuqc ei jienv ninh mbuo nyei waac zoux yaac liuc leiz ziangx zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic.
Titus3:2 Oix zuqc mbuox mienh maiv dungx gorngv doqc haaix dauh
Titus3:3 Zinh ndaangc mbuo ganh yaac hngongx
Titus3:4 Mv baac mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh bun cing ninh zoux longx yaac hnamv mienh wuov zanc
Titus3:5 ninh njoux mbuo. Se maiv zeiz weic mbuo zoux nyei haaix nyungc kuv sic
Titus3:6 Tin-Hungh yaac longc mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Yesu Giduc dox Singx Lingh camv-camv nyei bun mbuo
Titus3:7 ziouc bun mbuo weic ninh nyei en haih duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv yaac duqv zipv yietc liuz nyei maengc
Titus3:8 Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien nyei. Yie oix meih hniev-hniev nyei gorngv naaiv deix sic weic bun sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh jorm hnyouv zoux kuv sic. Naaiv deix sic se longx nyei yaac weic zuangx mienh maaih lamh longc.
Titus3:9 Mv baac oix zuqc simv nqoi
Titus3:10 Haaix dauh ceux lunc zoux bun jiu-baang bun nqoi
Titus3:11 Weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv naaiv nyungc mienh se waaic nzengc mi'aqv. Ninh nyei zuiz biux mengh ninh se dorngc.
Titus3:12 Yie paaiv Aan^te^maatv fai Ti^ki^gatc mingh meih naaic wuov zanc
Titus3:13 Yaac oix zuqc longc hnyouv tengx caengx sic mienh
Titus3:14 Oix zuqc mbuox mbuo nyei mienh hoqc longc ninh mbuo nyei ziangh hoc zoux longx nyei sic
Titus3:15 Caux yie yiem naaiv nyei zuangx mienh jangx taux meih. Aengx mbuox dongh hnamv yie mbuo
Philemon1:1 Yie
Philemon1:2 yaac fiev bun yie mbuo nyei muoc
Philemon1:3 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo.
Philemon1:4 Fi^le^mon youz aac
Philemon1:5 weic zuqc yie haiz gorngv meih sienx longx Ziouv Yesu yaac hnamv haic Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh.
Philemon1:6 Yie tov Tin-Hungh bun mbuo weic mbuo dongh nyungc sienx maaih nyei jiu tong
Philemon1:7 Youz aac
Philemon1:8 Weic zuqc mbuo se lomh nzoih sienx Giduc nyei gorx-youz
Philemon1:9 Mv baac weic zuqc yie hnamv meih
Philemon1:10 Yie tengx yie nyei dorn
Philemon1:11 Zinh ndaangc meih buatc ninh maiv lamh longc. Mv baac ih zanc ninh weic meih yaac weic yie maaih lamh longc haic aqv.
Philemon1:12 Ih zanc yie fungx ninh nzuonx meih naaic
Philemon1:13 Yie weic kuv fienx zuqc wuonx jienv loh yaac haiz oix liouh ninh yiem naaiv div meih tengx yie.
Philemon1:14 Mv baac yie maiv gaengh zoux haaix nyungc taux meih nqoi nzuih
Philemon1:15 Nziex O^ne^si^matv leih caamx baav meih se weic bun meih duqv ninh nzuonx daaih yietc liuz yiem.
Philemon1:16 Mv baac ih zanc ninh maiv zeiz kungx zoux nouh
Philemon1:17 Hnangv naaiv
Philemon1:18 Se gorngv ninh zoux haaix nyungc dorngc meih fai qiemx meih nyei haaix nyungc zaeqv
Philemon1:19 Yie longc yie ganh nyei buoz fiev naaiv. “Yie

Philemon1:21 Yie fiev naaiv zeiv fienx
Philemon1:22 Aengx maaih diuc. Tov meih mbuo liuc leiz dorngx bun yie hitv. Yie hnamv daaih Tin-Hungh oix dau meih mbuo daux gaux nyei waac bun yie maiv lauh aengx duqv nzuonx meih mbuo naaic.

Hebrews1:1 Loz-hnoi Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh yaac longc camv-nyungc za'eix caux mbuo nyei ong-taaix mbuo gorngv camv-nzunc.
Hebrews1:2 Mv baac yiem naaiv deix setv mueiz nyei hnoi Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei Dorn caux mbuo gorngv. Naaiv dauh Dorn Tin-Hungh longc zeix maanc muotc yaac paaiv ninh nzipc maanc muotc benx ninh nyei jaa-dingh.
Hebrews1:3 Ninh aengv Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc
Hebrews1:4 Naaiv dauh Dorn duqv zoux gauh hlo jiex fin-mienh ndongc Tin-Hungh cuotv bun ninh wuov norm mbuox gauh hlo jiex zuangx fin-mienh nyei mbuox.
Hebrews1:5 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh maiv mbuox jiex haaix dauh fin-mienh
Hebrews1:6 Aengx maaih nzunc
Hebrews1:7 Gorngv taux fin-mienh wuov zanc Tin-Hungh gorngv
Hebrews1:8 Mv baac gorngv taux ninh nyei Dorn wuov zanc
Hebrews1:9 Zoux horpc nyei jauv meih hnamv
Hebrews1:10 Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv
Hebrews1:11 Lungh ndau zungv oix zuqc mietc
Hebrews1:12 Meih oix zorqv lungh ndau njunc jienv hnangv njunc domh lui. Lungh ndau ziouc goiv yienc hnangv yienc lui mv baac meih yietc liuz hnangv loz wuov nor. Meih nyei hnyangx-jeiv yietc liuz yaac maiv jomc.”
Hebrews1:13 Tin-Hungh maiv mbuox jiex haaix dauh fin-mienh
Hebrews1:14 Wuov nyungc
Hebrews2:1 Weic naaiv
Hebrews2:2 Fin-mienh douc wuov deix waac se zien nyei. Haaix dauh baamz
Hebrews2:3 Wuov nyungc
Hebrews2:4 Tin-Hungh ganh yaac zoux zorng-zengx. Ninh zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh
Hebrews2:5 Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz paaiv fin-mienh gunv oix daaih wuov norm siang-lungh ndiev
Hebrews2:6 Mv baac
Hebrews2:7 Meih bun ninh maaih douc zoux gauh aiv deix fin-mienh
Hebrews2:8 zungv orn ninh gunv maanc muotc.” Tin-Hungh orn ninh gunv maanc muotc bun cing maiv maaih haaix nyungc Tin-Hungh maiv bun ninh gunv. Mv baac ih zanc mbuo maiv gaengh buatc ninh gunv maanc muotc.
Hebrews2:9 Daaux nzuonx mbuo buatc Yesu
Hebrews2:10 Tin-Hungh zeix maanc muotc yaac zeix daaih weic ninh ganh. Hnangv naaic Tin-Hungh bun Yesu siouc kouv weic bun ninh dunh yunh nzoih se zoux duqv horpc nyei. Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv zoux weic dorh mienh camv daaih zipv ninh nyei njang-laangc weic zuqc Yesu zoux bieiv dorh ninh mbuo duqv njoux.

Hebrews3:1 Sienx Giduc nyei gorx-youz aac
Hebrews3:2 Yesu ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux paaiv ninh daaih wuov dauh nyei gong
Hebrews3:3 Yesu yaac puix duqv mienh taaih gauh camv Mose
Hebrews3:4 Mouz norm biauv m'daaih maaih laanh mienh gomv. Mv baac maanc muotc se Tin-Hungh ganh zeix daaih.
Hebrews3:5 Mose ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bou tengx Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh weic zoux zorng-zengx gorngv Tin-Hungh nqa'haav hingv oix gorngv nyei sic.
Hebrews3:6 Mv baac Giduc zoux Dorn ziepc zuoqv nyei gunv Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh. Se gorngv mbuo bungx laangc sienx wuonv mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei
Hebrews3:7 Wuov nyungc
Hebrews3:8 maiv dungx zoux hnyouv ngaengc hnangv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem deic-bung-huaang ngaengc jienv seix Tin-Hungh wuov nzunc nor.
Hebrews3:9 Feix ziepc hnyangx gu'nyuoz meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix buatc yie zoux nyei jauv
Hebrews3:10 Yie ziouc nouz haic wuov doic mienh yaac gorngv
Hebrews3:11 Yie qiex jiez haic
Hebrews3:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
Hebrews3:13 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi laanh kuinx laanh
Hebrews3:14 Se gorngv mbuo sienx wuonv taux daauh taux mueiz hnangv yiem gorn sienx wuov nor
Hebrews3:15 Ging-Sou gorngv
Hebrews3:16 Haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac mv baac corc cuoqv ninh wuov deix se dongh haaix deix? Dongh Mose dorh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov deix yietc zungv maiv zeiz?
Hebrews3:17 Tin-Hungh nouz feix ziepc hnyangx wuov deix dongh haaix deix? Dongh baamz zuiz zuqc guangc sei yiem deic-bung-huaang wuov deix maiv zeiz?

Hebrews3:19 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews4:1 Tin-Hungh laengz bun mbuo duqv bieqc ninh hitv kuonx nyei dorngx wuov deix waac corc maiv gaengh jiex. Wuov nyungc
Hebrews4:2 Yie mbuo haiz liuz kuv fienx hnangv ninh mbuo haiz nor. Mv baac ninh mbuo haiz liuz nyei kuv fienx maiv tengx haaix nyungc ninh mbuo
Hebrews4:3 Mbuo sienx nyei mienh za'gengh duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh laengz bun nyei hitv kuonx dorngx. Wuov norm hitv kuonx dorngx se dongh Tin-Hungh gorngv
Hebrews4:4 Weic zuqc yiem Ging-Sou maaih norm dorngx gorngv
Hebrews4:5 Aengx hnangv a'jang gorngv liuz wuov deix waac
Hebrews4:6 Haiz kuv fienx ndaangc wuov deix maiv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei hitv kuonx dorngx weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv muangx waac. Mv baac maaih deix duqv bieqc nyei.
Hebrews4:7 Weic naaiv
Hebrews4:8 Se gorngv Yo^su^waa bun ninh mbuo duqv hitv kuonx
Hebrews4:9 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews4:10 weic zuqc haaix dauh duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh bun nyei hitv kuonx dorngx
Hebrews4:11 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews4:12 Tin-Hungh nyei waac se nangh nyei
Hebrews4:13 Maiv maaih haaix nyungc bingx duqv Tin-Hungh jienv. Daaux nzuonx maanc muotc yietc zungv yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien koi nqoi nzengc. Mbuo yaac oix zuqc zorqv mbuo nyei nyungc-nyungc binv mengh mbuox ninh.
Hebrews4:14 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews4:15 Mbuo nyei domh sai mienh maiv zeiz maiv hiuv mbuo mau nyei dorngx
Hebrews4:16 Weic naaiv mbuo oix zuqc bungx laangc nyei mingh taux Tin-Hungh ceix en nyei weic. Yiem naaic mbuo qiemx zuqc nyei ziangh hoc ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yaac ceix en bun mbuo.
Hebrews5:1 Dauh dauh domh sai mienh se yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx ginv cuotv daaih yaac orn ninh div zuangx mienh fu-sux Tin-Hungh. Ninh oix zuqc weic zuangx mienh nyei zuiz dorh zingh nyeic caux ziec nyei ga'naaiv fungx bun Tin-Hungh.
Hebrews5:2 Weic zuqc domh sai mienh ganh maaih ziex diuc mau nyei
Hebrews5:3 Weic zuqc ninh ganh yaac mau
Hebrews5:4 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih taaih ganh zoux gauh hlo jiex nyei domh sai mienh. Se Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh zoux hnangv paaiv Aalon nor.
Hebrews5:5 Fih hnangv nyei
Hebrews5:6 Aengx maaih norm dorngx ninh gorngv
Hebrews5:7 Yesu corc yiem naaiv baamh gen wuov zanc
Hebrews5:8 Maiv gunv Yesu zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn
Hebrews5:9 Tin-Hungh bun ninh dunh yunh liuz
Hebrews5:10 Tin-Hungh yaac paaiv ninh zoux domh sai mienh hnangv Men^ki^se^ndekc wuov nyungc sai mienh nor.
Hebrews5:11 Yie mbuo corc maaih waac camv nyei gorngv zoux sai mienh nyei jauv mv baac aqc duqv gorngv mengh weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei m'normh maiv zaangh waac.
Hebrews5:12 Taux ih zanc meih mbuo zungv horpc zuqc zoux fin-saeng

Hebrews5:14 Hnaangx se weic domh mienh nyanc
Hebrews6:1 Hnangv naaic

Hebrews6:7 Haaix nzong ndeic zanc-zanc duqv mbiungc-wuom longx

Hebrews6:9 Hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz aac

Hebrews6:12 Yie mbuo maiv oix meih mbuo lueic

Hebrews6:14 Ninh gorngv mbuox Apc^laa^ham

Hebrews7:1 Naaiv dauh Men^ki^se^ndekc zoux Saalem Zingh nyei hungh yaac zoux Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh nyei sai mienh. Apc^laa^ham mingh mborqv hingh wuov deix biei dauh hungh diex liuz
Hebrews7:2 Apc^laa^ham yaac zorqv ninh mborqv hingh caangv duqv daaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv
Hebrews7:3 Maiv maaih sou gorngv haaix dauh zoux Men^ki^se^ndekc nyei die fai maa
Hebrews7:4 Hnamv mangc gaax
Hebrews7:5 Ziux leiz-latc dingc
Hebrews7:6 Men^ki^se^ndekc maiv zeiz Lewi nyei douh zong

Hebrews7:9 Se gorngv aengx gorngv nyungc
Hebrews7:10 Weic zuqc Men^ki^se^ndekc buangh Apc^laa^ham wuov zanc

Hebrews7:15 Aengx maaih diuc bun mbuo zungv gauh mengh baeqc

Hebrews7:23 Wuov deix sai mienh maaih camv nyei

Hebrews7:26 Hnangv naaic

Hebrews8:4 Se gorngv ninh yiem baamh gen nor
Hebrews8:5 Naaiv deix sai mienh zoux nyei gong se kungx zoux yiem tin-dorngh maaih nyei nyungc zeiv caux mou zeiv hnangv. Mose yaac fih hnangv nyei. Ninh oix zoux zaangc Ziouv nyei ndopv-liuh wuov zanc

Hebrews8:13 Tin-Hungh gorngv taux siang-ngaengc waac ziouc bun daauh nzunc nyei ngaengc waac jiex mi'aqv. Haaix nyungc jiex ziangh hoc yaac loz
Hebrews9:1 Da'yietv nzunc laengz nyei ngaengc waac maaih zoux leiz-baaix nyei yietc nyeic yaac maaih mienh zoux daaih nyei singx dinc.
Hebrews9:2 Ninh mbuo corng norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh. Ga'nyiec wuov qongx heuc Cing-Nzengc nyei Dorngx. Naaiv qongx gu'nyuoz maaih norm dang-jaax yaac maaih norm dieh an njuov gengx Tin-Hungh.
Hebrews9:3 Da'nyeic kang mbaeqc gaengh ndie gu'nyuoz maengx wuov qongx heuc Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx.
Hebrews9:4 Wuov qongx maaih buov hung nyei jiem-dieh caux buang jienv jiem wuov norm Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang. Faang gu'nyuoz maaih norm jiem-ongx dapv jienv maa^naa
Hebrews9:5 Faang gu'nguaaic maaih njang-laangc nyei Ke^lu^mbim. Ninh mbuo nyei ndaatv yang gomv jienv Tin-Hungh ceix en nyei weic. Mv baac ih zanc maiv maaih ziangh hoc gorngv muonc naaiv deix sic.
Hebrews9:6 Naaiv deix ga'naaiv hnangv naaiv nor mbenc nzoih

Hebrews9:11 Mv baac ih zanc Giduc zungv taux daaih

Hebrews9:14 Wuov nyungc
Hebrews9:15 Weic naaiv Giduc zoux siang-ngaengc waac nyei mbu'ndongx mienh

Hebrews9:22 Ziux leiz-latc nor

Hebrews10:1 Leiz-latc se maiv zeiz nqa'haav oix daaih wuov deix zien sic. Leiz-latc kungx zoux wuov deix longx nyei sic nyei nyungc zeiv caux dongh linh hnangv. Weic naaiv mienh hnyangx-hnyangx zanc-zanc dongh wuov nyungc ga'naaiv dorh mingh ziec
Hebrews10:2 Se gorngv haih bun ninh mbuo yietc liuz cing-nzengc ninh mbuo ziouc haiz maiv maaih zuiz
Hebrews10:3 Mv baac mienh ziec nyei ga'naaiv tengx ninh mbuo hnyangx-hnyangx jangx zuqc ganh nyei zuiz
Hebrews10:4 weic zuqc ngongh gouv nziaamv caux yungh nyei nziaamv zungv maiv haih nzaaux maiv ndutv zuiz.

Hebrews10:39 Mv baac mbuo maiv zeiz hluotv nqaang zuqc mietc nyei mienh. Mbuo sienx Tin-Hungh yaac zoux duqv njoux nyei mienh.
Hebrews11:1 Sienx fim se sienx dingc mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei za'gengh oix duqv

Hebrews11:26 Ninh funx weic Giduc diev nyaiv gauh zic I^yipv Deic-Bung jaaix jiex nyei zinh zoih
