Hebrews11:31 Weic maaic buonv-sin wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Hebrews11:32 Yie oix zuqc aengx gorngv jienv mingh fai? Yie maiv maaih ziangh hoc gorngv Gi^nde^on
Hebrews11:33 Weic ninh mbuo maaih sienx fim
Hebrews11:34 mborqv daic domh douz
Hebrews11:35 Maaih deix m'sieqv dorn weic maaih sienx fim duqv ninh mbuo daic mingh nyei mienh aengx nangh daaih. Aengx maaih deix mienh zuqc mienh zeix taux daic
Hebrews11:36 Maaih deix zuqc mienh guatc doqc jatv
Hebrews11:37 Maaih deix zuqc mienh longc la'bieiv zong
Hebrews11:38 Naaiv norm baamh gen zungv maiv puix ninh mbuo yiem. Ninh mbuo youh jienv deic-bung-huaang
Hebrews11:39 Naaiv deix mienh duqv mengh dauh longx weic zuqc ninh mbuo maaih sienx fim
Hebrews11:40 Tin-Hungh weic mbuo dingc ziangx gauh longx nyei za'eix. Se wuov deix mienh oix zuqc caux mbuo yietc jauv cingx daaih haih duqv dunh yunh nzoih.
Hebrews12:1 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews12:2 Tiux mingh oix zuqc mangc dingc Yesu
Hebrews12:3 Meih mbuo hnamv mangc gaax
Hebrews12:4 Meih mbuo caux zuiz borngz jaax
Hebrews12:5 Meih mbuo la'kuqv Tin-Hungh kuinx meih mbuo hnangv die kuinx dorn wuov deix waac fai? Ninh gorngv
Hebrews12:6 Weic zuqc Ziouv mborqv njaaux ninh hnamv nyei mienh
Hebrews12:7 Meih mbuo zuqc diev nyei kouv naanc se weic mborqv njaaux. Tin-Hungh zoux bun meih mbuo hnangv zoux bun ninh nyei dorn-jueiv nor. Maaih haaix dauh dorn-jueiv maiv zuqc ninh nyei die mborqv njaaux jiex?
Hebrews12:8 Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv hnangv ninh nyei dorn mbuo zuqc mborqv njaaux
Hebrews12:9 Aengx maaih diuc
Hebrews12:10 Mbuo nyei cien die mborqv njaaux mbuo se ziux ninh mbuo buatc horpc zuqc njaaux nyei
Hebrews12:11 Zuqc mborqv njaaux wuov zanc
Hebrews12:12 Hnangv naaiv
Hebrews12:13 Oix zuqc zoux jauv yuonh nyei. Zaux waaic nyei mienh ziouc maiv jaa waaic
Hebrews12:14 Oix zuqc longc hnyouv caux zuangx mienh horpc fim dongh eix nyei yiem yaac longc hnyouv zoux cing-nzengc mienh. Haaix dauh maiv cing-nzengc
Hebrews12:15 Oix zuqc faix fim
Hebrews12:16 Yaac maiv dungx bun haaix dauh zoux buangh liouh nyei sic fai maiv taaih Tin-Hungh hnangv Esaau nor. Esaau weic yietc donx hnaangx maaic ninh zoux dorn-la'gauv duqv sung-gouv nyei leiz.
Hebrews12:17 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv nqa'haav ninh oix duqv ninh nyei die buang nyei waac mv baac zuqc nqemh
Hebrews12:18 Meih mbuo maiv zeiz hnangv loz-hnoi nyei I^saa^laa^en Mienh mingh taux hluo duqv zuqc nyei Sinaai Mbong
Hebrews12:19 maaih nzatc mbui
Hebrews12:20 weic zuqc ninh mbuo siouc maiv duqv wuov deix hatc nyei waac
Hebrews12:21 Ninh mbuo buatc nyei sic za'gengh gamh nziex haic aqv. Liemh Mose ganh yaac gorngv
Hebrews12:22 Meih mbuo mingh nyei se mingh taux Si^on Mbong
Hebrews12:23 Meih mbuo mingh taux Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx dorn-la'gauv
Hebrews12:24 Meih mbuo yaac mingh taux Yesu
Hebrews12:25 Faix fim oc
Hebrews12:26 Wuov zanc ninh nyei qiex ndanc ndau dongz
Hebrews12:27 Gorngv “aengx maaih nzunc” wuov joux waac bun cing zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc ndanc dongz nzengc ziouc zuqc zorqv cuotv mi'aqv
Hebrews12:28 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews12:29 weic zuqc mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh se henv haic nyei douz
Hebrews13:1 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zanc-zanc hnangv muoz-doic nor
Hebrews13:2 Oix zuqc jangx jienv longc hnyouv zipv maiv buatc jiex nyei kaeqv mienh. Maaih deix mienh zipv kaeqv ziouc zipv zuqc fin-mienh yaac liemh maiv hiuv.
Hebrews13:3 Oix zuqc jangx jienv zuqc wuonx loh nyei mienh hnangv meih mbuo ganh yaac caux jienv ninh mbuo zuqc wuonx loh nor. Yaac oix zuqc jangx jienv zuqc mienh zoux doqc wuov deix
Hebrews13:4 Dauh dauh oix zuqc taaih dorng jaa nyei leiz
Hebrews13:5 Maiv dungx bun mauv nyaanh nyei jauv gunv meih mbuo nyei maengc. Meih mbuo maaih nyei
Hebrews13:6 Hnangv naaic mbuo oix zuqc bungx dingc hnyouv gorngv
Hebrews13:7 Oix zuqc jangx jienv zinh ndaangc dorh meih mbuo wuov deix bieiv zeiv
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Giduc maiv goiv yienc. A'hnoi
Hebrews13:9 Maiv dungx bun haaix nyungc ganh nyungc leiz dorh meih mbuo yangh dorngc jauv. Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh nyei en bun hnyouv wuonv se gauh longx kaux nyanc hopv nyei leiz-nyeic. Mienh kaux nyanc hopv nyei leiz-nyeic se maiv tengx yietc deix ninh mbuo.
Hebrews13:10 Mbuo maaih norm ziec-dorngh. Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh fu-sux Tin-Hungh wuov deix sai mienh maiv maaih leiz nyanc yiem mbuo nyei ziec-dorngh ziec nyei ga'naaiv.
Hebrews13:11 Yiutai Mienh nyei domh sai mienh dorh saeng-kuv nyei nziaamv bieqc Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex Wuov Qongx weic fiqv zuiz. Mv baac saeng-kuv nyei sei dorh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc ndopv-liuh ciangv buov nzengc.
Hebrews13:12 Weic naaiv Yesu yaac yiem ga'nyiec ziqc zingh gaengh siouc kouv taux daic weic longc ninh ganh nyei nziaamv nzaaux baeqc fingx cing-nzengc daaih.
Hebrews13:13 Wuov nyungc
Hebrews13:14 Weic zuqc yiem naaiv baamh gen mbuo maiv maaih yietc liuz wuonv nyei zingh
Hebrews13:15 Hnangv naaic
Hebrews13:16 Maiv dungx la'kuqv zoux kuv sic
Hebrews13:17 Oix zuqc muangx meih mbuo nyei bieiv zeiv yaac mbuoqc ninh mbuo gunv. Ninh mbuo zanc-zanc goux jienv meih mbuo weic zuqc ninh mbuo oix zuqc gorngv mengh ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong mbuox Tin-Hungh. Oix zuqc muangx ninh mbuo weic bun ninh mbuo njien-youh nyei zoux ninh mbuo nyei gong. Maiv zei aeqv
Hebrews13:18 Tov tengx yie mbuo daux gaux. Yie mbuo hiuv dingc yie mbuo nyei hnyouv cing-nzengc
Hebrews13:19 Yie yaac qaqv tov meih mbuo daux gaux jouh Tin-Hungh bun yie siepv-siepv nyei haih nzuonx meih mbuo naaic.
Hebrews13:20 Tov ceix baengh orn nyei Tin-Hungh
Hebrews13:21 
Hebrews13:22 Zuangx gorx-youz aah! Yie tov meih mbuo muangx longx yie kuinx meih mbuo naaiv deix waac
Hebrews13:23 Yie oix meih mbuo hiuv duqv mbuo nyei youz
Hebrews13:24 Mbuox meih mbuo nyei zuangx bieiv zeiv caux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yietc zungv
Hebrews13:25 Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en bun meih mbuo zuangx mienh.
James1:1 Yie
James1:2 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
James1:3 weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv buangh naaiv deix sic se seix mangc meih mbuo nyei sienx fim
James1:4 Oix zuqc longc noic diev taux daauh weic bun meih mbuo haih benx dunh yunh nzoih nyei mienh
James1:5 Se gorngv meih mbuo haaix dauh cong-mengh maiv gaux
James1:6 Mv baac tov nyei mienh oix zuqc longc sienx fim daux gaux
James1:7 Wuov dauh maiv zuqc hnamv daaih Ziouv oix bun haaix nyungc ninh
James1:8 weic zuqc wuov nyungc mienh maaih i diuc hnyouv. Zoux haaix nyungc yaac maiv dingc.
James1:9 Jomc wuov dauh gorx-youz duqv Tin-Hungh taaih ninh faaux hlang ziouc oix zuqc a'hneiv.
James1:10 Butv zoih wuov dauh zuqc Tin-Hungh bun ninh zoux faix yaac oix zuqc a'hneiv weic zuqc butv-zoih mienh oix hnangv miev nyei biangh nor
James1:11 Weic zuqc mba'hnoi cuotv daaih
James1:12 Haaix dauh zuqc seix yaac diev duqv taux daauh
James1:13 Haaix dauh buangh zuqc nduov ninh baamz zuiz nyei sic maiv dungx gorngv
James1:14 Mv baac mienh zuqc nduov se laaix ganh nyei hnyouv hanc ziouc yuoqc ganh mingh baamz zuiz.
James1:15 Hnyouv hanc haaix nyungc se beiv maaih jienv sin nor. Yungz cuotv daaih benx zuiz mi'aqv. Zuiz hlo dingc
James1:16 Yie hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz aac
James1:17 Yietc zungv longx nyei
James1:18 Tin-Hungh ziux ninh ganh nyei za'eix longc zien leiz nyei doz yungz mbuo daaih weic bun mbuo yiem ninh zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc zoux da'yietv.
James1:19 Yie hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz aac
James1:20 Weic zuqc mienh qiex jiez maiv haih zoux maiv cuotv Tin-Hungh horpc haic nyei za'eix.
James1:21 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc guangc nzengc yietc zungv laih hlopv caux hiuang orqv nyei sic. Oix zuqc suonc hnyouv muangx Tin-Hungh zuangx jienv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv nyei doz
James1:22 Maiv dungx nduov ganh laaic haiz liuz doz ziouc gaux aqv. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc ei jienv zoux.
James1:23 Haaix dauh haiz liuz doz yaac maiv ei jienv zoux
James1:24 Mangc liuz
James1:25 Tin-Hungh dunh yunh nyei leiz-latc bun mienh duqv zoux bungx nqoi nyei mienh. Haaix dauh zaah mangc
James1:26 Haaix dauh funx ninh ganh sienx duqv longx mv baac maiv gunv ganh nyei nzuih nor
James1:27 Ei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh mangc
James2:1 Yie nyei gorx-youz aah! Meih mbuo sienx kaux mbuo njang-laangc nyei Ziouv
James2:2 Se gorngv maaih laanh mienh zuqv lui-houx longx nyei yaac dangh jienv jiem-buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng bieqc meih mbuo gapv zunv nyei dorngx
James2:3 meih mbuo taaih zuqv lui-houx longx wuov laanh ziouc mbuox ninh
James2:4 Hnangv naaic yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz meih mbuo bun nqoi zoux ziex horngh mienh maiv zeiz? Meih mbuo longc meih mbuo ganh orqv haic nyei hnyouv samx mienh maiv zeiz?
James2:5 Yie hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz aac
James2:6 Mv baac meih mbuo mangc piex mienh jomc mienh. Zoux doqc meih mbuo se dongh butv-zoih mienh maiv zeiz? Tor meih mbuo mingh wuov sic dorngh yaac dongh butv-zoih mienh maiv zeiz?
James2:7 Dongh naaiv deix butv-zoih mienh gorngv doqc meih mbuo nyiemc wuov norm jaaix nyei mbuox maiv zeiz?
James2:8 Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv
James2:9 Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo taaih naaiv laanh
James2:10 Haaix dauh gan nzengc leiz-latc mv baac dorngc yietc diuh
James2:11 Tin-Hungh gorngv
James2:12 Meih mbuo oix ziux bun mienh duqv bungx nqoi nyei leiz zuqc siemv. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo gorngv nyei caux zoux nyei oix zuqc doix wuov nyungc leiz.
James2:13 Haaix dauh maiv korv-lienh mienh
James2:14 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
James2:15 Se gorngv maaih dauh gorx-youz fai dorc nziez maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv
James2:16 meih mbuo yaac maaih dauh mbuox ninh
James2:17 Sienx fim yaac hnangv naaic nor. Kungx sienx hnangv yaac maiv ei jienv zoux se dorngx daic mi'aqv.
James2:18 Mv baac maaih mienh oix gorngv
James2:19 Meih sienx kungx maaih nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh hnangv fai? Longx aqv. Liemh mienv yaac sienx
James2:20 Mienh hngongx mienh aah! Kungx sienx hnangv
James2:21 Mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv
James2:22 Meih mbuo buatc nyei fai? Apc^laa^ham nyei sienx fim caux zoux nyei sic gapv jienv. Ninh zoux nyei sic ziouc bun ninh nyei sienx fim dunh yunh nzoih.
James2:23 Hnangv naaic
James2:24 Hnangv naaiv
James2:25 Wuov dauh maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn
James2:26 Se gorngv sin maiv maaih qiex
James3:1 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
James3:2 Mbuo dauh dauh zoux dorngc camv-nyungc nyei. Haaix dauh yietc liuz maiv gorngv dorngc haaix nyungc
James3:3 Mbuo zorqv hlaang-kouv fapv jienv maaz nyei nzuih baengx weic bun maaz muangx mbuo. Mbuo ziouc haih gunv nzengc ninh nyei sin
James3:4 Hnamv mangc gaax nzangv! Maiv gunv nzangv ndongc haaix hlo yaac zuqc domh nziaaux buonc mingh
James3:5 Mbietc yaac fih hnangv nyei. Maiv gunv se sin zaangc nyei yietc nyungc faix nyei
James3:6 Mbietc se hnangv douz nor. Mbietc zoux sin nyei yietc nyungc yaac orqv haic
James3:7 Nyungc-nyungc saeng-kuv
James3:8 Mv baac mbietc
James3:9 Mbuo longc mbietc ceng Ziouv Zaangc Diex
James3:10 Ceng nyei waac caux zioux nyei waac juangc sung nzuih cuotv. Yie nyei gorx-youz aah! Hnangv naaic za'gengh maiv horpc yietc deix.
James3:11 Kuv nyei wuom caux maiv kuv nyei wuom haih juangc norm zingv cuotv fai?
James3:12 Yie nyei gorx-youz aah! Ngongh nyorx ndiangx haih ziangh ga'lanv biouv fai? A'ngunc hmei haih ziangh ngongh nyorx biouv fai? Wuom-nzaaih zingv yaac maiv haih cuotv kuv nyei wuom.
James3:13 Yiem meih mbuo naaic
James3:14 Se gorngv meih hnyouv im
James3:15 Naaiv nyungc cong-mengh se maiv hnangv yiem gu'nguaaic daaih nyei cong-mengh. Se baamh gen nyei
James3:16 Haaix norm dorngx maaih mienh mueic jieqv
James3:17 Yiem gu'nguaaic daaih nyei cong-mengh da'yietv se cing-nzengc nyei
James3:18 Haaix dauh kuinx i bung mienh horpc hnyouv daaih se zuangx baengh orn nyei nyim. Siou daaih nyei yietc zungv ziouc longx nyei.
James4:1 Yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz haaix nyungc bun meih mbuo nzaeng jaax mborqv jaax? Se laaix meih mbuo nyei hnyouv maaih hanc nyei sic cingx hoic meih mbuo mborqv jaax maiv zeiz?
James4:2 Meih mbuo hanc oix duqv ga'naaiv yaac maiv haih duqv ziouc daix mienh. Mauv mienh nyei ga'naaiv mv baac maiv haih duqv ziouc nzaeng jaax mborqv jaax. Meih mbuo oix longc nyei meih mbuo maiv maaih weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv tov Tin-Hungh.
James4:3 Meih mbuo tov liuz yaac maiv duqv weic zuqc meih mbuo tov dorngc
James4:4 Maaih hieh hnyouv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv fai? Caux baamh gen zoux doic se caux Tin-Hungh daav win. Haaix dauh dingc caux baamh gen zoux doic
James4:5 Meih mbuo hnamv daaih naaiv deix Ging-Sou nyei waac maiv maaih eix leiz fai? Ging-Sou gorngv
James4:6 Mv baac ninh yaac jaa ceix en gauh camv. Weic naaiv Ging-Sou gorngv
James4:7 Hnangv naaic oix zuqc mbuoqc Tin-Hungh gunv. Oix zuqc ngaengc jienv mienv nyei hungh
James4:8 Oix zuqc mingh nitv jienv Tin-Hungh
James4:9 Oix zuqc nzauh haic
James4:10 Oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien nyiemc ganh zoux faix
James4:11 Gorx-youz aac
James4:12 Kungx maaih nduqc dauh liepc jiez Leiz-Latc yaac zoux Siemv Zuiz Jien
James4:13 Gorngv naaiv deix waac nyei mienh muangx yie maah! Meih mbuo gorngv
James4:14 Mv baac meih mbuo liemh maiv hiuv duqv njang hnoi meih mbuo nyei maengc oix hnangv haaix nor. Meih mbuo se hnangv diqv dien mouc nor
James4:15 Meih mbuo horpc zuqc gorngv
James4:16 Mv baac meih mbuo ceng-hlo
James4:17 Hnangv naaic
James5:1 Butv-zoih mienh aah! Muangx yie gorngv oc. Oix zuqc weic meih mbuo oix buangh nyei kouv naanc bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv.
James5:2 Meih mbuo nyei zinh zoih yuqc nzengc
James5:3 Meih mbuo nyei jiem nyaanh jiex nzingx mi'aqv. Naaiv nzingx zoux zorng-zengx bun cing meih mbuo dorngc. Nzingx yaac oix hnangv douz nor
James5:4 Meih mbuo maiv koi gong-zinh bun tengx meih mbuo zoux ndeic nyei mienh. Naaiv deix gong-zinh heuc jienv gox meih mbuo. Muangx gaax! Tengx meih mbuo siou gaeng-zuangx nyei mienh nyei qiex faaux taux Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei m'normh.
James5:5 Meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc kungx nyanc longx hopv longx zaaux henh mbienx hnangv. Naaiv se hnangv uix ganh junc zuov zuqc daix wuov hnoi.
James5:6 Meih mbuo dingc zuiz yaac daix kuv mienh
James5:7 Gorx-youz aac
James5:8 Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc longc noic
James5:9 Gorx-youz aac
James5:10 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
James5:11 Mbuo gorngv
James5:12 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
James5:13 Yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz haaix dauh maaih kuonx naanh fai? Wuov dauh oix zuqc daux gaux. Haaix dauh maaih orn-lorqc fai? Oix zuqc baaux ceng Tin-Hungh nyei nzung.
James5:14 Meih mbuo haaix dauh butv baengc fai? Ninh oix zuqc heuc jiu-baang nyei mienh gox daaih tengx daux gaux yaac dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox zorqv youh hietv jienv ninh nyei sin.
James5:15 Longc sienx fim daux gaux ziouc njoux duqv baengc mienh
James5:16 Hnangv naaic
James5:17 E^li^yaa se yietc dauh baamh mienh
James5:18 E^li^yaa aengx daux gaux
James5:19 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac
James5:20 oix zuqc jangx jienv haaix dauh ken yangh dorngc jauv nyei zuiz-mienh nzuonx daaih
1Peter1:1 Yie
1Peter1:2 Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh ei ninh nyei za'eix jaa-ndaangc ginv meih mbuo daaih. Ninh nyei Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo zoux cing-nzengc mienh weic bun meih mbuo muangx Yesu Giduc yaac duqv Yesu nyei nziaamv nzaaux nzengc meih mbuo. Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en ceix baengh orn camv-camv nyei bun meih mbuo.
1Peter1:3 Mbuo oix zuqc ceng mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei Die
1Peter1:4 Hnangv naaic mbuo ziouc haih siouc maiv haih mietc
1Peter1:5 Weic meih mbuo sienx
1Peter1:6 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc orn-lorqc maiv gunv ih zanc zuqc seix
1Peter1:7 Naaiv deix sic se weic bun cing meih mbuo zien-zien nyei sienx. Sienx fim se gauh jaaix jiex jiem. Maiv gunv jiem haih zitc corc oix zuqc longc douz sinx. Hnangv naaic
1Peter1:8 Maiv gunv meih mbuo maiv gaengh buatc jiex ninh
1Peter1:9 weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei lingh wuonh duqv njoux. Naaiv se weic meih mbuo nyei sienx fim.
1Peter1:10 Douc waac mienh gorngv taux Tin-Hungh oix bun meih mbuo nyei en. Ninh mbuo longx-longx nyei zaah mangc yaac zimh lorz naaiv njoux en.
1Peter1:11 Naaiv deix mienh maaih Giduc nyei Singx Lingh yiem ninh mbuo gu'nyuoz jaa-ndaangc gorngv Giduc oix zuqc siouc kouv
1Peter1:12 Tin-Hungh bun naaiv deix douc waac mienh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong se maiv zeiz weic tengx ninh mbuo ganh
1Peter1:13 Weic naaiv oix zuqc liuc leiz ziangx hnyouv
1Peter1:14 Meih mbuo zoux muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac nyei naamh nyouz. Maiv dungx ei jienv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv hanc zoux
1Peter1:15 Heuc meih mbuo daaih wuov dauh se cing-nzengc nyei. Yiem meih mbuo zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc sic meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc hnangv ninh nor
1Peter1:16 Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv
1Peter1:17 Meih mbuo daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo heuc Tin-Hungh zoux “Aa Die aac.” Ninh maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien. Ninh ziux gorqv-mienh zoux nyei sic siemv. Weic naaiv meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc oix zuqc gamh nziex ninh
1Peter1:18 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zuoqc meih mbuo yiem ong-taaix
1Peter1:19 Ninh longc Giduc jaaix haic nyei nziaamv zuoqc meih mbuo. Giduc se hnangv maiv waaic fangx yaac maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei ba'gi yungh dorn nor.
1Peter1:20 Tin-Hungh maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc ninh ginv Giduc daaih. Aengx taux naaiv deix nqa'haav laai nyei hnoi-nyieqc Giduc cuotv daaih weic tengx meih mbuo.
1Peter1:21 Meih mbuo kaux Giduc sienx Tin-Hungh
1Peter1:22 Meih mbuo ei jienv zien leiz zoux ziouc bun meih mbuo nyei hnyouv cing-nzengc daaih yaac za'gengh hnamv sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv laanh hnamv laanh.
1Peter1:23 Meih mbuo se ganh siang-yungz jiex
1Peter1:24 Hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
1Peter1:25 Mv baac Ziouv nyei doz yietc liuz yiem.” Naaiv doz se zunh bun meih mbuo muangx nyei kuv fienx.
1Peter2:1 Weic naaiv oix zuqc guangc yietc zungv waaic sic. Maiv dungx gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh
1Peter2:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv coqv hoqc cuotv seix nyei gu'nguaaz oix hopv nyorx nor
1Peter2:3 Hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
1Peter2:4 Oix zuqc daaih nitv jienv Ziouv
1Peter2:5 Meih mbuo yaac hnangv maaih maengc nyei la'bieiv
1Peter2:6 Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv
1Peter2:7 Naaiv norm la'bieiv weic meih mbuo sienx nyei mienh se jaaix haic. Mv baac Ging-Sou gorngv weic maiv sienx nyei mienh
1Peter2:8 Ging-Sou yaac gorngv
1Peter2:9 Mv baac meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei fingx
1Peter2:10 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo maiv zeiz Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo zoux ninh nyei baeqc fingx. Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo maiv duqv Tin-Hungh korv-lienh mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo duqv Tin-Hungh korv-lienh.
1Peter2:11 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
1Peter2:12 Meih mbuo yiem maiv sienx nyei mienh mbu'ndongx kungx oix zuqc zoux longx nyei sic hnangv. Hnangv naaic
1Peter2:13 Weic meih mbuo sienx Ziouv
1Peter2:14 Yaac oix zuqc muangx jien-fouv nyei waac weic zuqc hungh diex orn jien-fouv daaih dingc zoux dorngc nyei mienh nyei zuiz yaac ceng zoux horpc nyei mienh.
1Peter2:15 Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix se oix meih mbuo zoux kuv sic dangv jienv hngongx nyei mienh gorngv nyei pa'li pa'laaix waac.
1Peter2:16 Meih mbuo zoux bungx nqoi nyei mienh ziouc oix zuqc hnangv bungx nqoi nyei mienh yiem nor. Mv baac maiv dungx longc bungx nqoi nyei leiz zoux haaix nyungc waaic sic. Oix zuqc ziangh jienv zoux Tin-Hungh nyei nouh.
1Peter2:17 Oix zuqc taaih dauh dauh mienh. Oix zuqc hnamv sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz. Oix zuqc gamh nziex Tin-Hungh
1Peter2:18 Meih mbuo zoux nouh nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc mbuoqc meih mbuo nyei ziouv yaac taaih ninh. Maiv zeiz kungx mbuoqc hnyouv longx
1Peter2:19 Se gorngv mienh siouc maiv horpc zuqc siouc nyei kouv naanc yaac diev jienv weic hiuv duqv se ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix
1Peter2:20 Se gorngv meih mbuo zoux dorngc sic ziouc zuqc mborqv yaac longc noic diev
1Peter2:21 Tin-Hungh heuc meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic zuqc Giduc weic meih mbuo siouc kouv zoux nyungc zeiv bun meih mbuo zuotc. Meih mbuo ziouc oix zuqc gan jienv ninh nyei zaux-mbiec yangh.
1Peter2:22 “Giduc maiv baamz jiex zuiz
1Peter2:23 Ninh zuqc mienh gorngv doqc
1Peter2:24 Giduc ganh longc ninh nyei sin ndaam jienv mbuo nyei zuiz yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax
1Peter2:25 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo se hnangv mingh dorngc jauv nyei ba'gi yungh. Mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo nzuonx daaih gan jienv Ba'gi Yungh Ziouv
1Peter3:1 Meih mbuo zoux auv nyei mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc mbuoqc ganh nyei nqox. Hnangv naaic
1Peter3:2 Weic zuqc nqox buatc yiem auv zoux nyei nyungc zeiv maaih hnyouv taaih yaac cing-nzengc nyei.
1Peter3:3 Meih mbuo zorng nzueic maiv dungx kungx zorng beih zaangc
1Peter3:4 Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc zorng gu'nyuoz hnyouv
1Peter3:5 Zinh ndaangc gan longx Tin-Hungh
1Peter3:6 hnangv Saalaa muangx Apc^laa^ham nor
1Peter3:7 Meih mbuo zoux nqox nyei mienh yaac oix zuqc fih hnangv nyei hiuv duqv korv-lienh ganh nyei auv
1Peter3:8 Yie gorngv deix setv mueiz waac. Meih mbuo yietc zungv oix zuqc dongh diuc hnyouv
1Peter3:9 Maiv dungx zoux orqv winh orqv. Zuqc mienh gorngv doqc yaac maiv dungx gorngv doqc mienh. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc buang waac ninh mbuo
1Peter3:10 Hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
1Peter3:11 Oix zuqc guangc nqoi orqv sic
1Peter3:12 Weic zuqc Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc jienv caux ninh horpc hnyouv wuov deix. Ninh nyei m'normh yaac muangx ninh mbuo daux gaux nyei waac. Mv baac Ziouv nyei hmien maiv huin mangc zoux orqv sic wuov deix mienh aqv.”
1Peter3:13 Se gorngv meih mbuo jorm hnyouv zoux kuv sic
1Peter3:14 Mv baac maiv gunv meih mbuo weic zoux horpc nyei jauv zuqc siouc kouv
1Peter3:15 Yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv meih mbuo oix zuqc taaih Giduc
1Peter3:16 Yaac oix zuqc maaih maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei laangh fim. Hnangv naaic
1Peter3:17 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix se bun meih mbuo laaix zoux kuv sic zuqc siouc kouv
1Peter3:18 Giduc weic zuiz daic yietc nzunc dorngx yietc liuz. Yietc laanh maiv maaih zuiz nyei mienh div zuangx zuiz-mienh daic weic dorh mbuo taux Tin-Hungh. Giduc nyei sin zuqc daix daic mv baac Singx Lingh bun ninh aengx nangh daaih.
1Peter3:19 Ninh kaux Singx Lingh mingh zunh doz bun wuonx jienv loh wuov deix mienh nyei wuonh muangx
1Peter3:20 se dongh Noyaa gapv nzangv wuov zanc Tin-Hungh zoux hnyouv ndaauv zuov jienv mv baac ninh mbuo maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov deix. Yiem nzangv gu'nyuoz nyei mienh zoqc
1Peter3:21 Naaiv wuom biux mengh jiex wuom nyei leiz
1Peter3:22 Ninh zungv faaux tin-dorngh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei mbiaauc maengx
1Peter4:1 Weic zuqc Giduc nyei sin zuqc siouc kouv
1Peter4:2 Hnangv naaic
1Peter4:3 Jiex daaih nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo zoux hnangv maiv sienx nyei mienh oix zoux nyei sic gaux aqv. Wuov zanc kungx sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux orqv sic
1Peter4:4 Maiv sienx nyei mienh hnamv maiv mengh baeqc meih mbuo ih zanc maiv mingh caux ninh mbuo ceux lunc zoux waaic sic
1Peter4:5 Mv baac maaih hnoi ninh mbuo oix zuqc gorngv mengh ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic mbuox Tin-Hungh
1Peter4:6 Weic naaiv
1Peter4:7 Maanc muotc nyei setv mueiz hnoi taux fatv aqv. Meih mbuo oix zuqc gunv jienv ganh
1Peter4:8 Gauh longc jienv jiex se oix zuqc jorm hnyouv laanh hnamv laanh
1Peter4:9 Oix zuqc a'hneiv laanh zipv laanh zoux kaeqv
1Peter4:10 Dauh dauh duqv zipv Tin-Hungh nyei zingh nyeic yaac oix zuqc goux longx. Haaix dauh zipv haaix nyungc zingh nyeic oix zuqc longc tengx zuangx mienh.
1Peter4:11 Haaix dauh zunh doz oix zuqc za'gengh douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac. Haaix dauh cuotv fim tengx mienh oix zuqc longc Tin-Hungh bun daaih nyei qaqv fu-sux. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc ziouc bun mienh dengv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox ceng Tin-Hungh. Yesu Giduc yietc liuz maaih njang-laangc
1Peter4:12 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
1Peter4:13 Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc a'hneiv weic zuqc meih mbuo duqv caux Giduc juangc siouc kouv. Hnangv naaic Giduc nyei njang-laangc hinc cuotv wuov zanc meih mbuo ziouc njien-youh orn-lorqc haic.
1Peter4:14 Se gorngv weic sienx Giduc meih mbuo zuqc mienh gorngv doqc
1Peter4:15 Maiv dungx bun meih mbuo haaix dauh laaix daix mienh
1Peter4:16 Mv baac se gorngv meih mbuo laaix sienx Giduc zuqc siouc kouv
1Peter4:17 Tin-Hungh jiez gorn siemv zuiz nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv. Tin-Hungh ganh nyei mienh oix zuqc siemv ndaangc. Se gorngv yiem mbuo jiez gorn zuqc siemv
1Peter4:18 Hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor
1Peter4:19 Hnangv naaic
1Peter5:1 Yie kuinx yiem meih mbuo naaic jiu-baang nyei zuangx mienh gox. yie yaac zoux mienh gox
1Peter5:2 Yie kuinx meih mbuo goux longx Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo goux wuov guanh mienh hnangv goux ba'gi yungh mienh goux ninh mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh nor. Oix zuqc buangv hnyouv goux
1Peter5:3 Yaac maiv dungx gunv ba'laqc hniev Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo goux wuov deix. Oix zuqc zoux longx nyei nyungc zeiv bun ninh mbuo zuotc.
1Peter5:4 Taux Giduc
1Peter5:5 Meih mbuo lunx wuov deix m'jangc dorn fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc mbuoqc gox wuov deix gunv. Oix zuqc nyiemc ganh zoux faix
1Peter5:6 Hnangv naaic oix zuqc nyiemc ganh zoux faix yiem Tin-Hungh maaih qaqv nyei buoz-ndiev. Taux ninh dingc nyei ziangh hoc ninh ziouc taaih meih mbuo faaux.
1Peter5:7 Oix zuqc zorqv yietc zungv you-nzauh guangc bun ninh weic zuqc ninh goux jienv meih mbuo.
1Peter5:8 Oix zuqc ging hnyouv mbungh jienv. Meih mbuo nyei win-wangv
1Peter5:9 Oix zuqc sienx wuonv
1Peter5:10 Mv baac zuov meih mbuo zuqc siouc kouv caamx baav liuz
1Peter5:11 Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv yietc liuz yiem taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen.
1Peter5:12 Silaa tengx yie fiev naaiv zeiv fienx se nangv nyei. Yie yaac funx ninh zoux ziepc zuoqv nyei gorx-youz. Yie fiev kuinx meih mbuo yaac zoux zorng-zengx gorngv naaiv se Tin-Hungh nyei zien en. Meih mbuo oix zuqc kaux wuonv ninh nyei en aqv.
1Peter5:13 Mbaa^mbi^lon Zingh nyei jiu-baang yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. Tin-Hungh yaac ginv ninh mbuo hnangv ginv meih mbuo nor. Yie nyei dorn
1Peter5:14 Meih mbuo wuic buangh oix zuqc zoux hnyouv cing-nzengc zom hmien bun cing laanh hnamv laanh. Tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo yietc zungv caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh nyei mienh duqv baengh orn.
2Peter1:1 Yie
2Peter1:2 Yie tov Tin-Hungh ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo jaa camv jienv faaux
2Peter1:3 Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei qaqv zorqv mbuo yiem naaiv seix zaangc weic gan longx Tin-Hungh qiemx longc nyei nyungc-nyungc ceix bun mbuo. Mbuo hnangv naaiv nor duqv weic zuqc mbuo hiuv duqv ninh
2Peter1:4 Hnangv naaiv
2Peter1:5 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv bun meih mbuo nyei sienx fim jaa zoux kuv sic. Zoux kuv sic yaac oix zuqc jaa hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh.
2Peter1:6 Hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh yaac oix zuqc jaa haih gunv duqv ganh. Haih gunv duqv ganh yaac oix zuqc jaa maaih noic diev. Maaih noic diev yaac oix zuqc jaa gan longx Tin-Hungh.
2Peter1:7 Gan longx Tin-Hungh yaac oix zuqc jaa hnamv sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz. Hnamv sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz yaac oix zuqc jaa hnamv zuangx mienh.
2Peter1:8 Se gorngv meih mbuo maaih naaiv deix zoux longx nyei sic yaac jaa maaih camv jienv faaux
2Peter1:9 Mv baac haaix dauh maiv maaih naaiv deix zoux longx nyei sic nor
2Peter1:10 Zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Peter1:11 Hnangv naaic Tin-Hungh ziouc bun meih mbuo maaih dunh yunh nyei leiz bieqc mbuo Njoux Ziouv Yesu Giduc yietc liuz nyei guoqv.
2Peter1:12 Weic naaiv
2Peter1:13 Yie hnamv yie corc ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc yie horpc zuqc tengx meih mbuo jangx duqv naaiv deix sic.
2Peter1:14 Yie hiuv duqv maiv lauh yie oix zuqc guangc yie naaiv norm haih daic nyei sin
2Peter1:15 Yie oix longc nzengc qaqv lorz jauv weic bun meih mbuo zuov yie guei seix ziouc zanc-zanc jangx jienv naaiv deix sic.
2Peter1:16 Yie mbuo maiv zeiz longc guai-qaauv mienh benx daaih nyei gouv-laic bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei qaqv caux ninh aengx oix daaih nzunc nyei sic. Se yie mbuo ganh nyei m'zing duqv buatc ninh nyei haangh daauh.
2Peter1:17 Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh taaih ninh
2Peter1:18 Yie mbuo caux ninh yiem wuov norm cing-nzengc mbong nyei ziangh hoc yie mbuo yaac duqv haiz naaiv deix qiex yiem tin-dorngh daaih.
2Peter1:19 Weic naaiv yie mbuo gauh hiuv dingc douc waac mienh douc daaih nyei waac se zien nyei. Meih mbuo longc hnyouv hnamv taux naaiv deix jauv se longx aqv
2Peter1:20 Da'yietv longc jienv jiex oix zuqc bieqc hnyouv
2Peter1:21 Weic zuqc maiv maaih haaix dauh haih ei ganh nyei eix douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac. Mienh douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac se ei Singx Lingh dorh ninh mbuo gorngv hnangv.
2Peter2:1 Zinh ndaangc yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx maaih jaav douc waac mienh. fih hnangv nyei
2Peter2:2 Mv baac maaih mienh camv nyei oix gan jienv ninh mbuo zoux nyaiv haic nyei sic. Laaix ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic mienh yaac oix gorngv doqc zien leiz nyei jauv.
2Peter2:3 Naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng mauv nyaanh ziouc gorngv ninh mbuo ganh benx daaih nyei jaav doz-leiz nduov meih mbuo nyei nyaanh nyanc. Mv baac dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz wuov dauh liuc leiz ziangx lauh aqv. Oix mietc ninh mbuo wuov dauh yaac maiv njormh.
2Peter2:4 Tin-Hungh maiv liouh baamz zuiz nyei fin-mienh. Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo zoi njiec deic nyuoqc
2Peter2:5 Tin-Hungh yaac maiv liouh loz-hnoi wuov gitv lungh ndiev. Ninh bun mbiungc-suiv-imx yiemx daic nzengc maiv gan Tin-Hungh nyei mienh. Kungx njoux zunh mbuox mienh hnangv haaix nor zoux horpc Tin-Hungh wuov dauh Noyaa
2Peter2:6 Tin-Hungh yaac dingc So^ndom caux Go^mo^laa Zingh nyei zuiz
2Peter2:7 Tin-Hungh yaac njoux wuov dauh kuv mienh Lotv cuotv. Lotv weic orqv mienh zoux buangh liouh nyei sic nzauh duqv kouv haic.
2Peter2:8 Wuov dauh kuv mienh yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx
2Peter2:9 Hnangv naaic
2Peter2:10 Tin-Hungh oix lengc jeiv nyei hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux maiv luonx horngc nyei sic yaac mangc piex Tin-Hungh nyei hatc maaz nyei mienh. Naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng daamv hlo yaac maux haic. Ninh mbuo maiv gamh nziex gorngv doqc yiem gu'nguaaic maaih njang-laangc wuov deix.
2Peter2:11 Maiv gunv fin-mienh maaih lingc maaih qaqv gauh henv naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng
2Peter2:12 Naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng se hnangv mv bei daic nyei saeng-kuv nor
2Peter2:13 Ninh mbuo zoux hoic mienh
2Peter2:14 Ninh mbuo nyei m'zing kungx cienh sieqv hnangv. Baamz zuiz taux haaix zanc yaac maiv haih gaux. Ninh mbuo nduov hnyouv mau nyei mienh. Hnyouv yaac mauv guenx ga'naaiv. Ninh mbuo zungv zuqc Tin-Hungh zioux aqv.
2Peter2:15 Ninh mbuo leih zien jauv yangh dorngc jauv mi'aqv
2Peter2:16 Laaix ninh baamz zuiz ninh yaac zuqc hemx aqv. Ninh nyei maaz-li se maiv haih gorngv waac nyei ga'naaiv mv baac gorngv cuotv benx mienh nyei qiex donv jienv wuov dauh douc waac mienh zoux nyei ga'naaiv-hngongx sic.
2Peter2:17 Naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng se hnangv wuom-zingv-nqaai
2Peter2:18 Ninh mbuo gorngv maux haic nyei ga'naaiv-hngongx waac
2Peter2:19 Naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng laengz bun mienh duqv bungx nqoi
2Peter2:20 Se gorngv mienh hiuv duqv mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Yesu Giduc
2Peter2:21 Se gorngv ninh mbuo yietc liuz maiv hiuv zoux horpc nyei jauv
2Peter2:22 Naaiv deix waac-beiv za'gengh doix naaiv deix mienh zoux nyei sic. Maaih joux waac gorngv
2Peter3:1 Yie hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Ih zanc yie fiev bun meih mbuo naaiv zeiv fienx se da'nyeic zeiv. Yie fiev naaiv deix i zeiv fienx weic tengx meih mbuo jangx jienv ziouc dongz zuqc meih mbuo nyei hnyouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv taux naaiv deix jauv.
2Peter3:2 Yie oix meih mbuo jangx jienv loz-hnoi Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Yaac oix meih mbuo jangx jienv mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv longc meih mbuo nyei gong-zoh mbuo zunh mbuox meih mbuo wuov diuh lingc.
2Peter3:3 Da'yietv longc jienv jiex
2Peter3:4 yaac naaic gaax
2Peter3:5 Ninh mbuo duqv-eix la'kuqv loz-hnoi Tin-Hungh gorngv cuotv waac
2Peter3:6 Yaac dongh wuov deix wuom yiemx nzengc
2Peter3:7 Mv baac ih zanc nyei lungh caux ndau maaih Tin-Hungh nyei waac beu jienv
2Peter3:8 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
2Peter3:9 Ziouv za'gengh ei ninh laengz nyei waac zoux
2Peter3:10 Mv baac Ziouv aengx daaih nyei hnoi oix hnangv janx-zaqc daaih wuov nor. Wuov hnoi lungh ziouc njunh njunh nyei jiex nzengc. Yiem lungh nyei yietc zungv zuqc douz buov yuqc. Ndau caux yiem ndau-beih nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv yaac zuqc buov qui nzengc.
2Peter3:11 Naaiv deix yietc zungv oix hnangv naaiv nor zuqc mietc. Wuov nyungc meih mbuo horpc zuqc zoux haaix nyungc mienh? Oix zuqc zoux cing-nzengc mienh yaac gan longx Tin-Hungh
2Peter3:12 zuov jienv Tin-Hungh siemv zuiz nyei hnoi taux. Yaac oix zuqc longc hnyouv zoux bun wuov norm hnoi daaih siepv. Wuov norm hnoi lungh zungv oix zuqc douz buov qui nzengc. Yiem lungh nyei nyungc-nyungc yaac zuqc douz buov yuqc nzengc.
2Peter3:13 Mv baac ziux Tin-Hungh laengz nyei waac mbuo zuov jienv siang-lungh siang-ndau
2Peter3:14 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
2Peter3:15 Oix zuqc funx mbuo nyei Ziouv zoux hnyouv ndaauv weic bun meih mbuo maaih qangx duqv njoux
2Peter3:16 Yiem Baulo fiev nyei zeiv-zeiv fienx ninh yaac gorngv taux naaiv deix jauv. Fienx gu'nyuoz maaih deix dorngx aqc duqv mengh baeqc. Aengx maaih deix mienh hiuv maiv toux yaac sienx maiv wuonv ziouc zorqv naaiv deix waac aaux benx jaav waac mi'aqv
2Peter3:17 Hnamv haic nyei zuangx gorx-youz aac
2Peter3:18 Oix zuqc yietc zei hiuv duqv mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Yesu Giduc caux ninh nyei en ceix camv jienv faaux. Mbuo ih zanc oix zuqc ceng ninh yaac yietc liuz ceng taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen.
1John1:1 Yie mbuo fiev gorngv taux yungz maengc nyei Doz. Maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc naaiv Doz zungv yiem nyei. Zinh ndaangc Doz caux Zaangc Diex yiem mv baac ih zanc hinc cuotv daaih bun yie mbuo buatc. Yie mbuo ganh haiz jiex nyei
1John1:2 
1John1:3 Yie mbuo buatc jiex yaac haiz jiex nyei ziouc zunh mbuox meih mbuo
1John1:4 Yie mbuo fiev naaiv deix jauv bun meih mbuo weic bun mbuo lomh nzoih njien-youh orn-lorqc.
1John1:5 Naaiv se yie mbuo haiz Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn gorngv jiex nyei waac ziouc zunh mbuox meih mbuo. Ninh gorngv
1John1:6 Se gorngv mbuo gorngv mbuo caux Tin-Hungh jiu tong mv baac corc yangh hmuangx nyei jauv nor
1John1:7 Mv baac se gorngv mbuo yiem njang hnangv Tin-Hungh yiem njang nor
1John1:8 Se gorngv mbuo gorngv mbuo maiv maaih zuiz
1John1:9 Se gorngv mbuo nyiemc mbuo nyei zuiz
1John1:10 Se gorngv mbuo gorngv mbuo maiv baamz zuiz
1John2:1 Yie nyei fu'jueiv aah! Yie hnangv naaiv nor fiev bun meih mbuo weic bun meih mbuo maiv baamz zuiz. Se gorngv haaix dauh baamz zuiz nor
1John2:2 Giduc siev ninh ganh nyei maengc daic weic fiqv mbuo nyei zuiz. Yaac maiv daan mbuo nyei zuiz hnangv
1John2:3 Se gorngv mbuo ei jienv Tin-Hungh nyei lingc zoux
1John2:4 Haaix dauh gorngv ninh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh yaac maiv ei jienv Tin-Hungh nyei lingc zoux
1John2:5 Haaix dauh ei jienv Tin-Hungh nyei waac zoux
1John2:6 Haaix dauh gorngv ninh caux Tin-Hungh juangc maengc ziangh
1John2:7 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Yie maiv zeiz fiev diuh siang-lingc mbuox meih mbuo. Yie fiev nyei se loz-lingc
1John2:8 Mv baac yie fiev diuh siang-lingc bun meih mbuo. Naaiv diuh siang-lingc yiem Giduc yaac yiem meih mbuo biux mengh se zien nyei
1John2:9 Haaix dauh gorngv ninh yiem njang mv baac nzorng ninh nyei gorx-youz
1John2:10 Haaix dauh hnamv ninh nyei gorx-youz ziouc yiem njang gu'nyuoz. Ninh yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc nduov haaix dauh baamz zuiz.
1John2:11 Haaix dauh maiv hnamv ninh nyei gorx-youz
1John2:12 Fu'jueiv aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo weic Giduc duqv guangc liuz meih mbuo nyei zuiz.
1John2:13 Zoux die nyei zuangx mienh aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau yiem nyei wuov dauh. Meih mbuo mienh lunx mienh aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hingh jiex hiuang orqv wuov dauh mi'aqv. Fu'jueiv aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv Zaangc Diex.
1John2:14 Zoux die nyei zuangx mienh aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau zungv yiem nyei wuov dauh. Mienh lunx mienh aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo henv. Tin-Hungh nyei waac yaac yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv. Meih mbuo yaac hingh jiex hiuang orqv wuov dauh mi'aqv.
1John2:15 Maiv dungx hnamv baamh gen fai hnamv baamh gen nyei ga'naaiv. Haaix dauh hnamv baamh gen
1John2:16 Weic zuqc yietc zungv yiem baamh gen nyei ga'naaiv se baamh mienh hanc nyei
1John2:17 Baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen yuoqc mienh nyei ga'naaiv jiex jienv mingh aqv. Mv baac haaix dauh ei jienv Tin-Hungh nyei eix zoux
1John2:18 Fu'jueiv aah! Nqa'haav laai nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv. Meih mbuo haiz gorngv jiex
1John2:19 Naaiv deix win-wangv yiem mbuo cuotv mingh mv baac ninh mbuo maiv za'gengh benx mbuo nyei mienh. Se gorngv ninh mbuo za'gengh mbuo nyei mienh
1John2:20 Mv baac Giduc ceix Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo
1John2:21 Yie fiev fienx bun meih mbuo maiv zeiz weic meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv zien leiz. Yie fiev nyei se weic meih mbuo hiuv duqv zien leiz nyei. Yaac hiuv duqv gorngv-baeqc nyei sic maiv haih yiem zien leiz cuotv daaih.
1John2:22 Wuov nyungc
1John2:23 Haaix dauh maiv nyiemc Dorn
1John2:24 Meih mbuo yiem gorn haiz jiex nyei waac oix zuqc zaangh jienv hnyouv. Hnangv naaic
1John2:25 Naaiv se Giduc ganh laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Ninh laengz bun mbuo duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.
1John2:26 Yie fiev naaiv deix waac bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv nduov meih mbuo wuov deix mienh.
1John2:27 Mv baac Giduc ceix Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo. Singx Lingh yaac yiem jienv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv
1John2:28 Fu'jueiv aah! Oix zuqc zanc-zanc caux ninh juangc maengc ziangh. Hnangv naaic
1John2:29 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv Giduc se baengh fim nyei. Hnangv naaic
1John3:1 Mangc gaax Tin-Hungh ndongc haaix hnamv mbuo! Ninh bun mbuo duqv mbuox heuc Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz. Yaac maiv zeiz kungx duqv mbuox hnangv
1John3:2 Hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz aah! Ih zanc mbuo benx Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz. Nqa'haav hingv mbuo oix hnangv haaix nor maiv gaengh hiuv. Mv baac mbuo hiuv duqv Giduc hinc cuotv wuov zanc mbuo oix hnangv ninh nor
1John3:3 Haaix dauh maaih lamh hnamv Tin-Hungh oix bun ninh hnangv Yesu
1John3:4 Haaix dauh baamz zuiz se baamz Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc weic zuqc zuiz se baamz leiz-latc nyei sic.
1John3:5 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv Giduc daaih weic teix mbuo nyei zuiz. Ninh ganh yaac maiv maaih zuiz.
1John3:6 Haaix dauh caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh
1John3:7 Fu'jueiv aah! Maiv dungx muangx haaix dauh nduov meih mbuo. Haaix dauh zoux horpc
1John3:8 Haaix dauh baamz zuiz se mienv nyei hungh nyei mienh
1John3:9 Haaix dauh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz
1John3:10 Hnangv naaiv mbuo haih hiuv duqv haaix dauh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz
1John3:11 Meih mbuo yiem gorn haiz jiex nyei waac se dongh naaiv. Laanh oix zuqc hnamv laanh.
1John3:12 Maiv dungx hnangv Kaa^in nor. Kaa^in se hiuang orqv wuov dauh nyei mienh yaac daix ninh nyei youz. Ninh weic haaix diuc daix ninh nyei youz? Weic zuqc ninh ganh zoux dorngc
1John3:13 Gorx-youz aah! Se gorngv baamh mienh nzorng meih mbuo
1John3:14 Mbuo hnamv mbuo nyei gorx-youz ziouc hiuv duqv mbuo biaux ndutv haih daic nyei qaqv duqv maengc ziangh jienv. Haaix dauh maiv hnamv mienh
1John3:15 Haaix dauh nzorng ninh nyei gorx-youz
1John3:16 Mbuo hiuv duqv maaih hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv se hnangv haaix nor weic zuqc Yesu weic mbuo siev ninh nyei maengc. Mbuo yaac oix zuqc weic mbuo nyei gorx-youz siev maengc.
1John3:17 Haaix dauh kuh yiem kuh nyanc
1John3:18 Fu'jueiv aah! Maiv dungx kungx longc nzuih gorngv hnamv mienh hnangv
1John3:19 Hnangv naaic
1John3:20 Se gorngv mbuo nyei hnyouv dingc mbuo maaih zuiz
1John3:21 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Se gorngv mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv dingc mbuo maaih zuiz
1John3:22 Mbuo yaac hiuv duqv mbuo tengx ninh tov haaix nyungc
1John3:23 Tin-Hungh nyei lingc se mbuo oix zuqc sienx ninh nyei Dorn
1John3:24 Haaix dauh ei jienv Tin-Hungh nyei lingc zoux
1John4:1 Yie hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Mienh gorngv ninh mbuo maaih Singx Lingh
1John4:2 Naaiv haih bun meih mbuo zieqv duqv se Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh. Haaix dauh nyiemc Yesu Giduc njiec daaih benx dauh baamh mienh
1John4:3 Mv baac haaix dauh maiv nyiemc Yesu
1John4:4 Fu'jueiv aah! Meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yaac hingh jiex wuov deix zunh jaav leiz nyei mienh mi'aqv. Weic zuqc yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv wuov dauh se gauh henv jiex yiem baamh gen wuov dauh.
1John4:5 Wuov deix zunh jaav leiz nyei mienh guei baamh gen. Weic naaiv ninh mbuo kungx gorngv baamh gen nyei jauv-louc hnangv. Baamh mienh yaac muangx ninh mbuo.
1John4:6 Mbuo benx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh. Haaix dauh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh
1John4:7 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Mbuo oix zuqc laanh hnamv laanh weic zuqc hnamv mienh naaiv nyungc hnyouv se yiem Tin-Hungh daaih. Haaix dauh hnamv mienh
1John4:8 Haaix dauh maiv hnamv mienh
1John4:9 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor bun mbuo hiuv duqv ninh hnamv mienh. Ninh paaiv ninh nyei ndoqc Dorn njiec baamh gen
1John4:10 Hnamv nyei jauv se hnangv naaiv. Maiv zeiz mbuo hnamv Tin-Hungh. Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo ziouc paaiv ninh nyei Dorn daaih fiqv mbuo nyei zuiz.
1John4:11 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Tin-Hungh ndongc naaic hnamv mbuo
1John4:12 Maiv maaih haaix dauh buatc jiex Tin-Hungh. Se gorngv mbuo laanh hnamv laanh nor
1John4:13 Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei Singx Lingh mbuo
1John4:14 Yie mbuo buatc jiex yaac zoux zorng-zengx gorngv Zaangc Diex paaiv ninh nyei Dorn daaih zoux baamh mienh nyei Njoux Ziouv.
1John4:15 Haaix dauh nyiemc Yesu zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn
1John4:16 Hnangv naaic
1John4:17 Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo taux daauh taux mueiz
1John4:18 Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo
1John4:19 Mbuo hnamv Tin-Hungh yaac hnamv mienh weic zuqc Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo ndaangc.
1John4:20 Haaix dauh gorngv
1John4:21 Giduc bun naaiv diuh lingc mbuo
1John5:1 Haaix dauh sienx Yesu zoux Giduc
1John5:2 Mbuo hnangv naaiv nor hiuv duqv mbuo hnamv Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz
1John5:3 Mbuo hnamv Tin-Hungh se hnangv naaiv. Mbuo ei jienv ninh nyei lingc zoux. Ninh nyei lingc yaac maiv aqc duqv gan
1John5:4 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz dauh dauh hingh jiex baamh gen mi'aqv. Bun mbuo duqv hingh jiex baamh gen
1John5:5 Haaix dauh haih hingh jiex baamh gen? Se dongh sienx Yesu zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn wuov dauh hnangv.
1John5:6 Yesu Giduc daaih ninh maaih wuom caux nziaamv zoux jangx-hoc. Maiv daan maaih wuom hnangv
1John5:7 Hnangv naaic maaih buo nyungc zoux zorng-zengx.
1John5:8 Maaih Singx Lingh
1John5:9 Baamh mienh zoux zorng-zengx
1John5:10 Haaix dauh sienx Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn
1John5:11 Tin-Hungh zoux zorng-zengx se dongh naaiv. Tin-Hungh bun mbuo duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. Naaiv nyungc maengc se yiem ninh nyei Dorn daaih.
1John5:12 Haaix dauh maaih Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn
1John5:13 Yie fiev naaiv deix jauv-louc bun meih mbuo sienx Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn nyei mienh
1John5:14 Mbuo haih bungx laangc nyei yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien weic zuqc mbuo hiuv duqv mbuo ei jienv ninh nyei eix tov haaix nyungc
1John5:15 Se gorngv mbuo hiuv duqv maiv gunv mbuo tov haaix nyungc Tin-Hungh oix muangx mbuo nor
1John5:16 Haaix dauh buatc ninh nyei gorx-youz baamz zuiz mv baac zuiz maiv gaengh zic duqv bun mienh zuqc daic nor
1John5:17 Zoux dorngc nyei sic yietc zungv se zuiz aqv. Mv baac maiv zic duqv bun mienh daic nyei zuiz yaac maaih.
1John5:18 Mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz maiv maaih haaix dauh zanc-zanc baamz zuiz
1John5:19 Maiv gunv baamh gen yiem hiuang orqv wuov dauh nyei buoz-ndiev
1John5:20 Mbuo yaac hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn njiec daaih bun mbuo haih mengh baeqc
1John5:21 Fu'jueiv aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim beu jienv ganh
2John1:1 Yie
2John1:2 weic zuqc maaih zien leiz yiem mbuo nyei hnyouv yaac oix yietc liuz caux mbuo yiem.
2John1:3 Tov Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux ninh nyei Dorn
2John1:4 Yie za'gengh a'hneiv haic buatc maaih deix meih nyei fu'jueiv ei jienv Zaangc Diex bun mbuo nyei lingc gan longx zien leiz.
2John1:5 Domh dorc aah! Ih zanc yie kuinx meih mbuo oix zuqc laanh hnamv laanh. Naaiv maiv zeiz yie fiev siang-lingc bun meih mbuo. Naaiv diuh lingc yiem gorn mbuo m'daaih maaih jienv daaih aqv.
2John1:6 Hnamv Tin-Hungh caux hnamv mienh se hnangv naaiv. Mbuo oix zuqc ei jienv Tin-Hungh nyei lingc. Yiem gorn wuov zanc meih mbuo haiz jiex ninh nyei lingc se oix zuqc hnamv Tin-Hungh. Laanh yaac oix zuqc hnamv laanh.
2John1:7 Maaih nduov mienh nyei mienh camv nyei cuotv mingh youh lungh ndiev. Ninh mbuo maiv nyiemc Yesu Giduc njiec daaih benx dauh baamh mienh. Naaiv nyungc mienh se kungx nduov mienh hnangv yaac zoux Giduc nyei win-wangv.
2John1:8 Meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim
2John1:9 Haaix dauh guai mbiangx-nziaaux
2John1:10 Se gorngv haaix dauh daaih yaac maiv zunh naaiv deix njaaux nyei waac
2John1:11 Se gorngv haaix dauh caux ninh gorngv wuic buangh waac
2John1:12 Yie corc maaih camv nyei yie oix mbuox meih mbuo mv baac maiv oix longc zeiv longc matc fiev. Yie ganh oix mingh caux meih mbuo doix hmien gorngv weic bun mbuo lomh nzoih njien-youh taux daauh.
2John1:13 Meih nyei nziez
3John1:1 Yie
3John1:2 Hnamv nyei loz-gaeng aah! Yie tov Tin-Hungh bun meih zoux haaix nyungc yaac haengh wangc aengx bun meih wangc siangx
3John1:3 Yie a'hneiv haic maaih deix gorx-youz daaih naaiv mbuox yie
3John1:4 Maiv maaih haaix nyungc bun yie gauh njien-youh jiex naaiv aqv! Se yie haiz mienh gorngv yie nyei fu'jueiv zanc-zanc gan longx zien leiz.
3John1:5 Hnamv nyei loz-gaeng aac
3John1:6 Ninh mbuo yiem naaiv norm jiu-baang zoux zorng-zengx gorngv meih ndongc naaic hnamv ninh mbuo. Tov meih tengx ninh mbuo aengx haih cuotv jauv mingh puix duqv Tin-Hungh paaiv nyei mienh.
3John1:7 Ninh mbuo weic Giduc nyei Mengh cuotv mingh yaac maiv longc maiv sienx nyei mienh tengx haaix nyungc ninh mbuo.
3John1:8 Weic naaiv mbuo oix zuqc juang naaiv nyungc mienh
3John1:9 Yie fiev jiex fienx bun jiu-baang mv baac Ndi^o^de^fetv nzaeng zoux hlo
3John1:10 Hnangv naaic
3John1:11 Hnamv nyei loz-gaeng aac
3John1:12 Zuangx mienh ceng Nde^metv^li^atc zoux duqv longx. Zien leiz yaac tengx ninh zoux zorng-zengx. Yie mbuo yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux zorng-zengx ceng Nde^metv^li^atc zoux duqv longx. Meih yaac hiuv duqv yie mbuo gorngv nyei waac se zien nyei.
3John1:13 Yie aengx maaih waac camv nyei oix mbuox meih mv baac maiv oix longc batv longc matc fiev.
3John1:14 Yie hnamv daaih maiv lauh yie duqv buatc meih
3John1:15 Tov Tin-Hungh bun meih maaih baengh orn. Yiem naaiv nyei zuangx gorx-youz yaac jangx taux meih. Tov meih tengx mbuox yietc dauh yietc dauh yiem naaic nyei gorx-youz
Jude1:1 Yie
Jude1:2 Tov Tin-Hungh korv-lienh meih mbuo
Jude1:3 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
Jude1:4 Weic zuqc maaih deix mienh nimc bieqc meih mbuo mbu'ndongx
Jude1:5 Maiv gunv meih mbuo hiuv nzengc naaiv deix sic
Jude1:6 Aengx jangx jienv maaih wuov deix fin-mienh maiv longc ninh mbuo duqv daaih nyei buonc hatc maaz mv baac guangc ninh mbuo horpc zuqc yiem nyei dorngx. Ninh mbuo ziouc zuqc Tin-Hungh longc yietc liuz maiv haih waaic nyei limc ndoh jienv
Jude1:7 So^ndom caux Go^mo^laa caux weih gormx wuov deix zingh nyei mienh fih hnangv nyei. Ninh mbuo zoux maiv luonx horngc nyei sic
Jude1:8 Naaiv deix njaaux jaav leiz nyei fin-saeng yaac fih hnangv nyei. Naaiv deix mbeix mbeix nyei mienh ei ninh mbuo nyei mbeix baamz zuiz bun ganh nyei sin maaih uix
Jude1:9 Liemh wuov dauh domh fin-mienh bieiv
Jude1:10 Naaiv deix mienh maaih haaix nyungc ninh mbuo maiv mengh baeqc
Jude1:11 Naaiv deix mienh zungv oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Ninh mbuo ziux Kaa^in nyei jauv yangh. Weic douh nyaanh ninh mbuo sueih ganh zoux dorngc hnangv Mbaa^laa^am zoux wuov nor. Ninh mbuo yaac faanv hnyouv hnangv Kolaa nor
Jude1:12 Meih mbuo gapv zunv nyanc hnaangx weic jiu tong nyei ziangh hoc
Jude1:13 Ninh mbuo zoux nyaiv haic nyei sic cuotv daaih hnangv koiv jiez seix haic nyei wuom-laangc cuotv nyei mbiaauz nor. Ninh mbuo yaac hnangv youh lungh nyei hleix
Jude1:14 Aa^ndam nyei da'cietv doic zeiv-fun Enokv jaa-ndaangc douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac gorngv naaiv deix mienh. Ninh gorngv
Jude1:15 siemv maanc mienh nyei zuiz
Jude1:16 Naaiv deix mienh zanc-zanc ngopv
Jude1:17 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aah! Oix zuqc jangx jienv mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei gong-zoh zinh ndaangc gorngv nyei waac.
Jude1:18 Ninh mbuo mbuox meih mbuo
Jude1:19 Naaiv deix mienh nduov mienh bun nqoi zoux ziex guanh. Ninh mbuo maiv maaih Singx Lingh
Jude1:20 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac
Jude1:21 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc gunv ganh weic bun cing Tin-Hungh hnamv meih mbuo
Jude1:22 Oix zuqc korv-lienh hnyouv mbungh mbienv nyei mienh.
Jude1:23 Maaih deix oix zuqc hnangv yiem douz caangv cuotv daaih nor
Jude1:24 Mbuo oix zuqc ceng mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh. Kungx maaih naaiv nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh hnangv
Jude1:25 
Revelation1:1 Naaiv buonv sou fiev jienv gorngv Yesu Giduc laauc yaangh nyei sic
Revelation1:2 Yo^han yaac zoux zorng-zengx gorngv nzengc ninh buatc liuz nyei yietc zungv sic. Ninh gorngv nyei se Tin-Hungh nyei waac caux Yesu Giduc zoux nyei zorng-zengx.
Revelation1:3 Doqc naaiv buonv sou nyei mienh maaih orn-lorqc aqv. Muangx haiz naaiv deix douc daaih nyei waac yaac ei jienv zoux nyei mienh yaac maaih orn-lorqc
Revelation1:4 Yie
Revelation1:5 
Revelation1:6 yaac bun mbuo zoux ninh nyei guoqv nyei baeqc fingx yaac zoux sai mienh fu-sux ninh nyei die
Revelation1:7 Mangc maah! Ninh caux jienv mbuonx daaih. Dauh dauh nyei m'zing oix duqv buatc ninh
Revelation1:8 Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv
Revelation1:9 Yie
Revelation1:10 Yiem Ziouv nyei Hnoi
Revelation1:11 Yie haiz gorngv
Revelation1:12 Yie huin nzuonx mangc gaax haaix dauh caux yie gorngv waac
Revelation1:13 Yiem wuov deix jaax mbu'ndongx maaih dauh hnangv baamh mienh nor
Revelation1:14 Ninh nyei mba'biei mbopv baeqc
Revelation1:15 Ninh nyei zaux youc! youc wuov hnangv longc louh douz sinx daaih zien haic nyei dongh siqv nor. Qiex yaac hnangv wuom buangv mouh cuotv wuov nor mbui.
Revelation1:16 Ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz nanv jienv siec norm hleix. Yiem nzuih cuotv zung i maengx laic nyei nzuqc ndaauv. Ninh nyei hmien njang haic
Revelation1:17 Yie yietv buatc ninh
Revelation1:18 yaac zoux Ziangh Jienv Wuov Dauh. Yie daic mingh mv baac mangc gaax
Revelation1:19 “Meih oix zuqc fiev jienv meih buatc jiex nyei
Revelation1:20 Gorngv taux yiem yie nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz wuov deix siec norm hleix caux wuov deix siec norm don dang nyei jiem-jaax maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei eix leiz. Siec norm hleix se wuov deix siec norm jiu-baang nyei fin-mienh. Siec norm don dang nyei jaax se wuov deix siec norm jiu-baang.
Revelation2:1 “Meih oix zuqc fiev fienx bun E^fe^so jiu-baang nyei fin-mienh mbuox ninh
Revelation2:2 Yie hiuv duqv meih zoux nyei sic. Hiuv duqv meih zoux gong kouv haic yaac longc noic diev. Yie yaac hiuv duqv meih nyaangc maiv njiec mienh orqv mienh. Meih zungv seix jiex dongh ceng ganh zoux gong-zoh mv baac maiv zeiz. Meih yaac seix duqv cuotv ninh mbuo se jaav nyei.
Revelation2:3 Yie hiuv duqv meih maaih noic diev yaac weic yie nyei mbuox siouc kouv
Revelation2:4 ‘Mv baac yie maaih yietc diuc oix gorngv meih. Se meih ih zanc maiv hnamv yie hnangv daauh dangh wuov nor hnamv.
Revelation2:5 Hnamv mangc gaax
Revelation2:6 Mv baac meih maaih diuc longx nyei. Meih nzorng Ni^ko^lau wuov jauv mienh zoux nyei sic hnangv yie nzorng wuov nor.
Revelation2:7 ‘Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx Singx Lingh hnangv haaix nor mbuox zuangx jiu-baang. Haaix dauh duqv hingh jiex nor
Revelation2:8 “Meih oix zuqc fiev fienx bun Saa^me^naa jiu-baang nyei fin-mienh
Revelation2:9 yie hiuv duqv meih nyei kouv naanc yaac hiuv duqv meih jomc haic mv baac meih za'gengh butv zoih. Yie hiuv duqv meih zuqc siouc mienh gorngv doqc. Gorngv meih wuov deix se ceng ganh zoux Yiutai Mienh mv baac maiv zeiz. Ninh mbuo zoux Saadaan nyei wuic hnangv.
Revelation2:10 Maiv dungx gamh nziex meih maiv lauh oix zuqc siouc nyei kouv naanc. Mienv nyei hungh oix zorqv deix meih mbuo nyei mienh wuonx jienv loh seix meih mbuo. Meih mbuo ziouc siouc ziepc hnoi nyei kouv naanc. Mv baac oix zuqc sienx wuonv taux daic
Revelation2:11 ‘Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx Singx Lingh hnangv haaix nor mbuox zuangx jiu-baang. Haaix dauh duqv hingh
Revelation2:12 “Meih oix zuqc fiev fienx bun Be^gaa^mam jiu-baang nyei fin-mienh
Revelation2:13 yie hiuv duqv meih yiem nyei dorngx
Revelation2:14 ‘Mv baac maaih ziex diuc yie oix gorngv meih. Yiem naaic maaih deix mienh gan Mbaa^laa^am njaaux nyei leiz. Loz-hnoi Mbaa^laa^am njaaux Mbaalaakv dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh baamz zuiz
Revelation2:15 Yiem meih naaic yaac maaih deix gan Ni^ko^lau wuov jauv mienh njaaux nyei leiz.
Revelation2:16 Hnangv naaic
Revelation2:17 ‘Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx Singx Lingh hnangv haaix nor mbuox zuangx jiu-baang. Haaix dauh duqv hingh nor
Revelation2:18 “Meih oix zuqc fiev bun Ti^yaa^ti^laa jiu-baang nyei fin-mienh
Revelation2:19 Yie hiuv duqv meih zoux nyei jauv. Yie hiuv duqv meih hnamv yie
Revelation2:20 ‘Mv baac maaih yietc diuc yie oix gorngv meih. Meih sueih ceng ganh zoux douc waac mienh wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Revelation2:21 Yie bun ziangh hoc Ye^se^mben maaih qangx goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz mv baac ninh maiv kangv guangc ninh hienx nyei jauv.
Revelation2:22 Mangc maah! Yie oix zorqv ninh zong njiec coux butv baengc kouv. Se gorngv hienx ninh wuov deix yaac maiv goiv hnyouv guangc ninh mbuo hienx ninh nyei sic
Revelation2:23 Yie yaac oix daix nzengc Ye^se^mben nyei fu'jueiv. Hnangv naaic zuangx jiu-baang ziouc hiuv duqv yie zoux zaah mienh nyei hnyouv caux mienh hnamv nyei sic wuov dauh. Ei meih mbuo gorqv-mienh zoux nyei
Revelation2:24 Mv baac yiem Ti^yaa^ti^laa zengc njiec wuov deix
Revelation2:25 Mv baac meih maaih nyei oix zuqc goux longx zuov taux yie aengx daaih.
Revelation2:26 ‘Haaix dauh duqv hingh

Revelation4:1 Naaiv deix sic jiex liuz
Revelation4:2 Liemh zeih Singx Lingh daaih gunv jienv yie
Revelation4:3 Zueiz jienv weic wuov dauh nyei mou zeiv buatc hnangv maeng-luoqc caux siqv nyei la'bieiv-jaaix. Aengx maaih diuh jung hnangv la'bieiv-jaaix ndiemh maeng nyei
Revelation4:4 Wuov norm hungh weic maaih nyic ziepc feix norm weic weih gormx
Revelation4:5 Yiem hungh weic borngz mba'lingc cuotv njapc njapc nyei
Revelation4:6 Yiem weic nza'hmien yaac buatc hnangv longc gingx zoux daaih nyei koiv
Revelation4:7 Da'yietv dauh nangh nyei ga'naaiv buatc hnangv sienh nor. Da'nyeic dauh buatc hnangv ngongh gouv. Da'faam dauh maaih hmien hnangv baamh mienh nyei hmien. Da'feix dauh buatc hnangv ndaix jienv nyei domh jaangv nor.
Revelation4:8 Naaiv deix biei dauh nangh nyei ga'naaiv dauh dauh maaih juqv kuaaiv ndaatv. Yaac maaih m'zing buangv nzengc sin

Revelation4:11 “Yie mbuo nyei Ziouv
Revelation5:1 Yie buatc zueiz jienv hungh weic wuov dauh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz maaih njunc sou. Naaiv njunc sou i bung zungv fiev jienv nzaangc
Revelation5:2 Yie yaac buatc dauh henv haic nyei fin-mienh heuc qiex hlo nyei
Revelation5:3 Mv baac yiem tin-dorngh
Revelation5:4 Yie ziouc nyiemv duqv kouv haic
Revelation5:5 Wuov deix mienh gox maaih dauh mbuox yie
Revelation5:6 Yie ziouc buatc maaih dauh Ba'gi Yungh Dorn souv jienv hungh weic mbu'ndongx
Revelation5:7 Ba'gi Yungh Dorn ziouc mingh zorqv yiem zueiz weic wuov dauh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz wuov njunc sou daaih.

Revelation6:3 Ba'gi Yungh Dorn maeqv nqoi da'nyeic norm yienx wuov zanc
Revelation6:4 Aengx maaih dauh maaz cuotv daaih

Revelation6:12 Ba'gi Yungh Dorn maeqv nqoi da'luoqc norm yienx wuov zanc
Revelation6:13 Lungh zaangc nyei hleix yaac ndortv njiec ndau hnangv domh nziaaux buonc ngongh nyorx ndiangx maiv gaengh zuoqc nyei biouv ndortv wuov nor.

Revelation7:3 Ninh gorngv
Revelation7:4 Yie yaac haiz gorngv duqv nqaapv jienv yienx wuov deix mienh nyei soux mouc. Fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh yietc zungv maaih yietc sinx biei waanc biei cin dauh duqv nqaapv yienx.

Revelation8:1 Ba'gi Yungh Dorn maeqv nqoi da'cietv norm yienx wuov zanc
Revelation8:2 Yie ziouc buatc souv jienv Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh. Ninh mbuo yaac duqv zipv siec norm nzatc.
Revelation8:3 Aengx ganh maaih dauh fin-mienh bouh jienv jiem-hung-louh daaih souv jienv buov hung dieh. Ninh yaac duqv zipv hung camv nyei weic zorpc jienv Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh daux gaux nyei waac ziouc yiem hungh weic nza'hmien wuov norm buov hung nyei jiem-dieh buov.
Revelation8:4 Hung-sioux caux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh daux gaux nyei waac ziouc yiem fin-mienh nyei buoz faaux taux Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien.
Revelation8:5 Naaiv dauh fin-mienh aengx dorh hung-louh mingh zorqv ziec-dorngh nyei douz dapv buangv ziouc zoi njiec baamh gen. Liemh zeih borngz mba'ong paengz-paengz nyei
Revelation8:6 Wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh nanv jienv wuov deix siec norm nzatc mbenc ziangx biomv.
Revelation8:7 Da'yietv dauh fin-mienh yietv biomv nzatc
Revelation8:8 Da'nyeic dauh fin-mienh yietv biomv nzatc
Revelation8:9 Yiem koiv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv buo gouv nyei yietc gouv zuqc daic. Nzangv buo gouv nyei yietc gouv yaac zuqc mietc.
Revelation8:10 Da'faam dauh fin-mienh yietv biomv ninh nyei nzatc
Revelation8:11 Wuov norm hleix nyei mbuox heuc “Yangh Meuz.” Wuom buo gouv nyei yietc gouv ziouc im mi'aqv. Mienh camv nyei hopv zuqc wuov deix wuom ziouc daic mi'aqv

Revelation9:1 Da'hmz dauh fin-mienh yietv biomv ninh nyei nzatc
Revelation9:2 Wuov norm hleix koi nqoi kuotv ziouc maaih douz-sioux cutv-cutv nyei cuotv hnangv buov domh! douz cuotv sioux nor. Mba'hnoi caux lungh ziouc hmuangx mingh laaix kuotv cuotv nyei sioux om jienv.
Revelation9:3 Aengx maaih jopv-nyeic yiem douz-sioux cuotv daaih aengx njiec taux ndau. Jopv-nyeic duqv zipv qaqv hoic mienh hnangv ziepc nyeic ndaangh nyei qaqv nor.
Revelation9:4 Maaih waac hatc ninh mbuo maiv bun hoic miev fai haaix nyungc ga'naaiv-zuangx fai ndiangx. Kungx haih hoic maiv maaih Tin-Hungh nyei yienx nqaapv jienv biorngh wuov deix mienh hnangv.
Revelation9:5 Jopv-nyeic yaac maiv duqv hoic naaiv deix mienh daic
Revelation9:6 Wuov deix biaa hlaax nyieqc gu'nyuoz
Revelation9:7 Naaiv deix jopv-nyeic buatc hnangv zorng jienv mingh mborqv jaax nyei maaz nor. Ninh mbuo nyei m'nqorngv ndongx jienv ga'naaiv buatc hnangv jiem-ningv nor. Ninh mbuo nyei hmien yaac hnangv mienh nyei hmien
Revelation9:8 mba'biei hnangv m'sieqv dorn nyei mba'biei. Nyaah yaac hnangv sienh nyei nyaah nor.
Revelation9:9 Ninh mbuo nyei la'kuotv maaih nyungc ga'naaiv buang jienv hnangv hlieqv-jaapv nor. Ndaatv yaac mbui hnangv maaz-cie camv nyei tiux mingh mborqv jaax wuov nor mbui.
Revelation9:10 Ninh mbuo maaih dueiv hnangv ziepc nyeic ndaangh nyei dueiv nor
Revelation9:11 Aengx maaih dauh hungh gunv jienv ninh mbuo
Revelation9:12 Da'yietv nyungc zuqc kouv nyei sic jiex mi'aqv. Nqa'haav aengx maaih i nyungc zuqc kouv nyei sic oix cuotv.
Revelation9:13 Da'luoqc dauh fin-mienh yietv biomv ninh nyei nzatc
Revelation9:14 Naaiv nyungc qiex gorngv mbuox da'luoqc dauh fin-mienh
Revelation9:15 Naaiv deix biei dauh fin-mienh ziouc duqv bungx nqoi aqv. Ninh mbuo se liuc leiz ziangx liouh jienv taux naaiv norm ziangh hoc
Revelation9:16 Yie haiz gorngv geh maaz nyei baeng maaih mbu'ziex dauh. Yietc zungv maaih i waanc-waanc dauh.
Revelation9:17 Yiem naaiv deix hinc yaangh nyei sic yie buatc naaiv deix maaz caux geh maaz nyei baeng hnangv naaiv nor. Baeng nyei la'kuotv maaih hlieqv-jaapv siqv nyei hnangv douz nor
Revelation9:18 Nzuih baengx cuotv daaih nyei douz caux douz-sioux caux hungh zoux buo nyungc zeqc naanc bun baamh mienh zuqc daic buo gouv nyei yietc gouv.
Revelation9:19 Naaiv deix maaz nyei qaqv yiem maaz nyei nzuih baengx caux dueiv. Dueiv se hnangv naang nor
Revelation9:20 Zengc njiec nyei baamh mienh
Revelation9:21 Ninh mbuo maiv goiv hnyouv guangc daix mienh nyei sic
Revelation10:1 Yie aengx buatc dauh henv haic nyei fin-mienh yiem wuov lungh njiec daaih. Maaih dorv mbuonx beu jienv ninh hnangv domh lui-ndaauv nor. Ninh nyei m'nqorngv gu'nguaaic maaih diuh jung. Ninh nyei hmien hnangv mba'hnoi nor. Ninh nyei zaux yaac hnangv douz-ndiouh.
Revelation10:2 Ninh nyei buoz nanv jienv sou-njunc dorn
Revelation10:3 Ninh heuc qiex mbui hnangv sienh heuc nor
Revelation10:4 Siec norm mba'ong yietv mbui wuov zanc
Revelation10:5 Yie ziouc buatc caaiv jienv koiv
Revelation10:6 yaac ziangv jienv yietc liuz ziangh jienv taux maanc gouv maanc doic nyei Tin-Hungh
Revelation10:7 Taux da'cietv dauh fin-mienh biomv nzatc wuov zanc
Revelation10:8 Yie haiz zinh ndaangc yiem tin-dorngh gorngv waac wuov nyungc qiex aengx caux yie gorngv
Revelation10:9 Yie ziouc mingh taux fin-mienh tov ninh bun wuov njunc sou-dorn yie. Fin-mienh mbuox yie
Revelation10:10 Yie ziouc zorqv yiem fin-mienh nyei buoz sou-njunc dorn daaih nyanc. Yiem yie nyei nzuih haiz hnangv mueiz-dorngh nor gaam
Revelation10:11 Aengx maaih waac mbuox yie
Revelation11:1 Yie aengx duqv zipv diuh luoqc diqc guaengv
Revelation11:2 Mv baac yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ga'nyiec
Revelation11:3 Yie oix paaiv i dauh yie nyei zorng-zengx mienh zuqv jienv la'maah ndie-cou douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov deix yietc cin nyic baeqv luoqc ziepc hnoi gu'nyuoz.”
Revelation11:4 Naaiv deix i dauh zorng-zengx mienh se zoux souv jienv baamh gen nyei Ziouv nza'hmien wuov deix i diuh ga'lanv ndiangx caux i norm don dang nyei jaax.
Revelation11:5 Se gorngv maaih haaix dauh oix hoic ninh mbuo
Revelation11:6 Naaiv deix zorng-zengx mienh maaih lingc hatc jienv lungh yiem ninh mbuo douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv bun lungh duih mbiungc. Ninh mbuo yaac maaih lingc zoux bun wuom benx nziaamv
Revelation11:7 Ninh mbuo zoux liuz zorng-zengx
Revelation11:8 Ninh mbuo nyei sei ziouc zuqc guangc yiem domh zingh nyei jaai-horngc
Revelation11:9 Maaih mienh yiem maanc guoqv
Revelation11:10 Lungh ndiev maanc mienh njien-youh orn-lorqc weic zuqc naaiv deix i dauh daic mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo ziouc zoux jorm
Revelation11:11 Jiex liuz wuov deix buo hnoi aanx
Revelation11:12 Wuov deix i dauh douc waac mienh ziouc haiz qiex mbui nyei yiem wuov tin-dorngh mbuox ninh mbuo
Revelation11:13 Dongh wuov norm ziangh hoc ndau dongz duqv seix haic. Wuov norm zingh ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv ziouc mbaang
Revelation11:14 Da'nyeic nyungc zuqc kouv nyei sic jiex liuz aqv. Da'faam nyungc oix taux siepv aqv.
Revelation11:15 Da'cietv dauh fin-mienh biomv ninh nyei nzatc
Revelation11:16 Yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien zueiz jienv ninh mbuo nyei weic wuov deix nyic ziepc feix dauh mienh gox ziouc puoqv njiec ndau baaix Tin-Hungh.
Revelation11:17 Ninh mbuo gorngv
Revelation11:18 Maanc guoqv mienh qiex jiez haic
Revelation11:19 Wuov zanc yiem wuov tin-dorngh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ziouc koi nqoi mi'aqv. Yaac mangc duqv buatc Tin-Hungh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. Wuov zanc borngz mba'lingc njapc njapc nyei
Revelation12:1 Aengx maaih nyungc mbuoqc horngh nyei domh jangx-hoc yiem wuov lungh hinc cuotv daaih. Maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn
Revelation12:2 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn maaih jienv sin. Ndutv sin nyei ziangh hoc taux
Revelation12:3 Yiem wuov lungh aengx maaih nyungc jangx-hoc cuotv. Maaih diuh domh jung-hungh siqv
Revelation12:4 Jung-hungh nyei dueiv puotv yiem lungh nyei hleix buo gouv nyei yietc gouv ndortv njiec ndau. Ninh souv jienv wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei nza'hmien zuov gu'nguaaz yietv ndortv ndau ziouc oix nyanc gu'nguaaz.
Revelation12:5 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc yungz duqv dauh dorn
Revelation12:6 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc biaux mingh wuov deic-bung-huaang
Revelation12:7 Wuov zanc yiem wuov tin-dorngh maaih mborqv jaax nyei sic cuotv. Mi^kaa^en caux ninh nyei fin-mienh caux wuov diuh jung-hungh mborqv jaax. Jung-hungh caux ninh nyei fin-mienh mborqv jaax
Revelation12:8 mv baac zuqc suei mi'aqv. Tin-dorngh ziouc maiv maaih ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx aqv.
Revelation12:9 Naaiv diuh domh jung-hungh zuqc zoi njiec. Ninh se dongh loz-hnoi wuov diuh naang
Revelation12:10 Yie aengx haiz qiex mbui yiem wuov tin-dorngh gorngv
Revelation12:11 Mbuo nyei gorx-youz longc wuov dauh Ba'gi Yungh Dorn nyei nziaamv yaac longc ninh mbuo zoux zorng-zengx nyei waac hingh jiex gox ninh mbuo wuov dauh. Ninh mbuo maiv korv-fiqv ninh mbuo nyei maengc
Revelation12:12 Lungh caux meih mbuo yiem lungh nyei yietc zungv oix zuqc njien-youh orn-lorqc. Mv baac ndau caux koiv oix zuqc kouv aqv
Revelation12:13 Jung-hungh buatc ninh zuqc zoi njiec taux baamh gen mi'aqv. Ninh ziouc zunc yungz gu'nguaaz-dorn wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn.
Revelation12:14 Mv baac wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn duqv zipv i kuaaiv hlo haic nyei domh jaangv nyei ndaatv weic ndaix mingh deic-bung-huaang
Revelation12:15 Naang ziouc piuv wuom cuotv ninh nyei nzuih baengx
Revelation12:16 Mv baac ndau tengx wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn. Ndau ziouc morngx nqoi nzuih naqv nzengc yiem jung-hungh nyei nzuih baengx cuotv nyei wuom.
Revelation12:17 Jung-hungh qiex jiez! haic wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn
Revelation12:18 Naaiv diuh jung-hungh ziouc souv jienv koiv-hlen nyei saa-ziou ndau.
Revelation13:1 Yie ziouc buatc dauh hieh ga'naaiv yiem wuov koiv cuotv daaih. Wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv maaih siec norm m'nqorngv
Revelation13:2 Yie buatc nyei hieh ga'naaiv fangx zeiv hnangv nda'maauh mbeux
Revelation13:3 Hieh ga'naaiv nyei siec norm m'nqorngv maaih norm buatc hnangv zuqc jiex siang
Revelation13:4 Zuangx mienh baaix wuov diuh jung-hungh weic zuqc jung-hungh jiu ninh nyei lingc bun naaic dauh hieh ga'naaiv. Ninh mbuo yaac baaix hieh ga'naaiv ziouc gorngv
Revelation13:5 Wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv duqv zipv nzuih bungx waac-maux yaac gorngv ki Tin-Hungh. Ninh yaac duqv lingc sueih eix zoux feix ziepc nyeic hlaax nyieqc.
Revelation13:6 Hieh ga'naaiv ziouc nqoi nzuih gorngv doqc ki Tin-Hungh
Revelation13:7 Hieh ga'naaiv yaac duqv sueih eix caux Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx mborqv jaax yaac hingh jiex ninh mbuo. Ninh yaac duqv lingc gunv maanc guoqv
Revelation13:8 Lungh ndiev maanc mienh ziouc zaangc wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv
Revelation13:9 “Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx.
Revelation13:10 Haaix dauh maengc daaix zuqc zorqv wuonx loh
Revelation13:11 Yie aengx buatc dauh hieh ga'naaiv yiem ndau-ndiev cuotv daaih. Maaih i norm jorng hnangv ba'gi yungh dorn nyei jorng yaac gorngv waac hnangv jung-hungh nor.
Revelation13:12 Naaiv dauh hieh ga'naaiv duqv dorng jienv da'yietv dauh hieh ga'naaiv nyei nza'hmien longc nzengc da'yietv dauh nyei lingc. Ninh aapv baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei mienh baaix da'yietv dauh hieh ga'naaiv
Revelation13:13 Da'nyeic dauh hieh ga'naaiv zoux domh jangx-hoc
Revelation13:14 Ninh duqv yiem da'yietv dauh hieh ga'naaiv nyei nza'hmien zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc ziouc longc naaiv deix jangx-hoc nduov lungh ndiev mienh. Ninh yaac hatc zuangx mienh zeix norm fangx weic taaih zuqc nzuqc ndaauv hngaqv jiex siang nyei mv baac maiv daic wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv.
Revelation13:15 Da'nyeic dauh hieh ga'naaiv yaac duqv lingc haih biomv qiex bieqc da'yietv dauh hieh ga'naaiv nyei fangx. Fangx ziouc haih gorngv waac yaac haih bun yietc zungv maiv baaix ninh wuov deix mienh zuqc daix daic.
Revelation13:16 Ninh yaac aapv mienh
Revelation13:17 Hnangv naaic
Revelation13:18 Naaiv deix sic oix zuqc longc cong-mengh. Haaix dauh guai
Revelation14:1 Yie aengx mangc
Revelation14:2 Yie yaac haiz maaih qiex mbui yiem wuov lungh daaih hnangv wuom buangv mouh mbui
Revelation14:3 Ninh mbuo yiem hungh weic nyei nza'hmien
Revelation14:4 Naaiv deix m'jangc dorn maiv nitv jiex m'sieqv dorn
Revelation14:5 Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih maiv gorngv-baeqc. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv maaih dorngc nyei dorngx.
Revelation14:6 Yie aengx buatc ganh maaih dauh fin-mienh yiem ndaamv-lungh ndaix jienv mingh. Ninh yaac maaih yietc liuz yiem nyei kuv fienx zunh bun lungh ndiev maanc mienh
Revelation14:7 Naaiv dauh fin-mienh qiex hlo nyei zunh jienv gorngv
Revelation14:8 Aengx ganh maaih da'nyeic dauh fin-mienh gan jienv da'yietv dauh mingh yaac gorngv
Revelation14:9 Aengx ganh maaih da'faam dauh fin-mienh gan jienv wuov deix i dauh fin-mienh mingh
Revelation14:10 wuov dauh zungv oix zuqc hopv Tin-Hungh nouz zuiz nyei diuv. Naaiv diuv Tin-Hungh dox njiec nouz zuiz nyei zaanv yaac maiv peux haaix nyungc. Haaix dauh hnangv naaiv nor zoux zungv oix zuqc yiem cing-nzengc nyei fin-mienh caux wuov dauh Ba'gi Yungh Dorn nyei nza'hmien zuqc hungh nyei douz zeix.
Revelation14:11 Zeix ninh mbuo wuov guaax douz nyei sioux yietc liuz cutv-cutv nyei faaux taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Zaangc wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv caux hieh ga'naaiv nyei fangx
Revelation14:12 Hnangv naaic
Revelation14:13 Yie aengx haiz qiex yiem wuov lungh gorngv
Revelation14:14 Yie aengx mangc ziouc buatc dorv mbuonx baeqc nyei. Zueiz jienv mbuonx wuov dauh buatc hnangv dauh baamh mienh. Ninh ndongx jienv jiem-ningv
Revelation14:15 Aengx ganh maaih dauh fin-mienh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv cuotv daaih heuc qiex hlo nyei gorngv mbuox zueiz jienv mbuonx wuov dauh
Revelation14:16 Zueiz jienv mbuonx wuov dauh ziouc longc ninh nyei limh ngau gaatv. Yiem baamh gen oix zuqc siou nyei ga'naaiv ziouc gaatv nzengc mi'aqv.
Revelation14:17 Yie aengx buatc ganh maaih dauh fin-mienh yiem tin-dorngh
Revelation14:18 Aengx maaih dauh fin-mienh yiem ziec-dorngh daaih
Revelation14:19 Wuov dauh fin-mienh ziouc longc ninh nyei limh ngau gaatv baamh gen nyei a'ngunc biouv zoi bieqc nyueih a'ngunc biouv nyei domh zorngh
Revelation14:20 A'ngunc biouv yiem zingh ga'nyiec nyei zorngh zuqc nyueih
Revelation15:1 Yie aengx buatc yiem wuov lungh ganh maaih hlo haic
Revelation15:2 Yie aengx buatc hnangv longc gingx zorpc jienv douz nyei koiv nor. Yaac buatc hingh jiex hieh ga'naaiv caux hieh ga'naaiv nyei fangx caux ninh nyei mbuox nyei nzaangc wuov deix mienh. Ninh mbuo souv jienv koiv-hlen yaac nanv jienv Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei daanh baah
Revelation15:3 yaac baaux Tin-Hungh nyei bou
Revelation15:4 Ziouv aah! Maaih haaix dauh maiv taaih meih
Revelation15:5 Nqa'haav yie buatc yiem tin-dorngh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv koi nqoi
Revelation15:6 Dorh jienv siec nyungc zeqc naanc wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv cuotv daaih. Ninh mbuo zuqv jienv cing-nzengc nyei la'maah ndie lui-houx mbopv baeqc zaengh zaengh nyei. Yaac maaih jiem-kou kou jienv la'kuotv.
Revelation15:7 Wuov deix biei dauh nangh nyei ga'naaiv maaih dauh zorqv siec norm jiem-bunh bun wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh. Norm-norm jiem-bunh dapv buangv yietc liuz ziangh jienv taux maanc gouv maanc doic nyei Tin-Hungh nouz zuiz nyei sic.
Revelation15:8 Zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ziouc maaih sioux buangv nzengc
Revelation16:1 Yie aengx haiz qiex mbui yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv cuotv daaih mbuox wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh
Revelation16:2 Da'yietv dauh fin-mienh ziouc mingh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec baamh gen. Nqaapv jienv hieh ga'naaiv nyei yienx caux zaangc jiex ninh nyei fangx wuov deix mienh ziouc butv doqc haic nyei faang
Revelation16:3 Da'nyeic dauh fin-mienh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec koiv. Koiv nyei wuom ziouc benx nziaamv hnangv janx-daic nyei nziaamv nor. Yiem koiv maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv yietc zungv daic nzengc mi'aqv.
Revelation16:4 Da'faam dauh fin-mienh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec yietc zungv ndaaih caux wuom-zingv. Wuom ziouc benx nziaamv nzengc.
Revelation16:5 Yie yaac haiz gunv wuom wuov dauh fin-mienh gorngv
Revelation16:6 weic zuqc ninh mbuo zoux bun Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx caux douc waac mienh nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv
Revelation16:7 Yie aengx haiz maaih qiex yiem ziec-dorngh heuc jienv gorngv
Revelation16:8 Da'feix dauh fin-mienh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec mba'hnoi
Revelation16:9 Mienh zuqc nyutc douz buov
Revelation16:10 Da'hmz dauh fin-mienh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec hieh ga'naaiv nyei weic. Hieh ga'naaiv nyei guoqv ziouc hmuangx nzengc. Baamh mienh ngaatc jienv mbietc weic zuqc ninh mbuo mun duqv kouv haic.
Revelation16:11 Laaix ninh mbuo zuqc mun
Revelation16:12 Da'luoqc dauh fin-mienh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec Yu^fe^ditc Domh Ndaaih. Ndaaih ziouc nqaai mi'aqv
Revelation16:13 Yie aengx buatc buo dauh hieh guaiv mienv hnangv gaengv nor
Revelation16:14 Naaiv deix buo dauh se orqv haic nyei mienv yaac zoux duqv mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc. Ninh mbuo mingh lorz baamh gen nyei zuangx hungh
Revelation16:15 “Mangc maah! Yie oix hnangv janx-zaqc nor daaih. Haaix dauh ging jienv hnyouv yaac goux longx ninh nyei lui-houx
Revelation16:16 Wuov deix mienv ziouc dorh wuov deix hungh diex gapv zunv yiem norm dorngx. Naaiv norm dorngx Hipv^lu waac heuc Aa^laa^maa^getc^ndon.
Revelation16:17 Da'cietv dauh fin-mienh dox ninh nyei bunh njiec ndaamv-lungh
Revelation16:18 Gorngv liuz ziouc borngz mba'lingc njapc njapc nyei
Revelation16:19 Wuov norm domh zingh ziouc mbaaix benx buo gouv. Maanc guoqv nyei zingh yaac mbaang nzengc. Tin-Hungh jangx zuqc Mbaa^mbi^lon Domh Zingh ziouc bun zaanv diuv ninh hopv
Revelation16:20 Norm-norm koiv-nzou mouc dauh mouc mbiuic
Revelation16:21 Aengx maaih domh borqc yiem wuov lungh ndortv njiec mborqv mienh. Norm-norm borqc maaih feix ziepc gilo hniev. Mienh ziouc zioux Tin-Hungh laaix domh borqc nyei zeqc naanc ba'laqc kouv cung mingh.
Revelation17:1 Bouh jienv siec norm bunh wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh maaih dauh daaih mbuox yie
Revelation17:2 Lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex hienx ninh. Lungh ndiev mienh yaac hopv ninh hienx nqox nyei diuv nquin mingh.”
Revelation17:3 Singx Lingh gunv jienv yie
Revelation17:4 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn zuqv jienv nyei lui-houx se luoqc caux siqv-hongc. Ninh yaac longc jiem caux la'bieiv-jaaix caux zien-zou zorng sin. Buoz yaac nanv jienv jiem-bui. Bui gu'nyuoz zaangh buangv ninh hienx mienh zoux nyaiv haic
Revelation17:5 Yiem ninh nyei biorngh maaih norm mbuox maaih maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei eix leiz. Mbuox se “Mbaa^mbi^lon Domh Zingh
Revelation17:6 Yie yaac buatc wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn hnangv hopv diuv nquin nor
Revelation17:7 Fin-mienh naaic yie
Revelation17:8 Meih buatc wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv zinh ndaangc ziangh jienv nyei
Revelation17:9 “Naaiv deix sic se oix zuqc longc cong-mengh cingx hnamv duqv mengh baeqc. Wuov deix siec norm m'nqorngv se dongh wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn zueiz jienv wuov deix siec norm mbong.
Revelation17:10 Siec norm m'nqorngv yaac zoux siec dauh hungh diex. Biaa dauh jiex mi'aqv. Maaih dauh ih zanc zoux jienv hungh. Aengx maaih dauh maiv gaengh daaih. Mv baac ninh daaih
Revelation17:11 Zinh ndaangc yiem mv baac ih zanc maiv yiem wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv duqv zoux da'betv dauh hungh
Revelation17:12 “Meih buatc wuov deix ziepc norm jorng se dongh maiv gaengh faaux weic zoux hungh nyei ziepc dauh hungh diex. Ninh mbuo oix duqv zipv lingc caux wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv zoux hungh yietc norm ziangh hoc.
Revelation17:13 Naaiv deix ziepc dauh hungh diex dongh hnyouv gapv eix ziouc zorqv ninh mbuo nyei qaqv caux lingc jiu bun hieh ga'naaiv.
Revelation17:14 Ninh mbuo oix caux Ba'gi Yungh Dorn mborqv jaax mv baac Ba'gi Yungh Dorn oix mborqv hingh ninh mbuo
Revelation17:15 Fin-mienh aengx gorngv mbuox yie
Revelation17:16 Meih buatc wuov deix ziepc norm jorng caux wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv oix nzorng haic wuov dauh maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn. Ninh mbuo ziouc caangv nzengc ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv

Revelation17:18 “Meih buatc wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn se gunv lungh ndiev nyei zuangx hungh wuov norm domh zingh.”
Revelation18:1 Nqa'haav yie aengx buatc ganh dauh fin-mienh yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih. Ninh maaih hatc maaz hlo haic. Ninh nyei njang-laangc yaac ziux baamh gen njang.

Revelation18:5 weic zuqc ninh nyei zuiz ndui jienv mbaengc gu'nguaaic tin-dorngh aqv. Tin-Hungh yaac jangx duqv naaiv norm zingh zoux nyei waaic sic.
