Revelation19:1 Nqa'haav yie haiz yiem tin-dorngh maaih qiex mbui hnangv mienh camv! haic gapv zunv nyei qiex mbui nor. Ninh mbuo heuc jienv gorngv
Revelation19:2 Ninh dingc mienh nyei zuiz se dingc duqv zien nyei
Revelation19:3 Ninh mbuo aengx heuc nzunc gorngv
Revelation19:4 Wuov deix nyic ziepc feix dauh mienh gox caux wuov deix biei dauh nangh nyei ga'naaiv ziouc puoqv njiec baaix zueiz jienv hungh weic nyei Tin-Hungh
Revelation19:5 Aengx maaih qiex yiem hungh weic daaih gorngv
Revelation19:6 Yie aengx haiz qiex hnangv mienh camv! nyei gapv zunv nor
Revelation19:7 Mbuo oix zuqc njien-youh orn-lorqc
Revelation19:8 Tin-Hungh bun ninh zuqv cing-nzengc nyei
Revelation19:9 Wuov dauh fin-mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox yie
Revelation19:10 Yie ziouc puoqv njiec fin-mienh nyei zaux-hlen oix baaix ninh mv baac ninh gorngv
Revelation19:11 Jiex daaih yie buatc tin-dorngh nqoi
Revelation19:12 Ninh nyei m'zing hnangv douz-mbietc nor. M'nqorngv yaac ndongx jienv camv-norm ningv. Ninh yaac maaih norm mbuox fiev jienv ninh nyei sin. Cuotv liuz ninh ganh maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv duqv naaiv norm mbuox.
Revelation19:13 Ninh zuqv jienv ziemx jiex nziaamv nyei domh lui-ndaauv. Ninh nyei mbuox heuc
Revelation19:14 Tin-dorngh nyei zuangx baeng geh jienv maaz-baeqc
Revelation19:15 Yiem ninh nyei nzuih cuotv zung laic haic nyei nzuqc ndaauv. Ninh oix longc naaiv zung nzuqc ndaauv mborqv hingh maanc guoqv nyei mienh. Yaac oix longc hlieqv-biaav gunv ninh mbuo
Revelation19:16 Ninh nyei domh lui-ndaauv caux ninh nyei camh zuih fiev jienv mbuox gorngv
Revelation19:17 Yie aengx buatc dauh fin-mienh souv jienv mba'hnoi. Ninh heuc jienv mbui nyei gorngv mbuox ndaix ndaamv-lungh nyei yietc zungv norqc
Revelation19:18 Daaih nyanc hungh diex nyei orv
Revelation19:19 Yie aengx buatc wuov dauh hieh ga'naaiv caux baamh gen nyei zuangx hungh caux ninh mbuo nyei guanh guanh baeng gapv zunv daaih oix caux geh jienv maaz wuov dauh caux wuov dauh nyei baeng mborqv jaax.
Revelation19:20 Mv baac hieh ga'naaiv caux wuov dauh jaav douc waac mienh
Revelation19:21 Zengc njiec nyei mienh zuqc geh maaz wuov dauh nyei nzuih cuotv wuov zung nzuqc ndaauv hngaqv daic nzengc mi'aqv. Yietc zungv norqc daaih nyanc wuov deix orv beuv
Revelation20:1 Yie aengx buatc dauh fin-mienh yiem lungh njiec daaih. Buoz nanv jienv ndo haic wuov norm kuotv nyei forv-zeih caux diuh domh limc.
Revelation20:2 Ninh zorqv jung-hungh
Revelation20:3 Fin-mienh zorqv ninh zoi njiec ndo haic wuov norm kuotv
Revelation20:4 Yie aengx buatc ziex norm weic. Zueiz jienv weic wuov deix duqv lingc siemv zuiz. Yie yaac buatc weic tengx Yesu zoux zorng-zengx yaac zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz zuqc hngaqv jaang ndutv wuov deix mienh nyei wuonh. Ninh mbuo maiv zaangc jiex hieh ga'naaiv fai hieh ga'naaiv nyei fangx yaac maiv nqaapv hieh ga'naaiv nyei yienx yiem ninh mbuo nyei biorngh fai buoz. Ninh mbuo nangh daaih duqv caux Giduc zoux hungh gunv yietc cin hnyangx.
Revelation20:5 Naaiv se mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih nyei daauh baan. Zengc njiec wuov deix daic mingh nyei mienh zuov taux buangv wuov deix yietc cin hnyangx cingx daaih nangh.
Revelation20:6 Haaix dauh maaih buonc caux daauh baan nangh daaih nyei mienh
Revelation20:7 Buangv wuov deix yietc cin hnyangx
Revelation20:8 Ninh ziouc mingh nduov lungh ndiev biei bung maanc guoqv nyei mienh
Revelation20:9 Ninh mbuo mingh buangv lungh ndiev yaac weih jienv Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx nyei ciangv caux Tin-Hungh hnamv wuov norm zingh. Mv baac douz yiem wuov lungh njiec daaih buov mietc nzengc ninh mbuo.
Revelation20:10 Nduov ninh mbuo wuov dauh mienv nyei hungh zuqc zoi njiec zieqc jienv hungh nyei douz-koiv gu'nyuoz
Revelation20:11 Yie aengx buatc norm domh weic mbopv baeqc nyei
Revelation20:12 Yie aengx buatc daic mingh nyei mienh
Revelation20:13 Koiv ziouc fungx yietc zungv yiem koiv daic nyei mienh nzuonx. Daic nyei qaqv caux yiemh gen yaac fungx yiem ninh mbuo wuov deix mienh nzuonx. Gorqv-mienh ziouc ziux gorqv-mienh zoux nyei sic zuqc siemv aqv.
Revelation20:14 Daic nyei qaqv caux yiemh gen zuqc zoi njiec douz-koiv. (Naaiv douz-koiv se zuqc daic nyei da'nyeic nzunc.)
Revelation20:15 Se gorngv haaix dauh nyei mbuox maiv fiev jienv ziangh maengc daan
Revelation21:1 Yie aengx buatc siang-lungh siang-ndau weic zuqc loz-lungh loz-ndau jiex nzengc mi'aqv. Koiv yaac maiv maaih aqv.
Revelation21:2 Yie yaac buatc wuov norm Cing-Nzengc Zingh
Revelation21:3 Yie aengx haiz qiex hlo nyei yiem hungh weic daaih gorngv
Revelation21:4 Ninh oix sortv ninh mbuo nyei m'zing diemv-diemv wuom-mueic. Yangh naaiv jiex maiv maaih haaix dauh daic
Revelation21:5 Zueiz jienv hungh weic wuov dauh gorngv
Revelation21:6 Ninh aengx mbuox yie
Revelation21:7 Haaix dauh duqv hingh ziouc duqv naaiv deix benx ninh nzipc nyei buonc. Yie yaac oix zoux ninh nyei Tin-Hungh
Revelation21:8 Mv baac daamv faix wuov deix
Revelation21:9 Dongh bouh jienv siec norm bunh dapv buangv nqa'haav laai nyei siec nyungc zeqc naanc wuov deix siec dauh fin-mienh
Revelation21:10 Singx Lingh ziouc gunv jienv yie
Revelation21:11 Naaiv norm zingh maaih Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc buangv nzengc
Revelation21:12 Zingh nyei zingh laatc hlo haic
Revelation21:13 Biei bung zingh yietc bung maaih buo dauh laatc gaengh
Revelation21:14 Zingh laatc bangc ziepc nyeic kuaaiv la'bieiv zoux gorn-ndoqv ceix jiez
Revelation21:15 Caux yie gorngv waac wuov dauh fin-mienh nanv jienv jiem-biaav-ndorqc oix ndorqc naaiv norm zingh
Revelation21:16 Zingh nyei biei bung fih njietv fih ndaau. Fin-mienh longc ninh nyei biaav-ndorqc ndorqc zingh. Yietc zungv maaih i cin feix baeqv gilo ndaauv
Revelation21:17 Fin-mienh yaac ndorqc zingh laatc
Revelation21:18 Zingh laatc longc maeng-gox nyei la'bieiv-jaaix zoux daaih. Zingh gu'nyuoz longc zien jiem zoux daaih hnangv gingx nor nzang nyei.
Revelation21:19 Zingh nyei gorn-ndoqv wuov deix la'bieiv longc nyungc-nyungc la'bieiv-jaaix zorng. Da'yietv norm gorn-ndoqv nyei la'bieiv se maeng-gox nyei la'bieiv-jaaix. Da'nyeic norm se mbanv mbuov
Revelation21:20 da'hmz norm jieqv-baeqc
Revelation21:21 Ziepc nyeic dauh laatc gaengh longc ziepc nyeic norm jaaix nyei la'bieiv-zou
Revelation21:22 Yie maiv buatc zingh gu'nyuoz maaih zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv
Revelation21:23 Zingh maiv qiemx zuqc mba'hnoi caux hlaax ziux njang
Revelation21:24 Maanc guoqv nyei mienh oix bangc naaiv norm zingh nyei njang yangh jauv. Lungh ndiev maanc hungh yaac oix dorh ninh mbuo maaih nyei njang-laangc bieqc zingh.
Revelation21:25 Zingh gaengh ziangh hnoi koi nqoi
Revelation21:26 Maanc guoqv nyei mienh oix dorh ninh mbuo nyei njang-laangc caux mengh hoc bieqc naaiv norm zingh.
Revelation21:27 Mv baac haaix nyungc maiv cing-nzengc
Revelation22:1 Fin-mienh aengx bun yie mangc yungz maengc wuov diuh ndaaih
Revelation22:2 yaac liouc njiec gan zingh nyei domh jauv mbu'ndongx mingh. I bung ndaaih hlen yietc bung maaih zungh yungz maengc biouv nyei ndiangx. Yietc hnyangx ziangh ziepc nyeic torngx biouv
Revelation22:3 Yiem wuov norm zingh maiv maaih zuqc Tin-Hungh zioux nyei haaix nyungc. Tin-Hungh caux Ba'gi Yungh Dorn nyei weic oix yiem zingh gu'nyuoz. Tin-Hungh nyei bou mbuo yaac oix baaix ninh.
Revelation22:4 Ninh mbuo ziouc duqv buatc ninh nyei hmien
Revelation22:5 Yangh naaiv jiex maiv maaih lungh muonz zanc. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv qiemx zuqc longc dang fai mba'hnoi ziux njang
Revelation22:6 Wuov dauh fin-mienh aengx gorngv mbuox yie
Revelation22:7 Yesu gorngv
Revelation22:8 Yie
Revelation22:9 Mv baac ninh mbuox yie
Revelation22:10 Fin-mienh aengx mbuox yie
Revelation22:11 Haaix dauh zoux waaic sic
Revelation22:12 Yesu gorngv
Revelation22:13 Yie zoux An^faa yaac zoux O^me^gaa
Revelation22:14 “Nzox ganh nyei lui-houx cing-nzengc nyei mienh maaih orn-lorqc. Ninh mbuo maaih leiz nyanc yungz maengc ndiangx nyei biouv yaac duqv yangh laatc gaengh bieqc wuov norm zingh gu'nyuoz.
Revelation22:15 Mv baac yiem ga'nyiec ziqc zingh maaih zoux maiv benx nyei sic hnangv juv nor wuov deix
Revelation22:16 “Yie
Revelation22:17 Singx Lingh caux siang-mbuangz lomh nzoih gorngv
Revelation22:18 Yie
Revelation22:19 Se gorngv haaix dauh zorqv deix naaiv njunc sou zinh hoz nyei waac cuotv
Revelation22:20 Weic naaiv deix yietc zungv sic zoux zorng-zengx wuov dauh gorngv
